1Chronicles4:31 Bɛt-Markabote, Atsaar-Susim, Bɛt-Bireyi, ne Saarayim. Yaa tẽn-bãmb pʋs la bãmb zĩnd hal n tãag a Davɩɩd rĩungã wakate," 
Matthew1:1 A Abrahaam yageng a Davɩɩd yageng a Zeezi Kiris roog la a woto: 
Matthew1:2 A Abrahaam n dog a Izake, t'a Izak dog a Zakoobe, t'a Zakoob dog a Zʋʋda ne a ba-biisi," 
Matthew1:3 t'a Zʋʋda ne a pag a Tamaar dog a Farɛɛs ne a Zaara, t'a Farɛɛs dog a Ɛsrom, t'a Ɛsrom dog a Aram," 
Matthew1:4 t'a Aram dog a Aminadaabe, t'a Aminadaab dog a Naasõ, t'a Naasõ dog a Salmo," 
Matthew1:5 t'a Salmo ne a pag a Rahaab dog a Booze, t'a Booz ne a pag a Rut dog a Obɛɛde," 
Matthew1:6 t'a Obɛɛd dog a Izayi, t'a Izayi dog a Davɩɩde. Rĩm a Davɩɩd ne a Uuri pagã doga a Salmo," 
Matthew1:7 la a Salmo doga a Roboam, t'a Roboam dog a Abiya, t'a Abiya dog a Aaza," 
Matthew1:8 t'a Aaza dog a Zozafate, t'a Zozafat dog a Zoram, t'a Zoram dog a Oozɩyaase," 
Matthew1:9 t'a Oozɩyaas dog a Zoatam, t'a Zoatam dog a Akaaze, t'a Akaaz dog a Ezekɩyaas," 
Matthew1:10 t'a Ezekɩyaas dog a Manaase, t'a Manaase dog a Amo, t'a Amo dog a Zoziyaase," 
Matthew1:11 t'a Zoziyaas dog a Zekoniyaas ne a ba-biisi. Zemsa wakat ning b sẽn yõg Israyɛll nebã n kẽng Babilondã. 
Matthew1:12 Babilond yembdã zugẽ, a Zekoniyaas yaool n doga a Salatiyɛlle, t'a Salatiyɛll dog a Zorobabɛlle," 
Matthew1:13 t'a Zorobabɛll dog a Abiyuudi, t'a Abiyuud dog a Eliyakim," 
Matthew1:14 t'a Eliyakim dog a Azaoore, t'a Azaoor dog a Sadoke, t'a Sadok dog a Akim," 
Matthew1:15 t'a Akim dog a Eliyuudi, t'a Eliyuud dog a Eleyazaare, t'a Eleyazaar dog a Mata, t'a Mata dog a Zakoobe," 
Matthew1:16 t'a Zakoob dog a Zozɛf sẽn yaa a Maari sɩda. Yaa Maari ning sẽn dog a Zeezi b sẽn boond tɩ Kirisã. 
Matthew1:17 Woto, sẽn sɩng ne a Abrahaam tɩ ta a Davɩɩde, yaa zamaan piig la a naase. La sẽn sɩng ne a Davɩɩd tɩ ta b sẽn na n yõg Israyɛll nebã n kẽng Babilondã, yaa zamaan piig la a naase. La b sẽn yõg bãmb n kẽng Babilondã zugẽ tɩ ta a Kiris wakatã, yaa zamaan piig la a naase." 
Matthew1:18 Ad a Zeezi Kiris dogem sẽn yɩ to-to: B rag n dɩka bãmb ma a Maari n kõ a Zozɛfe, la sẽn deng b sẽn nan ka kẽ ne taaba, b mikame t'a Maari tʋtame, la yaa Sɩɩg-sõng n kɩt t'a yɩ a woto." 
Matthew1:19 La a sɩd a Zozɛf sẽn yaa nin-tɩrga, n ka rat n ning-a yãnd nebã nifẽ wã yĩnga, a tagsame n dat n soos n bas-a." 
Matthew1:20 Wakat ning a Zozɛf sẽn wa n tagsd a woto wã, Zu-soabã malɛɛk puka a meng ne yẽnda zãmsd pʋgẽ n yeele: Zozɛfe, a Davɩɩd yagenga, da zoe rabeem tɩ peeg f pag a Maari ye, bala pʋgã a sẽn tʋtã yita Sɩɩg-sõng nengẽ." 
Matthew1:21 Yẽnda na n doga bi-ribla, la fo na n pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Zeezi. Yaa yẽnda n na n yols b nebã ne yel-wẽnã." 
Matthew1:22 Bõn-kãens fãa maaname tɩ Zu-soabã sẽn dag n gom ne b no-rɛɛsã noorã paam pidsgu: 
Matthew1:23 Ade, pa-kuil na n dɩka pʋga, n dog bi-ribla, la b na n pʋda a yʋʋr tɩ Emanuwɛlle, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Wẽnd‑be‑ne‑do.›" 
Matthew1:24 A Zozɛf sẽn neke, a maana wa Zu-soabã malɛɛkã sẽn yeel yẽnda wã, la a peega a pagã." 
Matthew1:25 La yẽnda ka bãng-a hal t'a wa rog bi-ribla, t'a pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Zeezi." 
Matthew2:1 A Zeezi sẽn dog Betlehɛm Zʋʋde soolem tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, rĩm a Erood zamaanẽ, gese, yam dãmb yii yaang n wa Zeruzalɛm n soke:" 
Matthew2:2 Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã sẽn nan dogã bee yɛ? Bala, tõnd yãnda bãmb ãdg yaanga, la tõnd waame n na n waoog bãmba." 
Matthew2:3 Rĩm a Erood sẽn wʋm dẽnda, yẽnda ne Zeruzalɛm dãmbã fãa yɛɛsame." 
Matthew2:4 Erood tigma tẽngã maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã fãa ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã n sok-b Kiris sẽn dag n tog n dog tẽng ningã. 
Matthew2:5 Bãmb yeela yẽnda tɩ yaa Zʋʋde Betlehɛm, bala Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã dag n gʋlsame n yeel a woto:" 
Matthew2:6 «Foom Betlehɛm, Zʋʋda tẽnga, yaa vẽeneg tɩ fo ka poorẽ Zʋʋda tẽn-kãsemsã sʋk ye. Bala, naab n na n yi fo pʋgẽ n dɩlg Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã.»" 
Matthew2:7 Woto, Erood soosame n bool yam dãmbã n sok-b neere n bãng ãdgã sẽn puk wakat ninga." 
Matthew2:8 Yẽnda tʋma bãmb Betlehɛm n yeel-ba: Kẽng-y n tɩ bao-y n bãng-y biigã yell neere, la y sã n yãnd-a, bɩ y lebg n wa togs-ma, tɩ mam me tõe n kẽng n tɩ waoog-a." 
Matthew2:9 Bãmb sẽn kelg rĩmã goam n sɛ, b loogame. La haya, ãdg ning bãmb sẽn dag n yãnd yaangã lʋɩɩ bãmb taoore, la a sẽn ta zĩig ning bi-bilfã sẽn be wã, a yalsame." 
Matthew2:10 Bãmb sẽn yã ãdgã, b paama sũ-no-kãsenga." 
Matthew2:11 Bãmb kẽe roogẽ wã, la b yãnda biigã ne a ma a Maari, la bãmb wõgemdame n waoog biigã. Dẽ poore, bãmb logsa b kordo, n yãgs kũun n kõ Bãmba: yaa sãnem la wisdu, la miir sẽn tar yũ-noogo." 
Matthew2:12 La Wẽnnaam sẽn sagl bãmb zãmsd pʋgẽ tɩ b ra leb n tũ a Erood nengẽ, bãmb dɩka sor a to n kuili." 
Matthew2:13 Bãmb sẽn looge, Zu-soabã malɛɛk puka a meng ne a Zozɛf zãmsd pʋgẽ n yeel-a: Yik n dɩk biigã ne a ma n zoe n kẽng Ezɩpte. Zĩnd be hal tɩ mam leb n wa n gom ne foom. Bala, Erood na n baoo biigã, sẽn na yɩl n kʋ-a." 
Matthew2:14 A Zozɛf yikame n dɩk biigã ne a ma ne yʋngo n kẽng Ezɩpte. 
Matthew2:15 La yẽnda zĩnda be hal tɩ ta Erood kũum, tɩ bũmb ning Zu-soabã sẽn dag n gom ne b no-rɛɛsã noorã paam pidsgu. Bãmb yeelame: Mam boola m biigã t'a yi Ezɩpte." 
Matthew2:16 La Erood sẽn mik tɩ yam dãmbã belga yẽnda, a sũurã puuga hal wʋsgo, t'a tʋm neb Betlehɛm ne a tẽn-kɩremsã tɩ b tɩ kʋ kamb nins fãa sẽn zems yʋʋm a yiibu la sẽn ka ta woto me, sẽn zems yẽnda sẽn dag n sok yam dãmbã n bãng ãdgã sẽn puk wakat ningã wã." 
Matthew2:17 Woto, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn dag n togsã paama pidsgu. A yeelame:" 
Matthew2:18 Koɛɛg n zẽk Rama, yãbr la wiis-kãsemse. Yaa a Rasɛll n yãbd a kamba, la a ka sakd belsg ye, a kambã sẽn ka be wã yĩnga." 
Matthew2:19 La Erood kũumã zugẽ, Zu-soabã malɛɛk puka a meng ne a Zozɛf zãmsd pʋgẽ Ezɩpt tẽng n yeel-a:" 
Matthew2:20 Yik n dɩk biigã ne a ma n leb Israyɛll tẽnga, bala neb nins sẽn dag n baood biigã n na n kʋ wã kiime." 
Matthew2:21 La a Zozɛf yik n dɩka biigã ne a ma n leb Israyɛll tẽnga. 
Matthew2:22 La yẽnda sẽn wʋm t'a Arkelawuus reega a ba zĩig n dɩt naam Zʋʋde wã, yẽnda zoee rabeem n ka kẽng be ye. La Wẽnnaam sẽn sagl yẽnda zãmsd pʋgẽ yĩnga, a kẽnga Galɩle soolmẽ," 
Matthew2:23 la a tɩ zĩnda tẽng a ye pʋg sẽn boond tɩ Nazarɛte, tɩ bũmb ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn dag n togsã paam pidsgu. B yeelame: «B na n boola yẽnda tɩ Nazarɛt neda.»" 
Matthew3:1 Wakat kãnga, a Zãmbatiis waa n moonda koe-noog Zʋʋde we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ wã n yetẽ:" 
Matthew3:2 Tek-y yam n kos sugr tɩ arzãn soolem kolgame. 
Matthew3:3 Yaa a Zã yell la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi dag n gom n yeele: Ned a yembr koɛɛg n kelemd we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ n yetẽ: Maneg-y Zu-soabã sore, rems-y bãmb so-bugsã tɩ yɩ tɩrse." 
Matthew3:4 A Zã rag n yera fuug sẽn wʋg ne yʋgemd kõbdo, la a rag n sẽbga a sɛɛgã ne gãong sẽbdga. A rɩɩb rag n yaa sʋy la weoog sɩɩdo." 
Matthew3:5 Zeruzalɛm dãmbã ne Zʋʋde fãa nebã, la tẽms nins fãa sẽn pẽ Zʋrdẽ wã neb kẽnga yẽnda nengẽ." 
Matthew3:6 La bãmb vẽnegame n togs b yel-wẽna, tɩ yẽnda lis bãmb Zʋrdẽ koomã pʋgẽ." 
Matthew3:7 La a Zã sẽn yã Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne Saduusẽ-dãmbã wʋsg sẽn wat lisgã, a yeel-b lame yaa: Wag-toos buudu, ãnda n wilg yãmb y sẽn na maan to‑to n zoe n põs sũ-puugr sẽn watã?" 
Matthew3:8 Sã n yaa a woto, bɩ y wom biis sẽn zems neb sẽn tek yam n kos sugri," 
Matthew3:9 la y ra tags t'a Abrahaam sẽn yaa yãmb ba wã sekame ye. Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam tõe n dɩka kug-kãensã n kɩt tɩ b lebg a Abrahaam kamba." 
Matthew3:10 Lar zoe n bee tɩɩs yẽgẽ moasã. B na n kɛɛga tɩɩg ning fãa sẽn ka womd bi-sõamyã n lob bugmẽ. 
Matthew3:11 Mam yẽ lisda yãmb koomẽ yam tekr yĩnga, la sẽn pʋgend-a maam n watẽ wã yɩɩda maam, tɩ mam pʋs n pa zems tɩ logs bãmb neooda sẽbds ye. Bãmb na n lisa yãmb Sɩɩg-sõng pʋgẽ la bugum pʋgẽ." 
Matthew3:12 Bãmb zãada b kaorgo. Bãmb na n pɩɩsa b zɛɛga, n wʋk b ki n sui b baoorẽ, la b na n yõoga wudgã ne bugum sẽn ka kiida." 
Matthew3:13 A Zeezi yii Galɩle n wa a Zã nengẽ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgẽ wã t'a lis-ba. 
Matthew3:14 La a Zã zãgsame n yeele: Yaa maam n tog n wa yãmb nengẽ tɩ yãmb lis maam, tɩ yãmb wat mam nengẽ?" 
Matthew3:15 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda yaa: Bas tɩ yɩ a woto, bala, a zemsame tɩ tõnd pids bũmb nins fãa sẽn yaa tɩrse. La a Zã ka kɩɩs bãmb yɛs ye." 
Matthew3:16 A Zeezi sẽn paam lisg n sa, b yii koomẽ wã. La gese, yĩngr pakame, la bãmb yãnda Wẽnnaam Sɩɩg sẽn wẽnd wall t'a sigd bãmb zugu." 
Matthew3:17 La koɛɛg zĩnda saasẽ n yeele: «Ada yaa mam Bi-ribl-nongr sẽn ta mam yam zãnga.» 
Matthew4:1 Dẽ, Sɩɩg-sõng talla a Zeezi n kẽng we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ tɩ sʋtãanã na n mak bãmba." 
Matthew4:2 La bãmb sẽn loe noor rasem pis-naase, wĩndg ne yʋngo, kom yaool n yõka bãmba." 
Matthew4:3 Dẽ sʋtãanã kolgame n yeel bãmb yaa: Yãmb sã n yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, bɩ y kɩt tɩ kug-kãensã lebg buri." 
Matthew4:4 A Zeezi leokame: «A gʋlsame tɩ ninsaal ka na n vɩ ne rɩɩb bal ye, la yaa ne goam nins fãa sẽn yit Wẽnnaam noorẽ wã.»" 
Matthew4:5 Sʋtãanã talla bãmb n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, tẽn-sõngẽ wã, n zĩndg bãmb Wẽnd doogã zug n yeel-b yaa:" 
Matthew4:6 «Yãmb sã n yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, bɩ y yɩk n tiims tẽnga, bala, a gʋlsame tɩ bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b malegsã gũ yãmba, la b na n zãa yãmb ne b nusi, tɩ y naoor ra wa lak kugr ye.»" 
Matthew4:7 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «A gʋlsame me tɩ f ra mak Zu-soabã sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã ye.» 
Matthew4:8 Sʋtãana leb n talla bãmb n kẽng tãn-lug-lug zugu, n wilg bãmb dũniyã soolem toay-toayã fãa ne b ziirã n yeel bãmb yaa:" 
Matthew4:9 «Yãmb sã n wõgemd n waoog maam, mam na n kõo yãmb yõwã fãa.»" 
Matthew4:10 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: Kẽng n looge, Sʋtãanã! Bala, a gʋlsame tɩ f waoog Zu-soabã fo Wẽnnaam la f sak bãmb b yen bal tãa." 
Matthew4:11 Dẽ, sʋtãana basa a Zeezi, la malegs waame n sõng bãmba." 
Matthew4:12 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm tɩ b kẽesa a Zã bi-bees roogo, b loogame n kẽng Galɩle." 
Matthew4:13 Bãmb yii Nazarɛt n kẽng Kapɛrnaom sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã, Zabulõ ne Neftali soolmẽ wã," 
Matthew4:14 tɩ bũmb ningã Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sẽn dag n togsã paam pidsgu: 
Matthew4:15 Zabulõ tẽnga, Neftali tẽnga, sor sẽn dabd ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ n be Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, Galɩle, bu-zẽms sẽn vɩ a pʋgẽ," 
Matthew4:16 neb sẽn zĩ lik bida pʋgẽ wã yãnda vẽen-kãsenga, la vẽenem puka neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ kũum tẽngẽ la a maasmẽ wã yĩnga." 
Matthew4:17 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi sɩngame n moondẽ n yetẽ: «Tek-y yam n kos sugr tɩ arzãn soolem kolgame.»" 
Matthew4:18 A Zeezi sẽn kẽng Galɩle ko-kãsengã noore, b yãnda raop a yiib sẽn yaa ba-biisi, a Sɩmo b sẽn boond t'a Pɩyɛɛr ne a ba-biig a Ãndere, tɩ b lobd zĩm-gãmbr ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ. Bãmb dag n yaa zĩm-yõagdba." 
Matthew4:19 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Wa n tũ-y maam, tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ y lebg nin-baoodba.»" 
Matthew4:20 Tao-tao bala, bãmb basa zĩm-gãmba wã n tũ a Zeezi." 
Matthew4:21 Bãmb sẽn kẽng taoor bilfu, b leb n yãnda raop a yiib sẽn yaa ba-biisi, a Zebde kom-dibli a Zak ne a ba-biig a Zã tɩ b be koom koglgẽ ne b ba a Zebde n tõgd b zĩm-gãmba. La a Zeezi bool-b lame." 
Matthew4:22 Tao-tao bala, bãmb basa b koom-koglgã ne b ba wã n tũ a Zeezi." 
Matthew4:23 A Zeezi saaga Galɩle soolmã fãa n zãms nebã b karen-dotã pʋse, n moon Wẽnnaam soolem koe-noogã, n maag bãad-dãmba, la koms-rãmb buud fãa sẽn be nebã sʋka." 
Matthew4:24 Bãmb yʋʋr saaga Siiri soolem fãa, la b talla bãad-dãmba, ne neb nins fãa yĩns tood buud toay-toay sẽn namsdã, zĩn sẽn tar-b rãmba, la neb sẽn lʋɩt kisĩnkĩiri, la ki-boaga n wa bãmb nengẽ, la a Zeezi maaga bãmba." 
Matthew4:25 Neb kʋʋng yii Galɩle ne Dekapoll la Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋde la tẽms sẽn be Zʋrdẽ rʋʋndã n tũ bãmba. 
Matthew5:1 A Zeezi sẽn yã neb kʋʋngã, b rʋʋ tãng zug n zĩndi, la b karen-biisã kolga bãmba." 
Matthew5:2 Dẽ a Zeezi sɩngame n zãms bãmb n yeele: 
Matthew5:3 Bark bee sik-m-mens rãmbã zutu, bala arzãn soolem yaa bãmb dẽnda." 
Matthew5:4 Bark bee sũ-sãang rãmbã zutu, bala b na n paama belsgo." 
Matthew5:5 Bark bee sũ-maasem dãmbã zutu, bala b na n sooga dũniyã." 
Matthew5:6 Bark bee tɩrlem kom la a ko-yũud sẽn tar-b rãmbã zutu, bala b na n tɩgame." 
Matthew5:7 Bark bee nimbãan-zoɛtbã zutu, bala Wẽnnaam na n zoee bãmb me nimbãanega." 
Matthew5:8 Bark bee pʋ-peelem dãmbã zutu, bala bãmb na n yãnda Wẽnnaam." 
Matthew5:9 Bark bee zab-paasdbã zutu, bala b na n boola bãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam kamba." 
Matthew5:10 Bark bee neb nins b sẽn namsd‑b tɩrlmã yĩngã zutu, bala arzãn soolem yaa bãmb dẽnda." 
Matthew5:11 Bark bee yãmb zutu, nebã sã n gomd yãmb wẽnga, la b namsd yãmba la b sa n sãamd yãmb yʋʋr mam yĩnga." 
Matthew5:12 Maan-y sũ-noog n kɩdme, yãmb keoor sẽn na n yɩ kãseng arzãn pʋgẽ wã yĩnga. Bala, b rag n namsa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn deng yãmbã me a woto." 
Matthew5:13 Yãmb yaa dũniyã yamsem. La yamsem noosem sã n yi, ned na n yɩ a wãn t'a leb n lebg yamsem? A ka leb n tar yõod ye, a tɛk yaa b lob-a yɩng tɩ nebã tab-a ne nao." 
Matthew5:14 Yãmb yaa dũniyã vẽenem. Tẽng sẽn be tãng zug ka tõe n solg ye. 
Matthew5:15 Ned ka yõgend fɩtl n na n fõgen-a ne peoog ye. A na n dogl-a-la fɩtl doagendgã zug t'a kõt nebã fãa sẽn be roogã pʋgẽ wã vẽenem. 
Matthew5:16 Bɩ yãmb vẽenem yãg a woto me nebã sʋka, tɩ bãmb tõe n yãnd yãmb tʋʋm‑sõamyã la b waoog yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã." 
Matthew5:17 Da tags-y tɩ mam waame n na n sãam tõogã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã noy ye. Mam ka wa n na n sãam-b ye, la yaa tɩ pids-ba." 
Matthew5:18 Bala, mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ hal tɩ yĩngr la tẽng looge, ɩ ba a yembr la kargr ba a yembr sẽn be tõogã pʋgẽ kõn loog hal tɩ fãa paam pidsg ye." 
Matthew5:19 Dẽ yĩnga, tõ-kãensã sʋka, ned sã n kɩɩs tõog a yembr sẽn yaa-a bilf n yɩɩda, la a zãms nebã tɩ b maan a woto, b na n boola yẽnda tɩ yao-zʋʋg arzãn soolmẽ. La b na n boola ned ning sẽn sakd-bã, la sẽn zãmsd nebã tɩ b sak-bã tɩ nin-kãseng arzãn soolmẽ." 
Matthew5:20 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb tɩrlmã sã n ka yɩɩg tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã tɩrlem, yãmb kõn kẽ arzãn soolmẽ ye." 
Matthew5:21 Yãmb wʋmame tɩ b rag n yeela kʋdem-dãmbã tɩ b ra kʋ ye, la tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to, a zemsame tɩ bʋ-kaoodbã kao a bʋʋdo." 
Matthew5:22 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned sũur sã n yik ne a ba-biiga, a zemsame tɩ bʋ-kaoodbã kao yẽnda bʋʋdo. Ned sã n yeel a ba-biig t'a ka bark ye, a zemsame tɩ kaorengã yɛl bʋ-bʋʋdbã kao a bʋʋdo. La ned sã n yeel a ba-biig tɩ yalma, yẽnda soab zemsa bug-tẽnga." 
Matthew5:23 Woto yĩnga, fo sã n wa ne f kũun tẽn-kugrã taoore, n zĩnd be n tẽeg tɩ f ba-biig n tar yell ne foom," 
Matthew5:24 bɩ f bas f kũunã tẽn-kugrã taoore, n deng n kẽng n tɩ maneg f yellã ne f ba-biigã, n yaool n wa kõ f kũunã." 
Matthew5:25 Maneg f yell ne f zabd-n-taagã tao-tao, yãmb sẽn ket n be sor zug n dabda, tɩ yẽnda ra ning foom bʋ-bʋʋdã nugẽ, tɩ bʋ-bʋʋdã ning foom gũud nugẽ t'a kẽes foom bi-bees roog ye." 
Matthew5:26 Mam yeta foom sɩda, tɩ fo kõn yi be hal tɩ f yao-a a yaoolem lagf ye." 
Matthew5:27 Yãmb wʋmame tɩ b rag n yeelame tɩ b ra yo ye. 
Matthew5:28 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn get pag ne ratem wẽng zoe n maana yoob ne-a a sũurẽ. 
Matthew5:29 Fo rɩtg nifã sã n wat ne fo lʋɩɩs bɩ f feoog-a n lob yɩɩga, bala, fo yĩngã will a yembr sã n sãam n são b sẽn na n lob fo yĩngã tõr bug-tẽnga." 
Matthew5:30 La fo nug‑rɩtg sã n wat ne fo lʋɩɩs bɩ f fiuug-a n lob yɩɩga, bala, fo yĩngã will a yembr sã n sãam n são b sẽn na n lob fo yĩngã tõr bug-tẽnga." 
Matthew5:31 B rag n yeelame tɩ ned sã n bas a pag bɩ a kõ-a baosg sebre. 
Matthew5:32 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned sẽn basd a pag tɩ ka yoob yĩnga, a kɩtdame t'a kẽ yoobo. La ned ning fãa sẽn dɩkd pag b sẽn bas maanda yoobo." 
Matthew5:33 Yãmb leb n wʋmame tɩ b rag n yeela kʋdem dãmbã a woto: «Da wẽen tɩ yaool n ka sɩd ye, la fo sẽn pʋlem Zu-soabã ne bũmb ninsã, pids-ba.»" 
Matthew5:34 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ y ra wẽen lae-lae ye. Da wẽen-y ne arzãn ye, bala a yaa Wẽnnaam geere." 
Matthew5:35 Da wẽen-y ne tẽngã ye, bala a yaa bãmb nao roagendga. Da wẽen-y ne Zeruzalɛm ye, bala a yaa rĩm-kãseng tẽnga." 
Matthew5:36 Da wẽen ne f zug me ye, bala fo ka tõe tɩ f zoobg ba a yembr lebg pɛɛlg bɩ sablg ye." 
Matthew5:37 Bɩ yãmb n-yẽe yɩ n-yẽe, tɩ y ayo yɩ ayo. Sã n yɩɩd a woto, sẽn paasã yita wẽng soabã nengẽ." 
Matthew5:38 Yãmb wʋmame tɩ b rag n yeelame tɩ nif nif yĩnga, la yẽnd yẽnd yĩnga." 
Matthew5:39 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ y ra rok y sũur ne ned sẽn maand yãmb wẽng ye. Ned sã n wẽ fo rɩtg yɛgdgã pɛk bɩ f wẽnemd a to wã me n kɩs-a. 
Matthew5:40 Ned sã n dat n bool foom bʋʋd zĩigẽ n deeg f fu-bila, bɩ f kɩs-a fu-kãsengã me." 
Matthew5:41 Ned sã n modg foom tɩ f yãag-a nao-yakem tusr bɩ f yãag-a nao-yakem tus a yiibu. 
Matthew5:42 Ned sã n kos foom bũmb bɩ f kõ-a. La ned sã n dat n peng foom bũmb bɩ f ra mong-a ye. 
Matthew5:43 Yãmb dag n wʋmame tɩ b yeelame tɩ f nong f to la f kisg f bɛyã. 
Matthew5:44 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ y nong y bɛɛbã [la y ning neb nins sẽn kãabd yãmb wẽngã zut barka, la y maan neb nins sẽn kis yãmbã neere] la y pʋʋs neb nins sẽn maand yãmb wẽngã, la sẽn namsd yãmbã yĩnga," 
Matthew5:45 tɩ yãmb tõe n yɩ yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã kamba. Bala, bãmb kɩtdame tɩ bãmb wĩntoogã zẽkd nin-wẽnse, la nin-sõamyã yĩnga, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ saagã niid nin-tɩrse, la sẽn ka-b tɩrsã yĩnga." 
Matthew5:46 Yãmb sã n nong neb nins sẽn nong yãmbã bala, bõe keoor la yãmb na n paame? Yaood dɛɛgdbã me ka maand a woto sɩda?" 
Matthew5:47 La yãmb sã n pʋʋsd y ba-biisã bala, bõe la yãmb maand n yɩɩd y taabã? Neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã me ka maand a woto sɩda?" 
Matthew5:48 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ yãmb yɩ neb sẽn zems zãnga, a wa yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã sẽn zems zãngã." 
Matthew6:1 Gũus-y y mens n da tʋm tẽebã tʋʋm nebã nin gesg yĩng tɩ b tõe n yãnd yãmb ye. Y sã n maan a woto, yãmb kõn paam keoor yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã nengẽ ye." 
Matthew6:2 Woto yĩnga, fo sã n na n sõng naong rãmba, da kɩt tɩ b peeb baorg fo taoor wa zãmb dãmbã sẽn maand karen-dotẽ la soayã zut tɩ nebã tõe n waoog-bã ye. Mam yeta yãmb sɩd tɩ bãmb zoe n paamda b keoore." 
Matthew6:3 La fo sã n kõt naong rãmba, da sak tɩ f nug-goabg bãng f nug-rɩtgã sẽn maand bũmb ningã ye." 
Matthew6:4 Woto, fo kũunã na n yɩɩ soosgo, la fo ba sẽn yã tɩ fo soosame n kõ wã, bãmb na keo foom." 
Matthew6:5 Yãmb sã n pʋʋsdẽ, bɩ y ra maan wa zãmb dãmbã sẽn maandã ye: bãmb nong n yalsda yĩngri, karen-dotẽ la so-tiisẽ n pʋʋsdẽ, tɩ nebã tõe n yãnd bãmba. Mam yeta yãmb sɩd tɩ bãmb zoee n paamda b keoore." 
Matthew6:6 La fo sã n na n pʋʋse, kẽ f roogẽ n pag kʋɩlenga, n pʋʋs f ba sẽn be zĩig sẽn solge. La fo ba sẽn yã tɩ fo soosame n pʋʋse, bãmb na n keoo foom." 
Matthew6:7 Yãmb sã n pʋʋsdẽ, bɩ y ra gom n leb n gom gom-vɩɩd wa buud a taabã sẽn maandã ye. Bãmb tẽedame tɩ b goamã wʋsgã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam na n leoka bãmb pʋʋsgã." 
Matthew6:8 Da yɩ-y wa bãmb ye, bala sẽn deng yãmb sẽn na n kosã, yãmb ba wã zoe n mii bũmb nins yãmb sẽn datã." 
Matthew6:9 Woto yĩnga, ad yãmb sẽn tog n pʋʋs to-to: Tõnd ba sẽn be arzãna, bɩ yãmb yʋʋrã paam waoogre," 
Matthew6:10 tɩ yãmb soolmã wa, tɩ yãmb daab maan tẽng zug wa sẽn maand arzãnã." 
Matthew6:11 Kõ-y tõnd d daar woo daar dɩɩbã dũndã. 
Matthew6:12 Kõ-y tõnd sugr d beegr yĩnga, a wa tõnd me sẽn kõt d bɛɛgdbã sugrã." 
Matthew6:13 Da bas-y tõnd tɩ d kẽ makr pʋgẽ ye. Fãag-y tõnd wẽng soabã nugẽ, [tɩ yãmb n so soolem la pãnga la waoogre, wakat sẽn kõn sa. Ãmina!]" 
Matthew6:14 Yãmb sã n kõ nebã sugr b beegr yĩnga, yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã na n kõo yãmb me sugri." 
Matthew6:15 La yãmb sã n ka kõ nebã sugr b beegr yĩnga, yãmb ba kõn kõ yãmb me sugr y beegrã yĩng ye." 
Matthew6:16 Yãmb sã n loe noore, bɩ y ra gãnem y nens wa zãmb dãmbã sẽn gãnemd b nens tɩ wilg nebã tɩ bãmb loee noorã ye. Mam yeta yãmb sɩd tɩ bãmb zoe n paamda b keoore." 
Matthew6:17 La foom, fo sã n loe noor bɩ f sõog f zug kaam la f widg f nenga," 
Matthew6:18 tɩ fo no-loeerã ra yɩ nebã nin gesg yĩng ye, la a na n yɩ f ba sẽn be zĩig sẽn solgã yĩnga. La f baaba sẽn yã tɩ fo soosame n loe noorã, bãmb na keo foom." 
Matthew6:19 Da bĩng‑y paoong yãmb yĩng dũniyã zug ka tɩ mogd bɩ tẽngempiisim sãamd-b lame, la wagda kẽed n wʋkdame." 
Matthew6:20 Bĩng-y yãmb paoongã arzãna, tɩ mogd bɩ tẽngempiisim ka sãamd-a be ye, la wagda ka kẽed be n wʋk-a ye." 
Matthew6:21 Bala, fo paoong sẽn be zĩig ningã, fo sũur me na n zĩnda beenẽ." 
Matthew6:22 Nif yaa yĩng fɩtla. Fo nif sã n yaa sõama, fo yĩngã tõr na n pida ne vẽenem." 
Matthew6:23 La fo nif sã n ka sõama, fo yĩngã tõr na n yɩɩ lika. Dẽ yĩnga, vẽenem ning sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã sã n yaa lika, lik-kãng na n yɩɩ bida." 
Matthew6:24 Ned ba a yembr ka tõe n sak zu-soben-dãmb a yiib ye. Bala, a na n kisga a yembr la a nong a to wã, wala a loe a meng ne a yembr la a paoog a to wã. Yãmb ka tõe n sak Wẽnnaam la y sak arzegs me ye." 
Matthew6:25 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ y ra maan yɩɩr ne y vɩɩmã yelle, yãmb sẽn na n dɩ bũmb ninga, la y sẽn na n yũ bũmb ninga, wala y maan yɩɩr ne y yĩngã yelle, yãmb sẽn na n yeelg bũmb ningã ye. Vɩɩm ka yɩɩd dɩɩb la, bɩ yĩng ka yɩɩd futu?" 
Matthew6:26 Ges-y bõn-pɩgsã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã. Bãmb ka bʋta, b ka tigsda, b ka suiid baoẽ ye. La yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã rɩlgda bãmba. Yãmb ka yɩɩd bãmb wʋsg sɩda?" 
Matthew6:27 Yãmb ned a bõe n tõe n paas a vɩɩmã woglem kãntɩɩg a yembr tãa a sẽn maand yɩɩr yĩnga? 
Matthew6:28 La yaa bõe tɩ y na n maan yɩɩr ne fut yelle? Tags-y weoog rulg-lɛlem sẽn bɩt to-to wã yelle. Bãmb ka tʋmda, b ka wĩid lamd me ye." 
Matthew6:29 La baoosgo, mam yeta yãmb t'a Salmo mengã ne a sẽn dag n tar ziir to‑to wã fãa, ka tõog n yeelg a meng tɩ be neer n ta rulg lelemd a yembr ye." 
Matthew6:30 Yãmb tẽeb bilf rãmba! Sã n yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam nagsa mood ning sẽn be weoogẽ dũndã n na n dɩ bugum beoogã, woto, bãmb kõn ges yãmb fut yell n yɩɩd sɩda?" 
Matthew6:31 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ y da maan yɩɩr n sokd y mens y sẽn na n dɩ wall y sẽn na n yũ bũmb ninga, wall y sẽn na n yeelg bũmb ninga ye." 
Matthew6:32 Bala, yaa neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã n baood bõn-kãense. Yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã miime tɩ yãmb data bõn-kãense." 
Matthew6:33 Deng‑y n bao-y Wẽnnaam soolmã ne bãmb tɩrlmã, la b na n kõo yãmb bõn-kãens fãa n paase." 
Matthew6:34 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ y da maan yɩɩr ne beoog yell ye, bala, daar fãa yell sek-a lame." 
Matthew7:1 Da bʋ-y neb a taab bʋʋdo, tɩ b ra wa bʋ yãmb bʋʋd ye." 
Matthew7:2 Bala, yãmb sẽn bʋʋd nebã bʋʋd to-to wã, b na n bʋʋ yãmb me bʋʋd a woto. Yaa ne makdg ning yãmb sẽn tar n makdẽ wã la b na n mak n lebs yãmba." 
Matthew7:3 Yaa bõe tɩ fo ne moogã sẽn be f ba-biigã nifẽ n yaool n ka ne sug-raoogã sẽn be fo mengã nifẽ wã? 
Matthew7:4 Walla fo na n maana a wãn n yeel f ba-biig t'a bas tɩ f yãk moog sẽn be a nifẽ, tɩ sug-raoog yaool n be f rẽndẽ?" 
Matthew7:5 Zãmb soaba! Reng n yãk sug-raoogã sẽn be fo nifẽ wã n yaool n tõog n yãnd moogã sẽn be f ba-biigã nifẽ wã neer n yãke. 
Matthew7:6 Da rɩk-y bõn-sõama n kõ baas ye, la y da rɩk y kĩndi n lob kurkuy taoor tɩ b tõe n tab-b-la ne b nao la b wẽnemd n pogl yãmba." 
Matthew7:7 Kos-y tɩ b na n kõ-y lame. Bao-y tɩ y na n yãndame. Kabs-y tɩ b na n paka kʋɩlengã tɩ y kẽ. 
Matthew7:8 Bala, ned ning sẽn kot‑a na paame, ned ning sẽn baood‑a na n yãndame, la b na n paka kʋɩleng tɩ ned ning sẽn kabsd kẽ." 
Matthew7:9 Ãnda yãmb sʋkã biig n na n kos-a bur t'a kõ-a kugri? 
Matthew7:10 Wall a kos-a zĩnf t'a kõ-a waafo? 
Matthew7:11 Dẽ, yãmb sẽn yaa nin-wẽnsã sã n mi tɩ kõ y kambã bõn-sõama, ka Wẽnnaam n mi n yɩɩd n na n kõ neb nins sẽn kot bãmbã bõn-sõama sɩda?" 
Matthew7:12 Yãmb sẽn dat tɩ nebã maan yãmb bũmb ningã, bɩ yãmb me maan bõn-kãens me n kõ‑ba. Yõwã yaa Wẽnnaam tõogo la b no-rɛɛsdbã noore." 
Matthew7:13 Tũ-y zag-no-sẽkã n kẽ. Bala, zag-noor ning sẽn kẽesd sãoong zĩigẽ wã, ne sor ning sẽn dabd-a be wã yaa yalemse, la neb wʋsg n tũud be." 
Matthew7:14 La zag-noor ning sẽn kẽesd vɩɩm pʋgẽ wã yaa sẽka, tɩ sor ning sẽn dabd-a be wã yaa bãanega, la yaa neb bilf bal n yãt-a." 
Matthew7:15 Gũus-y yãmb mens ne zĩrẽ no‑rɛɛsdbã sẽn wat yãmb sʋk wa piis tɩ b pʋsẽ wã, b yaa digd-n-yĩid-toosã." 
Matthew7:16 Biis nins bãmb sẽn womdã n na n kɩt tɩ yãmb bãng-ba. Dẽ yĩnga yãmb kaooda sib kɛglg zugu, walla y wobd kankam gõpayãndg zugu?" 
Matthew7:17 Tɩ-sõng fãa womda bi-sõama, la tɩ-wẽng fãa womda bi-yoodo." 
Matthew7:18 Tɩ-sõng ka tõe n wom bi-yood ye, la tɩ-wẽng me ka tõe n wom bi-sõama ye." 
Matthew7:19 B kɛɛda tɩɩg ning fãa sẽn ka womd bi-sõama wã n tugund bugum. 
Matthew7:20 Dẽ, yaa ne biis nins bãmb sẽn womdã la yãmb na n bãng-ba." 
Matthew7:21 Ka ned ning fãa sẽn boond maam tɩ Zu-soaba! Zu-soaba! N na n kẽ arzãn soolmẽ ye. Yaa ned ning bal sẽn maand-a mam ba sẽn be arzãnã raab n na n kẽ. 
Matthew7:22 Badaare, neb wʋsg na n yeela maam yaa: Zu-soaba! Zu-soaba! Tõnd dag n ka togs bãngr goam ne yãmb yʋʋre, la d dig zĩn-dãmb ne yãmb yʋʋre, la d maan bõn-bãn wʋsg ne yãmb yʋʋr sɩda?" 
Matthew7:23 La mam na n yeel-b lame: «Mam zɩ n bãng yãmb lɛ-lɛ. Tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã, yi-y mam taoore.»" 
Matthew7:24 Woto yĩnga, ned ning fãa sẽn wʋmd goam nins mam sẽn yetã n tũudẽ, yẽnda na n yɩɩ wa yam soab sẽn me a roog kugr zugu." 
Matthew7:25 Saag niime, koom zoee wʋsgo, sobg fugame n wẽ roogã la a ka lʋɩ ye. Bala, b yẽbg‑a‑la pĩig zugu." 
Matthew7:26 La ned ning fãa sẽn wʋmd goam nins mam sẽn yetã n ka sakdẽ, yẽnda na n yɩɩ wa yalem sẽn me a roog bĩisr zugu." 
Matthew7:27 Saag niime, koom zoee wʋsgo, sobg fugame n wẽ roogã. A lʋɩɩme, la a sãoongã yɩɩ kãsenga." 
Matthew7:28 A Zeezi sẽn gom koe-kãens n sa, bãmb zãmsgã yɛɛsa nebã." 
Matthew7:29 Bala, bãmb zãmsa nebã wala ned sẽn tar noor ne a sẽn maandã, la a ka wa bãmb tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ye." 
Matthew8:1 A Zeezi sẽn sig tãngã, kʋʋn-kãseng tũu bãmba." 
Matthew8:2 La gese, yĩng-soab a yembr n wa n wõgemd bãmb taoor n yeele: «Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n data, yãmb tõe n kɩtame tɩ mam lebg yɩlemde.»" 
Matthew8:3 A Zeezi tẽega b nug n sɩɩs-a n yeele: Mam datame. Lebg yɩlemde. La tao-tao bala yĩn-gãong bãagã loog n bas-a lame t'a lebg yɩlemde. 
Matthew8:4 La a Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: Gũus f meng la f ra sak tɩ ned wʋm ye. Kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ tɩ b ges foom, la f kõ bũmb nins a Moyiis sẽn wilgã, t'a tõe n yɩ kaset b yĩnga." 
Matthew8:5 A Zeezi sẽn wa n kẽ Kapɛrnaom tẽnga, sodaas koabg naab a yembr n wa bãmb nengẽ n kos bãmb a woto:" 
Matthew8:6 «Zu-soaba, mam tʋmtʋmd n ki bogr n gãe yiri, la a namsda wʋsgo.»" 
Matthew8:7 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «M na n kẽngame n tɩ maag-a.» 
Matthew8:8 Sodaas koabg naabã leoka bãmb yaa: «Mam ka zems tɩ yãmb wa mam yir ye. Yãmb ye n gom bala, la mam tʋmtʋmdã na n paama laafɩ." 
Matthew8:9 Bala, neb n so maam, la mam me soo sodaase. Mam sã n yeel a yembr t'a kẽnge, a kẽngdame. La mam sã n yeel a to t'a wa, a watame. La mam sã n yeel m tʋmtʋmd t'a maan woto, a maandame.»" 
Matthew8:10 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm woto, a linga bãmba. La b yeela neb nins sẽn tũud bãmbã yaa: Mam yeta yãmb sɩd tɩ mam nan ka yãnd tẽ-kãseng a woto ye, baa Israyɛll sʋkã." 
Matthew8:11 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ neb n na n yi yaang la taoore, n zĩnd n dɩ ne a Abrahaam arzãn soolmẽ." 
Matthew8:12 La b na n loba soolmã kamb lik sẽn be yɩngã pʋgẽ, la yãbr ne yẽn wãbr na n zĩnda beenẽ." 
Matthew8:13 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela sodaas koabg naabã yaa: «Kuil tɩ na n yɩɩ wa fo sẽn tẽ wã bala.» La wakat-kãng bala tʋmtʋmdã paama maagre." 
Matthew8:14 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi kẽnga a Pɩyɛɛr yiri, la b mikame t'a reem-poakã gãee ne yĩn-wɩngre." 
Matthew8:15 La a Zeezi sɩɩsa a nugã, la a yĩn-wɩngrã sigame t'a yik n maan bãmb sãando." 
Matthew8:16 Zaabr sẽn ta, b talla neb wʋsg zĩn-dãmb sẽn tar n wa a Zeezi nengẽ. A Zeezi riga zĩn-dãmbã ne b noor goamã, la b maag neb nins fãa sẽn ka laafɩ wã." 
Matthew8:17 Yɩɩ a woto tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sẽn togsã paam pidsgu. A yeelame: Bãmb deega tõnd yĩns tõodo, la b zɩɩ tõnd bãase." 
Matthew8:18 A Zeezi sẽn yã neb kʋʋngã sẽn gũbg bãmbã, b yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b loog n kẽng ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde." 
Matthew8:19 La tõog karen-saamb a yembr kolgame n yeel a Zeezi yaa: Mam na n tũuda yãmb n kẽnd zĩig ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n kẽnge. 
Matthew8:20 La a Zeezi yeela yẽnda: Waas tara bogdo, tɩ liuuli sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã tar tʋgdo, la Ninsaal Bi-riblã ka tar zĩig n na n gãneg a zug ye." 
Matthew8:21 Ned a to zĩnda bãmb karen-biisã sʋk n yeel bãmba: Zu-soaba, bas-y tɩ m deng n kẽng n tɩ mum m ba la m wa." 
Matthew8:22 La a Zeezi leoka yẽnda yaa: Tũ maam, la f bas kũumã tɩ b mum b kũum." 
Matthew8:23 Bãmb kẽe koom-koglgã, la bãmb karen-biisã tũu bãmba." 
Matthew8:24 La tao-tao bala sob-kãseng yika ko-kãsengã zug hal tɩ ko-pɛm limd koom-koglgã. La a Zeezi da gõeeme. 
Matthew8:25 Bãmb karen-biisã wa n neka bãmb n yeele: Zu-soaba, fãag-y-do! Ad‑y tõnd na n kiime!" 
Matthew8:26 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Tẽeb bilf rãmba, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb zoet rabeem? La a Zeezi yikame n tãs sobdã ne ko-kãsengã, la zĩiga fãa lebga sɩddd..." 
Matthew8:27 Daopã yɛɛsame n yeele: Nin-kãngã yaa bõe ned tɩ baa sobdã ne ko-kãsengã sakd bãmba? 
Matthew8:28 Bãmb sẽn dʋʋg ko-kãsengã n ta Gadara nebã tẽngẽ, gãeems a yiib n yi yaadẽ n wa a Zeezi nengẽ. B yaa gãeen-zabds hal wʋsgo, tɩ ned ka saagd n pɩʋʋg zĩig ning b sẽn be wã ye." 
Matthew8:29 Bãmb kelmame n yeele: Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, yãmb waame n na n maan tõnd bõe? Yãmb waame n na n nams tõnd tɩ wakatã nan ka ta la?" 
Matthew8:30 Kurkuy wʋsg n dag n be hal yɩɩg n wãbdẽ. 
Matthew8:31 La zĩn-dãmbã bõosa a Zeezi n yeel tɩ b sã n dig bãmb tɩ b yi, bɩ b tʋm-b tɩ b tɩ kẽ kurkuyã." 
Matthew8:32 A Zeezi yeela zĩn-dãmbã tɩ b kẽnge. La b yiime n kẽ kurkuyã. Dẽ, kurkuyã zoeeme n yi ko-kãsengã noor sigdgã n bilim n lʋɩ koomã pʋga, la koomã rɩ-b lame." 
Matthew8:33 Kurkuyã gũudbã zoeeme n kẽng tẽngã pʋgẽ n tɩ togs bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã, la bũmb ning sẽn maan neb nins zĩn-dãmbã sẽn dag n tarã." 
Matthew8:34 La tẽngã rãmb fãa yiime n seg a Zeezi. La b sẽn yã a Zeezi, b kosa bãmb tɩ b loog la b bas-b b tẽnga." 
Matthew9:1 A Zeezi kẽe koom-koglg n leb n pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã n kuil b tẽngẽ. 
Matthew9:2 B talla rao a yembr sẽn ki bogre, n gãe a gãagẽ, n wa bãmb nengẽ. A Zeezi sẽn yã bãmb tẽebo, b yeela sẽn ki-a bogrã yaa: M biiga, keng f sũuri! Fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Matthew9:3 Gom-kãng yĩnga, tõog karen-saam-dãmb kẽer tagsa b sũyẽ tɩ rao-kãngã paoogda Wẽnnaam." 
Matthew9:4 La a Zeezi sẽn mi bãmb tagsgã yeela bãmba: Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tar tags‑wẽns y sũyã pʋse? 
Matthew9:5 Bʋg yeelg n yaa naana n yɩɩda: «Fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugr bɩ, bɩ yik n kẽne?»" 
Matthew9:6 La sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Yãmb bãng tɩ Ninsaal Bi‑riblã tara noor dũni ka tɩ kõ yel‑wẽnã sugrã, bãmb yeela Ki‑bogrã yaa: «Yik n dɩk f gãagã n kuili.»" 
Matthew9:7 Yẽnda yikame n kuil a yiri. 
Matthew9:8 La kʋʋngã sẽn yãnd woto, b yɛɛsame la b waooga Wẽnnaam b sẽn kõ ninsaalb pãng a woto wã yĩnga." 
Matthew9:9 A Zeezi sẽn yi be n kẽng taoore, b yãnda rao a yembr sẽn boond t'a Matye t'a zĩ yaood deegr zĩigẽ. Bãmb yeela yẽnda: «Wa tũ maam.» La yẽnda yikame n tũ bãmba." 
Matthew9:10 A Zeezi sẽn zĩ a Leevi roogẽ n dɩtẽ, yaood-dɛɛgdb ne yel-wẽn maandb waa wʋsgo, n zĩnd ne bãmb ne b karen-biisã n dɩtẽ." 
Matthew9:11 Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn yã rẽnda, b soka a Zeezi karen-biisã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb karen-saambã rɩt ne yaood-dɛɛgdb la yel-wẽn maandba?»" 
Matthew9:12 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm b sokrã yeela bãmb yaa: «Ka neb nins sẽn tar laafɩ wã n baood tɩp ye, yaa bãad-dãmba." 
Matthew9:13 Dẽ, kẽng n zãms-y koe-kãngã võore: «Mam sẽn dat yaa nimbãan-zoeere, ka maand ye.» Bala, mam ka wa tɩ bool nin-tɩrs ye, yaa yel-wẽn‑maandbã.»" 
Matthew9:14 Dẽ, a Zã karen-biisã waa a Zeezi nengẽ n sok bãmb woto: «Yaa bõe tɩ tõnd ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã loet noor tɩ yãmb karen-biisã yaool n ka loetẽ?»" 
Matthew9:15 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: Dẽ yĩnga pʋg-paal sɩd tũud-n-taas tõe n maana sũ-sãang wakat ning a sẽn ket n be bãmb sʋk bɩ? Day n wat tɩ b na n yiis pʋg-paalã sɩd n bas-ba. Dẽ bãmb na yaool n loe noore. 
Matthew9:16 Ned ka be sẽn na n dɩk peen-paalg n lisg fu-kʋdg ye. Bala, peen-paalgã na n yõbgame n kɩt tɩ fu-kʋdgã kẽeg n yɩɩg pĩnda." 
Matthew9:17 Ned ka be sẽn na n sui reezẽ rã-paalg ko-wao-kʋdẽ ye. Sã n ka rẽ, ko-waoosã na pusi, tɩ rãamã raage, la ko-waoosã na n yɩɩ bõne. B tog n suii reezẽ rã-paalg ko-wao-paals pʋse. Woto, rãamã ne ko‑waoosã fãa kõn sãam ye." 
Matthew9:18 A Zeezi sẽn ket n gomd ne bãmb a woto, naab a yembr waa n wõgemda bãmb taoor n yeele: Mam bi-pugl n ki moas-moasã. Wa-y n tik-y yẽnda ne y nugu, la a na n vʋʋgame." 
Matthew9:19 A Zeezi yika ne b karen-biisã n tũ yẽnda. 
Matthew9:20 La gese, pag a yembr bãag sẽn tar t'a zɩɩm daagd hal yʋʋm piig la a yiib waa a Zeezi poorẽ n sɩɩs bãmb fuugã noore." 
Matthew9:21 Bala, a yeela a sũurẽ: «Mam sã n tõog n sɩɩs bãmb fuugã bala, m na n paama laafɩ.»" 
Matthew9:22 A Zeezi sẽn wẽnemd n yãnd pagã, b yeel-a lame: «M biiga, keng f sũuri! Fo tẽeb n maag foom.» La pʋg-kãng paama maagr wakat-kãng bala." 
Matthew9:23 La a Zeezi sẽn ta naabã yir n yãnd wɩ-pɛɛbdbã ne neb kʋʋngã sẽn maand bʋrgã, bãmb yeel-b lame:" 
Matthew9:24 «Yi-y tɩ bi-puglã ka ki ye, a gõeeme.» La nebã yaala a Zeezi." 
Matthew9:25 La b sẽn yiis nebã n sɛ, a Zeezi kẽeme n gãd bi-puglã nugu, la a yikame." 
Matthew9:26 Bõn-kãng kibar saaga tẽngã fãa. 
Matthew9:27 A Zeezi sẽn yit zĩ-kãnga, zoens a yiib pʋgla bãmb n kelemdẽ n yetẽ: «Davɩɩd Bi-ribla, zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega!»" 
Matthew9:28 A Zeezi sẽn ta yiri, zoensã kolga bãmba, la a Zeezi sok-b lame: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ mam tõe n maana bõn-kãnga?» La b leokame: «N-yẽe Zu-soaba.»" 
Matthew9:29 Dẽ a Zeezi sɩɩsa zoensã ninã n yeele: Bɩ a yɩ ne yãmb a wa yãmb sẽn tẽedã. 
Matthew9:30 La b ninã pukame. La a Zeezi keooga bãmb neer n yeel-b tɩ b gũus tɩ ned da wa bãng yõwã ye. 
Matthew9:31 La bãmb sẽn looge, b moona a Zeezi yʋʋrã tẽn-kãng zĩigã fãa." 
Matthew9:32 La bãmb sẽn wa n loogdẽ wã, b talla muk zĩn sẽn tar n wa a Zeezi nengẽ." 
Matthew9:33 La a Zeezi sẽn dig zĩnã, mukã gomame. La neb kʋʋngã yɛɛsame n yeel tɩ ned nan ka yã bũmb a woto Israyɛll pʋgẽ ye." 
Matthew9:34 La Fariizẽ-dãmbã yeelame tɩ yaa ne zĩn-dãmbã naab pãng la a Zeezi digd zĩn-dãmbã. 
Matthew9:35 A Zeezi saaga tẽn-bɛd la tẽn-bãooneg fãa n zãms nebã b karen-dotẽ, la b moon Wẽnnaam soolem koe-noogã, la b maag bãad-dãmba la koms-rãmb buud toay‑toay fãa." 
Matthew9:36 A Zeezi sẽn yã neb kʋʋngã, b nimbãaneg yõka bãmba. Bala, nin-kãens da yɛɛme tɩ b nensã yeege, n yaa wa piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩm ye." 
Matthew9:37 Dẽ a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «Koodã sẽn dat tigsgã yaa wʋsgo, la tigsdbã sõor paoodame." 
Matthew9:38 Dẽ yĩnga, kos-y tigsgã soab tɩ b tʋm tʋmtʋmdb b pʋʋgẽ wã.»" 
Matthew10:1 La a Zeezi boola b karen-biis piig la a yiibã n kõ-b pãn-tõog tɩ b rig zĩn-dẽgdo, la b maag bãad-dãmb buud fãa la koms-rãmb buud fãa." 
Matthew10:2 Ad tẽn-tʋmdb piig la a yiibã yʋya: Dẽenem soab yaa a Sɩmo b sẽn boond t'a Pɩyɛɛr ne a ba-biig a Ãndere, la a Zebde bi-ribl a Zak ne a ba-biig a Zã," 
Matthew10:3 a Filip ne a Bartelemi, a Toma ne a Matye sẽn yaa yaood dɛɛgda, a Zak sẽn yaa a Alfe biigã ne a Tade," 
Matthew10:4 a Sɩmo b sẽn boond tɩ Zelot ne a Zʋdaas Iskaryo, soab ning sẽn zãmb a Zeezi wã." 
Matthew10:5 Yaa bãmb piig la a yiibã la a Zeezi tʋm yã, n yeel-b a woto: «Da kẽng-y bu-zẽmsã nengẽ ye, la y ra kẽ Samaari nebã tẽmsẽ ye." 
Matthew10:6 Bas-y be la y kẽng Israyɛll buudã sẽn yaa wa piis sẽn menemã nengẽ. 
Matthew10:7 Kẽnd-y la y moondẽ tɩ arzãn soolem kolgame. 
Matthew10:8 Maag-y bãad-dãmba, la y vʋʋg kũum, la y kɩt tɩ yĩn-gãong bãas sẽn tar‑b rãmbã lebg yɩlma, la y rig zĩn-dãmba. Yãmb deega zaalem, bɩ y kõ zaalem." 
Matthew10:9 Da zã-y sãnem bɩ wanzuri bɩ lagf y sɛɛg sẽbdsẽ ye," 
Matthew10:10 la y ra zɩ korg y so-toakã yĩng ye. Da rɩk-y fut a yiibu, la neooda, wall dasaar ye. Bala, tʋmtʋmd togd n paama a rɩɩbo." 
Matthew10:11 Yãmb sã n kẽ tẽngẽ, tɩ yaa tẽn-bedre, bɩ tẽn-bila, bɩ y bao n bãng ned sã n bee be n zems tɩ sik yãmb a yiri, la y zĩnd be hal tɩ ta y loogre." 
Matthew10:12 Y sã n wa kẽed zakẽ wã, bɩ y yeel tɩ laafɩ zĩnd ne zakã rãmba." 
Matthew10:13 La zag-kãng sã n zemsa ne laafɩ, bɩ yãmb laafɩ wã zĩnd ne a nebã. La a sã n ka zems ne laafɩ, bɩ yãmb laafɩ wã leb y nengẽ." 
Matthew10:14 La b sã n ka reeg yãmba, la b ka kelg yãmb goamã, bɩ y yi zag-kãnga, walla tẽn-kãng pʋga, la y pĩms‑y y naowã tom." 
Matthew10:15 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda tɩ bʋʋdã daare, Sodom ne Gomoor sɩbgrã toolem ka na n ta tẽn-kãng rẽndã ye." 
Matthew10:16 Ade, mam tʋmda yãmb wa piis digd-n-yĩids sʋka. Dẽ yĩnga, yɩ-y yam dãmb wa wiisi, la y yɩ neb sẽn ka tar yell ye, n yaa wa wala." 
Matthew10:17 Gũus-y y mens ne nebã, bala b na n yõga yãmb n kẽng bʋʋd zĩisẽ, la b na n pãba yãmb ne kalwaas b karen-dotã pʋse." 
Matthew10:18 B na n kẽnga ne yãmb Gʋvɛrneer dãmb ne rĩm-dãmb taoor mam yĩnga, tɩ tõe n yɩ kaset bãmb ne bu-zẽmsã yĩnga." 
Matthew10:19 La b sã n tall yãmb n kẽnge, bɩ y da maan yɩɩr ne yãmb sẽn na n gom to-to, wall y sẽn na n yet tɩ bũmb ning ye. Wakat-kãng bala, b na n wilga yãmb bũmb ning y sẽn na n gomã." 
Matthew10:20 Bala, ka yãmb n na n gom ye, yaa yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã Sɩɩgã sẽn be yãmb pʋsã n na n gome." 
Matthew10:21 Ned na n kɩtame tɩ b yõk a ba-biig n kʋ, la ba-rãmb me na n maana b kamb a woto. Kamb na n yika ne b ba-rãmb la b ma-rãmb n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ba." 
Matthew10:22 Neba fãa na n kisga yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, la ned ning sẽn na n yals-a kãenkãe tɩ wakat ta na paam fãagre." 
Matthew10:23 B sã n nams yãmb tẽn-kãngã, bɩ y zoe n kẽng tẽng a to. Mam yeta yãmb sɩda tɩ yãmb ka na n saag Israyɛll tẽmsã n sɛ tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã nan ka wa ye." 
Matthew10:24 Karen-biig ka yɩɩd a karen-saamb ye, la tʋmtʋmd ka yɩɩd a zu-soab ye." 
Matthew10:25 Karen-biig sã n yɩ wa a karen-saamba, tɩ tʋmtʋmd yɩ wa a zu-soaba, sekame. B sã n boola yirã soab tɩ Belzebulli, b kõn bool a yirã rãmb a woto n yɩɩd sɩda?" 
Matthew10:26 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ y ra zoe dabeem ye. Bala, bũmb ka be sẽn lud sẽn kõn puk ye, la sẽn solg neb sẽn kõn bãng ye." 
Matthew10:27 Togs-y bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel yãmb likẽ wã vẽenemẽ, la y rʋ rot zut n moon bũmb nins mam sẽn walem yãmb tʋbẽ wã." 
Matthew10:28 Ra zoe-y neb nins sẽn kʋʋd yĩngã n yaool n ka tõe n kʋ sɩɩgã ye. Zoe-y soab ning sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ yĩngã ne sɩɩgã sãam bug-tẽngã. 
Matthew10:29 B ka koosd yirs a yiib su a yembr sɩda? La baoosgo, a yembr bãmb sʋk ka lʋɩt tẽng tɩ ka tũ ne yãmb ba wã raab ye." 
Matthew10:30 La baa yãmb zugã zoobd fãa sõdame. 
Matthew10:31 Dẽ yĩnga, da zoe-y rabeem ye. Yãmb bee yõod n yɩɩd yirs wʋsgo." 
Matthew10:32 Ned sã n kɩs kaset nebã taoor t'a yaa mam neda, mam me na n kɩsa kaset m ba sẽn be arzãnã taoor tɩ yẽnda yaa mam neda." 
Matthew10:33 La ned sã n yeel nebã taoor t'a ka mi maam, mam me na n yeela m ba sẽn be arzãnã taoor tɩ m ka mi-a ye." 
Matthew10:34 Ra tags-y tɩ mam waame tɩ bãan na zĩnd tẽng zug ye. Mam ka wa ne bãan ye, la yaa ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Matthew10:35 Bala mam waame n na n kɩt tɩ welgr zĩnd rao ne a baaba sʋka, bi-pugl ne a ma sʋka, bi-pag ne a sɩd‑ma sʋka," 
Matthew10:36 la ned yir dãmb meng n na n yɩ a bɛɛba. 
Matthew10:37 Ned ning sẽn nong a ba bɩ a ma n yɩɩd maam ka zems tɩ yɩ mam dẽnd ye. La sẽn nong-a a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugl n yɩɩd maam ka zems tɩ yɩ mam dẽnd ye. 
Matthew10:38 Ned ning sẽn ka rɩkd a da-pɩk n pʋg maam ka zems tɩ yɩ mam dẽnd ye. 
Matthew10:39 Ned ning sẽn na n gɩbl a vɩɩm, na n kong-a lame. La ned ning sẽn na bas a vɩɩm, mam yĩng na n leb n paam-a lame." 
Matthew10:40 Ned sã n deeg yãmba, yaa maam la a reeg yã. La ned sã n deeg maam, yaa sẽn tʋm-a maamã la a reeg yã." 
Matthew10:41 Ned ning sẽn deegd‑a no-rɛɛs a sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs yĩnga, a na n deega, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs keoore. La ned ning sẽn deegd nin-tɩrga, a sẽn yaa nin-tɩrgã yĩnga, a na n deega nin-tɩrg keoore." 
Matthew10:42 Ned sã n kõ kom-bãooneg kãensã ned a yembr ko-maasg t'a yũ, a sẽn yaa mam karen-biig yĩnga, baa ya ne wũmbla, mam yeta yãmb sɩd t'a kõn kong a keoor ye." 
Matthew11:1 A Zeezi sẽn wilg bãmb karen-biisã piig la a yiibã b tʋʋmã n sɛ, b meng yii be n kẽng n tɩ zãms nebã la b moon koe-noogã b tẽmsã pʋse." 
Matthew11:2 A Zã zĩnda bi-bees roogẽ n wʋm tɩ b gomd a Zeezi tʋʋmã yelle. Dẽ, yẽnda tʋma a karen-biisã tɩ b tɩ sok a Zeezi yaa:" 
Matthew11:3 «Yãmb la sẽn tog n wa-a wã bɩ, bɩ d tog n gũ ned a to?»" 
Matthew11:4 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Kẽng-y n tɩ togs-y-yã a Zã bũmb nins yãmb sẽn wʋmd la y yãtã: 
Matthew11:5 zoens nin pugsdame, wobs kẽndame, yĩn-gãong bãas sẽn tar-b rãmbã yĩns lebgda yɩlma, wʋms wʋmdame, kũum vʋʋgdame, la koe-noogã moonda naong rãmb sʋka." 
Matthew11:6 Bark bee ned ninga mam sẽn kõn yɩ kug-lakdg a yĩngã zugu.» 
Matthew11:7 La a Zã karen-biisã sẽn looge, a Zeezi sɩngame n gom ne neb kʋʋngã a Zã yell n yeele: Bõe la yãmb kẽng n tɩ ges we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ wã? Tãnwĩig sobg sẽn miimda?" 
Matthew11:8 La yaa bõe la yãmb tɩ gese? Dao sẽn yeelg waoogr futu? Neb nins sẽn yer fu-bʋgs sẽn yaa neebã bee rĩm-dãmb zagsẽ. 
Matthew11:9 Dẽ, bõe la yãmb kẽng n tɩ gese? Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa? Mam yeta yãmb tɩ n-yẽe. La yaa ned sẽn yɩɩd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa." 
Matthew11:10 Bala, yaa rao-kãng yell la b sẽn dag n gʋls n yeel a woto wã:» «Ade, mam tʋmda m koe-toagsda, t'a reng fo taoore, n lʋɩ taoor n maneg f sorã.»" 
Matthew11:11 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ pagb sẽn dog b rãmbã sʋka, ned ka zĩnd sẽn yaa kãseng n yɩɩd a Zã ye. Baoosgo, soab ning sẽn yaa-a yao-zʋʋg arzãn soolmẽ wã yaa kãseng n yɩɩd yẽnda." 
Matthew11:12 Hal sẽn sɩng ne a Zã wakat tɩ ta moasã, yaa ne pãng la nebã kẽed arzãn soolmẽ. La yaa pãens rãmbã n tõogd n paamd-a." 
Matthew11:13 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã fãa ne tõogã togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam soolmã wɛɛngẽ hal tɩ ta a Zã wakate. 
Matthew11:14 La yãmb sã n na n sak n deege, yẽnda yaa Eli ning sẽn dag n tog n wa-a wã." 
Matthew11:15 Sẽn tar-a tʋb bɩ a wʋme. 
Matthew11:16 Mam na n mamsa zamaan-kãngã nebã ne ãnda rãmba? Bãmb wẽnda wa kamb sẽn zĩ raagẽ n boond taab n yetẽ: 
Matthew11:17 «Tõnd peeba wɩɩs la yãmb ka sao ye. Tõnd yɩɩla kʋʋr yɩɩl la yãmb ka wiis ye.» 
Matthew11:18 Bala, a Zã waame n ka rɩt la a ka yũud ye, tɩ b yet tɩ sɩ-wẽng n tar-a." 
Matthew11:19 Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn wa wã, b rɩtame la b yũuda, tɩ nebã yetẽ tɩ b yaa yão-be-neda, la rã-yũuda, la yaood-dɛɛgdb ne yel-wẽn maandbã zoa. La yam tʋʋm‑sõama n wilgd yam sẽn yaa a soaba." 
Matthew11:20 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi sɩngame n leng tẽms nins bãmb sẽn maan bõn-bãn wʋsg b pʋsẽ wã, bala, bãmb ka sak n na n tek yam n kos sugr ye." 
Matthew11:21 Bãmb yeelame: «Korazin, fo na paam toogo! Betsayɩɩda, fo na paam toogo! Bala, bõn-bãn nins sẽn maan yãmb pʋsẽ wã sã n dag n maanẽ Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ sẽn yaa tẽn-wẽnsã pʋse, bãmb dag n na n tekẽ‑la yam hal daar zãra, n pil bot n zĩnd tompeglmẽ n kos sugri." 
Matthew11:22 Yaa woto yĩng la mam yet yãmb tɩ bʋʋdã daare, Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ nebã sɩbgrã toolem kõn ta yãmb dẽndã ye." 
Matthew11:23 La foom, Kapɛrnaom, b na n zẽka foom hal tɩ f ta arzãna? Ayo, b na n sika foom hal tɩ ta kɩɩm-kulgu. Bala, bõn-bãn nins sẽn maan fo pʋgẽ wã sã n dag n maanẽ Sodom pʋgẽ, a rag n na ketẽ tɩ ta rũndã." 
Matthew11:24 Yaa woto yĩng la mam yet yãmb tɩ bʋʋdã daare, Sodom sɩbgrã toolem ka na n ta foom ye.»" 
Matthew11:25 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi gomame n yeele: M ba sẽn yaa arzãn la dũniyã Zu-soaba, mam pẽgda yãmba, yãmb sẽn solg bõn-kãens ne yam-dãmba, la ne yẽesem-dãmba, n yaool n vẽneg bõn‑kãens ne kom-bãoonegã yĩnga." 
Matthew11:26 N-yẽe! M ba, yãmb n dat tɩ yɩ a woto." 
Matthew11:27 M ba ninga bũmb fãa mam nugẽ, la ned ba a yembr ka mi Bi-riblã ye, sã n ka ba wã bala. La ned ba a yembr ka mi ba wã, sã n ka Bi-riblã bala, la Bi-riblã sẽn dat vẽneg ba wã ne ned ninga." 
Matthew11:28 Bɩ y wa mam nengẽ yãmb‑dãmb fãa sẽn yɛ, la sẽn tʋk zɩɩb sẽn yaa zɩsgo, la mam na n kõo yãmb vʋʋsgo." 
Matthew11:29 Rɩk-y mam yubl-balgr n pidi, la y sak mam zãmsgã. Bala, mam yaa nin-bʋgsgo, la m yaa sũ-mar soaba, la yãmb na paam vʋʋsgo." 
Matthew11:30 Bala, yubl-balgr ning mam sẽn pit yãmbã yaa faoogo, la zɩɩb ning mam sẽn tʋkd yãmbã yaa faasga." 
Matthew12:1 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi wa n pɩʋʋgda bɩle pʋt pʋsẽ n loogdẽ, la rag n yaa vʋʋsg daare. B karen‑biisã sɩngame n yãgds koodã n wãbdẽ, komã sẽn tar‑bã yĩnga." 
Matthew12:2 Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn yã woto, b yeela a Zeezi yaa: Ges-y-yã! Yãmb karen-biisã maanda bũmb sẽn ka zems tɩ maan vʋʋsg daar ye." 
Matthew12:3 La a Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: Yãmb ka karem bũmb ning a Davɩɩd sẽn maan wakat ning kom sẽn yõk yẽnda ne a tũud-n-taasã," 
Matthew12:4 a sẽn kẽ Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã to‑to, tɩ yẽnda ne a tũud‑n‑taasã dɩ bur ning sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam dẽndã tɩ yẽnda wall a tũud-n-taasã yaool n dag n ka zems tɩ rɩ, sã n ka maan-kʋʋdbã balã la?" 
Matthew12:5 Bɩ yãmb ka karem tõogã pʋgẽ tɩ vʋʋsg daare, maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn be wẽnd doogẽ wã kɩɩsda vʋʋsg daarã tõog tɩ ka beegr b yĩng la?" 
Matthew12:6 Mam yaool n yeta yãmb tɩ sẽn yɩɩd wẽnd doogã n be ka. 
Matthew12:7 Yãmb sã n dag n bãngẽ gomd ning sẽn yet-a tɩ: «mam data nimbãan-zoeer la ka maoongã võore, yãmb dag n ka na n ning neb sẽn ka tar yell taal ye." 
Matthew12:8 Bala, Ninsaal Bi-riblã yaa vʋʋsg daarã Zu‑soaba.»" 
Matthew12:9 A Zeezi yii be n kẽng b karen-doogẽ wã. 
Matthew12:10 La dao a yembr n dag n be be t'a nug ki. La b soka a Zeezi yaa: «Noor beeme tɩ maag bãad vʋʋsg daar bɩ?» La sok-kãng yaa sẽn na yɩl n paam bũmb n dõd a Zeezi. 
Matthew12:11 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Ãnda n be yãmb sʋkã sẽn na n tar a peosg a yembr tãa t'a lʋɩ bokẽ vʋʋsg daare, t'a ka tɩ tak-a n yiisi?" 
Matthew12:12 Ninsaal yõod sẽn yɩɩd peosg zĩig ka zãra? Dẽ, noor beeme tɩ maan neer vʋʋsg daare.»" 
Matthew12:13 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela raoã yaa: «Tẽeg f nugã.» La raoã tẽegame, la nugã vʋʋgame n lebg sõama wa nug a to wã." 
Matthew12:14 Fariizẽ-dãmbã yii yɩng n yẽs ne taab n bao b sẽn na n maan to-to n kʋ a Zeezi. 
Matthew12:15 La a Zeezi wʋmame n yi zĩ-kãnga. Neb wʋsg tũu bãmba, la b maaga b fãa." 
Matthew12:16 La a Zeezi tãsd‑b lame n yeel tɩ b ra sak n gom yẽnda yell ye. 
Matthew12:17 Tɩ bũmb ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sẽn yeelã paam pidsgu: 
Matthew12:18 «Ad mam tʋmtʋmd mam sẽn yãke, mam nin-nongr sẽn ta m yam. Mam na n ninga m Sɩɩgã yẽnda zugu, la yẽnda na n moona bu‑zẽmsã tɩrlem koɛɛga." 
Matthew12:19 Yẽnda kõn wẽ nokoeemde wall a zẽk a koɛɛg ye, la ned kõn wʋm yẽnda koɛɛg soay zut ye." 
Matthew12:20 Yẽnda kõn kaoog tãnwĩ-kaoong n baas ye, la yẽnda kõn kiis fɩtl laong sẽn ket n nusdẽ ye, hal t'a wa kɩt tɩ tɩrlem paam tõogre." 
Matthew12:21 La buud toay-toayã na n teega yẽnda yʋʋrã.» 
Matthew12:22 Dẽ, b talla ned sẽn yaa zoang la muka tɩ zĩn tar-a n wa a Zeezi nengẽ, la bãmb maag-a lame, tɩ yẽnda sẽn dag n yaa mukã, a gomdame la a yãtẽ." 
Matthew12:23 Neb kʋʋngã fãa yɛɛsame n yeele: Dao-kãngã ka na n yɩ a Davɩɩd biigã sɩda? 
Matthew12:24 La Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm woto, b yeelame: «Dao-kãngã ka rigd zĩn-dãmbã tɩ sã n ka ne zĩn-dãmbã naab a Belzebull pãng ye.»" 
Matthew12:25 La a Zeezi sẽn mi bãmb tagsgã yeel-b lame yaa: Soolem ning fãa neb sẽn welg n gõdg n zabd ne taaba, a na n wãame. La tẽng ning fãa bɩ yir ning fãa neb sẽn welg n gõdg n zabd ne taab kõn tõog n yals ye." 
Matthew12:26 Sã n yaa t'a Sʋtãan digda a Sʋtãana, a welgame n gõdg n zabd ne a menga. Dẽ, yẽnda soolem na n yɩɩ a wãn n yalse?" 
Matthew12:27 La mam sã n digda zĩn-dãmbã ne a Belzebull pãnga, yãmb kambã rigd-b-la ne ãnda pãnga? Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ bãmb mensã na n kao yãmb bʋʋdo." 
Matthew12:28 La sã n yaa ne Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã pãng la mam digd zĩn-dãmbã, dẽ, Wẽnnaam soolem taa yãmb sʋka." 
Matthew12:29 Bɩ ned na n yɩɩ a wãn n kẽ pãng soab roogẽ n wʋk a teedo, t'a ka reng n sẽb-a? A sã n sẽb-a, a na yaool n tõog n wʋk a roogã teedã." 
Matthew12:30 Ned ning sẽn ka be mam poorẽ kisa maam, la ned ning sẽn ka naagd maam n tigsdẽ, a sãeegdame." 
Matthew12:31 Yaa woto yĩng la mam yet yãmb tɩ ninsaalbã na n paama sugr b yel-wẽnã la b paoogrã buud fãa yĩnga. La ned ning sẽn paoog-a Sɩɩg-sõng kõn tol n paam sugr ye. 
Matthew12:32 Ned ning sẽn gom-a Ninsaal Bi-riblã wẽng na n paama sugri. La ned ning sẽn na n gom Sɩɩg-sõng wẽng kõn paam sugr dũni-kãnga pʋga, la dũni ning sẽn watã pʋg me ye." 
Matthew12:33 Kɩt-y tɩ tɩɩgã yɩ sõama la t'a biisã yɩ sõamã, wall y kɩt tɩ tɩɩgã yɩ yooko, t'a biisã me yɩ põaasa. Bala, yaa tɩɩg biisẽ la b bãngd a sã n yaa sõama, wall yooko." 
Matthew12:34 Yãmb wag-toos buudu, yãmb sẽn yaa nin-wẽns a woto wã, yãmb na n yɩɩ a wãn n tõog n gom gom-sõama? Bala, yaa bũmb nins sẽn pid sũurẽ wã n yit noorẽ wã." 
Matthew12:35 Nin-sõng yiisda bõn-sõamã a paoon-sõngã pʋgẽ. La nin-wẽng yiisda bõn-wẽns a paoon-wẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Matthew12:36 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ bʋʋdã kaoob daare, b na n soka ninsaalbã b gom-vɩɩd nins fãa b sẽn dag n gomã yelle." 
Matthew12:37 Bala, yaa ne fo noorã goam la f na n paam bʋʋm, la yaa ne fo noorã goam la f na n kong bʋʋm." 
Matthew12:38 Dẽ, tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã kẽer yeela a Zeezi yaa: Karen-saamba, tõnd datame tɩ yãmb maan bãnd tɩ d yãnde." 
Matthew12:39 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: Zamaan‑kãngã neb sẽn yaa nin-wẽns la yoaadbã kota bãnde, la b kõn kõ bãmb bãnd a to tɩ sã n ka Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zonaas bãndã ye." 
Matthew12:40 Bala, a wa a Zonaas sẽn zĩnd zĩm-bedrã pʋgẽ rasem a tãab la yʋnd a tãabã, woto me, Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n paa tãnd tẽngr dasem a tãab la yʋnd a tãabo." 
Matthew12:41 Bʋʋdã wakate, Niniiv nebã na n yika ne zamaan‑kãngã nebã, la b na n mong‑b‑la bʋʋm. Bala, Niniiv nebã teka yam n kos sugr a Zonaas koe-moonegã yĩnga. La ade, sẽn yɩɩd a Zonaas n be ka." 
Matthew12:42 Bʋʋdã wakate, rĩm-poakã sẽn yit wĩndg goabgã na n yika ne zamaan‑kãngã nebã, la a na n mong‑b‑la bʋʋm. Bala, yẽnda yii dũni satmẽ n wa n kelg a Salmo yam goamã. La ade, sẽn yɩɩd a Salmo n be ka." 
Matthew12:43 Zĩn-dẽgd sã n yi n bas neda, a saada zĩ-pɛɛlẽ n baood vʋʋsgo, la a ka yãt ye." 
Matthew12:44 Dẽ, a yetame: «Mam na n leba m doog ning m sẽn yi n basã pʋgẽ.» La a sã n ta, n mik tɩ roogã yaa vɩʋʋgo, n pɩɩs n maneg tɩ ya neere." 
Matthew12:45 A kẽngdame n tɩ peeg zĩn-dãmb a yopoe sẽn yaa wẽns n yɩɩd yẽnda mengã tɩ b wa kẽ n zĩnd be. La rao-kãng yaoolem toogã na n yɩɩ wẽng n yɩɩg pipi wã. A na n yɩɩ a woto me zamaan‑kãngã nin-wẽnsã yĩnga. 
Matthew12:46 La a Zeezi sẽn ket n gomd ne neb kʋʋngã wakate, b ma wã ne b ma-biisã dag n yasa yɩng n baood n na n gom ne bãmba." 
Matthew12:47 [Ned a yembr n yeel a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb ma wã ne y ma-biisã yasa yɩng n baood n na n gom ne yãmba.»] 
Matthew12:48 A Zeezi leoka sẽn gom-a ne bãmbã a woto: «Ãnda la mam ma, la ãnda rãmb la mam ma-biisi?»" 
Matthew12:49 La a Zeezi teesa b karen-biisã ne b nug n yeele: «Ad mam ma ne mam ma-biisi. 
Matthew12:50 Sɩda, ned ning fãa sẽn maand-a mam Ba sẽn be arzãnã raabo, yẽnda soab la mam ma-bi-raoogo, mam ma-bi-poaka la m ma.»" 
Matthew13:1 Badaare, a Zeezi yii roogẽ wã n tɩ zĩnd ko-kãsengã noore." 
Matthew13:2 Neb kʋʋng wʋsg tigma taab bãmb nengẽ tɩ yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ bãmb kẽ koom koglgẽ n zĩndi. Neb kʋʋngã fãa rag n yasa kʋɩl-koakẽ wã. 
Matthew13:3 A Zeezi goma ne bãmb bũmb wʋsg yell ne yel-bũn n yeele: Ka-koaad n yi n na n fẽrg bõn-buudu. 
Matthew13:4 La yẽnda sẽn fẽrgdã, bõn-buud kẽer lʋɩɩ sorã kɩrenga, la liuuli waa n dɩ-b lame." 
Matthew13:5 La kẽer lʋɩɩ kug zĩigẽ, tomã sẽn ka waoogẽ. La tao-tao bala b yiime, tomã sẽn ka waoogã yĩnga." 
Matthew13:6 La wĩndgã sẽn zẽke, a yõog-b lame tɩ b kʋɩ, b sẽn ka tar yẽgnã yĩnga." 
Matthew13:7 Kẽer lʋɩɩ gõos sʋka, la gõosã yikame n wulumd-b n dɩ-ba." 
Matthew13:8 La kẽer lʋɩɩ zĩ-sõngẽ, la b woma biisi. Kẽer womame tɩ ta koabg-koabga, kẽer pis-yoob‑yoobe, la kẽer pis-tã‑tã." 
Matthew13:9 Sẽn tar-a tʋb bɩ a wʋme. 
Matthew13:10 Karen-biisã kolg n soka a Zeezi tɩ yaa bõe tɩ bãmb gomd ne nebã ne yel-bũna? 
Matthew13:11 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: B kõo yãmb tɩ tõe n bãng arzãn soolmã yel-soalem võore, la b ka kõ bãmb ye." 
Matthew13:12 Bala, ned ninga sẽn tar-a, b na n kõo yẽnda n paas t'a paam wʋsgo. La ned ning sẽn ka tar-a, b na n deega baa bũmb bilf ning yẽnda sẽn tarã." 
Matthew13:13 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam wẽed yel-bũn ne bãmba: Bala, bãmb getame, la b ka ne ye, bãmb kelgdame, la b ka wʋmd ye, la b ka wʋmd võor me ye." 
Matthew13:14 La Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi bãngr-goamã paama pidsg bãmb yĩnga. A yeelame: «Yãmb na n wʋma sõama, la y kõn bãng a võor ye, yãmb na n gesa neere, la y kõn yã ye." 
Matthew13:15 Bala, nin-kãensã sũyã riglmame. Bãmb yẽda b tʋba la b mum b nini, tɩ b nin da yã la b tʋb ra wʋme, tɩ bãmb yamã kõn wʋm a võore, tɩ b kõn lebg n wa tɩ mam maag-b ye." 
Matthew13:16 La yãmba, bark bee yãmb zutu, y ninã sẽn yãtã, la y tʋbã sẽn wʋmdã yĩnga." 
Matthew13:17 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb la nin-tɩrs wʋsg dag n dat n yãnda bũmb nins yãmb sẽn yãtã la b ka yã ye. B rag n dat n wʋma bũmb nins yãmb sẽn wʋmdã la b ka wʋm ye." 
Matthew13:18 Dẽ, kelg-y bõn-bu-fẽrgdã yel-bũndã võore." 
Matthew13:19 Ned sã n kelg Wẽnnaam soolem koɛɛgã n ka wʋm a võore, wẽng soabã wat n yiisa bõn-buudã sẽn dag n fẽrg yẽnda sũurẽ wã. Yẽnda wẽnda bõn-buudã sẽn lʋɩ sorã kɩrengã." 
Matthew13:20 Bõn-buudã sẽn lʋɩ kugã zĩigẽ wã yaa ned ning sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã n deeg-a tao-tao ne sũ-noogo," 
Matthew13:21 la a yaool n ka tar a meng yẽgen ye. Yẽnda kaoosda wakat bilf bala, la yel-pakr bɩ namsg sã n yaool n paam-a Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã yĩnga, yẽnda lʋɩtame." 
Matthew13:22 Bõn-buudã sẽn lʋɩ gõosã sʋkã yaa ned ning sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã, tɩ dũniyã yɩɩre la arzegs belgr wulumd koɛɛgã t'a ka womd biis ye." 
Matthew13:23 Bõn-buudã sẽn lʋɩ zĩ-sõngẽ wã yaa ned ning sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã n wʋmd a võore. Yẽnda womda biisi. Kẽer womame tɩ ta koabg-koabga, kẽer pis-yoob‑yoobe, kẽer pis-tã‑tã.»" 
Matthew13:24 A Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd a to n yeele: Arzãn soolem wẽnda wa rao sẽn bʋd bõn-bu-sõng a pʋʋgẽ. 
Matthew13:25 La nebã sẽn gõe wakate, a bɛ wã waa n bʋda nadens koodã sʋk n bas n looge." 
Matthew13:26 Koodã sẽn zẽk n wom biisi, nadensã me pukame." 
Matthew13:27 Yirã soab tʋmtʋmdb waa n sok-a lame yaa: «Zu-soaba, ka bõn-bu-sõng la yãmb bʋd y pʋʋgẽ wã wɛ? Nadensã yii yɛ n wa be beenẽ?»" 
Matthew13:28 Yẽnda leoka bãmb yaa: «yaa bɛy n maan bõn-kãnga.» La tʋmtʋmdbã soka yẽnda: «Yãmb datame tɩ d kẽng n tɩ võ nadensã bɩ?» 
Matthew13:29 Yẽnda leoka bãmb yaa: «Ayo! Bala, yãmb sã n võod nadensã, tõe tɩ y wa n yĩd n naag koodã n võ." 
Matthew13:30 Bas-y b yiibã fãa tɩ b bɩ ne taab hal tɩ ta tigsg wakate. La tigsgã wakate, mam na n yeela tigsdbã tɩ b reng n võ nadensã n sẽb kil n yõog bugum, la b tigs koodã n sui m baoorẽ wã.»" 
Matthew13:31 A Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd a to n yeele: «Arzãn soolem wẽnda wa siin-bil ned sẽn dɩk n bʋd a pʋʋgẽ. 
Matthew13:32 Yẽnda n yaa bilf n yɩɩd bõn-buud a taabã fãa. La a sã n wa n bɩ, a lebgda bedr n yɩɩd zẽed buud fãa, n lebg tɩɩg hal tɩ liuuli wat n zao a wila.»" 
Matthew13:33 Bãmb leb n wẽe yel-bũn-kãngã me: «Arzãn soolem wẽnda wa rã-bɩll pag sẽn dɩk n ning zom wam a tã hal t'a wuk zomã zãnga.» 
Matthew13:34 Gom-kãens fãa a Zeezi goma ne neb kʋʋngã ne yel-bũna. B rag n ka gomd tɩ ka ne yel-bũn ye," 
Matthew13:35 tɩ bũmb nins Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã sẽn dag n yeelã paam pidsgu. A yeelame yaa: «Mam na n yaaga m noor n wẽ yel-bũna, mam na n wilga bũmb sẽn solg hal dũniyã naaneg wakat tɩ ta moasã.»" 
Matthew13:36 Dẽ, a Zeezi basa neb kʋʋngã n leb yiri. Bãmb karen-biisã kolg n yeela bãmb yaa: «Bilg-y tõnd nadensã sẽn be pʋʋgẽ wã yel-bũndã võore.»" 
Matthew13:37 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Ned ning sẽn bʋt bõn-bu-sõngã yaa Ninsaal Bi-riblã. 
Matthew13:38 Pʋʋgã yaa dũni wã, bõn-bu-sõama wã yaa soolmã kamba, nadensã yaa wẽng soabã kamba." 
Matthew13:39 Bɛyã sẽn bʋd nadensã yaa sʋtãana. La tigsgã yaa dũniyã sɛɛbo. Tigsdbã yaa malegsã. 
Matthew13:40 La wa b sẽn võod nadensã n yõogd bugmã, a na n yɩɩ a woto me dũniyã sɛɛb wakate." 
Matthew13:41 Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n tʋma bãmb malegsã tɩ b yãgs kug-lakdsã fãa ne neb nins sẽn maand‑b wẽngã n yiis-b bãmb soolmẽ wã. 
Matthew13:42 La b na n loba bãmb wʋng bugmẽ, la be na n yɩɩ yãbr la yẽn wãbr zĩiga." 
Matthew13:43 Dẽ, nin-tɩrsã na n yãga wa wĩndg bãmb ba soolem pʋgẽ. Bɩ ned ninga sẽn tar‑a tʋb wʋme.»" 
Matthew13:44 Arzãn soolem leb n wẽnda wa arzɛk sẽn solg pʋʋg pʋgẽ. Rao ning sẽn yãnd-a wã lebs n solg-a lame. La a sũurã sẽn yaa noogã yĩnga, a kuil n tɩ koosa a sẽn tarã fãa n dɩk n da pʋʋgã." 
Matthew13:45 Arzãn soolem leb n wẽnda wa toand sẽn baood kĩndi sẽn yaa neeba. 
Matthew13:46 Yẽ wa yãa kĩndf a yembr t'a ligdã yaa wʋsgo, t'a kẽng n tɩ koos a sẽn dag n tarã fãa n da-a." 
Matthew13:47 Arzãn soolem leb n wẽnda wa zĩm-gãmbr b sẽn lob ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ n wʋk zĩm buud toor‑toore. 
Matthew13:48 La a sã n pidi, b vuugd-a lame n yi kʋɩl-koakã n zĩnd n tũus sẽn ya‑b sõama wã n sag yaasẽ, la b lob sẽn ka-b sõama wã." 
Matthew13:49 A na n yɩɩ a woto dũni sɛɛb wakate. Malegsã na n wa baka nin-wẽnsã n yiis nin-tɩrsã sʋka," 
Matthew13:50 n lob-b wʋng bugmẽ. Yãbr la yẽn wãbr na n zĩnda beenẽ. 
Matthew13:51 Yãmb wʋma bõn-kãens fãa võor bɩ? Bãmb leokame tɩ n-yẽe. 
Matthew13:52 La a Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Yaa woto yĩng tɩ tõog karen-saamb ning fãa sẽn zãms arzãn soolem yɛl n bãnge, wẽnda wa yir soab sẽn yãkd bõn-paals ne bõn-kʋd a paoong pʋgẽ.»" 
Matthew13:53 A Zeezi sẽn wẽ yel-bũn-kãens n sa, b yii zĩ-kãnga." 
Matthew13:54 Bãmb kẽnga b meng tẽngẽ. La b sẽn ta be, b sɩngame n zãms nebã b karen-doogẽ wã. Nebã yɛɛsame n sokdẽ: «Bãmb yamã ne b bõn-bãnã yita yɛɛne?" 
Matthew13:55 Ka bãmb la ra-wãadã biigã wɛ? Ka b ma wã yʋʋr la a Maari wɛ? La ka b ma-biis la a Zak ne a Zozɛf la a Sɩmo ne a Zuud wɛ? 
Matthew13:56 B tãopã fãa ka be tõnd sʋk ka sɩda? Dẽ, bãmb paama bõn-kãensã fãa yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Matthew13:57 La tags-kãng kɩtame tɩ b ka tẽ a Zeezi ye. La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: «No-rɛɛs ka kongd waoogre, sã n ka a meng tẽngẽ la a roagdbã sʋk ye." 
Matthew13:58 La bãmb ka maan bõn-bãn wʋsg zĩ-kãng ye, nebã sẽn ka tẽedã yĩnga." 
Matthew14:1 Wakat-kãnga, naab a Erood wʋma b sẽn gomd a Zeezi yelle," 
Matthew14:2 la a yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã: «Yaa a Zãmbatiis n vʋʋge, yaa woto yĩng n kɩt t'a tar pãn-tõog n maand bõn-bãnã.»" 
Matthew14:3 Bala a Erood dag n yõka a Zã n balg-a n kẽes bi-bees roogo, a ba-biig a Filip pag a Eroodyaad poorẽ." 
Matthew14:4 Bala, a Zã rag n yeela yẽnda t'a ka tar noor tɩ peeg a Eroodyaad n maan a pag ye." 
Matthew14:5 A Erood dag n dat n kɩtame tɩ b kʋ a Zã, la a rag n zoeta neb kʋʋngã, bala, b rag n geta a Zã wa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa." 
Matthew14:6 La a Erood dogmã tẽegr daare, a Eroodyaad bi-puglã saoo neb nins sẽn be-b be wã taoore, la yɩɩ a Erood noogo," 
Matthew14:7 hal t'a wẽen t'a na n kõ-a-la bũmb ning a sẽn na n kose. 
Matthew14:8 A ma wã saglg yĩnga, a yeelame yaa: «Kõ-y maam a Zã zugã ne lengr ka.»" 
Matthew14:9 Rĩmã sũur sãamame, la a wẽenegã yĩnga, ne nebã sẽn be beenẽ n dɩtẽ wã yĩnga, a yeelame tɩ b kõ-a a sẽn datã." 
Matthew14:10 La a tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ fiuug a Zã zugã bi-beesã roogẽ. 
Matthew14:11 B talla a Zã zugã ne lengr n wa n kõ bi-puglã, la a tallame n tɩ kõ a ma." 
Matthew14:12 A Zã karen-biisã waa n dɩka a Zã kũumã n tɩ mume. La b kẽngame n tɩ togs a Zeezi. 
Matthew14:13 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, bãmb kẽe koom-koglg n kẽng zĩig neb sẽn ka be. La neb kʋʋngã sẽn bãnge, b yii tẽmsẽ wã n pʋg bãmb ne nao." 
Matthew14:14 A Zeezi sẽn yi koom koglgẽ wã, b yãnda neb kʋʋngã, tɩ b nimbãaneg yõk-ba, la bãmb maaga bãad-dãmbã." 
Matthew14:15 Zaabr sẽn ta, karen-biisã kolga a Zeezi n yeel-b yaa: «Zĩ-kãngã yaa weoogo, la wakatã zoe n yõsgame. Rẽ wã, bɩ y kuils nebã tɩ b kẽng tẽmsẽ wã n tɩ ra rɩɩbo.»" 
Matthew14:16 A Zeezi leokame: «Ka tɩlɛ tɩ nebã loog ye, bɩ yãmb mensã kõ-b rɩɩb tɩ b rɩ.»" 
Matthew14:17 Karen-biisã leoka bãmba: «Bur a nu ne zĩm a yiib bal la tõnd tar ka.» 
Matthew14:18 La a Zeezi yeelame: «Tall‑y rẽnda n wa.» 
Matthew14:19 A Zeezi kɩtame tɩ nebã zĩnd moodã zugu, la b reega bur a nu wã ne zĩm a yiibã n nak n ges yĩngri, n ning barka. Dẽ, bãmb kaoo burã n kõ b karen-biisã tɩ b reeg n pʋɩ neb kʋʋngã." 
Matthew14:20 Nebã fãa rɩɩme n tɩge, la b wʋka bur-kɛlã pet piig la a yiibu." 
Matthew14:21 Neb nins sẽn dɩ wã sõor kolga raop tus a nu, pagbã ne kambã sõor sẽn ka naage." 
Matthew14:22 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi modga b karen-biisã tɩ b kẽ koom-koglg n deng bãmb taoor ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde, tɩ bãmb na n yõdg n kuilsa neb kʋʋngã." 
Matthew14:23 A Zeezi sẽn kuils nebã n sɛ, b rʋʋ tãngã, zĩig ned sẽn ka be n na n pʋʋse. La yʋng sẽn ta, bãmb dag n bee be b yembre." 
Matthew14:24 Koom-koglgã da zoe n zãaga ne kʋɩl-koakã, la ko-pɛm da wẽed-a lame hal t'a lengdẽ, bala, sobgã rag n segda bãmba." 
Matthew14:25 Beoogã sẽn waa n kolg vẽegre, a Zeezi kẽna koomã zugu, n babs‑ba." 
Matthew14:26 Bãmb karen-biisã sẽn yã bãmb tɩ b kẽnd ko-kãsengã zugã, b yɛɛsame n yeele: «Yaa kɩɩma.» La rabeemã yĩnga b rag kelemdame." 
Matthew14:27 Tao-tao bala a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Keng‑y sũyã la y ra zoe rabeem tɩ yaa maam.» 
Matthew14:28 La a Pɩyɛɛr leokame yaa: «Zu-soaba, sã n sɩd yaa yãmb bɩ y yeel-m tɩ m kẽn koomã zug n wa yãmb nengẽ.»" 
Matthew14:29 Bãmb yeela yẽnda: «Wa.» Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr yii koom koglgẽ wã n kẽn koomã zug n dabd a Zeezi nengẽ." 
Matthew14:30 La a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn yã tɩ sobgã yaa wʋsgo, rabeem yõka yẽnda. La yẽnda sẽn sɩng n na n lisã, a kelmame n yeele: «Zu-soaba, fãag-y-ma.»" 
Matthew14:31 Tao-tao bala, a Zeezi tẽega b nug n gãd yẽnda n yeel-a: «Tẽeb bilf soaba, yaa bõe tɩ fo yam yoaada?»" 
Matthew14:32 Bãmb kẽe koom-koglgã pʋgẽ la sobgã yõkame. 
Matthew14:33 Neb nins sẽn dag n be koom-koglgã pʋgẽ wã wõgemda a Zeezi taoor n yeele: «Yãmb sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.» 
Matthew14:34 Bãmb dʋʋga ko-kãsengã n ta Zenezarɛt tẽnga. 
Matthew14:35 Zĩ-kãng nebã bãnga a Zeezi, n kɩt tɩ b saag tẽms nins sẽn pẽ wã fãa n togs nebã, la b talla bãad-dãmbã fãa n wa a Zeezi nengẽ." 
Matthew14:36 Bãad-dãmbã bõosa a Zeezi tɩ b bas tɩ b sɩɩs baa yaa bãmb fuugã noor bala. La neb nins fãa sẽn sɩɩsã paama laafɩ zãnga. 
Matthew15:1 Dẽ, Fariizẽ-dãmb ne tõog karen-saam-dãmb n yi Zeruzalɛm n wa a Zeezi nengẽ n sok-b yaa:" 
Matthew15:2 «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb karen-biisã kɩɩsd kãsem-dãmbã miningu? Bala, bãmb sã n na n dɩ b ka nudgd b nus ye.»" 
Matthew15:3 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: «La yãmba, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb kɩɩsd Wẽnnaam tõogã y mensã mining sakr yĩnga?»" 
Matthew15:4 Bala, Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Waoog f ba la f ma, la ned ning sẽn na n tʋʋs a ba bɩ a ma, bɩ b kʋ‑a.»" 
Matthew15:5 La yãmba, yãmb yetame tɩ ned ning sẽn na n yeel a ba bɩ a ma: «Ade, bũmb ning mam sẽn dag n na n dɩk sõng yãmb lebga Wẽnnaam dẽnda.»" 
Matthew15:6 Dẽ wã, ka tɩlɛ t'a waoog a ba bɩ a ma ye. Woto, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ Wẽnnaam goamã lebg zaalem tɩ yãmb miningã reeg zĩiga." 
Matthew15:7 Zãmb dãmba, a Ezayi sɩd togsa bãngr goam ne yãmb yell n yeele:" 
Matthew15:8 «Nin-kãensã waoogda maam ne nobɩmse, la b sũyã zãra ne maam." 
Matthew15:9 Bãmb sẽn waoogd maamã yaa zaalem, bala, bãmb zãmsda nebã ninsaalb tõod bala.»" 
Matthew15:10 La a Zeezi boola neb kʋʋngã n yeel-b yaa: «Kelg-y la y bãng tɩ 
Matthew15:11 ka bũmb ning sẽn kẽed ninsaal noorẽ wã n maand-a t'a yɩ rẽgd ye. Yaa bũmb ning sẽn yit ninsaal noorẽ wã, n maand-a t'a lebg rẽgdo.»" 
Matthew15:12 Dẽ, bãmb karen-biisã kolgame n yeel bãmb yaa: «Yãmb bãngame tɩ y goamã zaba Fariizẽ-dãmbã sɩda?»" 
Matthew15:13 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «B na n võoga bõn-bɩtg ning fãa mam ba sẽn be arzãnã sẽn ka selã. 
Matthew15:14 Bas-y-ba. Bãmb yaa zoens sẽn tat zoense. Zoang sã n tat zoanga, bãmb b yiibã fãa na n lʋɩɩ bokẽ.»" 
Matthew15:15 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Bilg‑y tõnd yel-bũn-kãng võore.» 
Matthew15:16 La a Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yãmb me yam ket n nan ka wek la? 
Matthew15:17 Yãmb ka mi tɩ bũmb nins fãa sẽn kẽed ninsaal noorẽ kẽeda pʋgẽ tɩ b yaool n tɩ bas-a we-kɛɛng la? 
Matthew15:18 La bũmb ning sẽn yit noorẽ yita sũurẽ, la yaa bõn-kãens n maand ned t'a yɩ rẽgdo." 
Matthew15:19 Bala, tags-wẽnse, nin-kʋʋre, yoobo, raglem, wagdem, zĩrẽ la kãnegr yita sũur pʋgẽ." 
Matthew15:20 Ad yaa bõn-kãens n maand ned t'a yɩ rẽgdo. La tɩ rɩ n ka nudg f nus ka maand ned t'a yɩ rẽgd ye.» 
Matthew15:21 A Zeezi basa zĩ-kãng n loog n kẽng Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ soolmẽ. 
Matthew15:22 La gese, Kana pag sẽn yit tẽn-kãens zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba! A Davɩɩd Bi-ribla! Zoe-y mam nimbãanega. Zĩn n namsd mam bi-pugl hal wʋsgo.»" 
Matthew15:23 La bãmb ka leok yẽnda tɩ bũmb ye. Bãmb karen-biisã kolgame n kos bãmb n yeele: «Rig-y‑yã t'a looge, bala a pʋgda tõnd n kelemdẽ.»" 
Matthew15:24 A Zeezi leokame: «B sẽn tʋm maamã, yaa Israyɛll buudã pe-menemdsã nengẽ bala.»" 
Matthew15:25 La pagã waame n wõgemd bãmb taoor n yeele: «Zu-soaba, sõng-y-ma.»" 
Matthew15:26 A Zeezi leokame: «Ka sõama tɩ b rɩk kamb dɩɩb n lob ba-bi ye.» 
Matthew15:27 La pagã leokame yaa: «Zu-soaba, yaa sɩda, la baoosgo, ba-bi rɩta rɩ-zersã sẽn lʋɩt b zu-soben-dãmbã taabl tẽngrã.»" 
Matthew15:28 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-a lame: «Paga, ad f tẽebã yaa kãsenga. Bɩ fo sẽn datã yɩ.» La wakat-kãng bala, a bi-puglã paama maagre." 
Matthew15:29 A Zeezi yii be n kẽng Galɩle ko-kãsengã noore. Bãmb dʋʋ tãngã zug n zĩnd be. 
Matthew15:30 La neb wʋsg waa bãmb nengẽ ne wobse, la zoense, ne mugsi, la koms-rãmba, la neb wʋsg bãas a taab sẽn tarã, n zĩnig bãmb a Zeezi taoore, la a Zeezi maaga bãmba." 
Matthew15:31 La neb kʋʋngã sẽn yãnd mugsã sẽn gomdã, la koms-rãmbã sẽn paam maagrã, la wobsã sẽn kẽnd sõama wã, la zoensã sẽn yãtã, b yɛɛsame n waoog Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã." 
Matthew15:32 A Zeezi boola b karen-biisã n yeele: «Kʋʋn-kãngã nimbãaneg tara maam, bala, yaa rasem a tãab moasã b sẽn be ne maam, la b ka tar dɩɩb sẽn na dɩ ye. Mam ka rat n kuils-b ne kom tɩ b wa tek n tadg sorã zug ye.»" 
Matthew15:33 Karen-biisã soka bãmb yaa: «Tõnd na n maana a wãn n paam bur weoogẽ ka sẽn sekd tɩ nin-kãensã fãa rɩ n tɩge?» 
Matthew15:34 A Zeezi sok-b lame: «Yãmb tara bur a wãna?» Tɩ b leoke: «A yopoe n paas zĩm-bãooneg bilfu.» 
Matthew15:35 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela nebã tɩ b zĩnd tẽnga." 
Matthew15:36 La bãmb deega bur a yopoe wã ne zĩmã. La b sẽn ning-a barka, b kaoome n kɩs b karen-biisã la bãmb pʋɩ neb kʋʋngã." 
Matthew15:37 Nebã fãa rɩɩme n tɩge, la b wʋka gɩrsã sẽn kellã tɩ pid pet a yopoe." 
Matthew15:38 Neb nins sẽn dɩ wã sõor yaa tus a naase, pagbã ne kambã sõor sẽn ka naag ye." 
Matthew15:39 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi kuilsa neb kʋʋngã la b kẽ koom-koglg n kẽng Magdala soolem." 
Matthew16:1 Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne Saduusẽ-dãmbã kolga a Zeezi. La bãmb sẽn dat n mak bãmb yĩnga, b kosa a Zeezi tɩ b maan bãnd sẽn yit yĩngr tɩ b yã." 
Matthew16:2 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Zaabre, yãmb yetame tɩ zĩigã na n yɩɩ vẽenega, bala yĩngr yaa miuugu." 
Matthew16:3 La yibeoogo, yãmb yetame tɩ saag na n nii rũndã, bala yĩngr yaa miu-sablga. Yãmb mii yĩngr yɛl bilsgu, n yaool n ka tõe n bãng bãn sẽn wilgd wakatã yɛlã ye." 
Matthew16:4 Zamaan neb sẽn yaa wẽns la yoaadbã baooda bãnde. La b ka na n kõ bãmb bãnd a to tɩ ka a Zonaas bãndã ye.» La a Zeezi basa bãmb n looge. 
Matthew16:5 A Zeezi karen-biisã sẽn wa n dabd ko-kãsengã rʋʋnd a to wã, b yĩmame n ka zɩ bur ye." 
Matthew16:6 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Gũus‑y mens neer ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã la Saduusẽ-dãmbã rã-bɩlle.» 
Matthew16:7 La b tagsame tɩ yaa bãmb sẽn ka zɩ burã yĩng la a Zeezi gom woto. 
Matthew16:8 La a Zeezi bãnga b tagsgã n yeel-ba: «Tẽeb bilf rãmba! Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tagsd y sũyẽ tɩ yaa yãmb sẽn ka zɩ burã yĩnga? 
Matthew16:9 Yãmb ket n nan ka wʋm la? Yãmb ka tẽr bur a nu wã sẽn sek raop tus a nu wã, la a kɛlã yãmb sẽn wʋkã pet sõore?" 
Matthew16:10 Yãmb ka tẽr bur a yopoe wã sẽn sek raop tus a naase, la a kɛlã yãmb sẽn wʋkã pet sõore?" 
Matthew16:11 Bõe tɩ yãmb ka bãng tɩ ka bur yell la mam gomd ne yãmba? Gũus-y y mens ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã la Saduusẽ-dãmbã rã-bɩlle.» 
Matthew16:12 La karen-biisã bãngame tɩ b sẽn yeel bãmb tɩ b gũus ne bũmb ningã, ka rã-bɩll sẽn ningd burã ye, la yaa Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne Saduusẽ-dãmbã zãmsgã." 
Matthew16:13 A Zeezi sẽn ta Sezaare sẽn yaa a Filip soolmã tẽngã, b soka b karen-biisã yaa: «Nebã yetame tɩ maam a Ninsaal Bi-riblã yaa ãnda?»" 
Matthew16:14 B leokame: Neb kẽer yetame tɩ yãmb yaa a Zãmbatiisi, tɩ kẽer t'a Eli, tɩ kẽer t'a Zeremi wall Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã ned a yembre.»" 
Matthew16:15 T'a Zeezi leb n sok-ba: «La yãmba, yãmb yetame tɩ mam yaa ãnda?»" 
Matthew16:16 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr leokame n yeele: «Yãmb yaa Kirisã, Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã Bi-ribla.»" 
Matthew16:17 La Zeezi goma ne-a n yeel-a: «Sɩmo! A Zonaas biiga, bark bee fo zugu. Bala, ka nemd walla zɩɩm n vẽneg foom bõn-kãngã ye. Yaa m ba sẽn be arzãnã." 
Matthew16:18 La maam, mam yeta foom tɩ fo yaa Pɩyɛɛre, la kug-kãngã zugu, mam na n mee m Wẽnd doogã, la kɩɩm-kulg ka na n tõog-a ye." 
Matthew16:19 Mam na n kõo foom arzãn soolem kʋɩlen-biisi: ‹Bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn na n loe tẽng zug ka na n loee arzãna, la bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn na n lok tẽng zug ka na n loka arzãna.›" 
Matthew16:20 Dẽ, bãmb sagla b karen-biisã neere, n yeel-b tɩ b ra togs ned baa a yembr tɩ bãmb yaa Kiris ye.»" 
Matthew16:21 Sẽn sɩng wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi sɩngame n wilg b karen-biisã tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bãmb kẽng Zeruzalɛm tɩ kãsem-dãmbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã nams bãmb wʋsgo, la b kʋ bãmba. La rasem a tãab daarã, bãmb na n vʋʋgame." 
Matthew16:22 A Pɩyɛɛr boola bãmb n yi kɛɛng n leng-b n yeele: «Zu-soaba, Wẽnd na zãage! Yel-kãngã kõn paam yãmb abada.»" 
Matthew16:23 La a Zeezi wẽnemdame n yeel a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Leb mam poorẽ, Sʋtãana! Fo yaa gɩdgr mam sor zugu. Bala, fo tagsdã ka Wẽnnaam dẽnd ye, yaa ninsaal dẽnda.»" 
Matthew16:24 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «Ned sã n dat n tũ maam, bɩ a kɩɩs a meng raabo, n tʋk a da-pɩk n pʋg maam." 
Matthew16:25 Bala ned ning sẽn baood tɩ kogl a vɩɩm, a vɩɩm na sãame, la ned ning sẽn na n bas a vɩɩm mam yĩnga, a na leb n paam-a." 
Matthew16:26 La ned sã n paam dũni gill fãa n bas n ki, a yõod bee yɛ? Walla bõe la ninsaal na n dɩk n tek ne a vɩɩmã?" 
Matthew16:27 Bala, Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n waa ne b ba wã ziiri, ne b malegse. La rẽ wẽnde, bãmb na n dola ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmde." 
Matthew16:28 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ sẽn be-b ka wã, neb kẽer n ka na n ki hal tɩ b yãnd Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn wat ne b naamã ye.»" 
Matthew17:1 Rasem a yoob zugẽ, a Zeezi peega a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zak la a ba-biig a Zã n tall-b n yi kɛɛnga, n dʋ tãn-lug-lug zugu." 
Matthew17:2 A Zeezi tedga bãmb taoore: bãmb nengã rag n yãgda wa wĩntoogo, la b futã lebga peels wa vẽenem." 
Matthew17:3 A Moyiis ne a Eli puka b mens ne bãmba n sõsd ne a Zeezi. 
Matthew17:4 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba! Yaa sõama tɩ tõnd pa ka. Yãmb sã n data, mam na n tilga fu-rot a tãab ka: a yembr yãmb yĩnga, a yembr a Moyiis yĩnga, la a yembr a Eli yĩnga.»" 
Matthew17:5 La yẽnda sẽn ket n gomda, sawadg sẽn pɩnd wa n lud bãmba. La ade, koɛɛg n yi sawadgẽ wã n yeele: «Ada yaa mam Bi-ribl-nongr sẽn ta mam yam zãnga. Kelg-y-yã-a.»" 
Matthew17:6 La karen-biisã sẽn wʋm koe-kãngã, rabeem kãseng yõk-b lame tɩ b lʋɩ n fõgen b nens tẽnga." 
Matthew17:7 A Zeezi kolgame n sɩɩs bãmb n yeele: «Yik‑y‑yã, da zoe‑y rabeem ye.»" 
Matthew17:8 Bãmb zẽka b nens n ges la b ka yã ned a to tɩ sã n ka a Zeezi b yembr bal ye. 
Matthew17:9 Bãmb sẽn wa n yi tãngã zug n sigda, a Zeezi keooga bãmb a woto: «Da gom-y ne ned ba a yembr yã-kãngã yell hal tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã wa vʋʋg n bas kũum ye.»" 
Matthew17:10 La karen-biisã soka a Zeezi yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ tõog karen-saam-dãmbã yetẽ t'a Eli n tog n deng n wa?» 
Matthew17:11 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Yaa sɩd t'a Eli na n deng n wa n lebs n manega bũmb fãa tɩ leb n yɩ wa pĩndã. 
Matthew17:12 La mam yeta yãmb t'a Eli zoe n waame la nebã ka bãng-a ye, la b maana yẽnda wa b sẽn date. Woto me, bãmb na n namsa Ninsaal Bi-riblã.»" 
Matthew17:13 Dẽ, bãmb karen-biisã bãngame tɩ yaa a Zãmbatiis yell la a Zeezi sẽn gom ne bãmbã." 
Matthew17:14 Bãmb sẽn kolg neb kʋʋngã, dao a yembr n wa n yĩgimd a Zeezi taoor n yeele:" 
Matthew17:15 «Zu-soaba, zoe-y mam bi-riblã nimbãaneg tɩ kĩsinkĩir n tar-a t'a namsd wʋsgo. Naoor wʋsgo, a lʋɩta bugmẽ wall koomẽ." 
Matthew17:16 Mam tall-a lame n wa yãmb karen-biisã nengẽ la b ka tõog n maag-a ye.» 
Matthew17:17 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Zamaan neb sẽn ka tẽeb la sẽn yaa nin-wẽnse! Mam na n paa ne yãmb hal tɩ ta wakat bʋgo? Mam na n maana sũ-mar ne yãmb tɩ ta wakat bʋgo? Tall-y biigã n wa ne ka.» 
Matthew17:18 A Zeezi tãsa zĩnã, la a yiime n bas biigã, la a paama laafɩ wakat-kãng bala." 
Matthew17:19 Dẽ, a Zeezi karen-biisã kolga bãmb wakat ning neb sẽn ka be ne bãmb n sok-b yaa: «Bõe tɩ tõnd ka tõog n dig zĩn-kãngã?»" 
Matthew17:20 A Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Yaa yãmb tẽebã sẽn paoodã yĩnga. Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ yãmb sã n tar tẽeb sẽn zem siin-bila, yãmb na n yeela tãn-kãngã t'a serg ka n kẽng ka, la a na n serg n kẽngame. La bũmb kõn zĩnd yãmb sẽn kõn tõog n maan ye.»" 
Matthew17:21 [La zĩn-kãngã buud ka yita, tɩ ka ne pʋʋsg la no-loeer ye.]" 
Matthew17:22 La bãmb sẽn gõod Galɩle, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «B na n zãmba Ninsaal Bi-riblã n yõk‑b n kõ ninsaalbã." 
Matthew17:23 B na n kʋ-b lame, la rasem a tãab daarã, b na n vʋʋgame.» La karen-biisã sũyã sãama wʋsgo." 
Matthew17:24 A Zeezi ne b karen-biisã sẽn ta Kapɛrnaom, neb nins sẽn deegd wẽnd-doog yaood darkem a yiib-yiibã wa a pɩyɛɛr nengẽ n sok‑a yaa: «Yãmb karen-saambã ka yaood wẽnd doogã yaoodã la?»" 
Matthew17:25 La a Pɩyɛɛr leokame tɩ b yaoodame sẽ! La bãmb sẽn kẽ roogẽ, a Zeezi renga a Pɩyɛɛr n gom n sok-a: «Sɩmo! Fo tagsda a wãna? Dũni rĩm-dãmbã deegda yaood la yõor yaood ãnda rãmb nengẽ? B kamba nengẽ bɩ, bɩ sãambã nengẽ?»" 
Matthew17:26 La a Pɩyɛɛr leoka bãmb tɩ yaa sãambã nengẽ. La a Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Sã n yaa a woto, rẽnd tẽngã kamb ka tog n yao ye." 
Matthew17:27 La sẽn na yɩl tɩ tõnd da wa beeg-ba, kẽng ko-kãsengã noore, n lob zĩm-lɛoog n yõk zĩnf ning sẽn na n yɩ-a pipi n gãd lɛoogã. Yaag a noorã tɩ f na n yãnda ligd beenẽ n yiis n wa n yao maam ne fo yĩnga.»" 
Matthew18:1 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi karen-biisã kolga bãmb n soke: «Ãnda n yaa kãseng n yɩɩd arzãn soolem pʋgẽ?»" 
Matthew18:2 La a Zeezi boola bi-bilf n yals bãmb sʋk n yeele: 
Matthew18:3 «Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb sã n ka tek yam n lebg wa kom-bãoonego, yãmb kõn kẽ arzãn soolem pʋgẽ ye." 
Matthew18:4 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n sik a meng n yɩ wa bi-kãngã, yẽnda n na n yɩ kãseng n yɩɩd arzãn soolem pʋga." 
Matthew18:5 La ned ning fãa sẽn na n deeg bi-bilf a woto mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, yaa mam mengã la a reegda." 
Matthew18:6 La ned sã n maan kom-bãoon-kãensã sẽn tẽed maamã ned a yembr t'a lʋɩ, b sã n loe a soabã kokor ne neer kugr n lob-a ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ n ket n são a yĩnga.»" 
Matthew18:7 Toog na n paama dũni wã, bũmb nins sẽn wat ne lʋɩɩsã yĩnga. Bala, yaa tɩlae tɩ bũmb nins sẽn wat ne lʋɩɩsã wa. La ned ning sẽn na n waa-a ne-bã na paam toogo." 
Matthew18:8 Fo nug bɩ f naoor sã n wat ne fo lʋɩɩse, fiuus-b n lob yɩɩga. Fo sã n yaa nug-yend wall kar-yend n paam vɩɩmã n são fo sẽn na n tall f nao a yiibã bɩ f nus a yiibã tɩ b lob foom bugum sẽn ka kiidã pʋgẽ." 
Matthew18:9 La fo nif sã n wat ne fo lʋɩɩse, bɩ f feoog-a n lob yɩɩga. Fo sã n yɩ nin-feoog n paam vɩɩm n são fo sẽn na n tall f nin a yiibã tɩ b lob foom bugum sẽn ka kiidã pʋgẽ." 
Matthew18:10 Gũus-y n da paoog-y kom-kãensã ned ba a yembr ye. Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ bãmb malegsã sẽn be arzãnã geta mam ba sẽn be arzãnã neng daar fãa." 
Matthew18:11 [Bala Ninsaal Bi-riblã waame tɩ fãag bũmb nins fãa sẽn menemã.] 
Matthew18:12 Yãmb tagsda a wãna? Ned sã n tar piis koabga, t'a yembr bãmb sʋkã meneme, a ka na n bas pis-wɛ la a wɛ wã sẽn ketã kunkubã zut n keng n tɩ bao sẽn menemã wã sɩda?" 
Matthew18:13 La a sã n tõog n yãnd-a, sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb t'a maanda sũ-noog pe-kãng yĩng n yɩɩd pis-wɛ la a wɛ wã sẽn ka menemã." 
Matthew18:14 Woto me, yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã ka rat tɩ kom-kãensã ned ba a yembr menem ye." 
Matthew18:15 Fo ba-biig sã n maan yel-wẽnde, kẽng n tɩ yãnd-a, foom ne yẽnda sʋka n wilg-a a kongrã. A sã n kelg foom, fo paama f ba-biiga." 
Matthew18:16 La a sã n ka kelg foom, bɩ f peeg nin‑yɛng bɩ neb a yiib n kẽnge, tɩ yellã fãa tõe n paam manegr kaset dãmb a yiib bɩ a tãab taoore, wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yetã." 
Matthew18:17 La a sã n tõdg n ka kelg-ba, togs yellã Kiris tigindã sʋka. La a sã n tõdg n ka kelg tigindã, bɩ f ges a soabã wa ned sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaam la a wa yaood dɛɛgda." 
Matthew18:18 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n loe tẽng zug ka na n loee arzãna, la bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n lok tẽng zug ka na n loka arzãna." 
Matthew18:19 Mam leb n yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb neb a yiib sã n lagem taab noor a yembr tẽng zug n kos bũmbu, ba sẽn yaa bũmb ninga, mam ba sẽn be arzãnã na n kõ-a‑la bãmba." 
Matthew18:20 Bala, zĩig ning neb a yiib bɩ a tãab sẽn tigim taab ne mam yʋʋre, mam bee bãmb sʋka." 
Matthew18:21 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr kolgame n sok a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba! Naoor a wãn la m ba-biig na n beeg maam tɩ mam kõ-a sugri? Hal tɩ ta naoor a yopoe bɩ?»" 
Matthew18:22 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: Mam ka yet foom tɩ hal tɩ ta naoor a yopoe ye, la yaa hal tɩ ta naoor pis-yopoe naoor a yopoe." 
Matthew18:23 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ arzãn soolem yaa wa rĩm a yembr sẽn dat t'a tʋmtʋmdb wa maan b tʋʋmdã gɛɛla. 
Matthew18:24 La a sẽn sɩng n geendẽ, b waa ne tʋmtʋmd a yembr sẽn tar a zu-soabã samd talã tus-piiga." 
Matthew18:25 Dao wã sẽn ka tar n na n yao wã yĩnga, a soaalã yeelame tɩ b koos-a ne a pagã la a kambã, la bũmb nins fãa a sẽn tarã n wa n yao a samdã." 
Matthew18:26 Tʋmtʋmdã wõgemda yẽnda taoore, n wẽ kãntɩɩg n yeele: «Maan-y sũ-mar ne maam tɩ m na n yaoo y samdã zãnga.»" 
Matthew18:27 Tʋmtʋmdã nimbãaneg yõka a zu-soabã t'a bas a samdã taale, n bas-a t'a looge." 
Matthew18:28 La tʋmtʋmd‑kãng sẽn yi, a sega a tʋmd-n-taag a yembr sẽn tar yẽnda samd deniye koabga. Yẽnda yõka yẽnda n sog a kokoɛy wã n yeel-a: «Yao maam m samdã.»" 
Matthew18:29 La a tʋmd-n-taagã wõgemda yẽnda taoor n bõos-a n yeel-a: «Maan sũ-mar ne maam tɩ m na n yaoo f samdã zãnga.» 
Matthew18:30 La a ka sak ye, n kẽng ne-a n tɩ sui bi-bees roogẽ n gũud a sẽn na n yao a samdã n sɛ." 
Matthew18:31 La a tũud-n-taasã sẽn yã bũmb ning a sẽn maanã, b sũyã sãama hal wʋsgo, la b kẽngame n tɩ togs b zu-soabã bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã." 
Matthew18:32 Dẽ, a zu-soabã kɩtame tɩ b bool yẽnda t'a yeel-a: «Tʋmtʋmd-wẽnga! Mam da basa fo samdã fãa taale fo sẽn bõos maamã yĩnga." 
Matthew18:33 Dẽ, fo ra ka tog n zoe f tʋmd-n-taagã nimbãaneg wa mam sẽn zoe fo nimbãanegã sɩda?»" 
Matthew18:34 A soaalã sũur yĩigame t'a ning-a bi-bees gũudbã nugẽ tɩ b nams-a hal t'a wa n yao a samdã zãnga. 
Matthew18:35 Mam ba sẽn be arzãnã na n maana yãmb a woto me, yãmb ned kam fãa sã n ka kõ a ba-biig sugr ne a sũur fãa." 
Matthew19:1 La a Zeezi sẽn gom gom-kãens n sɛ, b yii Galɩle n kẽng Zʋʋde soolem sẽn be Zʋrdẽ rʋʋndã." 
Matthew19:2 Neb kʋʋng wʋsg tũu bãmba, la a Zeezi maag-b-la beenẽ." 
Matthew19:3 Fariizẽ-dãmbã kolga a Zeezi n na n bẽd bãmba. B sokame: «Dẽ yĩnga, noor beeme tɩ rao rig a pag a beegr buud fãa yĩnga?»" 
Matthew19:4 La a Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Yãmb ka karem tɩ hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, Naandã naan-b-la rao ne pag laa?»" 
Matthew19:5 La b yeele: «Yaa woto yĩng tɩ rao na n bas a ba ne a ma n zĩnd ne a paga, la bãmb b yiibã na n yɩɩ yĩng a yembre.»" 
Matthew19:6 Woto, b ka leb n yaa neb a yiib ye, b yaa yĩng a yembre. Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ ninsaal da welg bũmb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn lagem ne taabã ye." 
Matthew19:7 Bãmb soka a Zeezi: «La bõe yĩng t'a Moyiis kõ noor tɩ sã n na n dig pag bɩ b kõ‑a baosg sebr la b rig-a?» 
Matthew19:8 A Zeezi leoka bãmba: «Yaa yãmb sũyã sẽn yaa kegemsã yĩng n kɩt t'a Moyiis kõ yãmb noor tɩ y rig y pagbã. La hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, rag n ka a woto ye." 
Matthew19:9 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned sã n dig a paga, tɩ sã n ka yoob yĩnga, n dɩk a to, a maanda yoobo.»" 
Matthew19:10 Bãmb karen-biisã yeela bãmb yaa: «Rao ne pag yellã sã n yaa a woto, dẽnd f sã n ka kẽ kãadem n são.»" 
Matthew19:11 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: «Nebã fãa ka wʋmd gom-kãngã võor ye, sã n ka b sẽn kõ b rãmb pãn-tõog tɩ wʋma bala." 
Matthew19:12 Bala, zu-soben-dãmb n be n yaa a woto hal b rogem wakate, la kẽer yaa neb n maan-b tɩ b lebg a woto, la kẽer maana b mens zu-soben-dãmb arzãn soolmã yĩnga. Ned ning sẽn tõe n wʋm-a koe-kãngã võor bɩ a wʋme.»" 
Matthew19:13 Dẽ, neb talla kom-bãooneg n wa a Zeezi nengẽ tɩ b na tik-b ne b nus n pʋʋs b yĩnga. La karen-biisã lenga bãmba." 
Matthew19:14 La a Zeezi yeelame: «Bas-y kom-bãoonegã, tɩ b wa mam nengẽ la y ra gɩdg-b ye. Bala, arzãn soolem yaa neb nins sẽn wẽnd bãmbã yĩnga.»" 
Matthew19:15 A Zeezi tika kambã ne b nusi, n yaool n yi zĩ-kãngã." 
Matthew19:16 Dẽ, dao a yembr kolg n soka a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saamba, bõe n yaa sõama mam sẽn tog n maane, n tõog n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa?»" 
Matthew19:17 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo sokd maam n dat n bãng sẽn yaa sõama? Ned a yembr bal n yaa sõama. Fo sã n dat n kẽ vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã pʋgẽ, bɩ f sak tõodã.»" 
Matthew19:18 Yẽnda soka a Zeezi: «Tõ-bʋse?» La a Zeezi leoka yẽnda: «Da kʋ ye, da yo ye, da zu ye, da kɩs kaset-zĩrẽ ye," 
Matthew19:19 waoog f ba la f ma, la f nong f to wa f menga.»" 
Matthew19:20 Bi-bɩɩgã yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Mam saka tõ-kãens fãa! Bõe n ket yɛsa?» 
Matthew19:21 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Fo sã n dat n zems zãnga, kẽng n tɩ koos fo sẽn tarã, n dɩk ligdã n kõ naong rãmba, la fo na paam paoong arzãn pʋga. La f wa n tũ maam.»" 
Matthew19:22 Bi-bɩɩgã sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, a looga ne sũ‑sãoongo. Bala, a ra tara arzegs wʋsgo." 
Matthew19:23 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb t'a na n yɩɩ toog ne arzɛk soab t'a kẽ arzãn soolem pʋga." 
Matthew19:24 Mam leb n yeta yãmb tɩ yʋgemd sẽn na n tũ fu-pĩim yõorẽ n loog yaa naana n yɩɩd arzɛk soab sẽn na n kẽ Wẽnnaam soolem pʋga.»
