Matthew19:25 Karen-biisã sẽn wʋm gom-kãense, a linga bãmb wʋsgo, la bãmb soka taab yaa: «Ãnda soab masã n tõe n paam fãagre?»" 
Matthew19:26 A Zeezi ges-b lame n yeel-ba: «Ne ninsaala bõn-kãng ka tõe ye, la Wẽnnaam tõe bũmb fãa.»" 
Matthew19:27 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr goma ne a Zeezi n yeele: «Tõnd basa bũmb fãa n tũud yãmba, tõnd yell na n yɩɩ a wãn-wãna?»" 
Matthew19:28 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb fãa sẽn tũ maamã, tɩ bũmba fãa tekrã wakate, ninsaal bi‑riblã sã n wa zaoond b naamã geer zugu, yãmb me na n zaoonda gɛy piig la a yiib zut n kao Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã bʋʋdo." 
Matthew19:29 La ned ning fãa sẽn na n bas a yiri, a ba-bi-raopa, a ba-bi-pogse, a ba, a ma, a paga, a kamba wall a pʋʋg mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, a na n paama bũmb nins a sẽn basã buud naoor koabga, la a paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sɛ wã." 
Matthew19:30 Dẽenem dãmb wʋsg n na n lebg yaoolem dãmba, tɩ yaoolem dãmb wʋsg lebg dẽenem rãmba." 
Matthew20:1 Bala, arzãn soolem wẽnda wa yir soab sẽn yi yibeoog pĩnd n na n dɩgs tʋmtʋmdb tɩ b tɩ tʋm a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ." 
Matthew20:2 B sara ne taab tɩ daar a yembr tʋʋmd na n yɩɩ deniye a yembre, t'a kɩt tɩ b kẽng a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã." 
Matthew20:3 A yii sõ-bɩɩmd wakate, n yãnd neb sẽn be raagẽ wã n ka maand bũmb ye," 
Matthew20:4 n yeel-ba: «Yãmb me kẽng n tɩ tʋm m reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã, tɩ m na n kõ-y-la yaood sẽn zemse.»" 
Matthew20:5 Nin-kãens kẽngame. Dẽ, a leb n yii wĩnto-sʋka, la wẽn-kaoore n leb n maan a woto bala." 
Matthew20:6 Wĩndg sẽn dabd lʋɩɩse, a leb n yiime n yãnd neb sẽn yas be, n sok-ba «Bõe tɩ yãmb be ka daarã tõr n ka maand bũmbu?»" 
Matthew20:7 Bãmb leokame: «Yaa tɩ ned ba a yembr ka rɩk tõnd tʋʋmd ye.» Yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: «Bɩ yãmb me kẽng mam reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã.» 
Matthew20:8 Zĩ-sobd sẽn ta, reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã soab yeela ned ning sẽn get-a yẽnda tʋʋmã yellã yaa: «Bool tʋmtʋmdbã n yao ned kam fãa a yaoodo, sɩng ne yaoolem dãmbã n tɩ baas ne dẽenem dãmbã.»" 
Matthew20:9 Neb nins sẽn wa‑b wĩndgã lʋɩɩs wakatã kolgame tɩ b kõ ned kam fãa deniye a yembre. 
Matthew20:10 Dẽenem dãmbã n yaool waoongo, n tẽed tɩ bãmb na n deeg n yɩɩda neb a taabã. La a kõo bãmb ned kam fãa deniye a yembre." 
Matthew20:11 B sẽn deeg deniye a yembr-yembrã, b yẽgma ne yirã soab n yeele:" 
Matthew20:12 «Sẽn wa-b yaoolmã tʋma lɛɛr a yembr tãa, tɩ tõnd tʋm daarã tõr n nams ne tʋʋlgã, tɩ yãmb kõ bãmb yaood a yembr ne tõndo.»" 
Matthew20:13 La a leoka bãmb ned a yembr a woto: «M zoa, mam ka zãmb foom ye. Tõnd dag n ka sar ne taab deniye a yembr tɩ fo sak sɩda?" 
Matthew20:14 Dẽ wã, deeg f ligd n looge. Maam n dat n kõ yaoolem soabã wa foom." 
Matthew20:15 Dẽ yĩnga, mam ka tar noor tɩ maan m sẽn dat ne m sẽn so wã bɩ? Bɩ fo getame tɩ mam maan-neerã ka sõama?»" 
Matthew20:16 Woto, yaoolem dãmbã na n yɩɩ dẽenem dãmba, tɩ dẽenem dãmbã yɩ yaoolem dãmba." 
Matthew20:17 La a Zeezi sẽn dabd Zeruzalɛm, b peega b karen-biis piig la a yiibã toore, la b yeela bãmb sorã zug yaa:" 
Matthew20:18 «Ges-y-yã! Tõnd dabda Zeruzalɛm, la b na n yõka Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kõ maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, la b na n kaoo bãmb bʋʋd tɩ yɩ kũum." 
Matthew20:19 La b na n ninga bãmb bu-zẽms nusẽ tɩ b yaal bãmba, la b pãb-b ne kalwaase, la b ka-b da-pɩk zugu. La rasem a tãab daare, b na n vʋʋgame.»" 
Matthew20:20 Dẽ, a Zebde kom-dibli wã ma waa a Zeezi nengẽ ne a kom-dibli wã n yĩgimd bãmb taoor n na n bõos bãmba." 
Matthew20:21 Bãmb soka yẽnda t'a rata bõe? La a yeela bãmb yaa: Kõ-y noor tɩ mam kom-dibl‑kãensã b yiibã zĩnd ne yãmb y soolmã pʋgẽ, a yembr y rɩtgo, a to wã y goabga." 
Matthew20:22 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Yãmb ka mi yãmb sẽn kot maam bũmb ningã ye. Dẽ yĩnga, yãmb tõe n yũu bõn-yũudl ning mam sẽn na n yũ wã?» La b leokame: «D tõeeme.»" 
Matthew20:23 La a Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Yaa sɩd tɩ yãmb na n yũu bõn-yũudl ning mam sẽn na n yũ wã. La a ka be ne maam tɩ kõ noor tɩ ned zĩnd mam dɩtgo wall mam goabg ye. Mam sã n na n kõ me, yaa neb nins mam ba sẽn segl zĩ-kãens b yĩngã.»" 
Matthew20:24 Karen-biis piigã sẽn wʋm woto, b sũyã sãama ne ba-biis a yiibã." 
Matthew20:25 A Zeezi boola bãmb n yeele: «Yãmb miime tɩ soolem nanambsã so b nebã ne pãng n dɩt naam, la tɩ nin-kãsemsã weoogda b nebã." 
Matthew20:26 La a kõn yɩ a woto yãmb sʋk ye. Ned ning fãa sẽn dat n yɩ yãmb sʋkã nin-kãsenga, bɩ a yɩ yãmb sõngda." 
Matthew20:27 La ned ning fãa sẽn dat n yɩ yãmb taoor soaba, bɩ a yɩ yãmb yamba." 
Matthew20:28 Yaa woto yĩng la Ninsaal Bi-riblã wa yã. Ka tɩ nebã na sõng bãmb ye, la yaa tɩ bãmb na sõng nebã, la tɩ kõ b vɩɩmã, n yao n fãag neb wʋsgo.»" 
Matthew20:29 La bãmb sẽn yi Zeriko, neb kʋʋng wʋsg tũu a Zeezi." 
Matthew20:30 La zoens a yiib sẽn zĩ sorã noor wʋmame tɩ yaa a Zeezi n loogda, dẽ, b zẽka b koees n yeele: «Zu-soaba! A Davɩɩd Bi-ribla! Zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega.»" 
Matthew20:31 Neb kʋʋngã Tãsa bãmb n yeel-b tɩ b sĩndi. La b zẽka b koɛɛg n yɩɩd pĩnd n yeele: Zu-soaba! Davɩɩd Bi-ribla! Zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega. 
Matthew20:32 A Zeezi yalsame n bool-b n sok yaa: «Yãmb datame tɩ mam maan bõe n kõ‑yã?» 
Matthew20:33 La b yeelame: «Zu-soaba, d data d ninã pukri.»" 
Matthew20:34 La a Zeezi zoee bãmb nimbãanega, n sɩɩs b ninã. La tao-tao bala b ninã pukame, la bãmb tũu a Zeezi." 
Matthew21:1 Bãmb sẽn kolg Zeruzalɛm n ta Bɛtfaaze sẽn be oliiv tɩɩs tãngã sẽnẽ, a Zeezi tʋma b karen-biis a yiib" 
Matthew21:2 n yeel-b yaa: «Kẽng-y tẽng ning sẽn be yãmb taoorã. Yãmb sã n kẽ be bala, y na n yãnda bõn-yãang sẽn loe tɩ bõn-bil be ne-a. Lok-y-b n wa n kõ maam." 
Matthew21:3 Ned sã n yeel‑y tɩ bũmb bɩ y leok tɩ yaa Zu-soabã n dat-ba, la wakat-kãnga, a na n bas-b lame tɩ b looge.»" 
Matthew21:4 Bõn-kãng maaname tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã sẽn gomã paam pidsgu: 
Matthew21:5 «Yeel-y Sɩyõ nebã yaa: Ges-y-yã! Yãmb Rĩmã zaoo bõn-yãanga, bõn-bila, rũng b sẽn zombd biiga, n wat yãmb nengẽ ne sũ-bʋgsem wʋsgo.»" 
Matthew21:6 Karen-biisã kẽngame n tɩ maan wa a Zeezi sẽn yeel bãmbã. 
Matthew21:7 Bãmb talla bõn-yãangã ne bõn-bilã n wa, n paal b fut bõensã poɛy t'a Zeezi zombe." 
Matthew21:8 Neb kʋʋngã kẽer yɛɛda b fut sorã zugu, tɩ kẽerã kɛ tɩɩs vãad n gãneg sorã zugu." 
Matthew21:9 Neb nins sẽn dag n be a Zeezi taoorã ne neb nins sẽn pʋgd-b bãmbã rag n kelemdame n yetẽ yaa: «Hozaana a Davɩɩd Bi-ribla! Bark bee ned ning sẽn wat ne Zu-soabã yʋʋrã zugu! Hozaana hal saasẽ.» 
Matthew21:10 A Zeezi sẽn kẽ Zeruzalɛm, tẽngã fãa rãmbame tɩ b sokdẽ tɩ yaa yɛ ned la woto?" 
Matthew21:11 Kʋʋngã rag n leokdame tɩ yaa a Zeezi, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs sẽn yit Nazarɛt sẽn be Galɩle soolem." 
Matthew21:12 A Zeezi kẽe wẽnd doogã zakẽ n dig neb nins fãa sẽn dag n koosd la b raad wẽnd doogã zakẽ wã. Bãmb leeba ligd tekdbã taabl‑dãmba, la wal-koaasdbã goeelse." 
Matthew21:13 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: «A gʋlsame tɩ b na n boola mam doogã tɩ pʋʋsg roogo.» La yãmba, yãmb maan-a lame t'a lebg wagda geongo." 
Matthew21:14 Zoens la wobs kolga a Zeezi wẽnd doogẽ wã, la a Zeezi maag-b lame." 
Matthew21:15 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã sẽn yã bõn-yɛɛsds nins a Zeezi sẽn maanã, la kambã sẽn kaasd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã n yetẽ tɩ «hozaana a Davɩɩd Bi-riblã», b sũyã puugame." 
Matthew21:16 La bãmb soka a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb wʋmda kambã sẽn yetã bɩ?» A Zeezi leoka bãmba: N-yẽe, la m sokda yãmb y sã n nan ka karem gom-kãensã sẽn be gʋls sõmyã pʋgẽ wã sẽn yet tɩ: «Yãmb paama pẽgr sẽn yit kom-bãooneg la kamb sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ noyẽ?»" 
Matthew21:17 A Zeezi basa bãmb be n yi tẽngã n kẽng Betani n tɩ pa be yʋn-kãnga. 
Matthew21:18 La yibeoogo, a Zeezi sẽn wa n lebg n lebd Zeruzalɛmã, kom yõka bãmba." 
Matthew21:19 La bãmb yãa kankang sẽn be sorã noore. Bãmb kẽngame n tɩ mik t'a ka tar biis ye, yaa vãad bala. La b yeel-a lame yaa: «Fo kõn leb n wom biis ye, abada.» La wakat-kãng bala kankangã kʋɩɩme." 
Matthew21:20 La karen-biisã sẽn yã woto, a linga bãmba, tɩ b soke: «Kankangã yɩɩ wãn n kʋɩ zĩig pʋgẽ a woto?»" 
Matthew21:21 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ yãmb sã n tar tẽeb n ka sãmbdẽ, yãmb na n maana bũmb ning sẽn maan kankangã, la ka rẽ bal ye. Yãmb sã n yeel tãn-kãngã t'a yik a sẽn beẽ wã n kẽ ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ, a na n yɩɩ a woto bala." 
Matthew21:22 Yãmb sẽn na n pʋʋs n kos bũmb ning fãa ne tẽebo, y na n paamame." 
Matthew21:23 A Zeezi kẽe wẽnd doogẽ wã, la b sẽn zãmsd nebã wakate, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne tẽngã nin-kẽemb wa n soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa ne no-bʋg la yãmb maand bõn-kãngã, la yaa ãnda n kõ yãmb no-kãnga?»" 
Matthew21:24 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Mam me na n soka yãmb sokr a yembre. Yãmb sã n leok maam, mam na yaool n togs yãmb mam sẽn paam noorã zĩig ning n maand bõn-kãnga." 
Matthew21:25 A Zã lisgã yii yɛɛnẽ? Arzãn bɩ, bɩ ninsaalb nengẽ?» La b yẽsa ne taab n yeele: «Tõnd sã n leok t'a yii arzãna, b na n yeelame tɩ la yaa bõe tɩ tõnd ka tẽ bãmba?" 
Matthew21:26 La tõnd sã n leok t'a yii ninsaalb nengẽ, d tog n zoee neb kʋʋngã: Bala, b fãa tẽedame t'a Zã yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa.»" 
Matthew21:27 Dẽ, b leoka a Zeezi: «Tõnd ka mi ye.» T'a Zeezi lebs n leok-ba: «Mam me ka na n togs yãmb m sẽn paam noorã zĩig ning n maand bõn-kãngã wã ye.»" 
Matthew21:28 Yãmb tagsg yaa a wãna? Dao a yembr n dag n tar a kom-dibli a yiibu. Yẽnda goma ne pipi soabã n yeel-a: «M biiga, kẽng n tɩ tʋm m reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã rũndã.»" 
Matthew21:29 La a leokame: «Mam ka na n kẽng ye.» La yẽnda teka yam n kẽnge. 
Matthew21:30 Ba wã goma ne yiib-n-soabã n yeel yẽnda me a woto bala. La bi-kãng leokame n yeele: «M baaba, mam na n kẽngame.» La a yaool n ka kẽng ye." 
Matthew21:31 Bãmb b yiibã sʋka, bʋg n maan a ba wã raabo? La bãmb leokame: «Yaa pipi soabã.» La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ yaood dɛɛgdbã ne pʋg-yoaadbã na n denga yãmb Wẽnnaam soolmã pʋgẽ." 
Matthew21:32 Bala, a Zã waa yãmb nengẽ n wilg yãmb tɩrlem sore, la yãmb ka tẽ yẽnda ye. La yaood dɛɛgdbã ne pʋg-yoaadbã tẽe yẽnda. La baa ne yãmb sẽn yã bõn-kãngã, yãmb yam ka tek tɩ y tẽ-a ye.»" 
Matthew21:33 Kelg-y yel-bũnd a to. Yir soab a yembr n dag n sel reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgo, n wẽ yãgr n gũbg-a, la a tuk reezẽ rãam wẽkr bok a pʋgẽ, la me gãosgo, n dɩk-a n peng reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg koaadba, la a yi n tog sore." 
Matthew21:34 Reezẽ wã yãgsg wakat sẽn kolge, yẽnda tʋma a tʋmtʋmdb reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã nengẽ tɩ b tɩ reeg reezẽ wã." 
Matthew21:35 La reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã yõga tʋmtʋmdbã n pãb a yembre, n kʋ a yembre la b lob a tãab soabã ne kuga." 
Matthew21:36 Yẽnda leb n tʋma tʋmtʋmdb a taaba, sõor sẽn yɩɩd pĩnd dãmbã, la b maana bãmb me a woto." 
Matthew21:37 A wa n baas n tʋma a meng bi-ribl bãmb nengẽ n yet a sũurẽ a woto: «B na n waoog-a lame.» 
Matthew21:38 La reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã sẽn yãnd biigã, b yẽsa ne taab a woto: Yaa yõwã n na n wa soog a ba wã paoongã fãa. Wa-y tɩ d kʋ-a tɩ paoongã lebg tõnd dẽnda." 
Matthew21:39 La bãmb yõka biigã n yiis reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã n kʋ. 
Matthew21:40 Moasã, reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã soab sã n wa, a na n maana koaadb kãens bõe?" 
Matthew21:41 Bãmb leoka a Zeezi yaa: «A na n kɩtame tɩ nin-wẽn‑kãens ki nimbãan-kũum, la a rɩk pʋʋgã n peng koaadb a taab sẽn na kõ yẽnda reezẽ wã a bɩʋʋng wakate.»" 
Matthew21:42 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Yãmb nan ka karem gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yetã la? «Kugr ning tãn-metbã sẽn zãgsã, n lebg roogã pãng kugri, a soakã zĩig kugri. Yaa Zu-soabã n kɩt t'a lebg a woto, la a yaa bõn-kãseng tõnd nifẽ.»" 
Matthew21:43 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ b na n deega Wẽnnaam soolmã yãmb nugẽ n kõ buud a to sẽn na wom soolmã biisi. 
Matthew21:44 [Ned ning sẽn na n lʋɩ kug-kãngã zug na n tõtmame. La kug-kãngã sẽn na n lʋɩ ned ning zugu, a na n beds-a lame.]" 
Matthew21:45 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm yel-bũndã, b bãngame tɩ yaa bãmb yell la a Zeezi dag n gomda." 
Matthew21:46 Bãmb baoome n dat n yõk a Zeezi la b rag n zoeta nebã, bala, nebã tẽedame t'a Zeezi yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa." 
Matthew22:1 A Zeezi leb n wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd n yeele: 
Matthew22:2 Arzãn soolem wẽnda wa rĩm sẽn maan pʋg-peegr tigr a bi-ribl yĩnga. 
Matthew22:3 Yẽnda tʋma a tʋmtʋmdb tɩ b tɩ yeel neb nins yẽnda sẽn dag n boolã tɩ b wa, la b rag n ka rat n wa ye." 
Matthew22:4 Yẽ leb n tʋma tʋmtʋmdb a taab n yeel-b tɩ b kẽng n tɩ yeel neb nins yẽnda sẽn dag n boolã n yeel‑ba: «Mam segla tigrã rɩɩb n sɛ, mam kʋʋ m nag-nobdse, la m rũm-nobdse. Bũmba fãa seglame n sɛ. Wa-y pʋg-peegr tigrã.»" 
Matthew22:5 La b sẽn ka nand boolgã yĩnga, b loogame. Bãmba rãmb kẽnga b pʋtẽ, tɩ bãmba rãmb kẽng leebgo." 
Matthew22:6 La neb a taabã yõga tʋmtʋmdbã n nams-ba, la b kʋ-ba." 
Matthew22:7 Rĩmã sũur yikame t'a tʋm a tãb-biisã tɩ b tɩ sãam nin-kʋʋdb kãense, la b yõog b tẽngã bugum." 
Matthew22:8 Dẽ, a yaool n yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Pʋg-peegrã tigr seglame n sɛ. La neb nins mam sẽn boolã dag n ka zems tɩ rɩ-a ye." 
Matthew22:9 Woto wã, kẽng-y so-tiisẽ wã n tɩ bool neb nins fãa yãmb sẽn na yã wã tɩ b wa.»" 
Matthew22:10 Tʋmtʋmdbã saa soayã zut n tigs neb nins fãa b sẽn yã wã, nin-wẽns la nin-sõamyã, hal tɩ tigrã roog pid ne nebã." 
Matthew22:11 Rĩmã kẽeme n na n ges nebã sẽn paam boolgã, la a yãnda rao a yembr be sẽn ka yer pʋg-peegrã tigr fuug ye." 
Matthew22:12 A yeel-a lame: «M zoa, fo maana a wãn n wa n kẽ ka n ka yeelg pʋg-peegrã tigr fuugu?» La raoã ka tõog n leok tɩ bũmb ye." 
Matthew22:13 Dẽ, rĩmã yeela tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Sẽb-y-yã a nao wã ne a nusã, n lob-a lik bida sẽn be yɩngã pʋgẽ. Yãbr la yẽn wãbr na n zĩnda be.»" 
Matthew22:14 Bala, b sẽn bool b rãmbã yaa kʋʋng wʋsgo, la b sẽn tũus b rãmbã sõor paoodame." 
Matthew22:15 Dẽ, Fariizẽ-dãmbã kẽng n tɩ yẽsa ne taaba, n na n bao sor ning b sẽn na n maan n bẽd a Zeezi ne b mengã noor goam n yõke." 
Matthew22:16 Bãmb tʋma b karen-biis kẽer ne a Erood poorẽ dãmb a Zeezi nengẽ. Bãmb yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saamba, tõnd miime tɩ yãmb yaa sɩd soaba, la yãmb zãmsda nebã Wẽnnaam soayã ne sɩd n ka zoet ned ye. Bala, yãmb ka get ninsaalbã sẽn yaa to-to wã ye." 
Matthew22:17 Togs-y-do. Ne yãmb tagsgo, noor beeme tɩ yao Sezaar yõor yaoodo bɩ?»" 
Matthew22:18 La a Zeezi sẽn mi bãmb sɩlmã, b yeel-b lame yaa: «Zãmb dãmba, bõe tɩ y bẽt maam?" 
Matthew22:19 Wilg-y maam ligd ning yãmb sẽn tar n yaood yõor yaoodã.» La b wilga bãmb deniye a yembre. 
Matthew22:20 La a Zeezi soka bãmba: «Maasmã ne gʋlsmã sẽn be lagfã zugã yaa ãnda rẽnda?» 
Matthew22:21 La b leokame: «Yaa Sezaar dẽnda.» Dẽ a Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Sã n yaa woto, bɩ y lebs Sezaar bũmb ning sẽn yaa Sezaar dẽnda, la y lebs Wẽnnaam bũmb ning sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam dẽnda.»" 
Matthew22:22 Gom-kãens yɛɛsa bãmba, la b basa a Zeezi n looge." 
Matthew22:23 Badaar bala, Saduusẽ-dãmbã, sẽn yet-b tɩ kũum vʋʋgr ka be wã kolga a Zeezi n sok-b sok-kãnga:" 
Matthew22:24 «Karen-saamba, a Moyiis yeelame tɩ ned sã n ki n ka bas biiga, a ba-biig na n deega pʋg‑kõorã n dog kamb a ba-biigã sẽn ki wã yĩnga." 
Matthew22:25 La ba-biis a yopoe n dag n be tõnd sʋka. Kãsmã peega paga, la a kiime. La a sẽn ka paam biig yĩnga, a basa a pagã ne a yao wã." 
Matthew22:26 Yiib soabã me yɩɩ a woto, tɩ ta tãab soabã, hal tɩ ta b yopoe wã fãa." 
Matthew22:27 Bãmb fãa sẽn ki n sɛ, pagã me kiime." 
Matthew22:28 Kũum vʋʋgrã wakate, bʋg ba-biisã a yopoe wã sʋk n na n soog pagã? Bãmb fãa la sẽn tall-a wã la!»" 
Matthew22:29 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb bee tudgr pʋgẽ, yãmb sẽn ka wʋmd gʋls-sõamyã wall Wẽnnaam pãngã võorã." 
Matthew22:30 Bala, kũum vʋʋgrã wakate, raop ka na n leb n peeg pagba, pagb ka na n kuil sɩdba, la b na n yɩɩ wa Wẽnnaam malegsã sẽn be arzãnã." 
Matthew22:31 La ne kũum vʋʋgrã yelle, yãmb nan ka karem Wẽnnaam sẽn yeelã la?:" 
Matthew22:32 ‹Mam yaa a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam, a Izak Wẽnnaam, la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam›? Wẽnnaam ka kũum Wẽnnaam ye, bãmb yaa nin-vɩɩs Wẽnnaam.»" 
Matthew22:33 La a Zeezi zãmsgã linga neb kʋʋngã sẽn dag n kelgd bãmbã. 
Matthew22:34 Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm t'a Zeezi kɩtame tɩ Saduusẽ-dãmbã noyã muma, b tigsa taaba." 
Matthew22:35 La bãmb ned a yembr sẽn yaa tõog karen-saamb soka a Zeezi sokr n na n mak bãmba: 
Matthew22:36 «Karen-saamba, tõodã sʋka, bʋg n yaa kãseng n yɩɩda?»" 
Matthew22:37 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Nong Zu-soaba fo Wẽnnaam ne f sũur fãa, la ne f sɩɩgã fãa, la ne f tagsgã fãa.»" 
Matthew22:38 Yẽnda n yaa pipi tõogo, n leb n yɩɩd b fãa." 
Matthew22:39 La tõog a to me sẽn pʋgd yẽnda n yaa kãseng wa yẽnda: «Nong f to wa f menga.» 
Matthew22:40 Tõodã fãa ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã koees fãa yẽbga tõ-kãensã b yiibã zutu. 
Matthew22:41 Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn tigmã, a Zeezi sok-b-la woto:" 
Matthew22:42 «Yãmb tagsda bõe ne Kirisã yelle? B yaa ãnda biiga?» B leokame: «A Davɩɩde.» 
Matthew22:43 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: «La yɩta a wãn t'a Davɩɩd gom ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãng n bool bãmb tɩ Zu-soaba?» bãmb yeelame: 
Matthew22:44 «Zu-soabã yeela mam Zu-soabã yaa: ‹Zĩnd mam dɩtgo, hal tɩ m kɩt tɩ f tab f bɛɛbã.›»" 
Matthew22:45 A Davɩɩd sã n boonda bãmb tɩ Zu-soaba, bãmb leb n yɩta wãn n yaa yẽnda biiga?" 
Matthew22:46 Ned baa a yembr ka tõog n yãnd gomd n leok bãmb ye. La sẽn sɩng ne badaare, ned baa a yembr ka leb n saag n sok bãmb bũmb ye." 
Matthew23:1 Dẽ, a Zeezi goma ne neb kʋʋngã la ne b karen-biisã n yeele:" 
Matthew23:2 Tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã bee a Moyiis zĩigẽ. 
Matthew23:3 Dẽ wã, maan-y bũmb nins b sẽn na n yeel yãmbã, la y tũ bũmb nins b sẽn na n zãms yãmbã, la y ra maan wa bãmb sẽn maandã ye. Bala, bãmb yetame la b yaool n ka maandẽ ye." 
Matthew23:4 Bãmb sẽbda zɩɩb sẽn yaa zɩsd n tʋkd nebã, n yaool n ka rat n sɩɩs-b ne b nug-bil ye." 
Matthew23:5 Bãmb maanda b tʋʋmã fãa nebã nin gesg yĩnga. Woto, bãmb maanda b pʋʋsgã gãn tɩ yaa yalemse, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ b futã zerd yaa wogdo." 
Matthew23:6 Bãmb nonga naam zĩndg zĩis rɩɩb zĩisẽ la karen-dotẽ. 
Matthew23:7 Bãmb nonga nebã pʋʋsem raasẽ, la b nongẽ tɩ nebã boond bãmb tɩ karen-saamba." 
Matthew23:8 La yãmba, ra kɩt-y tɩ nebã boond yãmb tɩ karen-saamb ye. Bala, yãmb karen-saamb yaa a yembr tãa, la yãmb fãa yaa ba-biisi." 
Matthew23:9 Da bool-y ned baa a yembr tãa dũni ka tɩ ba ye. Bala, ned a yembr tãa n yaa yãmb ba, soab ning sẽn be-a saasẽ wã." 
Matthew23:10 Da kɩt-y tɩ nebã bool yãmb tɩ taoor dãmb ye. Bala, ned a yembr tãa n yaa taoor soaba, yaa a Kirisi." 
Matthew23:11 Sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩd yãmb sʋkã, bɩ a yɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmda." 
Matthew23:12 Ned sã n zẽk a menga, b na n sik-a lame, la ned sã n sik a menga, b na n zẽk-a lame." 
Matthew23:13 Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb pagda arzãn soolmã tɩ nebã ka tõe n kẽ ye. Yãmb mensã ka kẽede, la yãmb ka basd neb nins sẽn dat n kẽ wã me tɩ b kẽ ye." 
Matthew23:14 [Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmba, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb sɛɛsda pʋg‑kõap paoongo, n pʋʋsd pʋʋs-wogd n belgd nebã. Bõn-kãng yĩnga, yãmb sɩbgr na n yɩɩ toog n yɩɩda.]" 
Matthew23:15 Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmba, la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmba, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb saagda ko-kãsengã ne tẽngã fãa n baood ned sẽn na sak yãmb kaorengã. La yãmb sã n paam neda, yãmb kɩtdame t'a lebg bug-tẽng ned sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩd yãmb naoor a yiibu." 
Matthew23:16 Yãmb sẽn yaa tɛtb sẽn yaa zoensã, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb yetame tɩ ned sã n wẽen ne wẽnd doogã, ka tar yell ye, la a sã n wẽen ne sãnemã sẽn be wẽnd doogẽ wã, yaa tɩlɛ t'a pidsi." 
Matthew23:17 Ka-yam dãmb la zoense, bʋg n yaa kãseng n yɩɩda, sãnemã bɩ, bɩ wẽnd doogã sẽn kɩtd tɩ sãnemã lebg bõn-sõngã?" 
Matthew23:18 Yãmb leb n yetame tɩ ned sã n wẽen ne tẽn-kugrã, rẽ ka be ye, la tɩ ned sã n wẽen ne kũunã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zugã, yaa tɩlɛ t'a pidsi." 
Matthew23:19 Zoensã, bʋg n yaa kãseng n yɩɩda, kũunã bɩ, bɩ tẽn-kugrã sẽn kɩtd tɩ kũunã lebg bõn-sõngã?" 
Matthew23:20 Ned ning sẽn wẽend ne tẽn-kugrã wẽenda ne tẽn-kugrã la ne bũmb ning sẽn be a zugã. 
Matthew23:21 Ned ning sẽn wẽend ne wẽnd doogã wẽenda ne roogã la ne ned ning sẽn so-a roogã. 
Matthew23:22 La ned ning sẽn wẽend ne arzãn wẽenda ne Wẽnnaam geerã la ne a soab sẽn zao a zugã. 
Matthew23:23 Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmba, la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb yãkda zẽ-vãad wa mant la anet la kume piig pʋɩɩre, la yãmb basda bũmb ning sẽn yaa kãseng n yɩɩd fãa tõogã pʋgẽ: yaa nimbãan-zoeere la sɩd maanego. Yaa bõn-kãensã la yãmb tog n maane, la y ra bas sẽn ketã me ye." 
Matthew23:24 Tɛtb sẽn yaa zoense, yãmb yoogda koom n kokd dũmpigli, n yaool n vend yʋgemde." 
Matthew23:25 Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmba, la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb nedgda ko-yũudum wamd ne laag poore, tɩ b pʋsã yaool n pid ne fãab la yĩng ratem sakre." 
Matthew23:26 Fariizẽ sẽn yaa zoanga, deng n nedg ko-yũudum wamdã ne laagã pʋg tɩ yɩ yɩlemde, tɩ b poayã me na yɩ yɩlma." 
Matthew23:27 Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmba la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb wẽnda wa yaad sẽn puus goor tɩ yaa pɛɛlga, tɩ b yɩngã ya neere, tɩ b pʋsã yaool n pid ne kũum kõaba, la rẽgd buud fãa." 
Matthew23:28 Yãmb me, nebã sã n get yãmb yɩngã, yãmb yaa wa nin-tɩrse. La pʋgẽ wã, yãmb pida ne zãmbo la tʋʋm-wẽnse." 
Matthew23:29 Yãmba, tõog karen-saam-dãmba, la Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmba, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb meta Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã yaado, la y nagsd nin-tɩrsã yaado," 
Matthew23:30 la y yetẽ tɩ yãmb sã n dag n vɩɩmdẽ y ba-rãmbã zamaanẽ, yãmb dag n kõn naagẽ bãmb n daag Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã zɩɩm ye." 
Matthew23:31 Ne gom-kãense, yãmb kaooda y mens bʋʋdo, n wilgdẽ tɩ yãmb yaa neb nins sẽn kʋ-b Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã kamba." 
Matthew23:32 Beneere, bɩ y kell n maan y yaab-rãmbã tʋʋmd n baase." 
Matthew23:33 Wiisã! Wag-toos buudu! Yãmb na n yɩɩ a wãn n põs bug-tẽng sɩbgrã? 
Matthew23:34 Yaa woto yĩng la mam tʋmd yãmb Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdba, la yam dãmba, la tõog karen-saam-dãmba. Yãmb na n kʋʋ kẽere, n ka kẽer da-pɩgs zutu. Yãmb na n pãba b taabã y karen-dotã pʋse, la y na n namsa bãmb tẽng-tẽnga." 
Matthew23:35 Sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ nin-tɩrsã fãa zɩɩm sẽn daag dũniyã zugã, sẽn sɩng ne a Abɛll tɩ ta a Berikɩya biig a Zakari yãmb sẽn kʋ wẽnd doogã ne tẽn-kugrã sʋkã, zɩɩm taal zĩnd yãmb zutu." 
Matthew23:36 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ bõn-kãens fãa na n waa zamaan‑kãngã nebã zutu." 
Matthew23:37 Zeruzalɛm! Zeruzalɛm! Fo sẽn kʋʋd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdba, la f lobd neb nins b sẽn tʋm fo nengẽ wã kugã! Naoor wʋsgo mam dag n tʋlg n tigsa f kambã wa no-yãang sẽn põgended a no-bi a pɩgsẽ, la yãmb ka sak ye." 
Matthew23:38 Gese, b na n basa y roogã vɩʋʋg ne-yã." 
Matthew23:39 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb ka na n leb n yãnd maam yɛs hal tɩ ta wakat ning yãmb sẽn na n yeele: «Bark bee soab ning sẽn wat ne Zu-soabã yʋʋrã zugu.»" 
Matthew24:1 A Zeezi sẽn yi wẽnd doogẽ wã n loogdẽ, b karen-biisã kolgame n wilg bãmb tɩ b ges a meebã sẽn yaa to-to" 
Matthew24:2 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Yãmb nee bõn-kãensã fãa? Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ kugr baa a yembr kõn pa a to zug ye. B na n leeb-b-la zãng n lubi.»" 
Matthew24:3 Bãmb zĩnda oliiv tɩɩs tãngã zugu, la bãmb karen-biisã waa bãmb nengẽ neb sẽn ka be be wakat n yeel-b yaa: «Togs-y tõnd wakat ning bõn-kãens fãa sẽn na n zĩndã, la bãnd ning sẽn na n wilg tɩ yãmb watame la tɩ dũni na n sɛɛme wã.»" 
Matthew24:4 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Gũus-y y mens tɩ ned da tudg yãmb ye. 
Matthew24:5 Bala, neb wʋsg n na n wa rɩk mam yʋʋrã n yetẽ: ‹Yaa maam la Kirisã.› La b na n tudga neb wʋsgo." 
Matthew24:6 Yãmb na n wʋmame tɩ b gomd zab yelle, la y wʋm zab rãamde. Yõk-y y mens n da yɛɛs ye. Bala, bõn-kãens fãa tog n waame. La ket n nan ka wakat sɛɛb ye." 
Matthew24:7 Soolem na n yika zabr ne soolem a to, tɩ rĩung yik ne rĩung a to, la kom ne tẽn-digimdg na n zĩnda zĩig-zĩiga." 
Matthew24:8 Yõwã fãa na n yɩɩ wa rogem toog sɩngr bala. 
Matthew24:9 Dẽ, b na n namsa yãmba, n kʋ yãmba, la soolem fãa nebã na n kisga yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
Matthew24:10 Bõn-kãng na n waa ne neb wʋsg lʋɩɩse. B na n zãmba taaba, n kisg taaba." 
Matthew24:11 Belgr no-rɛɛsdb wʋsg na n pukame la b na n belga neb wʋsg n tõoge. 
Matthew24:12 Wẽngã maaneg sẽn na n lebg wʋsgã yĩnga, neb wʋsg nonglem na n boogame." 
Matthew24:13 La ned ning fãa sẽn na n mao-a tɩ wakat ta, a na paam fãagre." 
Matthew24:14 Wẽnnaam soolmã koe-no-kãngã na n moona dũni gill fãa, tɩ yɩ kaset soolem toay‑toayã fãa nebã yĩnga. Dẽ, wakat sɛɛb na yaool n ta." 
Matthew24:15 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ yãmb sã n yãnd sãoong bõn-wẽngã Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Dãniyɛll sẽn dag n gom a yellã sẽn be zĩ-sõngẽ wã, bɩ sẽn karemd-a wã gũusi," 
Matthew24:16 bɩ neb nins sẽn be‑b Zʋʋde wã zoe n dʋ tãmsã," 
Matthew24:17 bɩ ned ning sẽn be bɛoong zug da sig n kẽ a roogẽ n na n dɩk bũmb be ye," 
Matthew24:18 la bɩ ned ning sẽn be a pʋʋgẽ ra leb a poorẽ n na n tɩ rɩk a fuug ye. 
Matthew24:19 Toog bee Pagb nins sẽn tʋtã, la sẽn yẽsemd kamb wakat-kãngã zugu." 
Matthew24:20 Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam tɩ y zoeesã ra yɩ waood wẽnd bɩ vʋʋsg daar ye. 
Matthew24:21 Bala, wakat-kãnga, to-kãseng n na n zĩndi, la a buud ka zĩnd hal dũni sɩngr wakat tɩ ta masã ye, la a buud kõn tol n zĩnd yɛs ye, abada." 
Matthew24:22 La da-kãens sõorã sã n dag n ka boogẽ, ned baa a yembr dag n kõn põsẽ ye. La b booga da-kãens sõor nin-tũusdsã yĩnga." 
Matthew24:23 Dẽ, ned sã n yeel yãmb tɩ Kirisã bee ka wall ka sẽnẽ, bɩ y ra tẽ a soab ye." 
Matthew24:24 Bala, belgr kiris-rãmb la belgr no-rɛɛsdb n na n puki. B na n maana bõn-kãsemse, la bõn-yɛɛsdse, hal tɩ b sã n tõe menga, b na n tudga nin-tũusdsã mense." 
Matthew24:25 Gese, mam pĩnd n togsa yãmb bõn-kãnga." 
Matthew24:26 Dẽ, b sã n yeel yãmb tɩ ad Kirisã bee we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ wã, bɩ y ra kẽng ye, wall ad b bee roogẽ wã, bɩ y ra tẽ ye." 
Matthew24:27 Sɩda, a wa sa-yãgb sẽn yit yaang n yãg n tãagd nin-taoorã, Ninsaal Bi-riblã waoong me na n yɩɩ a woto." 
Matthew24:28 Dɩgr sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, yɩbrend na tigs taab be.»" 
Matthew24:29 Tao-tao bala, ra-kãens toogã zugẽ, wĩndgã na n sobgame, kiuugã peelem kõn leb n zĩnd ye, ãdsã na n yii yĩngr n sʋʋge, la saasẽ pãensã na n digimdame." 
Matthew24:30 Wakat-kãnga, Ninsaal Bi-riblã bãnd na yaool n puk saasẽ. Buud nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã neb na n wiisame, la b na n yãnda Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn zao sawat n wat ne pãn-kãsenga la ne ziiri." 
Matthew24:31 Bãmb na n tʋma b malegs ne baor‑kẽeng koe-kãsenga, tɩ b tigs bãmb nin-tũusdsã sẽn be dũniyã kɩrems a naasã, hal yaang la nin‑taoore." 
Matthew24:32 Reeg-y kankangã yel-bũndã tɩ yɩ zãmsg y yĩnga. Kankang sã n wa n tãood wil-poala, n sɩng n tobdẽ, yãmb miime tɩ sig-noy kolgame." 
Matthew24:33 Woto me, yãmb me sã n wa n yãnd bõn-kãensã fãa, bɩ y bãng tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã kolgame la b bee dignoorẽ." 
Matthew24:34 Sɩd sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ zamaan‑kãngã kõn sa tɩ bõn-kãensã fãa ka maan ye." 
Matthew24:35 Saasẽ la tẽng na looge, la mam goamã kõn loog ye." 
Matthew24:36 Sã n yaa ne a daarã la a wakatã, ned baa a yembr ka mi ye: malegsã sẽn be arzãnã ka mi, Bi-riblã ka mi. Yaa ba wã bal n mi." 
Matthew24:37 Bũmb ning sẽn zĩnd a Nowe wakatã n na n zĩnd Ninsaal Bi-riblã waoong wakat me. 
Matthew24:38 Bala, rasem nins sẽn deng sãoong sa-kãsengã, nebã dag n dɩtame la b yũuda, n kẽed kãadem la b yiisd b kamb kãadem, hal tɩ ta daar ning a Nowe sẽn kẽ koom koglgã pʋgẽ wã." 
Matthew24:39 Bãmb dag n ka tẽed yell hal tɩ sãoong sa-kãsengã wa n kãag bãmb fãa. Na n yɩɩ a woto me Ninsaal Bi-riblã waoong wakate. 
Matthew24:40 Dẽ, raop a yiib sẽn na n be pʋʋgẽ n kooda: b na n dɩka a yembre la b bas a yembre." 
Matthew24:41 Pagb a yiib na n bee neerẽ n werda: tɩ b rɩk a yembre la b bas a yembre. 
Matthew24:42 Rẽ yĩnga, neend-yã, yãmb sẽn ka mi daar ning yãmb Zu-soabã sẽn na n wa wã yĩnga." 
Matthew24:43 Bãng-y tɩ yir soab sã n dag n bãngẽ wagdr sẽn na n wa yʋngã wakat ninga, a dag n na n gũume la a ka na n bas-a t'a poog a roogã ye." 
Matthew24:44 Woto yĩnga, yãmb me segl n sɛ, bala, Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n waa wakat ning yãmb sẽn ka tagsd tɩ b na waame wã." 
Matthew24:45 Dẽ wã, tʋmtʋmd bʋg n tar yam n yaa sɩd soaba, t'a soaalã lʋɩɩs-a a nebã taoore, t'a tõe n kõ-b rɩɩb wakat fãa sẽn segde?" 
Matthew24:46 Tʋmtʋmd‑kãng soaalã sã n lebg n wa n mik t'a maanda a woto, tʋmtʋmdã sũur na n yɩɩ noogo." 
Matthew24:47 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb t'a soaalã na n kɩtame t'a soog bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn tarã." 
Matthew24:48 La a sã n yaa tʋmtʋmd yoog sẽn yet t'a soaalã kaoosda waoongo," 
Matthew24:49 a sã n sɩng n pãb a zĩnd-n-taasã, a sã n naag rã-yũudbã n dɩtẽ la a yũuda," 
Matthew24:50 a soaalã na n waa daar ning a sẽn ka tẽeda, la wakat ning a sẽn ka mi ye." 
Matthew24:51 La a na n sɩbg-a-la sõama, tɩ bũmb ning sẽn paamd zãmb dãmbã paam-a, zĩig ning yãbr la yẽn wãbr sẽn na n zĩndã." 
Matthew25:1 Dẽ, arzãn soolem na n yɩɩ wa pa-kuil-n-dãmb piig sẽn dɩgs b fɩtl dãmb n yi n na n tɩ seg pʋg-paal sɩdã." 
Matthew25:2 Bãmb sʋkã neb a nu yaa yalemba, tɩ nu wã ya yam dãmba." 
Matthew25:3 Yalembã sẽn na n dɩgs b fɩtl dãmbã, b ka zɩ kaam ye." 
Matthew25:4 La yamã rãmb rɩgsa b fɩtl dãmbã, la b zɩ kaam ne tʋgdo." 
Matthew25:5 La pʋg-paal sɩdã sẽn kaoosd waoongã yĩnga, gõeem yõka b fãa tɩ b gũsi." 
Matthew25:6 Kɛleng n zẽk yʋn-sʋkã n yeele: «Pʋg-paalã sɩd watame! Yi-y n seg-y-yã-a.» 
Matthew25:7 Dẽ, pa-kuil-n-dãmb kãens fãa yikame n maneg b fɩtl dãmba." 
Matthew25:8 Yalembã kosa yam dãmbã tɩ b yãk b kaamã bilf n kõ-b tɩ bãmb fɩtl dãmbã sɩnga kũum. 
Matthew25:9 Yam dãmbã leok-b lame n yeele: «Ayo! Ka na n sek tõnd ne yãmb me ye. Kẽng-y ka-koaasdbã nengẽ n tɩ ra y mens yĩng tɩ rẽnda n são.» 
Matthew25:10 Bãmb sẽn wa n kẽnd n na n tɩ ra wã, pʋg-paalã sɩd taame. Pʋg-sadb nins sẽn dag n segl n sɛ wã tũu yẽnda n kẽ kãadmã tigr doogẽ, la b paga kʋɩlengã." 
Matthew25:11 Pa-kuil-n-dãmb a taabã yaool n wa waame n yeele: «M soaala! M soaala! Pak-y tɩ d kẽ!» 
Matthew25:12 La a leoka bãmb yaa: «Sɩd-sɩdã, mam ka mi yãmb ye.»" 
Matthew25:13 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y gũ! Bala, yãmb ka mi daarã, wall wakatã ye." 
Matthew25:14 Arzãn soolmã leb n na n yɩɩ wa rao a yembr sẽn dat n tog sore, n bool a tʋmtʋmdbã, n dɩk a paoongã n pʋɩ-ba." 
Matthew25:15 A kõo ned a yembr talã a nu, n kõ a yiib soabã talã a yiibu, la a kõ tãabẽ soabã talã a yembre, n zems ned kam fãa sẽn tõe n tall n tʋme, la a bas n tog sore." 
Matthew25:16 A sẽn loog bal yee, la sẽn deeg-a talã a nu wã loog yã, n tɩ tall-b n leeb n paam yõod talã a nu n paase." 
Matthew25:17 Sẽn deeg-a talã a yiibã me maana a woto, n paam yõod talã a yiib n paase." 
Matthew25:18 La sẽn deeg-a talã a yembr tãa wã tɩ tuka bok tẽnga, n bus a zu-soabã ligdi." 
Matthew25:19 Sẽn wa n kaoose, tʋmtʋmd-kãens zu-soabã waame n zĩnd ne-b n na n geele." 
Matthew25:20 Sẽn dag n deeg-a talã a nu wã kolgame, la a talla talã a nu wã a sẽn paamã n wa ne n yeele: «Zu-soaba, yãmb dag n kõo maam talã a nu. La ad talã a nu a taab mam sẽn tʋm n paame.»" 
Matthew25:21 A zu-soabã yeel-a lame: «Yaa sõama, tʋmtʋmd sõng sẽn maand sɩda! Fo maana sɩd ne bũmb bilfu, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo ges bũmb wʋsg yelle. Wa n paam pʋɩɩr ne f zu-soabã sũ-noogo.»" 
Matthew25:22 Sẽn dag n deeg-a talã a yiibã me kolgame n yeele: «Zu-soaba, yãmb dag n kɩsa maam talã a yiibu, la ad talã a yiib a taab mam sẽn tʋm n paame.»" 
Matthew25:23 A zu-soabã yeel-a lame: «Yaa sõama, tʋmtʋmd sõng sẽn maand sɩda! Fo maana sɩd ne bũmb bilfu, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo ges bũmb wʋsg yelle. Wa n paam pʋɩɩr ne f zu-soabã sũ-noogo.»" 
Matthew25:24 Sẽn dag n deeg-a talã a yembr tãa wã yaool n kolgame n yeele: «Zu-soaba, mam dag n miime tɩ yãmb yaa nen-kɛgeng soaba, n kẽebd y sẽn ka bʋdẽ, la y wʋkd y sẽn ka yɛdgẽ ye." 
Matthew25:25 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ rabeem yõk maam tɩ mam kẽng n tuk bok tẽng n solg y talã wã. Ad-y y talã wã! Deeg-y-yã‑a.» 
Matthew25:26 A zu-soabã yeel-a lame: «Tʋmtʋmd-wẽng sẽn yaa kʋɩɩma, fo rag n miime tɩ mam kẽebda m sẽn ka bʋdẽ ye, la m wʋkd m sẽn ka yɛdgẽ ye." 
Matthew25:27 Sã n yaa a woto, fo rag n tog n tɩ ningẽ‑la mam ligdã bãnkẽ, tɩ m sã n wa lebg n wa, bɩ m deeg-a ne yõodo." 
Matthew25:28 Deeg-y-yã a talã wã n kõ ned ning sẽn tar-a talã piigã. 
Matthew25:29 Bala, b na n kõo ned ning sẽn tar-a wã t'a paam hal wʋsgo, la sẽn ka tar-a wã, b na n deega baa bũmb bilf ning a sẽn tarã n bas-a." 
Matthew25:30 La sã n yaa ne tʋmtʋmd ning sẽn ka-a yõodã, lob-y-yã-a lik bida sẽn be yɩngã pʋgẽ, beenẽ na n yɩɩ wiisg la yẽn wãbr n na n zĩndi.»" 
Matthew25:31 Ninsaal Bi-riblã sã n wa ne b ziirã, la ne b malegsã fãa, b na n zaoonda b ziir geerã zugu." 
Matthew25:32 Soolem toay‑toayã fãa neb na n tigma bãmb taoore. Bãmb na n welga nebã ne taab wa rũm-kɩɩm sẽn welgd piis ne bʋʋsã. 
Matthew25:33 Bãmb na n ninga piisã b rɩtgo, la b ning bʋʋsã b goabga." 
Matthew25:34 Dẽ, Rĩmã na n yeela sẽn be‑b bãmb dɩtgã yaa: «Yãmb dãmb sẽn tar m ba wã barkã, wa-y-yã! Reeg-y soolmã sẽn dag n segl yãmb yĩng hal dũni naaneg wakatã tɩ yɩ y pʋɩɩre." 
Matthew25:35 Bala, kom yõka maam, la yãmb kõo maam dɩɩb tɩ m dɩ. Ko-yũud yõka maam, la yãmb kõo maam koom tɩ m yũ. Mam dag n yaa sãana, la yãmb sika maam y yiri." 
Matthew25:36 Mam dag n yaa beelle, la yãmb kõo maam fuug tɩ m yeelge. Mam dag n yaa bãada, la yãmb waa n gesa maam. Mam dag n bee bi-bees roogẽ, la yãmb waa n gesa maam.»" 
Matthew25:37 La nin-tɩrsã na n yeelame: «Zu-soaba, dabʋr la tõnd yãnd yãmb tɩ kom tar yãmb tɩ tõnd kõ yãmb tɩ y rɩ, wall tɩ ko-yũud tar yãmb tɩ tõnd kõ yãmb koom tɩ y yũ?" 
Matthew25:38 Dabʋr la tõnd yãnd yãmb tɩ y ya sãan tɩ tõnd sik yãmb d yiri, wall tɩ y ya beell tɩ tõnd kõ yãmb fuugu tɩ yeelge?" 
Matthew25:39 Dabʋr la tõnd yãnd yãmb tɩ y ya bãada, wall y be bi-bees roogẽ tɩ tõnd wa n ges yãmba?»" 
Matthew25:40 Dẽ, Rĩma na n leoka bãmba: «Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ wakat ning fãa yãmb sẽn maan bõn-kãens kom-kãensã sẽn yaa bõoneg n yɩɩda, la b ya mam ba-biisã, yaa maam la yãmb maan yã.»" 
Matthew25:41 Dẽ poore, b na n yeela neb nins sẽn be-b bãmb goabgã yaa: «Yãmb dãmb kãab-wẽng sẽn be y zutã, zãag‑y ne maam! Kẽng-y bugum sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa wã pʋgẽ, bugum ning sẽn segl sʋtãanã ne a malegsã yĩngã." 
Matthew25:42 Bala, kom yõka maam, la yãmb ka kõ maam dɩɩb tɩ m dɩ ye. Ko-yũud yõka maam, la yãmb ka kõ maam koom tɩ m yũ ye." 
Matthew25:43 Mam dag n yaa sãana, la yãmb ka sik maam y yir ye. Mam dag n yaa beelle, la yãmb ka kõ maam fuug tɩ m yeelg ye. Mam dag n yaa bãada, la mam zĩnda bi-bees roogẽ tɩ yãmb ka wa n ges maam ye.»" 
Matthew25:44 La bãmb me na n leokame yaa: «Zu-soaba, dabʋr la tõnd yãnd yãmb tɩ kom wall ko-yũud tar yãmba, wall y yaa sãan bɩ beelle, bɩ bãada, wall y be bi-bees roogẽ la keta tõnd n ka sõng yãmba?»" 
Matthew25:45 La b na n leoka bãmb yaa: «Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ wakat ning fãa yãmb sẽn tõdg n ka maan kom-kãens sẽn yaa bõoneg n yɩɩd fãa wã ned a yembr bõn-kãense, yaa maam la yãmb ka maane.»" 
Matthew25:46 La nin-kãens na n kẽe sɩbgr sẽn kõn sa pʋgẽ, la nin-tɩrsã na n kẽe vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa pʋgẽ." 
Matthew26:1 La a Zeezi sẽn gom gom-kãens n sɛ, b yeela b karen-biisã yaa:" 
Matthew26:2 Yãmb miime tɩ Pakã yaa ra-yɩta, la tɩ b na n yõka Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kɩs tɩ b ka ra-pɩk zugu." 
Matthew26:3 Woto, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tẽngã nin-kẽemb tigsa taab maan-kʋʋd kãsmã b sẽn boond t'a Kayifã zakẽ," 
Matthew26:4 la b seda ne taab n na n maan sɩlem n yõk a Zeezi n kʋ-ba. 
Matthew26:5 Baoosgo, b rag n yetame tɩ ka tog n yɩ tigrã pʋgẽ, tɩ rãmbg ra wa n yik nebã sʋk ye." 
Matthew26:6 A Zeezi sẽn be Betani n zĩ yĩng soab a Sɩmo roogẽ," 
Matthew26:7 pag a yembr kolga bãmba. A rag n zãada albatr tʋk sẽn pid ne tɩdar kaam, sẽn tar yũ‑noog wʋsgo, t'a ligdã raab yaa toogo. Bãmb sẽn dɩt wakate, pagã rɩka tɩdar kaamã n kiig a Zeezi zugu." 
Matthew26:8 Karen-biisã sẽn yã rẽnda wã, b sũyã sãamame tɩ b yeele: «Yaa bõe tɩ pagã rɩk tɩdarã n lob bõn‑bõn a woto?" 
Matthew26:9 Bala, b rag n tõe n koos-a‑la ligd wʋsg n dɩk n kõ naong rãmba.»" 
Matthew26:10 A Zeezi bãngame n yeel-ba: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb namsd pagã a woto? A maana tʋʋm-sõng mam yĩnga. 
Matthew26:11 Bala, naong rãmbã bee ne yãmb daar fãa, la maam, yãmb ka na n paam tɩ mam be ne yãmb daar fãa ye." 
Matthew26:12 Pagã sẽn walg mam yĩngã tɩdar kaamã, yaa mam mumb yĩnga." 
Matthew26:13 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ dũni tɛk fãa, zĩig ning fãa b sẽn na n moon koe-no-kãngã, b na n goma bũmb ning pagã sẽn maanã yelle, a tẽegr yĩnga.»" 
Matthew26:14 Dẽ, karen-biisã piig la a yiibã ned a yembr sẽn boond t'a Zʋdaas Iskaryo wã kẽnga maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã nengẽ" 
Matthew26:15 n tɩ sok-b yaa: «Yãmb na n kõo maam bõe tɩ m yõk a Zeezi n kõ-yã?» Woto, b kõ-a-la wanzuri ligd pis-tã." 
Matthew26:16 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, yẽnda baoo a sẽn na n bẽd ne bũmb ning n paam n yõk a Zeezi n yõk n kɩse." 
Matthew26:17 Bur sẽn ka rã-bɩllã wakat pipi daare, karen-biisã waa n soka a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb datame tɩ d segl Pakã rɩɩb yɛɛnẽ n kõ-yã.»" 
Matthew26:18 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Kẽng-y tẽngã pʋgẽ, a zagl yiri, n tɩ yeel-a tɩ yãmb karen-saambã n yet a woto: ‹Mam wakat kolgame. Yaa fo yirã la mam dat n maan Pakã tigr ne m karen-biisã.› »" 
Matthew26:19 Karen-biisã maana bũmb ning a Zeezi sẽn yeelã, la b segla Pakã tigrã." 
Matthew26:20 Zĩ-sobd sẽn ta, a Zeezi zĩnda ne b karen-biisã n na n dɩ." 
Matthew26:21 La b rɩɩbã wakate, a Zeezi yeelame: «Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb ned a yembr n na n yõk maam n kõ.»" 
Matthew26:22 Karen-biisã sũy sãama wʋsgo, tɩ ned fãa sok a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, yaa maam bɩ?»" 
Matthew26:23 B leoka bãmb n yeele: «Ned ning sẽn na n naaga maam n tʋm-a nug laagẽ wã, n na n yõk maam n kɩse.»" 
Matthew26:24 Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n looga wa b sẽn dag n gʋls b yellã to-to wã. La ned ning sẽn na n yõk-a Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kɩsã na paam toogo. Dao‑kãng sã n dag n ka rogẽ n são. 
Matthew26:25 A Zʋdaase, soab ning sẽn na n zãmb-a bãmbã sokame: «Karen-saamba, yaa maam bɩ?» A Zeezi leok-a lame: «Foom n yeele.»" 
Matthew26:26 Bãmb sẽn dɩtã wakate, a Zeezi dɩka buri. La b sẽn ning-a barka, b kao-a lame n kõ b karen-biisã n yeele: «Reeg n dɩ-y-yã. Yõwã yaa mam yĩngã.»" 
Matthew26:27 Rẽ zugẽ, b rɩka bõn-yũudla, La b sẽn ning-a barka, b kõo b karen-biisã n yeele: «Bɩ yãmb fãa yũ-y‑yã," 
Matthew26:28 bala, yõwã yaa mam zɩɩm, kãab-paalgã zɩɩm sẽn daag neb wʋsg yĩnga, yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Matthew26:29 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ mam ka na n leb n yũ reezẽ rã-kãngã hal tɩ ta daar ning mam sẽn na n yũ-a paalg ne yãmb m ba soolem pʋgẽ wã ye.» 
Matthew26:30 La bãmb sẽn yɩɩl yɩɩn-sõamyã, bãmb yiime n tees oliiv tɩɩs tãngã zugu." 
Matthew26:31 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Yʋn-kãngã bala, yãmb fãa na n zoee n basa maam. Bala, b gʋlsa a woto: ‹Mam na n wẽe rũm-kɩɩmã, la piisã sull na n sãeegame.›" 
Matthew26:32 La m vʋʋgrã zugẽ, m na n deng-y‑la Galɩle.»" 
Matthew26:33 A Pɩyɛɛr yeelame: «Baa nebã fãa sã n na n bas yãmba, mam yẽ kõn bas yãmb ye.»" 
Matthew26:34 La a Zeezi yeel-a lame: «Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta foom tɩ yʋn-kãngã bala, sẽn deng no-raoog kɛlenga, fo na n kɩɩsa naoor a tãab tɩ fo ka mi maam ye.»" 
Matthew26:35 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela bãmba: «Baa sã n na n yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ mam ki ne yãmba, mam ka na n yeel tɩ m ka mi yãmb ye.» La karen-biis a taabã me yeela a woto." 
Matthew26:36 Rẽ poore, a Zeezi kẽnga zĩig ning sẽn boond tɩ Zetsemaane wã ne b karen-biisã, la b yeel-b lame yaa: «Zĩnd-y ka tɩ m kẽng taoor bilf n tɩ pʋʋse.»" 
Matthew26:37 A Zeezi peega a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zebde kom-dibli a yiibã, la sũ-sãang ne sũur zɩɩb kãseng yõka a Zeezi." 
Matthew26:38 Dẽ, bãmb yeelame: «Sũ-sãang n tar maam hal n dat n kʋ maam. Pa-y ka n neend ne maam.»" 
Matthew26:39 La bãmb kẽnga taoor bilfu, n wõgemd n fõgen b nenga, n pʋʋs a woto: «M ba, sã n tõeeme, bɩ y kɩt tɩ bõn-yũudl‑kãngã loog n bas maam. Baoosgo, bɩ a ra yɩ mam sẽn dat ye, a yɩ wa yãmb sẽn datã.»" 
Matthew26:40 Bãmb lebg n waa b karen-biisã nengẽ n mik tɩ b gõeeme, la b yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Yãmb ka tõog n neend ne maam baa lɛɛr a yembr tãa bala!" 
Matthew26:41 Neend-y la y pʋʋse, n da wa n kẽ makr pʋgẽ ye. Sɩɩgã ratame, la yĩngã pãng paoodame.»" 
Matthew26:42 Bãmbã leb n vẽsga naoor a yiib soab n pʋʋs a woto: «M ba, sã n yaa tɩ ka tõe tɩ bõn-yũudl‑kãngã loog kal mam yũ-a, bɩ y tʋlsem maane.»" 
Matthew26:43 Bãmb waame n mik tɩ b leb n gõeeme, bala, b ninã rag n zɩsga ne gõeem." 
Matthew26:44 Bãmb basa b karen-biisã n leb n zãag naoor a tãab soaba, n leb n pʋʋs wa pĩndã." 
Matthew26:45 Dẽ poore, b leb n waa b karen-biisã nengẽ n yeel-ba: «Yãmb ket n gõee moasã n vʋʋsdẽ! Ade, wakat kolgame tɩ b na n yõk Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kõ yel-wẽn maandbã." 
Matthew26:46 Yik-y tɩ d kẽnge. Sẽn zãmb-a maamã kolgdame.» 
Matthew26:47 Bãmb sẽn nan ket n gomda, piig la a yiibã ned a yembre, a Zʋdaas waa ne neb kʋʋngo, maan-kʋʋdbã, kãsem-dãmbã ne tẽngã nin-kẽembã sẽn tʋme, la b ra zãada zabr sʋʋs ne roaya." 
Matthew26:48 Ned ning sẽn zãmbd a Zeezi wã rag n kõo nebã bãnd n yeele: «Ned ning mam sẽn na n mokã, yaa yẽnda la a Zeezi, yõk-y‑yã‑a.»" 
Matthew26:49 Dẽ, tao-tao bala, yẽnda kolga a Zeezi n yeele: «Karen-saamba, ne y yʋngo!» La a moka bãmba." 
Matthew26:50 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «M zoa, fo sẽn wa n na n maan bũmb ningã, bɩ f maane.» Woto, nin-kãens kolgame n gãd a Zeezi, n yõk-ba." 
Matthew26:51 Neb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Zeezi wã, ned a yembr taka a sʋʋg n wõog n kɛ maan-kʋʋd kãsmã tʋmtʋmd n fiuug a tʋbre." 
Matthew26:52 La a Zeezi yeel-a lame: «Lebs f sʋʋgã n sui a wʋʋgẽ. Bala, neb nins fãa sẽn na n zab ne zabr sʋʋga, zabr sʋʋg n na n kʋ-ba." 
Matthew26:53 Fo tẽedame tɩ mam ka tõe n bool m ba tɩ b tʋm maam malegs sẽn yɩɩd tusa-tusa sul piig la a yiib la? 
Matthew26:54 Sã n yɩ a woto, gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yet t'a tog n yɩɩ a woto wã na n yɩɩ a wãn n paam pidsgu.»" 
Matthew26:55 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi yeela neb kʋʋngã: «Yãmb waa ne zabr sʋʋse la ne roay n na n yõk maam wa m yaa fãada. Mam dag n zĩi ne yãmb wẽnd doogẽ wã daar fãa, n zãmsd nebã, la yãmb ka yõk maam ye." 
Matthew26:56 La bõn-kãens fãa maaname tɩ bũmb nins Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn gʋlsã paam pidsgu.» Dẽ, karen-biisã fãa basa a Zeezi n zoe." 
Matthew26:57 Neb nins sẽn yõk a Zeezi wã talla bãmb n kẽng maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Kayif zakẽ, zĩig ning tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne kãsem-dãmba sẽn tigs taabã." 
Matthew26:58 A Pɩyɛɛr pʋgla a Zeezi yɩɩg-yɩɩg halɩ n ta maan-kʋʋd kãsmã zakẽ, n kẽ n naag ne gũudbã n zĩẽ, n dat n ges yellã sẽn na n baas to-to." 
Matthew26:59 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne kaorengã yɛl-bʋʋdbã fãa rag n baooda kaset zĩrẽ n na n paam n dõd a Zeezi n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ba," 
Matthew26:60 la b ka paam ye, baa ne zĩrẽ kaset rãmb wʋsg sẽn wa wã. Neb a yiib n yaool n wa n yeele:" 
Matthew26:61 «Rao-kãngã yeelame tɩ yẽnda tõe n sãama wẽnd doogã n lebs n me-a dasem a tãab pʋgẽ.» 
Matthew26:62 Maan-kʋʋd kãsmã yikame n sok a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb ka leokd tɩ bũmb la? Yaa bõe leokr la yãmb tar ne nin‑bãmbã sẽn dõt yãmbã?» 
Matthew26:63 A Zeezi kell n sĩndame. La maan-kʋʋd kãsmã yeela bãmba: «Mam kota yãmb ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋr tɩ y togs tõnd yãmb sã n yaa Kirisi, Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã.»" 
Matthew26:64 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Yaa yãmb sẽn yeelã. Sẽn paase, mam yeta yãmb tɩ sẽn sɩng ne moasã, yãmb na n yãnda Ninsaal Bi-riblã, tɩ b zĩ Sẽn-Tõe-yã-fãa wã rɩtgo, la b zao yĩngr sawat n watẽ.»" 
Matthew26:65 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd kãsmã kẽesa a fut n yeele: «Bãmb paooga Wẽnnaam. Tõnd leb n baooda kaset dãmb n na n maan bõe? Yãmb la sẽn wʋm bãmb sẽn paoog Wẽnnaamã la! Yãmb tagsg yaa bõe?»" 
Matthew26:66 B leokame n yeele: «Bãmb togda ne kũum.» 
Matthew26:67 Dẽ, b tʋbsa a Zeezi nengã kolkoodo, la b pãb bãmb ne nug-gila. Neb kẽer laala bãmb pegs n yeele:" 
Matthew26:68 «Kirisi, togs-y bãngr gomd n wilg tõnd ned ning sẽn wẽ-a yãmbã.»" 
Matthew26:69 Wakat-kãnga, a Pɩyɛɛr dag n zĩi yɩng zakã pʋga. Tʋmtʋmd-poak a yembr kolga yẽnda n yeele: «Fo me rag n bee ne Galɩle ned a Zeezi.»" 
Matthew26:70 La a kɩɩsa nebã fãa taoor n yeele: «Mam ka mi fo sẽn dat n yeel tɩ bũmb ningã ye.» 
Matthew26:71 La yẽnda sẽn yik n kẽnd zakã noor sẽnẽ, tʋmtʋmd-poak a to n yãnd yẽnda n yeel neb nins sẽn be‑b beenẽ wã yaa: «Rao-kãngã dag n bee ne Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi.»" 
Matthew26:72 La yẽnda leb n kɩɩsame, n wẽen n yeele: «Mam ka mi rao-kãngã ye.»" 
Matthew26:73 Sẽn yɩ bilfu, neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã kolgame n yeel a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Sɩda yẽ, fo yaa bãmb ned a yembre, bala fo goamã bal wilgda fo sẽn yaa a soaba.»" 
Matthew26:74 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr sɩngame n kãab la a wẽen n yeele: «Mam ka mi rao-kãngã ye.» Tao-tao bala, no-raoog kelmame." 
Matthew26:75 La a Pɩyɛɛr tẽega a Zeezi sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã: «Sẽn deng no-raoog sẽn na n kelme, fo na n kɩɩsa naoor a tãab tɩ fo ka mi maam ye.» La a Pɩyɛɛr yii yɩng n yãb ne sũ-sãan-kãsenga." 
Matthew27:1 Beoogã sẽn vẽege, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tẽngã nin-kẽemb yẽsa ne taab a Zeezi yellã poorẽ n dat n kʋ-ba." 
Matthew27:2 La b sẽba bãmb n tall n tɩ kɩs Gʋvɛrneer a Pilate. 
Matthew27:3 A Zʋdaase, soab ning sẽn yõk a Zeezi n kõ wã sẽn yã tɩ b kaoo a Zeezi bʋʋd tɩ na n yɩ kũumã, a sũurã sãamame, la a talla wanzuri ligd pis-tã wã n wa n na n lebs maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tẽngã nin-kẽembã la a yeel-ba:" 
Matthew27:4 «Mam beegame, mam sẽn zãmb rao-kãng sẽn ka tar yellã tɩ b yõk-a wã yĩnga.» La b leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Tõnd toogo? Paka foom.»" 
Matthew27:5 Woto, a Zʋdaas loba ligdã wẽnd doogẽ wã la a yi n kẽng n tɩ sãrg a menga." 
Matthew27:6 Dẽ, Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã wʋka ligdã, la b yeel tɩ bãmb ka tar noor tɩ lebs-a wẽnd doogã ligdẽ ye. Bala, a yaa zɩɩm ligdi." 
Matthew27:7 La b sẽn yẽs ne taaba, b rɩka ligdã n da yagbã pʋʋg n maan sãamb yaad zĩiga." 
Matthew27:8 Yaa rẽnda n kɩt tɩ b boond pʋ-kãng tɩ zɩɩm pʋʋg hal tɩ ta rũndã. 
Matthew27:9 Woto, gomd ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn gomã pidsame. A yeelame: «B rɩka wanzuri ligd pis-tã, ligd ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn tall n da bãmbã," 
Matthew27:10 n kɩs n deeg yagbã pʋʋgo, wa Zu-soabã sẽn dag n yeel maam tɩ m maanã.»" 
Matthew27:11 A Zeezi yalsa Gʋvɛrneerã taoore. Gʋvɛrneerã soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa yãmb la Zʋɩf‑rãmbã dĩmã bɩ?» T'a Zeezi leok-a: «yaa wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.» 
Matthew27:12 La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne nin-kẽembã sẽn dõt bãmbã, bãmb ka leok gomd baa a yembre." 
Matthew27:13 Dẽ, a Pilat soka bãmba: «Yãmb ka wʋmd bũmb nins fãa b sẽn gomd n dõt yãmbã la?»" 
Matthew27:14 La a Zeezi ka leok yẽnd a gomd baa a yembr ye, la rẽ yɛɛsa Gʋvɛrneerã wʋsgo." 
Matthew27:15 Tigr fãa, Gʋvɛrneerã minim n yiisda bi-bɛɛg a yembre, neb kʋʋngã sẽn kot a soabã n base." 
Matthew27:16 Bãmb dag n tara bi-bɛɛg a yembr nebã sẽn mi a yell sõama, n boond t'a Barabaase." 
Matthew27:17 Dẽ, nebã sẽn tigmã, a Pilat sok-b lame yaa: «Nin‑bʋg la yãmb dat tɩ mam yiis n base? A Barabaas bɩ, bɩ a Zeezi b sẽn boond tɩ Kirisã?»" 
Matthew27:18 Bala, a rag n miime tɩ yaa sũ-kiir yĩng la b sẽn yõk a Zeezi n wa kõ yẽnda wã." 
Matthew27:19 La yẽnda sẽn wa n zĩ bʋʋdã zĩigẽ wã, a pagã tʋma ned t'a wa yeel-a yaa: «Da kẽes f toog nin-tɩr-kãngã yellẽ wã ye. Bala, rũndã, mam namsa wʋsg zãmsd pʋgẽ dao‑kãnga poorẽ.»" 
Matthew27:20 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã sagla nebã n tõog tɩ b kos a Barabaas la b kɩt tɩ b kʋ a Zeezi. 
Matthew27:21 Gʋvɛrneerã sok‑b lame yaa: «Bãmb b yiibã sʋka, bʋg la yãmb dat tɩ mam yiis n base?» Bãmb leokame: «A Barabaase.»" 
Matthew27:22 A Pilat leb n sok-b lame: «La woto wã, mam na n maana a Zeezi b sẽn boond tɩ Kirisã wã bõe?» La b fãa leokame: «Ka-y‑b da-pɩk zugu.»" 
Matthew27:23 Dẽ, Gʋvɛrneerã leb n sokame: «Yaa bõe yel-wẽnd la b maan‑yã?» La nebã leb n kelma ne pãng n yɩɩd pĩnd n yeele: «Ka-y‑b da-pɩk zugu.»" 
Matthew27:24 A Pilat sẽn mik tɩ yẽ maooda zaalem balã, la tɩ bʋrgã paasdame wã, a reega koom n nudg a nus neb kʋʋngã taoor n yeel yaa: «Nin-tɩr-kãngã zɩɩm ka be mam zug ye. Rẽndã bee ne yãmba.»" 
Matthew27:25 La nebã fãa leokame n yeel yaa: «Bɩ b zɩɩmã zĩnd tõnd ne d kambã zutu.» 
Matthew27:26 Woto, a Pilat yiisa a Barabaas n bas n kõ-ba. La yẽnda sẽn kɩt tɩ b pãb a Zeezi ne kalwaase, yẽnda rɩka bãmb n kõ nebã tɩ b tɩ ka-b da-pɩk zugu." 
Matthew27:27 Gʋvɛrneerã sodaas talla a Zeezi n kẽng sodaas naabã zakẽ, n tigs sodaasã fãa tɩ b gũbg bãmba." 
Matthew27:28 B yeesa a Zeezi futã, n lebs fu-miuug n yeelg bãmba." 
Matthew27:29 Bãmb wʋga gõos maanf n fõgen a Zeezi zugã, la b bao tãnwĩig n ning b nug-rɩtgã, n yaool n wõgemded bãmb taoor n paoogd bãmb n yetẽ yaa: «Hobragi! Zʋɩf-rãmb dĩmã, tõnd pʋʋsda yãmba!»" 
Matthew27:30 B tʋbsa a Zeezi kolkoodo, la b reegd tãnwĩigã bãmb nugẽ wã n wẽed b zugã." 
Matthew27:31 Bãmb sẽn yaal a Zeezi woto n sɛ, b yeega fuugã n lebs b futã n yeelg-ba, la b tall-b n na n tɩ ka ra-pɩk zugu." 
Matthew27:32 Bãmb sẽn yita, b yãnda Sirɛn dao a yembr sẽn boond t'a Sɩmo, la b modga yẽnda t'a tʋk a Zeezi da-pɩkã." 
Matthew27:33 Bãmb sẽn ta zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ Golgota, sẽn dat n togs tɩ zu-wang zĩigã," 
Matthew27:34 b kõo a Zeezi reezẽ rãam sẽn kalem ne tɩɩm sẽn yaa toog wa yam tɩ b yũ. La a Zeezi sẽn lembe, b ka sak n na n yũ ye." 
Matthew27:35 Sodaasã sẽn ka a Zeezi da-pɩkã zug n sɛ, b pʋɩɩ bãmb futã ne taaba, n maan poeer n na n bãng ned fãa sẽn na n paame, [tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã gomd pidsi. A yeelame yaa: «B pʋɩɩ mam futã ne taaba, la b maana bãnd n na n bãng ned ning sẽn na n soog-a mam fuug sẽn ka tar sẽnesmã.»]" 
Matthew27:36 Dẽ zugẽ, sodaasã zĩndame n gũ a Zeezi." 
Matthew27:37 B ninga gʋlsem bãmb zugẽ n wilgd bãmb kʋʋbã võore: «Rao-kãngã yaa a Zeezi, Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩma.»" 
Matthew27:38 B kaa fãadb a yiib ne bãmba: a yembr bãmb dɩtgo, a to wã bãmb goabga." 
Matthew27:39 So-loaagdbã dag n paoogda bãmba, n gõmsd b zut" 
Matthew27:40 n yetẽ: «Fo soab sẽn tõe n sãam wẽnd doogã n lebs-a n me rasem a tãab pʋgẽ wã, bɩ f fãag f meng wɛ! Fo sã n yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, bɩ f sig da-pɩkã zugu.»" 
Matthew27:41 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, la nin-kẽembã me yaala bãmb n yetẽ:" 
Matthew27:42 «Yẽnda fãaga neb a taaba, la a yaool n ka tõe n fãag a meng ye. Yẽnda ka Zʋɩf-rãmb dĩm la! A wa sig da-pɩkã zug la tõnd na tẽ-a.»" 
Matthew27:43 Yẽnda teega Wẽnnaam: bɩ Wẽnnaam fãag-a moasã, sã n yaa tɩ b nong-a lame. Bala, a yetame: «Mam yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.»" 
Matthew27:44 Fãadbã me b sẽn ka ne bãmbã me rag n tʋʋda bãmb a woto bala. 
Matthew27:45 Sẽn sɩng ne wĩnto-sʋk hal tɩ ta wẽn-kaoore, zĩigã fãa lebga lika." 
Matthew27:46 La wẽn-kaoorã wakate, a Zeezi zẽka b koɛɛg n gom ne pãng n yeele: «Eli! Eli! Lama sabaktani?» Sẽn dat n yeel tɩ: ‹Mam Wẽnnaam! Mam Wẽnnaam! Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb bas maam?›" 
Matthew27:47 Neb nins sẽn dag n be-b be wã, kẽer wʋma bãmb goamã n yeel tɩ b boonda a Eli." 
Matthew27:48 Tao-tao bala, bãmb ned a yembr wudgame n dɩk neoodg n los reezẽ rã‑miisgẽ, n sel tãnwĩig n tees bãmb n yeel tɩ b fõose." 
Matthew27:49 La neb a taabã yeelame tɩ b bas n gese, a Eli sã n na wa n fãag-a." 
Matthew27:50 A Zeezi leb n zẽka b koɛɛg n kelem ne pãnga, la b bas b sɩɩga." 
Matthew27:51 La gese, wẽnd doogã fu-lilldgã sɩnga yĩngr n pãrg n tãag tẽnga, n pasg a yiibu. Tẽngã rigimdame, pĩisã pusame," 
Matthew27:52 yaad pagsame, la nin-sõamyã wʋsg sẽn dag n ki wã vʋʋgame." 
Matthew27:53 Bãmb yii yaadẽ wã n kẽ tẽn-sõngã pʋgẽ, a Zeezi vʋʋgrã zugẽ. La b puka b mens ne neb wʋsgo." 
Matthew27:54 Sodaas koabg naabã ne neb nins sẽn dag be ne yẽnda n gũud a Zeezi wã sẽn yã tẽn-digimdgã ne bũmb ning sẽn maanã, rabeem kãseng yõka bãmb tɩ b yeele: «Hakɩɩka, dao-kãngã yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.»" 
Matthew27:55 Pagb wʋsg n dag n yas yɩɩg n getẽ. Yaa pagb nins sẽn yi hal Galɩle n yãag a Zeezi n na n ges b yellã: 
Matthew27:56 Yaa a Maari sẽn yit Magdala, la a Zak ne a Zozɛf ma a Maari, la a Zebde kom-dibli wã ma rag n bee pʋg-kãens sʋka." 
Matthew27:57 Zaabr sẽn ta, Arimate dao a yembr sẽn yaa arzɛk soab t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Zozɛf waame. Yẽnda me dag n yaa a Zeezi karen-biiga." 
Matthew27:58 Yẽnda kẽnga a Pilat nengẽ n tɩ kos a Zeezi kũumã. Dẽ, a Pilat yeelame tɩ b kõ-a." 
Matthew27:59 A Zozɛf dɩka kũumã, n vil-a ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg peend sẽn yaa sõama," 
Matthew27:60 n gãneg-a yao-paalg pʋgẽ. Yẽnda dag n kɩtame tɩ b tuk yao-kãng pĩig pʋgẽ a meng yĩnga. La a bilma kug-bedr n yẽd yaoogã noor la a looge. 
Matthew27:61 A Maari sẽn yit Magdala ne Maari a to wã dag n zĩi be tɩ b nensã tees yaoogã. 
Matthew27:62 Vẽkembeoogo, seglg daarã yɩ tɩ zaamẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã tũu taab n tɩ yã a Pilat" 
Matthew27:63 n yeel-a yaa: «N na! Tõnd tẽrame tɩ bɛlgd-kãngã dag n yeela a sẽn wa n ket n vɩ wã wakat t'a na n vʋʋga rasem a tãabẽ daare. 
Matthew27:64 Dẽ wã, bɩ y kɩt tɩ b gũ yaoogã hal tɩ ta dasem a tãab daarã, t'a karen-biisã da wa n zuk a kũumã la b yeel nebã tɩ b vʋʋg n basa kũum ye. Yaoolem belg-kãng na n yɩɩ wẽng n yɩɩg pipi soabã.»" 
Matthew27:65 A Pilat yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb tara gũudba. Bɩ y kẽng n tɩ gũ-a wa yãmb sẽn datã.» 
Matthew27:66 La b kẽngame n tɩ sog yaoogã noor kugrã, la b ning gũudb tɩ b gũ yaoogã." 
Matthew28:1 Vʋʋsg daarã loogr zugẽ, rasem a yopoe wã pipi daarã tõd-beoogo, a Maari sẽn yit Magdala, ne Maari a to wã kẽngame n na n tɩ ges yaoogã." 
Matthew28:2 La gese, tẽn-digimdg kãseng zĩndame. Bala, Zu-soabã malɛɛk yii arzãn n sigi, n wa bilg kugrã n zĩnd a zugu." 
Matthew28:3 Malɛɛkã dag n wẽnda wa sa-yãgbo, la a fuugã yaa pɛɛlg fasɩ wa lampalga." 
Matthew28:4 Gũudba rigda ne rabeem n lebg wa kũum. 
Matthew28:5 La malɛɛkã goma ne pagbã n yeel-ba: «Sã n yaa ne yãmba, bɩ y ra yɛɛs ye. Mam miime tɩ yãmb baooda a Zeezi b sẽn ka da-pɩk zugã." 
Matthew28:6 Bãmb ka be ka ye. Bala, b vʋʋga wa b sẽn dag n yeelã. Wa n ges-y zĩig ning b sẽn dag n gãe wã," 
Matthew28:7 la y kẽng tao-tao n tɩ togs b karen-biisã tɩ b vʋʋgame n bas kũum. La ade, b renga yãmb taoor Galɩle. Yaa be la yãmb na n yãnd bãmba. Ade, mam togsa yãmba.»" 
Matthew28:8 Dẽ, bãmb yii yaoogã zĩigẽ tao-tao ne rabeem, la ne sũ-no-kãsenga, la b zoeeme n tɩ togs karen-biisã koɛɛgã." 
Matthew28:9 La gese, a Zeezi wa n sega pagbã n yeel-b yaa: «Mam pʋʋsda yãmba.» Bãmb kolgame n gãd a Zeezi nao wã n waoog-ba." 
Matthew28:10 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Da zoe-y rabeem ye. Kẽng n tɩ yeel-y m ba-biisã tɩ b kẽng Galɩle. Yaa be la b na n yãnd maam.» 
Matthew28:11 Pagbã sẽn nan ket n be sorẽ, gũudbã neb kẽer kẽnga tẽngã pʋgẽ n tɩ togs maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã." 
Matthew28:12 Bãmb ne nin-kẽembã tigma taab n yãnd taaba, la b kõo sodaasã ligd wʋsg" 
Matthew28:13 n yeel-b tɩ b yeel tɩ bãmb gũsame t'a Zeezi karen-biisã wa zuk kũumã," 
Matthew28:14 la Gʋvɛrneerã sã n wʋme, bãmb mensã na n goma ne-a n tõog t'a ka maan bãmb bũmb ye." 
Matthew28:15 Sodaasã deega ligdã, la b maana wa b sẽn yeel bãmbã. La gom-kãng kell n saaga Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋk hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Matthew28:16 Karen-biis piig la a yembrã kẽnga Galɩle, tãng ning a Zeezi sẽn dag n bilg bãmbã zugu." 
Matthew28:17 La b sẽn yãnd a Zeezi, b waooga bãmba. La neb kẽer maana sãmbse." 
Matthew28:18 A Zeezi kolgame n gom ne bãmb a woto: «Wẽnnaam kõo maam pãng fãa sẽn be yĩngri, la sẽn be tẽng zugu." 
Matthew28:19 Bɩ y kẽng n maan nebã buud fãa tɩ yɩ mam karen-biisi, n lis bãmb ne Ba, la Bi-ribla, la Sɩɩg-sõng yʋʋre," 
Matthew28:20 la y zãms bãmb tɩ b sak bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maanã. La gese, mam bee ne yãmb wakat fãa, hal tɩ ta wakat sɛɛbo.»" 
Mark1:1 Koe-noog ning sẽn togsd a Zeezi Kiris sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã yɛlã sɩngr la a woto. 
Mark1:2 Bõn‑kãng zemsa wa sẽn gʋls Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sebrã pʋgã: «Ade, mam tʋmda m koe-toagsd t'a reng fo taoor n maneg f sorã." 
Mark1:3 Yaa yẽnda koɛɛg n kelemd we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ n yetẽ: Maneg-y Zu-soabã sore, rems-y bãmb so-bugsã tɩ yɩ tɩrse.»" 
Mark1:4 A Zã rag n bee weoogẽ n lisd nebã la a moondẽ n yetẽ tɩ b tek yam n deeg lisg b yel-wẽnã sugr yĩnga. 
Mark1:5 Zʋʋde tẽmsã neb fãa ne Zeruzalɛm dãmbã rag n yitame n kẽngd yẽnda nengẽ, n vẽnegd n togsd b yel-wẽnã t'a lisd bãmb Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ." 
Mark1:6 A Zã fuugã rag n wʋga ne yʋgemd kõbdo. A sẽbdgã rag n yaa gãongo, la a rɩɩb rag n yaa sʋy la weoog sɩɩdo." 
Mark1:7 Yẽnda rag n moondame n yetẽ: «Ned sẽn yɩɩd maam n na n pʋgl maam n wa. Mam pʋs n ka zems tɩ zõond n lok bãmb neooda loets ye. 
Mark1:8 Mam lisa yãmb koomẽ, la bãmb na n lisa yãmb Sɩɩg-sõng pʋgẽ.»" 
Mark1:9 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi yii Galɩle Nazarɛt n wa, la a Zã lisa bãmb Zʋrdẽ koomã pʋgẽ." 
Mark1:10 La b sẽn yit koomẽ wã, b yãnda yĩngr sẽn pake, la Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn wẽnd wall sẽn sigd bãmb zugu." 
Mark1:11 Koɛɛg zĩnda saasẽ n yeele: «Fo yaa mam Bi-ribl-nongr sẽn ta mam yam zãnga.» 
Mark1:12 Tao-tao bala, Sɩɩgã kɩtame t'a Zeezi kẽng we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ." 
Mark1:13 Bãmb paa be rasem pis-naas tɩ Sʋtãanã mak bãmba. B rag n bee be ne we-rũmsi, la malɛɛk-rãmb n dag n sõngd bãmba." 
Mark1:14 B sẽn kẽes a Zã bi-bees roogã zugẽ, a Zeezi kẽnga Galɩle n tɩ moond koe-noogã n yetẽ:" 
Mark1:15 «Wakatã taame, la Wẽnnaam soolem kolgame. Tek-y yam n bas y yel-wẽnã la y tẽ koe-noogã.»" 
Mark1:16 Bãmb sẽn tũud Galɩle ko‑kãsengã noore, bãmb yãnda a Sɩmo ne a ba-biig a Ãndere, tɩ b lobd zĩm-gãmbr ko‑kãsengã pʋgẽ. Bala, b rag n yaa zĩm-yõagdba." 
Mark1:17 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Wa‑y n tũ-y maam, tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ y lebg nin-baoodba.»" 
Mark1:18 Bãmb basa b zĩm-gãmba wã tao-tao n tũ a Zeezi. 
Mark1:19 Bãmb sẽn kẽng taoor bilfu, b yãnda a Zebde kom-dibli a Zak ne a ba-biig a Zã. Bãmb me rag n bee koom koglgẽ n tõgd b zĩm-gãmba." 
Mark1:20 Tao-tao bala, a Zeezi boola bãmba, la b basa b ba a Zebde koglgã pʋgẽ ne tʋmtʋmdbã n tũ bãmba." 
Mark1:21 A Zeezi ne b karen-biisã kẽe Kapɛrnaom tẽnga pʋga. La vʋʋsg daarã sẽn ta, a Zeezi kẽe karen-doogẽ wã n sɩng n zãms nebã." 
Mark1:22 Bãmb zãmsgã yɛɛsa nebã, bala, b zãmsa ne noore, la ka wa tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ye." 
Mark1:23 La rao a yembr n dag n be bãmb karen-doogẽ wã tɩ zĩn-dẽgd tar-a. A kelmame n yeele: 
Mark1:24 «Zeezi sẽn yit Nazarɛte, yaa bõe la y rat ne tõndo? Yãmb waame n na n menes tõnd laa? Mam mii yãmb sẽn yaa ned ninga. Yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam pʋ‑peelem soaba.»" 
Mark1:25 A Zeezi leng-a lame n yeele: «Sĩnd la f yi n bas raoã.» 
Mark1:26 Zĩn-dẽgdã kelma ne pãnga, n yi n bas raoã t'a rigd wʋsgo." 
Mark1:27 Nebã fãa yɛɛsame n sok taaba: «Bõn-kãngã yaa bõe? Koe-paalga! B tãsda zĩn-dãmb mens hal tɩ b sakd-ba.» 
Mark1:28 Tao-tao bala, bãmb yʋʋrã saaga zĩigã fãa Galɩle soolmã pʋga." 
Mark1:29 A Zeezi ne b karen-biisã sẽn yi karen-doogẽ wã, a Zeezi ne a Zak la a Zã kẽnga a Sɩmo ne a Ãndere rãmb zakẽ." 
Mark1:30 A Sɩmo pagã ma yĩns rag n wɩngame t'a gãeyã. La a Zeezi sẽn ta bala, b togs-b lame." 
Mark1:31 Bãmb kolgame n gãd a nug n sõng-a t'a yiki, la wakat‑kãng bala, a yĩn-wɩngrã sigame t'a yik n maan-b sãando." 
Mark1:32 La zĩ-sobdo, wĩndgã lʋɩɩs poore, nebã talla bãad-dãmbã fãa ne neb nins zĩn-dãmb sẽn tarã n wa a Zeezi nengẽ." 
Mark1:33 La tẽngã nebã tigma taab roogã noore. 
Mark1:34 A Zeezi maaga neb wʋsgo, bãas buud toay-toay sẽn dag n tar-ba. Bãmb diga zĩn-dãmb wʋsg me n ka sak tɩ b gom ye. Bala, zĩn-dãmbã rag n mii bãmba." 
Mark1:35 A Zeezi sãda beoogo, tɩ zĩigã ket n yaa lika, n kẽng zĩig neb sẽn ka be n tɩ pʋʋse." 
Mark1:36 A Sɩmo ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã baoo bãmba. 
Mark1:37 La b sẽn yãnd a Zeezi, b yeel-b lame yaa: «Nebã fãa baooda yãmba.»" 
Mark1:38 La a Zeezi leoka bãmba: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng tẽn-kɩremsã, tɩ m tɩ moon koe-noogã beenẽ me, tɩ yaa rẽnda yĩng la m wa-yã.»" 
Mark1:39 Bãmb saaga Galɩle n moon koe-noogã karen-dotã pʋse, la b rig zĩn-dãmba." 
Mark1:40 Ned a yembr yĩn-gãong bãag sẽn tar n wa a Zeezi nengẽ n yĩgimd n bõos bãmb ne nimbãaneg n yeele: «Yãmb sã n data, y tõe n maaga maam tɩ m yɩ yɩlemde.»" 
Mark1:41 Raoã nimbãaneg yõka a Zeezi tɩ b tẽeg b nug n sɩɩs-a n yeele: «Mam datame, lebg yɩlemde.»" 
Mark1:42 Wakat-kãng bala, yĩn-gãongã bãag loog n bas-a lame t'a lebg yɩlemde." 
Mark1:43 Wakat kãng bala, a Zeezi yeel-a-lame t'a looge," 
Mark1:44 n keoog-a neer n yeele: «Gũus n da wa yeel ned tɩ bũmb ye. La f kẽng n tɩ wilg f meng maan-kʋʋdã, la f maan maoong ning a Moyiis sẽn wilgã, f yɩlgr yĩnga, t'a yɩ kaset nebã yĩnga.»" 
Mark1:45 La raoã sẽn looge, a puka yellã n moone, hal t'a Zeezi ka leb n tõe n kẽ tẽngẽ tɩ ka yɩ ne soosg ye. Bãmb zĩnda zĩis neb sẽn ka be, la neb rag n yita zĩig zãng fãa n wat bãmb nengẽ." 
Mark2:1 Rasem bilf rẽ loogr poore, a Zeezi lebg n waa Kapɛrnaom, la nebã wʋmame tɩ b bee roogẽ." 
Mark2:2 Nebã tigma taab hal wʋsgo, tɩ weer ka be baa rignoorẽ wã ye. La a Zeezi moona bãmb Wẽnnaam koɛɛga." 
Mark2:3 B talla ned a yembr sẽn ki bogr n wa bãmb nengẽ, la yaa neb a naas n tʋk-a." 
Mark2:4 La bãmb sẽn ka tõe n tall-a n ta a Zeezi nengẽ nebã waooglem yĩngã, b laka roogã zugu, zĩig ning a Zeezi sẽn yɛsã n tũnug võ-kãnga n sik ki-bogrã ne a gãagã." 
Mark2:5 A Zeezi sẽn yãnd b tẽebã, b yeela sẽn ki-a bogrã yaa: «M biiga, fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugri.»" 
Mark2:6 Tõog karen-saam-dãmb kẽer sẽn dag n zĩ be rag n tagsda b sũurẽ woto: 
Mark2:7 Yaa a wãn tɩ rao-kãnga gomd a woto? Bãmb paoogda Wẽnnaam. Ãnda n tõe n kõ yel-wẽn sugr tɩ ka Wẽnnaam b yembr tãa? 
Mark2:8 A Zeezi bãnga bũmb nins b sẽn tagsd b sũurẽ wã n sok-b yaa: Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tagsd woto y sũyã pʋse? 
Mark2:9 Bʋg n yaa naana n yɩɩd tɩ yeel ki-bogr soabã: Fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugri, bɩ f yik n dɩk f gãagã n kẽne?" 
Mark2:10 La yaa sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã tara pãn‑tõog dũni zug tɩ kõ yel-wẽn sugri. 
Mark2:11 La a Zeezi yeela ki-bogr soabã yaa: Mam yeta foom tɩ f yik n dɩk f gãagã n kuili. 
Mark2:12 Tao-tao bala, raoã yikame n dɩk a gãagã n loog nebã fãa nifẽ, tɩ b fãa yɛɛs n pẽg Wẽnnaam n yeele: «Tõnd nan ka yã bũmb a woto nand ye.»" 
Mark2:13 A Zeezi leb n kẽnga ko‑kãsengã noore, la kʋʋngã fãa waa bãmb nengẽ. La bãmb zãms-b lame." 
Mark2:14 A Zeezi sẽn loogdã, b yãnda a Alfe biig a Leevi t'a zĩ yaood deegr zĩigẽ. Bãmb yeela yẽnda yaa: Tũ maam. La a Leevi yikame n tũ bãmba." 
Mark2:15 A Zeezi sẽn zĩ a Leevi roogẽ n dɩtẽ, yaood dɛɛgdbã ne yel-wẽn maandb wʋsg me lagmame n dɩt ne bãmba, ne b karen-biisã. Bala, b yɩɩ wʋsg n tũ bãmba." 
Mark2:16 Tõog karen-saam-dãmbã sẽn yaa Fariizẽ-dãmb sẽn yã t'a Zeezi rɩt ne yaood dɛɛgdbã la ne yel-wẽn maandbã, b soka b karen-biisã yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ bãmb dɩt la b yũud ne yaood dɛɛgdbã la ne yel-wẽn maandbã?" 
Mark2:17 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm woto, b yeela bãmb yaa: «Nin-kegems ka baood tɩp ye, yaa bãad-dãmb n baood‑a. Mam ka wa n na n bool nin-tɩrs ye, la yaa yel-wẽn maandbã.»" 
Mark2:18 A Zã karen-biisã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã da loeta noore. Nebã wa n soka a Zeezi: Yaa bõe t'a Zã karen-biisã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã karen-biisã loet noor tɩ yãmb karen-biisã ka loetẽ? 
Mark2:19 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: Ned sã n maan kãadem n bool a zo‑rãmba, nin-kãens tõe n loee noor wakat ning pʋg‑sɩdã sẽn ket n be ne-bã sɩda? Bãmb sã n ket n be ne pʋg-paalã sɩda, b ka tõe n loe noor ye." 
Mark2:20 Daar n wat tɩ b na n yiis pʋg-paal sɩdã b sʋka. Dẽ, wakat-kãnga, b na yaool n loe noore." 
Mark2:21 Ned ka rɩkd peen-paalg n lisg fu-kʋdg ye, bala, peen-paalgã na n kɩtame tɩ fu-kʋdgã kẽeg n yɩɩg pĩnda." 
Mark2:22 Ned ka be sẽn na n sui reezẽ rã-paalg ko-wao-kʋdẽ ye. Sã n ka rẽ, ko-waoosã na pusi, tɩ rãamã raage, la ko-waoosã na n yɩɩ bõne. Reezẽ rã-paalg tog n suii ko-wao-paals pʋse." 
Mark2:23 Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daar a yembre, a Zeezi ne b karen-biisã dag n pɩʋʋgda pʋto, la b karen-biisã sẽn kẽndã, b sɩngame n yãgs koodo." 
Mark2:24 Fariizẽ-dãmbã yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Gese, yaa bõe tɩ karen‑biisã maand bũmb ning sẽn ka zems tɩ maan vʋʋsg daare?»" 
Mark2:25 A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Yãmb zɩ n karem bũmb ning a Davɩɩd sẽn maan b yel-pakrã wakatã la? Komã sẽn yõk yẽnda ne neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã laa? 
Mark2:26 Yẽnda sẽn kẽ Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã to‑to maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar wakatẽ, n dɩ kaset burã, la a yãk n kõ neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã tɩ yaool n dag n ka zems tɩ b rɩ, kal maan-kʋʋdbã balã laa?»" 
Mark2:27 B rag n yet‑b lame: «Vʋʋsg raarã maana ninsaal yĩnga, la b ka maan ninsaal vʋʋsg daarã yĩng ye." 
Mark2:28 Woto yĩnga, Ninsaal Bi-riblã n so vʋʋsg daarã me.»" 
Mark3:1 A Zeezi leb n kẽe karen-doogã pʋgẽ, la rao a yembr n dag n be be t'a nug ki." 
Mark3:2 La Fariizẽ-dãmbã gũusa a Zeezi n dat n bãng b sã n na n maaga yẽnda Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsgã daare, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paam n dõd bãmba." 
Mark3:3 A Zeezi yeela rao ningã nug sẽn ki wã yaa: «Yik n yaas sʋk ka!» 
Mark3:4 La b soka Fariizẽ-dãmbã yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, noor beeme tɩ maan neer vʋʋsgã daar bɩ, bɩ tɩ maan wẽnga? Tɩ fãag ned bɩ, bɩ tɩ kʋ-a? La b sĩndame.»" 
Mark3:5 A Zeezi wẽneg n gesa b fãa ne sũ-yikri la ne sũ-sãanga, b sũyã sẽn diglmã yĩngã. La b yeela raoã yaa: «Tẽeg f nugã.» Raoã tẽegame la a nugã vʋʋgame." 
Mark3:6 Fariizẽ-dãmbã yiime n yẽs ne a Erood poorẽ dãmba tao-tao n bao b sẽn na n maan to-to n menes a Zeezi. 
Mark3:7 A Zeezi ne b karen-biisã kẽnga ko‑kãsengã sẽnẽ. La neb wʋsg yii Galɩle, la Zʋʋde, la Zeruzalɛm, la Yidume, la Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, la Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ tẽmse, n tũ bãmba." 
Mark3:8 Neb kʋʋng‑kʋʋng sẽn wʋm bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn maanã waa bãmb nengẽ. 
Mark3:9 A Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b pẽneg kogl-bil yam-yam wakat fãa bãmb yĩnga, tɩ kʋʋngã ra wa n dɩdg bãmb ye." 
Mark3:10 Bãmb sẽn maagd neb wʋsgã yĩng kɩtame tɩ bãad-dãmb wʋsg dag n maoodẽ n dɩdgd taab n dat n sɩɩs bãmba. 
Mark3:11 Zĩn-dãmb nins sẽn yaa rẽgdã sã n yãnd bãmba, b wõgemdeda bãmb taoor n kelem n yeele: «Yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.»" 
Mark3:12 La a Zeezi rag n tãsd‑b lame tɩ b sĩndi la b ra moon b yʋʋrã ye. 
Mark3:13 Rẽ zugẽ, bãmb dʋʋ tãngã n bool b sẽn dat b rãmbã tɩ b wa bãmb nengẽ." 
Mark3:14 Bãmb yãka raop piig la a yiib tɩ b pa ne bãmba," 
Mark3:15 tɩ b tõe n tʋm-b tɩ b tɩ moon koe-noogã, ne pãn-tõog tɩ rig zĩn-dãmba." 
Mark3:16 Ad raop piig la a yiibã bãmb sẽn yãkã: a Sɩmo b sẽn pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Pɩyɛɛre," 
Mark3:17 a Zak sẽn yaa a Zebde biigã, ne a ba-biig a Zã, a Zeezi sẽn pʋd b yʋy tɩ Boanergɛɛse, sẽn dat n yeel tɩ sa-kɛlems kamba," 
Mark3:18 a Ãndere, a Filipi, a Bartelemi, a Matye, a Toma, a Alfe biig a Zake, a Tade," 
Mark3:19 a Sɩmo sẽn boond tɩ zelot la a Zʋdaas Iskaryo, ned ning sẽn zãmb-a a Zeezi wã." 
Mark3:20 A Zeezi kuila yir ne b karen-biisã. La neb kʋʋng wʋsg tigma taab yɛs hal tɩ bãmb ka tar sẽk n na n dɩ ye. 
Mark3:21 A Zeezi roagdbã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, b waame n na n peeg-ba, bala, b rag n tagsdame t'a Zeezi rag n zʋbsdame." 
Mark3:22 La tõog karen-saam-dãmbã sẽn yi Zeruzalɛmã yeelame: Belzebull n so bãmba. Bãmb digda zĩn-dãmbã ne zĩn-dãmbã naab pãnga. 
Mark3:23 A Zeezi boola bãmba, n gom ne bãmb ne yel-bũnd n yeele: «Sʋtãanã na n yɩɩ a wãn n dig sʋtãana?" 
Mark3:24 Soolem neb sã n welg taab n gõdg n zabd ne taaba, soolem‑kãng na wã." 
Mark3:25 La yir a yembr neb sã n welg taab n gõdg n zabd ne taaba, yi-kãng na wã." 
Mark3:26 Woto, Sʋtãanã sã n zabd ne a menga, a welgame la a ka tõe n yals ye, a yell sãamame." 
Mark3:27 Ned ka tõe n kẽ pãng soab roogẽ n wʋk a teedo, a sã n ka reng n sẽb-a ye. La a sã n sẽb-a, a tõe n yaool n wʋka a roogã teedo." 
Mark3:28 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd tɩ ninsaalbã yel-wẽnã fãa b sẽn maandã, la paoogr nins fãa b sẽn paoogdã tõe n paama sugri." 
Mark3:29 La ned sã n paoog Sɩɩg-sõngo, a ka tõe n paam sugr abada. Yel-wẽn‑kãng paada ne-a wakat sẽn kõn sa.»" 
Mark3:30 A Zeezi goma a woto b sẽn yeel tɩ zĩn-dẽgd n tar bãmbã yĩnga. 
Mark3:31 A Zeezi ma ne b ma-biis waa n yalsa yɩng n tʋm tɩ b bool-b tɩ b wa. 
Mark3:32 Kʋʋngã rag n zĩndame n gũbg bãmba, la b yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Ad y ma ne y ma-biisã bee yɩng n baood yãmba.»" 
Mark3:33 La b leokame: «Mam ma yaa ãnda, la m ma-biis yaa ãnda rãmba?" 
Mark3:34 La b wẽnemdame n ges neb nins sẽn zĩ n gũbg bãmbã n yeele: Ad m ma ne m ma-biisi. 
Mark3:35 Bala, ned ningã fãa sẽn maand-a Wẽnnaam daabo, ada soab n yaa mam ma-bi-raoogo, la m ma-bi-poaka, la m ma.»" 
Mark4:1 A Zeezi leb n sɩngame n na n zãms nebã ko‑kãsengã noore. Neb kʋʋng wʋsg sẽn dag n tigim taab bãmb nengẽ wã yĩnga, bãmb kẽe koom-koglg sẽn be ko‑kãsengã pʋgẽ n zĩndi. La kʋʋngã fãa zĩnda koomã noore." 
Mark4:2 Dẽ, bãmb wẽe yel-bũn n zãms nebã bũmb wʋsgo. Zãmsgã pʋgẽ b yeela nebã yaa:" 
Mark4:3 «Kelg-y-yã! Ned a yembr n dag n kẽng n na n tɩ fẽrg bõn-buudu. 
Mark4:4 Fẽrgrã wakate, bõn-biis kẽer lʋɩɩ sor kɩrenga, la liuuli waa n dɩɩ bãmba." 
Mark4:5 La kẽer lʋɩɩ kug zĩiga, tom sẽn ka waoogẽ, la tao-tao bala, b yiime, tomã sẽn ka waoogã yĩnga." 
Mark4:6 La sõor sẽn zẽke, wĩntoogã yõog-b lame tɩ b ki, b sẽn ka paam yẽgã yĩnga." 
Mark4:7 La kẽer lʋɩɩ gõos sʋka, la gõosã yikame n dɩ-b tɩ b ka wom biis ye." 
Mark4:8 La kẽer lʋɩɩ zĩ-sõngẽ n yik n wom biisi. Kẽer womame tɩ ta bɛɛl pis-tã‑tã, tɩ kẽer ta pis-yoob‑yoobe, tɩ kẽer ta koabg-koabga." 
Mark4:9 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeelame: Sẽn tar-a tʋb sẽn wʋmd bɩ a wʋme.»" 
Mark4:10 Bãmb sẽn wa n be kɛɛnga, neb nins sẽn tũ-b bãmbã ne karen-biis piig la a yiibã soka bãmb yel-bũnã võore." 
Mark4:11 A Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Yaa yãmb la Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ y bãng bãmb soolmã bõn-solgdse, la ne neb nins sẽn ka be soolmã pʋgẽ wã, yel-kãens yaa soalem bala," 
Mark4:12 hal tɩ baa b sã n get sõama, b kõn yã ye, la b sã n wʋmd sõama, b kõn wʋm a võore, tɩ b ra wa n tek yam n kos sugr n paam ye.»" 
Mark4:13 A Zeezi leb n sok-b lame yaa: «Yãmb ka wʋmd yel-bũn-kãngã võor la? Dẽ, yãmb na n maana a wãn n wʋm yel-bũnã fãa võore?" 
Mark4:14 Bõn-bu-fẽrgdã fẽrga Wẽnnaam goamã. 
Mark4:15 Neb kẽer wẽnda wa sor kɩrengã, zĩig ning Wẽnnaam goamã sẽn fẽrgã. Bãmb sẽn wʋm koɛɛgã yee, la Sʋtãanã sẽn wat n yiis koɛɛg ning sẽn bʋd b sũurẽ wã." 
Mark4:16 Bõn-buudã sẽn lʋɩ kugã zĩigẽ wã yaa ned ning sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã n deeg-a tao-tao ne sũ-noogo," 
Mark4:17 la bãmb ka tar yẽg ye, bãmb kaoosda wakat bilf bala. La toog bɩ namsg sã n paam bãmba Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã yĩnga, tao-tao bala, b lʋɩtame." 
Mark4:18 Bõn-buud kẽer sẽn lʋɩ‑b gõos sʋkã, yaa neb nins sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã, tɩ yɩɩrã ne dũniyã yɛlã," 
Mark4:19 la arzegs belgre, la bũmb a taab ratem kẽedẽ n dɩt Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã t'a ka womd biis ye." 
Mark4:20 Bõn-buud nins sẽn lʋɩ‑b zĩ-sõngẽ wã, yaa neb nins sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã n deegdẽ n womd biisi. Kẽer womame tɩ ta bɛɛl pis-tã‑tã, tɩ kẽer ta pis-yoob‑yoobe, tɩ kẽer ta koabg-koabga.»" 
Mark4:21 A Zeezi leb n soka bãmb yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, b fõgenda fɩtl ne peoogo, wall b ning-a gãag tẽngre? B kõn dogl-a fɩtl doagendgã zug sɩda?" 
Mark4:22 Bala, bũmb ka be sẽn ludi, sẽn kõn puk ye, la bũmb ka be sẽn solge, sẽn kõn vẽneg ye." 
Mark4:23 Bɩ sẽn tar-a tʋb sẽn wʋmd wʋme.» 
Mark4:24 Bãmb leb n yeela nebã yaa: «Gũus-y neer ne bũmb ning yãmb sẽn wʋmdã. Wẽnnaam na n maka ne makdg ningã yãmb sẽn tar n makd n kõt nebã n lebs yãmba, la b na n ningame tɩ sudgi." 
Mark4:25 Bala, b na n kõo ned ning sẽn tar-a, la ned ning sẽn ka tar-a wã, b na n deega baa bũmb bilf ning a sẽn tarã.»" 
Mark4:26 Bãmb leb n yeelame: «Wẽnnaam soolem yaa wa rao sẽn bʋd bõn-biis a pʋʋgẽ. 
Mark4:27 A gõe t'a ne me, wĩndg ne yʋngo, bõn-biisã bundame n yikdẽ, la yẽnda ka mi sẽn yɩt to-to ye." 
Mark4:28 Bõn-bulã yita b toore, n deng n yaa vãado, n wa rɩk pʋse, n yaool n wom biis sẽn yaa sõama." 
Mark4:29 La biisã sã n bɩ zãnga, b tigsdame, bala, a tigsg wakat taame.»" 
Mark4:30 A Zeezi leb n yeelame: «Tõnd na n mamsa Wẽnnaam soolmã ne bõe, wall d bilg-a ne bõe yel-bũndi?" 
Mark4:31 A wẽnda wa siin-bila. Yẽnda yaa bilf n yɩɩd bõn-biisã fãa sẽn bʋt tẽngã. 
Mark4:32 La b sã n bʋd-a, a yikdame n lebg wok n yɩɩd zẽed buud a taabã fãa, n tãoodẽ tɩ liuuli tõe n tɩʋ b tʋgd a maasmẽ.»" 
Mark4:33 Yaa ne yel-bũn a woto buud wʋsg la a Zeezi wilg nebã Wẽnnaam goamã, a wa sẽn zems b wʋmbo." 
Mark4:34 A Zeezi ka gom ne-ba, a sã n ka ne yel-bũn ye. La b sã n wa n be ne b karen-biisã bala, b bilgda bãmb bũmb fãa võore." 
Mark4:35 La baraar bala, zĩ-sobd sẽn ta, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng ko‑kãsengã rʋʋnde.»" 
Mark4:36 La karen-biisã sẽn kuils nebã n sɛ, bãmb looga ne a Zeezi ne koom-koglg ning b sẽn dag n be a pʋgẽ wã. La kogond a taab me tũu bãmba." 
Mark4:37 Sob-kãseng yikame tɩ ko-pɛmã kẽed koglgã pʋg hal t'a zoe n kolg pidbu. 
Mark4:38 La a Zeezi rag n bee koglgã poorẽ n kʋgl zu-kʋk n gõe. La b neka bãmb n yeele: «Karen-saamba, tõnd be ka n na ki tɩ ka yet yãmb tɩ bũmbu?»" 
Mark4:39 A Zeezi sẽn neke, b lenga sobgã, n yeel ko-kãsengã t'a bas bʋʋr la a sĩndi! La sobgã yõkame tɩ zĩigã lebg sɩddd..." 
Mark4:40 Dẽ, a Zeezi sok-b lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb zoet rabeem a woto? Yaa a wãn tɩ yãmb ket n ka tar tẽebo?»" 
Mark4:41 Dabeem kãseng yõk-b lame, la b soka taaba: «Nin-kãngã yaa bõe neda, tɩ hal baa sobgã ne ko-kãsengã sakd bãmba?»" 
Mark5:1 A Zeezi ne b karen-biisã taa ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde, tẽng sẽn boond tɩ Gadara." 
Mark5:2 A Zeezi sẽn yi koom-koglgã pʋgẽ bal yee, la rao a yembr zĩn-dẽgd sẽn tar yii yaad zĩigẽ n wa bãmb nengẽ." 
Mark5:3 Rao-kãng dag n gãee yaadẽ wã, la neb dag n ka leb n tõe n sẽb-a ye, baa ne kutu." 
Mark5:4 Bala, naoor wʋsgo, b rag n balga a naoã ne kutu la b sẽb-a ne bãense, la a kaoo bãensã n sãam kutã, la ned baa a yembr ka tar pãng sẽn sek tɩ tõog-a ye." 
Mark5:5 Daar fãa, yʋng ne wĩndga, a bee yaadẽ wã la tãmsã zut n kelemdẽ, la a pogend a meng ne kuga." 
Mark5:6 A sẽn yã a Zeezi sẽn ket n be yɩɩga, a wudgame n ta n wõgemd bãmb taoore, n zẽk a koɛɛg n gom ne pãng n yeele:" 
Mark5:7 «Zeezi! Saasẽ-saasẽ Wẽnnaam bi-ribla, yãmb data maam ne bõe? Mam kota yãmb ne Wẽnnaam yʋʋr tɩ y ra nams maam ye.»" 
Mark5:8 Bala, a Zeezi rag n yet‑a lame: «Zĩn-dẽgdã! Yi n bas raoã.»" 
Mark5:9 La bãmb sok-a lame yaa: «Fo yʋʋr la a bõe?» T'a leok-ba: «Mam yʋʋr la a Tusa wã, bala, tõnd yaa wʋsgo.»" 
Mark5:10 La yẽnda kosa a Zeezi ne a sũur fãa n yeel tɩ b ra rig bãmb tɩ b yi tẽn-kãng ye. 
Mark5:11 Kurkuy kʋʋng wʋsg n dag n be tãngã sẽnẽ n wãbdẽ. 
Mark5:12 La zĩn-dãmbã bõosa a Zeezi n yeele: «Tʋm-y tõnd kurkuyẽ wã tɩ d tɩ kẽ-ba.» 
Mark5:13 La b kõ-b-la noore. La zĩn-dãmbã yiime n kẽ kurkuyã tɩ b yi tãngã sigdg n wudg n lʋɩ ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ. La b sõorã kolga tus a yi, la koomã rɩ-b lame." 
Mark5:14 La neb nins sẽn dag n gũud bãmbã zoeeme n tɩ togs koɛɛgã tẽngã pʋgẽ la a kɩremsã, la nebã yiime n tɩ ges bũmb ning sẽn maanã." 
Mark5:15 Bãmb waa a Zeezi nengẽ, la b yãnda ned ning zĩn sẽn boond tɩ Tusa wã sẽn dag n tarã, t'a yer fut n zĩẽ, n mi a nenga." 
Mark5:16 Neb nins sẽn yãnd bũmb ning sẽn maanã togsa neb a taabã sẽn yɩ to-to ne rao ning zĩnã sẽn dag n tarã, la ne kurkuyã." 
Mark5:17 Dẽ, bãmb sɩngame n kos a Zeezi ne b sũur fãa tɩ b yi n bas b tẽngã." 
Mark5:18 Bãmb sẽn wa n kẽed koom koglgẽ wã, rao ning zĩnã sẽn dag n tarã kosa bãmb noor n na n pa ne bãmba." 
Mark5:19 La a Zeezi ka sak ye, b yeel-a lame yaa: «Lebg n kuil f nebẽ wã n tɩ wilg bũmb nins fãa Zu-soabã sẽn maan n kõ foomã, la b sẽn zoe fo nimbãaneg to-to.»" 
Mark5:20 Yẽnda kẽnga Dekapoll soolem n tɩ moon bũmb nins fãa a Zeezi sẽn maan n kõ yẽnda wã. La nebã fãa yɛɛsame. 
Mark5:21 A Zeezi kẽe koom-koglgã n leb ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde. La neb kʋʋng wʋsg leb n tigma taab bãmb nengẽ, la a Zeezi dag n bee koomã noore." 
Mark5:22 Karen-doog kãsem a yembr n wa be t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Zayiruusi. Yẽnda sẽn yã a Zeezi, a wõgemda bãmb taoore," 
Mark5:23 n kos bãmb ne a sũur fãa n yeele: «Mam bi-pugl n dat n ki. Wa-y n sɩɩs-y-yã-a ne y nus t'a sãoog n da ki ye.» 
Mark5:24 A Zeezi yãaga yẽnda, la neb kʋʋng wʋsg tũu bãmba, n dɩdgd bãmba." 
Mark5:25 Mik tɩ pag a yembr n dag n be be t'a zɩɩm yit hal yʋʋm piig la a yiibu. 
Mark5:26 Yẽnda namsa wʋsg tɩpdb wʋsg nusẽ, n kɩs bũmb nins fãa a sẽn dag n tarã, la a ka sãoog baa bilf ye, bãagã pʋs n yãngame." 
Mark5:27 A wʋma a Zeezi kibare, la a wẽdga nebã n wa a Zeezi poorẽ n sɩɩs bãmb fuugu." 
Mark5:28 Bala, a rag n yeela a sũurẽ woto: «Mam sã n tõog n sɩɩs b futã bala, mam na n paama maagre.»" 
Mark5:29 La wakat-kãng bala, zɩɩmã sẽn dag n yitã yõkame, la a bãnga a yĩngã pʋgẽ tɩ bãagã bas-a lame." 
Mark5:30 Wakat-kãng bal me, a Zeezi bãnga b mengã pʋgẽ tɩ pãng n yi bãmb nengẽ. La b wẽnemda kʋʋngã sʋk n soke: «Ãndã n sɩɩs mam futã?»" 
Mark5:31 Bãmb karen-biisã yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb yãame tɩ neb wʋsg rɩdga yãmba, tɩ yãmb leb n sokdẽ tɩ ãndã n sɩɩs yãmba.»" 
Mark5:32 La bãmb dag n wẽnemdame n na n ges n bãng sẽn maan-a bõn-kãngã. 
Mark5:33 La rabeem yõka pagã t'a rigda, la a sẽn mi bũmb ning sẽn maan yẽnda yĩngẽ wã yĩnga, a waa n yĩgimda a Zeezi taoore, n pelg a pʋgã fãa n togs bãmba." 
Mark5:34 La a Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «M biiga, fo tẽeb n maag-fo. Kẽng ne laafɩ n paam f meng ne bãag ning sẽn tar foomã.»" 
Mark5:35 Bãmb sẽn ket n gomdã, neb yii karen-doog kãsmã zakẽ n wa n yeele: «Yãmb bi-puglã kiime, bõe tɩ y na n kell n nams karen-saamba?»" 
Mark5:36 La a Zeezi ka kelg gom-kãens ye, la b yeela karen-doog kãsmã yaa: «Da maan dabeem ye, tẽ bala.»" 
Mark5:37 Bãmb ka sak tɩ ned yãag bãmb ye, sã n ka a Pɩyɛɛr la a Zak ne a ba-biig a Zã." 
Mark5:38 B sẽn ta karen-doog kãsmã zakẽ, a Zeezi yãnda neb wʋsg sẽn be be n yãbda, n wiisdẽ, n maand bʋʋr wʋsgo." 
Mark5:39 Bãmb kẽeme n sok nebã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maand bʋʋr a woto la y yãbda? Biigã ka ki ye, a gõeeme.»" 
Mark5:40 La nebã yaala bãmba. Dẽ, a Zeezi kɩtame tɩ nebã fãa yi, la b tall biigã ba ne a ma, ne b karen-biis a tãabã sẽn yãag bãmbã n kẽ biigã sẽn be zĩig ningã." 
Mark5:41 Bãmb gãda biigã nug n yeel-a: «Talita kumi» sẽn dat n yeel tɩ: «Mam bi-pugla, mam yeta foom tɩ f yiki.»" 
Mark5:42 Tao-tao bala, bi-puglã yikame n sɩng n kẽnda, bala, a ra tara yʋʋm piig la a yiibu. La nebã yɛɛsa wʋsgo." 
Mark5:43 A Zeezi sagla bãmb neere n yeel-b tɩ b gũus tɩ ned da bãng ye, n yaool n yeel-b tɩ b bao rɩɩb n kõ biigã t'a rɩ." 
Mark6:1 A Zeezi basa zĩ-kãngã n leb b meng tẽngẽ, la b karen-biisã tũu bãmba." 
Mark6:2 La vʋʋsg daar sẽn ta, bãmb zãmsa nebã karen-doogẽ wã. Nebã wʋsg sẽn wʋm bãmb zãmsgã, b yɛɛsame n soke: «Bãmb bãng-kãng yita yɛ? Ad yaa yam meng-meng la b kõ-ba, hal tɩ b tõe n maan bõn-bãn ne b nusi!" 
Mark6:3 Ka bãmb la ra-wãadã, a Maari biigã, a Zak la a Zooze la a Zuud la a Sɩmo ma-biigã? Bãmb ma-bi-pogs ka be tõnd sʋk ka sɩda?» La yõwã kɩtame tɩ Nazarɛt nebã ka tẽ a Zeezi ye." 
Mark6:4 La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ka kongd waoogre, sã n ka a meng tẽngẽ la a roagdb sʋka, la a meng zakẽ ye.»" 
Mark6:5 Bãmb ka tõog n maan bõn-bãnd baa a yembr beenẽ, sã n ka b sẽn tik bãad-dãmb kẽer ne b nus n maag-bã bal ye." 
Mark6:6 La nebã ka-tẽebã linga a Zeezi. A Zeezi saaga tẽn-kɩremsã n zãms nebã. 
Mark6:7 Dẽ, bãmb boola b karen-biisã piig la a yiibã, n sɩng n tʋm bãmb b yiib-yiibu, n kõ-b pãn-tõog tɩ b rig zĩn-dãmb nins sẽn yaa rẽgdã." 
Mark6:8 A Zeezi yeel-b lame tɩ b ra zã baa fʋɩ b kẽndã yĩnga, sã n ka rasaar bal ye. Tɩ b ra zã buri, wall korg bɩ ligd b sẽbds pʋs me ye." 
Mark6:9 B yeel-b lame tɩ b wid neooda la b ra yeelg fu-yord a yiib ye. 
Mark6:10 La a Zeezi rag n yeta bãmb yaa: «Yãmb sã n tɩ sig ned zakẽ, pa-y be hal tɩ ta y loogre." 
Mark6:11 La yãmb sã n kẽng tẽngẽ tɩ b ka reeg yãmba, la b ka kelg yãmba, bɩ y yi be la y pĩms y naoã tom tɩ bõn-kãng yɩ kaset b yĩnga.»" 
Mark6:12 Bãmb loogame n moon n yeel nebã tɩ b tek yam n kos sugri. 
Mark6:13 Bãmb diga zĩn-dãmb wʋsgo, la b tigsa bãad-dãmb wʋsg ne kaam n maag-ba." 
Mark6:14 Naab a Erood wʋma a Zeezi kibare, bala, b yʋʋrã saaga zĩigã fãa. Nebã yeelame: «A Zãmbatiis vʋʋgame n yi kũum sʋka. Yaa woto n kɩt t'a tar pãng n maand bõn-bãna.»" 
Mark6:15 Neb a taab yeelame: «Yaa a Eli!» La neb kẽer yeelame: «Bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs wa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb a taabã.» 
Mark6:16 La a Erood sẽn wʋm woto, yẽnda yeelame: «Yaa Zã ning mam sẽn da fiuug a zugã. Yaa yẽnda n vʋʋge.»" 
Mark6:17 Bala, a Erood meng dag n kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Zã n sẽb n kẽes bi-bees roogẽ, yẽnda ba-biig a Filip pag a Eroodyaad a sẽn peegã poorẽ." 
Mark6:18 Bala, a Zã rag n yeel-a lame tɩ ka zems ne tõog tɩ yẽnda dɩk a ba-biigã pag ye." 
Mark6:19 A Eroodyaad sũur yika ne a Zã t'a rat n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-a. 
Mark6:20 La yẽnda ka tõe ye. Bala, a Erood zoeta a Zã, a sẽn mi t'a yaa nin-tɩrg la nin-sõngã yĩnga. Erood gũ-a lame, la a sẽn wʋm a Zã goamã, lebga tagsg wʋsg ne-a. Baoosgo, a kelg-a-la ne sũ-noogo." 
Mark6:21 A Erood sẽn tẽeg a dogem daar n maan tigr a nin-kãsemsã ne a sodaas nanambsã ne Galɩle soolem nanambsã yĩnga, a Eroodyaad paama weer n na n maan a sẽn dag n datã." 
Mark6:22 A Eroodyaad bi-pugl kẽe roogẽ wã n sao, la biigã saoog yɩɩ a Erood ne neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ ne yẽnda n dɩtẽ wã noogo." 
Mark6:23 A Erood wẽena ne yẽnda n yeele: «Fo sẽn kos maam bũmb ning fãa, mam na kõ foom, baa sã n yaa mam soolmã pʋɩ-sʋka.»" 
Mark6:24 La bi-puglã yiime n tɩ sok a ma yaa: «M kos bõe?» La a ma wã leokame: «Kos a Zãmbatiis zugã.» 
Mark6:25 La yẽnda leba rĩmã nengẽ tao-tao n tɩ kos yẽnda a woto: «Mam datame tɩ y kõ maam a Zãmbatiis zug ne lengr moasã bala.» 
Mark6:26 Rĩma sũur sãamame. La a wẽenegã ne nebã sẽn zĩ ne yẽnda wã yĩnga, a rag n ka rat n zãgs ye." 
Mark6:27 Tao-tao bala, rĩmã yeela dapoe-bil t'a kẽng n tɩ wa ne a Zãmbatiis zugã." 
Mark6:28 Dapoe-bilã kẽngame n tɩ fiuug a Zã zugã bi-beesã roogẽ n sagl lengrẽ n tall n wa n kõ bi-puglã, la bi-puglã tallame n tɩ kõ a ma." 
Mark6:29 La a Zã karen-biisã sẽn wʋme, b waa n dɩka a kũumã n tɩ solg yaoogẽ." 
Mark6:30 A Zeezi tẽn-tʋmdbã tigma taab bãmb nengẽ n wilg bãmb bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn maane, la b zãms nebã." 
Mark6:31 Neb wʋsg rag n watame la b loogdẽ hal tɩ bãmb ka tol n tar weer n na n dɩ ye. Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d yi we-kɛɛnga, neb sẽn ka beẽ tɩ y tɩ vʋʋs bilfu.»" 
Mark6:32 Bãmb kẽe koom-koglgã n na n yi kɛɛnga, zĩig neb sẽn ka beẽ." 
Mark6:33 La neb wʋsg yãnda bãmb loogrã n bãng bãmba. La neb yii tẽms fãa n zoe ne nao n deng bãmb n ta zĩig ning bãmb sẽn dabdã. 
Mark6:34 A Zeezi sẽn yi koom koglgẽ wã, b yãnda neb kʋʋng wʋsgã, la b nimbãaneg yõka bãmba, bala, bãmb wẽnda wa piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩm ye. La bãmb sɩngame n zãms-b bũmb wʋsgo."
