Mark6:35 Wakatã sẽn loogdã yĩnga, a Zeezi karen-biisã kolga bãmb n yeele: «Zĩ-kãngã yaa weoogo, la wakatã loogdame." 
Mark6:36 Kɩt-y tɩ nebã loog n kẽng tẽn-bãoonegã la tẽn-kɩremsã sẽn pẽ wã n tɩ ra rɩɩb n dɩ.» 
Mark6:37 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: «Bɩ yãmb mensã bao rɩɩb n kõ nebã tɩ b rɩ.» La b yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Tõnd na n kẽngame n tɩ ra bur deniye kobsi n wa n kõ-b tɩ b rɩ?» 
Mark6:38 La a Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: «Yãmb tara bur a wãna? Kẽng‑y n ges-y yã.» Karen-biisã kẽngame n tɩ gese, la b wa n togs a Zeezi tɩ yaa bur a nu ne zĩm a yiibu." 
Mark6:39 Dẽ, bãmb yeelame tɩ b zĩnig nebã fãa sull-sull mo-maasã zugu." 
Mark6:40 La bãmb zĩnda rulg-rulga, koabg-koabga la pis‑nunu." 
Mark6:41 A Zeezi dɩka bur a nu wã ne zĩm a yiibã n nak n ges yĩngri, n ning barka, n yaool n kao burã n kõ b karen-biisã tɩ b pʋɩ kʋʋngã. Bãmb pʋɩɩ zĩm a yiibã me tɩ ta nebã fãa." 
Mark6:42 Bãmb fãa rɩɩme n tɩge. 
Mark6:43 La b wʋka bur-gɩrsã ne zĩm-kɛlã peoog piig la a yiibu. 
Mark6:44 Neb nins sẽn dɩ burã yaa raop tus a nu. 
Mark6:45 Tao-tao bal yõwã zugẽ, a Zeezi kɩtame tɩ b karen-biisã kẽ koom-koglgã n deng bãmb taoor ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde, Betsayɩda sẽnẽ, tɩ bãmb mengã yõdg n kuils nebã." 
Mark6:46 Bãmb sẽn kuils nebã n sa, b kẽnga tãngã zug n tɩ pʋʋse." 
Mark6:47 Zĩ-sobd sẽn ta, koom-koglgã bee ko-kãsengã sʋka, t'a Zeezi be tẽng b yembre." 
Mark6:48 Bãmb yãame tɩ b karen-biisã namsda wʋsgo, n dugsd koom-koglgã, bala, sobg n segd-ba. Sẽn kolg tõd-beoogo, a Zeezi kẽna ko-kãsengã zug n dabd b karen-biisã sẽnẽ, n dat n loog-ba." 
Mark6:49 Bãmb sẽn yã a Zeezi tɩ b kẽnd koomã zugã, b tẽeme tɩ yaa kɩɩma," 
Mark6:50 la b kelmame, bala, bãmb fãa yãnd-b lame, la rabeem yõka bãmba. Tao-tao bala, a Zeezi goma ne bãmb n yeele: «Keng-y y sũyã, yaa maam. Da zoe-y rabeem ye.»" 
Mark6:51 Dẽ, bãmb kẽe koom-koglgã pʋgẽ n paas b karen-biisã, la sobgã yõkame. Karen-biisã yɛɛsame n sẽege," 
Mark6:52 bala, bãmb dag n ka wʋm burã bõn-bãndã võore, b sũyã sẽn diglmã yĩnga." 
Mark6:53 La bãmb sẽn pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã, bãmb taa Zenezarɛt soolmẽ, la b yalsa koomã noore." 
Mark6:54 La bãmb sẽn yi koom koglgẽ wã, nebã bãnga a Zeezi tao-tao." 
Mark6:55 La b zoeeme n kẽ soolmã fãa n tɩ rɩgs bãad-dãmbã ne pãnday n wa zĩig ning fãa b sẽn wʋm t'a Zeezi be. 
Mark6:56 A Zeezi sẽn taẽ fãa, tɩ yaa tẽn-bãoonegẽ, tɩ yaa tẽn-bɛdẽ, tɩ yaa pʋt rotẽ, nebã gãnegda bãad-dãmb raas pʋse, la b kosa a Zeezi tɩ b sak tɩ b sɩɩs b fuugã noor bala. La neb nins fãa sẽn sɩɩsã paama laafɩ." 
Mark7:1 Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã kẽer sẽn yi Zeruzalɛmã tigma taab n gũbg a Zeezi. 
Mark7:2 Bãmb yãnda a Zeezi karen-biisã kẽer sẽn dɩt rɩɩb ne nus-rẽgdo, sẽn dat n togs tɩ sẽn ka nudg ye." 
Mark7:3 Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa yaool n ka rɩt tɩ b ka reng n nudg b nusã neer wa sẽn zems b yaab-rãmbã miningã ye. 
Mark7:4 La bãmb sã n yi raagẽ n wa, b sã n ka waase b ka rɩt ye. La b tara minind a taab b sẽn sakda, a wa wamã la yʋyã la zũud laas neoodgo." 
Mark7:5 Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã soka a Zeezi yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb karen-biisã ka sakd b yaab-rãmbã miningu, n dɩt ne nus-rẽgdo?»" 
Mark7:6 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Zãmb-dãmba, a Ezayi sɩd togsa bãngr goam ne yãmb yelle, a sẽn gʋls n yeele: ‹Nin-kãensã waoogda maam ne b nobɩms bala, la b sũyã zãra ne maam." 
Mark7:7 La bãmb sẽn waoogd maamã yaa zaalem, bala, bãmb zãmsa nebã kaoreng sẽn yaa ninsaalb tõod bala.›" 
Mark7:8 Yãmb basda Wẽnnaam tõod n sakd ninsaalb minindu.» 
Mark7:9 A Zeezi kẽnga taoor n yeele: «Yãmb tara sɩlem n maandẽ, n basd Wẽnnaam tõodã kɛɛng n sakd y mens minindu." 
Mark7:10 Bala, a Moyiis rag n yeelame: Waoog f ba la f ma, la ned sã n paoog a ba bɩ a ma bɩ b kʋ-a.›" 
Mark7:11 La ne yãmba, ned sã n yeel a ba bɩ a ma: ‹Mam sẽn dag n na n sõng yãmb ne bũmb ningã, a lebga korbã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ kũun Wẽnnaam yĩnga›." 
Mark7:12 Yãmb ka leb n sakd t'a maan baa fʋɩ n kõ a ba bɩ a ma ye. 
Mark7:13 Woto, yãmb minindã yãmb sẽn karemd nebã kɩtdame tɩ Wẽnnaam goamã lebg zaalem. La yãmb maanda bũmb a woto buud wʋsgo.»" 
Mark7:14 Dẽ poore, bãmb leb n boola neb kʋʋngã n yeel-ba: «Yãmb fãa, kelg-y maam la y bãnge." 
Mark7:15 Bũmb ka be n kẽed ninsaal pʋgẽ n tõe n kɩt t'a lebg rẽgd ye. Yaa bũmb ning sẽn yit ninsaal pʋgẽ wã n kɩtd t'a lebg rẽgdo. 
Mark7:16 [Sẽn tar-a tʋb sẽn wʋmda, bɩ a wʋme.]" 
Mark7:17 Bãmb sẽn bas nebã n kẽ roogẽ, b karen-biisã soka bãmb yel-bũn‑kãng võore." 
Mark7:18 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb me yam ka vẽneg la? Yãmb ka bãng tɩ bũmb sẽn be yɩng n kẽed ninsaal pʋgẽ ka tõe n kɩt t'a lebg rẽgd la? 
Mark7:19 Bala, bõn-kãng ka kẽed yẽnda sũurã pʋgẽ ye, a kẽeda a pʋ‑roogẽ wã tɩ b yaool n tɩ yiis-a n bas we-kɛɛnga.» A Zeezi goma a woto n na n wilg tɩ rɩɩb fãa yaa sẽn na rɩ." 
Mark7:20 Bãmb leb n yeelame: «Yaa bũmb ning sẽn yit ninsaal pʋgẽ wã n kɩtd t'a lebg rẽgdo. 
Mark7:21 Bala, yaa pʋgẽ, ninsaalbã sũyã pʋs la bõn-wẽnsã yita: tags-wẽnse, tʋʋm-dẽgdo," 
Mark7:22 wagdem, nin-kʋʋre, yoobo, yão-beedo, pʋ-toogo, sɩlem, rãmbgo, sũ-kiiri, nin-tʋʋre, tɩtaam la yalem-tagsgo." 
Mark7:23 Bõn-wẽn‑kãens fãa yita ninsaal pʋgẽ n kɩtdẽ t'a lebg rẽgdo.» 
Mark7:24 A Zeezi basa zĩ-kãngã n kẽng Tɩɩr soolmẽ. Bãmb kẽe roogẽ n ka rat tɩ ned bãng ye, la b ka tõog n soond ye." 
Mark7:25 Bala, zĩn-dẽgd n dag n tar pag a yembr bi-pugla, la pagã wʋma a Zeezi kibare, n wa n wõgemd bãmb taoore." 
Mark7:26 Pʋg‑kãng dag n yaa Gɛrk sẽn yit Siiri Fenisi. Yẽnda kosa bãmb tɩ b rig zĩnã sẽn tar a biigã. 
Mark7:27 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «Bas tɩ kambã rɩ n tɩg nanda, bala, a ka zems tɩ b rɩk kamb rɩɩb n kõ ba-bi ye.»" 
Mark7:28 Yẽnda leoka bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba, yaa sɩda, la ba-bi sẽn be taabl tẽngr rɩta kambã rɩ-zersã.»" 
Mark7:29 Dẽ, bãmb yeel-a lame yaa: «Gom-kãngã yĩng bɩ f kẽnge. Zĩnã yiime n bas f bi-puglã.»" 
Mark7:30 La yẽnda sẽn ta yiri, a mikame tɩ zĩnã yii n basa a bi-puglã t'a gãe a gãagẽ." 
Mark7:31 A Zeezi basa Tɩɩr soolem n leb n tũ Sɩdõ n pɩʋʋg Dekapoll n kẽng Galɩle ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ. 
Mark7:32 B waa ne wʋng sẽn yaa bidg bãmb nengẽ n kos-b tɩ b tik-a ne b nusi. 
Mark7:33 Bãmb peega yẽnda kʋʋngã sʋk n yi kɛɛnga, n ning b nug-bi a tʋbã pʋsẽ, la b tʋbsame, n tẽk a zelemdã ne kolkoodã," 
Mark7:34 n yaool n nak n ges yĩngr n wẽ sir n yeele: «Efata», sẽn dat n togs tɩ yoke." 
Mark7:35 Tao-tao bala, a tʋba yoosame, la a zelemdã lakame t'a gomd sõama." 
Mark7:36 A Zeezi sagla bãmb tɩ b ra togs ned ye. La bãmb sã n sagendẽ, b moondame n yɩɩd pĩnda." 
Mark7:37 Nebã yɛɛsa hal wʋsg n yetẽ: «Bãmb maanda bũmb fãa neere. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ baa wʋms wʋmdẽ, tɩ mugs gomda.»" 
Mark8:1 Wakat kãnga neb kʋʋng sẽn dag n leb n tigim taab a Zeezi sɛɛgẽ, n yaool n dag n ka tar dɩɩb sẽn na n dɩ wã yĩnga, a Zeezi boola b karen-biisã n yeel-b yaa:" 
Mark8:2 «Kʋʋngã nimbãaneg tara maam, bala, rasem a tãab moasã la b be ne maam n ka tar rɩɩb sẽn na rɩ ye." 
Mark8:3 Mam sã n kɩt tɩ b kuil ne kom, b na n tadga sorẽ, bala, kẽer sẽn yiẽ wã zãrame.»" 
Mark8:4 Bãmb karen-biisã sok-b lame yaa: «D na n yãa bur yɛɛnẽ weoogẽ ka tɩ sek nin‑bãmbã fãa?» 
Mark8:5 A Zeezi soka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb tara bur a wãna?» Bãmb leokame t'a yopoe. 
Mark8:6 Dẽ, a Zeezi kɩtame tɩ kʋʋngã fãa zĩnd tẽnga. Bãmb dɩka bur a yopoe wã, la b sẽn ning-a bark n sa, b kaoome n kõ b karen-biisã tɩ b pʋɩ nebã, la b pʋɩ-b lame." 
Mark8:7 La bãmb dag n tara zĩm-bãooneg bilfu. La a Zeezi sẽn ning-a barka, b yeelame tɩ b pʋɩ rẽ me." 
Mark8:8 Nebã dɩɩme n tɩge. La karen-biisã wʋka bur-gɩrsã sẽn kellã peoog a yopoe n zã. 
Mark8:9 Sẽn dɩ-bã sõor kolga neb tus a naase. Dẽ poore, a Zeezi kuils-b lame." 
Mark8:10 Tao-tao bala, bãmb ne b karen-biisã kẽe koom-koglgã n kẽng Dalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Fariizẽ-dãmbã waame n sɩng n gom ne a Zeezi. La sẽn na n yɩlẽ n mak a Zeezi, b kosa bãmb tɩ b wa ne bãnd sẽn yit yĩngri." 
Mark8:12 A Zeezi wẽe sir-kãseng b sũurẽ n yeele: «Bõe tɩ zamaan‑kãngã nebã baood bãnde? Mam yeta yãmb sɩd tɩ zamaan‑kãngã nebã kõn tol n paam bãnd ye.» 
Mark8:13 Dẽ, a Zeezi basa bãmb n kẽ koom koglg n kẽng ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde." 
Mark8:14 B karen-biisã yĩmame n ka zɩ bur ye. Yaa bur a yembr tãa bal la b dag n tar koglgã pʋgẽ. 
Mark8:15 A Zeezi sagla bãmb woto: «Gũus-y y mens neer ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã, la Erood rã-bɩlle.»" 
Mark8:16 B karen-biisã yẽsa ne taab n yeel tɩ yaa bãmb sẽn ka tar burã yĩng la a Zeezi sẽn gom a woto wã. 
Mark8:17 A Zeezi bãngame n sok-b yaa: «Yaa a wãn tɩ yãmb yẽsd ne taab n yetẽ tɩ yaa yãmb sẽn ka tar burã yĩnga? Yãmb yam ket n nan ka vẽneg la? Yãmb ket n nan ka wʋm la? Yãmb yamã kɩdame la? 
Mark8:18 Yãmb sẽn tar ninã y ka ne la? Yãmb sẽn tar tʋbã y ka wʋmd la? Yãmb ka tol n tar pʋ-tẽer la?» 
Mark8:19 Mam sẽn kao bur a nu n kõ neb tus a nu wã, yãmb wʋka bur-gɩrsã sẽn kellã pet a wãna?» Bãmb leokame tɩ piig la a yiibu." 
Mark8:20 La mam sẽn kao bur a yopoe n kõ neb tus a naasã, yãmb wʋka bur-gɩrsã sẽn kellã pet a wãna? Bãmb leokame t'a yopoe." 
Mark8:21 La a Zeezi sok-b lame yaa: Yãmb ket n ka wʋm la? 
Mark8:22 Bãmb kẽnga Betsayɩda, la b waa ne zoang a Zeezi nengẽ n kos bãmb tɩ b sɩɩs-a." 
Mark8:23 Bãmb gãda zoangã nug n tɛ-a n yi tẽngã, n tʋbs kolkood n ning a ninã, n tik-a ne b nusi, n sok-a: «Fo nee bũmbu?»" 
Mark8:24 Zoangã puka a ninã n leoke: «Mam nee nebã, la b wẽnda wa tɩɩse, la b kẽndame.»" 
Mark8:25 A Zeezi leb n tika yẽnda ninã ne b nusã yɛsa. La zoangã sẽn ges kũii, a ninã pukame t'a ne vẽenega." 
Mark8:26 Dẽ, a Zeezi kuilsa yẽnda a yiri, n yeel-a t'a ra kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ ye." 
Mark8:27 A Zeezi ne b karen-biisã kẽnga tẽms sẽn pẽ tẽng sẽn boond tɩ Filip Sezaare. La b sẽn be sorẽ, a Zeezi soka b karen-biisã yaa: «Nebã yetame tɩ mam yaa ãnda?»" 
Mark8:28 B leokame: «kẽer yetame t'a Zãmbatiisi, tɩ kẽer yetẽ t'a Eli, tɩ kẽer me yetẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã ned a yembre.»" 
Mark8:29 La a Zeezi sok-b lame yaa: «La yãmba, yãmb yetame tɩ mam yaa ãnda?» A Pɩyɛɛr leoka bãmb n yeele: «Yãmb yaa Kirisã.»" 
Mark8:30 Dẽ, a Zeezi keooga bãmb neer tɩ b ra sak n gom ne ned bãmb yell ye." 
Mark8:31 Dẽ, a Zeezi sɩngame n zãms b karen-biisã n yeel tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã nams wʋsgo, la tɩ tẽngã nin-kẽembã ne maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã, ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã zãgs bãmba, la b kʋ bãmba, la b kũumã rasem a tãab daare, b na n vʋʋgame." 
Mark8:32 Bãmb wilga bõn-kãens vẽenega. La a Pɩyɛɛr boola bãmb kɛɛnga, n sɩng n zab bãmba." 
Mark8:33 A Zeezi leb n wẽnegame n ges b karen-biisã, n leng a Pɩyɛɛr n yeele: «Sʋtãana, leb mam poorẽ, bala, fo tagsgã ka Wẽnnaam tagsg ye, yaa ninsaalb rẽnda.»" 
Mark8:34 Dẽ, bãmb boola b karen-biisã ne neb kʋʋngã n yeel-b yaa: «Ned sã n dat n tũ maam, bɩ a kɩɩs a mengã raabo, n dɩk a da-pɩk n tũ maam." 
Mark8:35 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn dat n gũ a vɩɩm, a vɩɩm na sãame, la ned ning fãa sẽn na n bas a vɩɩm mam yĩnga la koe-noogã yĩnga, a na paam fãagre." 
Mark8:36 La ned sã n paam dũni bũmb fãa n yaool n bas n ki, bõe yõod la a paam a pʋgẽ?" 
Mark8:37 Ninsaal na n teka a vɩɩmã ne bõe? 
Mark8:38 Sɩd me, ned ning fãa sẽn na n zoe‑a mam yãnde la mam goamã yãnde, zamaan‑kãngã nebã sẽn yaa yoaadbã la yel-wẽn maandbã sʋka, Ninsaal Bi-riblã sã n wa n wa ne b ziirã, la b ba wã ziiri, ne malegs-sõamyã, b na n zoee yẽnda me yãnde.»" 
Mark9:1 A Zeezi leb n yeela nebã yaa: «Sɩd‑sɩda mam yeta yãmba, tɩ yãmb neb kẽer kõn ki tɩ b ka yãnd Wẽnnaam soolmã sẽn wat ne pãng la ziir ye.»" 
Mark9:2 Rasem a yoob zugẽ, a Zeezi peega a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã la a Zak n tall-b n yi kɛɛnga, n dʋ tãn-lug-lug zugu, zĩig neb sẽn ka be. La a Zeezi tedga bãmb taoore." 
Mark9:3 Bãmb futã rag n pɩndame, n yaa peels n yɩɩd dũni neb sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ yɩ." 
Mark9:4 A Eli ne a Moyiis puka bãmb taoore, n gom ne a Zeezi." 
Mark9:5 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saamba, yaa sõama tɩ tõnd pa ka, tɩ d tilg fu-rot a tãabo: a yembr yãmb yĩnga, a yembr a Moyiis yĩnga, la a yembr a Eli yĩnga.»" 
Mark9:6 A rag n ka mi a sẽn yet ye. Bala, rabeem kãseng n dag n kẽ-ba." 
Mark9:7 Sawadg waa n luda bãmba, la koɛɛg yii sawadgẽ wã n yeele: «Ad‑a yaa mam Bi-ribl-nongre. Kelg-y-yã-a.»" 
Mark9:8 Tao-tao bala, karen-biisã wẽnesame n ges zĩiga fãa, la b ka yã ned a to, sã n ka a Zeezi bal sẽn yɛs ne bãmbã ye." 
Mark9:9 Bãmb sẽn sigd tãngã, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b ra saag n togs ned bũmb nins b sẽn yã wã, hal tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã vʋʋg n bas kũum ye." 
Mark9:10 Bãmb talla koe-kãng bãmb sʋka, la b soka taab tɩ vʋʋg n bas kũumã› võor yaa bõe?" 
Mark9:11 Karen-biisã soka bãmb woto: «Yaa bõe tɩ tõog karen-saam-dãmbã yetẽ tɩ yaa tɩlɛ t'a Eli reng n wa?» 
Mark9:12 Bãmb leok-b lame yaa: «Sɩda, a Eli n na n deng n wa n lebs n maneg bũmba fãa. La yaa bõe tɩ b gʋls tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã nams wʋsgo la b paam paoogre?" 
Mark9:13 La mam yeta yãmb t'a Eli waame, la nebã maana yẽnda wa b sẽn date, wa b sẽn pĩnd n gʋls n gom a yellã.»" 
Mark9:14 La bãmb sẽn kolg b karen-biis a taabã nengẽ, bãmb yãnda neb kʋʋng wʋsg sẽn gũbg bãmba, la tõog karen-saam-dãmb sẽn wẽed nokoɛɛm ne bãmba." 
Mark9:15 La nebã sẽn yã a Zeezi wã, a ling-b‑la wʋsgo, la b zoeeme n tɩ pʋʋs-ba." 
Mark9:16 A Zeezi soka nebã: «Yaa bõe yell la yãmb gomd ne bãmba?» 
Mark9:17 La rao a yembr n zĩnd kʋʋngã sʋk n leok bãmba: «Karen-saamba, mam waa ne m biig yãmb nengẽ. Zĩn sẽn kɩtd tɩ ned lebg mukã n tar-a." 
Mark9:18 A sẽn yõk-a zĩig ning fãa, a lubd-a-la tẽnga tɩ tãntãmpuud yit a noorẽ wã, tɩ biigã wãbd a yẽn n tɩrdẽ. La mam kosa yãmb karen-biisã tɩ b rig zĩnã la b ka tõog ye." 
Mark9:19 A Zeezi leoka bãmba: «Yãmba, zamaan‑kãngã neb sẽn ka tẽebo, mam na n zĩnda ne yãmb hal tɩ ta wakat bʋgo? Mam na n maana sũ-mar ne yãmb hal tɩ ta wakat bʋgo? Tall-y biigã n wa ka.»" 
Mark9:20 La b tall-a lame n wa bãmb nengẽ. Tao-tao bala, zĩnã sẽn yã a Zeezi, a rĩmsa biigã ne pãnga, hal t'a lʋɩ tẽng n bilimdẽ t'a tãntãmpuud yita.»" 
Mark9:21 A Zeezi soka a ba wã yaa: «Wakat bʋg la a sɩng n maand biigã a woto?» Yẽnda leokame: «Hal a yãadem wakate. 
Mark9:22 La naoor wʋsgo, a lub-a-la bugmẽ bɩ koomẽ n dat n kʋ-a. La yãmb sã n tõe n maana bũmb bɩ y zoe d nimbãaneg n sõng-do.»" 
Mark9:23 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yãmb sã n tõe? Ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed tõee bũmb fãa.» 
Mark9:24 Tao-tao bala, biigã ba zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «Mam tẽedame. Sõng-y‑ma, tɩ m tẽebã paoodame.»" 
Mark9:25 A Zeezi sẽn yã kʋʋngã sẽn zoet n watẽ wã, bãmb lenga zĩn-dẽgdã n yeel-a: «Zĩn sẽn maand ned t'a lebg muk la wʋngã, mam yeta foom, yi n bas biigã la f ra leb n kẽ-a yɛs ye.»" 
Mark9:26 La zĩnã kelmame, n zugs biigã ne pãng t'a lebg wa kũum, la a yi n bas-a. Neb kẽer yeelame t'a kiime." 
Mark9:27 La a Zeezi gãda a nug n zẽk-a, la a yik n yalsa yĩngri." 
Mark9:28 Wakat ning a Zeezi sẽn kẽ roogẽ tɩ neb a taab ka be be, bãmb karen-biisã soka bãmb yaa: «Bõe tɩ tõnd ka tõog n dig zĩn-kãngã?»" 
Mark9:29 A Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Zĩn‑kãngã buud ka yita, tɩ sã n ka ne pʋʋsg ye.»" 
Mark9:30 Bãmb yii be n pɩʋʋg Galɩle. La a Zeezi rag n ka rat tɩ ned bãng bãmb sẽn beẽ ye. 
Mark9:31 Bala, bãmb zãmsa b karen-biisã n yeele: «B na n ninga Ninsaal Bi-riblã neb nusẽ. B na n kʋ-b lame, la b kʋʋbã rasem a tãab daare, b na n vʋʋgame.»" 
Mark9:32 La bãmb karen-biisã ka wʋm gom‑kãng võor ye, la b zoee rabeem n ka sok bãmb ye." 
Mark9:33 Bãmb taa Kapɛrnaom, la a Zeezi sẽn kẽ roogẽ, b soka b karen-biisã: «Yaa bõe poorẽ la yãmb dag n wẽed nokoeemd ne taab sorã zugã?»" 
Mark9:34 La b sĩndame, bala, bãmb sẽn dag n be sorã zugã, b rag n wẽeda nokoeemd ne taab n dat n bãng sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩd bãmb sʋka." 
Mark9:35 Dẽ, a Zeezi zĩndame n bool b karen-biis piig la a yiibã n yeel-b yaa: «Ned sã n dat n yɩ taoor soaba, bɩ a yɩ nebã fãa poorẽ soaba, la nebã fãa tʋmtʋmda.»" 
Mark9:36 Bãmb peega bi-bilfu n yals-a bãmb sʋka, n mobg-a n yeel b karen-biisã yaa:" 
Mark9:37 «Ned sã n deeg bi-bilf a woto mam yĩnga, yaa maam la a reeg yã. La ned sã n deeg maam, ka maam la a reeg ye, yaa sẽn tʋm-a maamã la a reeg yã.»" 
Mark9:38 A Zã yeela bãmb yaa: «Karen-saamba, tõnd yãnda rao a yembr t'a rigd zĩn-dãmb ne yãmb yʋʋre, n yaool n ka tõnd tũud-n-taag ye. La tõnd gɩdg-a lame a sẽn ka tũud tõndã yĩnga.»" 
Mark9:39 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Da gɩdg-y-yã-a ye. Bala, ned ka be sẽn na n maan bõn-bãnd ne mam yʋʋre, n wẽneg n sãbs maam ye." 
Mark9:40 Ned sã n ka kis tõndo, a bee ne tõndo." 
Mark9:41 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n kõ yãmb koom tɩ y yũ yãmb sẽn yaa Kiris nebã yĩnga, a soab kõn kong a keoor ye.»" 
Mark9:42 La ned sã n maan kom-bãooneg kãens sẽn tẽed maamã ned a yembr t'a lʋɩ, sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd a soab yĩnga, yaa b sẽn na n loe a yubl ne neer kugr n lob-a ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ." 
Mark9:43 Fo nug sã n kɩt tɩ f lʋɩ yel‑wẽnd pʋgẽ bɩ f fiuug‑a tɩ fo sẽn na n kẽ vɩɩm sẽn kõn sɛ pʋgẽ ne nug yende, rẽ sãoo fo sẽn na n kẽ bugum sẽn ka kiid pʋgẽ ne f nus a yiibã. Fo nug sã n dat n maan foom tɩ f lʋɩ, bɩ f fiuug-a. Yaa neer tɩ fo yɩ nug-yend n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa, n yɩɩd fo sẽn na n tall f nus a yiibã n tɩ kẽ bug-tẽnga, bugum sẽn ka kiid pʋgẽ," 
Mark9:44 [zĩig ning bãmb zũnzũy sẽn ka kiida la bugum sẽn ka kiida.] 
Mark9:45 Fo naoor sã n dat n maan foom tɩ f lʋɩ, bɩ f fiuug-a. Yaa neer tɩ fo yɩ nao-yende, n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa, n yɩɩd fo sẽn na n tall f nao a yiibã n tɩ kẽ bug-tẽnga," 
Mark9:46 [zĩig ning bãmb zũnzũy sẽn ka kiida, la bugum sẽn ka kiida.]" 
Mark9:47 Fo nif sã n dat n maan foom tɩ f lʋɩ, bɩ f feoog-a. Yaa neer tɩ f yɩ nin-feoog n kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ, n yɩɩd tɩ tall f nin a yiibã n tɩ kẽ bug-tẽnga," 
Mark9:48 «zĩig ning bãmb zũnzũy sẽn ka kiida la bugum sẽn ka kiida.» 
Mark9:49 Bala, ned fãa na n paama yuglg ne bugum wa yamsem." 
Mark9:50 Yamsem yaa bõn-sõngo. La yamsem noosem sã n yi, yãmb na n maana bõe t'a leb n yɩ noogo? Tall-y yamsem noosem n zĩnd ne taab ne laafɩ." 
Mark10:1 A Zeezi yii be n kẽng Zʋʋde soolem pʋgẽ tẽmsẽ, la Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde. La neb kʋʋng leb n tigma bãmb nengẽ, la bãmb leb n zãms-b lame wa b sẽn mi n maandẽ wã." 
Mark10:2 Fariizẽ-dãmbã kolga a Zeezi n dat n bẽd bãmba. B sokame: «Dẽ yĩnga, noor beeme tɩ rao dig a paga?»" 
Mark10:3 A Zeezi leoka bãmba yaa: «A Moyiis tõogã yeela yãmb tɩ bõe?» 
Mark10:4 Bãmb yeelame: «A sakame tɩ b gʋls baosg sebr n kɩs-a la b rig-a.» 
Mark10:5 A Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Yaa yãmb sũyã sẽn diglmã yĩng la a Moyiis kõ yãmb tõ-kãngã. 
Mark10:6 La hal dũni sɩngrẽ, Wẽnnaam naana rao la paga." 
Mark10:7 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ rao na n yii n bas a ba la a ma, n zĩnd ne a paga." 
Mark10:8 La bãmb b yiibã fãa na n lebga yĩng a yembre. Woto, bãmb ka leb n yaa a yiib yɛs ye, bãmb yaa yĩng a yembre." 
Mark10:9 Dẽ, bɩ ninsaal da welg bũmb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn lagem ne taab ye.»" 
Mark10:10 Bãmb sẽn kẽ roogẽ, b karen-biisã leb n soka bãmb koe-kãng yelle." 
Mark10:11 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Ned sã n dig a pag n dɩk pag a to, a yaa yoaad a pipi pagã nifẽ." 
Mark10:12 La pag sã n bas a sɩd n dɩk a to, a maanda yoobo.»" 
Mark10:13 Neb talla kom-bãooneg n wa a Zeezi nengẽ tɩ b sɩɩs-ba, la b karen-biisã lenga neb nins sẽn wa-b ne-bã." 
Mark10:14 A Zeezi sẽn yã bõn-kãnga, a ka yɩ b sũurã noog baa bilf ye. La bãmb yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «Bas-y kom-bãoonegã tɩ b wa mam nengẽ la y ra gɩdg-b ye, tɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã yaa neb nins sẽn wẽnd-b bãmbã yĩnga." 
Mark10:15 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn kõn deeg Wẽnnaam soolmã koɛɛg wa bi-bilfu, a kõn kẽ be ye.»" 
Mark10:16 Dẽ, bãmb deega kambã n tik-b ne b nusi, n ning-b barka." 
Mark10:17 A Zeezi sẽn yik n dɩk sore, dao a yembr n zoe n wa n yĩgimd bãmb taoor n sok bãmb yaa: «Karen-saamb sõngo, bõe la mam na n maan n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa?»" 
Mark10:18 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «Bõe tɩ fo boond maam tɩ sõngo? Nin-sõng ka be tɩ sã n ka Wẽnnaam b yembr bal ye. 
Mark10:19 Fo mii tõodã: Da kʋ ye. Da yo ye. Da zu ye. Da kɩs kaset-zĩrẽ ye. Da zãmb ned ye. Waoog f ba la f ma.» 
Mark10:20 Yẽnda leoka bãmb yaa: «Karen-saamba, mam saka rẽnda fãa hal m yãadem wakat tɩ ta moasã.»" 
Mark10:21 A Zeezi ges-a lame n noang-a. La bãmb yeela yẽnda: «Bũmb a yembr n paoog foom. Kẽng n koos bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn tarã n kõ naong rãmba, la fo na paam paoong arzãna, la wa n tũ maam.»" 
Mark10:22 La koe-kãng kɩtame tɩ raoã neng gãnem t'a loog ne sũ-sãanga, bala, a rag n tara paoong wʋsgo." 
Mark10:23 A Zeezi wẽnegame n ges n yeel b karen-biisã yaa: «A na n yɩɩ toog ne neb nins sẽn tar-b arzegsã tɩ kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ.» 
Mark10:24 A Zeezi gom-kãng yɛɛsa b karen-biisã, la a Zeezi kẽnga taoor n yeel-ba: «M kamba, ad na n yɩɩ toog ne [neb nins sẽn teegd arzegsã] tɩ b kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ." 
Mark10:25 A yaa naana tɩ yʋgemd tũ fu-pĩim yõorẽ n looge, n yɩɩd arzɛk soab sẽn na n kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ.»" 
Mark10:26 Bãmb karen-biisã yɛɛs n paasame n sok taab yaa: «Dẽ, ãndã n tõe n paam fãagre?»" 
Mark10:27 A Zeezi gesa bãmb n yeele: «Ninsaal ka tõe bõn-kãng ye, la ka a woto ne Wẽnnaam ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam tõee bũmb fãa.»" 
Mark10:28 A Pɩyɛɛr sɩngame n yeel bãmba: «Gese, tõnd basa bũmba fãa n tũud yãmba.»" 
Mark10:29 A Zeezi leokame: «Mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n bas a yiri, bɩ a ba-bi-raopa, bɩ a ba-bi-pogse, bɩ a ma, bɩ a ba, bɩ a kamba, bɩ a pʋt mam yĩng la koe-noogã yĩnga," 
Mark10:30 n ka paam yiyã, la ba-bi-raopa la ba-bi-pogse, la ma-rãmba, la kamba, la pʋt naoor koabga, la namsg ye. La wakat sẽn watã, a na paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa." 
Mark10:31 Taoor rãmb wʋsg na n lebga poorẽ dãmba, tɩ poorẽ dãmb wʋsg lebg taoor dãmba.»" 
Mark10:32 Bãmb dɩka sor n dabd Zeruzalɛm, la a Zeezi lʋɩɩ bãmb taoore. Bãmb karen-biisã dag n bee yɛɛsg pʋgẽ, la neb nins sẽn dag n pʋgd bãmbã dag n zoeta rabeem. A Zeezi leb n peega b karen-biis piig la a yiibã n sɩng n togs-b bũmb nins sẽn na n paam bãmbã." 
Mark10:33 Gese, tõnd dabda Zeruzalɛm, la b na n yõka Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kõ maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã. La b na n kaoo bãmb bʋʋd n yeel tɩ b kʋ-ba. B na n ninga bãmb bu-zẽms nusẽ," 
Mark10:34 b na n yaala bãmba, n tʋbs bãmb kolkoodo, n pãb bãmb ne kalwaase, n kʋ bãmba. La b ki tɩ rasem a tãabo, b na vʋʋge." 
Mark10:35 A Zebde kom-dibli a Zak ne a Zã kolga a Zeezi n yeel bãmb yaa: «Karen-saamba, tõnd datame tɩ yãmb maan bũmb ning tõnd sẽn na n kos yãmbã n kõ-do.»" 
Mark10:36 A Zeezi soka bãmba: «Bõe la yãmb dat tɩ mam maan n kõ yãmba?» 
Mark10:37 Bãmb yeelame: «Yãmb sã n wa n be y naamã sẽn tar ziirã pʋgẽ, sak-y tɩ tõnd ned a yembr zĩnd yãmb dɩtgo, t'a to wã zĩnd yãmb goabga.»" 
Mark10:38 A Zeezi yeel‑b lame: «Yãmb pa mi y sẽn kot bũmb ning ye. Yãmb tõe n yũu wamd ning b sẽn na n tugl‑ma la y so koom ning b sẽn na n so‑ma?» A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb ka mi bũmb ning yãmb sẽn kotã ye. Dẽ yĩnga, yãmb tõe n yũu bõn-yũudl ning mam sẽn na n yũ wã, la y reeg toog ning mam sẽn na n deegã?»" 
Mark10:39 Bãmb yeelame tɩ b tõeeme! La a Zeezi leoka bãmba: «Yaa sɩda, yãmb na n yũu bõn-yũudl ning mam sẽn na n yũ wã, la y reeg toog ning mam sẽn na n deegã." 
Mark10:40 La a ka be ne maam tɩ sak tɩ yãmb zĩnd mam dɩtgo wall mam goabg ye. Zĩ-kãng segla Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk neb nins tɩ tog n zĩnd be wã yĩnga.» 
Mark10:41 Karen-biis piigã sẽn wʋm gom-kãngã, b sũur sãama ne a Zak la a Zã." 
Mark10:42 A Zeezi boola bãmb n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb miime tɩ neb nins nebã sẽn get wa soolem nanambsã maanda b nebã pãnga, la tɩ nin-kãsemsã soo bãmb ne pãnga." 
Mark10:43 La a kõn yɩ a woto yãmb sʋk ye. Ned sã n dat n yɩ kãseng yãmb sʋka, bɩ a yɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmda." 
Mark10:44 La ned sã n dat n yɩ taoor soab yãmb sʋka, bɩ a yɩ yãmb fãa yamba." 
Mark10:45 Bala, Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn wa wã, ka tɩ nebã na tʋm bãmb yĩng ye, la yaa tɩ tʋm nebã yĩnga, la tɩ kõ b vɩɩm tɩ yɩ yaoodo, tɩ neb wʋsg tõe n paam fãagre.»" 
Mark10:46 Bãmb taa Zeriko. La bãmb sẽn yit Zeriko ne b karen-biisã la ne neb kʋʋng wʋsgã, a Time biig a Bartime rag n zĩi sorã kɩreng n bõosdẽ." 
Mark10:47 Yẽnda sẽn wʋm tɩ yaa Nazarɛt Zeezi n watã, a sɩngame n kelem n yeele: «Zeezi! A Davɩɩd Bi-ribla! Zoe-y mam nimbãanega.»" 
Mark10:48 Neb wʋsg lenga yẽnda n yeel-a t'a sĩndi, la a zẽka a koɛɛg n yɩɩd pĩnd n yeele: «A Davɩɩd Bi-ribla, zoe-y mam nimbãanega!»" 
Mark10:49 A Zeezi yalsame n yeel tɩ b bool-a. La b boola zoangã n yeel-a: «Keng f sũuri. Yik tɩ b boonda foom.» 
Mark10:50 Zoangã loba a fuug tẽng n yik tao‑tao, n wa a Zeezi nengẽ." 
Mark10:51 A Zeezi sok-a lame yaa: «Bõe la fo rat tɩ mam maan n kõ foom?» Zoangã leoka bãmb n yeele: «M karen-saamba, m data m ninã pukri.»" 
Mark10:52 La a Zeezi yeel-a lame: «Kẽnge! Fo tẽeb n maag foom.» Tao-tao bala, a paama a nini, la a sɩngame n tũ a Zeezi sorã zugu." 
Mark11:1 Bãmb sẽn kolg Zeruzalɛm n pẽneg Bɛtfaaze la Betani, oliiv tɩɩs tãngã sẽnẽ, a Zeezi tʋma b karen-biis a yiib n yeel-b yaa:" 
Mark11:2 «Kẽng-y tẽng ning sẽn be-a yãmb taoorã. Yãmb sã n kẽ tẽngã bala, y na n yãnda bõn-bil sẽn loe, ned sẽn nan ka zomb-a ye. Lok-y-yã-a n wa ne ka." 
Mark11:3 Ned sã n sok yãmb tɩ yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maand a woto? Bɩ y leok-a tɩ yaa Zu-soabã n dat-a, la bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b leb n tall-a n wa ka moas-moasã bala.»" 
Mark11:4 Bãmb karen-biisã kẽngame n tɩ yã bõn-bil sẽn loe zak noore, sorã kɩrenga, la bãmb lok-a lame." 
Mark11:5 Neb kẽer sẽn be beenẽ soka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb maanda bõe? Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb lokd bõn-bilã?» 
Mark11:6 Bãmb leoka wa a Zeezi sẽn dag n yeel bãmbã, la b basa bãmb tɩ b looge." 
Mark11:7 Bãmb waa ne bõn-bilã a Zeezi nengẽ, n palg-a b futu, la a Zeezi zomb-a lame." 
Mark11:8 Neb wʋsg yɛɛda b fut sorã zugu, tɩ kẽer gãneg tɩɩs vãad b sẽn kao pʋt pʋsẽ." 
Mark11:9 Neb nins sẽn be a Zeezi taoorã ne neb nins sẽn pʋgd bãmbã dag n kelemdame n yetẽ: « Hozaana! Bark bee ned ning sẽn wat ne Zu-soabã yʋʋrã zugu! 
Mark11:10 Bark bee soolem ning sẽn wat-a wã, tõnd ba a Davɩɩd soolmã zugu. Hozaana hal saasẽ!»" 
Mark11:11 A Zeezi taa Zeruzalɛm n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã. La bãmb sẽn ges bũmbã fãa n sa, rẽ tɩ zĩigã sobgame. Bãmb yii be ne b karen-biisã piig la a yiibã n kẽng Betani." 
Mark11:12 Vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, bãmb sẽn yit Betani, kom dag n tara a Zeezi." 
Mark11:13 La b sẽn tool n yãnd kankang sẽn tar vãad yɩɩga, bãmb kẽngame n na n tɩ ges b sã n na paam bũmb beenẽ. La b sẽn kolge, b ka yã bũmb ye, yaa vãad bala. Bala, kankam wakat nan ka ta ye." 
Mark11:14 Dẽ, bãmb yeela kankangã yaa: «Ned kõn leb n dɩ fo biis yɛs ye, abada.» La bãmb karen-biisã wʋmame." 
Mark11:15 Bãmb taa Zeruzalɛm, la a Zeezi sẽn kẽ wẽnd doogã zakẽ, b sɩngame n dig neb nins sẽn be beenẽ n koosdẽ, la neb nins sẽn be beenẽ n daadẽ wã. La b leeba ligd tekdbã taabl-dãmba, ne wan‑koaasdbã goeelse." 
Mark11:16 La bãmb ka sak tɩ ned baa a yembr zã teoog n pɩʋʋg wẽnd doogã zak ye. 
Mark11:17 Bãmb zãmsa nebã n yeele: «Rẽ yĩnga, b ka gʋls tɩ b na n boola mam doogã tɩ pʋʋsg roog buud fãa yĩng sɩda? La yãmb maan-a lame t'a lebg wagda geongo.»" 
Mark11:18 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã wʋma a Zeezi gomdã, la b baoo sor ning b sẽn na n tũ n kʋ-ba. Bãmb dag n zoeta a Zeezi, bala, b zãmsgã rag n kẽe neb kʋʋngã sõama." 
Mark11:19 La zĩ-sobd sẽn ta, a Zeezi yii tẽngã ne b karen-biisã." 
Mark11:20 La yibeoogo, bãmb sẽn loogdã, b yãnda kankangã sẽn kʋɩ ne a yẽgã fãa." 
Mark11:21 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn tẽeg bũmb ning sẽn dag n maanã, a yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saamba, ges-y-yã! Kankangã yãmb sẽn dag n kãab wẽngã, a kʋɩɩme.»" 
Mark11:22 A Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Maan-y tẽeb ne Wẽnnaam. 
Mark11:23 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ ned sã n yeel tãn-kãngã t'a serg a sẽn beẽ wã n kẽ ko-kãsengã pʋga, la a sã n ka sãmb a sũurã pʋgẽ, la a sã n tẽ tɩ bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn yeelã na n yɩɩme, Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ yɩ a woto.»" 
Mark11:24 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam yet yãmba: «Bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn na pʋʋs n kose, bɩ y tẽ tɩ y reeg-a lame, la yãmb na yã t'a pidsame.»" 
Mark11:25 Yãmb sã n yas yĩngr n pʋʋsdẽ, yãmb sã n tara yell ne neda, bɩ y kõ-a sugri, tɩ yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã me kõ yãmb sugr y beegrã yĩnga." 
Mark11:26 [La yãmb sã n ka kõ sugri, yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã me ka na n kõ yãmb sugr y beegrã yĩng ye.]" 
Mark11:27 Bãmb leb n kẽnga Zeruzalɛm yɛsa, la a Zeezi sẽn gõod wẽnd doogẽ wã, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, ne kãsem-dãmbã waa bãmb nengẽ n sok-b yaa:" 
Mark11:28 «Yãmb maanda bõn-kãens ne no-bʋgo, la ãndã n kõ yãmb noor tɩ y maane?»" 
Mark11:29 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Mam na n soka yãmb sokr a yembre. Leok-y maam tɩ mam na yaool n togs yãmb mam sẽn paam noorã zĩig ning n maand bõn-kãensã. 
Mark11:30 A Zã lisgã yii arzãn bɩ, bɩ ninsaalb nengẽ? Leok-y maam.»" 
Mark11:31 La bãmb yẽsa ne taab a woto: «Tõnd sã n leok t'a yii arzãna, bãmb na n yeelame tɩ la yaa wãn tɩ tõnd ka tẽ-a?" 
Mark11:32 La tõnd sã n yeel t'a yii ninsaalb nengẽ, ha! Bãmb dag n zoeta nebã, bala, nebã rag n tẽedame t'a Zã sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs hakɩɩka." 
Mark11:33 Dẽ, bãmb leoka a Zeezi: «Tõnd ka mi ye.» La a Zeezi yeela bãmba: «Mam me kõn togs yãmb mam sẽn paam noorã zĩig ning n maand bõn-kãensã ye.»" 
Mark12:1 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi sɩngame n tão bãmb yel-bũnd n yeele: «Dao a yembr n dag n sel a reezẽ tɩɩse, n wẽ yãgr n gũbg-a, n tuk reezẽ rãam wẽkr boko la a me gãosgo. La yẽnda gũnug-a-la ne reezẽ tɩ‑koaadba la a bas n tog sore." 
Mark12:2 La bõn-bɩʋʋng sẽn ta, yẽnda tʋma tʋmtʋmd reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã nengẽ t'a tɩ reeg a pʋɩɩr n wa n kõ-a." 
Mark12:3 La bãmb yõka yẽnda n pãbe, n dig-a t'a lebg a nug-zaala." 
Mark12:4 La yẽnda leb n tʋma tʋmtʋmd a to bãmb nengẽ, la b pãba yẽ zugã n yaal-a." 
Mark12:5 Yẽnda tʋma a tãab soaba, la b kʋʋ yẽnda. La yẽnda tʋma neb a taab wʋsgo, la b pãba kẽere, n kʋ kẽere." 
Mark12:6 Nin-yend tãa n dag n ket yẽnda sẽn tõe n tʋme: A bi-ribl‑nongre. Yẽnda yaool n tʋma yẽnda n tagsdẽ: ‹B na n waooga mam biigã.› 
Mark12:7 La reezẽ tɩ‑koaadb kãens yẽsa ne taab n yeele: ‹Yaa yõwã n na n soog a ba wã paoongã. Wa-y tɩ d kʋ-a tɩ paoongã lebg tõnd dẽnda.› 
Mark12:8 La bãmb yõka yẽnda n kʋ, n yiis-a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã n lob kɛɛnga." 
Mark12:9 Woto wã, reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã soab na n maana bõe? Yẽnda na n waame n kʋ reezẽ tɩ‑koaadb kãense, la a rɩk pʋʋgã n gũnug koaadb a taaba." 
Mark12:10 Yãmb nan ka karem gʋls-sõamyã koe-kãngã la? Kugr ninga tãn-metbã sẽn zãgsã lebga roogã pãng kugri, a soakã zĩigẽ wã." 
Mark12:11 Yaa Zu-soabã n kɩt t'a yɩ a woto, la a yaa bõn-kãseng tõnd nifẽ.» Gãosg sẽn be reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ." 
Mark12:12 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã la kãsem-dãmbã da rat n yõka a Zeezi, la b zoee kʋʋngã. B bãngame tɩ yaa bãmb yell la a Zeezi gom yel-bũndã pʋgẽ. La b basa a Zeezi n looge." 
Mark12:13 Bãmb tʋma Fariizẽ-dãmbã kẽer ne a Erood poorẽ dãmb kẽer tɩ b tɩ maan sɩlem n kɩt t'a Zeezi gom n yõk b meng n kõ-ba. 
Mark12:14 B waa n yeela a Zeezi a woto: «Karen-saamba, tõnd miime tɩ yãmb yaa sɩd soaba, la tɩ yãmb ka zoet ned baa a yembr ye. Bala, yãmb ka tũusd neb ye. La yãmb zãmsda nebã Wẽnnaam sorã ne sɩda. Dẽ yĩnga, noor beeme tɩ yao rĩm a Sezaar yõor yaood bɩ? Tõnd tog n yaoome bɩɩ, bɩ d ka tog n yao?»" 
Mark12:15 A Zeezi sẽn mi b zãmbã leoka bãmb yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb makd maam? Wa-y ne lagf a yembr tɩ m gese.» 
Mark12:16 La b talla a yembr n wa n kõ bãmba. La a Zeezi sok-b lame yaa: «Maasmã ne yʋʋrã yaa ãnda rẽnda?» Bãmb leokame: «Yaa rĩm a Sezaar rẽnda.» 
Mark12:17 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Lebs-y rĩm a Sezaar bũmb nins sẽn yaa rĩm a Sezaar dẽnda, la y lebs Wẽnnaam bũmb nins sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam dẽnda.» A Zeezi leokrã yɛɛsa bãmba." 
Mark12:18 Sadusẽ rãmb me waa a Zeezi nengẽ, bãmb da yetame tɩ kũum ka tõe n vʋʋg ye. Saduusẽ-dãmba sẽn yet tɩ kũum vʋʋgr ka be wã waa a Zeezi nengẽ n sok bãmb a woto:" 
Mark12:19 «Karen-saamba, a Moyiis rag n gʋlsame n yeel tõnd tɩ ned sã n ki n bas a paga, n ka tar biiga, bɩ a ba-biig reeg a pagã n dog kamb a ba-biigã yĩnga.»" 
Mark12:20 Raop a yopoe n dag n be n yaa ba-biisi. Kẽem soabã peega paga, la a kiime n ka paam biig ye." 
Mark12:21 Yiib soabã reega pʋg‑kõorã, la yẽ me kiime n ka paam biig ye. Tãab soabã me yɩɩ a woto." 
Mark12:22 Bãmb b yopoe wã ned baa a yembr ka paam biig ye. Bãmb fãa sẽn ki, pagã me yaool n kiime." 
Mark12:23 Kũum vʋʋgr wakate, pagã na n yɩɩ ãnda soab paga? Bala, yẽ yɩɩ bãmb b yopoe wã fãa paga.»" 
Mark12:24 A Zeezi leoka bãmba: «Ka yãmb sẽn ka wʋmd gʋls-sõamyã, wall Wẽnnaam pãngã võor yĩng la yãmb tudg-y sɩda?" 
Mark12:25 Bala, kũum vʋʋgr wakate, raop ka na n leb n dɩgs pagba, pagb me ka na n kuil sɩdba. Bãmb na n yɩɩ wa malegsã sẽn be arzãnã." 
Mark12:26 La ne kũum vʋʋgrã yelle, yãmb nan ka karem a Moyiis sebrã pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam sẽn gom ne a Moyiis tuugã sẽn wit bugmã sɛɛgẽ n yetẽ wã la?: «Mam yaa a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam, a Izak Wẽnnaam la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam.»" 
Mark12:27 Wẽnnaam ka kũum Wẽnnaam ye, b yaa nin-vɩɩs Wẽnnaam. Ad yãmb tudgrã yaa kãsenga!»" 
Mark12:28 Tõog karen-saamb a yembr sẽn wʋm bãmb goamã, la a sẽn yã t'a Zeezi leoka bãmb ne yamã, a kolgame n sok bãmb yaa: «Tõodã fãa sʋka, bʋg n yɩɩda?»" 
Mark12:29 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Pipi soabã la woto: Israyɛlle, kelge, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa b yembr bal tãa." 
Mark12:30 Bɩ f nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã ne f sũur fãa, la f yalẽ fãa la f yamã fãa la ne f pãngã fãa." 
Mark12:31 Tõog ning sẽn pʋgd-a yẽnda la woto: Nong f to wa f menga.» Tõog ka be sẽn yɩɩd bãmbã ye. 
Mark12:32 Tõog karen-saambã yeela bãmb yaa: «Karen-saamba, y gomd yaa sɩda. Wẽnnaam sɩd yaa b yembr tãa, la a to ka be kal bãmb bala," 
Mark12:33 la tɩ nong bãmb ne f sũur fãa la f yam fãa la f pãng fãa, la tɩ nong f to wa f menga, a yɩɩda maand sẽn yõogd bugum la maand a taabã fãa.»" 
Mark12:34 A Zeezi sẽn yã tɩ yẽnda leoka ne yam, b yeel-a lame: «Fo ka zãr ne Wẽnnaam soolem ye.» La ned baa a yembr ka saag n leb n sok bãmb bũmb ye." 
Mark12:35 A Zeezi sẽn zãmsd nebã wẽnd doogẽ wã, b sokame: Yɩta a wãn tɩ tõog karen-saam-dãmbã yetẽ tɩ Kiris yaa a Davɩɩd biiga?" 
Mark12:36 Sɩɩg-sõng kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd meng yeele: «Zu-soabã yeela mam Zu-soabã yaa: Zĩnd mam dɩtgo, hal tɩ m wa kɩt tɩ f tab f bɛɛbã ne f nao.»" 
Mark12:37 A Davɩɩd meng boonda bãmb tɩ Zu-soaba. Dẽ, bãmb na n yɩɩ a wãn n leb n yɩ a Davɩɩd biiga? La neb kʋʋng wʋsg kelga bãmb ne sũ-noogo." 
Mark12:38 Zãmsgã pʋgẽ, a Zeezi yeela nebã yaa: Gũus-y y mens ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã sẽn nong n gõ ne fu-bɛda, n dat tɩ nebã pʋʋsd bãmb raas pʋsã." 
Mark12:39 Bãmb baooda waoogr zaoods karen-dotẽ la rɩɩb zĩisẽ. 
Mark12:40 Bãmb gʋsda pʋg‑kõap paoongo, la b pʋʋsd pʋʋs-wogd nebã gesg yĩnga. Bãmb na n paama sɩbgr sẽn ya toog n yɩɩd a taabã." 
Mark12:41 A Zeezi zĩndame tɩ b nengã tees ligdã ningr zĩigẽ, tɩ b get kʋʋngã sẽn ningd ligdã to‑to. Arzegs rãmb wʋsg n dag ningd ligd wʋsgo." 
Mark12:42 Pʋg‑kõor a yembr sẽn yaa naong soab me n wa n ning lagd-bãooneg a yiib sẽn zems tãma. 
Mark12:43 La a Zeezi boola b karen-biisã n yeel-ba: «Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ pʋg‑kõ-kãngã sẽn yaa naong soabã kõome n yɩɩd neb nins fãa sẽn ning ligd ligdã koglgẽ wã. 
Mark12:44 Bala, bãmb ned kam fãa tʋm n yõngame n ningi, la yẽ sẽn ka tarã, a pɩɩsa a meng zãng n kɩse, hal a rɩɩb ligdi.»" 
Mark13:1 A Zeezi sẽn yit wẽnd doogẽ wã, bãmb karen-biig a yembr yeela bãmb yaa: «Karen-saamba, ges-y roogã kugã neerlem la meebã!»" 
Mark13:2 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda: «Fo nee ro-kãsems kãensã? Kugr baa a yembr kõn pa a to zug b sẽn kõn leeb n lub ye.» 
Mark13:3 A Zeezi zĩnda oliiv tɩɩs tãngã zugu, tɩ b nengã tees wẽnd doogã. La neb sẽn ka be ne bãmbã, a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zak la a Zã la Ãndere kosa a Zeezi yaa:" 
Mark13:4 «Wilg-y tõnd bõn-kãng sẽn na n wa wakat ninga, la bãnd sẽn na n wilg bõn-kãens fãa saab wakate.»" 
Mark13:5 La a Zeezi sɩngame n yeel bãmba: «Gũus-y y mens neer tɩ ned da tudg yãmb ye. 
Mark13:6 Bala, neb wʋsg na n dɩka mam yʋʋr n wa n yeel tɩ bãmb yaa maam, la b na n tudga neb wʋsgo." 
Mark13:7 Yãmb sã n wʋm zabr rãamde, la y wʋm zabr kibare, bɩ y ra yɛɛs ye, bala, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bõn-kãens fãa zĩndi, la rẽ nan ka wakat saab nand ye." 
Mark13:8 Tẽng a ye rãmb na n yika zabr ne tẽng a to rãmba, tɩ soolem a ye rãmb yik ne soolem a to rãmba. La tẽn-digimdg na n zĩnda zĩig-zĩiga, la kom na n zĩndame. Bõn-kãens fãa na n yɩɩ wa rogem toog sɩngr bala." 
Mark13:9 Gũus-y y mense. Neb na n yõga yãmb n kẽng bʋʋd zĩisẽ, la b na n pãba yãmb karen-dot pʋse. Neb na n yõga yãmb n kẽng Gʋvɛrneer dãmb la rĩm-dãmb taoor mam yĩnga, tɩ bãmb paam n wʋm kasetã." 
Mark13:10 Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ koe-noogã reng n moon tẽmsã fãa pʋse. 
Mark13:11 B sã n yõg yãmb n kẽnd bʋʋd zĩigẽ, bɩ y ra maan yɩɩr ne yãmb sẽn na n tɩ yeel tɩ bũmb ning ye. Togs-y bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn na n wilg yãmb wakat-kãngã, bala, ka yãmb n na n gom ye, yaa Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
Mark13:12 Ned na n yõka a ba-biig n kɩs tɩ b kʋ. Ba na n yõka a biig n kɩse, tɩ Kambã yik ne b ba-rãmb la b ma-rãmba, n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ba." 
Mark13:13 Nebã fãa na n kisga yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, la ned ning fãa sẽn na yals kãenkãe hal tɩ wakat ta na paam fãagre." 
Mark13:14 Yãmb sã n wa n yãnd ‹sãoong bõn-wẽngã› t'a be zĩig ning sẽn ka zems t'a beẽ wã (bɩ sẽn karemd-a wã wʋm a võor sõama) woto, bɩ neb nins sẽn be Zʋʋde soolmẽ wã zoe n dʋ tãmsã," 
Mark13:15 tɩ ned ning sẽn be a roog zug ra sig n kẽ a roogẽ n na n dɩk bũmb ye. 
Mark13:16 La bɩ ned ning sẽn be a pʋʋgẽ ra lebg n tɩ rɩk a fuug ye. 
Mark13:17 Pagb nins sẽn tʋta la sẽn yẽsemd kamb na yã toog da-kãens daare. 
Mark13:18 Pʋʋs-y tɩ bõn-kãens ra yɩ waood wẽnd ye. 
Mark13:19 Bala, tood nins sẽn na n zĩnd da-kãens daarã, sẽn sɩng ne Wẽnnaam sẽn naan dũni hal tɩ ta moasã, a buud nan ka zĩnd ye, la tood a woto buud kõn leb n zĩnd ye, abada." 
Mark13:20 Zu-soabã sã n dag n ka boogẽ da-kãens sõorã, ned baa a yembr dag n kõn põs ye. La nin-tũusdsã bãmb sẽn tũusã yĩnga, bãmb booga da-kãens sõore." 
Mark13:21 Dẽ, ned sã n yeel yãmb tɩ Kiris bee ka, wall b bee ka sẽnẽ, bɩ y ra tẽ-a ye." 
Mark13:22 Bala, neb sẽn yagd zĩrẽ tɩ b yaa Kirisi, la neb sẽn yagd zĩrẽ tɩ bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb na n yikame n maan bãn la bõn-yɛɛsdse, tɩ b sã n tõe, bɩ b tudg nin-tũusdsã." 
Mark13:23 Gũus-y y mense. Mam pĩnd n togsa yãmb bũmba fãa.» 
Mark13:24 Wakat-kãnga, to-kãng zugẽ, wĩntoogã na n sobgame la kiuugã kõn kõ a vẽenem yɛs ye." 
Mark13:25 Ãdsã na n yii yĩngr n dʋʋge, la saasẽ pãens rãmbã na n digimdame." 
Mark13:26 Dẽ poore, nebã na n yãnda «Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn wat ne sawato, ne pãn-kãsenga, la ne ziiri." 
Mark13:27 La bãmb na n tʋma b malegsã, n tigs b nin-tũusdsã sẽn be dũni kɩrems a naasã, hal dũni tɛk tɩ ta yĩngr tɛka." 
Mark13:28 Ges-y kankang n paam zãmsgo: a sã n tão wil-poal n tobdẽ, yãmb miime tɩ sig-noor kolgdame." 
Mark13:29 Woto me, yãmb sã n yãnd tɩ bõn-kãens maandẽ, bɩ y bãng tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã waoong kolgame, la b waame n sa." 
Mark13:30 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ zamaan‑kãngã kõn looge, hal tɩ bõn-kãens fãa paam pidsgu." 
Mark13:31 Yĩngr la tẽng na looge, la mam goamã kõn tol n loog ye, abada." 
Mark13:32 Sã n yaa ne da-kãng daare la a wakatã, ned baa a yembr ka mi ye: Malegs sẽn be arzãn ka mi, bi-riblã me ka mi. Yaa m ba bal n mi." 
Mark13:33 Gũus-y neere. Neend-y-yã, bala, yãmb ka mi ra-kãng sẽn na n wa wakat ning ye." 
Mark13:34 A na n yɩɩ wa rao sẽn togd sore, n bas a yir ne a tʋmtʋmdba, n wilg ned kam fãa a tʋʋmde la a yeel zag-no-gũudã t'a gũ." 
Mark13:35 Woto yĩnga, neend-yã, tɩ yãmb ka mi wakat ning yirã soab sẽn na n wa wã ye. Tõe n yɩɩ zĩ-sobdo, wall yʋn-sʋka, wall no-kɛleng wakate, wall yibeoogo." 
Mark13:36 Maan-y rabeem tɩ b ra ling n wa n mik tɩ yãmb gõeeme ye. 
Mark13:37 Bũmb ning mam sẽn yet yãmbã, mam yet-a-la nebã fãa: Neend-y-yã.»" 
Mark14:1 Ra keta rasem a yiib tɩ ta Pak tigrã, la bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigrã. La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã dag n baooda sɩlem ning bãmb sẽn na n maan n paam n yõk a Zeezi n kɩt tɩ b kʋ." 
Mark14:2 La b yeelame tɩ b ra maan tigrã wakate, tɩ rãmbg ra wa n zĩnd nebã sʋk ye." 
Mark14:3 A Zeezi sẽn be Betani n zĩ yĩng soab a Sɩmo roogẽ n dɩtẽ, pag a yembr n wa be n tar albatre tʋk sẽn pid ne naar halaal tɩdar kaam, a raab sẽn yaa toogo. La a wãaga tʋkã n kiig kaamã a Zeezi zugu." 
Mark14:4 Bãmb karen-biis kẽer sũy yikame tɩ b gom ne taab n yeel tɩ yaa bõe tɩ b sãam tɩdar kaamã? 
Mark14:5 Tɩ b ra tõe n koos-a-la deniye kobs-tã n kõ naong rãmba. La b yẽgma ne pagã. 
Mark14:6 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: Bas-y-yã-a laafɩ. Bõe tɩ yãmb namsd-a? A maana maam yel-sõmde. 
Mark14:7 Bala, naong rãmb na n kell n bee ne yãmb wakat fãa, la yãmb tõe n maan-b‑la neer y sẽn dat wakate. La mam ka na n be ne yãmb daar fãa ye." 
Mark14:8 Pagã maana a sẽn tõe. A pĩnd n ninga mam yĩngã tɩdar kaam m mumb yĩnga. 
Mark14:9 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda tɩ dũni tɛk fãa, zĩig ning fãa b sẽn na n moon koe-no-kãngã, b na n togsa bũmb ning pagã sẽn maanã, a tẽegr yĩnga." 
Mark14:10 A Zʋdaas Iskaryo sẽn yaa a Zeezi karen-biis piig la a yiibã ned a yembr kẽnga maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b t'a na n yõka a Zeezi n kõ-ba. 
Mark14:11 Koe-kãng yɩ-b-la noogo, tɩ b kãab-a ligdi. La a Zʋdaas baoo weer ning a sẽn na paam n yõk bãmb n kõ." 
Mark14:12 Bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigrã pipi daar sẽn yaa Pakã pe-bilã kʋʋb raare, a Zeezi karen-biisã soka bãmb tɩ b ratame tɩ bãmb kẽng n tɩ segl Pakã tigr rɩɩb yɛ bãmb yĩnga." 
Mark14:13 La a Zeezi tʋma b karen-biis a yiib n yeel-ba: Kẽng-y tẽngã pʋgẽ, la yãmb na n sega rao sẽn zɩt koom ne yʋʋre. Pʋg-y yẽnda." 
Mark14:14 La a sẽn na n kẽ zak ningã, bɩ y yeel yirã soab tɩ karen-saamb sokdame yaa: «Zĩig bee yɛ mam sẽn na n dɩ Pakã tigr ne m karen-biisã?»" 
Mark14:15 La a na n wilga yãmb do-kãseng sẽn be roog zugu, sẽn segle, tɩ teed fãa be a pʋgẽ. Yaa be la yãmb na n segl pakã tõnd yĩnga." 
Mark14:16 Karen-biisã loogame n kẽng tẽngã pʋgẽ, la b mikame tɩ bũmba fãa yɩɩ wa a Zeezi sẽn da yeelã, la b segla Pakã tigrã." 
Mark14:17 Zĩ-sobd sẽn ta, bãmb waa ne b karen-biisã piig la a yiibã." 
Mark14:18 Bãmb sẽn zĩ n dɩtẽ, a Zeezi yeelame: Yãmb ned a yembr sẽn dɩt ne maamã n na n zãmb maam." 
Mark14:19 Sũ-sãang sɩng n yõka bãmb tɩ b sok a Zeezi yembr-yembre: Yaa maam? 
Mark14:20 A Zeezi leoka bãmba: Yaa yãmb piig la a yiibã ned a yembr sẽn tʋmd a nug ne maam laagẽ wã. 
Mark14:21 Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n kii wa b sẽn gʋls b yellã to-to wã. La rao ning sẽn na n yõk-a bãmb n kõ wã na n paama toogo. Rao-kãng ma sã n dag n ka rogẽ yã-a n são. 
Mark14:22 Rɩɩbã wakate, a Zeezi rɩka bur n ning bark n kao n kõ bãmb n yeele: «Deeg-y n dɩ-y-yã. Yõwã yaa mam yĩngã.»" 
Mark14:23 Dẽ poore, bãmb dɩka bõn-yũudla, n ning-a bark n kõ b karen-biisã, la b fãa yũume." 
Mark14:24 La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Yõwã yaa mam zɩɩm, kãab-paalg zɩɩm sẽn daag neb wʋsg yĩnga.»" 
Mark14:25 Mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ mam kõn leb n yũ reezẽ rãam yɛs hal tɩ ta daar ning mam sẽn na n yũ a paalg Wẽnnaam soolmẽ wã ye." 
Mark14:26 Bãmb sẽn yɩɩl yɩɩlã n sɛ, bãmb kẽnga oliiv tɩɩs tãngã zugu." 
Mark14:27 A Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: Yãmb fãa na n targ n basa maam. Tɩ bõe a gʋlsa a woto: «Mam na n wẽe pe-kɩɩmã, la piisã na n sãeegame.»" 
Mark14:28 La mam sã n vʋʋge, mam na n denga yãmb taoor Galɩle." 
Mark14:29 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela bãmb yaa: «Baa nebã fãa sã n targ n bas yãmba, mam yẽ kõn targ ye.»" 
Mark14:30 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda: «Mam yeta foom sɩda, tɩ rũndã, yʋngã bala, sẽn deng no-raoog kɛleng a yiib soabã, foom, fo na n kɩɩsa naoor a tãab tɩ f ka mi maam ye.»" 
Mark14:31 La a Pɩyɛɛr yeela ne pãng n yɩɩd pĩnda: «Baa sã n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam naag yãmb n ki, mam kõn kɩɩs tɩ m ka mi yãmb ye.» La bãmb fãa me yeela a woto." 
Mark14:32 Bãmb taa zĩig a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Zetsemaane. La a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b zĩnd ka tɩ bãmb kẽng n tɩ pʋʋs la b wa. 
Mark14:33 B peega a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zak la a Zã tɩ b tũ bãmba. A Zeezi sɩngame n paam sũur zɩ-kãsenga. 
Mark14:34 Bãmb yeela a Pɩyɛɛr dãmb yaa: «Sũ-sãang n tar maam hal n dat n kʋ maam. Pa-y ka n neende.» 
Mark14:35 Dẽ, a Zeezi kẽnga taoor bilfu, n vãbend tẽng n pʋʋs n yeel tɩ sã n dag n tõeẽ bɩ to-kãngã da paam bãmb ye." 
Mark14:36 Bãmb yeelame: « Abba, m ba, yãmb tõee bũmb fãa. Yiis-y bõn-yũudl‑kãngã mam taoore. Baoosgo, da maan-y mam daab ye, maan-y y raabo.»" 
Mark14:37 A Zeezi waa b karen-biisã nengẽ n mik tɩ b gõeeme. La bãmb yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Sɩmo, fo gõeeme la? Fo ka tõe n neend lɛɛr a yembre?" 
Mark14:38 Neend-y la y pʋʋse n da wa n lʋɩ makr pʋg ye. Sɩɩgã ratame, la yĩngã pãng paoodame.»" 
Mark14:39 A Zeezi leb n zãaga bilf n tɩ pʋʋs wa pĩndã bala. 
Mark14:40 Bãmb leb n waa n mikame tɩ b karen-biisã gõeeme yɛsa, bala, gõeemã rag n tar-b-la wʋsgo. La b karen-biisã ka mi b sẽn na n leok bãmb tɩ bũmb ning ye." 
Mark14:41 A Zeezi leb n waa naoor a tãab soab n yeel bãmb yaa: «Kell n gũs-y moasã n vʋʋse. Maan n sɛɛme. Wakatã taame. Ges-y-yã, b zãmba Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kõ yel-wẽn maandbã." 
Mark14:42 Yik-y tɩ d kẽnge. Ned ning sẽn na n zãmb-a maam n yõk n kõ wã kolgdame.» 
Mark14:43 A Zeezi sẽn nan ket n gomda, a Zʋdaas sẽn yaa bãmb karen-biisã piig la a yiibã ned a yembr waame, la a waa ne neb kʋʋng sẽn zãad sʋʋs la rasaba, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne kãsem-dãmbã sẽn tʋme." 
Mark14:44 Ned ning sẽn na n zãmb a Zeezi wã dag n kõo bãmb bãnd n yeel tɩ ned ning yẽnda sẽn na n mokã, yaa nin‑kãng la a Zeezi. Bɩ b yõk-a, n gũ-a neer n tall‑a n looge." 
Mark14:45 A Zʋdaas sẽn ta bala, a kolga a Zeezi n yeel-ba «karen-saamba», la a mok-ba." 
Mark14:46 Neb a taabã yõka a Zeezi. A Zʋdaas waa ne sodaase. 
Mark14:47 Ned a yembr sẽn dag n be beenẽ wõoga a sʋʋg n kɛ maan-kʋʋd kãsmã tʋmtʋmd n fiuug a tʋbre. 
Mark14:48 A Zeezi goma ne-b n yeele: «Yãmb waa ne sʋʋs la roay n na n yõk maam wa m yaa fãada! 
Mark14:49 Mam dag n bee ne yãmb daar fãa n zãmsd nebã wẽnd doogẽ wã, la yãmb ka yõk maam ye. La yaa tɩ gʋls-sõamyã na paam pidsgu.»" 
Mark14:50 La bãmb karen-biisã fãa basa bãmb n zoe. 
Mark14:51 Bi-bɩɩg a yembr n dag n lob fu-goabg bal n tũ bãmba. 
Mark14:52 La b gãda yẽnda t'a bas a fu-goabgã n zoe beelle. 
Mark14:53 Bãmb talla a Zeezi n kẽng maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem yiri, zĩig ning maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã fãa la kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã sẽn tigmã." 
Mark14:54 A Pɩyɛɛr pʋgla bãmb yɩɩg-yɩɩga, n ta maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem zakẽ n zĩnd ne tʋmtʋmdbã n woot bugum." 
Mark14:55 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne kaoreng yɛl bʋ-bʋʋdbã fãa baoo kaset dãmb sẽn na n dõd a Zeezi n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ba, la b ka yã ye." 
Mark14:56 Bala, neb wʋsg yaga zĩrẽ n dõd bãmba la b kasetã ka zems taab ye." 
Mark14:57 Neb kẽer yik n kɩsa kaset zĩrẽ ne bãmb yell n yeel tɩ bãmb wʋma a Zeezi sẽn yeele: 
Mark14:58 «Mam na n sãama Wẽnd-do-kãngã ninsaalb nus sẽn me wã, n lebs n me a to ninsaalb nus sẽn ka me, dasem a tãab pʋgẽ.»" 
Mark14:59 La baa ne yel-kãnga, bãmb kasetã ka zems taab ye." 
Mark14:60 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem yika tigingã sʋk n sok a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb ka leokd tɩ bũmb la? Yaa bõe rõadg la nebã rõt yãmbã?»" 
Mark14:61 A Zeezi sĩndame n ka leok tɩ bũmb ye. Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem leb n soka bãmb yɛsa: «Yaa yãmb la Kiris, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bark soabã Bi-riblã bɩ?»" 
Mark14:62 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Mam sɩd yaa Kirisi. La yãmb na n yãnda Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn zao Sẽn-Tõe-yã-Fãa wã rɩtgo, la b sẽn wat ne sawato.»" 
Mark14:63 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem pãrsa a fut n yeele: «Tõnd leb n rata kaset rãmb n maan bõe?" 
Mark14:64 Yãmb wʋma b sẽn gom n paoog Wẽnnaamã. Yãmb tagsda a wãna?» La nebã fãa kaoo bãmb bʋʋd n yeel tɩ b zemsa kũum. 
Mark14:65 Neb kẽer sɩngame n tʋbs bãmb kolkoodo, n pil bãmb neng ne peend n pãb bãmb ne nug-gila, n yeel bãmb yaa: «Togs-y bãngr goamã.» La tʋmtʋmdbã deega a Zeezi n laal bãmb pegse." 
Mark14:66 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn zĩ zakã pʋgẽ wã, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem tʋmtʋmd-poak n wa be." 
Mark14:67 A sẽn yãnd a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn woot bugmã, a ges-a lame n yeel-a: «Yãmb me rag n bee ne Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi.»" 
Mark14:68 Yẽnda kɩɩsame n yeele: «Mam ka mi ye. Mam ka bãng fo sẽn dat n togs bũmb ningã ye.» La a yiime n kẽng zãongẽ wã. [La no-raoog kelmame]. 
Mark14:69 Tʋmtʋmd-poakã sẽn yã yẽnda, a leb n sɩngame n wilg neb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã t'a Pɩyɛɛr yaa a Zeezi neda." 
Mark14:70 La a Pɩyɛɛr leb n kɩɩsame tɩ ka sɩd ye. Sẽn yɩ bilfu, neb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Fo sẽ yaa bãmb neda, bala, fo yaa Galɩle neda!»" 
Mark14:71 La a sɩngame n kãab a meng n wẽen n yeele: «Mam ka mi rao ning yãmb sẽn gomd a yellã ye.» 
Mark14:72 Wakat-kãng bala, no-raoog kelma naoor a yiib soaba. La a Pɩyɛɛr tẽega gomd ning a Zeezi sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã: «Sẽn deng no-raoog sẽn na n kelem naoor a yiibu, fo na n kɩɩsa naoor a tãab tɩ f ka mi maam ye.» La a sẽn tagse, a yãbame." 
Mark15:1 Yibeoog pĩnda, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb tigma ne kãsem-dãmbã la tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, la kaoreng yɛl bʋ-bʋʋdbã fãa. Bãmb sẽba a Zeezi n tall-b n tɩ kɩs a Pilate." 
Mark15:2 A Pilat soka a Zeezi: Yãmb yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã? A Zeezi leoka yẽnda a woto: Yãmb n yeele. 
Mark15:3 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã rõda bãmb ne bũmb wʋsgo. 
Mark15:4 A Pilat leb n soka bãmb yaa: Yãmb ka leokd tɩ bũmb la? Ges-y bũmb nins fãa b sẽn dõt yãmbã. 
Mark15:5 La a Zeezi ka tol n leok tɩ bũmb ye. La rẽ yɛɛsa a Pilate. 
Mark15:6 Tigr fãa, a Pilat dag n yiisda bi-bɛɛg a yembre, nebã sẽn kos a soabã n base." 
Mark15:7 La ned a yembr sẽn boond t'a Barabaas dag n bee bi-bees roogẽ ne tẽn-dãmbdba, bala, tẽn-dãmbg wakate, b kʋʋ neda." 
Mark15:8 Kʋʋngã rʋʋme n tɩ kos a Pilat bũmb ning a sẽn mi n maand n kõt bãmbã. 
Mark15:9 A Pilat soka bãmb b sã n datame t'a bas Zʋɩf-rãmbã dĩmã n kõ-ba. 
Mark15:10 Bala, yẽnda bãngame tɩ yaa sũ-kiir yĩng la maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã yõk a Zeezi n wa n kɩs yẽnda." 
Mark15:11 La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã kɩtame tɩ nebã kos tɩ b yiis a Barabaas n base. 
Mark15:12 A Pilat leb n gomame n sok bãmb tɩ b ratame tɩ yẽnda maan a soab ning bãmb sẽn boond tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã dĩmã bõe? 
Mark15:13 Bãmb leb n kelmame n yeele: Ka-y bãmb da-pɩk zugu. 
Mark15:14 A Pilat soka bãmba: B maana bõe sẽn yaa wẽnga? La nebã leb n kelma ne pãng n yɩɩd pĩnda: Ka-y bãmb da-pɩk zugu. 
Mark15:15 A Pilat sẽn dat n noog nebã sũur yĩnga, a yiisa a Barabaas n base. La yẽnda sẽn kɩt tɩ b pãb a Zeezi ne kalwaase, yẽ rɩka bãmb n kõ nebã tɩ b ka-b da-pɩk zugu." 
Mark15:16 Sodaasã talla a Zeezi n kẽng zakã pʋgẽ, sẽn dat n togs tɩ sodaasã zakẽ, la bãmb tigma sodaasã fãa sẽn be zĩ-kãngã." 
Mark15:17 B yeelga a Zeezi fu-miuugu, la b kala gõos wa maanfo, n fõgen bãmb zugu." 
Mark15:18 Dẽ, sodaasã sɩngame n pʋʋs bãmb n yeele: Zʋɩf-rãmbã dĩma, tõnd pʋʋsda yãmba." 
Mark15:19 La bãmb wẽe a Zeezi zug ne tãnwĩiga, n tʋbs bãmb kolkoodo, la b yĩgimdame n wõgemd bãmb taoore." 
Mark15:20 Bãmb sẽn yaal a Zeezi a woto n sɛ, b pidga fu-miuugã n lebs a Zeezi futã n yeelg-ba, la b talla bãmb n na n tɩ ka da-pɩk zugu." 
Mark15:21 Bãmb modga ned a yembr sẽn yi weoogẽ n loogdẽ t'a tʋk a Zeezi da-pɩkã. A yʋʋr la a Sɩmo, n yaa Sirɛn neda. Yẽnda yaa a Alegsãndr ne a Rufuus ba." 
Mark15:22 Bãmb talla a Zeezi n kẽng zĩig ning sẽn boond tɩ Golgota, sẽn dat n togs tɩ zu-wang zĩiga." 
Mark15:23 Bãmb kõo a Zeezi rãam sẽn kalem ne miir la a Zeezi ka yũ ye. 
Mark15:24 Bãmb kaa a Zeezi da-pɩk zugu, la b pʋɩɩ bãmb futã n maan bãnde, n na n bãng ned kam fãa sẽn na n paam fuug ninga." 
Mark15:25 Yaa sõ-bɩɩmd wakat la b ka bãmb da-pɩkã zugu. 
Mark15:26 Gʋlsem ning sẽn wilgd b sẽn dõd bãmb ne bũmb ningã yeta a woto: Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã. 
Mark15:27 Bãmb kaa fãadb a yiib da-pɩgs zut ne a Zeezi: A yembr b rɩtgo, a to wã b goabga." 
Mark15:28 [Woto, gʋls-sõng sẽn yet tɩ b lagma bãmb nin‑wẽns sʋkã paam pidsgu.]" 
Mark15:29 Neb nins sẽn loogd be wã tʋʋ bãmba, n gõms b zut n yeele: «N-faa! Yãmb sẽn tõe n sãam wẽnd doogã n lebs n me-a rasem a tãab pʋgẽ wã," 
Mark15:30 bɩ y fãag y meng n wa n sig da-pɩkã zugu.» 
Mark15:31 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã me goma ne taab n yaal bãmb n yeele: B fãaga neb a taaba, n yaool n ka tõe n fãag b meng ye." 
Mark15:32 Bɩ Kiris sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã sig da-pɩkã zug moasã tɩ d yã n tẽ. La neb nins b sẽn ka da-pɩgs zut ne bãmbã me goma bãmb wẽnga. 
Mark15:33 Sẽn ta wĩnto-sʋka, dũni gill fãa lebga lik bida hal tɩ ta wẽn-kaoore." 
Mark15:34 La wẽn-kaoor wakate, a Zeezi zẽka b koɛɛg n kelem n yeele: Eloyi! Eloyi! Lama sabaktani? Sẽn dat n togs tɩ: ‹Mam Wẽnnaam! Mam Wẽnnaam! Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb bas maam?›" 
Mark15:35 Neb kẽer sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã sẽn wʋm a woto, b yeelame: Gese, bãmb boonda a Eli." 
Mark15:36 La bãmb ned a yembr wudgame n dɩk neoodgo, n los miismẽ, n yaag n sel tãnwĩig n kõ bãmb tɩ b yũ, la a yeele: Bas-y tɩ d ges a Eli sã n na wa n sik bãmba." 
Mark15:37 La a Zeezi zẽka b koɛɛg n kelem ne pãnga, la b kiime." 
Mark15:38 Wẽnd doogã fu-lilldig sɩnga yĩngr n kẽeg n tãag tẽnga. 
Mark15:39 Sodaas koabg naabã sẽn dag n yas t'a neng tees a Zeezi wã, a sẽn yã b kũumã sẽn yɩ to-to wã, a yeelame: Hakɩɩka, rao-kãngã yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla." 
Mark15:40 Pagb kẽer me n dag n yas yɩɩg n getẽ. A Maari sẽn yit Magdala, ne a Maari sẽn yaa a Zak-bil ne a Zooze ma, la a Salome dag n bee bãmb sʋka." 
Mark15:41 Bãmb dag n tũuda a Zeezi n sõngd bãmb wakat ning b sẽn dag n be Galɩle. Pagb a taab wʋsg da tũu a Zeezi n wa Zeruzalɛm. 
Mark15:42 Dag n yaa seglg daare, sẽn dat n togs tɩ daar ning sẽn deng vʋʋsg daarã. La wĩndgã sẽn kolg lʋɩɩs yĩnga," 
Mark15:43 a Zozɛf sẽn yit Arimate waame. Yẽnda yaa kaorengã yɛl bʋ-bʋʋd nebã fãa sẽn waoogd‑a, la a me rag n gũuda Wẽnnaam soolem waoongo. Yẽnda maana raood n kẽng a Pilat nengẽ n tɩ kos a Zeezi kũumã." 
Mark15:44 A Pilat sẽn wʋm t'a Zeezi zoe n kiime, a yɛɛsame, la a kɩtame tɩ b bool sodaas koabg naabã t'a wa, t'a sok-a n na n bãng b sã n kii sẽn kaoose." 
Mark15:45 Sodaas koabg naabã sẽn wilg yẽnda yellã sẽn yɩ to-to wã, a kõo a Zozɛf a Zeezi kũumã." 
Mark15:46 La a Zozɛf raa lẽ peen-peelse, n sik a Zeezi kũumã da-pɩkã zugu, n vil-b ne pɛɛlã n gãneg-b yaoog sẽn tuk kugr zug pʋgẽ, la a bilma kugr n lud yaoogã noore." 
Mark15:47 A Maari sẽn yit Magdala ne a Zooze ma a Maari rag n geta zĩig ning b sẽn gãneg bãmbã. 
Mark16:1 Vʋʋsg daarã sẽn looge, a Maari sẽn yit Magdala ne a Zak ma a Maari, la a Salome raa tɩdar sẽn tar yũ-noogo, n na n tɩ yug a Zeezi kũumã." 
Mark16:2 Dimaasã daar yibeoog pĩnda, bãmb taa yaoogẽ wã sõ-pukr wakate." 
Mark16:3 Bãmb goma ne taab n yeel tɩ ãndã n na n lak kugrã n bas yaoogã noor n kõ-ba. 
Mark16:4 La bãmb sẽn zẽk b nens n gese, b yãame tɩ b bilga kugrã sẽn yaa bedr wʋsgã n bas yaoogã noore." 
Mark16:5 Bãmb sẽn kẽ yaoogẽ wã, b yãnda bi-bɩɩg t'a zĩ rɩtgo n yer fu-pɛɛlga, la b yɛɛsame." 
Mark16:6 Yẽnda yeela bãmba: Da yɛɛs-y ye. Yãmb baooda Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi b sẽn ka da-pɩkã zugã. Bãmb vʋʋgame. Bãmb ka be ka ye. Ad zĩig ning b sẽn dag n gãneg bãmbã. 
Mark16:7 La y kẽng n tɩ yeel b karen-biisã ne a Pɩyɛɛr t'a Zeezi na n denga yãmb taoor n kẽng Galɩle. Yaa beenẽ la yãmb na n yã bãmb wa b sẽn da yeel yãmbã. 
Mark16:8 Pagbã yii yaoogẽ wã n zoe ne yɛɛsg la rigbu. La yɛɛsgã yĩnga, bãmb ka togs ned tɩ bũmb ye." 
Mark16:9 [A Zeezi sẽn vʋʋg dimaas daar yibeoogã, b reng n puka b meng ne a Maari sẽn yit Magdala, soab ningã bãmb sẽn dig zĩn-dãmb a yopoe tɩ yi n basã." 
Mark16:10 La yẽnda kẽngame n tɩ togs neb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Zeezi wã la sẽn zĩ ne sũ-sãams la nintãmã. 
Mark16:11 Bãmb sẽn wʋm t'a Zeezi vɩɩme, la tɩ pagã yãnd-b lame, bãmb ka tẽ-a ye." 
Mark16:12 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi puka b meng ne bãmb neb a yiib sẽn dag n be sorẽ n kẽnd weoogẽ, la yɩɩ ne wẽneg a to." 
Mark16:13 Bãmb me lebg n waa n togsa b taabã, la b kell n ka tẽ bãmb me ye." 
Mark16:14 A Zeezi yaool n puka b meng ne karen-biis piig la a yembrã, dẽ tɩ b zĩ n dɩtame. La a Zeezi zab-b lame, b ka-tẽebã la b sũ-riglmã yĩnga. Bala, b ka tẽ neb nins sẽn yã bãmb b vʋʋgrã zugẽ wã ye." 
Mark16:15 La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Saag-y dũni tɛk fãa n moon nebã fãa koe-noogã. 
Mark16:16 Ned ning fãa sẽn na n tẽ, tɩ b lis-a, a na paam fãagre. La ned ning fãa sẽn kõn tẽ na kong bʋʋm." 
Mark16:17 Ad bãn nins sẽn na n tũ neb nins sẽn na n tẽ wã: ne mam yʋʋre, bãmb na n diga zĩn-dãmba la b gom gom-zẽmse." 
Mark16:18 Bãmb na n yõga wiisi, la b sã n yũ bũmb sẽn yaa zẽnem, a kõn zab-b ye. Bãmb na n tika bãad-rãmb ne b nusi, la b na n paama maagre." 
Mark16:19 Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn gom woto n sɛ, dẽ Wẽnnaam zẽka bãmb n kẽng arzãna, la bãmb zĩnda Wẽnnaam nug‑rɩtgo." 
Mark16:20 La bãmb karen-biisã kẽngame n moon koɛɛgã zĩig fãa. Zu-soabã tʋma ne bãmba, n maan bãn n tũnug koɛɛgã n wilg t'a yaa sɩda.]" 
Luke1:1 Neb wʋsg makame n gʋls bũmb nins sẽn maan tõnd sʋkã. 
Luke1:2 B sẽn gʋlsã zemsa wa neb nins sẽn dag n yãnd yellã hal a sɩngrẽ sẽn togs tõndã, la b lebg koe-noogã moaandbã." 
Luke1:3 Teofill sõngo, mam sẽn fees n bao n bãng fãa neb nins sẽn bils maamã nengẽ wã, mam tagsame tɩ yaa neer tɩ mam me gʋls yãmb n wilg yɛlã sẽn pʋg taab to-to," 
Luke1:4 tɩ yãmb tõe n deeg tɩ bũmb nins b sẽn dag n zãms yãmbã yaa sɩda. 
Luke1:5 Wakat ning a Erood sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋde rĩmã, maan-kʋʋd a ye n dag n be tɩ b boond t'a Zakari. Yẽnda yaa maan-kʋʋd a Abiya sull a ye neda. A pagã yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Aarõ yagenga, la a yʋʋr la a Elizabɛte." 
Luke1:6 Bãmb b yiibã fãa dag n yaa nin-tɩrs Wẽnnaam nifẽ, la b da sakda Zu-soabã tõodã la b noyã fãa sõama." 
Luke1:7 La b rag n ka tar biig ye. Bala, a Elizabɛt da yaa kiiri, la b yiibã fãa da kʋʋlame." 
Luke1:8 Daar a yembre, a Zakari buudã sẽn da tog n ges maoongã yelle, a Zakari dag n maanda maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã Wẽnnaam taoore." 
Luke1:9 Bala, b dag n maana bãnde, wa sẽn zems maan-kʋʋdbã miningu, n yãk yẽnda t'a kẽ Zu-soabã roogẽ wã n yõog wisdã." 
Luke1:10 La neb kʋʋngã dag n bee yɩng wisdã yõogr wakat n pʋʋsdẽ. 
Luke1:11 La Zu-soabã malɛɛk puka a meng ne a Zakari, n yas wisdã yõogr tẽn-kugrã rɩtgo." 
Luke1:12 La a Zakari sẽn yã malɛɛkã, a yɛɛsame, tɩ rabeem yõk-a." 
Luke1:13 Malɛɛkã yeela yẽnda yaa: Zakari, da zoe rabeem ye, bala, Wẽnnaam leoka fo pʋʋsgo. Fo pag a Elizabɛt na n doga bi-ribl n kõ-fo. La fo na n pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Zã." 
Luke1:14 Fo na n paama sũ-noog n kɩdme, la neb wʋsg na n maana sũ-noog a rogmã yĩnga." 
Luke1:15 Bala, yẽnda na n yɩɩ nin-kãseng Zu-soabã nifẽ. Yẽnda kõn yũ reezẽ rãam wall bõn-yũudl sẽn yilimd neng ye. Sɩɩg-sõng na n pida yẽnda a ma sẽn na n dog-a wakat bala." 
Luke1:16 A na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll kamb wʋsg lebg n wa Zu-soabã sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ. 
Luke1:17 Yẽnda na n kẽna Wẽnnaam taoor ne sɩɩg ning la pãng ning a Eli sẽn dag n tarã, n kɩt tɩ ba-rãmbã paam zems-n-taar ne b kamba, n kɩt tɩ kɩɩsdbã paam yam n lebg nin-tɩrse. La a na n sõnga nebã tɩ b segl n sa Zu-soabã yĩnga." 
Luke1:18 A Zakari soka malɛɛkã yaa: «Bõe n na n kɩt tɩ mam bãng bõn-kãnga? Bala, mam yaa nin-kẽema, la m pagã me yʋʋm ka paood ye.»" 
Luke1:19 La malɛɛkã leoka yẽnda yaa: «Mam yaa a Gabriyɛlle, n be Wẽnnaam taoore. B tʋma maam tɩ m wa n gom ne foom la m togs-f koe-no-kãnga." 
Luke1:20 Gese, fo na n lebga muka, la fo kõn tõog n gome, hal tɩ ta wakat ning bõn-kãngã sẽn na n paam pidsgã, fo sẽn ka tẽ mam goamã, tɩ b yaool n na n paam pidsgu, b wakat sã n ta wã yĩnga. »" 
Luke1:21 Wakat-kãnga, nebã da gũuda a Zakari, la a sẽn kaoosd wẽnd doogẽ wã yɛɛsa bãmba." 
Luke1:22 La a sẽn yi, a ka tõog n gom ne nebã ye. La b bãngame t'a yãnda yãab wẽnd doogẽ wã. La a sɩngame n bils bãmb ne magbo, la a ket n yaa muka." 
Luke1:23 La a Zakari tʋʋmdã rasem sõor sẽn pidi, a kuila a yiri." 
Luke1:24 La wakat bilf sẽn paase, a pag a Elizabɛt rɩka pʋga. La yẽnda soondame hal tɩ ta kiis a nu." 
Luke1:25 La a yeelame yaa: Ad bũmb ning Zu-soabã sẽn maan n kõ maam, n zems wakat ning bãmb sẽn yãk yam n na n yiis bũmb ning sẽn dag n yaa mam yãnd nebã sʋkã." 
Luke1:26 Kiis a yoob soabã wakate, Wẽnnaam tʋma malɛɛk a Gabriyɛlle, Galɩle tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Nazarɛte," 
Luke1:27 pa-kuil a yembr nengẽ, b sẽn da rɩk n kõ a Davɩɩd yageng a Zozɛfe. Pʋg-sadã yʋʋr la a Maari." 
Luke1:28 Malɛɛkã waa yẽnda nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: Mam pʋʋsda foom, ned ning Wẽnnaam sẽn ning barkã. Zu-soabã bee ne foom." 
Luke1:29 Gom kãens namsa a Maari t'a sokd a meng tɩ pʋʋs-kãngã võor yaa bõe? 
Luke1:30 Malɛɛkã yeel-a lame yaa: Maari, da zoe rabeem ye. Bala, fo paama bark Wẽnnaam nifẽ." 
Luke1:31 Gese, fo na n dɩka pʋga, n dog bi-ribla, la f na n pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Zeezi." 
Luke1:32 Yẽnda na n yɩɩ nin-kãsenga, la b na n boond-a lame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-To Bi-ribla. Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam na n kõo yẽnda a yaab a Davɩɩd naam." 
Luke1:33 Yẽnda na n sooga a Zakoob buudã wakat sẽn kõn sa, la a naamã kõn zĩnd saab wakat ye." 
Luke1:34 A Maari soka malɛɛkã tɩ bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ wãn n yɩ tɩ yẽnda nan ka mi raoa? 
Luke1:35 La malɛɛkã leok-a lame yaa: Sɩɩg-sõng na n waa fo zugu, la Wẽn-kẽemdã pãngã na n luda foom ne b maasem. Yaa woto yĩng la b na n bool bi-sõng ning fo sẽn na n dogã tɩ Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla." 
Luke1:36 Ad fo kẽem a Elizabɛt me rɩka pʋg a kʋʋlem wakate, n na n dog bi-ribla. B sẽn dag n boond yẽnda tɩ kiirã, a tara kiis a yoob pʋg moasã." 
Luke1:37 Bala, bũmb ka be Wẽnnaam sẽn ka tõe ye." 
Luke1:38 Dẽ, a Maari yeelame yaa: Mam yaa Zu-soabã tʋmtʋmd poaka. Bɩ yãmb sẽn yeel bũmb ningã yɩ. La malɛɛkã loogame n bas-a." 
Luke1:39 Da-kãens pʋgẽ, a Maari yikame n kẽng Zʋʋde tẽng a yembr sẽn be tãmsã sẽnẽ wã tao-tao." 
Luke1:40 A Maari kẽe a Zakari zakẽ, n pʋʋs a Elizabɛte." 
Luke1:41 A Elizabɛt sẽn wʋm a Maari pʋʋsgã bala, biigã sẽn be yẽnda pʋgẽ wã virsame, la a Elizabɛt pida ne Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
Luke1:42 A zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: Fo tara Wẽnnaam bark n yɩɩd pagbã fãa. La biigã sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã me tara barka. 
Luke1:43 Maana a wãn tɩ mam wa paam tɩ m Zu-soabã ma wat m nengẽ? 
Luke1:44 Bala, ade, fo pʋʋsmã sẽn kẽ mam tʋbrẽ wã yee, la biigã sẽn be mam pʋgẽ wã sẽn virs ne sũ-noogo." 
Luke1:45 Bark bee pag ning sẽn tẽ tɩ Zu-soabã sẽn yeel yẽnda wã na n paama pidsgã zugu. 
Luke1:46 La a Maari yeelame yaa: Mam sɩɩgã pẽgda Zu-soabã," 
Luke1:47 la mam sũur pida ne sũ-noogo, mam fãagd a Wẽnnaam yĩnga." 
Luke1:48 Bala, bãmb gesa b tʋmtʋmd-poakã a sik-m-mengã pʋgẽ. Bala, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, ad zamaan fãa neb na n yeelame tɩ bark bee mam zugu." 
Luke1:49 Bala, Pãng‑Soabã maana bõn-kãsems n kõ maam. Bãmb yʋʋr yaa sõmblem." 
Luke1:50 «Bãmb nimbãan-zoeerã paada neb nins sẽn zoet bãmbã zutu, zamaan woo zamaane.»" 
Luke1:51 Bãmb wilga b nug pãnga. Bãmb sãeega neb nins sẽn dag n tar wuk-m-meng tagsd b sũyã pʋsẽ wã. 
Luke1:52 Bãmb deega pãens rãmbã naam n bas-ba, la b zẽk sik-m-mens rãmbã." 
Luke1:53 Bãmb tɩgsa kom sẽn tar b rãmbã ne arzegse, la b kɩt tɩ arzegsã rãmb loog zaalem." 
Luke1:54 Bãmb sõnga b tʋmtʋmd a Israyɛlle, la b tẽeg b nimbãan‑zoeerã," 
Luke1:55 wa b sẽn dag n yeel tõnd yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n maana a Abrahaam ne a yagensã neer wakat fãa wã. 
Luke1:56 A Maari paa ne a Elizabɛt sẽn kolg kiis a tãabo, n yaool n lebg n kuil a yiri." 
Luke1:57 A Elizabɛt rogem wakat taame. La a roga bi-ribla. 
Luke1:58 Yẽnda yagsã ne a roagdbã wʋmame tɩ Zu-soabã puka b nimbãan-zoeer ne yẽnda, la b lagma ne-a n paam sũ-noogo." 
Luke1:59 Rogmã rasem a nii daare, bãmb waa ne bi-bilfã n na n kẽes bãongo, la b da rat n pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Zakari wa a baaba." 
Luke1:60 La a ma wã gomame n yeel tɩ ayo! T'a yʋʋr na n yɩɩ a Zã. 
Luke1:61 Nebã yeela a Elizabɛt tɩ yẽnda roagdbã sʋka, ned ka be n tar yʋ-kãng ye." 
Luke1:62 La bãmb bilsa biigã baaba ne nus n dat n bãng a sẽn dat tɩ b pʋd biigã yʋʋr ninga. 
Luke1:63 A Zakari kosa walga, n gʋls tɩ biigã yʋʋr la a Zã. La nebã fãa yɛɛsame." 
Luke1:64 Wakat-kãng bala, a Zakari zelemd lakame t'a sɩng n gomd n pẽgd Wẽnnaam." 
Luke1:65 Rabeem yõka b yagsã fãa. La koe-kãng saaga Zʋʋde tẽmsã fãa sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã. Nebã dag n gomda bõn-kãng yell ne taaba. 
Luke1:66 Neb nins fãa sẽn wʋm gomdã da tagsda a yelle, la b sokdẽ tɩ bi-kãngã na n yɩɩ bõe biiga? Bala, Zu-soabã pãng dag n bee ne-a." 
Luke1:67 Biigã ba a Zakari pida ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, n gom pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeele:" 
Luke1:68 Pẽgr Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã Wẽnnaam, bãmb sẽn wa n ges b nebã n fãag-bã yĩnga," 
Luke1:69 la bãmb sẽn kõ tõnd fãagd sẽn tar pãnga, sẽn yit a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmdã buud pʋgẽ" 
Luke1:70 wa bãmb sẽn dag n gom ne b no-rɛɛs-sõamyã noy hal wakat sẽn kaoose," 
Luke1:71 tɩ b na n fãaga tõnd n yiis d bɛɛbã la neb nins fãa sẽn kis-b tõndã nusẽ wã. 
Luke1:72 Woto, bãmb zoee tõnd yaab-rãmbã nimbãanega, n tẽeg bãmb kãab-sõngã yelle," 
Luke1:73 wa bãmb sẽn dag n kãabe, n wẽen n yeel tõnd yaab a Abrahaam" 
Luke1:74 tɩ b na n fãaga tõnd n yiis d bɛɛbã nusẽ, la b kõ tõnd pãn-tõog tɩ pʋʋs bãmb ne sõmblem la tɩrlem bãmb taoor hal tõnd vɩɩmã tɛka, tɩ rabeem kaẽ ye." 
Luke1:75  
Luke1:76 La foom a bi-bilfã, b na n boola foom tɩ Sẽn‑Ka‑To no-rɛɛsa. Bala, fo na n lʋɩɩ Zu-soabã taoore n maneg bãmb soayã," 
Luke1:77 la f kɩt tɩ nebã bãng tɩ yaa ne yel‑wẽnã sugr kosg la b na n paam fãagre," 
Luke1:78 tõnd Wẽnnaamã nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga. Yaa nimbãan-zoeerã yĩng la sõorã sẽn pukdã na n wa tõnd nengẽ," 
Luke1:79 n kõ neb nins sẽn zĩ lik pʋgẽ la kũum maasmẽ wã vẽenem, la a tɛ tõnd tɩ d tũ laafɩ sore." 
Luke1:80 La biigã bɩtame t'a yam paasdẽ. La a paa weoogẽ wã hal tɩ ta daar ning a sẽn puk a meng ne Israyɛll nebã. 
Luke2:1 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Sezaar Ogust yiisa tõog n yeel tɩ b sõd dũniyã nebã fãa." 
Luke2:2 Sõd-kãng sẽn yɩ dẽenem soabã zĩnda Siiri Gʋvɛrneer a Kiriniyuus zamaanẽ. 
Luke2:3 Ned kam fãa dag n kuiisa a meng tẽngẽ tɩ b tɩ sõd-a. 
Luke2:4 A Zozɛf me yii Nazarɛt sẽn be Galɩle soolmẽ n kẽng a Davɩɩd tẽngẽ wã sẽn boond tɩ Betlehɛm n be Zʋʋde soolmẽ, yẽ sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd buud la a yagengã yĩnga." 
Luke2:5 Yẽnda kẽnga be ne a pʋg-bil a Maari tɩ b sõd-a. La a Maari da tʋtame. 
Luke2:6 La bãmb sẽn be be, a Maari rogem wakat taame." 
Luke2:7 La yẽnda roga a pipi biigã, n vil-a ne peend n gãneg rũms rɩɩb koglg pʋgẽ, weer sẽn ka be sik-zĩigẽ wã yĩnga." 
Luke2:8 La tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ, pe-kɩɩmb n dag n be we-kɛɛng ne yʋng n gũud b piisi." 
Luke2:9 Zu-soabã malɛɛk puka a meng ne bãmba, la Zu-soabã ziir vẽenem yãgame n gũbg bãmba. Dabeem kãseng yõka bãmba." 
Luke2:10 La malɛɛkã yeel-b lame yaa: «Da zoe-y rabeem ye. Bala, mam togsda yãmb koe-noog sẽn na n wa ne sũ-no-kãseng nebã fãa yĩnga." 
Luke2:11 Fãagd la b rog yãmb yĩng dũndã, a Davɩɩd tẽngẽ wã. Bãmb la Kirisã, Zu-soabã." 
Luke2:12 Ad bãnd ning sẽn na n kɩt tɩ yãmb bãng bãmba: Yãmb na n yãnda bi-pɛɛlg sẽn vil ne peend n gãe rũms rɩɩb koglgẽ.» 
Luke2:13 La zĩig pʋgẽ bala, malegs wʋsg yii arzãn n wa n paas malɛɛkã n pẽgd Wẽnnaam n yetẽ:" 
Luke2:14 «Wẽnnaam sẽn be hal saasẽ-saasẽ wã paam pẽgre! La laafɩ zĩnd dũniyã zugu, neb nins bãmb sẽn nongã sʋka.»" 
Luke2:15 Malegsã sẽn bas bãmb n leb n leb arzãna, pe-kɩɩmbã yeela taab yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng Betlehɛm n tɩ ges bũmb ning sẽn maan tɩ Zu-soabã togs tõndã.»" 
Luke2:16 Bãmb kẽnga tao-tao n tɩ yã a Maari ne a Zozɛfe, la bi-pɛɛlgã sẽn gãe rũms rɩɩb koglgẽ wã." 
Luke2:17 Bãmb sẽn yã bi-pɛɛlgã, b togsa bũmb nins fãa b sẽn dag n gom ne bãmb biigã wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Luke2:18 Yellã linga neb nins fãa sẽn wʋm bũmb nins pe-kɩɩmbã sẽn togsd bãmbã. 
Luke2:19 A Maari bĩnga gom-kãens fãa a sũurẽ n tagsd b yelle. 
Luke2:20 Pe-kɩɩmbã lebgame, n waoogd Wẽnnaam la b pẽgd bãmba, bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn wʋme, la b sẽn yã tɩ sɩd yaa wa malɛɛkã sẽn dag n togs bãmbã yĩnga." 
Luke2:21 La rasem a nii daarã sẽn yaa biigã bãong kẽesg daarã sẽn ta, b pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Zeezi, wala malɛɛkã sẽn dag n yeel sẽn deng a ma sẽn na n dɩk a pʋgã." 
Luke2:22 La a Maari ne biigã yɩlgr wakat sẽn pidi, wa sẽn zems ne a Moyiis tõogã, yẽnda ne a Zozɛf talla biigã n kẽng Zeruzalɛm n na n tɩ kõ Zu-soabã." 
Luke2:23 Bãmb maana wa sẽn gʋls Zu-soabã tõog pʋgẽ wã. A yetame: «Bi-ribl fãa sẽn yaa a ma bi‑rẽenga, b tog n dɩk‑a lame n kõ Zu-soabã.»" 
Luke2:24 La b maana wal a yiib bɩ manwan-bi a yiib maoongo, wa sẽn gʋls Zu-soabã tõog pʋgẽ wã." 
Luke2:25 La mik rao a yembr n dag n be Zeruzalɛm n boond t'a Sɩmyõ. Rao-kãng dag n yaa nin-tɩrga, la a sakda Wẽnnaam. Yẽnda dag n gũuda Israyɛll belsgo, la Sɩɩg-sõng dag n bee a zugu." 
Luke2:26 Sɩɩg-sõng dag n wilg-a lame t'a kõn ki, hal t'a yã Kirisã, Zu-soabã sẽn na n tʋmã." 
Luke2:27 Sɩɩg-sõng kɩtame t'a Sɩmyõ kẽng wẽnd doogẽ wã. La a Zeezi ba wã ne b ma wã sẽn tall bãmb n wa n na n pids bũmb ning tõogã sẽn yetã," 
Luke2:28 a Sɩmyõ deega biigã a nusẽ, n pẽg Wẽnnaam n yeele:" 
Luke2:29 Zu-soaba! Moasã, yãmb basa y tʋmtʋmdã t'a loogd ne laafɩ. Wa yãmb sẽn dag n yeelã," 
Luke2:30 mam nin yãnda fãagr ning yãmb sẽn kõ tõndã," 
Luke2:31 fãagr y sẽn segl nebã fãa nifẽ wã. 
Luke2:32 A yaa vẽenem sẽn vẽnegd bu-zẽmse, la a yaa Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã ziiri." 
Luke2:33 B sẽn gom a Zeezi yell a woto wã yɛɛsa b ba ne b ma. 
Luke2:34 A Sɩmyõ ning-b-la barka, la a yeel a Zeezi ma a Maari yaa: Ad bi-kãngã waa Israyɛll neb wʋsg lʋɩɩse la b yikr yĩnga, la a na n yɩɩ bãnd neb sẽn na n zãgse." 
Luke2:35 A na n puka neb wʋsg sũy pʋsẽ yɛla, la sũ-sãang sẽn wẽnd sʋʋg sẽn kõs ned n na n paam foom." 
Luke2:36 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-poak a ye n dag n be be. A yʋʋr la a Ãnde, a Fanuwɛll bi-pugla, n yaa a Azɛɛr buudu. A ra kʋʋla wʋsgo. A zĩnda ne a sɩdã yʋʋm a yopoe a pʋg-sademd wakate," 
Luke2:37 n lebg pʋg‑kõore, n kell n paa a woto. La baa ne a sẽn tar yʋʋm pis-nii la a naasã, a dag n ka yit wẽnd doogẽ wã ye. A dag n maanda Wẽnnaam tʋʋmd wĩntoog ne yʋngo, ne no-loeer la pʋʋsgo." 
Luke2:38 Yẽnda me waa wẽnd doogẽ wã wakat-kãng bala. Yẽnda dag n pẽgda Wẽnnaam la a gomd biigã yell ne neb nins sẽn dag n gũud Zeruzalɛm fãagrã a Zeezi yelle. 
Luke2:39 La bãmb sẽn pids bũmb fãa wa sẽn zems Zu-soabã tõogo, a Zozɛf ne a Maari leb n leba b tẽngẽ, Nazarɛte." 
Luke2:40 Biigã rag n bɩtame, la a pãng paasdame, la a da pida ne yam, la Wẽnnaam barkã da bee a zugu." 
Luke2:41 A Zeezi ba-rãmbã dag n kẽngda Zeruzalɛm yʋʋmd fãa, Pakã tigr yĩnga." 
Luke2:42 A Zeezi sẽn ta yʋʋm piig la a yiibu, b kẽnga Zeruzalɛm wa sẽn zems tigrã miningu." 
Luke2:43 La tigrã sẽn sa tɩ bãmb lebg n kuiisẽ, biig a Zeezi paa Zeruzalɛm, la b ba-rãmbã ka bãng ye." 
Luke2:44 Bãmb sẽn dag n tags t'a Zeezi bee b kẽnd-n-taasã nengẽ wã yĩnga, b kẽna daar a ye kẽnde, n yaool n gẽes a Zeezi b mitinsã sʋka." 
Luke2:45 La b ka yãnd-b ye. La b lebg n lebda Zeruzalɛm la b gẽesd a Zeezi. 
Luke2:46 Rasem a tãab daarã, bãmb yãnda a Zeezi wẽnd doogẽ wã tɩ b zĩ karen-saam-dãmbã sʋk n kelgd-b la b sogsd-b sokdse." 
Luke2:47 A Zeezi bãngrã ne b leokdsã linga neb nins fãa sẽn da wʋmd bãmbã. 
Luke2:48 A Zeezi ba-rãmbã sẽn yãnd-bã, b yɛɛsame. A Zeezi ma wã yeel-b lame yaa: M biiga, yaa bõe tɩ fo maan tõnd a woto? Gese, maam ne f baaba baoo foom ne sũ-sãanga." 
Luke2:49 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb da baood maam? Yãmb ka mi tɩ mam maanda tʋʋmd m ba wã roogẽ la? 
Luke2:50 La bãmb ka wʋm bũmb ning a Zeezi sẽn da gomd ne bãmbã võor ye. 
Luke2:51 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi tũu bãmb n leb Nazarɛte, la b saka bãmb noore. Bãmb ma wã dag n bĩngda bõn-kãens fãa a sũurẽ." 
Luke2:52 A Zeezi rag n bɩtame, tɩ b yamã paasdẽ, la b paama Wẽnnaam barka la ninsaalb rẽnd me." 
Luke3:1 Rĩm a Sezaar Tɩbɛɛr sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la nuunẽ, t'a Pilat dag n yaa Zʋʋde soolem Gʋvɛrneere, t'a Erood yaa Galɩle rĩmã, t'a biig a Filip ya Yitʋʋre ne Tarkonit soolem dĩmã, t'a Lizanyaas yaa Abilɛn soolem dĩma," 
Luke3:2 t'a Ãnd ne a Kayiif yaa maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmba, Wẽnnaam goma ne a Zakari biig a Zã weoogẽ wã." 
Luke3:3 La a Zã saaga tẽms nins fãa sẽn pẽ Zʋrdẽ wã, n moondẽ n yet nebã tɩ b tek yam n deeg lisgu, n paam b yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Luke3:4 Yɩɩ wa sẽn gʋls Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sebrã pʋgẽ wã: Yaa ned ning koɛɛg sẽn kelemd we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ wã, n yetẽ tɩ: «Maneg-y Zu-soabã sore! Rems-y bãmb so-bugsã tɩ yɩ tɩrse!" 
Luke3:5 Londã fãa na n pidsame! Tãmsã ne kunkubã fãa na n sarmame! So-golemsã na n lebga tɩrse, la b na n kõo so-rʋdã!" 
Luke3:6 La ninsaal buud fãa na n yãa fãagr ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõtã.» 
Luke3:7 Dẽ, a Zã rag n yeta neb kʋʋngã sẽn wat yẽnda nengẽ t'a lis-bã yaa: Wag-toos buudu, ãndã n wilg yãmb tɩ y zoe sũ-puugr sẽn watã?" 
Luke3:8 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y wom biis sẽn zemsd ne neb sẽn tek yam n kos sugri, la y da tags y sũyã pʋs t'a Abrahaam sẽn yaa yãmb yaabã sekame ye. Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam tõe n dɩka kug-kãensã n kɩt tɩ b lebg a Abrahaam yagense." 
Luke3:9 Larã zoe n bee tɩɩsã yẽgẽ moasã. Dẽ, b na n keega tɩɩg ning fãa sẽn ka womd bi-sõama, n lob bugmẽ." 
Luke3:10 Neb kʋʋngã soka a Zã yaa: Woto wã, bõe la tõnd tog n maane?" 
Luke3:11 A Zã leok-b lame n yeele: Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar fu-yerdɩ a yiib yãk a ye n kõ sẽn ka tar-a, la ned ning sẽn tar n dɩtẽ me maan a woto." 
Luke3:12 Yaood dɛɛgdbã me waame n dat t'a lis-ba. B soka a Zã yaa: Karen-saamba, tõnd tog n maana bõe?" 
Luke3:13 Yẽnda leok-b lame n yeele: Da reeg-y yaood n yɩɩd b sẽn kõ yãmb noor tɩ y reegã baa bilfu. 
Luke3:14 Sodaas me soka a Zã tɩ la bãmb yẽ tog n maana bõe? Yẽnda leoka bãmb n yeele: Da maan-y ned pãng ye, la y da rõd neb zaalem ye, la y maan sũ-noog ne y yaoodã." 
Luke3:15 Nebã da yas n gũudame, la b fãa da sokda b mens n dat n bãng sãnde ka a Zã la Kirisã." 
Luke3:16 A Zã leoka bãmb fãa n yeele: Mam lisda yãmb koomẽ. La ned a ye n wata, n tar pãng n yɩɩd maam. Mam pʋs n pa zems tɩ lood bãmb neooda sẽbds ye. Bãmb na n lisa yãmb ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, la ne bugum." 
Luke3:17 Bãmb zãada b kaorgo. Bãmb na n pɩɩsa b zɛɛga, n wʋk ki wã n sui b baoorẽ. La b na n yõoga wudgã ne bugum sẽn ka kiida." 
Luke3:18 A Zã sagla nebã ne sagls a taab wʋsgo, n moon bãmb koe-noogã." 
Luke3:19 La a Zã sẽn wilg Erood sẽn yaa Gʋvɛrneerã t'a sẽn maan ne a ba-biig a Filip pag a Eroodyaadã, ne tʋʋm wẽnsã fãa a sẽn maanã ka zemse," 
Luke3:20 A Erood leb n maana tʋʋm wẽng a to n paase, n yõk a Zã n sui bi-bees roogo." 
Luke3:21 Nebã fãa sẽn paam koom lisgu, a Zeezi me paama lisgu. La bãmb sẽn pʋʋsd wakate, yĩngr pakame," 
Luke3:22 la Sɩɩg-sõng rɩka manwall wẽneg n sig bãmb zugu. Koɛɛg zĩnda saasẽ n yeele: Fo yaa mam bi-ribl-nongr sẽn ta mam yam zãnga. 
Luke3:23 A Zeezi sẽn wa n na n sɩng b tʋʋmdã, rẽ tɩ b rag n tara yʋʋm pis-tã sẽnẽ. Bãmb da yaa a Zozɛf biig wa nebã sẽn dag n tagsdã. A Zozɛf rag n yaa a Heli biiga," 
Luke3:24 sẽn yaa a Matat biiga, sẽn yaa a Leevi biiga, sẽn yaa a Melki biiga, sẽn yaa a Yanayi biiga, sẽn yaa a Zozɛf biiga," 
Luke3:25 sẽn yaa a Matatyaas biiga, sẽn yaa a Amoos biiga, sẽn yaa a Nahum biiga, sẽn yaa a Esli biiga, sẽn yaa a Nagayi biiga," 
Luke3:26 sẽn yaa a Maat biiga, sẽn yaa a Matatyaas biiga, sẽn yaa a Semeyin biiga, sẽn yaa a Yosɛk biiga, sẽn yaa a Zoda biiga," 
Luke3:27 sẽn yaa a Zoaana biiga, sẽn yaa a Reeza biiga, sẽn yaa a Zorobabɛll biiga, sẽn yaa a Salatiyɛll biiga, sẽn yaa a Neeri biiga," 
Luke3:28 sẽn yaa a Melki biiga, sẽn yaa a Adi biiga, sẽn yaa a Kozam biiga, sẽn yaa a Elmadam biiga, sẽn yaa a Ɛɛr biiga," 
Luke3:29 sẽn yaa a Zeezi biiga, sẽn yaa a Eliyezɛɛr biiga, sẽn yaa a Zorim biiga, sẽn yaa a Matat biiga, sẽn yaa a Leevi biiga," 
Luke3:30 sẽn yaa a Sɩmyõ biiga, sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda biiga, sẽn yaa a Zozɛf biiga, sẽn yaa a Zonam biiga, sẽn yaa a Eliyakim biiga," 
Luke3:31 sẽn yaa a Meleya biiga, sẽn yaa a Mena biiga, sẽn yaa a Matata biiga, sẽn yaa a Natam biiga, sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd biiga," 
Luke3:32 sẽn yaa a Ezayi biiga, sẽn yaa a Zobɛɛd biiga, sẽn yaa a Booz biiga, sẽn yaa a Sala biiga, sẽn yaa a Nasõ biiga," 
Luke3:33 sẽn yaa a Aminadaab biiga, sẽn yaa a Admin biiga, sẽn yaa a Arni biiga, sẽn yaa a Ɛsrom biiga, sẽn yaa a Farɛɛs biiga, sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda biiga," 
Luke3:34 sẽn yaa a Zakoob biiga, sẽn yaa a Izak biiga, sẽn yaa a Abrahaam biiga, sẽn yaa a Taara biiga, sẽn yaa a Nakoor biiga," 
Luke3:35 sẽn yaa a Seruk biiga, sẽn yaa a Reyu biiga, sẽn yaa a Falɛk biiga, sẽn yaa a Ebɛɛr biiga, sẽn yaa a Sala biiga," 
Luke3:36 sẽn yaa a Kayinam biiga, sẽn yaa a Arfaksaad biiga, sẽn yaa a Sɛm biiga, sẽn yaa a Nowe biiga, sẽn yaa a Lemek biiga," 
Luke3:37 sẽn yaa a Matusala biiga, sẽn yaa a Henok biiga, sẽn yaa a Zarɛɛd biiga, sẽn yaa a Maleleyɛll biiga, sẽn yaa a Kayinam biiga," 
Luke3:38 sẽn yaa a Enoos biiga, sẽn yaa a Sɛt biiga, sẽn yaa a Ãdem biiga, sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam biigã." 
Luke4:1 A Zeezi sẽn pid ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, bãmb yii Zʋrdẽ n lebg n wa, la Sɩɩgã talla bãmb n kẽng weoogẽ." 
Luke4:2 La Sʋtãanã maka bãmb beenẽ dasem pis-naase. La dasem kãens pʋgẽ, bãmb ka tol n dɩ bũmb ye. La rẽ sẽn looge, kom yaool n yõka bãmba." 
Luke4:3 Dẽ, sʋtãanã yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb sã n yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, bɩ y yeel kug-kãensã tɩ b lebg buri.»" 
Luke4:4 La a Zeezi leoka yẽnda: «A gʋlsame: «Ninsaal kõn vɩ ne rɩɩb bal ye.» 
Luke4:5 Rõatã talla bãmb n dʋ yĩngr n paase, n wilg bãmb dũniyã soolem dãmbã nif kamsg pʋgẽ," 
Luke4:6 n yeel-b yaa: «Mam na n kõo yãmb dũni naamã fãa, ne soolem kãensã ziirã, bala, b kõ-a-la maam, la mam kõt-a la m sẽn dat a soaba." 
Luke4:7 Dẽ, yãmb sã n wõgemd mam taoore, a fãa na n lebga yãmb n so.»" 
Luke4:8 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: B gʋlsame: «Waoog Zu-soaba, fo Wẽnnaam, la f pʋʋs bãmb b yembr bala.»" 
Luke4:9 Rõatã leb n talla a Zeezi yɛs n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, n yals bãmb wẽnd doogã zug n yeel-ba: Yãmb sã n yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, bɩ y yɩk ka n tiimd tẽnga." 
Luke4:10 Bala, b gʋlsame: ‹Bãmb na n yeela b malegsã tɩ b gũ yãmba," 
Luke4:11 la malegsã na n zãa yãmb ne b nusi, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb naoor da wa n lak kugr ye.› »" 
Luke4:12 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda tɩ b gʋlsame: «Ra mak Zu-soaba, fo Wẽnnaamã ye.»" 
Luke4:13 Rõatã sẽn mak a Zeezi ne makr buud toor-toor n sɛ, a loogame n bas bãmba, hal tɩ ta a sẽn na n leb n paam weer a to n mak-ba." 
Luke4:14 A Zeezi lebg n leba Galɩle ne Sɩɩg-sõngã pãnga. La bãmb yʋʋrã saaga soolmã fãa. 
Luke4:15 A Zeezi dag n zãmsda nebã karen-dot pʋse, la nebã fãa rag n pẽgda bãmba." 
Luke4:16 A Zeezi kẽnga Nazarɛte, tẽng ning b sẽn dag n wub bãmbã. La vʋʋsg daare, bãmb kẽe karen-doogẽ wã wa bãmb sẽn minim n maandẽ wã. Bãmb yikame n na n karem." 
Luke4:17 La b kõo bãmb Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sebre. Bãmb laka sebrã, n yãnd zĩig ning b sẽn da gʋls n yeel tɩ:" 
Luke4:18 «Zu-soabã Sɩɩg bee mam zugu, bala, b kõ maam pãng tɩ m togs koe-noogã naong rãmb sʋka. Bãmb tʋma maam tɩ m tɩ moon yembsã yolsg koɛɛga, la m moon n togs zoensã, tɩ b na n leb n paama b nini, la m kɩt tɩ neb nins b sẽn namsdã loog ne lohorem," 
Luke4:19 la m moon bark yʋʋmd Zu-soabã sẽn kõtã.» 
Luke4:20 A Zeezi pila sebrã n kɩs tʋmtʋmdã la b zĩndi. Nebã fãa sẽn be karen-doogẽ wã dag n geta bãmba. 
Luke4:21 A Zeezi sɩngame n gom ne-b n yeele: «Gʋls-sõng‑kãngã yãmb sẽn wʋm moas-moasã wã paama pidsg rũndã.» 
Luke4:22 La nebã fãa dag n kɩta bãmb kaset n pẽgd bãmba, gom-sõamy nins sẽn dag n yit bãmb noorẽ wã yĩnga. La bãmb dag n yetame: «Bãmb ka a Zozɛf biigã wɛ?»" 
Luke4:23 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Mam miime tɩ yãmb na n wẽe maam yel-bũn‑kãnga: «Tɩpa, tɩp f meng f toor n sãooge, la bɩ y maan bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn maan Kapɛrnaom tɩ tõnd wʋma, y tẽngẽ ka.»" 
Luke4:24 A Zeezi leb n yeel-b lame yaa: «Sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs baa a yembr zɩ n paam tɩ b reeg-a sõama a meng tẽngẽ ye." 
Luke4:25 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd t'a Eli wakate, yĩngr sẽn pag tɩ saag ka ni yʋʋm a tãab la kiis a yoobe, tɩ kom kãseng kẽ tẽngã fãa wã, pʋg‑kõap wʋsg n dag n be Israyɛlle." 
Luke4:26 Baoosgo, Wẽnnaam ka tʋm a Eli pʋg‑kõor baa a yembr nengẽ, sã n ka Sɩdõ soolem pʋg‑kõor a yembr sẽn dag n be Sarɛpta nengẽ bala." 
Luke4:27 La Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Eliize wakate, yĩn-gãong bãas sẽn tar b rãmbã me rag n yaa wʋsg Israyɛlle. La baoosgo, baa a yembr bãmb sʋkã ka paam yɩlgr ye, sã n ka Siiri rao a Naama bala.»" 
Luke4:28 Nebã fãa sẽn dag n be karen-doogẽ wã sẽn wʋm gom kãensã, b sũyã puugame." 
Luke4:29 Dẽ, bãmb yikame n veo a Zeezi n yiis tẽngã, n tall-b n tɩ ta tãng ning bãmb tẽngã sẽn tiẽ wã zugu, n na n tus bãmb tɩ b yi tãngã zug n lʋɩ." 
Luke4:30 La a Zeezi tũu bãmb sʋk bal n looge. 
Luke4:31 A Zeezi kẽnga Kapɛrnaom, Galɩle tẽng a ye, la bãmb dag n zãmsda nebã vʋʋsg daare." 
Luke4:32 La bãmb zãmsgã yɛɛsa nebã. Bala, bãmb dag n zãmsda ne noore." 
Luke4:33 Dao a yembr n dag n be karen-doogẽ wã tɩ zĩn-dẽgd tar-a. 
Luke4:34 A kelma ne pãng n yeele: «Hey! Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi, yãmb data tõnd ne bõe? Yãmb waame n na n sãam tõnd la? Mam mii yãmb sẽn yaa ned ninga. Yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sõmblem soaba.»" 
Luke4:35 A Zeezi tãsa yẽnda n yeel-a: «Sĩndi, la f yi n bas raoã.» Zĩnã luba raoã nebã sʋka, la a yi n bas-a n ka maan-a wẽng baa bilfu." 
Luke4:36 Nebã fãa yɛɛsame n gomd ne taab n yetẽ tɩ koe-kãngã yaa bõe koɛɛga? Bãmb tara noor la pãnga, tɩ b sã n yeel zĩn-dãmb nins sẽn yaa rẽgdã tɩ b yi, b yitame." 
Luke4:37 La a Zeezi yʋʋrã dag n saagda soolmã fãa. 
Luke4:38 A Zeezi sẽn yi karen-doogẽ wã, b kẽnga a Sɩmo yiri. A Sɩmo reem-poakã yĩns rag n wɩnga hal wʋsgo, la b kosa a Zeezi tɩ b maag-a." 
Luke4:39 A Zeezi sulga a zugẽ n tãs yĩn-wɩngrã, la a yĩn-wɩngrã sigame. La wakat-kãng bala, a yikame n maan-b sãando." 
Luke4:40 Wĩndg sẽn kẽ, neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tar‑b bãad-dãmba, bãas buud toay-toay sẽn tare, tall-b lame n wa a Zeezi nengẽ. A Zeezi tika bãmb ned kam fãa ne b nusi, n maag-ba." 
Luke4:41 Zĩn-dãmb me dag n yit n basda neb wʋsgo, la b kelemdẽ n yetẽ: «Yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.» La a Zeezi dag n tãsda bãmba, n gɩdgd-b tɩ b ra gom ye. Bala, zĩn-dãmbã rag n miime t'a Zeezi yaa Kirisã." 
Luke4:42 Beoogã sẽn vẽege, bãmb yiime n kẽng zĩig sẽn yaa we-rasempʋɩɩga. Neb kʋʋngã sɩngame n gẽesd bãmba, n wa n ta bãmb nengẽ. Bãmb dag n datame n gɩdg a Zeezi tɩ b ra loog n bas-b ye." 
Luke4:43 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: «Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam moon Wẽnnaam soolem koe-noogã tẽms a taabã me. Bala, yaa bõn-kãng yĩng la b sẽn tʋm maamã.»" 
Luke4:44 La a Zeezi dag n moonda koe-noogã Galɩle karen-dotã pʋse. 
Luke5:1 Neb kʋʋngã sẽn dag n gũbg a Zeezi n pẽdgd taab n dat n wʋm Wẽnnaam goamã, tɩ bãmb yaool n dag n be Zenezarɛt ko‑kãsengã noorã," 
Luke5:2 bãmb yãnda koom kogend a yiib sẽn be koomã noore, zĩm-yõagdb sẽn dag n sig n bas n pegsd b zĩm-gãmba."
