Luke5:3 A Zeezi kẽe koglg a yembr sẽn dag n yaa a Sɩmo rẽnda, n kos-a t'a zãag bilf ne kʋɩl-koakã. La a Zeezi zĩnda koom koglgẽ wã n pa be n zãmsd neb kʋʋngã." 
Luke5:4 A Zeezi sẽn gom n sɛ, b yeela a Sɩmo yaa: «Kẽng-y koomã sʋk n tɩ y lob y zĩm-gãmbã wã n yõg zĩma.»" 
Luke5:5 A Sɩmo leoka bãmba: «Karen-saamba, tõnd tʋma yʋngã tõr n ka tol n yõk bũmb ye. La yãmb sẽn yeelã yĩnga, m na n loba zĩm-gãmbã wã.»" 
Luke5:6 Bãmb sẽn lobã, b yõga zĩm wʋsgo, la b zĩm-gãmba wã rag n pãrsdame." 
Luke5:7 Bãmb kamsa b tũud-n-taasã sẽn dag n be koglg a to wã pʋgẽ wã tɩ b wa n sõng-ba. B waame la b pidsa koom-kogend a yiibã hal tɩ b rat n lisi. 
Luke5:8 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr sẽn yã woto, a wõgemda a Zeezi taoor n yeele: «Zu-soaba, zãag-y y meng ne maam. Bala, mam yaa yel-wẽn maanda.»" 
Luke5:9 Bala, rabeem wʋsg dag n yõka yẽnda ne neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã, zĩmã bãmb sẽn yõgã waooglem yĩnga." 
Luke5:10 La yɩɩ woto me ne a Zebde kom-dibli a Zak ne a Zã sẽn yaa a Sɩmo tũud-n-taasã. La a Zeezi yeela a Sɩmo yaa: «Da zoe rabeem ye. Sẽn sɩng ne moasã, fo na n yɩɩ nin-baooda.»" 
Luke5:11 Dẽ, bãmb lebg n talla kogendã n wa kʋɩl-koakẽ wã, n bas fãa la b tũ a Zeezi." 
Luke5:12 A Zeezi rag n bee tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ, la rao a ye n be beenẽ tɩ yĩn-gãong bãag tar-a. A sẽn yãnd a Zeezi, a lʋɩɩme n fõgen a neng tẽnga, n bõos bãmb a woto: «Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n data, yãmb tõe n kɩtame tɩ mam lebg yɩlemde.»" 
Luke5:13 A Zeezi tẽega b nug n sɩɩs-a n yeele: «Mam datame, lebg yɩlemde.» Tao-tao bala, yĩn-gãong bãagã loog n bas-a lame." 
Luke5:14 Dẽ, a Zeezi keooga yẽnda t'a ra gom bõn-kãng ne ned ye. La b yeel-a yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ wilg f meng maan-kʋʋdã, la f maan maoong wa sẽn zems a Moyiis sẽn yeelã, f yɩlgrã yĩnga, t'a tõe n yɩ kaset bãmb yĩnga.»" 
Luke5:15 A Zeezi yʋʋrã rag n saagd n yɩɩda pĩnda. Neb kʋʋng wʋsg tigma taab n na n kelg-ba, la b tõe n paam tɩ b maag b bãasã." 
Luke5:16 La a Zeezi rag n kẽngda we-rasempʋɩɩsẽ, n tɩgd n pʋʋsdẽ." 
Luke5:17 Daar a yembre, a Zeezi rag n zãmsda nebã. Fariizẽ-dãmb ne tõog karen-saam-dãmb n dag yi Galɩle tẽmsã fãa ne Zʋʋde, la ne Zeruzalɛm n wa n zĩ be. La Zu-soabã pãng rag n bee ne a Zeezi tɩ bãmb maagd bãad-dãmba." 
Luke5:18 La ade, neb n tʋk ned sẽn ki bogre, ne gãaga, n dag n baood n na n kẽes-a, n sik-a a Zeezi taoore." 
Luke5:19 La nebã sẽn yaa wʋsg tɩ bãmb ka mi b sẽn na n tũ zĩig ning n kẽes-a wã yĩnga, bãmb dʋʋ roogã zugu, n maan võore, n sik ki-bogrã ne a gãagã a Zeezi taoor nebã sʋka." 
Luke5:20 A Zeezi sẽn yã b tẽebã, b yeela raoã yaa: «Fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugri.»" 
Luke5:21 Tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã sɩngame n tagsdẽ n yetẽ yaa: «Yaa yɛ ned la yõwã n paoogd Wẽnnaam a woto? Sã n ka Wẽnnaam b yembre, ãndã n tõe n kõ yel-wẽn sugri?»" 
Luke5:22 A Zeezi bãnga bãmb tagsdã, n gom ne-b n sok-b yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb tagsd a woto y sũyã pʋse?" 
Luke5:23 Bʋg yeelg n yaa naana n yɩɩda? Fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugrã» bɩ, bɩ «yik n kẽnã»?" 
Luke5:24 La sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Yãmb bãng tɩ Ninsaal Bi‑riblã tara noor dũni ka tɩ kõ yel‑wẽnã sugrã, bãmb yeela Ki‑bogrã yaa: «Yik n dɩk f gãagã n kuili.»" 
Luke5:25 La wakat-kãng bala, a yika bãmb taoore, n dɩk gãag ning yẽnda sẽn dag n gãe a zugã, n loog n kuiis a yir la a pẽgd Wẽnnaam." 
Luke5:26 Bãmb fãa rag n yɛɛsame, la b waoogd Wẽnnaam. La rabeem yõka bãmb tɩ b yeel yaa: «Tõnd yãnda bõn-bãnd rũndã.»" 
Luke5:27 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi yiime, la b yãnda yaood-dɛɛgd sẽn zĩ a tʋʋm zĩigẽ, t'a yʋʋr la a Leevi. A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «Wa tũ maam.»" 
Luke5:28 A Leevi basa fãa n yik n tũ a Zeezi. 
Luke5:29 A Leevi maana tigr kãseng a yiri, a Zeezi yĩnga. La yaood-dɛɛgdb wʋsg ne neb a taab n dag n be be n zĩ n dɩt ne bãmba." 
Luke5:30 Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne bãmb tõog karen-saam-dãmbã rag n yẽgemdame n yet a Zeezi karen-biisã yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb dɩtẽ la y yũud ne yaood dɛɛgdbã la yel-wẽn maandbã?» 
Luke5:31 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Ka neb nins sẽn tar laafɩ wã n baood tɩp ye: yaa bãad-dãmbã. 
Luke5:32 Mam ka wa n na n bool nin-tɩrs tɩ b wa tek yam n kos sugr ye, yaa yel-wẽn maandbã. »" 
Luke5:33 Bãmb yeela a Zeezi yaa: «A Zã karen-biisã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã karen-biis loeta noor naoor wʋsg n pʋʋsdẽ, tɩ yãmb karen-biisã yaool n dɩtẽ la b yũuda.»" 
Luke5:34 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb tõe n modga pʋg-paal sɩd tũud-n-taas tɩ b loe noor wakat ning pʋg-paal sɩdã sẽn ket n be bãmb sʋk sɩda? 
Luke5:35 Day n wat tɩ b na n yiis pʋg-paal sɩdã n bas-ba. Dẽ, da-kãense, b na yaool n loe noore.»" 
Luke5:36 A Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd me n yeele: Ned kõn kẽeg fu-paalg n yãk a peend n na n lisg fu-kʋdg ye. Sã n ka rẽ, yẽnda n kẽeg fu-paalga, la peendã yẽnda sẽn yãkã ka zemsd ne fu-kʋdgã ye." 
Luke5:37 La ned ka suiid reezẽ rãam paalg ko-wao-kʋdẽ ye. Sã n ka rẽ, reezẽ rãam paalgã na n kɩtame tɩ ko-waoosã pusi. Reezẽ rãamã na raage, la ko-waoosã na sãame." 
Luke5:38 La b tog n suii reezẽ rã‑paalg ko-wao-paals pʋse. 
Luke5:39 La ned sã n yũ reezẽ rã-kʋdgo, a ka leb n dat reezẽ rã‑paalg ye. Bala, a yetame tɩ reezẽ rãam kʋdgã yaa noogo." 
Luke6:1 Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daar a yembre, a Zeezi dag n pɩʋʋgda pʋto. Bãmb karen-biisã rag n yãgsda kood n tẽgd n wãbdẽ." 
Luke6:2 Fariizẽ-dãmbã kẽer soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maand bũmb ning noor sẽn ka kõ tɩ maan vʋʋsg daare?» 
Luke6:3 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: Yãmb ka karem bũmb ning a Davɩɩd sẽn maan kom sẽn tar yẽnda ne a tũud-n-taasã wakat la? 
Luke6:4 Yẽnda sẽn kẽ Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã to‑to n deeg kaset bur paadmã n wãb la a kõ a tũud-n-taasã, baa ne ned sẽn ka tar noor tɩ rɩ, sã n ka maan-kʋʋdbã balã la?" 
Luke6:5 La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Ninsaal Bi-riblã yaa vʋʋsg daarã Zu‑soaba.» 
Luke6:6 Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daar a to, a Zeezi kẽe karen-doogẽ wã n zãmsd nebã. Dao n dag n be beenẽ t'a nug‑rɩtg ki." 
Luke6:7 Tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã dag n gũusda a Zeezi n dat n ges b sã n na n maaga ned vʋʋsg daarã. Dag n yaa sẽn na n yɩl n paam bũmb n dõd a Zeezi. 
Luke6:8 La a Zeezi dag n mii b tagsdã. Dẽ, b yeela rao ninga nug sẽn ki wã yaa: «Yik n yals sʋk ka. Yẽnda yik n yaasa yĩngri.»" 
Luke6:9 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam sokda yãmba, noor beeme tɩ maan neer vʋʋsgã daar bɩ, bɩ tɩ maan wẽnga? Tɩ fãag ned bɩɩ, bɩ tɩ kʋ-a?»" 
Luke6:10 Dẽ, a Zeezi wẽnemd n gesa bãmb fãa n yeel raoã t'a tẽeg a nugã. Yẽnda tẽegame la a nugã vʋʋgame." 
Luke6:11 Bãmb sũyã puuga wʋsg tɩ b yẽsd ne taab n baood b sẽn na n maan a Zeezi bũmb ninga. 
Luke6:12 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi kẽnga tãng zug n na n tɩ pʋʋse. La bãmb pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam yʋngã tɛk fãa." 
Luke6:13 La beoogã sẽn vẽege, bãmb boola b karen-biisã n tũus bãmb piig la a yiibu, n bool-b tɩ tẽn-tʋmdbã." 
Luke6:14 Yaa a Sɩmo bãmb sẽn pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Pɩyɛɛrã, ne a ba-biiga Ãndere, a Zak ne a Zã, la a Filip ne a Bartelemi," 
Luke6:15 a Matye la a Toma, la a Alfe biig a Zak ne a Sɩmo b sẽn boond tɩ Zelote," 
Luke6:16 la a Zak biig a Zʋʋdaase, ne a Zʋdaas Iskaryo sẽn lebg zãmb soabã." 
Luke6:17 A Zeezi yii ne b karen-biisã tãngã zug n sig n yaas tẽnga. Bãmb karen-bi wʋsgã dag n bee be ne neb kʋʋng wʋsg sẽn yi Zʋʋde soolem fãa, la Zeruzalɛm la Tɩɩr tẽn-kɩremse ne Sɩdõ." 
Luke6:18 Bãmb dag n waame n na n kelg a Zeezi, la b paam tɩ b yiis b bãasã n maag-ba. Zĩn-dẽgd sẽn dag n namsd-b rãmbã paama maagre." 
Luke6:19 La neb kʋʋngã fãa rag n baood n sɩɩsa a Zeezi. Bala, pãng n dag n yit a Zeezi nengẽ n maagd bãmb fãa." 
Luke6:20 Dẽ, a Zeezi zẽka b neng n ges b karen-biisã n yeel yaa: bark bee yãmb sẽn yaa naong rãmba zutu, bala, Wẽnnaam soolem yaa yãmb dẽnda." 
Luke6:21 Bark bee yãmb kom sẽn tar moasã wã zutu, bala, yãmb na n tɩgame. Bark bee yãmb sẽn yãbd moasã wã zutu, bala, yãmb na la." 
Luke6:22 Bark bee yãmb zutu, nebã sẽn na n kisg yãmba, la b bak yãmb toore, la b tʋʋd yãmba, la b tõdg yãmb yʋʋrã, n geelg-a wa bõn-wẽng Ninsaal Bi-riblã yĩnga." 
Luke6:23 Bɩ y maan sũ-noog da-kãng n kɩdme, tɩ bõe yãmb keoor na n yɩɩ kãseng arzãn pʋgẽ. Bala, bãmb ba-rãmb dag n maanda Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã me a woto." 
Luke6:24 La yãmb sẽn yaa arzegs rãmba, yãmb na paam toogo, bala, yãmb tara y belsgo." 
Luke6:25 Yãmb sẽn dɩt n tɩgd moasã wã, yãmb na paam toogo, bala, kom na n yõka yãmba. Yãmb sẽn laad moasã wã, yãmb na paam toogo, bala, yãmb na n paama sũ-sãang la nintãm." 
Luke6:26 Yãmb na paam toogo, nebã fãa sã n pẽgd yãmba, bala, ba-rãmbã rag n maanda belgr no-rɛɛsdbã a woto." 
Luke6:27 La mam yeta yãmba, yãmb sẽn kelgd maamã, tɩ y nong y bɛɛbã, la y maan neb nins sẽn kis yãmbã neere." 
Luke6:28 Ning-y neb nins sẽn kãabd yãmb wẽngã zut barka, la y pʋʋs neb nins sẽn maand yãmb wẽngã yĩnga." 
Luke6:29 Ned sã n wẽ fo yegd pɛka, bɩ f wẽnemd a to wã me n kõ-a. Ned sã n deeg fo fu-bedre, bɩ f bas-a t'a reeg f fu-bilã me." 
Luke6:30 Ned ning fãa sẽn kos foom bũmb bɩ f kõ-a, la ned sã n dɩk fo paoongo, bɩ f ra sok-a ye." 
Luke6:31 Bũmb ningã yãmb sẽn dat tɩ nebã maan yãmbã, bɩ yãmb me maan bãmb me a woto." 
Luke6:32 Yãmb sã nong neb nins sẽn nong yãmbã bala, bõe bark la yãmb na n paame? Yel-wẽn maandbã me nonga neb nins sẽn nong bãmbã me." 
Luke6:33 La yãmb sã n maand neb nins sẽn maand yãmb neerã bal neere, bõe bark la yãmb na n paame? Yel-wẽn maandbã me maanda a woto." 
Luke6:34 La yãmb sã n pengd neb nins yãmb sẽn tẽed tɩ b na n paam n lebsa yãmbã bala, bõe bark la yãmb na n paame? Yel-wẽn maandbã me pengda taaba, tɩ b tõe n leb n deeg sẽn zem a woto me." 
Luke6:35 La yãmba, nong-y bɛɛbã. Maan-y-b neere, la y peng n da tẽed tɩ b na lebs-y ye. La yãmb keoor na n yɩɩ kãsenga, la yãmb na n yɩɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn be saasẽ-saasẽ wã kamba. Bala, bãmb yaa sõama zɩ-beoog rãmbã ne nin-wẽnsã yĩnga." 
Luke6:36 Bɩ y yɩ nimbãan-zoɛtba, wa yãmb ba wã sẽn yaa nimbãan-zoɛtã." 
Luke6:37 Da bʋ-y ned bʋʋd ye, la b kõn bʋ yãmb bʋʋd ye. Da kao-y ned bʋʋd ye, la b kõn kao yãmb bʋʋd ye. Maan-y sugri, la b na maan yãmb me sugri." 
Luke6:38 Bɩ y kõ la b na kõ yãmba. B na n maka sõama n kõ yãmba, n dĩ, n yegse, n ning tɩ sudgi. Bala, ne makdg ning yãmb sẽn makd n kõt nebã, Wẽnnaam na n maka ne rẽnda n kõ yãmba." 
Luke6:39 A Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd me n yeele: Zoang tõe n tɛɛ zoang sɩda? Bãmb b yiibã fãa kõn lʋɩ bokẽ sɩda? 
Luke6:40 Karen-biig ka yɩɩd a karen-saamb ye. La karen-biig fãa sẽn paam zãmsg n taas lebga wa a karen-saamba. 
Luke6:41 Yaa bõe tɩ fo get moogã sẽn be f ba-biigã nifẽ wã, n yaool n ka ne sug-raoogã sẽn be fo mengã rẽndẽ wã?" 
Luke6:42 Fo sẽn ka ne sug-raoogã sẽn be fo nifẽ wã, fo na n yɩɩ a wãn n yeel f ba-biigã t'a bas tɩ f yãk moogã sẽn be a nifẽ wã? Zãmb soaba, deng n yãk sug-raoogã sẽn be fo nifẽ wã, la rẽ, fo na n yãnda sõama n tõog n yãk moogã sẽn be f ba-biigã nifẽ wã." 
Luke6:43 Tɩ-sõng ka be n womd bi-wẽns ye, la tɩ-wẽng me ka be n womd bi-sõama ye." 
Luke6:44 Bala, b bãngda tɩɩg fãa a biisẽ. B ka wobd kankam gõaag zug ye, la b ka kaood sib kɛglg zug ye." 
Luke6:45 Nin-sõng yiisda bõn-sõng a laog-sõngã bĩngr zĩigẽ sẽn be a sũurẽ, la nin-wẽng yiisda wẽng a laog-wẽngã bĩngr zĩigẽ sẽn be a sũurẽ. Bala, yaa bũmb ning sẽn pid sũurã n yit noorẽ wã." 
Luke6:46 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb boond maam tɩ Zu-soaba! Zu-soaba! La y ka maand mam sẽn yet yãmb bũmb ninsã? 
Luke6:47 Ned ning fãa sẽn wat mam nengẽ n kelgd mam goamã n sakdẽ, mam na n wilga yãmb yẽnda sẽn wẽnd ned ninga." 
Luke6:48 Yẽnda wẽnda wa rao sẽn yik n na n me a roogo. Yẽnda tuu bog-zulunga, n yẽbg roogã kugr zugu. La ko-kãseng sẽn wa, ko-zoetmã zoeeme n wẽ roogã, la a ka tõog n miim-a ye, roogã meebã sẽn dag n yaa sõama wã yĩnga." 
Luke6:49 La ned ning sẽn wʋmd n ka sakdẽ wã, wẽnda wa rao a yembr sẽn me a roog tom zugu, n ka tuk bok ye. Ko-zoetmã zoee n wẽe roogã, la tao-tao bala, a lʋɩɩme, la ro-kãngã sãoongã yɩɩ kãsenga." 
Luke7:1 A Zeezi sẽn gom gom-kãense ne neb nins sẽn dag n kelgd bãmbã n sɛ, b kẽnga Kapɛrnaom." 
Luke7:2 Sodaas koabg naab a ye n dag n tar a tʋmtʋmd‑nongr sẽn gãe ne bãag n kolg kũum. 
Luke7:3 Yẽnda sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd a Zeezi yelle, a tʋma Zʋɩf-rãmbã kãsem-dãmb bãmb nengẽ tɩ b tɩ kos-b tɩ b wa n fãag a tʋmtʋmdã." 
Luke7:4 Bãmb sẽn ta a Zeezi nengẽ, b bõosa bãmb ne pẽdgr n yeele: «Rao-kãngã zemsame tɩ y maan a sẽn kotã n kõ-a." 
Luke7:5 Bala, yẽnda nonga tõnd buudã, la yaa yẽnda n me tõnd karen-doogã.»" 
Luke7:6 Dẽ, a Zeezi dag n tũuda bãmb n dabda, la b sẽn kolg yirã, sodaas koabg naabã tʋma a zo-rãmb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, da nams-y y meng a woto ye. Bala, mam ka zems tɩ yãmb kẽ mam zakẽ ye." 
Luke7:7 Yaa woto yĩng me n kɩt tɩ mam ka tags tɩ mam zemsame tɩ wa yãmb nengẽ m toorã. Yãmb ye n gom bala, la mam tʋmtʋmdã na n paama laafɩ." 
Luke7:8 Bala, neb sẽn yɩɩd maam n so maam, tɩ mam me so sodaase. Mam sã n yeel a yembr t'a kẽnge, a kẽngdame, la m sã n yeel a to t'a wa, a watame. Mam sã n yeel m tʋmtʋmd t'a maan woto, a maandame.»" 
Luke7:9 Dẽ, a Zeezi sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã wã, a yɛɛsa bãmba. La b wẽnemdame n yeel neb kʋʋngã sẽn da pʋgd bãmbã yaa: «Mam yeta yãmb tɩ hal baa Israyɛll pʋgẽ, mam nan ka yã tẽ-kãseng a woto ye.»" 
Luke7:10 La b sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã sẽn lebg n ta yiri, b mikame tɩ tʋmtʋmda paama laafɩ." 
Luke7:11 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi kẽnga tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Nayin. Bãmb karen-biisã ne neb wʋsg dag n tũuda bãmba." 
Luke7:12 A Zeezi sẽn wa n kolg tẽngã noore, mikame tɩ neb n dag n tʋk kũum n dabd mumbu. Yẽnda dag n yaa pag a yembr sẽn yaa pʋg‑kõor bi-ribl yende. La tẽngã neb wʋsg rag n yãagda pagã." 
Luke7:13 Zu-soabã yãnda pagã, t'a nimbãaneg yõk-b tɩ b yeel-a yaa: «Ra yãb ye!»" 
Luke7:14 A Zeezi kolgame n tik pãndarã, la neb nins sẽn dag n tʋk-a wã yalsame. A Zeezi yeelame yaa: «Bi-bɩɩga, mam yeta foom tɩ f yiki.»" 
Luke7:15 La sẽn ki-a wã yikame n zĩnd n sɩng n gomda, t'a Zeezi lebs-a a ma." 
Luke7:16 Nebã fãa yɛɛsame n pẽgd Wẽnnaam n yetẽ: «Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs kãseng puka tõnd sʋka, la Wẽnnaam waa n gesa b nebã.»" 
Luke7:17 Nebã sẽn gom a Zeezi yell woto wã, saaga Zʋʋde soolmã fãa ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
Luke7:18 A Zã karen-biisã togsa yẽnda bõn-kãens fãa. 
Luke7:19 A Zã boola a karen-biis a yiib n tʋm-b tɩ b tɩ sok Zu-soabã n gese, yaa bãmb la sẽn tog n wa-a wã bɩ, bɩ bãmb tog n gũu ned a to?" 
Luke7:20 Raopã sẽn ta a Zeezi nengẽ, b yeelame yaa: «A Zãmbatiis tʋma tõnd yãmb nengẽ tɩ d wa sok n gese, yaa yãmb la sẽn tog n wa-a wã bɩ, bɩ tõnd tog n gũu ned a to?»" 
Luke7:21 Wakat-kãng bala, a Zeezi maaga bãad-dãmb wʋsgo, koms-rãmba, la sɩ-wẽns sẽn tar-b rãmba, la b pugs zoens wʋsg nini." 
Luke7:22 La a Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: Kẽng-y n tɩ togs-y-yã a Zã bũmb nins yãmb sẽn yã la y wʋmã: «Zoens nin pugsdame, põe kẽndame, wãoob paamda maagre, wʋms wʋmdame, kũum vʋʋgdame, koe-noogã moonda naong rãmb sʋka." 
Luke7:23 La bark bee ned ning mam sẽn kõn yɩ kug-lakdg a yĩngã zugu.» 
Luke7:24 A Zã sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã sẽn looge, a Zeezi sɩngame n gom ne neb kʋʋngã a Zã yell n yeele: Yãmb kẽng n tɩ gesa bõe we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ wã? Tãnwĩig sobg sẽn miimda?" 
Luke7:25 La bõe la yãmb sẽn kẽng n tɩ gesã? Rao sẽn yer waoogr futu? Ad neb nins sẽn yer fu-bʋgsã, la b vɩ bõn neeb sʋkã bee rĩm-dãmb zagsẽ." 
Luke7:26 La bõe la yãmb sẽn kẽng n tɩ gesã? Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa? Mam yeta yãmb tɩ n-yẽe, la a pʋs n yɩɩda Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa." 
Luke7:27 Yaa yẽnda yell la b sẽn gʋls n yeel tɩ: «Gese, mam tʋmda m koe-toagsd t'a reng fo taoor n segl f waoongã.»" 
Luke7:28 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ pagb sẽn dog b rãmbã sʋka, baa a yembr ka be sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩd a Zã ye. La baoosgo, sẽn yaa-a yao-zʋʋg Wẽnnaam soolmẽ wã yaa kãseng n yɩɩd a Zã." 
Luke7:29 Nebã fãa ne yaood dɛɛgdbã sẽn wʋm a Zã goamã, b reega a Zã lisgã, n wilg tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa tɩrga." 
Luke7:30 La Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã sẽn zãgs t'a Zã kõn lis bãmbã, b tõdga bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n seglg bãmb yĩngã." 
Luke7:31 Dẽ, a Zeezi kẽnga taoor n yeele: «Mam na n mamsa zamaan‑kãngã neb ne bõe? La b wẽnda ãnda?" 
Luke7:32 Bãmb wẽnda kamb sẽn zĩ raagẽ n boond taab n yetẽ yaa: ‹Tõnd peeba wɩɩg yãmb yĩnga, la yãmb ka sao ye. Tõnd yɩɩla kʋʋr yɩɩla, la yãmb ka yãb ye.›" 
Luke7:33 Bala, a Zãmbatiis waame n ka wãbd buri, la a ka yũud reezẽ rãam ye, tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ zĩn n tar-a." 
Luke7:34 Ninsaal bi-riblã sẽn wa wã, b rɩtame la b yũuda, tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ rao-kãngã yaa yão-be-neda, la rã-yũuda, la yaood dɛɛgdbã ne yel-wẽn maandbã zoa." 
Luke7:35 La Wẽnnaam kambã sẽn deegd Wẽnnaam yamã kɩta kaset t'a yaa yam.» 
Luke7:36 Fariizẽ a yembr bõosa a Zeezi tɩ b wa n dɩ ne yẽnda. A Zeezi kẽe Fariizẽ wã yir n zĩnd n na dɩ. 
Luke7:37 La gese, pag a ye n dag n be tẽngã pʋgẽ n yaa yel-wẽn maanda. Yẽnda bãngame t'a Zeezi zĩi Fariizẽ wã zakẽ n dɩtẽ. Yẽnda talla albatr tʋk sẽn pid ne tɩdare," 
Luke7:38 n wa n yals a Zeezi poorẽ, b naoã sɛɛgẽ. A dag n yãbdame, n sɩng n madgd a Zeezi naoã ne a nintãmã, la a rag n yẽesd-b ne a zoobdã, n mogsd bãmb naoã la a zãgsd-b ne tɩdarã." 
Luke7:39 Fariizẽ ning sẽn bool a Zeezi wã sẽn yã woto, a tagsa a sũurẽ n yeele: «Rao-kãngã sã n dag n yaẽ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa, b rag n na bãngẽ pag ning sẽn sɩɩsd bãmbã sẽn yaa ned ninga, la a sẽn yaa bũmb ninga: yel-wẽn maand bala.»" 
Luke7:40 A Zeezi goma ne a Sɩmo n yeel-a yaa: «Sɩmo, mam dat n togsa foom bũmbu.» T'a leoke: «Karen-saamba, togs-y-yã.»" 
Luke7:41 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ned a ye n dag n be tɩ neb a yiib tar yẽnda samde. A yembrã rag n tara deniye kobs-nu samde, t'a to wã tar pis-nu." 
Luke7:42 La bãmb sẽn dag n ka tar n na yao wã yĩnga, yẽnda basa b yiibã fãa samã taale. Bãmb b yiibã sʋka, bʋg n na n nong yẽnda n yɩɩda?»" 
Luke7:43 A Sɩmo leokame: «Mam tagsdame tɩ yaa ned ning sẽn dag n tara sam-kẽeng tɩ b bas-a taalã.» A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «Fo togsa sɩda.» 
Luke7:44 Dẽ, a Zeezi wẽnemda paga sẽnẽ n yeel a Sɩmo yaa: «Fo nee pʋg-kãngã? Mam kẽe fo zakẽ, la fo ka kõ maam koom tɩ m waas m nao ye. La yẽnda, a madga mam nao ne a nintãm, n yẽes-b ne a zoobdo." 
Luke7:45 Fo ka mok maam ye, la hal mam sẽn kẽ wã tɛka, yẽnda mogsda mam nao n ka basdẽ ye." 
Luke7:46 Fo ka sõog mam zug kaam ye, la yẽnda, a waala mam nao ne tɩdare." 
Luke7:47 Yaa woto yĩnga, mam yeta foom tɩ yẽnda paama a yel-wẽnã sẽn yaa wʋsgã sugri. Bala, yẽnda wilga a nonglem kãsenga. La ned ning b sẽn kõt sugr bũmb bilf yĩng nonglem yaa bilfu.»" 
Luke7:48 La a Zeezi yeela pagã yaa: «Fo paama f yel-wẽnã sugri.» 
Luke7:49 Neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ ne bãmb n dɩtẽ wã sɩngame n tags b sũyẽ wã a woto: «Dao-kãngã yaa ãndã n kõt baa yel-wẽnã sugri?» 
Luke7:50 La a Zeezi yeela pagã yaa: «Fo tẽeb n fãag foom. Kẽng ne bãane. 
Luke8:1 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi rag n kẽnda tẽn-bɛd la tẽn-bãooneg pʋse, n moondẽ la b togsd Wẽnnaam soolem koe-noogã. Karen-biis piig la a yiibã rag n bee ne bãmba," 
Luke8:2 n paas pagb kẽere, a Zeezi sẽn dig sɩ-wẽns sẽn dag n be ne-bã, la b maag-b n yiis b bãasã: Yaa a Maari sẽn yit Magdala, soab ning a Zeezi sẽn dig zĩn-dãmb a yopoe tɩ b yi n bas-a wã," 
Luke8:3 a Erood ligd gɛt a Suuza pag a Zan n paas a Suzan, la pagb a taab wʋsg sẽn dag n yãkd b paoong n sõngd a Zeezi ne b karen-biisã." 
Luke8:4 Neb kʋʋng wʋsg tigma taaba, la neb yii tẽms toay-toay n wa bãmb nengẽ. A Zeezi tãoo yel‑bũn-kãngã:" 
Luke8:5 Bʋt a yembr n yi n na n tɩ bʋd a bõn-buudu, la yẽnda sẽn fẽrgd bõn-buudã, kẽer lʋɩɩ sor kɩrenga. Neb n taba bãmba, la liuuli rɩ-b lame." 
Luke8:6 Kẽer lʋɩɩ kugr zugu. La b sẽn yi, b kʋɩɩme, maasr sẽn ka be wã yĩnga." 
Luke8:7 Kẽer me lʋɩɩ gõos sʋka. La gõosã naaga bãmb n yi n dɩ-ba. 
Luke8:8 La kẽer lʋɩɩ zĩ-sõngẽ, n yi n wom biis tɩ ta koabg-koabga.» A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto, b zẽka b koɛɛg n yeele: «Ned ning sẽn tar-a tʋb n tõe n wʋm bɩ a wʋme.»" 
Luke8:9 A Zeezi karen-biisã soka bãmb yel-bũndã võore. 
Luke8:10 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeel yaa: «B kõo yãmb tɩ y bãng Wẽnnaam soolem yel-soalmã. La ne neb a taabã, b togsda bãmb bõn-kãens ne yel‑bũnã, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ bãmb sẽn getã, bɩ b ra yã ye, la tɩ b sẽn wʋmdã, b kõn wʋm a võor ye.»" 
Luke8:11 «Yel-bũndã võor la a woto: bõn-buudã yaa Wẽnnaam goamã. 
Luke8:12 Sẽn be-b sor kɩrengã yaa neb nins sẽn wʋm koɛɛgã, tɩ Sʋtãanã wat n yiisd koɛɛgã sẽn dag n be b sũyẽ wã, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ b ra tẽ n paam fãagrã." 
Luke8:13 Sẽn be-b kugrã zugã yaa neb nins sẽn wʋmd koɛɛgã n deegd-a ne sũ-noogã. La b ka tar yẽgen ye. Bãmb tẽeda wakat bilf bala, la makr wakate, bãmb basda tẽebã." 
Luke8:14 Bõn-buudã sẽn lʋɩ gõosã sʋkã, yaa neb nins sẽn wʋmd koɛɛgã n sɛ n looge, tɩ yɩɩre, la arzegse, la dũniyã sũ-noogã rɩ koɛɛgã t'a ka womd biis tɩ bɩ ye." 
Luke8:15 Zĩ-sõngã, yaa neb nins sẽn wʋmd koɛɛgã ne sũur sẽn yaa sõama la tɩrga, n talld-a, n yalsd kãenkãe, n womd biisã.»" 
Luke8:16 Ned ka yõgend fɩtl n fõgn-a ne peoogo, wall a ning-a gãag tẽngr ye. B rogend-a-la fɩtl doagendgã zug tɩ neb nins sẽn kẽedã tõe n yãnd vẽenemã." 
Luke8:17 Bala, bũmb ka be sẽn lud sẽn kõn puk ye, la bũmb ka be sẽn solg sẽn kõn vẽneg ye." 
Luke8:18 Dẽ, bɩ y gũus ne yãmb sẽn kelgd to-to wã. Bala, b na n kõo ned ning sẽn tar‑a, la ned ning sẽn ka tar‑a, b na n deega baa bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn tagsd t'a tarame wã n bas-a." 
Luke8:19 A Zeezi ma ne b ma-bi-raop waa bãmb nengẽ, la neb kʋʋngã yĩnga, b ka tõog n ta a Zeezi ye." 
Luke8:20 Nebã yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb ma wã bee yɩng ne b ma-bi-raopã n dat n yãnd-yã.» 
Luke8:21 La a Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Mam ma ne m ma-bi-raop yaa neb nins sẽn kelgd Wẽnnaam goamã n sakdẽ wã.» 
Luke8:22 Daar a ye, a Zeezi kẽe koom-koglg ne b karen-biisã, n yeel-b tɩ b wa tɩ b kẽng ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde. La b loogame." 
Luke8:23 La bãmb sẽn dugsd koglgã wakate, a Zeezi gũsame. La sob-kãseng yika koomã zugu, tɩ koom-koglgã rag n pid ne koom, tɩ lebg yel-pakr ne-ba." 
Luke8:24 Karen-biisã kolgame n nek a Zeezi n yeel‑a yaa: «Karen-saamba! Karen-saamba! Tõnd na n kiime!» A Zeezi nekame, n tãs sobgã ne ko-pɛmã, la b yõkame, la zĩigã lebga sɩddd..." 
Luke8:25 Dẽ, bãmb soka b karen-biisã yaa: «Yãmb tẽebã bee yɛ?» La rabeem yõka bãmb tɩ b yɛɛs n sok taab tɩ nin-kãngã yaa yɛ neda? Bala, baa sobgã ne ko-pɛma sakda bãmb noore." 
Luke8:26 Bãmb taa Geraaza rãmbã tẽnga, tẽng sẽn teesd Galɩle." 
Luke8:27 La a Zeezi sẽn sig tẽnga, tẽngã rao a ye zĩn-dãmb wʋsg sẽn tar waa n sega bãmba. Hal daar zãra, a ka leb n yeelgd fut ye, la a rag n ka gãe yir ye, yaa yaadẽ." 
Luke8:28 A sẽn yãnda a Zeezi, a kelmame n wõgemd bãmb taoor n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeele: «Wẽnnaam sẽn be saasẽ-saasẽ bi-ribl a Zeezi, yãmb data maam ne bõe? Mam bõosd-y lame tɩ y ra nams maam ye.»" 
Luke8:29 Bala, a Zeezi rag n yeta zĩn-dẽgdã sẽn dag n kẽ yẽnda hal daar zãrã t'a yi n bas raoã. B rag n sẽbda yẽnda ne bãense, n balg a naoã ne kutu, la a rag n kaooda a sẽbdsã. La zĩnã rag n talld-a lame n kẽngd we-rasempʋɩɩsẽ." 
Luke8:30 A Zeezi soka yẽnda t'a yʋʋr la a bõe. T'a leok t'a tusa. Bala, zĩn-dãmb wʋsg n dag n kẽ yẽnda." 
Luke8:31 La zĩn-dãmbã bõosa a Zeezi tɩ b ra rig-b tɩ b kẽng zĩ-zulungẽ wã ye. 
Luke8:32 Kurkuy wʋsg n dag n be tãngã zug n wãbdẽ, la zĩn-dãmbã bõosa a Zeezi tɩ b kõ bãmb noor tɩ b tɩ kẽ kurkuyã. La a Zeezi kõ-b lame." 
Luke8:33 Zĩn-dãmbã yii n basa raoã n tɩ kẽ kurkuyã, la kurkuyã wudga tãngã sigdgẽ, n bilim n lʋɩ koomẽ wã, la koomã rɩ-b lame." 
Luke8:34 Neb nins sẽn dag n gũud kurkuyã sẽn yã bũmb ning sẽn maanã, b zoee n tɩ togsa koɛɛgã tẽnga pʋgẽ la pʋtẽ wã me." 
Luke8:35 Nebã kẽngame n na n tɩ ges bũmb ning sẽn maanã. Bãmb waa a Zeezi nengẽ, la b yãnda rao ning zĩn-dãmbã sẽn yi n basã t'a zĩ a Zeezi sɛɛgẽ, n yer futu, n mi a nenga. La rabeem yõka bãmba." 
Luke8:36 Neb nins sẽn yã bũmb ning sẽn maanã togsa bãmb rao ning zĩnã sẽn dag n tarã sẽn paam yolsg to-to. 
Luke8:37 Geraaza soolmã nebã fãa kosa a Zeezi tɩ b zãag n bas bãmba. Bala, rabeem kãseng n dag n yõk bãmba. A Zeezi kẽe koom-koglgã n na n lebg n lebe." 
Luke8:38 Rao ning zĩn-dãmbã sẽn yi n basã bõosa a Zeezi ne pẽdgr n dat n pa ne bãmba. La a Zeezi kuils-a lame n yeele: 
Luke8:39 «Lebg n kuil f yir n tɩ wilg bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn maan n kõ foomã.» Raoã loogame n tɩ moon bũmb nins fãa a Zeezi sẽn maan n kõ yẽnda wã tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ. 
Luke8:40 A Zeezi sẽn leb rʋʋndã, neb kʋʋng reega bãmba, bala, b fãa rag n gũuda bãmba." 
Luke8:41 La gese, dao a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Zayiruusi, n yaa karen-doog naab waame n wõgemd a Zeezi taoor n bõos bãmb tɩ b wa yẽnda yirã." 
Luke8:42 Bala, yẽnda rag n tara a bi-pugl yende, a yʋʋm sẽn kolg piig la yiibu, n gãe n dat n ki. A Zeezi sẽn dabd be wakate, neb kʋʋngã dag n dɩdga bãmb hal wʋsgo." 
Luke8:43 La pag a ye n dag n be be tɩ bãag tar-a, t'a zɩɩm yit hal yʋʋm piig la a yiibu. Yẽnda rɩka a sẽn dag n tarã fãa n kõ tɩpdba, la b baa a yembr ka tõog t'a paam laafɩ ye." 
Luke8:44 Yẽnda kolga a Zeezi poorẽ, n sɩɩs bãmb fuugã noore. La wakat-kãng bala, zɩɩmã sẽn dag n yitã yõkame." 
Luke8:45 La a Zeezi sokame: «Yaa ãndã n sɩɩs maamã?» Ned fãa sẽn kɩɩsd tɩ ka yẽnda wã, a Pɩyɛɛr yeelame: «Karen-saamba, neb kʋʋngã gũbga yãmb n dɩdgd yãmba. »" 
Luke8:46 La a Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Ned n sɩɩs maam. Bala, mam bãngame tɩ pãng n yi mam nengẽ.»" 
Luke8:47 Pagã sẽn yã t'a yellã pukame, a waa n yĩgimda a Zeezi taoor ne rigbu, nebã fãa nifẽ, n togs bũmb ning yĩng sẽn kɩt tɩ yẽnda sɩɩs a Zeezi wã, la yẽnda sẽn paam laafɩ zĩig pʋgẽ to-to." 
Luke8:48 A Zeezi yeel-a lame: «M bi-pugla, fo tẽeb n fãag foom, kẽng ne bãane.»" 
Luke8:49 A Zeezi sẽn ket n gomdã, ned n yi karen-doog naabã yir n wa n yeel-a: «Da leb n nams-y karen-saamb ye: Yãmb bi-puglã kiime.»" 
Luke8:50 La a Zeezi sẽn wʋme, b yeela karen-doog naabã yaa: «Da maan dabeem ye. Tẽ bala, la biigã na n põsame.»" 
Luke8:51 La a Zeezi sẽn ta yirã, bãmb ka sak tɩ ned tũ bãmb n kẽ, sã n ka a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã, la a Zak ne biigã ba la a ma bala." 
Luke8:52 Nebã fãa rag n yãbdame n wiisd biigã yĩnga. Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-b lame «Ra yãb‑y tɩ biigã ka ki ye, a gõeeme.»" 
Luke8:53 Nebã sẽn dag n mi tɩ biigã kiime wã, b yaala a Zeezi." 
Luke8:54 La a Zeezi gãda biigã nugu, n zẽk b koɛɛg n yeele: «M biiga, yiki.»" 
Luke8:55 La a sɩɩgã lebg n waame, la wakat-kãng bala, a yikame. La a Zeezi yeelame tɩ b kõ biiga rɩɩb t'a rɩ." 
Luke8:56 Bi-puglã ba-rãmb yɛɛsame, la a Zeezi keooga bãmb tɩ b ra togs ned bũmb ning sẽn maanã ye." 
Luke9:1 A Zeezi boola karen-biis piig la a yiibã n kõ-b pãnga la noor tɩ b rig zĩn-dãmba, la b maag bãad-dãmba." 
Luke9:2 A Zeezi tʋma bãmb tɩ b tɩ moon Wẽnnaam soolem koɛɛga, la b maag bãad-dãmba." 
Luke9:3 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Da rɩk-y bũmb y kẽnda yĩng ye. Da zɩ-y dasaar bɩ korgo, buri wall ligd ye. La y ra zɩ fut a yiib‑yiib ye." 
Luke9:4 Yãmb sẽn sig zak ning pʋgẽ, bɩ y pa be n tãag y sẽn na n yi be n looge." 
Luke9:5 La zĩig ning fãa nebã sẽn ka reeg yãmba, y sã n wa n yit tẽn-kãngã, bɩ y pĩms y naoã tom tɩ yɩ kaset b yĩnga.»" 
Luke9:6 A Zeezi karen-biisã loogame n kẽng tẽng‑tẽnga, n moond koe-noogã, la b maagd neb zĩiga fãa." 
Luke9:7 A Erood sẽn yaa Gʋvɛrneerã dag n wʋma bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n maandã, la a rag n ka mi yẽnda sẽn na n tags tɩ bũmb ning ye. Bala, neb kẽer dag n yetame t'a Zã vʋʋgame n yi kũum sʋka," 
Luke9:8 tɩ kẽer yetẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn zĩnd pĩndã ned a ye n vʋʋge. 
Luke9:9 La a Erood yeelame: «Mam kɩtame tɩ b fiuug a Zã zugu. Dẽ, ned ning mam sẽn wʋmd tɩ b gomd a yell woto wã yaa ãnda soaba?» La yẽnda rag n baoodame n dat n yãnd a Zeezi." 
Luke9:10 Tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn lebg n wa, b togsa a Zeezi bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn maanã. A Zeezi peega bãmb n yi kɛɛng n kẽng tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Betsayɩda sẽnẽ." 
Luke9:11 La neb kʋʋngã bãngame n pʋg bãmba. A Zeezi reeg-b lame n gom ne-b Wẽnnaam soolem yelle, la b maag neb nins sẽn dag n dat maagrã me." 
Luke9:12 Wĩndgã sẽn kɩlle, karen-biis piig la a yiibã kolgame n yeel a Zeezi yaa: Kɩt-y tɩ neb kʋʋngã loog n kẽng tẽn-bãoonegẽ wã ne pʋtã sẽn pẽ ka wã n tɩ paam gãag zĩisi, la b paam dɩɩbo. Bala, tõnd sẽn beẽ wã yaa we-rasempʋɩɩga." 
Luke9:13 A Zeezi yeela karen-biisã tɩ bãmb mensã kõ nebã rɩɩb tɩ b rɩ. La b leokame n yeele: Tõnd ka tar sẽn yɩɩd bur a nu ne zĩm a yiib ye. Sã n ka tɩ tõnd mens na n kẽngame n tɩ ra rɩɩb nin-kãensã fãa yĩnga. 
Luke9:14 La nebã sẽn dag n be be wã kolga raop tus a nu. A Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b kɩt tɩ nebã zĩnd sull-sulli, neb pis-nunu." 
Luke9:15 Karen-biisã maana a woto n kɩt tɩ b fãa zĩndi. 
Luke9:16 A Zeezi reega bur a nu wã ne zĩm a yiibã n nak n ges yĩngr n ning-b barka, n yaool n kao burã ne zĩmã n kõ karen-biisã tɩ b pʋɩ neb kʋʋngã." 
Luke9:17 Bãmb fãa rɩɩme n tɩge, la b wʋka gɩrsã sẽn kellã n pid pet piig la a yiibu. Bur a nu ne zĩm a yiibu." 
Luke9:18 Daar a ye, a Zeezi rag n bee zĩig neb sẽn ka be, n pʋʋsdẽ, la karen-biisã rag n bee ne bãmba. A Zeezi soka b karen-biisã yaa: Neb kʋʋngã yetame tɩ mam yaa ãnda?" 
Luke9:19 Bãmb leokame tɩ kẽer yetame t'a Zãmbatiisi, tɩ kẽer yetẽ t'a Eli, tɩ kẽer yetẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn zĩnd pĩndã ned a ye sẽn vʋʋge." 
Luke9:20 La a Zeezi soka bãmb yaa: La yãmba, yãmb yetame tɩ mam yaa ãnda? A Pɩyɛɛr leokame: «Yãmb yaa Kiris sẽn yi Wẽnnaam nengẽ.»" 
Luke9:21 A Zeezi keooga bãmb neere, n yeel-b tɩ b ra saag n togs ned yõwã ye." 
Luke9:22 A Zeezi gomame n paas n yeel tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ Ninsaal Bi-riblã nams wʋsgo, tɩ kãsem-dãmbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã la tõog karen-saam-dãmbã kɩɩs bãmba n kʋ-ba, la tɩ rasem a tãab daare bãmb na vʋʋge." 
Luke9:23 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela b fãa yaa: ned sã n dat n tũ maam, bɩ a kɩɩs a mengã ratem, n tʋk a da-pɩk daar fãa n pʋg maam." 
Luke9:24 Sɩd me, ned ning fãa sẽn dat n kogl a vɩɩm, a vɩɩm na sãame. La ned ning sẽn na n bas a vɩɩm mam yĩnga, a na n leb n paam-a lame." 
Luke9:25 Ned sã n paam dũni bũmb fãa, n yaool n menem wall a sãam a menga, a yõod bee yɛ ne-a?" 
Luke9:26 Sɩd me, ned sã n zoe mam yãnde, la mam goamã yãnde, Ninsaal Bi-riblã sã n wa n wa ne b ziirã, la b ba wã ziiri, ne malegs-sõamyã, b na n zoee yẽnda me yãnde." 
Luke9:27 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ neb nins sẽn be ka wã kẽer ka na n ki hal tɩ b yãnd Wẽnnaam soolmã. 
Luke9:28 Sẽn kolg rasem a nii, a Zeezi sẽn gom gom-kãensã zugẽ, bãmb peega a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã la a Zak n dʋ tãngã zug n na n pʋʋse." 
Luke9:29 La bãmb sẽn pʋʋsd wakate, b nengã yalẽ tedgame, la bãmb futã lebga peels n pɩnda." 
Luke9:30 La gese, raop a yiib n wa n gom ne a Zeezi. Dag n yaa a Moyiis ne a Eli," 
Luke9:31 n puk b meng ne ziiri, n gomd ne a Zeezi b kũumã b sẽn na n ki Zeruzalɛmã yelle." 
Luke9:32 Gõeem rag n namsda a Pɩyɛɛr ne a tũud-n-taasã, la bãmb neendame n yãnd a Zeezi ziirã ne raop a yiibã sẽn da be ne bãmbã." 
Luke9:33 Wakat ning raopã sẽn bas a Zeezi n loogdẽ wã, a Pɩyɛɛr yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saamba, yaa sõama tɩ tõnd pa ka. D tilg fu-rot a tãabo: a yembr yãmb yĩnga, a yembr a Moyiis yĩnga, a yembr a Eli yĩnga.» Yẽnda rag n ka mi a sẽn gomd bũmb ningã ye." 
Luke9:34 La yẽnda sẽn gomd a woto, sawadg waa n luda bãmba, la a Moyiis rãmb sẽn kẽed sawadgẽ wã, rabeem yõka bãmba." 
Luke9:35 La koɛɛg yii sawadgẽ wã n yeele: Ada yaa mam Bi-ribl mam sẽn yãke, bɩ y kelg-a." 
Luke9:36 La koɛɛgã sẽn gom a woto n sɛ, a Zeezi rag n yɛsa b yembre. Karen-biisã kell n sĩndame n ka togs ned bũmb ning bãmb sẽn yã wã da-kãens ye." 
Luke9:37 Vẽkembeoogo, bãmb sẽn yi tãngã zug n sigi, neb kʋʋng wʋsg waa n sega a Zeezi." 
Luke9:38 La gese, neb kʋʋngã sʋka, dao a ye n zĩnd be n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeele: Karen-saamba, m kot-y lame tɩ y ges m bi-riblã. Bala, yaa m bi-yende." 
Luke9:39 Zĩn n kẽed-a, la a sã n kẽ-a bala, a kelemdame, la zĩnã kɩtdame t'a sobg n gʋɩgsdẽ, tɩ tãntãn-puudã yita. A sã n na n wa n yi n bas biigã, rẽ t'a nams-a-la wʋsgo, n pogl-a." 
Luke9:40 Mam bõosa yãmb karen-biisã tɩ b rig-a, la b ka tõog ye." 
Luke9:41 A Zeezi yeelame yaa: Neb sẽn ka tẽebo, la sẽn yaa nin-wẽnse, mam na n paa ne yãmb la m maan sũ-mar ne yãmb tɩ ta wakat bʋgo? Tall f biigã n wa ne ka." 
Luke9:42 La biigã sẽn kolgdã, zĩnã lub-a-la tẽnga, n nams-a wʋsgo. La a Zeezi lenga zĩn-dẽgdã, n maag biigã n kɩs-a a ba." 
Luke9:43 La nebã fãa yɛɛsame, b sẽn yã Wẽnnaam pãn-kãsengã yĩngã. Nebã sẽn ket n tagsd bũmb nins fãa a Zeezi sẽn maanã yell ne yɛɛsgo, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa:" 
Luke9:44 Yãmba, yok-y y tʋb n kelg gom-kãensã sõama: b na n yõka Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kõ nebã." 
Luke9:45 La karen-biisã rag n ka wʋmd gom-kãng võor ye. A rag n solga ne bãmba, sẽn na n yɩlg tɩ b ra bãng a võorã ye. La b rag n yɛɛsdame n ka rat n sok a Zeezi bõn-kãng wɛɛngẽ ye." 
Luke9:46 Nokoeemd yika bãmb sʋka, tɩ b rat n bãng sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩd bãmb sʋkã." 
Luke9:47 A Zeezi sẽn mi bãmb sũyã tagsgã, b peega bi-bilf n zĩnig-a b sɛɛgẽ" 
Luke9:48 n yeel karen-biisã yaa: «Ned ning fãa sẽn na n deeg bi-bilf‑kãngã mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, yaa mam mengã la a reeg yã. La ned ning fãa sẽn deeg maam, a reegda sẽn tʋmã maamã. Bala, ned ning sẽn yaa-a yao-zʋʋg yãmb sʋkã, yaa yẽnda soab n yaa kãsenga.»" 
Luke9:49 A Zã gomame n yeele: «Karen-saamba, tõnd yãnda rao sẽn digd zĩn-dãmb ne yãmb yʋʋre, la tõnd gɩdg-a lame, a sẽn ka naag tõnd n tũud yãmbã yĩnga.»" 
Luke9:50 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Ra gɩdg-y-yã-a ye. Bala, ned sã n ka kis yãmba, a bee ne yãmba.»" 
Luke9:51 Wakat ning b sẽn tog n zẽk a Zeezi tɩ b kẽng arzãnã sẽn kolge, bãmb tolg n yãka yam n na n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
Luke9:52 B tʋma neb tɩ b reng bãmb taoore. La b kẽngame n tɩ kẽ Samaari n na n segl bũmb fãa a Zeezi yĩnga. 
Luke9:53 La nebã ka reeg a Zeezi ye, bãmb sẽn dag n dabd Zeruzalɛmã yĩnga." 
Luke9:54 Bãmb karen-biis a Zak ne a Zã sẽn yã woto, b yeelame yaa: «Zu-soaba, yãmb datame tɩ d kɩt tɩ bugum yi yĩngr n sig n dɩ-b bɩ?»" 
Luke9:55 La a Zeezi wẽnemdame n leng bãmb [n yeele: «Yãmb ka mi sɩɩg ning sẽn tar yãmbã ye. 
Luke9:56 Bala, Ninsaal Bi-riblã ka wa tɩ sãam ninsaalbã vɩɩm ye, la yaa tɩ fãag-ba.»] La bãmb kẽnga tẽng a to." 
Luke9:57 Bãmb sẽn be sorẽ n dabda, ned n yeel a Zeezi yaa: «Mam na n tũu yãmb n kẽng zĩig ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n kẽngẽ»." 
Luke9:58 A Zeezi leok-a lame: «Waas tara bogdo, la liuuli sẽn yɩgdã tara tʋgdo, la Ninsaal Bi-riblã ka tar zĩig sẽn na n gãneg a zug ye.»" 
Luke9:59 A Zeezi yeela ned a to: «Tũ maam.» La yẽnda leoka a Zeezi yaa: «bas-y-m nand tɩ m tɩ mum m ba la m wa.» 
Luke9:60 La a Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Bas kũumã tɩ b mum b kũum, la foom, kẽng n moon Wẽnnaam soolem koɛɛgã.»" 
Luke9:61 Ned a to leb n yeelame: «Zu-soaba mam na n tũu yãmba, la, sak-y tɩ m deng n tɩ pʋʋs m zakã rãmb wẽnd-na-taas la m wa.»" 
Luke9:62 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda yaa: «Ned sã n gãd wãk rũng sẽn tata, la a rat n wẽnemd n ges a poorẽ, yẽnda ka zems ne Wẽnnaam soolmã ye.»" 
Luke10:1 Rẽ poore, Zu-soabã leb n yãka neb pis-yopoe la a yiib a taaba, n tʋm bãmb yiib‑yiib tɩ b reng bãmb taoor n kẽng tẽng fãa la zĩig ning fãa bãmb meng sẽn tog n kẽngã." 
Luke10:2 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Tigsgã yaa wʋsgo la tʋmtʋmdbã sõor paoodame. Kos-y tigsgã soab tɩ b tʋm tʋmtʋmdb b tigsgẽ wã. 
Luke10:3 Kẽng-y-yã! Ade, mam tʋmda yãmb wa piis digd-n-yĩids sʋka." 
Luke10:4 Da zã-y ligd korgo, wall yolgo, wall neooda ye, la y ra yals n pʋʋs ned sor zug ye." 
Luke10:5 Yãmb sã n na n kẽ yir fãa, bɩ y pʋʋs-b a woto: ‹Bɩ laafɩ zĩnd yi-kãngã pʋga.›" 
Luke10:6 La laafɩ ned sã n be beenẽ, yãmb laafɩ wã na n siga a zugu. La laafɩ ned sã n ka be, bɩ y loog ne y laafɩ pʋʋsem." 
Luke10:7 Pa-y yi-yɛnga, n dɩtẽ la y yũud bũmb ning b sẽn na n kõ yãmbã. Bala, tʋmtʋmd toga ne a yaoodo. Da tegs-y yiy ye." 
Luke10:8 Tẽng ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n kẽ tɩ b reeg yãmba, bɩ y rɩ bũmb nins b sẽn na n kõ yãmbã." 
Luke10:9 Maag-y bãad-rãmb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã, la y yeel-b tɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã kolga bãmba." 
Luke10:10 Tẽng ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n kẽ tɩ b ka reeg yãmba, kẽng-y tẽngã soay zut n yeele:" 
Luke10:11 ‹Yãmb tẽngã wubsg meng sẽn bol tõnd naoã, tõnd pĩmsd-a lame n basd ne yãmba. La baoosgo, bãng-y tɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã pẽnegame.›" 
Luke10:12 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ da-kãnga, Sodom sɩbgrã toolem kõn ta tẽng‑kãng rẽndã ye.»" 
Luke10:13 «Korazin, fo na paam toogo! Betsayɩda, fo na paam toogo! Bala, bõn-bãn nins sẽn maan yãmb sʋkã sã n dag n maanẽ Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ, yaa hal daar zãr la b da na n yeelg boto, la b yug b zug tompeglem n kos sugri." 
Luke10:14 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ bʋʋdã daare, Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ sɩbgr kõn ta yãmb dẽndã ye." 
Luke10:15 La foom, Kapɛrnaom, b na n zẽka foom n taas saasẽ bɩ? Ayo! B na n sigsa foom hal n taas kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Luke10:16 Ned ning sẽn kelgd yãmb kelgda maam. La ned ning sẽn zãgsd yãmb zãgsda maam. La sẽn zãgsd-a maam zãgsda sẽn tʋm-a maamã.» 
Luke10:17 Neb pis-yopoe la a yiibã lebg n waa ne sũ-noog n yeele: «Zu-soaba, baa zĩn-dãmbã mens sakda tõnd noor yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga.»" 
Luke10:18 A Zeezi yeel-b lame: «Mam dag n nee a Sʋtãan sẽn yi yĩngr n lʋɩt wa sa-yãgbo. 
Luke10:19 La ade, mam kõo yãmb pãng tɩ y tab wiis la namse, la bɛyã pãngã fãa, la baa fʋɩ kõn tõog n maan yãmb wẽng ye." 
Luke10:20 Baoosgo, da maan-y sũ-noog zĩn-dãmbã sẽn sakd yãmbã yĩng ye. Maan-y sũ-noogo, yãmb yʋyã sẽn gʋls arzãn pʋgẽ wã yĩnga.»" 
Luke10:21 Wakat-kãng bala, Sɩɩg-sõng kɩtame t'a Zeezi paam sũ-no-kãseng n yeele: «M ba sẽn yaa arzãn la tẽng Zu-soaba, mam pẽgda yãmba, yãmb sẽn solg bõn-kãens ne yam-dãmba, la yẽesem-dãmbã, n yaool n vẽneg-b ne kom-bãoonegã yĩnga. N‑yẽe, m ba, yaa yãmb n dat tɩ yɩ a woto." 
Luke10:22 M ba kõo maam bũmbã fãa, la ned baa a yembr ka mi Bi-riblã sẽn yaa a soaba, sã n ka a ba wã ye. La ned baa a yembr ka mi ba wã sẽn yaa a soaba, sã n ka Bi-riblã bala, la ned ning Bi-riblã sẽn dat n vẽneg bãmb ne-a wã ye.»" 
Luke10:23 A Zeezi wẽnemdame n gom ne b karen-biisã b yeyn-yeyn n yeel-b yaa: «Bark bee neb nins nin sẽn yãt bũmb nins yãmb sẽn yãtã zutu. 
Luke10:24 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb wʋsgo, la rĩm-dãmb dag n dat n yãnda bũmb nins yãmb sẽn yãtã la b ka yãnd ye. B rag n dat n wʋma bũmb nins yãmb sẽn wʋmdã la b ka wʋm ye.»" 
Luke10:25 La gese, tõog karen-saamb a yembr yikame n na n mak a Zeezi n yeele: «Karen-saamba, bõe la mam tog n maan n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã tɩ yɩ m pʋɩɩre?»" 
Luke10:26 A Zeezi sok-a lame: «Bõe la b gʋls tõodã sebrã pʋgẽ, bõe la fo karemd be?»" 
Luke10:27 A leokame n yeele: «Nong Zu-soabã fo Wẽnnaamã ne f sũur fãa, ne f yalẽ fãa la ne f pãngã fãa, la f yamã fãa, la f nong f to wa f menga.»" 
Luke10:28 A Zeezi leok-a lame yaa: «Fo leokrã yaa sõama. Maan a woto, tɩ f na vɩɩmde.»" 
Luke10:29 La yẽnda sẽn dat n wilg t'a yaa tɩrga, a soka a Zeezi yaa: «Ãnda la mam to?»" 
Luke10:30 Dẽ, a Zeezi leb n gomame n yeele: Dao n dag n yi Zeruzalɛm n dabd Zeriko. A tɩ lʋɩɩ fãadb sʋka, tɩ b rees a sẽn tarã, n pãb-a hal t'a kolg kũum, tɩ b bas-a n looge." 
Luke10:31 Mikame tɩ maan-kʋʋd n dag n dɩk so-kãnga. A yãnda raoã, la a gilg n loog n bas-a lame." 
Luke10:32 Woto me, Leevi ned a yembr taa zĩ-kãngã. A yãnda raoã, la a gilg n loog n bas-a lame." 
Luke10:33 La Samaari ned a yembr sẽn dag n togd sor taa raoã sɛɛgẽ n yãnd-a, t'a nimbãaneg yõk-a." 
Luke10:34 A kolga raoã, n tɩbs a noadã ne kaam la reezẽ rãam, la a vil-b ne pɛɛla. Rẽ sẽn sa, a rɩk-a lame n zombg a meng bõn-zoambdga, n tall-a n kẽng sik zĩigẽ n tɩ ges a yelle." 
Luke10:35 Vẽkembeoogo, a yãka deniye a yiib n kɩs sik zĩigã soab n yeel-a t'a yõdg n ges bãadã yelle, la t'a ligd sã n kẽ, a lebgre a meng na lebs-a." 
Luke10:36 Bãmb b tãabã sʋka, bʋg n wẽnda a yaa ned ning sẽn lʋɩ-a fãadbã sʋkã to?" 
Luke10:37 Tõog karen-saambã leokame tɩ yaa ned ning sẽn zoe-a yẽnda nimbãanegã. La a Zeezi yeel-a lame t'a me kẽng n tɩ maan a woto. 
Luke10:38 A Zeezi sẽn kẽnd ne b karen-biisã, b taa tẽng a yembre, la pag sẽn boond t'a Mart sika bãmb a yiri." 
Luke10:39 A dag n tara ma-bi-poak sẽn boond t'a Maari. La a Maari zĩnda Zu-soabã sɛɛgẽ n kelgd bãmb goamã. 
Luke10:40 Rɩɩbã seglg yɛl toay-toayã dag n sooga a Mart tagsgã. A waame n yeel yaa: Zu-soaba, mam ma-bi-poakã sẽn bas maam m yembr tɩ m get seglgã yellã ka namsd yãmba? Dẽ wã yaa, yeel-y-yã-a t'a sõng-ma." 
Luke10:41 Zu-soabã yeela a Mart yaa: Marte! Marte! Fo maanda yɩɩre, n sidgd ne bũmb wʋsgo." 
Luke10:42 Bũmb a yembr tãa n yaa tɩlɛ. A Maari yãka pʋɩ-sõng b sẽn kõn deeg n bas-a ye. 
Luke11:1 Daar a yembre, a Zeezi da bee zĩig a ye n pʋʋsdẽ. Bãmb sẽn pʋʋs n sɛ, b karen-biig a yembr yeela bãmb yaa: Zu-soaba, zãms-y tõnd pʋʋsgo, wa a Zã sẽn zãms b karen-biisã." 
Luke11:2 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Yãmb sã n pʋʋsdẽ, bɩ y yeele: Tõnd ba! Bɩ yãmb yʋʋrã yɩ ne waoogre, tɩ yãmb soolmã wa." 
Luke11:3 Kõ-y tõnd d daar o daar dɩɩbã daar fãa. 
Luke11:4 Kõ-y tõnd d beegrã sugri, tɩ tõnd me kõta neb nins fãa sẽn beegd tõndã sugri, la y ra bas tõnd tɩ d kẽ makr pʋgẽ ye." 
Luke11:5 A Zeezi leb n yeela bãmb a woto: Ãnda yãmb sʋkã n na n tar a zoa, t'a wa a nengẽ yʋn-sʋka, n yeel-a tɩ «m zoa, peng-m bur a tãab" 
Luke11:6 tɩ m zoa n yi sor n wa n sig-m tɩ m ka tar bũmb sẽn na kõ-a t'a rɩ ye.» 
Luke11:7 A zoa wã sã n pa pʋgẽ n leok-a n yeele: «Ra nams maam tɩ rignoorã zoe n pagame, maam ne m kambã zoee n kẽe gãaga, mam ka leb n tõe n yik n kõ foom bur ye.»" 
Luke11:8 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ baa a sã n ka na n yik n kõ-a burã, a sẽn yaa yẽnda zoa wã yĩnga, a na yik n kõ-a bũmb nins fãa a sẽn datã, a pẽdgrã yĩnga." 
Luke11:9 La maam, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y kose la b na kõ yãmba, tɩ y bao la y na yã, tɩ y kabse, la b na pak tɩ y kẽ." 
Luke11:10 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn kot deegdame. Ned ning sẽn baood yãtame, la b pakdame tɩ sẽn kabsd-a kẽ." 
Luke11:11 Yãmb sẽn yaa ba-rãmbã, ãndã yãmb sʋkã bi-ribl n na n kos-a bur t'a kõ-a kugri," 
Luke11:12 wall a kos-a zĩnf t'a kõ-a waaf tɩ ka zĩnfu, wall a kos-a gell t'a kõ-a nanga?" 
Luke11:13 Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb sẽn yaa nin-wẽnsã miime tɩ kõ y kambã bõn-sõamyã, yãmb ba sẽn be arzãnã n mi n yɩɩda, n na n kõ neb nins sẽn kot bãmbã Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
Luke11:14 A Zeezi dag n digda zĩn sẽn yaa muka. Zĩnã sẽn yi, mukã gomame, la neb kʋʋngã yɛɛsame." 
Luke11:15 La neb kẽer yeelame tɩ yaa ne zĩn-dãmbã naab a Belzebull pãng la a Zeezi digd zĩn-dãmbã. 
Luke11:16 La neb kẽer sẽn dat n mak bãmbã kosa bãmb tɩ b wa ne bãnd sẽn yit arzãna. 
Luke11:17 La a Zeezi sẽn mi b tagsgã yeel-b lame yaa: soolem ning fãa neb sẽn welg taab n gõdg n zabd ne taaba, a na sãame, la rotã na n lʋɩt n yẽegda taaba." 
Luke11:18 La sã n yaa tɩ Sʋtãanã welgame n gõdg n zabd ne a menga, a soolmã na n yɩɩ a wãn n yalse? Bõe yĩnga, yãmb yetame tɩ yaa ne a Belzebull pãng la mam digd zĩn-dãmbã." 
Luke11:19 La sã n yaa tɩ mam digda zĩn-dãmbã ne a Belzebull pãnga, yaa ne ãnda soab pãng la yãmb kambã rigd-ba? Rẽndã n kɩt tɩ bãmb mensã na n yɩ yãmb bʋ-kaoodba." 
Luke11:20 La sã n yaa ne Wẽnnaam pãngã la mam digd zĩn-dãmbã, rẽnd Wẽnnaam soolem taa yãmb nengẽ." 
Luke11:21 Pãng soab sẽn raoolem a meng sõama sã n gũud a zaka, bũmb kõn sɩɩs a paoongã ye." 
Luke11:22 La ned pãng sẽn yɩɩd yẽnda sã n wa n tõog-a, a reegda a zab-teedã fãa a sẽn dag n teegã, la a wʋk a teedã n pʋɩ nebã." 
Luke11:23 Sẽn ka be-a ne maam kisa maam, la sẽn ka naagd-a maam n tigsdẽ sãeegdame." 
Luke11:24 Sɩɩg sẽn yaa rẽgd sã n yi n bas neda, a saagda zĩ-pɛɛlã n baood vʋʋsgo. La a sẽn ka yãt vʋʋsgã yĩnga, a yetame t'a na n lebg n leba a yir ning a sẽn dag n yi n basã." 
Luke11:25 La a sã n ta, a mikdame tɩ yirã pɩɩsame n maneg n nagse." 
Luke11:26 Dẽ, a kẽngdame n tɩ peeg sɩɩs a yopoe a taab sẽn yaa wẽns n yɩɩd yẽnda. B wat n kẽe be n zĩndi, la rao-kãng vɩɩmã lebgda wẽng n yɩɩd pipi wã." 
Luke11:27 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto, pag n zĩnd nebã sʋk n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeel tɩ pag ning sẽn zã-a a Zeezi pʋgã, la a yẽsem bãmbã yaa ned sẽn tar barka." 
Luke11:28 La a Zeezi leokame n yeel tɩ yaa neb nins sẽn kelgd Wẽnnaam goamã n sakdẽ wã n tar barkã. 
Luke11:29 Nebã sẽn tigsd taab n lebgd kʋʋngã, a Zeezi yeelame yaa: Zamaan‑kãngã neb yaa nin-wẽnse. B baooda bãnde, la b kõn kõ bãmb bãnd a to tɩ ka a Zonaas rẽndã ye." 
Luke11:30 Bala, a wa a Zonaas sẽn yɩ bãnd Niniiv nebã yĩngã, Ninsaal Bi-riblã me na n yɩɩ bãnd zamaan‑kãngã nebã yĩnga." 
Luke11:31 Bʋʋdã wakate, rĩm-poak ning sẽn dag n yi wĩndg goabgã na n yikame n kao zamaan‑kãngã nebã bʋʋdo. Bala, a yii tẽngã satmẽ n na n wa n kelg a Salmo yam goamã. La gese, sẽn be-a ka wã yɩɩda a Salmo." 
Luke11:32 Bʋʋdã wakate, Niniiv nebã na n yika ne zamaan‑kãngã nebã n kao b bʋʋdo. Bala, a Zonaas sẽn moon bãmb koɛɛgã, b kosa sugri. La gese, sẽn be-a ka wã yɩɩda a Zonaase." 
Luke11:33 Ned kõn yõgen fɩtl n bao zĩig n solg-a, wall a fõgen-a ne peoog ye. Ayo! A dogend-a-la fɩtl doagendg zugu, tɩ neb nins sẽn kẽedã na yã vẽenem." 
Luke11:34 Fo nifã yaa f yĩngã fɩtla. Fo nif sã n yaa sõama, fo yĩngã tõr tara vẽenem. La a sã n ka sõama, fo yĩngã tõr me bee lik pʋgẽ." 
Luke11:35 Gũus f menga, tɩ vẽenem ning sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã da wa n lebg lik ye." 
Luke11:36 Dẽ, fo yĩngã tõr sã n tar vẽenem, tɩ lik baa bilf ka be zĩig baa a ye, a na n paama vẽenem sõama wa wakat ning fɩtl sẽn yãgd ne a pãngã fãa n vẽnegd foomã." 
Luke11:37 A Zeezi sẽn gomdã, Fariizẽ a yembr bõosa bãmb tɩ b wa n dɩ ne yẽnda. A Zeezi kẽeme n zĩnd n na n dɩ." 
Luke11:38 Fariizẽ wã sẽn yã t'a Zeezi ka waas n yaool n na n dɩ wã, ling-a lame." 
Luke11:39 La Zu-soabã yeel-a lame yaa: Yãmb Fariizẽ-dãmbã, yãmb nedgda wamã ne laasã poaya, la yãmb pʋsã pida ne fãab la wẽnga." 
Luke11:40 Ka-yam-dãmba, ka sẽn maan-a yɩngã n maan pʋgẽ wã me la?" 
Luke11:41 Kõ-y naong rãmbã ne y sũyã fãa, la bũmbã fãa na n yɩɩ yolgemd yãmb yĩnga." 
Luke11:42 Yãmb Fariizẽ-dãmbã na n paama toogo! Bala, yãmb yaooda mant ne ru la zẽ-vãad buudã fãa piig pʋɩyã, n yaool n basd tɩrlem la Wẽnnaam nonglem. Yaool n yaa bõn-kãensã la yãmb tog n maane, la y ra bas sẽn ketã me ye." 
Luke11:43 Yãmb Fariizẽ-dãmbã, y na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb nonga pipi zaoog karen-dotẽ wã, la y nong nebã sẽn pʋʋsd yãmb daasẽ wã." 
Luke11:44 Yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb yaa wa yaado, bũmb sẽn ka wilgd b zĩiga, tɩ neb tabd n ka miẽ ye." 
Luke11:45 Tõog karen-saamb a yembr goma ne bãmb n yeele: Karen-saamba, yãmb sẽn gomd a woto wã, yãmb paoogda tõnd me." 
Luke11:46 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: Yãmb tõog karen-saam-dãmbã me na n paama toogo! Bala, yãmb dɩkda zɩɩbo, a tʋkr sẽn yaa toog n tʋkd nebã, tɩ yãmb mensã yaool n ka sɩɩsd-b ne y nug-bil ye." 
Luke11:47 Yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb meta Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã yaado, tɩ yaool n yaa yãmb ba-rãmbã n kʋ-ba." 
Luke11:48 Woto, yãmb yaa kaset rãmba, la y wilgdame tɩ yãmb saka y ba-rãmbã sẽn tʋmã. Bãmb n kʋ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, tɩ yãmb met b yaadã." 
Luke11:49 Yaa rẽndã n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam yamã yetẽ yaa: Mam na n tʋma no-rɛɛsdb la tẽn-tʋmdb b nengẽ. Bãmb na n kʋʋ kẽere, la b nams kẽere," 
Luke11:50 tɩ m tõe n sok zamaan‑kãngã nebã m no-rɛɛsdb nins fãa b sẽn kʋ hal dũni sɩngr tɩ ta moasã wã zɩɩm," 
Luke11:51 sẽn sɩng ne a Abɛll zɩɩm tɩ ta a Zakari b sẽn kʋ tẽn-kugrã ne wẽnd doogã sʋkã zɩɩm. N-yẽe! Mam yeta yãmb tɩ b na n soka zamaan‑kãngã nebã bõn-kãnga. 
Luke11:52 Yãmb tõog karen-saam-dãmbã, yãmb na paam toogo! Bala, yãmb feooga bãngr kʋɩlen-bilã. Yãmb mens ka rat n kẽ ye, la y gɩdgda neb nins sẽn dat n kẽ wã tɩ b ka tõe n kẽ ye." 
Luke11:53 Bãmb sẽn yi be, tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã pẽdga bãmb wʋsgo, n sogs-b tɩ b gom bũmb wʋsg yelle," 
Luke11:54 n bẽt bãmba, n dat n paam gomd sẽn yi bãmb noorẽ n yõk-ba." 
Luke12:1 Wakat-kãnga, neb tus‑tusa tigma taaba, n sẽbg taaba, tɩ yaa wa b na n fẽda taaba. A Zeezi deng n goma ne b karen-biisã n yeel-b yaa: Gũus-y y mens ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã rã-bɩllã sẽn yaa zãmbã." 
Luke12:2 Bũmb ka be sẽn ludi, sẽn kõn puk ye. La bũmb ka be sẽn solge, b sẽn kõn bãng ye." 
Luke12:3 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn na gom lik bida pʋgẽ, b na n wʋm-a-la vẽenemẽ. La bũmb nins yãmb sẽn na n walem tʋbẽ, rot pʋsẽ, b na n moon-b-la rot zutu." 
Luke12:4 M zo-rãmba, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y ra zoe neb nins sẽn kʋʋd yĩngã n yaool n ka tõe n maan bũmb a to n paasã ye." 
Luke12:5 Mam na n wilga yãmb y sẽn tog n zoe a soaba. Zoe-y soab ning sẽn tõe n kʋ, la b tõe n kẽes bug-tẽngẽ me wã. N-yẽe! Mam yeta yãmb tɩ yaa soab‑kãng la yãmb tog n zoe." 
Luke12:6 B ka koosd yirs a nu su a yiib sɩda? Baoosgo, Wẽnnaam ka yĩmd b baa a yembr yell ye." 
Luke12:7 Baa yãmb zugã zoobd fãa sõdame. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ y ra zoe rabeem ye. Yãmb bee yõod n yɩɩd yirs wʋsgo." 
Luke12:8 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n kɩs kaset nebã taoor t'a yaa mam neda, Ninsaal Bi-riblã me na n kɩsa kaset Wẽnnaam malegsã taoor tɩ soab‑kãng yaa bãmb neda." 
Luke12:9 La ned ning fãa sẽn na n kɩɩs nebã taoor t'a ka mi maam, Ninsaal Bi-riblã me na n kɩɩsa Wẽnnaam malegsã taoor tɩ bãmb ka mi-a ye." 
Luke12:10 Ned ning fãa sẽn gomã Ninsaal Bi-riblã wẽng tõe n paama sugri. La ned ning sẽn na n paoog-a Sɩɩg-sõng kõn tol n paam sugr ye. 
Luke12:11 B sã n tall yãmb n kẽng karen-dotẽ wall bʋ-kaoodbã la pãn-soaadbã taoore, bɩ y da maan yɩɩr ne yãmb sẽn na n gom to-to n yiis y menga, wall y sẽn na n yet tɩ bũmb ning ye." 
Luke12:12 Bala, wakat-kãng bala, Sɩɩg-sõng na n wilga yãmb bũmb ning y sẽn tog n yeelã." 
Luke12:13 Ned a yembr zĩnda kʋʋngã sʋk n yeel a Zeezi yaa: Karen-saamba, yeel-y m ba-biigã t'a pʋɩ tõnd dogem pʋɩɩrã n yãk m dẽnd n kõ-ma." 
Luke12:14 A Zeezi leok-a lame yaa: Daoa, ãndã n yãk maam tɩ m yɩ yãmb bʋ-kaooda, wall y te-pʋɩta?" 
Luke12:15 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela nebã yaa: Gũus-y y mens ne rat wʋsgã. Bala, hal baa naar pʋgẽ, ninsaal vɩɩmã ka tũud ne bũmb nins a sẽn tarã ye." 
Luke12:16 La a Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd n yeele: Arzɛk soab a yembr pʋt n dag n sak sõama. 
Luke12:17 La a da tagsda a sũurẽ n yetẽ yaa: Mam na n maana a wãna? Bala, mam ka tar zĩig n na n bĩng m koodã ye." 
Luke12:18 A yeelame yaa: «Ad bũmb ning mam sẽn na n maane: Mam na n wãa m baoã n lebs n me sẽn yaa bɛd n yɩɩda, n bĩng m koodã fãa ne m teedã be." 
Luke12:19 La mam a n yeela m meng yaa: Fo tara paoong wʋsg sẽn sekd yʋʋm wʋsg yĩnga. Bɩ f vʋʋse, n dɩ la f yũ, la f maan sũ-noogo.»" 
Luke12:20 La Wẽnnaam yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yalma! Yʋn-kãngã bala, mam na n deega fo vɩɩmã. La bũmb nins fo sẽn seglã na n yɩɩ ãnda rẽnda?»" 
Luke12:21 Yaa a woto ne ned ning fãa sẽn tigsd paoong a meng yĩnga, n yaool n ka tar Wẽnnaam arzegsã." 
Luke12:22 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ y ra maan yɩɩr ne y vɩɩmã yelle, yãmb sẽn na n dɩ bũmb ninga, wall ne y yĩngã yelle, y sẽn na n yeelg bũmb ning ye." 
Luke12:23 Bala, vɩɩm yɩɩda rɩɩbo, la yĩng yɩɩda futu." 
Luke12:24 Ges-y gãabdã! B ka bʋta, b ka tigsda, b ka tar pilgu, wall baoor ye. La Wẽnnaam rɩlgd-b lame. Yãmb ka be yõod n yɩɩd bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sɩda?" 
Luke12:25 Ãndã yãmb sʋkã n tõe n paas a vɩɩmã woglem kãntɩɩg a yembre, a sẽn maand yɩɩr yĩnga?" 
Luke12:26 Dẽ, yãmb sã n ka tõe n maan bũmb sẽn yaa bilf n yɩɩda, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb maand yɩɩr ne bũmb nins sẽn ketã?" 
Luke12:27 Ges-y rulg-lɛlem sẽn bɩt to-to. B ka tʋmda, la b ka wĩid lamdo. Baoosgo, mam yeta yãmb t'a Salmo mengã ne a naamã fãa ka tõog n maneg a meng ne fut n yɩ neer wa rulg-lelemd a yembr ye." 
Luke12:28 Yãmb tẽeb bilf rãmba, sã n yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam nagsa mood sẽn be weoogẽ rũndã, tɩ b na n tugl-b bugum beoogã a woto, bãmb kõn ges yãmb fut yell n yɩɩda?" 
Luke12:29 Dẽ wã, bɩ y da nams y mens n baood y sẽn na n dɩ bũmb ninga, wall y sẽn na n yũ bũmb ning ye." 
Luke12:30 Bala, yaa dũni neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã n baood bõn-kãense. Yãmb ba wã miime tɩ yãmb dat-b lame." 
Luke12:31 Bas-y rẽ la y bao Wẽnnaam soolmã, la b na n kõo yãmb bõn-kãensã n paase." 
Luke12:32 Mam piisi, da zoe-y dabeem ye. Bala, a taa yãmb ba wã yam tɩ b kõ yãmb b soolmã." 
Luke12:33 Koos-y yãmb sẽn tarã n dɩk a ligdã n kõ naong rãmba. Bao-y kord sẽn ka sãamda, la paoong sẽn ka sɛt arzãn pʋga, zĩig ning wagdr sẽn ka kolgdã, la mogd sẽn ka sãamda." 
Luke12:34 Bala, yãmb paoong sẽn beẽ wã, yãmb sũurã me na n zĩnda be." 
Luke12:35 Bɩ y sẽb y sees sẽbdse, la y yõgen y fɩtl-dãmba," 
Luke12:36 la y yɩ wa neb sẽn gũud tɩ b zu-soab yi pʋg-peegr tigr n lebg n wa, t'a sã n ta bal n wẽ bɩ b pak t'a kẽ." 
Luke12:37 Bark bee tʋmtʋmd kãens zutu, b zu-soabã sẽn na n wa n ta n mik tɩ b neeme. Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ b zu-soabã na n sẽba a sẽbdga, n kɩt tɩ b zĩnd rɩɩb zĩigẽ, t'a wa n kõ-b rɩɩbo." 
Luke12:38 Yẽnda wat yʋn-sʋk tɩ yaa no-kɛlenga, a sã n wa n mik tɩ b ka gõe, b sũur na yɩ noogo." 
Luke12:39 Bãng-y neer tɩ roog soab sã n dag n miẽ wakat ning wagdr sẽn na n wa, a rag n na n neendame n ka bas t'a poog a roogã ye." 
Luke12:40 Bɩ yãmb me segl n sɛ. Bala, Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n waa wakat ning yãmb sẽn ka tagsd tɩ b na n waame wã." 
Luke12:41 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr soka a Zeezi yaa: Zu-soaba, yaa tõnd bal la yãmb wẽ yel-bũn‑kãngã bɩ, bɩ yaa nebã fãa?" 
Luke12:42 T'a Zeezi leok yaa: Dẽ, ãndã n yaa tʋmtʋmd sẽn maand sɩda la a tar yam, t'a zu-soabã yeel-a t'a ges a tʋmtʋmdbã yelle, n kõt-b rɩɩb wakat fãa sẽn zemse?" 
Luke12:43 Tʋmtʋmd‑kãng zu-soabã sã n wa n mik t'a maanda a woto, tʋmtʋmdã sũur na yɩ noogo." 
Luke12:44 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd t'a zu-soabã na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda ges a arzegsã fãa yelle. 
Luke12:45 La tʋmtʋmd‑kãng sã n yeel a sũurẽ t'a zu-soabã kaoosda waoongo, n sɩng n pãbd tʋmtʋmd daopã la tʋmtʋmd‑pogsã, n dɩtẽ la a yũud n gãeemdẽ," 
Luke12:46 tʋmtʋmd‑kãng zu-soabã na n waa daar ning yẽnda sẽn ka gũud-a, la wakat ning a sẽn ka mi. A zu-soabã na n sɩbga yẽnda sõama, n kɩt tɩ bũmb nins sẽn paamd neb nins sẽn ka maand sɩdã paam yẽnda me." 
Luke12:47 Tʋmtʋmd ning sẽn mi‑a a zu-soab raabo, n yaool n ka segl bũmbu, la a ka maan a zu-soabã sẽn datã, b na n pãb-a la wʋsgo." 
Luke12:48 La ned ning sẽn ka mi‑a zu-soabã raabo, n maan tʋʋmd sẽn tog ne sɩbgre, b na n pãba yẽnda bilfu. B sã n kõ ned bũmb wʋsgo, b na n sok-a-la bũmb wʋsgo. La b sã n gũnug ned bũmb wʋsgo, b na n sok-a-la wʋsg n yɩɩda." 
Luke12:49 Mam waame n na n lob bugum dũni zugu. La mam nonga a sã n dag n zoe n widgẽ! 
Luke12:50 La lisg n be mam sẽn tog n deege, la a yellã na n namsa maam hal t'a wa n pidsi." 
Luke12:51 Yãmb tẽedame tɩ mam waame tɩ laafɩ na zĩnd tẽng zugu? Mam yeta yãmb tɩ ayo. La yaa tɩ welgr na zĩndi. 
Luke12:52 Bala, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, neb a nu sẽn be zak a yembr pʋg na n welga taaba, tɩ tãabã kɩɩs yiibã, tɩ yiibã kɩɩs tãabã." 
Luke12:53 Ba na n welga ne a bi-ribla, tɩ bi-ribl welg ne a ba. Ma na n welga ne a bi-pugla, tɩ bi-pugl welg ne a ma. Sɩd‑ma na n welga ne a bi-paga, tɩ bi-pag welg ne a sɩd‑ma." 
Luke12:54 A Zeezi leb n yeela neb kʋʋngã yaa: Yãmb sã n yãnd sawadg sẽn yikd nin-taoore, tao-tao bala, yãmb yetame tɩ saagã na n niime, la a yɩta a woto." 
Luke12:55 La yãmb sã n yãnd tɩ sobg yita wĩndg goabga, yãmb yetame tɩ zĩigã na n yɩɩ tʋʋlgo, la a yɩta a woto." 
Luke12:56 Zãmb-dãmba, yãmb mii tẽng yɛla, la yĩngr yɛl sẽn yaa to-to. Bõe tɩ yãmb ka mi moasã wakatã yɛl n welge?" 
Luke12:57 La yaa bõe tɩ yãmb ka tõe n bãng sẽn yaa tɩrg y toor n bake? 
Luke12:58 Fo sã n dabd bʋʋd zĩigẽ ne f zabd-n-taaga, bɩ f modg n maneg f yellã ne-a, yãmb sẽn ket sorã zug wakate, tɩ yẽnda ra wa tall foom n kẽng bʋ-kaoodbã taoore, tɩ bʋ-kaoodbã yõk foom n kõ bi-bees roog gũud t'a kẽes-f bi-bees roog ye." 
Luke12:59 Mam yet-f lame tɩ fo kõn yi be hal tɩ f yao a samdã yaoolem lagf ye. 
Luke13:1 Wakat-kãnga, neb kẽer waa n togsa a Zeezi bũmb ning sẽn maan Galɩle nebã, a Pilat sẽn daag b zɩɩm n kalem ne b maandã zɩɩmã." 
Luke13:2 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ Galɩle nin-kãens sẽn nams a woto wã, b yaa yel-wẽn maandb n yɩɩd Galɩle neb a taabã la?" 
Luke13:3 Ayo! Mam yeta yãmb tɩ ayo. Yãmb sã n ka tek yam n kos sugri, yãmb fãa na n sãama a woto me." 
Luke13:4 Wall neb piig la a nii Siloe gãosgã sẽn lʋɩ n bʋʋg-b n kʋ-bã, yãmb tagsdame tɩ bãmb yaa bɛɛgdb n yɩɩd Zeruzalɛm neb a taabã la?" 
Luke13:5 Ayo! Mam yeta yãmb tɩ ayo. Yãmb sã n ka tek yam n kos sugri, yãmb fãa me na n sãama a woto.»" 
Luke13:6 A Zeezi wẽe yel-bũn‑kãngã me: Ned n dag n tar kankang sẽn sel a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ. A waame n na n yãgs biisi, la a ka yã ye." 
Luke13:7 Dẽ, a yeela pʋʋgã koaad yaa: «Yʋʋm a tãab moasã la mam wat n dat kankangã biisi, la m ka yãt ye. Keeg-a! Bõe yĩng t'a yãmb zĩigã zaalem?»" 
Luke13:8 Reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã koaad leokame n yeele: «M soaala, leb n bas-y-yã-a roandã yɛsa. Ka ne rẽ, mam na n tuume n gilg-a la m ning-a birga." 
Luke13:9 Daar ninga, a na wom biisi. La a sã n ka wome, bɩ y keeg-a.»" 
Luke13:10 Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daar a yembre, a Zeezi dag n zãmsda neb karen-doog a yembr pʋgẽ." 
Luke13:11 La pag a yembr n dag n be be, tɩ zĩn kɩt t'a lebg koams hal yʋʋm piig la a nii. A dag n zõrame n ka tõe n doog baa bilf ye." 
Luke13:12 A Zeezi yãnd-a lame n gom ne-a n yeele: Paga, fo paama yolsg ne f komsmã." 
Luke13:13 Bãmb tika yẽnda ne b nusi. Wakat-kãng bala, a roogame n kõ Wẽnnaam waoogre." 
Luke13:14 La karen-doogã naab sũur sãama ne a Zeezi sẽn maan bõn-bãnd vʋʋsg daarã, la a yeela nebã yaa: Dasem a yoob n be tʋʋm yĩnga. Wa-y da-kãens tɩ b maag-yã, tɩ da yɩt tõnd vʋʋsg daarã ye. Zu-soabã leok-a lame n yeele:" 
Luke13:15 Zãmb rãmba, yãmb ned kam fãa ka lokd a naaf a rɩɩb koglgẽ n tall n tɩ yũnug vʋʋsg daarã sɩda?" 
Luke13:16 La pʋg‑kãngã sẽn yaa a Abrahaam bi-pugla, t'a Sʋtãan loe-a hal yʋʋm piig la a nii wã, d ka tog n lok-a vʋʋsg daare?" 
Luke13:17 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto, yãnd yõka b bɛɛbã fãa, la neb kʋʋngã maanda sũ-noog bũmb nins fãa a Zeezi sẽn maan tɩ be ziirã yĩnga." 
Luke13:18 A Zeezi leb n yeelame yaa: Wẽnnaam soolmã wẽnda bõe, la m na n mams-a-la ne bõe?" 
Luke13:19 A wẽnda wa siin-bil ned sẽn dɩk n lob a zẽed zĩigẽ. A yitame n lebg tɩɩga, la yĩngr liuuli vɩɩ a wilẽ wã." 
Luke13:20 B leb n yeelame: Mam na n mamsa Wẽnnaam soolmã ne bõe? 
Luke13:21 A wẽnda rã-bɩll pag sẽn dɩk n ning zom wam a tãabo, hal tɩ zom-nagdgã fãa wuki." 
Luke13:22 A Zeezi da pɩʋʋgda tẽn-bɛd la tẽn-bãoonego, n zãmsd nebã la b dabd Zeruzalɛm." 
Luke13:23 Ned n sok bãmb yaa: Zu-soaba, yaa neb bilf bal n na n paam fãagre? A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele:" 
Luke13:24 Nang-y pãng n tũ digno-sẽkã n kẽ. Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ neb wʋsg na n baoome tɩ kẽ la b ka na n tõog ye." 
Luke13:25 Yirã soab sã n yik n pag rignoorã, tɩ yãmb pa yɩng n sɩng n kabsdẽ, la y yet Zu-soabã tɩ b pak tɩ y kẽ, b na n leoka yãmb tɩ b ka mi yãmb sẽn yitẽ ye." 
Luke13:26 Dẽ, yãmb na n sɩngame n yeele: «Tõnd dɩɩ ne yãmba, la d yũ ne yãmba, la yãmb zãmsa neb tõnd soayã zutu.»" 
Luke13:27 La b na n leoka yãmb n yeele: «Mam ka mi yãmb sẽn yitẽ ye. Zãag-y ne maam, yãmb fãa sẽn tʋmd ka-tɩrlem tʋʋmã.»" 
Luke13:28 Yãmb sã n yãnd a Abrahaam, la a Izake, la a Zakoob ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã fãa Wẽnnaam soolmã pʋgẽ, tɩ b yaool n lob yãmb yɩnga, nintãm ne yẽn wãbr na zĩnd be." 
Luke13:29 Neb na n yii yaang la taoore, dɩtg la goabga, n zĩnd n dɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã pʋgẽ." 
Luke13:30 La gese, poorẽ dãmb n be n na n yɩ dẽenem dãmba, tɩ dẽenem dãmb me na n yɩ poorẽ dãmba." 
Luke13:31 Wakat-kãnga, Fariizẽ-dãmbã kẽer waa n yeela a Zeezi yaa: Kẽng n looge! Yi ka, bala, a Erood dat n kʋʋ foom." 
Luke13:32 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Kẽng n tɩ yeel-y sɩlem‑soabã tɩ mam digda zĩn-dãmba, la m maagd bãad-dãmb rũndã la beoogo. La ra-yɩt na n yɩɩ baoosg daar ne maam." 
Luke13:33 La yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam kẽn dũndã, la beoogo, la ra‑yɩta. Bala, a ka zems tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ki zĩig a to tɩ ka Zeruzalɛm ye." 
Luke13:34 Zeruzalɛm! Zeruzalɛm! Fo sẽn kʋʋd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdba, la f lobd neb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋm fo nengẽ wã kugã, naoor a wãn la mam dag n tʋlg n tigs fo kambã wa no-yãang sẽn põgended a kamb a pɩgsẽ? La yãmb ka tʋlg ye." 
Luke13:35 Gese, b na n basa yãmb ne y roogã. La mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb ka na n leb n yãnd maam yɛsa, hal tɩ ta daar ning yãmb sẽn na n yeel tɩ: «Bark bee ned ning sẽn wat ne Zu-soabã yʋʋrã zugu.»" 
Luke14:1 Daar a yembre, a Zeezi kẽe Fariizẽ-dãmbã naab a yembr zakẽ n na n dɩ, la Fariizẽ-dãmbã dag n gũusda bãmba." 
Luke14:2 La ade, rao a ye bã-moatg sẽn tar n dag n be bãmb taoore." 
Luke14:3 A Zeezi goma ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã la Fariizẽ-dãmbã n yeele: Dẽ yĩnga, noor beeme tɩ maag ned vʋʋsg daare?" 
Luke14:4 Bãmb kell n sĩndame. Dẽ, a Zeezi peega bãadã, n maag-a, la b kuils-a." 
Luke14:5 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Ãnda yãmb sʋkã bi-ribl bɩ a naaf n na n lʋɩ bulgẽ vʋʋsg daar t'a ka yiis-a tao-tao? 
Luke14:6 La b ka tõog n leok gom‑kãng ye. 
Luke14:7 Rẽ poore, a Zeezi goma ne neb nins b sẽn bool rɩɩbã yĩngã n wẽ-b yel-bũndi. Bala, bãmb yãame tɩ nin-kãens baooda naam zĩndg zĩisi. B yeel-b lame yaa:" 
Luke14:8 Ned sã n bool foom yi-kãadem tigrẽ, bɩ f ra tɩ zĩnd naam zĩndg zĩigẽ ye. Bala, tõeeme t'a boola ned sẽn yɩɩd foom." 
Luke14:9 Sã n yɩ a woto, sẽn bool-a foom ne yẽnda wã na n waa n yeela foom tɩ f yik n bas zĩig n kõ-a, fo na n yaool n tɩ zĩnda poorẽ zaoogã zugu, la f na n yãnda yãnde." 
Luke14:10 B sã n bool foom, kẽng n tɩ zĩnd poorẽ zaoogã zugu, tɩ ned ning sẽn bool-a foomã sã n wa bɩ a yeel foom yaa: «M zoa, wa taoor ka!» Woto na n yɩɩ fo waoogr neb nins fãa sẽn zĩ ne foom n dɩtẽ wã taoore." 
Luke14:11 Sɩd me, b na n sika ned ning fãa sẽn zẽkd a menga, la b na n zẽka ned ning fãa sẽn sikd a menga." 
Luke14:12 La a Zeezi yeela ned ning sẽn bool-a bãmb tɩ b wa n dɩ wã yaa: Fo sã n na n bool neb tɩ b wa n dɩ ne foom, tɩ yaa wĩntoog bɩ yʋngo, da bool f zo-rãmba, wall f ba-biisi, wall f buudu, wall f yags nins sẽn yaa arzegs rãmbã, tɩ bãmb me da wa n bool foom ye. Rẽ na n yɩɩ lebsgo." 
Luke14:13 Fo sã n na n bool neb tɩ b wa n dɩ ne foom, bool naong rãmba, la koms-rãmba, la wobse, la zoense," 
Luke14:14 la fo na n paama sũ-noogo, b sẽn ka tar n na n kõ foom n lebsã yĩnga. Bala, nin-tɩrsã vʋʋgr wakate, fo na n paama keoore." 
Luke14:15 Neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ n dɩtẽ wã sẽn wʋm a Zeezi gom kãensã, b ned a yembr yeelame yaa: Bark bee ned ning sẽn na n naag-a n dɩ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ wã zugu!" 
Luke14:16 La a Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: Dao a yembr n dag n segl rɩɩb n bool neb wʋsg tɩ b wa rɩ. 
Luke14:17 Dɩɩbã wakate, a tʋma a tʋmtʋmd t'a tɩ yeel neb nins a sẽn boolã tɩ b wa tɩ bũmbã fãa zoe n segl n sɛɛme." 
Luke14:18 La bãmb ned kam fãa sɩng n padmame. Pipi soabã yeelame tɩ yẽnda raa pʋʋgo, la yaa tɩlɛ tɩ yẽnda kẽng n tɩ gese, la a kotame tɩ b bas-a taale." 
Luke14:19 A to yeelame tɩ yẽnda raa nag-koods piiga, la yẽnda na n mak-b lame n gese, la a kotame tɩ b bas-a taale." 
Luke14:20 Ned a to yeelame tɩ yẽnda nan peega a pʋg-paala, la rẽ n kɩt tɩ yẽnda ka na n tõog n wa ye." 
Luke14:21 Tʋmtʋmdã lebgame n tɩ togs a soaalã bõn-kãense. A soaalã sũur yĩigame t'a yeel a tʋmtʋmdã t'a kẽng raasẽ wã, la tẽngã soayã zut tao-tao, n wa ne naong rãmba, la koms-rãmba, la zoense, la wobsã be." 
Luke14:22 Tʋmtʋmdã yeelame tɩ yẽnda maana a soaalã sẽn yeelã, la vɩʋʋg ket n beeme." 
Luke14:23 La soaalã yeela tʋmtʋmdã yaa: Rɩk soayã, la f yeg yãgã n modg nebã tɩ b wa kẽ hal tɩ mam yirã pid ne nebã." 
Luke14:24 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ neb nins mam sẽn dag n boolã, bãmb ned baa a yembr kõn lemb mam dɩɩbã ye." 
Luke14:25 Neb kʋʋng wʋsg dag n tũuda a Zeezi sorã zugu. A Zeezi wẽnemdame n yeel-b yaa: 
Luke14:26 Ned sã n wat mam nengẽ, n ka kis a ba la a ma, la a paga, la a kamba, la a ba-bi-raopa, la a ba-bi-pogse, la baa ne a mengã vɩɩm, a ka tõe n yɩ mam karen-biig ye." 
Luke14:27 La ned ning fãa sẽn kõn dɩk a da-pɩk n tũ maam, ka tõe n yɩ mam karen-biig ye." 
Luke14:28 Bala, ãndã n be yãmb sʋkã n dat n me gãosgo, n ka reng n zĩnd n geel ligd ning fãa a sẽn tog n yiis tʋʋmdã yĩnga, n bãng a sã n tara sẽn sek tɩ me-a n sa?" 
Luke14:29 Sã n ka rẽ, a sã n yẽbg roogã n sa, n yaool n ka tõe n baas-a, neb nins fãa sẽn na n yãnd‑a wã na n yaala yẽnda n yeele:" 
Luke14:30 Rao‑kãngã sɩnga gãosg meeb la a ka tõog n baas ye. 
Luke14:31 Wall rĩm bʋg n be n dat n tɩ zab ne rĩm a to, n ka reng n zĩnd n mag n gese, yẽnda ne a nebã tus piigã sã n tara pãn-tõog tɩ kẽng n seg rĩm a to wã sẽn wat ne neb tus pisi wã?" 
Luke14:32 Rĩm a to wã sẽn ket n be yɩɩga, a na n tʋma neb a nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yẽs laafɩ yẽsg ne-a." 
Luke14:33 Woto me, yãmb ned ning fãa sẽn ka basd bũmb nins fãa a sẽn tarã ka tõe n yɩ mam karen-biig ye." 
Luke14:34 Yamsem yaa bõn-sõngo. La yamsem sã n lebg poada, bõe la b na n ning-a t'a leb n paam noosem?" 
Luke14:35 A ka yõod tãnd yĩnga, wall birg yĩng ye. B lobd-a la yɩnga. Bɩ sẽn tar-a tʋb n wʋmdẽ wʋme!" 
Luke15:1 Yaood-dɛɛgdbã fãa ne yel-wẽn maandbã fãa kolga a Zeezi n na n kelg-ba. 
Luke15:2 La Fariizẽ-dãmbã la tõog karen-saam-dãmbã da yẽgemdame n yetẽ tɩ rao-kãngã reegda yel-wẽn maandba la b rɩt ne-ba. 
Luke15:3 La a Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũn‑kãngã n yeele: 
Luke15:4 Nin-bʋg n be yãmb sʋkã n na n tar piis koabga, t'a yembr meneme, t'a ka bas pis-wɛ la a wɛ wã weoogẽ wã n kẽng n tɩ gẽes peosg ning sẽn menem-a wã hal n yãnd-a?" 
Luke15:5 La yẽnda sã n yãnd-a, a na n palg-a-la a bãgdẽ ne sũ-noogo." 
Luke15:6 La yẽnda sã n lebg n ta yiri, a boonda a zo-rãmbã ne a yagsã a yir n yeel-b yaa: «Naag-y maam n maan sũ-noogo, bala, mam yãnda m peosgã sẽn dag n menemã.»" 
Luke15:7 Woto me, mam yeta yãmb tɩ sũ-noog na n zĩnda arzãn pʋgẽ, yel-wẽn maand a yembr sẽn tek yam n kos sugr yĩnga, n yɩɩd nin-tɩrs pis-wɛ la a wɛ sẽn ka baood sugr kosgã yĩnga." 
Luke15:8 Walla, pʋg bʋg n na n tar ligd piiga, t'a yembr menem t'a ka yõgen fɩtla, n pɩɩs roogã la a gẽes-a neer hal n yãnd-a?" 
Luke15:9 La a sã n yãnd-a, a boonda a zo-rãmbã ne a yagsã a yir n yeel-b yaa: Naag-y maam n maan sũ-noogo, bala, mam yãnda m lagfã sẽn dag n menemã." 
Luke15:10 Woto me, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yel-wẽn maand a yembr sã n tek yam n kos sugri, sũ-noog na n zĩnda Wẽnnaam malegsã sʋka." 
Luke15:11 A Zeezi leb n yeelame yaa: Rao n dag n tar kom-dibli a yiibu. 
Luke15:12 La yao wã yeela a ba wã yaa: «M ba, pʋɩ-y y paoongã n yãk m pʋɩɩr n kõ-ma.» La ba wã pʋɩ-b-la a paoongã." 
Luke15:13 Rasem bilf zugẽ, yao wã tigsa a sẽn da tarã fãa n kẽng tẽn-zãrgẽ, n tɩ sãam a paoongã be ne tʋʋm-dẽgd maanego." 
Luke15:14 La yẽnda sẽn sãam a paoongã fãa n sa, kom kãseng n kẽ tẽn-kãngã, la komã sɩngame n nams-a." 
Luke15:15 Yẽnda kẽng n tɩ noka tẽnga ned a yembre, t'a tʋm yẽnda a pʋtẽ t'a tɩ gũ kurkuyã." 
Luke15:16 Yẽnda dag n datẽ-la zãbnã kurkuyã sẽn da rɩtã n dɩ n pid a pʋga, la ned ka kõt yẽnda ye." 
Luke15:17 Yẽnda tagsa a sũurẽ n yeele: «M baaba tʋmtʋmdbã waooga, la b tara rɩɩb n dɩt n tɩgd n kelldẽ, tɩ kom kʋʋd maam ka." 
Luke15:18 Mam na n yikame n kẽng m baaba nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: M ba, mam beega Wẽnnaam la m beeg yãmba." 
Luke15:19 Mam ka leb n zems tɩ b bool maam tɩ yãmb biig ye. Ges-y maam wa yãmb tʋmtʋmd a yembre.» 
Luke15:20 La a yikame n kẽng a ba wã nengẽ. La yẽnda sẽn ket n be yɩɩga, a ba wã yãnd-a lame t'a nimbãanega yõk-a. A ba wã wudgame n tɩ mobg-a n mok-a." 
Luke15:21 Biigã yeela a ba wã yaa: «M ba, mam beega Wẽnnaam la m beeg yãmba. Mam ka leb n zems tɩ b bool maam tɩ y biig ye.»" 
Luke15:22 La a ba wã yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Wa-y ne fuug ning sẽn yaa-a neer n yɩɩdã tao-tao n yeelg-a. Ning-y-yã-a nug-bilã nugbĩnga, la y wid-a neooda." 
Luke15:23 Wa-y ne nag-bi-noabdgã, n kʋ-a tɩ d rɩ la d maan sũ-noogo." 
Luke15:24 Bala, mam bi-ribl‑kãngã rag n kiime, la a leb n vʋʋgame. A rag n menemame, la d leb n yãnd-a lame.» La bãmb sɩngame n kɩdemdẽ." 
Luke15:25 La bi-ribl kãsengã rag n bee pʋtẽ. La yẽnda sẽn lebg n watẽ n kolg yiri, a wʋma yʋʋmb ne saoog rãamde." 
Luke15:26 Yẽnda boola tʋmtʋmd a yembr n sok-a bũmb ning sẽn maandã võore. 
Luke15:27 Tʋmtʋmdã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yãmb yao wã lebg n waame, tɩ yãmb ba wã kʋ nag-bi-noabdgã, a sẽn lebg n wa ne laafɩ wã yĩnga.»" 
Luke15:28 Yẽnda sũurã puugame t'a ka sak n na n kẽ ye. A baaba wã yiime n na n bool-a t'a wa n kẽ. 
Luke15:29 Dẽ, a leoka a ba wã yaa: «Ade, yaa yʋʋm wʋsg la mam tʋmd n kõt yãmba. Mam nan ka kɩɩs yãmb noor ye. La maam yẽ, yãmb zɩɩ n kõ maam baa bull tɩ m maan sũ-noog ne m zo-rãmb ye." 
Luke15:30 La yãmb bi-kãngã, sẽn sãam-a yãmb paoongã ne pʋg-yoaadbã sẽn lebg n wa wã, yãmb kʋʋ nag-bi-noabdgã n kõ-a.»" 
Luke15:31 A ba wã yeel-a lame yaa: «M biiga, fo bee ne maam daar fãa, la bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn tarã yaa foom n so." 
Luke15:32 La a zemsame tɩ tõnd maan sũ-noog n kɩdem. Bala fo yao wã fo sẽn ne wã rag n kiime, la a leb n vʋʋgame. A rag n menemame, la m leb n yãnd-a lame.»" 
Luke16:1 A Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã me yaa: Arzɛk soab a yembr n dag n be n tar a tʋʋm taoor soaba, la b togs-a lame t'a tʋmtʋmdã sãamda yẽnda paoongã." 
Luke16:2 Yẽnda boola tʋʋmã taoor soab n yeel-a yaa: «Bõe tɩ b gomd fo yell a woto tɩ mam wʋmdẽ? Wilg maam fo tʋʋmã sẽn yɩ to-to. Bala, fo ka na n leb n yɩ mam tʋʋmã taoor soab ye.»" 
Luke16:3 Tʋʋmã taoor soab tagsa a sũurẽ n yeele: «Mam zu-soabã sẽn dat n yiis maam tʋʋmdẽ wã, mam na n maana bõe? Koobo? Mam ka tar pãng n na n ko ye, la bõsg yaa yãnd ne maam." 
Luke16:4 Mam mii m sẽn na n maanega, tɩ b sã n wa n yiis maam m tʋʋmdẽ wã, bɩ neb deeg maam b yiyã.»" 
Luke16:5 Dẽ, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b bool a zu-soaba sam-dãmbã yembr-yembre, n yeel pipi soabã yaa: «Fo tara mam zu-soaba samd wãna?»" 
Luke16:6 T'a leok tɩ kaam rʋg-bɛd koabga. La a yeela yẽnda t'a reeg a sebrã n zĩnd tao-tao n gʋls tɩ pis-nu. 
Luke16:7 Yẽnda leb n soka a to yaa: «La fo yẽ samdã yaa wãna?» Tɩ yẽnda leok tɩ kood yond kobs-nu. La a yeela yẽnda t'a reeg a sebrã n gʋls tɩ kobs-naase. 
Luke16:8 La a zu-soaba pẽga a tʋʋmã taoor soab sẽn ka tɩrgã, a sẽn maan yamã yĩnga. Bala, dũni‑kãnga neb maanda yam ne taaba, n yɩɩd vẽenem kambã." 
Luke16:9 La mam yeta yãmb tɩ y rɩk dũni paoongã n bao zo-rãmba, tɩ paoongã sã n wa n sɛ n bas yãmba, bɩ Wẽnnaam reeg yãmb yiy sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa wã pʋgẽ." 
Luke16:10 Ned ning sẽn maand sɩd bõn-bãooneg pʋse, a maanda sɩd bõn-kãsems pʋse. La ned ning sẽn ka maand sɩd bõn-bãooneg pʋs ka na n maan sɩd bõn-kãsems pʋs me ye." 
Luke16:11 Dẽ, yãmb sã n ka maan sɩd ne dũniyã arzegse, ãndã n na n dɩk paoong sɩd-sɩd n gũnug yãmba?" 
Luke16:12 La yãmb sã n ka maan sɩd ne ned a to paoongo, ãndã n na n kõ yãmb y meng rẽnda?" 
Luke16:13 Tʋmtʋmd baa a ye ka be n tõe n sak zu-soben-dãmb a yiib ye. Bala, yẽnda na n kisga a yembr la a nong a to wã, wall a waoog a yembr la a paoog a to wã. Yãmb ka tõe n sak Wẽnnaam la ligd me ye." 
Luke16:14 Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn da nong ligdã rag n kelgda bõn-kãensã fãa la b rag n yaanda a Zeezi. 
Luke16:15 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: yãmb yaa neb sẽn wilgd nebã tɩ y yaa tɩrse. La Wẽnnaam mii yãmb sũyã. Bala, bũmb ning nebã sẽn pẽgd wʋsgã yaa bõn-wẽng Wẽnnaam nifẽ." 
Luke16:16 Hal tɩ ta a Zã wakate, dag n yaa tõogã ne no-rɛɛsdbã wakate. La sẽn sɩng ne a Zã wakatã, b moonda Wẽnnaam soolem koe-noogã, la ned kam fãa nangda pãng n dat n kẽ be." 
Luke16:17 Yĩngr la tẽng loogr yaa naana n yɩɩd tõogã kargr a yembr menengo. 
Luke16:18 Ned ning fãa sẽn dig a pag la a rɩk a to, maanda yoobo. La ned ning fãa sẽn dɩk pag a sɩd sẽn dig maanda yoobo." 
Luke16:19 Rao a ye n dag n be n yaa arzɛk soaba, n yeelgd fu-sõama sẽn yaa neeba. La daar fãa, a tara bũmb fãa tɩ seke, t'a vɩɩmã ya noog wʋsgo." 
Luke16:20 Naong soab a yembr sẽn boond t'a Lazaar dag n gãee arzɛk soabã zak noore. La a yĩngã fãa da pida ne noada. 
Luke16:21 A rag n nongẽ lame n paam rɩ-zeremsã sẽn yit arzɛk soaba taabl zug n lʋɩtẽ wã n dɩ. La sẽn paase, baasã wat n lelemda a noadã." 
Luke16:22 Naong soabã wa n kiime. La malegsã talla yẽnda n kẽng a Abrahaam nengẽ. La arzɛk soabã me wa n kiime, la b mum-a lame." 
Luke16:23 Kɩɩm-kulg pʋgẽ, yẽnda nak n gesame. La a namsgã pʋgẽ, a tool n yãnda a Abrahaam yɩɩga, t'a Lazaar be ne-a." 
Luke16:24 Yẽnda zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel: «M ba a Abrahaam! Zoe-y mam nimbãanega, n tʋm a Lazaar t'a tẽk a nug-bil koomẽ n wa n wʋlg m zelemdã. Bala, mam namsda wʋsg bug-kãngã pʋgẽ.»" 
Luke16:25 A Abrahaam leoka yẽnda n yeele: «M biiga, bɩ f tẽeg tɩ fo paama arzegs f vɩɩmã wakate, la t'a Lazaar paama toodo. La moasã, yẽnda paamda belsg ka, tɩ fo be toog pʋgẽ." 
Luke16:26 La rẽ fãa sẽn yãk a toogo, bog-kãseng n be tõnd ne yãmb sʋka, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ neb nins sẽn dat n yi ka n wa yãmb nengẽ wã ra tõog ye, la tɩ sẽn be-b yãmb nengẽ wã me ra tõog n wa tõnd nengẽ ye.»" 
Luke16:27 Arzɛk soabã yeelame yaa: «Sã n yaa a woto, m ba, mam kota yãmb tɩ y tʋm a Lazaar mam ba wã yiri." 
Luke16:28 Bala mam tara ba-bi-raop a nu. Bɩ a kẽng n tɩ kɩs bãmb kaset tɩ b ra wa n wa zĩ-kãngã sẽn yaa namsg zĩigã ye.» 
Luke16:29 A Abrahaam leokame tɩ b tara a Moyiis ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, la b kelg bãmba." 
Luke16:30 La arzɛk soabã yeelame yaa: «Ayo, m ba a Abrahaam! La ned sẽn ki sã n vʋʋg n kẽng bãmb nengẽ, b na n teka yam n kos sugri.»" 
Luke16:31 La Abrahaam leoka yẽnda yaa: «Bãmb sã n ka kelg a Moyiis ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, baa ned sẽn ki sã n vʋʋge, b kõn tẽ-a ye.» A Lazaar ne arzɛk soabã." 
Luke17:1 A Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: Bũmb nins sẽn wat ne lʋɩɩsã ka tõe n ka wa ye. La ned ning sẽn na n wa-a ne-bã na paam toogo. 
Luke17:2 B sẽn na n loe ned kokor ne neer kugr n lob-a ko-kãsengã pʋg n são a yĩnga, n yɩɩd a sẽn na n kɩt tɩ kom-bãooneg kãens ned a yembr lʋɩ." 
Luke17:3 Gũus-y y mense. Fo ba-biig sã n maan yel-wẽnde, bɩ f leng-a, la a sã n kos sugri, bɩ f kõ-a." 
Luke17:4 La a sã n beeg foom naoor a yopoe daar a yembre, n lebg n wa fo nengẽ naoor a yopoe n yet t'a kota sugri, bɩ f kõ-a sugri." 
Luke17:5 Tẽn-tʋmdbã yeela Zu-soabã yaa: Paas-y d tẽebã. 
Luke17:6 La Zu-soabã yeelame yaa: «Yãmb sã n dag n tarẽ tẽeb sẽn zem siin-bila, yãmb na n yeela wom-sɛ-kãngã t'a vik n tɩ sel ko-kãsengã pʋga, la a na n saka yãmba.»" 
Luke17:7 Ãnda n be yãmb sʋkã n tar tʋmtʋmd sẽn kood wall sẽn gũud rũmsi, t'a sã n yi weoog n lebg n wa bɩ a yeel tʋmtʋmdã: kell n wa zĩnd n dɩ?" 
Luke17:8 Yẽnda ka na n yeel tʋmtʋmdã tɩ: «Segl dɩɩb n kõ-ma, ning fuug n tall rɩɩbã n wa n kõ-m tɩ m dɩ la m yũ. Rẽ poore fo na yaool n dɩ la f yũ.»" 
Luke17:9 Yẽnda na n pʋʋsa tʋmtʋmd-kãng barka, a sẽn maan bũmb ningã b sẽn yeel-a t'a maanã yĩng sɩda?" 
Luke17:10 Woto me, yãmb sã n maan bũmb nins fãa b sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maanã, bɩ y yeele: Tõnd yaa tʋmtʋmdb sẽn ka yõod ye, d maana tʋʋmd ningã tõnd sẽn da tog n maanã bala." 
Luke17:11 A Zeezi sẽn wa n dabd Zeruzalɛm, bãmb da tũuda Samaari soolem ne Galɩle sʋka." 
Luke17:12 Bãmb sẽn kẽed tẽn-bil a yembr pʋga, neb piig yĩn-gãong bãas sẽn tar waa n sega bãmba. Bãmb yaasa yɩɩg n zẽk b koees n yeele:" 
Luke17:13 Zeezi, Zu-soaba, zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega." 
Luke17:14 A Zeezi sẽn yãnd-bã, b yeel-b lame tɩ b kẽng n tɩ wilg b mens maan-kʋʋdbã. La bãmb sẽn dabd be wakate, bãmb kell n lebga yɩlma." 
Luke17:15 Bãmb sʋka ned a yembr sẽn yã t'a paama maagre, yẽ lebg n pʋga a nao, n zẽk a koɛɛg n pẽgd Wẽnnaam." 
Luke17:16 Yẽnda wõgemda a Zeezi taoore, n fõgen a neng tẽnga, n pʋʋs bãmb barka. A dag n yaa Samaari neda." 
Luke17:17 A Zeezi gomame n yeel yaa: «Bãmb piiga fãa ka lebg yɩlma sɩda? La neb a wɛ wã bee yɛ? 
Luke17:18 Yaa sãan-kãngã bal n lebg n wa n na n kõ Wẽnnaam waoogre? 
Luke17:19 Dẽ a Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: yik n looge. Fo tẽeb n fãag foom.» 
Luke17:20 Fariizẽ-dãmbã soka a Zeezi n dat n bãng Wẽnnaam soolmã sẽn na n wa wakat ninga. A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: Wẽnnaam soolmã ka wate, n yaa wa bũmb ned sẽn tõe n gẽnes ye." 
Luke17:21 B ka na n yeel tɩ ges-y-yã! Wẽnnaam soolem bee ka wall a bee ka sẽnẽ ye. Bala, ad-y Wẽnnaam soolmã bee yãmb sʋka." 
Luke17:22 La a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã yaa: Wakat n wat tɩ yãmb na n dat n yãnd Ninsaal Bi-riblã rayã daar a yembr la yãmb kõn yã ye. 
Luke17:23 B na n yeela yãmb tɩ b bee ka, wala b bee ka sẽnẽ. Da kẽng-y be ye, la y ra babs-b ye." 
Luke17:24 A wa sa-yãgb sẽn yit kɩreng a yembr n yãg n tɩ ta kɩreng a to wã, Ninsaal Bi-riblã me na n yɩɩ a woto b waoongã daare." 
Luke17:25 La yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bãmb deng n nams wʋsgo, la tɩ zamaan‑kãnga nebã zãgs bãmba." 
Luke17:26 Bũmb ning sẽn zĩnd a Nowe wakatã na n zĩnda Ninsaal Bi-riblã waoongã wakat me. 
Luke17:27 Nebã rag n dɩtame la b yũuda, la b kẽed kãadem, la b kõt b kamb sɩdba, hal tɩ ta daar ningã a Nowe sẽn kẽ koom koglgẽ wã. Sa-kẽengã wa n sãama bãmb fãa." 
Luke17:28 A na n yɩɩ wa a Lot wakatã. Nebã rag n dɩtame la b yũuda, n daadẽ la b koosdẽ, n bʋtẽ la b metẽ." 
Luke17:29 La daar ning a Lot sẽn yi Sodom tẽngã, bugum yii yĩngr n ni wa saaga, ne kidbri n sãam bãmb fãa." 
Luke17:30 Na n yɩɩ a woto me daar ning Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn na n puk b mengã. 
Luke17:31 Badaare, bɩ ned ning sẽn be roog zug t'a teed be roogã pʋg ra sig n dɩgs-b ye. La bɩ ned ning sẽn be pʋtẽ da lebg n leb poorẽ me ye." 
Luke17:32 Tẽeg-y-yã a Lot pagã yelle. 
Luke17:33 Ned ning sẽn na n bao tɩ gũ a vɩɩm, a na n menes-a lame, la ned ning sẽn na n bas a vɩɩm na n paam-a lame." 
Luke17:34 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ baraar yʋngo, neb a yiib sẽn na n gõe gãag a yembr zugu, b na n dɩka a ye, n bas a ye." 
Luke17:35 Pagb a yiib sẽn na n werd neerẽ ne taaba, b na n dɩka a yembr n bas a ye." 
Luke17:36 [Raop a yiib sẽn na n be pʋʋgẽ, b na n dɩka a yembr la b bas a ye.]" 
Luke17:37 Karen-biisã soka a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, na n yɩɩ zĩ-bʋgo? La a Zeezi leokame tɩ dɩgr sẽn be zĩig ninga, yɩbrend tigimda beenẽ.» Pagb a yiib sẽn werd neerẽ." 
Luke18:1 A Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd n na n wilg-b tɩ b tog n pʋʋsa wakat fãa n da yɛ ye. 
Luke18:2 A Zeezi yeelame: Bʋ-kaood a ye n dag n be tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ n ka zoet Wẽnnaam, la a ka zoet ned baa a yembr nif ye." 
Luke18:3 Pʋg‑kõor a ye me n dag n be tẽn-kãng pʋga, n wat n yet bʋ-kaoodã yaa: ‹Bʋ‑y maam ne m bʋʋd‑n‑taaga bʋʋd tɩrga, n kõ‑ma.›" 
Luke18:4 Bʋ-kaoodã zãgsame n kaoos t'a ka na n sõng-a ye. La a yaool n wa tagsa a sũurẽ n yeele: «Baa ne mam sẽn ka zoet Wẽnnaamã, la m ka zoet ned nifã," 
Luke18:5 pʋg‑kõ-kãngã sẽn pẽdgd maamã yĩnga, m na bʋ a bʋʋdã n kõ‑a bʋʋm t'a ra leb n wat n pẽdgd maam woto daar fãa ye.»" 
Luke18:6 Zu-soabã leb n yeelame yɛsa: Kelg-y bʋ-kaood-wẽngã sẽn yeelã. 
Luke18:7 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam kõn sõng bãmb nin-tũusdsã sẽn zẽkd b koees wĩndg la yʋng n kot bãmbã sɩda? B na kaoos n sõng-ba?" 
Luke18:8 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ b na n sõnga bãmb tao-tao. La Ninsaal Bi-riblã sã n wa, b na n yãnda tẽeb tẽng zugu?" 
Luke18:9 A Zeezi leb n wẽe yel-bũn-kãngã neb kẽer yĩnga, b sẽn da tẽed tɩ b yaa tɩrse, la b paoogd neb a taabã yĩnga, n yeele:" 
Luke18:10 Daop a yiib n dag n kẽng wẽnd doogẽ n na n tɩ pʋʋse. A yembrã yaa Fariizẽ neda, la a to wã yaa yaood dɛɛgda." 
Luke18:11 Fariizẽ nedã yalsa yĩngr n pʋʋs a sũurẽ a woto: «Mam Wẽnnaam, m pʋʋsda yãmb bark mam sẽn ka wẽnd wa neb a taabã sẽn yaa wagda la nin-wẽnse, la yoaadbã, la m ka wẽnd baa yaood-deegd-kãnga wã yĩnga." 
Luke18:12 Mam loeta noor naoor a yiib rasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, mam yãkda m sẽn tarã piig pʋɩɩr n kõtẽ.»" 
Luke18:13 Yaood-dɛɛgdã yalsa yɩɩga, n pʋs n ka saagd n na n doog a neng yĩngr ye. La a ra pĩisda a yãoog n yetẽ: «Mam Wẽnnaam! Zoe-y mam nimbãaneg tɩ m yaa yel-wẽn-maanda.»" 
Luke18:14 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ rao-kãng lebg n kuila a yir ne tɩrlem. La Fariizẽ nedã ka paam ye. Bala, b na n sika ned ning sẽn zẽkd a menga, la b na zẽka ned ning sẽn sikd a menga." 
Luke18:15 Neb n dag n talld hal baa kom-peels n wat a Zeezi nengẽ tɩ b sɩɩs-ba. La karen-biisã sẽn yã bõn-kãnga, b sɩngame n lengd neb nins sẽn tall-b kambã n wa wã." 
Luke18:16 La a Zeezi kɩtame tɩ b wa ne kambã, la b yeele: Bas-y kom-bãoonegã tɩ b wa mam nengẽ la y ra gɩdg-b ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam soolmã yaa neb nins sẽn wẽnd-b bãmbã yĩnga." 
Luke18:17 Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn ka reegd Wẽnnaam soolmã wa bi-bilf ka na kẽ be ye." 
Luke18:18 Naab a yembr soka a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saam-sõngo, bõe la mam tog n maan n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa?»" 
Luke18:19 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ f boond maam tɩ nin-sõngo? Ned kae n yaa sõama tɩ sã n ka Wẽnnaam b yembr bal ye. 
Luke18:20 Fo mii tõodã: ‹Da yo ye, da kʋ ye, da zu ye, da kɩs kaset zĩrẽ ye, waoog f ba la f ma›. »" 
Luke18:21 Raoã yeelame tɩ yẽnda saka bõn-kãensã fãa hal sẽn sɩng a yãadem wakate. 
Luke18:22 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm woto, b yeel-a lame yaa: Bũmb a ye n ket n paoog foom. Koos fo sẽn tarã fãa n pʋɩ naong rãmbã, la f na n paama paoong arzãna. La f wa tũ maam." 
Luke18:23 Yẽnda sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, a sũurã sãama hal wʋsgo, bala yẽnda ra tara arzegs wʋsgo." 
Luke18:24 A Zeezi sẽn yã [t'a sũurã sãama wʋsgã], b yeelame: Ad na n yɩɩ toog ne neb nins sẽn tar arzegsã tɩ kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ." 
Luke18:25 Bala, yʋgemd sẽn na n tũ fu-pĩim yõorẽ n loog yaa naana n yɩɩd arzɛk soab sẽn na n kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ." 
Luke18:26 Neb nins sẽn da kelgd bãmbã yeelame tɩ rẽ, ãndã n tõe n paam fãagre." 
Luke18:27 La a Zeezi leokame tɩ ninsaalbã sẽn ka tõe bũmb ningã, Wẽnnaam tõeeme." 
Luke18:28 La a Pɩyɛɛr yeelame yaa: Ade, tõnd basa d sẽn tarã n tũ yãmba." 
Luke18:29 La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta yãmba, tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n bas a yiri, a paga, a buudu, wall a kamba, Wẽnnaam soolmã yĩnga," 
Luke18:30 n ka reeg wʋsg n yɩɩd a woto zamaan‑kãngã pʋgẽ, la a paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa zamaan ning sẽn watã pʋgẽ ye." 
Luke18:31 A Zeezi peega karen-biis piig la a yiibã kɛɛng n yeel-b yaa: Ade, tõnd dabda Zeruzalɛm, la bũmb ning fãa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn da gʋls Ninsaal Bi-riblã yell wɛɛngẽ wã na n pidsame." 
Luke18:32 Bala, b na n yõka bãmb n kõ bu-zẽmsã. Bu-zẽmsã na n yaala bãmba, n gom bãmb wẽnga, n tʋbs bãmb kolkoodo." 
Luke18:33 La b na n pãba bãmb ne kalwaase, n yaool n kʋ-ba. La rasem a tãabẽ daarã, bãmb na n vʋʋgame." 
Luke18:34 La karen-biisã ka wʋm b gomdã võor baa bilf ye. Gom-kãensã rag n solga ne bãmba, la b rag n ka mi gom‑kãng sẽn dat n yɛɛlg ye." 
Luke18:35 A Zeezi sẽn kolg Zeriko, zoang a ye n da zĩ sorã kɩreng n bõsdẽ." 
Luke18:36 Yẽnda wʋma kʋʋngã sẽn loogdã rãamde, a sokame n na n bãng sẽn yaa bũmb ninga." 
Luke18:37 La b togsa yẽnda tɩ yaa Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi n dag n loogde. 
Luke18:38 La a kelmame n yeele: «Zeezi, a Davɩɩd Bi-ribla, zoe-y mam nimbãanega!»" 
Luke18:39 Neb nins sẽn dag n kẽnd taoorã lenga yẽnda n dat t'a sĩndi. La a kelmame n yɩɩd pĩnda n yeel tɩ: «Davɩɩd bi-ribla, zoe-y mam nimbãanega.»" 
Luke18:40 A Zeezi yalsame n yeel tɩ b tall-a n wa. La a sẽn kolge, a Zeezi sok-a lame:" 
Luke18:41 Bõe la fo rat tɩ m maan n kõ-fo? Yẽnda leokame tɩ: «Zu-soaba, m dat n leb n paama m ninã.»"
