Luke18:42 La a Zeezi yeela yẽnda: Leb n paam f nini. Fo tẽeb n fãag-fo. 
Luke18:43 Wakat-kãng bala, a ninã pukame t'a tũ a Zeezi la a waoogd Wẽnnaam. Nebã fãa sẽn yã rẽnda wã, b pẽga Wẽnnaam." 
Luke19:1 A Zeezi kẽe Zeriko, n pɩʋʋgd tẽngã," 
Luke19:2 la rao a ye n da be be t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Zaase, a yaa arzɛk soaba, n yaa yaood dɛɛgdbã naaba." 
Luke19:3 Yẽnda rag n baood n yãnda a Zeezi n bãng b sẽn yaa a soaba, la neb kʋʋngã yĩnga, a rag n ka tõe n yãnd-b ye, bala yẽnda yaa rao-koɛɛga." 
Luke19:4 Dẽ, yẽnda wudgame n kẽng taoor n tɩ rʋ wom-sɛɛg n na n ges a Zeezi, bala b rag n tog n tũu beenẽ n looge." 
Luke19:5 La a Zeezi sẽn ta zĩ-kãngã, bãmb nak n gesame n yeel a Zaase yaa: Zaase, sig tao-tao, bala mam tog n siga fo yirã rũndã." 
Luke19:6 A Zaase siga tao-tao n deeg a Zeezi ne sũ-noogo. 
Luke19:7 Nebã sẽn yã rẽ, bãmb fãa yẽgmame n yetẽ t'a Zeezi tɩ siga yel-wẽn-maand yiri." 
Luke19:8 La a Zaase yalsa Zu-soabã taoor n yeel-b yaa: Ade, Zu-soaba, mam na n yãka m paoongã pʋɩ-sʋk n kõ naong rãmba. La mam sã n dag n zãmba ned n deeg a bũmbu, m na n lebsa yẽnda naoor a naase." 
Luke19:9 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Fãagr waa yi-kãngã pʋg rũndã. Bala, nin-kãngã me yaa a Abrahaam yagenga." 
Luke19:10 Bala Ninsaal Bi-riblã waame n na n bao la fãag bũmb nins sẽn dag n menemã. 
Luke19:11 La nebã sẽn kelg gom-kãense, a Zeezi leb n wẽe bãmb yel-bũndi, bala, bãmb da kolga Zeruzalɛm. La nebã rag n tagsdame tɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã na n puka wakat-kãng bala." 
Luke19:12 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeelame yaa: «Na-biig a yembr n da yi n kẽng tẽng sẽn zãr n na n tɩ reeg naam la a wa." 
Luke19:13 Yẽnda boola a tʋmtʋmdb piig n kõ-b mind piig n yeel-b tɩ b yõdg n leeb n paam yõod hal tɩ yẽnda lebg n wa. 
Luke19:14 La a soolmã nebã rag n kisa yẽnda, la b tʋma neb tɩ b pʋgl-a n tɩ yeel yaa: ‹Tõnd ka rat tɩ rao-kãngã soog tõnd ye.›" 
Luke19:15 La yẽnda sẽn deeg naamã n lebg n wa, a kɩtame tɩ b bool tʋmtʋmdb nins yẽnda sẽn da kõ ligdã tɩ b wa, tɩ yẽnda bãng ned kam fãa sẽn leeb n paam yõod to-to." 
Luke19:16 Pipi soabã waa n yeelame yaa: ‹Zu-soaba yãmb minnã paama yõod min piiga.› 
Luke19:17 A yeela yẽnda yaa: ‹Be neere, tʋmtʋmd-sõngo, fo sẽn maan sɩd ne bũmb bilfã yĩnga, bɩ f soog tẽms piiga.›" 
Luke19:18 La yiib soabã waame n yeele: ‹Zu-soaba, yãmb minnã doga min a nu.›" 
Luke19:19 A yeela yẽnda yaa: ‹Fo me soog tẽms a nu.› 
Luke19:20 A to n waa n yeele: ‹Zu-soaba, ad yãmb minnã! Mam dag n vil-a-la ne peend n bĩngi," 
Luke19:21 bala, mam dag n zoeta yãmba, yãmb sẽn yaa nin-toaagã yĩnga. Yãmb dɩkda bũmb ning y sẽn ka rɩgle, la y tigsd bũmb ning yãmb sẽn ka bʋd ye.›" 
Luke19:22 Naabã yeela tʋmtʋmd‑kãng yaa: ‹Tʋmtʋmd-wẽnga, mam na n dɩka fo mengã goam n kao fo bʋʋdo. Fo rag n miime tɩ mam yaa nin-toaaga, tɩ mam dɩkda bũmb ning mam sẽn ka rɩgle, la m tigsd bũmb ning mam sẽn ka bʋd ye," 
Luke19:23 dẽ, bõe yĩng tɩ fo ka bĩng mam ligdã bãnkẽ tɩ mam sã n lebg n wa bɩ m deeg-a ne yõodo?›" 
Luke19:24 La a yeela neb nins sẽn da be be wã tɩ b reeg min a yembrã a sẽn tarã n kõ ned ning sẽn tar-a min piigã. 
Luke19:25 Bãmb yeela yẽnda yaa: ‹Zu-soaba, yẽnda tara min piiga.›" 
Luke19:26 Mam yeta yãmb tɩ b na kõo ned ning sẽn tarã, la ned ning sẽn ka tarã, b na n deega baa bũmb bilf ning yẽnda sẽn tarã." 
Luke19:27 La sẽn keta, tall-y mam bɛɛbã sẽn da ka rat tɩ mam soog-bã n wa ne ka. Kood-y-b mam nifẽ ka.»" 
Luke19:28 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto n sɛ, bãmb lʋɩɩ nebã taoor tɩ b rabd Zeruzalɛm." 
Luke19:29 La bãmb sẽn kolg Bɛtfaaze ne Betani sẽn be tãng ning sẽn boond tɩ oliiv tɩɩs tãngã sẽnẽ, a Zeezi tʋma b karen-biis a yiib," 
Luke19:30 n yeel-b yaa: Kẽng-y tẽng ning sẽn be taoorã, y sã n ta be, y na n yãnda bõn-bil b sẽn loe, tɩ ned nan ka zomb-a ye. Lok-y-yã-a, n wa ne ka." 
Luke19:31 Ned sã n sok yãmb tɩ bõe yĩng tɩ y lokd-a, bɩ y yeel-a tɩ yaa Zu-soabã n dat-a." 
Luke19:32 Neb nins b sẽn da tʋmã kẽngame n tɩ mik tɩ yaa wa a Zeezi sẽn da yeel bãmbã bala. 
Luke19:33 La bãmb sẽn lokd bõn-bilã, a soaadbã soka bãmb tɩ yaa bõe tɩ b lokd bõn-bilã." 
Luke19:34 B leokame tɩ Zu-soabã dat-a lame. 
Luke19:35 La b talla bõn-bilã n wa a Zeezi nengẽ, n paal b fut a poorã n kɩt t'a Zeezi zombe." 
Luke19:36 La bãmb sã n kẽngdẽ, nebã yɛɛta b futã sorã zugu." 
Luke19:37 Bãmb sẽn kolgd Zeruzalɛm, oliiv tɩɩs tãngã sigdg sẽnẽ, bãmb karen-bi-kʋʋngã fãa sɩngame n zẽk b koees n pẽg Wẽnnaam ne sũ-noogo, bõn-bãnã fãa bãmb sẽn yã wã yĩnga." 
Luke19:38 Nebã da yetame tɩ yaa: Wẽnd na bark rĩm ning sẽn wat ne Zu-soabã yʋʋrã! Laafɩ bee arzãna, la ziir bee hal yĩngri." 
Luke19:39 Fariizẽ-dãmbã kẽer sẽn dag n be neb kʋʋngã sʋk yeela a Zeezi tɩ b leng b karen-biisã tɩ b sĩndi. 
Luke19:40 A Zeezi leokame yaa: Mam yeta yãmb tɩ b sã n sĩndi, kugã na n kelmame!" 
Luke19:41 Bãmb sẽn kolg Zeruzalɛm, a Zeezi sẽn yã tẽngã, b yãba a yĩng n yeele:" 
Luke19:42 Fo me sã n da bãngẽ bũmb ning sẽn wat ne fo laafɩ wã rũndã! La moasã b solga ne foom. 
Luke19:43 Wakat n wat tɩ fo bɛɛba na n me bõn-yood n gilg foom. B na n gũbga foom n dɩdg-f zĩiga fãa. 
Luke19:44 B na n sarma foom ne f kambã sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã, la b kõn bas kugr baa yembr kugr a to zug fo pʋgẽ ye, fo sẽn ka bãng wakat ning fo fãagrã sẽn wa wã yĩnga." 
Luke19:45 A Zeezi kẽe wẽnd doogẽ wã n sɩng n dig koaasdbã," 
Luke19:46 n yeel-b yaa: A gʋlsame tɩ: «Mam doogã na n yɩɩ pʋʋsg roogo, la yãmba, y maan-a lame t'a lebg wagda geongo.»" 
Luke19:47 A Zeezi da zãmsda nebã daar fãa wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ. La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmba ne gʋlsdbã la tẽngã kãsem-dãmb dag n baood n na n kʋʋ bãmba. 
Luke19:48 La bãmb da ka mi b sẽn na n maan to-to ye, tɩ bõe nebã fãa rag n yong n kelgda a Zeezi." 
Luke20:1 Daar a yembre, a Zeezi sẽn zãmsd nebã wẽnd doogẽ wã la b moond koe-noogã, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã, la gʋlsdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã waame." 
Luke20:2 La b yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Togs-y tõndo: Yaa ne no-bʋg la yãmb maand bõn-kãensã, wall ãnd n kõ yãmb no-kãnga.»" 
Luke20:3 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: «Mam me na n soka yãmb sokre. 
Luke20:4 Togs-y maam: A Zã lisgã yii arzãn bɩ, bɩ yaa ninsaalb nengẽ?»" 
Luke20:5 La bãmb yẽsa ne taab n yeele: «Tõnd sã n yeel t'a yii arzãna, b na n yeelame tɩ la yaa bõe tɩ tõnd ka tẽ a Zã," 
Luke20:6 la tõnd sã n yet t'a yii ninsaalb nengẽ, nebã fãa na n loba tõnd kuga, bala nebã tẽeda hakɩɩk t'a Zã yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa.»" 
Luke20:7 Dẽ bãmb leokame tɩ b ka mi lis-kãng sẽn yi zĩig ning ye. 
Luke20:8 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Mam me ka na n togs yãmb mam sẽn paam noorã zĩig ning n maand bõn-kãensã ye.» 
Luke20:9 La a Zeezi sɩngame n wẽ nebã yel-bũn‑kãngã n yeele: Dao a ye n da sel reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgo, n dɩk-a n peng reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg koaadba, la a yi n tog sor n na n tɩ kaoose." 
Luke20:10 La bõn-bɩʋʋng sẽn ta, a tʋma tʋmtʋmd reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã nengẽ tɩ b kɩs-a reezẽ tɩɩs biis t'a wa n kõ-a. La reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã pãba yẽnda n lebs-a t'a kuil nug-zaala." 
Luke20:11 Yẽnda leb n tʋma tʋmtʋmd a to yɛsa. La koaadbã pãba yẽnda n paoog-a n lebs-a t'a kuil nug-zaala. 
Luke20:12 Yẽnda leb n tʋma tãabẽ soaba, la b pogla yẽnda n dig-a." 
Luke20:13 La reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã soab yeelame yaa: «Mam na n maana bõe? Mam na n tʋma m bi-ribl-nongrã tɩ tõeeme tɩ b waoog-a.» 
Luke20:14 La reezẽ tɩ‑koaadbã sẽn yã biigã, b yẽsa ne taab n yeele: «Yaa yõwã n na n soog a ba wã paoongã bɩ d kʋ‑a tɩ arzɛkã lebg tõnd dẽnda.»" 
Luke20:15 La b yõka yẽnda n yiis reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ wã n kʋ-a. Moasã reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã soab na n maan-b-la bõe? 
Luke20:16 A na n waame, n sãam koaadb-kãense, la a rɩk pʋʋgã n peng koaadb a taaba. La nebã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, b yeelame tɩ: Bɩ ra yɩ a woto ye." 
Luke20:17 La a Zeezi gesa bãmb n yeel yaa: Gʋlsg sõngã sẽn yeel tɩ: «Kugr ning tãn-metbã sẽn zãgsã lebga roogã pãng kugri, a soakã zĩigẽ wã» võor yaa bõe?" 
Luke20:18 Ned ning sẽn na n lʋɩ-a kug-kãngã zug na n tõtmame, la kug-kãngã sẽn na n lʋɩ ned ning zugu, a na n beds-a lame." 
Luke20:19 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã baoome tɩ yõk a Zeezi wakat-kãng bala, la bãmb zoee nebã. B rag n bãngame tɩ yaa bãmb yĩng la a Zeezi sẽn wẽ yel-bũn‑kãngã wã." 
Luke20:20 Bãmb sɩngame n gũusd a Zeezi, sẽn na yɩl n paam a Zeezi gomd n bẽd-b n yõk n tɩ kɩs pãn-soaadbã ne Gʋvɛrneerã sẽn so noorã." 
Luke20:21 Nin-kãens soka a Zeezi a woto: Karen-saamba, tõnd miime tɩ yãmb gomda tɩrlem la y zãmsd nebã ne tɩrlem, la tɩ yãmb ka tũusd neb ye. La yãmb zãmsda nebã Wẽnnaam sor wa sẽn zems sɩdã." 
Luke20:22 Tõnd tara noor tɩ yao rĩm a Sezaar yõor yaood bɩ? Bɩ d ka tare? 
Luke20:23 La a Zeezi sẽn bãng bãmb sɩlmã leok-b lame yaa: 
Luke20:24 Wilg-y maam lagfo. Maasmã ne gʋlsmã sẽn be a zugã yaa ãndã rẽnda? Tɩ b leok tɩ rĩm a Sezaare. 
Luke20:25 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Rẽ wã, kõ-y rĩm a Sezaar bũmb ning sẽn yaa rĩm a Sezaar dẽnda, la y kõ Wẽnnaam bũmb ning sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam dẽnda." 
Luke20:26 Bãmb ka tõog n yõk a Zeezi b gomd baa a yembr pʋgẽ nebã taoor ye. La a Zeezi leokrã yɛɛs-b lame tɩ b sĩndi. 
Luke20:27 Saduusẽ-dãmbã sẽn yet tɩ kũum vʋʋgr ka be wã neb kẽer kolgame n sok a Zeezi a woto: 
Luke20:28 «Karen-saamba, a Moyiis dag n gʋlsame n yeel tõnd tɩ: Ned ba-biig sã n tar pag n ki n bas-a n ka paam biiga, bɩ yẽnda peeg pagã n dog kamb a ba-biigã yĩnga.»" 
Luke20:29 La raop a yopoe n dag n be n yaa ba-biisi. La kãsma peega paga la a kiime n ka paam biig ye. 
Luke20:30 La yiib soabã reega pʋg‑kõorã, n ki n bas-a tɩ tãab soaba reeg-a." 
Luke20:31 La a yɩɩ woto ne bãmb b yopoe wã fãa, b kiime n ka paam kamb ye." 
Luke20:32 La pagã me yaool n kiime. 
Luke20:33 Kũum vʋʋgr daare, bãmb sʋkã, yẽnda na n yɩɩ ãndã soab paga? Bala yẽnda sẽn dag n zĩnd ne neb a yopoe wã fãa la?" 
Luke20:34 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Dũni‑kãnga nebã peegda pagba, tɩ pagbã kuiis sɩdba," 
Luke20:35 la neb nins b sẽn na n mik tɩ b zemsame tɩ zĩnd dũni ning sẽn watã pʋgẽ wã la tɩ vʋʋg n bas kũumã ka na n leb n peeg pagba, wala kuil sɩdb ye." 
Luke20:36 Bãmb ka tõe n leb n ki yɛs ye, bala, b na n yɩɩ wa malegse, la b na n yɩɩ Wẽnnaam kamba, bãmb sẽn vʋʋg n bas kũumã yĩnga." 
Luke20:37 Zĩig ning b sẽn gomd tuugã bugmã sẽn be a zugã yellã, a Moyiis wilgame tɩ kũum vʋʋgdame, yẽnda sẽn boond Zu-soabã t'a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã." 
Luke20:38 La Wẽnnaam ka kũum Wẽnnaam ye, b yaa nin-vɩɩs Wẽnnaam. Bala ne bãmba nebã fãa vɩɩme.»" 
Luke20:39 Gʋlsdb kẽer leokame yaa: «Karen-saamba, yãmb goma sõama.»" 
Luke20:40 La bãmb ka saag n leb n sok a Zeezi sokr a to yɛs ye. 
Luke20:41 A Zeezi sok-b lame yaa: «B tõe n yɩɩ a wãn n yeel tɩ Kiris yaa a Davɩɩd yagenga? 
Luke20:42 A Davɩɩd meng yeela yɩɩn-sõamyã sebr pʋgẽ tɩ: ‹Zu-soabã yeela mam Zu-soabã yaa: Zĩnd mam dɩtgo," 
Luke20:43 hal tɩ m kɩt tɩ f bɛɛbã yɩ fo nao roagendga.» 
Luke20:44 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd boonda bãmb tɩ Zu-soaba, woto bãmb na n yɩɩ a wãn n yaa a yagenga?› »" 
Luke20:45 La nebã fãa sẽn kelgd a Zeezi, bãmb yeela b karen-biisã yaa:" 
Luke20:46 Gũus-y y mens ne gʋlsdbã sẽn nong n gõod ne fu-wogdo, n nongẽ tɩ nebã pʋʋsd bãmb raasẽ, la b baood n zĩnd waoogr goeels zut karen-dotẽ, la rɩɩb zĩisẽ wã." 
Luke20:47 Bãmb deesda pʋg‑kõapã paoong zãnga, la b pʋʋsd pʋʋs-wogd nebã nin gesg yĩnga. Bãmb na n paama sɩbgr sẽn yaa toog n yɩɩda." 
Luke21:1 A Zeezi zẽka b neng n ges arzegsã rãmb sẽn da ningd b kũunã ligdã ningr zĩigẽ. 
Luke21:2 Bãmb yãnda pʋg‑kõor a yembr me sẽn yaa naong soab t'a ningd tãma a yiib beenẽ. 
Luke21:3 La a Zeezi yeelame yaa: Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ pʋg‑kõ-kãngã sẽn yaa naong soabã ningame n yɩɩd neb a taabã fãa. 
Luke21:4 Bala, nin-kãensã ned kam fãa tʋm n yãka a paoong a sẽn tar tɩ loogã pʋgẽ n ning ligdã ningr zĩigẽ, la pʋg‑kõorã ninga a sẽn tarã fãa, hal baa a rɩɩbã ligd zãnga." 
Luke21:5 La neb kẽer sẽn dag n gomd wẽnd doogã yell n wilgd tɩ b nags-a-la ne kug-neebã, la teedã neb sẽn tall n wa n kõ Wẽnnaamã, a Zeezi yeelame yaa:" 
Luke21:6 Day n wate, tɩ bũmb ningã yãmb sẽn ne wã, kugr baa a yembr kõn pa a to zug b sẽn kõn leeb n lub ye." 
Luke21:7 Bãmb soka a Zeezi yaa: Karen-saamba, dẽ, bõn-kãens na n waa dabʋre, la bõe bãnd n na n wilg bõn-kãens waoongo?" 
Luke21:8 A Zeezi leokame yaa: Gũus-y tɩ ned ra belg yãmb n tõog ye. Bala, neb wʋsg n na n dɩk mam yʋʋr n wa n yeel tɩ bãmb la Kirisi, la tɩ wakat kolgame. Da tũ-y-b ye." 
Luke21:9 La yãmb sã n wa wʋm tɩ b gomd zabre, la tẽn-dãmbg yelle, bɩ y ra zoe rabeem ye. Bala, bõn-kãens tog n deng n waame, la ka dũniyã saab nand ye." 
Luke21:10 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-b lame: Tẽng a yembr na n yika zabr ne tẽng a to, la rĩung a yembr na n yika ne rĩung a to." 
Luke21:11 Tẽn-digimdg kãsems na n zĩndame, la bã-longds ne kom na n zĩnda zĩig-zĩiga, la yel-kãsems sẽn kẽesd rabeem ne bõn-bãn sẽn yit yĩngr na n zĩndame." 
Luke21:12 La sẽn deng bõn-kãens fãa, b na n yõga yãmba, n nams-yã. B na n yõga yãmb n tall n kẽng karen-dotẽ, b na n kẽesa yãmb bi-bees roto, b na n tall-y lame n kẽng rĩm-dãmb ne Gʋvɛrneer dãmb taoor mam yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
Luke21:13 Na n tũu ne rẽnda tɩ yãmb kɩs bãmb mam kaseto. 
Luke21:14 Dẽ wã, ning-y y yamẽ, n da reng n tags y sẽn na n tɩ gom bũmb ning n fãag y meng ye." 
Luke21:15 Bala, mam na n ninga goam y noorẽ, la m kõ-y yam, la yãmb bɛɛbã fãa baa a yembr kõn tõog n kɩɩs wall b wẽ nokoeemd ye." 
Luke21:16 Baa yãmb ba-rãmba, la y ba-biisi, la y roagdba, la y zo-rãmb mens na n yõga yãmb n kɩse, la b na n kʋʋ yãmb neb kẽere." 
Luke21:17 Nebã fãa na n kisga yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩnga. 
Luke21:18 La yãmb zug zoobg baa a yembr kõn menem ye. 
Luke21:19 Yãmb sã n yals kãenkãe, y na n fãaga y mense." 
Luke21:20 Dẽ, yãmb sã n wa n yãnd sodaas sẽn gũbg Zeruzalɛm, bɩ y bãng t'a sãoongã kolgame." 
Luke21:21 Dẽ, bɩ neb nins sẽn na n be Zʋʋde wã zoe n dʋ tãmse, tɩ neb nins sẽn be Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgẽ wã zoe n yi, la tɩ neb nins sẽn na n be-b wetẽ da kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ ye." 
Luke21:22 Bala, ra-kãens na n yɩɩ sũ-dokr rayã, tɩ bũmb nins fãa b sẽn gʋlsã na paam pidsgu." 
Luke21:23 Pagb nins sẽn tʋtã, la sẽn yẽsemd kamb ra-kãens daarã na n paama toogo. Bala, to-kãseng n na n zĩnd soolmã pʋgẽ, la Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr na n lʋɩɩ nin-kãens zutu." 
Luke21:24 Zabr sʋʋg n na n kʋ bãmba, la b na n yõga bãmb n maan yembse, n tall n kẽng buudã fãa sʋka. La bu-zẽms na n sooga Zeruzalɛm ne pãng hal tɩ b wakatã pidi." 
Luke21:25 Bãn na n zĩnda wĩndgẽ, la kiuugẽ, la ãdsẽ, la tẽngã zugu, ko-kãsengã bʋrgã, la a ko-pɛmã na n yɛɛsa buud toay-toayã tɩ b ka mi b sẽn na n maan bũmb ning ye." 
Luke21:26 Rabeem na n kʋʋ ninsaalba, bãmb sẽn gũud bũmb ning sẽn na n wa dũni zugã yĩngã. Bala, yĩngr pãens na n digimdame." 
Luke21:27 Dẽ, b na n yãnda Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn zao sawadg n wat ne pãnga, la ne ziiri." 
Luke21:28 La bõn-kãens sã n sɩng n watẽ, bɩ y roog la y nak n gese, bala, yãmb fãagrã kolgame." 
Luke21:29 La a Zeezi wẽe bãmb yel-bũnd n yeele: «Ges-y kankanga, la tɩɩsã fãa." 
Luke21:30 Yãmb sã n yãnd b sẽn tobdã, yãmb mens miime tɩ sigr zoe n kolgame." 
Luke21:31 Woto me, yãmb me sã n wa n yãnd tɩ bõn‑kãensã maandame, bɩ y bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã kolgame." 
Luke21:32 Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ neb nins sẽn vɩ moasã wã fãa kõn ki tɩ bõn-kãensã ka pids ye." 
Luke21:33 Yĩngr la tẽng na looge, la mam goamã kõn tol n loog ye." 
Luke21:34 Gũus-y y mens tɩ rɩ-n-tɩk wall rã-tɩgre, la vɩɩmã yɛl yɩɩr da wa n zɩsg yãmb sũyã ye, la tɩ ra-kãng ra wa n ling yãmb" 
Luke21:35 wa zĩm-gãmbre, bala, ra-kãng na n waa n linga neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽn-gãongã fãa zugã." 
Luke21:36 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ y neend la y pʋʋs wakat fãa, tɩ yãmb tõe n paam pãng n põs bũmb nins fãa sẽn tog n wa wã, la y tõog n yals Ninsaal Bi-riblã taoore.»" 
Luke21:37 A Zeezi rag n zãmsda nebã wẽnd doogẽ wã wĩndga, la yʋngo, bãmb kẽnd n gãee tãng ning b sẽn boond tɩ oliiv tɩɩs tãngã zugu." 
Luke21:38 La nebã fãa kẽngda bãmb nengẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne yibeoogo, n na n tɩ kelg bãmba." 
Luke22:1 Bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigri, b sẽn boond tɩ Pakã da kolgame." 
Luke22:2 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmba ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã dag n baooda b sẽn na n maan to-to n kʋ a Zeezi. Bala, b rag n zoeta nebã." 
Luke22:3 La a Sʋtãan kẽe a Zʋdaase, b sẽn boond tɩ Iskaryo, sẽn dag n yaa neb piig la a yiibã ned a yembrã." 
Luke22:4 La a Zʋdaas kẽngame n tɩ yẽs ne maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã la ne wẽnd-doog gũudbã kãsem-dãmbã, n bao a sẽn na n tũ sor ning n yõk a Zeezi n kõ-ba." 
Luke22:5 Bãmb sũyã yɩɩ noogo, tɩ b sar tɩ bãmb na n kõo a Zʋdaas ligdi." 
Luke22:6 La yẽnda sakame, n sɩng n baood weer ning yẽnda sẽn na n yõk a Zeezi n kõ-ba, tɩ kʋʋngã ka bãng ye." 
Luke22:7 Bur sẽn ka rã-bɩllã raare, daar ning b sẽn da tog n kʋ Pakã pe-bilã taame." 
Luke22:8 La a Zeezi tʋma a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã n yeel-b yaa: Kẽng-y n tɩ segl-y Zʋɩf-rãmbã Pakã rɩɩb tõnd yĩng tɩ d rɩ-a. 
Luke22:9 Bãmb soka a Zeezi tɩ yɛɛnẽ la bãmb dat tɩ b tɩ segl Pakã. 
Luke22:10 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: Ade, yãmb sã n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ, yãmb na n sega rao sẽn tʋk koom ne yʋʋre. Tũ-y-yã-a n kẽ yir ning a sẽn na n kẽ wã." 
Luke22:11 Yeel-y yirã soab yaa: «Karen-saamb sokdame tɩ roog ning bãmb sẽn na n dɩ Pakã tigr ne b karen-biisã bee yɛ?» 
Luke22:12 La yẽnda na n wilga yãmb do-pʋg sẽn yaa yalenga, n be roog zugu, tɩ teedã fãa be be, yaa be la y na n segl Pakã." 
Luke22:13 Bãmb kẽngame, n tɩ mik tɩ bũmba fãa yaa wa a Zeezi sẽn dag n yeel bãmbã, la b segla Pakã." 
Luke22:14 Wakat sẽn ta, a Zeezi zĩnda ne tẽn-tʋmdbã n na n dɩ." 
Luke22:15 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Mam tʋlga ne m sũur fãa n dɩ Pak‑kãngã ne yãmba, sẽn deng m namsgã." 
Luke22:16 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ mam kõn leb n dɩ-a yɛsa, hal t'a pids Wẽnnaam soolem pʋgẽ." 
Luke22:17 A Zeezi rɩka bõn-yũudlã n ning bark n yeele: Deeg-y bõn-yũudl-kãngã n pʋɩ ne taaba. 
Luke22:18 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ sẽn sɩng ne moasã, mam kõn leb n yũ reezẽ tɩɩs koom yɛsa, hal tɩ Wẽnnaam soolmã wa." 
Luke22:19 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi rɩka bur n ning bark n yaool n kao-a n kõ karen-biisã n yeele: Ad‑a yaa mam yĩnga, b sẽn kõ yãmb yĩnga. [Bɩ y maand bõn-kãngã n tẽegd mam yelle." 
Luke22:20 Woto me, bãmb sẽn dɩ n sɛ, a Zeezi rɩka bõn-yũudlã n kõ-b n yeele: Bõn-yũudl‑kãngã yaa kãab‑paalgã sẽn maan ne mam zɩɩmã sẽn daag yãmb yĩngã.]" 
Luke22:21 Baoosgo, ade, ned ning sẽn zãmbd-a maamã naaga maam ka n dɩtẽ." 
Luke22:22 Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n kii wa Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk yam to-to wã. La ned ning sẽn na n zãmb-a bãmbã na n paama toogo. 
Luke22:23 La karen-biisã sɩngame n sokd taab n dat n bãng ned ning sẽn be‑a bãmb sʋkã n na n maan yel-kãngã. 
Luke22:24 Karen-biisã wẽe nokoeemd ne taab wʋsg n dat n bãng ned ning b sẽn tog n ges wa kãsem bãmb sʋkã. 
Luke22:25 A Zeezi yeel-b lame: Soolem dĩm-dãmbã soo nebã ne pãnga, la sẽn tar-b noor ne nebã kɩtdame tɩ b boond bãmb tɩ tʋʋm‑neer maandba." 
Luke22:26 La a ka a woto ne yãmb ye. Sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩd yãmb sʋka, bɩ a yɩ wa yao-zʋʋga, tɩ ned ning sẽn yaa-a taoor soab yɩ wa tʋmtʋmda." 
Luke22:27 Bala, ned ning sẽn zĩ n dɩtẽ wã la kãseng n yɩɩd bɩ, bɩ yaa ned ning sẽn kɩt-a rɩɩbã? La baoosgo, mam bee yãmb sʋk wa rɩ-kɩta." 
Luke22:28 Yãmba, yãmb yaa neb sẽn kell n modg n pa ne maam m makrã pʋgẽ." 
Luke22:29 Yaa rẽnd n kɩt tɩ mam kõt yãmb soolmã, wa m ba sẽn kõ-a maamã," 
Luke22:30 tɩ yãmb tõe n zĩnd ne maam m soolmã pʋgẽ n dɩ la y yũ, la y zaoond gɛy zut n kao Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã bʋʋdo." 
Luke22:31 Zu-soabã yeelame yaa: Sɩmo! Sɩmo a Sʋtãan kosame n na n yelg yãmb wa b sẽn yelgd koodo. 
Luke22:32 La mam pʋʋsa fo yĩnga, tɩ f tẽebã ra wa paoog ye. La fo sã n lebg n wa mam nengẽ, bɩ f paas f ba-biisã raoodo." 
Luke22:33 A Pɩyɛɛr yeelame yaa: Zu-soaba, mam seglame n sɛ tɩ kẽ bi-bees roog ne yãmba, wall tɩ ki ne yãmba." 
Luke22:34 La a Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: Pɩyɛɛre, mam yeta foom tɩ rũndã, no-raoog kõn kelem tɩ fo ka kɩɩs noor a tãab tɩ f ka mi maam ye." 
Luke22:35 A Zeezi leb n yeela b karen-biisã yaa: Mam sẽn tʋm yãmb tɩ y ka zɩ ligdi wall korgo, wall neooda wã, bũmb paooga yãmba? B leokame tɩ baa fɩ." 
Luke22:36 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: Moasã, ka leb n yaa a woto ye. Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar ligd korg rɩk-a, tɩ ned ning me sẽn tar korg rɩke. La ned ning sẽn ka tar zabr sʋʋga, bɩ a koos a fuug n da a yembre." 
Luke22:37 Bala, mam yeta yãmb tɩ bũmb ning b sẽn gʋls n yeel tɩ «b naaga bãmb ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã» tog n pidsa mam zugu. La bũmb ning sẽn gʋls n gomd mam yellã kolga pidsgu." 
Luke22:38 Karen-biisã yeela a Zeezi tɩ ad zabr sʋʋs a yiibu. La a Zeezi yeel-b lame tɩ rẽ sekame. 
Luke22:39 A Zeezi yiime n kẽng oliiv tɩɩs tãngẽ wã, wa bãmb sẽn minim n maandẽ wã. La karen-biisã tũu bãmba." 
Luke22:40 Bãmb sẽn ta zĩ-kãngã, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b pʋʋs n da wa n lʋɩ makr pʋgẽ ye." 
Luke22:41 La bãmb zãag n basa karen-biisã, sẽn zems kugr lobgre, n tɩ yĩgimd n pʋʋs" 
Luke22:42 n yeel yaa: M ba, yãmb sã n data, bɩ y zãag bõn-yũudl‑kãngã ne maam. Baoosgo, bɩ y ra maan mam sẽn datã ye, maan-y y raabo." 
Luke22:43 Dẽ, malɛɛk yii arzãn n puk a meng ne bãmb n paas bãmb pãnga." 
Luke22:44 La Sũ-sãoon-kãseng yõka a Zeezi, la bãmb pʋʋsa ne pãng n yɩɩd pĩnda, la b tʋʋlgã lebga wa zɩ-pɛla, n lasd tẽnga." 
Luke22:45 Bãmb basa b pʋʋsgã n yik n wa b karen-biisã nengẽ n mik tɩ b gõeeme, sũ-sãangã yĩnga." 
Luke22:46 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb gõe? Yik-y n pʋʋs-y n da wa n lʋɩ makr pʋgẽ ye. 
Luke22:47 Bãmb sẽn dag n nan ket n gomda, ad neb kʋʋng sẽn be taabẽ! La ned ning b sẽn boond t'a Zʋdaase, n yaa karen-biis piig la yiibã ned a yembrã dag n lʋɩɩ bãmb taoore. Yẽnda kolga a Zeezi n mok-ba." 
Luke22:48 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Zʋdaase, yaa ne mokr la fo na n yõk Ninsaal Bi-riblã n kõ la?»" 
Luke22:49 Neb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Zeezi wã yãnda bũmb ning sẽn na n maanã, la b soka a Zeezi yaa: Zu-soaba, d kɛ-b ne sʋʋse?" 
Luke22:50 Karen-biisã ned a yembr kɛɛ maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem tʋmtʋmd n fiuug a dɩtg tʋbre. 
Luke22:51 La a Zeezi gomame n yeel yaa: Bas-y-yã a woto. La a Zeezi tika raoã tʋbr n maag-a. 
Luke22:52 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi yeela maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã, ne wẽnd-doog gũudbã nanambsã la kãsem-dãmbã sẽn dag n na n yõk bãmbã yaa: Yãmb waa mam nengẽ ne sʋʋse la ne rasab wa m yaa fãada." 
Luke22:53 Mam dag n bee wẽnd doogẽ wã daar fãa ne yãmba, la y ka yõkd maam ye. La wakat-kãngã yaa yãmb rẽnda, la likã pãng wakate." 
Luke22:54 B yõka a Zeezi n tall-b n kẽng maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem yiri. A Pɩyɛɛr dag n pʋgda yɩɩg-yɩɩga. 
Luke22:55 Nebã yõgna bugum zaka sʋka, n zĩndi. La a Pɩyɛɛr zĩnda ne bãmba." 
Luke22:56 Tʋmtʋmd-poak a yembr sẽn yã a Pɩyɛɛr t'a zĩ bugmã vẽenemẽ, a ges-a-la kuii n yeele: Rao-kãngã me rag n bee ne a Zeezi." 
Luke22:57 La a Pɩyɛɛr kɩɩsame n yeele: Paga, mam ka mi a Zeezi ye." 
Luke22:58 Sẽn yɩ bilfu, ned a to yãnda a Pɩyɛɛr n yeele: Fo me yaa bãmb ned a yembre. La a Pɩyɛɛr yeela raoã yaa: Mam ka bãmb ned ye." 
Luke22:59 Sẽn zems lɛɛr a yembr rẽ zugẽ, ned a to leb n yeelame: Hakɩɩka! Rao-kãngã rag n bee ne bãmba. Bala, yẽnda yaa Galɩle neda." 
Luke22:60 A Pɩyɛɛr leokame: Hey! Mam ka mi bũmb ning fo sẽn gomd a yellã ye. Wakat-kãng bala, yẽnda sẽn ket n gomda, no-raoog kelmame." 
Luke22:61 Zu-soabã wẽnemdame n ges a Pɩyɛɛre. La a Pɩyɛɛr tẽega gomd ning bãmb sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã: Sẽn deng no-raoog sẽn na n kelem rũndã, fo na n kɩɩsa naoor a tãab tɩ f ka mi maam ye." 
Luke22:62 A Pɩyɛɛr yii yɩng n yãb ne sũ-sãang wʋsgo. 
Luke22:63 Raop nins sẽn da gũud a Zeezi wã yaala bãmba, n pãb-ba." 
Luke22:64 Bãmb da loeta a Zeezi nengã ne peend n yet-b yaa: «Bãng-bãnge, ãnd n wẽ yãmbã?»" 
Luke22:65 La bãmb tʋʋ a Zeezi ne tʋy a taab wʋsgo. 
Luke22:66 La beoogã sẽn vẽege, tẽngã nin-kẽembã sull ne maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb la tõog karen-saam-dãmbã tigma taab n kɩt tɩ b tall a Zeezi n wa bãmb kaoreng yɛl bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoore." 
Luke22:67 B yeela a Zeezi yaa: Yãmb sã n yaa Kirisã, bɩ y yeel tõndo. A Zeezi leok-b lame n yeele: Mam sã n yeel yãmba, y kõn tẽ maam ye." 
Luke22:68 La m sã n sok yãmb bũmbu, y kõn leok-m ye." 
Luke22:69 Sẽn sɩng moasã, Ninsaal Bi-riblã na n zĩnda pãng soab a Wẽnnaam rɩtgo." 
Luke22:70 Bãmb fãa sokame: Rẽnd yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam biig wɛ? La a Zeezi leok-b lame: Yaa wa yãmb sẽn yeelã: «Mam yaa woto.» 
Luke22:71 Dẽ, bãmb yeelame: Yaa bõe kaset la tõnd leb n baoodẽ? Tõnd mens wʋma bãmb noor goamã." 
Luke23:1 Bãmb fãa yikame n tall a Zeezi n kẽng a Pilat taoore. 
Luke23:2 B sɩngame n dõd a Zeezi n yeel yaa: Tõnd yãnda rao-kãngã t'a rãmbd tõnd tẽngã n yetẽ tɩ b ra yao a rĩm a Sezaar yõor yaood ye. La a yetẽ tɩ yẽnda menga yaa Kirisã, la rĩmã." 
Luke23:3 A Pilat soka a Zeezi a woto: Yãmb yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã? T'a Zeezi leok-a: Yaa wa yãmb sẽn yeelã. 
Luke23:4 A Pilat yeela maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne neb kʋʋngã yaa: «Mam ka ne yell nin-kãngã zug sẽn zems tɩ b sɩbg-a ye.» 
Luke23:5 La nebã kẽnga taoor n kell n yeel yaa: «Zãmsgã bãmb sẽn sɩng Galɩle n zãms nebã Zʋʋde fãa hal tɩ ta ka wã wata ne rãmbg nebã sʋka.» 
Luke23:6 A Pilat sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, yẽnda sokame n dat n bãng raoã sã n yaa Galɩle neda." 
Luke23:7 La a Pilat sẽn wʋm t'a Zeezi yaa a Erood soolmã neda, a tʋma bãmb a nengẽ. A Erood me rag n bee Zeruzalɛm wakat‑kãnga." 
Luke23:8 A Erood sẽn yãnd a Zeezi, a paama sũ-no-kãsenga, bala, yẽnda rag n wʋmame tɩ b gomd b yelle, la hal daar zãra, yẽnda rag n dat n yãnda a Zeezi. La a rag n tẽedame t'a Zeezi na n maana bõn-bãnd t'a yãnde." 
Luke23:9 A Erood soka bãmb bũmb wʋsgo, la a Zeezi ka leok yẽnda tɩ bũmb ye." 
Luke23:10 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã yalsa be n dõt a Zeezi ne b pãngã tɛka. 
Luke23:11 Erood ne a sodaasã paooga a Zeezi, n yaal-ba, n yeelg-b fu-neere, la a lebs-b a Pilat nengẽ." 
Luke23:12 Badaar bala, a Pilat ne a Erood sẽn dag n yaa beemã lebga zoodo." 
Luke23:13 A Pilat tigma maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã la nanambse, ne nebã" 
Luke23:14 n yeel-b yaa: Yãmb talla rao-kãngã n wa mam nengẽ n yeel t'a yaa tẽn-dãmbda. Ade, mam sok-a-la yãmb nifẽ, la mam ka yã yell nin-kãngã nengẽ sẽn zems tɩ b sɩbg-a ye, mam ka yã tʋʋm-wẽns nins yãmb sẽn dõt-a wã ba a yembr a zug ye." 
Luke23:15 A Erood me ka yã bõn-wẽng ne-a ye. Bala, bãmb lebs n tʋm-a-la tõnd nengẽ. Ade, rao-kãngã ka maan bũmb sẽn tog ne kũum ye." 
Luke23:16 Dẽ, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sɩbg-a-la m bas-a." 
Luke23:17 [Tigr fãa, rag n yaa tɩlɛ t'a Pilat yiis bi-bɛɛg a ye n bas n kõ nebã]." 
Luke23:18 Bãmb fãa naaga taab n kelem n yeel tɩ b kʋ rao-kãngã la b yiis a Barabaas n kõ-ba. 
Luke23:19 B rag n kẽesa a Barabaas bi-bees roogẽ tẽn-dãmbg sẽn dag n zĩnd tẽngã pʋgẽ wã poorẽ, la a sẽn kʋ ned yĩnga." 
Luke23:20 A Pilat leb n goma ne nebã, n dat n bas a Zeezi." 
Luke23:21 La nebã rag n kelemdame n yetẽ: Ka-y bãmb da-pɩk zugu! Ka-y bãmb da-pɩk zugu! 
Luke23:22 A Pilat leb n yeela bãmb naoor a tãab soab yaa: La bãmb maana bõe sẽn yaa wẽnga? Mam ka yã bũmb b sẽn maane, n tog kʋʋb ye. Dẽ wã mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sɩbg-ba la m bas-ba." 
Luke23:23 La nebã zẽka b koees wʋsg n kos tɩ b ka a Zeezi da-pɩk zugu. La b kelemsã tõogame t'a Pilat tũ b sẽn datã. 
Luke23:24 A Pilat kaoo bʋʋdã tɩ yɩ wa nebã sẽn kosã. 
Luke23:25 Yẽnda basa ned ningã nebã sẽn kosã, a soab b sẽn dag n kẽes bi-bees roog tẽn-dãmbgo, la nin-kʋʋr yĩngã. La a rɩk a Zeezi n kɩs-b tɩ b maan b sẽn dat ne-ba." 
Luke23:26 La bãmb sẽn tall a Zeezi n loogdẽ, bãmb yõka dao a yembr sẽn yi weoogẽ n kuiisẽ. A yʋʋr la a Sɩmo. B kɩtame t'a tʋk da-pɩkã n pʋg a Zeezi." 
Luke23:27 Neb kʋʋng wʋsgo, raop la pagb dag n pʋgda a Zeezi. La pagbã dag n yãbdame, n wiisdẽ, n pĩisd b gɛy a Zeezi yĩnga." 
Luke23:28 A Zeezi wẽnegame n yeel pagbã yaa: Zeruzalɛm pagba, da yãb-y mam yĩng ye. Yãb-y y mense, la y kamb yĩnga." 
Luke23:29 Bala, bãng-y tɩ ray n wate, tɩ b na n yeel tɩ pʋg-kiyã la sẽn ka tol n dog-bã, la sẽn ka yẽsem-b kambã n tar sũ-noogo." 
Luke23:30 La nebã na n sɩng n yeela tãmsã tɩ b sirg n zãb-ba, la b yeel kunkuba tɩ b lill bãmba." 
Luke23:31 Bala, b sã n maand ra-maas a woto, b na n maana ra-koeemsã wãn-wãna?" 
Luke23:32 B rag tara nin-wẽns a yiib n kẽnd n na tɩ lagem ne a Zeezi n kʋ. 
Luke23:33 La bãmb sẽn ta zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ zu-wangã, b kaa a Zeezi da-pɩkã zug be, ne nin-wẽns a yiibã: A yembr b rɩtgo, a to wã b goabga." 
Luke23:34 A Zeezi yeelame yaa: «M ba, kõ-y-b sugri, tɩ b ka mi bũmb ningã b sẽn maandã ye.» La bãmb maana bãnd n pʋɩ a Zeezi futã ne taaba." 
Luke23:35 Nebã rag yasa be n getẽ. La tẽngã nanambsã rag n yaanda a Zeezi n yetẽ: «B fãaga neb a taaba, bãmb sã n yaa Kirisã, Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk a soabã, bɩ b fãag b menga.»" 
Luke23:36 Sodaasã me kolgame n yaal a Zeezi, la b kõ-b reezẽ rã‑miisga," 
Luke23:37 n yeel a Zeezi yaa: «Yãmb sã n yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã, bɩ y fãag y meng y toore.»" 
Luke23:38 B rag n gʋlsa a woto bãmb zugẽ: Nin-kãngã yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã. 
Luke23:39 Nin-wẽnsã sẽn dag n be da-pɩgsã zutã ned a yembr tʋʋsa a Zeezi n yeel-b tɩ ka bãmb la Kirisã la? Tɩ b fãag b meng la b fãag bãmba. 
Luke23:40 La a to wã lenga yẽnda n yeel-a yaa: «Fo ka zoet Wẽnnaam la? Fo sɩbgrã sẽn yaa a yembr ne bãmb sɩbgrã? 
Luke23:41 Tõnd yẽ sɩbgrã zemsame. Bala, tõnd deegda sẽn zems d tʋʋmã. La nin-kãngã ka maan bũmb sẽn yaa wẽng ye.»" 
Luke23:42 La a yeela a Zeezi yaa: Yãmb sã n wa n deeg y naamã, bɩ y tẽeg mam yelle." 
Luke23:43 A Zeezi leok-a lame yaa: «Mam yeta foom sɩd-sɩd tɩ rũndã bala, fo na n zĩnda ne maam Paradi pʋga.»" 
Luke23:44 Rẽ tɩ rag n zoe n kolga wĩnto-sʋka, la zĩiga fãa lebga lik bida hal tɩ ta wẽn-kaoore." 
Luke23:45 Wĩntoogã sobgame, la fu-lilldgã sẽn be wẽnd doogẽ wã pãrga pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Luke23:46 La a Zeezi zẽka b koɛɛg n yeel yaa. M ba, m basda m sɩɩgã yãmb nugẽ. La a Zeezi sẽn gom a woto n sɛ, b kiime." 
Luke23:47 Sodaas koabg naabã sẽn yã bũmb ning sẽn maana, a waooga Wẽnnaam n yeel tɩ: Hakɩɩka rao-kãngã rag n yaa nin-tɩrga." 
Luke23:48 La neb kʋʋngã sẽn da wa n na n ges bõn-kãngã sẽn yã bũmb nins sẽn maanã, b lebgdame la b pĩisd b yãado." 
Luke23:49 Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n mi a Zeezi wã, ne pagb nins sẽn yi Galɩle n yãag bãmbã dag n yasa yɩɩg n get bũmb nins sẽn maandã." 
Luke23:50 Kaorengã yɛl-bʋ-kaood a ye n da be t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Zozɛf n yaa nin-sõngo la nin-tɩrga. 
Luke23:51 A rag n ka lagem ne bʋ-kaoodb a taabã n yãk yamã la a maan b sẽn maan bũmb ningã ye. A rag n yaa Arimate sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã tẽng neda. La a rag n gũuda Wẽnnaam soolmã waoongo. 
Luke23:52 A kẽnga a pilat nengẽ n tɩ kos a Zeezi kũumã. 
Luke23:53 Yẽnda sika kũumã, da-pɩkã zugu, n vil-a ne lẽ peend n tɩ gãneg yaoogẽ sẽn tu kugr zugu, kũum sẽn nan ka mumẽ ye." 
Luke23:54 Badaar dag n yaa seglg daare, la vʋʋsg daarã da rat n sɩngame." 
Luke23:55 La pagbã sẽn da yi Galɩle n yãag a Zeezi wã tũu a Zozɛf n wa yã yaoogã la b sẽn gãneg a Zeezi kũumã be to-to. 
Luke23:56 La b lebgame n tɩ to tɩdar zom la b maan tɩdar kaam. La bãmb vʋʋsa vʋʋsg daarã wa sẽn zems a Moyiis tõogã. Yaoog sẽn tuk pĩigẽ. 
Luke24:1 Dimaas daar yibeoog pĩnda, pagbã talla tɩdar-dambã b sẽn dag n seglã n kẽng yaoogẽ wã." 
Luke24:2 B mikame tɩ b bilga kugrã n bas yaoogã noore. 
Luke24:3 Bãmb kẽeme la b ka yã Zu-soab a Zeezi kũumã ye 
Luke24:4 Bãmb sẽn dag n ka mi b sẽn tagsd tɩ bũmb ningã, ade, raop a yiib sẽn yer fut sẽn pɩnd puka b meng ne bãmba." 
Luke24:5 Rabeem yõka bãmb tɩ b yĩgimd n sulg b nens tẽnga. La raopã yeel-b lame yaa: Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb baood nin-vɩɩg kũum sʋka? 
Luke24:6 [Bãmb ka be ka ye, b vʋʋgame.] Tẽeg-y bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dag n gom ne yãmb b sẽn da ket n be Galɩle wã." 
Luke24:7 B yeelame tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b zãmb Ninsaal Bi-riblã n yõk n kõ yel-wẽn maandbã tɩ b ka-b da-pɩk zugu, la tɩ rasem a tãab daare bãmb na n vʋʋgame." 
Luke24:8 La pagbã tẽega a Zeezi goamã. 
Luke24:9 La bãmb yii yaoogẽ wã n kẽng n tɩ togs karen-biis piig la a yembrã ne neb a taabã fãa bõn-kãens fãa. 
Luke24:10 Da yaa a Maari sẽn yit Magdala, ne a Zan la a Zak ma a Maari, n paas pagb a taab sẽn da be ne bãmbã n tɩ togs tʋmtʋmdbã bõn-kãnga." 
Luke24:11 La tʋmtʋmdbã tagsame tɩ pagbã sẽn dag n gomdã yaa zʋbsgo, la b ka tẽ-b ye." 
Luke24:12 La a Pɩyɛɛr yikame n wudg n kẽng yaoogẽ wã. Yẽnda sẽn zõonde, a ka yã bũmb tɩ sã n ka pɛɛlã sẽn dʋr tẽngã. La bũmb ning sẽn maanã yɛɛsa yẽ, la a lebg n leba a yiri." 
Luke24:13 La mikame tɩ badaare, karen-biis a yiib n da rabd tẽn-bil a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Emayuusi, n zems kɩlometr piig la a yembr ne Zeruzalɛm." 
Luke24:14 Bãmb da gomda bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã yell ne taaba. 
Luke24:15 La bãmb sẽn gomd n kɩɩsd taaba, a Zeezi meng waame n kẽn ne bãmba." 
Luke24:16 La bãmb yam ludame tɩ b ka bãng a Zeezi ye. 
Luke24:17 A Zeezi soka bãmb tɩ yaa bõe yell la b gomd ne taab la b kẽnda. La b yalsame tɩ b nensã gãnem. 
Luke24:18 La bãmb ned a yembr sẽn boond t'a Keleopaas soka a Zeezi yaa: Yãmb y yembr bal n be Zeruzalɛm n ka bãng bũmb ning sẽn maan be rasmã noorã? 
Luke24:19 A Zeezi soka bãmb tɩ yaa bõe yelle. La b leoka bãmb yaa: Yell ning sẽn paam Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi wã. Sẽn da yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs sẽn tar pãng ne b tʋʋmã la b goamã, Wẽnnaam la nebã fãa taoorã." 
Luke24:20 Tɩ tõnd maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne tõnd nanambsã sẽn yɩ to-to n yõk bãmb n kɩs tɩ b kao b bʋʋd n yeel tɩ b zemsa kũumã, n ka-b da-pɩk zugã." 
Luke24:21 Tõnd da tẽedame tɩ yaa bãmb n na n fãag Israyɛlle, la sẽn paas rẽ fãa, ad yaa rasem a tãab rũndã la bõn-kãens maan yã." 
Luke24:22 Yaa sɩd tɩ pagb kẽer sẽn be tõnd sʋk yɛɛsa tõnd wʋsgo. B kẽnga yaoogẽ wã yibeoogẽ pĩnda," 
Luke24:23 n tɩ ka yã a Zeezi kũumã ye. B waa n yeelame tɩ malegs n puk b mens ne bãmba, n yeel bãmb t'a Zeezi vɩɩme." 
Luke24:24 La neb kẽer sẽn da be ne tõndã kẽnga yaoogẽ wã n tɩ mik tɩ bũmbã fãa yaa wa pagbã sẽn dag togsã bala. La bãmb ka yãnd a Zeezi ye. 
Luke24:25 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Neb yam sẽn ka weke, yãmb ka tẽed bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn togsã tao-tao ye!" 
Luke24:26 Dẽ yĩnga, Kiris rag n ka tog n nams a woto n yaool n deeg b naamã sɩda?" 
Luke24:27 A Zeezi bilga bãmb bũmb nins sẽn be gʋls-sõamyã fãa pʋgẽ n gomd bãmb yellã, sẽn sɩng ne a Moyiis tɩ ta Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã fãa." 
Luke24:28 La b sẽn kolg tẽn-bil ning bãmb sẽn dag n dabdã, a Zeezi maana wa bãmb dat n taa taoore." 
Luke24:29 La karen-biis a yiibã pẽdga bãmb n yeel tɩ b pa ne bãmba, bala, yʋng kolgame la wĩndgã dat n kẽeme. A Zeezi kẽe n siga ne bãmba." 
Luke24:30 A Zeezi sẽn zĩ ne bãmb n na n dɩ, b rɩka burã n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam bark n kao-a n kõ bãmba." 
Luke24:31 Dẽ, karen-biisã yamã vẽnegame tɩ b bãng tɩ yaa a Zeezi, la a Zeezi menema bãmb taoor bala." 
Luke24:32 La bãmb goma ne taab n yeel yaa: Bãmb sẽn dag n gomd ne tõnd sorã zug la b bilgd tõnd gʋls-sõamyã, tõnd ka paam sũ-no-kãseng sɩda?" 
Luke24:33 La bãmb yika wakat-kãng bal n leb Zeruzalɛm n tɩ yã karen-biis piig la a yembrã ne b tũud-n-taas sẽn tigim taaba," 
Luke24:34 la b yeela bãmb tɩ hakɩɩka! Zu-soabã vʋʋgame la b vẽnega b meng ne a Sɩmo. 
Luke24:35 Bãmb me togsa bũmb ning sẽn maan bãmb sorã zugã, la bãmb sẽn bãng a Zeezi to-to b sẽn wa n kaood burã." 
Luke24:36 Bãmb sẽn dag n ket n gomd a woto, a Zeezi meng puka bãmb sʋk [n yeel-b yaa: Bɩ laafɩ zĩnd ne yãmba]." 
Luke24:37 Dabeem yõka bãmb la b yɛɛsame n tẽed tɩ b yãnda kɩɩma. 
Luke24:38 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yɛɛsdẽ, la yaa bõe tɩ y sãmbd y sũyã pʋsẽ a woto?" 
Luke24:39 Ges-y mam nusã ne m naoã. Yaa maam bala, Sɩɩs-y maam n gese. Kɩɩm ka tar nemd wall kõab wa mam sẽn tarã ye." 
Luke24:40 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto, b wilga karen-biisã b nusã la b naoã." 
Luke24:41 Karen-biisã sẽn ket n ka tẽeda, b sũ-noogã yĩnga, la sẽn yaa lingr ne bãmbã, a Zeezi sok-b lame b sã n tara rɩɩb be sẽn na rɩ." 
Luke24:42 Bãmb kõo a Zeezi zĩm-sẽedgo ne sɩɩd bilfu. 
Luke24:43 A Zeezi reeg-a lame n dɩ bãmb nifẽ. 
Luke24:44 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Yaa woto la mam sẽn da togs yãmb mam sẽn dag n ket n be ne yãmbã: Ra yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bũmb nins fãa sẽn gʋls a Moyiis tõogã pʋgẽ, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sɛb pʋsẽ, la yɩɩn-sõamyã pʋgẽ n gomd mam yellã paam pidsgu.»" 
Luke24:45 Dẽ, a Zeezi vẽnega b yamã tɩ b tõog n wʋm Wẽnnaam gʋls sõamyã võore." 
Luke24:46 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Woto, b gʋlsame n yeel tɩ Kirisã tog n namsame, la b na n vʋʋg n basa kũum rasem a tãab daare." 
Luke24:47 La tɩ sẽn sɩng ne Zeruzalɛm, b na n moona yam tekr koɛɛg buudã fãa sʋk ne bãmb yʋʋr tɩ b tõe n paam yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Luke24:48 Yãmb yaa bõn-kãng kaset-dãmba. 
Luke24:49 La ade, mam na n tʋma yãmb bũmb ningã m ba sẽn dag n kãabã. Pa-y Zeruzalɛm hal tɩ y wa pid ne pãng sẽn yit yĩngri." 
Luke24:50 La a Zeezi peega bãmb n kẽng Betani sẽnẽ, la b zẽka b nus n ning karen-biisã zut barka." 
Luke24:51 La barkã ningr wakate, a Zeezi basa karen-biisã n zẽk n kẽng arzãna." 
Luke24:52 La karen-biisã waooga a Zeezi, la b leb Zeruzalɛm ne sũ-no-kãsenga." 
Luke24:53 La bãmb bee wẽnd doogã pʋg wakat fãa n pẽgd Wẽnnaam. 
John1:1 Hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, gomdã dag n beeme, la gomdã dag n bee ne Wẽnnaam, la gomdã yaa Wẽnnaam." 
John1:2 Bãmb dag n bee ne Wẽnnaam hal sɩngr wẽndẽ. 
John1:3 B naana bũmb fãa ne bãmba, la bũmb ka be sẽn naane, tɩ ka yɩ ne bãmb ye." 
John1:4 Vɩɩm dag n bee bãmb pʋgẽ, la vɩɩmã dag n yaa vẽenem ninsaalbã yĩnga." 
John1:5 Vẽenemã yãga lik pʋgẽ, la likã ka reeg-a ye." 
John1:6 Dao a yembr la Wẽnnaam tʋm t'a wa. A yʋʋr la a Zã. 
John1:7 Dao‑kãng waame n yaa kaset kɩta, n na n kɩs vẽenemã kaseto, tɩ nebã fãa tõe n tẽ yẽnda yĩnga." 
John1:8 Dag n ka yẽnda la vẽenemã ye, la a waame n na n kɩs vẽenemã kaseto." 
John1:9 Vẽen-kãng yaa sɩd vẽenem, n wa dũni pʋgẽ n vẽnegd ned fãa." 
John1:10 Gomdã dag n bee dũni pʋgẽ. B naana dũni wã ne bãmba, la dũni ka bãng bãmb ye." 
John1:11 Bãmb waa b meng nebẽ, la b nebã ka reeg bãmb ye." 
John1:12 La neb nins fãa sẽn deeg bãmba, la neb nins sẽn tẽed bãmb yʋʋrã, b kõo bãmb noor tɩ b lebg Wẽnnaam kamba." 
John1:13 Ka kamb b sẽn dog ne zɩɩm, wall ne yĩng ratem, wall ne ninsaal datem ye, yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn doge." 
John1:14 B kɩtame tɩ gomdã rɩk yĩng n zĩnd tõnd sʋka. Tõnd gesa bãmb ziiri, Bi-ribl sẽn ka to ziir a sẽn deeg a ba nengẽ, la b pida ne bark la sɩda." 
John1:15 A Zã kɩsa bãmb kaset n yeele: Yaa soab ning mam sẽn gom a yell n yeel tɩ ned ning sẽn pʋgend maam n watẽ wã yɩɩda maam, bala, b renga maam n beẽ wã." 
John1:16 La tõnd fãa paama bãmb yalẽ wã, n deegd bãmb barkã n paasd wakat fãa." 
John1:17 Bala, b tũnuga a Moyiis n kõ tõogã, la barkã ne sɩdã tũnuga a Zeezi Kiris n wa." 
John1:18 Ned baa a yembr nan ka yã Wẽnnaam ye. Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa Bi-ribl‑yend sẽn ka to, n be ba a Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã n kɩt tɩ nebã bãng bãmba." 
John1:19 Ad kaset ning a Zã sẽn kɩs wakat ning Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn tʋm maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi rãmbã tɩ b yi Zeruzalɛm n wa n sok yẽnda wã: «Fo yaa ãnda soabã?» 
John1:20 Yẽnda vẽnegame n togsame n ka kɩɩs ye. A yeelame: «Mam ka Kirisã ye.» 
John1:21 Bãmb leb n sok-a lame dẽ wã, fo yaa ãnda? fo yaa a Eli bɩ? T'a leoke: «Mam ka a Eli ye.» La b sok-a lame: «La yaa foom la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã bɩ?» T'a leok tɩ ayo." 
John1:22 La b leb n yeelame yaa: «Foom la ãnda, tɩ tõnd tõe n tɩ leok neb nins sẽn tʋm-b tõndã! Fo mengã yetame tɩ fo yaa ãnda?»" 
John1:23 A Zã yeelame: Mam yaa soab ning sẽn kelemd we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ n yetẽ: «Rems‑y Zu-soabã sor tɩ yɩ tɩrga, wa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sẽn yeelã.»" 
John1:24 B sẽn dag n tʋm b rãmbã yaa Fariizẽ-dãmbã. 
John1:25 B sok-a lame yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo lisd nebã, fo sã n ka Kiris bɩ a Eli bɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã?»" 
John1:26 A Zã leokame n yeele: «Maam, mam lisda yãmb koomẽ. La yãmb sʋkã, ned a yembr n be beenẽ yãmb sẽn ka mi ye." 
John1:27 Soab‑kãng pʋgenda maam, la mam ka zems tɩ lood bãmb neooda loets ye.»" 
John1:28 Gom-kãens goma Betani, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, zĩig ning a Zã sẽn dag n lisd nebã." 
John1:29 Vẽkembeoogo, a Zã yãnda a Zeezi sẽn wat yẽnda nengẽ, n yeele: «Ad Wẽnnaam pe-bilã, sẽn yiisd-a dũni yel-wẽnã.»" 
John1:30 Yaa bãmb yell la mam dag n gom ne yãmb n yeel tɩ dao n pʋgend maam, la b yɩɩda maam, bala, b renga maam n beẽ wã." 
John1:31 La mam dag n ka mi bãmb ye, la mam waa n lisda nebã koomẽ tɩ bãmb tõe n vẽneg b meng ne Israyɛll nebã." 
John1:32 A Zã leb n kɩsa kaset n yeele: «Mam yãnda Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yi arzãn n sig wa wall n pa bãmb zugu.» 
John1:33 La mam dag n ka mi bãmb ye. La sẽn tʋm-a maam tɩ m wa n lis nebã koomẽ wã yeela maam yaa: «Fo sẽn na n yãnd ned ning tɩ Sɩɩg-sõng sig n pa a soab zugã, bɩ f bãng tɩ yaa yẽnda n lisd nebã Sɩɩg-sõng pʋgẽ.»" 
John1:34 Maam, mam yãame, la mam kɩsa kaset tɩ yaa bãmb la Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã." 
John1:35 Vẽkembeoogo, a Zã rag n leb n bee be ne a karen-biis a yiibu." 
John1:36 A dag n geta a Zeezi sẽn loogd n yeele: «Ad Wẽnnaam pe-bilã.» 
John1:37 Karen-biis a yiibã wʋma gom-kãense, la b pʋgla a Zeezi." 
John1:38 A Zeezi wẽnegame n mik tɩ b pʋgda bãmba, la b sok-b lame: «Yãmb baooda bõe?» B leoka a Zeezi n yeele: «Rabbi, sẽn dat n yeel tɩ karen-saamba, yãmb yir yaa yɛ?»" 
John1:39 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Wa-y tɩ y na yã.» B kẽngame n tɩ yã zĩig ning a Zeezi sẽn be wã, la b paa ne bãmb da-kãnga. Dag n yaa zaabr wakat a naas sẽnẽ." 
John1:40 Neb a yiibã sẽn wʋm a Zã goam n pʋgl a Zeezi wã, a yembr bãmb sʋk la a Ãndere, a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr ba-biiga." 
John1:41 A Ãndere reng n yãnda a meng ba-biig a Sɩmo n yeel-a: «Tõnd yãnda Mesi wã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Kirisã.›»" 
John1:42 Yẽnda talla a Sɩmo n wa a Zeezi nengẽ. A Zeezi ges-a lame n yeele: Foom la a Sɩmo, a Zonaas bi-ribla. B na n boonda foom t'a Sefaase, sẽn dat n yeel tɩ Pɩyɛɛr (wall kugri)." 
John1:43 Vẽkembeoogo, a Zeezi yãka yam n na n kẽng Galɩle. Bãmb yãnda a Filip n yeel-a t'a tũ bãmba." 
John1:44 A Filip dag n yaa Betsayɩda sẽn yaa a Ãndere ne a Pɩyɛɛr tẽngã neda. 
John1:45 A Filip yãnda a Natanayɛll n yeel-a yaa: «Dao ning a Moyiis tõogã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn gom a yellã, tõnd yãnd-a lame. Yaa Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi, a Zozɛf bi-riblã.»" 
John1:46 A Natanayɛll soka yẽnda yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, bõn-sõng tõe n yii Nazarɛt sɩda?» A Filip yeel-a lame: «Wa n gese.»" 
John1:47 A Zeezi sẽn yãnda a Natanayɛll t'a wat bãmb nengẽ wã, b goma a yell n yeele: «Ad Israyɛll ned sɩd-sɩda, zãmb sẽn ka be a pʋgẽ ye.»" 
John1:48 A Natanayɛll soka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb bãnga maam yɛɛnẽ?» A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Sẽn deng a Filip sẽn na n bool foomã, fo sẽn dag n be kankangã tẽngrã, mam yãnda foom.»" 
John1:49 Dẽ, a Natanayɛll yeelame yaa: «Karen-saamba, yãmb la Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã! Yãmb la Israyɛll Rĩmã!»" 
John1:50 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Mam sẽn yeel tɩ mam yãnda foom kankangã tẽngrã yĩnga, fo tẽedame. La fo na n yãnda bõn-kãsems sẽn yɩɩd a woto." 
John1:51 Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb na n yãnda arzãn sẽn pake, la Wẽnnaam malegs sẽn dʋʋd la b sigd ninsaal Bi-riblã zugẽ.»" 
John2:1 Dasem a tãab rẽnda zugẽ, yi-kãadem n zĩnd Galɩle Kana. A Zeezi ma rag n bee be." 
John2:2 La b boola a Zeezi me ne b karen-biisã tɩ b wa yi-kãadmã. 
John2:3 La reezẽ rãamã sẽn paooge, a Zeezi ma wã yeela lame: «Nebã ka leb n tar reezẽ rãam ye.»" 
John2:4 A Zeezi leoka lame: «Paga, bõe n be maam ne fo sʋka? Mam wakatã nan ka ta ye.»" 
John2:5 Bãmb ma wã yeela tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b maan bũmb ning fãa a Zeezi sẽn na n yeel-b tɩ b maane. 
John2:6 Sĩms a yoob sẽn pees ne kug n dag n be be, tɩ b ningd koom tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã tar n yɩlgd‑b mens wa sẽn zems bãmb miningu, la a yembr fãa tõe n deega ko-yʋy a naas bɩ a nu koom." 
John2:7 A Zeezi yeel-b lame tɩ b pids sĩmsã ne koom, la b pids-b la pal-pale." 
John2:8 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: «Toog‑y moasã n tɩ kõ ned ning sẽn get-a rɩɩbã pʋɩɩb yellã.» La b tallame n tɩ kɩs-a. 
John2:9 Sẽn get-a rɩɩbã pʋɩɩb yellã fʋrga koomã sẽn tedg n lebg reezẽ rãamã. Yẽnda rag n ka mi reezẽ‑rã‑kãng sẽn yitẽ ye, la tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn wi-b koomã rag n miime." 
John2:10 A boola pʋg-paalã sɩd n yeel-a: «Ned fãa rengd n kõo nebã reezẽ rã‑sõngã, tɩ nebã nens sã n wa n yuusdẽ, bɩ a yaool n kõ-b reezẽ rãam ning sẽn ka-a sõama zãngã. La foom, fo bĩnga reezẽ rã‑sõngã hal tɩ ta moasã.»" 
John2:11 Bõn-bãnã a Zeezi sẽn maanã sɩnga a woto Galɩle Kana. Bãmb wilga b ziiri, la bãmb karen-biisã tẽe bãmba." 
John2:12 Rẽ poore, bãmb kẽnga Kapɛrnaom ne b ma wã, la b ma-bi-raopã, ne b karen-biisã, tɩ b tɩ zĩnd be rasem bilf bala." 
John2:13 Zʋɩf-rãmbã Pakã tigr dag n kolgame, la a Zeezi kẽnga Zeruzalɛm." 
John2:14 Bãmb tɩ yãame tɩ neb n dag n zĩ wẽnd doogã zakẽ n koosd niigi, piisi, la manwalla." 
John2:15 A Zeezi rɩka wĩy n kal n maan kaase, n dig bãmb fãa tɩ b yi wẽnd doogã zakẽ, la b riga piisã ne niigã, la b sãeeg ligd tɛkdbã ligdi, la b leeb taabl-dãmbã," 
John2:16 la b yeel man-wal koaasdbã yaa: «Yiis-y yõwã kaanẽ. Da rɩk-y mam ba wã roog tɩ yɩ leebg zĩig ye.» 
John2:17 Bãmb karen-biisã tẽegame t'a gʋlsame: «Yãmb roogã nonglem na n sooga maam zãnga.» 
John2:18 Zʋɩf-rãmbã goma ne a Zeezi n yeele: «Bõe bãnd la yãmb na n wilg tõndo, n wilg tɩ yãmb tara noor tɩ maan bõn-kãnga?»" 
John2:19 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Sãam-y wẽnd do-kãngã, la rasem a tãab pʋgẽ, mam na lebs-a n me.»" 
John2:20 Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeela bãmb yaa: Yaa yʋʋm pis-naas la a yoob pʋgẽ la b rɩk n tõog n me wẽnd do-kãngã n sa, tɩ fo na n wa n lebs-a n me rasem a tãab pʋgẽ?" 
John2:21 La a Zeezi dag n gomda b yĩngã sẽn yaa wẽnd doogã yelle. 
John2:22 Bãmb sẽn wa n vʋʋg n bas kũumã, b karen-biisã tẽegame t'a Zeezi dag n yeela a woto, la b tẽe Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã ne gomd ning a Zeezi sẽn dag n gomã." 
John2:23 Bãmb sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛm Pakã tigrã wakatã, neb wʋsg tẽe bãmb yʋʋrã, b sẽn yã bãnã bãmb sẽn dag n maandã yĩnga," 
John2:24 la sã n yaa ne a Zeezi, bãmb ka bas yard ne-b ye. Bala, bãmb dag n mi-b-la fãa," 
John2:25 la bãmb dag n ka baood tɩ ned kɩs a to kaset ye, bala, bãmb mengã mii bũmb ning sẽn be ninsaal pʋgẽ." 
John3:1 Rao a yembr n dag n be Fariizẽ-dãmbã sʋka, n ya Zʋɩf-rãmbã naaba, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Nikodɛm." 
John3:2 Yẽnda waa a Zeezi nengẽ ne yʋng n yeel-b yaa: Karen-saamba, tõnd miime tɩ yãmb yaa karen-saamb Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋme. Bala, ned ka tõe n maan bõn-bãn nins yãmb sẽn maandã, tɩ sã n ka Wẽnnaam n be ne-a ye." 
John3:3 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Mam yeta foom sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned sã n ka leb n dog yɛsa, a ka tõe n yãnd Wẽnnaam soolmã ye.»" 
John3:4 A Nikodɛm yeela bãmba: «Ned sẽn kʋʋl na n yɩɩ a wãn n leb n doge? A tõe n leb n kẽe a ma pʋgẽ yɛs n dog sɩda?» 
John3:5 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Mam yeta foom sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned sã n ka rog ne koom la ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, a ka tõe n kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ wã ye." 
John3:6 Bũmb ning yĩng sẽn dog yaa yĩnga, la bũmb ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn dog yaa sɩɩga." 
John3:7 Da sak tɩ mam sẽn yeel tɩ fo tog n leb n dogame wã yɛɛs foom ye. 
John3:8 Sobg fugd n teesd a sẽn datẽ. Fo wʋmda a rãamdã, la fo ka mi a sẽn yitẽ, la a sẽn dabdẽ me ye. Yaa woto me ne ned ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn doge.»" 
John3:9 A Nikodɛm leb n gomame n yeele: «Bõn-kãng tõe n maana wãn n yɩ?» 
John3:10 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda: «Fo yaa Israyɛll karen-saam-kãsenga, n yaool n ka mi rẽnda?" 
John3:11 Mam yeta foom sɩd-sɩda, tɩ tõnd yeta d sẽn mi, la tõnd kɩta bũmb nins d sẽn yã wã kaseto, la yãmb ka tẽ tõnd kasetã ye." 
John3:12 Mam sã n gom ne yãmb dũni bũmb yɛl tɩ yãmb ka tẽeda, yãmb na n yɩɩ a wãn n tẽ, mam sã n gom ne yãmb saasẽ yɛl yelle?" 
John3:13 Ned baa a yembr ka rʋ saasẽ ye, sã n ka sẽn yi-a arzãn n wa wã: ‹yaa Ninsaal Bi-riblã.›" 
John3:14 A wa a Moyiis sẽn zẽk zũud waafã we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ woto me yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b zẽk Ninsaal Bi-riblã," 
John3:15 tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed‑b bãmb na paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. 
John3:16 Bala, Wẽnnaam nonga dũniyã wʋsgo, hal tɩ b kõ b Bi-ribl yendã, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na tẽ bãmb kõn sãam ye, la a na paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa." 
John3:17 Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam ka tʋm b Bi-riblã dũniyã zug tɩ b kao ninsaalbã bʋʋd ye, la yaa tɩ nebã na paam fãagr bãmb maasem yĩnga." 
John3:18 B ka na n kao ned ning sẽn tẽedã bʋʋd ye. La ned ning sẽn ka tẽedã, buud zoe kaoome, a sẽn ka tẽ Wẽnnaam Bi-ribl yendã yʋʋr yĩngã." 
John3:19 Bũmb ning sẽn wat ne bʋʋdã la a woto: vẽenem waa dũniyã zugu, la ninsaalbã nonga likã n yɩɩd vẽenemã, b tʋʋmã sẽn yaa wẽnsã yĩnga." 
John3:20 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn maand wẽng kisa vẽenem, n ka wat vẽenemẽ ye, t'a tʋʋm-wẽnsã na n wa puki." 
John3:21 La ned ning sẽn maand sɩd wata vẽenemẽ, tɩ nebã tõe n bãng t'a tʋʋmã tʋmda Wẽnnaam sakr pʋgẽ.»" 
John3:22 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi kẽnga Zʋʋde soolmẽ ne b karen-biisã, n pa be rasem bilf ne bãmba, la b lisd nebã." 
John3:23 A Zã me dag n bee Eno, zĩig sẽn pẽ ne Salim n lisd nebã, bala, koom dag n bee be wʋsgo. Nebã dag n kẽnda be t'a lisd-ba." 
John3:24 Bala, b dag nan ka sui a Zã bi-bees roogẽ ye." 
John3:25 La a Zã karen-biis kẽer wẽe no-koeemd ne Zʋɩf a yembre, yɩlg-m-mengã poorẽ." 
John3:26 Dẽ, bãmb kẽnga a Zã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a: «Karen-saamba, ned ning sẽn dag n be ne yãmb Zʋrdẽ rʋʋndã, tɩ yãmb kɩs a kasetã, ad a lisda nebã, la nebã fãa dabda a nengẽ.»" 
John3:27 A Zã leokame n yeele: «Ninsaal ka tõe n deeg bũmb baa fʋɩ, tɩ sã n ka sẽn yi arzãnã n kõ-a ye." 
John3:28 Yãmb mens yaa kaset dãmb tɩ mam yeelame tɩ mam ka Kirisã ye, la tɩ yaa bãmb n tʋm maam tɩ m deng b taoore." 
John3:29 Yaa pag sɩd n so-a. La pʋg-sɩdã zoa bee ne-a n kelgd-a, la a sã n wʋm pʋg-sɩdã koɛɛga, a sũur yaa noogo. Sũ-no-kãng sẽn yaa mam dẽndã pida zãnga." 
John3:30 Yaa tɩlay tɩ Bãmb tʋʋmdã lebgd kãseng n paasdẽ, tɩ mam dẽndã tar boogre.»" 
John3:31 Sẽn yi-a yĩngr n wa wã yɩɩda nebã fãa. Sẽn yaa-a tẽng zug ka ned yaa tẽng bũmbu, la a gomda tẽng bũmb yɛla. Sẽn yi-a arzãnã yɩɩda nebã fãa." 
John3:32 Bãmb togsda bũmb nins b sẽn yã la b wʋme, la ned baa a yembr ka tẽed bãmb kasetã ye." 
John3:33 Ned sã n deeg bãmb kasetã, a soabã wilgdame tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa sɩd soaba." 
John3:34 Soab ning Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋmã togsda Wẽnnaam goamã, bala, Wẽnnaam kõta a soab bãmb Sɩɩgã tɩ seke." 
John3:35 Ba wã nonga Bi-riblã, n dɩk bũmba fãa n ning a nugẽ." 
John3:36 Ned ning sẽn tẽed-a Bi-riblã tara vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. La ned ning sẽn kɩɩsd-a Bi-riblã kõn paam vɩ-kãng ye, la Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã na n ta-a lame." 
John4:1 Zu-soabã bãngame tɩ Fariizẽ-dãmbã wʋmame tɩ bãmb paama karen-biis n yɩɩd a Zã, la b lisd-ba." 
John4:2 Baoosgo, a Zeezi dag n ka lisd nebã b toor ye, dag n yaa b karen-biisã." 
John4:3 Dẽ, bãmb yii Zʋʋde n na n kẽng Galɩle." 
John4:4 Yaool n dag n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bãmb pɩʋʋg Samaari soolem. 
John4:5 Dẽ, bãmb taa Samaari tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Sɩkaare, pʋʋg ning a Zakoob sẽn dag n kõ a bi-ribl a Zozɛfã sɛɛgẽ." 
John4:6 A Zakoob bulgã dag n bee be. Kẽndã yaams yĩnga, a Zeezi zĩnda bulgã noore. Dẽ tɩ yaa wĩnto-sʋk sẽnẽ." 
John4:7 Samaari pag a yembr n wa n na n yãk koom. A Zeezi yeela lame «Kõ-m koom tɩ b yũ wɛ.» 
John4:8 Bala, bãmb karen-biisã dag n kẽnga tẽngã pʋgẽ n na n tɩ ra rɩɩbo." 
John4:9 Samaari pagã yeela bãmb yaa: «Yɩta a wãn tɩ yãmb sẽn yaa Zʋɩfã kot maam a Samaari nin‑paga koom n na n yũ?» (Sɩd me, Zʋɩf-rãmbã rag n ka baood n na n paam lagem-n-taar ne Samaari rãmbã ye.)" 
John4:10 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: «Fo sã n dag n miẽ Wẽnnaam kũunã, la f mi ned ning sẽn kot-a foom koomã n na n yũ wã, yaa foom n dag n na n kos-a, la a rag n na n kõo foom ko-bundga.»" 
John4:11 La pagã yeela bãmb yaa: «M kẽem sõngo, yãmb ka tar baa fɩ n na n toog koomã bulgẽ wã ye, tɩ bulgã yaool n zulmẽ. Dẽ, yãmb na n yãnda ko-bund-kãng yɛɛnẽ?»" 
John4:12 Yãmb yɩɩda tõnd yaab a Zakoob sẽn kõ-a tõnd bul‑kãngã wã la? Bãmb meng yũu a koom, tɩ b kom-dibli ne b rũm-bãgã me yũ." 
John4:13 A Zeezi leok-a lame n yeele: Ned ning fãa sẽn yũud ko-kãngã, ko-yũud na n leb n yõka." 
John4:14 La ned ning fãa sẽn na n yũ koom ning mam sẽn na n kõ-a wã ye, ko-yũud kõn leb n yõka ye: la koom ning mam sẽn na n kõ-a wã na n lebga ko-bundg sẽn na n buli, hal tɩ ta vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã pʋgẽ." 
John4:15 Pagã yeela bãmba: «M kẽem sõngo, kõ-y maam ko-kãnga, tɩ ko-yũud da leb n yõk maam, tɩ m leb n wat ka n yãkd koomã ye.»" 
John4:16 A Zeezi yeel-a lame: «kẽng n tɩ bool f sɩdã, la f lebg n wa ka.»" 
John4:17 Pagã leokame: «Mam ka tar sɩd ye.» A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Fo maana neere, fo sẽn yeel tɩ f ka tar sɩdã." 
John4:18 Bala, fo talla sɩdb a nu, la fo sẽn tar a soab moasã wã ka fo sɩd ye. Fo togsa sɩd yellã pʋgẽ.»" 
John4:19 Pagã yeela bãmb yaa: «M kẽem sõngo, mam neeme tɩ yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa." 
John4:20 Tõnd ba-rãmbã dag n pʋʋsda tãn-kãngã zugu. La yãmb Zʋɩf-rãmbã yetame tɩ zĩig ning b sẽn tog n pʋʋsã yaa Zeruzalɛm.» 
John4:21 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Paga, tẽ mam goamã! Wakat n wat tɩ ka tãn-kãngã zug wall Zeruzalɛm la yãmb na n pʋʋs y ba wã ye." 
John4:22 Yãmb pʋʋsda y sẽn ka mi. Tõnd pʋʋsda d sẽn mi, bala, fãagrã yita Zʋɩf-rãmbã nengẽ." 
John4:23 La wakat watame, la yaa moasã, tɩ tõnd ba wã waoogdb sɩd-sɩdã na n waoog bãmb ne b sɩɩse la ne sɩda. Bala, yaa waoogdb a woto buud la tõnd ba wã baooda." 
John4:24 Wẽnnaam yaa Sɩɩga, la yaa tɩlɛ tɩ neb nins sẽn pʋʋsd bãmbã na pʋʋs ne b sɩɩse, la ne sɩda.»" 
John4:25 Pagã yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam miime tɩ Mesi wã, soab ning b sẽn boond tɩ Kirisã na n waame. B sã n wa, b na n wilga tõnd bũmba fãa.»" 
John4:26 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda: «Maam, soab ning sẽn gomd ne foomã, yaa maam la bãmba.»" 
John4:27 Dẽ, bãmb karen-biisã lebg n waa wakat-kãnga, la a yɛɛsa bãmb tɩ yã a Zeezi sẽn gomd ne pag, la bãmb ned baa a yembr ka sok bãmb b sẽn kot pagã bũmb ninga, wall b sẽn gomd ne-a bũmb ning yell ye." 
John4:28 Dẽ, pagã basa a yʋʋrã be, n kẽng tẽngã pʋgẽ n tɩ yeel nebã yaa:" 
John4:29 Wa-y n ges-y rao sẽn togs maam bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn maanã! Dẽ yĩnga, ka na n yɩ Kirisã?" 
John4:30 Nebã yii tẽngã n kẽng a Zeezi nengẽ. 
John4:31 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeezi karen-biisã dag n bõosda bãmb n yetẽ tɩ: «Karen-saamba, dɩ-y-yã.»" 
John4:32 La a Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: «Mam tara rɩɩb yãmb sẽn ka mi, n na n dɩ.»" 
John4:33 Dẽ, karen-biisã goma ne taab n yeel tɩ daar ninga ned n tall rɩɩb n wa n kõ-ba." 
John4:34 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam rɩɩbã, yaa tɩ maan sẽn tʋm-a maamã raabo, la m baas tʋʋmd ning b sẽn kõ maam tɩ m maanã." 
John4:35 Yãmb ka mi n yetẽ tɩ keta kiis a naas tɩ tigsg wakat ta wɛ? Ade, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y zẽk y nens n ges pʋtã sẽn pelg n dat tigsgã." 
John4:36 Sẽn tigsd-a wã zoe n deegda a tʋʋm yaoodo, la a tigsda koodã wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga. Woto, sẽn bʋt-a wã ne sẽn tigsd-a wã naagda taab n kɩdme." 
John4:37 Yel-bũnd ning sẽn yet tɩ ned a yembr n bʋt tɩ ned a to tigsã, yaa sɩda." 
John4:38 Mam tʋma yãmb tɩ y tɩ n tigs pʋʋg yãmb sẽn ka tʋmẽ ye. Neb a taab n tʋme, tɩ yãmb wa n kẽ n dɩt a yõodo." 
John4:39 Samaari tẽn-kãng neb wʋsg tẽe a Zeezi, pagã kaset yĩnga, a sẽn yeel t'a Zeezi togsa yẽnda bũmb nins fãa yẽ sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
John4:40 La Samaari nebã sẽn yã a Zeezi, b kos-b lame tɩ b pa ne bãmba. La a Zeezi paa be rasem a yiibu." 
John4:41 Neb nins sẽn tẽ a Zeezi b goamã yĩngã sõor n yɩɩda, la b yeela pagã yaa:" 
John4:42 «Ka leb n yaa fo goamã yĩng la tõnd sẽn tẽed a Zeezi wã ye. Bala, tõnd mensã wʋma b goamã, la tõnd miime tɩ sɩd yaa bãmb la dũni fãagdã.»" 
John4:43 Dasem a yiib-kãens zugẽ, a Zeezi yii be n na n kẽng Galɩle," 
John4:44 bala, bãmb mengã dag n kɩsa kaset tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ka paamd waoogr a meng ba-yirẽ ye." 
John4:45 Bãmb sẽn ta Galɩle, Galɩle nebã reega bãmba, b sẽn dag n yãnd bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn maan Zeruzalɛm, tigrã wakatã yĩngã. Bala, bãmb me dag n kẽnga tigrã." 
John4:46 Dẽ, a Zeezi leba Galɩle Kana, tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n tek koom tɩ lebg reezẽ rãamã. Rĩma tʋmtʋmd-kãseng a yembr n dag n be Kapɛrnaom, t'a bi-ribl ka keem ye." 
John4:47 A wʋmame t'a Zeezi yii Zʋʋde n wa Galɩle, la a kẽnga bãmb nengẽ n tɩ bõos-b tɩ b wa n maag a biigã sẽn dag n kolg kũum." 
John4:48 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: Yãmb sã n ka yãt bõn-bãn la bõn-yɛɛsdse, yãmb ka na n tol n tẽ ye." 
John4:49 Rĩmã tʋmtʋmd-kãsengã yeela bãmb yaa: «Zu‑soaba, wa‑y tao-tao tɩ m biigã ra wa ki ye.»" 
John4:50 A Zeezi yeel-a lame: «Kẽng tɩ f biigã vɩɩme.» Dao wã tẽe gomd ning a Zeezi sẽn yeelã, la a loogame." 
John4:51 A sẽn be sorẽ n kuiisẽ, a tʋmtʋmdbã seg-a lame n yeel-a: «Yãmb biigã vɩɩme.»" 
John4:52 Tʋmtʋmd-kãsengã soka bãmb n na n bãng wakat ning biigã sẽn sɩng n sãoogã. La b yeel-a lame tɩ yaa zaamẽ wĩnto-sʋk sẽn loog lɛɛr a yembr la a yĩn-wɩngrã sig yã. 
John4:53 Biigã ba bãngame tɩ yaa wakat-kãng bal la a Zeezi yeel yẽnda t'a bi-riblã vɩɩme wã. La yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb fãa tẽe a Zeezi. 
John4:54 A Zeezi leb n maana bõn-bãn‑kãnga, a yiib soaba, b sẽn yi Zʋʋde n wa Galɩle wã poorẽ." 
John5:1 Dẽ poore, Zʋɩf-rãmbã tigr n zĩndi, la a Zeezi kẽnga Zeruzalɛm." 
John5:2 Bãk a ye n dag n be Zeruzalɛm, piisã dignoor sɛɛgẽ, tɩ b boond ne Ebre goam tɩ Betɛsda, la zãn a nu n dag n be be." 
John5:3 Bãad-dãmb wʋsg n dag n gãe zãnã tẽngre: zoense, wobse, ki-boaga. [B dag n bee be n gũud koomã rãmbgo." 
John5:4 Bala, malɛɛk n sigd bãkã pʋgẽ wakat wakat n dãmbd koomã. La koomã sã n dãmb n sa, ned ning sẽn yɩ-a pipi n lʋɩ koomẽ wã paamda maagre, baa bãagã sẽn yaa bũmb ninga.]" 
John5:5 Dao a yembr n dag n be beenẽ n ka keemẽ, la a bãagã taa yʋʋm pis-tã la a nii." 
John5:6 A Zeezi yãnda a sẽn gãe, la b sẽn mi t'a bee be hal daar zãrã, b sok-a lame yaa: «Fo rat n paama laafɩ bɩ?»" 
John5:7 Bãadã leoka bãmb yaa: «Zu‑soaba, mam ka tar ned sẽn na n kẽes maam bãkẽ wã koomã lengr wakat ye. La mam sã n dabd be, ned n dengd maam n lʋɩ be.»" 
John5:8 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Yik n dɩk f gãagã n kẽne.» 
John5:9 Wakat-kãng bala, dao wã paama laafɩ. A rɩka a gãag n sɩng kẽna." 
John5:10 Badaar dag n yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daare. Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeela rao ning sẽn paam-a maagrã yaa: «Yaa vʋʋsg daare, fo ka tar noor tɩ tʋk f gãagã ye.»" 
John5:11 La a leoka bãmba: «Ned ning sẽn kõ-a maam laafɩ wã yeela maam tɩ m rɩk m gãagã n kẽne.» 
John5:12 Zʋɩf-rãmbã soka dao wã tɩ yaa ãnda soab n yeel foom tɩ f rɩk f gãagã n kẽna?» 
John5:13 La rao ning sẽn paam-a maagrã dag n ka mi sẽn yaa ned ning ye. Bala, a Zeezi dag n kẽe nebã sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã sʋk n meneme." 
John5:14 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi yãnda raoã wẽnd doogẽ wã n yeel-a: Gese, fo paama laafɩ. Da leb n maan yel-wẽn ye, tɩ yell sẽn yɩɩd a woto da wa n paam foom ye." 
John5:15 Raoã kẽngame n tɩ yeel Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ yaa a Zeezi la sẽn maag yẽnda wã. 
John5:16 Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã rag n namsd a Zeezi, b sẽn maand bõn-kãng vʋʋsg daarã yĩngã." 
John5:17 La a Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: M ba tʋmda hal tɩ ta moasã. Mam me tʋmdame. 
John5:18 Gom-kãng yĩnga, Zʋɩf-rãmbã rag n baooda a Zeezi n yɩɩd pĩnd n dat n kʋ. Ka b sẽn kɩɩs bãmb vʋʋsg daar tõogã yĩng bal ye, la yaa b sẽn boond Wẽnnaam tɩ b meng ba, n wilgd tɩ bãmb ne Wẽnnaam yaa yembrã yĩnga." 
John5:19 Dẽ, a Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ Bi-riblã ka tõe n maan baa fɩ a toor ye, yaa bũmb nins a ba sẽn maand t'a yãtẽ wã bal la a maanda. Bũmb nins fãa ba wã sẽn maanda, Bi-riblã me maanda rẽ me." 
John5:20 Bala, ba wã nonga Bi-riblã, n wilgd-a bũmb nins fãa b sẽn maandã, la b na n leb n wilg-a-la tʋʋm sẽn yaa kãsems n yɩɩd a woto, tɩ yãmb yɛɛse." 
John5:21 Sɩd me, a wa ba wã sẽn vʋʋgd kũum, n kɩtdẽ tɩ b leb n vɩ wã, woto me, Bi-riblã kɩtdame tɩ bãmb sẽn dat t'a soab vɩɩmdã vɩɩmde." 
John5:22 Sẽn paase, ba wã ka kaood ned baa a yembr bʋʋd ye, b basa bʋʋdã fãa ne Bi-riblã," 
John5:23 tɩ nebã fãa na waoog-a wa b sẽn waoogd ba wã. Ned ning sẽn ka waoogd Bi-riblã ka waoogd ned ning sẽn tʋm-a wã me ye. 
John5:24 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn kelgd mam goamã, la a tẽed sẽn tʋm-a maamã a tara vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. B ka na n sɩbg-a ye. A yii kũumẽ n kẽ vɩɩmẽ." 
John5:25 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ wakat watame, la yaa moasã bala, tɩ sẽn ki-bã na n wʋm Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã koɛɛga. La neb nins sẽn wʋm-bã na n vɩɩmdame." 
John5:26 Sɩd me, a wa vɩɩmã sẽn be ba wã nugẽ wã, ba wã kõo Bi-riblã pãn-tõog tɩ b tar vɩɩmã b nugẽ," 
John5:27 la b kõ-a-la noor tɩ kao bʋʋdo, bala, a yaa Ninsaal Bi-ribla." 
John5:28 Da sak-y tɩ rẽ yɛɛs yãmb ye. Bala, wakat n wat tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn be yaadẽ na n wʋm bãmb koɛɛga." 
John5:29 Neb nins sẽn maan neerã na n yiime n paam vʋʋgr la vɩɩm. Neb nins sẽn maan wẽngã na n yiime n paam vʋʋgr la bʋʋdo. 
John5:30 Mam ka tõe n maan baa fɩ m toor ye. Mam bʋʋda bʋʋdã n zemsd m sẽn wʋmdã, la mam bʋʋdã yaa tɩrga, bala, mam ka baood tɩ maan m daab ye, la yaa sẽn tʋm-a maamã raabo." 
John5:31 Sã n yaa maam n kɩt m meng kaseto, mam kasetã ka sɩd ye." 
John5:32 Yaa ned a to n kɩt mam kaseto, la mam miime tɩ kaset ning a soab sẽn kɩt mam wɛɛngẽ wã yaa sɩda." 
John5:33 Yãmb tʋma koe-toagsedb a Zã nengẽ, la a Zã kɩsa sɩdã kaseto." 
John5:34 Ne maam, mam kasetã ka yit ninsaal nengẽ ye, la mam gomda a woto tɩ yãmb tõe n paam fãagre." 
John5:35 A Zã dag n yaa fɩtl sẽn wita, n yãgda, la yãmb tʋlgame n maan sũ-noog wakat bilf bal yẽnda vẽenemẽ wã." 
John5:36 La maam, mam tara kaset sẽn yɩɩd a Zã rẽndã. Bala, tʋʋm nins m ba sẽn kõ maam tɩ m maana, tʋʋm-kãens meng mam sẽn maandã n kɩt mam kaseto, n wilgdẽ tɩ m ba n tʋm maam." 
John5:37 La m ba sẽn tʋm maamã, bãmb meng kɩsa mam kaseto. Yãmb zɩ n wʋm b koɛɛga, wall y yãnd b neng ye," 
John5:38 la bãmb goamã ka be yãmb pʋgẽ ye, yãmb sẽn ka tẽed bãmb sẽn tʋm a soabã yĩnga." 
John5:39 Yãmb feesda Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã pʋse, bala, yãmb sẽn tẽed tɩ yãmb na n paama vɩɩm sẽn kõn sɛ, b maasem yĩngã. Yaa gʋls-sõamy-kãens n kɩt mam kaseto." 
John5:40 La yãmb yaool n ka rat n wa mam nengẽ n paam vɩɩmã ye. 
John5:41 Mam ka reegd ziir sẽn yit ninsaalb nengẽ ye. 
John5:42 La mam mii yãmba: Wẽnnaam nonglmã ka be yãmb pʋsẽ ye. 
John5:43 Mam waa m ba yʋʋr yĩnga, la yãmb ka reegd maam ye. Ned a to sã n wa ne a meng yʋʋre, yãmb deegda yẽnda." 
John5:44 Yãmb sẽn paamd pẽgr taab nengẽ, la y ka baood pẽgr sẽn yit Wẽnnaam b yembr tãa nengẽ wã, yãmb tõe n yɩɩ wãn n tẽ?" 
John5:45 Da tags-y tɩ mam na n yeela m ba tɩ yãmb ka maan neer ye. Sẽn na n yeel-a tɩ yãmb beegame wã, yaa a Moyiisi, yãmb teegr sẽn be ne a soabã." 
John5:46 Bala, yãmb sã n dag n tẽedẽ a Moyiisi, yãmb dag n na tẽ maam, bala, a gʋlsame n gom mam yelle." 
John5:47 La yãmb sã n ka tẽed bũmb nins a sẽn gʋlsã, yãmb na n tẽe mam goamã wãn-wãna?" 
John6:1 Rẽnda poore, a Zeezi kẽnga Galɩle ko-kãsengã sẽn boond tɩ Tiberyaad rʋʋnde." 
John6:2 Neb kʋʋng dag n pʋgda bãmba, b sẽn yãt bõn-bãn nins a Zeezi sẽn maand n maagd bãad-dãmbã yĩnga." 
John6:3 A Zeezi rʋʋ tãngã n zĩnd be ne b karen-biisã. 
John6:4 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã tigr b sẽn boond tɩ Pakã dag n kolgame. 
John6:5 A Zeezi zẽka b nenga, la b yãnda neb kʋʋng sẽn wat bãmb nengẽ, la b yeela a Filip yaa: «Tõnd na n daa bur yɛɛnẽ tɩ nin-kãensã paam rɩɩbo?»" 
John6:6 A Zeezi goma a woto n na n mak a Filip n gese. Bala, b meng rag n mii b sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga." 
John6:7 A Filip leoka bãmb n yeel tɩ deniye kobsi bur ka tõe n sek tɩ ned fãa paam bur-gɩrg ye. 
John6:8 A Zeezi karen-biig a yembre, a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr ba-biig a Ãndere yeela bãmb yaa:" 
John6:9 Bi-ribl bil n be ka n tar Oorz bur a nu ne zĩm a yiibu. La rẽnda yaa bõe ne neb sõor a woto? 
John6:10 A Zeezi yeelame: «Kɩt-y tɩ nebã zĩndi.» Mood n dag n be zĩ-kãng wʋsgo. Dẽ, nebã zĩndame, la raopã sõor tata tus a nu." 
John6:11 A Zeezi deega burã, n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam barka, n pʋɩ neb nins sẽn dag n be-b be wã. B maana a woto me ne zĩmã, tɩ ned fãa deeg a sẽn dat tɛka." 
John6:12 Nebã sẽn dɩ n tɩge, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b wʋk rɩ-zersã sẽn kellã, tɩ bũmb baa a yembr da pa n sãam ye." 
John6:13 Dẽ, b wʋka Oorz bur a nu wã gɩrsã, nebã sẽn dɩ tɩ kellã, n pids pet piig la a yiibu." 
John6:14 Nin-kãens sẽn yã bõn-bãn nins a Zeezi sẽn maanã, b yeelame yaa: «Sɩd yaa bãmb la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ning sẽn da tog n wa-a dũni pʋgẽ wã.»" 
John6:15 A Zeezi sẽn mi tɩ nebã na n waa n yõka bãmb n tɩ maan b rĩmã yĩnga, b yii be n leb n dʋ tãngã zug b yembre." 
John6:16 Zaabr sẽn ta, a Zeezi karen-biisã sigame n ta ko-kãsengã noore." 
John6:17 Bãmb kẽe koom koglg pʋgẽ n na n kẽng Kapɛrnaom, ko-kãsengã rʋʋnd a to wã. Zĩigã rag n zoe n sobga zãnga, la a Zeezi dag n ka wa b nengẽ ye." 
John6:18 Sebg n dag n fugd ne pãng hal wʋsgo, la ko-pɛmã dag n zẽkdame." 
John6:19 Karen-biisã sẽn dugs koglgã n zãag sẽn zems kɩlo a nu bɩ a yoobe, b yãnda a Zeezi sẽn kẽnd ko-kãsengã zug n kolgd koom-koglgã. La rabeem yõk-b lame." 
John6:20 La a Zeezi yeel-b lame: «Da maan‑y rabeem ye yaa maam.» 
John6:21 Karen-biisã dag n dat n dɩka a Zeezi ne koom-koglgã, la tao-tao bala, koom-koglgã rʋʋga tẽnga. Bala, b taa b sẽn dag n dabdẽ wã. Koom-koglg sobg sẽn lengda." 
John6:22 Vẽkembeoogo, neb kʋʋngã sẽn dag n yals ko-kãsengã rʋʋndã tẽegame tɩ dag n yaa koom-koglg a yembr tãa n dag n be be, la t'a Zeezi dag n ka kẽ kogl-kãng ne b karen-biisã ye, la tɩ karen-biisã b yeyn-yeyn n looge." 
John6:23 La koom-kogend a taab yii Tiberyaad n wa n yals zĩig sẽn pẽ ne zĩig ning a Zeezi sẽn ning burã bark n kõ neb kʋʋngã tɩ b wãbã. 
John6:24 La kʋʋngã sẽn yã t'a Zeezi bɩ b karen-biisã ka be be wã, b mensã kẽe koom-kogendẽ wã n kẽng Kapɛrnaom n na n tɩ bao a Zeezi." 
John6:25 B yãnda a Zeezi ko-kãsengã rʋʋnd a to wã, n sok-b yaa: «Karen-saamba, yãmb waa ka rabʋre?»" 
John6:26 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ yãmb sẽn baood maamã, ka bõn-bãnã yãmb sẽn yã wã yĩng ye, la yaa yãmb sẽn wãb burã n tɩgã yĩnga." 
John6:27 Da tʋm-y rɩɩb sẽn sãamdã yĩng ye. Tʋm-y rɩɩb ning sẽn paad vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã yĩnga: Ninsaal Bi-riblã n na n kõ-a yãmba. Bala, yaa ba a Wẽnnaam n yãk yẽnda.»" 
John6:28 Nebã soka a Zeezi yaa: «Bõe la tõnd na n maan n tʋm Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã?» 
John6:29 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Wẽnnaam tʋʋmde, yaa tɩ yãmb tẽ a soab ning bãmb sẽn tʋmã.»" 
John6:30 La b yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Bõe bõn-bãnd la yãmb maand tɩ tõnd na n yãnd n tẽ yãmba? Bõe tʋʋm la yãmb tʋmda?» 
John6:31 Tõnd ba-rãmbã dɩɩ man we-rasempʋɩɩgã pʋgẽ wa b sẽn gʋls n yeel tɩ: «A Moyiis kõo bãmb bur sẽn yit arzãn tɩ b wãbe.» 
John6:32 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ka a Moyiis n kõ yãmb bur sẽn yi arzãnã ye, la yaa m ba n kõt yãmb bur sɩd-sɩd sẽn yi arzãnã." 
John6:33 Bala, Wẽnnaam burã, yaa soab ning sẽn yit-a arzãn n sigda, n kõt dũni neb vɩɩmã.»" 
John6:34 La nebã yeela a Zeezi yaa: Zu-soaba, kõt-y tõnd bur kãng daar fãa." 
John6:35 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Maam la bur sẽn kõt vɩɩmã. Ned ning fãa sẽn wat-a mam nengẽ, Kom kõn leb n yõk yẽnda ye, la ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed-a maam, ko-yũud kõn leb n yõk yẽnda abada." 
John6:36 La mam yeela yãmb tɩ yãmb yãnda maam la y ka tẽed ye. 
John6:37 Neb nins fãa m ba sẽn kõt maamã na n waa mam nengẽ, la mam kõn dig ned baa a yembr sẽn wat mam nengẽ ye." 
John6:38 Bala, mam sẽn yi arzãn n sigã, ka tɩ maan m sẽn dat ye, la yaa tɩ maan sẽn tʋm-a maamã raabo." 
John6:39 La sẽn tʋm-a maamã raab la woto: Yaa tɩ m da bas ned baa a yembr bãmb sẽn kõ maamã tɩ menem ye, la mam na n vʋʋg-a-la yaoolem daarã." 
John6:40 Sɩd me, ad m ba raabo: Yaa tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn yã Bi-riblã n tẽ bãmb na paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. La mam na n vʋʋg-a-la yaoolem daarã." 
John6:41 Zʋɩf-rãmbã dag n yẽgemda ne taab a Zeezi poorẽ, bala, a Zeezi yeelame tɩ bãmb la bur sẽn yi arzãn n sigã." 
John6:42 Nebã yeelame yaa: Ka yẽnda la a Zeezi wɛɛ, a Zozɛf bi-riblã, tɩ tõnd mi a ba ne a ma wã la? La yaa a wãn t'a yetẽ tɩ yẽnda yii arzãn n sigi?" 
John6:43 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Da yẽgm-y ne taab ye. 
John6:44 Ned baa a yembr ka tõe n wa mam nengẽ, tɩ sã n ka m ba, sẽn tʋm-a maamã n tak a soab n wa ne ye. La mam na n vʋʋg-a-la yaoolem daarã." 
John6:45 A Gʋlsa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sɛbẽ tɩ: «B fãa na n deega zãmsg Wẽnnaam nengẽ.» Ned ning fãa sẽn wʋm m ba koɛɛg la a reeg bãmb zãmsgã wata mam nengẽ. 
John6:46 Ka rat n yeel tɩ ned n zoe n yãnd d ba wã ye, sã n ka soab ning sẽn yi-a Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã. Soab‑kãng yẽ yãnda d ba wã." 
John6:47 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned ning sẽn tẽedã tara vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. 
John6:48 Mam yaa bur sẽn kõt vɩɩm. 
John6:49 Yãmb yaab-rãmbã rɩɩ mand we-rasempʋɩɩgẽ wã, la b kiime." 
John6:50 Bur ning sẽn yit-a yĩngrã yell la woto: Ned ning sẽn dɩt-a kõn ki ye. 
John6:51 Maam, mam yaa bur-vɩɩg sẽn yi arzãn n sigi. Ned sã n dɩ bur‑kãngã, a na n vɩɩmda wakat sẽn kõn sa. La bur ning mam sẽn na n kõ dũni wã vɩɩm yĩngã, yaa mam yĩngã." 
John6:52 Gom-kãng poorẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã wẽe no-koeemd ne taab wʋsg n yeele: Nin-kãngã na n yɩɩ wãn n kõ tõnd a yĩngã tɩ d wãbe?" 
John6:53 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ yãmb sã n ka wãb Ninsaal Bi-riblã nemdo, la yãmb sã n ka yũ a zɩɩmã, yãmb ka tar vɩɩm y pʋsẽ ye." 
John6:54 Ned ning sẽn wãbd mam nemd la a yũud mam zɩɩm tara vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa, la mam na n vʋʋg-a-la yaoolem daarã." 
John6:55 Bala, mam nemdã yaa rɩɩb sɩd-sɩda, la mam zɩɩmã yaa bõn-yũudl sɩd-sɩda." 
John6:56 Sẽn wãbd-a mam nemd la a yũud mam zɩɩmã paada mam pʋgẽ, tɩ mam paad yẽnda pʋgẽ." 
John6:57 A wa m ba wã sẽn vɩ, n tʋm maam, tɩ mam vɩ m ba wã maasem yĩngã, woto me, ned ning sẽn dɩt maam na n vɩɩ mam maasem yĩnga." 
John6:58 Ada la bur sẽn yi arzãn n sigi. A ka wẽnd bur ning yãmb ba-rãmbã sẽn wãbã ye: Bãmb kiime. Sẽn dɩt-a bur‑kãngã wã na n vɩɩmda wakat sẽn kõn sa. 
John6:59 Yaa woto la a Zeezi gom wakat ning b sẽn dag n zãmsd nebã Kapɛrnaom karen-doogẽ wã. 
John6:60 A Zeezi karen-biisã sẽn wʋm bãmb goamã, wʋsg yeelame yaa: Zãms-kãngã reegr yaa toogo. Ãnda n tõe n sak-a?" 
John6:61 A Zeezi sẽn mi b yamẽ tɩ b karen-biisã yẽgemda gomdã poorẽ, b yeela bãmb yaa: Yõwã tuka yãmb sũur la?" 
John6:62 La yãmb sã n yãnd Ninsaal Bi-riblã t'a zẽkd n lebd a sẽn dag n beẽ wã, na n yɩɩ a wãna?" 
John6:63 Yaa Sɩɩg-sõng n kõt vɩɩm. Yĩngã ka sõngd ne baa fɩ. Goam nins mam sẽn togs yãmbã wata ne Sɩɩg-sõng la vɩɩm. 
John6:64 La neb kẽer n be yãmb sʋkã n ka tẽed ye. Bala, hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, a Zeezi dag n mii neb nins sẽn ka tẽed bãmba, la ned ning sẽn na n zãmb-a bãmb n yõk n kõ wã." 
John6:65 A Zeezi gomame n paas n yeele: «Dẽ n kɩt tɩ mam yeel yãmb tɩ ned baa a yembr ka tõe n wa mam nengẽ, tɩ sã n ka m ba n kõ-a noor ye.»" 
John6:66 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, bãmb karen-biis wʋsg leba poorẽ, n bas n ka leb n tũud a Zeezi ye." 
John6:67 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela b karen-biis piig la a yiibã yaa: La yãmb yẽ, yãmb ka rat n loog la?" 
John6:68 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr leoka bãmb n yeele: «Zu-soaba, tõnd na n kẽnga ãnda soab nengẽ? Yãmb tara vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã goamã." 
John6:69 La tõnd tẽeme, la tõnd bãngame tɩ yãmb yaa sõmblem soab sẽn yi Wẽnnaam nengẽ.»" 
John6:70 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Ka maam n tũus yãmb piig la a yiibã wɛ? La yãmb ned a ye n yaa zĩnã. 
John6:71 Bãmb dag n gomda a Sɩmo Iskaryo biig a Zʋdaas yelle. Bala, yaa yẽnda, bãmb piig la a yiibã sʋk ned ning sẽn da na n zãmb-a bãmbã." 
John7:1 Rẽ poore, a Zeezi dag n saagda Galɩle, bala, b dag n ka rat n saag Zʋʋde ye. Bala, Zʋɩf-rãmbã dag n baooda bãmb n na n kʋ." 
John7:2 Rẽ tɩ zãnã tigrã, sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã tigr dag n kolgame." 
John7:3 A Zeezi ma-biisã yeela bãmb yaa: Yi ka n kẽng Zʋʋde tɩ f karen-biisã me paam n yãnd tʋʋm nins fo sẽn maandã. 
John7:4 Ned sã n dat tɩ nebã yãnd-a, a ka soosd n tʋmd a tʋʋmã ye. Fo sẽn maand bõn-kãensã, maan tɩ dũni neb bãng-fo." 
John7:5 Sɩda, a Zeezi ma-biisã me dag n ka tẽed bãmb ye." 
John7:6 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam wakatã nan ka ta ye, la ne yãmba, wakat fãa zemsame." 
John7:7 Dũni wã ka tõe n kisg yãmb ye. B kisa maam, bala, mam kɩta kaset tɩ b tʋʋmã yaa wẽnse." 
John7:8 Kẽng-y tigrã. Mam nan ka na n kẽng tig‑kãngã ye, bala, mam wakatã nan ka pid ye.»" 
John7:9 A Zeezi sẽn gom ne bãmb woto n sa, a Zeezi kell n paa Galɩle." 
John7:10 A Zeezi ma-bi-raopã sẽn kẽng tigrã, bãmb mengã me yaool n kẽngame. B soosame n kẽng tɩ nebã ka yã bãmb ye." 
John7:11 Zʋɩf-rãmbã dag n baooda a Zeezi tigrã wakat n sokdẽ: «B bee yɛ?» 
John7:12 La vũn-vũn n dag n be kʋʋngã sʋk wʋsg bãmb poorẽ. Neb kẽer yetame tɩ bãmb yaa nin-sõngo, tɩ kẽer yetẽ tɩ ayo, bãmb kẽesda nebã moogo." 
John7:13 Ned baa a yembr ka saagd n gom bãmb yellã vẽeneg ye, b sẽn zoet Zʋɩf-rãmbã yĩnga." 
John7:14 Tigrã rag n zoe n taa pʋɩ-sʋka, t'a Zeezi kẽng wẽnd doogẽ wã, n sɩng n zãmsd nebã." 
John7:15 Linga Zʋɩf-rãmbã, la b sokame yaa: «Yẽnda yɩɩ wãn n mi Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamy wã n yaool n ka paam zãmsgo?»" 
John7:16 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: «Zãmsg ning mam sẽn zãmsd nebã ka yit mam nengẽ ye, a yita sẽn tʋm-a maamã nengẽ." 
John7:17 Ned ning fãa sẽn dat n tũ Wẽnnaam daabã na bãng zãms-kãng sã n yita bãmb nengẽ, wall mam goamã sã n yita mam meng nengẽ." 
John7:18 Ned ning goam sẽn yit a meng nengẽ baooda a meng waoogre. La ned ning sẽn baood sẽn tʋm-a yẽnda wã waoogr yaa sɩd soaba, la ka-tɩrlem ka be yẽnda pʋgẽ ye." 
John7:19 A Moyiis ka kõ yãmb tõogã sɩda? La yãmb ned baa a yembr ka maand tõogã sẽn yetã ye. Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb baood n na n kʋ maam?» 
John7:20 Neb kʋʋngã leokame: «Zĩn n tar yãmba, ãnda n baood n na n kʋ yãmba?»" 
John7:21 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam tʋma tʋʋmd a yembre, la a yɛɛsa yãmb fãa." 
John7:22 A Moyiis n yeel yãmb tɩ y kẽes kom-dibli wã bãongo (bãongã ka sɩng ne a Moyiis ye. Yaa yaab-rãmbã n sɩng-a), la yãmb kẽesda kambã bãongo, baa ne vʋʋsg daare." 
John7:23 Yãmb sã n tõe n kẽes ned bãong vʋʋsg daare, n ka kɩɩs a Moyiis tõogã, bõe tɩ yãmb sũyã yĩigd ne maam, mam sẽn kõ yĩn-tõr laafɩ vʋʋsg daarã yĩnga?" 
John7:24 Da bʋ-y bʋʋdã tɩ zems ne nin sẽn yãtã ya, bʋ-y bʋ-tɩrga." 
John7:25 Zeruzalɛm neb kẽer yeelame yaa: Ka rao‑kãngã la b sẽn baood n na n kʋ wã wɛ? 
John7:26 Ad a sẽn yɛs nebã sʋk n gomd tɩ b ka yet-a tɩ bũmbu! Rẽ yĩnga, kãsem-dãmbã sɩd reegame tɩ yaa bãmb la Kirisã la?" 
John7:27 Tõnd yaool n mii rao‑kãngã sẽn yitẽ. La Kiris sã n wa, ned baa a yembr ka na n bãng b sẽn yitẽ ye." 
John7:28 Dẽ, a Zeezi zẽka b koɛɛg wakat ning b sẽn zãmsd nebã wẽnd doogẽ wã n yeele: Yãmb mii maam, la y mii mam sẽn yitẽ. Baoosgo, mam ka wa m toor ye. La sẽn tʋm-a maamã yaa sɩd soaba, la yãmb ka mi-b ye." 
John7:29 Mam mii bãmba, bala, yaa bãmb yʋʋr yĩng la mam sẽn be ka wã, la yaa bãmb n tʋm maam." 
John7:30 Nebã da rat n yõka a Zeezi, la ned baa a yembr ka sɩɩs bãmb ye, bãmb wakatã sẽn dag n nan ka ta wã yĩnga." 
John7:31 Neb kʋʋngã sʋka, wʋsg tẽe a Zeezi n yetẽ: Dẽ yĩnga, Kiris sã n wa, b na n maana bõn-bãn n yɩɩd dao kãngã sẽn maandã sɩda?" 
John7:32 Fariizẽ-dãmbã wʋma neb kʋʋngã sẽn dag n gomd a Zeezi yell vũn-vũnã. Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmba ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã tʋma gũudb tɩ b tɩ yõk a Zeezi." 
John7:33 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Mam ket n bee ne yãmb wakat bilf yĩng bala, la m na n leba sẽn tʋm-a maamã nengẽ." 
John7:34 Yãmb na n baoo maam, la y ka na n yãnd maam ye, la mam sẽn na n zĩnd zĩig ningã, yãmb ka tõe n wa be ye." 
John7:35 Zʋɩf-rãmbã goma ne taab n yeele: A na n kẽe yɛ tɩ tõnd da yãnd-a? A na n kẽnga Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn sãeeg n be Gɛrk-rãmbã sʋka nengẽ n tɩ zãms Gɛrk-rãmbã bi? 
John7:36 A sẽn yeel tɩ tõnd na n bao-a lame n ka yã, la tɩ tõnd ka tõe n wa zĩig ning a sẽn na n zĩndẽ wã, gom‑kãng võor yaa bõe?" 
John7:37 Tigrã yaoolem daare, daar ning sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩdã, a Zeezi yalsa yĩngr n zẽk b koɛɛg n yeele: Bɩ Ko-yũud sẽn tar ned ning wa mam nengẽ n yũ." 
John7:38 Kʋɩlse, b koom sẽn kõt vɩɩm na n yii ned ning sẽn tẽed maamã pʋgẽ, wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yetã." 
John7:39 A Zeezi dag n goma Sɩɩg-sõngã neb nins sẽn tẽed bãmbã sẽn na n deegã yelle. Bala, b dag n nan ka kõ nebã Sɩɩg-sõngã ye, a Zeezi sẽn dag n nan ka paam waoogrã yĩnga." 
John7:40 Nebã sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, neb n zĩnd kʋʋngã sʋk n yeel tɩ dao‑kãngã sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa." 
John7:41 Kẽer da yetame tɩ dao-kãngã yaa Kirisã. La neb a taab yetame yaa: Dẽ yĩnga, sɩd yaa Galɩle la Kirisã tog n yi sɩda?" 
John7:42 Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã ka yeel tɩ «Kirisã na n yɩɩ a Davɩɩd yagenga, n dog Betlehɛm sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd tẽngã» sɩda?" 
John7:43 Dẽ, welgr zĩnda nebã sʋk a Zeezi poorẽ." 
John7:44 Neb kẽer bãmb sʋk dag n dat n yõka a Zeezi, la ned baa a yembr ka sɩɩs bãmb ye." 
John7:45 Gũudbã leba maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã nengẽ, la b sok-b lame tɩ yaa bõe tɩ b ka tall a Zeezi n wa?" 
John7:46 Gũudbã leokame n yeele: Ned nan ka gom wa rao-kãngã ye. 
John7:47 Tɩ Fariizẽ-dãmbã leb n sok-ba: «A tõog n belga yãmb me n tõog la? 
John7:48 Dẽ yĩnga, naab bɩ Fariizẽ baa a yembr tãa beeme n tẽ bãmb sɩda?" 
John7:49 Sã n yaa neb kʋʋngã sẽn ka mi tõogã, b yaa neb kãab-wẽng sẽn be b zutu.»" 
John7:50 Bãmb ned a yembre, a Nikodɛm, sẽn dag n wa-a a Zeezi nengẽ pĩndã yeel-b lame yaa:" 
John7:51 «Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd tõodã kaooda ned bʋʋd tɩ d ka reng n kelg a soaba, la d bãng bũmb ning a sẽn maanã sɩda?»" 
John7:52 B leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Fo me yaa Galɩle ned la? Vɛɛs sõama n gese, la f na yãnd tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ka yit Galɩle ye.»" 
John7:53 [Rẽ poore, ned fãa kuila a yiri." 
John8:1 A Zeezi kẽnga oliiv tɩɩs tãngẽ wã. 
John8:2 La yibeoog bala, b leb n kẽnga wẽnd doogẽ wã, la nebã fãa waa bãmb nengẽ. Bãmb zĩndame n zãmsd nebã." 
John8:3 Dẽ, tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã talla pag b sẽn yõk yoodem zug n wa ne-a" 
John8:4 a Zeezi taoore, n yals-a nebã fãa sʋk n yeel a Zeezi yaa: Karen-saamba, b linga pʋg-kãngã t'a maand yoobo." 
John8:5 A Moyiis yeela tõnd a tõogã pʋgẽ tɩ d lob pagb a woto kuga. La yãmba, yãmb yetame tɩ bõe?" 
John8:6 B goma a woto n na n bẽd a Zeezi n paam n dõd-ba. La a Zeezi zõondame n sɩng n gʋls tomã pʋgẽ ne b nug-bila. 
John8:7 La nebã sẽn dag n ket n pẽdgd bãmb ne b sokrã, b roogame n yeel-b yaa: Sẽn be-a yãmb sʋk n ka tar yel-wẽnde, bɩ a reng n lobg pagã kugri." 
John8:8 A Zeezi leb n zõondame n gʋlsd tomẽ wã. 
John8:9 Tõog karen-saam-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm gom-kãngã, tɩ b sũyã kaset kao b bʋʋdo, b yii yembr yembre, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem hal tɩ ta yaoolem soaba. La a Zeezi paa b yembr ne pagã sẽn dag n yɛs nebã sʋkã." 
John8:10 Dẽ, a Zeezi roogame n yeel pagã yaa: Paga, sẽn dõt-b foomã bee yɛ? Baa a yembr ka kao fo bʋʋd la?" 
John8:11 Pagã leokame tɩ: Zu-soaba, ned baa a yembre. La a Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: Mam me ka kaood fo bʋʋd ye. Kẽnge, la f ra leb n saag n maan yel-wẽn ye.]" 
John8:12 A Zeezi leb n goma ne bãmb n yeele: Mam yaa dũni vẽenem. Ned ning sẽn tũud maam kõn kẽn lik pʋgẽ ye, la a na n paama vɩɩm vẽenem." 
John8:13 Dẽ, Fariizẽ-dãmbã yeela bãmb yaa: Fo kɩta f meng kaseto, fo kaset ka sɩd ye." 
John8:14 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Baa ne mam sẽn kɩt m meng kasetã, mam kasetã yaa sɩda. Bala, mam mii m sẽn yiẽ, la m sẽn dabdẽ. La yãmb ka mi mam sẽn yiẽ, wall m sẽn dabdẽ ye." 
John8:15 Yãmb bʋʋda wa ninsaalb sẽn data. La maam, mam ka bʋʋd ned baa a yembr bʋʋd ye." 
John8:16 La mam sã n bʋʋdẽ me, mam bʋʋdã tũuda sɩda, bala mam ka m yembr ye. M ba, sẽn tʋm-a maamã bee ne maam." 
John8:17 B gʋlsa yãmb tõogã pʋgẽ tɩ neb a yiib kaset yaa sɩda. 
John8:18 Mam kɩta m meng kaseto, la m ba, sẽn tʋm-a maamã kɩta mam kaseto." 
John8:19 Dẽ, b yeela a Zeezi yaa: F ba bee yɛ? A Zeezi leokame n yeele: Yãmb zɩ mam sẽn yaa a soaba, la y zɩ m ba sẽn yaa a soab me. Yãmb sã n dag n miẽ-la maam, y dag n na bãng m ba me." 
John8:20 A Zeezi goma woto, wakat ning b sẽn dag n zãmsd nebã wẽnd doogẽ wã, ligd lobrã koglg sɛɛgẽ, la ned baa a yembr ka yõk bãmb ye, bãmb wakatã sẽn ket n nan ka ta wã yĩnga." 
John8:21 A Zeezi leb n yeela bãmb yaa: Mam loogdame, la yãmb na n baoo maam, la yãmb na n kii y yel-wẽndã pʋgẽ. Yãmb ka tõe n wa mam sẽn kẽndẽ wã ye." 
John8:22 Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeelame yaa: A sẽn yet tɩ tõnd ka tõe n wa zĩig ning a sẽn kẽndẽ wã, a na n kʋʋ a meng la?" 
John8:23 La a Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: Yãmb yaa tẽngr ka nebã, la mam yaa yĩngr neda. Yãmb yaa dũni‑kãngã nebã, la mam ka dũni‑kãngã ned ye." 
John8:24 Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ mam yeel yãmb tɩ y na n kii y yel-wẽnã pʋgẽ wã. Bala, yãmb sã n ka tẽed tɩ mam yaa m sẽn yaa a soabã, yãmb na n kii y yel-wẽnã pʋgẽ." 
John8:25 B soka a Zeezi b sẽn yaa a soaba. A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Pipi, bõe yĩng tɩ m na n gom ne yãmba?" 
John8:26 Mam tara bũmb wʋsg n na n gome, sẽn kẽed ne yãmb yelle, la m bʋ b bʋʋdo. La sẽn tʋm-a maamã yaa sɩd soaba, la mam togsda dũni wã bũmb ning m sẽn wʋm bãmb nengẽ." 
John8:27 Nebã ka wʋm tɩ yaa b ba a Wẽnnaam yell la a Zeezi sẽn gomd ne bãmbã ye. 
John8:28 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Yãmb sã n wa n zẽk Ninsaal Bi-riblã n sa, y na yaool n bãng tɩ mam yaa m sẽn yaa a soaba, la tɩ mam ka maand baa fɩ m toor ye, la tɩ mam gomda wa m ba sẽn zãms maamã." 
John8:29 Sẽn tʋm-a maamã bee ne maam. B ka bas maam m yembr ye, bala, wakat fãa, mam maanda sẽn noom bãmba." 
John8:30 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto wã, neb wʋsg tẽe bãmba." 
John8:31 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeela Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn tẽ bãmbã yaa: Yãmb sã n tall mam goamã, yãmb sɩd yaa mam karen-biisi." 
John8:32 Yãmb na bãng sɩdã, la sɩdã na kɩt tɩ yãmb lebg burkĩmba." 
John8:33 Bãmb leoka a Zeezi n yeele: Tõnd yaa a Abrahaam yagense, la tõnd zɩ n yɩ ned yamb ye. Bõe tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ tõnd na n lebga burkĩmba?" 
John8:34 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn maand yel-wẽnd yaa yel-wẽn yamba. 
John8:35 La yamb ka paad yir wakat fãa ye. La yirã bi-ribl paada be wakat fãa. 
John8:36 Dẽ, Bi-riblã sã n yols yãmba, yãmb na n yɩɩ burkĩmb meng-menga." 
John8:37 Mam miime tɩ yãmb yaa a Abrahaam yagense. La yãmb yaool n dat n kʋʋ maam, yãmb sẽn ka reegd mam goamã yĩnga." 
John8:38 Mam togsda bũmb ning m sẽn yã m ba wã nengẽ wã. La yãmba, yãmb maanda bũmb ning y sẽn wʋm y ba wã nengẽ." 
John8:39 Nebã leoka a Zeezi n yeele: Tõnd ba la a Abrahaam. A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb sã n yaa a Abrahaam kamba, bɩ y tʋm y ba a Abrahaam tʋʋmã." 
John8:40 La moasã, maam, soab ning sẽn togs yãmb sɩd m sẽn wʋm Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã, yãmb baooda maam n na n kʋ. A Abrahaam zɩ n maan bõn-kãngã buud ye." 
John8:41 Yãmb tʋmda y ba tʋʋma.» Bãmb yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Tõnd ka tãmpĩib ye. Tõnd ba yaa a yembr tãa: Yaa Wẽnnaam.» 
John8:42 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Wẽnnaam sã n dag n yaẽ yãmb ba, yãmb dag n na n nongẽ-la maam, bala, mam yii Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ, la m yii Wẽnnaam nengẽ n wa. Mam ka wa m toor ye, la yaa bãmb n tʋm maam." 
John8:43 Bõe tɩ yãmb ka wʋmd mam goamã võore? Yaa tɩ yãmb ka tõe n kelg mam gomd ye.
