John8:44 Yãmb ba la Sʋtãanã, la yãmb dat n pidsa y ba wã raabo. A yɩɩ nin-kʋʋd hal sɩngr wẽndẽ tɩ ta moasã, la a ka pa sɩd pʋgẽ ye, sɩd sẽn ka be yẽnda pʋgẽ wã yĩnga. A sã n yagd zĩrẽ, yaa a pʋga fãa la rẽnda, bala, a yaa zĩrẽ-yagda, la zĩrẽ wã ba." 
John8:45 La mam sẽn togsd sɩdã, yãmb ka tẽed maam ye." 
John8:46 Ãnda yãmb sʋkã n na n wilg maam tɩ m maana yel-wẽnde? Mam sã n togsda sɩda, bõe tɩ yãmb ka tẽed maam?" 
John8:47 Wẽnnaam biig kelgda Wẽnnaam goamã. Yãmb ka kelgda, yãmb sẽn ka Wẽnnaam kambã yĩnga.»" 
John8:48 Zʋɩf-rãmbã leoka a Zeezi n yeele: «Tõnd ka tar bʋʋm tɩ yeel tɩ fo yaa Samaari neda, la tɩ zĩn n tar foom sɩda?»" 
John8:49 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Zĩn ka tar maam ye. Mam waoogda m ba, la yãmb paoogda maam." 
John8:50 Mam yẽ ka baood m meng waoogr ye. Ned a yembr tãa n baood waoogrã, la a bʋʋd bʋʋdã." 
John8:51 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned sã n tall mam gomdã, a kõn tol n ki ye.»" 
John8:52 Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeela bãmb yaa: «Moasã wã yẽ, tõnd miime tɩ zĩn n tar foom. A Abrahaam kiime, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã me kiime, tɩ fo yaool n yetẽ tɩ ned sã n tall fo goamã a kõn tol n ki ye." 
John8:53 Dẽ yĩnga, fo yɩɩda tõnd ba a Abrahaam, sẽn ki wã la? Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã me kiime. Fo tẽedame tɩ fo yaa ãnda?»" 
John8:54 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: Mam sã n waoogd m menga, mam waoogrã yaa zaalem. Yaa m ba, soab ning yãmb sẽn boond tɩ y Wẽnnaamã n waoogd maam." 
John8:55 La yãmb ka mi bãmb ye. Mam yẽ mii bãmba. Mam sã n yeel tɩ m ka mi bãmba, mam na n yɩɩ zĩrẽ-yagd wa yãmba. La mam mii bãmba, n sakd bãmb noore." 
John8:56 Yãmb ba a Abrahaam dag n kɩdma ne sũ-noogo, a sẽn dag n tagsd t'a na n yãnda mam daarã yĩnga. A yãnd-a lame, n maan sũ-noogo." 
John8:57 Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeela a Zeezi yaa: Fo nan ka ta yʋʋm pis-nu, n yaool n yãnd a Abrahaam?" 
John8:58 A Zeezi yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ sẽn deng a Abrahaam dogem, mam dag n beeme.»" 
John8:59 Gom-kãng poorẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã wʋka kug n na n lob a Zeezi, la a Zeezi soondame, la b yii wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
John9:1 A Zeezi sẽn loogda, b yãnda rao a yembr sẽn dog ne zondo." 
John9:2 Bãmb karen-biisã soka bãmb yaa: Karen-saamba, yaa ãnda soab n maan yel-wẽnd tɩ raoã rog ne zondo? Yaa yẽnda meng bɩ, bɩ yaa a ba-rãmbã?" 
John9:3 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Ka tɩ yaa yẽnda bɩ a ba-rãmbã n maan yel-wẽnd ye, la yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã na tũnug yẽnda n puki." 
John9:4 Tõnd tog n tʋma sẽn tʋm-a maamã tʋʋma, tɩ wĩndg ket n beẽ. Yʋng watame tɩ ned baa a yembr ka tõe n leb n tʋm ye." 
John9:5 Mam sẽn ket dũniyã pʋgã, mam yaa dũniyã vẽenem.»" 
John9:6 A Zeezi sẽn gom woto n sɛ, b tʋbsa tẽnga, n kalem tãndã ne kolkoodã tɩ lebg begdo, n dɩk n bɛ zoangã nini" 
John9:7 n yeel-a: «Kẽng Siloe bãkẽ wã n tɩ widg f nengã.» (Siloe dat n yeelame t'a soab b sẽn tʋme) Zoangã kẽnga be n tɩ widg a nengã, la a sẽn lebg n watẽ wã, a rag n neeme." 
John9:8 A yagsã ne neb nins sẽn dag n yãnd t'a yaa bõasã yetame yaa: Ka rao ning sẽn dag n zĩ n bõosdẽ wã la woto sɩda? 
John9:9 Neb kẽer dag n yetame tɩ yaa yẽnda, tɩ kẽer yetẽ tɩ ayo, tɩ yaa a wẽnego. La yẽnda mengã rag n yetame: «Yaa mam meng bal vã.»" 
John9:10 Dẽ, b sok-a lame t'a ninã maana a wãn n puki?" 
John9:11 A leokame n yeele: Dao ning b sẽn boond t'a Zeezi wã n bui tom n bɛ mam ninã, la b yeel maam tɩ m kẽng Siloe bãkẽ wã n tɩ widg m nenga. Mam kẽngame n tɩ widg m nenga, la m ninã pukame." 
John9:12 La nebã soka raoã yaa: Rao-kãng bee yɛ? La a leokame: «Mam ka mi ye.» 
John9:13 Nebã talla ned ning sẽn dag n yaa-a zoangã n kẽng Fariizẽ-dãmbã nengẽ. 
John9:14 Yaool n dag n yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daar la a Zeezi bui tomã n puk raoã ninã. 
John9:15 Fariizẽ-dãmbã me soka rao wã a ninã sẽn maan to-to n puki. La a yeela bãmba: «Sẽn maag-a maamã bɛɛ mam ninã ne tãndo, tɩ mam tɩ widg a nenga, la masã mam neeme.»" 
John9:16 Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm woto, kẽer yeelame: «Rao-kãngã ka yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ ye. Bala, a ka sakd vʋʋsg daar tõodã ye.» Neb a taab dag n yetame: «Yel-wẽn-maand tõe n yɩɩ a wãn n maan bõn-bãn a woto?»" 
John9:17 La welgr kẽe bãmb sʋka. B leb n soka zoangã yaa: «Fo kaset yaa bõe ne ned ning sẽn puk-a fo ninã?» A leokame: «Yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa.» 
John9:18 Sẽn deng b sẽn na n bool dao wã ba-rãmba, Zʋɩf-rãmbã ka tẽ tɩ raoã dag n yɩɩ zoang t'a ninã yaool n puk ye." 
John9:19 B soka a ba-rãmbã yaa: Yaa yãmb bi-ribl la woto, yãmb yet t'a roga ne zondã bɩ? Maana a wãn t'a yãtẽ moasã?" 
John9:20 A ba-rãmbã leokame n yeele: «Tõnd miime t'a yaa tõnd bi-ribla, la t'a roga ne zondo." 
John9:21 La sẽn yɩ to-to t'a yãt moasã wã, tõnd ka mi ye. Tõnd ka mi ned ning sẽn puk-a a ninã me ye. Sok-y-yã-a t'a yʋʋmã seka a sẽn na gom a mengã yelle.»" 
John9:22 Raoã ba-rãmbã goma a woto, bala, b rag n zoeta Zʋɩf-rãmbã. Bala, Zʋɩf-rãmbã dag n seda ne taab n yeel tɩ ned sã n yeel t'a Zeezi yaa Kirisã, bɩ b rig-a n yiis karen-doogẽ wã." 
John9:23 Rẽnda n kɩt t'a ba-rãmbã yeel t'a yʋʋmã yaa wʋsg la b sok-a wã. 
John9:24 Fariizẽ-dãmbã leb n boola rao ning sẽn dag n yaa-a zoangã n yeel-a: Togs sɩd Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga. Tõnd yẽ miime tɩ rao-kãngã yaa yel-wẽn-maanda. 
John9:25 A leokame n yeele: A sã n yaa yel-wẽn-maanda, mam ka mi ye. Bũmb a yembr la mam mi: Yaa tɩ mam dag n yaa zoanga, la tɩ moasã mam neeme." 
John9:26 B soka yẽnda yaa: «A maana foom bõe? A puka fo ninã wãn-wãna?» 
John9:27 Sẽn dag n yaa-a zoangã leoka bãmb n yeele: «Mam zoe n togsa yãmba, la yãmb ka kelg maam ye. Bõe tɩ yãmb dat tɩ mam leb n togs yãmb yɛs tɩ y kelge? Yãmb me dat n lebga bãmb karen-biis la?»" 
John9:28 Fariizẽ-dãmbã tʋʋ raoã n yeel-a yaa: «Foom la bãmb karen-biiga. Tõnd yẽ yaa a Moyiis karen-biisi. 
John9:29 Tõnd miime tɩ Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiisi, la yõwã soabã, tõnd ka mi a sẽn yitẽ ye.»" 
John9:30 Raoã leoka bãmb yaa: «Ad bõn‑kãng sɩd yaa lingr ne maam tɩ yãmb ka mi a sẽn yitẽ ye. Tɩ b yaool n puka mam nini. 
John9:31 Tõnd miime tɩ Wẽnnaam ka leokd yel-wẽn-maandb pʋʋsg ye. La ned sã n waoogd Wẽnnaam la a tũud bãmb daabã, Wẽnnaam leokda a soaba." 
John9:32 Ned nan ka wʋm tɩ ned n puk ned sẽn dog ne zond nin ye. 
John9:33 Dao-kãngã sã n dag n ka yitẽ Wẽnnaam nengẽ, a dag n kõn tõog n maan baa fɩ ye.»" 
John9:34 B leok-a lame n yeele: «Fo yĩngã tõr bee yel-wẽn pʋgẽ, hal f rogem wakat tɩ ta moasã, tɩ fo wa yɛs n na n zãms tõndo?» La b rig-a lame n yiis yɩnga." 
John9:35 A Zeezi wʋmame tɩ b riga raoã n yiis karen-doogẽ wã. A Zeezi yãnd-a lame n yeel-a yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, fo tẽeda Ninsaal Bi-riblã?»" 
John9:36 A leokame n yeele: «Zu-soaba, bãmb yaa ãnda, tɩ mam na n tẽ bãmba?»" 
John9:37 A Zeezi yeel-a lame: Fo yãnd-a lame, sẽn gomd-a ne foomã, yaa yẽnda." 
John9:38 Dẽ, dao wã yeelame yaa: «Zu-soaba, mam tẽedame.» La a wõgemdame n waoog bãmba." 
John9:39 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi yeela raoã yaa: «Mam waa dũni-kãngã pʋgẽ bʋʋd yĩnga, tɩ neb nins sẽn ka yãtã na yã, tɩ neb nins sẽn yãtã na lebg zoense.»" 
John9:40 Fariizẽ-dãmb kẽer sẽn dag n be beenẽ ne a Zeezi, n wʋm gom-kãensã soka bãmb yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd me yaa zoense bɩ?»" 
John9:41 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Yãmb sã n dag n yaẽ zoense, yãmb dag n kõn tallẽ yel-wẽn ye. La Moasã, yãmb yetame: «Tõnd yaa nin‑dãmba.» Woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ y yel-wẽnã paad ne-yã." 
John10:1 35 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned ning sẽn ka tũud piisã yãgr noor n kẽedẽ, n gãndgd zĩig a to n kẽedẽ, a yaa wagdr la fãada." 
John10:2 La ned ning sẽn tũud-a yãgrã noor n kẽedẽ wã, yẽ soab la piisã pe-kɩɩma." 
John10:3 Zag-no-gũudã pakda yãgrã noor n kõ-a, la piisã wʋmda a koɛɛgã. A sẽn so piis ninsã, a boonda ned fãa ne a yʋʋre, n tall-b n yi yɩnga." 
John10:4 A sã n yiis piis nins a sẽn so wã zãnga, a lʋɩta b taoore, la piisã pʋgd-a lame, b sẽn mi a koɛɛgã yĩnga." 
John10:5 Piisã kõn tol n pʋg sãan ye, la b na n zoe n zãaga ne-a, bala, b ka mi sãambã koees ye." 
John10:6 A Zeezi wẽe yel-bũn‑kãngã, la b ka wʋm a võor ye." 
John10:7 A Zeezi leb n yeela bãmb yaa: Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ yaa maam la piisã zag-noore. 
John10:8 Neb nins fãa sẽn deng maam n wa wã yaa wagda la fãadba. La piisã ka kelg-b ye. 
John10:9 Maam la zag-noorã. Sẽn tũ-a maam n kẽ na n paama fãagre. A na n kẽedame la yita, la a na n paama yamdo." 
John10:10 Wagdr sã n wa n watẽ, yaa tɩ zu, n kʋ, la a sãame. La mam waame tɩ piisã na paam vɩɩm, la tɩ b na paam-a sõama." 
John10:11 Maam la pe-kɩɩm-sõngã. Pe-kɩɩm-sõng gẽnegda a yõor a piis yĩnga. 
John10:12 La ned ning b sẽn dɩk t'a gũud piisã, n ka pe-kɩɩmã la a ka so piisã, a sã n yãnd we-baag sẽn wata, a basda piisã n zoe. We-baagã kẽeda piisã n yõg-ba, la a sãeeg-ba." 
John10:13 A sẽn zoetã, yaa tɩ yaa yaood yĩng la a gũud piisã, la b yellã ka pak-a ye. Maam la pe-kɩɩm-sõngã." 
John10:14 Mam mii m piisã, la m piisã mii maam," 
John10:15 wa m ba wã sẽn mi maam tɩ mam me mi m ba wã, la mam kõta m vɩɩmã m piisã yĩnga." 
John10:16 Mam tara piis a taab sẽn ket n nan ka be yãg-kãngã pʋgẽ ye. Kal mam tall bãmb me n wa. B na n wʋma mam koɛɛga, na n yɩɩ bãgr a yembre, la pe-kɩɩm-yɛnga." 
John10:17 M ba nonga maam, bala, mam kɩta m vɩɩmã n na n leb n deeg-a." 
John10:18 Ned ka yiisd mam vɩɩmã ye, la yaa maam n kɩt-a m toore. Mam tara pãn-tõog tɩ kɩs-a, la m tara pãn-tõog me tɩ leb n deeg-a yɛsa. Noor ning m ba sẽn yeel maamã la woto." 
John10:19 Gom-kãens yĩnga, welgr leb n kẽe Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋka." 
John10:20 Wʋsg bãmb sʋkã yeelame yaa: Zĩn n tar a Zeezi! A yaa gãeenga! Bõe tɩ yãmb kelgd-a? 
John10:21 Neb a taab yeelame yaa: Gom-kãensã ka ned zĩn sẽn tar goam ye. Dẽ yĩnga, zĩn tõe n puka zoens nini?" 
John10:22 Wakat-kãng tɩ b dag n maanda bark ningr tigr Zeruzalɛm. Dag n yaa waood wẽnde. 
John10:23 A Zeezi dag n bee a Salmo zãndẽ wã n kẽnda. 
John10:24 Zʋɩf-rãmbã gũbga bãmba n yeele: Hal tɩ ta dabʋr la yãmb na n bas tõnd tɩ d yamã gõodẽ? Yãmb sã n yaa Kirisã, bɩ y togs tõnd vẽenega." 
John10:25 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam togsa yãmba, la yãmb ka tẽed ye. Tʋʋm nins mam sẽn maand ne m ba wã yʋʋrã kɩta mam kaseto." 
John10:26 La yãmb ka tẽed ye, bala, yãmb ka mam piis ye." 
John10:27 Mam piisã wʋmda mam koɛɛga. Mam mi-b lame, la b pʋgda maam." 
John10:28 Mam kõt-b-la vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. B kõn tol n sãam ye, la ned baa a yembr kõn yiis-b mam nugẽ ye." 
John10:29 Mam ba sẽn kõ-a maam piisã yɩɩda fãa, la ned baa a yembr ka tõe n yiis-b m ba nugẽ ye." 
John10:30 Maam ne m ba, tõnd yaa yembre." 
John10:31 Zʋɩf-rãmbã leb n wʋka kug n na n lob a Zeezi. 
John10:32 A Zeezi leb n goma ne bãmb n yeele: Mam wilga yãmb tʋʋm‑sõamyã wʋsg sẽn yit m ba nengẽ tɩ y yãnde. Tʋʋm-sõng bʋg poorẽ la yãmb dat n lob maam kugã? 
John10:33 Zʋɩf-rãmbã leoka bãmb n yeele: Ka tʋʋm-sõng yĩng la tõnd dat n lob yãmb kug ye, yaa Wẽnnaam tʋʋsg yĩnga. Sẽn paase, yãmb sẽn yaa ninsaalã, yãmb geenda y meng wa Wẽnnaam." 
John10:34 A Zeezi leoka bãmb yaa: B ka gʋls yãmb tõogã sebr pʋgẽ tɩ: «Mam yetame tɩ yãmb yaa wẽnnaam-dãmb» sɩda? 
John10:35 Sã n yaa tɩ tõogã boola Wẽnnaam sẽn gom ne neb ninsã tɩ wẽnnaam-dãmba (tõnd miime tɩ ned ka tõe n sãam Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõngã ye)," 
John10:36 yãmb yeta ned ning d ba wã sẽn welg toor la b tʋm-a wã t'a tʋʋsda Wẽnnaam, mam sẽn yeel tɩ m yaa Wẽnnaam bi-riblã yĩnga." 
John10:37 Mam sã n ka tʋmd m ba wã tʋʋmd bɩ y ra tẽ maam ye. 
John10:38 La mam sã n tʋmdame, baa yãmb sã n ka tẽed maam me, bɩ y tẽ tʋʋm-kãense, tɩ y tõe n bãng la y reeg tɩ d ba wã bee mam pʋgẽ, tɩ mam be bãmb pʋgẽ." 
John10:39 Nebã leb n baoome n na n yõk a Zeezi, la a Zeezi põsg-b lame." 
John10:40 A Zeezi leb n leba Zʋrdẽ rʋʋndã, zĩig ning a Zã sẽn deng n lis nebã, la b paa be." 
John10:41 Neb wʋsg waa bãmb nengẽ n yetẽ: A Zã ka maan bõn-bãnd baa a yembr ye. La bũmb nins fãa a Zã sẽn togs ne rao-kãngã yellã yaa sɩda. 
John10:42 Neb wʋsg tẽe bãmb beenẽ. 
John11:1 Dao a yembr n be Betani n ka keem ye. Yẽnda yʋʋr la a Lazaare, A tão‑poak a Maari ne a ma-bi-poak a Mart me dag n vɩɩ tẽn-kãngã." 
John11:2 Yaa Maari‑kãng n rag n kiig tɩdar kaam a Zeezi zug la a yẽes bãmb nao ne a zoobdã. Yaa yẽnda tão a Lazaar n lʋɩ ka-keemã. 
John11:3 Ma-bi-pogs a yiibã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, ad ned ning yãmb sẽn nongã bẽedame.»" 
John11:4 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm woto, b yeelame: «Bã-kãngã ka kũum bãag ye, yaa Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga, la tɩ Wẽnnaam bi-riblã me na n tũnuga rẽnda n paam waoogre.»" 
John11:5 La a Zeezi yaool n dag n nonga a Mart ne a ma-bi-poakã, la a Lazaare." 
John11:6 A Zeezi sẽn wʋm t'a Lazaar ka laafɩ wã, b kell n paa zĩig ning b sẽn dag n be wã rasem a yiib yɛsa." 
John11:7 Rẽ poore, b yeela b karen-biisã tɩ b wa tɩ b leb Zʋʋde." 
John11:8 Karen-biisã yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Karen-saamba, nindaarẽ ka bal tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã dag n dat n lob yãmb ne kuga, tɩ yãmb leb n lebd be?»" 
John11:9 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Yibeoog tɩ ta zaabr ka lɛɛr-dãmb piig la a yiibu sɩda? Ned sã n kẽnd wĩndga, a ka lagsd ye. Bala, a nee dũni‑kãngã vẽenemã." 
John11:10 La ned sã n kẽnd yʋngo, a lagsdame, bala, vẽenem ka be yẽnda pʋgẽ ye.»" 
John11:11 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto n sa, b yeela b karen-biisã yaa: «Tõnd zoa a Lazaar gũsame, la mam na n kẽng n tɩ nek-a lame.»" 
John11:12 Karen-biisã yeela bãmb yaa: A sã n gũsame, rẽnda a na n paama a menga." 
John11:13 A Zeezi dag n gomda a Lazaar kũumã yelle, la b karen-biisã dag n tẽedame tɩ yaa gõeem meng-menga." 
John11:14 Dẽ, a Zeezi yeel-b-la vẽeneg yaa: «A Lazaar kiime.»" 
John11:15 La mam sũur yaa noog m sẽn ka zĩnd be wã yĩnga, tɩ yãmb tõe n tẽ. Wa-y tɩ d kẽng a nengẽ." 
John11:16 Dẽ, a Toma b sẽn boond tɩ Didim yeela karen-biis a taabã yaa: Wa-y tɩ d me tũ bãmb n tɩ naag n ki." 
John11:17 A Zeezi sẽn ta be, b mika b sẽn dag n mum a Lazaar tɩ rab-naaslẽ." 
John11:18 Betani yaool n dag n pẽe ne Zeruzalɛm sẽn zems kɩlo a tãab bala. 
John11:19 Zʋɩf-rãmb wʋsg waa a Maari ne a Mart nengẽ n na n bels-ba, b tão wã kũum yĩnga." 
John11:20 A Mart sẽn wʋm t'a Zeezi watame wã, a yiime n seg bãmba, la a Maari paa yir n zĩẽ." 
John11:21 A Mart yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n dag n beẽ ka, mam tão wã dag n ka na n ki ye.»" 
John11:22 La baa ne moasã, mam miime tɩ yãmb sẽn na kos Wẽnnaam bũmb ning fãa, bãmb na n kõo yãmba." 
John11:23 A Zeezi yeel-a lame: «Fo tão wã na n vʋʋgame.» 
John11:24 A Mart leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam miime t'a na n vʋʋga vʋʋgrã wakate, yaoolem daarã." 
John11:25 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Yaa maam la vʋʋgre, la vɩɩm. Ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed maam baa a sã n ki a na paam vɩɩm." 
John11:26 La ned ning fãa sẽn vɩ n tẽed maam kõn tol n ki ye. Dẽ yĩnga, fo tẽeda woto bɩ?»" 
John11:27 A Mart yeela a Zeezi yaa: «N-yẽe, Zu-soaba, mam tẽedame tɩ yãmb yaa Kirisi, Wẽnnaam bi-riblã, soab ning sẽn tog n wa-a dũniyã zugu.»" 
John11:28 A Mart sẽn gom woto n sa, a loogame. La a boola a ma-bi-poak a Maari n soos n yeel-a tɩ Karen-saamb waame la b boond-a lame." 
John11:29 A Maari sẽn wʋm a woto, a yika tao-tao n babs a Zeezi," 
John11:30 bala, a Zeezi dag n nan n ka kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ ye, b rag n ket n bee zĩig ning a Mart sẽn seg bãmbã." 
John11:31 Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn dag n be yir n belsd a Maari wã sẽn yã t'a yika tao-tao n yi wã, b pʋg-a lame, n tẽed t'a kẽnda yaoogẽ wã n na n tɩ yãbe." 
John11:32 A Maari sẽn ta zĩig ning a Zeezi sẽn be wã, n yãnd bãmbã, a wõgemda bãmb taoor n yeel bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n dag n zĩndẽ ka, mam tão wã dag n ka na n ki ye.»" 
John11:33 A Zeezi sẽn yã a Maari sẽn yãbdã, la b yã Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn tũ yẽnda wã me sẽn yãbdã, bãmb yĩngã rigimdame, la b sũurã sãamame." 
John11:34 A Zeezi sokame yaa: «Yãmb ning-a-la yɛ?» La b leoka a Zeezi n yeele: Zu-soaba, wa n ges-y-yã." 
John11:35 A Zeezi yãbame. 
John11:36 Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeelame yaa: «Ges-y-yã a sẽn dag n nong-a to-to!»" 
John11:37 Bãmb neb kẽer yeelame: Bãmb sẽn puk zoangã ninã, bãmb dag n ka tõe n maan tɩ rao-kãngã ka ki la?" 
John11:38 A Zeezi yĩngã leb n digimdame, la b kẽnga yaoogẽ wã. Dag n yaa tãng bokẽ, tɩ b bilim kugr n yẽd a noorã." 
John11:39 A Zeezi yeelame: «Lak‑y kugrã.» Kiidã tão a Mart yeela a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, a zoe n põogame, bala, a kũumã rasem a naas la rũndã." 
John11:40 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Mam ka yeel foom tɩ fo sã n tẽ, fo na n yãnda Wẽnnaam ziir sɩda?»" 
John11:41 Dẽ, nebã laka kugrã, la a Zeezi nak n gesa yĩngr n yeele: M ba, mam pʋʋsda yãmb barka, y sẽn leok mam kosgã yĩnga." 
John11:42 Mam yẽ miime tɩ yãmb leokda mam kosg wakat fãa, la yaa neb kʋʋngã sẽn be ka wã yĩng la mam sẽn gomdã, tɩ b na tẽ tɩ yaa yãmb n tʋm maam.»" 
John11:43 A Zeezi sẽn gom woto n sɛ, b goma ne pãng n yeele: «Lazaare, wa yi ka!»" 
John11:44 La sẽn dag n ki-a wã yiime, la a nao wã ne a nusã vila ne pɛɛla, la a nengã dag n luda ne peende. A Zeezi yeela nebã tɩ b lood a pɛɛlã, la b bas-a t'a looge." 
John11:45 Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn dag n wa a Maari nengẽ, n yãnd bũmb nins a Zeezi sẽn maanã, wʋsg tẽe bãmba." 
John11:46 La neb kẽer kẽngame n tɩ yã Fariizẽ-dãmbã n togs-b bũmb ning a Zeezi sẽn maanã. 
John11:47 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmba, la Faariisẽ-dãmbã tigsa kaorengã yɛl bʋ-bʋʋdbã n yeele: «Tõnd na n maana a wãna? Raoã maanda bõn-bãn wʋsgo." 
John11:48 Tõnd sã n bas-a t'a ket n maandẽ, nebã fãa na n tẽe-a lame, la Rome-dãmbã na n waa n sãama tõnd wẽnd doogã ne d soolmã.»" 
John11:49 Bãmb ned a yembre, a Kayiifi, sẽn dag n yaa-a maan-kʋʋd kãsem yʋʋm‑kãngã yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb ka wʋmd yellã baa fɩ." 
John11:50 Yãmb ka ne tɩ ned a yembr sã n ki nebã fãa yĩng tɩ soolmã tõr da sãam n são?» 
John11:51 Mik ka ne a mengã yam la a gom a woto ye. A sẽn dag n yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem yʋʋm‑kãngã, a togsa bãngr gomd n wilg t'a Zeezi tog n kii bãmb soolmã yĩnga." 
John11:52 La ka bãmb soolmã yĩng bal ye, la yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ me n tigim Wẽnnaam kambã sẽn sãeegã, tɩ b lebg yĩng a yembre." 
John11:53 Sẽn sɩng ne da-kãnga, Zʋɩf-rãmbã yãka yam tɩ kʋ a Zeezi." 
John11:54 Dẽ, a Zeezi dag n ka leb n pukd b meng n kẽnd Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋk ye. La bãmb yii be n kẽng zĩig sẽn pẽ ne we-rasempʋɩɩgã, tẽng b sẽn boond tɩ Efrayiim pʋgẽ. Bãmb zĩnda be ne b karen-biisã." 
John11:55 Zʋɩf-rãmbã Pak tigrã dag n kolgame, la tẽngã neb wʋsg kẽnga Zeruzalɛm, sẽn deng tigrã, n na n tɩ yɩlg b mense." 
John11:56 B rag n baooda a Zeezi la b yet taab wẽnd doogẽ wã yaa: «Yãmb tagsg yaa bõe ne b yellã? B na n kell n paame n ka wa tigrã?» 
John11:57 Mik maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã dag n yeela nebã tɩ ned sã n bãng a Zeezi zĩiga, bɩ a wa n wilg tɩ b tɩ yõk-ba." 
John12:1 Pakã tigr ket tɩ rasem a yoobe, a Zeezi waa Betani, tẽng ning a Lazaar bãmb sẽn vʋʋg-a t'a yi n bas kũumã sẽn be wã." 
John12:2 La b segla rɩɩb be bãmb yĩnga. A Mart dag n pʋɩta rɩɩbã, la a Lazaar dag n naaga ne neb nins sẽn zĩ ne a Zeezi n dɩtẽ wã." 
John12:3 A Maari dɩka tɩdar sẽn maan ne naar halaale, n tat litr pʋɩ-sʋka, t'a ligd ya wʋsgo, n waal a Zeezi nao wã, n yẽes-b ne a zoobdo. La roogã fãa lebga tɩdarã yũugu." 
John12:4 A Zeezi karen-biig a yembre, a Zʋdaas Iskaryo, soab ning sẽn na n zãmb-a bãmbã yeelame yaa:" 
John12:5 «Bõe tɩ b ka koos tɩdarã deniye kobs-tã n kõ naong rãmba?» 
John12:6 A sẽn gom woto wã, ka rat n yeel t'a kũmda naong rãmbã ye. Yaa t'a rag n yaa wagdre, la yẽnda sẽn zãad ligdã korgã, b sã n ning bũmb be fãa, a vaagd-a lame." 
John12:7 La a Zeezi yeelame yaa: «Bas-y pagã t'a bĩng tɩdar-kãngã mam mumb yĩnga. 
John12:8 Naong rãmbã bee ne yãmb wakat fãa, la yãmb kõn paam tɩ mam be ne yãmb wakat fãa ye.»" 
John12:9 Zʋɩf-rãmbã wʋsg wʋmame t'a Zeezi bee Betani, la neb kʋʋng waa be. B sẽn wa wã, ka a Zeezi yĩng bal ye, la yaa tɩ yã a Lazaar a Zeezi sẽn vʋʋg t'a yi kũum sʋkã." 
John12:10 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb yẽsa ne taab n na n kell n kʋ a Lazaar me," 
John12:11 bala, Zʋɩf-rãmbã wʋsg basda bãmba n tẽed a Zeezi, a Lazaar yĩnga." 
John12:12 Vẽkembeoogo, neb kʋʋng wʋsgã sẽn wa Zeruzalɛm tigrã yĩngã, wʋmame t'a Zeezi kẽeda Zeruzalɛm." 
John12:13 Dẽ, nebã kaoo koms-vãad n yi n seg bãmba, n kelemdẽ n yetẽ: Hozaana, bark bee ned ning sẽn wat ne Zu-soabã yʋʋre, Israyɛll Rĩmã zugu." 
John12:14 A Zeezi yãnda bõn-bila, n zomb-a wa b sẽn gʋlsã. B gʋlsame n yeele:" 
John12:15 Siyõ nebã, da maan-y rabeem ye. Ad yãmb Rĩma zomba bõan-bil n watẽ." 
John12:16 Bãmb karen-biisã ka wʋm ad-a võor sɩngrẽ wã ye. La a Zeezi sẽn wa n paam waoogrã, karen-biisã yaool n tẽegame tɩ b dag n gʋlsa yel-kãens yell a Zeezi wɛɛngẽ, la tɩ nebã pidsa sẽn gʋlsã." 
John12:17 Neb kʋʋngã sẽn dag n be ne a Zeezi wakat ning bãmb sẽn bool a Lazaar yaoogẽ wã, n vʋʋg-a t'a yik n bas kũumã rag n kɩta a Zeezi kaseto." 
John12:18 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ nebã yi n seg bãmbã, bala, b wʋmame t'a Zeezi maana bõn-bãn‑kãnga." 
John12:19 Dẽ, Fariizẽ-dãmbã yeela taab yaa: «Yãmb neeme tɩ y ka tõogd baa bilf ye. Nebã fãa pʋgda bãmba.»" 
John12:20 Gɛrk-rãmb n dag n be neb nins sẽn wa Zeruzalɛm n na n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam tigrã wakatã sʋka. 
John12:21 Bãmb kolga Galɩle Betsayɩda ned a Filip n kos-a n yeele: «M Kẽema, tõnd dat n yãnda a Zeezi.»" 
John12:22 A Filip kẽngame n tɩ togs a Ãndere, la bãmb b yiibã kẽngame n tɩ togs a Zeezi." 
John12:23 A Zeezi leoka bãmb a woto: Wakat taame tɩ ninsaal Bi-riblã tog n paam waoogre. 
John12:24 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ka-buug sã n ka kẽ tãndẽ n pa be n ki, a paada a yembre. La a sã n ki, a womda biis wʋsgo." 
John12:25 Ned ning sẽn nong a vɩɩm menesd-a lame. La ned ning sẽn na kisg a vɩɩm dũni‑kãngã pʋgẽ, a na n bĩng-a‑la wakat sẽn kõn sa wã yĩnga." 
John12:26 Ned sã n dat n tʋm mam yĩnga, bɩ a tũ maam. La mam sẽn be zĩig ninga, mam tʋmtʋmdã me na n bee be. Ned sã n tʋmd mam yĩnga, m ba na n waooga a soaba." 
John12:27 Moas-moasã wã, sũ‑sãang n tar maam. La mam na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Mam na n yeela m ba tɩ b fãag maam ne wakat-kãngã bɩ? La hal tɩ ta moasã, yaa wakat‑kãng yĩng la mam wa-yã." 
John12:28 M ba, waoog-y y yʋʋrã! Dẽ, koɛɛg zĩnda yĩngr n yeele: Mam waooga m yʋʋrã, la m na n leb n waoog-a lame yɛsa." 
John12:29 Neb kʋʋngã sẽn dag n yas be, n wʋm koɛɛgã dag n yetame tɩ yaa sa-tãsga. Neb a taab dag n yetame tɩ malɛɛk n gom ne a Zeezi." 
John12:30 A Zeezi leb n gomame n yeele: «Ka mam yĩng la koɛɛgã sẽn gom tɩ yãmb wʋma ye, yaa yãmb yĩnga." 
John12:31 Moasã yaa dũni‑kãngã bʋʋd wakate. Moasã, b na n diga dũni‑kãngã naabã n yiis yɩnga." 
John12:32 La b sã n wa n zẽk maam tɩ m bas tẽn-gãongã, mam na n taka nebã fãa tɩ b wa m nengẽ.»" 
John12:33 A Zeezi goma a woto n na n wilg kũum ninga buud bãmb sẽn na n ki wã. 
John12:34 Kʋʋngã leoka bãmb n yeele: «A Moyiis tõogã wilga tõnd tɩ Kirisã paada wakat sẽn kõn sa. Bõe tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b zẽk Ninsaal Bi-riblã? Ninsaal Bi-ribl‑kãng yaa ãnda?» 
John12:35 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Vẽenemã ket n bee yãmb sʋk wakat bilf yĩnga. Yãmb sẽn tar vẽenemã wakate, bɩ y kẽne, tɩ lik bida da wa n ling yãmb ye. Sẽn kẽnd-a lik bida pʋgẽ ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye." 
John12:36 Wakat ning yãmb sẽn tar vẽenemã, bɩ y tẽ-a, tɩ y na lebg vẽenem kamba. A Zeezi yeela rẽnda, la b loog n zãag ne nebã n tɩ soonde." 
John12:37 Baa ne a Zeezi sẽn maan bõn-bãn wʋsg a woto nebã taoorã, b ka tẽ bãmb ye," 
John12:38 tɩ gomd ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sẽn yeelã pidi. A yeelame yaa: «Zu-soaba, ãnda n tẽ koɛɛg ning tõnd sẽn moona? La Zu-soabã pãng puka ne ãnda?»" 
John12:39 Sẽn paase, b ka tõe n tẽ ye, bala, a Ezayi leb n yeela a woto:" 
John12:40 «Wẽnnaam luda b ninã, la b keng b sũyã, tɩ b ra wa n yãnd ne b ninã, tɩ b ra tags n wʋm a võore, la tɩ b da wa n tek yam, tɩ mam maag-b ye.»" 
John12:41 Yaa woto la a Ezayi gom wakat ning a sẽn yãnd a Zeezi ziirã n gom bãmb yellã. 
John12:42 Baoosgo, baa nanambsã sʋka, wʋsg tẽe a Zeezi, la Fariizẽ-dãmbã yĩnga, b ka sak n togs tɩ b tẽedame ye, tɩ b ra wa n rig-b n yiis karen-doogẽ wã ye." 
John12:43 Bala, b dag n nonga ninsaalbã waoogr n yɩɩd Wẽnnaam sẽn na n waoog bãmbã." 
John12:44 A Zeezi zẽka b koɛɛg n yeele: «Sẽn tẽed-a maam ka tẽed maam ye, yaa sẽn tʋm-a maamã la a tẽeda," 
John12:45 la sẽn yãa maam yãa sẽn tʋm-a maamã. 
John12:46 Mam sẽn yaa vẽenemã, mam waa dũni pʋgẽ, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed maam kõn pa lik pʋgẽ ye." 
John12:47 Ned sã n wʋm mam goamã n ka reege, ka maam n bʋʋd a soabã bʋʋd ye: Bala, mam sẽn wa wã, ka tɩ bʋ dũni nebã bʋʋd ye, la yaa tɩ fãag-ba." 
John12:48 Sẽn tõdg-a maam la a ka reegd mam goamã, a tara a bʋ-kaooda: Goam nins mam sẽn goma n na n kao yẽnda bʋʋd yaoolem daare." 
John12:49 Bala, mam goamã ka yit mam nengẽ ye. La m ba, sẽn tʋm-a maamã, bãmb b toor n wilg maam m sẽn tog n yeel la m gome." 
John12:50 La mam miime tɩ bãmb noorã yaa vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa. Woto, bũmb nins mam sẽn gomdã, yaa wa m ba sẽn yeel maamã»" 
John13:1 Sẽn deng Pakã tigrã, a Zeezi sẽn mi tɩ bãmb wakat taame tɩ yi dũni‑kãngã n kẽng b ba nengẽ wã, bãmb nonga b nebã sẽn dag n be dũni pʋgẽ tɩ bãmb nongẽ wã, hal ne nonglem tɛkẽ." 
John13:2 Rɩɩbã wakate, rẽ tɩ Sʋtãanã dag n ninga a Sɩmo biig a Zʋdaas sũurẽ t'a zãmb a Zeezi n yõk n kõ." 
John13:3 A Zeezi sẽn mi tɩ b ba wã ninga bũmb fãa bãmb nugẽ, la b mi tɩ bãmb yii Wẽnnaam nengẽ n wa, la tɩ b leb n lebda beenẽ wã," 
John13:4 b yik n basa rɩɩbã, n yees b futã, la b rɩk peend n sẽbg b sɛɛga." 
John13:5 Rẽ poore, b pʋdga koom laagẽ, n sɩng n waasd b karen-biisã nao la b yẽesd-b ne peendã sẽn sẽbg bãmb sɛɛgã." 
John13:6 Bãmb taa a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛre, la a yeela bãmb yaa: Zu-soaba, yãmb n na n waas mam nao wã?" 
John13:7 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: Fo ka wʋmd mam sẽn maandã võor moasã ye, la sã n yɩ bilfu, f na yaool n wʋme." 
John13:8 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela a Zeezi yaa: Ayo! Yãmb kõn waas mam nao abada! A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: Mam sã n ka waas foom, fo kõn leb n paam baa fɩ mam nengẽ ye." 
John13:9 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr yeela bãmb yaa: Zu-soaba, ka mam nao wã bal la y na n waas ye, yaa ne m nusã la m zugã me." 
John13:10 A Zeezi yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: Sẽn so-a koom ka leb n baood soobo, sã n ka nao wã waasg bal ye. Bala, a yĩngã tõr yaa yɩlemde. Yãmb yaa yɩlma, la ka yãmb fãa ye." 
John13:11 Sɩd me, bãmb dag n mii ned ning sẽn na n zãmb-a bãmbã. Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ bãmb yeel tɩ ka karen-biisã fãa n yaa yɩlmã ye." 
John13:12 A Zeezi sẽn waas b karen-biisã nao n sɛ, la b lebs n yeelg b futã, b leb n zĩnda rɩɩbẽ wã n yeel b karen-biisã yaa: Yãmb wʋma mam sẽn maan yãmbã võore?" 
John13:13 Yãmb boonda maam tɩ karen-saamba la Zu-soaba, la yãmb sẽn yetã zemsame, bala, mam sɩd yaa a boto." 
John13:14 Dẽ, mam sẽn yaa Zu-soab la Karen-saambã sã n waasa yãmb nao. Wã, yãmb me tog n waasa taab nao wã." 
John13:15 Bala, yaa mamsg la mam kõ yãmba, tɩ yãmb me na maan wa mam sẽn maan yãmbã." 
John13:16 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ tʋmtʋmd ka yɩɩd a zu-soab ye, la tẽn-tʋmd me ka yɩɩd sẽn tʋm-a yẽnda wã ye." 
John13:17 Yãmb sã n mi rẽnda, yãmb yaa sũ-noog rãmba, yãmb sã n maand a woto." 
John13:18 Ka yãmb fãa yell la mam sẽn gomdã ye. Mam mii neb nins mam sẽn tũusã. La yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bũmb ning sẽn gʋls Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã pʋgẽ wã pidsi. B yeela be tɩ: «Ned ning sẽn wãbd-a bur ne maamã wẽneg n zabda ne maam.» 
John13:19 Mam pĩnd n togsa yãmb moasã, sẽn deng a pidsgu, t'a sã n wa n pidsi, bɩ yãmb tẽ tɩ mam yaa m sẽn ya." 
John13:20 Mam yeta yãmb sɩd-sɩd tɩ ned sã n deeg mam sẽn tʋm a soaba, a reega maam, la sẽn deeg-a maam deega sẽn tʋm-a maamã." 
John13:21 A Zeezi sẽn gom woto n sa, sũ-sãang yõka bãmba, la b yeelame yaa: Sɩd-sɩda, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb ned a yembr n na n yõk maam n kõ." 
John13:22 Bãmb karen-biisã dag n geta taab n sokd a Zeezi sẽn gomd ned ningã yelle. 
John13:23 A Zeezi karen-biig a yembre, soab ning bãmb sẽn dag n nongã dag n kɩɩ kãntɩɩg rɩɩbã zĩigẽ n yegl a Zeezi." 
John13:24 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr kamsa yẽnda n yeel-a t'a sok a Zeezi tɩ yaa ãnda yell la bãmb sẽn gomdã. 
John13:25 Karen-bi-kãng kɩlla a Zeezi yãoogẽ n yeel-b yaa: Zu-soaba, yaa ãnda?" 
John13:26 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: Yaa ned ning mam sẽn na n suk bur-gɩrg n kõ-a wã. Bãmb suka bur-gɩrgã n kõ Iskaryo Sɩmo biig a Zʋdaase. 
John13:27 A Zʋdaas sẽn deeg burã bal la Sʋtãanã sẽn kẽ yẽnda. A Zeezi yeel-a lame: Fo sẽn na n maan bũmb ningã, maan-a tao-tao." 
John13:28 La neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ be n dɩtẽ ã, baa a yembr ka wʋm a Zeezi sẽn yeel a Zʋdaas woto wã võor ye." 
John13:29 Sɩd me, sẽn dag n yaa a Zʋdaas n zãad bãmb ligdã, kẽer tagsame t'a Zeezi yet-a lame t'a ra bũmb nins bãmb sẽn tog n paam tigrã yĩnga, wall t'a kõ naong rãmbã bũmbu." 
John13:30 A Zʋdaas deega bur-gɩrgã n kell n yik n yi. Dag n yaa yʋngo. 
John13:31 A Zʋdaas sẽn yi, a Zeezi yeelame yaa: Ninsaal bi-riblã paama waoogr moasã, la Wẽnnaam paama waoogr bãmb pʋgẽ." 
John13:32 Wẽnnaam sã n paam waoogr bãmb pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam me na n waooga bãmb b mengã pʋgẽ, la keta bilf bal tɩ b waoog-ba." 
John13:33 M kom-bãoonego, mam sẽn ket n be ne yãmbã, yaa wakat bilf bal yĩnga. Yãmb na n baoo maam, la a wa mam sẽn dag n yeel Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ bãmb ka na n tõog n wa mam sẽn dabdẽ wã, mam yeta yãmb woto me moasã." 
John13:34 Mam kõta yãmb tõ-paalga: «Nong-y taaba. Nong-y taab me wa mam sẽn nong yãmbã. 
John13:35 Yãmb sã n nong taaba, nebã fãa na bãng tɩ yãmb yaa mam karen-biisi.»" 
John13:36 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr yeela bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba, yãmb dabda yɛ?» A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Fo ka tõe n pʋgl maam n kẽng m sẽn dabdẽ wã moasã ye, la kaoosg pʋgẽ, fo na pʋgl n wa.»" 
John13:37 A Pɩyɛɛr yeela bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba, bõe yĩng tɩ mam ka tõe n pʋgl yãmb moasã? Mam na n saka kũum yãmb yĩnga.»" 
John13:38 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Fo na n saka kũum mam yĩnga. Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta foom tɩ no-raoog kõn kelem tɩ fo ka kɩɩs naoor a tãab tɩ f ka mi maam ye.»" 
John14:1 Da sak-y tɩ y sũyã sãam ye. Tẽ-y Wẽnnaam, la y tẽ maam me." 
John14:2 Rot wʋsg be m ba wã yiri, sã kaẽ dẽ, mam dag n na n yeela yãmba. Bala, mam dabdame n na n tɩ segl zĩig yãmb yĩnga." 
John14:3 Dẽ, mam sã n kẽng n tɩ segl zĩigã yãmb yĩnga, mam na n lebg n waa n peega yãmba, tɩ maam sẽn be zĩig ningã, bɩ yãmb me zĩnd be." 
John14:4 Yãmb mii mam sẽn dabd zĩig ningã sore. 
John14:5 A Toma yeela bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba, tõnd ka mi yãmb sẽn dabdẽ ye. Dẽ, tõnd na n yɩɩ a wãn n bãng a sore?»" 
John14:6 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Maam la sore, la sɩda, la vɩɩm. Ned baa a yembr ka tõe n wa m ba nengẽ tɩ ka tũ ne maam ye." 
John14:7 Yãmb sã n dag n miẽ maam, yãmb dag n na miẽ m ba me. La sẽn sɩng ne moasã, yãmb mii bãmba, la yãmb yãnda bãmba.»" 
John14:8 A Filip yeela bãmb yaa: Zu-soaba, wilg-y tõnd y ba wã, la rẽ na sek tõndo." 
John14:9 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: «Filipu, mam be ne yãmb hal daar zãr tɩ fo ket n nan ka bãng maam? Sẽn yãnd-a maam yãnda m ba. Yɩta a wãn tɩ fo yet maam: ‹Wilg tõnd y ba?›" 
John14:10 Fo ka tẽed tɩ mam bee m ba wã pʋgẽ, tɩ m ba wã be mam pʋgẽ la? Goam nins mam sẽn gomd ne yãmbã ka yit mam meng nengẽ ye. M ba sẽn be mam pʋgẽ wã n maand b tʋʋma." 
John14:11 Bɩ y tẽ maam, tɩ mam bee m ba pʋgẽ, tɩ m ba be mam pʋgẽ. Ka rẽ bɩ y tẽ maam tʋʋm kãsemsã yĩnga." 
John14:12 Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ ned ning sẽn tẽed maam me na n tʋma tʋʋm nins mam sẽn tʋmdã, la a na n tʋma tʋʋm kãsems n yɩɩda, bala, mam dabda m ba nengẽ," 
John14:13 la bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn na kos ne mam yʋʋre, mam na n maan-b lame, tɩ m ba wã paam ziir b biigã pʋgẽ." 
John14:14 Yãmb sã n kos maam bũmbu, mam na maane.»" 
John14:15 Yãmb sã n nong maam, y na n saka mam tõodã," 
John14:16 la maam, mam na n bõosa m ba, tɩ b kõ yãmb sõangd a to tɩ b pa ne yãmb wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
John14:17 Sõangd‑kãng yaa sɩd Sɩɩg dũniyã sẽn ka tõe n deege, a sẽn ka ne bãmba la a ka mi‑bã yĩnga. La yãmba, yãmb mii bãmba, bala, b bee ne yãmba, la b na n zĩnda yãmb pʋsẽ." 
John14:18 Mam ka na n bas yãmb kɩɩbd ye, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ." 
John14:19 Bilf bal sã n paase, dũni rãmb kõn leb n yãnd maam ye. La yãmb yẽ, y na n yãnd maam. Bala, mam vɩɩme, la yãmb me na n vɩɩmde." 
John14:20 Badaare, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam bee m ba pʋgẽ, tɩ yãmb be mam pʋgẽ, tɩ mam be yãmb pʋsẽ." 
John14:21 Ned ning sẽn talld-a mam tõodã n sakd-ba, yaa yẽnda soab n nong maam. Ned ning sẽn nong-a maam, m ba na n nong‑a la mam me na n nong-a lame, la m na n puka m meng ne-a." 
John14:22 A Zʋʋde, sẽn ka a Iskaryo yeela bãmb yaa: «Zu-soaba, yɩta a wãn tɩ yaa ne tõnd la yãmb tog n puk y menga, la ka ne dũniyã nebã?»" 
John14:23 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda yaa: «Ned sã n nong maam, a na n saka mam gomde, la m ba na n nonga a soaba. Tõnd na n waa yẽnda nengẽ, n zĩnd yẽnda pʋgẽ." 
John14:24 Ned ning sẽn ka nong-a maam ka sakd mam goam ye. La gomd ning yãmb sẽn wʋmdã ka mam gomd ye, yaa m ba, sẽn tʋm-a maamã gomde." 
John14:25 Mam goma ne yãmb bõn-kãng yelle, mam sẽn ket n be ne yãmb wakate." 
John14:26 La sõangdã, Sɩɩg-sõngã m ba sẽn na n tʋm ne mam yʋʋrã, yaa bãmb n na n zãms yãmb bũmb fãa, la b tẽeg yãmb bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
John14:27 Mam basda laafɩ ne yãmba. Mam kõta yãmb m laafɩ. Mam ka kõt yãmb wa dũni wã sẽn kõtã ye. Bɩ y ra sak tɩ y sũyã sãam wall rabeem yõk yãmb ye. 
John14:28 Yãmb wʋma mam sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ m na n loogame la m na n lebg n waa yãmb nengẽ wã. Yãmb sã n da nongẽ maam, y dag n na maanẽ sũ-noogo, mam sẽn dabd m ba nengẽ wã yĩnga. Bala, m ba yɩɩda maam." 
John14:29 Mam togsa yãmb bõn-kãens moasã tɩ b nan ka ta ye, tɩ b sã n wa n pidsi, bɩ y tẽ." 
John14:30 Mam ka na n tol n leb n gom ne yãmb yɛs ye. Bala, dũni naabã watame. A baa fɩ ka be mam pʋgẽ ye." 
John14:31 La yaa tɩ dũniyã na bãng tɩ mam nonga m ba, la tɩ mam maanda wa m ba sẽn yeel maamã. Yik-y tɩ d loog ka.»" 
John15:1 Mam yaa reezẽ tɩɩg meng-menga, la m ba yaa reezẽ tɩɩgã koaada." 
John15:2 Will ning fãa sẽn tão mam zug n yaool n ka womd biisi, m ba kɛɛgd‑a lame. La will ning fãa sẽn womd biisi, m ba yosd-a lame t'a tõe n wom biis n paase." 
John15:3 B zoe n yosa yãmba, gomd ning mam sẽn togs yãmbã yĩnga." 
John15:4 Pa-y mam pʋgẽ, wa mam sẽn paad yãmb pʋsẽ wã. A wa reezẽ tɩɩg will sẽn ka tõe n wom biis a toore, a sã n ka kell n tong ne reezẽ tɩɩgã, woto me, yãmb ka tõe n wom biisi, y sã n ka pa mam pʋgẽ ye." 
John15:5 Maam la reezẽ tɩɩgã menga, tɩ yãmb ya wilã. Ned ning sẽn paad mam pʋgẽ, tɩ mam paad a soab pʋgẽ womda biis wʋsgo. Bala, sã n ka ne maam, yãmb ka tõe n maan bũmb baa fɩ ye." 
John15:6 Ned sã n ka paad mam pʋgẽ, b na n lob-a-la yɩng wa reezẽ tɩɩg willã, la a na n kʋɩɩme. La b wʋkda wilã n tugund bugum, la bugmã rɩt-b lame." 
John15:7 Yãmb sã n pa mam pʋgẽ, tɩ mam goamã pa yãmb pʋgẽ, bɩ y kos bũmb ning fãa y sẽn data, la b na kõ yãmba." 
John15:8 Yãmb sã n wom biis wʋsgo, m ba na n paama waoogre, la yãmb na n yɩɩ mam karen-biisi." 
John15:9 Mam me nonga yãmb wa m ba sẽn nong maamã. Pa-y mam nonglmã pʋgẽ. 
John15:10 Yãmb sã n tall mam tõodã, yãmb na n paa mam nonglmã pʋgẽ, wa mam me sẽn tall m ba tõod n be bãmb nonglem pʋgẽ wã." 
John15:11 Mam goma ne yãmb a woto, tɩ mam sũ-noogã na zĩnd yãmb pʋgẽ, la tɩ y sũ-noogã na pidi." 
John15:12 Ad mam tõogo: «Nong-y taab wa mam sẽn nong yãmbã.» 
John15:13 Nonglem ka be ninsaal yĩnga, n yɩɩd tɩ kõ f vɩɩm f zo-rãmb yĩng ye." 
John15:14 Yãmb sã n maan bũmb nins mam sẽn yet yãmbã, yãmb yaa mam zo-rãmba." 
John15:15 Mam ka boond yãmb tɩ tʋmtʋmdb ye, bala, tʋmtʋmd ka mi a zu-soab sẽn maand ye. Mam boola yãmb tɩ m zo-rãmba, bala, mam kɩtame tɩ yãmb bãng bũmb nins fãa m ba sẽn togs maamã." 
John15:16 Ka yãmb n yãk maam ye, yaa maam n yãk yãmba, n ning m tʋʋmd yãmb zutu, tɩ yãmb na kẽng n wom biisi, la tɩ yãmb biisã na pa wakat fãa. Woto, bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn na kos m ba ne mam yʋʋre, b na kõ yãmba." 
John15:17 Bũmb ning mam sẽn yet yãmb tɩ y maane, yaa tɩ y nong taaba." 
John15:18 Dũni neb sã n kis yãmba, bãng-y tɩ b reng n kisga maam." 
John15:19 Yãmb sã n dag n yaa dũniyã rẽnda, dũniyã neb dag n na nong bũmb nins a sẽn so. La yãmb sẽn ka dũniyã rẽnda, n paas mam sẽn tũus yãmb n yiis dũniyã neb sʋkã yĩnga, dũniyã rãmb kisa yãmba." 
John15:20 Tẽeg-y gomd ning mam sẽn yeel yãmbã. Mam yeela yãmb tɩ tʋmtʋmd ka yɩɩd a zu-soab ye. B sã n namsa maam, b na n namsa yãmb me. B sã n deega mam goamã, b na n deega yãmb goam me." 
John15:21 La b na n maana yãmb bõn-kãensã fãa mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, bala, b ka mi sẽn tʋm-a maamã ye." 
John15:22 Mam sã n dag n ka waẽ, la m dag n ka gomẽ ne-ba, beegr dag n kõn zĩnd b zut ye. La moasã, b ka tar padeng sẽn na n padem b yel-wẽnã yĩng ye." 
John15:23 Sẽn kis-a maam kisa m ba me. 
John15:24 Mam sã n dag n ka maanẽ tʋʋm nins ned baa a yembr sẽn nan ka maan bãmb sʋkã, beegr dag n kõn zĩnd b zut ye. Moasã, b yãnda mam tʋʋmã, la b kisga maam ne m ba wã fãa." 
John15:25 La beemã kẽeme, tɩ bũmb ning sẽn gʋls bãmb tõogã pʋgẽ wã pidsi. A yeela be yaa: «Bãmb kisga maam zaalem bala.»" 
John15:26 Sõangdã mam sẽn na n deeg m ba nengẽ n tʋm yãmbã, sɩd Sɩɩgã sẽn yit m ba pʋgẽ wã sã n wa, b na n kɩsa mam kaseto," 
John15:27 la yãmb me na n kɩsa mam kaseto, yãmb sẽn be ne maam hal sɩngr wẽndẽ wã yĩnga." 
John16:1 Mam goma ne yãmb a woto tɩ bũmb da wa kɩt tɩ yãmb lʋɩ ye. 
John16:2 B na n diga yãmb n yiis karen-dotã pʋse, la wakat pʋs n watame tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n kʋ-a yãmb na tẽ tɩ yẽnda maanda Wẽnnaam tʋʋmde." 
John16:3 B na n maana a woto, bala, b ka bãng m ba, wall maam ye." 
John16:4 Mam goma ne yãmb a woto, tɩ wakat sã n wa ta, bɩ yãmb tẽeg tɩ mam dag n yeela yãmba. Mam ka yeel yãmb ad-a hal sɩngrẽ ye, bala, mam dag n bee ne yãmba." 
John16:5 Moasã, mam lebda sẽn tʋm-a maamã nengẽ, la yãmb ned baa a yembr ka sokd maam tɩ mam dabda yɛɛnẽ ye." 
John16:6 La mam sẽn gom ne yãmb bõn-kãng yellã yĩnga, sũ-sãang n pid yãmba." 
John16:7 Baoosgo, mam yeta yãmb sɩda, tɩ mam sã n looge, tara yõod ne yãmba. Bala, mam sã n ka looge, sõangdã ka na n wa yãmb nengẽ ye. La mam sã n kẽnge, mam na n tʋm-b lame n kõ-yã." 
John16:8 La b sã n wa, b na n kɩtame tɩ dũniyã neb sak n deeg sẽn kẽed ne yel-wẽnã yelle, la tɩrlemã yelle, la bʋʋdã yelle." 
John16:9 B na n sak n deega sẽn kẽed yel-wẽnã yellã, bala, b ka tẽed maam ye." 
John16:10 B na n deega tɩrlmã yellã, bala, mam dabda m ba nengẽ, la tɩ yãmb ka na n leb n yãnd maam yɛs ye." 
John16:11 B na n deega bʋʋdã yellã, bala, dũni-kãngã naabã bʋʋd kaoome." 
John16:12 Bũmb wʋsg la mam ket n tar n na n togs yãmba, la yãmb ka tõe n wʋm-b moasã ye." 
John16:13 La sɩd Sɩɩgã sã n wa, b na n tɛɛ yãmb sɩdã fãa pʋgẽ. Bala, b ka na n gom b sẽn dat ye, b na n togsa yãmb bũmb nins b sẽn wʋme, la b na n togsa yãmb bũmb sẽn be taoor n watẽ." 
John16:14 Bãmb na n waooga maam, bala, b na n dɩka bũmb nins sẽn yaa mam dẽnd n togs yãmba." 
John16:15 M ba sẽn tar fãa yaa maam n so. Dẽ n kɩt tɩ mam yeel tɩ sɩd Sɩɩgã na n dɩka bũmb nins sẽn yaa mam dẽndã n togs yãmbã. 
John16:16 Sã n yɩ bilfu, yãmb ka na n leb n yãnd maam ye, la sã n leb n yɩ bilf n paase, yãmb na n leb n yãnda maam, [bala, mam dabda m ba nengẽ.]" 
John16:17 Dẽ, bãmb karen-biisã yeela taab yaa: «Bãmb sẽn yeel tɩ sã n yɩ bilfu tõnd ka na n leb n yãnd bãmba, la sã n leb n yɩ bilf n paase tõnd na n leb n yãnda bãmbã, n leb n yeel tɩ b rabda b ba nengẽ wã, a võorã yaa bõe?»" 
John16:18 Dẽ, karen-biisã yeelame yaa: «Bõe gomd la b sẽn gomdã? ‹Sã n yɩ bilfu?› Tõnd ka mi b sẽn gomd bũmb ning yell ye.»" 
John16:19 A Zeezi sẽn dag n mi tɩ b karen-biisã na n soka bãmbã, b yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb sogsda taab ne mam sẽn yeel tɩ bilf sã n paase, yãmb ka na n leb n yãnd maamã, la sã n leb n yɩ bilf n paase, yãmb na n leb n yãnda maamã." 
John16:20 Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb na n yãbame n wiisi, la dũniyã neb sũy na n yɩɩ noogo. Yãmb na n yãnda sũ-sãanga, la yãmb sũ-sãangã na n tekame n lebg sũ-noogo." 
John16:21 Pag rogem sã n ta, sũ-sãams n tar-a, bala, a wakatã taame. La a sã n dog biigã n sa, a ka leb n tẽr a toogã yell ye, a sũur sẽn noom ne ned sẽn dogã yĩngã." 
John16:22 Moasã, yãmb tara sũ-sãamse, la mam na n leb n yãnda yãmba, yãmb sũyã na n yɩɩ noodo, la ned baa a yembr kõn yiis yãmb sũ-noogã ye." 
John16:23 Da-kãng daare, yãmb kõn leb n sok maam bũmb baa a yembr yell ye. Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ bũmb ning yãmb sẽn na n kos m ba, b na n kõo yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
John16:24 Hal tɩ ta moasã, yãmb nan ka kos bũmb ne mam yʋʋr ye. Kos-y tɩ y na n deegame, tɩ y sũ-noogã tõe n pid zãnga.»" 
John16:25 Mam goma ne yãmb a woto ne yel-bũna. Wakat n wat tɩ mam ka na n leb n gom ne yãmb ne yel-bũn ye, la mam na n togsa yãmb m ba wã yell vẽenega." 
John16:26 Badaare, yãmb na n kosa ne mam yʋʋre, la mam ka yet tɩ m na n bõosa m ba yãmb yĩng ye." 
John16:27 Bala, m ba wã meng nonga yãmba, bala, yãmb nonga maam, la y tẽeme tɩ mam yii Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
John16:28 Mam yii Wẽnnaam nengẽ n wa dũniyã pʋgẽ. Moasã, mam yita dũniyã pʋgẽ, la mam dabda m ba nengẽ." 
John16:29 Bãmb karen-biisã yeela bãmb yaa: Ges-y-yã, yãmb gomda ne tõnd vẽeneg moasã, n ka leb n gomd baa fɩ yell ne yel-bũn ye." 
John16:30 Moasã, tõnd miime tɩ yãmb mii bũmb fãa, la tɩ yãmb ka baood tɩ ned sok yãmb ye. Yaa rẽnda yĩng la tõnd sẽn tẽed tɩ yãmb yii Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã." 
John16:31 A Zeezi leoka bãmb n yeele: Yãmb tẽedame moasã? 
John16:32 Ad wakat n wate, la a zoe n taame, tɩ b na n sãeeg yãmb fãa yembr-yembre, la yãmb na n basa maam m yembre. La mam ka m yembr ye. Bala, m ba bee ne maam." 
John16:33 Mam goma ne yãmb a woto tɩ yãmb tõe n paam vɩ‑bãan mam pʋgẽ. Yãmb na n paama namsg dũniyã pʋgẽ. La bɩ y keng y sũyã, bala, mam tõoga dũniyã." 
John17:1 A Zeezi sẽn gom woto n sɛ, bãmb nak n gesa yĩngr n yeele: M ba, wakat taame. Waoog-y y bi-riblã, tɩ yẽnda me waoog yãmba!" 
John17:2 La wa yãmb sẽn kõ yẽnda noor ning Ninsaal buud fãa zutã, bãmb kõta neb nins fãa yãmb sẽn kõ yẽnda wã vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa." 
John17:3 La vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã yaa tɩ nebã na bãng yãmb sẽn yaa y yembre, n yaa sɩd Wẽnnaamã, la b bãng a Zeezi Kirisi, yãmb sẽn tʋm a soabã." 
John17:4 Mam kɩtame tɩ yãmb paam waoogr tẽng zugu. Mam sɛɛsa tʋʋmd ning yãmb sẽn kõ maam tɩ m maanã. 
John17:5 Dẽ, moasã, m ba, waoog-y maam y meng nengẽ ne ziir ning mam sẽn dag n tar yãmb nengẽ sẽn deng dũni belmã." 
John17:6 Mam puka yãmb yʋʋrã neb nins yãmb sẽn yiis dũniyã pʋgẽ n kõ maamã. Yãmb n dag n so-ba, la yãmb kõ-b-la maam, la b reega yãmb goamã." 
John17:7 Moasã, b bãngame tɩ bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn kõ maamã yita yãmb nengẽ." 
John17:8 Bala, mam togs-b-la goam nins yãmb sẽn kõ maamã. B reega goamã, la b bãnga sɩd-sɩd tɩ mam yii yãmb nengẽ, la b tẽeme tɩ yãmb n tʋm maam." 
John17:9 Yaa bãmb yĩng la mam sẽn pʋʋsdã. Mam ka pʋʋsd dũniyã neb yĩng ye, yaa neb nins yãmb sẽn kõ maamã yĩnga, bala, bãmb yaa yãmb nebã" 
John17:10 la tɩ bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn so yaa yãmb n so, la yãmb sẽn so yaa maam n so. La mam paamda waoogr bãmb pʋgẽ." 
John17:11 Mam ka leb n be dũni‑kãngã pʋgẽ ye, la bãmb ket n bee a pʋgẽ, tɩ mam wat yãmb nengẽ. M ba sẽn ya sõmblem soaba, tall-y-b yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga, yʋʋr ning yãmb sẽn kõ maamã, tɩ bãmb na lebg yembr wa tõnd sẽn yaa yembrã." 
John17:12 Mam sẽn dag n be ne bãmbã wakate, mam dag n gũuda neb nins yãmb sẽn kõ maamã ne yãmb yʋʋre. Mam kogl-b lame tɩ ned baa a yembr ka menem ye, sã n ka sẽn dag n tog n sãam-a wã, tɩ yãmb gʋls-sõamyã paam pidsgã." 
John17:13 Moasã, mam wata yãmb nengẽ, la mam gomda a woto dũniyã pʋgẽ, tɩ nebã na paam mam sũ-noog sẽn pid zãngã." 
John17:14 Mam kõo bãmb yãmb goamã, la dũniyã neb kisga bãmba, bala, bãmb ka dũniyã neb wa mam me sẽn ka dũni nedã." 
John17:15 Mam ka kot yãmb tɩ y yiis-b dũni ye, la yaa tɩ yãmb na gũ-b ne wẽng soabã." 
John17:16 Bãmb ka dũni neb ye, wa mam me sẽn ka dũni nedã." 
John17:17 Soog‑y bãmb zãng ne‑y sɩdã. Yaa yãmb goamã la sɩdã. 
John17:18 Mam tʋma bãmb dũniyã pʋgẽ wa yãmb sẽn tʋm maam dũni pʋgẽ wã me. 
John17:19 Mam welga m meng toor bãmb yĩnga, tɩ bãmb me na welg toor sɩdã pʋgẽ." 
John17:20 Ka bãmb yĩng bal la mam pʋʋsd ye. Yaa neb nins sẽn na tẽ maam bãmb goam yĩngã yĩng me," 
John17:21 tɩ bãmb fãa na lebg yembre, wa yãmba, m ba sẽn be mam pʋgẽ, tɩ mam be yãmb pʋgẽ wã. Bɩ bãmb me lebg yembr tõnd pʋgẽ, tɩ dũniyã nebã na tẽ tɩ yaa yãmb n tʋm maam." 
John17:22 La mam kõo bãmb ziir ning yãmb sẽn kõ maamã, tɩ bãmb na lebg yembr wa tõnd sẽn yaa yembrã," 
John17:23 tɩ mam be bãmb pʋgẽ, tɩ yãmb be mam pʋgẽ, tɩ b na lebg yembr fasɩ, la tɩ dũniyã neb na bãng tɩ yaa yãmb n tʋm maam, la tɩ yãmb nonga bãmb wa yãmb sẽn nong maamã." 
John17:24 M ba, mam datame tɩ neb nins yãmb sẽn kõ maamã me na zĩnd ne maam zĩig ning mam sẽn be wã, tɩ b na get mam ziirã, ziir ning yãmb sẽn kõ maam, yãmb sẽn nong maam hal sẽn deng dũni yẽbgrã yĩnga." 
John17:25 M ba sẽn yaa tɩrga, dũni neb ka bãng yãmb ye, la maam yẽ, mam bãnga yãmba, la nin-bãmbã bãngame tɩ yaa yãmb n tʋm maam." 
John17:26 Mam kɩtame tɩ b bãng yãmb yʋʋrã, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ b bãng-a, tɩ nonglem ning yãmb sẽn nong maamã na zĩnd bãmb pʋse, la tɩ mam na zĩnd bãmb pʋse." 
John18:1 A Zeezi sẽn gom woto n sa, b yii ne b karen-biisã n kẽng Sedrõ kʋɩl-bilã rʋʋnd a to wã. Zẽed zĩig n be be, la a Zeezi kẽe be ne b karen-biisã." 
John18:2 A Zʋdaase, soab ning sẽn da zãmbd-a bãmb n na n yõk n kõ wã rag n mii zĩ-kãng sõama, bala, a Zeezi ne b karen-biisã dag n tigma taab be naoor wʋsgo." 
John18:3 Dẽ, a Zʋdaas peega sodaas sulli, ne gũudbã maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne Fariizẽ-dãmbã sẽn tʋmã, tɩ b zãad bug-vɩlemse, la fɩtl-dãmba, la zab-teedo, n kẽng zĩigẽ wã." 
John18:4 A Zeezi sẽn mi bũmb nins fãa sẽn na n paam bãmbã, b kolga nebã n yeel-b yaa: Yãmb baooda ãnda?" 
John18:5 La b leoka bãmb tɩ yaa Nazarɛt Zeezi wã. La a Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: Yaa maam! A Zʋdaase, soab ning sẽn yõkd bãmb n na n kõ wã dag n bee ne nebã." 
John18:6 Wakat ning a Zeezi sẽn yeel tɩ: «yaa maamã,» nebã tarame n lʋɩ tẽnga." 
John18:7 A Zeezi leb n sok-b lame yaa: Ãnda la yãmb baooda? La b yeelame tɩ yaa Nazarɛt Zeezi wã. 
John18:8 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: Mam yeela yãmb tɩ yaa maam. Dẽ, sã n yaa maam la yãmb baooda, bɩ y bas nin-kãensã tɩ b looge." 
John18:9 Yaa sẽn na yɩl tɩ bãmb sẽn dag n yeelã pidsi: Neb nins yãmb sẽn kõ maamã, ned baa a yembr ka menem ye." 
John18:10 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr dag n tara zabr sʋʋga, la a wõog-a lame n kɛ maan-kʋʋd kãsmã tʋmtʋmd n fiuug a rɩtg tʋbre. Tʋmtʋmdã yʋʋr la a Malkuusi." 
John18:11 A Zeezi yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: Lebs f zabr sʋʋgã a wʋʋgẽ. Mam ka na n yũ bõn-yũudl ning m ba sẽn kõ maamã la? 
John18:12 Dẽ, sodaasã sull ne b sodaas naabã, la Zʋɩf-rãmbã gũudbã yõka a Zeezi n sẽbe." 
John18:13 B reng n talla bãmb n kẽng a Ãnd yiri, bala, yẽnda dag n yaa a Kayif sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem yʋʋm‑kãngã rɛɛmba." 
John18:14 Yaa a Kayif n dag n sagl Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ ned a yembr tãa sã n ki soolmã nebã yĩng n são wã. 
John18:15 Mik t'a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zeezi karen-biig a to dag n pʋgda a Zeezi. Maan-kʋʋd kãsmã dag n mii karen-bi-kãnga, la karen-biiga tũu a Zeezi n kẽ maan-kʋʋd kãsmã zakẽ," 
John18:16 la a Pɩyɛɛr paa yɩnga, zag-noorã sɛɛga. Karen-biig a to wã maan-kʋʋd kãsmã sẽn mi wã yiime n gom ne pag ning sẽn gũud zakã noorã, n kɩt t'a Pɩyɛɛr kẽ." 
John18:17 Dẽ, tʋmtʋmd poakã, zag-no-gũudã yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: Fo ka rao-kãngã karen-biig a yembr sɩda? La a Pɩyɛɛr yeelame tɩ yẽnda ka bãmb karen-biig ye." 
John18:18 Tʋmtʋmdbã ne gũudbã dag n yasa be. La waood yĩnga, b dag n yõgna saal bugum n wootẽ. A Pɩyɛɛr me dag n bee ne bãmb n woot bugmã." 
John18:19 Maan-kʋʋd kãsmã soka a Zeezi b karen-biisã yelle, la bũmb nins b sẽn zãmsd nebã yelle." 
John18:20 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: Mam goma nebã fãa taoor wakat fãa, mam zãmsa nebã karen-doogẽ la wẽnd doogẽ wã, zĩig ning Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn tigimd taabã, la mam ka soos n gom baa fɩ." 
John18:21 Bõe tɩ y sokd maam bumb nins m sẽn goma? Sok‑y neb nins sẽn kelg-b maamã bãmb mii bũmb nins mam sẽn gomã! 
John18:22 A Zeezi sẽn gom woto wã, gũud a yembr sẽn dag n be be wẽe a Zeezi pɛk n yeele: «Yaa woto la fo leokd maan-kʋʋd kãsmã?»" 
John18:23 A Zeezi leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Mam gomdã sã n yaa wẽnga, bɩ f wilg a sẽn yaa wẽng zĩig ninga. La mam sã n goma sõama, bõe yĩng tɩ f wẽed-ma?»" 
John18:24 Dẽ, a Ãnd kɩtame tɩ b tall a Zeezi b sẽn sẽbã n kẽng maan-kʋʋd a Kayif yiri." 
John18:25 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr dag n bee be n woot bugum. Ned n yeel-a yaa: «Fo me ka bãmb karen-biig a yembr sɩda?» Yẽnda kɩɩsame n yeel yaa: «Mam ka bãmb karen-biig ye.» 
John18:26 Maan-kʋʋd kãsmã tʋmtʋmd a yembre, sẽn yaa rogem ne ned ning a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn dag n kɛ a tʋbr n fiuugã yeelame yaa: «Mam ka yã foom zẽedã zĩigẽ ne bãmb sɩda?»" 
John18:27 A Pɩyɛɛr leb n kɩɩsame. La wakat-kãng bala, no-raoog kelmame." 
John18:28 B yii ne a Zeezi a Kayif zakẽ wã n tall-b n kẽng gʋvɛrneerã zakẽ. Dag n yaa yibeoogo. Bãmb mensã ka kẽ zakã pʋg ye, sẽn na yɩl n da rẽgem b mense, n paam n dɩ Pak tigrã." 
John18:29 Dẽ, a Pilat yiime n wa nebã nengẽ n yeel-ba: Bõe rõadg la yãmb tar ne rao-kãngã?" 
John18:30 B leokame n yeele: «A sã n dag n ka maanẽ wẽnga, tõnd dag n kõn tall-a n wa n kõ yãmb ye.»" 
John18:31 Dẽ, a Pilat yeel-b lame yaa: «Bɩ yãmb mensã reeg-a n bʋ a bʋʋdã wa sẽn zems yãmb tõogã.» Zʋɩf-rãmbã yeela a Pilat yaa: «Tõnd ka tar noor tɩ kʋ ned ye.»" 
John18:32 Yaa sẽn na yɩl la gomd ning a Zeezi sẽn gom n na n wilg kũum ning buud bãmb sẽn na n ki wã pidsi. 
John18:33 A Pilat kẽe a zakẽ wã n bool a Zeezi n yeel-ba: «Yaa yãmb la Zʋɩf-rãmbã dĩma bɩ?» 
John18:34 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: Yãmb meng n tags a woto n sokdẽ bɩ, bɩ yaa neb a taab n gom mam yell a woto?" 
John18:35 A Pilat leokame n yeele: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam yaa Zʋɩf la? Fo soolmã neb ne maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã n tall foom n wa n kõ maam. Bõe la f maan yã?»" 
John18:36 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Mam soolmã ka dũni ka rẽnd ye. Mam soolmã sã n dag n yaẽ dũni ka rẽnda, mam tʋmtʋmdbã dag n na zab n sõng maam, tɩ b ra yõk maam n kõ Zʋɩf-rãmbã ye. La moasã, mam soolmã ka tẽng zug ka rẽnd ye.»" 
John18:37 A Pilat yeelame: Dẽnd fo yaa rĩm wɛ? A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Yaa wa yãmb sẽn yeelã, mam yaa rĩma. Ad bũmb ning yĩng mam sẽn dogã, la bũmb ning yĩng mam sẽn wa dũni wã: Yaa tɩ kɩs sɩdã kaseto. Ned ning fãa sẽn yaa sɩdã rẽnd kelgda mam koɛɛga.»" 
John18:38 A Pilat sokame yaa: «Sɩd yaa bõe?» A Pilat sẽn gom woto n sa, a leb n yiime n kẽng Zʋɩf-rãmbã nengẽ n yeel-b yaa: «Mam ka yã baa fɩ raoã nengẽ sẽn sekd tɩ b kao a bʋʋd n yeel t'a zemsa kũum ye." 
John18:39 La yãmb tara mining sẽn yaa tɩ mam yiis bi-bɛɛg a yembr y Pakã tigr wakat n base. Yãmb datame tɩ mam bas Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩmã y yĩnga?» 
John18:40 Nebã leb n kaasame n yeele: Ayo! Da bas-y yẽnda ye, bas-y-yã a Barabaase. A Barabaas yaool n dag n yɩɩ fãada." 
John19:1 Dẽ, a Pilat kɩtame tɩ b tall a Zeezi n tɩ pãb-b ne kalwaase." 
John19:2 Sodaasã wʋga maanf ne gõos n fõgen a Zeezi zugu, la b yeelg bãmb ne fu-bed-miuugu," 
John19:3 n yaool n kolg bãmb n yetẽ yaa: «Zʋɩf-rãmbã-rĩma, tõnd pʋʋsda yãmba». La b dag n laanda bãmb pegse. Gõos maanfo." 
John19:4 A Pilate leb n yiime n yeel Zʋɩf-rãmbã yaa: «Ade, mam yiisda raoã yɩnga, tɩ yãmb na bãng tɩ mam ka yã bũmb baa a yembr ne-a sẽn sekd m na yeel t'a toga kʋʋb ye.»" 
John19:5 Dẽ, a Zeezi yii yɩng ne gõos maanfã, la fu-bed-miuugã, la a Pilat yeela nebã yaa: «Ad dao wã!»" 
John19:6 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne gũudbã sẽn yã a Zeezi wã, b kaasame n yeele: «Ka-a da-pɩk zugu! Ka-a da-pɩk zugu.» A Pilat yeel-b lame yaa: «Deeg-y-yã-a n ka-a y toore, bala, mam ka yã bũmb ne-a sẽn sek m na yeel t'a toga kʋʋb ye.»" 
John19:7 Zʋɩf-rãmbã leoka a Pilat n yeele: «Tõnd tara tõogo, la ne tõogã, a segda kʋʋbo, bala, a maana a meng Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.»" 
John19:8 A Pilat sẽn wʋm gom-kãnga, a rabeemã paasame." 
John19:9 A leb n kẽe zakẽ wã n sok a Zeezi tɩ b yaa yɛ neda? La a Zeezi ka leok-a ye. Dẽ, a Pilat yeela bãmb yaa:" 
John19:10 Maam la fo sĩnd n ka gomd ne? Fo ka mi tɩ mam tara noor tɩ kɩt tɩ b bas foom, la m tar noor tɩ kɩt tɩ b ka foom da-pɩk zug la?" 
John19:11 A Zeezi leokame n yeele: «Yãmb sã n dag n ka reegẽ noor yĩngi, yãmb ka tar noor tɩ maan maam baa fɩ. Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ ned ning sẽn tall maam n wa n kõ yãmbã yel-wẽnd yɩɩd yãmb dẽndã.»" 
John19:12 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, a Pilat baoome n na n bas a Zeezi. La Zʋɩf-rãmbã kaasame n yeele: «Yãmb sã n bas rao‑kãngã, rẽnd yãmb ka Sezaar zoa ye. Ned ning fãa sẽn maand a meng rĩm wilgdame t'a kisa Sezaare.»" 
John19:13 A Pilat sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, a talla a Zeezi n yi yɩnga, n zĩnd bʋʋdã zĩigẽ, b sẽn boond tɩ kug sẽn gãneg zĩiga, la ne Ebre goamã yaa Gabata." 
John19:14 Dag n yaa Pakã tigr seglg daare, sẽn kolg wĩnto-sʋka. A Pilat yeela Zʋɩf-rãmbã yaa: «Ad-y y rĩma!»" 
John19:15 La b kaasame n yeele: «Kʋ-y-yã-a! Kʋ-y-yã-a! Ka-y-yã-a da-pɩk zugu!» A Pilat yeel-b lame yaa: «M ka y rĩmã da-pɩk zugu?» Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb leokame n yeele: «Tõnd ka tar dĩm a to, tɩ ka Sezaar ye.»" 
John19:16 Dẽ, a Pilat kõ-b-la a Zeezi tɩ b tɩ ka da-pɩk zugu. La bãmb talla a Zeezi n looge." 
John19:17 A Zeezi meng n tʋk b ra-pɩkã n yi tẽngã, n tees zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ zu-wang zĩigã, la Golgota ne Ebre goamã." 
John19:18 Yaa be la b ka a Zeezi ne neb a yiib a taaba, da-pɩgs zutu, a yembr goabga la a yembr dɩtgo, t'a Zeezi be sʋka." 
John19:19 A Pilat gʋlsa ra-peok zug n tabl da-pɩkã. A gʋlsa be tɩ: «Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi, Zʋɩf-rãmbã rĩma.»" 
John19:20 Zʋɩf-rãmbã wʋsg karma gʋlsmã, bala, zĩig ning b sẽn ka a Zeezi da-pɩk zugã pẽe ne tẽngã. B rag n gʋlsa gomdã ne Ebre, la Latẽ, la Gɛrk." 
John19:21 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã yeela a Pilat yaa: «Da gʋls-y tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã dĩm ye, gʋls-y t'a yeelame t'a yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã dĩma.»" 
John19:22 A Pilat leokame n yeele: «Mam sẽn gʋlsã, m gʋlsame.»" 
John19:23 Sodaasã sẽn ka a Zeezi n sa, b wʋka bãmb futã n pʋɩ zĩis a naase, tɩ sodaag fãa dɩk pʋɩɩr a yembre. B rɩka a Zeezi fu-wokã me. A ka tar sẽnesem ye, yaa peen‑yend bala, yĩngr tɩ ta tẽngre. B goma ne taab n yeele:" 
John19:24 Wa-y tɩ d da pãrs fuugã ye. D maan bãnde, tɩ bãndã wilg ned ning sẽn na n soog-a fuugã. Yɩɩ woto tɩ Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõngã pidsi. A yeelame: «B pʋɩɩ mam futã ne taaba, la b maana bãnd mam fu-wokã yĩnga.» Ad bũmb ning sodaasã sẽn maanã." 
John19:25 A Zeezi ma wã ne a ma-bi-poaka, a Kolopaas pag a Maari ne a Maari Madelɛn dag n yɛsa da-pɩkã sɛɛgẽ." 
John19:26 A Zeezi sẽn yã b ma wã, la karen-biig ning bãmb sẽn nongã, t'a yɛs b ma wã sɛɛgẽ, b yeela b ma yaa: «Paga, ad f bi-ribla.»" 
John19:27 La b yeela karen-biigã yaa: «Ad f ma.» La sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, karen-biigã deega a Zeezi ma wã a zakẽ." 
John19:28 Dẽ poore, a Zeezi sẽn mi tɩ bũmb fãa zoe n maan n saame wã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ gʋlsg sõmyã paam pidsgu, b yeelame: «ko-yũud n tar maam.»" 
John19:29 Laok n dag n dɩg be n pid ne reezẽ rã‑miisga. B rɩka neoodg n los reezẽ rã‑miisgẽ wã, n vil kãnkãre, n zẽk n tees a Zeezi noorã." 
John19:30 La a Zeezi sẽn fõos reezẽ rã-miisgã n sa, b yeelame yaa: «Bũmb fãa maan n saame.» La b sulga b zugu, la b kiime." 
John19:31 Dag n yaa Pakã tigr seglg daare. La Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn ka rat n bas nebã tɩ b pa ra-pɩgsã zut bãmb vʋʋsg daarã yĩnga, ‹Vʋʋsg da-kãng dag n yaa da-kãsenga,› b kosa a Pilat t'a kɩt tɩ b kao b gɛy wã la b sigs-ba." 
John19:32 Dẽ, sodaasã waame, n kao pipi ned ning sẽn dag n ka da-pɩk zug a Zeezi sɛɛgẽ wã gɛyã, la b kao ned a to wã me gɛya." 
John19:33 B sẽn ta a Zeezi, n mik tɩ b zoe n kiime wã, b ka kao bãmb gɛyã ye." 
John19:34 La sodaag a yembr kõsa bãmb lʋgr ne kãnde, la tao-tao bala, koom ne zɩɩm n yi be." 
John19:35 Ned ning sẽn yã bõn-kãngã kɩsa a kaseto, la a kasetã yaa sɩda. La a miime t'a togsa sɩda, tɩ yãmb me na tẽ." 
John19:36 Yɩɩ woto tɩ Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõngã pidsi. A yeelame yaa: «Bãmb kõbr baa a yembr ka na n kaoog ye.» 
John19:37 Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõngã yeela zĩig a to yaa: «Bãmb na n gesa ned ning bãmb sẽn dag n kõsã.» 
John19:38 Rẽ poore, Arimate dao a Zozɛf sẽn dag n soos n yaa a Zeezi karen-biiga, a sẽn zoet Zʋɩf-rãmbã yĩngã kosa a Pilat noor n na n dɩk a Zeezi kũumã. La a Pilat kõ-a-la noore. Dẽ, a waa n sika kũumã n tall n looge." 
John19:39 A Nikodɛm, sẽn dag n wa-a a Zeezi nengẽ ne yʋngã me talla miir ne alowɛs sẽn kalem taaba, sẽn tar yũ-noogo, sẽn tat kɩlo pis-naas la a nu n wa." 
John19:40 Dẽ, b rɩka a Zeezi kũumã, n ning-a tɩdarã, n vil ne pɛɛla, wa sẽn zems Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn minim n mumd kũum to-to wã." 
John19:41 La tɩɩs zĩig n dag n be zĩig ning b sẽn ka a Zeezi da-pɩkã zugã, la zĩigã pʋgẽ, yao-paall n dag n be beenẽ b sẽn da nan ka mum ned a pʋgẽ ye." 
John19:42 Yɩɩ be la b mum a Zeezi kũumã, Zʋɩf-rãmbã seglg yĩnga, bala, yaoogã rag n pẽeme." 
John20:1 Dimaasã daar yibeoog pĩnda, a Maari Madelɛn kẽnga yaoogẽ wã, rẽ tɩ zĩigã ket n yaa libsgu. La a mikame tɩ b bilga kugrã n bas yaoogã." 
John20:2 Yẽnda zoeeme n tɩ yãnd a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr ne karen-biig a to wã a Zeezi sẽn dag n nongã, n yeel-b tɩ yaa: «B yiisa Zu-soabã yaoogẽ wã, la tõnd ka mi b sẽn tɩ bĩng-b zĩig ning ye.»" 
John20:3 A Pɩyɛɛr ne karen-biig a to wã yiime n na n kẽng yaoogẽ wã. 
John20:4 Bãmb b yiibã rag n zoetame, la karen-biig a to wã zoee tao-tao n yɩɩg a Pɩyɛɛre, n deng-a n ta yaoogẽ wã." 
John20:5 A sulgame n gese, n yãnd pɛɛlã sẽn be beenẽ wã, la a yaool n ka kẽ ye." 
John20:6 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr sẽn dag n pʋgd yẽnda wã taame. A kẽe yaoogẽ wã, n mik tɩ pɛɛlã bee be." 
John20:7 Peend ning b sẽn dag n lud a Zeezi zug ne-wã me dag n bee be, la a ka naag ne a taabã ye, la b gil-a lame n dɩgl toore." 
John20:8 Dẽ, karen-biig a to wã, sẽn deng-a n ta wã me kẽe yaoogẽ wã n yãnd bũmb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã, la a tẽeme." 
John20:9 Bala, a dag n nan ka wʋm Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõngã sẽn yet t'a Zeezi tog n vʋʋgame wã võor ye." 
John20:10 La karen-biisã lebg n kuila b yiya. 
John20:11 A Maari yaool n dag n yasa yɩng yaoogã sɛɛgẽ n yãbda. A yãbdame, la a sulgame n na n ges yaoogã pʋgẽ," 
John20:12 la a yãnda malegs a yiib sẽn yer fu-peelse, n zĩ zĩig ning b sẽn dag n gãneg a Zeezi wã. A yembr dag n zĩi zugã zĩigẽ, t'a yembr zĩ nao wã zĩigẽ." 
John20:13 Malegsã yeela pagã yaa: «Paga, yaa wãn tɩ fo yãbda?» La a leokame: «Yaa b sẽn dɩk m Zu-soabã tɩ m ka mi b sẽn ning-b zĩig ningã yĩnga.»" 
John20:14 Pagã sẽn gomd a woto wã, a wẽnegame n yãnd a Zeezi sẽn yɛs yĩngri, la a dag n ka mi tɩ yaa bãmb ye." 
John20:15 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Paga, bõe tɩ fo yãbda? Ãnda la fo baooda?» Pagã sẽn tẽed tɩ yaa tɩɩsã gũud la sẽn gomd ne yẽnda wã, a yeelame: «M soaala, sã n yaa yãmb n dɩk-b bɩ y togs maam yãmb sẽn bĩng-b zĩig ning tɩ m na tɩ rɩk-ba.»" 
John20:16 A Zeezi bool-a lame yaa: «Maari!» A Maari wẽnemdame n yeel ne Ebre goam tɩ rabuni, sẽn dat n togs tɩ karen-saamba." 
John20:17 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Ra sɩɩs-m ye, bala, mam nan ka rʋ m ba nengẽ ye. Kẽng m ba-biisã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b tɩ mam dʋʋda m ba sẽn yaa yãmb ba wã nengẽ, mam Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ.»" 
John20:18 A Maari Madelɛn waa n togsa karen-biisã t'a yãnda Zu-soabã, la bãmb n yeel yẽnda bõn-kãense." 
John20:19 Da-kãng sẽn yaa dimaas daarã yʋngo, doog ning a Zeezi karen-biisã sẽn dag n be wã noy dag n pagame, bãmb sẽn zoet Zʋɩf-rãmbã yĩnga. A Zeezi waame n yals bãmb sʋk n yeel-b yaa: «Bɩ laafɩ zĩnd ne yãmba!»" 
John20:20 A Zeezi sẽn yeel woto, b wilga b karen-biisã b nusã ne b lʋgrã. Karen-biisã sẽn yãnd Zu-soabã, b kɩdmame." 
John20:21 A Zeezi leb n yeel-b lame yaa: «Bɩ laafɩ zĩnd ne yãmba! Wa m ba sẽn tʋm maamã, mam me tʋmda yãmba.»" 
John20:22 Gom-kãens zugẽ, a Zeezi fʋʋsa bãmb zug n yeel-ba: «Reeg-y Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
John20:23 Neb nins yãmb sẽn na n kõ sugrã na n paama sugri, la neb nins yãmb sẽn na tõdg sugrã kõn paam sugr ye.»" 
John20:24 Karen-biisã piig la a yiibã ned a yembre, a Toma b sẽn boond tɩ Didimã dag n ka be ne a taabã wakat ning a Zeezi sẽn wa wã ye." 
John20:25 Dẽ, karen-biis a taabã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Tõnd yãnda Zu-soabã!» La yẽnda yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam sã n ka yãnd kutã bãn b nusẽ wã, mam sã n ka tʋm m nug-bil kutã bogd pʋgẽ, la m sã n ka tʋm m nug bãmb lʋgrẽ wã, mam kõn tol n tẽ ye.»" 
John20:26 Rasem a nii rẽ zugẽ, a Zeezi karen-biisã da leb n tigma taab roogẽ wã, la a Toma dag n bee ne bãmba. Kʋɩlemsã dag n pagame, la a Zeezi waa n yalsa bãmb sʋk n yeel-b yaa: Bɩ laafɩ zĩnd ne yãmba!" 
John20:27 La b yeela a Toma yaa: «Tẽeg f nug-bilã ka. Ges mam nusã. Tẽeg f nugã n tʋm mam lʋgrẽ wã me, la f tẽ n da yɩ ka-tẽeb soab ye.»" 
John20:28 A Toma leoka bãmb n yeele: Mam Zu-soaba la mam Wẽnnaam! 
John20:29 A Zeezi yeela yẽnda yaa: Yaa fo sẽn yã maamã yĩng la fo tẽeda. Bark bee neb nins sẽn ka yã n yaool n tẽedã zutu. 
John20:30 Bõn-bãn wʋsg a taab la a Zeezi maan b karen-biisã taoor tɩ ka gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ ye. 
John20:31 La bãmbã sẽn gʋlsã, yaa tɩ yãmb na tẽ t'a Zeezi yaa Kirisi, Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla, la tɩ yãmb na paam vɩɩm bãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga, yãmb sẽn tẽ wã yĩnga." 
John21:1 Rẽ zugẽ, a Zeezi puka b meng ne karen-biisã Tiberyaad ko-kãsengã noore. Ad b sẽn puk b meng to-to:" 
John21:2 A Zeezi karen-biisã rag n bee ne taaba: A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr ne a Toma b sẽn boond tɩ Didim, la a Natanayɛll sẽn yit Galɩle Kana wã, la a Zebde kom-dibli wã ne a Zeezi karen-biis a taab a yiibu." 
John21:3 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr yeelame: «Mam na n tɩ yõga zĩma!» la neb a taabã yeel-a lame: «Tõnd me na n tũu foom.» B yiime n tɩ kẽ koom koglgẽ. La yʋn-kãnga, b ka yõk bũmb ye." 
John21:4 Zĩigã sẽn wa n yẽegdẽ, a Zeezi dag n bee kʋɩl-koakẽ wã, la karen-biisã dag n ka mi tɩ yaa a Zeezi ye." 
John21:5 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «M kamba, yãmb ka tar sẽn na rɩ la?» B leoka a Zeezi tɩ ayo." 
John21:6 A Zeezi yeel-b lame yaa: «Lob-y zĩm-gãmbrã koglgã rɩtgo, la y na n paamame.» Dẽ, b loba zĩm-gãmbrã, la b dag n ka leb n tõe n tak-a ye, zĩmã waooglem yĩnga." 
John21:7 Dẽ, karen-biig ning a Zeezi sẽn dag n nongã yeela a Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Yaa Zu-soabã!» A Sɩmo sẽn wʋm tɩ yaa Zu-soaba yee, la a sẽn yeelg a fuugu, bala, a dag n yaa beelle, la a yɩk n lʋɩ koomẽ wã." 
John21:8 Karen-biis a taabã taee zĩm-gãmbrã sẽn pid ne zĩmã ne koom-koglgã n wa, bala, b ne tẽngã dag n ka yɩɩd nao-yakem koabg la pis-nu ye." 
John21:9 Bãmb sẽn yi koomẽ wã n ta tẽnga, bãmb yãnda bug-saal sẽn wit tɩ zĩm be a zugu, n paas buri." 
John21:10 A Zeezi yeel-b lame tɩ b wa ne zĩmã b sẽn yõg paalmã. 
John21:11 A Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr kẽe koom koglgẽ wã n vuug zĩm-gãmbrã n yiisi, la a dag n pida ne zĩm-bɛd koabg la pis-nu la a tãabo. La baa ne zĩmã sẽn dag n waoog a woto wã, zĩm-gãmbrã ka kẽeg ye." 
John21:12 A Zeezi yeel-b lame: Wa n dɩ-y-yã. La karen-biisã ned baa a yembr ka saag n sok bãmb b sẽn yaa a soab ye, bala, b dag n miime tɩ yaa Zu-soabã." 
John21:13 A Zeezi kolgame n dɩk burã n kõ-ba, la b kõ-b zĩmã me." 
John21:14 A Zeezi sẽn vʋʋg n yi kũum sʋkã tɛka, naoor a tãab moasã la b puk b meng ne b karen-biisã." 
John21:15 Bãmb sẽn dɩ n sa, a Zeezi yeela a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr yaa: «Zã biig a Sɩmo, dẽ yĩnga fo nonga maam n yɩɩd bãmbã sẽn nong maamã bɩ?» A leoka bãmb yaa: «N-yẽe, Zu-soaba! Yãmb miime tɩ mam nonga yãmba.» A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Ges mam pe-bi wã yelle.»" 
John21:16 B leb n yeel-a-la naoor a yiib soab yaa: «A Zã biig a Sɩmo, dẽ yĩnga, fo nonga maam?» A Pɩyɛɛr leoka bãmb n yeele: «N-yẽe, Zu-soaba! Yãmb yẽ mi tɩ mam nonga yãmba.» A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Yɩ mam piisã pe-kɩɩma.»" 
John21:17 B yeela yẽnda naoor a tãab soab yaa: «Zã biig a Sɩmo, dẽ yĩnga fo nonga maam?» A Pɩyɛɛr sũur sãamame, a Zeezi sẽn sok yẽnda naoor a tãab moasã tɩ rẽnda yĩnga yẽnda nonga bãmbã yĩnga. La a leoka bãmb n yeele: «Zu-soaba, yãmb mii bũmb fãa. Yãmb miime tɩ mam nonga yãmba.» A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: «Ges m piisã yelle.»" 
John21:18 Sɩd-sɩdã, mam yeta foom tɩ fo sẽn dag n yaa bi-bɩɩga, fo dag n sẽbgda f sɛɛg sẽbdga, n dabd f sẽn datẽ. La fo sã n wa n kʋʋle, fo na n zẽka f bãgdo, tɩ ned a to sẽb foom f sẽbdgã, n tall foom n kẽng f sẽn ka ratẽ ye." 
John21:19 A Zeezi goma a woto n na n wilg kũum ning buud a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn na n ki n kõ Wẽnnaam waoogrã. A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto n sa, b yeel-a lame yaa: «Wa n tũ maam!»" 
John21:20 A Pɩyɛɛr wẽnegame n yãnd karen-biig ning a Zeezi sẽn nongã t'a wat bãmb nengẽ. Yaa soab‑kãng n kɩll a Zeezi yãoogẽ wã rɩɩbã wakat n sok bãmb tɩ: Zu-soaba, yaa ãnda n na n zãmb yãmb n yõk n kõ wã?" 
John21:21 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn yã yẽnda wã, a soka a Zeezi yaa: «Zu-soaba, la bõe n na n paam rao-kãngã?»" 
John21:22 A Zeezi yeel-a lame yaa: Mam sã n dat t'a vɩɩmd hal tɩ mam wa, bʋg n pak foom? Fo yẽ we n wa n tũ maam." 
John21:23 Gom-kãng zugẽ, gomd n saag ba-biisã sʋk n yetẽ tɩ karen-bi-kãng ka na n ki ye. A Zeezi yaool n ka yeel t'a ka na n ki ye. B yeelame tɩ bãmb sã n dat t'a vɩɩmd hal tɩ bãmb wa, bʋg n pak a Pɩyɛɛre?" 
John21:24 Yaa karen-bi-kãng n kɩt bõn-kãens kaseto, la a gʋls-ba. La tõnd miime t'a kasetã yaa sɩda." 
John21:25 A Zeezi maana bũmb wʋsg a taaba. Ned sã n dag n na n gʋlsẽ yɛla fãa yembr-yembre, mam ka tẽed tɩ dũniyã na n yã weer n tõog n deeg sɛbã b sẽn na n gʋlsã ye." 
Acts1:1 Teofilli, mam dẽenem sebrã pʋgẽ, mam wilga bũmb nins fãa a Zeezi sẽn sɩng n maan la b zãms nebã," 
Acts1:2 hal tɩ ta daar ning bãmb sẽn zẽk n kẽng arzãna. Sẽn deng a Zeezi sẽn na n zẽke, b kõo b tõodã tẽn-tʋmdb nins bãmb sẽn tũusã, ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga." 
Acts1:3 A Zeezi namsgã zugẽ, b maana bũmb wʋsg n na n wilg b karen-biisã tɩ b vɩɩme. A Zeezi puka b meng ne tẽn-tʋmdbã rasem pis-naase, n gom ne bãmb Wẽnnaam soolmã yelle." 
Acts1:4 Daar a yembre, a Zeezi da zĩi ne tẽn-tʋmdbã n dɩtẽ, la b yeel-b lame yaa: Da zãag-y ne Zeruzalɛm ye. Pa-y be n gũ bũmb ning m ba sẽn da kãabã, kũun ning mam sẽn da gom ne yãmb a yellã." 
Acts1:5 Bala, a Zã rag n lisa nebã koomẽ. La yãmba, rasem bilf sã n paase, yãmb na n paama lisg Sɩɩg-sõng pʋgẽ." 
Acts1:6 La tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn da tigim taabã soka a Zeezi yaa: Zu-soaba, yaa moasã la y na n deeg Israyɛll soolmã n lebs-ba?" 
Acts1:7 A Zeezi leok-b lame yaa: Ka be ne yãmb tɩ y bãng wakate la sasa ning m ba sẽn yãk ne noor ning b sẽn tarã ye. 
Acts1:8 La Sɩɩg-sõng sã n wa yãmb zutu, y na n deega pãnga, la yãmb na n yɩɩ mam kaset dãmb Zeruzalɛm, la Zʋʋde soolmã fãa, la Samaari, hal tɩ ta dũniyã tɛk fãa." 
Acts1:9 A Zeezi sẽn gom a woto n sɛ, b zẽkame tɩ nebã get-ba. La sawadg lilla a Zeezi tɩ nebã ka leb n ne-b ye." 
Acts1:10 La bãmb sẽn dag n ket n get yĩngr wakat ning a Zeezi sẽn zẽkdã, haya! Raop a yiib sẽn yer fu-peels waa n yalsa bãmb sɛɛgẽ" 
Acts1:11 n yeel-b yaa: Galɩle nebã, yaa bõe tɩ y yas n get yĩngri? Zeezi‑kãngã Wẽnnaam sẽn zẽk tɩ b yi yãmb sʋk to-to n kẽng arzãn tɩ yãmb yã wã, b na n lebg n waa a woto bala." 
Acts1:12 Dẽ, tẽn-tʋmdbã yii tãng ning sẽn boond tɩ Oliiv tɩɩs tãngã n sig n leb Zeruzalɛm. Tãngã zãrem ne Zeruzalɛm zemsa vʋʋsg daar kẽnd bala." 
Acts1:13 La bãmb sẽn ta Zeruzalɛm, b rʋʋ yĩngr doogã, zĩig ning bãmb sẽn minim n sigdã. Dag n yaa a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã la a Zak la a Ãndere ne a Filip la a Toma la a Bartelemi ne a Matye la a Alfe biig a Zak la a Sɩmo sẽn yaa Zelot ne a Zak biig a Zʋʋde." 
Acts1:14 Bãmb fãa lagma taab ne yam a yembr n kẽngd taoor n pʋʋsd daar fãa, ne pagbã, la a Zeezi ma a Maari ne a Zeezi ma-biisã." 
Acts1:15 Badaare, a Pɩyɛɛr yika a ba-biis a taabã sʋka, la b sõorã da taa neb koabg la pisi. A yeelame:" 
Acts1:16 M saam-biisi, rag n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ bũmb ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn da gom ne a Davɩɩd noor tɩ b gʋls gʋls-sõamyã pʋsẽ, n deng n togs t'a Zʋʋdaas na n lʋɩɩ neb taoor tɩ b wa n yõk a Zeezi wã paam pidsgu." 
Acts1:17 A Zʋʋdaas rag n yaa tõnd sullã ned a yembre, la a rag n paama a pʋɩɩr ne tõnd tʋʋmdã." 
Acts1:18 La rao-kãng rɩka ligd ning a sẽn paam a yel-wẽndã poorẽ wã n da pʋʋgo, la a lʋɩɩme t'a zugã reng taoore, t'a pʋgã pusg t'a yãadã yʋlem." 
Acts1:19 La Zeruzalɛm tẽngã nebã fãa wʋma bõn-kãnga. Rẽ n kɩt tɩ b pʋd pʋʋgã yʋʋr ne b buudã goam tɩ «Hakeldama» sẽn dat n togs tɩ zɩɩm pʋʋgo. 
Acts1:20 Mik b gʋlsa yɩɩn-sõamyã sebr pʋgẽ n yeel yaa: «Bɩ a yirã lebg raboogo, tɩ ned ra zĩnd be ye. La tɩ ned a to reeg yẽnda tʋʋmdã.»" 
Acts1:21 Rẽ wã, tɩ d gẽes neb nins sẽn zĩnd-b ne tõnd wakat ning Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn dag n tar tõnd n kẽnd la b watẽ, sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning a Zã sẽn lis bãmbã n tãag daar ning Wẽnnaam sẽn zẽk bãmb n bas tõndã sʋka, n yãk ned a yembr t'a naag tõnd n kɩs a Zeezi vʋʋgrã kaseto." 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Bãmb wilga neb a yiibu: A Zozɛf b sẽn boond t'a Barsabaas la b boondẽ me t'a Zustuus ne a Matyaase. 
Acts1:24 Dẽ, bãmb fãa pʋʋsa a woto: Zu-soaba, yãmb sẽn mi nebã fãa sũyã, wilg-y ned ning yãmb sẽn yãk bãmb b yiibã sʋka," 
Acts1:25 t'a kẽ tʋʋmdã pʋgẽ, n yɩ tẽn-tʋmd n led a Zʋʋdaas zĩigẽ, t'a basame n kẽng zĩig ning sẽn segd ne-a." 
Acts1:26 Bãmb maana bãnde n na n yãk ned a yembre, la bãndã yõka a Matyaase. La yẽnda naaga tẽn-tʋmdb piig la a yembrã sullẽ." 
Acts2:1 Pãntekotã daar sẽn ta, bãmb fãa rag n tigma taab zĩig a yembre." 
Acts2:2 La tao-tao bala, bʋrg sẽn wẽnd sob-kãseng sẽn fugd bʋrg yii arzãn n wa n pid roog ning pʋg bãmb sẽn dag n zĩ wã." 
Acts2:3 La bãmb yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd wa zɛlma, n yaa wa bug-witim, n welg taab n sig ned kam fãa zugu." 
Acts2:4 Bãmb fãa pida ne Sɩɩg-sõngo. La b sɩngame n gom gom-zẽn wa sẽn zems Sɩɩgã sẽn kõ-b tɩ b gomã. 
Acts2:5 La Zʋɩf-rãmb sẽn sakd tẽebã sõama, sẽn yi soolem nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã tɛkã, n dag n wa n be Zeruzalɛm." 
Acts2:6 Bʋrgã sẽn maanã, neb kʋʋng wʋsg tigma taaba. La bãmb fãa yɛɛsa wʋsgo, ned kam fãa sẽn da wʋmd Kiris tẽedbã sẽn gomd ne yẽnda meng goamã yĩnga." 
Acts2:7 La a linga bãmb tɩ b yɛɛs n yetẽ yaa: «Nin-kãensã fãa sẽn gomdã, b ka Galɩle neb wɛ?" 
Acts2:8 La maana a wãn tɩ tõnd ned kam fãa wʋmd bãmb sẽn gomd tõnd mens goam d sẽn dog ne‑a wã? 
Acts2:9 Neb sẽn yit Part la Meed ne Elam dãmba, ne neb nins sẽn yi Mezopotami la Zʋʋde la Kapadoos la Põ ne Aazi soolem," 
Acts2:10 la Firzi la Pamfili ne Ezɩpt la Libi soolem toadgã sẽn pẽ Sirɛnã. 
Acts2:11 La neb nins sẽn yi Rom n yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã la bu-zẽms sẽn sakd Zʋɩf-rãmbã kaorengo, la Kɛrɛt nebã ne Araabi neb bee tõnd sʋka. La baoosgo tõnd wʋmda b sẽn gomd Wẽnnaam tʋʋm kãsemsã ne tõnd mens goamã!»" 
Acts2:12 Bãmb fãa yɛɛsame n dag n ka mi b sẽn na n tags tɩ bũmb ning ye. La b goma ne taab n yeel tɩ bõn-kãngã võor yaa bõe. 
Acts2:13 La neb a taab rag n yaanda Kiris tẽedbã n yetẽ tɩ b yũu rãam n tɩge. 
Acts2:14 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr yika yĩngr ne neb piig la a yembrã n zẽk a koɛɛg n gom ne neb kʋʋngã a woto: Yãmb Zʋɩf-rãmba, la yãmb fãa sẽn be-b Zeruzalɛm, bãng-y bõn-kãnga, la y kelg mam goamã neere." 
Acts2:15 Nin-kãensã ka yũ rãam wala yãmb sẽn tẽedã ye. Bala, nan ket n yaa yibeoogo, wakat a wɛ bala." 
Acts2:16 La yaa bũmb ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zowɛll sẽn da togsã: 
Acts2:17 Wẽnnaam yeelame yaa: «Yaoolem wakate, mam na n pʋdga m Sɩɩgã ninsaalbã buud fãa zutu. Yãmb kom-dibli la y kom-pugli na n togsa bãngr goamã. Yãmb kom-bɩɩs na n yãnda vẽnegre, la yãmb nin-kẽemb na n paama zãmsdo." 
Acts2:18 N ye! Ra-kãens daare, mam na n pʋdga m Sɩɩgã m tʋmtʋmd-raopã la m tʋmtʋmd-pogsã zutu, la b na n togsa bãngr goamã." 
Acts2:19 Mam na n maana bõn-yɛɛsds yĩngri, saasẽ, la bõn-bãn dũniyã zugu, zɩɩm, la bugum, la bug-zõos na n zĩndame." 
Acts2:20 Wĩndgã na n lebga lik bida, la kiuugã na n lebga wa zɩɩm, tɩ Zu-soabã daarã sẽn yaa ra-kãseng la sẽn be ziirã yaool n wa." 
Acts2:21 La ned ning fãa sẽn na n pʋʋs ne Zu-soabã yʋʋr na n paama fãagre.» 
Acts2:22 Yãmb Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y gom-kãensã. Yãmb mens miime tɩ yaa Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi la Wẽnnaam tall n maan bõn-bãnã la bõn-yɛɛsds la bãn yãmb sʋkã, n wilg tɩ yaa bãmb n tʋm-ba." 
Acts2:23 B zãmba rao-kãngã, n yõk n kõ yãmb wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam yam-yãkrã, la bãmb sẽn dag n pĩnd n yeelã. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ yel-wẽn maandb ka a Zeezi da-pɩk zug n kʋ-ba." 
Acts2:24 La Wẽnnaam vʋʋga bãmb n fãag-b kũum pãng nugẽ. Bala, kũumã pãng rag n ka tõe n tall bãmb ye." 
Acts2:25 Bala, a Davɩɩd dag n goma b yell n yeel yaa: «Mam dag n yãta Zu-soabã mam taoor wakat fãa. Bala, bãmb bee ne maam, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ bũmb da wa n miim maam ye." 
Acts2:26 Woto yĩnga, mam sũur pida ne sũ-noogo, la mam zelemd kɩdemdame. La baa mam yĩngã na n vʋʋsa tẽeb pidsg gũudum pʋgẽ." 
Acts2:27 Bala, yãmb ka na n bas maam kɩɩm-kulg pʋgẽ ye, la yãmb kõn bas y sõmblem soabã t'a pa yaoogẽ n põog ye." 
Acts2:28 Yãmb wilga maam vɩɩm soayã: Yãmb na n pida maam ne sũ-noog y nengẽ.» 
Acts2:29 M saam-biisi, kõ-y maam noor tɩ m gom ne yãmb tõnd yaab a Davɩɩd yell vẽenega: Bãmb kiime, tɩ b mum-ba, la b yaoog ket n bee tõnd sʋk hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Acts2:30 La bãmb dag n yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa, n mi tɩ Wẽnnaam dag n wẽename n kãab bãmb n yeel tɩ b na n kɩtame tɩ b yagensã sʋka, a yembr sẽn yit bãmb buud pʋgẽ zaoond b naamã geer zugu." 
Acts2:31 A Davɩɩd da reng n goma Kirisã vʋʋgrã yell n yeel tɩ b ka bas Kiris kɩɩm-kulg ye, la b yĩngã ka pa yaoogẽ n põog ye." 
Acts2:32 Yaa Zeezi‑kãng la Wẽnnaam sẽn vʋʋgã, la tõnd fãa yaa bõn-kãng kaset dãmba." 
Acts2:33 A Zeezi zẽkame n be Wẽnnaam dɩtgo, la bãmb deega Sɩɩg-sõngã b sẽn da kãabã, b ba wã nengẽ, n pʋdg-a tõnd zutu. La yaa bõn-kãng la yãmb sẽn yãt la y wʋmd moasã wã." 
Acts2:34 Bala, a Davɩɩd mengã ka rʋ arzãn ye, la a yeelame tɩ Zu-soab a Wẽnd yeela yẽnda Zu-soabã yaa: «Wa n zĩnd mam dɩtgo," 
Acts2:35 hal tɩ m kɩt tɩ f tab f bɛɛbã.» 
Acts2:36 Dẽ yĩngã, Israyɛll buudã fãa, bãng-y sɩd-sɩd tɩ Zeezi‑kãng yãmb sẽn ka da-pɩkã zugã, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ bãmb lebg Zu-soabã la Kirisi." 
Acts2:37 La nebã sẽn wʋm gom-kãnga, a sɩɩsa bãmb sũyã. La b soka a Pɩyɛɛr ne tẽn-tʋmdbã a taabã yaa: «D saam-biisi, tõnd tog n maana bõe?»" 
Acts2:38 A Pɩyɛɛr yeel-b lame yaa: «Tek-y yam n kos sugri, la bɩ ned kam fãa sak n deeg koom lisg ne a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋr a yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. Dẽ, y na yaool n deeg Wẽnnaam kũunã sẽn yaa Sɩɩg-sõngã." 
Acts2:39 Bala, Wẽnnaam kãabgã yaa yãmb ne y kambã yĩnga, la neb nins fãa sẽn be zĩ-zãrgã yĩnga, la neb nins fãa tõnd Wẽnnaam sẽn na n yaool n boolã me yĩnga.»" 
Acts2:40 A Pɩyɛɛr leb n goma goam a taab n kɩs kaset n sagl-b ne pẽdgr n yeel-b tɩ b fãag b mens n yi zamaan‑kãnga sẽn yaa wẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Acts2:41 Neb nins sẽn sak a Pɩyɛɛr goamã paama koom lisgu. La badaare, karen-biis sõor sẽn kolg tus a tãab n paase." 
Acts2:42 Bãmb dag n sakda tẽn-tʋmdbã zãmsg neere, n vɩ ba-biis lagem-n-taar pʋgẽ, la b kaood burã n dɩt ne taaba, la b pʋʋsd ne taaba." 
Acts2:43 La yɛɛsg rag n tara nebã fãa, bala, tẽn-tʋmdbã rag n maanda bõn-yɛɛsds ne bõn-bãn wʋsgo." 
Acts2:44 Tẽedbã fãa rag n naaga taab zĩ-yende, n dɩk b paoongã fãa n naagd taaba." 
Acts2:45 B rag n koosda b paoongã ne b sẽn tarã n pʋɩt ligdã tɩ tat nebã fãa, tɩ ned kam fãa paamd sẽn zemsd sẽn tõe n sõng-a." 
Acts2:46 Daar fãa, bãmb da naagda taab noor a yembr n be wẽnd doogẽ wã. Bãmb da naagda taab n dɩt rɩɩbã b yiyã pʋse, la b dag n dɩta b rɩɩbã ne sũ-noogo, la ne sũy sẽn yaa sõama." 
Acts2:47 Bãmb da pẽgda Wẽnnaam. La nebã fãa rag n nong-b lame. La daar fãa, Zu-soabã dag n fãagda neb n paasd wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
Acts3:1 Zaabr lɛɛr a tãab sẽn yaa pʋʋsgã wakat sẽn ta, a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã da tũu taab n kẽng wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
Acts3:2 La rao a ye sẽn dog ne komsem n da be be. La b ra rɩkda yẽnda daar fãa n wat n zĩndgd-a wẽnd doogã noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ rigno-neerã t'a bõosd neb nins sẽn da kẽed wẽnd doogẽ wã. 
Acts3:3 La raoã sẽn yã a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã sẽn dat n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã, yẽnda bõos-b lame." 
Acts3:4 A Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã gesa yẽnda n yeel-a t'a ges bãmba. 
Acts3:5 La raoã gesa a Pɩyɛɛr ne a zã n tẽed tɩ bãmb na n kõ-a-la bũmbu. 
Acts3:6 La a Pɩyɛɛr yeel-a lame yaa: Mam ka tar wanzuri wala sãnem ye, la mam kõta foom bũmb ning mam sẽn tarã, ne a Zeezi Kiris sẽn yi Nazarɛt yʋʋre, yik n kẽne!" 
Acts3:7 La a Pɩyɛɛr gãda raoã nug-rɩtgo, n kɩt t'a yiki. La wakat-kãng bala koamsã naoã ne a nao-sẽbã lebga kãenkãe." 
Acts3:8 La yẽnda yika wʋgʋp n yals yĩngr n sɩng kẽna. La yẽ kẽname n tũ bãmb n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã n yɩgd n tiimsd n pẽgd Wẽnnaam. 
Acts3:9 Nebã fãa yãnda yẽnda sẽn kẽnd la a pẽgd Wẽnnaamã. 
Acts3:10 La bãmb bãngame tɩ yaa rao ning sẽn da zĩ wẽnd doogã rignoor ning sẽn boond tɩ neerã n bõosdẽ wã, la b sẽn yã bũmb ning sẽn maan raoã, dabeem yõk-b lame tɩ b yɛɛs wʋsgo." 
Acts3:11 La raoã sẽn da pʋgd a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã wã, nebã fãa yɛɛsame n zoe n kẽng bãmb nengẽ, zĩig sẽn boond t'a Salmo veranda wã." 
Acts3:12 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn yã woto, a yeela nebã yaa: Yãmb Israyɛll nebã, yaa bõe tɩ bõn-kãngã yɛɛs yãmba? La yaa bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb get tõnd a woto wala yaa ne tõnd pãng wala d sõmblem yĩng la d tõog n kɩt rao-kãngã kẽnda?" 
Acts3:13 Yaa a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã n waoog b tẽn-tʋmd a Zeezi. Yaa bãmb la yãmb sẽn da zãmb n yõk n kɩs a Pilate, t'a Pilat da tags n dat n bas-b tɩ yãmb tõdg yẽnda taoorã." 
Acts3:14 Yãmb tõdga sõmblem la tɩrlem soabã, n kos tɩ b bas nin-kʋʋdã n kõ-yã." 
Acts3:15 La y yaool n kɩt tɩ b kʋ vɩɩm-naabã. La Wẽnnaam vʋʋg-b lame tɩ b yi kũum sʋk n vɩ. Tõnd yaa bõn-kãng kaset dãmba. 
Acts3:16 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Zeezi yʋʋrã n kõ dao‑kãngã yãmb sẽn ne la y miẽ wã pãnga, tõnd sẽn tẽ bãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga. Yaa tẽeb ne a Zeezi n maag rao-kãngã zãng fasɩ yãmb fãa nifẽ." 
Acts3:17 La moasã, m saam-biisi, mam miime tɩ yaa yãmb ne y nanambsã zɩɩlmã yĩng n kɩt tɩ y maan a Zeezi a woto." 
Acts3:18 La Wẽnnaam maana a woto n pids bũmb ning b sẽn da pĩnd n togs ne b no-rɛɛsdbã fãa noyã, tɩ bãmb Kirisã na n namsame wã." 
Acts3:19 Dẽ, tek-y yam n kos sugri tɩ Wẽnnaam tõe n yẽes y yel-wẽnã," 
Acts3:20 woto, Zu-soabã na n kɩtame tɩ yolsg wakat wa. La b na n tʋma a Zeezi, Kirisa bãmb sẽn dag n yãk yãmb yĩngã." 
Acts3:21 A Zeezi tog n zĩnda arzãn nanda, hal tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn da togs bũmb ningã fãa wakat sẽn loogã ne b no-rɛɛs sõamyã noyã manegr wakat ta." 
Acts3:22 A Moyiis rag n yeelame: «Zu-soabã sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam na n yãka b no-rɛɛs sẽn yaa wa maam yãmb buudã sʋk n kõ-yã. Yãmb na n kelga bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn na n togs yãmbã. 
Acts3:23 La ned ning sẽn ka kelgd-a Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs‑kãnga, b na n menes-a-la Wẽnnaam nebã sʋka.»" 
Acts3:24 La Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã fãa sẽn sɩng ne a Sãmwɛll la sẽn pʋgl-b bãmbã me goma ra-kãens yelle. 
Acts3:25 Yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã kamba, la kaool ningã Wẽnnaam sẽn maan ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã kamba, Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel a Abrahaam tɩ dũniyã buud fãa na n paama bark bãmb yagensã maasem yĩngã." 
Acts3:26 Yaa yãmb yĩng pipi la Wẽnnaam yãk b tẽn-tʋmd n tʋm-b yãmb nengẽ, tɩ ned kam fãa yãmb sʋkã sã n wẽnemd n bas a yel-wẽnã bɩ b ning-a barka." 
Acts4:1 A Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã sẽn da ket n gomd ne nebã, maan-kʋʋdbã ne wẽnd-doog gũudbã naab la Saduusẽ-dãmbã waame." 
Acts4:2 Bãmb sũyã puuga wʋsg ne tẽn-tʋmdbã a yiibã sẽn da zãmsd nebã la b moondẽ n yetẽ tɩ neb nins sẽn tũud a Zeezi wã na n vʋʋg n basa kũum wala a Zeezi sẽn vʋʋg n bas kũumã. 
Acts4:3 La b yõga tẽn-tʋmdbã n kɩs gũudbã tɩ b gũ-b hal tɩ beoog vẽege, bala wĩndga da zoe n kẽeme." 
Acts4:4 Baoosgo, neb nins sẽn da wʋm koe-moonegã, wʋsg tẽeme. Nebã sẽn tẽ wã sõor kolga tus a nu." 
Acts4:5 La vẽkembeoogo, Zʋɩf-rãmbã nanambs la kãsem-dãmbã ne tõog karen-saam-dãmbã," 
Acts4:6 la maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem a Ãnd ne a Kayiifi, la a Zã la a Alegsãndr la neb nins fãa sẽn dag n yaa maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb buudã tigma taab Zeruzalɛm." 
Acts4:7 Bãmb talla a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã n wa n yals bãmb sʋk n sok-b tɩ yaa ne pãn‑bʋgo, wala yaa ne ãnda yʋʋr la b maan bõn-kãnga." 
Acts4:8 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn pid ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: Zʋɩf-rãmbã nanambse, ne kãsem-dãmba," 
Acts4:9 b sẽn sokd tõnd rũndã n dat bãng maan-neer ning sẽn maan koamsã, la sẽn yɩ to-to tɩ rao-kãng paam maagrã," 
Acts4:10 Yãmb fãa ne Israyɛll nebã fãa bãng-y neere, tɩ yaa ne Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi Kiris yãmb sẽn ka da-pɩk zug tɩ Wẽnnaam vʋʋg-b n bas kũumã yʋʋre, n kɩt tɩ rao-kãngã paam laafɩ zãng n yas yãmb fãa taoore." 
Acts4:11 Wa gʋls sõamyã sẽn yetã, a Zeezi yaa: «Kugr ning yãmb a tãn-metbã sẽn dag n zãgsã, yaa kug-kãng n lebg roogã pãng kugri.»" 
Acts4:12 Fãagr ka be ne ned a to sã n ka a Zeezi ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam ka kõ ned yʋʋr a to ninsaalba sʋk dũniyã zug tɩ tõnd tõe n tũ n paam fãagr ye." 
Acts4:13 La bãmb sẽn yãnd a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã pel-kɛgengã, b yɛɛsame, bala, b rag n bãngame t'a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã yaa nin-zaals sẽn ka paam zãmsgo. La b rag n bãngame t'a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã rag n tũuda a Zeezi." 
Acts4:14 Kaorengã yɛl-bʋ-kaoodbã sẽn yã rao ningã sẽn paam maagrã t'a yik n yas a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã sɛɛgẽ wã, b rag n ka tar sẽn na leok ye." 
Acts4:15 La b kõo a Pɩyɛɛr dãmb noor tɩ b yi kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã roogẽ. La kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã yẽsa ne taab n yeel yaa: Tõnd na n maana nin-kãensã bõe? 
Acts4:16 Bala, Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa bãnga vẽeneg tɩ nin-kãensã maana bõn-bãn-kãsenga, la tõnd ka tõe n kɩɩs bõn-kãng ye." 
Acts4:17 La sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yel-kãngã ra saag nebã sʋk n paase, wa-y tɩ d gɩdg-b tɩ b ra leb n gom ne ned ba a yembr a Zeezi yʋʋrã yell ye." 
Acts4:18 Dẽ, b boola a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã n yeel-b tɩ b ra leb n tol n gom la b zãms nebã ne a Zeezi yʋʋr ye." 
Acts4:19 La a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã leok-b lame yaa: Yaa tɩrg Wẽnnaam nifẽ tɩ tõnd sak yãmb n yaool n bas Wẽnnaam? Bɩ yãmb mens togse. 
Acts4:20 Bala, tõnd ka tõe n ka gom bũmb ning tõnd sẽn yã la d wʋmã yell ye." 
Acts4:21 La kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã leb n lenga a Pɩyɛɛr dãmb n leb n bas-b n ka tõog n paam bũmb sẽn na n sɩbg-b ye, b sẽn zoet nebã yĩnga. Bala, nebã fãa ra pẽgda Wẽnnaam bũmb ning sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
Acts4:22 Bala, rao ning maagrã sẽn yɩ bõn-bãndã dag n tara sẽn yɩɩd yʋʋm pis-naase." 
Acts4:23 La b sẽn yiis a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã n base, bãmb kẽnga b ba-biis a taaba nengẽ, n tɩ togs-b bũmb ning fãa maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã ne kãsem-dãmbã sẽn da yeel bãmbã." 
Acts4:24 Tẽedbã sẽn wʋm yõwã, b lagma taab n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam n yeel yaa: Zu-soaba, yãmb n naan yĩngr la tẽnga, la ko-kãsengã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn be b pʋsẽ wã," 
Acts4:25 yãmb n kɩt tɩ tõnd yaab a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã gom ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga, n yeel tɩ: «Yaa bõe yĩng tɩ buud toay-toayã sũy puudẽ, la yaa bõe tɩ nebã set sedb sẽn ka võore." 
Acts4:26 Dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã segla b mens zabr yĩnga, la nanambsã lagma taaba, n na n zab ne Zu-soabã la ne bãmb Kirisã.»" 
Acts4:27 Bala, rĩm a Erood ne a Põns Pilat sɩd lagma taab Zeruzalɛm ka, ne bu-zẽmsã la ne Israyɛll nebã n zab ne yãmb tẽn-tʋmd-sõng a Zeezi yãmb sẽn yãkã."
