Acts4:28 Woto, bãmb pidsa bũmb ning fãa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn da pĩnd n yãk ne y pãngã la y ratmã." 
Acts4:29 La moasã, Zu-soaba, kelg-y bãmb zabr goamã. La y kõ y tẽn-tʋmdbã raood kãseng tɩ b moon yãmb koɛɛgã." 
Acts4:30 Tẽeg-y y nug n kɩt tɩ neb paam maagre, tɩ bõn-bãnã la bãnã maan ne y tʋmtʋmd-sõng a Zeezi yʋʋre." 
Acts4:31 La bãmb sẽn pʋʋs n sɛ, bãmb sẽn dag n tigim taab roog ningã rigimdame. La b fãa pida ne Sɩɩg-sõngo. La b moona Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã ne raoodo." 
Acts4:32 Neb wʋsgã sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã sũyã la b yamã fãa ra yaa a yembre. Bãmb ned ba a yembr dag n ka yet tɩ bũmb nins yẽ sẽn so wã yaa a meng rẽnd ye. La paoongã fãa rag n yaa bãmb fãa n so. 
Acts4:33 La tẽn-tʋmdbã rag n kɩta Zu-soabã a Zeezi vʋʋgrã kaset ne pãn-kãsenga. La bark kãseng rag n sigda bãmb fãa zutu. 
Acts4:34 La bãmb sʋkã ned ba a yembr da ka naong soab ye. Bala, neb nins fãa sẽn da tar pʋto, wall rotã koosa bãmb fãa, n dɩk b sẽn koosã ligd n tall n wa." 
Acts4:35 La b kɩta tẽn-tʋmdbã ligdã, la b pʋɩta ligdã tɩ ned kam fãa paam sẽn zems a sõngre." 
Acts4:36 La a Zozɛfe, tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn pʋd a soab yʋʋr t'a Barnabaas sẽn dat n togs tɩ ned sẽn belsd a taaba. Yẽnda yaa Leevi buudu la a yita Sɩpre." 
Acts4:37 Yẽnda koosa a pʋʋg n tall ligdã n wa rɩgl tẽn-tʋmdbã taoore. 
Acts5:1 La rao a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Hananiyaas ne a pag a Safɩɩra me koosa b pʋʋgo. 
Acts5:2 La a Ananiyaas ne a pagã seda ne taab n yãk ligdã n bĩng b mens yĩnga. La a rɩk sẽn kellã n tɩ kɩs tẽn-tʋmdbã. 
Acts5:3 La a Pɩyɛɛr sok-a lame yaa: Ananiyaase, yaa bõe tɩ Sʋtãanã soog fo sũurã halɩ n kɩt tɩ f yag zĩrẽ ne Sɩɩg-sõng n yãk pʋʋgã ligd fo sẽn koosã?" 
Acts5:4 Fo sẽn dag n nan ka koos pʋʋgã, a ka foom n so la? La fo sẽn koos-a wã ligdã ka fo rẽnd sɩda? La yɩɩ a wãn tɩ fo tags f sũurẽ tɩ maan bõn-kãnga? Fo ka yag zĩrẽ wã ne ninsaalb ye, la yaa ne Wẽnnaam la f yag yã." 
Acts5:5 A Ananiyaas sẽn wʋm gom-kãense, a lʋɩɩ tẽng n ki. La rabeem kãseng yõka neb nins fãa sẽn wʋm yel-kãnga" 
Acts5:6 La kom-bɩɩsã yikame n dɩk-a n vil ne pɛɛl n tɩ mume. 
Acts5:7 La sẽn kaoos bilf n kolg lɛɛr a tãabo, a Ananiyaas pagã me kẽeme la yẽnda ka bãng bũmb ning sẽn da maanã ye." 
Acts5:8 A Pɩyɛɛr sok-a lame yaa: Togs maam yãmb sã n koosa y pʋʋgã a woto tɛka. La a leokame tɩ n-yẽe, tɩ yaa woto tɛka." 
Acts5:9 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr yeela yẽnda yaa: Yɩɩ a wãn tɩ yãmb sed ne taab n na n mak Zu-soabã Sɩɩga? Gese, neb nins sẽn mum fo sɩdã bee rignoorẽ, la bãmb na n dɩka foom me n looge." 
Acts5:10 La wakat-kãng bala, yẽnda lʋɩɩ tẽng a Pɩyɛɛr taoor n ki. La kom-bɩɩsã kẽeme n mik t'a Safɩɩra kiime. La b rɩk-a lame n tɩ mum n yegl a sɩdã." 
Acts5:11 Rabeem kãseng yõka tẽedbã fãa ne neb nins fãa sẽn wʋm bõn-kãensã. 
Acts5:12 Tẽn-tʋmdbã maana bãn la bõn-yɛɛsds wʋsg nebã sʋka. Tẽedbã fãa tigma taab zĩig ning b sẽn boond t'a Salmo zãndã. 
Acts5:13 La neb a taabã sʋk ned ba a yembr da ka saagd n dat n naag-b ye. La nebã rag n pẽgda tẽedbã wʋsgo. 
Acts5:14 Raop la pagb wʋsg sẽn da tẽed Zu-soabã tara paasg daar fãa. 
Acts5:15 B rag n tallda bãad-dãmb ne gãas wala pãnday n wat n gãnegd-b soayã zut tɩ daar ninga, a Pɩyɛɛr sã n wa n loogdẽ, bɩ a maasmã tõe n bui bãad-dãmb kẽere." 
Acts5:16 La neb wʋsg-wʋsg yii tẽms sẽn yeg Zeruzalɛm n tall bãad-dãmb la neb zĩn-dẽgd sẽn namsd n wa. La bãmb fãa paama maagre. 
Acts5:17 La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem ne neb nins fãa sẽn da be ne yẽnda wã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ Saduusẽ-dãmbã, yik n pida ne sũ-kiiri." 
Acts5:18 Bãmb yõga tẽn-tʋmdbã n kẽes bi-bees roogẽ. 
Acts5:19 La Zu-soabã malɛɛk waa ne yʋng n pak bi-bees roogã kʋɩleng n yiis tẽn-tʋmdbã n yeel-b yaa: 
Acts5:20 Kẽng-y n tɩ yals-y wẽnd doogã pʋg n togs nebã vɩɩm‑kãngã koɛɛgã fãa. 
Acts5:21 La bãmb sẽn wʋm woto, bãmb kẽe wẽnd doogẽ wã yibeoog pĩnd n sɩng n zãmsd nebã. La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem ne neb nins sẽn da be ne yẽnda wã waame n tigim kaorengã yɛl-bʋ-kaoodbã la Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã, La b tʋmame tɩ b tall tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn be bi-bees roogẽ wã n wa." 
Acts5:22 La gũudbã sẽn ta bi-bees roogẽ wã, b ka yãnd tẽn-tʋmdbã be ye. La b lebgame n tɩ yeel yaa:" 
Acts5:23 Tõnd yãnda bi-bees roogã sẽn pag sõama, tɩ gũudbã yas noyẽ wã n gũudẽ. La tõnd sẽn pake d ka yã ned doogã pʋgẽ ye." 
Acts5:24 La bãmb sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, wẽnd-doog gũudbã kãsem ne maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb dag n ka mi b sẽn na n tags bũmb ning tẽn-tʋmdbã wɛɛngẽ ye, la b rag n sokda b mens tɩ yel-kãngã na n yɩɩ a wãna." 
Acts5:25 La ned n wa n yeel-b tɩ neb nins bãmb sẽn dag n kẽes bi-bees roogẽ wã bee wẽnd doogẽ wã n zãmsd nebã. 
Acts5:26 La wẽnd-doog gũudbã kãsem ne gũudbã kẽngame n tɩ tall tẽn-tʋmdbã n wa n ka maan-b pãng ye. Bala, gũudbã rag n yɛɛsdame tɩ nebã na n wa lob bãmb kuga." 
Acts5:27 La b sẽn tall tẽn-tʋmdbã n leb n wa, b kɩtame tɩ b yals kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoore. La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem yeel-b lame yaa:" 
Acts5:28 Tõnd dag n yeela yãmb tɩ y ra leb n saag n zãms nebã ne yʋ-kãngã ye. La ade, yãmb pidsa Zeruzalɛm ne y zãmsgã. La y rat n dɩk raoã kũum yell n dogl tõnd zutu!" 
Acts5:29 A Pɩyɛɛr ne tẽn-tʋmdbã leokame yaa: Tõnd tog n saka Wẽnnaam n yɩɩd ninsaalbã. 
Acts5:30 Tõnd yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam vʋʋga a Zeezi yãmb sẽn dag n ka a soab da-pɩkã zug tɩ b ki wã. 
Acts5:31 Wẽnnaam zẽka a Zeezi tɩ b be bãmb rɩtgo n yaa rĩmã la fãagda n na n kõ Israyɛll nebã yam tekre la yel-wẽnã sugri. 
Acts5:32 Tõnd yaa bõn-kãens kaset dãmba. La Sɩɩg-sõng Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ neb nins sẽn sak bãmbã me yaa kaset soaba. 
Acts5:33 La kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã sẽn wʋm gom-kãense, b sũyã puugame tɩ b ra baood tẽn-tʋmdbã n dat n kʋ." 
Acts5:34 La tõog karen-saamb a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Gamalyɛll n yaa Fariizẽ ned n dag n be b sʋka. La nebã ra waoogda yẽnda la a yika kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoor n kõ noor tɩ b yiis tẽn-tʋmdbã tɩ yɩ bilfu. 
Acts5:35 La yẽnda yeela nebã yaa: Israyɛll nebã, gũus-y ne bũmb ningã yãmb sẽn dat n maan nin-bãmbã wã." 
Acts5:36 Bala, a Tedaas yika wakat sẽn ka zãra n yetẽ tɩ yẽnda yaa nin-kãsenga. La neb sẽn kolg kobs-naas da tũuda yẽnda. La b kʋ-a lame, la neb nins fãa sẽn da tũud yẽnda wã zoe n sãeegame, la b tũudmã yɩɩ zaalem." 
Acts5:37 La yẽnda sẽn looge, Galɩle dao a Zʋdaas me yika sõdbã wakat n kɩt tɩ neb wʋsg tũ yẽnda. La b kʋʋ yẽ me, la neb nins fãa sẽn da tũud yẽnda wã sãeegame." 
Acts5:38 Dẽ, moasã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y bas nin-bãmbã tɩ b loog la y ra leb n bao tɩ maan bãmb bũmb ye. Bala, bãmb sẽn maandã, wala b tʋʋmã sã n yaa ninsaalb rẽnda, a na n sãama b toore." 
Acts5:39 La b sã n yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ, yãmb kõn tõog n sãam-b ye. Gũus-y y mens n da wa n zab ne Wẽnnaam ye." 
Acts5:40 Bãmb saka a Gamalyɛll goamã. La b leb n boola tẽn-tʋmdbã n kɩt tɩ b pãb-b ne kalwaase n yeel-b tɩ b ra leb n saag n gom ne a Zeezi yʋʋre, La b bas-ba." 
Acts5:41 Tẽn-tʋmdbã yii kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoor ne sũ-noogo b sẽn ges tɩ bãmb zemsame tɩ paam namsg a Zeezi yʋʋrã yĩnga. 
Acts5:42 Bãmb dag n zãmsda nebã la b moond a Zeezi Kiris koe-noogã wẽnd doogẽ wã la zagsã pʋs daar fãa n ka basdẽ ye. 
Acts6:1 Wakat-kãnga, karen-biisã ra lebgda wʋsgo. Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn vɩ-b tẽn-taasã yẽgma ne Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn vɩ-b Zeruzalɛmã, b sẽn da ka kõt bãmb pʋg‑kõapã b daar fãa pʋɩɩrã wa sẽn zemsã yĩnga." 
Acts6:2 Dẽ, tẽn-tʋmdbã piig la a yiibã tigma karen-biisã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «A ka zems tɩ tõnd bas Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã mooneg n pʋɩt neb rɩɩb ye." 
Acts6:3 Ba-biisi, woto yĩngã, bɩ y yãk raop a yopoe yãmb sʋkã sẽn tar kaset sõngo, n pid ne Sɩɩg-sõng la yam, tɩ tõnd ning tʋʋm-kãngã bãmb zutu." 
Acts6:4 La tõnd na n kell n kẽnga taoor ne pʋʋsgo la Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã moonego.» 
Acts6:5 La neb kʋʋngã fãa sũur yɩɩ noog ne koe-kãnga. Dẽ, bãmb yãka a Etɛn sẽn pid ne tẽeb la Sɩɩg-sõngã, la a Filip ne a Porkoore, la a Nikanoor ne a Tɩmo, la a Parmenaas ne a Nikola sẽn yit Ãntiyoos n dag n kẽ Zʋɩf-rãmbã kaorengo." 
Acts6:6 B talla bãmb n wa tẽn-tʋmdbã nengẽ, la b pʋʋsame n tik-b ne b nusi." 
Acts6:7 La Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã rag n saagdame n yɩɩd pĩnda, la karen-biisã sõor dag n paasda wʋsg Zeruzalɛm. La maan-kʋʋdb wʋsg rag n sakda tẽebã." 
Acts6:8 A Etɛn sẽn pid ne bark la pãnga, a maana bõn-yɛɛsds kãsemse, la bãn nebã sʋka." 
Acts6:9 La karen-doog ning sẽn boond tɩ neb sẽn paam lohorem karen-doogã neb kẽer sẽn yit Sirɛn la Alegsãndri n paas ne Zʋɩf-rãmb sẽn yit Silisi la Aazi soolem sɩngame n wẽ nokoeemd ne a Etɛn. 
Acts6:10 La a Etɛn sẽn da gomd ne yam la Sɩɩg-sõng pãngã, b ka tõog n leok yẽnda ye." 
Acts6:11 Dẽ, b maana zãmb n paam neb tɩ b yeel tɩ bãmb wʋmame t'a Etɛn tʋʋd a Moyiis ne Wẽnnaam." 
Acts6:12 La b rãmba nebã ne kãsem-dãmbã la ne gʋlsdbã. La b waame n yõk a Etɛn ne pãng n tall-a n kẽng Kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoore. 
Acts6:13 Bãmb waa ne zĩrẽ kaset dãmb tɩ b yet t'a Etɛn tʋʋda zĩ-sõngã la tõogã n ka basdẽ ye. 
Acts6:14 Bala, bãmb wʋma a Etɛn sẽn yeel tɩ Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi na n sãama zĩ-kãngã la b tek minind nins a Moyiis sẽn da kõ bãmbã." 
Acts6:15 Neb nins sẽn da zĩ bʋ-kaoorã zĩigẽ wã fãa ra geta a Etɛn la b yãame tɩ yẽnda nengã wẽnda wa malɛɛk nenga. 
Acts7:1 La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem soka a Etɛn tɩ sɩd yaa a woto la? 
Acts7:2 A Etɛn leokame n yeel yaa: M ba-bi‑raop la m ba-rãmba, kelg-y-yã. Tõnd yaab a Abrahaam sẽn dag n be Mezopotami n nan ka kẽng Kaarã nandã, Wẽnnaam sẽn tar ziirã vẽnega b meng ne bãmba." 
Acts7:3 La Wẽnnaam yeel-b lame tɩ: «Yi n bas f tẽngã ne f buudã n kẽng tẽng ning mam sẽn na n wilg foomã.» 
Acts7:4 Dẽ, a Abrahaam yi n basa Kalde-rãmbã tẽng n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Kaarã. La bãmb ba wã kũum poore, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ b yi be n wa tẽn-kãngã yãmb sẽn be moasã wã pʋgẽ." 
Acts7:5 La Wẽnnaam ka kõ a Abrahaam zĩig ba sẽn sekd naoor rɩglg tɩ yɩ a pʋɩɩr tẽn‑kãngã pʋgẽ ye. La Wẽnnaam kãabame tɩ b na n kõo bãmb ne b yagensã tẽngã tɩ b soog-a, a Abrahaam loogr poore. La rẽ t'a Abrahaam nan ka tar biig ye. Wẽnnaam da gomame n yeel a Abrahaam a woto:" 
Acts7:6 «Fo yagensã na n zĩnda tẽng a to, tɩ b kẽes-b yembdo, la b na n namsa bãmb hal tɩ ta yʋʋm kobs naase.»" 
Acts7:7 Wẽnnaam yeelame yaa: «La mam na n sɩbga buud ning sẽn na n kẽes-b yembdã, la bõn-kãng zugẽ b na n yaool n yii be n waoog maam tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ.»" 
Acts7:8 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam maana zood lagem-n-taar ne a Abrahaam n kõ-a bãong kẽesg tɩ yɩ bãnde. La a Abrahaam doga a Izake. La rasem a nii sẽn ta, b kẽesa a Izak bãongo, la a Izak sẽn dog a Zakoobe, a kẽesa yẽnda me bãongo. La a Zakoob sẽn dog Zʋɩf-rãmbã yaab-rãmb piig la a yiibã, a kẽes-b-la bãongo." 
Acts7:9 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã yaab-rãmb maana sũ-kiir ne a Zozɛf n koos-a tɩ b tall-a n kẽng Ezɩpte. 
Acts7:10 La Wẽnnaam dag n bee ne a Zozɛfe, la b fãaga yẽnda a yel-pakrã fãa pʋgẽ. La Wẽnnaam kɩtame t'a Zozɛf tar yam la bark Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ nifẽ. La rĩm a Faarõ kɩtame t'a Zozɛf lebg Gʋvɛrneer n soog Ezɩpt ne a Farõ na-yirã neb fãa." 
Acts7:11 La kom-kãseng n kẽ Ezɩpt soolmã fãa ne Kana tẽngã gilli, la namsgã yɩɩ wʋsgo, la tõnd yaab-rãmbã ra ka tar dɩɩb sẽn na n dɩ ye." 
Acts7:12 A Zakoob sẽn wʋm tɩ kood bee Ezɩpt tẽnga, b tʋma tõnd yaab-rãmbã be dẽenem." 
Acts7:13 La a Zakoob sẽn tʋm-b naoor a yiib soaba, a Zozɛf vẽnega a meng ne a ba-biisã. La Faarõ bãnga a Zozɛf sẽn yaa buud ninga." 
Acts7:14 Dẽ, a Zozɛf tʋmame tɩ b tɩ peeg a ba a Zakoob ne b yirã rãmb fãa, b sõorã taa bãmb pis-yopoe la a nu." 
Acts7:15 A Zakoob kẽnga Ezɩpt la b kii be. La tõnd yaab-rãmbã me kii be. 
Acts7:16 La b tʋka a Zakoob kũumã n kẽng Sɩkɛm n tɩ mum yaoog ninga a Abrahaam sẽn dag n da ne ligd a Hamoor kambã nengẽ sẽn be Sɩkɛmã pʋgẽ. 
Acts7:17 La wakatã sẽn kolgd tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n maan kãabg ningã ne a Abrahaamã tog n pidsi, nebã fɩɩgame n lebg wʋsg Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ," 
Acts7:18 hal tɩ Ezɩpt rĩm a to sẽn ka bãng a Zozɛf reeg naam. 
Acts7:19 Rĩm‑kãng maana sɩlem n zãmb tõnd buudã n maan tõnd yaab-rãmbã pãng n kɩt tɩ b bas b kom-peels tɩ b ki. 
Acts7:20 La yaa wakat-kãng la b rog a Moyiisi. A rag n yaa bi-neere n ta Wẽnnaam yam. La yẽnda zĩnda a ba wã zakẽ kiis a tãabo. 
Acts7:21 La b sẽn yiis a Moyiis n base, a Faarõ bi-pugla rɩka yẽnda n wub-a wa a biiga." 
Acts7:22 B zãmsa a Moyiis Ezɩpt-rãmbã yamã fãa. La a goamã ne a tʋʋmã ra tara pãnga. 
Acts7:23 La a Moyiis sẽn ta yʋʋm pis-naase, a tags‑a sũurẽ n dat n ges a ba-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll yagensã." 
Acts7:24 A Moyiis yãnda b sẽn maand Israyɛll ned a yembr pãnga, la a sõnga Israyɛll nedã n dok a sũur n kʋ Ezɩpt nedã." 
Acts7:25 A Moyiis ra tẽedame t'a ba-biisã na n bãngame tɩ Wẽnnaam na n talla yẽnda n fãag‑ba. La b ka bãng ye. 
Acts7:26 La vẽkembeoogo, a Moyiis yãnda Israyɛll neb a yiib sẽn zabd taaba. La yẽnda rat n paasa zabrã n yeel yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ y maan taab pãnga? Yãmb yaa ba-biisi.»" 
Acts7:27 Ned ning sẽn maand a to wã pãngã tusa yẽnda n yeel-a tɩ ãndã n yãk-a t'a yɩ bãmb naab la b bʋ-kaooda," 
Acts7:28 t'a Moyiis rat n kʋʋ yẽnda wala a sẽn kʋ Ezɩpt nedã zaamẽ wã la? 
Acts7:29 A Moyiis sẽn wʋm gom-kãngã, a zoeeme n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Madiyã tẽng n dog kom-dibli a yiib beenẽ." 
Acts7:30 La yʋʋm pis-naas rẽ zugẽ, malɛɛk puka a meng ne a Moyiis tuug sẽn wit bugum pʋgẽ weoog sẽn pẽ Sinayi tãngã." 
Acts7:31 A Moyiis sẽn yã tuugã sẽn wit bugmã a yɛɛsame. La b sẽn kolgd n na n gese, bãmb wʋma Zu-soabã koɛɛg sẽn yeel yaa:" 
Acts7:32 «Mam yaa fo yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam. A Abrahaam la a Izak ne a Zakoob Wẽnnaam.» La rabeem yõka a Moyiis t'a sɩng n digda, n ka saag n na n ges ye." 
Acts7:33 La Zu-soabã yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Piid f neooda wã, bala fo sẽn be zĩig ningã yaa zĩ-sõngo." 
Acts7:34 Mam yãnda m nebã sẽn be Ezɩptã namsgã, la m wʋma b wõosgã. La m sigame n na n fãag-ba. Moasã, wa tɩ m na n tʋm-f la Ezɩpte.»" 
Acts7:35 Moyiis ningã Israyɛll kambã sẽn dag n yeel tɩ ãnda n yãk-a t'a yɩ bãmb naab-la, b bʋ-kaoodã, yaa Moyiis‑kãng la Wẽnnaam tʋm yã, t'a yɩ naaba la fãagda, ne malɛɛk ningã sẽn dag n puk a meng ne bãmb tuugã pʋgẽ wã sõngre." 
Acts7:36 Yaa a Moyiis n maan bõn-yɛɛsds la bãn Ezɩpt tẽngã n yiis Israyɛll kambã Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ la mog-miuugã ne weoogã pʋgẽ yʋʋm pis-naasã. 
Acts7:37 Leb n yaa a Moyiis‑kãng n dag n yeel Israyɛll kambã yaa: «Wẽnnaam na n yãka b no-rɛɛs sẽn wẽnd maam yãmb ba-biisã sʋk n kõ yãmba.» 
Acts7:38 La yaa yẽnda n zĩnd ne Israyɛll nebã weoogẽ wã, n dag n be ne malɛɛkã sẽn gomd ne yẽnda Sinayi tãngã. La a zĩnda ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã n deeg tõog sẽn kõt vɩɩmã n kõ yãmba." 
Acts7:39 Tõnd yaab-rãmbã rag n ka tʋlg n na n sak a Moyiis ye. Bãmb basa a Moyiis kɛɛnga n baood n lebg n leb Ezɩpte. 
Acts7:40 B yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Maan wẽnnaam-dãmb n kõ tõnd tɩ b lʋɩ d taoore. Bala, a Moyiisi, soab ning sẽn yiis-a tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã, tõnd ka mi bũmb ning sẽn maan-a ye.»" 
Acts7:41 Dẽ, badaare b maana nag-bila, n maan maoong n kõ wẽnd-naandgã, la b maana sũ-noog ne bũmb ning b mens nus sẽn maanã." 
Acts7:42 La Wẽnnaam wẽnemda b neng n bas-b tɩ b pʋʋs yĩngr ãds wa sẽn gʋls Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sebr pʋgẽ wã: «Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sẽn zĩnd weoogã pʋgẽ yʋʋm pis-naasã, yãmb kʋʋ rũms la y maan maand n kõ maam sɩda?" 
Acts7:43 La yãmb zẽka y wẽnnaam a molok fu-roogo, ney wẽnnaam a ramfã ãdga. Yãmb maana wẽnd-naands kãens n na n waoogd-ba. Woto yĩnga, mam na n yiisa yãmb tɩ y kẽng hal n zãag ne Babilonde.»" 
Acts7:44 Weoogẽ wã tõnd yaab-rãmbã dag n tara kaset fu-roogã. Fu-roogã wẽnda mamsg ningã a Moyiis sẽn dag n yãndã, tɩ sẽn gomd-a ne yẽnda wã yeel-a t'a tilg n wẽneg a woto wã." 
Acts7:45 Rẽ zugẽ, tõnd yaab-rãmbã reega fu-ro-kãng n tall-a n kẽ tẽng ningã pʋg a Zozoe sẽn lʋɩ bãmb taoor n zab tɩ Wẽnnaam dig buud a taabã tɩ b reeg n soogã, la fu-roogã paa be hal tɩ ta a Davɩɩd zamaanẽ." 
Acts7:46 A Davɩɩd paama bark Wẽnnaam nifẽ, n kos bãmb noor n dat n me roog n kõ a Zakoob Wẽnnaam." 
Acts7:47 La baoosgo yɩɩ a Salmo n me roogã n kõ Wẽnnaam. 
Acts7:48 La Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To ka kẽed rot sẽn me ne ninsaalb nus ye. Wala Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã sẽn yeelã: 
Acts7:49 Zu-soabã yeelame: «Saasẽ yaa mam geere, dũni yaa mam nao roagendga. Ro-bʋg buud la yãmb na n me n kõ maam? La mam vʋʋsg zĩig bee yɛ?" 
Acts7:50 Ka mam meng n naan bõn-kãens fãa la?» 
Acts7:51 Yãmb yaa kɩɩsdba. La yãmb sũyã ne y tʋbã pagame n ka wʋmd Wẽnnaam boaalã ye. Yãmb kɩɩsda Sɩɩg-sõng daar fãa wala y yaab-rãmbã sẽn da maanã. 
Acts7:52 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs bʋg la y yaab-rãmbã ka namse? B kʋʋ neb nins sẽn da pĩnd n togs tɩrlem soabã waoongã. La moasã, yaa yãmb n zãmb tɩrlem soabã n kʋ-a." 
Acts7:53 Malɛɛk-rãmbã kõo yãmb Wẽnnaam tõogã la yãmb ka sak-a ye. 
Acts7:54 Kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-kaoodbã sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, b sũyã yika ne a Etɛn tɩ b wãb b yẽna." 
Acts7:55 La a Etɛn sẽn pid ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, yẽnda gesa yĩngri, la a yãnda Wẽnnaam ziirã, la a Zeezi sẽn yas Wẽnnaam dɩtgo." 
Acts7:56 La a Etɛn yeelame yaa: Kelg-y yã, mam nee yĩngr sẽn pake la Ninsaal Bi-riblã sẽn yas Wẽnnaam dɩtgo." 
Acts7:57 Dẽ, bãmb kelma ne pãng n yẽd b tʋba. La b fãa wudgame n yõk a Etɛn." 
Acts7:58 La b talla yẽnda n yi tẽngã n sɩng n lob-a ne kug n na n kʋ. La kaset dãmbã rʋʋga b fut bi-bɩɩg a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Soll taoore. 
Acts7:59 La b sẽn da lobd a Etɛn ne kugã, a ra pʋʋsdame n yetẽ: Zu-soab a Zeezi, reeg-y m sɩɩgã." 
Acts7:60 Dẽ, a Etɛn yĩgimda a rũm zug n kelem ne pãng n yeel yaa: Zu-soaba, da ning-y b taal yel-wẽn-kãngã yĩng ye. La a sẽn yeel a woto n sɛ, a gũsame." 
Acts8:1 La a Soll da gesame t'a Etɛn kʋʋbã zemsame. La wakat-kãng bala, b sɩng n namsda Kiris tẽedbã sẽn da be Zeruzalɛmã wʋsgo. La b fãa sãeegame n kẽ Zʋʋde soolem ne Samaari soolem pʋse, sã n ka tẽn-tʋmdbã bal n ka sãeege." 
Acts8:2 Nin-sõamyã rɩka a Etɛn n mum la b yãba wʋsg yẽ kũumã yĩnga. 
Acts8:3 La a Soll da namsda Kiris tẽedbã wʋsgo. Yẽnda ra kẽeda rot pʋs fãa n yõgd raop la pagb n kẽesd-b bi-bees roogẽ. 
Acts8:4 Dẽ, b sẽn sãeeg neb ninsã rag n kẽngda zĩig-zĩig n moond koe-noogã." 
Acts8:5 A Filip kẽnga Samaari na-tẽngã n tɩ moon Kiris koɛɛgã be. 
Acts8:6 Neb kʋʋngã sẽn wʋmd la b yãt a Filip sẽn maand bõn-bãna, bãmb naaga taab n kelgd bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn togsdã neer‑neere." 
Acts8:7 Bala, zĩn-dẽgd wʋsg ra kelemda ne pãng n yit n basd neb nins b sẽn da tarã. La koms-rãmb wʋsg ne wobs me ra paamda maagre." 
Acts8:8 La sũ-no-kãseng zĩnda tẽn-kãng pʋga. 
Acts8:9 Dao a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Sɩmo n da zoe n deng n be tẽn-kãng me pʋga, n maand tɩt n yɛɛsd Samaari nebã. A ra yeta a meng tɩ nin-kãsenga." 
Acts8:10 La sẽn sɩng ne nin-tals la nin-kãsems fãa ra kelgda yẽnda neer n yetẽ tɩ rao-kãng yaa Wẽnnaam pãnga. Tɩ yaa pãng ning b sẽn boond tɩ pãn-kãsengã. 
Acts8:11 Nebã ra kelgda yẽnda neere, bala, yaa daar zãr la a maand a tɩɩmã n yɛɛsd bãmba." 
Acts8:12 La nebã sẽn tẽ a Filip sẽn moond Wẽnnaam soolem koe-noogã la a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋrã, b raop la b pagb sak n deega koom lisgu." 
Acts8:13 A Sɩmo menga tẽeme n deeg koom lisg n kell n pa ne a Filip la a sẽn yãt bõn-yɛɛsdsã ne bõn-bãn kãsemsã sẽn maandã, a yɛɛsame." 
Acts8:14 Tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã sẽn wʋm tɩ Samaari nebã reega Wẽnnaam goamã, b tʋma a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã bãmb nengẽ." 
Acts8:15 A Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã sẽn ta Samaari b pʋʋsa Kiris tẽedbã yĩng tɩ b reeg Sɩɩg-sõngo. 
Acts8:16 Bala, Sɩɩg-sõng nan zɩɩ n sig bãmb ned ba a yembr zug ye. Bãmb da paama koom lisg bal ne zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋre." 
Acts8:17 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã tika tẽedbã ne b nusi, la b reega Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
Acts8:18 A Sɩmo sẽn yã tɩ wakat ning tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn tikd Kiris tẽedbã ne b nusã b reegda Sɩɩg-sõngo, yẽnda waa ne ligd n na n kõ a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã." 
Acts8:19 Yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: Kõ-y maam me pãn-kãnga, tɩ mam sẽn na n tik ned ning fãa ne m nusi, bɩ a reeg Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
Acts8:20 La a Pɩyɛɛr yeela yẽnda yaa: Bɩ f ligdã naag foom n sãam, fo sẽn tẽed tɩ ligd tõe n daa Wẽnnaam kũunã yĩnga." 
Acts8:21 Fo ka tar pʋɩɩr yel-kãnga pʋgẽ ye. Tɩ bõe fo sũurã ka tɩrg Wẽnnaam taoor ye. 
Acts8:22 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ f tek yam n bas f tags‑wẽnsã, n pʋʋs Zu-soabã tɩ sã n tõe bɩ f paam sugr kũun tags kãnga sẽn be fo sũurẽ wã yĩnga." 
Acts8:23 Bala, mam neeme tɩ sũ-toog n tar foom tɩ f ya yel-wẽnã yamba." 
Acts8:24 A Sɩmo yeel-b lame yaa: Yãmb mens pʋʋs Zu-soabã mam yĩnga, tɩ bũmb nins yãmb sẽn yeelã ba a yembr da paam maam ye." 
Acts8:25 La a Pɩyɛɛr ne a Zã sẽn kɩs kaset la b moon Zu-soabã koɛɛg n sa, b lebg n leba Zeruzalɛm. La b sẽn wa n dabdã, b moona koe-noogã Samaari tẽn-bãooneg wʋsg pʋse." 
Acts8:26 La Zu-soabã malɛɛk goma ne a Filip n yeel-a t'a yik n kẽng wĩndgã goabg n tũ sor ningã sẽn yit Zeruzalɛm n dabd Gaaza, n yaa weoog sorã." 
Acts8:27 A Filip yikame n kẽng tao-tao. La rao a yembr sẽn ya zu-soab n yit Etiyopi sega yẽnda sorã zugu. Rao-kãng yaa Etiyopi rĩm-poaka, Kãndaas ligd gũuda, yẽnda ra waa Zeruzalɛm n na n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam." 
Acts8:28 La yẽnda ra lebg n kuiisame, a ra zĩi a saar pʋg n karemd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sebre." 
Acts8:29 La Sɩɩg-sõng yeela a Filip t'a kẽng n kolg saarã. 
Acts8:30 Yẽnda wudg n kolgame, la a wʋma Etiyopi raoã sẽn da karemd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sebre, t'a Filip sok-a t'a wʋmda a sẽn karemdã võor sɩda?" 
Acts8:31 Tɩ raoã leok tɩ yẽnda na n yɩɩ wãn n tõog n wʋm a võor tɩ sã n ka ned n bilg n kõ-a. La a boola a Filip t'a wa kẽ voatɩɩrã pʋg n zĩnd ne yẽnda. 
Acts8:32 Raoã sẽn da karemd zĩig ning gʋls-sõngã pʋgẽ wã ra yeta a woto: B waa ne bãmb wala b sẽn wat ne pesg kʋʋb zĩigẽ, wala pe-bil sẽn ka yaagd a noor a wõrsdã taoorã, bãmb me ka yaag b noor ye." 
Acts8:33 B sẽn paoog bãmbã pʋgẽ, b ka kao b bʋʋd tɩrg ye. Ãnda n na n tõog n wilg bãmb sẽn bas b poorẽ? Bala, b yiisa bãmb vɩɩm dũniyã zug ka." 
Acts8:34 Ligd-gũudã yeela a Filip yaa: M Bõosdame tɩ y togs maam. Yaa ãnda yell la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã sẽn gomd a woto wã? Yaa b meng yell bɩ, bɩ yaa ned a to yelle?" 
Acts8:35 Dẽ, a Filip sɩnga ne gʋls-sõngã zĩ-kãng n moon yẽnda a Zeezi koe-noogã." 
Acts8:36 La bãmb sẽn ket n kẽndã, b waa n taa koom zĩigẽ. La ligd-gũudã yeelame yaa: Ad koom, bõe n gɩdg maam ne koom lisgu?" 
Acts8:37 [A Filip yeel-a lame t'a sã n tẽ ne a sũurã fãa, a tõe n paama koom lisgu. La a leokame tɩ yẽnda tẽedame t'a Zeezi Kiris yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla.]" 
Acts8:38 Dẽ, a kɩtame tɩ saarã yalse. La a Filip ne ligd-gũudã tũu taab n sig n kẽ koomẽ wã. La a Filip lisa yẽnda." 
Acts8:39 La bãmb sẽn lebg n yi koomã pʋgẽ, Zu-soabã Sɩɩg rɩka a Filip n looge, la ligd-gũudã ka leb n yãnd-a ye. La a leb n dɩka a sor ne sũ-noogo." 
Acts8:40 La b yãnda a Filip Azote. La yẽnda moona koe-noogã tẽms nins fãa yẽnda sẽn tũ wã, halɩ n tɩ ta Sezaare." 
Acts9:1 Baoosgo, a Soll sẽn dag n ket n namsd Zu-soabã karen-biis n dat kʋ-bã, a kẽnga maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem nengẽ" 
Acts9:2 n tɩ kos-a t'a gʋls sɛb n tʋm karen-dot nins sẽn be Damaasã tɩ yẽnda sã n tɩ yãnd neb beenẽ sẽn tũud Zu-soabã sore, sã n yaa raop wala pagba, bɩ yẽnda yõg-b n tall n wa Zeruzalɛm." 
Acts9:3 La yẽnda sẽn wa n be sorẽ n kolg Damaase, tao-tao bala, vẽenem n yi arzãn n yãg n gũbg yẽnda." 
Acts9:4 La a Soll lʋɩɩ tẽnga. La a wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yet yẽnda yaa: Solle, Solle, yaa bõe tɩ fo namsd maam?" 
Acts9:5 A Soll leokame tɩ Zu-soaba, yãmb yaa ãnda: La Zu-soabã yeelame yaa: Mam yaa a Zeezi fo sẽn namsd a soabã. [Na n yɩɩ toog ne foom, fo sẽn kɩɩsdã yĩnga. La yẽnda ra yɛɛsame n digd n sok Zu-soabã tɩ bãmb datame tɩ yẽ maan bõe. Dẽ Zu-soabã yeela yẽnda]" 
Acts9:6 Yik n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ, la beenẽ b na n yeela foom bũmb ning f sẽn tog n maane." 
Acts9:7 La raop nins sẽn da tũud a Sollã yɛɛsame n yas n ka tõe n gom ye. B dag n wʋmda koɛɛgã la b ka ne ned ye. 
Acts9:8 A Soll yikame, la baa yẽnda ninã sẽn pukã, a ra ka tõe n yãnd baa fʋɩ. B gãda a nug n tɛ-a n kẽng Damaase." 
Acts9:9 Yẽnda maana rasem a tãab n ka tõe n yãnd ye. La a ka rɩ wala a yũ bũmb ye. 
Acts9:10 Karen-biig a ye n dag n be Damaas t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Hananiyaase. Zu-soabã puka b meng ne yẽnda vẽnegr pʋgẽ n yeel-a tɩ Hananiyaas! T'a leok yaa: Ad maam Zu-soaba. 
Acts9:11 Zu-soabã yeela a Hananiyaas yaa: Yik n kẽng sor ning sẽn boond tɩ tɩrgã n ta a Zʋdaas zakẽ n bao ned a yembr sẽn yit Tars t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Solle. 
Acts9:12 Bala, yẽnda yãnda vẽnegr pʋgẽ tɩ ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Hananiyaas n wa n tik yẽnda ne a nus t'a leb n paam a nini." 
Acts9:13 A Hananiyaas leokame n yeel yaa: Zu-soaba, mam wʋma neb wʋsg sẽn gomd rao-kãngã sẽn maan yãmb nebã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã wẽng wʋsgã yelle." 
Acts9:14 La maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb kõo yẽnda noor t'a wa ka n yõg neb nins fãa sẽn pʋʋsd ne yãmb yʋʋrã. 
Acts9:15 La Zu-soabã yeela a Hananiyaas yaa: Kẽnge. Bala, mam yãka rao-kãngã n na n kɩt t'a tall mam yʋʋrã n wilg bu-zẽmsã la rĩm-dãmbã, la Israyɛll nebã." 
Acts9:16 La mam meng n na n wilg yẽnda namsg nins fãa yẽ sẽn tog n nams mam yʋʋrã yĩngã. 
Acts9:17 La a Hananiyaas kẽngame. La yẽnda taa n kẽe roogẽ wã n tik a Soll ne a nus n yeel-a yaa: Ba-biig a Solle, Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn puk b meng ne yãmb y sẽn wa n be sorã zug n watẽ wã tʋma maam tɩ m wa tɩ y tõe n leb n paam y nini, la y pid ne Sɩɩg-sõngo." 
Acts9:18 La tao-tao bala, bũmb sẽn wẽnd wa nod-pags yii a Soll nini wã n lʋɩ. La yẽnda leb n paama a nini. La yẽ yikame n deeg koom lisgu." 
Acts9:19 Dẽ, a Soll deega rɩɩb n dɩ la a pãnga leb n waame." 
Acts9:20 La a Soll paa ne karen-biisã sẽn be Damaasã rasem bilfu. La tao-tao bala, yẽnda sɩngame n moond koɛɛgã karen-dotã pʋsẽ n yetẽ t'a Zeezi yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-ribla." 
Acts9:21 Neb nins fãa sẽn wʋm yẽnda wã yɛɛsame n sokdẽ tɩ rao-kãngã n dag n namsd neb nins sẽn be Zeruzalɛm n pʋʋsd ne a Zeezi yʋʋrã wɛ! Tɩ la yẽnda ka wa ka n na n yõg neb nins sẽn pʋʋsd ne a Zeezi yʋʋrã n tall-b n kẽng n tɩ kõ maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã wɛ? 
Acts9:22 La a Soll koe-moonegã pãng ra paasdame. Daar fãa yẽ ra tõogda Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn be Damaasã n wilgd-b t'a Zeezi sɩd yaa Kirisã. 
Acts9:23 La sẽn kaoos bilfu, Zʋɩf-rãmbã naaga taab n yãk yam n dat n kʋ a Solle." 
Acts9:24 La a Soll bãnga b yam-wẽngã. Bãmb dag n gũusda tẽngã noyã wĩndg la yʋngo, sẽn na n yɩl n kɩt tɩ b kʋ a Solle." 
Acts9:25 Dẽ, karen-biisã kẽesa a Soll peoogẽ ne yʋng n gãndg n sik yẽnda lalgã poore." 
Acts9:26 A Soll sẽn ta Zeruzalɛm, yẽnda makame n dat n lagem ne karen-biisã, la bãmb fãa ra zoeta a Solle. Bala, b ra ka tẽed t'a Soll sɩd lebga a Zeezi karen-biig ye." 
Acts9:27 Dẽ, a Barnabaas peega a Soll n tall-a n kẽng tẽn‑tʋmdbã nengẽ, n togs bãmb a Soll sẽn yã Zu-soabã sorã zugã, la Zu-soabã sẽn gom ne-a to-to wã. La yẽ togsa bãmb a Soll sẽn moon koɛɛgã ne pɛl-kɛgeng Damaas tẽngã pʋgẽ ne a Zeezi yʋʋrã." 
Acts9:28 La a Soll dag n tũuda bãmb n gõod la a wat Zeruzalɛm la a moond koɛɛga ne Zu-soabã yʋʋr ne raoodo. 
Acts9:29 A Soll ra gomda ne Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn gomd Gɛrk goamã la a wẽed nokoɛɛm ne-ba. La b ra baood n na n kɩtame tɩ b kʋ a Solle. 
Acts9:30 La ba-biisã sẽn bãng bõn-kãnga, b talla a Soll n ta Sezaare n kɩt t'a kẽng Tarse:" 
Acts9:31 A Zeezi tẽedbã sẽn be Zʋʋde la Galɩle ne Samaari wã fãa dag n bee laafɩ, b pãnga ra paasdame la b ra sakda Zu-soabã, la Sɩɩg-sõng ra sõngd-b lame tɩ b lebgd wʋsgo." 
Acts9:32 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn da saagd zĩigã fãa n get nin-tũusdsã, a kẽnga a Zeezi tẽedbã sẽn dag n be Lida wã nengẽ." 
Acts9:33 La yẽnda yãnda rao a yembr beenẽ t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Ene n yaa ki-bogre, n gãe gãag zug hal yʋʋm a nii." 
Acts9:34 A Pɩyɛɛr yeel-a lame yaa: Ene, a Zeezi maagda foom, yik n maneg f gãagã f toore. La tao-tao bala a Ene yikame." 
Acts9:35 Lida ne Saaron tẽngã nebã fãa yãnda a Ene la b saka Zu-soabã. 
Acts9:36 Tẽed-poak a ye n da be Zope t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Tabita sẽn dat n togs tɩ Dorkaas ne Gɛrk goamã. A yʋʋrã võor yaa yãka: Pʋg-kãng ra maanda tʋʋm-sõamyã wʋsgo, la a sõngd naong rãmba." 
Acts9:37 Ra-kãense, a Dorkaas lʋɩɩ bãag n ki. La b sẽn so yẽ koom n sɛ, b rɩk-a lame n gãneg yĩngr doog pʋgẽ." 
Acts9:38 La Lida dag n ka zãr ne Zope ye. Dẽ, karen-biisã sẽn wʋm t'a Pɩyɛɛr bee Lida, b tʋma raop a yiib yẽ nengẽ tɩ b tɩ bõos-a t'a wa bãmb nengẽ n da kaoos ye." 
Acts9:39 La a Pɩyɛɛr yikame n tũ-b n looge. La a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn ta be, b tall-a lame n dʋ yĩngr doogã pʋgẽ. La pʋg‑kõapã fãa kolga yẽnda n yãbd la b wilgd yẽndã fu-yerd ninsi, la fut nins a Dorkaas sẽn dag n sẽ a sẽn wa n ket n vɩ wã." 
Acts9:40 A Pɩyɛɛr kɩtame tɩ nebã fãa yi. La yẽ yĩgimdame n pʋʋse. Dẽ a wẽnemdame n ges kũumã n yeel-a tɩ: Tabita yiki. La a puka a nini. La a sẽn yãnda a Pɩyɛɛre, a yikame n zĩndi." 
Acts9:41 La a Pɩyɛɛr gãda a nug n sõng-a t'a yik yĩngri. A Pɩyɛɛr boola nin-sõamyã ne pʋg‑kõapã n wilg-b t'a Dorkaas vʋʋgame. 
Acts9:42 Zope tẽnga fãa wʋma bõn-kãnga, la neb wʋsg tẽe Zu-soabã." 
Acts9:43 A Pɩyɛɛr paa Zope n kaoos bilfu, yẽnda siga zap a sɩmo yiri." 
Acts10:1 Dao a ye n da be Sezaare t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Korney n ya sodaas koabg naab n be soda-kʋʋngã b sẽn boond tɩ Itali-rãmbã sʋka. 
Acts10:2 Rao-kãng ra yaa wẽn-tũuda, la yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb ra zoeta Wẽnnaam. Yẽnda ra sõngda neb wʋsg sẽn yaa naong rãmba, la a ra pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam wakat fãa." 
Acts10:3 Sẽn zems zaabr lɛɛr a tãab sasa, yẽnda yãnda Wẽnnaam malɛɛk vẽeneg vẽnegr pʋgẽ t'a kẽ n yeel yẽnda tɩ Korney." 
Acts10:4 La yẽnda gesa malɛɛkã ne rabeem n yeel-a yaa: Yaa a wãna m Zu-soaba? Malɛɛkã yeel-a lame yaa: Fo pʋʋsgã, ne f sẽn sõngd naong rãmbã zẽk n taa Wẽnnaam, la b ka yĩm f yell ye." 
Acts10:5 Dẽ moasã, bɩ f tʋm neb Zope tɩ b tɩ bool ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr t'a wa." 
Acts10:6 Yẽnda siga zap a Sɩmo zakẽ, yirã bee ko-kãsenga noore." 
Acts10:7 La malɛɛk ning sẽn gom ne yẽnda wã sẽn looge, a Korney boola a tʋmtʋmdb a yiib ne a sodaag a yembr sẽn yaa nin-sõng sodaas nins yẽnda sẽn so wã sʋka." 
Acts10:8 A Korney togsa bãmb bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã la a tʋm-b Zope. 
Acts10:9 Vẽkembeoogo, bãmb sẽn waa n be sorẽ n kolgd Zope, sẽn zems wĩnto-sʋka, a Pɩyɛɛr dʋʋ roogã zug n na n pʋʋse." 
Acts10:10 La kom yõka a Pɩyɛɛr t'a rat rɩɩb n dɩ. La b sẽn segend rɩɩbã n na n kõ-a wakate, yẽnda paama vẽnegre." 
Acts10:11 A Pɩyɛɛr yãnda saasẽ sẽn pake, la bũmb sẽn wẽnd wa peen-bedr b sẽn loe a noy a naasã t'a sigd n pẽnegd tẽnga." 
Acts10:12 La rũms buud fãa sẽn tar nao a naase, la bõn-vuudsã la bõn-pɩgs buud fãa n dag n be a pʋgẽ." 
Acts10:13 La koɛɛg n yeel a Pɩyɛɛr t'a yik n kʋ n dɩ. 
Acts10:14 La a Pɩyɛɛr leokame yaa: Ayo, Zu-soaba, tɩ bõe mam zɩɩ n dɩ bũmb sẽn ka zems wala sẽn yaa rẽgd ye." 
Acts10:15 La yẽnda leb n wʋma koɛɛg sẽn gomd ne yẽnda n yetẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel tɩ bũmb ning yaa yɩlgemdã bɩ a ra bool bõn-kãng tɩ yaa rẽgd ye. 
Acts10:16 Bõn-kãng maana naoor a tãabo. La tao-tao bal rẽ zugẽ bõn-kãng leb n zẽk n leba saasẽ. 
Acts10:17 Wakat ning a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn nan tagsd a sũurẽ n dat n bãng vẽnegr ninga yẽnda sẽn yã wã võore, rẽ t'a Korney sẽn tʋm neb ninsã sok n bãnga a Sɩmo yirã zĩig n wa n be zakã noore." 
Acts10:18 Bãmb boolame n sok tɩ yaa ka la a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr sẽn be wã? 
Acts10:19 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn dag n ket n tagsd n baood vẽnegrã võore, sɩɩgã yeela yẽnda tɩ ad neb a" 
Acts10:20 tãab n be beenẽ n baood-a. T'a yik n sig n tũ la a ra sãmbe, tɩ bala, yaa bãmb n tʋm‑ba." 
Acts10:21 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr sigame n yeel rap‑kãens yaa: «Yaa maam la ned ning yãmb sẽn baoodã. Yaa bõe yell n wa ne yãmb ka?»" 
Acts10:22 Bãmb leokame yaa: «Sodaas koabg naab a Korney n tʋm tõndo. Bãmb yaa nin-tɩrga, n zoet Wẽnnaam, la Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa kɩta bãmb kaset sõngo. Wẽnnaam malɛɛk n sagl-b tɩ b kɩt yãmb wa b yirã, tɩ b kelg bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tar n na n gom ne-bã.»" 
Acts10:23 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr kɩtame tɩ b kẽ, la yẽnda reeg-b-la sãando. Vẽkembeoogo, a Pɩyɛɛr yikame n tũ-b n looge. La ba-biisã sẽn be Zope wã neb kẽer yãaga bãmba." 
Acts10:24 La ra-yɩt-n-daare, bãmb taa Sezaare. A Korney ra gũud‑b lame, la yẽnda ra boola a roagdbã la a zo-nongds tɩ b tigim yẽnda yirã." 
Acts10:25 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn wa n kẽedẽ wã, a Korney wa n sega yẽnda n lʋɩ n wõgemd a taoore, n na n pʋʋs-a ne waoogre." 
Acts10:26 La a Pɩyɛɛr roog-a lame n yeel-a yaa: Yiki, bala mam me yaa ninsaal bala." 
Acts10:27 Dẽ, yẽnda kell n sõsda ne a Korney. La a kẽe roogẽ wã n mik neb wʋsg sẽn tigim be." 
Acts10:28 A Pɩyɛɛr yeel-b lame yaa: Yãmb miime t'a ka zems ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã tõog tɩ ned sẽn yaa Zʋɩf lagem ne buud sẽn ka Zʋɩf wala kẽ a zakẽ ye. La Wẽnnaam wilga maam tɩ m ka tog n yeel ned ba a yembr t'a ka zemse, wala a yaa rẽgd ye." 
Acts10:29 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ yãmb sẽn bool maamã, m waame n ka kɩɩs ye. Dẽ, mam dat n bãnga bũmb ning sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb tʋm tɩ b bool maamã." 
Acts10:30 A Korney leokame yaa: Rab-tãtẽ sẽn zems wakat-kãnga, mam dag n bee m doogẽ zaabr lɛɛr a tãab wakat n pʋʋsdẽ. Tao-tao bala, rao sẽn da yer fut sẽn pɩnd n yals mam taoorã," 
Acts10:31 n yeel yaa: Korney! Wẽnnaam wʋma fo pʋʋsgã, la b ka yĩmd sõngr ning fo sẽn sõngd naong rãmbã yell ye." 
Acts10:32 Dẽ, bɩ f tʋm neb Zope tɩ b tɩ bool a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr t'a wa. Yẽnda siga a Sɩmo sẽn yaa zapã zakẽ sẽn be ko-kãsengã sɛɛgã." 
Acts10:33 La tao-tao bala mam tʋma neb tɩ b bool yãmba. La yãmb maana neer n sak n wa. Moasã, tõnd fãa bee Wẽnnaam taoor ka n na n kelg bũmb nins fãa Zu-soabã sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y togs tõndã." 
Acts10:34 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr gomame n yeel yaa: Moasã, mam sɩd bãngame tɩ Wẽnnaam ka tũusd neb ye." 
Acts10:35 Ned ning fãa, sẽn yaa buud ning fãa sẽn zoet Wẽnnaam la a maand tɩrlem, yẽnda soab tata bãmb yam." 
Acts10:36 Wẽnnaam tʋma b koɛɛgã Israyɛll yagensã nengẽ n togs-b tɩ laafɩ Koe-noog wata a Zeezi sẽn yaa nebã fãa Zu-soabã maasem yĩnga. 
Acts10:37 Yãmb mii bũmb ning sẽn sɩng n maan Galɩle la Zʋʋde soolmã fãa a Zã sẽn dag n moond nebã koom lisg koɛɛg zugẽ. 
Acts10:38 Yãmb bãnga sẽn yɩ to-to tɩ Wẽnnaam sik b Sɩɩg-sõng pãngã Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi zugã. La sẽn yɩ to-to me t'a Zeezi saag tẽngã n maan neer n maag neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Sʋtãanã yembd pʋgẽ wã, bala, Wẽnnaam bee ne bãmba." 
Acts10:39 A Zeezi sẽn maan bũmb nins fãa Zʋɩf-rãmbã tẽngẽ wã la Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, tõnd yaa kaset dãmba. Bãmb kaa a Zeezi da-pɩk zug n kʋ-ba," 
Acts10:40 la rasem a tãab daare, Wẽnnaam vʋʋga bãmb n kõ-b noor tɩ b vẽneg b menga." 
Acts10:41 La b ka vẽneg b meng ne nebã fãa ye. La yaa ne tõndo, Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n pĩnd n yãk tɩ yaa kaset dãmbã, sẽn dag n dɩ la d yũ ne bãmb b vʋʋgrã zugẽ wã." 
Acts10:42 La a Zeezi kõo tõnd noor tɩ d moon nebã sʋk n kɩs kaset n yeel tɩ Wẽnnaam yãka bãmba, tɩ b na n kao nin-vɩɩse, la kũum bʋʋdo." 
Acts10:43 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã fãa goma Zeezi yell n yeel tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn tẽeda bãmb na n paama a yel-wẽnã sugr kũun ne bãmb yʋʋre. 
Acts10:44 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn ket n gomda, Sɩɩg-sõng siga neb nins fãa sẽn dag n kelgd yẽnda goamã zutu." 
Acts10:45 Tẽedb nins sẽn yaa Zʋɩf buud n tũ a Pɩyɛɛr n wa wã yɛɛsa wʋsg ne Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam kũunã sẽn sigd neb nins me sẽn ka Zʋɩf-rãmbã zutã. 
Acts10:46 Bala, b da wʋmda b sẽn gomd gom-zẽn n waoogd Wẽnnaam." 
Acts10:47 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr leb yeelame yaa: Nin-bãmbã sẽn paam Sɩɩg-sõng pidb wala tõndã, moasã b tõe n gɩdga bãmb tɩ b ka paam koom lisg sɩda?" 
Acts10:48 A Pɩyɛɛr kõo noor tɩ b lis-b ne a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋre. Dẽ, bãmb kosa a Pɩyɛɛr t'a pa ne-b rasem bilfu." 
Acts11:1 Tẽn‑tʋmdbã la b ba-biisã sẽn da be Zʋʋde wã wʋmame tɩ bu-zẽmsã me reega Wẽnnaam goamã. 
Acts11:2 La a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm tẽedb nins sẽn yaa Zʋɩf buudã wẽe nokoeemd ne yẽnda. 
Acts11:3 N yeel-a yaa: Yãmb kẽe neb sẽn ka kẽ bãong zakẽ n dɩ ne-ba! 
Acts11:4 La a Pɩyɛɛr togsa bãmb yellã fãa sẽn maanã ball-balle, n yeel-b yaa:" 
Acts11:5 «Mam dag n bee Zope tẽngã pʋgẽ, la mam sẽn wa n pʋʋsdẽ, mam paama vẽnegre. Mam yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd wa peen-bedr sẽn yi arzãn n sigd mam nengẽ t'a noy a naasã loe. La a sulgame n pẽneg maam." 
Acts11:6 Mam maaga m meng n gese, la m yãnda rũms sẽn tar nao a naase, we-rũmsi, baa bõn-vuuds ne bõn-pɩgs sẽn be a pʋgẽ." 
Acts11:7 Dẽ mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yeele: ‹Pɩyɛɛre, yik n kʋ n dɩ.›" 
Acts11:8 La mam leokame yaa: ‹Ayo, Zu-soaba, bala, bũmb sẽn ka zems wala sẽn yaa rẽgd na n zɩɩ n kẽ mam noorẽ ye.›" 
Acts11:9 La koɛɛgã yii arzãn naoor a yiibẽ soab n yeel maam yaa: ‹Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel tɩ bũmb ning yaa yɩlemdã, bɩ f ra bool-a tɩ rẽgd ye.›" 
Acts11:10 Bõn-kãng maana hal naoor a tãabo. Dẽ, a fãa lebg n dʋʋ arzãna." 
Acts11:11 La wakat-kãng bala, raop a tãab sẽn yi Sezaare b sẽn tʋm-b mam nengẽ wa n taa zak ning mam sẽn dag n be wã noore." 
Acts11:12 Sɩɩg-sõng yeela maam tɩ m tũ-b n loog la m da sãmb ye. Ba-biis a yoobã sẽn be ka wã yãaga maam n ta Sezaare. La tõnd kẽ a Korney zakẽ wã. 
Acts11:13 La a Korney togsa tõnd sẽn yɩ to-to tɩ yẽnda yãnd malɛɛkã sẽn wa yẽnda roogã pʋgẽ n yeel yẽnda t'a tʋm neb Zope tɩ b tɩ bool a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr t'a wa wã. 
Acts11:14 T'a Pɩyɛɛr na n togsa yẽnda koees sẽn na n kɩt tɩ yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb fãa paam fãagre. 
Acts11:15 La mam sẽn sɩng n gomdã, Sɩɩg-sõng siga bãmb zut wala b sẽn dag n sig tõnd zut sɩngrẽ wã." 
Acts11:16 Dẽ, mam tẽega Zu-soabã goamã b sẽn dag n yeelã: ‹A Zã lisa ne koom la b na n lisa yãmb Sɩɩg-sõng pʋga.›" 
Acts11:17 Rẽ wã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ-b kũun ning b sẽn dag n kõ tõnd d sẽn tẽ Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yĩngã, dẽ, mam yaa ãnda soab n tõe n kɩɩs Wẽnnaam?" 
Acts11:18 Bãmb sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, b sĩnda b noore. La b pẽga Wẽnnaam n yeel yaa: Rẽnd Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽmsã me tek yam n kos sugr n na n paam vɩɩm.»" 
Acts11:19 Namsg ning sẽn paam tẽedbã a Etɛn kũumã poorẽ wã kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n kẽng hal Fenisi, la Sɩpr ne Ãntiyoos la b ka moon ned a to Wẽnnaam koɛɛga sã n ka Zʋɩf-rãmbã bal ye." 
Acts11:20 Baoosgo, tẽedb kẽer sẽn yi Sɩpr la Sirɛn waa Ãntiyoos la b goma ne neb a taabã me n moon-b Zu-soab a Zeezi koe-noogã." 
Acts11:21 Zu-soabã pãng dag n bee ne bãmba, la neb wʋsg tẽe Zu-soabã n kos sugri." 
Acts11:22 A Zeezi tẽedbã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã wʋma koe-kãnga, la b tʋma a Barnabaas Ãntiyoose." 
Acts11:23 La yẽnda sẽn ta n yãnd Wẽnnaam sẽn ning tẽedbã bark to-to wã, a sũurã yɩɩ noogo. La a paasa b fãa raood n yet tɩ b kell n tũ Zu-soabã ne b sũyã fãa n da bas ye." 
Acts11:24 Bala, a Barnabaas yaa nin-sõngo, n pid ne Sɩɩg-sõngo n tar tẽebo. La neb wʋsg tẽe Zu-soabã." 
Acts11:25 Dẽ poore, a Barnabaas kẽnga Tars n na n tɩ bao a Solle." 
Acts11:26 La yẽnda sẽn yãnd a Soll be, a peeg-a lame n wa Ãntiyoose. Bãmb paa be ne a Zeezi tẽedbã yʋʋmd tõre n zãms neb kʋʋngo. Yaa Ãntiyoos la b sɩng n bool a Zeezi karen-biisã tɩ Kiris nebã." 
Acts11:27 La ra-kãense, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb yii Zeruzalɛm n wa Ãntiyoose." 
Acts11:28 La bãmb ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Agabuus yikame n togs ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãng tɩ wakat n wat tɩ kom-kãseng na n zĩnd dũniyã tɛk fãa. La komã sɩd zĩnda a rĩm a Sezaar Kolood sẽn wa n dɩt naam wakate. 
Acts11:29 Dẽ, karen-biisã yãka yam tɩ ned kam fãa kɩs sõngr ning sẽn zems a pãng tɩ b tʋm n sõng ba-biisã sẽn dag n be Zʋʋde soolmã." 
Acts11:30 La b maana a woto n dɩk n ning a Barnabaas ne a Soll nugẽ tɩ b tɩ kɩs kãsem-dãmbã sẽn be Zʋʋde wã. 
Acts12:1 La wakat-kãng sasa, rĩm a Erood sɩngame n nams a Zeezi tẽedbã kẽere." 
Acts12:2 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b kʋ a Zã ba-biig a Zak ne sʋʋga. 
Acts12:3 La yẽnda sẽn yã tɩ bõn-kãng taa Zʋɩf-rãmbã yam, a kell n kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Pɩyɛɛre. Rag n yaa bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigr daare." 
Acts12:4 Rĩm a Erood sẽn yõk a Pɩyɛɛr n kẽes bi-bees roogẽ, a kɩtame tɩ sodaas piig la a yoob gũ a Pɩyɛɛr n dees taab naas-naase, n dag n tagsdẽ tɩ Pakã tigr sã n loog bɩ a yiis-a n kao a bʋʋd nebã nifẽ." 
Acts12:5 Dẽ, bi-bees roogã pʋgẽ b ra gũuda a Pɩyɛɛre. La a Zeezi tẽedbã rag n pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam ne b sũur fãa a Pɩyɛɛr yĩnga." 
Acts12:6 Yʋng ning sẽn deng rĩm a Erood sẽn na n yiis a Pɩyɛɛr n kao a bʋʋdã, gũudbã rag n bee bi-bees roogã noor n gũudẽ, la b ra balga a Pɩyɛɛr ne bãens a yiib t'a gãe pʋgẽ, Sodaas a yiib tẽn-sʋka." 
Acts12:7 Tao-tao bala, Zu-soabã malɛɛk puka a menga la vẽenem n yãg bi-bees roogã pʋgẽ. Malɛɛkã wẽe a Pɩyɛɛr lʋgr n nek-a n yeel-a yaa: Yik tao-tao. La bãensã lʋɩɩme n bas a Pɩyɛɛr nusã." 
Acts12:8 Dẽ, malɛɛkã yeela yẽnda t'a sẽb a sẽbdgã la a wid a neooda. A Pɩyɛɛr maana a woto. La malɛɛkã yeel-a lame t'a rɩk a fuugã n yeelg n tũ yẽnda." 
Acts12:9 A Pɩyɛɛr tũu malɛɛkã n yi, la a ra ka tagsd tɩ bũmb ningã malɛɛkã sẽn maandã yaa sɩd ye. A ra tagsdame tɩ yẽnda yãnda vẽnegre." 
Acts12:10 La bãmb sẽn loog pipi gũudã ne yiib soabã n ta kʋɩleng ning sẽn teesd tẽngã n pag ne kutã, kʋɩlen-kãng paka a toor bãmb taoore. La b yiime n kẽng n dɩk sorã, la tao-tao bala, malɛɛkã loog n basa yẽnda." 
Acts12:11 Dẽ, a Pɩyɛɛr yam vẽnegame t'a bãng bũmb ning sẽn maanã. La a yeelame yaa: Moasã, mam bãnga sɩd-sɩd tɩ yaa Zu-soabã n tʋm malɛɛk t'a fãag maam rĩm a Erood nugẽ la ne bũmb ning fãa Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn da rat n maan maamã." 
Acts12:12 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn tagse, a kẽnga a Maari yiri. Yaa a Zã b sẽn boond t'a Markã ma. La neb wʋsg n dag n tigim taab beenẽ n pʋʋsdẽ." 
Acts12:12 A Pɩyɛɛr sẽn tagse, a kẽnga a Maari yiri. Yaa a Zã b sẽn boond t'a Markã ma. La neb wʋsg n dag n tigim taab beenẽ n pʋʋsdẽ." 
Acts12:13 A Pɩyɛɛr wẽe rignoor ning b sẽn kẽedã kʋɩlenga, la tʋmtʋmd poak a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Rood kolgame n na n kelge." 
Acts12:14 La yẽnda bãnga a Pɩyɛɛr koɛɛgã la a sũurã yɩɩ noog t'a bas kʋɩlengã pakr n wudg n leb pʋgẽ n tɩ togs t'a Pɩyɛɛr n wa n be rignoorẽ wã. 
Acts12:15 Bãmb yeela yẽnda t'a zugã lebgame. La tʋmtʋmd-poakã kell n baas n yeelame tɩ yẽnda sẽn yetã yaa sɩda. 
Acts12:16 Dẽ, b yeelame tɩ yaa a Pɩyɛɛr malɛɛka. La wakat kãnga, a Pɩyɛɛr dag n ket n wẽeda kʋɩlengã. La b sẽn yaool n pake, b yãnda a Pɩyɛɛre, la b yɛɛsame." 
Acts12:17 A Pɩyɛɛr zãasa bãmb ne nug n na n kɩt tɩ b sĩndi. La a Pɩyɛɛr togs-b-la Zu-soabã sẽn maan to-to n yiis yẽnda bi-beesã roog pʋgẽ. La a yeel tɩ b tɩ togs a Zak ne ba-biis a taabã bõn-kãnga. Dẽ, yẽnda yiime n kẽng zĩig a to." 
Acts12:18 La beoogã sẽn vẽege, rãmbg kãseng n yik sodaasã sʋka, b sẽn dag n dat n bãng a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn be zĩig ningã yĩnga." 
Acts12:19 Rĩm a Erood kɩtame tɩ b bao a Pɩyɛɛre, la b ka yãnd-a ye. Dẽ, rĩm a Erood kɩtame tɩ b kao gũudbã bʋʋdo, la a kõ noor tɩ b kʋ-ba. Rẽ zugẽ, rĩm a Erood yii Zʋʋde n kẽng Sezaare n tɩ pa be wakat bilfu." 
Acts12:20 Rĩm a Erood sũur puuga wʋsg ne Tɩɩr la Sɩdõ nebã. Nin-kãensã zemsa taab n na n kẽng rĩm a Erood nengẽ. Bãmb yõga zood ne sõgen ning sẽn manegd rĩmã roogã, la b wa rĩm a Erood nengẽ n na n bao tɩ laafɩ zĩnd bãmb ne rĩmã sʋka, bala rĩmã soolmã n dag n dɩlg bãmb tẽngã." 
Acts12:21 Daar ning rĩm a Erood sẽn yãkã sẽn ta, a yeelga a naam fut n zaoond a naam geer zug n gom gom-bɛd nebã taoore." 
Acts12:22 La nebã dag n kelemdame n yetẽ: Ka ninsaal n gomd ye, yaa Wẽnd meng n gomde." 
Acts12:23 Wakat-kãng bala, Zu-soabã malɛɛk wẽe rĩm a Eroode, yẽ sẽn dɩk Wẽnnaam waoogrã n kõ a mengã yĩnga. La zũnzũy n dɩ-a t'a ki." 
Acts12:24 Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã rag n saagdame n yɩɩd pĩnda. 
Acts12:25 La a Barnabaas ne a Soll sẽn maan b tʋʋmd Zeruzalɛm n sɛ, b peega a Zã b sẽn boond t'a Mark n lebg n wa Ãntiyoose." 
Acts12:25 La a Barnabaas ne a Soll sẽn maan b tʋʋmd Zeruzalɛm n sɛ, b peega a Zã b sẽn boond t'a Mark n lebg n wa Ãntiyoose." 
Acts13:1 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb la karen-saam-dãmb n dag n be a Zeezi tẽedbã sẽn be Ãntiyoosã sʋka. Yaa a Barnabaas ne a Sɩmyõ b sẽn boond t'a Nizɛɛr ne a Lisiyuus sẽn yit Sirɛn la a Manayɛn sẽn wub rĩm a Erood ba wã zakẽ, ne a Solle." 
Acts13:2 Bãmb sẽn dag n maand Zu-soabã tʋʋmd la b loet noore, Sɩɩg-sõng yeel-b lame tɩ b yãk a Barnabaas ne a Soll n welg-b toore, tɩ b maan tʋʋmd ning b sẽn bool-b tɩ b maanã." 
Acts13:3 Dẽ, bãmb loee noor n pʋʋs la b yaool n tik a Barnabaas ne Soll ne b nus n pʋʋs b yĩng n bas-b tɩ b kẽnge." 
Acts13:4 La Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn tʋm a Barnabaas ne a Solle, b kẽnga Seleesi, la b kẽe koom-koglg be n kẽng Sɩpre." 
Acts13:5 Bãmb sẽn ta tẽng sẽn boond tɩ Salamin, b sɩng n moona Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã Zʋɩf-rãmbã karen-dot pʋse. A Zã-Mark ra bee ne bãmb n sõngd-ba." 
Acts13:5 Bãmb sẽn ta tẽng sẽn boond tɩ Salamin, b sɩng n moona Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã Zʋɩf-rãmbã karen-dot pʋse. A Zã-Mark ra bee ne bãmb n sõngd-ba." 
Acts13:6 Bãmb pɩʋʋga tẽng ning koomã sẽn gũbgã fãa hal n ta tẽng sẽn boond tɩ Pafoose, la b yãnda bag a yembr be sẽn yaa zãmb-no-rɛɛsa, yẽnda yaa Zʋɩf t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Baar-Zeezi sẽn dat n togs t'a Zeezi biiga." 
Acts13:7 Yẽnda ra bee ne tẽn-kãng Gʋvɛrneer a Sergiyuus Poluus sẽn dag n yaa ned sẽn tar yam wʋsgã. Gʋvɛrneerã kɩtame tɩ b bool a Barnabaas ne a Solle, bala a rag n dat n wʋma Wẽnnaam goamã." 
Acts13:8 La a Elimaas sẽn yaa bagã yʋʋr ne Gɛrk goamã kɩɩsa a Barnabaas ne a Soll n baood n sãam Gʋvɛrneerã tẽebo. 
Acts13:9 Dẽ, a Soll b sẽn boond me t'a Poll pida ne Sɩɩg-sõng n ges bagã," 
Acts13:10 n yeel-a yaa: «Sɩlem-wẽng soaba, fo pida ne wẽnem sʋtãan biiga, f yaa tɩrlem fãa bɛyã. F ka na n bas Zu-soab so-tɩrsã sãoongo?" 
Acts13:11 Moasã, gese, Zu-soabã na n wẽe foom tɩ f lebg zoanga, n kaoos wakat bilfu, la fo kõn n leb n yãnd wĩntoogã vẽenem ye. La tao-tao bala, a Elimaas ninã sɩnga mumbu, la lebga lik bida ne yẽnda. Yẽnda wẽnemda zĩig fãa n baood ned sẽn na n gãd a nug n tɛ-a." 
Acts13:12 Dẽ, guvɛrneerã sẽn yã bũmb ning sẽn maanã, a tẽeme. Bala, Zu-soabã zãmsgã wɛɛngẽ wã yɛɛsa yẽnda.»" 
Acts13:13 A Poll ne a tũud-n-taasã kẽe koom-koglg Pafoos n yi be n kẽng Pɛrz sẽn be Pamfili soolmã. A Zã-Mark basa bãmb be n lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm. 
Acts13:13 A Poll ne a tũud-n-taasã kẽe koom-koglg Pafoos n yi be n kẽng Pɛrz sẽn be Pamfili soolmã. A Zã-Mark basa bãmb be n lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm. 
Acts13:14 A Poll dãmb yii Pɛrz n kell n kẽng n ta Ãntiyoos sẽn be Pisidi soolem. La Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daare, a Poll dãmb kẽ karen-doogẽ wã n zĩndi." 
Acts13:15 La b sẽn karem tõogã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sɛbã n sɛ, karen-doogã nanambs tʋma neb tɩ b yeel a Poll dãmb yaa: Ba-biisi, yãmb sã n tara koɛɛg n na n gom ne nebã n paas-b raoodo, yãmb tõe n gomame moasã." 
Acts13:16 A Poll yikame n zãas a nug n yeel yaa: «Yãmb Israyɛll nebã, la yãmb dãmb sẽn zoet Wẽnnaamã, kelg-y yã!" 
Acts13:17 Wẽnnaam ning sẽn yaa Israyɛll nin-kãensã Wẽnnaam tũusa tõnd yaab-rãmbã n kɩt tɩ bu-kãng bɩ a sẽn wa n be sãand weoog Ezɩpt tẽngã wakate. La Wẽnnaam yiisa bãmb be ne pãn-kãsenga. 
Acts13:18 La b sõnga bãmb sẽn kolg yʋʋm pis-naas weoogã pʋga. 
Acts13:19 La Wẽnnaam sãama buud a yopoe Kana n dɩk b soolmã n kõ b nebã tɩ b sooge. 
Acts13:20 La bõn-kãens fãa kolga yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-nu. Dẽ poorẽ, Wẽnnaam kõo tõnd yaab-rãmbã bʋ-kaoodba hal tɩ ta Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Sãmwɛll zamaanẽ." 
Acts13:21 Rẽ zugẽ, bãmb kosa rĩmã, la Wẽnnaam kõ‑b‑la a Sayull sẽn yaa rao a Kiis biig n yaa Benzame buudã. Yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-naase." 
Acts13:22 Wẽnnaam sẽn yiis a Sayull naamẽ wã, b yãka a Davɩɩd t'a yɩ Israyɛll dãmbã rĩmã. La Wẽnnaam kɩsa a Davɩɩd kaset n yeel a woto: ‹Mam yãndame t'a Izayi biig a Davɩɩd yaa rao sẽn ta mam yam. Yẽnda n na n pids mam datmã fãa zãnga.›" 
Acts13:23 Yaa a Davɩɩd yagensã sʋk la Wẽnnaam kɩt t'a Zeezi rog n yɩ fãagd Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, wa sẽn zems bãmb sẽn dag n kãabã." 
Acts13:24 Sẽn deng a Zeezi waoongo, a Zã dag n mooname n yeel Israyɛll nebã fãa tɩ b tek yam n sak lisgu." 
Acts13:25 La a Zã tʋʋmd sẽn wa n kolgd sɛɛbo, a rag n yetame yaa: ‹Yãmb tagsdame tɩ mam yaa ãnda? Mam ka ned ningã yãmb sẽn gũud a soabã ye. La kelg-y-yã: Bãmb na n pʋgla maam n wa, la mam sõmblem pʋs n ka sek tɩ m lok b neooda sẽbds ye.›" 
Acts13:26 M ba-biisi, yãmb sẽn yaa a Abrahaam yagensã la neb nins sẽn be yãmb sʋk n zoet Wẽnnaamã, yaa yãmb yĩng la b tʋm fãagrã koe-no-kãngã." 
Acts13:27 Bala, Zeruzalɛm nebã ne b nanambsã ka bãng a Zeezi sẽn yaa ned ning ye. La b ka wʋm Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã goamã b sẽn karemd vʋʋsg daar fãa wã võor ye. La b kaoo a Zeezi bʋʋd n pids Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã gom-kãense." 
Acts13:28 Baa b sẽn ka yãnd bũmb ne bãmb sẽn zems kũumã, b kosa a Pilat t'a kɩt tɩ b kʋ a Zeezi." 
Acts13:29 La b sẽn pids bũmb nins fãa gʋls-sõamyã sẽn dag n togs bãmb wɛɛngẽ wã, b sik-b-la da-pɩkã zug n tɩ gãneg yaoogẽ." 
Acts13:30 La Wẽnnaam vʋʋga a Zeezi n bas kũum. 
Acts13:31 La neb nins sẽn dag n tũ a Zeezi n yi Galɩle n kẽng Zeruzalɛm yãnda bãmb rasem wʋsgo. La moasã b yaa a Zeezi kaset dãmb Israyɛll nebã sʋka. 
Acts13:32 La tõnd togsda yãmb koe-no-kãngã, n wilgd yãmb kãabg ningã Wẽnnaam sẽn da kãab tõnd yaab-rãmbã," 
Acts13:33 moasã, Wẽnnaam pids-a lame n kõ tõnd sẽn yaa bãmb yagensã, n vʋʋg a Zeezi n bas kũum wa sẽn gʋls yɩɩn-sõng a yiib soaba pʋgẽ wã: ‹Rũndã, mam yaa fo ba, la fo yaa mam biiga, maam n dog foom.›" 
Acts13:34 Wẽnnaam dag n yeelame tɩ b na n vʋʋg-b lame n bas kũum tɩ b yĩngã ra põog ye. Yaa bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n gomã la a woto: ‹Mam na n kõo yãmb a Davɩɩd bõn-sõamyã. Bũmb nins sẽn yaa sõamã la sɩdã.› 
Acts13:35 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ b leb n yeel zĩig a to yaa: ‹Yãmb kõn bas y sõmblem soabã t'a põog ye.› 
Acts13:36 La a Davɩɩd sẽn maan sẽn tat Wẽnnaam yam bãmb wakatẽ wã, b yaool n kiime n paam b saam-dãmba, la b yĩngã põogame." 
Acts13:37 La Wẽnnaam sẽn vʋʋg ned ning n bas kũumã ka põog ye. 
Acts13:38 Dẽ, ba-biisi, bɩ y bãng tɩ yaa a Zeezi maasem yĩng la b moond yãmb yel-wẽnã sugr kũun koɛɛgã." 
Acts13:39 La ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed bãmba, b basda yẽnda taal ne bũmb ning fãa a Moyiis tõogã sẽn dag n ka tõe n bas taalã." 
Acts13:40 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y gũus tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yeel bũmb ning b sɛbã pʋsã ra paam yãmb ye." 
Acts13:41 ‹Nin-kɩɩsdba, ges-y-yã, la y yɛɛs n menem, bala, mam na n maana tʋʋmd yãmb belmã wakate. Yaa tʋʋmde, tɩ b sã n dag n yeel yãmba, y kõn tol n tẽ ye.› »" 
Acts13:42 La a Poll ne a Barnabaas sẽn yi karen-doogẽ wã, nebã kosa bãmb tɩ vʋʋsg daar sẽn watã bɩ b leb n wa n moon koe-kãngã yɛsa." 
Acts13:43 La kaorengã sẽn sɛ, Zʋɩf-rãmb ne neb nins sẽn tẽed Zʋɩf-rãmbã kaorengã wʋsg tũu a Poll ne a Barnabaas tɩ b sõs ne-b n sagl-b tɩ kell n pa Wẽnnaam barkã pʋgẽ." 
Acts13:44 La vʋʋsg daar sẽn leb n ta, sẽn kolg tẽngã nebã fãa tigma taab n na n kelg Wẽnnaam goamã." 
Acts13:45 Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn yã neb kʋʋngã, sũ-kiir yõk-b lame tɩ b kɩɩs a Poll goamã la b tʋ yẽnda." 
Acts13:46 A Poll ne a Barnabaas yeela bãmb vẽeneg yaa: Yaa yãmb la b rag n tog n deng n togs Wẽnnaam goamã pipi. La y sẽn zãgs Wẽnnaam goamã, yãmb kao y mens bʋʋd n yet tɩ yãmb ka zems tɩ paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sɛ wã ye. Rẽ wã tõnd na n kẽnga bu-zẽmsã nengẽ moasã." 
Acts13:47 Bala, Zu-soabã yeela tõnd a woto: «Mam yãka foom tɩ f yɩ vẽenem bu-zẽmsã yĩnga, n tall fãagrã n ta hal dũniyã tɛk fãa.»" 
Acts13:48 La bu-zẽmsã sẽn wʋm woto, b sũyã yɩɩ noogo, la b pẽga Zu-soabã goamã. La neb nins fãa sẽn na n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sɛ wã lebga tẽedba." 
Acts13:49 La Zu-soabã koɛɛg ra saagda soolem‑kãng fãa. 
Acts13:50 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã pirsa nin‑bɛdã pagb sẽn sakd tẽebã yell neerã, la ne tẽnga nin-kãsems tɩ b nams a Poll la a Barnabaas n dig-b tɩ b yi bãmb soolmẽ." 
Acts13:51 Dẽ a Poll ne a Barnabaas pĩmsa b naoã tom nin-bãmb yĩnga, la b yi n kẽng Ikoniyom." 
Acts13:52 La karen-biisã sẽn be Ãntiyoosã ra pida ne sũ-no-kãsenga la ne Sɩɩg-sõngo. 
Acts14:1 A Poll ne a Barnabaas tũu taab n kẽ Zʋɩf-rãmbã karen-doog a yembr pʋg sẽn be Ikoniyom, la b gomame n tõog tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã wʋsg ne Gɛrk-rãmbã lebg tẽedbã." 
Acts14:2 La Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn ka tẽ wã kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽmsã yik beem ne karen-biisã. 
Acts14:3 A Poll ne a Barnabaas paa Ikoniyom n kaoose. A Poll dãmb dag n kɩsa sɩd ne Zu-soabã n gomd ne pɛl-kɛgenga. La Zu-soabã kɩsa bãmb bark goamã a Poll dãmb sẽn moondã kaseto n kõ bãmb pãn-tõog tɩ b maan bãna, la bõn-yɛɛsds ne b nusi." 
Acts14:4 La tẽngã nebã welga taaba, tɩ kẽer ra be Zʋɩf-rãmbã poorẽ, tɩ kẽer be tʋmtʋmdbã poorẽ." 
Acts14:5 La bu-zẽmsã ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã la b nanambsã sɩngame n segl b mens n na n maan a Poll dãmb wẽnga, la b lob bãmb kug n kʋ." 
Acts14:6 La a Poll ne a Barnabaas sẽn bãnge, b zoeeme n kẽng Listr ne Dɛrb tẽmsã, sẽn be Likaoni soolmã, la tẽms a taab sẽn pẽ be." 
Acts14:7 La b moona koe-noogã beenẽ. 
Acts14:8 Dao a ye n da be Listr t'a nao ki t'a ka tõe n yik ye. Yẽ sẽn dogã tɛka, a yaa põore la a zɩ n tõog n kẽn ye." 
Acts14:9 Yẽnda ra kelgda bũmb ning a Poll sẽn togsdã. La a Poll ges-a lame n bãng t'a tara tẽeb n tõe n paam maagre. 
Acts14:10 A Poll zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel raoã t'a yik n yals a naoã zugu. La raoã yɩɩ yagbg n yik n sɩng kẽna. 
Acts14:11 Neb kʋʋngã sẽn yãnd bũmb ning a Poll sẽn maanã, b zẽka b koees n yeel ne Likaoni-rãmbã goam tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam dãmb n dɩk yĩng n sig n wa bãmb sʋka." 
Acts14:12 B pʋda a Barnabaas yʋʋr t'a Zeese, la b pʋd a Poll t'a Ɛrmees sẽn dag n yaa yẽndã n gomdã yĩnga." 
Acts14:13 Wẽnnaam ning b sẽn boond tɩ zeesã pʋʋsgã roog rag n bee tẽngã noore, la zees maan-kʋʋdã baoo tɩ-puud n wʋg n pid lols yubli n tall-b n wa tẽnga noy n dat tɩ neb kʋʋngã lagem yẽnda tɩ b maan maoong n kõ a Poll ne a Barnabaase." 
Acts14:14 La tʋmtʋmdb a yiibã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, b kẽesa b fut n wudg n kẽ kʋʋngã sʋk n kelem n yeel yaa:" 
Acts14:15 Daopa, yaa bõe tɩ y maand a woto? Tõnd me yaa ninsaalb wa yãmb bala. Tõnd moonda yãmb koe-noog n yet-y tɩ y bas wẽn-naan-kãens sẽn ka tar yõodã la y wẽnemd n sak Wẽnnaam ning sẽn vɩ wã la sẽn naan yĩngr la tẽngã, la ko-kãsengã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã." 
Acts14:16 Yʋʋm sẽn looge, Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã basa buudã fãa tɩ b maan b yam daabo." 
Acts14:17 La baoosgo, Wẽnnaam maana kaset n wilg-b tɩ bãmb beeme. Bãmb maana neere, n kõ yãmb saag t'a niid tɩ sẽoog ne bõn-bɩʋʋng beẽ, tɩ rɩɩb sekd yãmb n pids y sũyã ne sũ-noogo." 
Acts14:18 Baa ne gom-kãensã, yɩɩ toog ne tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b tõog tɩ nebã ra maan maoong n waoog-ba." 
Acts14:19 La Zʋɩf-rãmb n yi Ãntiyoos ne Ikoniyom n wa rãmb nebã tɩ b lob a Poll kuga. La b sẽn tẽed t'a kiime wã, b vuuga yẽnda n yiis tẽngã pʋga." 
Acts14:20 La tẽedbã gũbga a Poll la a leb n yikame n kẽ tẽngã pʋga. La vẽkembeoogo, a Poll ne a Barnabaas kẽnga tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Dɛrbe." 
Acts14:21 La bãmb sẽn moon koe-noogã tẽngã pʋga, b paamame tɩ neb wʋsg lebg karen-biisi. La a Poll ne a Barnabaas lebg n leba Listr ne Ikoniyom la Ãntiyoos yɛsa." 
Acts14:22 Bãmb belsa tẽedbã sũyã n paas-b raood n sagl-b tɩ b yals tẽebã pʋg kãenkãe n yeel-b yaa: Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ tõnd paam namsg wʋsg n yaool n tõog n kẽ Wẽnnaam soolmẽ wã. 
Acts14:23 A Zeezi tẽedbã sẽn be zĩig ninsã fãa, a Poll dãmb yãka kãsem-dãmb n kõ-ba. La bãmb loee noor n pʋʋs n dɩk-b n bas Zu-soab ningã bãmb sẽn tẽ a soabã nugẽ." 
Acts14:24 La a Poll ne a Barnabaas pɩʋʋga Pisidi soolem n kẽng Paamfili soolem. 
Acts14:25 Bãmb moona Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã Pɛrz n yaool n kẽng Atali. 
Acts14:26 Bãmb kẽe koom-koglg tẽn-kãng n leb Ãntiyoose, yaa tẽng ning b sẽn dag n ning b zut bark tɩ b maan tʋʋmd ning bãmb sẽn maanã." 
Acts14:27 La b sẽn ta Ãntiyoose, b tigma a Zeezi tẽedbã fãa n togs-b Wẽnnaam sẽn tall bãmb n maan bũmb nins fãa wã. La sẽn yɩ to-to tɩ Wẽnnaam pak sor tɩ bu-zẽmsã me tõe n tẽ wã." 
Acts14:28 La a Poll dãmb paa be ne Kiris tẽedbã n kaoose. 
Acts15:1 Neb kẽer yii Zʋʋde n wa Ãntiyoos n sɩng n zãmsd ba-biisã n yetẽ tɩ b sã n ka kẽ bãong wa sẽn zems a Moyiis tõogã, b ka tõe n paam fãagr ye." 
Acts15:2 A Poll ne a Barnabaas kɩɩs-b lame n wẽ nokoeem-kãseng ne-b bõn-kãng wɛɛngẽ. Rẽ, ba-biisã yãka yam t'a Poll ne a Barnabaas ne bãmb sʋkã neb kẽer na n kẽnga tẽn-tʋmdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã nengẽ Zeruzalɛm n tɩ ges yel-kãng yelle." 
Acts15:3 Dẽ, Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be Ãntiyoosã yãag-b lame. A Poll dãmb pɩʋʋga Fenisi la Samaari soolem la b togsda sẽn yɩ to-to tɩ bu-zẽmsã me sak Wẽnnaamã. La bõn-kãng kõo ba-biisã fãa sũ-no-kãsenga." 
Acts15:4 La a Poll dãmb sẽn ta Zeruzalɛm, a Zeezi tẽedbã ne tẽn-tʋmdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã reeg-b lame. La a Poll dãmb togs-b‑la bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn tall bãmb n maanã." 
Acts15:5 La Fariizẽ-dãmbã neb kẽer sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã yikame n yeel tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b kẽes bu-zẽmsã bãongo, la b kɩt tɩ b sak a Moyiis tõogã." 
Acts15:6 Tẽn-tʋmdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã tigma taab n na n ges yel-kãng yelle. 
Acts15:7 Bãmb sẽn wẽ nokoɛɛm wʋsg n kaoose, a Pɩyɛɛr yikame n yeel yaa: M ba-biisi, hal pipi wakat bala, Wẽnnaam yãka maam yãmb sʋk tɩ m moon koe-noogã bu-zẽmsã me tɩ b wʋme, la b tẽ." 
Acts15:8 La Wẽnnaam sẽn mi ninsaalbã fãa sũyã, b kõ-b‑la Sɩɩg-sõng wa b sẽn dag n kõ tõndã, tɩ yɩ kaset tɩ b sak n deeg-b lame." 
Acts15:9 Wẽnnaam ka welg tõnd toor ne bu-zẽmsã ye, bala b sẽn tẽ wã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam yɩlga b sũyã." 
Acts15:10 Dẽ moasã, yaa bõe tɩ y baood Wẽnnaam noor n zɩlgd karen-biisã zɩɩb tõnd yaab-rãmbã wall tõnd mens sẽn ka tõog n tʋke?" 
Acts15:11 La tõnd tẽedame tɩ yaa Zu-soab a Zeezi barkã yĩng n kɩt tɩ tõnd paam fãagr wala bãmb me sẽn paam to-to wã. 
Acts15:12 Nebã sẽn tigmã fãa sĩndame n kelg a Barnabaas ne a Poll sẽn togsd Wẽnnaam sẽn tall bãmb n maan bõn-bãnã, la bõn-yɛɛsdsã fãa bu-zẽmsã sʋkã." 
Acts15:13 Bãmb sẽn gom n sɛ, a Zak gomame n yeel yaa:" 
Acts15:14 M ba-biisi, kelg-y maam. A Sɩmo wilga yãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn geelg bu-zẽmsã to-to n sɩng n yãk neb be n maan b rẽndã." 
Acts15:15 La bõn-kãng zemsa ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn gomã. B gʋlsame n yeel yaa: 
Acts15:16 «Zu-soabã yetame yaa: ‹Rẽ poore, mam na n lebgame n wa mee a Davɩɩd doogã sẽn dag n lʋɩ wã. Mam na n leb n manega yẽnda raboogã n me, la m na n yik-a lame n yalse," 
Acts15:17 tɩ neb a taabã sẽn ketã bao Zu-soabã. La buud nins fãa sẽn pʋʋsd ne mam yʋʋrã me na n baoo maam.› 
Acts15:18 Ade, yaa Zu-soabã sẽn wilg bõn-kãens hal yʋʋm zãrã n yeel a woto.»" 
Acts15:19 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam togsdẽ t'a zemsame tɩ d da bao yell n kõ bu-zẽmsã sẽn sakd Wẽnnaamã ye. 
Acts15:20 La bɩ d gʋls-b n yeel-b tɩ b lak b mens ne wẽn-naandsã maand nemdo, la wɩɩbdo, la b ra wãb rũng sẽn sãrg nemdo, la b ra rɩ zɩɩm ye." 
Acts15:21 Bala, hal kʋdem wẽndẽ tɩ ta moasã, b moonda a Moyiis tõogã tẽmsã pʋse, la b karemd-a karen-dotã pʋs vʋʋsg daar fãa." 
Acts15:22 Dẽ, tẽn-tʋmdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã la tẽedbã fãa yãka yam n na n tũus neb kẽer bãmb sʋkã n tʋm-b tɩ b tũ a Poll ne a Barnabaas n kẽng Ãntiyoose. Bãmb yãka a Zʋʋd b sẽn boond t'a Barsabaas la a Sɩlaase. Bãmb b yiibã fãa yaa neb ba-biisã sẽn waoogda." 
Acts15:23 B kɩs‑b‑la sebrã, la b sẽn gʋlsã yeelame yaa: Tẽn-tʋmdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã, la ba-biisã pʋʋsda ba-biis nins sẽn be bu-zẽmsã sʋk n be Ãntiyoos la Siiri ne Silisi soolmã." 
Acts15:24 Tõnd wʋmame tɩ neb kẽer n yi tõnd nengẽ n wa n dãmbd yãmb la b yuusd yãmb yam ne b goamã. La ka tõnd n kõ-b noor ye. 
Acts15:25 Yaa woto yĩnga, tɩ tõnd tigim taab n yãk yam a yembr n yãk neb n tʋm-b tɩ b na n yãag d zo-nongds a Poll ne a Barnabaas n wa yãmb nengẽ." 
Acts15:26 A Poll dãmb ra gẽnega b yõy tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris tʋʋmdã yĩnga. 
Acts15:27 Rẽnda yĩng la d tʋm a Zʋʋd ne a Sɩlaas yãmb nengẽ. La b mens na n togs-y‑la bõn-kãense. 
Acts15:28 Bala, Sɩɩg-sõng ne tõnd me gesame tɩ yaa neere tɩ d da zɩlg-y zɩɩb sã n ka bũmb nins sẽn yaa tɩlɛ wã ye. La yaa tɩ yãmb ka tog n wãb nemd" 
Acts15:29 b sẽn maan maoong n kõ wẽn-naands ye. La y ka tog n dɩ rũng sẽn sãrge, la y da rɩ zɩɩm ye, la y ra maan wɩɩbd ye. Yãmb sã n lak y mens ne bõn-kãense, y maana sẽn yaa neere. Wẽnd na sõng yãmba." 
Acts15:30 Dẽ, b basa b sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã tɩ b loog n kẽng Ãntiyoose. La b tigma Kiris tẽedbã fãa beenẽ n kɩs-b sebrã." 
Acts15:31 B sẽn kɩt tɩ b karem sebrã n sɛ, b fãa sũyã yɩɩ noogo, b sẽn paas bãmb raoodã yĩnga." 
Acts15:32 A Zʋʋd ne a Sɩlaas mens sẽn dag n yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, b goma ne ba-biisã n kaoose, n paas-b raood la pãnga." 
Acts15:33 La b sẽn pa Ãntiyoos n kaoos bilfu, ba-biisã pʋʋs-b lame tɩ Wẽnd na kuils-b laafɩ, n bas-b tɩ b lebg n leb neb nins sẽn tʋm-b bãmbã nengẽ." 
Acts15:34 [La a Sɩlaas yãka yam n na n pa Ãntiyoose.] 
Acts15:35 La baoosgo, a Poll ne a Barnabaas paa Ãntiyoose. La bãmb ne neb a taab wʋsg ra zãmsda nebã la b moond-b koe-noogã sẽn yaa Zu-soabã goamã." 
Acts15:36 Rasem bilf sẽn paase, a Poll yeela a Barnabaas t'a wa tɩ b leb n kẽng tẽms nins fãa bãmb sẽn dag n moon Zu-soabã koɛɛgã n tɩ ges ba-biisã n bãng b kibar sẽn yaa to-to." 
Acts15:37 A Barnabaas rag n dat n peega a Zã b sẽn boond t'a Mark t'a tũ-ba. 
Acts15:37 A Barnabaas rag n dat n peega a Zã b sẽn boond t'a Mark t'a tũ-ba. 
Acts15:38 La a Poll tagsame tɩ yaa neer tɩ b ra peeg a Zã-Mark ye. Tɩ bala, a rag n lebg n basa bãmb Paamfili soolem n ka leb n yãag-b n maan tʋʋmdã ye." 
Acts15:38 La a Poll tagsame tɩ yaa neer tɩ b ra peeg a Zã-Mark ye. Tɩ bala, a rag n lebg n basa bãmb Paamfili soolem n ka leb n yãag-b n maan tʋʋmdã ye." 
Acts15:39 La b kɩɩsa taab wʋsg yel-kãng wɛɛngẽ hal n welg taaba. La a Barnabaas peega a Mark n kẽ koom-koglg n na n kẽng Sɩpre. 
Acts15:39 La b kɩɩsa taab wʋsg yel-kãng wɛɛngẽ hal n welg taaba. La a Barnabaas peega a Mark n kẽ koom-koglg n na n kẽng Sɩpre. 
Acts15:40 La a Poll yãka a Sɩlaase, la ba-biisã pʋʋsame tɩ Zu-soabã ning-b barka, la b loogame." 
Acts15:41 A Poll pɩʋʋga Siiri ne Silisi soolem n paas a Zeezi Kiris tẽedbã pãnga. 
Acts16:1 A Poll taa Dɛrb ne Listri. Karen-biig a ye n dag n be beenẽ t'a yʋʋr la a Tɩmote. A ma yaa Zʋɩf poak sẽn yaa tẽeda, la a ba wã yaa Gɛrk buudu." 
Acts16:2 Ba-biisã sẽn be Listr ne Ikoniyomã ra kɩta yẽnda kaset sõngo. 
Acts16:3 A Poll dag n datame n peeg a Tɩmote, la tall-a lame n tɩ kẽes bãongo, Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn dag n be tẽn-kãensã yĩnga. Bala, b fãa ra miime t'a Tɩmote ba wã yaa Gɛrka." 
Acts16:4 A Poll dãmb sã n ta tẽngẽ fãa, b togsda Kiris tẽedbã yam-yãkr nins tẽn-tʋmdbã ne kãsem-dãmbã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã sẽn yãkã, sẽn na yɩlg tɩ b sak yam-yãk‑kãense." 
Acts16:5 A Zeezi tẽedbã tẽeb pãng da paasdame, la b sõorã ra paasda daar woo daare." 
Acts16:6 La Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn gɩdg a Poll dãmb tɩ b ra moon Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã Aazi soolem yĩnga, b pɩʋʋga Firzi ne Galasi soolem." 
Acts16:7 Bãmb sẽn kolg Miizi soolem, b makame n na n kẽng Bitini soolem, la a Zeezi Sɩɩgã ka sak tɩ b kẽng ye." 
Acts16:8 Dẽ, bãmb pɩʋʋga Miizi soolmã, n kẽng n ta Torwaase." 
Acts16:9 Yʋngo, a Poll paama vẽnegre. A yãnda Masedoan ned sẽn yas n bõosd yẽnda n yetẽ yaa: Wa-y Masedoan, n wa n sõng-do." 
Acts16:10 Vẽneg‑kãngã a Poll sẽn paamã zugẽ, tao-tao bala, tõnd baoome tɩ kẽng Masedoan. Bala, tõnd yeelame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam n boond tõnd tɩ d tɩ moon koe-noogã soolem‑kãng pʋga." 
Acts16:11 Tõnd kẽe koom-koglg Torwaas n kẽng Samotars tɩrga. La vẽkembeoogo, tõnd kẽnga Neyapoliisi." 
Acts16:12 La tõnd yii beenẽ n kẽng Filip tẽnga. Filip yaa Masedoan soolmã na-tẽnga, la rag n yaa Rom nebã n so-a. Tõnd paa tẽn-kãng rasem bilfu." 
Acts16:13 Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsgã daare, tõnd yii tẽngã n kẽng kʋɩlg noore, tõnd sẽn dag n tagsd tɩ d na n yãnda pʋʋsg zĩig beenẽ wã yĩnga. Tõnd zĩnda tẽnga, n gom ne pagb nins sẽn da tigim taab be wã." 
Acts16:14 Pag a yembr n dag n be beenẽ n zoet Wẽnnaam, t'a yʋʋr ya a Lidi. A yita Tɩyatɩɩre, la a koosda peen-miid sẽn be neer wʋsgo. Pʋg-kãng ra kelgdame, la Zu-soabã sɩɩsa a sũurã t'a sak n deeg bũmb nins a Poll sẽn da togsdã." 
Acts16:15 La yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb sẽn paam lisgu, a kosa tõnd a woto: Yãmb sã n tẽed tɩ mam tũuda Zu-soabã sɩd-sɩda, bɩ y wa n sig mam yirã n zĩnd be. La a pẽdga tõnd wʋsg n tõoge." 
Acts16:16 Tõnd wa n dag n dabda pʋʋsg zĩigẽ, la tʋmtʋmd-poak a yembr sẽn yaa kĩnkir-bag n wa n seg tõndo. A zu-soben-dãmbã rag n paamda ligd wʋsg a bagrã bʋgb yĩnga." 
Acts16:17 Yẽnda sɩngame n pʋgd a Poll ne tõnd poor n yetẽ yaa: Nin-bãmbã yaa Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To tʋmtʋmdba, la b wilgd-y‑la fãagr sore." 
Acts16:18 A maana a woto n kaoos rasem wʋsgo. La a Poll yam yii ne yẽnda t'a wẽnemd n yeel zĩnã yaa: Mam yeta foom ne a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋr tɩ f yi n bas bi-puglã. La wakat-kãng bala, zĩnã yiime n bas-a." 
Acts16:19 Tʋmtʋmd-poakã zu-soben-dãmbã sẽn yã tɩ b ka na n leb n paam ligd bi-puglã yĩnga, b yõka a Poll ne a Sɩlaas n tɛ-b n kẽng raagẽ wã, taoor dãmbã nengẽ." 
Acts16:20 B talla a Poll dãmb n kẽng bʋ-kaoodbã nengẽ n tɩ yeel yaa: Nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã rãmbda tõnd tẽngã," 
Acts16:21 n zãmsd nebã minindu, tõnd sẽn yaa Rom nebã sẽn ka tar noor tɩ reeg-b wall d tũ-b ye." 
Acts16:22 Neb kʋʋngã yika zabr ne a Poll dãmba. La bʋ-kaoodbã kɩtame tɩ b pãrs a Poll ne a Sɩlaas futã la b yeel‑b tɩ b pãb-b ne kalwaase. 
Acts16:23 B sẽn pãb a Poll dãmb sõama n sɛ, b kẽes-b-la bi-bees roogo, la b yeel bi-bees roog gũudã t'a gũ-b neere." 
Acts16:24 B sẽn yeel gũudã a woto n sɛ, a kẽesa bãmb roog sẽn be roog a to pʋgẽ n balg-b ra-bãongo." 
Acts16:25 La sẽn kolg yʋn-sʋka, a Poll ne a Sɩlaas ra pʋʋsdame, la b yɩɩnd n waoogd Wẽnnaam. La bi-beesã ra kelgd-b lame." 
Acts16:26 Tao-tao bala, tẽn-digimd‑kãseng n zĩndi, hal tɩ bi-bees roogã yẽbgr rigimdi. Wakat-kãng bala, kʋɩlemsã fãa pagsame, la bi-beesã fãa bãens sogsame." 
Acts16:27 Bi-bees roog gũuda nekame. La a sẽn yã tɩ bi-bees roogã kʋɩlems pagsame, a wõoga a sʋʋg n na n kʋ a menga, a sẽn tagsd tɩ bi-beesã zoeeme wã yĩnga." 
Acts16:28 La a Poll zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel yaa: Da maan-y y meng bũmb ye! Tõnd fãa bee ka. 
Acts16:29 Dẽ, bi-bees roog gũudã kosame tɩ b wa ne bugum, la a wudga tao-tao n kẽ bi-beesã roogẽ, n lʋɩ a Poll ne a Sɩlaas taoor ne rigbu." 
Acts16:30 La yẽnda yiisa a Poll ne a Sɩlaas yɩnga, n sok-b yaa: M neb sõamyã, bõe la mam tog n maan n paam fãagre?" 
Acts16:31 La b leokame n yeele: Tẽ-y Zu-soab a Zeezi, la yãmb ne y yirã rãmb na n paama fãagre." 
Acts16:32 La a Poll dãmb moona yẽnda ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be yẽnda zakẽ wã Zu-soabã koɛɛga. 
Acts16:33 Gũudã talla bãmb wakat-kãng bal ne yʋngã, n tɩ pegs b noadã. La tao-tao bala, yẽnda ne a zakã rãmb fãa paama koom lisgu." 
Acts16:34 A talla a Poll dãmb n kẽ a zakẽ, n kõ-b rɩɩbo, la yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb fãa paama sũ-noogo, b sẽn tẽ Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Acts16:35 La beoogã sẽn vẽege, bʋ-kaoodbã tʋma gũudb tɩ b tɩ yeel bi-bees roogã gũud yaa: Yiis nin-bãmbã n base." 
Acts16:36 Bi-bees roogã gũud tɩ togsa a Poll gom‑kãens n yeele: Bʋ-kaoodbã tʋma koɛɛg n yeel tɩ m yiis-y n base. Rẽ wã, yi-y n loog-y ne laafɩ." 
Acts16:37 La a Poll yeela gũudbã yaa: Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b pãb tõnd nebã fãa taoore, tɩ tõnd bʋʋd nan ka kao ye, la b kẽes tõnd bi-bees roogo. Tõnd yaool n yaa Rom nebã. Tɩ moasã, bãmb dat n soos n yiis tõndo? Bada! B wa b toor n wa yiis tõndo." 
Acts16:38 Gũudbã tɩ togsa bʋ-kaoodbã gom-kãense. La b sẽn wʋm t'a Poll ne a Sɩlaas yaa Rom nebã, rabeem yõk-b lame." 
Acts16:39 Dẽ, b waa n kosa a Poll dãmb sugri, n yiis-ba, la b bõos-b tɩ b yi tẽngã." 
Acts16:40 Bãmb sẽn yi bi-bees roogã, b kẽnga a Lidi yiri. La b sẽn yã ba-biisã, b sagl-b lame la b looge." 
Acts17:1 A Poll dãmb tũu Amfipolis ne Apoloni n ta Tesaloniki. Zʋɩf-rãmbã karen-doog n da be be. 
Acts17:2 A Poll kẽe karen-doogẽ wã wa a sẽn minim n maandẽ wã, La a sõsa ne bãmb gʋlsg sõamyã wɛɛngẽ, vʋʋsg ray a taab n pʋgl taaba." 
Acts17:3 Yẽnda ra bilgda bãmb la a wilgd-b tɩ Kiris da tog n namsame, la tɩ b na n vʋʋgame n bas kũum. A Poll yeel-b lame yaa: Zeezi ning mam sẽn gomd ne yãmb b yellã, yaa bãmb la Kirisã." 
Acts17:4 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã kẽer tẽe a Poll sẽn yeelã, la bãmb ne Gɛrk-rãmb wʋsgo, la pagb wʋsg me nebã sẽn waoogd naaga ne a Poll la a Sɩlaase." 
Acts17:5 La sũ-kiir yõka Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ b kams ninsaan-faad nebã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b gũm taaba, n dãmbd tẽngã. B kẽnga a Zaazõ yirã n na n tɩ bao a Poll ne a Sɩlaas n tall-b n kẽng nebã taoore." 
Acts17:6 La b sẽn ka yãnd a Poll rãmba, b yõga a Zaazõ ne ba-biis kẽer n tall-b n kẽng tẽn-soaadbã taoore, n kelemd n yetẽ yaa: Nin‑bãmbã, sẽn dãmb-b dũni fãa wã waa ka me, la a Zaazõ reeg-b-la a yiri." 
Acts17:7 B fãa tʋʋmã kɩɩsda rĩm a Sezaar noorã, la b yetame tɩ rĩm a to n be: A Zeezi." 
Acts17:8 Gom-kãens namsa neb kʋʋngã ne tẽn-soaadbã. 
Acts17:9 La b kɩtame t'a Zaazõ ne neb a taabã gãneg yaood tɩ b yaool n bas-b tɩ b looge. 
Acts17:10 Tao-tao bala, ba-biisã kɩtame t'a Poll ne a Sɩlaas loog Beere ne yʋngã. La b sẽn ta beenẽ bala, b kẽe Zʋɩf-rãmbã karen-doogẽ." 
Acts17:11 Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn dag n be Beere wã da tara yam sõng n yɩɩd sẽn be-b Tesalonikã. Bãmb deega Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã ne b sũyã fãa. La daar fãa, bãmb da vɛɛsda gʋls‑sõamyã n dat n bãng bũmb nins b sẽn yet bãmbã sã n yaa sɩda." 
Acts17:12 Neb wʋsg bãmb sʋkã tẽeme, la Gɛrk-rãmbã sʋk me, pagb wʋsg nebã sẽn nande, ne raop wʋsg tẽeme." 
Acts17:13 La Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn be Tesalonikã sẽn bãng t'a Poll da moonda Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã Beere wã me, b waa beenẽ, n pirs nebã, n dãmb-ba." 
Acts17:14 Dẽ, tao-tao bala, ba-biisã kɩtame t'a Poll zãag n kẽng ko-kãsengã noore. La a Sɩlaas ne a Tɩmote paa Beere." 
Acts17:15 Neb nins sẽn yãag a Pollã talla yẽnda n ta Atɛn. La a Poll yeel-b lame tɩ b sã n leb bɩ b tɩ yeel a Sɩlaas ne a Tɩmote tɩ b babs-a n wa tao-tao. Dẽ, b lebgame." 
Acts17:16 A Poll sẽn be Atɛn n gũud a Sɩlaas ne a Tɩmote waoongã, yẽnda sũurã sãama wʋsgo, a sẽn yã tɩ tẽngã pida ne wẽn-naandsã yĩnga." 
Acts17:17 Dẽ, a Poll dag n sõsda ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã, la ne buud a taabã neb sẽn zoet Wẽnnaamã karen-doogẽ wã. La daar fãa, raagã pʋga, a ra sõsda ne neb nins sẽn wat be wã." 
Acts17:18 Epikuryẽ-rãmbã ne Ɛstoyisẽ-rãmbã karen-saam-dãmb kẽer me sɩngame n gom ne a Polle. La kẽer sokame tɩ gom-to-nedã rat n yeelame tɩ bõe? La neb a taab yetame tɩ yaa wa a Poll yaa wẽn-zẽms koe-toagsda, bala, a dag n gomda a Zeezi la kũum vʋʋgr yelle." 
Acts17:19 La b talla a Poll n kẽng Ayeropaazã kãsem-dãmbã taoor n sok-a yaa: Dẽ yĩnga, fo tõe n togsa tõnd zãms-paalgã fo sẽn tarã võor tɩ d bãnge?" 
Acts17:20 Bala, bũmb nins fo sẽn togsd tõndã yaa bõn-sãams ne tõndo, la tõnd dat n bãnga b võore." 
Acts17:21 Bala, Atɛn nebã fãa ne sãambã sẽn be bãmb sʋkã da ka rɩkd b weerã n maand bũmb a to tɩ sã n ka tɩ gom, wall tɩ kelg koe-paals ye." 
Acts17:22 A Poll yik n yalsa Ayeropaazã sʋk n yeel yaa: Atɛn nebã, bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, mam mikame tɩ yãmb yaa wẽn-pʋʋsdb meng-menga." 
Acts17:23 Bala, mam sẽn wa n kẽnd la m get bũmb nins yãmb sẽn pʋʋsdã, mam tol n yãnda tẽn-kugr a yembr tɩ b gʋls a zug tɩ «wẽnnaam ning tõnd sẽn ka mi wã rẽnda.» Wẽnnaam ning yãmb sẽn waoogd n yaool n ka mi-bã, yaa Wẽnnaam‑kãng yell la mam sẽn gomd ne yãmbã." 
Acts17:24 Wẽnnaam ning sẽn naan-a dũni wã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, bãmb yaa yĩngr la tẽng Zu-soaba, la b ka kẽed pʋʋsg rot ninsaalb nus sẽn me pʋsẽ," 
Acts17:25 la b ka baood me tɩ ninsaalb tʋm ne b nus n sõng-b wa bũmb n paoog-b ye. Bala, yaa bãmb n kõt ninsaalbã vɩɩm, la vʋʋsem, la bũmbã fãa." 
Acts17:26 Wẽnnaam talla nin-yend n kɩt tɩ ninsaalbã buud fãa zĩnd dũni zug tɛk fãa, la b welga wakat n kõ ninsaalbã, la b ning b soolmã tods n kõ-ba." 
Acts17:27 Wẽnnaam maana bõn-kãngã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ ninsaalbã bao bãmba, la tɩ b sẽn maood n dat n yãnd Wẽnnaamã, bɩ tõe tɩ b yãnd-ba. Bala, Wẽnnaam ka zãr ne tõnd ned ba a yembr ye," 
Acts17:28 bala, yaa bãmb pʋg la d tar vɩɩm, la d tõe n kẽne la d beẽ. Yaa wala yãmb yʋʋmbã kẽer sẽn dag n yeel me tɩ tõnd yaa Wẽnnaam kambã." 
Acts17:29 Rẽ wã yĩnga, tõnd sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam kambã, d ka tog n tags tɩ Wẽnnaam wẽnda sãnem, wala wanzuri, wala kugr sẽn peese wa sẽn zems ninsaalb minim la b tagsg ye." 
Acts17:30 Nebã sẽn ka mi b sẽn maandã wakate, Wẽnnaam ka maand bũmb ye, La moasã, b yeta nebã fãa sẽn be zĩig fãa tɩ b tek yam n kos sugri." 
Acts17:31 Bala, Wẽnnaam yãka raare, tɩ rao ning bãmb sẽn yãkã na n kao dũniyã fãa bʋʋd ne tɩrlem. La Wẽnnaam kõo nebã fãa bãnde, n vʋʋg rao-kãng n bas kũum n wilg tɩ yaa sɩda." 
Acts17:32 La b sẽn wʋm a Poll sẽn gomd kũum vʋʋgr yellã, kẽer yaala yẽnda, la kẽer yeelame tɩ b na n leb n kelga a Poll koe-kãngã nindaare." 
Acts17:33 Dẽ, a Poll yii bãmb sʋka." 
Acts17:34 La baoosgo neb kẽer lagma a Poll n tẽ. A Deniis sẽn yaa bʋ-kaoodbã sʋk ned a yembr dag n naaga be, ne pag a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Damaris n leb n paas neb a taaba." 
Acts18:1 Rẽ poore, a Poll basa Atɛn n kẽng Korẽnte." 
Acts18:2 Yẽnda yãnda Zʋɩf a yembr beenẽ t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Akɩlaas, yẽnda yaa soolem a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Põ neda. La yẽnda ne a pag a Pirsill yii Itali soolem n nan wa be paalem, naab a Kolood sẽn dag n yiis tõog n yet tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa yi Rom tẽnga yĩnga. A Poll kẽnga bãmb nengẽ." 
Acts18:3 La a Poll nug-tʋʋmdã ne bãmb dẽndã sẽn dag n ya bũmb a yembrã, yẽnda zĩnda bãmb yirã n naag taab n tʋmdẽ. Bãmb dag n sẽta fu-roto." 
Acts18:4 Vʋʋsg daar fãa a Poll moonda koɛɛg karen-doogã pʋgẽ n maoodẽ tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne Gɛrk-rãmbã tẽ-a. 
Acts18:5 La a Sɩlaas ne a Tɩmote sẽn yi Masedoan a wa, a Poll rɩka a weerã zãng n moon koe-noogã n yeel Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ yaa a Zeezi la Kirisã." 
Acts18:6 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã ra kɩɩsda a Poll la b tʋʋd-a. Dẽ, yẽnda fugsa a fut n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb sã n sãame, a taalã bee ne yãmba, la a ka be ne maam ye. La sẽn sɩng ne moasã, mam na n kẽnga bu-zẽmsã nengẽ.»" 
Acts18:7 Dẽ, a Poll yii be n kẽng ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Titiyuus Zustuus yiri, yẽnda yaa ned sẽn zoet Wẽnnaam dabeem, la a zakã rag n pẽe ne karen-doogã." 
Acts18:8 La a Kirispuus sẽn yaa karen-doog naabã ne a yirã rãmb fãa tẽe Zu-soabã. La Korẽnt tẽng neb wʋsg sẽn wʋm a Poll koe-moonegã, bãmb me tẽeme n paam koom lisgu." 
Acts18:9 La yʋngo, Zu-soabã goma ne a Poll vẽnegr pʋg n yeel-a yaa: Da zoe rabeem ye, kẽng taoor n gom la f ra sĩnd ye." 
Acts18:10 Bala, mam bee ne foom, la ned ba a yembr kõn tõog n yõk foom n maan-f wẽng ye. Bala, neb wʋsg n be tẽn-kãngã pʋg n yaa mam nebã." 
Acts18:11 A Poll zĩnda Korẽnt yʋʋmd la kiis a yoobe, n zãms nebã Wẽnnaam goamã beenẽ." 
Acts18:12 La wakat ninga a Galyõ sẽn dag n yaa Akayi soolem Gʋvɛrneerã, Zʋɩf-rãmbã lagma taab n dõd a Poll n tall‑a n kẽng bʋʋd zĩigẽ." 
Acts18:13 B tɩ yeelame yaa: Rao-kãngã sẽn baood n kɩt tɩ nebã waoog Wẽnnaam to-to wã ka zemsd ne tõogã ye. 
Acts18:14 A Poll sẽn yet t'a na n gome, la a Galyõ sẽn yeel Zʋɩf-rãmbã yaa: Zʋɩf-rãmba, sã n dag ya bũmb sẽn ka tɩrg wala tʋʋm‑wẽng poorẽ, mam dag n na n maaga m meng n kelg yãmba." 
Acts18:15 La sã n yaa nokoɛɛm goam poorẽ, la yʋy la yãmb mens tõogã poorẽ, yõwã yaa yãmb la pak-yã. Mam ka na n yɩ bõn-kãens bʋ-kaood ye." 
Acts18:16 La a Galyõ riga bãmb tɩ b yi bʋʋdã zĩigẽ. 
Acts18:17 Dẽ, b naaga taab n yõk a Sostɛn sẽn yaa karen-doog naabã n sɩng n pãbd-a bʋʋda zĩig noore. La a Galyõ dag n ka maand yɩɩr ne yel-kãng ye." 
Acts18:18 A Poll kell n paa Korẽnt n kaoose. Dẽ, a yaool n basa ba-biisã n kẽ koom-koglg n kẽng Siiri la a Pirsill ne a Akilaas tũu yẽnda. La sẽn deng a Poll sẽn na n kẽ koom-koglgã, a kɩtame tɩ b põng a zugã Sãnkre, bala yẽ rag n pʋlma Wẽnnaam." 
Acts18:19 Bãmb taa Efɛɛse, la a Poll basa a Akilaas ne a Pirsill beenẽ. A Poll kẽnga karen-doogẽ n tɩ sõs ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã." 
Acts18:20 La b kos-a lame t'a pa be n kaoose, la a zãgsame." 
Acts18:21 A Poll pʋʋsa bãmb wẽnd-na-taas n yeel-b yaa: [Tigrã sẽn watã, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam maan-a Zeruzalɛm.] Wẽnnaam sã n data, mam na n leb n waa yãmb nengẽ. La yẽ kẽe koom-koglg Efɛɛs n looge." 
Acts18:22 A Poll sẽn sig Sezaare, a kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n na n tɩ pʋʋs Kiris tẽedbã n yaool n kẽng Ãntiyoose." 
Acts18:23 La yẽnda sẽn kaoos Ãntiyoos bilfu, a lebg n dɩka sor n kẽng tẽng-tẽnga, n pɩʋʋg Galasi soolem ne Firzi soolem n paas karen-biisã fãa pãng b tẽebã pʋga." 
Acts18:24 Zʋɩf a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Apoloos n dag n wa Efɛɛse, yẽnda roga Alegsãndri. Yẽnda yaa ned sẽn ya gom-minim soaba, la yẽnda ra mii gʋls-sõamyã neere." 
Acts18:25 B rag n zãms-a-la Zu-soabã sore. La baa sẽn da yaa a Zã lisgã yell bal la yẽnda sẽn mi wã, a ra zãmsda nebã bũmb nins sẽn kẽed ne a Zeezi kibarã tɩrga, ne a sũurã fãa." 
Acts18:26 Dẽ, a Apoloos sɩngame n gom karen-doogã pʋg ne pɛl-kɛgenga. La a Pirsill ne a Akilaas sẽn wʋm yẽ koɛɛgã, b peeg-a lame n maneg n zãms-a Wẽnnaam sorã tɩrg n paase." 
Acts18:27 A Apoloos sẽn dat n kẽng Akayi wã, ba-biisã paasa yẽnda raood n gʋls sebr n tʋm karen-biisã sẽn be soolem kãngã n yet tɩ b reeg-a neere. La yẽnda sẽn ta beenẽ, a sõnga neb nins sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã wʋsg ne Wẽnnaam barkã." 
Acts18:28 Bala, yẽnda goma wʋsg ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã, n tall gʋls-sõamyã nebã taoor n wilg-b t'a Zeezi yaa Kirisã." 
Acts19:1 A Apoloos sẽn wa n be Korẽntã wakate, a Poll pɩʋʋga soolem nins sẽn be zugẽ wã n kẽng Efɛɛse. A Poll yãnda karen-biis kẽer be," 
Acts19:2 n sok-b tɩ b sẽn tẽ wã, b paama Sɩɩg-sõngo? La b leoka yẽnda tɩ bãmb zɩɩ n wʋm tɩ b gomd tɩ Sɩɩg-sõng n be ye." 
Acts19:3 T'a Poll sok-b tɩ rẽ wã lisg ning b sẽn deegã yaa bʋgo? Tɩ b leok tɩ yaa a Zã lisgã. 
Acts19:4 Dẽ, a Poll yeel-b lame yaa: A Zã rag n lisda neb nins sẽn tek-b yam n kos sugrã, la b rag n yeta Israyɛll nebã tɩ b tẽ ned ningã sẽn na n pʋgl‑a yẽnda n wa wã. Sẽn dat n togs t'a Zeezi." 
Acts19:5 Bãmb sẽn wʋm a woto, b kɩtame tɩ b lis-b koomẽ ne Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋre." 
Acts19:6 A Poll tika bãmb ne a nusi, la Sɩɩg-sõng siga b zutu. Bãmb sɩngame n gom gom-zẽn n togs bãngr goamã." 
Acts19:7 Nin-kãens fãa sõorã ra kolga piig la a yiibu. 
Acts19:8 A Poll kẽe karen-doogẽ wã n gom ne Pɛl-kɛgenga, la yẽnda moona Wẽnnaam soolem koɛɛgã kiis a tãabo n maood n dat n wilg sẽn kelgd-b yẽnda wã tɩ yaa sɩda." 
Acts19:9 La neb kẽer riglma b sũyã n tõdg tɩ b ka na n tẽ ye. La b gom Zu-soabã sor wẽng neb wʋsgã taoore. Dẽ, a Poll yii bãmb sʋka, n peeg karen-biisã toor n kẽng a Tiranuus kaorengã roog pʋg n zãms-b daar fãa." 
Acts19:10 Bõn-kãng kaoosa yʋʋm a yiibu, hal tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne Gɛrk-rãmbã la neb nins fãa sẽn be Aazi soolmã wʋm Zu-soabã koɛɛgã." 
Acts19:11 La Wẽnnaam maana bõn-bãn-kãsems ne a Poll nusi. 
Acts19:12 Hal tɩ b rɩgs pɛɛla, wala fut sẽn da sɩɩsd a Poll yĩngã n ningd bãad-dãmbã zut la b paamda maagre, la sɩ-wẽnsã yit n basd-b lame." 
Acts19:13 Tɩt rãmb kẽer sẽn dag n yaa Zʋɩf buud n yaa gõaadb makame n na n tall Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋrã n dig zĩn-dãmb tɩ b yi n bas bãad-dãmba. Tɩtã rãmb yeela sɩ-wẽnsã yaa: Ne a Poll sẽn moond Zeezi ningã wã yʋʋre, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y yi." 
Acts19:14 Neb nins sẽn dag n maand a woto wã yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Seeva kom-dibli a yopoe. 
Acts19:15 La sɩ-wẽngã leok-b lame yaa: Mam mii a Zeezi, la mam mii a Poll sẽn yaa ned ninga. La yãmba, yãmb yaa ãnda rãmba?" 
Acts19:16 La sɩ-wẽngã sẽn tar ned ningã yikame n yẽeg-b n zab ne-b n tõog-b fãa ne pãng hal tɩ b zoe n yi ro-kãng pʋg bɛɛl la ne sãmpoaga. 
Acts19:17 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne Gɛrk-rãmbã sẽn da be Efɛɛs fãa wʋma bõn-kãnga: La rabeem yõka b fãa, la Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋrã paama waoogre." 
Acts19:18 Neb nins sẽn tẽ wã wʋsg dag n wat n togsda b sẽn da maan bũmb ninsã nebã taoore. 
Acts19:19 La neb wʋsg sẽn da be bãmb sʋkã n yaa bag-bʋgdbã talla b sɛbã n wa n yõog bugum nebã fãa taoore. La b geela sɛbã ligd n mik tɩ taa wanzuri ligd tus pis‑nu. 
Acts19:20 Woto kɩtame tɩ Zu-soabã koɛɛg saag ne pãnga, la tõogre." 
Acts19:21 Bõn-kãens zugẽ, a Poll yãka yam n na n pɩʋʋg Masedoan ne Akayi n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, la a yet tɩ yẽnda sã n ta beenẽ, yaa tɩlɛ t'a kẽng Rom tẽng me." 
Acts19:22 A Poll tʋma a sõangdb a yiib tɩ b kẽng Masedoan, yaa a Tɩmote ne a Eraste. La yẽnda meng leb n paa Aazi soolem n kaoos bilfu." 
Acts19:23 Wakat-kãnga, rãmb-kãsems n yik Zu-soabã sor wɛɛngẽ." 
Acts19:24 Yõak a yembr n da be t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Demetiryuusi, yẽnda ra maanda wẽn-poak a Artemi pʋʋsg ro-bãooneg ne wanzuri. A maanda a woto t'a tʋmtʋmdbã paamd ligd wʋsgo." 
Acts19:25 Yẽnda tigma nin-bãmb ne neb nins sẽn yaa yõgsã n yeel-b yaa: Raopa, yãmb fãa miime tɩ yaa ne nug-tʋʋm‑kãngã la tõnd tʋmd n paamd ligdi." 
Acts19:26 La yãmb yãtame la y wʋmd bũmb nins rao a Pollã sẽn maandã. Bala, yẽnda yetame tɩ nebã nus sẽn maan wẽnnaam-dãmb ninsã ka wẽnnaam-dãmb ye, la a tõogame n tek neb wʋsg yam. La ka Efɛɛs soolem bal ye, yaa sẽn kolg Aazi fãa gilli." 
Acts19:27 Sã n ka gũusi, bõn-kãngã na n sãama tõnd tʋʋmdã, la sẽn paase, a na n maaname tɩ wẽn-poak kãseng a Artemi pʋʋsgã roog ka leb n tar waoogr ye. Dẽ, Aazi soolem nebã fãa ne dũniyã fãa sẽn da pʋʋsd wẽn-poak ningã ka na n leb n paam pẽgr ye." 
Acts19:28 B sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, b sũyã yikame tɩ b kelem n yeel yaa: Efɛɛsẽ-rãmbã Artemi wã yaa kãsenga." 
Acts19:29 La tẽngã fãa rãmbame. Bãmb yõga a Gayuus ne a Aristark sẽn yaa Masedoan nebã n yaa a Poll tũud-n-taasã, n naag taab n wudg tao-tao n kẽ reemã zĩigẽ." 
Acts19:30 A Poll dag n dat n kẽnga neb kʋʋngã taoore, la karen-biisã gɩdg-a lame." 
Acts19:31 Kãsem-dãmb kẽer meng sẽn be Aazi soolem n yaa a Poll Zo-rãmb tʋmame tɩ b kos-a t'a ra kẽng reemã zĩigẽ ye. 
Acts19:32 La wakat-kãnga, neb kẽer kelemdame n yet tɩ woto, tɩ neb kẽer kelem n yeel bũmb a to. Bala, neb kʋʋngã rãmbdame, hal tɩ neb kẽer meng rag n ka mi bũmb ning yĩng sẽn kɩt tɩ b tigma ye." 
Acts19:33 La b kɩtame t'a Alegsãndr yi kʋʋngã sʋka, tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã tus-a t'a kẽng nebã taoore. La a Alegsãndr zẽka a nug n na n gom nebã taoore." 
Acts19:34 La nebã sẽn bãng t'a Alegsãndr yaa Zʋɩfã, b fãa naaga taab n kelem hal tɩ kolg lɛɛr a yiib n yetẽ tɩ Efɛɛsẽ-rãmbã wẽn-poak a Artemi yaa kãsenga." 
Acts19:35 Baoosgo, tẽnga seb-gʋlsdã tõogame tɩ nebã sĩndi, la a yeel yaa: Efɛɛs nebã, ãnda soab n ka mi tɩ yaa Efɛɛs tẽngã n yaa Artemi kãsenga pʋʋsg roog gũuda, la Artemi naandã sẽn yi yĩngr n lʋɩ wã gũuda?" 
Acts19:36 La ned ka tõe n kɩɩs bõn-kãng ye. Rẽ wã yĩnga, y tog n maaga y mense n da maan bũmb baa fʋɩ ne yãgb ye." 
Acts19:37 Bala, rap kãens yãmb sẽn tall n wa ka wã, b ka paooge, wala b tʋʋs tõnd wẽn-poakã ye." 
Acts19:38 Rẽ wã yĩnga, a Demetiryuus ne a tʋmd-n-taasã sã n tar yell ne neda, bʋʋd ray beeme, la bʋ-kaoodb beeme. Bɩ b tɩ bʋ ne taab be." 
Acts19:39 Yãmb sã n ket n tar yɛl a taaba, bʋ-kaoodbã sã n wa tigim wa sẽn zems ne tõogã, b na ges yel-kãng yelle." 
Acts19:40 La sɩdã, b tõe n dõda tõnd n yet tɩ d rãmbda tẽngã, bũmb ning sẽn maan dũndã wã yĩnga. Bala, tõnd ka tar bũmb sẽn wilgd tɩ d tara noor tɩ tigim a woto ye. La yẽnda sẽn gom a woto n sɛ, a kɩtame tɩ nebã looge." 
Acts20:1 La rãmbgã sẽn sigi, a Poll tigma karen-biisã n paas-b raood n yaool n loog n kẽng Masedoan." 
Acts20:2 Yẽnda pɩʋʋga zĩig‑zĩig soolem‑kãng pʋg n sagl karen-biisã wʋsgo, n yaool n kẽng Gɛrs tẽnga." 
Acts20:3 La a Poll zĩnda Gɛrs soolem kiis a tãabo. La yẽnda rag n dat n kẽe koom-koglg n kẽng Siiri, la Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn soos n sed n dat yõk-a wã yĩnga, yẽnda yãka yam n na n lebg n tũ Masedoan sore."
