Acts20:4 Neb nins sẽn yãag a Poll n ta Aazi soolmã, yaa Beere rao a Piruus biig a Sopatɛɛre, ne a Aristark la a Sekõnduus sẽn yit Tesalonik ne a Gayuus sẽn yit Dɛrb tẽnga, la a Tɩmote ne a Tisik la a Torfim sẽn dog Aazi soolmẽ wã." 
Acts20:5 Nin-kãens renga taoor n tɩ gũ tõnd Torwaas soolem. 
Acts20:6 La bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigrã loogr poore, tõnd mensã kẽe koom-koglg Filip tẽnga. La sẽn kaoos rasem a nu, tõnd tɩ bʋʋga bãmb Torwaase, la d zĩnda be rasem a yopoe." 
Acts20:7 Dimaas daar zaabre, tõnd dag n tigmame n na n dɩ tẽegr buri. A Poll sẽn da tog n loog vẽkembeoogã, yẽnda moona koɛɛgã ne karen-biisã n gom n kaoos halɩ n ta yʋn-sʋka." 
Acts20:8 Yĩngr doog ning pʋg tõnd sẽn da tigmã, fɩtl-dãmb wʋsg n dag n be be." 
Acts20:9 La bi-bɩɩg a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Etikuus n dag n zao fẽnetr zugu. La a Poll sẽn dag n moond koɛɛgã tɩ kaoosdẽ wã wakate, a gũsa sõamã. La gõeemã sẽn dɩk-a wã yĩnga, a yii yĩngr ro-tomdem a tãabẽ soabã n lʋɩ tẽnga. La b rɩk-a lame n mik t'a kiime." 
Acts20:10 La a Poll sigame n zõond a Etikuus zug n dɩk-a a nusẽ n yeel yaa: Da maan-y yɩɩr ye, a vɩɩme." 
Acts20:11 La a Poll sẽn lebg n dʋ, a Kaoo burã n dɩ. La a gomame yɛs n kaoos hal tɩ beoogã vẽege, n yaool n looge." 
Acts20:12 La b yãaga bi-bɩɩgã vɩɩga. La a yɩɩ belsg kãseng bãmb fãa yĩnga. 
Acts20:13 Tõnd denga taoor n kẽ koom-koglg n kẽng Asoose, yaa be la tõnd dag n tog n tɩ seg a Poll n dɩke, yẽnda n da yãk yam a woto n na n kẽn ne nao n kẽng be." 
Acts20:14 La a Poll sẽn seg tõnd Asoose, a kẽe koom-koglgã ne tõnd n kẽng Mitilɛn." 
Acts20:15 Tõnd yika be ne koom-koglgã n looge, la vẽkembeoogo, tõnd taa tẽng b sẽn boond tɩ Siyo taoore, la daar ning sẽn pʋgdã, tõnd taa Samoose, la daar ning sẽn pʋglã wã, tõnd siga Mile." 
Acts20:16 A Poll dag n sɩd yãka yam n na n loog Efɛɛs n da sig beenẽ, sẽn na n yɩl n da sãam weer Aazi soolmẽ wã ye. Bala, yẽnda rag n yãgdame n datẽ tɩ sã n tõe, bɩ a zĩnd Zeruzalɛm Pãntekotã daare." 
Acts20:17 A Poll zĩnda Mile n tʋm koɛɛg tɩ b tɩ bool a Zeezi Kiris tẽedbã kãsem-dãmbã sẽn be Efɛɛsã tɩ b wa. 
Acts20:18 La b sẽn wa n ta a Poll nengẽ, yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: Yãmb mii mam yel-manesem sẽn yɩ to-to ne yãmb wakat fãa, sẽn sɩng ne daar ning mam sẽn wa Aazi soolmã pʋgẽ wã." 
Acts20:19 Mam tʋma Zu-soabã yĩng ne sik-m-menga, la ne nintãm, tood nins mam sẽn paamã, Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn da set n dat n kʋ maamã." 
Acts20:20 Yãmb miime tɩ mam ka solg yãmb bũmb nins fãa sẽn na n sõng-y wã ye. Mam togsa yãmb bũmbã fãa la m zãms-y nebã sʋka la rot pʋse. 
Acts20:21 Mam kɩsa kaset ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã la Gɛrk-rãmbã n yeel-b tɩ b tek yam n kos Wẽnnaam sugri, la b tẽ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi." 
Acts20:22 La moasã, Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn modgd maam tɩ m kẽng Zeruzalɛmã, mam na n kẽngame, la m ka mi bũmb ning sẽn na n tɩ paam maam be ye." 
Acts20:23 Mam sẽn mi bala, yaa tɩ Sɩɩg-sõng keoogda maam tẽng‑tẽnga, tɩ bi-bees roog la namsg n gũud maam." 
Acts20:24 La mam tagsdame tɩ mam vɩɩmã ka tar yõod ne maam ye. La sẽn pak maam yaa tɩ m wee n tõog n maan m tʋʋmdã hal n ta a tɛka, n tõog n baas tʋʋmd ning Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn ning mam zugã, n moon Wẽnnaam barkã koe-noogã." 
Acts20:25 Mam zĩnda yãmb sʋk n moon Wẽnnaam soolem koɛɛgã, la mam mii moasã tɩ yãmb ned baa a yembr ka na n leb n yãnd mam neng yɛs ye." 
Acts20:26 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam togsd yãmb dũndã, tɩ yãmb ned a yembr sã n sãame, a taalã ka be ne maam ye." 
Acts20:27 Bala, mam togsa yãmb Wẽnnaam daabã fãa n ka solg bũmb ye." 
Acts20:28 Dẽ wã, gũus-y y mense, la y ges piis nins fãa Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõ-y tɩ y gũ wã yelle. Rɩlg-y Zu-soabã tẽedbã b sẽn da ne b biigã zɩɩmã." 
Acts20:29 Mam miime tɩ mam loogr poore, neb sẽn wẽnd wa rigd-n-yĩid‑toos n na n wa yãmb sʋk n sãam piisã." 
Acts20:30 La neb n na n yik yãmb sʋkã n zãmsd nebã sẽn ka sɩda, n maan a woto n belg tẽedbã tɩ b tũ-ba." 
Acts20:31 Rẽ wã yĩnga, neend-y la y tẽeg tɩ yʋʋm a tãabo, mam sagla yãmb ned kam fãa ne nintãm, wĩntoog ne yʋng n ka bas ye." 
Acts20:32 La moasã, mam basda yãmb Wẽnnaam nugẽ, la m basd-y ne bãmb bark goamã sẽn tar pãng n tõe n paas yãmb daoodo, la a kɩt tɩ yãmb yɩ pʋɩt-n-taas ne Wẽnnaam nebã fãa wã." 
Acts20:33 Mam ka maan sũ-kiir ne ned ligdi, wall a sãnem, wall a fut ye." 
Acts20:34 Yãmb mens miime tɩ mam tʋma ne m meng nus n na n paam bũmb ning sẽn na sek maam ne neb nins sẽn tũud maamã. 
Acts20:35 Mam wilga yãmb bũmb fãa pʋgẽ tɩ d tog n tʋma a woto n tõog n sõng naong rãmba, la d tẽeg goam nins Zu-soab a Zeezi meng sẽn yeelã: Tɩ kõ bee bark n yɩɩd tɩ reege." 
Acts20:36 A Poll sẽn gom a woto n sɛ, a yĩgimdame n pʋʋs ne bãmb fãa." 
Acts20:37 La b fãa ra yãbda wʋsgo, n mobgd a Poll n mogsd-a, n pʋʋsd-a Wẽnd-na-taase." 
Acts20:38 La b sũyã sẽn sãam ne bũmb ning n yɩɩd yaa a Poll sẽn yeel tɩ b ka na n leb n yãnd-a wã. Rẽ poore, b yãaga yẽnda hal n ta koom koglgẽ wã." 
Acts21:1 La tõnd sẽn bas bãmba, d kẽe koom-koglg n loog n kẽng tɩrg n ta Kose. La vẽkembeoogo, tõnd taa Roode, n yaool n yi be n kẽng Patara." 
Acts21:2 Tõnd yãnda koom-koglg beenẽ sẽn dag n dabd Fenisi, tõnd yaool n kẽe yẽnda n kẽnge." 
Acts21:3 Tõnd sẽn kẽng n kolg Sɩpre, tõnd bas-a-la goabg n kẽng Siiri sẽnẽ n na yeg Tɩɩr n tɩ sig zĩig ning koom-koglgã sẽn tog n sik a zɩɩbã." 
Acts21:4 Tõnd yãnda tẽedb beenẽ la tõnd paa ne bãmb rasem a yopoe. La Sɩɩg-sõng wilga bãmb tɩ b yeel a Poll t'a ra kẽng Zeruzalɛm ye. 
Acts21:5 La rasem‑kãens loogr zugẽ, tõnd loogame. La b fãa ne b pagbã la b kambã yãaga tõndo, hal n yi tẽnga pʋgẽ. Tõnd yĩgimda koomã noor n pʋʋse." 
Acts21:6 Dẽ, tõnd sẽn pʋʋs taab Wẽnd-na-taas n sɛ, tõnd kẽe koom koglgẽ wã, la b lebgame n kuil b yiyã." 
Acts21:7 Tõnd sẽn kẽn ne koom-koglgã n sɛ, tõnd yii Tɩɩr n kẽng Tolemayiis n tɩ pʋʋs ba-biisã la d zĩnd ne bãmb beenẽ daar a yembre." 
Acts21:8 Vẽkembeoogo, tõnd loogame n ta Sezaare. Tõnd siga koe-moaand a Filip zakẽ. Yẽnda yaa neb a yopoe wã b sẽn da tũus Zeruzalɛmã nin-yende." 
Acts21:9 La yẽnda ra tara kom-pugli a naas sẽn nan ka mi rao ye, n yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdba." 
Acts21:10 Tõnd paa Sezaare rasem wʋsgo, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Agabuus yii Zʋʋde n wa tõnd nengẽ." 
Acts21:11 Yẽnda rɩka a Poll sẽbdgã n sẽb a nao ne a nus n yeel yaa: Ade, Sɩɩg-sõng yetame tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã na n sẽba ned ning sẽn so-a sẽbd‑kãngã wã a woto Zeruzalɛm, n ning-a bu-zẽmsã nusẽ." 
Acts21:12 Tõnd ne neb nins sẽn be Sezaare wã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, tõnd kosa a Poll t'a ra kẽng Zeruzalɛm ye." 
Acts21:13 La a Poll leokame: Yaa bõe n tar yãmb tɩ y yãbd n na n sãam mam sũuri? Bala, mam seglame n sɛ, la ka sẽbrã yĩng bal ye. M seglame me n na n ki Zeruzalɛm Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
Acts21:14 La yẽnda sẽn ka sak tõnd sẽn datã, d bas-a lame la d yeel tɩ Zu-soabã maan b raabo." 
Acts21:15 Rasem‑kãens sẽn looge, tõnd segla d teed n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
Acts21:16 Sezaare karen-biis kẽer me yãaga tõndo. B talla tõnd n tɩ ta rao a yembr sẽn yit Sɩpr t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Nazõ yiri. Yẽnda yaa karen-bi-kʋdre. Yaa yẽnda zakẽ la tõnd tog n tɩ zĩndi. 
Acts21:17 Tõnd sẽn ta Zeruzalɛm, ba-biisã reega tõnd ne sũ-noogo." 
Acts21:18 Vẽkembeoogo, a Poll kẽnga a Zak yir ne tõndo, la a Zeezi tẽedbã kãsem-dãmb fãa tigma beenẽ." 
Acts21:19 A Poll sẽn pʋʋs-b n sɛ, a sɩngame n togs bãmb bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn tall yẽnda n maan bu-zẽmsã sʋkã." 
Acts21:20 Bãmb sẽn kelg a Poll goamã, b pẽga Wẽnnaam la b yeel a Poll yaa: Ba biiga, yãmb yãame, Zʋɩf-rãmb tus wʋsg n lebg tẽedbã, la b fãa wɩngda ne a Moyiis tõogã." 
Acts21:21 Mik b ra kɩtame tɩ bãmb tẽed tɩ yãmb zãmsda Zʋɩf-rãmb nins fãa sẽn be bu-zẽmsã sʋkã n yet-b tɩ b wẽnemd n bas a Moyiis tõogã, la b ra kẽes b kamba bãongo, la b ra tũ minindã ye." 
Acts21:22 Dẽ wã, d na n maana wãna? Bala, neb wʋsg na n sɩd wʋmame tɩ y waame [la neb kʋʋng na n tigmame.]" 
Acts21:23 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y maan bũmb ning tõnd sẽn na n yeel-y wã. Tõnd tara raop a naas sẽn maan pʋleng ne Wẽnnaam." 
Acts21:24 Peeg-y-ba, n naag ne-b n sak miningã n yɩlg y mense, la y yao yaoodã, tɩ b põng b zutã. Dẽ, nebã fãa na n bãngame tɩ bũmb nins fãa b sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd yãmb wɛɛngẽ wã ka sɩd ye, la tɩ yãmb meng sakda a Moyiis tõogã." 
Acts21:25 Sã n yaa ne bu-zẽms nins sẽn lebg Kiris tẽedbã, tõnd gʋls-b lame n yeel-b tɩ b ra wãb rũms nemd b sẽn maan maoong n kõ wẽn-naandse, la b ra rɩ zɩɩm, la b ra wãb rũng sẽn sãrg nemdo, la b ra maan wɩɩbd ye." 
Acts21:26 Vẽkembeoogo, a Poll peega nin-bãmbã b naasã n naag ne-b n yɩlg-b mense, n yaool n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã n togs nebã bãmb yɩlgrã rayã sẽn na n baas wakat ninga, la wakat ning bãmb ned kam fãa sẽn na n wa ne a kũun tɩ b maan maoongã." 
Acts21:27 Rasem a yopoe wã sẽn kolg pidsgu, Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn yit Aazi soolmã sẽn yãnd a Poll wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ, b rãmba neb kʋʋngã gilli, n yõk a Polle," 
Acts21:28 n kelemd n yetẽ yaa: Israyɛll nebã, wa n sõng-y-do! Ad rao ning sẽn zãmsd nebã fãa zĩig fãa tɩ b kɩɩs Israyɛll buudã, la b kɩɩs a Moyiis tõogã la zĩ-kãngã, la a kɩtame meng tɩ Gɛrk-rãmb kẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã n kɩt tɩ zĩ-sõng-kãnga rẽgme." 
Acts21:29 Bala b rag n yãnda Efɛɛs rao a Torfim t'a tũud a Poll tẽngã pʋgẽ, la b tagsdame t'a Poll tall-a lame n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
Acts21:30 Tẽngã fãa rãmbame, la neb yii zĩig fãa n zoe n wa. B yõka a Poll n tɛ-a n yiis wẽnd doogẽ wã, la b pag kʋɩlemsã tao-tao." 
Acts21:31 La b sẽn dat n kʋ a Pollã, b wa n togsa sodaas tusr naabã tɩ Zeruzalɛm fãa rãmbame." 
Acts21:32 Wakat-kãng bala, yẽnda yãka sodaase, la sodaas koabg nanambse, n zoe n kẽng nebã nengẽ. Nebã sẽn yã sodaas tusr naabã ne sodaasã, b basa a Poll pãbre." 
Acts21:33 Dẽ, sodaas tusr naabã kolgame n yõka a Poll n kɩt tɩ b balg-a ne bãens a yiibu. La a yaool n sok a Poll sẽn yaa ned ninga, la a sẽn maan bũmb ninga." 
Acts21:34 La neb kʋʋngã sʋka, kẽer kelemdame n yet tɩ woto, tɩ kẽer yet bũmb a to. Dẽ, bʋrgã sẽn yaa wʋsg tɩ sodaas tusr naabã ka tõe n bãng sẽn yaa sɩdã, a yeelame tɩ b tall a Poll n kẽng gãosgẽ wã." 
Acts21:35 La a Poll sẽn ta rʋʋdgã, yɩɩ tɩlɛ tɩ sodaasã tebg yẽnda, neb kʋʋngã sẽn maood n dat n maan a Poll pãngã yĩnga." 
Acts21:36 Bala, b fãa ra pʋgdame n kelemdẽ n yetẽ tɩ b kʋ-a." 
Acts21:37 La wakat ning b sẽn tar a Poll n kẽed gãosgẽ wã, a Poll yeela sodaas tusr naabã yaa: M tara noor tɩ yeel-y bũmbu? La sodaas tusr naabã sok-a lame yaa: Fo mii Gɛrk goamã?" 
Acts21:38 Rẽnd fo ka Ezɩpt ned ning sẽn dag n wa-a ne rãmbg pĩndã, n peeg nin-kʋʋdb tus a naas tɩ b tũ-f n kẽ weoogã wɛ?" 
Acts21:39 A Poll leokame yaa: Mam yaa Zʋɩfe, m doga Tars sẽn be Silisi soolem, m yaa tẽn-kãseng neda. M bõosd-y lame tɩ y kõ maam noor tɩ m gom ne nebã." 
Acts21:40 La sodaas tusr naabã kõ-a-la noore, la a Poll yik n yalsa rʋʋdgã zug n zẽk a nug n zãas nebã, la bʋrgã sɛɛme, tɩ lebg sɩddd... Dẽ, yẽnda goma ne bãmb ne Ebre-rãmbã goamã." 
Acts22:1 A Poll yeela nebã yaa: M ba-biisi la m ba-rãmba, kelg-y bũmb ning mam sẽn tar moasã n na n togs yãmb n yiis m meng yellẽ wã." 
Acts22:2 Bãmb sẽn wʋm t'a Poll gomd ne bãmb ne Ebre-rãmbã goamã, b yalsa sɩddd... n yɩɩd pĩnda. Dẽ, a Poll yeel-b lame:" 
Acts22:3 Mam yaa Zʋɩf sẽn dog Tars sẽn be Silisi soolem. La b wuba maam Zeruzalɛm ka la mam zĩnda a Gamalyɛll taoor tɩ b zãms maam tɩ m bãng tõnd yaab-rãmbã tõod neere. Mam me rag n wɩngda ne Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã wala yãmb fãa sẽn yaa to-to rũndã wã. 
Acts22:4 Mam dag n namsa neb nins sẽn dag n tũud so-kãnga wã n kʋ-ba, la m yõg raop la pagb n sẽb n kẽes-b bi-bees roogo." 
Acts22:5 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem ne kãsem-dãmbã fãa sullã yaa mam kaset dãmba. Mam tol n deega sɛb bãmb nengẽ, ba-biis nins sẽn be Damaasã yĩnga, la m kẽnga be n na n tɩ sẽb tẽedbã sẽn be beenẽ wã n tall-b n wa Zeruzalɛm n kɩt tɩ b sɩbg-ba." 
Acts22:6 La mam sẽn waa n be sorẽ n kolgd Damaase, sẽn zems wĩnto-sʋk sasa, tao-tao bala, vẽenem kãseng n yi arzãn n yãg n gũbg maam." 
Acts22:7 Mam lʋɩɩ tẽnga, la m wʋma koɛɛg sẽn dag n yet maam yaa: «Solle! Solle! Yaa bõe tɩ fo namsd maam?»" 
Acts22:8 Mam sokame tɩ Zu-soaba, yãmb yaa ãnda soab tɩ mam namsd-yã? La koɛɛgã yeela maam yaa: «Mam yaa a Zeezi sẽn yit Nazarɛte, soab ning fo sẽn namsdã.»" 
Acts22:9 Neb nins sẽn dag n be ne maamã yãnda vẽenemã, la b ka wʋm ned ning sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã koɛɛgã ye." 
Acts22:10 Dẽ, mam sokame yaa: «Zu-soaba, bõe la mam tog n maane?» La Zu-soabã yeela maam yaa: «Yik n kẽng Damaas la beenẽ, b na n togsa foom bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn yet foom tɩ f maanã.»" 
Acts22:11 La vẽenemã sẽn yãg tɩ mam lebg zoangã yĩnga, mam tũud-n-taasã gãda mam nug n tɛ maam n ta Damaase." 
Acts22:12 Mik tɩ rao a yembr n dag n be beenẽ t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Hananiyaas n sakd tõodã, la Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa sẽn da be be wã ra kõta yẽnda kaset sõngo." 
Acts22:13 Yẽnda waa mam nengẽ n yeel maam yaa: «M ba-biig a Solle, paam-y nin yɛsa.» La wakat-kãng bala, mam leb n paama m nini, la m yãnd-a lame." 
Acts22:14 A Hananiyaas yeelame yaa: «Tõnd yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam pĩnd n yãka yãmb tɩ y bãng b tʋlsem, tɩ y yã tɩrlem soabã la y wʋm bãmb noor goamã." 
Acts22:15 Bala, yãmb na n yɩɩ bãmb kaset soaba n togs bũmb nins yãmb sẽn yã la y wʋmã, nebã fãa taoore." 
Acts22:16 La moasã, yaa bõe tɩ y kaoosdẽ? Yik-y n pʋʋs-y ne Zu-soabã yʋʋre, n deeg koom lisgu, n paam y yel-wẽnã pekre.»" 
Acts22:17 La mam lebg n waa Zeruzalɛm, la mam sẽn be wẽnd doogã pʋg n pʋʋsdẽ, mam paama vẽnegre." 
Acts22:18 La m yãnda Zu-soabã, la b yeela maam tɩ m nang pãng n yi Zeruzalɛm tao-tao, tɩ bala, tẽngã nebã ka na n deeg mam sẽn na n kɩs Zu-soabã kasetã ye." 
Acts22:19 La mam yeelame: «Zu-soaba, bãmb mens miime tɩ mam da kẽnda karen-dot pʋsẽ, n kɩtdẽ tɩ b kẽesd neb nins sẽn tẽed yãmbã bi-bees roogo, la m kɩtdẽ tɩ b pãbd-ba." 
Acts22:20 La b sẽn na n daag y kaset kɩt a Etɛn zɩɩmã wakate, mam meng ra bee be, mam da yetame tɩ b sẽn maandã yaa sõama, maam n dag n gũud neb nins sẽn kʋʋd a Etɛnnã futu.»" 
Acts22:21 Dẽ, Zu-soabã yeela maam yaa: «Kẽnge, bala, m na n tʋma foom zĩ-zãrgẽ, bu-zẽmsã nengẽ.»" 
Acts22:22 Nebã kelga a Poll hal tɩ ta wakat ning yẽnda sẽn gom gom-kãngã wã, la wakat-kãnga, b sɩngame n zẽk b koees n yetẽ: Menes-y nin-kãngã dũniyã zugu! Kʋ-y-yã-a, yẽnda ka tog n vɩɩmd ye." 
Acts22:23 Bãmb dag n kelemdame, n lobd b fut la b lobd tom yĩngri." 
Acts22:24 Sodaas tusr naabã yeelame tɩ b kẽes a Poll gãosgẽ wã n pãb-a ne kalwaas n sok-a n bãng sẽn yaa bũmb ninga yĩng n kɩt tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã kelemd a woto n dõt yẽnda wã. 
Acts22:25 La b sẽn sẽb a Poll ne wĩy n na n pãbe, yẽnda soka sodaas koabg naab ning sẽn da be be wã tɩ rẽ yĩnga, tõogã kõta bãmb noor tɩ b pãb Rom ned ne kalwaas t'a bʋʋd meng nan ka kao?" 
Acts22:26 Gom-kãensã yĩnga, sodaas koabg naaba kẽng n tɩ togsa sodaas tusr naabã bõn-kãng n yeel yaa: Yãmb na n maana a wãna? Rao-kãngã, yaa Rom neda." 
Acts22:27 Dẽ, sodaas tusr naabã wa n soka a Poll yaa: Togs maam, fo yaa Rom neda? T'a leok tɩ n-yẽe." 
Acts22:28 Dẽ, sodaas tusr naabã leb n yeelame yaa: Ad mam yaoo ligd wʋsgo, n paam n lebg Rom neda. La a Poll yeelame yaa: La mam yẽ roga ne-a." 
Acts22:29 Tao-tao bala, neb nins sẽn dag n tog n pãb a Poll la b sok-a wã loogame n bas-a. La sodaas tusr naabã sẽn bãng t'a Poll yaa Rom nedã, la yẽnda sẽn da kɩt tɩ b sẽb-a wã yĩnga, rabeem yõk-a lame." 
Acts22:30 La vẽkembeoogo, sodaas tusr naabã sẽn dat n bãng bũmb ninga Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn dõt a Pollã tiki-takɩ, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b lodg a Poll sẽbrã n bas-a. La a yeel maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã fãa tɩ b tigim taaba. Dẽ, a kɩtame tɩ b talla a Poll n wa n yalsg-a bãmb sʋka." 
Acts23:1 A Poll gesa kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã n yeel yaa: M saam-biisi, mam kẽna Wẽnnaam taoor ne sũur kaset sẽn yaa sõama hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Acts23:2 La maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Hananiyaas yeelame tɩ neb nins sẽn pẽ a Pollã wẽ a noorã. 
Acts23:3 Dẽ, a Poll yeela yẽnda yaa: Pʋ-libsim soaba, Wẽnnaam na n wẽe yãmba. Yãmb zĩndame n na n kao mam bʋʋd wa sẽn zems ne tõogo, la y kɩɩs tõogã n yet tɩ b wẽ maam." 
Acts23:4 Neb nins sẽn da be be wã yeela a Poll tɩ Wẽnnaam maan-kʋʋd kãsem la yẽnda tʋʋsda. 
Acts23:5 La a Poll yeelame yaa: M saam-biisi, mam da ka mi tɩ yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã yeelame tɩ: «Ra gom f tẽngã neb naab wẽng ye.»" 
Acts23:6 La a Poll sẽn mi tɩ nebã sẽn tigmã kẽer yaa Saduusẽ-dãmba, tɩ kẽer yaa Fariizẽ-dãmbã, a zẽka a koɛɛg kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã sʋk n yeele: «M saam-biisi, mam yaa Fariizẽ, la m yaa Fariizẽ biiga. Yaa mam sẽn tẽed tɩ kũum vʋʋgr beemẽ wã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b bʋʋd mam bʋʋdo." 
Acts23:7 La a Poll sẽn yeel gom-kãnga, Fariizẽ-dãmbã ne Saduusẽ-dãmbã sɩngame n wẽed nokoɛɛm ne taaba, la nebã welga taaba." 
Acts23:8 Sɩd me, Saduusẽ-dãmbã yetame tɩ kũum vʋʋgre, wall malɛɛka, wall Sɩɩg ka be ye. Tɩ Fariizẽ-dãmbã yaool n yetẽ tɩ bõn-kãens fãa beeme." 
Acts23:9 La bʋr-kãseng yikame, la tõog karen-saam-dãmb kẽer sẽn be Fariizẽ-dãmbã sullẽ wã yikame n kɩɩs ne pãng n yeel tɩ bãmb ka yã bõn-wẽng ne rao-kãngã ye, la tɩ tõeeme tɩ yaa sɩɩg wall malɛɛk n gom ne-a." 
Acts23:10 La nokoeemdã sẽn lebgd wʋsgã, tɩ sodaas tusr naabã zoet rabeem tɩ nebã na n wa tɛ a Poll n tõsã, a yeela sodaasã tɩ b sig nebã sʋk n tall a Poll n wa gãosgã pʋga." 
Acts23:11 La yʋng ning sẽn pʋgdã, Zu-soabã vẽnega b meng ne a Poll n yeel-a yaa: ‹keng f pɛlga, bala, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ f kɩs mam kaset Rom tẽng me wala fo sẽn kɩs mam kaset Zeruzalɛmã.› »" 
Acts23:12 La beoogã sẽn vẽege, Zʋɩf-rãmbã yẽsa ne taab n yãk yam n wẽen tɩ b ka na n dɩ wall b yũ, sã n ka tɩ b kʋ a Polle." 
Acts23:13 Neb nins sẽn yẽs ne taab n wẽena sõor yɩɩda pis-naase. 
Acts23:14 Bãmb kẽng n tɩ yãnda maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne kãsem-dãmbã n yeel-b yaa: Tõnd wẽename tɩ d ka na n lemb dɩɩbo, sã n ka tɩ d paam n kʋʋ a Polle." 
Acts23:15 Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ yãmb ne kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã fãa kos sodaas tusr naabã tɩ b wa ne a Poll y nengẽ, wa y rat n baoo n bãnga yẽnda yellã n paase. La rẽ tɩ tõnd mensã seglame n na n kʋ-a t'a nan ka ta ka ye." 
Acts23:16 La a Poll tão biig wʋmame tɩ b set n dat n kʋʋ a Polle, la a kẽnga gãosgẽ wã n tɩ kẽ be n togs a Polle." 
Acts23:17 Dẽ, a Poll boola sodaas koabg naab a yembr n yeel-a t'a tall bi-bɩ-kãng n kẽng sodaas tusr naabã nengẽ, tɩ bala, a tara koɛɛg n dat n togs-a." 
Acts23:18 Sodaas koabg naabã peega biigã n kẽng sodaas tusr naabã nengẽ n yeel yaa: Bi-bɛɛg a Poll boola maam n kos-m tɩ m tall bi-bɩ-kãngã n wa y nengẽ t'a tara koɛɛg n dat n togs-yã. 
Acts23:19 La sodaas tusr naabã gãda bi-bɩ-kãng nug n yi kɛɛng n sok-a tɩ yaa bõe la a tar n dat n togs yẽnda. 
Acts23:20 Bi-bɩɩgã leokame yaa: Zʋɩf-rãmbã lagma taab n dat n kos yãmb tɩ y tall a Poll n wa kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoor wala b rat n leb n sok n bãnga yẽnda yellã n paase. 
Acts23:21 Ra kelg-y-b ye. Bala, bãmb sʋka neb sẽn yɩɩd pis-naas n segend bẽdg a Poll yĩnga, la b yãka yam n wẽen tɩ b ka na n dɩ wala b yũ sã n ka tɩ b kʋ a Polle. Bãmb seglame n sɛ moasã n gũud yãmb sẽn na n yet tɩ bũmb ninga." 
Acts23:22 Sodaas tusr naabã keooga bi-bɩɩgã n yeel-a: Ra togs ned bũmb ning fo sẽn togs maamã ye. 
Acts23:23 Dẽ poore, sodaas tusr naabã boola sodaas kobs nanambs a yiib n yeel yaa: Segl-y sodaas kobs-yi la wed-rʋʋdb pis-yopoe, ne kãn-tãoodb kobs-yi tɩ yʋngã wakat a wɛ sasa, y na n kẽnga hal Sezaare." 
Acts23:24 La y segl wiid me sẽn na n zombg a Poll n tall-a n kẽng Gʋvɛrneer a Feligs nengẽ tɩ bũmb ra maan-a ye. 
Acts23:25 La yẽnda gʋlsa sebr n yeel a woto: 
Acts23:26 Maam a Kolood Liziyaas n pʋʋsd Gʋvɛrneer sõng a Feligsi. 
Acts23:27 Zʋɩf-rãmbã ra yõka rao-kãngã n da na n kʋ-a, la mam sẽn wʋm tɩ yẽnda yaa Rom nedã, mam waa ne sodaas n fãag-a." 
Acts23:28 La mam sẽn dat n bãng sẽn yaa bũmb ninga yĩng la Zʋɩf-rãmbã rõt yẽnda wã, m tall-a lame n kẽng b kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoore." 
Acts23:29 La mam mikame tɩ b sẽn dõt yẽnda wã yaa nokoɛɛm sẽn kẽed ne bãmb mens tõoga yell wɛɛngẽ, la rao-kãngã ka maan bũmb sẽn zems tɩ b kʋ-a wall b kẽes-a bi-bees roog ye." 
Acts23:30 Dẽ, mam sẽn wʋm tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã setame n dat n kʋ-a wã, mam tʋm-a-la yãmb nengẽ tao-tao la m yeela a rõatbã tɩ b wa yãmb taoor n togs b koɛɛgã. Wẽnd na sõnge." 
Acts23:31 La sodaasã peega a Poll ne yʋngã n tall-a hal n ta Ãntipatiris wa b sẽn da yeel bãmbã. 
Acts23:32 La vẽkembeoogo, sodaas nins sẽn kẽn ne naoã lebg n leba gãosgẽ wã n bas wed-rʋʋdbã tɩ b tall a Poll n looge." 
Acts23:33 Bãmb sẽn ta Sezaare, b kɩsa Gʋvɛrneerã sebrã la b ning a Poll yẽnda nugẽ." 
Acts23:34 Gʋvɛrneerã sẽn karem sebrã n sɛ, a soka a Poll a sẽn yit soolem ninga. La yẽnda sẽn wʋm t'a Poll yita Silisi soolem," 
Acts23:35 A yeelame t'a rõatbã sã n wa n wa, a na kelg-a. La a yeelame tɩ b kẽes a Poll rĩm a Erood na-zakẽ wã n gũ-a." 
Acts24:1 La rasem a nu sẽn looge, maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Hananiyaas waa Sezaare ne kãsem-dãmb kẽere, la gom-minim soab a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Tertulli. Bãmb togsa b sẽn bʋʋd ne a Pollã yell Gʋvɛrneer a Feligs taoore." 
Acts24:2 B boola a Poll t'a wa, la a Tertull sɩngame n dõd yẽnda n yeele: Yaa yãmb maasem yĩng tɩ tõnd paamd laafɩ hakɩɩka, la y maana yam tʋʋm n maneg soolem kãngã." 
Acts24:3 Dẽ wã, Feligs sõngo, tõnd deegda bãmb bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, la zĩiga fãa n pʋʋsd d zaamẽ beoogo." 
Acts24:4 La mam ka rat n dɩk yãmb weerã n kaoos ye. Yaa woto yĩng tɩ m kot-y tɩ y maan sũ-mar n kelg tõnd wakat bilfu. 
Acts24:5 Tõnd mikame tɩ rao-kãngã yaa wẽnem soab n wat ne rãmbg Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã sʋka, la a yaa Nazarɛt dãmba kaoreng taoor soaba." 
Acts24:6 La a makame meng n dat n paoog wẽnd doogã. Dẽ, tõnd yõk-a lame. [Tõnd dag n dat n kao a bʋʋd wa sẽn zems tõnd tõogã." 
Acts24:7 La sodaas tusr naab a Liziyaas waa n deeg-a-la ne pãn-kãseng tõnd nusẽ. 
Acts24:8 La a yeela a Poll rõatbã tɩ b wa yãmb nengẽ.] Yãmb meng tõe n sok-a lame n bãng bũmb nins fãa yĩng sẽn kɩt tɩ d bʋʋd ne-a wã. 
Acts24:9 Zʋɩf-rãmbã paasa gomda pãng n yet tɩ yaa sɩda. 
Acts24:10 Dẽ, Gʋvɛrneerã zẽka a nug n yeel a Poll t'a gome. Dẽ, a Poll dɩka koɛɛg n yeel yaa: Mam miime tɩ yãmb yaa soolem-kãngã bʋ-kaood hal yʋʋm wʋsgo. Dẽ, yaa ne kɩs-sɩd la mam na n gom yãmb taoor n yiis m meng yellẽ wã." 
Acts24:11 Yãmb meng tõe n baoome n bãnge. Sẽn ka yɩɩd rasem piig la a yiibu, mam kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n na n tɩ pʋʋs Wẽnnaam." 
Acts24:12 B ka yã maam tɩ m wẽed nokoeemd ne ned ba a yembr wẽnd doogã pʋga, wala m rãmbd neb kʋʋng karen-dot pʋse, bɩ tẽnga pʋg zĩig ba a yembr ye." 
Acts24:13 La bãmb ka tõe n wilg yãmb tɩ bũmb ning b sẽn dõt maam moasã wã yaa sɩd ye. 
Acts24:14 Baoosgo, mam togsda bõn-kãngã y taoore. Mam pʋʋsda m yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam n tũud so-paalg ningã bãmb sẽn boond tɩ yaa kaoreng a to wã. La mam tẽeda bũmb nins fãa sẽn gʋls tõogã sɛb pʋse, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sɛbã pʋsã." 
Acts24:15 Mam tara tẽeb pidsg gũudum‑kãnga, ne Wẽnnaam wa mam dõatbã mens sẽn tarã, n tẽed tɩ nin-sõamyã la nin-wẽns na n vʋʋgame n bas kũum." 
Acts24:16 Yaa woto yĩnga, tɩ mam me maood n dat n paam sũur kaset sẽn yaa sõama Wẽnnaam la ninsaalb taoor daar fãa." 
Acts24:17 Mam yii Zeruzalɛm n kaoos yʋʋm wʋsgo, la m lebg n waa be n na n kõ m nebã sõngre, la m maan maoong n kõ Wẽnnaam." 
Acts24:18 La b yaool n yãnda maam wẽnd doogẽ wã tɩ m yɩlgd m meng la neb me ka tigme, la rãmbg ka zĩnd me ye." 
Acts24:19 La Zʋɩf-rãmb kẽer sẽn yi Aazi soolem dag n bee be la b sã n da tarẽ yell ne maam yaa bãmb n dag tog n yals yãmb taoor n bʋ ne maam. 
Acts24:20 Walla, nin-bãmbã sẽn be ka wã togse, b sã n yãnda mam sẽn maan wẽnga, mam sẽn yals kaoreng yɛl-bʋ-bʋʋdbã taoorã." 
Acts24:21 Sã n ka bũmb a yembrã mam sẽn maanã, m sẽn yik n yals b sʋk n zẽk m koɛɛg n yeel tɩ: «Yaa mam sẽn tẽed tɩ kũum vʋʋgr beeme wã yĩng n kɩt tɩ yãmb bʋʋd ne maam dũndã.»" 
Acts24:22 A Feligs sẽn mi Kiris kaorengã yell neerã, a visga bʋʋdã daar n yeel nebã tɩ b kuil tɩ sodaas tusr naab a Liziyaas sã n wa n wa, a na yaool n ges b yellã." 
Acts24:23 La yẽnda yeela sodaas koabg naabã t'a gũ a Polle, la a kõ-a lohorem bilfu, la a ra gɩdg a Poll zo-rãmbã sẽn dat n sõng-a wã ye." 
Acts24:24 Rasem bilf sẽn paase, a Feligs ne a pag a Dursill sẽn yaa Zʋɩf poakã waame. La a tʋmame tɩ b bool a Poll t'a wa, la yẽnda kelga a Poll sẽn togs tẽeb ne a Zeezi Kirisã sẽn yaa bũmb ninga." 
Acts24:25 La a Poll sẽn gom tɩrlmã vɩɩm la tõog-m-menga la bʋ-kaoor sẽn watã yellã, rabeem yõka a Feligs t'a yeel a Poll t'a loog moasã tɩ yẽnda sã n wa paam weere, a na leb n bool-a." 
Acts24:26 A ra tẽedame me t'a Poll na n kõ-a-la ligdi, yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt t'a bool a Poll naoor wʋsg n sõs ne-a." 
Acts24:27 La yʋʋm a yiib sẽn looge, a Porkiuus Festuus reega a Feligs zĩig n yaa Gʋvɛrneere. La a Feligs sẽn dat n maan sẽn noom Zʋɩf-rãmbã, a ka kõ a Poll lohorem ye." 
Acts25:1 A Festuus sẽn wa soolmã pʋg tɩ rab-tãtẽ, a yii Sezaare n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
Acts25:2 Maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã kãsem-dãmb dõta a Poll a Festuus taoore. 
Acts25:3 B kosa a Festuus n pẽdg-a wʋsg n dat t'a maan bãmb neer n kɩt tɩ b tall a Poll n wa Zeruzalɛm, la b rag n segla bẽdg n dat n solg n kʋ a Poll sorã zugu." 
Acts25:4 A Festuus leokame t'a bee bi-bees roog Sezaare, la sã n yɩ bilfu, yẽnda meng na n lebg n lebame." 
Acts25:5 La a yeel-b lame: Bɩ yãmb kãsem-dãmb kẽer tũ maam tɩ d kẽng Sezaare, tɩ rao-kãng sã n maana sẽn yaa wẽng bɩ bãmb bʋ ne-a beenẽ." 
Acts25:6 A Festuus ka kaoos b sʋk n yɩɩg rasem a nii bɩ piig ye. Dẽ a lebg n leba Sezaare. La vẽkembeoogo, a Festuus kẽ n zĩnda bʋʋda zĩigẽ n yeel tɩ b tall a Poll n wa." 
Acts25:7 La a Poll sẽn ta, Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn yi Zeruzalɛmã gũbga yẽnda n dõt-a ne bõn-wẽns wʋsgo, la b ka tõe n wilg tɩ b sẽn dõt a Poll ne bũmb ninsã yaa sɩd ye." 
Acts25:8 La a Poll gomame n na n fãag a meng n yeel yaa: Mam ka maan bũmb sẽn yaa wẽng n kɩɩs Zʋɩf-rãmbã tõogo, wala sẽn kɩɩsd wẽnd doogã bɩ rĩm a Sezaar ye." 
Acts25:9 Dẽ, a Festuus sẽn dat n maan sẽn noom Zʋɩf-rãmbã, yẽ soka a Poll yaa: Fo rat n kẽnga Zeruzalɛm tɩ b tɩ bʋ f bʋʋd mam taoor yel-kãngã poorẽ bɩ?" 
Acts25:10 A Poll leokame yaa: Mam yasa rĩm a Sezaar bʋʋd geer taoore, la yaa ka la b tog kao mam bʋʋdo. Yãmb meng mii neere, tɩ mam ka maan bũmb n beeg Zʋɩf-rãmbã ye." 
Acts25:11 Mam sã n da tarẽ kongre, la m sã n da maane tʋʋm sẽn zems ne kũum, mam kõn zãgs tɩ m kõ n ki ye. La b sẽn dõt maam ne bũmb ningã sã n yaa zĩrẽ, ned ka tõe n yõk maam n kõ-b ye. Mam data rĩm a Sezaar nengẽ." 
Acts25:12 La a Festuus sẽn yẽs ne a sõangdbã n sa, a leoka a Poll yaa: Fo sẽn dat rĩm a Sezaar nengẽ wã, f na n kẽnga rĩm a Sezaar nengẽ." 
Acts25:13 La rasem bilf sẽn looge, rĩm a Agirpa ne a Bereniis waa Sezaare n na n pʋʋs a Festuusi." 
Acts25:14 La b sẽn kaoos be rasem wʋsgo, a Festuus togsa rĩmã a Poll yellã n yeel yaa: A Feligs basa rao a yembr sẽn yaa bi-bɛɛg ka." 
Acts25:15 Mam sẽn wa n be Zeruzalɛm wakatã, maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã kãsem-dãmb bʋʋ ne yẽnda n kos maam tɩ m kao a bʋʋd tɩ zems kũum." 
Acts25:16 Mam leoka bãmb tɩ Rom-dãmb ka minim tɩ rɩk bi-bɛɛg n kɩs tɩ b kʋ, n ka reng n kõ-a noor t'a yals a rõatbã taoor n paam weer n gom n fãag a meng ne bũmb ning b sẽn dõd-a wã ye." 
Acts25:17 Dẽ, b tũu maam n wa ka. La vẽkembeoogo mam zĩnda bʋʋdã zĩigẽ n yeel tɩ b tall rao-kãng n wa." 
Acts25:18 La a rõatbã sẽn wa wã, b ka tol n wilg tʋʋm-wẽng ba a yembr rao-kãngã sẽn maane, wa mam sẽn da tagsdã ye." 
Acts25:19 Bãmb sẽn tar yell ne yẽ, yaa sẽn kẽed b mens wẽn-tũudum wɛɛngẽ, la ne rao a yembr sẽn boond t'a Zeezi n ki t'a Poll yetẽ tɩ rao-kãng vɩɩme." 
Acts25:20 Mam sẽn da ka mi m sẽn na n maan to-to ne yel-kãngã wã, m sok-a-la a sã n datẽ lame n kẽng Zeruzalɛm tɩ b tɩ bʋ a bʋʋd be yel-kãngã wɛɛngẽ." 
Acts25:21 La a Poll kosame n yeel tɩ yẽnda ratame tɩ b bas tɩ rĩm-kãsengã ges yẽnda yellã yelle. Dẽ, mam kosa noor n na n tall-a hal tɩ m wa n tʋm-a rĩm a Sezaar nengẽ." 
Acts25:22 A Agirpa yeela a Festuus yaa: Mam me rat n kelga rao-kãngã koɛɛga. A Festuus leokame tɩ beoogo, a na n bool-a lame t'a wa t'a kelg-a." 
Acts25:23 Dẽ, vẽkembeoogo, a Agirpa ne a Bereniis waa ne waoogr wʋsg n kẽ bʋʋda kaoob zĩigẽ ne sodaas tusr nanambsã, la tẽngã nin-kãsemse. La a Festuus yeelame tɩ b tall a Poll n wa." 
Acts25:24 Dẽ, a Festuus yeelame: Rĩm a Agirpa, la yãmb fãa sẽn be ka ne tõndã, yãmb nee rao-kãngã, ned ningã poorẽ Zʋɩf-rãmbã neb kʋʋngã fãa sẽn wa mam nengẽ sã n yaa Zeruzalɛm, wall kaanẽ n kelem n yeel tɩ rao-kãngã ka tog n vɩɩmdã." 
Acts25:25 La ne maam, mam mikame t'a ka maan tʋʋm wẽng sẽn zems ne kũum ye. La yẽnda meng sẽn yet t'a ratame tɩ rĩm‑kãsengã kaoo a bʋʋdã, mam yãka yam n na n tʋm-a rĩm‑kãsengã nengẽ." 
Acts25:26 Mam ka tar koɛɛg vẽeneg n na n gʋls n togs rĩm‑kãsengã rao‑kãngã yellã wɛɛngẽ ye. Yaa rẽndã yĩng la m bool-a t'a wa yãmb taoore, sẽn yɩɩd fãa, a bee yãmb taoore rĩm a Agirpa, tɩ y sã n sogs-a n sɛ, bɩ m yaool n paam koɛɛg n gʋlse." 
Acts25:27 Bala, mam tagsdame tɩ yaa yalemdo tɩ tʋm bi-bɛɛg n ka tol n wilg vẽeneg a sẽn beeg ne bũmb ningã." 
Acts26:1 A Agirpa yeela a Poll tɩ b kõt-a-la noor t'a gom n yiis a meng yellẽ wã. Dẽ, a Poll tẽega a nug n yeel yaa:" 
Acts26:2 Rĩm a Agirpa, mam sũur yaa noogo, m sẽn paam dũndã n na n gom yãmb taoor n togs bũmb nins fãa Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn dõt maamã wɛɛngẽ." 
Acts26:3 Bala, yãmb mii Zʋɩf-rãmbã minindã ne b nokoɛɛmã zãnga. Rẽ wã, mam kot-y lame tɩ y kelg maam ne sũ-mare." 
Acts26:4 Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa mii mam vɩɩmã sẽn yɩ bũmb ninga, hal mam sẽn yaa bi-bilf wakate, b mii mam sẽn zĩnd m nebã sʋka, la Zeruzalɛm hal sɩngrẽ wã sẽn yɩ to-to." 
Acts26:5 Bãmb mii maam hal daar zãra, b sã n dat n togs sɩda. Mam yaa Fariizẽ neb nins sẽn sakd tõnd wẽn-tũudmã n yɩɩd neb a taabã ned a yembre." 
Acts26:6 La moasã, b bʋʋda ne maam, mam sẽn tẽed kãabg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n kãab tõnd yaab-rãmbã yĩnga." 
Acts26:7 La tõnd buud piig la a yiibã me pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam wĩntoog la yʋng n ka basdẽ, n gũud kãab-kãng pidsgu. Rĩm a Agirpa, yaa tẽeb pidsg gũudum‑kãng yĩng n kɩt tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã rõd maam." 
Acts26:8 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb Zʋɩf-rãmbã tagsdẽ tɩ yaa toog ne Wẽnnaam tɩ b vʋʋg kũum? 
Acts26:9 Mam meng da tagsame tɩ m tog n zaba ne m pãng tɛka n kɩɩs Nazarɛt dao a Zeezi yʋʋrã. 
Acts26:10 La mam maana bõn-kãng Zeruzalɛm. La mam sẽn paam noor maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb nengẽ, mam menga kẽesa Wẽnnaam nin-tũusds wʋsg bi-bees roogo. La b sã n da rat n kʋ-ba, mam ningda m nugu." 
Acts26:11 Wakat kẽere, mam kɩtdame tɩ b sɩbg-b karen-dot pʋse, n da rat n modg-b tɩ b kɩɩs b tẽebã. Mam sũurã puuga wʋsg ne bãmb hal tɩ m kẽng tẽn-zẽms pʋs n tɩ nams-ba." 
Acts26:12 Yaa woto yĩnga, tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb kõ maam noor n tʋm maam tɩ m kẽng Damaase." 
Acts26:13 Rĩm a Agirpa, mam sẽn be sorẽ, wĩnto-sʋk sasa, mam yãnda vẽenem sẽn yi arzãn n yãgd n yɩɩd wĩntoog vẽenem, n wa n bui maam ne m tũud-n-taasã." 
Acts26:14 Tõnd fãa lʋɩɩ tẽnga, la mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn da yet maam ne Ebre-rãmbã goam yaa: «Solle, Solle, yaa bõe tɩ fo namsd maam? Yaa toog ne foom, fo sẽn zãgsda yĩnga.»" 
Acts26:15 Mam sokame tɩ Zu-soabã yãmb yaa ãnda? La Zu-soabã leokame yaa: «Mam yaa a Zeezi, fo sẽn namsd a soabã." 
Acts26:16 Yik n yals yĩngri. Mam vẽnega m meng ne foom n na n kɩt tɩ f yɩ mam tʋmtʋmda, la m kaset soab n togs neb a taabã bũmb nins fo sẽn yã rũndã wã, la bũmb nins mam sẽn na n wilg foomã." 
Acts26:17 Mam yãka foom Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne bu-zẽmsã sʋka, la m tʋmda foom b nengẽ," 
Acts26:18 tɩ f puk b nina tɩ b wẽnemd n bas likã n wa vẽenemẽ wã la b bas Sʋtãanã n sak Wẽnnaam n paam b yel-wẽnã sugri, la pʋɩɩr ne neb nins sẽn tẽ maam n lebg Wẽnnaam nebã.»" 
Acts26:19 Woto wã yĩnga, Rĩm a Agirpa, mam ka kɩɩs vẽnegr ning sẽn yi arzãna ye." 
Acts26:20 La m deng n moona koɛɛgã Damaas nebã nanda, la m yaool n moon-a Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋde soolmã fãa pʋga, la bu-zẽmsã n yeel-b tɩ b tek yam n kos sugr n sak Wẽnnaam n maan tʋʋm sẽn wilgd tɩ b sɩd teka yam." 
Acts26:21 Yaa bõn-kãng yĩng la Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn yõk maam wẽnd doogã pʋg n na n kɩt tɩ b kʋ wã. 
Acts26:22 La Wẽnnaam gũudmã yĩnga, mam ket n vɩɩme hal tɩ ta rũndã, n kɩt kaset nin-talse la nanambs taoore. La mam ka togsd bũmb a to tɩ sã n ka Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã ne a Moyiis sẽn dag n togsã ye." 
Acts26:23 B ra togsame tɩ Kiris na n namsame la b na n yɩɩ pipi soab sẽn vʋʋg n bas kũum, la b na n waa ne fãagr vẽenem tõnd buudã ne bu-zẽmsã yĩnga." 
Acts26:24 La a Poll sẽn gom a woto n na n fãag a mengã, a Festuus zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel-a yaa: Polle! Fo yaa gãeenga. Fo bãngrã sẽn yaa wʋsgã kɩtame tɩ f lebg gãeenga." 
Acts26:25 A Poll yeelame: Festuus sõngo, mam ka gãeeng ye. Mam sẽn gomdã yaa sɩda la mi-m-neng goamã." 
Acts26:26 Rĩm a Agirpa mii bõn-kãense, dẽ mam tõe n goma ne pɛl-kɛgeng bãmb taoore, bala mam mii vẽeneg tɩ bãmb mii b fãa, tɩ bõe bõn-kãens ka solg n maan ye." 
Acts26:27 Rĩm a Agirpa, yãmb tẽeda Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yeel bũmb ninsã? Mam miime tɩ yãmb tẽeda bõn-kãense." 
Acts26:28 A Agirpa yeela a Poll yaa: Fo tagsdame tɩ wakat bilf pʋgẽ, f tõe n kɩtame tɩ mam yɩɩ a Zeezi neda?" 
Acts26:29 A Poll leokame yaa: Yaa wakat bilf pʋgẽ woo, wall yaa wakat wʋsg pʋgẽ me, mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam tɩ kõn yɩ yãmb y yembr bal ye. La yaa tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn kelgd mam koɛɛgã dũndã wã me, yãmb na lebg wa maam, bãn-kãensã sẽn yãk b toogo." 
Acts26:30 Dẽ, rĩmã ne Gʋvɛrneerã, la a Bereniis ne neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ ne bãmbã yikame." 
Acts26:31 B sergame n yẽs ne taab n yeel tɩ rao-kãngã ka maan bũmb sẽn zems ne kũum, wall bi-bees roog kõom ye." 
Acts26:32 La a Agirpa yeela a Festuus tɩ sã n ka a Poll sẽn yeel t'a rata rĩm a Sezaar nengẽ wã, a rag n tõe n paamẽ‑la lohorem." 
Acts27:1 La b sẽn yãk yam tɩ tõnd na n kẽ koom-koglg n kẽng Itali, b rɩka a Poll ne bi-bees a taaba, n kɩs soda-sull ning b sẽn boond tɩ rĩmã sodaasã, sodaas koabg naab a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Zulyuusi." 
Acts27:2 Tõnd kẽe koom-koglg sẽn yi Adarmit n dabd Aazi soolem tẽmsã sẽn be koomã noor sẽnẽ n looge. La Masedoan dao a ye sẽn yi Tesalonik t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Aristark n da be ne tõndo. 
Acts27:3 La vẽkembeoogo, tõnd taa Sɩdõ. La a Zulyuus maana a Poll neer n kõ-a lohorem t'a kẽng n tɩ ges a Zo-rãmb n paam tɩ b sõng-a." 
Acts27:4 Tõnd sẽn yi be, d basa Sɩpr goabga, sebgã sẽn da segd tõndã yĩnga." 
Acts27:5 Tõnd sẽn pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã sẽn pẽ Siliisi ne Paamfili wã, tõnd taa Miira sẽn be Liisi soolmẽ wã." 
Acts27:6 La beenẽ, sodaas koabg naabã yãnda koom-koglg sẽn yi Alegsãndri n dabd Itali, la yẽnda kɩtame tɩ tõnd kẽ koom-kogl-kãngã." 
Acts27:7 Tõnd kẽna bãanem-bãanem n kaoos rasem wʋsgo, la d namsa wʋsg n kolg Niid tẽnga noore. La sebgã sẽn ka sak tɩ tõnd ta be wã, tõnd yega Kɛrɛt tẽngã n kẽng Salmone sẽnẽ." 
Acts27:8 Tõnd namsa wʋsg ne koom-koglgã n yeg Kɛrɛt kɩrenga, n ta zĩig a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Koom-koglg yalsg zĩ-neerã sẽn pẽ Laaze tẽnga." 
Acts27:9 Wakat wʋsg loogame la koom-koglgã kẽnd wa n lebga yel-pakre. Bala, no-loeerã wakat zoe n loogame." 
Acts27:10 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt t'a Poll keoog-b n yeel yaa: Raopa, mam neeme tɩ so-toak-kãngã na n yɩɩ wẽnga, koom-koglgã ne a zɩɩbã na n yɩɩ bõne, la sẽn yɩɩda, sã n ka gũusi tõnd mensã na n kii a pʋgẽ." 
Acts27:11 La sodaas koabg naabã ra kɩsa sɩd ne ned ning sẽn get koom-koglgã kẽnd yellã ne koom-koglgã taoor soab n yɩɩd a Poll goamã. 
Acts27:12 La koom-koglgã yalsg zĩig ra ka sõama tɩ pa be waood wẽnd ye, yaa woto yĩng tɩ neb wʋsg yãk yam n yeel tɩ b yi be n mao tɩ sã n tõe bɩ b ta Fenigs sẽn yaa koom-koglg yalsg zĩig sẽn be Kɛrɛt n pakd n teesd wĩndgã goabg la a rɩtgã, n zĩnd be waoodã wẽnde." 
Acts27:13 Sob-fʋl-fʋl yii wĩndgã goabg n sɩng n fʋʋsdẽ, la bãmb tagsame tɩ b ra tõe n maana b sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã. B yika ne koom-koglgã n kẽng n yeg Kɛrɛt n tũ a kɩrengã." 
Acts27:14 La sẽn yɩ bilfu, sob-kãseng b sẽn boond tɩ Erakilõ yika koomã sẽn gũbg tẽng ninga wã tãmsã sẽnẽ." 
Acts27:15 La a sẽn wẽ koglgã t'a ka tõe n kẽng taoorã, tõnd basame tɩ sebgã peeg koglgã." 
Acts27:16 Tõnd kolga tẽn-bil a yembr sẽn be koomã sʋk tɩ b boond tɩ Kooda. Dẽ, tõnd namsa wʋsg n tõog n yalsg koom-kogl-bilã." 
Acts27:17 La b sẽn zẽk kogl-bilã n kẽes koom-koglgã pʋg n sɛ, b yaool n sẽba koom-koglgã ne wĩyã. La b sẽn zoet tɩ koom-koglgã na n wa tɩ sud bĩisrã sẽn be Libi yegendã, b sika koom-koglgã pɛɛla n bas tɩ sebgã peeg koglgã." 
Acts27:18 La sebgã namsa tõnd wʋsgo, dẽ vẽkembeoogo, b loba koglgã zɩɩb koomã pʋgẽ." 
Acts27:19 La rasem a tãabẽ daarã, bãmb mens sɩngame n wʋk koglgã teed kẽer n lob koomẽ wã." 
Acts27:20 La kaoosa rasem wʋsg tɩ wĩndgã, wala ãdsã ka puk ye, la sebgã ra ketẽ n tara pãnga hal tɩ tõnd wa n ka leb n tẽed tɩ d na n põsame ye." 
Acts27:21 Neb nins sẽn da be koom-koglgã pʋgã maana rasem wʋsg n ka rɩ bũmb ye. Dẽ, a Poll yikame n yals b sʋk n yeel yaa: M saam-biisi, yãmb sã n dag n sakẽ mam goamã n ka yi n bas Kɛrɛt tẽngã, tõnd da ka na n paam bõn a woto la to-kãngã ye." 
Acts27:22 La moasã, mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y keng y sũyã tɩ bala, tõnd ned ba a yembr ka na n ki ye, sã n ka koom-koglgã bal n na n sãame." 
Acts27:23 Bala, Wẽnnaam ning sẽn so maam tɩ mam sakd-a wã malɛɛk waa mam nengẽ yʋngẽ," 
Acts27:24 la a yeela maam yaa: «Polle, ra zoe rabeem ye, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ fo ta rĩm a Sezaar taoore. La gese, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sõmblem soab la b maand nimbãan-zoeer ne foomã rɩka neb nins sẽn be koom-koglgã pʋg ne foomã vɩɩm n ning fo nugẽ.»" 
Acts27:25 Woto yĩnga, m saam-biisi, keng-y y sũyã, bala, mam tara tẽeb‑kãnga ne Wẽnnaam, tɩ na n yɩɩ wala b sẽn togs maama bala," 
Acts27:26 la tõnd na n tɩ teega tẽng a yembr koom sẽn gũbgi. 
Acts27:27 Dag n yaa yʋnd piig la a naasẽ soab la sobgã ra lengd tõnd ko-kãsengã sẽn boond tɩ Adiryatikã zugu. La sẽn kolg yʋn-sʋka, koom-koglgã pʋgẽ tʋmtʋmdbã tẽeme tɩ b pẽnega tẽnga." 
Acts27:28 Bãmb loee koom zulum bõn-makdgã ne wĩir n los koomẽ wã n mak a zulmã n mik tɩ yaa metr pis-tã la a yopoe. La b sẽn leb n zãag bilfu, b losame yɛsa n mik tɩ zulmã zemsa metr pisi la a nii." 
Acts27:29 Bãmb sẽn yɛɛsd tɩ tõnd koom-koglgã na n wa tɩ wẽ kug yĩnga, b losa kug bɛd a naas sẽn da tar n yalsd koom-koglgã koomã pʋgẽ, tɩ b gãd koglgã. La b ra yãgdame n dat tɩ beoogã vẽeg tao-tao." 
Acts27:30 Koom-koglgã tʋmtʋmdb maana wala b rat n losa kug a taab sẽn yalsd koom-koglgã koomã pʋgẽ, tɩ b gãd koglgã, mik b ra soosdame n dat n sik koom-kogl‑bilã koomẽ wã n zoe." 
Acts27:31 A Poll yeela sodaas koabg naabã ne sodaasã yaa: Nin-bãmbã sã n ka pa koom-koglgã pʋga, yãmb kõn tõog n põs ye." 
Acts27:32 Dẽ, sodaasã wãa wĩ nins sẽn da loe kogl-bilã n pase, n bas-a t'a lʋɩ koomẽ wã." 
Acts27:33 Sẽn deng beoogã vẽegre, a Poll sagla nebã fãa n yeel-b tɩ b rɩ. Yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: Ade, yaa rasem piig la a naas rũndã la yãmb sẽn gũud sobgã yõkre, n ka sakd n dɩ rɩɩb ye." 
Acts27:34 Rẽ wã, mam kota yãmb tɩ y rɩ, bala, yaa sẽn na n fãag yãmba, la yãmb ned ba a yembr zoobg ka na n menem ye." 
Acts27:35 A Poll sẽn gom a woto n sa, a rɩka bur n yals nebã fãa taoor n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam barka. A sẽn pʋʋs n sa, a kaoo burã n sɩng wãbre." 
Acts27:36 Dẽ, nebã fãa me kenga b pels n dɩ." 
Acts27:37 Tõnd fãa sẽn dag n be koom-koglgã pʋgẽ wã yaa neb kobsi la pis-yopoe la a yoobe. 
Acts27:38 La b sẽn dɩ n tɩge, b loba koodã koomã pʋgẽ n na n boog koom-koglgã zɩɩbo." 
Acts27:39 La beoogã sẽn vẽege, koom-koglgã tʋmtʋmdbã ka bãng sẽn yaa tẽng ning ye. La b yãnda zĩiga, kʋɩl-koakã sẽn gonge, zĩ-bĩisri, la bãmb yãka yam n dat tɩ sã n tõe, bɩ b tall koom-koglgã n ta beenẽ." 
Acts27:40 Bãmb logsa bãens nins sẽn yalsd koglgã n bas tɩ b lʋɩ koomẽ wã, la b kell n logs koglgã wẽnemdedgã wĩ, n yaool n zẽk koglgã taoor peendã, sẽn na yɩl tɩ sebgã tus-ba, la b tees kʋɩl-koakã." 
Acts27:41 La bãmb tɩ kẽe bĩisr pʋgẽ, ko-wĩis a yiib sʋka, la b basa koglgã t'a pa be. Koglgã taoor kẽe bĩisrẽ wã sõama n ka leb n tõe n serg ye. La ko-pɛmã wẽe koglgã poor ne pãng n wesge." 
Acts27:42 La sodaasã da rat n kʋʋ bi-beesã tɩ b ned ba a yembr da wa rug koomã n zoe n põs ye. 
Acts27:43 La sodaas koabg naabã sẽn dat n fãag a Pollã, a ka sak tɩ b maan a woto ye. Yẽnda yeela neb nins sẽn mi rugbã tɩ b reng n lʋɩ koomẽ wã n dug n yi yɩnga," 
Acts27:44 la a yeel neb a taabã tɩ b sog ra-pegdã, wall koom-koglgã raado, n dug n yi. La woto, nebã tõog n taa yɩng ne yõore la laafɩ." 
Acts28:1 Tõnd sẽn põsã poore, d wʋmame tɩ tẽn-kãng sẽn be koomã sʋkã boondame tɩ Malte." 
Acts28:2 Tẽngã neb gesa tõnd yell neer wʋsg ne nimbãan-zoeere. La saagã sẽn da ni tɩ yaa waoodã yĩnga, b widga bugum n deeg tõnd fãa be tɩ d gũbg n woode." 
Acts28:3 A Poll wʋka ra-yãngls n na n ning bugmẽ wã, la bug-waolgã yĩnga, waaf n yi be n gãd a Poll nugã." 
Acts28:4 La tẽngã neb sẽn yãnd waafã sẽn luund a Poll nugẽ wã, b goma ne taab n yeele: Hakɩɩka rao-kãngã yaa nin-kʋʋda, bala, baa ne yẽnda sẽn põs ko-kãsengã, wẽnd tɩrlem ka rat n bas-a t'a vɩɩmd ye." 
Acts28:5 La a Poll mesga waafã t'a lʋɩ bugmẽ wã la a Poll bũmb ka zab baa bilf ye. 
Acts28:6 Nin-kãens ra gũudame n na n yãnd a sẽn mode, wall a Poll sẽn na n lʋɩ n ki zĩig pʋgẽ. La b sẽn gũ n kaoos n mik tɩ bũmb baa fʋɩ ka maan yẽnda wã, b wẽnemdame n yeel t'a Poll yaa wẽnd a yembre." 
Acts28:7 Soolem a ye n da pẽ be tɩ yaa tẽn-kãng naabã n so, naabã yʋʋr la a Publyuusi. A reega tõnd ne nonglem n sik a yir rasem a tãabo." 
Acts28:8 A Publyuus baaba n da gãe ne yĩn-wɩngre la sãb-noaadga, la a Poll kẽe a nengẽ n tik-a ne a nus n pʋʋs n maag-a." 
Acts28:9 Rẽ zugẽ, tẽngã bãad-dãmb a taab me waame, la b fãa paama laafɩ." 
Acts28:10 B waooga tõnd ne waoog‑kãsenga, la tõnd sẽn wa n na n loogã, b kõo tõnd bũmb nins fãa sẽn tõe n sõng tõnd d so-toakã pʋgẽ." 
Acts28:11 La kiis a tãab zugẽ, tõnd kẽe Alegsãndiri koom-koglg a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Diyoskuur sẽn dag n zĩnd Malt tẽngã waoodã wẽnde." 
Acts28:12 Tõnd sẽn ta Sɩrakuus tẽnga d paa be rasem a tãabo. 
Acts28:13 La tõnd yii beenẽ n tũ koomã noor n ta Regiyo. La vẽkembeoogo, wĩndga goabg sebgã yikame, la rasem a yiib pʋgẽ, tõnd taa Pʋzolle." 
Acts28:14 Tõnd yãnda ba-biis tẽn-kãng pʋga, tɩ b kos tõnd tɩ d pa be ne bãmb rasem a yopoe. Yɩɩ woto tɩ tõnd kẽng Rom." 
Acts28:15 Ba-biisã sẽn be Romma sẽn wʋm tõnd kibare, b waa n sega tõnd hal tẽms sẽn boond tɩ Apiyuus ne Tʋroa-Tavɛrn. A Poll sẽn yãnd-bã, a pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam bark la a keng a pɛlga." 
Acts28:16 Tõnd sẽn wa n ta Rommã, sodaas koabg naabã rɩka bi-beesã n kɩs sodaasã taoor soaba, la b kõo a Poll lohorem t'a zĩnd toor ne sodaag a yembr sẽn gũud-a." 
Acts28:17 B sẽn ta Rom tɩ rab-tãtẽ, a Poll boola Zʋɩf-rãmbã nin-kãsems tɩ b wa yẽnda nengẽ. La b sẽn tigim taaba, a Poll goma ne bãmb a woto: M saam-biisi, baa ne mam sẽn ka maan bũmb sẽn beegd tõnd buudã, la m ka maan bũmb sẽn kɩɩsd tõnd yaab-rãmbã miningã, b yõka maam Zeruzalɛm n kɩs Rom-dãmbã tɩ b kẽes maam bi-bees roogo." 
Acts28:18 La Rom-dãmbã sẽn kelg maam, b rag n dat n bas-m lame, bala b ka yã mam sẽn maan bũmb n tog ne kʋʋb ye." 
Acts28:19 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã zãgsame, dẽ, yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne maam tɩ m kos n na n kẽng rĩm a Sezaar nengẽ. La yaool n ka bũmb la m tar n dat n dõd m buudã ye." 
Acts28:20 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ m dat n yãnd-yã n gom ne-yã, bala, yaa Israyɛll nebã tẽeb pidsg gũudum poorẽ la b balg maam ne bãn-kãensã." 
Acts28:21 Zʋɩf-rãmbã nin-kãsems yeela a Poll yaa: Tõnd ka reeg sebr baa a yembr sẽn yi Zʋʋde soolem n gomd ne tõnd yãmb yell ye, la ba-biig baa a yembr ka yi be n wa togs tõndo, wall a gom yãmb sẽn maan tɩ ka zems ye." 
Acts28:22 La tõnd datẽ lame n kelg yãmb sẽn na n yeel tɩ bũmb ninga, bala tõnd miime tɩ zĩiga fãa, nebã kɩɩsda kaoreng ning yãmb sẽn tũudã." 
Acts28:23 Bãmb yãka daar n kõ a Polle, la badaare bãmb wʋsg waa n yãnda a Poll a gãagã zĩigẽ, la yẽnda goma ne bãmb yibeoog hal tɩ ta zaabre, yẽnda rɩka a Moyiis tõogã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdba sɛb n moon bãmb Wẽnnaam soolmã koɛɛg n na n wilg-b t'a Zeezi koɛɛgã yaa sɩda." 
Acts28:24 Neb kẽer tẽe bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn da yetã la neb kẽer kɩɩsame n ka tẽ ye. 
Acts28:25 La bãmb sẽn ka zems taab n yik n na n loogã, a Poll yeel-b-la gom‑kãensã bal n paase: Sɩɩg-sõng sɩd tara bʋʋm la a sẽn da gom ne y yaab-rãmbã n yeel" 
Acts28:26 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi tɩ: «Kẽng nin-bãmbã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: ‹Yãmb nong bɩ kelg sõama, y kõn tol n wʋm a võor ye. Yãmb nong bɩ y ges sõama, y kõn tol n yãnd ye." 
Acts28:27 Bala, nin-kãensã sũyã riglmame, b yẽda b tʋba, la b mum b nini, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b nin da yã ye, tɩ b tʋb ra wʋm ye, tɩ b ra tags n wʋm a võor ye. La b ra tek yam n kos sugri, sẽn na yɩl tɩ mam maag-b ye.› »" 
Acts28:28 A Poll leb n yeelame yaa: «Dẽ wã yĩnga, bãng-y tɩ b tʋma Wẽnnaam fãagr koɛɛgã bu-zẽmsã tẽngẽ, la b na n kelg-a lame.»" 
Acts28:29 [A Poll sẽn yeel a woto n sɛ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã loogdame la b wẽed nokoeemd wʋsg ne taaba.]" 
Acts28:30 A Poll zĩnda be yʋʋm a yiib tõre, la a yaood roogã ligdi. La yẽnda ra reegda neb nins fãa sẽn da wat yẽ nengẽ wã ro-kãng pʋga." 
Acts28:31 Yẽnda ra moonda Wẽnnaam soolem koɛɛgã, la a zãmsd nebã a Zeezi Kiris koɛɛgã ne pɛl-kɛgenga, tɩ gɩdgr kaẽ ye." 
Romans1:1 Maam a Polle, a Zeezi Kiris tʋmtʋmd b sẽn yãk t'a yɩ tẽn-tʋmdã, n welg-a toor Wẽnnaam koe-noogã yĩnga," 
Romans1:2 koe-noog ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n tũnug b no-rɛɛsdbã n kãab bãmb gʋls-sõamyã pʋgẽ," 
Romans1:3 la sẽn gomd bãmb Bi-ribl sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd yageng ne yĩng yelle," 
Romans1:4 la ne sɩɩgã yelle, b welga toore, la Wẽnnaam wilga ne pãng n yeel t'a Zeezi yaa Bãmb Bi-ribla, bãmb sẽn vʋʋg-b n yiis kũum sʋkã yĩngã." 
Romans1:5 Yaa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kirisi. Yaa bãmb maasem yĩng la tõnd deeg barka, la tẽn-tʋmdo, tɩ ne bãmb yʋʋre, tõnd na tall soolem toay-toayã fãa neb tɩ b wa tẽ Bãmba, la b sak Bãmba." 
Romans1:6 A Zeezi Kiris sẽn bool yãmbã, yãmb me yaa soolem kãens rãmba." 
Romans1:7 Maam n tʋmd seb-kãngã neb nins fãa sẽn be Rom n yaa Wẽnnaam nin-nongdse, tɩ Wẽnnaam bool-b tɩ b yɩ sõama n welg toorã nengẽ: Bɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam la tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ning yãmb zut barka la b kõ-y bãane." 
Romans1:8 Pipi, mam deng n pʋʋsda m Wẽnnaamã bark a Zeezi maasem yĩnga, yãmb fãa yĩnga. Bala, yãmb tẽebã yell saaga dũni gill fãa." 
Romans1:9 Wẽnnaam mam sẽn sakd ne m sũur fãa, n moond bãmb bi-riblã koe-noogã yaa mam kaset soab tɩ mam pʋtã yãmb yell daar fãa," 
Romans1:10 la wakat fãa m pʋʋsg pʋgẽ. Mam kota Wẽnnaam tɩ b sã n data, bɩ b kõ-m weer sẽn zems tɩ wa yãmb nengẽ." 
Romans1:11 Bala, mam data ne m sũur fãa n yãnd yãmba, tɩ m tõe n taas yãmb Sɩɩgã kũuni, tɩ yãmb tẽebã na paam pãnga," 
Romans1:12 wall tɩ tõnd pʋs n naag taab n paam raood paoosg ne tẽeb a yembr tãa ning yãmb la maam sẽn tarã. 
Romans1:13 M ba-biisi, mam ka rat tɩ yãmb zɩ tɩ mam saaga naoor wʋsg n dat n wa n ges yãmba, tɩ m tõe n wom biis yãmb sʋk wa soolem a taabã pʋsẽ wã. La hal tɩ ta moasã, gɩdgr n gɩdg maam." 
Romans1:14 Mam tog n tʋma ne neb yam sẽn weke, la ne neb yam sẽn ka weke, la ne bãngdba la ne zɩtbã me." 
Romans1:15 Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ mam dat ne n sũur fãa n moon yãmb me sẽn be Rommã koe-noogã. 
Romans1:16 Bala, koe-noogã mooneg yãnd ka tar maam ye. Sɩdã, a yaa Wẽnnaam pãng sẽn fãagd ned ning fãa sẽn tẽeda: Pipi yaa Zʋɩf-rãmba, tɩ sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf-rãmbã pʋgda." 
Romans1:17 Bala, Wẽnnaam tɩrlmã pukda be ne tẽebo, la tẽeb yĩnga, wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Nin-tɩrg na n vɩɩ ne tẽebo." 
Romans1:18 Sɩdã, Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã yita yĩngr n sigd ninsaalbã zutu, bãmb wẽn-kɩɩsgã la b tʋʋm-wẽnsã sẽn gɩdgd sɩdã t'a ka tõe n maan a tʋʋmdã yĩnga." 
Romans1:19 Bala, bũmb ning fãa ned sẽn tõe n bãng sẽn kẽed ne Wẽnnaam yellã yaa vẽeneg ne bãmba, bala, Wẽnnaam puk-a la bãmba." 
Romans1:20 Sɩd me, sẽn sɩng ne dũni naanego, nebã nee Wẽnnaam pãng kãsengã sẽn ka sɛtã nin sẽn ka tõe n yã wã, la b Wẽnnaamlemã sõama, b sã n tags n ges bũmb nins bãmb sẽn maanã." 
Romans1:21 Dẽ, bãmb ka tõe n yãnd bũmb n dõd n yi ye, bala, bãmb sẽn bãng Wẽnnaamã, b ka waoog-b wa b yaa Wẽnnaam ye, la b ka pʋʋs-b bark ye. La bãmb tagsgã sẽn ka yõodã kẽesa bãmb moogo, la bãmb sũyã sẽn be zɩɩlem pʋgẽ wã kẽe lik bida pʋgẽ." 
Romans1:22 Bãmb wukda b mens n yet tɩ b yaa yam dãmbã, la b lebga yalemba." 
Romans1:23 Bãmb teka Wẽnnaam sẽn ka kiidã ziir ne bõn-naands sẽn mamsd ninsaal sẽn kiidã, la liuuli, la nao a naase, la bõn-vuudsi." 
Romans1:24 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam bas-b tɩ b kẽ rẽgd pʋgẽ, wa b sũyã sẽn data, tɩ b paoog b yĩnsã b toore." 
Romans1:25 Bãmb teka Wẽnnaam yellã sẽn yaa sɩdã ne zĩrẽ. Bãmb sẽn pʋʋsd bõn-naands n sakd-bã, n yaool n bas Naandã sẽn tog n paam waoogr wakat sẽn kõn sa wã, Ãmina." 
Romans1:26 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam bas-b tɩ b maan yĩng ratem sẽn paoogd neda. Bala, bãmb pagbã basa gãag ning sẽn zems Wẽnnaam sẽn seglã n maand sẽn ka segd ye." 
Romans1:27 Raopã me basa pagbã gãag sẽn zems Wẽnnaam sẽn seglã, tɩ ratem taab yĩngã rɩt bãmb wa bugum. B maanda yãnde, rao ne raoa, la b yĩnsã paamda sɩbgr sẽn zemsd ne b menengã sẽn wat ne bũmb ningã." 
Romans1:28 Bãmb sẽn ka tags tɩ yaa sõama tɩ bãng Wẽnnaamã, Wẽnnaam basame tɩ b tũud b tagsdã sẽn yaa wẽnsã, tɩ b maand bũmb sẽn ka zems ye." 
Romans1:29 Ka-tɩrlem buud fãa, la pʋ-toogo, la yão-beedo, la wẽnga, la ratem-wẽnga, la nin-kʋʋbo, la zaba, la zãmbo, la sɩlem n pid bãmba." 
Romans1:30 B yaa tẽn-kãn-nebã, nin-sãbsdba, wẽn-kɩɩsdbã, sũ-tʋʋls rãmba, wilg-m-mens rãmba, wuk-m-mens rãmba, n mi soay sẽn na tũ n maan wẽnga, ba-rãmb la ma-rãmb kɩɩsdba, b yam ka weke." 
Romans1:31 B yaa neb sẽn ka be teegre, sẽn ka tar nonglem, n ka mi sugri, n ka tar nimbãan-zoeere ye." 
Romans1:32 La baa ne b sẽn mi Wẽnnaam yelsem sẽn yet tɩ neb nins sẽn maand bõn-kãensã zemsa ne kũumã, b maand-b lame. La ka rẽ bal ye, b yetame me tɩ neb nins sẽn maand bõn-kãensã maanda neere." 
Romans2:1 Dẽ, fo sẽn yaa ned ning fãa, fo sẽn kaood f taab bʋʋdã, fo kõn paam bũmb n dõd n yi ye. Sɩdã, fo sẽn kaood neb a taabã bʋʋdã, fo rogenda yell f meng zugu. Bala, fo kaooda f taab bʋʋdo, la f yaool n maand wa bãmb bala." 
Romans2:2 Sɩd me, tõnd miime tɩ Wẽnnaam bʋ-kaoorã neb nins sẽn maand a woto wã yĩng tũuda sɩda." 
Romans2:3 Fo tẽedame tɩ f sẽn kaood f taab bʋʋdo, n maand wa bãmbã fo na n põsa Wẽnnaam bʋ-kaoorã?" 
Romans2:4 Bɩ fo ka nand bãmb sõmblmã, la bãmb sũ-bʋgsmã, la bãmb sũ-marã sẽn waoogã, n ka miẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam sõmblmã tusda foom tɩ f tek yam n kos sugri?" 
Romans2:5 La ne fo sũurã riglingã la f sũurã sẽn ka baood tekrã, fo tigsda sũ-puugr n bĩngd f meng Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã daar yĩnga, daar ning bãmb bʋ-kaoorã sẽn zemsã sẽn na n pukã," 
Romans2:6 bãmb sẽn na n keo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmdã: 
Romans2:7 neb nins sẽn modgd tɩ maan neere, n baood ziiri, la waoogre, la b baood vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã na n paam-a lame," 
Romans2:8 la neb nins no-koɛɛm sɩɩg sẽn tar tɩ b kɩɩsd sɩd la b sakd ka-tɩrlmã na n paama Wẽnnaam sũ-yikri la b sũ-puugri. 
Romans2:9 Zʋɩf-rãmb pipi tɩ sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf-rãmbã pʋgda. Ned ning fãa sẽn maand wẽngã na n paama yel-pakre, la pelen-yɩgre." 
Romans2:10 Ned ning fãa sẽn maand neere, na n paama ziiri, waoogre la bãane. Zʋɩf-rãmbã pipi tɩ sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf-rãmbã pʋgda." 
Romans2:11 Bala, Wẽnnaam ka bakd neb ye." 
Romans2:12 Neb nins fãa sẽn ka bãng tõogã, la sẽn maan yel-wẽnã na sãam me tɩ tõog toor kaẽ ye. La neb nins sẽn paam tõogã la sẽn maan yel-wẽnã, tõogã la b na n ges n kao bãmb bʋʋdo." 
Romans2:13 Sɩd me, ka neb nins sẽn kelgd tõogã n zems Wẽnnaam nifẽ ye. La yaa neb nins sẽn sakd tõogã n na n paam zemsgo." 
Romans2:14 Buud a taabã sẽn ka tar tõogã sã n kell n maand bũmb nins tõogã sẽn yetã, bãmb sẽn ka tar tõogã, bãmb mensã mii b sẽn tog n maane." 
Romans2:15 B wilgdame tɩ bũmb nins tõogã sẽn datã gʋlsa bãmb sũyã pʋse. Bãmb sũ-bãngrã kɩta rẽnda kaseto, la bãmb tagsgã rõta bãmba wall a zabd n sõngd bãmba." 
Romans2:16 Daar ning Wẽnnaam sẽn na n kɩt t'a Zeezi Kiris kao nebã tʋʋm-solgdsã bʋʋd wa koe-noog ning mam sẽn moondã sẽn yetã, bõn-kãens na n pukame." 
Romans2:17 Fo boonda f meng tɩ Zʋɩfe, n teegd tõogã, n waoogd f menga, f sẽn yaa wẽn-tũudã yĩngã." 
Romans2:18 Fo yetame tɩ f mii bãmb daabã, tɩ tõogã sẽn zãms foomã yĩnga, fo mii bũmb ning sẽn yaa sõama la sẽn yaa wẽng n bake." 
Romans2:19 Fo sẽn yet f meng tɩ f yaa zoens tɛtã, la neb nins sẽn be lik bida pʋgẽ wã vẽenemã," 
Romans2:20 n yaa ka-yam dãmbã zãmsdã, la kamb karen-saambã, yaa tɩ fo tẽedame tɩ f tara bãngr la sɩd sor tõogã pʋgẽ." 
Romans2:21 Fo zãmsda neb a taabã, la f ka zãmsd f meng ye." 
Romans2:22 Fo moondame n yetẽ tɩ b ra zu ye, la f yaool n zuuda! Fo yetame tɩ b ra yo ye, la f yaool n yooda! Fo geta wẽnd-naands wa bõn-põosgo, la f yaool n kẽed b rotẽ wã n zuud-ba!" 
Romans2:23 Fo sẽn dɩk tõogã n waoogd f mengã, fo kɩɩsda tõogã n paoogd Wẽnnaam." 
Romans2:24 Bala, buud a taabã neb paoogda Wẽnnaam yʋʋr yãmb yĩnga, wa sẽn be gʋls-sõamyã pʋgẽ wã." 
Romans2:25 Sɩda, bãong yaa bũmb sẽn be yõodo, fo sã n sakda tõogã. La fo sã n kɩɩs tõogã, fo bãongã lebga moonem bala." 
Romans2:26 La sẽn ka kẽ-a bãong sã n sakd bũmb nins sẽn gʋls tõogã pʋgẽ wã, b ka na n ges a moonemã wa bãong kõom sɩda?" 
Romans2:27 Sẽn ka tol n kẽ-a bãongã sã n pidsd tõogã sẽn yetã, a kõn kao fo bʋʋdo, fo soab sẽn tar tõogã sebr la bãongã sɩda?" 
Romans2:28 Ka ned ning sẽn tar-a Zʋɩf yalẽ wã bal n yaa Zʋɩf ye. La bãongã ka bũmb ning b sẽn ne yĩn-nemdã pʋgẽ wã ye. 
Romans2:29 La Zʋɩf yaa ned ning sẽn yaa-a Zʋɩf a sũur pʋgẽ, la bãong meng yaa sũurẽ dẽnda, sẽn zems Sɩɩgã rẽnda, la ka tõogã rẽnd ye. Zʋɩf‑kãng pẽgr ka yit ninsaalb nengẽ ye, la yaa Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Romans3:1 Zu-noog ning Zʋɩf sẽn tarã yaa bõe, wall bãongã kõom yõod yaa bõe?" 
Romans3:2 A bee nafr bũmb fãa pʋgẽ. Pipi, Wẽnnaam deng n dɩka b goamã n gũnug ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã." 
Romans3:3 La d na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Bãmb neb kẽer sã n ka maan sɩd ne Wẽnnaam, dẽ yĩnga, bãmb sẽn ka maan sɩdã na n kɩtame tɩ Wẽnnaam sɩdã ka maan a tʋʋmde?" 
Romans3:4 Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo. Nebã tog n bãngame tɩ baa ninsaalbã fãa sã n yagda zĩrẽ, Wẽnnaam yaa sɩd-soaba, wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Tɩ ne yãmb goamã, b na mik tɩ yãmb yaa tɩrga, la tɩ yãmb bʋʋda kaoob wakate, bɩ y paam tõogre." 
Romans3:5 La tõnd ka-tɩrlmã sã n kɩtdẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam tɩrlmã pukdẽ, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Wẽnnaam sã n sak tɩ b sũur yiki, b yaa ka-tɩrlem soab sɩda? Mam sẽn gomda yaa ninsaalemdo." 
Romans3:6 Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo. Sã n ka rẽ, Wẽnnaam na n yɩɩ a wãn n kao dũni bʋʋdo?" 
Romans3:7 La sã n yaa tɩ ne mam zĩrẽ wã Wẽnnaam sɩdã pukdame n paasde tɩ yaa bãmb waoogre, bõe tɩ b na n leb n kao mam bʋʋd wa yel-wẽn maanda?" 
Romans3:8 La wa tẽn-kãn-neb kẽer sẽn kãnegd tõnd n yetẽ tɩ d gomda a woto wã, bõe tɩ tõnd ka na n maand wẽng tɩ sẽn yaa sõmb tõe n tũ be n wa? Nin-kãens sɩbgrã yaa bũmb sẽn zemse." 
Romans3:9 La rẽ wã, tõnd yɩɩda neb a taabã la? Baa bilfu! Bala, tõnd zoe n wilgame tɩ nebã fãa, Zʋɩf-rãmbã la sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf-rãmbã bee yel-wẽnã yembd pʋgẽ" 
Romans3:10 wa sẽn gʋlsã: Ned sẽn zems ka be ye! Baa a yembr ka ye. 
Romans3:11 Ned baa a yembr yam ka weke, baa a yembr ka baood Wẽnnaam ye. Neba fãa menemame, n naag taab n lebg ka-barka." 
Romans3:12 Ned baa a yembr ka be sẽn maand neer ye, baa a ye!" 
Romans3:13 Bãmb kokorã yaa wa yaoog b sẽn fõke. B zɛlmã wã belgda nebã. Ruruug zẽnem n be bãmb no-bɩmsẽ wã. 
Romans3:14 Bãmb noor pida ne kãab-wẽng la toolem. 
Romans3:15 B nao wã tʋʋla ne a kẽng n tɩ raag zɩɩm. 
Romans3:16 B sẽn pɩʋʋgẽ fãa, yaa sãoong ne toog bala." 
Romans3:17 B ka mi bũmb ning sẽn wat ne laafɩ ye. 
Romans3:18 B toor ka be ne Wẽnnaam zoees ye. 
Romans3:19 Tõnd yaool n miime tɩ bũmb ning fãa tõogã sẽn yetã, a yeta neb nins fãa sẽn loe ne tõogã, tɩ noyã fãa na mume, tɩ nebã na bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam nifẽ, nebã fãa yaa bɛɛgdba." 
Romans3:20 Sɩdã, ned baa a yembr ka na n paam zemsg Wẽnnaam taoor tõogã sakr yĩng ye. Bala, tõogã kɩtdame bal tɩ ned bãng yel-wẽnd sẽn yaa a soaba." 
Romans3:21 La moasã Wẽnnaam tɩrlem pukame tɩ tõog toog kaẽ ye, la tõogã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sɛb kɩta tɩrlmã kaseto," 
Romans3:22 sẽn yaa tɩ tẽeb ne a Zeezi Kiris wata ne Wẽnnaam tɩrlem neb nins fãa sẽn tẽedã yĩnga. Bala, welgr ka ye:" 
Romans3:23 Sɩda, nebã fãa maana yel-wẽna, n kong Wẽnnaam ziirã." 
Romans3:24 La b paamda zemsgã zaalem bala, Wẽnnaam nimbãan-zoeerã yĩnga, fãagr ning sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã maasem yĩnga." 
Romans3:25 Yaa bãmb la Wẽnnaam pĩnd n yãk n kõ, neb nins sẽn na n tẽ bãmbã yel-wẽna yiisg yĩnga, ne b zɩɩmã. Woto na n wilga Wẽnnaam tɩrlem. Bãmb sẽn bas nebã n ka sɩbg-b b yel-wẽn nins b sẽn dag n maan Wẽnnaam sũ-marã wakatã yĩnga," 
Romans3:26 bãmb da rat n wilga b tɩrlmã moasã wakatã, tɩ nebã na bãng tɩ bãmb yaa tɩrga, bãmb sẽn kɩtd tɩ ned ning sẽn tẽed a Zeezi wã zemsã." 
Romans3:27 Woto yĩngã, bõe pʋgẽ la ned tõe n waoog a menga? Bũmb ka be ye. Ne tõ-bʋgo? Ne tʋʋm tõogo? Ayo! La yaa ne tẽeb tõogo." 
Romans3:28 Bala, tõnd geendame tɩ ninsaal paamda zemsg tẽeb yĩnga, tɩ tõog tʋʋmã toog kaẽ ye." 
Romans3:29 Walla, Wẽnnaam yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã bal Wẽnnaam la? Bãmb ka buud a taabã me Wẽnnaam la? N-yẽe, bãmb yaa buud a taabã me Wẽnnaam," 
Romans3:30 bala, Wẽnnaam a yembr tãa n be n na n kɩt tɩ sẽn kẽ-b bãongã zems tẽeb yĩnga, la b kɩt tɩ sẽn ka kẽ-bã me zems tẽeb yĩnga." 
Romans3:31 Woto wã, dẽ yĩnga tõnd dɩkda tẽebã n kiisd tõogã la? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo. Ka woto ye, tõnd wilgdame tɩ tõogã yaa sõama." 
Romans4:1 Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd na n goma d yĩng yaab a Abrahaam yell n yeel tɩ bõe? Bõe la b paam-yã?" 
Romans4:2 Sã n yaa sɩd tɩ yaa tʋʋmã yĩng la a Abrahaam paam tɩrlem, b tõe n waooga b menga. La Wẽnnaam taoore, a ka a woto ye." 
Romans4:3 Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã yetame tɩ bõe? A Abrahaam tẽe Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam gesa a Abrahaam wa nin-tɩrga, a tẽebã yĩnga." 
Romans4:4 La ned sã n tʋm tʋʋmde, a yaoodã ka nimbãan-zoeer kũun ye, yaa a rẽnda." 
Romans4:5 Sã n yaa ne ned ning sẽn ka tʋm-a, la a yaool n tẽ soab ning sẽn kɩtd tɩ wẽng maand lebg tɩrgã, b geta a soabã wa nin-tɩrga a tẽebã yĩnga." 
Romans4:6 Woto me, a Davɩɩd yetame tɩ ned ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt tɩrlem t'a ka tʋm bũmbã tara sũ-noogo. A yeelame:" 
Romans4:7 Bark bee neb nins b yel-wẽnã sẽn paam sugrã, tɩ b yel-wẽnã paam ludbã zutu." 
Romans4:8 Bark bee ned ning Zu-soabã sẽn ka geelgd a yel-wẽnã zugu. 
Romans4:9 Sũ-no-kãng yaa zũnsã yĩng bal bɩ, bɩ yaa ne moosã me? Bala, tõnd yetame yaa: Ne a Abrahaam, b geelga b tẽebã wa tɩrlem." 
Romans4:10 Wakat ning b sẽn geelg b tẽebã wa tɩrlmã, dẽ tɩ b dag n yaa wãn-wãna? Dẽ tɩ b dag n kẽe bãong bɩ b ka kẽ? B rag n nan ka kẽ bãong ye, b da ket n yaa moaaga." 
Romans4:11 La b reega bãongã kõom sẽn yaa bãnd sẽn wilg t'a paama tɩrlem tẽeb yĩnga, la rẽ tɩ b ket n yaa moaaga. Woto, b yaa nebã fãa sẽn tẽedã ba, tɩ baa ne b sẽn ka kẽ bãongã, bɩ Wẽnnaam geelg-b tɩrlmã." 
Romans4:12 Woto, bãmb yaa zũnsã me ba. Ka yĩngã bãong bal la b kẽ ye, b kẽnda tẽeb ning tõnd yaab a Abrahaam sẽn dag n tar b moonem wakatã pʋgẽ." 
Romans4:13 Sɩd me, ka ne tõogã la Wẽnnaam kãab a Abrahaam wall a yagensã tɩ b na n sooga dũni wã ye, la yaa ne tẽeb tɩrlem." 
Romans4:14 Sã n yaa tõog yĩng la ned paamd dogem-pʋɩɩre, dẽnd tẽeb yaa zaalem, la b kiisa kãabgã sẽn kãabã." 
Romans4:15 Bala, tõogã wata ne sũ-yikri, la zĩig ning tõog sẽn ka be, beegr me ka ye." 
Romans4:16 Dẽ, yaa ne tẽebo, tɩ b tõe n yeel tɩ yaa nimbãan-zoeere, tɩ kãabg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãabã na pids a Abrahaam yagensã fãa yĩnga. Ka b rãmb sẽn tar-b tõogã yĩng bal ye, la yaa ne neb nins sẽn tar-b tõnd ba a Abrahaam tẽebã wa b sẽn gʋlsã:" 
Romans4:17 Mam kɩtame tɩ fo lebg buud wʋsg ba. Bãmb yaa tõnd fãa ba, Wẽnnaam ning b sẽn tẽ wã taoore. Yaa Wẽnnaam ning sẽn kõt kũum vɩɩm, la b kɩtd tɩ bũmb nins sẽn ka be wã zĩndi." 
Romans4:18 A Abrahaam maana tẽeb ne bũmb ned sẽn ka tõe n tẽ, b tẽeme n lebg soolem wʋsg ba wa Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n yeelã: Fo yagensã na n yɩɩ a woto." 
Romans4:19 B ka bas tɩ b tẽebã boog ye, b kell n maana tẽeb ne b yĩngã sẽn kolg kũumã, bal b yʋʋmã dag n kolga koabga, la a Saara rogem me ra loogame." 
Romans4:20 La Wẽnnaam sẽn kãab-bã, b ka sãmbe, b sẽn ka tẽeb yĩng ye. La b tẽebã sẽn paas-b pãngã yĩnga, b kõo Wẽnnaam waoogre." 
Romans4:21 Bala, b sũur keema ne yel-kãngã: Bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãabã, b tara pãng n na n pids-a." 
Romans4:22 Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ b geelg a Abrahaam tẽebã wa tɩrlmã. 
Romans4:23 Ka bãmb b yembr yĩng la b gʋls n yeel tɩ b geelga b tẽebã wa tɩrlmã ye," 
Romans4:24 la yaa tõnd me yĩnga. B na n geelga tõnd tẽebã wa tɩrlem, tõnd sẽn tẽed a soab sẽn vʋʋg tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi tɩ b yi kũum sʋkã," 
Romans4:25 soab ning b sẽn kʋ tõnd beegr yĩnga, la sẽn vʋʋg tɩ tõnd tõe n paam tɩrlmã yĩnga." 
Romans5:1 Dẽ, tõnd sẽn paam zemsg tẽeb yĩngã, tõnd tara zems-n-taar ne Wẽnnaam tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga." 
Romans5:2 Yaa bãmb maasem yĩng la tõnd paam n kẽ barkã pʋgẽ ne tẽebo, la tõnd yasa kãenkãe bark‑kãng pʋgẽ, la tõnd maanda sũ-noogo, d sẽn gũud Wẽnnaam ziirã ne tẽebã yĩngã." 
Romans5:3 La sẽn yɩɩd rẽnda, tõnd maanda sũ-noog baa yel-pakr pʋgẽ, tõnd sẽn mi tɩ yel-pakrã wata ne sũ-mare," 
Romans5:4 tɩ sũ-mar wat ne maan-sɩd sẽn wat ne tõogre, tɩ maan-sɩd sẽn wat ne tõogrã wat ne tẽeb pidsg gũudum." 
Romans5:5 Tẽeb pidsg gũudum yaool n ka tudgd ned ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩg-sõng b sẽn kõ tõndã pidsda tõnd sũyã ne Wẽnnaam nonglem tõnd sũyã pʋse." 
Romans5:6 Bala, wakat ning tõnd sẽn da ka pãngã, Wẽnnaam wakatã sẽn wa n ta, Kiris kii nin-wẽnsã yĩnga." 
Romans5:7 Yaa toog tɩ ned sak n ki nin-tɩrg yĩnga. Daar ninga, nina na paam raood n ki nin-sõng yĩnga." 
Romans5:8 Wakat ning tõnd sẽn dag n ket n yaa yel-wẽn-maandba, Kiris kii tõnd yĩnga, la ne rẽnda, Wẽnnaam wilga b nonglem tõnd yĩnga." 
Romans5:9 Moasã, tõnd sẽn paam zemsg Kiris zɩɩmã raagr yĩngã, tõnd kõn põs Wẽnnaam sũ-yikr bãmb maasem yĩng n yɩɩd sɩda?" 
Romans5:10 Bala, sã n yaa tɩ tõnd sẽn dag n ket n ya bɛɛbã, tõnd yellã ne Wẽnnaamã paama yiisg bãmb Bi-riblã kũum yĩnga, moasã yellã sẽn sa wã, tõnd kõn paam fãagr bãmb vɩɩmã yĩng n yɩɩd sɩda?" 
Romans5:11 Sẽn yɩɩd rẽ yɛsa, tõnd maanda sũ-noog Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ, tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga, soab ning sẽn wa ne zemsg tõnd ne Wẽnnaam sʋk moasã wã." 
Romans5:12 Yaa woto yĩnga, a wa yel-wẽna sẽn wa dũni ned a yembr maasem yĩngã, tɩ yel-wẽnã wa ne kũum, tɩ nebã fãa kiidẽ, b fãa sẽn maan yel-wẽnã yĩngã." 
Romans5:13 Bala, hal tɩ ta wakat ning b sẽn moon tõogã, yel-wẽn dag n bee dũni, la b rag n ka geend yel-wẽnã tõogã sẽn dag n ka wã ye." 
Romans5:14 Baoosgo, kũum zĩnda a Ãdem wakat hal tɩ ta a Moyiis wakate. Baa neb nins sẽn ka beeg a Ãdem beegrã buud kiime. A Ãdem yaa sẽn da tog n wa-a wã wẽnego." 
Romans5:15 Kũun ning sẽn kõt zaalmã yell ka wẽnd kongrã yell ye. Bala, neb wʋsg sã n kii ned a yembr beegr yĩnga, sẽn yɩɩda, Wẽnnaam kiiga b barkã, la kũun sẽn yit ned a yembr bark pʋgẽ, a Zeezi Kirisi, neb wʋsg zut wʋsgo." 
Romans5:16 Kũun-kãng yellã ka wẽnd nin-yend yel-wẽnã yell ye. Bala, bʋʋd sẽn pʋgd kongr a yembr tãa wã wata ne sɩbgre, tɩ kũun ning sẽn kõt zaalem kongr zugẽ wã wat ne tɩrlem kũuni." 
Romans5:17 Kũum sã n bee ned a yembr tãa kongrã yĩnga, neb nins sẽn dag deeg Wẽnnaam bark-kãsengã la tɩrlem kũunã kõn vɩɩmd n dɩ naam a Zeezi Kiris b yembr tãa maasem yĩng n yɩɩd sɩda?" 
Romans5:18 Woto yĩnga, a wa ned a yembr tãa beegr sẽn kɩt tɩ sɩbgr paam nebã fãa wã, woto me, tɩrlem tʋʋmd a yembr tãa maasem yĩnga, tɩrlem sẽn kõt vɩɩmã tata nebã fãa." 
Romans5:19 Sɩd me, a wa ned a yembr tãa kɩɩsg yĩng sẽn kɩt tɩ neb wʋsg lebg yel-wẽn maandba, woto me, ned a yembr tãa sakr yĩnga, b na n kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg lebg tɩrse." 
Romans5:20 La tõog yaool n waame tɩ kongr lebg kãsenga. La zĩig ning yel-wẽn sẽn paam pãnga, barkã paama paoosg n yɩɩda." 
Romans5:21 Woto, a wa yel-wẽnã ne kũum sẽn soog zĩigã, barkã sooga zĩig me tɩrlmã yĩnga, tɩ d tõe n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa, tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga." 
Romans6:1 Dẽ, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Tõnd na n kell n paa yel-wẽnã pʋgẽ tɩ barkã paam paoosgo?" 
Romans6:2 Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo. Tõnd sẽn yaa wa kũum ne yel-wẽna yellã, tõnd na n leb n yɩɩ a wãn n vɩ yel-wẽn pʋgẽ?" 
Romans6:3 Yãmb zɩ tɩ tõnd fãa sẽn paam lisg a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã, yaa bãmb kũumẽ wã la tõnd lis-yã?" 
Romans6:4 Woto, ne lisgã, tõnd muma ne bãmba b kũumã pʋgẽ, t'a wa ba wã ziir sẽn vʋʋg a Zeezi tɩ b yi kũum sʋkã, tõnd me kẽnda vɩ-paalg pʋgẽ a woto." 
Romans6:5 Sɩd me, tõnd sã n lebga tɩɩg a yembr ne bãmba, tõnd sẽn paam pʋɩɩr ne bãmb kũumã yĩnga, tõnd na kell n yɩ bũmb a yembr ne bãmba, n paam pʋɩɩr ne bãmb vʋʋgrã." 
Romans6:6 Tõnd miime tɩ d yalẽ kʋdgã naaga ne bãmb n ka da-pɩkã zugu, tɩ yel-wẽnã ratem‑kãng pãng na sa, tɩ tõnd kõn leb n yɩ yel-wẽnã yembs yɛs ye." 
Romans6:7 Bala, ned sã n ki, yel-wẽnã ka leb n tar pãng ne yẽnda ye." 
Romans6:8 La tõnd sã n yaool n kii ne Kirisã, tõnd tẽedame tɩ d na n vɩɩmda ne bãmba," 
Romans6:9 tõnd sẽn mi tɩ Kiris sẽn vʋʋg n yi kũum sʋkã kõn leb n ki wã yĩnga. Kũum ka leb n so bãmb ye. 
Romans6:10 Bãmb kiime, la sɩdã, yaa yel-wẽnã yiisg yĩng la bãmb ki vugr bala. La b sẽn vɩ moasã wã, b vɩɩ Wẽnnaam yĩnga." 
Romans6:11 Woto yĩnga, ges-y y meng wa kũum ne yel-wẽna yelle, la a wa neb sẽn vɩ Wẽnnaam yĩnga, a Zeezi Kiris lagem-n-taarã pʋgẽ." 
Romans6:12 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ yel-wẽnã da leb n soog yãmb yĩn-kiidsã ye, la y da leb n sak a ratem wẽnsã ye." 
Romans6:13 Da rɩk-y y yĩngã will n kɩs yel-wẽnã tɩ yɩ ka-tɩrlem tʋʋm teed ye. Kõ-y y mens Wẽnnaam, wa neb sẽn vʋʋg n yi kũum sʋk n vɩ, la y kõ Wẽnnaam y yĩngã wil tɩ yɩ tɩrlem tʋʋm teedo." 
Romans6:14 Sɩda, yel-wẽnã ka na n soog yãmb ye. Bala, ka tõogã n leb n so yãmb ye, yaa barkã n so yãmba." 
Romans6:15 La yaa bõe? Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd na n maanda yel-wẽnã, tõog sẽn ka so tõndo, la yaa barkã yĩnga? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo." 
Romans6:16 Yãmb ka mi tɩ yãmb sã n kõ-y meng neda, n na n yɩ a yamb n sak-a, yãmb sɩd yaa ned ning yãmb sẽn sakdã yamba? Yãmb tõe n yɩɩ yel-wẽnã sẽn wat ne kũumã yembse, wall sakr sẽn taasd ned tɩrlem pʋgẽ wã yembse." 
Romans6:17 La Wẽnnaam sõngr yĩnga, yãmb sẽn dag n ya yel-wẽnã yembsã, yãmb saka tẽeb yẽbgr noyã b sẽn togs yãmbã ne yamleoogo." 
Romans6:18 B sẽn yols yãmb n yiis yel-wẽnã yembdẽ wã, yãmb lebga tɩrlem yembse." 
Romans6:19 Mam gomda ne ninsaalemdo, yãmb yĩngã pãn-komsmã yĩnga. Woto me, a wa yãmb sẽn dag n kõ y yĩngã wil tɩ yɩ rẽgd la tʋʋm-wẽns yembse, tɩ b maan tʋʋm wẽnsã, bɩ y kõ yĩngã wil tɩ yɩ tɩrlem yembse, tɩ b tall-y n taas yɩlgr zĩigẽ." 
Romans6:20 Balã, wakat ning yãmb sẽn dag n yaa yel-wẽnã yembse, tɩrlem dag n ka so yãmb ye." 
Romans6:21 Bi-bõe la yãmb dag n womd wakat-kãnga? Yaa biis nins sẽn ningd yãmb yãnd moasã wã, bala, b baoosg yaa kũum." 
Romans6:22 Moasã, yãmb sẽn paam yolsg n yi yel-wẽnã yembdẽ n lebg Wẽnnaam yembsã, yãmb bi-womdɩ yaa maneg n yɩ yɩlemde, la a baoosg yaa vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa." 
Romans6:23 Bala, yel-wẽnã yaood yaa kũun, la kũun ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt zaalmã yaa vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa, tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ." 
Romans7:1 M ba-biisi, mam gomda ne neb sẽn mi tõogo: Yãmb zɩ tɩ tõog loeta ned a yõor tɛk laa?" 
Romans7:2 Woto, pag sã n kuil sɩda, tõogã loee yẽndã ne a sɩdã a sɩdã yõor tɛka. La sɩdã sã n ki, tõog ning sẽn dag n loe-a ne a sɩdã yii n bas-a lame." 
Romans7:3 Dẽ, a sɩdã sã n ket n vɩ, t'a lebg rao a to paga, b na n bool-a lame tɩ pʋg-yoodre. La a sɩdã sã n ki, a paama yolsg ne tõogã. Dẽ, a sã n lebg ned a to paga, a ka pʋg-yoodr ye." 
Romans7:4 Woto me m ba-biisi, yãmb yaa kũum, sã n yaa ne tõogã yelle, Kiris yĩngã maasem yĩnga, n na n lebg ned a to rẽnda, soab ning sẽn vʋʋg n yi kũum sʋka, tɩ tõnd na wom biis Wẽnnaam yĩngã." 
Romans7:5 Bala, wakat ning yĩngã ratmã sẽn dag n so tõndã, tõogã kɩtame tɩ yel-wẽnã ratem yik n dag n tʋmd tõnd yĩngã wil pʋsẽ, n kɩtdẽ tɩ tõnd womd biis sẽn wat ne kũum." 
Romans7:6 La moasã, b yiisa tõnd tõogã yembd pʋgẽ, bala, tõnd yaa kũum ne bũmb nins sẽn dag gãd tõnd yembd pʋgẽ wã, tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã sakr yaa sɩɩgã tõog pʋgẽ, sẽn yaa tõ-paalgã, la ka leb n yaa tõ-kʋdgã sẽn gʋlsã pʋgẽ ye." 
Romans7:7 Dẽ, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Tõogã yaa yel-wẽnd la? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo. La mam ka bãng yel-wẽn sẽn ya bũmb ninga, sã n ka tõogã maasem yĩng ye. Tõogã sã n dag n ka yeelẽ tɩ: «Da maan sũ-kiir ye», mam dag n kõn bãng sũ-kiir sẽn yaa a soab ye." 
Romans7:8 La yel-wẽnã paama tõogã sẽn yeelã, n na n kɩt tɩ sũ-kiir buud fãa kẽ maam. Sɩdã, tõog sã n kaẽ, yel-wẽnã ka vɩ ye." 
Romans7:9 Ne maam, pĩnda, tõogã sẽn dag n ka be wã, mam dag n vɩɩme. La tõogã sẽn wa wã, yel-wẽnã paama vɩɩm, tɩ mam ki." 
Romans7:10 Woto, tõogã sẽn da tog n wa ne vɩɩmã, waa ne kũum mam yĩnga." 
Romans7:11 Bala, yel-wẽnã sẽn paam weerã, a talla tõogã n belg maam n tõoge, la a talla tõogã n kɩt tɩ mam ki." 
Romans7:12 Woto, tõogã yaa bõn-sõngo, noyã me yaa bõn-sõamyã, n yaa tɩrse la sõama." 
Romans7:13 Dẽ yĩngã, bũmb ning sẽn yaa sõama wã lebga kũum mam yĩng bɩ? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ayo. La sẽn na yɩlg tɩ yel-wẽnã puk a meng n wilg t'a yaa yel-wẽnã, a talla bõn-sõng n wa ne kũum mam yĩnga, tɩ tõogã maasem yĩnga, yel-wẽnã pãng na puk a wẽngã fãa pʋgẽ." 
Romans7:14 Sɩd me, tõnd miime tɩ tõogã yaa sɩɩg bũmbu. La mam yaa yĩnga, yel-wẽn sẽn so n maand a sẽn dat ne." 
Romans7:15 Bala, bũmb nins mam sẽn maandã, mam ka wʋmd b võor ye. Mam sẽn dat n maan bũmb ninsã, mam ka maand ye, la mam yaool n maanda bũmb nins mam sẽn kisã." 
Romans7:16 Mam sã n maanda m sẽn ka rata, mam sẽn yetã zemsda ne tõogã sẽn yetã, tɩ tõogã yaa bõn-sõngo." 
Romans7:17 Moasã, ka leb n yaa maam n maand bõn-kãens ye, la yaa yel-wẽnã sẽn be mam pʋgẽ wã." 
Romans7:18 Bala, mam miime tɩ bõn-sõng ka be mam pʋgẽ, mam yĩngã pʋgẽ ye. Bala, mam tõe n paama datem tɩ maan neere, la m ka tar pãn-tõog tɩ maan-a ye." 
Romans7:19 Mam ka maand neer ning mam sẽn datã ye, la m maanda wẽng ning m sẽn ka ratã." 
Romans7:20 Mam sã n maand m sẽn ka ratã, ka leb n yaa maam n maand ye, la yaa yel-wẽnã sẽn be mam pʋgẽ wã." 
Romans7:21 Mam sẽn dat n maan neerã, mam mikame tɩ tõ-kãngã n be ne maam: Wẽng n yegd maam." 
Romans7:22 Mam sũurã zĩ-zulungẽ wã, mam sũ-noog bee ne Wẽnnaam tõodã." 
Romans7:23 La mam yãta tõog a to mam yĩnga wilẽ, t'a maood ne mam yam-wekrã tõogã, n kɩtd tɩ mam ya yel-wẽnã sẽn be mam yĩngã wilẽ wã tõog yamba." 
Romans7:24 Mam yaa nĩmbãan-neda. Ãnda n na n yiis maam yĩn-kãngã sẽn yaa kũumã nugẽ? 
Romans7:25 Bɩ d pʋʋs Wẽnnaam bark tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga. Woto, ne mam yam-wekre, mam yaa Wẽnnaam tõogã yamba, la sã n yaa ne mam yĩngã, mam yaa yel-wẽnã tõog yamba." 
Romans8:1 Woto yĩnga, sɩbgr ka be neb nins sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ [n kẽnd wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã raabã la ka yĩng ratmã] zut ye." 
Romans8:2 Sɩd me, Sɩɩg sẽn kõt vɩɩm a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã tõog yolsa maam ne yel-wẽnã tõogo, la ne kũum tõog yembdo." 
Romans8:3 Bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋm b meng Bi-riblã ne yĩng sẽn wẽnd yel-wẽnã rẽndã, yaa yel-wẽnã yiisg yĩnga. Bi-riblã zĩnda b yĩngã pʋgẽ n wilg tɩ yel-wẽnã ka sõama ye. La tõogã ka tõe rẽnda ye. Bala, yĩngã kɩtame t'a ka pãng ye." 
Romans8:4 Kiris maana a woto tɩ tɩrlem ning tõogã sẽn yeel tɩ d tog n paamame wã na pid tõnd pʋsẽ, tõnd sẽn kẽnd wa sẽn zems Sɩɩgã raabo la ka yĩng rẽndã yĩnga." 
Romans8:5 Sɩd me, neb nins sẽn vɩ wa yĩngã sẽn datã, yĩngã sẽn dat bũmb ninsã n tusd bãmba, la yaa Sɩɩgã sẽn dat bũmb ninsã n tɛt neb nins sẽn kẽnd wa Sɩɩgã sẽn datã." 
Romans8:6 Yĩngã ratem sakr wata ne kũum, la Sɩɩgã ratem sakr wata ne vɩɩm la bãane." 
Romans8:7 Bala, yĩngã ratem sakr yaa beem ne Wẽnnaam, tɩ bõe, yĩngã ka sakd Wẽnnaam tõogã ye, la a pʋs n ka tõe n sak-a me ye." 
Romans8:8 La neb nins yĩngã ratem sẽn so wã yaool n ka tõe n ta Wẽnnaam yam ye. 
Romans8:9 Ne yãmba, yĩngã ratem ka leb n so yãmb yɛs ye, yaa Sɩɩgã n so yãmba, sã n yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã bee yãmb pʋse. Ned sã n ka tar Kiris Sɩɩgã, a ka bãmb dẽnd ye." 
Romans8:10 La Kiris sã n be yãmb pʋgẽ, yaa sɩd tɩ yĩngã yaa kũum yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la Sɩɩgã kõta vɩɩm, tɩrlmã yĩnga." 
Romans8:11 La soab ning sẽn vʋʋg a Zeezi tɩ b yi kũum sʋkã Sɩɩg sã n be yãmb pʋgẽ, soab‑kãnga, sẽn vʋʋg-a a Zeezi Kiris tɩ b yi kũum sʋkã na n kõo yãmb yĩn-kiidsã me vɩɩm, bãmb Sɩɩgã sẽn be yãmb pʋgẽ wã maasem yĩnga." 
Romans8:12 Woto yĩngã, m ba-biisi, tõnd tara samde, la ka yĩngã samde, n na n vɩɩmd wa yĩngã sẽn dat ye." 
Romans8:13 Yãmb sã n vɩɩmd wa yĩngã sẽn data, yãmb na ki. La yãmb sã n kɩt tɩ yĩngã tʋʋm ki ne Sɩɩgã pãnga, yãmb na vɩɩmde." 
Romans8:14 Bala, neb nins fãa Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã sẽn tɛt yaa Wẽnnaam kamba." 
Romans8:15 Yãmb ka reeg yembd sɩɩg n na n ket n vɩ rabeem pʋgẽ ye. La yãmb reega Sɩɩg sẽn kɩtd tɩ yãmb lebg Wẽnnaam kamba, tɩ Sɩ-kãng maasem yĩnga, tõnd yetame tɩ Abba, sẽn dat n yeel tɩ «m ba.»" 
Romans8:16 Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã meng kɩta kaset ne tõnd sɩɩgã n yetẽ tɩ tõnd yaa Wẽnnaam kamba. 
Romans8:17 La tõnd sã n yaa bãmb kamba, tõnd yaa b rãmb nins sẽn na n soog bãmb paoong me. Tõnd na n sooga Wẽnnaam paoongã, la d yaa pʋɩt-n-taas ne Kirisi, a sã n yaa tɩ tõnd lagma ne bãmb n namse, tɩ d tõe n naag bãmb n paam waoogr me." 
Romans8:18 Sɩdã, mam getame tɩ namsg nins sẽn tar tõnd moasã wã ka tõe n dɩk n mak ne ziir ning sẽn na n puk tõnd yĩng nindaarã ye." 
Romans8:19 Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ dũni bõn-naandsã fãa gũud Wẽnnaam kambã pukr ne datem kãsenga. 
Romans8:20 Bala, bõn-naandsã kẽe faoolem pʋgẽ. Ka ne b meng yamleoog ye, la yaa ned ning sẽn kẽes-a bãmb be wã yĩnga." 
Romans8:21 B be faoolmã pʋgẽ ne tẽeb pidsg gũudum‑kãngã: Bõn-naands kãens na n paama yolsg ne yembdo, la sãoongã, n paam pʋɩɩr ne Wẽnnaam kambã lohorem sẽn be ziirã." 
Romans8:22 Tõnd yaool n miime tɩ hal tɩ ta moasã, bõn-naandsã fãa wẽeda siri, tɩ rogem toog tar-ba." 
Romans8:23 Sẽn yɩɩda, tõnd mensã sẽn zoe n paam Sɩɩgã reng-n-lɛmbgã, tõnd me wẽeda sir d pʋsẽ, n gũud wakat ning Wẽnnaam sẽn na n deeg tõnd n maan b kambã, la d gũud tɩ b yols tõnd yĩngã n baase." 
Romans8:24 Bala, tõnd paama fãagre, la yaa ne tẽebo. La bũmb ning fo sẽn gũud ne tẽebã sã n yaa bũmb f sẽn ne, ka leb n ya tẽeb yell ye. Fo sã n ne bũmbu, f tõe n leb n tẽe a paoong yɛsa?" 
Romans8:25 La tõnd sã n tẽed tɩ d na n paama bũmb nins tõnd sẽn ka ne, tõnd maood n gũud-a lame." 
Romans8:26 Woto me, Sɩɩgã wat n sõngda tõnd d pãn-komsmã pʋgẽ, bala, tõnd ka mi d sẽn segd n kos bũmb nins d pʋʋsg pʋgẽ ye. La Sɩɩgã meng yõkda sɛɛg ne sir ned sẽn ka tõe n togs ye." 
Romans8:27 La soab ning sẽn feesd sũyã mii bũmb ning Sɩɩgã sẽn data. Bãmb yõkda Wẽnnaam sɛɛg nin-sõamyã yĩng wa sẽn zemsd Wẽnnaam daabo. 
Romans8:28 La tõnd miime tɩ bũmb fãa tʋmda ne taab neb nins sẽn nong Wẽnnaamã, b rãmb sẽn paam boolg wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam yam-yãkrã sõngr yĩnga." 
Romans8:29 Bala, neb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn pĩnd n bãngã, b pĩnd n yãka yam tɩ b na n wẽnega bãmb Bi-riblã, tɩ bãmb Bi-riblã na yɩ bi-rẽeng ba-biis wʋsg sʋka." 
Romans8:30 La neb nins bãmb sẽn pĩnd n tʋlsã, b bool-b lame: La bãmb sẽn bool-b rãmbã, b kɩtame me tɩ b zemse. La neb nins bãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ b zemsã, b waoog-b lame me." 
Romans8:31 Dẽ, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe ne yel-kãnga? Wẽnnaam sã n bee ne tõndo, ãnda n tõe n zab ne tõndo?" 
Romans8:32 Bãmb sẽn ka bas b meng Bi-riblã tɩ b põse, n dɩk-b n kõ tɩ b kʋ tõnd fãa yĩngã, na n yɩɩ wãn tɩ b ka lagem bũmbã fãa ne bãmb n kõ tõndo, nimbãan-zoeer yĩngã?" 
Romans8:33 Ãnda n na n dõd Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã? Yaa Wẽnnaam la sẽn kɩtd tɩ ned lebg tɩrgã. 
Romans8:34 Ãnda n na n kao b bʋʋd n sɩbg-ba? A Zeezi Kiris la sẽn ki-a wã. La sẽn yɩɩda, bãmb vʋʋgame, b bee Wẽnnaam nug-rɩtgo, b yõkda sɛɛg tõnd yĩnga." 
Romans8:35 Bõe n na n welg tõnd ne Kiris nonglmã? yel-pakr bɩ? Sũ-sãang kãseng bɩ? namsgo bɩ? Kom bɩ? bɩ naongo, bɩ Sãoongo, bɩ zabr sʋʋga?" 
Romans8:36 Wa b sẽn gʋlsã: B kʋʋda tõnd daarã tõr fo yĩnga. B geta tõnd wa piis b sẽn koota. 
Romans8:37 La bõn-kãens fãa pʋgẽ, tõnd yaa tõaagdb hakɩɩka, sẽn nong-a tõndã maasem yĩnga." 
Romans8:38 Bala, mam sũur keemame tɩ kũum, wall vɩɩm, wall malegse, wall pãn-soaadba, wall bũmb sẽn be moasã, wall bũmb sẽn wata," 
Romans8:39 wall pãense, wall yĩngr nebã, wall tẽngr nebã, wall bõn-naandg a to baa a yembr kõn n welg tõnd ne Wẽnnaam nonglem sẽn be tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã ye." 
Romans9:1 Mam yeta sɩd Kiris pʋgẽ, mam ka yagd zĩrẽ ye. Mam sũ-bãngrã kɩta maam bõn-kãng kaseto, Sɩɩg-sõng maasem yĩnga." 
Romans9:2 Sũ-sãoon-kãsenga, la sũ‑sãang n be mam sũurẽ wã daar fãa." 
Romans9:3 Bala, mam dag n nongẽ lame tɩ kãab wẽng zĩnd mam zugu, la m welg ne Kiris m ba-biisã, la m ba-rãmba ne yĩng yelle, sõngr yĩnga." 
Romans9:4 Bãmb yaa Israyɛll rãmba, b rãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn deeg n maan b kamba tɩ b so ziiri, la kaoolã, la tõogã, la kaorengo, la kãabdo, la yaab-rãmba." 
Romans9:5 Sã n yaa ne yĩng yelle, yaa bãmb n dog Kirisã, soab ning sẽn yɩɩd bũmba fãa, n yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bark soab wakat sẽn ka sɩngr n kõn zĩnd saabã. Ãmina!" 
Romans9:6 A ka tɩ Wẽnnaam goamã lebga zaalem ye. Bala, ka b rãmb fãa sẽn yaa a Israyɛll yagensã n yaa Israyɛll ye." 
Romans9:7 Ka b sẽn yaa a Abrahaam roogã neb yĩng la b yaa a yagens ye. La b yeelame yaa: Na n tũnuga a Izak tɩ fo paam yagens sẽn tar fo yʋʋre," 
Romans9:8 sẽn dat n togs tɩ ka kamb nins sẽn yaa b yĩng neongã n yaa Wẽnnaam kamb ye, la yaa neb nins b sẽn kãab-bã la b geend wa b yagense." 
Romans9:9 Sɩd me, ad kãabgã gomde: Vẽer woto wẽnde, mam na n lebg n waame, la rẽ t'a Saara paama bi-ribla." 
Romans9:10 Sẽn yɩɩda, yɩɩ woto me ne a Rebeka, sẽn tall tõnd ba a Izak bal pʋgã." 
Romans9:11 Bala, kambã da nan ka rog ye, la b ra nan ka maan neer bɩ wẽng ye. Baoosgo, Wẽnnaam daabã kell n yalsa wa sẽn zems bãmb sẽn yãkã, la yãkrã ka tũud ne tʋʋmã ye, a tũuda ne sẽn bool-a wã." 
Romans9:12 B yeela a Rebeka yaa: 
Romans9:13 Yao wã na n sooga kẽemã, wa sẽn gʋlsã: Mam nonga a Zakoobe, la mam kisga a Ezayu." 
Romans9:14 Dẽ, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Dẽ yĩnga, ka-tɩrlem bee Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ la? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ka ye." 
Romans9:15 Bala, b yeela a Moyiis yaa: Mam na n zoee ned ning m sẽn na n zoe a nimbãanegã nimbãanega, la m na n yãba ned ning m sẽn na n yãbã." 
Romans9:16 Woto yĩnga, yel-kãng ka tũud ne soab ning sẽn data, wall ne soab ning sẽn zoet ye, bee ne Wẽnnaam, soab ning sẽn zoet nimbãanegã." 
Romans9:17 Bala, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã yeela Farawõ yaa: Mam zẽka foom ne m raabo, n na n tall foom n wilg m pãngã, tɩ b na moon mam yʋʋrã tẽng zug tɛk fãa." 
Romans9:18 Woto, bãmb zoeta ned ning b sẽn dat n zoe a nimbãanegã nimbãanega, la bãmb sẽn dat t'a soab sũur yɩ kɛgenga, b kengda a soabã sũurã." 
Romans9:19 Dẽ, fo na n yeela maam yaa: Bõe la bãmb na n leb n yeel tɩ ka zemse? Bala, ãnda n tõe n kɩɩs bãmb sẽn datã?" 
Romans9:20 La fo yẽ, foom la ãnda n tõe n wẽ no-koeemd ne Wẽnnaam? Bũmb ning yagbã sẽn yagdã na n yeela yagbã tɩ yaa bõe yĩng t'a yagd yẽnda a woto?" 
Romans9:21 Ka yagbã n so yagdã, n yãkd yagd a yembr pʋgẽ n yagd teoogo a tʋʋm sẽn be waoogre, la a yagd teoogo a tʋʋm sẽn be paoogr la?" 
Romans9:22 La Wẽnnaam sã n maan sũ-mar wʋsg ne lagd sẽn wat ne sũ-yikri la sẽn maan sãoong yĩngã, n na n wilg b sũ-yikri la b kɩt tɩ nebã bãng bãmb pãngã?" 
Romans9:23 La bãmb sã n dag n datame n kɩt tɩ lagd sẽn zems ne nimbãan-zoeere, la bãmb sẽn pĩnd n yãk tɩ b paam ziirã bãng bãmb ziirã sẽn zems to-to?" 
Romans9:24 Dat n togs tɩ tõndo, neb b sẽn boole, ka Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋk bal ye, la bu-zẽmsã sʋk me," 
Romans9:25 wa bãmb sẽn yeel a Ooze sebrã pʋgẽ wã: Ned ning sẽn dag ka mam nedã, mam na n boola a soab tɩ m neda, la ned ning sẽn dag n ka m noangã, mam na n bool-a lame tɩ m noanga." 
Romans9:26 La zĩig ning meng b sẽn dag n yet bãmb tɩ b ka mam nebã, be bala, b na n boola bãmb tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ kom-dibli." 
Romans9:27 A Ezayi me goma Israyɛll yell n yeele: Baa Israyɛll nebã sõor sã n ta ko-kãsengã bĩisrã sõore, neb bilf bal n na põse." 
Romans9:28 Bala, bũmb ning Zu-soabã sẽn yeelã, b na n maan-a-la zãng tẽng zugu, la b na n maan-a-la tao-tao." 
Romans9:29 La a wa a Ezayi sẽn da pĩnd n yeelã, Saasẽ sodaas naabã sã n dag ka kellẽ tõnd buudã, tõnd dag n na n lebgẽ la wa Sodom, la tõnd dag n na n wẽnegẽ‑la Gomoore." 
Romans9:30 Dẽ, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Bu-zẽmsã, sẽn dag n ka baood-b tɩrlmã paama tɩrlem, tɩrlem ning tẽeb sẽn kõtã." 
Romans9:31 Tɩ Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n baood tõog sẽn wat ne tɩrlmã ka paam tõ-kãng ye. 
Romans9:32 Bõe yĩnga? Yaa tɩ Israyɛll ka bao tɩrlmã ne tẽeb ye, la yaa ne tʋʋmã. Bãmb laka kug-lakdgã," 
Romans9:33 wa sẽn gʋlsã: Ade, mam ningda kug-lakdgã la kugr sẽn lubd neb Sɩyõ pʋgẽ. La ned ning sẽn tẽed-a bãmb kõn paam yãnd ye." 
Romans10:1 M ba-biisi, mam sũurã raabo, la mam bõosg ne Wẽnnaam b yĩng yaa tɩ b paam fãagre." 
Romans10:2 Bala, mam kɩta bãmb kaset n yetẽ tɩ b tara ratem wʋsg Wẽnnaam yĩnga, la b ka tar bãngr ye." 
Romans10:3 Bãmb sẽn zɩ Wẽnnaam tɩrlmã yellã, la b rat n zĩndg b meng tɩrlmã, b ka sak n tũ Wẽnnaam tɩrlmã ye." 
Romans10:4 Bala, Kiris yaa tõogã baoosg zĩiga, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed na paam tɩrlem." 
Romans10:5 Sɩd me, a Moyiis gʋlsa tɩrlem ning tõogã sẽn wat ne wã yell n yeele: Ned sã n maan wa tõogã sẽn yeelã, tõogã na kɩt t'a vɩɩmde." 
Romans10:6 La tɩrlem ning tẽeb sẽn wat ne wã yeta a woto: Da tags f sũurẽ tɩ: Ãnda n na n dʋ arzãna? A rʋʋb yaa tɩ sigs Kirisã be. 
Romans10:7 Wall ãnda n na n sig bog-zulungã pʋgẽ? A sigb yaa tɩ tak Kiris n yiis kɩɩm-kulgu. 
Romans10:8 Sã n yaa a woto, tẽebã yetame tɩ bõe? Gomdã pẽe foom, a bee fo noorẽ la f sũurẽ. Yaool n yaa tẽeb gomdã la tõnd moonda." 
Romans10:9 Fo sã n kɩs Zu-soab a Zeezi kaset ne f noore, la fo sã n tẽ f sũurẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam vʋʋga bãmb n yiis kũum sʋka, fo na paam fãagre." 
Romans10:10 Bala, yaa ned sẽn na n tar tẽeb a sũurẽ la a paamd tɩrlem, la yaa ned sẽn na n kɩs kaset ne a no-goam la a paamd fãagre," 
Romans10:11 wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yetã: Ned ning fãa sẽn tẽed bãmb kõn paam yãnd ye. 
Romans10:12 Sɩd me, welgr ka be Zʋɩf ne Gɛrk sʋk ye: B fãa tara Zu-soab a yembr sẽn maand neb nins fãa sẽn boond bãmbã neer wʋsgo." 
Romans10:13 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn na n bool Zu-soabã yʋʋr na n paama fãagre."
