Romans10:14 La bãmb na n yɩɩ a wãn n bool ned ning b sẽn ka tẽedã yʋʋre? La b na n yɩɩ a wãn n tẽ ned tɩ b ka wʋm tɩ b gomd a yelle? La b na n yɩɩ a wãn n wʋm tɩ b gomd a yelle, koe-moaandb sã n ka beẽ?" 
Romans10:15 La koe-moaandb na n yɩɩ wãn n zĩndi, ned sã n ka tʋm-ba? Wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Neb nins sẽn moond koe-noogã nao tara rasãnde." 
Romans10:16 La ka nebã fãa n sak koe-noogã ye. Dẽ n kɩt t'a Ezayi yeel yaa: Zu-soaba, ãnda n tẽ tõnd sẽn togsã?" 
Romans10:17 Woto, yaa bũmb ning ned sẽn wʋmdã n wat ne tẽebo, la bũmb ning a sẽn wʋmdã yita Kiris goamã pʋgẽ." 
Romans10:18 La mam sokdame tɩ b ka wʋm la? B wʋm yã! Bãmb koɛɛg saaga tẽn-tõrã, la bãmb goamã taa dũni tɛk fãa." 
Romans10:19 La mam sokdame tɩ Israyɛll nebã ka bãng la? A Moyiis n yɩ pipi n yeel yaa: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ neb sẽn ka soolem sũ-kiir yõk yãmba, la mam na n dɩka buud sẽn ka tar yam vẽnegre, n kɩt tɩ yãmb sũyã yiki." 
Romans10:20 La a Ezayi pʋs n paama raood n yeele: Neb nins sẽn dag n ka baood maamã yãnda maam. La mam puka m meng ne neb nins sẽn dag n ka sokd mam yellã. 
Romans10:21 La a goma Israyɛll yell n yeele: Daarã tõre, mam tẽega m nusi, n tees neb sẽn yaa kɩɩsdba, la no-koeem-wẽedba." 
Romans11:1 Dẽ, mam sokdame yaa: Wẽnnaam zãgsa b nebã la? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ b ka zãgs-b ye. Bala, mam me yaa Israyɛll neda, a Abrahaam yagenga, a Benzame buudu." 
Romans11:2 Wẽnnaam ka zãgs b nebã bãmb sẽn pĩnd n bãngã ye. Yãmb ka mi bũmb ning Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yeta, zĩig ning a Eli sẽn yẽgem ne Wẽnnaam Israyɛll nebã poorẽ wã?" 
Romans11:3 Zu-soaba, b kʋʋ yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã, b leeba yãmb tẽn-kugã n lubi. Maam m yembr n kelle, tɩ b baood maam n na n kʋ." 
Romans11:4 La Wẽnnaam leokame tɩ bõe? Mam welga raop tus a yopoe m mengã yĩnga, la b ka yĩgimd baall taoor ye." 
Romans11:5 Woto me, moasã, neb n kelle, wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam sẽn tũus b rãmb b barkã pʋgẽ wã." 
Romans11:6 La sã n yaa ne Wẽnnaam bark la ned paamd fãagre, ka leb n yaa ne tʋʋm ye. Sã n ka rẽ, barkã ka leb n ya nimbãan-zoeer ye [la sã n yaa ne tʋʋmã la ned paamd fãagre, ka leb n yaa nimbãan-zoeer yell ye. Sã n ka rẽ, tʋʋmd ka leb n yaa tʋʋmd ye.]" 
Romans11:7 Dẽ, yaa bõe? Israyɛll nebã ka paam bũmb ning b sẽn dag n baoodã ye, la nin-tũusdsã paam-a lame. Neb a taabã sũy riglmame," 
Romans11:8 wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Hal tɩ ta dũndã daare, Wẽnnaam kõo bãmb gõeem sɩɩga, nin sẽn ka ne, tʋb sẽn ka wʋmda. La a Davɩɩd yeelame yaa:" 
Romans11:9 Bɩ b rɩɩbã yɩ bẽdg b yĩnga, gãmbre, kug-lakdga, la b yaoodo." 
Romans11:10 Bɩ b ninã lebg lik n ka tõe n yãnd ye, la y kɩt tɩ b kuudẽ n ka tõe n doog ye." 
Romans11:11 Dẽ, mam sokdame yaa: B lakame n na n lʋɩ? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ka a woto ye. La bãmb lʋɩɩsã wa ne bu-zẽmsã fãagre, tɩ sũ-kiir na yõk Israyɛll nebã." 
Romans11:12 Bãmb lʋɩɩsã sã n zĩnda yõod ne dũni, tɩ bãmb kongrã zĩnd yõod bu-zẽmsã yĩnga, bãmb yikr zãng kõn zĩnd yõod n yɩɩda?" 
Romans11:13 Bu-zẽmsã, mam yeta yãmba: Mam sẽn yaa tẽn-tʋmd bu-zẽmsã sʋka, mam waoogda m tʋʋmdã," 
Romans11:14 tɩ sã n tõe, bɩ m kɩt tɩ sũ-kiir yõk mam buudã, tɩ m tõe n fãag neb kẽere." 
Romans11:15 Bala, b sẽn bas bãmb kɛɛngã sã n kɩtame tɩ dũni paam yel-manegr ne Wẽnnaam, b sẽn na n leb n deeg bãmbã na n yɩɩ a wãnã? A kõn yɩ vʋʋg n bas kũum sɩda?" 
Romans11:16 La dẽenem biisã sã n welga toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, zom-nagdgã me welga toore. La yẽgrã sã n welga toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, wilã me yaa a woto." 
Romans11:17 La sã n yaa tɩ b kʋʋsa wil kẽere, n dɩk fo sẽn ya weoogẽ oliiv tɩɩgã n lebs n tong b zĩigẽ wã, tɩ fo paam lagem-n-taar ne oliiv tɩɩgã yẽg la a sũma," 
Romans11:18 da paoog wilã n waoog f meng ye. Fo sã n waoogd f menga, bãng tɩ ka foom n zãad yẽgã ye, la yaa bãmb n zãad foom." 
Romans11:19 Daar ninga fo na n yeelame: Bkʋʋsa wilã, tɩ b tõe n lebs maam n tong beenẽ." 
Romans11:20 Yaa sõama yẽ. Yaa b ka-tẽebã yĩng la b sẽn kʋʋs-bã. La yaa tẽeb yĩng la fo ket n vɩ. Da paam wuk-m-meng tagsg ye, ayo, maan dabeem." 
Romans11:21 Bala, Wẽnnaam sã n ka bas tɩɩgã meng wila, b ka na n bas foom me ye." 
Romans11:22 Ges Wẽnnaamã sõmblmã ne b toolmã yelle: Bãmb yaa toaag ne neb nins sẽn lʋɩ wã, la Wẽnnaam sõmblem fo yĩnga, fo sã n pa sõmblem-kãng pʋgẽ. Sã n ka rẽ, b na n kʋʋga foom me." 
Romans11:23 Bãmb me sã ka pa ka-tẽebã pʋgẽ, b na n lebs-b lame n tom ne tɩɩgã. Bala, Wẽnnaam pãnga sekame tɩ lebs-b n tom yɛsa." 
Romans11:24 B kʋʋga foom oliiv tɩɩg sẽn yaa weoog bũmb zugu, n tong foom ne yir oliiv tɩɩga, baa ne rẽ sẽn ka zemsd ne foomã. Sẽn yaa bãmb meng tɩɩg la rẽ wã, Wẽnnaam kõn lebs-b n tom be n yɩɩda, a sẽn zemsd ne bãmbã yĩnga?" 
Romans11:25 Bala, m ba-biisi, mam ka rat tɩ yãmb zɩ yel-solem-kãngã ye, tɩ yãmb da wa n get y mens wa yam dãmb ye: Israyɛll nebã kenga b sũy wakat bilf yĩnga, hal tɩ bu-zẽmsã fãa na kẽ fãagrã pʋgẽ." 
Romans11:26 Rẽ zugẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa na n paama fãagr wa sẽn gʋlsã: Yoalsdã na n yii Siyõ. B na n kɩtame t'a Zakoob bas Wẽn-kɩɩsgo." 
Romans11:27 Mam kaool ne bãmb na n yɩɩ a woto wakat ning mam sẽn na n yẽes b yel-wẽnã. 
Romans11:28 Sã n yaa ne koe-noogã yelle, b yaa bɛɛba, yãmb yĩnga. La sã n yaa ne yãkrã, Wẽnnaam nong-b lame, b ba-rãmbã yĩnga." 
Romans11:29 Bala, bũmb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ zaalmã, ne boolg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn boolã ka tõe n viig ye." 
Romans11:30 A wa yãmb sẽn dag n kɩɩs Wẽnnaam, n paam nimbãan-zoeer moasã Israyɛll nebã kɩɩsg yĩngã," 
Romans11:31 woto me, bãmb me kɩɩsa moasã, tɩ b tõe n paam nimbãan-zoeer moasã, nimbãan-zoeer ning yãmb sẽn paamã maasem yĩnga." 
Romans11:32 Bala, Wẽnnaam kẽesa nebã fãa kɩɩsg pʋgẽ, n na n naag b fãa n zoe b nimbãanega." 
Romans11:33 Wẽnnaam arzegsã, la b yamã ne b bãngrã zulma wʋsgo. Ned ka tõe n vees bãmb bʋʋdã soay n bãng ye, la ned ka tõe n wʋm bãmb so-tũudsã võor ye. Sɩd me," 
Romans11:34 ãnda n bãng Zu-soabã tagsgo? Wall ãnda n yɩ bãmb sagenda? 
Romans11:35 Ãnda n deng n kõ bãmba, tɩ bãmb tog lebs a soaba?" 
Romans11:36 Bũmb fãa yii bãmb nengẽ, bãmb n maan bũmb fãa, la bũmb fãa yaa bãmb yĩnga. Bãmb n so ziir wakat fãa. Ãmina." 
Romans12:1 Woto yĩnga, m ba-biisi, mam sagenda yãmb ne Wẽnnaam nimbãan-zoeerã tɩ y kõ y yĩnsã tɩ yɩ maan-vɩɩs sẽn welg toore, la sẽn tat Wẽnnaam yam. Yãmb sã n maan a woto, na n yɩɩ kaoreng sẽn zemse." 
Romans12:2 Da yɩ-y wa dũni‑kãngã nebã ye. Paam-y yam-wek-paalle, tɩ rẽ tek yãmba, tɩ y tõe n bãng Wẽnnaam daabo: Rẽ yaa sõama, n noomẽ la a zemsa zãnga." 
Romans12:3 Ne bark ning Wẽnnaam sẽn maan maamã, mam yeta yãmb ned kam fãa t'a ra tags tɩ yẽnda yaa tɩrg tɩ looge, n kẽes a tagsd moog ye. La bɩ ned fãa paam tagsd sẽn zemse, t'a tõe n paam sik-m-menga, tɩ zems ne tẽeb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ-a wã." 
Romans12:4 Sɩd me, a wa tõnd yĩngã sẽn yaa a yembr n tar wil wʋsgã, la tɩ wilã fãa tʋʋm ka yembrã," 
Romans12:5 woto me, baa ne tõnd sẽn yaa wʋsgã, tõnd lagem n yaa yĩng a yembr Kirisã pʋgẽ, n yaa wil ne taaba." 
Romans12:6 La tõnd paama kũun toay-toayã, n zems ne bark ning Wẽnnaam sẽn maan tõndã: Sã n yaa pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, bɩ a zemsd ne tẽebã." 
Romans12:7 Sã n yaa yel-gesg tʋʋmde, bɩ a yɩ ne tʋʋmd tagsgo. Bɩ ned ning sẽn zãmsd neb wɩng ne zãmsgã." 
Romans12:8 Ned ning sẽn sagend nebã, bɩ a wɩng ne saglgo. Ned sã n yaa kõata, bɩ a kõ ne sik-m-menga. Sẽn yaa-a taoor soaba, bɩ a maan a tʋʋmd ne a sũur fãa. Sẽn yaa-a nimbãan-zoɛta, bɩ yɩ ne sũ-noogo." 
Romans12:9 Kɩt-y tɩ zãmb da zĩnd nonglem pʋgẽ ye. Kisg-y wẽnga, la y nong sẽn yaa sõama wã sõama." 
Romans12:10 Nong-y taab ne ba-biir nonglem. Nand-y taaba, n tagsd taab yelle." 
Romans12:11 Yɩ-y neb sẽn wɩngd ne tʋʋmde, la y ra yɩ kʋɩɩmb ye. Wɩng-y ne sɩɩgã yelle. Maan-y Zu-soabã tʋʋmde." 
Romans12:12 Maan-y tẽeb n kɩdme. Paam-y sũ-mar yel-pakr pʋgẽ. Wɩng-y ne pʋʋsgo. 
Romans12:13 Sõng-y nin-tũusdsã sẽn dat sõngrã. Mao-y n maand-y sãambã sãando. 
Romans12:14 Ning-y neb nins sẽn namsd yãmbã zut barka. Ning-y bark la y ra kãab-b wẽng ye. 
Romans12:15 Maan-y sũ-noog ne neb nins sẽn maand sũ-noogo, la y yãb ne neb nins sẽn yãbda." 
Romans12:16 Paam-y tagsg a yembr taab yĩnga. Da bao-y tɩ paam bõn-kãsems ye. Kɩt-y tɩ y ratem zĩnd ne bõn-talse. Da ges-y y mens wa yam dãmb ye. 
Romans12:17 Da lebs-y ned baa a ye wẽng wẽng yĩng ye. Bao-y bũmb nins sẽn yaa sõama nebã fãa nifẽ wã. 
Romans12:18 Sã n tõe, t'a yellã sã n bee ne yãmba, bɩ y kɩt tɩ laafɩ zĩnd yãmb ne nebã fãa sʋka." 
Romans12:19 M zo-nongdse, da rok-y y sũy y toor ye. Bas-y tɩ sũ-yikrã maan a tʋʋmde. Bala, b gʋlsame yaa: Zu-soabã yetame tɩ sũ-dokr yaa bãmb n so, la yaa bãmb n na n keo nebã." 
Romans12:20 Kom sã n tar fo bɛyã, kõ-a t'a rɩ. Ko-yũud sã n tar-a, kõ-a t'a yũ. Bala, fo sã n maand a woto, yaa bug-saal la fo rʋʋgd a zugu." 
Romans12:21 Da sak tɩ wẽng tõog foom ye. Maan neer n tõog wẽnga. 
Romans13:1 Bɩ ned fãa sak pãn-soaadb sẽn yɩɩd-a. Bala, noor ka be sẽn ka yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ ye, la yaa Wẽnnaam n zĩnig pãn-soaadb nins sẽn be wã." 
Romans13:2 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ ned ning sẽn kɩɩsd pãn-soaadb kɩɩsda Wẽnnaam noore. La neb nins sẽn kɩɩsdã na n baoo sɩbgr n kõ b mense. 
Romans13:3 Ned sã n maand neere, a ka yɛɛsd sẽn zãad-b tẽng ye. Yaa a sẽn maand wẽng la a yɛɛsd-ba. Fo ratame n da zoe pãn-soaad dabeem? Maan neere, la a na yeel tɩ f sẽn maanda yaa sõama." 
Romans13:4 Bala, a tʋmda Wẽnnaam tʋʋmde, fo sõngr yĩnga. La fo sã n maan wẽnga, maan dabeem. Bala, a sẽn zãad zabr sʋʋgã ka zaalem ye. A tʋmda Wẽnnaam yĩnga, n wilg ned ning sẽn maand wẽngã Wẽnnaam sũ-dokre, la b sũ-yikri." 
Romans13:5 Dẽ wã yĩnga, nebã tog n saka noore, sũ-yikr‑kãng yĩnga, la ka rẽ yĩng bal ye, yaa sũur kaset yĩng me." 
Romans13:6 Yaa bõn-kãng yĩng me la yãmb yaood yaoodã. Bala, neb nins sẽn zãad nebã bee Wẽnnaam tʋʋmd pʋgẽ, bõn-kãng maaneg yĩnga." 
Romans13:7 Kɩs-y ned fãa bũmb ning y sẽn tog n kɩs-a: Kɩs-y sẽn tog n deeg-a yaoodã yaoodo, la y kɩs sẽn tog n deeg-a yõor yaoodã yõor yaoodo, la y zoe ned ning y sẽn tog n zoe wã, la y waoog ned ning y sẽn tog n waooge." 
Romans13:8 Da tall-y ned samde, sã n ka tɩ nong taab ye. Bala, ned ning sẽn nong a taab pidsa Wẽnnaam tõogã zãnga." 
Romans13:9 Sɩd me, d tõe n gila tõod nins sẽn yet tɩ: Da yo ye, da kʋ ye, da zu ye, [da kɩs kaset zĩrẽ ye], da ges f to bũmb n dat ye, la tõod a taabã yeelame tɩ: Nong f to wa f menga." 
Romans13:10 Nonglem kɩtdame tɩ f ka maand f to wẽng ye. Dẽ, nonglem yaa tõogã pidsgu." 
Romans13:11 Yãmb sẽn mi wakat ning tõnd sẽn be wã, moasã yaa wakat tɩ y nek n bas gõeem. Bala, fãagrã pẽe ne tõnd moasã n yɩɩd wakat ning tõnd sẽn lebg Kiris tẽedbã." 
Romans13:12 Zĩigã zoee n zʋʋgame, la zĩig kolga yẽegre. Dẽ, wa-y tɩ d bas likã tʋʋma, la d bob vẽenem pʋgẽ zab-teedo." 
Romans13:13 Tɩ d kẽn ne pʋ-peelem, wa neb sẽn kẽnd wĩndga, n ka rɩt tɩ loogdẽ, la d ka rã-yũudba, n da maan raglem la yoobo, wall ka wʋm-taaba la sũ-kiir ye." 
Romans13:14 Yeelg-y Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris wa fuugu, la y ra bʋ yĩngã yelle n dat n pids a sẽn datã ye." 
Romans14:1 Reeg-y ned ning sẽn ka-a pãng tẽeb pʋgẽ wã sõama, la y ra wẽ no-koeemd ne-a a tagsg wɛɛngẽ ye." 
Romans14:2 Nina tẽedame t'a tõe n dɩɩ bũmba fãa. Ned a to sẽn yaa pãn-komsem soab rɩta zẽ-vãad bala. 
Romans14:3 Bɩ ned ning sẽn dɩt-a wã ra paoog sẽn ka rɩt-a wã ye, la bɩ ned ning sẽn ka rɩt-a wã ra bʋ sẽn dɩt-a wã bʋʋd ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam reeg-a-la sõama." 
Romans14:4 Fo sẽn kaood f to tʋmtʋmd bʋʋdã, foom la ãnda? A yɛsa yĩngr t'a lʋɩtame, paka a zu-soabã. La a na n yalsa yĩngri, bala, Zu-soabã tara pãn-tõog tɩ tebend-a." 
Romans14:5 Nina tagsdame tɩ daar yɩɩda a to. Tɩ ned a to getẽ tɩ b zema taaba. Bɩ ned fãa bãng t'a sẽn tagsdã zemsame. 
Romans14:6 Ned ning sẽn tagsd dayã yellã, yaa Zu-soabã yĩng la a tagsd b yelle. Sẽn dɩt-a wã, yaa Zu-soabã yĩng la a rɩta, bala, a pʋʋsda Zu-soabã barka. Sẽn ka rɩt-a wã, yaa Zu-soabã yĩng la a ka rɩta. Yẽnda me pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam barka." 
Romans14:7 Sɩd me, tõnd ned baa a yembr ka vɩ a meng yĩng ye, la baa a yembr ka kiid a meng yĩng ye." 
Romans14:8 Bala, tõnd sã n vɩya, yaa Zu-soabã yĩng la tõnd vɩ. La tõnd sã n ki, yaa Zu-soabã yĩng la tõnd kiyã. Tɩ tõnd vɩ, tɩ d ya kũum me, tõnd yaa Zu-soabã rẽnda." 
Romans14:9 Bala, Kiris kiime n lebg n vʋʋge, tɩ b tõe n yɩ sẽn ki-bã ne sẽn vɩ-bã Zu-soaba." 
Romans14:10 La yaa bõe tɩ fo yẽ kaood f ba-biig bʋʋdo? Wall yaa bõe yĩng tɩ fo yẽ paoogd f ba-biiga? Tõnd fãa na n yalsa Wẽnnaam bʋʋd geerã taoore. 
Romans14:11 Bala, b gʋlsame tɩ: Zu-soabã yeelame tɩ b vɩɩme, tɩ rũmã fãa na n yĩgimda bãmb taoore, la tɩ zɛlma fãa na n kõo Wẽnnaam waoogre." 
Romans14:12 Woto tõnd ned kam fãa na n togsa Wẽnnaam a meng yelle. 
Romans14:13 Woto yĩnga, bɩ d da leb n kao taab bʋʋd ye. Ayo! Tʋm-y ne y tagsgã n da wa n ning kug-lakdg wall bũmb sẽn tõe n lub neda, y ba-biig taoor ye." 
Romans14:14 Mam miime, la Zu-soab a Zeezi pʋgẽ, mam mii hakɩɩka, tɩ bũmb ka be n yaa rẽgd a toor ye. La ned sã n tags tɩ bõn-kãngã yaa rẽgdo, dẽ a yaa rẽgd ne yẽnda." 
Romans14:15 Fo ba-biig sũur sã n sãam fo bõn-dɩtl poorẽ, ad fo ka leb n kẽnd ne nonglem ye. Da sak tɩ f bõn-dɩtl wa ne f ba-biiga, soab ning Kiris sẽn ki a yĩngã sãoong ye." 
Romans14:16 Bũmb ning sẽn yaa sõama ne yãmbã ka tog n wa ne tẽn-kãnem ye. 
Romans14:17 Bala, Wẽnnaam soolmã, ka tɩ rɩ wall tɩ yũ ye, la yaa tɩrlem la bãane, la sũ-noogo, Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõta." 
Romans14:18 Ned ning sẽn maand Kiris tʋʋmd a woto tata Wẽnnaam yam, la nebã me wilgdame t'a sẽn maandã zemsame." 
Romans14:19 Woto yĩnga, bɩ d bao bũmb ning fãa sẽn wat ne laafɩ la ne taab bɩɩsgo." 
Romans14:20 Da sãam Wẽnnaam tʋʋmd rɩɩb yĩng ye. Sɩd-sɩdã, bũmb fãa yaa sõama rɩɩb yĩnga. La ned sã n dɩ-a n lebg kug-lakdg neb yĩnga, a yaa wẽnga." 
Romans14:21 Yaa sõama tɩ ra wãb nemdo, wall yũ rãam, wall tɩ bas n da sɩɩs bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ kug-lakdg f ba-biig yĩnga [n kɩt a lʋɩ wall a maan pãn-komsem.]" 
Romans14:22 Tẽeb ning fo sẽn tarã, tall-a f meng yĩng Wẽnnaam taoore. Ned sẽn geend tɩ bũmb ning yaa sõama wã sã n ka kaood a bʋʋdo, sũ-noog soab la yẽnda." 
Romans14:23 La ned sã n wa sãmbd ne bũmb ning a sẽn dɩta, a bʋʋd zoe n kaoome, bala, ka tẽeb n [kɩt t'a maan a sẽn maandã ye.] La bũmb ning fãa sẽn ka tẽeb n kɩt tɩ f maan yaa yel-wẽnde." 
Romans15:1 Tõnd dãmb sẽn tar pãngã, tõnd tog n tebenda neb nins sẽn ka pãngã b pãn-komsmã pʋgẽ, la d da bao sẽn noom tõnd ye." 
Romans15:2 Bɩ tõnd ned kam fãa maan sẽn noom a to, sẽn ya sõmb wɛɛngẽ, t'a tõe n bɩ." 
Romans15:3 Bala, Kiris ka bao sẽn noom b meng ye, la a wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Tʋy nins nebã sẽn tʋʋd yãmbã lʋɩɩ mam zugu." 
Romans15:4 Mik bũmb nins b sẽn pĩnd n gʋlsã gʋlsa tõnd zãmsg yĩnga, tɩ tõnd tõe n paam saag-sõngo, sũ-mare la belsg ning Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn kõtã yĩnga." 
Romans15:5 Bɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn pid ne sũ-mar la belsgã sõng yãmb tɩ y paam tagsg a yembr taab yĩnga, wa a Zeezi Kiris sẽn datã," 
Romans15:6 tɩ yãmb na kõ Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ba wã waoogre, ne yam a yembre la koɛɛg a yembre." 
Romans15:7 Reeg-y taab neer wa Kiris sẽn deeg yãmbã, Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga." 
Romans15:8 Sɩda, mam yetame tɩ Kiris lebga zũnsã tʋmtʋmda, sẽn na yɩlg n wilg tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa sɩda, la b wilg tɩ bũmb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n kãab b ba-rãmbã yaa sɩda." 
Romans15:9 La buud a taabã neb waoogda Wẽnnaam, b nimbãan-zoeerã yĩnga, wa b sẽn da gʋls n yeelã: Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ mam na n gom soolem-dãmb sʋk n wilg tɩ m mii yãmba, la m na n yɩɩlame n waoog y yʋʋrã." 
Romans15:10 B leb n yeelame yaa: Soolem-dãmbã, lagm-y Wẽnnaam nebã n maan sũ-noogo." 
Romans15:11 N leb n paase, soolem-dãmbã fãa nebã, pẽg-y Zu-soabã, la tɩ tẽms toay-toay nebã pẽg bãmba." 
Romans15:12 A Ezayi me yeelame yaa: A Izayi yagengã na n pukame. B na n yikame n soog soolem-dãmbã. Soolem-dãmbã neb tẽeb na n bee ne bãmba. 
Romans15:13 Bɩ Wẽnnaam, saag-sõng sẽn yit a soab nengẽ wã pid yãmb ne sũ-noog fãa la bãan fãa tẽeb pʋgẽ, tɩ saag-sõng na pid yãmba, Sɩɩg-sõng pãng yĩnga." 
Romans15:14 Sã n yaa ne yãmb yelle, m ba-biisi, mam sũur kɛɛm tɩ yãmb pida ne sõmblem, la y pid ne bãngr fãa, la y yaa neb sẽn tõe n keoog taaba." 
Romans15:15 Baoosgo, bũmb kẽer pʋgẽ, mam gʋlsa yãmb ne gãndalsem, wa m dat n kɩtame tɩ yãmb tẽeg bũmb nins y sẽn mi, la yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn maan maam neere," 
Romans15:16 n kɩt tɩ mam ya Kiris tʋmtʋmd buud a taabã sʋkã yĩnga. Mam maanda Wẽnnaam koe-noogã tʋʋmd sẽn ya tẽeb bũmbã, tɩ buud a taabã nebã na yɩ wa kũun sẽn noom Wẽnnaam, neb Wẽnnaam Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga." 
Romans15:17 Dẽ, mam tara bʋʋm tɩ waoog m meng Kiris pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam taoore." 
Romans15:18 Bala, mam ka na n saag n pʋd bũmb yelle, tɩ ka Kiris sẽn tũnug maam n maane, sã n yaa m goamẽ, wall m tʋʋmẽ, tɩ ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga, la m maan bãn sẽn tar pãnga, la ne bõn-yɛɛsdse, tɩ m tõe n sõng buud a taabã neb tɩ b sak Wẽnnaam. Yaa woto yĩnga, sẽn sɩng ne Zeruzalɛm, n gilg hal tɩ ta Iliri, mam moona Kiris koe-noogã wʋsgo." 
Romans15:19  
Romans15:20 La mam yãka yam tɩ moon koe-noog zĩis nins b sẽn zɩ n pʋd Kiris yʋʋrã ye, tɩ m da wa n me ned a to yẽbgr zug ye. La a wa b sẽn gʋls n yeelã:" 
Romans15:21 Neb nins sẽn ka gom bãmb yell b sʋkã na n yãame, la neb nins sẽn dag n ka wʋm b kibarã, na n wʋma a võore." 
Romans15:22 Rẽnda n gɩdg maam naoor wʋsg tɩ mam ka wa yãmb nengẽ ye. 
Romans15:23 Moasã, mam ka leb n tar tʋʋm zĩig soolem-kãens ye. La hal yʋʋm wʋsgo, mam da ratame tɩ m sã n wa n dabd Ɛspayẽ, bɩ m tũ yãmb nengẽ." 
Romans15:24 Mam maanda tẽeb tɩ m sã n wa n loogdẽ, m na yãnd-yã, la m yamleoog tɩ zĩnd ne yãmbã sã n doke, y na yãag-m n kẽng Ɛspayẽ." 
Romans15:25 Moas-moasã wã mam dabda Zeruzalɛm, nin-sõamyã sõngr yĩnga." 
Romans15:26 Bala, Masedoan ne Akayi nebã yãka yam n lob taab ligdi n na n sõng naong rãmbã sẽn be ba-biisã sʋk Zeruzalɛmã." 
Romans15:27 Yɩɩ bãmb yam-yãkre, la yaa bũmb b sẽn da segd n maane. Bala, buud a taabã neb sã n paama pʋɩɩr ne bõn-sõamy nins sẽn be Zʋɩf-rãmbã nengẽ tẽebã wɛɛngẽ wã, bãmb me tog n sõnga Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne b yĩngã yelle." 
Romans15:28 B sẽn maan a woto wã, mam sã n tɩ kɩs ligdã n sa, mam na n yii be n tũ yãmb nengẽ n kẽng Ɛspayẽ" 
Romans15:29 Mam miime tɩ m sã n wa wat yãmb nengẽ, yaa ne Kiris barkã la m na n wa." 
Romans15:30 M ba-biisi, mam sagenda yãmb ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋre, la ne nonglem Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõtã, tɩ y naag ne maam n zabe, y sẽn na n pʋʋs mam yĩnga," 
Romans15:31 tɩ mam tõe n paam yolsg ne ka-tẽeb rãmb sẽn be Zʋʋde wã, la tɩ nin-sõamyã na reeg kũunã mam sẽn tar n kẽnd Zeruzalɛmã sõama." 
Romans15:32 Woto, sã n ta Wẽnnaam yam, mam na n taa yãmb nengẽ ne sũ-noogo, la mam na n paama vʋʋsem bilf yãmb sʋka." 
Romans15:33 Bɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn so laafɩ wã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. Ãmina! 
Romans16:1 Mam tʋmda d ba-bi-poak a Feebe yãmb nengẽ. A yaa Sãnkre wẽnd doogã yel-gɛt poaka. 
Romans16:2 Reeg-y-yã-a Zu-soaba pʋgẽ, wa sẽn zems nin-sõamyã maanego. Bũmb sã n wa n beẽ fãa t'a rat yãmb sõngre, bɩ a paam yãmba, bala, a sõnga neb wʋsgo, la a sõnga maam me." 
Romans16:3 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Piriska ne a Akilaas sẽn yaa mam tʋmd-n-taas a Zeezi Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ wã. 
Romans16:4 B gẽnega b yõor n na n fãag maam. Ka maam n yembr n bal n pʋʋsd-b bark ye, buud a taabã wẽnd-dotã fãa me pʋʋsd-b lame." 
Romans16:5 Pʋʋs-y nin-tũusds nins sẽn be bãmb zakẽ wã me. Pʋʋs-y m zo-nongr a Epayinet sẽn yaa Aazi soolmã dẽenem biis Kiris yĩnga. 
Romans16:6 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Maari sẽn nams a meng wʋsg yãmb yĩngã. 
Romans16:7 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Andronikuus ne a Zunyaas sẽn yaa mam ba-rãmba la m zĩnd-n-taas bi-bees roogẽ. B yaa neb tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn nong wʋsgo, la b pʋs n denga maam n lebg Kiris nebã." 
Romans16:8 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Ampilyatuus sẽn yaa mam zo-nongr Zu-soabã pʋgẽ wã. 
Romans16:9 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Yʋrbẽ sẽn yaa tõnd tʋmd-n-taag Kiris pʋgẽ, la y pʋʋs m zo-nongr a Ɛstakiisi." 
Romans16:10 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Apelɛɛse, sẽn modg Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ wã. Pʋʋs-y-yã a Aristobull zaka rãmba." 
Romans16:11 Pʋʋs-y m saam-biig a Eroodyõ. Pʋʋs-y neb nins sẽn be a Narsiis yirã n be Zu-soabã pʋgẽ wã. 
Romans16:12 Pʋʋs‑y-yã a Tirfɛn ne a Tɩrfooze, tɩ b yaa pagb sẽn modgd b mens Zu-soabã yĩnga. Pʋʋs-y d zo-nongr a Pɛrsɩɩd sẽn modgd a meng wʋsg Zu-soabã yĩnga." 
Romans16:13 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Rufuus sẽn yaa nin-yãkdg Zu-soabã pʋgẽ wã, la y pʋʋs a ma sẽn yaa mam me ma wã." 
Romans16:14 Pʋʋs-y-yã a Asẽnkirti, ne a Felgõ, ne a Ɛrmeese, ne a Patrobaase, ne a Hɛrmaas ne ba-biis nins sẽn be ne bãmbã." 
Romans16:15 Pʋʋs-y-yã Filolog ne a Zuli, a Neere ne a ma-bi-poakã, la a Olẽmpas ne nin-sõamyã nins fãa sẽn be ne bãmbã." 
Romans16:16 Pʋʋs-y taab ne mok-sõngo. Kiris Wẽnd-dotã fãa toonda yãmb pʋʋsem. 
Romans16:17 M ba-biisi, mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y gũus ne neb nins sẽn wat ne welgre la bõn-lakdse, tɩ kɩɩsd zãmsg ning yãmb sẽn paamã. Zãag-y y meng ne-ba." 
Romans16:18 Bala, neb a woto ka tʋmd tõnd Zu-soabã, Kiris yĩng ye, yaa b mens pʋs yĩnga. B belsda neb nins sẽn ka yamã ne gom-noodo la ne pẽgre." 
Romans16:19 Sã n yaa ne yãmba, nebã fãa mii yãmb sakrã yelle. Mam sũur nooma ne yãmb yellã, la mam nongame tɩ yãmb bãng yam ne bũmb nins sẽn yaa sõama, la y yɩ yɩlma n da maand wẽng ye." 
Romans16:20 Bilf sã n paase, Wẽnnaam na n luba a Sʋtãan tɩ yãmb tab-a ne y nao wã. Bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi barkã zĩnd ne yãmba." 
Romans16:21 Mam tʋmd-n-taag a Tɩmote ne a Lusiyuus la a Zaazõ la Sozipatɛɛr sẽn yaa m saam-biisã pʋʋsda yãmba. 
Romans16:22 Maam a Tɛrtiuusi, sẽn gʋls seb-kãngã Zu-soaba pʋgẽ wã pʋʋsda yãmba." 
Romans16:23 Mam gãag-soab a Gayuus sẽn yaa Wẽnd-do-tõrã gãag-soabã pʋʋsda yãmba. A Erast sẽn yaa tẽngã ligd-gũudã pʋʋsda yãmba. D ba-biig a Kartuus me pʋʋsda yãmba. 
Romans16:24 [Bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris barkã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. Ãmina.] 
Romans16:25 Bɩ soab ning sẽn tar-a pãn-tõog tɩ kɩt tɩ yãmb yals kãenkãe wa koe-noogã mam sẽn moondã sẽn yetã, wa sẽn zemsd ne yel-solemdã pukri, yel-solemd ning sẽn dag n solg hal sɩngr wẽndẽ wã." 
Romans16:26 La moasã, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã sɛb puk-a-la wa Wẽnnaam sẽn ka sɩngr kõn zĩnd saabã sẽn yeelã, n wilg soolem-dãmba fãa nebã, tɩ b tõe n sak tẽebã." 
Romans16:27 Bɩ Wẽnnaam, sẽn yaa b yembr tãa n yaa yam soabã soog ziiri, wakat fãa, a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga. Ãmina!" 
1Corinthians1:1 Maam a Polle, sẽn paam-a boolg tɩ yɩ a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmda, wa sẽn zems ne Wẽnnaam daabã, ne ba-biig a Sostɛn n gʋlsd seb-kãngã," 
1Corinthians1:2 n na n tʋm Wẽnnaam tẽedbã sẽn be Korẽntã. Bãmb yaa neb sẽn welg toor Kiris maasem yĩnga, tɩ b tõe n yɩ pʋ-peelem dãmba. Sebrã yaa neb nins fãa sẽn pʋʋsd ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋre, baa b sẽn be zĩig ninga yĩnga. A Zeezi Kiris yaa bãmb Zu-soaba, la tõnd me Zu-soaba." 
1Corinthians1:3 Bɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam ne Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ning yãmb zut barka, la b kõ yãmb laafɩ." 
1Corinthians1:4 Mam sã n tagsd yãmb yelle, mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark wakat fãa, b sẽn ning yãmb zut bark a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians1:5 Tɩ yãmb paam bũmb fãa wʋsgo, sã n yaa goamã wall bãngr fãa." 
1Corinthians1:6 Bala, Kiris kasetã kɩɩ yẽg yãmb pʋgẽ sõama." 
1Corinthians1:7 Woto, yãmb sẽn gũud tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi pukrã, kũun baa a yembr ka paoog yãmb ye." 
1Corinthians1:8 Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ y yals kãenkãe a woto hal tɩ wakat ta, tɩ rõadg kõn zĩnd yãmb zut tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris daarã ye." 
1Corinthians1:9 Wẽnnaam, sẽn bool-a yãmb tɩ y paam lagem-n-taar ne bãmb Bi-ribl a Zeezi Kiris sẽn yaa tõnd fãagdã, bãmb yaa maan-sɩd soaba." 
1Corinthians1:10 M ba-biisi, mam bõosda yãmb ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋre, tɩ y kɩt tɩ y goamã tũud taaba, tɩ welgr da zĩnd yãmb sʋk ye. Zems-y taab sõama ne yam a yembre, tagsg a yembr pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians1:11 Bala, m ba-biisi, a Kolowe nebã wilga maam tɩ ka-wʋm-taab n be yãmb sʋka." 
1Corinthians1:12 Mam wʋmdame tɩ yãmb ned fãa yetame tɩ yẽnda yaa a Poll neda, wall a Apoloos neda, wall a Sefaas neda, wall Kiris neda." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kiris welgame la? Dẽ, b kaa a Poll da-pɩk zug yãmb yĩng la? Bɩ yaa ne a Poll yʋʋr la yãmb paam lisgu?" 
1Corinthians1:14 Mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam barka, mam sẽn ka lis yãmb ned baa a yembre, sã n ka a Kirispuus la a Gayuusã." 
1Corinthians1:15 Woto, ned baa a yembr ka tõe n yeel tɩ b lisa yãmb ne mam yʋʋr ye." 
1Corinthians1:16 Mam lisa a Ɛstefanas zaka rãmba, la mam ka mi m sã n lisa ned a to me ye." 
1Corinthians1:17 Bala, Kiris ka tʋm maam tɩ m kẽng n lis neb ye, la yaa tɩ moon koe-noogã. Ka tɩ moon-a ne gom-minim, tɩ m ra wa n kɩt tɩ Kiris ra-pɩkã lebg bõn-yaalg ye." 
1Corinthians1:18 Bala, da-pɩkã koɛɛgã yaa yalemd ne neb nins sẽn sãamd-bã la ne tõnd dãmb sẽn paam fãagrã, a yaa pãng sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
1Corinthians1:19 Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ b gʋls n yeele: Mam na n sãama yam dãmba yam, la m kɩt tɩ neb nins sẽn tar bãngr lebg zaalem." 
1Corinthians1:20 Yam soabã bee yɛ? Tõog karen-saambã bee yɛɛnẽ? Zamaan‑kãngã no-koɛɛm wẽedã bee yɛ? Dẽ yĩnga, Wẽnnaam ka kɩt tɩ dũni yam lebg yalemd sɩda?" 
1Corinthians1:21 Bala, dũni wã sẽn ka tũnug Wẽnnaam yamã n bãng bãmbã, a meng yamã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, a taa Wẽnnaam yam tɩ tall koe-moonegã yalemda n fãag neb nins sẽn tẽedã." 
1Corinthians1:22 Zʋɩf-rãmbã kotame tɩ b maan bõn-bãna, tɩ Gɛrk-rãmbã baood yam." 
1Corinthians1:23 La tõnd moonda Kiris ning b sẽn ka da-pɩk zugã. Koe-kãng yaool n yaa bõn-lakdg ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã, la a ya yalemd ne buud a taabã." 
1Corinthians1:24 La sã n yaa ne neb nins sẽn paam-b boolgã, tɩ b yaa Zʋɩf tɩ b yaa Gɛrke, koɛɛgã yaa pãng sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ, yam sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
1Corinthians1:25 Bala, bũmb ning sẽn yaa yalemd ne Wẽnnaamã yaa yam n yɩɩd ninsaalbã, la bũmb ning sẽn yaa pãn-komsem ne Wẽnnaam tara pãng n yɩɩd ninsaalbã." 
1Corinthians1:26 M ba-biisi, ges-y yãmb sẽn dag n yaa bũmb nins wakat ning b sẽn bool yãmba, sẽn ya-b yam dãmb wa neb sẽn yetã ka waoog yãmb sʋk ye. Pãng rãmb ka waooga, naam roog neb me ka waooga." 
1Corinthians1:27 La Wẽnnaam yãka dũni bũmb nins sẽn yaa yalemdã n na n ning yam dãmb yãnde. Wẽnnaam yãka dũni bũmb nins sẽn yaa pãn-komsmã n na n ning pãens rãmbã yãnde. 
1Corinthians1:28 Wẽnnaam dɩka dũni bũmb nins sẽn ka yõodã, bũmb nins nebã sẽn ka nandã, bũmb nins sẽn ka be wa, n na n kɩt tɩ sẽn be-bã lebg zaalem," 
1Corinthians1:29 tɩ ned baa a yembr da waoog a meng Wẽnnaam taoor ye. 
1Corinthians1:30 Yaool n yaa Wẽnnaam n kɩt tɩ yãmb be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Kiris lebg tõnd yam, la d tɩrlem, la d welg-toore, la d fãagre," 
1Corinthians1:31 t'a wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Bɩ ned ning sẽn waoogd a menga, waoog a meng Zu-soabã pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians2:1 M ba-biisi, sã n yaa ne maam, mam sẽn wa n wa yãmb nengẽ wã, ka ne gom-minim wall yam yɩɩdem la mam wa n na n moon koɛɛg n kɩs Wẽnnaam kaset ye." 
1Corinthians2:2 Bala, mam ka tags tɩ yaa sõama tɩ mam bãng bũmb a to yãmb sʋkã tɩ sã n ka a Zeezi Kirisi, soab ning b sẽn ka da-pɩk zugã ye." 
1Corinthians2:3 Mam sẽn dag n be yãmb nengẽ wã, mam mengã dag n bee pãn-komsem pʋgẽ tɩ dabeem la rigb wʋsg dag n tar maam." 
1Corinthians2:4 Mam goamã ne m koe-moonegã ka yɩ ne yam goam sẽn na kɩt tɩ ned tẽ ye, la yɩɩ ne Sɩɩgã tʋʋma la a pãnga." 
1Corinthians2:5 Tɩ yãmb tẽebã da wa n yẽbg ninsaalb yam zug ye, la yɩ Wẽnnaam pãngã zugu." 
1Corinthians2:6 Yaool n yaa yam la tõnd moond neb nins sẽn zems zãngã sʋka. Ka dũni‑kãngã yam, wall dũni‑kãngã nanambs yam ye. Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãens fãa ka zĩnd pãng ye." 
1Corinthians2:7 Tõnd moonda Wẽnnaam yam sẽn yaa yel-solemde la sẽn solge, tɩ Wẽnnaam pĩnd n segl hal sẽn deng zamaan sɩngre, tõnd waoogr yĩnga." 
1Corinthians2:8 Dũni‑kãngã naab baa a yembr ka bãng yam‑kãng ye, bala, b sã n dag n bãngẽ-yã-a, b rag n kõn ka tõnd Zu-soab sẽn so ziirã da-pɩk zug ye." 
1Corinthians2:9 La yaa wa b sẽn gʋlsã: Bũmb ned nif sẽn nan ka yã ye, bũmb ned tʋbr sẽn nan ka wʋm ye. La bũmb sẽn nan ka wa ninsaal tagsgẽ ye, bũmb ning fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn segl neb nins sẽn nong bãmbã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians2:10 Wẽnnaam vẽnega yam‑kãng ne tõndo, Sɩɩg-sõng maasem yĩnga. Bala, Sɩɩgã feesda bũmb fãa, baa ne bũmb nins sẽn solg hal Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians2:11 Dẽ wã, ãnda n be ninsaalb sʋk n mi ninsaal yelle, tɩ ka ninsaal sɩɩg sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã? Woto me, ned baa a yembr ka mi Wẽnnaam yelle, sã n ka Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã ye." 
1Corinthians2:12 Tõnd yaool n ka reeg dũni sɩɩg ye, la yaa Sɩɩg sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ, tɩ tõnd tõe n bãng bũmb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ tõndo, b nimbãan-zoeerã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tõnd sẽn gomd bõn-kãens yellã, ka ne goam sẽn yit ninsaal yam pʋgẽ ye, la yaa ne goam Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã sẽn kõta, n dɩkd yɛl sẽn yaa sɩɩg yɛl n bilgd neb sẽn tagsd sɩɩg yɛlã yelle." 
1Corinthians2:14 La ninsaal sẽn yaa yĩng neongã ka tõe n deeg bũmb nins sẽn yit Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã nengẽ wã ye. Bala, b yaa yalemd ne yẽnda. La a ka tõe n bãng-b ye. Bala, yaa ne Sɩɩg-sõngã la ned tagsd-b yelle." 
1Corinthians2:15 Sẽn tar‑a sɩɩgã mii bũmb fãa bʋʋd kaoobo, la ned yaool n ka be be n kaood yẽnda bʋʋd ye." 
1Corinthians2:16 Sɩd me, ãnda soab n bãng Zu-soabã tagsg n na n sagl-ba? La ne tõndo, tõnd tara Kiris tagsgo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Sã n yaa ne maam, m ba-biisi, mam ka tõog n gom ne yãmb wa neb sẽn tagsd sɩɩgã yell ye, la yaa wa ne neb sẽn vɩ yĩng sakr pʋgẽ, wall kom-bãooneg Kiris pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians3:2 Mam ka kõ yãmb rɩ-taok ye, yaa bĩisim, bala, yãmb pʋgã da ka tõe rɩ-taok ye. La baa ne moasã me, yãmb pʋsã ket n ka tõe-a ye. Bala, yãmb ket n tũuda yĩngã ratem." 
1Corinthians3:3 Sũ-kiirã ne ka-wʋm-taabã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, dẽ yĩnga, yãmb ka neb sẽn sakd yĩngã ratem, la y kẽnd wa ninsaal sẽn maandã sɩda?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ned a yembr sã n yeel tɩ yẽnda yaa a Poll karen-biiga, tɩ ned a to yeel tɩ yẽnda yaa a Apoloos karen-biiga," 
1Corinthians3:5 ka ninsaalemd la rẽnda sɩda? A Apoloos yaa bõe, t'a Poll ya bõe? Bãmb yaa tʋmtʋmdb bal Wẽnnaam sẽn tall n kɩt tɩ yãmb tẽ a Zeezi, n zems ne Zu-soabã sẽn tees yãmb a soaba." 
1Corinthians3:6 Maam n sele, t'a Apoloos zãgs koom, la yaa Wẽnnaam n kɩtd tɩ koodã bɩtẽ." 
1Corinthians3:7 Woto, ka ned ning sẽn sel-a wã la bũmb ye. Ka ned ning sẽn zãgs-a koomã me n yaa bũmb ye. Yaa Wẽnnaam, soab ning sẽn kɩtd-a tɩ koodã bɩtẽ wã n yaa bũmbu." 
1Corinthians3:8 Ned ning sẽn sel-a wã, la ned ning sẽn zãgs-a koomã yaa yembr bala, la ned fãa na n deega a keoor wa zems a tʋʋmde." 
1Corinthians3:9 Bala, tõnd yaa tʋmd-n-taas ne Wẽnnaam. Yaa yãmb la Wẽnnaam Pʋʋgo, Wẽnnaam roogo." 
1Corinthians3:10 Wẽnnaam nimbãan-zoeerã b sẽn maana yĩnga, mam yẽbga roogã wa tãn-met sẽn tar yam, la ned a to waa n mee yẽbgrã zugu. La bɩ ned fãa gũus ne a sẽn met to-to yẽbgrã zugã." 
1Corinthians3:11 Bala, ned baa a yembr ka tõe n yẽbg yẽbgr a to tɩ ka sẽn be-a wã ye, sẽn dat n togs t'a Zeezi Kiris bala." 
1Corinthians3:12 La ned sã n me yẽbg-kãng zug ne sãnem, wall wanzuri, wall kug buud sẽn be yõodo, wall raado, wall yamdo, wall moodo, ned fãa tʋʋmd na n pukame." 
1Corinthians3:13 Bala, daarã na n kɩtame tɩ b bãng-a. Tɩ bõe bugmẽ la ned fãa Tʋʋmd na n puki, la bugmã na n maka ned fãa tʋʋmd n ges a sẽn yaa ne bũmb ninga." 
1Corinthians3:14 Bugmã sã n ka rɩ tʋʋmd ned sẽn maan yẽbg-kãng zugã, sẽn tʋm-a wã na paam keoore." 
1Corinthians3:15 La bugmã sã n dɩ tʋʋmd ning ned sẽn maane, na n yɩɩ bõn ne a soaba. Soab‑kãng na n paama fãagre, la a na yɩɩ wa ned sẽn pɩʋʋg bugum n põse." 
1Corinthians3:16 Yãmb zɩ tɩ yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam doogo, la tɩ Wẽnnaam sɩɩgã bee yãmb pʋgẽ la?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Ned sã n sãam Wẽnnaam doogã, Wẽnnaam na n sãama a soaba. Bala, Wẽnnaam doogã welga toore, la yaa yãmb la ro-kãngã." 
1Corinthians3:18 Bɩ ned da belg a meng ye. Ned yãmb sʋkã sã n tagsd t'a tara dũni yam, bɩ a lebg yalma, t'a tõe n lebg yam soaba." 
1Corinthians3:19 Bala, dũni yam yaa yalemd wẽnnaam taoore. Dẽ n kɩt tɩ b gʋls n yeel tɩ: Wẽnnaam yõkda yam dãmbã b sɩlmã pʋga." 
1Corinthians3:20 B leb n gʋlsame n yeel tɩ: Zu-soabã mii yam dãmba sẽn tagsd n lebd zĩig ninga, n miẽ tɩ b tagsgã yaa zaalem bala." 
1Corinthians3:21 Dẽ, bɩ ned baa a yembr da teeg ned n na n bao waoogr ye. Bala, bũmba fãa yaa yãmb dẽnda." 
1Corinthians3:22 A Poll woo, a Apoloos woo, a Sefaas woo, dũni wã woo, vɩɩmã woo, kũumã woo, bũmb nins sẽn be moasã wã woo, bũmb nins sẽn wat taoorã woo, fãa yaa yãmb dẽnda." 
1Corinthians3:23 Tɩ yãmb ya Kiris rẽnda, tɩ Kiris ya Wẽnnaam dẽnda." 
1Corinthians4:1 Woto yĩnga, ges-y tõnd wa Kiris tʋmtʋmdba, Wẽnnaam sẽn ning b yel-soalmã yell b nusẽ." 
1Corinthians4:2 B sẽn dat bũmb ning yel-gɛtb nengẽ bala, yaa tɩ b yãnd tɩ b maanda sɩd ne b tʋʋmde." 
1Corinthians4:3 Ne maam, ka yell ne maam tɩ yãmba, wall dũni bʋ-kaoodb bʋ mam bʋʋd ye. Mam me ka kaood n meng bʋʋd ye. Bala, bũmb ka zɩsg mam sũurã ye." 
1Corinthians4:4 La ka rẽnda yĩng la mam zemsr ye. Sẽn kaood-a mam bʋʋd yaa Zu-soabã. 
1Corinthians4:5 Woto yĩnga, da kao-y bũmb baa fɩ bʋʋd tɩ wakatã nan ka ta ye, tɩ Zu-soabã waoong nan ka ta ye. Bãmb sã n wa, b na n puka bũmb ning sẽn solg lik pʋgẽ wã, la b na n kɩtame tɩ bũmb nins nebã sẽn dag n saag b sũyã pʋsẽ wã pugsi. Wakat-kãnga, Wẽnnaam n na n pẽg ned kam fãa." 
1Corinthians4:6 M ba-biisi, mam dɩka mams‑kãens n bilg maam ne a Apoloos yellã, yãmb wʋmb yĩnga. Woto, tõnd yĩnga, yãmb na zãms n bãnge, n da wa n maan tɩ yõsg bũmb ning sẽn gʋlsã ye, la yãmb ned baa a yembr ka na n tong ned a yembr poore, n wa waoog a menga, n paoog ned a to wã ye." 
1Corinthians4:7 Bala, bõe n welgd foom ne f taabã? Bõe la fo tar tɩ ka ned n kõ foom? La sã n yaa tɩ yaa ned n kõ foom, bõe tɩ f waoogd f meng wa f ka reeg-a ned nengẽ?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Yãmb zoee n tɩgame, yãmb zoee n yaa arzegs rãmba, yãmb sɩngame n dɩt naam tɩ tõnd kaẽ ye. Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ y sɩd rɩ naam, tɩ tõnd me tõe n naag yãmb n dɩ naamã." 
1Corinthians4:9 Bala, mam tẽedame tɩ Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ tõnd sẽn ya tʋmtʋmdba yɩ nebã fãa zʋʋre, la neb bʋʋd sẽn kao tɩ b zems kũum, b sẽn kɩt tɩ tõnd lebg bõn-gets dũni rãmb yĩnga, la malegs yĩnga, la ninsaalb yĩngã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians4:10 Kiris yĩnga, tõnd yaa yalemba, la yãmb yaa yam dãmb Kiris pʋgẽ, tõnd yaa pãn-komsem dãmba, la yãmb tara pãnga. Yãmb bee waoogre, la tõnd paamda paoogre." 
1Corinthians4:11 Hal tɩ ta moasã, kom la ko-yũudu, la naongo, la pãbre, la yeebg tara tõndo." 
1Corinthians4:12 Tõnd tʋmda ne d nus n yaadẽ. Nebã tʋʋda tõndo, la tõnd ningd-b‑la barka. Neb namsda tõndo, la tõnd sakda rẽnda." 
1Corinthians4:13 Hal tɩ ta moasã neb kãnegda tõndo, la tõnd belsda nebã. Tõnd lebga wa sagd dũni neb nifẽ, ned baa a yembr sẽn ka rata." 
1Corinthians4:14 Mam ka gʋlsd yãmb yõwã n na n ning yãmb yãnd ye. Mam keoogda yãmba, yãmb sẽn yaa m kom-nongdsã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians4:15 Sɩd me, ba yãmb sã n paam tɛtb tus piig Kiris pʋgẽ, yãmb ka tar ba-rãmb wʋsg ye. Bala, yaa maam n dog yãmb a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ, koe-noogã maasem yĩnga." 
1Corinthians4:16 Woto yĩnga, mam sagenda yãmba: Yɩ-y mam togs-n-taase." 
1Corinthians4:17 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, mam tʋma m bi-nongr a Tɩmote sẽn maand sɩd Zu-soabã pʋgẽ wã yãmb nengẽ. Yẽnda na n tẽega yãmb so-tũuds nins sẽn be Kiris pʋgẽ tɩ mam zãmsd nebã, zĩig fãa, wẽnd dotã fãa pʋsã." 
1Corinthians4:18 Neb kẽer wuka b mense, wa mam sã n da ka tog n wa yãmb nengẽ ye." 
1Corinthians4:19 La sã n taa Zu-soabã raabo, bilf sã n paase, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ. Mam na n gesa wuk-m-mens rãmb kãens pãnga, la ka b goamã yell ye." 
1Corinthians4:20 Bala, Wẽnnaam soolma ka goam ye, la yaa pãnga." 
1Corinthians4:21 Bõe la y rata? Y ratame tɩ m wa y nengẽ ne sãbsg bɩ, bɩ ne nonglem la ne sũ-bʋgsem yam?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Wakat fãa, d wʋmdame tɩ b gomd dẽgd sẽn maand yãmb sʋkã yelle. Tʋʋm-dẽgd ning sẽn maand yãmb sʋkã, ned pʋs n pa yãt a buud bu-zẽmsã meng sʋk ye. Yaa woto hal tɩ baa yãmb ned a yembr tara a ba paga." 
1Corinthians5:2 Tɩ yãmb yaool n wuk y mense. Yãmb ka maan sũ-sãang wa kũum yĩnga, tɩ b tõe n yiis ned ning sẽn maan a woto wã yãmb sʋk ye." 
1Corinthians5:3 Sã yaa ne maam, baa mam yĩngã sẽn ka be be ne yãmbã, la yaa m tagsgã n be ne yãmbã, mam zoee n kaoo ned ning sẽn maan-a yell‑kãngã wã bʋʋdo, wa m sã n da bee be." 
1Corinthians5:4 Bala, Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋrã yĩnga, yãmb ne mam tagsgã naaga taaba, ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi pãnga." 
1Corinthians5:5 Bɩ b bas ned a woto a Sʋtãan nugẽ, t'a yĩngã na sãame, t'a sɩɩgã na paam fãagr Zu-soab a Zeezi daarã." 
1Corinthians5:6 Bũmb ning yãmb sẽn dɩkd n waoogd y mensã ka neer ye. Yãmb ka mi tɩ rã-bɩll bilf bal kɩtdame tɩ zom-nagdg tõr wuk la? 
1Corinthians5:7 Yiis-y rã-bɩl-kʋdgã n bas y mens n lebg yɩlma, tɩ y tõe n yɩ zom-nagd-paalga, rã-bɩll sẽn ka be yãmb pʋgẽ wã yĩnga. Bala, b kʋʋ Kiris sẽn yaa tõnd Pakã maoongo." 
1Corinthians5:8 Woto yĩnga, bɩ d maan tigrã, la da yɩ ne rã-bɩl-kʋdgo, wall ne zãmb la pʋ-toog rã-bɩll ye. Bɩ yɩ ne pʋ-peelem la sɩd bur sẽn ka rã-bɩlle." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mam gʋlsa yãmb m sebrã pʋgẽ n yeel-y tɩ y da paam lagem-n-taar ne tʋʋm-dẽgd maandbã ye. 
1Corinthians5:10 M ka yet tɩ y lak y mens zãng fasɩ ne dũni‑kãnga tʋʋm-dẽgd maandbã, wall ne yão-be-nebã, la kãag n kõ m meng rãmba, wall wẽnd-naands pʋʋsdbã ye. Sã n yaa rẽ, na n yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ y yi n bas dũni." 
1Corinthians5:11 Mam sẽn gʋls yãmb bũmb ning moasã n yetẽ wã, yaa tɩ y ra paam lagem-n-taar ne ned ning sẽn yet t'a yaa yãmb ba-biiga, n yaool n maand tʋʋm-dẽgdo, wall a ya yão-be-neda, wall wẽnd-naands pʋʋsda, wall nin-tʋʋda, wall ned neng sẽn yilimd ne rãam, wall kãag n kõ m meng soab ye. Bɩ y pʋs n da naag ned a woto n dɩ ye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Bõe tɩ m na n kao kɛɛng neb bʋʋdo? Ka neb nins sẽn be ne yãmbã bʋʋd la yãmb kaood sɩda? 
1Corinthians5:13 Wẽnnaam n na n kao kɛɛng nebã bʋʋdo. Gʋls-sõamyã yetame tɩ: Dig-y nin-wẽngã n yiis y sʋka. 
1Corinthians6:1 Yãmb ned sã n tar yell ne ned a to, a saagd n kẽnda neb nins sẽn ka sakd Wẽnnaamã nengẽ n bʋ ne-a bɩ, bɩ yaa Kiris tẽedbã nengẽ?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Yãmb ka mi tɩ nin-sõamyã na n kaoo dũni bʋʋd la? La sã n yaa tɩ yaa yãmb n na n kao dũni wã bʋʋdo, dẽ yĩnga, yaa paoogr ne yãmb tɩ kao yɛl sẽn ka a woto bʋʋd sɩda?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Yãmb ka mi tɩ tõnd na n kaoo malegsã bʋʋd la? Bõe tɩ tõnd ka na n kao vɩ-kãngã yɛlã bʋʋdo? 
1Corinthians6:4 Yãmb sã n yaool n tar yɛl ne taab vɩ-kãngã yɛl poorẽ, yaa neb nins wẽnd doogã sẽn ka gomd b yellã la yãmb kɩtd tɩ b kao bʋʋdã." 
1Corinthians6:5 Mam yeta woto n na n ning yãmb yãnde. Dẽ, ned ba a yembr ka be yãmb sʋkã n tar yam n tõe n bʋ yɛl nins sẽn be a ba-biisã sʋkã bʋʋd wɛ?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Ba-biig bʋʋda ne ba-biig a to neb sẽn ka tẽedb taoore. 
1Corinthians6:7 Yãmb sẽn bʋʋd ne taabã zoe n yaa kongr yãmb yĩnga. Bõe tɩ yell sã n ka zemse, yãmb ka yõkd y mens n tʋk-a? Bõe tɩ yãmb ka basd bal tɩ b rɩk bũmb yãmb sẽn so?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Yaa yãmb n maand sẽn ka zemse, la y fãad neb a taaba, la yaa yãmb ba-biisi." 
1Corinthians6:9 Yãmb zɩ tɩ neb nins sẽn maand sẽn ka zemsã ka na n paam Wẽnnaam soolem wa b rogem-pʋɩɩr la? Da belg-y y mens ye. Tʋʋm-dẽgd maandbã, wẽn-naands pʋʋsdbã, nin-yoaadbã," 
1Corinthians6:10 wẽng maandbã, raopã wall pagb sẽ gãe taabã, wagda wã, yão-beed dãmba, sẽn yũud-b rãam n tuumdẽ wã, nin-tʋʋdbã, fãadbã, baa a yembr kõn paam Wẽnnaam soolma wa a rogem-pʋɩɩr ye." 
1Corinthians6:11 Yãmb neb kẽer yaool n dag n yaa a woto. La yãmb paama pekre, b kɩtame tɩ yãmb lebg sõama, b kɩtame tɩ yãmb zemse, tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋrã maasem yĩnga, la ne tõnd Wẽnnaamã Sɩɩg pãnga." 
1Corinthians6:12 Mam tara noor tɩ maan bũmb fãa, la ka bũmba fãa n be yõod ye. Mam tara noor tɩ maan bũmb fãa, la mam ka na n sak n kẽ bũmb baa a yembr yembdẽ ye." 
1Corinthians6:13 Rɩɩb yaa pʋg yĩnga, la pʋg yaa rɩɩb yĩnga. La Wẽnnaam na n sãama b yiibã fãa. Yĩngã ka tʋʋm-dẽgd yĩng ye, a yaa Zu-soabã yĩnga, la Zu-soabã yaa yĩngã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians6:14 Wẽnnaam, sẽn vʋʋg-a Zu-soabã na n vʋʋga tõnd me ne b meng pãngã." 
1Corinthians6:15 Yãmb zɩ tɩ yãmb yĩnga yaa Kiris will la? Dẽ wã, mam na n dɩka Kiris wilã n kɩt tɩ lebg pʋg-yoodr willi?" 
1Corinthians6:16 No-koeemd ka be tɩ yaa ayo ye. Yãmb zɩ tɩ ned sẽn lagem ne pʋg-yoodr lebga yĩng a yembr ne-a la? Bala, b yeelame tɩ: Bãmb b yiibã na n lebga yĩng a yembre." 
1Corinthians6:17 La ned ning sẽn loe ne Zu-soabã lebgda sɩɩg a yembr ne bãmba. 
1Corinthians6:18 Zoe-y yoobo. Yel-wẽnd a to ninsaal sẽn maand ka be a yĩngã pʋgẽ ye. La ned ning sẽn maand yoob beegda a meng yĩnga. 
1Corinthians6:19 Yãmb zɩ tɩ yãmb yĩnga yaa Sɩɩg-sõng roogo, Sɩɩg-sõng yãmb sẽn deeg Wẽnnaam nengẽ, la tɩ yãmb ka leb n so y meng la?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Bala, b lebs n daa yãmb toogo. Woto yĩnga, waoog-y Wẽnnaam ne y yĩngã [la ne Sɩɩgã sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam dẽndã.]" 
1Corinthians7:1 Ne bũmb ning yãmb sẽn gʋls maam n gom a yellã, yaa sõama rao yĩng t'a ra sɩɩs pag ye." 
1Corinthians7:2 La sẽn na yɩl tɩ ned ra maan yoobo, bɩ ned fãa paam a paga, tɩ pag fãa paam a sɩda." 
1Corinthians7:3 Bɩ sɩdã kɩs pagã bũmb ning a sẽn tog n kis-a wã, la tɩ pagã me maan a woto ne a sɩdã." 
1Corinthians7:4 Pag ka tar noor ne a mengã yĩng ye, yaa a sɩdã n tar noor ne. Raoã me ka tar noor ne a mengã yĩng ye, yaa a pagã." 
1Corinthians7:5 Bɩ ned fãa ra mong a to, sã n ka tɩ y zemsa taab noore, wakat bilf yĩnga, tɩ y tõe n paam weer n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam. Rẽ sã n loog bɩ y leb n bao taaba, t'a Sʋtãan da wa n mak yãmba, y sẽn ka tõe y meng yĩng ye." 
1Corinthians7:6 Mam sẽn yet woto wã, ka tõog ye, yaa sore." 
1Corinthians7:7 Mam datẽ lame tɩ raopã fãa yɩẽ wa maam. La ned fãa deegda a kũun Wẽnnaam nengẽ, t'a zagl rẽnd ya woto, t'a zagl me rẽnd ya bũmb a to." 
1Corinthians7:8 Sã n yaa neb nins sẽn ka yi kãadmã, la pʋg‑kõapã, mam yet-b lame tɩ b sã n kell n pa wa mam sẽn yaa a soabã, yaa sõama." 
1Corinthians7:9 La b sã n ka tõe b mense, bɩ b kẽ kãadem. Bala, b sẽn na n kẽ kãadem n são b sẽn na n kẽnd tɩ yõogd‑ba." 
1Corinthians7:10 La neb nins sẽn kẽ kãadmã, mam yet-b lame (la ka maam n yet-b ye, yaa Zu-soabã) tɩ pag da yi n bas a sɩd ye." 
1Corinthians7:11 La a sã n yi n bas-a, bɩ a kell n zĩnd a yembre, wall a maneg a yell ne-a." 
1Corinthians7:12 La neb a taabã, m yet-b lame, ka Zu-soabã ye: D ba-biig sã n tar pag t'a ka tẽeda, n yaool n sak n na n zĩnd ne yẽnda, bɩ a ra rig-a ye." 
1Corinthians7:13 La pag sã n tar sɩd t'a ka tẽeda, n yaool n sak n na n zĩnd ne yẽnda, bɩ a da rig-a ye." 
1Corinthians7:14 Bala, pagã kɩtame t'a sɩdã sẽn ka tẽedã lebg nin-sõngo, la d ba-bi-raoogã me kɩtdame t'a pagã sẽn ka tẽedã lebg nin-sõngo. Sã n ka rẽ, yãmb kambã na n yɩɩ bõn-dẽgdo, tɩ b yaool n yaa nin-sõamyã." 
1Corinthians7:15 Sẽn ka tẽed-a wã sã n welge, bɩ a welge. Sã n yɩ a woto, bũmb ka loet ba-bi-raoogã bɩ ba-bi-poakã ne a to wã ye. Wẽnnaam boola tõnd tɩ d vɩɩmd laafɩ pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians7:16 Sɩd me, paga, fo na n yɩɩ wãn n bãng f sã n na n fãaga f sɩda? Walla, sɩda, fo na n yɩɩ wãn n bãng f sã n na n fãaga f pagã?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Sẽn be bala, bɩ ned fãa kẽn wa pʋɩɩr ning Wẽnnaam sẽn pʋɩ n kõ-a wã, la wa boolg ning a sẽn paam Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã. Yaa woto la mam yet wẽnd-dotã fãa pʋgẽ tɩ b maane." 
1Corinthians7:18 Wẽnnaam sẽn wa n bool yãmbã, sã n mikame tɩ y rag n yaa zũnga, bɩ y kell n yɩ zũnga. La sã n yaa tɩ y rag n yaa moaaga, bɩ y ra kɩt tɩ b kẽes-y bãong ye." 
1Corinthians7:19 Bãong kõom ka fɩ, la moonem me ka fɩ. Yaa Wẽnnaam noyã sakr la b geenda." 
1Corinthians7:20 Bɩ ned fãa kell n pa wa a sẽn dag n yaa to-to wakat ning a sẽn paam boolgã. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wẽnnaam sẽn wa n bool foomã, rẽ tɩ f yaa yamba? Da maan yɩɩr ye. La f sã n tõe n paam lohorem, da bas tɩ loog ye." 
1Corinthians7:22 Bala, yamb ning sẽn paam boolg Zu-soaba pʋgẽ, a lebga Zu-soaba burkĩna. Woto me, burkĩn ning b sẽn boolã yaa Kiris yamba." 
1Corinthians7:23 B lebs n daa yãmb toogo. Bɩ y da leb n lebg ninsaalb yembs ye. 
1Corinthians7:24 M ba-biisi, bɩ ned kam fãa kell n pa n sẽn dag n yaa to-to wakat ning b sẽn bool-a wã." 
1Corinthians7:25 Sã n yaa ne pa-kuil-n-dãmba yelle, mam ka tar sẽn yit Zu-soabã nengẽ ye. Maam, ned Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩt t'a maand sɩd bãmb nimbãan-zoeerã yĩngã n wilgd m tagsgo." 
1Corinthians7:26 Yɛl nins sẽn be moasã wã yĩnga, ad bũmb ning mam sẽn tẽed tɩ yaa sõama: Yaa sõama tɩ rao kell n yɩ a woto." 
1Corinthians7:27 Fo tara paga? Da bao tɩ welg ne-a ye. Fo ka tar paga? Da bao pag ye. 
1Corinthians7:28 Fo sã n yi kãadem, kõn yɩ yel-wẽnd ye. Pa-kuil sã n yi kãadem, kõn yɩ yel-wẽnd ye. La nin-bãmb na n paama yel-pakre, mam yaool n baooda yãmb sõngre." 
1Corinthians7:29 M ba-biisi, (ad bũmb ning m sẽn yeta), mam yetame yaa: Weerã yaa koɛɛga. Sẽn sɩng ne moasã, bɩ neb nins sẽn tar pagbã yɩ wa neb sẽn ka tar pagba," 
1Corinthians7:30 tɩ neb nins sẽn yãbd yɩ wa neb sẽn ka yãbdã, tɩ neb nins sẽn maand sũ-noogã yɩ wa neb sẽn ka maand sũ-noog ye, tɩ neb nins sẽn daad yɩ wa neb sẽn ka tar ye." 
1Corinthians7:31 La tɩ neb nins sẽn zaeegd ne dũni wã yɩ wa b sẽn sɩd ka zaeegd ne-a ye. Bala, dũni‑kãnga sẽn yaa to-to wã loogdame." 
1Corinthians7:32 Mam yaool n datame tɩ yãmb yɩ neb sẽn ka maand yɩɩr ye. Ned ning sẽn ka yi-a kãadem, Zu-soabã yell n pak-a, a sẽn na n maan to-to n ta Zu-soabã yam." 
1Corinthians7:33 Sẽn yi-a kãadem, dũni yɛl yell n pak-a, a sẽn na n maan to-to n ta a pagã yam." 
1Corinthians7:34 La a pʋɩɩ zĩis a yiibu. Woto me pag sẽn ka tar sɩda, la pa-kuili, yaa Zu-soabã yell n pak-ba, tɩ b tõe n yɩ nin-sõamyã b yĩngã pʋgẽ la b sɩɩgã pʋgẽ me. Sẽn kuil-a sɩda, dũni yɛl n pak-a, a sẽn na n maan to-to n ta a sɩda yam." 
1Corinthians7:35 Mam sẽn gomd woto wã, yaa yãmb sõngr yĩnga. Ka tɩ bẽd yãmb ye, yaa sẽn na yɩl la yãmb maan sẽn zemse, n na n sõng-y tɩ y loe y meng ne Zu-soabã tɩ tak-tɩ-m-tak ka beẽ ye." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ned sã n tags t'a pa-kuil sã n yõsg sɩd wakat yaa yãnde, n dat n kuils-a, bɩ a maan a sẽn data. Rẽ ka yel-wẽnd ye. Bɩ d yi kãadem." 
1Corinthians7:37 La sẽn yas-a kãenkãe, n mi a sẽn dat tɩ modgr kaẽ, yẽnda sã n yãk yam a sũurẽ t'a na n basa a biig a yiri, soab‑kãng maana neere." 
1Corinthians7:38 Woto, sẽn kõ-a a biig sɩd maana neere, sẽn ka kõ-a a biig sɩd maan-neer n yɩɩda." 
1Corinthians7:39 Pag loee ne a sɩda, a sɩdã vɩɩm tɛka. La a sɩdã sã n ki, a tara noor tɩ leb n kuil ned ning a sẽn data, la sẽn be, tog n yɩɩ Zu-soabã pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians7:40 La ne maam, mam yetame t'a sã n kell n pa a woto, a sũur na yɩ noog n yɩɩda. Mam me yaool n tẽedame tɩ m tara Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã." 
1Corinthians8:1 Sã n yaa ne maand nins sẽn kʋ tẽn-kugã nemdã yelle, tõnd fãa miime tɩ d tara bãngre. (Bãngr wata ne wuk-m-menga, la nonglem sõngdame." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ned sã n tagsd t'a mii bũmbu, a ket n ka mi tɩ sek ye." 
1Corinthians8:3 La ned sã n nong Wẽnnaam, Wẽnnaam mi-a lame)." 
1Corinthians8:4 Sã n yaa ne maandã b sẽn kʋ wẽn-naandsã nemd wãbr yelle, tõnd miime tɩ wẽn-naandg ka be dũni ye, la tɩ Wẽnnaam a yembr bal n be." 
1Corinthians8:5 Bala, baa ne bũmb nins sẽn be yĩngr wall tẽng zug tɩ b boond tɩ wẽnnaam-dãmbã (la wẽnnaam-dãmbã ne zu-soben-dãmba sõor waooga)." 
1Corinthians8:6 Ne tõndo, Wẽnnaam a yembr bal n be, n yaa ba. Bũmb fãa yita bãmb nengẽ, tõnd yaa bãmb dẽnda. La zu-soab a yembr tãa n be, a Zeezi Kirisi, soab ning maasem yĩng bũmb fãa sẽn be, la tõnd sẽn be." 
1Corinthians8:7 La ka nebã fãa n mi bõn-kãng ye. Sɩd me, neb kẽer yam sẽn ket n togl wẽn-naandsã wãbda nem-kãens sẽn yɩ maoongã. La bũmb‑kãng rẽgemda bãmb sũ-bãngrã sẽn ka pãngã." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ka rɩɩb n na n pẽneg tõnd ne Wẽnnaam ye: Tõnd sã n ka rɩt-a, bũmb ka paoog tõnd ye. La tõnd sã n dɩt-a, a ka paasd tõnd fʋɩ." 
1Corinthians8:9 Baoosgo, bɩ y gũus tɩ yãmb lohormã da wa n lebg kug-lakdg neb nins sẽn ka pãnga yĩng ye." 
1Corinthians8:10 Bala, ned sã n yãnd foom a tar bãngrã tɩ f zĩ wẽn-naandg karen-doogẽ n dɩtẽ, rẽ yĩnga, a sũ-bãngrã sẽn ka pãngã ka na n kɩt t'a me wãb maand sẽn kʋ wẽn-naandsã nemdo?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Woto, fo bãngrã kɩtame tɩ ka pãng soabã, ba-biig ning Kiris sẽn ki a yĩngã sãame." 
1Corinthians8:12 Fo sã n maan yel-wẽnd a woto n beeg f ba-biisã, tɩ b sũ-bãngrã sẽn ka pãngã lak foom, fo beega Kirisi." 
1Corinthians8:13 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ rɩɩb sã n yaa kug-lakdg m ba-biig yĩnga, mam kõn leb n wãb nemd lae-lae, tɩ m da wa n kɩt tɩ m ba-biig lʋɩ ye." 
1Corinthians9:1 Mam ka tar lohorem la? Mam ka tẽn-tʋmd la? Mam ka yãnd d Zu-soab a Zeezi la? Yãmb ka mam tʋʋmd Zu-soabã pʋgẽ biis la? 
1Corinthians9:2 Mam sã n ka tẽn-tʋmd neb kẽer yĩnga, mam yaa tẽn-tʋmd yãmb yĩnga. Yãmb yaa mam sẽn yaa Zu-soabã tẽn-tʋmdã tʋʋmd kaset bãnde." 
1Corinthians9:3 Gomd ning mam sẽn tar n leokd neb nins sẽn bʋʋd ne maamã yaa woto. 
1Corinthians9:4 Tõnd ka tar noor tɩ dɩ la d yũ la? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tõnd ka tar noor tɩ peeg d tão n maan d paga, wa tẽn-tʋmdb a taaba, la Zu-soabã ba-bi-raopa la a Sefaas sẽn maanã la?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Bɩ yaa maam bal ne a Barnabaas n ka tar noor tɩ tʋme? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ned a ãnda n be sodaarẽ la a get a meng yelle? Ãnda n send reezẽ tɩɩga, n ka rɩt a biisi? Ãnda n kɩɩmd rũms n ka yũud b bĩisim?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Dẽ yĩnga, yaa mam sẽn yaa ninsaalbã yĩng la m gomd a woto? Tõogã meng ka gomd a woto sɩda?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Bala, b gʋlsa a Moyiis tõogã pʋgẽ n yeele: Naaf ning sẽn pãbd-a koodã zɛɛgẽ wã, da ning a noor yʋk ye. Naafã yell n pak Wẽnnaam bɩ?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Bɩ yaa tõnd yĩng bal la b gom yã? N-yẽe! Yaa tõnd yĩng la b gʋls rẽnda. Sẽn kood-a tog n koo ne saagre, la sẽn pãbd-a koodã me tog n pãbda ne saagr t'a na n paama a pʋɩɩre." 
1Corinthians9:11 Sã n yaa tɩ tõnd bʋda sɩɩgã arzegs yãmb yĩnga, rẽ yĩnga, tõnd sã n tigsd yãmb arzegsã, yõsgame sɩda?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Neb a taab sã n dɩt yãmb yõodo, ka tõnd n pʋs n tog n dɩ n yɩɩda? La tõnd ka maan wa noor ning d sẽn tarã ye. Ayo, tõnd sakda fãa, tɩ d da wa ning gɩdgr Kiris koe-noogã taoor ye." 
1Corinthians9:13 Yãmb ka mi tɩ neb nins sẽn maand-b Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã, wẽnd doogã n dɩlgd‑ba, la tɩ neb nins sẽn tʋmd tẽn-kugrẽ wã paamda pʋɩɩr bũmb nins b sẽn yõogd tẽn-kugrã zugã pʋgẽ la?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Woto me, Zu-soabã kõo noor tɩ koe-noogã dɩlg neb nins sẽn moond koe-noogã." 
1Corinthians9:15 Ne maam, mam ka tʋm ne no-kãens baa a yembr ye. La mam ka gʋlsd a woto tɩ y na kõ-m ye. Bala, mam sẽn kiid n são. Ned baa a yembr kõn yiis waoogr ning mam sẽn tar yel-kãng pʋgẽ wã ye." 
1Corinthians9:16 Ne maam, tɩ moon koe-noogã ka waoogr baoob ye. Wẽnnaam n yet tɩ m tɩ m moone. Mam sã n ka moon koe-noogã, toog n na n paam maam." 
1Corinthians9:17 Mam sã n moon ne yamleoogo, mam paamda a keoore. La mam sã n moon-a modgr yĩnga, yaa tʋʋmd b sẽn dogl m zugu." 
1Corinthians9:18 Mam keoor la bʋgo? Yaa tɩ m sã n moond koe-noogã, bɩ m moon-a zaalem, n ka reeg bũmb nins koe-noogã sẽn kõt maam ne-wã ye." 
1Corinthians9:19 Bala, baa ned a yembr sẽn ka so maamã, mam maana m meng tɩ yɩ nebã fãa tʋmtʋmda, tɩ m tõe n paam neb fãa sõor m sẽn tõe n paam n yɩɩda." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã, mam yɩɩ wa Zʋɩfe, tɩ m tõe n paam-ba. Ne neb nins a Moyiis tõogã sẽn loe wã, mam yɩɩ wa ned a Moyiis tõogã sẽn loe, la a Moyiis tõogã yaool n ka loe maam, tɩ m tõe n paam neb nins tõogã sẽn loe wã." 
1Corinthians9:21 Ne neb nins sẽn ka be tõogã pʋgẽ wã, mam yɩɩ wa ned sẽn ka be tõogã pʋgẽ ye, la mam mengã yaool n ka ned sẽn be Wẽnnaam tõogã poorẽ ye, mam bee Kiris tõogã pʋgẽ, tɩ m tõe n paam neb nins sẽn ka be tõogã pʋgẽ wã." 
1Corinthians9:22 Ne neb nins sẽn be pãn-komsem pʋgẽ wã, mam yɩɩ pãn-komsem soaba, tɩ m tõe n paam pãn-komsem dãmbã. Mam maana m meng tɩ yɩ bũmbã fãa, nebã fãa yĩnga, tɩ sẽn wa n yaa neng ning fãa, bɩ m fãag neb kẽere." 
1Corinthians9:23 Mam maanda bũmba fãa koe-noogã yĩnga, tɩ m tõe n paam pʋɩɩr a pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians9:24 Yãmb zɩ tɩ neb nins sẽn zoet zoeesã zĩigẽ wã, nebã fãa n zoeta, la tɩ yaa nin‑yend tãa n deegd keoorã la? Bɩ y zoe y sẽn na zoe to-to n paam keoorã." 
1Corinthians9:25 Ned ning sẽn yõgd maoor modgda a meng n basd bũmb kẽere. Bãmb maanda a woto n dat maanf sẽn sãamda, la tõnd maandame n dat maanf sẽn ka sãamd ye." 
1Corinthians9:26 Mam yẽ, mam zoetame, la ka wa ned sẽn ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye. Mam lobda nug-gila, la ka tɩ pãb pemsem ye." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ayo, mam namsda m yĩngã sõama, n kɩtdẽ t'a sakd-ma, m sẽn zoet dabeem tɩ mam sẽn moon neb a taabã, bɩ b ra wa n yeel tɩ mam ka zems ye." 
1Corinthians10:1 M ba-biisi, mam ka rat tɩ yãmb zɩ yel-kãngã ye. Tõnd ba-rãmba fãa zĩnda sawadgã tẽngre, b fãa pɩʋʋga ko-kãsengã pʋga," 
1Corinthians10:2 a Moyiis pʋgẽ, b fãa paama lisg sawadgã ne ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ," 
1Corinthians10:3 b fãa rɩɩ sɩɩg rɩɩb a yembre," 
1Corinthians10:4 la b fãa yũu sɩɩg bõn-yũudl a yembre. Bala, b fãa ra yũuda koom sẽn yit pĩig sẽn da pʋgd bãmbã pʋgẽ, la pĩ-kãng ra yaa Kirisi." 
1Corinthians10:5 La bãmb neb wʋsg ka ta Wẽnnaam yam ye. Bala, b kii weoogẽ wã." 
1Corinthians10:6 Bõn-kãens yaa mamsg tõnd yĩnga, tɩ tõnd da wa paam datem-wẽns wa bãmb sẽn dag n paamã ye." 
1Corinthians10:7 Da yɩ-y wẽn-naands pʋʋsdb wa bãmb neb kẽer sẽn dag n yɩ, tɩ b gʋls n wilgã ye. B yeelame yaa: Nebã zĩndame n na n dɩ la b yũ. Rẽ poore, b yikame n na n noog b sũuri." 
1Corinthians10:8 Tɩ d da maan rẽgd wa bãmb neb kẽer sẽn maane, tɩ neb tus pisi la a tã ki daar a yembrã ye." 
1Corinthians10:9 Tɩ d da mak Zu-soabã wa bãmb neb kẽer sẽn mak-ba, tɩ wiis sãam-ba ye." 
1Corinthians10:10 Da yẽgm-y wa bãmb neb kẽer sẽn maane, tɩ sãamdã sãam-ba ye." 
1Corinthians10:11 Bõn-kãens paama bãmba, tɩ yɩ mamsgo, la b gʋlsame n na n keoog tõnd dãmb sẽn mi tɩ wakatã taa a saabã." 
1Corinthians10:12 Woto yĩnga, bɩ ned ning sẽn tagsd t'a yasa yĩngrã gũus n da wa lʋɩ ye." 
1Corinthians10:13 Makr baa a yembr sẽn nan ka mak ninsaal ka mak yãmb ye. Wẽnnaam yaa sɩd maanda, la b ka na n sak tɩ yãmb paam makr sẽn yɩɩd y pãng ye. La makr sã n wa, Wẽnnaam na n kõo yãmb manesem y sẽn na maan n yi, tɩ yãmb tõe yals makrã pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians10:14 Woto yĩnga, m Zo-nongdse, zoe-y wẽn-naands pʋʋsgo." 
1Corinthians10:15 Mam sẽn gomd ne yãmbã, yaa wa ne neb yam sẽn vɩ. Yãmb mens tags bũmb ning mam sẽn yetã yelle." 
1Corinthians10:16 Bark bõn-yũudlã tõnd sẽn ningd barkã, a ka kɩtd tɩ tõnd paam lagem-n-taar ne Kiris zɩɩmã sɩda? Burã tõnd sẽn kaoodã, a ka kɩtd tɩ tõnd paam lagem-n-taar ne Kiris yĩngã sɩda?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Burã sẽn yaa a yembrã, tõnd sẽn yaa wʋsgã, d yaa yĩng a yembre. Bala, tõnd fãa wãbda bur a yembre." 
1Corinthians10:18 Ges-y neb nins sẽn yaa Israyɛll neb ne yĩng yellã: Neb nins sẽn wãbd dũms nins b sẽn tall n maan maandã nemdã, b ka tar lagem-n-taar ne tẽn-kugrã sɩda?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Mam yetame tɩ bõe? Mam yetame tɩ maandã sẽn kʋ wẽn-naandsã nemdã yaa bũmb la? Bɩ tɩ wẽn-naandg yaa bũmbu? Baa bilfu. 
1Corinthians10:20 Maoongã sẽn kʋʋdã, yaa zĩn-dãmb yĩnga, la ka Wẽnnaam yĩng ye. La mam yaool n ka rat tɩ yãmb paam lagem-n-taar ne zĩn-dambã ye." 
1Corinthians10:21 Ka tõe n yũud Zu-soabã bõn-yũudlã, la y yũud zĩn-dãmbã me rẽnd ye. Yãmb ka tõe n naag n dɩt Zu-soabã dɩɩbo, la y leb n naag n dɩt zĩn-dãmb dɩɩb ye." 
1Corinthians10:22 Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd datame tɩ Zu-soabã sũ-kiir yik la? Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd pãng yɩɩda bãmb la?" 
1Corinthians10:23 Noor beeme tɩ maan fãa, la ka bũmb fãa n be yõod ye. Noor beeme tɩ maan bũmb fãa, la ka fãa n sõngd ye." 
1Corinthians10:24 Bɩ ned baa a yembr da bao a meng sõngr ye, a bao a to rẽnda." 
1Corinthians10:25 Sũur kaset yĩnga, bɩ y rɩ bũmb ning fãa sẽn koosd raagẽ, n da sok a kibar ye." 
1Corinthians10:26 Bala, tẽngã yaa Zu-soabã n so, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã me, yaa bãmb n so." 
1Corinthians10:27 Ned sẽn ka tẽed sã n bool yãmb tɩ y wa rɩ, tɩ yãmb sak n kẽnge, sũur kaset yĩnga, bɩ y rɩ bũmb ning fãa a sẽn kõt yãmbã, n da sok a kibar ye." 
1Corinthians10:28 La ned sã n yeel yãmb tɩ: Yõwã yɩɩ maoongo, bɩ y ra rɩ, [soab ning sẽn pĩnd n wilg yãmbã yĩnga,] la sũur yĩng me." 
1Corinthians10:29 Mam sẽn gomd sũur kasetã yellã, ka yãmb sũur kasetã ye, yaa ned a to wã rẽnda. Sɩd me, bõe yĩng tɩ sũur kaset sẽn ka mam dẽnd na n wa kao mam lohorem bʋʋdo?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Mam sã n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam bark la m dɩ, bõe yĩng tɩ b na n kãn maam ne bũmb ning mam sẽn pʋʋs bark a yĩnga?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Yãmb sã n dɩtẽ, wall y yũuda, wall bũmb ning fãa y sẽn maanda, maan-y fãa Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga." 
1Corinthians10:32 Da yɩ-y kug-lakdg sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf-rãmbã yĩnga, wall Zʋɩf-rãmbã yĩnga, wall Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã yĩng ye." 
1Corinthians10:33 Wa mam me sẽn maand sẽn noom nebã, n ka baood m meng nafre, la yaa neb wʋsgã rẽndã, tɩ b tõe n paam fãagrã." 
1Corinthians11:1 Yɩ-y mam togs-n-taase, wa mam meng sẽn yaa Kiris togs-n-taagã." 
1Corinthians11:2 Mam pẽgda yãmba, yãmb sẽn tẽr mam yell bũmb fãa pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, la tɩ yãmb sakd bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maanã." 
1Corinthians11:3 Mam yaool n datame tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ Kiris yaa rao fãa Zu-soaba, la dao yaa pag zu-soaba, la tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa Kiris Zu-soaba." 
1Corinthians11:4 Rao ning fãa sẽn lud a zug n pʋʋs wall a togs bãngr goam paoogda a Zu-soabã. 
1Corinthians11:5 La pag fãa sẽn ka lud a zug n pʋʋs wall a togs bãngr goam paoogda a Zu-soabã. Yaa wa a sẽn põng a zugu. 
1Corinthians11:6 Pag sã n ka teeg a zug peende, bɩ a wõrs a zoobdã me. La sã n yaa tɩ pag zoobd wõrsg wall a zug põngr yaa yãnde, bɩ a teeg peende." 
1Corinthians11:7 Dao ka tog n teeg peend ye, a sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam ziir la b wẽnegã yĩnga. La pag yaa dao ziiri." 
1Corinthians11:8 Sɩd me, ka pag la b yãk n naan dao ye, la yaa rao la b yãk n naan paga." 
1Corinthians11:9 La b ka naan rao pag yĩng ye, yaa pag la b naan dao yĩnga." 
1Corinthians11:10 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ pag tog n ning ned sẽn so-a yẽnda wã bãnd a zugẽ, malegsã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians11:11 Baoosgo, Zu-soabã pʋgẽ, pag ka be tɩ rao kaẽ ye, la rao ka be tɩ pag kaẽ ye." 
1Corinthians11:12 Bala, a wa b sẽn yãk rao pʋgẽ n naan pagã, yaa pag me n dog raoa, la fãa yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
1Corinthians11:13 Yãmb mens tags n gese, rẽ yĩnga, segdame tɩ pag pʋʋs Wẽnnaam n ka teeg a zug peende?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Vɩɩmã meng sẽn yaa to-to wã ka zãmsd tõnd tɩ yaa yãnd ne rao tɩ paam zoob-wogdo," 
1Corinthians11:15 la tɩ pag sã n tar zoob-wogdo bee neer ne-a sɩda? Sɩd me, b kõ-a‑la zoobdã tɩ lud a zugã wa peende." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ned sã n minim kɩɩsgo, tõnd yẽ ka minim a woto, la Wẽnnaam doogã me ka minim ye." 
1Corinthians11:17 Mam sẽn kõt yãmb koe-kãensã wã, bũmb ning mam sẽn ka pẽgda, yaa tɩ yãmb sẽn tigimdã, ka tɩ y na yɩ sõama n yɩɩd ye, yaa tɩ yɩ wẽng n yɩɩda." 
1Corinthians11:18 Pipi, mam wʋmdame tɩ yãmb sã n wa n tigim taaba, welgr n be yãmb sʋka (la mam tẽeda koe-kãng bilfu)." 
1Corinthians11:19 Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ welgr sɩd zĩndi, tɩ b na bãng neb nins sẽn zems pẽgr yãmb sʋkã." 
1Corinthians11:20 Dẽ, yãmb sẽn tigimd taabã, ka tɩ rɩ Zu-soabã rɩɩb ye." 
1Corinthians11:21 Bala, kẽer sẽn dengd b taab n dɩtẽ rɩta b mens rɩɩbo, tɩ nina zĩ ne kom, tɩ nina neng yilimd ne rãam." 
1Corinthians11:22 Yãmb ka tar yiy n na n dɩt be la y yũud be la? Bɩ yãmb ka nand Wẽnnaam doogã, la y rat n paoog neb nins sẽn ka tar bũmbã? Mam na n yeela yãmb tɩ bõe? Mam na n pẽga yãmba? Yel‑kãngã pʋgẽ yẽ, mam kõn pẽg yãmb ye." 
1Corinthians11:23 Bala, bũmb ning mam sẽn taas yãmbã, mam deeg-a la Zu-soabã nengẽ. Yʋng ning b sẽn yõk a Zeezi n kõ wã, Zu-soab a Zeezi dɩka buri," 
1Corinthians11:24 n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam barka, n yaool n kao-a n yeele: Yõwã yaa mam yĩng mam sẽn kõt yãmba. Maand-y woto n tẽegd mam yelle." 
1Corinthians11:25 B sẽn dɩ n sa me, a Zeezi dɩka bõn-yũudlã n yeele: Bõn-yũudl‑kãngã yaa kãab-paalg sẽn kãab mam zɩɩmã pʋgẽ: Maand-y a woto n tẽegd mam yell wakat fãa yãmb sẽn na yũ-a." 
1Corinthians11:26 Bala, wakat ning fãa yãmb sẽn wãbd bur‑kãngã, la y yũud bõn-yũudl‑kãngã, yãmb wilgda Zu-soabã kũum hal tɩ b lebg n wa." 
1Corinthians11:27 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ ned sã n wãb burã la a yũ Zu-soabã bõn-yũudlã ne paoogre, a beegda Zu-soabã yĩng ne b zɩɩmã." 
1Corinthians11:28 Woto yĩnga, bɩ ned fãa fees a menga, la a yaool n wãb burã la a yũ bõn-yũudlã." 
1Corinthians11:29 Bala, ned ning sẽn wãbd burã la a yũud bõn-yũudlã, la a ka nand Zu-soabã yĩnga, yaa bʋʋd a meng yĩng la a wãbd la a yũuda." 
1Corinthians11:30 Yaa rẽnda n kɩt tɩ bãad-rãmb la koms-rãmb yaa wʋsg yãmb sʋka, la tɩ neb wʋsg kiime." 
1Corinthians11:31 Tõnd sã n dag n kaoẽ d meng bʋʋdo, Wẽnnaam dag n kõn kaoẽ tõnd bʋʋd ye." 
1Corinthians11:32 La bʋʋd ning Wẽnnaam sẽn bʋʋdã pʋgẽ, b sɩbgda tõndo, tɩ b da wa n naag tõnd ne dũni wã n sɩbg ye." 
1Corinthians11:33 Woto yĩnga, m ba-biisi, yãmb sã n tigim taab n na n dɩ Zu-soabã kũum tẽegr dɩɩbã, bɩ y yals n gũ taaba." 
1Corinthians11:34 Kom sã n tar neda, bɩ a rɩ a yiri, tɩ y da wa n tigim taab n bao sɩbgr n kõ y mens ye. Mam sã n wa wa, m na ges yɛl a taabã yelle." 
1Corinthians12:1 M ba-biisi, mam ka rat tɩ yãmb zĩnd zɩɩlem pʋgẽ Sɩɩg-sõng kũunã yell wɛɛngẽ ye." 
1Corinthians12:2 Yãmb mii yãmb sẽn dag n ket n yaa nin-zaalse, tɩ yãmb sũyã loe ne wẽn-naands sẽn yaa mugsi, tɩ y ka tõe n lak ne-bã." 
1Corinthians12:3 Yaa rẽ yĩng tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ ned ka be, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã sẽn na n tus-a t'a yeel tɩ kãab wẽng n be a Zeezi zug ye. La ned baa a yembr me ka tõe n yeel t'a Zeezi yaa Zu-soaba, sã n ka Sɩɩg-sõng n kɩt t'a yeel ye." 
1Corinthians12:4 Kũunã yaa toay-toaya, la yaa Sɩɩg a yembr n kõte." 
1Corinthians12:5 Tʋʋmã sẽn tʋmd to-to wã yaa toay-toaya, la yaa Zu-soab a yembr yĩng la b tʋmda." 
1Corinthians12:6 Tʋʋmã yaa toay-toaya, la yaa Wẽnnaam a yembr n tʋmd fãa nebã fãa pʋse." 
1Corinthians12:7 Sɩɩgã belem pukda ned kam fãa vɩɩmẽ, nebã fãa sõngr yĩnga." 
1Corinthians12:8 Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kõta ned a yembr yam gomde, n kõ ned a to bãngr gomde, la yaa Sɩɩg a yembr n maand rẽ." 
1Corinthians12:9 Sɩ-kãng kõta ned a to tẽebo, n kõ ned a to maagr kũuni, la yaa Sɩɩg a yembre." 
1Corinthians12:10 Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kõta ned a to bõn-bãn maaneg kũuni, n kõ ned a to pĩnd-n-bãngr gomde, n kõ ned a to pãn-tõog tɩ bãng sɩɩsã n welg taaba, n kõ ned a to gom-zẽn buud toay-toaya, la ned a to gom-zẽn deesgo." 
1Corinthians12:11 Yaa Sɩɩg a yembr tãa n maand bõn-kãensã fãa, n pʋɩt kũunã n kõt ned kam fãa wa b sẽn data." 
1Corinthians12:12 Sɩd me, a wa yĩng sẽn yaa yembr n yaool n tar wil wʋsgã, la tɩ yĩngã wilã, baa ne b sẽn yaa wʋsgã b yaa yĩng a yembr balã, Kiris me yaa a woto bala." 
1Corinthians12:13 Bala, yaa Sɩɩg a yembr pʋgẽ la b lis tõnd fãa, Zʋɩf-rãmba, sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf-rãmba, yembse, burkĩmba, tɩ d tõe n lebg yĩng a yembre. La tõnd fãa yũu Sɩɩg a yembr n yiis d ko-yũudu." 
1Corinthians12:14 Woto, yĩng ka will a yembr bal ye, yaa wil wʋsgo." 
1Corinthians12:15 Naoor sã n yeel tɩ yẽnda sẽn ka nugã yĩnga, yẽnda ka yĩngã willi, rẽ ka kɩtd t'a ka yĩngã will ye." 
1Corinthians12:16 La tʋbr sã n yeel tɩ yẽnda sẽn ka nifã yĩnga, yẽ ka yĩngã willi, rẽ ka kɩtd t'a ka yĩngã will ye." 
1Corinthians12:17 Yĩngã tõr sã n dag n yaẽ nifu, tʋbr da na n bee yɛ? La fãa sã n dag n yaẽ tʋbre, yõor da na n bee yɛ?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ad Wẽnnaam ninga wilã yĩngã pʋgẽ wa b sẽn data. 
1Corinthians12:19 Yĩngã tõr sã n dag n yaẽ will a yembre, yĩngã meng da na n beẽ la yɛɛnẽ?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Woto wã, yĩngã wil yaa wʋsgo, la yaa yĩng a yembre." 
1Corinthians12:21 Nif ka tõe n yeel nug t'a ka rat a sõngr ye, la zug ka tõe n yeel nao t'a ka rat b sõngr ye." 
1Corinthians12:22 Ayo, ka woto ye, yĩngã wil nins sẽn wẽnda b pãngã ka ta b taabã, n tar yõod yĩngã pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians12:23 La wil nins tõnd sẽn get tɩ b ka be waoogr n ta b taabã, tõnd waoogd-b lame n yɩɩda. Woto, yĩngã wil nins sẽn ka togd ne gesgã, tõnd geta b yell sõama," 
1Corinthians12:24 la wil nins sẽn sakd gesgã ka baood tɩ d ges b yell woto ye. Wẽnnaam sẽn ning yĩngã wilã to-to wã, b kɩtame tɩ wil nins sẽn ka tar waoogrã na paam waoogre," 
1Corinthians12:25 tɩ welgr da wa n zĩnd yĩngã pʋgẽ ye, la tɩ wilã me na ges taab yelle." 
1Corinthians12:26 Yĩngã will a yembr sã n namsdẽ, wil a taabã fãa naaga yẽnda n namsdẽ. La a yembr sã n paam waoogre, b fãa naagda yẽnda n kɩdemdẽ." 
1Corinthians12:27 Yãmb yaa Kirisã yĩnga, la yãmb ned kam fãa yaa bãmb yĩngã wila." 
1Corinthians12:28 Wẽnnaam ninga neb b roogẽ wã: pipi rãmb yaa tẽn-tʋmdbã, tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã ya yiib rãmba, tɩ karen-saam-dãmbã ya tãab rãmba. Rẽ poore, bõn-bãn maaneg kũun n be, tɩ maagr kũuni, sõngr kũuni, lʋɩ neb taoor kũuni, gom-zẽn buud toay-toay kũun n pʋgda." 
1Corinthians12:29 Dẽ yĩnga, nebã fãa yaa tẽn-tʋmdb la? B fãa yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb la? B fãa yaa karen-saam-dãmb la? B fãa maanda bõn-bãn la?" 
1Corinthians12:30 B fãa tara maagr kũun la? B fãa gomda gom-zẽn la? B fãa reesda gom-zẽn la? 
1Corinthians12:31 Bao-y kũun nins sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩdã. La mam na n wilga yãmb sor sẽn yɩɩd a taaba fãa. 
1Corinthians13:1 Mam sã n tõog n gomd ninsaalb la malegsã goam buud fãa, mam sã n ka tar nonglem, mam yaa wa waag sẽn maand bʋʋre, wall keoonf sẽn wẽeda." 
1Corinthians13:2 La mam sã n paam pĩnd-n-bãngr goam kũuni, la yel-soalma fãa bilgri, la bãngr fãa, la hal baa mam sã n tar tẽeb sẽn tõe n sers tãmse, mam sã n ka tar nonglem, mam ka fɩ." 
1Corinthians13:3 La mam sã n dɩk n paoongã fãa n pʋɩ tɩ naong rãmbã tõe n paam rɩɩbo, mam sã n kõ m yĩngã tɩ b yõog bugum, mam sã n ka tar nonglem, rẽ fãa ka yõod ye." 
1Corinthians13:4 Nonglem tara sũ-mare, nonglem sõngda neb a taaba, a ka maand sũ-kiir ye. Nonglem ka fʋʋmd a menga, a ka maand wilg-m-menga," 
1Corinthians13:5 a ka maand zãmb baa bilfu, a ka baood a meng nafr bal ye, a ka yikd a sũuri, a ka bĩngd wẽng ning b sẽn maan-a wã a sũurẽ ye," 
1Corinthians13:6 a ka maand sũ-noog ne ka-tɩrlem ye. Ayo! A maanda sũ-noog ne sɩda," 
1Corinthians13:7 a maanda sugr bũmb fãa yĩnga, a tẽeda bũmb fãa, a tara saag-sõng ne bũmb fãa, la a sakda bũmb fãa." 
1Corinthians13:8 Nonglem ka sɛt abada. Pĩnd-n-bãngr goam na sa, gom-zẽn na sa, bãngr na sa." 
1Corinthians13:9 Bala, tõnd sẽn bãngdã, yaa wɛdg-wɛdga, la pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã d sẽn togsdã yaa wedse." 
1Corinthians13:10 La sẽn zems-a zãngã sã n wa, b na n sɛɛsa sẽn yaa-a wedsã." 
1Corinthians13:11 Mam sẽn dag n yaa biigã, mam goam dag n yaa yãag goamã, mam tagsg dag n yaa yãag tagsgo. Mam sẽn lebg raoã, mam sɛɛsa bũmb nins sẽn dag n yaa yãadrã." 
1Corinthians13:12 Tõnd sẽn ne rũndã wã, yaa wa nen-gɛtg pʋgẽ, pulum-pulum. La wakat sã n ta, tõnd na yãnd-b neng ne nenga. Mam sẽn mi rũndã wã yaa wedse, la wakat sã n ta, mam na bãng bãmb wa bãmb sẽn bãng maamã." 
1Corinthians13:13 Moasã, ad bũmb a tãab nins sẽn paadã: yaa tẽebo, la saag-sõngo, la nonglem. La sẽn yaa kãseng bãmb sʋk n yɩɩdã, yaa nonglem." 
1Corinthians14:1 Bao-y nonglem. Dat-y Sɩɩg-sõng kũunã me, la sẽn yɩɩd fãa, bɩ y dat pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
1Corinthians14:2 Sɩd me, sẽn gomd-a ne gom-zẽn ka gomd ne ninsaalb ye, a gomda ne Wẽnnaam. Bala, ned baa a yembr ka wʋmd a võor ye, la Sɩɩgã kɩtame t'a togsd yel-soalma." 
1Corinthians14:3 La sẽn togsd-a pĩnd-n-bãngr goam gomda ne ninsaalbã, n bɩɩsd-ba, n sagend-ba, n belsd-ba." 
1Corinthians14:4 Sẽn gomd-a gom-zẽn bɩɩsda a menga. Sẽn togsd-a pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã bɩɩsda wẽnd doogã. 
1Corinthians14:5 Mam datame tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa gom gom-zẽna, la mam sẽn dat n yɩɩda, yaa tɩ yãmb togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã. Sẽn togsd-a pĩnd-n-bãngr goam yɩɩda sẽn gomd-a gom-zẽnã, sã n ka t'a soab rees-a lame tɩ wẽnd doogã tõe n paam bɩɩsg a pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians14:6 M ba-biisi, mam sã n wa yãmb nengẽ, n tõdg a wa ne vẽnegr gomde, wall bãngr gomde, wall pĩnd-n-bãngr gomde, wall zãmsgo, n gomd ne gom-zẽna, a yõod yaa bõe ne yãmba?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Wa b sẽn na n peeb wall b wẽ teed sẽn ka tar vɩɩm, wa wɩɩg wall pɛndga, tɩ ka tũud sõama, ned na n yɩɩ a wãn n bãng yɩɩl ning wɩɩgã sẽn peebdã, wall pɛndgã sẽn wẽedã?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Baorg sã n peebd tɩ ka vẽenega, ãnda n na n segl a meng zabr yĩnga?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Woto me, yãmb sã n gomd goam neb sẽn ka wʋmd a võore, nebã na n yɩɩ a wãn n bãng yãmb sẽn dat n togs bũmb ningã?" 
1Corinthians14:10 Baa dũni pʋgẽ goam buudã sẽn yaa wʋsgã, baa a yembr ka be n yaa sɩɩ tɩ ned ka wʋmdẽ ye." 
1Corinthians14:11 Woto, gomd sã n gomd tɩ mam ka wʋmd a võore, mam yaa nin-zẽng sẽn gomd-a wã yĩnga, la sẽn gomd-a wã me na n yɩɩ nin-zẽng mam yĩnga." 
1Corinthians14:12 Woto yĩnga, yãmb sẽn dat Sɩɩg-sõng kũunã, bɩ y kɩt tɩ yaa wẽnd doogã bɩɩsg yĩng la yãmb baood-b wʋsgo." 
1Corinthians14:13 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ ned ning sẽn gomd gom-zẽn tog n pʋʋs n tõog n deesdẽ. 
1Corinthians14:14 Bala, mam sã n gomd gom-zẽna, mam sɩɩgã yẽ pʋʋsdame, la mam yamã ka maand baa fɩ." 
1Corinthians14:15 Woto wã, m na n maana bõe? Mam sɩɩgã na n pʋʋsdame, la mam yamã me na n pʋʋsdame. Mam sɩɩgã na n yɩɩndame, la mam yamã me na n yɩɩndame." 
1Corinthians14:16 Fo sã n pʋʋsd Wẽnnaam bark ne f sɩɩgã, ned ning sẽn zĩ ne nebã n kelgdẽ wã na n maana a wãn n leok tɩ ãmina fo bark pʋʋsgã yĩnga, a sẽn ka wʋmd bũmb ning fo sẽn yetã?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Yaa sɩd tɩ yãmb pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark sõama, la ned a to wã ka paamd bɩɩsg a pʋgẽ ye." 
1Corinthians14:18 Mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam barka, mam sẽn gomd gom-zẽn n yɩɩd yãmb fãa wã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians14:19 La wẽnd doogẽ wã, mam nong n goma goam a nu ne m yamã, tɩ b tõe n kõ neb a taabã zãmsgo, n yɩɩd tɩ gom goam tus-piig ne gom-zẽna." 
1Corinthians14:20 Sã n yaa ne tagsg wɛɛngẽ, bɩ y da yɩ wa kamb ye. Yɩ-y wa kamb wẽng maaneg wɛɛngẽ, la wa raop sẽn bɩ, tagsgã wɛɛngẽ." 
1Corinthians14:21 B gʋlsa tõodã sebr pʋgẽ n yeele: Zu-soabã yeelame tɩ yaa ne buud a to nebã, la ne sãamb noy la mam na n gom ne nin-kãensã. La baa ne rẽnda, b ka na n kelg maam ye." 
1Corinthians14:22 Woto yĩnga, gom-zẽnã yaa bãnd neb nins sẽn ka tẽedã yĩnga, la ka Kiris tẽedbã yĩng ye. La pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã yaa bãnd Kiris tẽedbã yĩnga, la ka sẽn ka Kiris tẽedbã yĩng ye." 
1Corinthians14:23 Woto, wẽnd doogã neb fãa sã n tigim taaba, tɩ nebã fãa gomd gom-zẽna, tɩ neb wa bal n na n kelge, wall sẽn ka tẽedb sã n wa, b kõn yeel tɩ yãmb yaa gãeems sɩda?" 
1Corinthians14:24 La nebã fãa sã n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, tɩ ned sẽn ka tẽeda, wall kɛlgd bal wa, nebã fãa goamã kẽed-a lame, b fãa bʋʋda yẽnda bʋʋdo," 
1Corinthians14:25 b pukda bũmb nins sẽn solg a sũurẽ. Wakat-kãnga, a na n wõgemda Wẽnnaam taoor n waoog bãmba, la a na n mooname n yeel tɩ Wẽnnaam sɩd bee yãmb sʋka." 
1Corinthians14:26 Woto wã, m ba-biisi, d na n maana a wãna? Yãmb sã n tigim taaba, ned sã n tar yɩɩlle, wall saglgo, wall vẽnegre, wall gom-zẽnga, wall gom-zẽn deesgo, bɩ ned fãa maan a tʋʋmd nebã bɩɩsg yĩnga." 
1Corinthians14:27 Sã n yaa gom-zẽn goamã, bɩ neb a yiib wall a tãab bal gome, yembr yembre, tɩ ned reesdẽ." 
1Corinthians14:28 La ned sã n ka be n deesdẽ, bɩ ned fãa sĩnd wẽnd doogẽ, n gom a pʋgẽ la a gomd ne Wẽnnaam." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ne neb nins sẽn togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, bɩ neb a yiib wall a tãab gome, tɩ neb a taabã bʋ b goamã n gese." 
1Corinthians14:30 Ned sẽn be beenẽ sã n paam vẽnegre, bɩ sẽn da gomd-a wã sĩndi." 
1Corinthians14:31 Bala, yãmb fãa tõe n togsda pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n deesd taaba, tɩ nebã fãa na paam zãmsgo, la tɩ nebã fãa na paam saglgo." 
1Corinthians14:32 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sɩɩs sakd-b lame. 
1Corinthians14:33 Bala, Wẽnnaam ka bʋrg Wẽnnaam ye, b yaa laafɩ Wẽnnaam. Wa sẽn maand Wẽnnaam nin-sõamyã wã wẽnd dotẽ wã," 
1Corinthians14:34 bɩ pagbã sĩnd b noy tigindã pʋse, bala, b ka tar noor tɩ gom be ye. Bɩ b yɩ sakdba, wa Wẽnnaam tõogã me sẽn yetã." 
1Corinthians14:35 B sã n dat n sok bũmb kẽer võor n bãnge, bɩ b tɩ sogs b mens sɩdbã yiri. Bala, a yaa bũmb sẽn ka zems tɩ pag gom wẽnd doogẽ ye." 
1Corinthians14:36 Wẽnnaam goamã yii yãmb nengẽ bɩ, bɩ yaa yãmb nengẽ bal la a ta yã?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Ned sã n tẽed t'a yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa, wall tɩ Wẽnnaam ninga gomd a noorẽ, bɩ a bãng tɩ bũmb ning mam sẽn gʋls n togs yãmbã yaa Zu-soabã tõogo." 
1Corinthians14:38 La ned sã n zɩ yel-kãnga, bɩ nebã me ra bãng a soab ye." 
1Corinthians14:39 Woto yĩnga, m ba-biisi, bɩ ned fãa dat pĩnd-n-bãngr goam kũuni, la y da gɩdg neb tɩ b da gom gom-zẽn ye." 
1Corinthians14:40 La bɩ y maan bũmb fãa tɩ zemse, la tũud taab sõama." 
1Corinthians15:1 M ba-biisi, mam tẽegda yãmb koe-noog ning mam sẽn moon yãmb tɩ yãmb deege, n yas a pʋgẽ kãenkãe wã." 
1Corinthians15:2 Koe-no-kãng maasem yĩnga yãmb paama fãagre, yãmb sã n tall-a wa mam sẽn togs-a yãmbã. Sã n ka yɩ a woto, yãmb tẽe zaalem bala." 
1Corinthians15:3 Koɛɛg ning mam sẽn taas yãmbã, yaa mam me sẽn deege: Yaa tɩ wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yetã, Kiris kii tõnd yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians15:4 B mum-b lame, la wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yetã, b vʋʋga rasem a tãab daare," 
1Corinthians15:5 la a Sefaas yãnda bãmba, tɩ karen-biisã piig la a yiibã me yã bãmba." 
1Corinthians15:6 Rẽ poore, tõnd ba-biis sẽn yɩɩd bãmb kobs-nu yãa bãmb wakat a yembre. Bãmb neb wʋsg ket n vɩɩme, la kẽer me kiime." 
1Corinthians15:7 Rẽ poore, a Zak yãnda bãmba, la tẽn-tʋmdbã fãa yãa bãmba." 
1Corinthians15:8 Bãmb fãa poore, b puka b meng ne maam tɩ m yãnd-ba, baa mam sẽn yaa wa biig sẽn dog n pa ta wã." 
1Corinthians15:9 Bala, tẽn-tʋmdbã sʋka, maam n ka ta m taaba, la mam ka zems tɩ b bool maam tɩ tẽn-tʋmd ye. Bala, mam namsa Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã." 
1Corinthians15:10 Wẽnnaam barkã yĩnga, mam yaa m sẽn yaa a soaba, la bãmb nimbãan-zoeer mam yĩngã ka yɩ zaalem ye. Ayo! Mam tʋmame n yɩɩd tẽn-tʋmdbã fãa. La ka mam mengã n tʋm ye, yaa Wẽnnaam barkã sẽn be mam pʋgẽ wã." 
1Corinthians15:11 Woto yĩnga, tɩ yaa maam, tɩ yaa bãmba, bũmb ning tõnd sẽn moondã la woto, la yaa bõn-kãng la yãmb sẽn tẽ wã." 
1Corinthians15:12 La sã n yaa tɩ b moondame tɩ Kiris vʋʋgame n yi kũum sʋka, yɩta a wãn tɩ neb kẽer yãmb sʋk yetẽ tɩ kũum vʋʋgr ka be?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Sã n yaa tɩ kũum vʋʋgr ka be, rẽnd Kiris me ka vʋʋg ye." 
1Corinthians15:14 La sã n yaa tɩ Kiris ka vʋʋge, rẽnd tõnd koe-moonegã yaa tʋʋm zaalle, la yãmb tẽebã me ka võor ye." 
1Corinthians15:15 Sã n yaa tɩ kũum ka vʋʋgda, kɩtame meng tɩ tõnd yagd zĩrẽ ne Wẽnnaam yelle. Bala, tõnd yagda zĩrẽ n yetẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam vʋʋga Kiris tɩ b yaool n ka vʋʋg-b ye." 
1Corinthians15:16 Bala, kũum sã n ka vʋʋgdẽ, rẽnd Kiris me ka vʋʋg ye." 
1Corinthians15:17 La sã n yaa tɩ Kiris ka vʋʋge, rẽnd yãmb tẽebã ka yõod ye, la yãmb ket n bee y yel-wẽnã pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians15:18 La neb nins sẽn ki Kiris tũudum pʋgẽ wã yell sãamame. 
1Corinthians15:19 Sã n yaa vɩ-kãngã pʋgẽ yĩng bal la tõnd be ne Kirisã, ned ka be t'a nimbãaneg leb n ta tõnd ye." 
1Corinthians15:20 La moas-moasã wã yẽ, Kiris vʋʋgame n yi kũum sʋka. Bãmb n yɩ pipi soab Wẽnnaam sẽn vʋʋge, sẽn ki-bã sʋka." 
1Corinthians15:21 Bala, a wa kũumã sẽn tũnug rao a yembr tãa n wa wã, kũum vʋʋgrã me tũnuga rao a yembr tãa n wa." 
1Corinthians15:22 La a wa nebã fãa sẽn kiid a Ãdem maasem yĩngã, woto me, nebã fãa na n vʋʋgame, Kiris maasem yĩngã." 
1Corinthians15:23 La ned fãa na n talla a zĩiga: Kiris n na n yɩ dẽenem soaba, a Zeezi waoongã raare. Neb nins bãmb sẽn so wã na yaool n pʋgle." 
1Corinthians15:24 Kiris sã n sɛɛs naam fãa, la pãn-soaadb fãa, la pãng fãa, b na n dɩka soolmã n lebs ba a Wẽnnaam. Dẽ, bũmb fãa saab taame." 
1Corinthians15:25 Bala, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ Kiris rɩ naam, hal tɩ ta daar ning b sẽn na n kɩt tɩ b tab b bɛɛbã fãa n zĩẽ." 
1Corinthians15:26 Yaoolem bɛ Kiris sẽn na n sãam yaa kũumã. 
1Corinthians15:27 Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Kiris soog bũmba fãa. La b sã n yet tɩ Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Kiris soog bũmbã fãa, rat n yeelame tɩ ned ning sẽn kɩt tɩ bãmb soogã ka naag tɩ bãmb soẽ ye." 
1Corinthians15:28 La Wẽnnaam sã n kɩt t'a Zeezi soog bũmba fãa n sɛ, a Zeezi mengã na n saka ned ning sẽn kɩt tɩ bãmb soog bũmb fãa wã, sẽn na yɩl la Wẽnnaam yɩ taoor soab bũmb fãa pʋgẽ." 
1Corinthians15:29 Sã n ka yɩ a woto, neb nins sẽn deegd kiidbã zĩig tɩ b lisd-bã na n maana a wãna? Kũum sã n ka vʋʋgd lae-lae, bõe yĩng tɩ nebã kɩtd tɩ b lis-b kiidbã yĩngã?" 
1Corinthians15:30 La yaa bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd gẽnegd d yõor wakat fãa? 
1Corinthians15:31 M ba-biisi, mam yeta yãmb ne waoogr ning yãmb ya mam yĩng tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi pʋgẽ wã, tɩ daar fãa, kũum n be mam taoore?" 
1Corinthians15:32 Sã n yaa ninsaalb gesg yĩng la mam mao ne we-rũms Efɛɛsã, a yõod yaa bõe ne maam? Sã n yaa tɩ kũum ka vʋʋgda, bɩ d rɩ la d yũ. Bala, beoogo, d na n kiime." 
1Corinthians15:33 Da belg-y y mens ye: Tũud-n-ta-wẽng sãamda minim-sõamyã. 
1Corinthians15:34 Teem-y nao-kẽndre, n kẽn wa nin-tɩrse, la y ra maan yel-wẽn ye. Yaa yãmb yãnde, la mam yetame tɩ yãmb neb kẽer ka mi Wẽnnaam ye." 
1Corinthians15:35 La nina na n sokame tɩ sẽn ki-bã na n vʋʋga wãn-wãna, la b na n talla yĩn-bʋg buudu?" 
1Corinthians15:36 Ka-yam soaba! Tẽeg tɩ bũmb ning fo sẽn bʋd ka yita, a sã ka ki ye." 
1Corinthians15:37 La fo sẽn dɩk bũmb ning n bʋdã, a ka yit n ket n ya a woto ye. Yãmb bʋta bõn-buugu, wa bɩle wall bũmb a to." 
1Corinthians15:38 La Wẽnnaam kõt-a la yĩng ning bãmb sẽn data, la kood buud fãa tara a tɩɩg buudu." 
1Corinthians15:39 Bõn-vɩɩlɩ wã fãa nemd ka wẽnd taab ye. Ninsaal nemd yaa toore, rũms nemd yaa toore, bõn-pɩgs nemd yaa toore, zĩm nemd yaa toore." 
1Corinthians15:40 Arzãn yĩns me beeme tɩ tẽng zug yĩns me beẽ. Arzãn yĩnga neerem yaa toor ne tẽng zug ka yĩngã. 
1Corinthians15:41 Wĩntoog vẽenem toore, kiuug vẽenem toore, ãds vẽenem toore. Bala, ãdsã mens vẽenem ka zems taab ye." 
1Corinthians15:42 Yaa woto me ne kũumã vʋʋgre. B sã n na n mum ninsaala, rẽ t'a yaa bõn-põaagdga. La a sã n wa na n vʋʋge, a ka lebd n yɩ bõn-põaagdg ye." 
1Corinthians15:43 B sẽn wat n na n mum-a wã, ka be sẽn get ye. La a sã n wa na n vʋʋge, na n yɩɩ ne ziiri. B sẽn wat n na n mum-a wã, rẽ t'a ka pãng ye. La a sã n wa na n vʋʋge, a pida ne pãnga." 
1Corinthians15:44 B sẽn wa n mumd-a wakatã, rẽ t'a yaa ninsaal yĩnga, la a sã n wa na n vʋʋge, a na n yaa sɩɩga. Ninsaal yĩng sã n beẽ, sɩɩg yĩng me beeme." 
1Corinthians15:45 Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ b gʋls n yeel tɩ: Pipi rao a Ãdem lebga nin-vɩɩga. La yaoolem Ãdmã lebga sɩɩg sẽn kõt vɩɩm. 
1Corinthians15:46 Ka sɩɩg yĩngã n deng ye, yaa ninsaal yĩngã, tɩ sɩɩg rẽndã yaool n pʋgda." 
1Corinthians15:47 Pipi raoã b sẽn yãk tẽng tom n naanã yaa tẽng bũmbu. La yiib soabã yita arzãna. 
1Corinthians15:48 Tẽng nedã sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, tẽng nebã fãa me yaa a woto. La arzãn nedã sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, arzãn nebã me yaa a woto." 
1Corinthians15:49 A wa tõnd sẽn tall tẽng nedã wẽnegã, tõnd na n talla arzãn nedã me wẽnego." 
1Corinthians15:50 M Ba-biisi, mam sẽn dat n yeelã, yaa tɩ ninsaal yĩng la zɩɩm ka tõe n paam Wẽnnaam soolmã ye, la bõn-põaagdg ka paamd n lebg sẽn ka põogd ye." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ad mam togsda yãmb yel-solemde: Tõnd fãa ka na n ki ye. Tõnd fãa na n paama tedgr 
1Corinthians15:52 wakat a yembre, nif kamsg pʋgẽ, yaoolem baorg peebgã wakate. Bala, a na n peebame, la neb nins sẽn ki wã na n vʋʋgame n tar yĩns sẽn ka põogd ye, la tõnd me na n paama tedgre." 
1Corinthians15:53 Sɩd me, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ yĩn-põaagdgã tek n lebg yĩng sẽn ka põogda, tɩ yĩn-kiidgã tek n lebg yĩng sẽn ka kiid ye." 
1Corinthians15:54 Yĩn-põaagdgã sã n wa lebg yĩng sẽn ka põogda, tɩ yĩn-kiidgã lebg yĩng sẽn ka kiida, wakat-kãng la bũmb ning b sẽn gʋlsã na n pidsi. B yeelame yaa: Tõogr n vel kũum." 
1Corinthians15:55 Kũum, fo tõogrã bee yɛ? Kũum, fo toogã bee yɛ?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Yaa yel-wẽnã la kũumã toolem, la yaa tõogã n kõt yel-wẽnã pãnga." 
1Corinthians15:57 La bark Wẽnnaam! Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ tõnd paam tõogre, tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi maasem yĩnga." 
1Corinthians15:58 Woto yĩnga, m ba-bi-nongdse, yals-y kãenkãe, tɩ bũmb da tõog n vigs yãmb ye. Kẽng-y taoor Zu-soabã tʋʋmd pʋgẽ wakat fãa, yãmb sẽn mi tɩ tʋʋmd ning yãmb sẽn tʋmd Zu-soabã yĩngã ka na n yɩ zaalmã yĩnga." 
1Corinthians16:1 Sã n yaa ne nonglem kũunã y sẽn na n kõ Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã yĩngã, bɩ yãmb me maan wa mam sẽn yeel Galasi soolem wẽnd-dotã tɩ b maanã." 
1Corinthians16:2 Dasem a yopoe wã pipi daarã, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa bĩng bũmb ning a sẽn tõe n kõ wã kɛɛnga, a yiri, tɩ y da wa yals n gũ mam waoong n na n yaool n tigs kũunã ye." 
1Corinthians16:3 La mam sã n wa, mam na n kõo neb nins yãmb sẽn yãk tɩ b tall y kũunã n kẽng Zeruzalɛmã kaset sɛb tɩ b zã n kẽnge." 
1Corinthians16:4 La sã n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam mengã kẽng Zeruzalɛm, b na tũ maam n kẽnge." 
1Corinthians16:5 Mam sã n pɩʋʋg Masedoane, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ, bala, mam na n pɩʋʋga Masedoan." 
1Corinthians16:6 Daar ninga, mam na n zĩnda ne yãmb bilfu, wall m na n zĩnda yãmb nengẽ hal tɩ waoodã wẽnd looge, tɩ yãmb na kɩt tɩ b tall maam n kẽng zĩig ning mam sẽn na n kẽngã." 
1Corinthians16:7 So-kãngã wã, mam ka rat n pɩʋʋg bal n ges yãmb la m loog ye. Mam saagdame tɩ Zu-soabã sã n sake, mam na n zĩnda ne yãmb bilfu." 
1Corinthians16:8 Baoosgo, mam na n paa Efɛɛs hal tɩ ta Pãntekotã." 
1Corinthians16:9 Bala, dignoor n pak hal yalenga, mam tʋʋmdã yĩnga, la sẽn kis-b maamã sõor waoogame." 
1Corinthians16:10 A Tɩmote sã n ta, bɩ y maan y sẽn na maan t'a sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, bɩ a pɛlg yɩ kãenkãe, bala, a tʋmda Zu-soabã tʋʋmd wa mam me sẽn maandã." 
1Corinthians16:11 Woto yĩnga, bɩ ned baa a yembr da get-a n pa nandẽ ye. Kɩt-y tɩ b yãag-a t'a lebg n wa mam nengẽ ne laafɩ, bala, mam gũuda yẽnda ne ba-biisã." 
1Corinthians16:12 Ne ba-biig a Apoloos yelle, mam keng-a-la sõama n yeel-a t'a tũ ba-biisã n wa yãmb nengẽ, la a dag n ka yãk yam tɩ wa be moasã ye. A sã n wa paam weere, a na wa." 
1Corinthians16:13 Neend-y-yã! Yals-y kãenkãe tẽebã pʋgẽ! Yɩ-y raopa, keng-y y mense." 
1Corinthians16:14 Bɩ bũmb nins fãa sẽn maand yãmb sʋkã yɩ ne nonglem. 
1Corinthians16:15 M ba-biisi, bũmb a yembr la mam leb n dat n yeel yãmb tɩ y maane. Yãmb miime t'a Ɛstefanas zaka rãmb n yɩ pipi tẽedb Akayi soolmã pʋga, la tɩ b tʋmdame n sõngd Kiris tẽedbã." 
1Corinthians16:16 Sak-y neb a woto, la y sak neb nins fãa sẽn naag tʋʋmdã pʋgẽ n tʋmdẽ wã." 
1Corinthians16:17 Mam sũur yaa noog ne a Ɛstefanas la a Fortunatuus la a Akayikuus sẽn wa mam nengẽ wã. B yiisa yãmb velem sẽn dag n tar maamã," 
1Corinthians16:18 bala, b kɩtame tɩ maam ne yãmb sɩɩsã gãande. Bãng-y neb a woto yõod sẽn zem to-to."
