1Corinthians16:19 Wẽnd-dot nins sẽn be Aazi soolmã neb pʋʋsda yãmba. A Akɩlaas ne a Pirsill la Wẽnnaam nebã sẽn tigimd bãmb zakẽ wã toonda yãmb pʋʋsem Zu-soabã pʋgẽ. 
1Corinthians16:20 D ba-biisã fãa toonda yãmb pʋʋsem. Pʋʋs-y taab ne mok-sõngo. 
1Corinthians16:21 Yaa maam a Poll mengã nug n gʋls pʋʋsmã. 
1Corinthians16:22 Ned sã n ka nong Zu-soabã, bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd a zugu. Maaranata" 
1Corinthians16:23 Bɩ Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris barkã zĩnd ne yãmba! 
1Corinthians16:24 Mam nonga yãmb fãa a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ. 
2Corinthians1:1 Maam a Poll sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris tʋmtʋmd Wẽnnaam sẽn yãkã, la tõnd ba-biig a Tɩmote n tʋmd seb-kãngã Wẽnnaam nebã sẽn be Korẽntã, la Wẽnnaam nebã fãa sẽn be Akayi soolmã fãa pʋgã." 
2Corinthians1:2 Bɩ y reeg bark la laafɩ sẽn yit tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam la Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ. 
2Corinthians1:3 Pẽgr Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ba wã! Ba sẽn yaa nimbãan-zoɛta la Wẽnnaam sẽn belsd nebã wakat fãa. 
2Corinthians1:4 Bãmb belsda tõnd d yel-pakrã fãa pʋgẽ, tɩ tõnd sẽn paamd belsg Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã, tõnd na tõog n bels neb nins sẽn be tood buud fãa pʋgẽ wã ne bels-kõngo." 
2Corinthians1:5 Bala, a wa Kiris namsgã sẽn paamd tõndã, woto me, tõnd paamda belsg wʋsg Kiris maasem yĩng me." 
2Corinthians1:6 Tõnd sã n namsdẽ, yaa tɩ yãmb na paam belsg la fãagre. Tõnd sã n paamd belsgo, yaa sẽn na yɩl la yãmb paam belsg sẽn na kõ yãmb pãng tɩ y tõog n sak namsg nins tõnd sẽn paamdã ne sũ-mare." 
2Corinthians1:7 La tõnd sũur keema sõama ne yãmba, bala, tõnd miime tɩ yãmb sẽn naag n sak namsgã, yãmb tara pʋɩɩr ne belsgã me." 
2Corinthians1:8 Sɩd me, d ba-biisi, tõnd ka rat tɩ yãmb zɩ yel-pakr nins tõnd sẽn paam Aazi soolmẽ wã ye. Tõnd namsa wʋsg tɩ looge, n yɩɩg tõnd pãnga, hal tɩ d dag n ka leb n tẽed tɩ d na n vɩɩmdame ye." 
2Corinthians1:9 Tõnd da tagsda d sũyã pʋs tɩ b na n kʋʋ tõndo, rẽ sẽn paam tõndã yaa sẽn na n yɩl tɩ tõnd kõn teeg d mens ye, la tɩ d na teeg Wẽnnaam ning sẽn vʋʋgd kũumã." 
2Corinthians1:10 Yaa Wẽnnaam‑kãng n fãag tõndo, la b na fãag tõnd ne kũum a woto buudu. N‑ye tõnd tara tẽ-kãngã tɩ b na n leb n fãaga tõnd yɛsa." 
2Corinthians1:11 Yãmb mens me sẽn sõng tõnd n pʋʋsd tõnd yĩngã, woto, Wẽnnaam na n leoka neb wʋsg pʋʋsg n sõng tõndo, la neb wʋsg na n pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam bark tõnd yĩnga." 
2Corinthians1:12 Bala, bũmb ning sẽn kõt tõnd sũ-noogã, yaa tõnd sũ-bãngrã sẽn kɩt kaset tɩ dũni wã neb sʋka, tõnd kẽna ne sõmblem la pʋ-peelem sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã yĩnga, la d kẽna yãmb sʋk a woto n yɩɩda. La ka yɩ ne ninsaal yam ye, yaa ne Wẽnnaam barkã la d maan woto." 
2Corinthians1:13 Tõnd sẽn gʋlsd yãmbã ka bũmb a to ye, yaa yãmb sẽn karemd n yãtẽ la y wʋmdẽ wã bala. La mam tẽedame tɩ yãmb na n bãnga zãnga," 
2Corinthians1:14 a wa yãmb sẽn zoe n sɩng n bãng tɩ Zu-soabã waoong daare, tõnd yaa yãmb zu-zẽkre, tɩ yãmb ya tõnd zu-zẽkre." 
2Corinthians1:15 La tẽ-kãngã pʋgẽ, mam da rat n deng n waa yãmb nengẽ, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb tõe n paam bark naoor a yiibẽ soaba." 
2Corinthians1:16 M da rat n yii yãmb nengẽ n tũ Masedoan, la m yi Masedoan n lebg n wa yãmb nengẽ tɩ y sõng-m ne Zʋʋde kẽndã." 
2Corinthians1:17 Dẽ yĩnga, mam sẽn da tʋlg n maan bõn-kãngã, mam wilgdame tɩ m ka yas m zĩ-yend bɩ? Bɩ mam yam-yãkrã yaa ninsaal dẽnda tɩ mam tõe n yeel tɩ n-yẽe, n leb n yeel tɩ ayo?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Sã n yaa sɩd me tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa sɩd soaba, koɛɛg ning tõnd sẽn gom ne yãmba ka yɩ n-yẽe n leb n yaa ayo ye." 
2Corinthians1:19 Bala, maam ne a Sɩlvẽ la a Tɩmote sẽn da moon Wẽnnaam bi-ribl a Zeezi Kiris koɛɛg yãmb sʋka ka yɩ n-yẽe la ayo ye, la a Zeezi pʋgẽ, yaa n-yẽe bal n be." 
2Corinthians1:20 Wẽnnaam kãabdã fãa yaa n-yẽe ning sẽn be-a Kiris pʋgẽ wã. Dẽ, yaa a Zeezi maasem yĩng la tõnd yet tɩ: Ãmina! Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga." 
2Corinthians1:21 Yaa Wẽnnaam n kɩtd tɩ tõnd ne yãmb yalsd kãenkãe Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ, la bãmb yãka tõnd n welg tõnd toore." 
2Corinthians1:22 Bãmb n ning tõnd bãnd b yʋʋrã yĩnga, la b ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yaa arzegs nins bãmb sẽn bĩng tõndã reng-n-lɛmbg tõnd sũyã pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians1:23 Mam dɩkda Wẽnnaam tɩ yaa m kaset soaba, la m sã n yagda zĩrẽ, bɩ b reeg m sɩɩgã: Yaa sẽn na n sõng yãmb yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam ka leb n wa Korẽntã." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ka tɩ tõnd dat n modga yãmb y tẽebã pʋg ye, la yaa tɩ tõnd dat n naaga yãmb n tʋm tɩ y paam sũ-noogo. Bala, yãmb kɩɩ yẽg tẽebã pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians2:1 Dẽ, mam yãka yam m sũurẽ n ka rat n leb n wa yãmb nengẽ ye. Sẽn na yɩl n da wa sãam yãmb sũyã ye." 
2Corinthians2:2 Bala, mam sã n sãam yãmb sũyã, ãndã n tõe n kõ maam sũ-noogo, sã n ka mam sẽn sãam neb nins sũyã bala?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Mam gʋlsa wa mam sẽn da gʋlsã, tɩ mam sã n wa wa, bɩ m da paam sũ-sãang ne neb nins sẽn da tog n kõ maam sũ-noogã ye. La mam sũur keema ne yãmb fãa, bala, mam sũ-noog yaa yãmb fãa sũ-noogo." 
2Corinthians2:4 Yaa yel-pak-kãseng pʋga, la sũ-sãang ne nintãm pʋg la mam dag n gʋls yãmba. A ka sẽn na n sãam yãmb sũy ye, la yaa tɩ yãmb na bãng nonglem kãseng ning mam sẽn tar yãmb yĩngã." 
2Corinthians2:5 Ned sã n yɩ sabaab tɩ sũ-sãang wa, ka maam bal sũur la a sãam ye, yaa yãmb fãa, la bas-y tɩ m yeel tɩ yãmb neb kẽere, n da wa yag zĩrẽ ye." 
2Corinthians2:6 Sɩbgr ning yãmb neb wʋsg sẽn sɩbg nin-kãngã soabã sek-a lame. 
2Corinthians2:7 La sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd moasã, yaa tɩ yãmb tog n kõ-a-la sugri, la y bels-a tɩ Sũ-sãoon-kãseng da wa yõk-a, n kẽes-a pãn-komsem pʋg ye." 
2Corinthians2:8 Dẽ, mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y maan bũmb sẽn wilgd tɩ y nong-a lame." 
2Corinthians2:9 Bala, mam sẽn da gʋls yãmba me, da yaa sẽn na n mak yãmb n bãng y sã n yaa sakdb bũmb fãa pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians2:10 La yãmb sẽn kõt ned ning sugr a beegr yĩngã, mam me kõt-a-la sugri. La ne maam, mam sẽn maan sugrã, sã n yaa tɩ bũmb n be m sẽn tog n kõ sugri, yaa yãmb yĩng la m maan bõn-kãng Kiris nifẽ," 
2Corinthians2:11 sẽn na yɩl tɩ sʋtãanã ra wa tõog tõnd ye. Bala, tõnd mii a Sʋtãan sɩlmã." 
2Corinthians2:12 La mam sẽn ta Torwaas n na n moon Kiris koe-noogã, baa ne Zu-soabã sẽn pak sor be n kõ maamã," 
2Corinthians2:13 mam sɩɩgã da ka gãe ye, mam sẽn ka yãnd m ba-biig a Titã yĩnga. Dẽ, mam basa bãmb n kẽng Masedoan." 
2Corinthians2:14 Bark Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩtd tɩ tõnd paamd tõogr daar fãa Kirisã tũudum pʋgẽ wã, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ ne tõndo, nebã bãngd Kiris zĩiga fãa, wa yũ-noog sẽn saagd to-to wã." 
2Corinthians2:15 Sɩd me, tõnd yaa wa wisd sẽn tar yũ-noog Kiris sẽn dɩk n kõ Wẽnnaam, tɩ tõnd be neb nins sẽn paam fãagrã, la neb nins sẽn na n sãamã sʋka." 
2Corinthians2:16 Ne neb kẽere, tõnd yaa kũum yũug sẽn wat ne kũum, la ne neb a taaba, tõnd yaa vɩɩm yũug sẽn wat ne vɩɩm. Ãnda n tar pãng n tõe n maan bõn-kãensã?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Bala, tõnd ka wẽnd wa neb wʋsg sẽn dɩkd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã n leebd n baood yõodã ye. Ayo, tõnd sẽn gomdã yaa ne pʋ-peelem, la goamã yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ, la tõnd gomda Wẽnnaam taoore, la Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians3:1 Dẽ wã, dat n yeelame tɩ tõnd leb n sɩngame n na n pẽg d mens bɩ? Wall tõnd da rata kaset sɛb n wilg yãmb wa neb a taabã sẽn maandã, wall d rata yãmb kaset sɛb n wilg neb a taabã?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Yãmb yaa tõnd sebr sẽn gʋls tõnd sũyã pʋse, nebã fãa sẽn mi la b karemdẽ." 
2Corinthians3:3 Yaa vẽeneg tɩ yãmb yaa Kiris sebre, tõnd sẽn gʋls n tʋme. Ka sẽn gʋls ne gʋls-koom ye, la yaa sẽn gʋls ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã sɩɩga. Ka sẽn gʋls kug-wals zut ye, la yaa sẽn gʋls yãmb sũyã pʋse." 
2Corinthians3:4 Yaa tẽeb pidsg-gũudum‑kãng la tõnd tar Wẽnnaam nengẽ, Kiris maasem yĩnga." 
2Corinthians3:5 Ka rat n yeel tɩ tõnd mens tara pãng n tõe n maan bõn‑kãng ne d mens pãng ye, la yaa tɩ tõnd pãngã yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
2Corinthians3:6 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ d tõe n yɩ bãmb tʋmtʋmdb kãab-paalgã maasem yĩnga. Ka ne tõog sẽn gʋlsã ye, la yaa ne Sɩɩg-sõngo. Bala, tõog sẽn gʋlsã kʋʋdame, la Sɩɩg-sõng kõta vɩɩm." 
2Corinthians3:7 La sã n yaa tɩ tõog ning sẽn wat-a ne kũumã, b sẽn gʋls-a kug-wals zutã, a sã n da tar ziir hal tɩ Israyɛll kambã rag n ka tõe n ges a Moyiis nengã, yẽ nengã sẽn yãgd ne ziirã yĩnga, tɩ yaool n yaa ziir sẽn na n wa n loogã," 
2Corinthians3:8 rẽ wã, Sɩɩgã sẽn maand tʋʋmd ningã kõn tall ziir n yɩɩd sɩda." 
2Corinthians3:9 Tʋʋmd ning sẽn wat ne sɩbgrã sã n da tar ziiri, yaa tʋʋmd ning sẽn wat ne tɩrlmã n tar ziir n yɩɩda." 
2Corinthians3:10 La b sã n na n mak-b ne taaba, bũmb ning sẽn yaa wa a talla ziirã ka yɩ ziir ye, ziir ning sẽn yaa kãseng n yɩɩdã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians3:11 Rẽnda wã yĩnga, sã n yaa tɩ bũmb ning sẽn dag n loogdã paama a ziiri, dẽnd bũmb ning sẽn ka loogdã n tar ziir n yɩɩda." 
2Corinthians3:12 Dẽ, tõnd sẽn tar tẽeb-pidsg gũudum‑kãngã wã, tõnd tara raood wʋsgo." 
2Corinthians3:13 La tõnd ka maand wa a Moyiis sẽn da lut a nengã ne peende, tɩ Israyɛll kambã da yã ziir‑kãng sẽn ya bõn-loaagdgã sɛɛbã ye." 
2Corinthians3:14 La bãmb yamã pagame, bala, hal tɩ ta moasã, bãmb sã n karemd kãab kʋdgã, peen-kãng ket n beeme. Peen-kãng ka tõe n pilg tɩ sã n ka ne a Kiris ye." 
2Corinthians3:15 Hal tɩ ta moasã, b sã n karemd a Moyiis sebrã, peendã ket n luda b yamã." 
2Corinthians3:16 La b sã n wẽnemd n tek yam n tẽ ‹Zu-soabã›, peendã pilgdame." 
2Corinthians3:17 La b sẽn yet tɩ ‹Zu-soabã›, rat n yeelame tɩ Sɩɩga, la Zu-soabã Sɩɩg sẽn be zĩig ninga, lohorem bee be." 
2Corinthians3:18 Tõnd fãa nensã pilgame tɩ nebã ne Zu-soabã ziir kãng beenẽ wa nen-gɛtgẽ, la Zu-soabã, sẽn yaa-a Sɩɩgã, tedga tõnd tɩ d wẽneg bãmba, n paamd ziir n paasdẽ." 
2Corinthians4:1 Wẽnnaam sẽn zoe tõnd nimbãaneg n kõ tõnd tʋʋm kãnga wã yĩng n kɩt tɩ tõnd ka boogd d raood ye. 
2Corinthians4:2 Tõnd kɩɩsda bũmb nins sẽn solg n yaa yãn-tʋʋmã, tõnd ka tʋmd ne sɩlem ye. La tõnd ka tekd Wẽnnaam goamã ye. Tõnd wilgda sɩdã vẽenega, n paamd kaset-sõng nebã fãa sũyã pʋs Wẽnnaam taoore." 
2Corinthians4:3 La tõnd sẽn moond koe-noog ningã wã sã n ket n solgame, a solga ne neb nins sẽn na n sãama." 
2Corinthians4:4 Yaa neb nins sẽn ka tẽed-bã. Dũni‑kãngã na-wẽngã sẽn yaa a sʋtãan sẽn lud b yamã tɩ b ka tõe n yãnd Kiris sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam mengã wẽnegã koe-noogã ziirã yĩnga. 
2Corinthians4:5 Ka tõnd mens koɛɛg la d moond ye, yaa a Zeezi Kiris koɛɛg la tõnd moonda. La a Zeezi maasem yĩnga, tõnd boonda d mens tɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmdba." 
2Corinthians4:6 Bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel tɩ vẽenem na n yãga lik pʋgẽ wã, yaa Wẽnnaam n kɩt tɩ vẽenemã yãg tõnd sũyã pʋse, tɩ tõnd yãnd Wẽnnaam ziirã sẽn pɩnd Kiris nengã zugu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Tõnd zãada paoon-kãngã d yĩnsã sẽn yaa wa yagd laasã pʋse. Tɩ pãn-kãsen‑kãngã na yɩ Wẽnnaam dẽnda, la kõn yɩ tõnd dẽnd ye." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tõnd paamda namsg buud toor-toore, la b ka kʋʋd tõnd ye. Tõnd dag n ka mi d sẽn na n maaneg ye, la tõnd ka boogd raood ye." 
2Corinthians4:9 Neb namsda tõndo, la Wẽnnaam sõngda tõndo. B pãbda tõnd n lubdẽ, la d ka kiid ye." 
2Corinthians4:10 Tõnd tara a Zeezi kũumã mamsg d yĩnsã pʋs daar fãa, tɩ nebã na yã a Zeezi vɩɩmã tõnd yĩnsã pʋse." 
2Corinthians4:11 Bala, tõnd sẽn vɩ wã, b kẽnda ne tõnd kũum zĩigẽ wakat fãa a Zeezi yĩnga, sẽn na n yɩl t'a Zeezi vɩɩmã me na puk tõnd yĩn-kiidsã pʋse." 
2Corinthians4:12 Woto, kũum n maand a tʋʋmd tõnd pʋse, tɩ vɩɩm maand a tʋʋmd yãmb pʋse." 
2Corinthians4:13 La a wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yeel tɩ: Mam tẽeme. Yaa woto yĩng la m gom yã. Tõnd me tẽedame, la yaa woto yĩng me n kɩt tɩ tõnd gomdã." 
2Corinthians4:14 La d miime tɩ sẽn vʋʋg-a Zu-soab a Zeezi wã na n naaga tõnd me ne a Zeezi n vʋʋge, la na n kɩtame tɩ tõnd ne yãmb naag taab n yals bãmb taoore." 
2Corinthians4:15 Bala, bõn-kãens sẽn maandã yaa yãmb yĩnga, tɩ barkã sẽn tat neb wʋsgã kɩt tɩ b pʋʋs Wẽnnaam barka, Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga." 
2Corinthians4:16 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ tõnd ka boogd d daood ye. La baa tõnd yĩngã sã n sãame, tõnd sɩɩgã lebgda paalg daar fãa." 
2Corinthians4:17 Bala, tõnd sẽn na n paam namsg bilf wakat bilf pʋgẽ wã kɩtdame tɩ tõnd na n paam ziir kãseng sẽn kõn sa n yɩɩda." 
2Corinthians4:18 Sẽn paase, tõnd sẽn getã, ka bũmb nins nin sẽn ne wã ye, tõnd geta bũmb nins nin sẽn ka tõe n yãndã wã. Bala, bũmb nins nin sẽn ne wã loogdame, la bũmb nins nin sẽn ka ne wã paada wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
2Corinthians5:1 Sɩd me, tõnd miime tɩ tõnd tẽng zug ka roogã sẽn yaa fu-roogã sã n wa n sãame, tõnd tara roog arzãn pʋga, sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam n me. Yaa roog sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa, sẽn ka ninsaalb nus n me ye." 
2Corinthians5:2 La tõnd sidgda ro-kãng pʋg me n dat arzãn doogã n yeelg n yɩɩd a yembrã," 
2Corinthians5:3 tɩ tõnd sã n paam yeelgre, tõnd kõn yɩ bɛɛl ye." 
2Corinthians5:4 Bala, tõnd sẽn ket n be fu-ro-kãngã pʋgã, tõnd sidgdame n tar namsgo, la ka tɩ tõnd dat n yeega tẽng zug roogã ye, la yaa tɩ tõnd data arzãn doogã n yeelge, tɩ vɩɩmã vel yĩn-kiidgã." 
2Corinthians5:5 Yaa Wẽnnaam n maan tõnd tɩ d yɩ a woto, bãmb n kõ tõnd Sɩɩg-sõng tɩ yaa arzegs nins b sẽn bĩng tõndã reng-n-lɛmbga." 
2Corinthians5:6 Dẽ wã, daar fãa tõnd tara raood wʋsgo, la d miime tɩ tõnd sẽn be yĩn-kãngã pʋgẽ wã, tõnd zãra ne Zu-soabã." 
2Corinthians5:7 Bala, tõnd kẽnda ne tẽebo, la d ka yã n yaool n tẽed ye." 
2Corinthians5:8 Tõnd tara raood wʋsgo, la tõnd nongẽ lame n yi n bas yĩng‑kãngã n kẽng Zu-soabã nengẽ n yɩɩda." 
2Corinthians5:9 Yaa woto yĩng me tɩ tõnd maoodẽ, n dat n ta bãmb yam, tõnd sã n be yĩn-kãnga pʋga, wall d sã n wa n yi n bas-a." 
2Corinthians5:10 Bala, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ tõnd fãa yals Kiris bʋʋdã geer taoore, tɩ b keo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems tʋʋm nins yẽ sẽn tʋmã yĩngã pʋgã. Sã n yaa tʋʋm-sõamyã wall tʋʋm-wẽnse." 
2Corinthians5:11 Tõnd sẽn mi Zu-soabã rabeem zoeesã, tõnd baoodame n sagl nebã n tõog tɩ b tẽ. Wẽnnaam mii tõnd sõama. La mam tẽedame tɩ yãmb sũyã pʋse, yãmb me mii maam." 
2Corinthians5:12 Tõnd ka leb n wilgd yãmb yɛs tɩ tõnd zemsame ye, la tõnd kõta yãmb weer tɩ y maan sũ-noog tõnd yĩnga, tɩ yãmb na tõog n leok neb nins sẽn waoogd b mens ne nin sẽn ne bũmb ninsã, la ka sẽn be sũurẽ wã." 
2Corinthians5:13 Sɩd me, sã n yaa tɩ tõnd yaa ka-yam dãmba, yaa Wẽnnaam yĩnga, la tõnd sã n tara yam, yaa yãmb sõngr yĩnga." 
2Corinthians5:14 Bala, Kiris nonglmã n so tõndo. Tõnd sẽn bãng vẽeneg n welg tɩ nin-yend n ki nebã fãa yĩnga, dẽ nebã fãa n ki." 
2Corinthians5:15 A Zeezi kii nebã fãa yĩnga, tɩ sẽn vɩ-bã kõn leb n vɩ b mens yĩng ye, la b na n vɩɩ sẽn ki-a bãmb yĩng n vʋʋg n bas kũumã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians5:16 Woto, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, tõnd ka leb n get ned wa sẽn zems ninsaal tagsg ye, la baa tõnd sã n dag n gesa Kiris wa sẽn zems ninsaal tagsgo, moasã, tõnd ka leb n get bãmb wa sẽn zems ninsaal tagsg yɛs ye." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ned sã n tũud Kirisi, yẽnda soab yaa nin-paalga. Bõn-kʋdã fãa loogame, bũmbã fãa lebga paalse." 
2Corinthians5:18 La yõwã fãa yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ. Kiris maasem yĩnga, Wẽnnaam yiisa yell ning sẽn da be tõnd ne bãmb sʋkã, n kõ tõnd zabr paasg tʋʋmde." 
2Corinthians5:19 Bala, yaa ne Kiris la Wẽnnaam yiis yell ning sẽn da be bãmb ne dũniyã sʋka, n ka leb n geelgd ninsaalbã beegrã ye. La b ninga zabr paasg koɛɛg togsg tõnd zutu." 
2Corinthians5:20 Dẽ, tõnd yaa Kiris tʋmtʋmdba, tɩ tõnd sẽn gomd ne yãmbã, yaa Wẽnnaam n tall tõnd n gomd ne yãmba: Tõnd kota yãmb ne Kiris yʋʋr tɩ y leb n paam lagem-n-taar ne Wẽnnaam!" 
2Corinthians5:21 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Kiris sẽn ka maan yel-wẽnã lebg yel-wẽn tõnd yĩnga, tɩ tõnd tõe n lebg nin-tɩrs Kiris pʋg Wẽnnaam taoore." 
2Corinthians6:1 Tõnd sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tʋmd-n-taasã yĩnga, tõnd kota yãmb tɩ y ra bas bark ninga yãmb sẽn deeg Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã tɩ yɩ zaalem ye." 
2Corinthians6:2 Bala, bãmb yetame: Mam leoka foom sẽn zems a wakate, la fo sẽn dat fãagr wakate, mam waa n sõnga foom. Ade, moasã yaa wakat sẽn zemse. Ade, moasã yaa fãagr daare." 
2Corinthians6:3 Tõnd ka rat tɩ d yel-manesem baa yembr lub ned ye, tɩ ned da wa n gom tõnd tʋʋmdã wẽng ye." 
2Corinthians6:4 La bũmb fãa pʋga tõnd wilgdame tɩ tõnd yaa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdba, n maand sũ-mar wʋsg yel-pakrã pʋgẽ, la naongã pʋgẽ, la sũ-sãamsã pʋgẽ," 
2Corinthians6:5 la pãbre, la bi-bees rot kõom, la tẽn-dãmbg pʋgẽ, la tʋʋm-wɛgl pʋgẽ, la gõeem sẽn ka be, la kom pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians6:6 Tõnd wilgdame tɩ d yaa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdba, ne pʋ-peelem, ne bãngre, ne sũ-maasem ne sõmblem, ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, la ne nonglem sẽn ka naag ne zãmbo," 
2Corinthians6:7 ne koɛɛg sẽn yaa sɩda, la ne Wẽnnaam pãnga, ne tɩrlem zab-teed sẽn tar n zabdẽ, la sẽn tar n kogend d menga, waoogre, la paoogr pʋgẽ," 
2Corinthians6:8 yʋ-beedo la yʋ-noog pʋgẽ, neb geta tõnd wa zĩrẽ‑be-nebã baa ne tõnd sẽn togsd sɩdã." 
2Corinthians6:9 B geta tõnd wa sãamba, baa ne b fãa sẽn mi tõndã. B geta tõnd wa kiidba, la tõnd yaool n vɩɩme. B geta tõnd wa neb b sẽn sɩbgde, la b ka kʋʋd tõnd ye." 
2Corinthians6:10 B geta tõnd wa sũ-sãang rãmba, la tõnd tara sũ-noog daar fãa. B geta tõnd wa naong rãmba, la tõnd kɩtdame tɩ neb wʋsg lebgd arzegs rãmba. B geta tõnd wa neb sẽn ka tar baa fʋɩ, la tõnd yaool n tara bũmb fãa." 
2Corinthians6:11 Korẽnt nebã, tõnd goma vẽeneg ne yãmba. D pelga d pʋs ne yãmba." 
2Corinthians6:12 Tõnd ka solg yãmb d nonglem ye. La yãmb ka wilg tõnd y nonglem ye. 
2Corinthians6:13 Mam gomda ne yãmb wa m kamba, bɩ y tags tõnd yell wa tõnd sẽn tagsd yãmb yellã. Yãmb me pelg y pʋs ne tõndo." 
2Corinthians6:14 Bɩ y da paam lagem-n-taar ne neb nins sẽn ka Kiris tẽedbã ye. Bala, bõe lagem-n-taar n be tɩrlem ne wẽng sʋka? Wall bõe lagem-n-taar n be vẽenem ne lik sʋka?" 
2Corinthians6:15 La bõe zems-n-taar n be Kiris ne a Belyall sʋka? Wall ned ning sẽn tẽedã tara bõe pʋɩɩr ne ned ning sẽn ka tẽedã? 
2Corinthians6:16 Bõe lagem-n-taar n be Wẽnnaam doogã ne wẽn-naands sʋka? Bala, tõnd yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ roogo, wa Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel tɩ: Mam na n zĩnda ne bãmba, la m kẽn bãmb sʋka. Mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, la bãmb na n yɩɩ mam nebã." 
2Corinthians6:17 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ Zu-soabã yetẽ yaa: Yi-y bãmb sʋka, welg-y toor ne-ba. La y ra sɩɩs bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgd ye, la mam na reeg yãmba." 
2Corinthians6:18 Mam na n yɩɩ yãmb Ba, la yãmb na n yɩɩ mam kom-dibli la m kom-pugli. Yaa Zu-soabã, Sẽn-Tõe-Fãa fãa wã n yeele." 
2Corinthians7:1 Woto yĩnga, m zo-nongdse, tõnd sẽn tar kãab-kãensã wã, bɩ d yɩlg d mens ne rẽgd ning sẽn dẽgemd yĩngã ne sɩɩgã, n bɩ sõmblem sẽn zems zãng pʋgẽ n paase, Wẽnnaam dabeem zoees pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians7:2 Bas-y tɩ d paam weer y sũyã pʋsẽ. Tõnd ka maan ned baa a yembr wẽnga, tõnd ka sãam ned baa a yembr yelle, tõnd ka zãmb ned n deeg a bũmbu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Mam sẽn gomd a woto wã, ka sẽn na n mong yãmb bʋʋm ye. Bala, mam dag n zoe n yeelame tɩ tõnd tagsda yãmb yelle, d sã n vɩ wall d sã n ki." 
2Corinthians7:4 Mam sũur keema wʋsg ne yãmba, mam sũur nooma ne yãmba. Mam paamda belsgo. Baa tõnd yel-pakrã fãa pʋgẽ, mam tara sũ-no-kãsenga." 
2Corinthians7:5 Bala, tõnd sẽn ta Masedoan soolmẽ wã tɛka, tõnd yĩnsã ka tol n paam vʋʋsg baa bilf ye. Tõnd paama namsg buud fãa. Yɩng yaa maoore, la pʋgẽ yaa rabeem." 
2Corinthians7:6 La Wẽnnaam sẽn belsd sũ-sãang rãmbã, b belsa tõnd ne a Tit waoongã." 
2Corinthians7:7 La ka ne a Tit waoongã bal ye, leb n yaa ne belsg ning yẽnda sẽn paam yãmb nengẽ wã me. Yẽnda togsa tõnd yãmb sẽn dat maam wʋsg to-to wã, yãmb nintãm la y sẽn dat n sõng maam to-to wã. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam paam sũ-noog wʋsg n paase." 
2Corinthians7:8 Baa mam sebrã sã n sãama yãmb sũyã, mam ka maand m bãngẽ ye. La baa mam sã n maana m bãngẽ, yɩɩ wakat bilf pʋgẽ, mam sẽn yã tɩ seb-kãngã sãama yãmb sũyã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians7:9 Mam maanda sũ-noog moasã, la ka m sẽn sãam yãmb sũyã yĩng ye. Yaa yãmb sũ-sãangã sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb tek yam n kos sugrã yĩnga. Bala, yãmb sũ-sãangã yii Wẽnnaam nengẽ. Rẽ wã, tõnd ka maan yãmb bũmb sẽn na n sãam-y ye." 
2Corinthians7:10 Sɩd me, sũ-sãang ning sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã kɩtdame tɩ ned tek yam n kos sugr n paam fãagre, la ned ka maand a bãngẽ rẽ yĩng ye. La dũni wã sũ-sãang wata ne kũum." 
2Corinthians7:11 La ad sũ-sãang ning sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã sẽn modg yãmb tɩ y maan bũmb ninsi: A kɩtame tɩ y yiis yell y mens zutu, a waa ne sũ-pa-noaanga, a waa ne rabeem, a waa ne ratem kãsenga, a waa ne yamleoogo, a waa ne sɩbgre. Bũmbã fãa pʋgẽ, yãmb wilgame tɩ y ka tar yell yel-kãngã pʋg ye." 
2Corinthians7:12 Rẽ wã, mam sẽn gʋls yãmbã, ka sẽn maan-a yellã yĩnga, a ka ned ning yẽnda sẽn beegã me yĩng ye. La yaa sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb sẽn nong tõnd to-to wã yɩ vẽeneg yãmb sʋk Wẽnnaam taoore." 
2Corinthians7:13 Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ tõnd paam belsgã. La sẽn paasd tõnd sẽn paam belsgã, a Tit sẽn paam raood ning yãmb fãa nengẽ t'a sũurã noomẽ wã leb n kõo tõnd sũ-noog wʋsg n yɩɩd yɛsa." 
2Corinthians7:14 Sã n yaa mam sẽn pẽg m meng bilf a Tit taoor yãmb wɛɛngẽ wã, bõn-kãng yãnd ka tar maam ye. Wa tõnd sẽn dag n togs yãmb sɩd daar fãa wã, woto me, tõnd sẽn pẽg d mens yãmb wɛɛngẽ a Tit taoorã me yɩɩ sɩda." 
2Corinthians7:15 La a Tit sã n tẽeg yãmb fãa sakrã yelle, a paamda nonglem wʋsg yãmb yĩng n paasdẽ, bala yãmb deega yẽnda ne rabeem la rigbu." 
2Corinthians7:16 Mam maanda sũ-noogo, mam sẽn tõe n kɩs sɩd ne yãmb bũmb fãa pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians8:1 M ba-biisi, tõnd datame tɩ yãmb bãng Wẽnnaam barkã sẽn puk wẽnd dot nins sẽn be Masedoannã sʋk to-to." 
2Corinthians8:2 Baa ne bãmb sẽn paam makr ne tood wʋsgã, bãmb sũ-noogã yɩɩ kãsenga, tɩ baa ne b naongã sẽn ya wʋsgã, b kõo wʋsg ne sũyã fãa." 
2Corinthians8:3 Mam kɩta kaset tɩ bãmb kõo ne b pãng tɛka. B kõo ne yamleoog n yɩɩd b pãng sẽn tõe menga. 
2Corinthians8:4 Bãmb kosa tõnd ne b sũyã fãa tɩ d bas-b tɩ b naag n sõng Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã. 
2Corinthians8:5 Bãmb deng n dɩka b mens n kõ Zu-soabã, la b sak tõnd ne Wẽnnaam daabo. Woto yɩɩda tõnd sẽn da tẽedã." 
2Corinthians8:6 Tõnd kosa a Tit me t'a maan nonglem tʋʋm-kãng yẽ sẽn sɩng yãmb sʋkã n baase. 
2Corinthians8:7 A wa yãmb sẽn modgd ne bũmb fãa wã: Sã n ya tẽebo, goamã, bãngre, la yãmb sẽn wɩngd ne bũmb fãa, la y tar nonglem tõnd yĩngã, bɩ y modg ne nonglem tʋʋm kãng maaneg me." 
2Corinthians8:8 Mam sẽn yet a woto wã, ka pãng la m dat n maan-y ye, la yaa sẽn na n dɩk neb a taabã sẽn maandã n mak n ges yãmb nonglmã sã n yaa sɩda." 
2Corinthians8:9 Bala, yãmb mii tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris barkã. Tɩ baa bãmb sẽn yaa arzɛk soabã, b maana b meng naong soab yãmb yĩnga, tɩ ne bãmb naongã, yãmb na paam arzegse." 
2Corinthians8:10 Yaa mam tagsg la m kõt yel-kãngã zugu. Bala, bõn-kãng toga ne yãmba, yãmb sẽn yɩ pipi rãmb sẽn sɩng ne rɩɩgẽ n maan ligd-lobrã, la ka y sẽn yɩ pipi rãmb n maan-a wã bal ye, yãmb n yɩ pipi rãmb n tʋlg n na n maan-a." 
2Corinthians8:11 Rẽ wã, moasã, bɩ y maan-a n baase, tɩ yãmb sẽn yãk yam n wilg tɩ y rat n maan-a lame wã, bɩ y kell n tall datem n maan-a n baase, la maan-y-yã-a wa sẽn zems yãmb pãnga." 
2Corinthians8:12 Bala, ned sã n tar datem tɩ kõ wa sẽn zems yẽ sẽn tar bũmb ningã, a tata Wẽnnaam yam n yɩɩd yẽnda sẽn na n dat n kõ bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn ka tarã." 
2Corinthians8:13 Bala, mam ka rat tɩ yãmb sẽn sõngd neb a taabã kẽes yãmb yel-pakr pʋg ye. La yaa sẽn na yɩl tɩ yãmb zeng taaba, tɩ yãmb sẽn tar bũmb ning tɩ sek moasã wã tõe n sõng bãmb b naongã pʋgẽ," 
2Corinthians8:14 la tɩ bãmb me sã n wa tar bũmb ning tɩ sekd-ba, bɩ b tõe n sõng yãmb me y naongã pʋgẽ. Sã n yɩ a woto, yãmb na n yɩɩ zem-taaba," 
2Corinthians8:15 tɩ yɩ wa gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yeel tɩ: Ned ning sẽn paam wʋsgã ka tar baa fʋɩ tɩ loog ye, la bũmb ka paoog ned ning sẽn paam bilfã ye." 
2Corinthians8:16 Bark Wẽnnaam, bãmb sẽn ning yam-yãk-kãngã me a Tit sũurẽ yãmb yĩngã." 
2Corinthians8:17 Bala, a Tit saka tõnd kosgã, la yẽnda sẽn tar ratmã, a yãka yam ne a sũur fãa n na n wa yãmb nengẽ." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tõnd tʋmda ba-biig ning sẽn tar pẽgr zĩiga fãa ne koe-noogã tʋʋmd a Zeezi tẽedbã sʋkã t'a tũ a Tite. 
2Corinthians8:19 Sẽn yɩɩd fãa, Kiris tẽedbã yãka yẽnda t'a yãag tõnd sõngr-tʋʋm-kãngã pʋgẽ, tõnd sẽn tʋmd Zu-soabã meng waoogr yĩnga, la tɩ yɩ kaset tɩ tõnd tara ratem tɩ maan ne d sũyã fãa." 
2Corinthians8:20 Tõnd maanda a woto tɩ ned da wa n tõog n dõd tõnd ne ligd‑kãng sẽn yaa wʋsg tɩ tõnd get a yellã wɛɛngẽ ye. 
2Corinthians8:21 Bala, tõnd baood n maana sẽn yaa neere, ka Zu-soabã nifẽ bal ye, la ninsaalbã nifẽ me." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tõnd tʋmda d ba-biigã ne bãmba. Tõnd paama weer naoor wʋsg n mak a tʋʋmdã ratem n gese, la moasã a wilgame t'a tara ratem ne tʋʋmã n yɩɩd pĩnda, a sẽn kɩs sɩd ne yãmbã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians8:23 Woto, sẽn kẽed ne a Tit wɛɛngẽ, yẽnda yaa mam tũud-n-taaga la m tʋmd-n-taag yãmb yĩnga. La sã n yaa ne d ba-biisã, bãmb yaa neb Kiris tẽedbã sẽn tʋme, Kiris waoogr yĩnga." 
2Corinthians8:24 Dẽ wã, bɩ y maan bũmb n wilg bãmb ne a Zeezi Kiris tẽedbã tɩ yãmb tara nonglem, tɩ rẽ na n wilgame tɩ tõnd dag n tara bʋʋm la d sẽn pẽgd yãmb bãmb nifẽ wã." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ka tɩlɛ tɩ mam gʋls yãmb sõngr ning sẽn tog n kõ Kiris tẽedbã wɛɛngẽ ye. 
2Corinthians9:2 Sɩd me, mam mii yãmb ratem sõngã, la mam pẽga m meng yãmb wɛɛngẽ Masedoan nebã taoor n yeel tɩ Akayi nebã rag n seglame n sɛ hal rɩɩgẽ, la yãmb sẽn modgdã kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg me rat n maane." 
2Corinthians9:3 Mam tʋmda ba-biisã yãmb nengẽ, tɩ tõnd sẽn pẽg yãmbã kõn yɩ zaalem bõn-kãng wɛɛngẽ ye, la tɩ yãmb na segl n sɛ wa mam sẽn yeelã." 
2Corinthians9:4 Mam ka rat tɩ Masedoan nebã yãag maam n wa n mik tɩ yãmb ka segl n sɛ ye, tɩ tõnd sẽn kɩs sɩd ne yãmbã da wa n lebg yãnd ne tõnd ye. La yaa m sẽn ka rat n yeel tɩ yãmb yãnda yĩnga." 
2Corinthians9:5 Dẽ, mam tagsdame tɩ yaa neer tɩ m kos ba-biisã tɩ b reng maam taoor n wa yãmb nengẽ, n ges nonglem kũunã yãmb sẽn zoe n kãabã yelle, tɩ y tõe n segl n sɛ, tɩ yɩ yamleoog kũuni, la ra yɩ wa zoe-bõn kũun ye." 
2Corinthians9:6 Bãng-y tɩ ned ning sẽn bʋt bilf na n tigsa bilfu, la ned ning sẽn bʋt wʋsg na n tigsa wʋsgo." 
2Corinthians9:7 Bɩ ned kam fãa kõ wa sẽn zems a sẽn yãk yam a sũur pʋgẽ, la ra yɩ ne nen-gãneng wall modgr ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam nonga ned ning sẽn kõt ne sũ-noogo." 
2Corinthians9:8 La Wẽnnaam tara pãn-tõog tɩ kõ yãmb bark buud fãa tɩ seke. Tɩ yãmb tõe n paam bũmb fãa, daar fãa, sẽn na sõng yãmb y ratmã fãa pʋgẽ n sek n kell tɩ y maan tʋʋm-soamã fãa," 
2Corinthians9:9 tɩ yɩ wa gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yeelã: A kɩtame t'a tʋʋm-sõama wã saag zĩig fãa. A kõo naong rãmba. Yẽnda tɩrlem paada wakat sẽn kõn sa. 
2Corinthians9:10 Soab ning sẽn kõt-a ka-koaad bõn-buudu, la b kõt-a bur t'a rɩtẽ wã na n kõo yãmb bõn-buudu, la b kɩt t'a wom wʋsgo, la b kɩt tɩ yãmb tɩrlmã biis yɩ wʋsgo." 
2Corinthians9:11 Woto, yãmb na paam arzegs bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, n yãk tɩ yɩ nonglem kũuni tɩ neb wʋsg na pʋʋs Wẽnnaam barka, kũunã tõnd sẽn kõ-bã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians9:12 Bala, ka Wẽnnaam nebã bal la nonglem kũun‑kãngã na n sõng ye. A na n kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg pʋʋs Wẽnnaam barka." 
2Corinthians9:13 Bãmb sã n paam sõng-kãngã, b na n pẽga Wẽnnaam, yãmb sẽn sak n kɩs Kiris koe-noogã kaseto, la yãmb sẽn kõ kũun wʋsg bãmb yĩnga, la nebã fãa yĩngã." 
2Corinthians9:14 B pʋʋsda yãmb yĩng ne nonglem, Wẽnnaam sẽn sik bark kãseng yãmb zutã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians9:15 Bark Wẽnnaam, bãmb kũunã noor sẽn ka tõe n togsã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians10:1 Maam a Poll kota yãmb ne sũ-bʋgsem, Kiris sõmblmã pʋgẽ, mam sẽn yaa nin-bʋgsgo, m sẽn wat n be ne yãmba, la m ya nin-toaag m sẽn wat n zãr ne yãmbã." 
2Corinthians10:2 Mam kota yãmba, tɩ mam sã n wa n be yãmb nengẽ, bɩ y ra maan tɩ yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ mam yɩ nin-toaag wa mam sẽn tagsd n na n yɩ nin-toaag ne neb nins sẽn tagsd tɩ tõnd kẽnda wa sẽn zems yĩngã datmã ye." 
2Corinthians10:3 Tõnd sɩd bee yĩng pʋga, la tõnd ka zabd wa yĩngã sẽn zabdã ye." 
2Corinthians10:4 Bala, tõnd sẽn tar zab-teed nins n zabdẽ wã ka yĩng zab-teed ye. La zab-te-kãens tara pãng Wẽnnaam nifẽ n tõe n leeb pãens rãmbã n lubi." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tagsd nins ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn zẽkd b mens n zabdẽ tɩ nebã kõn bãng Wẽnnaamã, tõnd leebd-b lame n lubdẽ, la tõnd tõogda tagsd buud fãa n kɩt tɩ b sak Kirisã." 
2Corinthians10:6 Yãmb sã n wa n sak zãng fasɩ, tõnd seglame n na n sɩbg kɩɩsg buud fãa." 
2Corinthians10:7 Yãmb geta bũmb nins yãmb ninã sẽn ne wã! Ned sã n tẽed t'a yaa Kiris rẽnda, bɩ a meng bãng bõn-kãngã me: Yẽnda sã n yaa Kiris rẽndã, tõnd me yaa Kiris rẽnda." 
2Corinthians10:8 La baa mam sã n maand sũ-noog wʋsg bilf ne noor ning Zu-soabã sẽn kõ tõnd tɩ d paas yãmb pãnga, la ka sẽn na n sãam yãmbã, yãnd kõn yõk maam ye." 
2Corinthians10:9 Mam ka rat t'a yɩ wa mam dat n kẽesa yãmb dabeem ne mam sɛbã ye. 
2Corinthians10:10 Bala, b yetame tɩ: A Poll sɛba yaa toogo, la b tara pãnga, la b meng sã n be tõnd sʋka, b ka pãng ye, la b goamã ka tar yõod ye." 
2Corinthians10:11 Bɩ ned ning sẽn gomd a woto wã bãng neer tɩ tõnd sẽn ka be yãmb sʋk n gomd to-to d sɛbã pʋsã, tõnd sã n wa n be yãmb sʋk me, tõnd tʋʋmã yaa a woto bala." 
2Corinthians10:12 Tõnd ka saagd n zeng d mens wall d mak d mens ne neb nins sẽn wilgd tɩ b mens zemsame wã ye. La bãmb sẽn mamsd b mens la b makd b mens ne taabã, b ka yam ye." 
2Corinthians10:13 Sã n yaa ne tõndo, tõnd ka rat n pẽg d mens tɩ loog ye, la tõnd na n dɩka mamsg ne tʋʋmd ning Wẽnnaam sẽn pʋɩ n kõ tõndo, la b leb n kɩt tɩ d tõog n ta hal yãmb nengẽ wã." 
2Corinthians10:14 Tõnd ka loogd d toadg wa tõnd dag n ka ta hal yãmb nengẽ ye. Bala, tõnd talla Kiris koe-noogã n ta hal yãmb nengẽ." 
2Corinthians10:15 Tõnd ka pẽgd d mens tɩ loog ne tʋʋm sẽn yaa ned a to rẽnd ye. La tõnd tẽedame tɩ yãmb tẽebã sã n paasdẽ, tõnd tʋʋmdã na n lebga kãseng yãmb sʋka, zĩig ning sẽn yaa tõnd dẽndã," 
2Corinthians10:16 tɩ d moon koe-noogã soolem nins sẽn be yãmb taoorã, la ka tɩ d pẽg d mens ne tʋʋm nins sẽn zoe n tʋm neb a taab soolmẽ ye." 
2Corinthians10:17 Wa Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yeelã: Ned ning sẽn na n pẽg a menga, bɩ a pẽg a menga, a sẽn tũud Zu-soabã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians10:18 Bala, ka ned ning sẽn wilgd t'a zemsame wã n tat Wẽnnaam yam ye, yaa Zu-soabã sẽn wilgd tɩ ned ning zemsame wã." 
2Corinthians11:1 Mam nongẽ‑la yãmb sã n da tõe n sakẽ mam yalemdã bilfu! La yãmb sakdame. 
2Corinthians11:2 Bala, mam maanda sũ-kiir yãmb yĩnga, la yaa sũ-kiir sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ, tɩ bõe mam sẽn dɩk yãmb n kõ sɩd a yembr tãa wã yĩnga. Tɩ mam tõe n tall yãmb n kẽng Kiris nengẽ wa pʋg-sad sẽn ka sãam ye." 
2Corinthians11:3 La baoosgo, a wa waafã sẽn maan sɩlem n zãmb a Awa wã, mam yɛɛsdame tɩ yãmb yam na n wa wẽnemd n lebg wẽng n kɩt tɩ y bas y sõmblmã ne y pʋ-peelmã y sẽn tar Kiris yĩngã ye." 
2Corinthians11:4 Bala, ned a to sã n yɩ pipi n wa moon yãmb Zeezi a to, tɩ ka Zeezi ningã tõnd sẽn da moon yãmbã, wall yãmb sã n deeg sɩɩg a to sẽn ka Sɩɩg ningã yãmb sẽn dag n deegã, wall koe-noog a to tɩ ka yãmb sẽn da reeg pĩndã, yãmb sakda yẽnda soab sõama." 
2Corinthians11:5 La mam yaool n tẽedame tɩ m ka yɩ poorẽ soab bũmb baa a fʋɩ pʋgẽ, ne tẽn-tʋmdb nins sẽn yet b mens tɩ b yaa tẽn-tʋmd-kãsemsã ye." 
2Corinthians11:6 Baa mam sã n ka gom minim-soaba, mam ka ned sẽn ka tar bãngr ye. La tõnd wilga bõn-kãng vẽeneg yãmb sʋk wakat fãa, bũmb fãa pʋga." 
2Corinthians11:7 Bɩ Mam sẽn moon yãmb Wẽnnaam koe-noogã zaalma, n sik m meng n zẽk yãmbã, m maana yel-wẽnde?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Mam fãa Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be zĩis a taabã, mam sẽn sak tɩ bãmb yao maam tɩ m sõng yãmbã yĩnga. La mam sẽn da wa n be yãmb nengẽ n dat sõngrã, mam ka yɩ zɩɩb ned baa a ye yĩng ye." 
2Corinthians11:9 Bala, ba-biis nins sẽn yi Masedoan n wa wã kõo maam bũmb ning sẽn da paoog maamã. Bũmba fãa pʋgẽ, mam gũusa m menga, n da wa n yɩ zɩɩb yãmb yĩng ye, la mam na n kell n gũusa m menga ne bõn-kãngã." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ne Kiris sɩdã sẽn be mam sũurẽ wã, mam yetame tɩ ned ka tõe n gɩdg maam tɩ m ka pẽg m meng bõn-kãng wɛɛngẽ Akayi soolmã pʋgẽ ye." 
2Corinthians11:11 Bõe yĩng tɩ m yet a woto? Yaa mam sẽn ka nong yãmb yĩng bɩ? Wẽnnaam menga miime tɩ mam nonga yãmba. 
2Corinthians11:12 Mam sẽn maand bũmb ninga, mam na n kell n maan-a lame yɛsa, tɩ gɩdg neb nins sẽn baood weer n dat n pẽg b mens n yeel tɩ bãmb sẽn tʋmdã ne tõnd sẽn tʋmdã yaa a yembrã." 
2Corinthians11:13 Nin-bãmbã rãmb yaa zãmb tẽn-tʋmdbã, la belgr tẽn-tʋmdbã, n toeemd b mens n yaa wa Kiris tẽn-tʋmdbã." 
2Corinthians11:14 La yõwã ka bõn-lingdg ye. Bala, Sʋtãanã meng toeemda a meng n lebg wa malɛɛk sẽn tar vẽenem." 
2Corinthians11:15 Dẽ wã, yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã me sã n toeemd b mens n lebgd wa tɩrlem tʋmtʋmdba, ka bõn-yɛɛsdg ye. Bãmb baoosg na n yɩɩ wa b tʋʋmã sẽn yaa to-to wã." 
2Corinthians11:16 Mam leb n yetame: Bɩ ned da ges maam wa yalem ye, wall y sã n get maam wa yalmã, bɩ y sak n deeg maam wa yalmã, tɩ mam me tõe n pẽg m meng bilfu." 
2Corinthians11:17 Mam sẽn gomd bũmb ningã, ka Zu-soabã n yet tɩ m gom ye. La mam gomda ne pɛl-kɛgenga, wa m yaa yalma, n pẽg m meng bõn-kãng pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians11:18 Neb wʋsg sẽn pẽgd b mens ne dũni yɛlã, mam me na n pẽga m menga." 
2Corinthians11:19 Yãmb sẽn yaa yam dãmb n yaool n sakd n deegd yalemb ne yamleoogo! 
2Corinthians11:20 Sɩd me, yãmb sakdame tɩ b kẽesd yãmb yembdo, tɩ b rɩt yãmba, tɩ b fãad yãmba, tɩ b ka nand yãmba, la b pãbd yãmb pegse." 
2Corinthians11:21 Mam yetame tɩ yaa yãnde. Tõnd maana pãn-komsem n ka tõog n maan a woto ye. Baoosgo, ne bũmb ning fãa ned sẽn tar raood tɩ pẽg a menga, mam me tara raoodo, mam gomda wa yalma." 
2Corinthians11:22 Bãmb yaa Ebre rãmba? Mam me yaa Ebre. Bãmb yaa Israyɛll buudu? Mam me yaa Israyɛll neda. B yaa a Abrahaam yagense? Mam me yaa a Abrahaam yagenga. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bãmb yaa Kiris tʋmtʋmdba? Maam n leb n yɩɩda. Mam gomda wa m zugã ka be ye. Sã n yaa ne tʋʋmã, maam n yɩɩd-ba, ne bi-bees roog kõom, maam n yɩɩd-ba, ne pãbr deegre, maam n leb n yɩɩd-ba, la mam kolga kũum naoor wʋsgo." 
2Corinthians11:24 Zʋɩf-rãmbã pãba maam ne kalwaase, a yembr n ka pis-naase, naoor a nu." 
2Corinthians11:25 B pãba maam ne rasab naoor a tã, b loba maam kug vugri, koom-kogend sãama naoor a tã tɩ mam be b pʋse. Mam paa koom zug daar tõre la yʋng tõre." 
2Corinthians11:26 Kʋɩls rag n na n dɩɩ maam wakat kẽere, m kẽna pʋse. Fãadb rag n na n fãa maam. Mam tẽngẽ neb baoo n na n sãama maam. Neb nins sẽn ka Zʋɩf buudã baoo n na n sãama maam, mam paama tood tẽms pʋsẽ, mam dag n na n kii wetẽ. Mam dag n na n kii ko-kãsengã zugu, zãmb ba-biis rag n na n kʋʋ maam." 
2Corinthians11:27 Mam tʋma tʋʋm-kegemse, mam namsame. Wakat kẽere, mam ka gũs ye. Kom la ko-yũud yõka maam. Mam gãanda kom wakat kẽere. Wakat kẽere, waood yõka maam la fut paooga maam," 
2Corinthians11:28 tɩ m ka gomd bũmb nins sẽn ketã ye. Mam tara zɩɩb daar fãa, Kiris tẽedbã fãa yɛl sẽn pak maamã yĩnga." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ãndã pãng n boog tɩ mam dẽnd ka booge? Ãndã n lʋɩ yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ tɩ mam sũur ka sãame? 
2Corinthians11:30 Pẽg-m-meng sã n noomẽ, mam na pẽg m pãng-komsem." 
2Corinthians11:31 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Ba wã, sẽn tar-a bark wakat sẽn kõn sa wã miime tɩ mam ka yagd zĩrẽ ye!" 
2Corinthians11:32 Mam sẽn wa n be Damaasã, rĩm a Areta Gʋvɛrneerã ra kɩtdame tɩ b gũud Damaas tẽngã noy n dat n yõk maam." 
2Corinthians11:33 La b kẽesa maam peoogẽ n tũnug roog fẽnetr n sik maam lalgã poor tɩ mam põse, t'a ka paam maam ye." 
2Corinthians12:1 Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ m pẽg m menga? Bõn-kãng ka tar yõod ye. Baoosgo, mam na n togsa mam sẽn yã yãab ninsi, la vẽnegr nins Zu-soabã sẽn kõ maamã." 
2Corinthians12:2 Yʋʋm piig la a naas sẽn looge, mam bãnga Kiris tẽed a yembr sẽn paam zẽkr n ta saas a tãab soabã. Mam ka mi yẽnda soab sã n da bee a yĩngã pʋga, wall a sã n da ka be a yĩng pʋgẽ ye, la Wẽnnaam miime." 
2Corinthians12:3 Rao-kãngã sã n da bee a yĩngã pʋga, wall a ka be, mam ka mi ye, la Wẽnnaam miime, la mam sẽn mi yaa tɩ" 
2Corinthians12:4 rao-kãngã zẽkame n kẽng Paraadi, la a wʋma goamã, ned sẽn ka tõe n togs ye, la b sẽn ka kõ ninsaal noor t'a gom-a ye." 
2Corinthians12:5 Mam na n pẽga m meng rao-kãngã wɛɛngẽ, la mam mengã wɛɛngẽ, mam ka na n pẽg mmeng ye. Sã n ka m pẽg m meng pãn-komsem bala." 
2Corinthians12:6 La mam sã n dat n pẽg m menga, mam ka na n maan yalemd ye, bala mam na n togsa sɩda. La mam gũusda m meng tɩ ned da wa n yãnd mam sẽn maandã, la a wʋm mam sẽn gomdã n tags tɩ maam n yɩɩd ye." 
2Corinthians12:7 La sẽn na n yɩl tɩ mam da wuk m meng vẽneg-kãsen‑kãensã yĩnga, b ninga gõaag mam yĩnga pʋgẽ, sẽn yaa sʋtãan tʋmtʋmd t'a namsd maam, tɩ mam da wa n pid ne wuk‑m‑meng ye." 
2Corinthians12:8 Mam kosa Zu-soabã naoor a tãab tɩ b kɩt tɩ bõn-kãng loog n bas maam. 
2Corinthians12:9 La b yeela maam yaa: «Mam barka sekda foom. Bala, yaa pãn-komsmã pʋg la mam pãngã maand a tʋʋmde.» Dẽnd mam na n maana sũ-noog m pãn-komsmã pʋga, tɩ Kiris pãngã zĩnd mam zugu." 
2Corinthians12:10 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam maand sũ-noog pãn-komsmã pʋgẽ, paoogrã pʋgẽ, yel‑pakrã pʋgẽ, namsgã pʋgẽ, la tood mam sẽn sak Kiris yĩngã pʋgẽ. Bala yaa mam pãn-komsmã wakat la mam tar pãnga." 
2Corinthians12:11 Yãmb modga maam tɩ m yɩ yalma. Sɩd me, yaa yãmb n da tog n gom n sõng maam. Bala, b sẽn boond-b rãmb tɩ tẽn-tʋmd-kãsemsã pʋs n ka yɩɩd maam ye, baa ne mam sẽn ka baa fɩ wã." 
2Corinthians12:12 Bãn nins sẽn yaa toor n wilgdẽ tɩ mam yaa tẽn-tʋmdã maana yãmb sʋk tɩ nebã yã, yɩɩ ne sũ-mare, makrã fãa pʋgẽ, la ne bãnã, la bõn-yɛɛsdse, la ne bõn-bãnã." 
2Corinthians12:13 Yaa bõe la yãmb paam-y tɩ ka ta a Zeezi tẽedbã a taabã sẽn tarã, sã n ka mam sẽn ka sak tɩ y ges mam yellã bala? Kõ-y-m sugr ne kong‑kãngã." 
2Corinthians12:14 Ade, mam seglame n sɛ n na n wa yãmb nengẽ naoor a tãab-n-soaba, la yãmb ka na n ges mam yell ye. Bala, mam ka baood yãmb bũmb ye, la yaa yãmb mensã la m baooda. Sɩd me, ka kamb n tog tigs paoong b ba-rãmb yĩng ye, la yaa ba-rãmbã n tog n tigs paoong b kamb yĩnga." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ne maam, mam na n kɩsa bũmb fãa ne yamleoogo, la m kɩs m mengã fãa yãmb mensã yĩnga. Mam sẽn nong yãmb wʋsgã kɩtame tɩ yãmb ka leb n nong maam wʋsg la?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Baa sã n yaa a woto, mam ka yɩ zɩɩb yãmb yĩng ye la nina na n tagsame tɩ mam maana sɩlem n paam yãmba." 
2Corinthians12:17 Rẽ yĩnga, mam sẽn tʋm neb nins yãmb nengẽ wã, m tũnuga bãmb ned a bõe n belg yãmb n deeg bũmbu?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Mam sagla a Tit t'a wa yãmb nengẽ, la m tʋma ba-biig a yembr t'a tũ yẽnda. Rẽ yĩnga, a Tit belga yãmb n deeg bũmbu? Yẽnda tagsgã ne mam dẽndã ka a yembr sɩda? Tõnd tʋʋm tʋmdɩ wã ka a yembr sɩda?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Hal daar zãra, yãmb da tagsame tɩ tõnd dat n baoo bʋʋm yãmb taoore, la ka a woto ye. Yaa Wẽnnaam taoore, Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ la tõnd gomda. M zo-nongdse, bõn-kãensã fãa yaa yãmb tẽebã bɩɩsg yĩnga." 
2Corinthians12:20 Bala, mam zoeta m na n wa wa n mik tɩ yãmb ka ya wa mam sẽn datã ye, la tɩ yãmb da mik tɩ mam mengã ka ya wa yãmb sẽn datã ye. Mam yɛɛsdame tɩ welgre, la sũ-kiiri, la kis-taaba, la geesem-geesem, la wɩdga, la paoog-taaba, la wuk-m-meng la zũnglug na n wa zĩnd yãmb sʋka." 
2Corinthians12:21 Mam zoeta m na n wa wa yãmb nengẽ, tɩ mam Wẽnnaamã leb n ning maam yãnd yãmb yĩnga, la tɩ mam da wa n yãbe, neb wʋsg sẽn dag n maan yel-wẽn n ka tek yam n kos sugr yĩnga, la b tʋʋm-dẽgdã la b yoobã yĩnga, la tʋʋm beedã b sẽn maanã yĩng ye." 
2Corinthians13:1 Mam wata yãmb nengẽ naoor a tãab-n-soaba. Yɛlã fãa na n paama manegre, ne neb a yiib bɩ a tãab kaseto." 
2Corinthians13:2 Mam sẽn dag n zĩnd yãmb nengẽ naoor a yiibẽ soabã, mam dag n zoee n togsa yãmb bõn-kãngã, la dũndã, mam sẽn ka be yãmb nengẽ wã, mam leb n deng n togsd-a-la neb nins sẽn maan yel-wẽnã wakat sẽn loogã, la neb a taabã fãa. Mam sã n lebg n wa yãmb nengẽ, m ka na n bas ned baa yembr ye." 
2Corinthians13:3 Bala, yãmb baooda bãnd sẽn wilgd tɩ Kiris tũnugda maam n gomda. Bãmb yaool n ka pãn-komsem soab yãmb yĩng ye, la b yaa pãn-kãseng soab yãmb sʋka." 
2Corinthians13:4 Bala, b kaa a Zeezi da-pɩk zug b pãn-komsem yĩnga, la bãmb vɩɩ ne Wẽnnaam pãnga. Tõnd me yaa pãn-komsem dãmb a Zeezi tũudmã pʋgẽ, la tõnd vɩɩ ne bãmba, n tʋmd yãmb yĩnga, ne Wẽnnaam pãnga." 
2Corinthians13:5 Fees-y y mens y toore, n ges yãmb sã n bee tẽebã pʋgẽ. Mak-y y mens y toor n gese. Yãmb ka mi t'a Zeezi Kiris bee yãmb pʋsẽ la? Sã n ka rẽ, dall makrã kɩtdame tɩ yãmb ka paamd tõogr ye." 
2Corinthians13:6 La mam tẽedame tɩ yãmb miime tɩ makrã ka kɩtd tɩ tõnd ka tõogdẽ ye. 
2Corinthians13:7 Baoosgo, tõnd pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam yãmb yĩng tɩ y kõn maan bũmb baa yembr sẽn yaa wẽng ye. Ka tɩ wilg tɩ tõnd tõogda makr pʋgẽ ye, la yaa tɩ yãmb na maan sẽn ya neere, baa sã n wẽnda wa tõnd ka paamd tõogr makr pʋgẽ." 
2Corinthians13:8 Bala, tõnd ka tar pãng n na n zab ne sɩd ye, tõnd sẽn tar pãng ningã yaa sẽn na n sõng sɩdã." 
2Corinthians13:9 Tõnd sẽn wat n maan sũ-noog d pãn-komsmã wakatã tɩ yãmb tara pãnga, la tõnd sẽn kot bũmb ningã d pʋʋsg pʋgẽ, yaa tɩ yãmb na zems zãnga." 
2Corinthians13:10 Yaa rẽ yĩng tɩ mam gʋlsd yãmb bõn-kãense, wakat ning mam sẽn ka be yãmb nengẽ wã, tɩ mam sã n wa n wa yãmb nengẽ, mam kõn yɩ nin-toaag ne yãmba, ne noor ning Zu-soabã sẽn kõ maam yãmb sõngr yĩnga, la ka y sãoong yĩngã ye." 
2Corinthians13:11 La sẽn keta, m ba-biisi, paam-y sũ-noogo, modg-y n zems-y zãnga. Sagl-y taaba, paam-y yam a yembre, zĩnd-y ne taab ne bãane. La Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa nonglem la laafɩ soabã na pa ne yãmba." 
2Corinthians13:12 Pʋʋs-y taab ne mokr sẽn yaa sõama. Wẽnnaam nebã fãa pʋʋsda yãmba. 
2Corinthians13:13 Bɩ Zu-soab a Zeezi barkã la Wẽnnaam nonglmã, la Sɩɩg-sõng lagem-n-taar zĩnd ne yãmb fãa." 
Galatians1:1 Maam a Polle, mam yaa tẽn-tʋmda, la ka tẽn-tʋmd ninsaalb wall ned sẽn yãk ye. Yaa a Zeezi Kiris la ba a Wẽnnaam, soab ning sẽn vʋʋg a Zeezi tɩ b yi kũum sʋkã n yãk maam." 
Galatians1:2 Maam ne ba-biis nins fãa sẽn be ne maamã n gʋlsd wẽnd-dotã sẽn be Galasi wã. 
Galatians1:3 Bɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ning yãmb barka, la b kõ-y bãane." 
Galatians1:4 Kiris yaa soab ning sẽn kõ b vɩɩm tõnd yel-wẽnã yiisg yĩnga, tɩ b tõe n fãag tõnd n yiis-d dũni‑kãngã wẽngã pʋgẽ, wa sẽn zems tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam daabã." 
Galatians1:5 Bɩ bãmb paam ziir wakat fãa, ãmina!" 
Galatians1:6 Yãmb sẽn wẽnemd tao-tao n bas soab ning sẽn bool-a yãmb Kiris maasem yĩng n na n tũ koe-noog a to wã linga maam. 
Galatians1:7 Ka tɩ koe-noog a to n be ye, la neb n dãmbd yãmb n dat n teem Kiris koe-noogã." 
Galatians1:8 La tõnd mensã, wall arzãn malɛɛk sã n togs yãmb koe-noog sẽn yaa toor ne koe-noog ning tõnd sẽn moon yãmbã, bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd a zugu." 
Galatians1:9 Tõnd yeela yãmb pĩnda, la mam leb n yetame: Ned sã n togs yãmb koe-noog sẽn yaa toor ne koe-noog ning yãmb sẽn deegã, bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd a zugu." 
Galatians1:10 Dẽ wã, mam dat n taa nebã yam bɩ, bɩ Wẽnnaam yam? Dẽ yĩnga, mam baoodame tɩ maan sẽn noom nebã la? Mam sã n dag n ket n maandẽ sẽn noom nebã, mam dag n kõn yaẽ a Kiris tʋmtʋmd ye." 
Galatians1:11 M ba-biisi, mam yeta yãmb tɩ koe-noog ning mam sẽn moona ka yit ninsaal nengẽ ye." 
Galatians1:12 Bala, mam mengã ka reeg-a, wall m wʋm-a ned nengẽ ye, la yaa ne a Zeezi Kiris vẽnegre." 
Galatians1:13 Sɩd me, yãmb wʋma mam yel-manesem sẽn yɩ to-to pĩnda, Zʋɩf-rãmbã kaoreng pʋgẽ. Wakat-kãnga, mam dag n namsda Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã, la m sãamd b roogã." 
Galatians1:14 Zʋɩf‑rãmbã kaoreng pʋgẽ, mam dag n yɩɩda m rog-taasã wʋsg m buudã pʋga. Bala, mam dag n wɩngda ne m ba-rãmbã minindã sakr hal tɩ looge." 
Galatians1:15 La sẽn dag n welg-a maam toor tɩ m nan ket n be m ma pʋgẽ, la b maan nimbãan-zoeer n bool maamã" 
Galatians1:16 sẽn wa n mik tɩ zemsame tɩ b puk b Bi-riblã ne maam, tɩ mam na moon b yellã bu-zẽmsã sʋkã, mam ka yals n sok ninsaal ye," 
Galatians1:17 la mam ka kẽng Zeruzalɛm n babs neb nins sẽn deng-b maam n yaa tẽn-tʋmdbã ye. Mam kẽnga Araabi, la mam lebg n waa Damaase." 
Galatians1:18 Yʋʋm a tãab rẽ zugẽ, mam kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n na n tɩ bao n bãng a Sefaase, la mam zĩnda ne-a dasem piig la a nu." 
Galatians1:19 La mam ka yãnd tẽn-tʋmd a to baa a yembre, sã n ka Zu-soabã ma-biig a Zak bala." 
Galatians1:20 Mam sẽn gʋlsd yãmb yõwã wã, mam yeta yãmb Wẽnnaam taoor tɩ m ka yagd ye." 
Galatians1:21 Dẽ poore, mam kẽnga Siiri ne Silisi soolmẽ." 
Galatians1:22 La Wẽnd-dot nins sẽn be a Kiris pʋgẽ Zʋʋde wã dag n ka mi maam ye. 
Galatians1:23 B rag n wʋmame bal tɩ b yetẽ tɩ «ned ning sẽn dag n namsd tõndã moonda tẽeb ning a sẽn dag n dat n sãamã koɛɛg moasã.» 
Galatians1:24 La Wẽnd-do-kãens nebã rag n kõta Wẽnnaam waoogr mam wɛɛngẽ. 
Galatians2:1 Rẽ poore, yʋʋm piig la a naas zugẽ, mam leb n kẽnga Zeruzalɛm la mam peega a Tit me." 
Galatians2:2 Yaa vẽnegr mam sẽn paam yĩng la mam kẽng be. Mam wilg-b la koe-noogã mam sẽn moond bu-zẽmsã. Yaa taoor dãmbã la m gom ne, ka yɩ nebã fãa taoor ye. Bala, mam dag n zoeta tʋʋmdã m sẽn maan la m ket n maandẽ wã na n wa yɩ zaalem." 
Galatians2:3 La pʋs n ka yɩ tɩlɛ t'a Tit sẽn yaa Gɛrk n be ne maamã kẽ bãong ye. 
Galatians2:4 Baoosgo, baa ne neb nins sẽn belg tɩ b yaa tõnd ba-biisã sẽn kẽ tõnd sʋk n na n gũus tõnd n ges lohorem ning tõnd sẽn tar d lagem-n-taar a Zeezi Kirisã pʋgẽ wã, n dat n kẽes tõnd yembdẽ wã." 
Galatians2:5 La tõnd ka tũ b raabã baa bilf ye, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ koe-noogã sɩdã na kell n yals yãmb sʋka." 
Galatians2:6 La sã n yaa ne neb nins nebã sẽn dag n get wa taoor dãmbã, la b sẽn dag n yaa bũmb ning pĩndã ka pak maam ye, Wẽnnaam ka welgd neb ye. Taoor dãmb-kãens ka modg maam tɩ m maan baa fɩ ye." 
Galatians2:7 Ayo, b sẽn yã tɩ Wẽnnaam kõo maam koe-noogã neb nins sẽn ka-b Zʋɩf‑rãmbã yĩnga, wa b sẽn kõ a Pɩyɛɛr Zʋɩf‑rãmbã yĩngã," 
Galatians2:8 (bala, ned ning sẽn tʋm a Pɩyɛɛr pʋgẽ n kɩt t'a lebg Zʋɩf‑rãmbã tẽn-tʋmdã, nin‑kãng me n tʋm mam pʋgẽ bu-zẽmsã yĩnga)." 
Galatians2:9 La b sẽn bãng bark ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ maamã, a Zak ne a Sefaas la a Zã, nebã sẽn get wa ra-lugsã yõga maam ne a Barnabaas nus-rɩtgo, n wilg tɩ lagem-n-taar bee tõnd ne bãmb sʋka. Woto, tõnd na n teesa bu-zẽmsã sẽnẽ, tɩ bãmb tees Zʋɩf‑rãmbã sẽnẽ." 
Galatians2:10 Tõnd togame bal n tẽeg naong rãmbã yelle, la mam maana rẽndã ne m sũur fãa." 
Galatians2:11 La a Sefaas sẽn wa Ãntiyoosã mam leng-a-la nebã taoore, bala, a dag n maana sẽn ka zemse." 
Galatians2:12 Sɩd me, sẽn deng neb kẽer sẽn yi a Zak nengẽ wã waoongo, a Sefaas dag n dɩta ne bu-zẽmsã. La nin-kãens waoongã zugẽ, a welgame n ka leb n dɩt ne bu-zẽmsã ye, a sẽn zoet zũnsã yĩnga." 
Galatians2:13 Zʋɩf-rãmb a taabã me rag n kuusd n maanda wa yẽnda sẽn maandã, hal t'a Barnabaas mengã tũ n kẽ b zãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Galatians2:14 La mam sẽn yã tɩ b ka kẽnd tɩrg wa sẽn zems koe-noogã sɩdã yĩnga, mam yeela a Sefaas nebã fãa taoor yaa: Fo sẽn yaa Zʋɩfã, fo sã n maand wa bu-zẽmsã fo na n maana a wãn n modg bu-zẽmsã tɩ b sak Zʋɩf‑rãmbã kaorengo?" 
Galatians2:15 Tõnd yẽ rogame n yaa Zʋɩf-rãmba, la d ka yel-wẽn-maandb soolem dãmbã sʋk ye." 
Galatians2:16 Tõnd sẽn mi tɩ ka ne tõogã tʋʋm la ned yɩt tɩrga, la yaa ne tẽeb ne a Zeezi Kirisã, tõnd me tẽe a Zeezi Kirisã, tɩ tẽeb ne Kirisã na kɩt tɩ tõnd lebg tɩrse, la ka tõogã tʋʋm ye. Bala, tõog tʋʋm kõn kɩt tɩ ned baa a yembr yɩ tɩrg ye." 
Galatians2:17 La tõnd sẽn baood tɩ Kiris kɩt tɩ tõnd yɩ tɩrsã, b sã n mik tɩ tõnd me yaa yel-wẽn maandb wa bu-zẽmsã, dẽ, Kiris yaa yel-wẽna tʋmtʋmd la? Yaa vẽeneg tɩ ka a woto ye." 
Galatians2:18 Bala, bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel tɩ b ka sõngdã, mam sã n wẽnemd n yeel tɩ b sõngdame, rẽnd mam lebga m meng kɩɩsda." 
Galatians2:19 Sɩd me, sã n yaa ne tõogã wɛɛngẽ, mam yaa kũum tõogã maasem yĩnga, tɩ m tõe n vɩɩmd Wẽnnaam yĩnga." 
Galatians2:20 B kaa maam ne Kirisã, la ka maam n vɩ yɛs ye, yaa Kirisã n vɩ mam pʋgẽ. Mam sẽn vɩ m yĩngã pʋgẽ moasã wã, yaa tẽeb ne Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã, soab ning sẽn kõ a vɩɩm a toor mam yĩngã pʋgẽ la mam vɩ." 
Galatians2:21 Mam ka tõdgd Wẽnnaam barkã ye. Bala, sã n dag n yaa ne tõog la ned paamd tɩrlem, dẽnd Kirisã kii zaalem." 
Galatians3:1 Yãmb Galasi neb sẽn ka yam! Ãnda n belg yãmba, b bilga yãmb a Zeezi Kiris b sẽn ka da-pɩk zugã yellã vẽenegã ãnda n belg yãmba?" 
Galatians3:2 Ad bũmb ning bal mam sẽn dat tɩ yãmb leok maam: Yaa yãmb sẽn maan tõogã sẽn yeelã yĩng la yãmb deeg Sɩɩg-sõngã bɩ, bɩ yaa yãmb sẽn kelg koe-noogã ne tẽebã?" 
Galatians3:3 Yãmb ka yamã taa a woto? Yãmb sẽn sɩng ne Sɩɩgã pãngã, yãmb na n baasa ne yĩng rẽnd moasã la?" 
Galatians3:4 Bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn yã wã yɩɩ zaalem la? Sã n yaẽ la zaalem! 
Galatians3:5 Soab ning sẽn kõt yãmb Sɩɩgã la b maand bõn-bãn yãmb sʋkã, yaa yãmb sẽn sakd tõogã yĩng la b maand bɩ, bɩ yaa yãmb sẽn kelgd koe-noogã ne tẽebã yĩnga?" 
Galatians3:6 La ne a Abrahaam, a tẽe Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam ges-a-la wa nin-tɩrga, a tẽebã yĩnga." 
Galatians3:7 Dẽ wã, bɩ y reeg tɩ yaa neb nins sẽn tẽedã n yaa a Abrahaam kamba." 
Galatians3:8 Woto, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn pĩnd n neẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽmsã yɩ tɩrs tẽeb yĩngã, b pĩnd n togsa a Abrahaam koe-no-kãngã n yeele: Buud fãa na n paama bark fo yĩnga." 
Galatians3:9 Woto, neb nins sẽn tar tẽebã naaga ne tẽeb soab a Abrahaam n paam barka." 
Galatians3:10 Sɩd me, neb nins fãa sẽn teegd tõog tʋʋmã bee kãab-wẽng pʋgẽ, bala, b gʋlsame n yeele: Kãab-wẽng n be ned ning fãa sẽn ka sakd bũmb nins fãa sẽn gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ, la a ka maand wa sẽn gʋlsã zugu." 
Galatians3:11 La yaa vẽeneg tɩ ned baa a yembr kõn paam tɩrlem Wẽnnaam taoor tõog yĩng ye, bala, nin-tɩrg na n vɩɩ ne tẽebo." 
Galatians3:12 Tõog yaool n ka yit tẽebẽ ye. La tõogã yetame tɩ ned ning sẽn na n maan-a wa sẽn gʋlsã, bõn-kãens na kɩt t'a vɩɩmde." 
Galatians3:13 Kiris yolsa tõnd ne kãab-wẽngã, bãmb sẽn lebg kãab-wẽng tõnd yĩngã yĩnga. Bala, b gʋlsame tɩ kãab-wẽng n be ned ning sẽn lulg raoog zugã zugu." 
Galatians3:14 Woto, a Abrahaam barkã na n zĩnda a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ bu-zẽmsã yĩnga, la ne tẽebo, bɩ tõnd deeg Sɩɩgã Wẽnnaam sẽn kãabã." 
Galatians3:15 M ba-biisi, m dɩk ninsaalb mamsgo: Ned sã n gʋls sebr n wilg a sũur gomde, a sẽn dat tɩ yɩ to-to a kũum poore, baa ne sẽn yaa ninsaal n gʋlsã, ned baa a yembr ka kɩɩsd gomdã wall a paas-a bũmb ye." 
Galatians3:16 Kãabdã sẽn kãabã yaa a Abrahaam ne a yagengã. B ka yeel tɩ yagense, wa b yaa wʋsg ye. Yaa a yembr tãa. B sẽn yeel tɩ ‹fo yagengã› dat n togsame tɩ Kirisi." 
Galatians3:17 Ad mam gomdã võore: Yaa tɩ yam-yãkr ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yãke, n togs tɩ bu-zẽmsã, ka tõog sẽn yaool n wa yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-tã rẽnda zugẽ wã n na n kiis-a, n kɩt tɩ kãabgã yɩ zaalem ye." 
Galatians3:18 Bala, rogem‑pʋɩɩrã sã n dag n yitẽ tõogã pʋgẽ, a rag n kõn leb n yi kãabgẽ ye. Yaool n yaa kãabg pʋgẽ la Wẽnnaam ning b barkã a Abrahaam zugu." 
Galatians3:19 La yaa bõe yĩng la b wa ne tõogã? Wẽnnaam yaool n waa ne tõogã n na puk nebã beegre, hal tɩ yageng ning Wẽnnaam kãabgã sẽn be a zugã na wa. Malegs n moon kãab-kãnga, la b tũnuga sɛ-yõakda." 
Galatians3:20 Sã n yaool n yaa nin-yend yelle, a ka baood sɛ-yõakd ye. La Wẽnnaam yaool n yaa b yembre." 
Galatians3:21 Dẽ wã, tõogã kɩɩsda Wẽnnaam kãabgã la? Ayo! B sã n dag n kõẽ tõog sẽn tõe n kõ vɩɩm, tõogã dag n na n sɩd waa ne tɩrlem." 
Galatians3:22 Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã yeelame tɩ dũni gill fãa bee yel-wẽn maaneg pʋgẽ. Woto, yaa neb nins sẽn tẽed a Zeezi Kirisã n na n paam kũun ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãabã, b sẽn tẽ wã yĩnga." 
Galatians3:23 Sẽn deng tẽebã waoongo, tõnd dag n bee tõogã yembdẽ n gũud tẽebã sẽn na n wa pukã." 
Galatians3:24 Woto, tõog yɩɩ tõnd gũuda n na n tɛ tõnd n taas Kiris nengẽ, tɩ ne tẽebo, tõnd na lebg tɩrse." 
Galatians3:25 Tẽebã sẽn wa wã, ka leb n yaa gũud‑kãng n so tõnd yɛs ye." 
Galatians3:26 Bala, yãmb sẽn tẽed a Zeezi Kirisã yãmb fãa yaa Wẽnnaam kamba." 
Galatians3:27 Yãmb sẽn deeg lisg Kiris pʋgẽ wã, Kiris luda yãmb wa fuugu." 
Galatians3:28 Ka leb n be tɩ m yaa Zʋɩf bɩ Gɛrka, yamb bɩ burkĩna, dao bɩ pag ye. Bala, yãmb fãa yaa yembr a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ." 
Galatians3:29 La yãmb sã n yaa Kiris nebã, dẽnd yãmb yaa a Abrahaam yagense, n yaa pʋɩt-n-taas ne a rogem-pʋɩɩrã wa b sẽn kãabã." 
Galatians4:1 La mam yaool n yeta yãmb tɩ ned ning sẽn na n soog a ba wã paoong sã n ket n yaa biiga, welgr ka be yẽnda ne yamb sʋk ye, tɩ yaool n yaa yẽnda n na n soog bũmba fãa." 
Galatians4:2 Ba-wubdsi la tʋʋm-gɛtb n so yẽnda hal tɩ ta wakat ning ba wã sẽn yãkã. 
Galatians4:3 Tõnd me sẽn dag n yaa kambã, tõnd dag n bee dũni wã bũmb buud toor-toor yembd pʋgẽ." 
Galatians4:4 La wakat sẽn ta, Wẽnnaam tʋma b bi-riblã tɩ pag rog-ba, n dog-b tõogã pʋgẽ," 
Galatians4:5 tɩ b tõe n yols neb nins sẽn dag n be tõogã yembd pʋgẽ, n tõog n deeg tõnd n maan Wẽnnaam kamba." 
Galatians4:6 La yãmb sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam kambã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam tʋma b bi-riblã Sɩɩg yãmb sũyã pʋse, la Sɩɩgã yetame tɩ «abba» sẽn dat n togs tɩ «m ba!»" 
Galatians4:7 Woto, fo ka leb n yaa yamb yɛs ye, fo yaa Wẽnnaam biiga. La fo sã n yaa Wẽnnaam biiga, fo yaa bãmb pʋɩ-rɛɛgd me, bãmb maasem yĩnga." 
Galatians4:8 Pĩndã, yãmb dag n ka mi Wẽnnaam ye, la yãmb dag n sakda wẽnnaam-dãmb sẽn ka wẽnnaam-dãmb sɩd-sɩd ye." 
Galatians4:9 La moasã, yãmb sẽn bãng Wẽnnaamã, la sẽn yɩɩd fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn bãng yãmbã, yɩta a wãn tɩ yãmb leb n kẽed dũni bõn-kãensã sẽn ka pãnga la sẽn ka yõodã, n na n leb n lebg b yembse?" 
Galatians4:10 Yãmb tũuda rayã, kitã, wakatã la yʋʋmã." 
Galatians4:11 Dabeem tara maam ne m sẽn nams yãmb yĩngã kõn yɩ zaalem. 
Galatians4:12 M ba-biisi, mam bõosda yãmb tɩ y yɩ wa maam, bala, mam me yaa wa yãmba." 
Galatians4:13 Yãmb ka beeg maam baa bilf ye. Yãmb miime tɩ mam sẽn na n moon yãmb koe-noogã pipi, yɩɩ mam ka laafɩ yĩnga." 
Galatians4:14 Mam yĩnsã ka-laafɩ wã yɩɩ makr yãmb yĩnga. Ka tɩ yãmb ka ges maam n ka nandẽ, wall y yam yii maam ye. Ayo! Yãmb pʋs n deega maam wa Wẽnnaam malɛɛka, la wa a Zeezi Kirisi." 
Galatians4:15 La yaa bõe n wa ne yãmb sũ-noogã? Bala, mam kɩta yãmb kaset n yetẽ tɩ yãmb sã n dag n tõeẽ, y dag n na yãgs y ninã n kõ maam." 
Galatians4:16 Mam sẽn togs yãmb sɩdã yĩnga, mam lebga yãmb bɛ la?" 
Galatians4:17 Bãmb sẽn wɩngd ne yãmbã ka sõama ye. B sẽn datã yaa tɩ welg yãmb ne tõndo, tɩ yãmb na wẽnemd n kẽ bãmba." 
Galatians4:18 Yaa sõama tɩ y wɩng ne bũmb ning sẽn yaa sõama wakat fãa, la ka mam sẽn be ne yãmb wakat bal ye." 
Galatians4:19 Mam kamba, rogem toog leb n tara maam yãmb yĩnga, hal n na ta wakat ning yãmb sẽn nan wẽneg Kirisã." 
Galatians4:20 Mam da nong n bee yãmb sʋk moasã n tek m sẽn gomd to-to wã, bala, mam ka mi m sẽn na n maan to-to ne yãmb yellã ye." 
Galatians4:21 Yãmb dãmb sẽn dat n be tõog sakr pʋgẽ wã, leok-y maam wɛ! Yãmb ka kelgd tõogã la?" 
Galatians4:22 Bala, b gʋlsame t'a Abrahaam paama kom-dibli a yiibu: A yembr yaa yem-poakã biiga, t'a to wã ya burkĩn-poakã biiga." 
Galatians4:23 Yaa ne ninsaal datem la b rog yem-poakã biigã, la b roga burkĩn-poakã biig wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam sẽn kãabã." 
Galatians4:24 Mamsg n be yel-kãngã pʋgẽ, bala, pagbã a yiibã mamsda kaool a yiibu. Pag a yembr mamsda kaool ning sẽn maan Sinayi tãngẽ wã, la a sẽn dogd b rãmbã yaa yembse. Pʋg-kãng yaa a Agaare." 
Galatians4:25 A Agaar yaa Sinayi tãng sẽn be Araabi wã, la kell n zemsa ne rũndã-rũndã Zeruzalɛmã, bala, a bee yembdẽ ne a kambã." 
Galatians4:26 La Zeruzalɛm sẽn yit-a yĩngrã yaa burkĩna, la yaa yẽnda n yaa tõnd ma." 
Galatians4:27 Sɩd me, b gʋlsame n yeel yaa: pʋg-kiir sẽn ka rogda, maan sũ-noogo. Fo sẽn ka yã rogem toogã, kɩdem la f kaase! Bala, pag ning b sẽn basã kamb na n yɩɩga pag ning b sẽn nongã kamba." 
Galatians4:28 La yãmba, m ba-biisi, yãmb yaa kãabg kamb wa a Izake." 
Galatians4:29 La a wa biig ning b sẽn dog yĩng ratem yĩngã sẽn dag n namsd biig ning b sẽn dog wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã raabã, ket n yaa a woto bal moasã." 
Galatians4:30 La Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã yetame tɩ bõe? Dig yem-poakã ne a biigã, bala, yem-poakã biig ka na n naag ne burkĩnã biig n deeg rogem‑pʋɩɩr ye." 
Galatians4:31 Woto, m ba-biisi, tõnd ka yem-poakã kamb ye, tõnd yaa burkĩn‑poakã kamba." 
Galatians5:1 Kiris yolsa tõnd tɩ d na vɩ ne lohorem. Dẽ yĩngã, yals-y kãenkãe n da leb n kẽes y mens yembdẽ ye." 
Galatians5:2 Ade, maam a Poll yeta yãmb tɩ yãmb sã n kɩt tɩ b kẽes-y bãongo, Kiris ka na n zĩnd yõod ne yãmb ye." 
Galatians5:3 Mam leb n yeta ned ning fãa sẽn kɩt tɩ b kẽes-a bãong t'a tog n pidsa tõogã gilli. 
Galatians5:4 Yãmb dãmb sẽn baood zemsg tõog sakr pʋgẽ wã, yãmb welga ne Kirisi, yãmb monga y mens barkã." 
Galatians5:5 Ne tõndo, yaa tẽeb pʋgẽ la tõnd gũud tɩ Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ tõnd lebg nin-tɩrse, Sɩɩg-sõng pãngã yĩnga." 
Galatians5:6 Bala, bũmb ning sẽn be yõod Kiris pʋgẽ wã ka bãongã wall moonemã ye, yaa tẽeb sẽn tʋmd ne nonglem." 
Galatians5:7 Yãmb dag n zoeta sõama, la ãnda n gɩdg yãmb tɩ y ra sak sɩdã, n kɩt tɩ y yalse?" 
Galatians5:8 Tags-kãng ka yi sẽn boond-a yãmbã nengẽ ye. 
Galatians5:9 Rã-bɩll bilf bal wukda bur zom-nagdgã gilli, wa b sẽn mi n yetẽ wã." 
Galatians5:10 Ne maam, mam sũurã keema ne yãmb Zu-soabã pʋgẽ, tɩ y tagsg ka na n yɩ toor ye. La ned ning sẽn dãmbda yãmbã, baa a sẽn yaa ned ning fãa, a na n deega a sɩbgre." 
Galatians5:11 M ba-biisi, ne maam, sã n yaa tɩ mam moondame tɩ b kẽes nebã bãongo, bõe yĩng tɩ b namsd maam? Dẽ, a Zeezi da-pɩkã koɛɛg sẽn yaa wa kug-lakdg tɩ mam moondẽ wã ka leb n beegd ned ye." 
Galatians5:12 Mam datẽ lame tɩ neb nins sẽn dãmbd yãmbã tolg n wã b mens n baase. 
Galatians5:13 M ba-biisi, b boola yãmb tɩ y vɩɩmd lohorem pʋgẽ. La bɩ y da rɩk lohorem‑kãng n na n vɩɩmd wa yĩngã sẽn datã ye. Vɩɩmd-y ne nonglem, la y tʋm n kõ taaba." 
Galatians5:14 Bala, gomd a yembr tãa n pidsd tõodã gilli. A yetame tɩ: Nong f to wa f menga." 
Galatians5:15 La yãmb sã n wãbd taab wa baase, la y namsd taaba, bɩ y gũus n da wa gõdg n sãam taab ye." 
Galatians5:16 Dẽ, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y kẽn wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã sẽn tɛt yãmbã, la yãmb kõn maan y yĩngã sẽn dat ye." 
Galatians5:17 Bala, yĩngã tara ratem sẽn yaa lebend ne Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã rẽnda, la Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã tara ratem sẽn yaa lebend ne yĩngã rẽnda. B kɩɩsda taaba, tɩ yãmb kõn maan y sẽn datã ye." 
Galatians5:18 La sã n yaa Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã n tɛt yãmba, yãmb ka be tõog sakr pʋgẽ ye." 
Galatians5:19 La yĩngã tʋʋm yaool n yaa vẽenese. Yaa yoobo, rẽgdo, tʋʋm‑wẽns maanego," 
Galatians5:20 wẽn-naands pʋʋsgo, tɩɩm, beem, ka-wʋmd-taaba, sũ-kiiri, sũ-yikri, no-koɛɛma, welgre, yi-taaba," 
Galatians5:21 zoe-bõne, rã-tɩgre, yão-beedo, la bũmb sẽn wẽnd a woto. Mam pĩnd n keoogda yãmb wa mam sẽn da zoe n maanã. Neb nins sẽn maand bõn-kãensã kõn paam Wẽnnaam soolem tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩr ye." 
Galatians5:22 La Sɩɩg-sõng bilã yaa nonglem, la sũ-noogo, la bãane, la sũ-mare, la sõmblem, la maan-neere, la maan-sɩda, la bʋgsem, la yõk-m-menga." 
Galatians5:23 Tõogã ka kɩɩsd bõn-kãensã ye. 
Galatians5:24 Neb nins sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã kaa b yĩngã ne a sẽn nonge, la a raabã fãa da-pɩk zugu." 
Galatians5:25 Tõnd sã n vɩ ne Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã pãnga, bɩ d kẽn wa sẽn zems bãmb Sɩɩgã sẽn tɛt tõndã me." 
Galatians5:26 Bɩ d da lebg wuk-m-mens rãmba, n baood taab noore, la d maand sũ-kiir ne taab ye." 
Galatians6:1 M ba-biisi, yãmb sã n ling ned t'a beegdẽ, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã sẽn be ne yãmbã yĩnga, bɩ y sagl a soab ne sũ-bʋgsem, t'a tõe n leb n dɩk so-tɩrgã. Gũus f menga, tɩ fo me ra wa n paam makr ye." 
Galatians6:2 Tʋk-y taab zɩɩbo. Woto, Yãmb na n maana Kiris tõogã sẽn datã." 
Galatians6:3 Ned sã n tẽed t'a yaa bũmbu, n yaool n ka fɩ, a belgda a menga." 
Galatians6:4 Bɩ ned kam fãa ges a meng tʋʋmd sẽn yaa to-to, la woto, a na maan sũ-noog ne a meng tʋʋma, la a ka tog n makd a rẽndã ne neb a taabã rẽnd n maand sũ-noog ye." 
Galatians6:5 Bala, ned fãa na n tʋka a meng zɩɩbo." 
Galatians6:6 Ned sã n paam tɩ ned a to zãmsd-a Wẽnnaam goamã, bɩ a kɩt tɩ sẽn zãmsd-a yẽnda wã me paam pʋɩɩr ne bũmb nins yẽnda sẽn tarã." 
Galatians6:7 Da belg-y y mens ye: Wẽnnaam ka sẽn na paoog ye. Ned sẽn bʋd bũmb ningã la a na n tigs bala. 
Galatians6:8 Bala, ned ning sẽn bʋt-a yĩngã yĩnga, a na n tigsa yĩngã biis sẽn yaa sãoongo. La ned ning sẽn bʋt-a Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã yĩng na n tigsa Sɩɩgã biis sẽn ya vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa." 
Galatians6:9 Bɩ d da yɛ ne tʋʋm‑sõama maaneg ye. Bala, wakat sã n ta, tõnd na n tigsame, a sã n yaa tɩ tõnd ka bas n vʋʋs ye." 
Galatians6:10 Woto yĩnga, tõnd sẽn paam weer ning fãa, bɩ d maan nebã fãa neere, la sẽn yɩɩd fãa yaa tẽeb pʋgẽ ba-biisã." 
Galatians6:11 Ges-y gʋls-biisã bedrem sẽn zem to-to! Maam n gʋlsd yãmb m toor moasã. 
Galatians6:12 Neb nins sẽn dat tɩ ne yĩngã yell bɩ b pẽg-bã modgda yãmb tɩ y kɩt tɩ b kẽes-y bãongo, la yaa sẽn na yɩlg bal n da paam namsg Kiris da-pɩkã yĩng ye." 
Galatians6:13 Bala, bãmb mensã sẽn yaa zũnsã, b ka sakd tõogã ye. La b ratame tɩ yãmb kɩt tɩ b kẽes-y bãongo, tɩ bãmb paam waoogr yãmb yĩn-neong yĩnga." 
Galatians6:14 La ne maam, yaa vẽeneg tɩ ka a woto ye. Mam ka na n waoog m meng ne bũmb a to tɩ ka ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris da-pɩkã ye. Ne maam, da-pɩkã yĩnga dũni wã yaa wa kũum, la ne dũni wã, mam me yaa wa kũum." 
Galatians6:15 Bala, bũmb ning sẽn be yõodo, ka bãongo wall moonem ye, la yaa tɩ yɩ nin-paalga." 
Galatians6:16 Bɩ bark la laafɩ zĩnd ne neb nins sẽn na n sak-b no-kãnga wã, la ne Wẽnnaam Israyɛllã." 
Galatians6:17 Yaoolem koɛɛg yaa tɩ ned baa a yembr da sãam mam sũur ye. Bala, nod-dãand nins mam sẽn tarã yaa bãnd tɩ mam yaa a Zeezi rẽnda." 
Galatians6:18 M ba-biisi, bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi barkã zĩnd ne yãmba. Ãmina." 
Ephesians1:1 Maam a Poll sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmd wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam tʋlsmã n tʋmd seb-kãngã Wẽnnaam nebã ne neb nins sẽn be Efɛɛs n tũud a Zeezi Kirisã. 
Ephesians1:2 Bɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris kõ yãmb b barkã la b laafɩ wã. 
Ephesians1:3 Pẽgr Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ba wã! Bãmb sẽn kõ tõnd Sɩɩg-sõng bark buud fãa sẽn yit yĩngri, Kiris maasem yĩngã." 
Ephesians1:4 Wẽnnaam yãka tõnd Kiris maasem yĩng sẽn deng dũni naanego, tɩ tõnd yɩ neb sẽn yell bãmb taoor ye. Wẽnnaam nonglmã pʋga," 
Ephesians1:5 bãmb da pĩnd n yãka yam tɩ tõnd na n yɩɩ bãmb kamba, a Zeezi maasem yĩnga, a wa sẽn zems bãmb daabo, la sẽn noom bãmba." 
Ephesians1:6 Bõn-kãng yaa tɩ tõnd na zẽk bãmb barkã ziir b sẽn kõ tõnd bãmb Bi-riblã maasem yĩngã. 
Ephesians1:7 Yaa Kiris zɩɩmã maasem yĩng la tõnd paam fãagre, fãagr ning sẽn yaa yel-wẽnã sugr kũuni, sẽn zems Wẽnnaam barkã sẽn waoog wʋsgã," 
Ephesians1:8 bark ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ tõnd hal wʋsgo, n paas yam fãa ne bãngrã." 
Ephesians1:9 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ tõnd bãng bãmb datmã yel-solemde, a wa sẽn zems yam-yãkr ning b sẽn da pĩnd n yãk Kiris pʋgẽ wã." 
Ephesians1:10 Wakatã sã n pidi, Wẽnnaam na n pidsa b yam-yãk-kãense. Bãmb na n tigsa bũmb nins fãa sẽn be yĩngri la sẽn be tẽng zugã tɩ b sak naab a yembre: Kirisã." 
Ephesians1:11 Kiris maasem yĩnga, Wẽnnaam yãka tõnd n bĩng toore. Bãmb sẽn maand bũmb fãa wa b yamã sẽn yãke la wa b sẽn datã, bãmb pĩnd n tʋlsa tõndo," 
Ephesians1:12 tɩ tõnd sẽn da pĩnd n tẽed Kirisã, tõnd na tʋm n kɩt tɩ nebã bãng bãmb ziirã." 
Ephesians1:13 Kiris maasem yĩnga, yãmb me sẽn wʋm sɩd koɛɛgã, yãmb fãagrã koe-noogã, yãmb tẽe bãmba, la b ning-y la bãnd sẽn yaa Sɩɩg-sõng b sẽn dag n kãabã." 
Ephesians1:14 Sɩɩg-sõng yaa kaset sẽn wilgd tɩ tõnd na n paama d pʋɩɩrã, sẽn yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn da neb ninsã na n dɩɩ naam tɩ yɩ Wẽnnaam ziiri." 
Ephesians1:15 Yaa woto yĩnga, mam me sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd yãmb tẽeb ne Zu-soab a Zeezi wã yelle, la nonglem ning yãmb sẽn tar Wẽnnaam nebã fãa yĩngã yelle," 
Ephesians1:16 mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark yãmb yĩng n ka basdẽ ye. Mam tẽegda yãmb yell m pʋʋsg pʋgẽ. 
Ephesians1:17 Mam pʋʋsdame n kot tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris Wẽnnaamã sẽn yaa Ba sẽn tar ziirã tɩ b na kõ yãmb yam la vẽnegr sɩɩga, n kɩt tɩ y bãng bãmba." 
Ephesians1:18 Mam pʋʋsdame tɩ Wẽnnaam na puk yãmb pʋ-tẽer ninã tɩ y bãng bõn-neer ning b sẽn bool yãmb tɩ ka tar paamã, la y bãng bãmb pʋɩɩr ning sẽn yaa arzegs sẽn be ziirã, Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã sẽn tarã." 
Ephesians1:19 Mam pʋʋsdame tɩ yãmb na bãng bãmb pãn kãsengã sẽn zem to-to, la a sẽn tʋmd tõnd sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã pʋsẽ, wa sẽn zems bãmb naamã pãng sẽn tʋmdã." 
Ephesians1:20 Wẽnnaam wilga b pãn-kãsengã Kiris pʋgẽ, n vʋʋg-b tɩ b yi kũum sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b zĩ bãmb dɩtg Arzãn pʋga." 
Ephesians1:21 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Kiris yɩɩd rĩm-dãmba fãa la noyã fãa la pãensã fãa la naam fãa, la b yʋʋrã yɩɩda yʋyã fãa sẽn pʋtã, la ka dũndã zamaanã pʋg bal ye, la yaa ne zamaan ning sẽn watã me pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians1:22 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Kirisã so bũmb fãa, la b kɩt tɩ bãmb yɩ b tẽedbã fãa Zu-soab ne bũmb fãa." 
Ephesians1:23 Kiris tẽedbã yaa Kirisã yĩnga. Kiris yalẽ wã fãa bee b nebã pʋgẽ, la b pida bũmb fãa ned fãa pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians2:1 Yãmba, yãmb dag n yaa kũum y beegrã ne y yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Ephesians2:2 Pĩnda, yãmb dag n kẽnda yel-wẽn kãens pʋgẽ wa sẽn zems dũni-kãngã sẽn kẽnd to-to wã, n sakd yĩngr pãng naabã, sɩɩg ning sẽn tʋmd wẽn-kɩɩsdbã pʋgẽ moasã wã." 
Ephesians2:3 Tõnd fãa me rag n bee bãmb sʋka, la tõnd dag n vɩɩ wa sẽn zems tõnd yĩngã datem wẽnsã. Tõnd dag n tʋmda wa tõnd yĩngã sẽn date, la sẽn zems tõnd tagsdo, la tõnd dag n yaa neb sẽn na n paam Wẽnnaam sɩbgr wa neb a taabã." 
Ephesians2:4 La Wẽnnaam sẽn tar nimbãan-zoeer wʋsgã, la bãmb sẽn nong tõnd ne nonglem kãsengã yĩnga," 
Ephesians2:5 baa tõnd sẽn dag n yaa kũum d beegrã yĩngã, Wẽnnaam kõo tõnd vɩɩm Kiris pʋgẽ. Yaa Wẽnnaam barkã yĩng la yãmb paam fãagre." 
Ephesians2:6 Wẽnnaam naaga tõnd ne Kirisã n vʋʋge, n kɩt tɩ tõnd naag ne bãmb n zĩnd arzãn pʋga, Kiris maasem yĩnga," 
Ephesians2:7 tɩ wakat sẽn wate, bɩ bãmb tõe n wilg tõnd bãmb bark kãsengã, b sẽn kõ tõnd sõmblem Kiris maasem yĩngã." 
Ephesians2:8 Sɩd me, yaa Wẽnnaam barkã yĩng la yãmb paam fãagr tẽeb yĩnga. Yãmb sẽn paam fãagrã, ka ne y mens pãng ye, yaa Wẽnnaam kũuni." 
Ephesians2:9 Ka ne tʋʋm ye, tɩ ned baa a yembr da wa pẽg a meng ye." 
Ephesians2:10 Bala, tõnd yaa Wẽnnaam bõn-naandse. B naana tõnd Kirisã maasem yĩnga, tɩ tõnd na maan tʋʋm‑sõama nins bãmb sẽn dag n pĩnd n segl tɩ tõnd wa maanã." 
Ephesians2:11 Dẽ wã, tẽeg-y tɩ wakat sẽn looge, yãmb dag n yaa bu-zẽms yĩng wɛɛngẽ, tɩ neb nins sẽn yet tɩ b yaa zũnsi, tɩ yaool n yaa bãong ninsaal nus sẽn kẽesã rãmb n dag n boond yãmb a bu-zẽmsã tɩ moose." 
Ephesians2:12 Wakat-kãng tɩ yãmb dag n zãra ne Kirisã, la yãmb da ka tar noor tɩ lagem ne Israyɛll nebã ye. Sẽn paase, yãmb dag n zãra ne lagem-n-taar ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n kãabã, la y dag n ka tar tẽeb pidsg gũudum ye. Y dag n vɩɩ dũni pʋgẽ n ka tar Wẽnnaam ye." 
Ephesians2:13 La moasã, Kiris pʋgẽ, yãmb sẽn dag n zãr wakat sẽn loogã, Kiris zɩɩmã maasem yĩnga, yãmb pẽnegame." 
Ephesians2:14 Bala, yaa Kiris n yaa tõnd laafɩ. Bãmb n kɩt tɩ sẽn yaa-a Zʋɩf la sẽn ka-a Zʋɩf lebg buud a yembre, n wã welgr lalgã sẽn yaa beemã sẽn dag n be sʋkã." 
Ephesians2:15 Kiris yiisa a Moyiis tõodã ne a noyã la a minindã, n na n kɩt tɩ buud a yiibã naag taab bãmb pʋgẽ n yɩ bu-paalg a yembre, n kɩt tɩ laafɩ zĩndi," 
Ephesians2:16 la b yiis yell ning sẽn dag n be buud a yiibã ne Wẽnnaam sʋkã, n kɩt tɩ b lebg yĩng a yembre, la b kɩt tɩ beemã sa, da-pɩkã maasem yĩnga." 
Ephesians2:17 Kiris waa n moona yãmb dãmb sẽn da zãrã laafɩ koe-noogã, la b moona neb nins sẽn da pẽ wã me." 
Ephesians2:18 Bala, Kiris maasem yĩnga, tõnd ned kam fãa tara noor tɩ wa d ba wã nengẽ, Sɩɩg-sõng a yembr pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians2:19 Dẽ wã yĩnga, yãmb ka leb n yaa sãamba, wall nin-loogds ye. Yãmb yaa buud a ye ne Wẽnnaam nebã, n ya Wẽnnaam zakã nebã." 
Ephesians2:20 B mee yãmb yẽbgr ning tẽn-tʋmdbã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yẽbgã zugu, la yaa Kiris mengã n ya roogã pãng kugri." 
Ephesians2:21 Kiris maasem yĩnga, roogã gill fãa naagda taab n yikdẽ, n lebgd ro-sõng Zu-soabã pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians2:22 Yãmb sẽn be Kiris pʋgẽ wã, yãmb me naaga meebã pʋgẽ n lebg Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã roogo." 
Ephesians3:1 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ maam a Poll yaa Kiris bi-bɛɛg yãmb sẽn yaa bu-zẽmsã yĩnga. 
Ephesians3:2 M tẽed tɩ yãmb wʋmame tɩ b gomd Wẽnnaam bark koɛɛgã b sẽn kõ maam tɩ m togs yãmbã yelle. 
Ephesians3:3 Yɩɩ ne vẽnegr la Wẽnnaam wilg maam yel-solemd ning mam sẽn gʋls a goamã bilf n wilg yãmbã. 
Ephesians3:4 Yãmb sã n karem-ba, y na n bãnga yam-vẽnegr ning mam sẽn paam Kiris yel-solemdã pʋgẽ wã võore." 
Ephesians3:5 Wakat sẽn looge, Wẽnnaam rag n ka kɩt tɩ ninsaalbã kamb bãng yel-solem-kãng wa b sẽn vẽneg-a moasã ne b tẽn-tʋmdb sõamyã la ne b no-rɛɛsdbã, ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãngã ye." 
Ephesians3:6 Yel-solem-kãng yaa tɩ bu-zẽmsã naagda Zʋɩf-rãmbã n paamd pʋɩɩr a yembre, la b lebg yĩng a ye ne bãmba, la pʋɩt-n-taas ne kãab-noog ning sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ, koe-noogã maasem yĩngã." 
Ephesians3:7 Mam lebga koe-no-kãng tẽn-tʋmda, wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam barkã kũunã b sẽn kõ maam, tɩ bãmb pãngã maand tʋʋmdã yĩnga." 
Ephesians3:8 Mam sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam nebã fãa yao-zʋʋgã, Wẽnnaam kõo maam bakr‑kãnga, tɩ m moon koe-noog ning sẽn wilgd Kiris arzegs sẽn ka sɛtã bu-zẽmsã sʋka," 
Ephesians3:9 la m vẽneg yel-solemd ning sẽn dag n solg Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bũmb fãa naandã nengẽ, wakat sẽn kaoosã n wilg nebã." 
Ephesians3:10 Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, Kiris tẽedbã maasem yĩng na n kɩtame tɩ nanambsã ne yĩngr pãens rãmbã bãng Wẽnnaam yamã, bũmb wʋsg pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians3:11 Bõn-kãng zemsa ne Wẽnnaam yam-yãkr sẽn kõn sa, b sẽn pids-a tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩngã." 
Ephesians3:12 Tõnd sẽn be Kiris pʋgẽ la d tẽed bãmbã yĩnga, tõnd tara lohorem tɩ kolg Wẽnnaam ne pɛl-kɛgenga." 
Ephesians3:13 Sẽn paase, mam kota yãmb tɩ y ra bas tɩ mam sẽn nams yãmb yĩngã boog yãmb raood ye. Mam namsgã yaa yãmb waoore." 
Ephesians3:14 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam yĩgimdid d ba wã taoore," 
Ephesians3:15 soab ning buud fãa sẽn be yĩngr la sẽn be tẽng zug sẽn paamd b yʋy b nengẽ wã taoore," 
Ephesians3:16 tɩ b na kõ yãmb wa sẽn zems b naamã arzɛka, n kɩt tɩ ne bãmb Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga, bɩ yãmb paam pãng y sũyã pʋse," 
Ephesians3:17 tɩ ne tẽebo, Kiris na zĩnd yãmb sũyã pʋse, la m kotẽ tɩ yãmb na kɩ yẽg n yals kãenkãe nonglem pʋgẽ," 
Ephesians3:18 tɩ yãmb tõe n naag ne Wẽnnaam nebã fãa n tõog n bãng nonglmã yalem la a woglem la a zulum ne a zãntlem sẽn yaa to-to," 
Ephesians3:19 la tɩ y bãng Kiris nonglmã sẽn yɩɩd ninsaalb bãngre, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb na pid ne bũmb fãa, hal n pid ne Wẽnnaam yalẽ wã." 
Ephesians3:20 Bɩ soab ning sẽn tõe n tall-a pãng ning sẽn be tõnd pʋgẽ n tʋmdẽ wã n maan hal wʋsg n yɩɩg tõnd sẽn kot fãa, wall d sẽn tagsd fãa wã" 
Ephesians3:21 paam ziir Kiris tẽedbã sʋka, a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ, zamaan woo zamaanã, wakat sẽn kõn sa, ãmina." 
Ephesians4:1 Woto yĩnga, mam sẽn be bi-bees roogẽ Zu-soabã tũudum yĩngã, mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y kẽn wa sẽn zems boolg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn bool yãmbã." 
Ephesians4:2 Kẽn-y ne sik-m-meng la sũ-bʋgsem la sũ-mare, la y sak n deeg taab ne nonglem," 
Ephesians4:3 n mao tɩ Sɩɩg-sõng lagem-n-taar zĩndi, laafɩ ning sẽn loe-a yãmb ne taabã yĩnga." 
Ephesians4:4 Yĩng a yembr bal n be, la Sɩɩg-sõng a yembr bal n be, wa b sẽn bool yãmb tɩ y paam tẽeb pidsg gũudum a yembr y boolgã yĩngã." 
Ephesians4:5 Zu-soab a yembr bala n be, la tẽeb a yembr bala, la lisg a yembr bala." 
Ephesians4:6 Wẽnnaam a yembr bal n be n yaa nebã fãa ba, n so bũmb fãa, la b be b fãa sʋka, la b fãa pʋse." 
Ephesians4:7 La b kõo tõnd ned kam fãa barkã, wa sẽn zems Kiris kũun makdgã." 
Ephesians4:8 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ gʋls-sõamyã yetẽ yaa: Bãmb sẽn dʋ yĩngrã, b zãa yembse, la bãmb kõo ninsaalb kũuni." 
Ephesians4:9 La gomd ning sẽn yet tɩ bãmb dʋʋme wã võor yaa bõe, sã n ka tɩ bãmb reng n siga tẽngã tẽngr me?" 
Ephesians4:10 Soab ning sẽn dag n sig-a wã, yaa soab‑kãng bal n zẽk yĩngr hal n loog saasẽ, tɩ bãmb tõe n pid bũmb fãa." 
Ephesians4:11 Yaa bãmb n kɩt tɩ neb kẽer yɩ tẽn-tʋmdbã, tɩ kẽer yɩ bãmb no-rɛɛsdba, tɩ kẽer yɩ koe-noogã moaandba, tɩ kẽer yɩ pe-kɩɩmba la karen-saam-dãmba," 
Ephesians4:12 b nebã bɩɩsg yĩnga. Wẽnnaam maana a woto bãmb tʋʋmdã na tõog n maan yĩnga, la Kiris yĩngã bɩɩsg yĩnga," 
Ephesians4:13 hal tɩ tõnd fãa na lagem taab n paam tẽeb a yembre, la d bãng Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã, n yɩ neb sẽn bɩ, n lebg wa a Zeezi sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, n zems zãngã." 
Ephesians4:14 Woto, tõnd kõn leb n yɩ wa kamb sẽn lengde, tɩ zãmsg buud fãa rɩkd-d n loogdẽ, tɩ ninsaalbã zãmbã ne b belgr tʋʋmã tar tõnd n leebdẽ ye." 
Ephesians4:15 La yaa tɩ tõnd sẽn togsd sɩd ne nonglmã yĩnga, tõnd na n bɩɩ bɩʋʋngã ne bũmb fãa, Kiris sẽn ya tõnd naabã pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians4:16 Yaa bãmb yĩng la yĩngã wil gill fãa sẽn sog taab sõama, sũgdsã sẽn zãad yĩngã sõama wã yĩngã, yĩngã will fãa bɩtame n zems a sẽn tog n bɩ to-to, la a bɩɩsd a meng ne nonglem." 
Ephesians4:17 Woto yĩnga, ad bũmb ning mam sẽn yet yãmba, la m sẽn kɩt a kaset Zu-soabã pʋgẽ: Yaa tɩ yãmb ka tog n leb n kẽn wa neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã ye. Bãmb kẽnda wa sẽn zems b tagsg sẽn ka yõodã." 
Ephesians4:18 Zɩɩlmã sẽn be nin-kãens pʋgẽ la b sũyã sẽn diglmã yĩnga, b yamã ka liki, la b ka vɩ wa Wẽnnaam sẽn datã ye." 
Ephesians4:19 Yel-wẽnã maaneg yãnd ka leb n tar-b baa bilfu. B basame tɩ raglem soog-ba, tɩ b maand tʋʋm dẽgd buud fãa la rat-wʋsgo." 
Ephesians4:20 La yãmba, ka yɛl a woto maaneg pʋgẽ la yãmb zãms tɩ bãng Kirisã ye," 
Ephesians4:21 sã n yaa tɩ yãmb wʋma bãmb yelle, la y paam zãmsg bãmb pʋgẽ, n zems ne sɩd ning sẽn be a Zeezi pʋgẽ wã. Sɩdã võor yaa tɩ yãmb bas y tʋʋm kʋdã sẽn yaa nin-kʋdgã rẽndã, nin-kʋdg ning sẽn dẽgemd a meng nana, ratem wẽngã sẽn tudgd nedã yĩnga," 
Ephesians4:22  
Ephesians4:23 la tɩ Sɩɩgã tek yãmb yamã," 
Ephesians4:24 la y yeelg nin-paalgã wa fuugu, nin-paalg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn naan wa b sẽn data, tɩrlem la sõmblem sɩd sẽn wat ne wã pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians4:25 Woto yĩnga, bas-y zĩrẽ yagbo, la bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa togs a to sɩda. Bala, tõnd yaa yĩng a yembr wil ne taaba." 
Ephesians4:26 Yãmb sũur sã n yiki, da sak-y tɩ wĩndg tɩ kẽ tɩ y sũurã nan ka sig ye." 
Ephesians4:27 Da kõ-y-yã a Sʋtãan weer ye. 
Ephesians4:28 Bɩ ned ning sẽn dag n zuud da leb n zu ye. A mao n tʋm pʋ-peelem tʋʋmd ne a nusi, t'a tõe n paam bũmb sẽn na kõ ned ning sẽn tog ne sõngrã." 
Ephesians4:29 Da sak-y tɩ gom yook ba a yembr yi yãmb noorẽ ye. Gomd sã n na n wa yi, bɩ yɩ gom-sõng sẽn na sõng ned t'a bɩ la a wa ne bark neb nins sẽn wʋmdã zutu." 
Ephesians4:30 Da maan-y tɩ Wẽnnaam Sɩɩg-sõngo, Sɩɩg ning b sẽn tall n ning yãmb bãnd fãagr daarã yĩngã sũur sãam ye." 
Ephesians4:31 Yiis-y sũ-toogo la kisgri, la tẽn-kãnem, la pʋ-toog buud fãa y sʋka." 
Ephesians4:32 Maan-y taab neere, n kũmd taaba, la y kõ taab sugri, a wa Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yãmb sugr Kiris maasem yĩngã." 
Ephesians5:1 Dẽ wã yĩnga, yɩ-y Wẽnnaam togs-n-taase, wa kom-nongdse," 
Ephesians5:2 la y kẽn nonglem pʋga, wa Kiris me sẽn nong tõndo, n kõ b meng tõnd yĩng tɩ yɩ kũun la maoong sẽn yaa wa kaam sẽn tar yũ-noog n tat Wẽnnaam yam." 
Ephesians5:3 Dẽ wã, a wa nin-sõamyã sẽn tog n yɩ to-to wã, da saag-y tɩ b pʋd yoobo, la rẽgd buud baa a yembre, la rat-wʋsg yell yãmb sʋk ye." 
Ephesians5:4 Da gom-y gom-dẽgdo, wall yalem goamã, wall kʋʋsem goam tɩ bõn-kãens ka zems ye. Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam barka." 
Ephesians5:5 Bala, bãng-y neer tɩ nin-yoaad baa a yembre, rẽgd soab baa a yembre, rat-wʋsg soab baa a yembre, sẽn dat n togs tɩ wẽn-naands pʋʋsd ka na n paam pʋɩɩr Kiris ne Wẽnnaam soolmẽ wã ye." 
Ephesians5:6 Da sak-y tɩ ned belg yãmb ne gom-vɩɩd ye. Bala, yaa bõn-kãens yĩng la Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr sigd kɩɩsdbã zutã." 
Ephesians5:7 Dẽ wã, da paam-y lagem-n-taar ne bãmb ye." 
Ephesians5:8 Sɩd me, pĩnda, yãmb dag n bee likẽ. La moasã, yãmb sẽn tũud Zu-soabã yĩnga, y bee vẽenemẽ. Rẽ wã, kẽn-y wa vẽenemẽ kamba." 
Ephesians5:9 Bala, vẽenem biis yaa sõmblem buud fãa, la tɩrlem la sɩda." 
Ephesians5:10 Mak-y n bãng-y bũmb nins sẽn tat Zu-soabã yam," 
Ephesians5:11 la y ra tol n paam lagem-n-taar ne likã tʋʋm sẽn ka yõodã ye. Wilg-y tɩ b ka sõama ye. 
Ephesians5:12 Sɩd me, pʋs n yaa yãnd tɩ pʋd bũmb nins nin-bãmbã sẽn maandã." 
Ephesians5:13 La d sã n wilg tɩ b ka sõama, lebgda vẽenega. Bala, bũmb ning fãa sẽn puk yaa vẽenega." 
Ephesians5:14 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ b yeel yaa: Foom! Sẽn gõe-a wã, neke! Yik n yi kũumã sʋka, la Kiris na kõ foom vẽenem sẽn kõt vɩɩm." 
Ephesians5:15 Dẽ wã, gũus-y neer ne yãmb kẽnde, n da kẽn wa yalemb ye. Kẽn-y wa yam dãmba." 
Ephesians5:16 Da bas-y tɩ weerã sãamd zaalem ye. Bala, moasã yaa wẽng wakate." 
Ephesians5:17 Woto wã yĩnga, da yɩ-y ka-yam dãmb ye, bãng-y bũmb nins Zu-soabã sẽn data." 
Ephesians5:18 Da tɩg-y ne rãam ye, yõwã sãamda neda. Pid-y ne Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã." 
Ephesians5:19 Sõs-y ne taab ne yɩɩn-sõamyã, la ne Wẽnnaam yɩɩla, la ne Sɩɩg-sõng yɩɩla. Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y Zu-soabã ne y sũyã fãa." 
Ephesians5:20 Pʋʋs-y tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam bark bũmb fãa yĩnga, ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋre." 
Ephesians5:21 Sak-y taaba, yãmb sẽn zoet Kirisã yĩnga." 
Ephesians5:22 Pagba, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa sak a sɩda, a wa yãmb sẽn sakd Zu-soabã." 
Ephesians5:23 Bala, rao yaa a pag zu-soaba, a wa Kiris sẽn yaa bãmb tẽedbã Zu-soabã. Tẽedbã yaa Kiris yĩnga, tɩ Kiris ya tẽedbã fãagda." 
Ephesians5:24 Bɩ pag fãa me sak a sɩd ne bũmb fãa, a wa Kiris tẽedbã sẽn sakd Kiris to-to wã." 
Ephesians5:25 Raopã, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa nong a paga, a wa Kiris sẽn nong b tẽedbã, n kõ b meng b yĩnga," 
Ephesians5:26 n na n tõog n pek-b ne koom la ne bãmb goamã, n yɩlg-ba," 
Ephesians5:27 n kɩt tɩ bãmb tẽedbã sẽn tar ziirã yals bãmb taoor tɩ rẽgdo, wall yõbdo, wall bũmb sẽn wẽnd a woto ra zĩnd ye, la tɩ b na yɩ pʋ-peelem dãmb sẽn ka tar yell ye." 
Ephesians5:28 Woto me, raopã tog n nonga b pagbã wa b sẽn nong b mens yĩngã. Ned ning sẽn nong a pag nonga a menga." 
Ephesians5:29 Sɩd me, ned baa a yembr zɩ n kisg a meng ye. A rɩlgd-a a menga, n get a meng yell wa Kiris sẽn get b Kiris tẽedbã yelle," 
Ephesians5:30 tõnd sẽn yaa bãmb yĩngã wilã yĩngã. 
Ephesians5:31 Yaa rẽ yĩng la rao tog n yi n bas a ba ne a ma n zĩnd ne a paga, la b yiibã na n lebga yĩng a yembre." 
Ephesians5:32 Yel-solemd‑kãngã yaa kãsenga. Mam sẽn yet a woto wã, yaa sẽn kẽed ne Kiris la b tẽedbã wɛɛngẽ." 
Ephesians5:33 Sẽn keta, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa nong a pag wa a menga, la bɩ pag fãa waoog a sɩda." 
Ephesians6:1 Kamba, sak-y y ba-rãmb la y ma-rãmb wa Zu-soabã sẽn datã. Bala, bõn-kãng yaa tɩrga." 
Ephesians6:2 Ad pipi tõog sẽn naag ne kãabgo. A yetame yaa: Waoog f ba la f ma," 
Ephesians6:3 tɩ f tõe n paam sũ-noogo, la f vɩɩmd n kaoos dũni zugu." 
Ephesians6:4 La yãmb sẽn yaa ba-rãmbã, ra maan-y bũmb sẽn yikd y kambã sũy ye. Wub-y-ba, n sagl-ba, la y keoog-b wa sẽn zems Zu-soabã raabo." 
Ephesians6:5 Tʋmtʋmdba, sak-y sẽn so-b yãmb dũni ka wã ne y sũur fãa, ne rabeem la rigbu, wa yãmb sẽn sakd Kirisã," 
Ephesians6:6 la y ra maan bõn-kãng b nifẽ bala, tɩ ra wa ya wa yãmb maanda sẽn noom ninsaalbã ye. Sak-y bãmba yãmb sẽn yaa Kiris tʋmtʋmdb sẽn maand Wẽnnaam daabo ne y sũyã fãa wã yĩnga." 
Ephesians6:7 Tʋm-y b yĩng ne yamleoogo, wa y tʋmda Zu-soabã yĩnga, la ka wa ninsaal yĩng ye," 
Ephesians6:8 tɩ yãmb miime tɩ ned kam fãa na n deega a keoor Zu-soabã nengẽ, a wa sẽn zems tʋʋm-sõng ning a sẽn maanã, t'a yaa yamb wall burkĩna." 
Ephesians6:9 La sã n yaa ne yãmb sẽn yaa zu-soben-dãmbã, yãmb me tog n maana a woto ne y tʋmtʋmdbã. Da maan-y gãgs ne-b ye. Bala, yãmb miime tɩ bãmb ne yãmb me Zu-soabã bee arzãna, la tɩ Zu-soabã nifẽ, ned ka yɩɩd a to ye." 
Ephesians6:10 Sẽn keta, mam yeta yãmb tɩ y paam raood Zu-soabã tũudum pʋgẽ, bãmb pãn-kãsengã maasem yĩnga." 
Ephesians6:11 Bob-y zab-teed nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yãmbã, tɩ y tõe n yals kãenkãe n zab ne a Sʋtãana, a sɩlmã pʋgẽ." 
Ephesians6:12 Bala, tõnd zabr ka ne ninsaal sẽn yaa nemd la zɩɩmã ye, la yaa ne lik rĩm-dãmba la a pãens sẽn so naam tẽng zug ka wã, la wẽng maaneg sɩɩsã sẽn be yĩngrã." 
Ephesians6:13 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ y bob Wẽnnaam zab-teedã fãa, tɩ y tõe n yals n zab wẽngã wakate, la tɩ y sã n zab n tõog bũmb fãa, yãmb na yals kãenkãe." 
Ephesians6:14 Dẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ y yals kãenkãe. Rɩk-y sɩdã tɩ yɩ y sẽbdga, la y bob tɩrlem tɩ yɩ yãmb gãntika," 
Ephesians6:15 la y wid laafɩ koe-noogã togsg ratem tɩ yɩ yãmb neooda," 
Ephesians6:16 la y tall tẽeb tɩ yɩ y gãongo, tɩ y tar n kogsd wẽng soabã pɛɛmã fãa sẽn yaa wa bugmã," 
Ephesians6:17 la y fõgen fãagrã me tɩ yɩ kut pugla, la y zã Sɩɩgã sʋʋg sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam goamã." 
Ephesians6:18 Pʋʋs-y wakat fãa ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga, n pʋʋs ne kosgo n da bas ye. Nang-y pãng n maand a woto wakat fãa. Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam b nebã fãa yĩnga," 
Ephesians6:19 la mam me yĩnga. Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam tɩ wakat ning fãa mam sẽn na n yaag m noor n na n gome, bɩ b kõ maam gomd sẽn na kɩt tɩ nebã bãng koe-noogã yel-solemdã võore, la tɩ m na gom ne raoodo." 
Ephesians6:20 Mam yaa koe-noogã toagsda, tɩ b balg maam a poorẽ. Pʋʋs-y tɩ m tõog n gom a yell ne raood wa m sẽn tog n gomã." 
Ephesians6:21 Tõnd ba-bi-nongr a Tisik sẽn yaa Zu-soabã tʋmtʋmd sẽn maand sɩdã na n wilga yãmb bũmb fãa, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb me bãng mam yelle, la bũmb nins mam sẽn maanda." 
Ephesians6:22 Mam yiis-a lame n tʋm yãmb nengẽ, tɩ y bãng tõnd kibare, la t'a na bels yãmb sũyã." 
Ephesians6:23 Bɩ tõnd Ba a Wẽnnaam la d Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris kõ d ba-biisã zĩnd-n-taar laafɩ la nonglem, b sẽn tar tẽebã yĩnga." 
Ephesians6:24 Bɩ neb nins fãa sẽn nong tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ne nonglem sẽn ka tekdã paam barka. 
Philippians1:1 Maam a Poll ne a Tɩmote sẽn yaa a Zezi-Kiris nonglem yembsã n tʋmd seb-kãngã Wẽnnaam nebã fãa sẽn tẽed a Zeezi Kirisã la karen-saam-dãmba ne yel-gɛtbã sẽn be Filip tẽngã. 
Philippians1:2 Bɩ y reeg bark la laafɩ sẽn yit tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam ne Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ. 
Philippians1:3 Wakat fãa mam sẽn tẽegd yãmb yelle, mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark y yĩnga." 
Philippians1:4 Mam pʋʋsda yãmb fãa yĩng wakat fãa ne sũ-noog n ka basdẽ ye," 
Philippians1:5 yãmb sẽn sõngd ne koe-noogã tʋʋmd hal sẽn sɩng daar ning yãmb sẽn wʋm-a, tɩ ta moasã wã yĩnga." 
Philippians1:6 Mam mii hakɩɩk tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn sɩng tʋʋm sõng-kãng yãmb sũyã pʋsã na n kell n maan-a lame n baase, hal tɩ ta a Zeezi Kiris daarã."
