Philippians1:7 A Zemsame tɩ mam paam tagsg a woto yãmb fãa yĩnga, bala, mam yam bee ne yãmb sõama, bala, sã n yaa mam sẽn be bi-bees roog pʋg moasã wã, wall sã n yaa mam sẽn da gomd n wilgdẽ tɩ koe-noogã yaa sɩdã, yãmb fãa lagemda ne maam n paamd bark a yembre." 
Philippians1:8 Bala, Wẽnnaam yaa mam kaset soab tɩ mam nonga yãmb fãa ne a Zeezi Kiris nonglem," 
Philippians1:9 la mam sẽn pʋʋsd n kot bũmb ninga, yaa tɩ yãmb nonglem na paasd daar fãa n yɩɩda, ne bãngre la yam-vẽnegre." 
Philippians1:10 Tɩ woto, yãmb na n bãnga bũmb ning sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩda sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Kiris waoongã daare, bɩ y yɩ neb sẽn yaa sɩd dãmb tɩ rõadg kaẽ ye," 
Philippians1:11 n pid ne tɩrlem biis sẽn yit a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ, Wẽnnaam waoogre la b pẽgr yĩnga." 
Philippians1:12 M ba-biisi, mam datame tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ bũmb nins sẽn paam maamã kɩtame tɩ koe-noogã saag n yɩɩda." 
Philippians1:13 Sɩd me, na-yirã nebã fãa la zĩiga fãa nebã bãngame tɩ yaa mam sẽn maand Kiris tʋʋmdã yĩng la b balg maam." 
Philippians1:14 Ba-biisã kẽer sẽn tũud Zu-soabã fãa paama raood mam balgrã yĩnga, n moon Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã ne raood n ka zoe rabeem ye." 
Philippians1:15 Yaa sɩd tɩ neb kẽer moonda a Kiris koɛɛgã sũ-kiir la geesem-geesem yĩnga. La neb kẽer moond-a-la ne yam sẽn yaa sõama. 
Philippians1:16 Bãmb dãmba moonda ne nonglem, b sẽn mi tɩ Wẽnnaam yãka maam tɩ m gom koe-noogã yĩngã." 
Philippians1:17 La neb a tãabã yaool n moonda Kiris koɛɛgã ne geesem-geesem, la ka ne pʋ-peelem ye. La b tẽedame tɩ bõn-kãng na n paasa maam namsg m balgrã pʋgẽ." 
Philippians1:18 Dẽ, ka yell ye, baa sẽn yaa bũmb ning fãa, sã n yaa ne yam-wẽng wall yaa ne pʋ-peelem, b baas n moonda Kiris koɛɛgã, la mam maanda sũ-noog bõn-kãng yĩnga. La m na n leb n maana sũ-noog yɛsa." 
Philippians1:19 Bala, yãmb pʋʋsgã la a Zeezi Sɩɩgã sõngrã yĩnga, mam miime tɩ bõn-kãng na n wẽneg n waa ne mam yolsgo." 
Philippians1:20 Wa sẽn zems mam datem la m tẽeb pidsg gũudmã, bũmb ba a yembr yãnd ka na n yõk maam ye. Moasã ne wakat fãa, mam na n goma ne pɛl-kɛgenga. Woto, Kiris na n paama waoogr mam yĩngã pʋgẽ, sã n yaa mam sẽn vɩ wall m sẽn ki." 
Philippians1:21 Bala, ne maam, Kiris yaa mam vɩɩm. La tɩ ki yaa yõod ne maam." 
Philippians1:22 La mam sẽn na n kell n vɩ m yĩngã pʋgẽ wã sã n tara yõod ne mam tʋʋmdã, mam ka mi m sẽn yãkd a soab ye. Bũmb a yiib ratem n tar maam." 
Philippians1:23 Mam dat n loog n kẽnga Kiris nengẽ. Rẽnda n yaa neer wʋsg ne maam. 
Philippians1:24 La yãmb yĩnga, mam sẽn na n kell n vɩɩmd n yaa sõama n yɩɩda." 
Philippians1:25 Mam sũur keemame. La mam miime tɩ mam na n kell n paa me, la m na n zĩnda yãmb fãa sʋk n sõng-y tɩ y kẽng taoore la y paam sũ-noog tẽebã pʋgẽ." 
Philippians1:26 Mam sã n leb n wa yãmb nengẽ, a na n kõo yãmb waoogr yɛs mam yĩnga, a Zeezi Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ." 
Philippians1:27 Bũmb sẽn be bala, kɩt-y tɩ yãmb tʋʋmã zems ne Kiris koe-noogã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ mam sã n wa n na ges yãmba, wall m sã n ka wa, bɩ m wʋm yãmb kibar sẽn yet tɩ y yasa kãenkãe ne yam a yembre, n lagemd taab ne tagsg a yembr n zabd koe-noogã tẽeb yĩnga." 
Philippians1:28 La y ka sakd n bas tɩ y bɛɛba kẽes yãmb rabeem ne bũmb baa yembr ye. Bõn-kãng yaa kaset bãmb yĩng tɩ b na n sãamame, la a yaa fãagr yãmb yĩnga. Rẽ yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Philippians1:29 Bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn maan bark ning Kiris maasem yĩngã, ka tɩ yãmb tẽ Kirisã bal ye, yaa tɩ yãmb na nams bãmb yʋʋrã yĩng me," 
Philippians1:30 n maood maoor ning yãmb sẽn yã tɩ mam maoome wã, la y wʋmd moasã tɩ mam maoodame wã." 
Philippians2:1 Dẽ yĩnga, sã n yaa tɩ tũ Kiris wata ne belsgo, sã n yaa tɩ Kiris nonglem yãmb yĩngã paasda yãmb raoodo, sã n yaa tɩ yãmb tara lagem-n-taar ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, la sã n yaa tɩ yãb-taab ne nimbãan-zoeer beeme," 
Philippians2:2 bɩ y paam nonglem a yembre, la yam a yembre, la datem a yembre, tɩ mam sũurã yɩ noog zãnga." 
Philippians2:3 Da maan-y bũmb baa fɩ ne geesem-geesem wall ne wuk-m-meng ye, la bɩ ned kam fãa paam sik-m-meng yam n tags tɩ neb a taaba yɩɩda yẽnda." 
Philippians2:4 Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa ra ges a meng sõngr yell bal ye, la bɩ a ges neb a taaba sõngr yell me." 
Philippians2:5 Paam-y yam ning a Zeezi Kiris sẽn da tarã. 
Philippians2:6 Bãmb sẽn dag n tar Wẽnnaam yalẽ wã, b ka tags tɩ bãmb sẽn zem ne Wẽnnaamã," 
Philippians2:7 yaa bũmb b sẽn tog n gãd kãenkãe ye. La a Zeezi basa b naam n lebg wa yãmba, n dɩk yĩng wa ninsaalb wẽneg n wa wala ninsaala." 
Philippians2:8 A Zeezi sika b menga, halɩ n sak kũum, n ki da-pɩkã zugu." 
Philippians2:9 Yaa woto yĩng me n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam zẽk bãmb ne waoogr sẽn yaa kãsenga, n kõ-b yʋʋr sẽn yɩɩd yʋyã fãa," 
Philippians2:10 tɩ ne a Zeezi yʋʋre, rũma fãa sẽn be saasẽ-saasẽ, la sẽn be tẽngã zugu, la sẽn be kɩɩm-kulgã na n yĩgimdame," 
Philippians2:11 la tɩ zɛlmã fãa na n kɩsa kaset t'a Zeezi Kiris yaa fãagda, tɩ yɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga." 
Philippians2:12 Woto, m zo-nongdse, wa yãmb sẽn sak wakat fãa wã, bɩ y tʋm fãagrã tʋʋm ne rabeem la rigbu, la ka mam sẽn da be yãmb sʋkã bal ye, la bɩ y tʋm moasã mam sẽn ka be yãmb sʋkã n yɩɩda." 
Philippians2:13 Bala, yaa Wẽnnaam n maand b tʋʋmd yãmb pʋsẽ, la b kõt yãmb ratmã, la pãng tɩ maan wa sẽn zems bãmb daabã." 
Philippians2:14 Maan-y bũmba fãa tɩ yẽgeng ne no-koɛɛm kaẽ ye. 
Philippians2:15 Tɩ yãmb na yɩ neb sẽn ka tar yelle, la sẽn yaa yɩlma. Tɩ yãmb na yɩ Wẽnnaam kamb sẽn ka tar rõadg ye, zamaan‑kãnga nebã sẽn sãam la sẽn yaa wẽnsã sʋka, yãmb yãgda bãmb sʋk wa vẽenem dũniyã pʋga," 
Philippians2:16 n zãad vɩɩm koɛɛgã bãmb yĩnga. Dẽ, Kiris waoongã daare, mam tõe n maana sũ-noogo, mam zoeesã ne m maoorã sẽn ka yɩ zaalmã yĩnga." 
Philippians2:17 La baa b sã n dɩk maam n bas wa b sẽn basd koom maoong zĩigẽ, n paas maam ne maoong ning la kũun nins yãmb sẽn kõt Wẽnnaam y sẽn tẽed bãmbã yĩnga, mam maanda sũ-noog ne bõn-kãnga, la m naagda yãmb fãa n kɩdemdẽ." 
Philippians2:18 Bɩ yãmb me maan sũ-noog a woto n naag maam n kɩdme. 
Philippians2:19 Mam tẽedame tɩ ne Zu-soaba a Zeezi sõngre, sã n yɩ bilfu, mam na n tʋma a Tɩmote yãmb nengẽ n bãng yãmb kibare tɩ bõn-kãng tõe n kõ maam daoodo." 
Philippians2:20 Bala, mam ka tar ned sẽn tar yam a yembr ne maam n na sɩd ges yãmb yellã neer ye." 
Philippians2:21 Sɩd me, b fãa geta b mens yɛlã yelle, n ka baood a Zeezi Kiris rẽndã ye." 
Philippians2:22 Yãmb miime t'a Tɩmote wilga a zemsgo, n zĩnd mam sɛɛgẽ wa biig sẽn be ne a ba, n naag maam koe-noogã tʋʋmd pʋgẽ." 
Philippians2:23 Dẽ, mam tagsdame tɩ mam sã wa bãng m yellã sẽn na n yɩ to-to, m na n tʋm-a-la yãmb nengẽ." 
Philippians2:24 La mam tar tẽeb ne Zu-soabã tɩ sã n yɩ bilfu, mam meng na n waa n gesa yãmba." 
Philippians2:25 Mam tagsame tɩ yaa neer tɩ m lebg n tʋm a Epafordit sẽn yaa mam tʋmd-n-taagã la m soda-taagã t'a wa yãmb nengẽ. Yãmb dag n toola yẽnda sõngr t'a wa n kõ maam. 
Philippians2:26 Yẽnda rag n data ne a sũur fãa n yãnd yãmb fãa, la a sũurã sãama wʋsgo yãmb sẽn wʋm a pa-keema yĩnga." 
Philippians2:27 A Epafordit sɩd lʋɩɩ bãag n da kolg kũum fãa-fãa, la Wẽnnaam zoee yẽnda nimbãanega, la ka yẽnda bal nimbãaneg ye, la yaa mam me nimbãanega, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ mam da paam sũ-sãang n paas ye." 
Philippians2:28 Rẽ wã, mam tʋmda yẽnda ne yãgb wʋsg yãmb nengẽ, tɩ yãmb sã n yãnd-a bɩ y leb n paam sũ-noogo, tɩ mam menga sũ-sãangã na booge." 
Philippians2:29 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y reeg-a ne sũ-no-kãseng wa y ba-biig Zu-soaba pʋga, la y waoog neb nins sẽn yaa a woto wã." 
Philippians2:30 Bala, yaa Kiris tʋʋmdã yĩng la a sẽn da na n ki wã. Yẽnda gẽnega a yõor n sõng maam ne sõngr ning yãmb sẽn da tog n sõng maam n ka tõogã." 
Philippians3:1 La koɛɛg sẽn keta m ba-biisi, maan-y sũ-noog Zu-soaba tũudum pʋgẽ. Mam ka yɛɛd tɩ leb n gʋls yãmb bõn-kãens ye. La yaa yãmb sõngr yĩnga." 
Philippians3:2 Gũus-y y mens ne neb nins sẽn wẽnd wa baasã, la y gũus ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã la ne sẽn kẽ-b bãong yĩng wɛɛngẽ wã balã." 
Philippians3:3 Bala, tõnd sẽn waoogd Wẽnnaam ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga, n maand sũ-noog a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ, n ka teegd yĩngã tʋʋmã, yaa tõnd la zũns sɩd-sɩda." 
Philippians3:4 Sã n yaa yĩng tʋʋm teegre, mam me ra tõe n teega yĩnga tʋʋma. Neb a taab sã n tẽed tɩ b tõe n teega yĩnga tʋʋma, mam n yɩɩda." 
Philippians3:5 Mam lebga zũng mam sẽn wa n tar rasem a nii, mam yaa Israyɛll neda, n yaa a Benzame buudu la Ebre meng-menga. La sã n yaa ne tõog wɛɛngẽ, mam yaa Fariizẽ." 
Philippians3:6 La wɩngr ne Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã wɛɛngẽ, mam namsa Kiris tẽedbã, la ne tɩrlem tõog sakr wɛɛngẽ, ned ka tõe n dõd maam ye." 
Philippians3:7 La bõn-kãens sẽn dag n yaa yõod ne maamã, mam geelga bãmb wa bũmb sẽn ka tar yõodo, Kirisã yĩnga." 
Philippians3:8 La mam sẽn bãng m fãagd a Zeezi Kiris tɩ rẽ ya sõma wʋsgã, mam pʋs n gesa bõn-kãens fãa wa bũmb sẽn ka yõodo. Kirisã yĩnga, mam sakame n bas fãa, n geelgd bũmb fãa wa sagdo tɩ m tõe n paam Kirisi," 
Philippians3:9 la m zĩnd bãmb pʋgẽ. Ka ne mam meng tɩrlem, mam sẽn sak tõog n paamã ye, la yaa ne tɩrlem ning ned sẽn paamda, a sẽn tẽed Kirisã yĩnga, tɩrlem sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ, la sẽn paamd ne tẽebo." 
Philippians3:10 Mam sẽn dat fãa yaa tɩ bãng Kirisã ne bãmb kũum vʋʋgrã pãnga la m naag bãmb n paam namsgo, n lebg yembr ne bãmb b kũumã pʋgẽ," 
Philippians3:11 tɩ m sã n tõog bɩ m paam vʋʋgr n yi kũum sʋka. 
Philippians3:12 Ka tɩ mam zoe n paama m rolbã nanda, wall m tõog n zemsa zãng nand ye. La mam ket n kẽngda taoore, n maoodẽ tɩ gãd-a, bala a Zeezi Kiris zoe n gãda maam." 
Philippians3:13 M ba-biisi, mam ka tagsd tɩ mam zoe n paama rolbã nand ye, la mam maanda bũmb a yembre: mam yĩmda bũmb nins sẽn be poorẽ wã n nangd pãng n na n paam bũmb nins sẽn be taoorã." 
Philippians3:14 Mam zoet n dabda taoore, n dat n paam Wẽnnaam arzãn boolg rolbã a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga." 
Philippians3:15 Dẽ, tõnd fãa sẽn yaa tẽedb sẽn bɩ wã, bɩ d paam tags-kãngã bala. La yãmb sã n tara tagsg a to ne bũmb a taaba, Wẽnnaam na n vẽnega yãmb ne bõn-kãng sẽn yaa a soab me." 
Philippians3:16 La bũmb sẽn be bala, tõnd sẽn kẽn n ta zĩig ninga wã, d kell n naag taab n kẽne." 
Philippians3:17 M ba-biisi, bɩ yãmb fãa yɩ mam togs-n-taase. Ges-y neb nins sẽn kẽnd wa sẽn zems mamsg ning tõnd sẽn wilg yãmbã." 
Philippians3:18 Mam dag n togsa yãmb naoor wʋsgo, la m leb n yet-a-la yãmb ne nintãm tɩ neb wʋsg n be tɩ b kẽna wilgdẽ tɩ b yaa Kiris da-pɩkã bɛɛba." 
Philippians3:19 Bãmb baoosg na n yɩɩ sãoongo, bãmb pʋsã n yaa b wẽnnaam, bãmb maanda sũ-noog ne bũmb ning sẽn yaa yãnd b yĩngã. B ka tagsd bũmb tɩ sã n ka dũniyã yɛl bal ye." 
Philippians3:20 La tõndo, tõnd yir bee arzãna, la tõnd gũuda tõnd fãagd sẽn yaa Zu-soab a Zeezi Kirisã tɩ b yi be n wa." 
Philippians3:21 Bãmb na n teka tõnd yĩn-põaagdgã t'a lebg wa bãmb waoogr yĩngã, ne pãng ning bãmb sẽn tar tɩ sek tɩ tõog bũmb fãa tɩ b sak bãmbã." 
Philippians4:1 Woto yĩnga, m ba-bi-nongdse, mam sẽn tʋlg ne m sũur fãa tɩ leb n yãnd yãmb sẽn yaa mam sũ-noog la m maanfã, bɩ y yals a woto kãenkãe Zu-soabã tũudum pʋga m zo-nongdse." 
Philippians4:2 Mam sagenda a Evodi ne a Sẽntiis tɩ b paam yam a yembr Zu-soabã tũudum pʋgẽ. 
Philippians4:3 La foom me, m tʋmd-n-ta-sõngo, mam kota foom tɩ f sõng pʋg-kãense. B ra tʋma ne maam koe-noogã yĩnga, ne a Kelma la ne mam tũud-n-taas a taabã yʋy sẽn be vɩɩm sebrã pʋgẽ wã." 
Philippians4:4 Maan-y sũ-noog daar fãa Zu-soabã tũudum pʋgẽ. Mam leb n yetame, maan-y sũ-noogo." 
Philippians4:5 Kɩt-y tɩ nebã fãa bãng yãmb sũ-bʋgsem. Zu-soabã waoong kolgame. 
Philippians4:6 Da maan-y yɩɩr ne bũmb baa fʋɩ ye. La bũmba fãa pʋga, pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam n kose la y pʋʋs barka la y wilg Wẽnnaam bũmb nins yãmb sẽn datã." 
Philippians4:7 La Wẽnnaam laafɩ wã sẽn yɩɩd ninsaalbã bãngr fãa wã na n gũu yãmb sũyã ne y tagsdã a Zeezi Kiris pʋga. 
Philippians4:8 Koɛɛg sẽn keta, m ba-biisi, bɩ y tags bũmb nins fãa sẽn yaa sɩda, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn tar waoogre, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn yaa tɩrse, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn be pʋ-peelem, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn zems nonglem, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn tar kaset sõngo, ne bũmb nins sẽn yaa neer zãng n zems pẽgrã yelle." 
Philippians4:9 Maan-y bũmb nins yãmb sẽn zãms la y reege, la y wʋm la y yã mam nengẽ wã. La Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa laafɩ soabã na zĩnd ne yãmba." 
Philippians4:10 Mam maana sũ-noog Zu-soabã tũudum pʋgẽ, m sẽn yã tɩ yãmb leb n geta mam yell moasã wã yĩnga. Sɩdã, yãmb da tagsda mam yelle, la y ka paam weer n maan bũmb ye." 
Philippians4:11 Ka mam sẽn ka tar bũmbã yĩng la m sẽn gomd a woto wã ye, tɩ bõe mam zãmsame tɩ maan sũ-noog ne bũmb ning mam sẽn tarã bala." 
Philippians4:12 Mam miime tɩ vɩɩmd naong pʋga, la m miime tɩ vɩɩmd arzɛk pʋg me. Bũmba fãa pʋga, la zĩiga fãa mam zãmsame tɩ rɩ n tɩge la tɩ gãand kom me. Mam zãmsame tɩ paam wʋsgo la tɩ konge." 
Philippians4:13 Kiris sẽn kõt maam b pãngã yĩnga, mam tõe n maana fãa." 
Philippians4:14 La baoosgo, yãmb maana neer y sẽn sõng maam m yel-pakrã pʋgẽ wã." 
Philippians4:15 Filip nebã, yãmb mens tẽrame tɩ koe-noogã mooneg sɩngrẽ, mam sẽn wa n yit Masedoannã, sã n ka yãmb bala, Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be zĩig ba a yembr ka naag maam m paoong pʋgẽ wall m naong pʋgẽ ye." 
Philippians4:16 Yaa yãmb bal n maan a woto. Bala, mam sẽn da be Tesalonikã yãmb da zoe n tʋma sõngr sẽn yɩɩd vugr n kõ maam." 
Philippians4:17 Ka tɩ mam baooda kũun ye, mam sẽn baood bũmb ninga yaa tɩ yãmb wom biis wʋsgo. Rẽnda n na n yɩ yãmb yõodo." 
Philippians4:18 Mam deega fãa la m tara wʋsgo. Mam sẽn deeg bũmb nins yãmb sẽn tʋm a Epafordit t'a kõ maamã, mam tarame tɩ sek n gɩmbe. Kũun-kãens yaa wa kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la maoong Wẽnnaam sẽn deegda la sẽn tat bãmb yam." 
Philippians4:19 Mam Wẽnnaam na kõ yãmb bũmb fãa tɩ sek-yã wa sẽn zems bãmb arzeg-kãsemsã a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga. 
Philippians4:20 Bɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam paam waoogr daar fãa, wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Ãmina." 
Philippians4:21 Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam nebã fãa sẽn tũud a Zeezi Kirisã. Ba-biis nins sẽn be ne maamã pʋʋsda yãmba. 
Philippians4:22 Wẽnnaam nebã fãa pʋʋsda yãmba, la neb nins sẽn be Sezaar zakẽ wã n toond yãmb b pʋʋsem n yɩɩda." 
Philippians4:23 Bɩ Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris barkã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. 
Colossians1:1 Maam a poll sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmd wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam daabã ne ba-biig a Tɩmote 
Colossians1:2 n tʋmd seb‑kãnga Wẽnnaam nebã sẽn yaa tõnd ba-biis sẽn maand sɩd Kiris tũudma pʋgẽ n be Koloosã nengẽ. Bɩ y paam bark la laafɩ sẽn yit tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam nengẽ. 
Colossians1:3 Tõnd pʋʋsda tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ba a Wẽnnaam barka, la d pʋʋsd yãmb yĩng n ka basdẽ ye." 
Colossians1:4 Sɩd me, tõnd wʋmame tɩ b gomd yãmb tẽeb ne a Zeezi Kirisã yelle, la nonglem ning yãmb sẽn tar Wẽnnaam nebã fãa yĩngã yelle," 
Colossians1:5 tẽeb pidsg gũudum ning b sẽn bĩng yãmb yĩng arzãn pʋgẽ wã yĩnga. Sɩd koɛɛgã sẽn yaa koe-noogã sẽn pĩnd n kɩt tɩ yãmb bãngã. 
Colossians1:6 Koe-no-kãng taa yãmb nengẽ. A sẽn womd biis la a kẽngd taoor to-to dũniyã tɛk fãa wã, a maanda a woto me yãmb nengẽ hal sẽn sɩng ne daar ning yãmb sẽn wʋm la y bãng Wẽnnaam barkã wa sẽn zems sɩda," 
Colossians1:7 la sẽn zems sagls nins tõnd tʋmd-n-ta-nongr a Epafras sẽn gʋls yãmbã. Yẽnda yaa Kiris tʋmtʋmd sẽn moond sɩda, n tʋmd yãmb yĩnga." 
Colossians1:8 A wilga tõnd nonglem ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb tarẽ wã. 
Colossians1:9 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ sẽn sɩng ne daar ning tõnd me sẽn wʋm kiba-kãngã wã, tõnd pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam yãmb yĩng n ka basdẽ ye, la d kot Wẽnnaam tɩ b pids yãmb sũyã ne bãmb daabã bãngre, la b kõ yãmb yam fãa, ne bãngr ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõtã." 
Colossians1:10 Kɩt-y tɩ y kẽnã waoogd Zu-soabã, tɩ y tõe n ta bãmb yam bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, la y wom biis ne tʋʋm‑sõama buud fãa, la y bɩ Wẽnnaam bãngr pʋgẽ." 
Colossians1:11 Tõnd kota Wẽnnaam, tɩ yãmb na paam pãng n paase, bãmb pãn-kãsengã maasem yĩnga, tɩ yãmb tõe n yɩ neb sẽn kẽngd taoor sɩd-sɩda, la sẽn tar sũ-mare." 
Colossians1:12 Pʋʋs-y tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam bark ne sũ-noogo, bãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb tõe n naag ne bãmb nebã n paam pʋɩɩr vẽenemã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Colossians1:13 Bãmb fãaga tõnd n yiis likã pãngẽ, n tall-d n kẽng b bi-ribl-nongrã soolmẽ," 
Colossians1:14 soab ning maasem yĩng tõnd sẽn paam fãagre, la yel-wẽna sugrã." 
Colossians1:15 Kiris yaa Wẽnnaam, soab ning ned sẽn ka tõe n yãnda wã wẽnego, la bũmb nins fãa b sẽn naanã dẽenem soaba." 
Colossians1:16 Bala, bãmb n naan bũmb nins fãa sẽn be yĩngr wall tẽng zugu, sẽn be yãab la sẽn ka tõe n yã, naam gɛyã, rĩm-dãmba, pãn-soaadba, la noyã. Bãmb n naan fãa b mengã yĩnga." 
Colossians1:17 Bãmb denga bũmba fãa n beẽ, la yaa bãmb pʋgẽ la bũmb fãa yalsd a zĩigẽ." 
Colossians1:18 Bãmb yaa Kiris tẽedbã sẽn yaa bãmb yĩngã zugu. Bãmb la bũmb fãa sɩngre, sẽn yɩ-a pipi n vʋʋg n bas kũum, tɩ bãmb tõe n yɩ dẽenem soab bũmb fãa pʋgẽ." 
Colossians1:19 Bala, a taa Wẽnnaam yam tɩ kɩt tɩ bãmb sẽn yaa bũmb ning fãa, bɩ a Zeezi me yɩ a woto," 
Colossians1:20 la b kɩt t'a Zeezi wa ne zems-n-taar bãmb a Wẽnnaam ne bũmb fãa sʋka, sã n yaa sẽn be tẽng zugu wall sẽn be yĩngri, n kɩt tɩ bãmb maasem yĩnga, bɩ laafɩ zĩndi, bãmb zɩɩmã sẽn daag da-pɩkã zugã yĩnga." 
Colossians1:21 La yãmb sẽn dag n yaa sãamb la y ya bɛɛb y tagsdã ne y tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩng pĩndã," 
Colossians1:22 moasã, Wẽnnaam yiisa yell ning sẽn da be yãmb ne bãmb sʋkã, a Zeezi yĩn-kiidgã kũum maasem yĩnga, tɩ b tõe n tall yãmb n wa b taoor ne pʋ-peelem, tɩ y ka tar yelle, la tɩ rõdb kaẽ ye." 
Colossians1:23 Yãmb sã n sɩd pa tẽebã pʋgẽ, la y kɩ yẽg n yals kãenkãe tɩ bũmb da wa n zãag yãmb ne koe-noogã tẽeb pidsg gũudum ning yãmb sẽn wʋma, sẽn yaa koe-noog ning b sẽn moon ninsaalbã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã, koe-noog ning maam a Poll sẽn lebg a tʋmtʋmdã." 
Colossians1:24 Moasã, mam maanda sũ-noogo, m sẽn be namsg pʋg yãmb yĩngã yĩnga, la mam yĩngã pʋgẽ, m pidsda Kiris namsg nins sẽn paooge, b sẽn dag n tog n nams b tẽedbã sẽn yaa bãmb yĩngã yĩngã." 
Colossians1:25 Yaa Kiris tẽedbã yĩng la mam lebg karen-saamba. Wẽnnaam n ning mam zug tɩ m moon yãmb bãmb koɛɛgã zãnga. 
Colossians1:26 Koe-no-kãng yaa yel-solemd sẽn solg wakat fãa, la sẽn solg ne zamaan dãmba fãa, n yaool n puk-a moasã ne bãmb nebã." 
Colossians1:27 Wẽnnaam n tʋlg n kɩt tɩ b nebã bãng yel-solem-kãngã arzɛkã sẽn tar ziir bu-zẽmsã sʋkã, dat n togs tɩ Kiris sẽn be yãmb pʋsẽ wã, b na n pidsa tẽeb gũudum ning sẽn yaa ziirã." 
Colossians1:28 Yaa Kiris koɛɛg la tõnd moonda, n keoogd ned buud fãa la d zãmsd ned kam fãa ne yam buud fãa, tɩ tõnd tõe n kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa zems zãng Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ." 
Colossians1:29 Yaa bõn-kãng yĩng la mam tʋmda, n tar bãmb pãngã sẽn maand a tʋʋmd mam pʋgẽ ne pãn‑kãsengã n maoodẽ." 
Colossians2:1 Sɩd me, mam datame tɩ yãmb bãng zab-kãseng ning mam sẽn zabd yãmb yĩngã, la neb nins sẽn be Laodiise, la neb nins fãa sẽn nan ka yã mam nengã yĩnga." 
Colossians2:2 Mam maoodame tɩ b sũyã tõe n paam belsgo, tɩ b tõe n lagem taab nonglem pʋgẽ n paam yam n bãng sɩd-sɩda, n bãng Wẽnnaam yel-sõmdã sẽn yaa Kirisã." 
Colossians2:3 Yam vẽnegr ne bãngrã arzegsã fãa solga Kiris pʋgẽ. 
Colossians2:4 Mam togsda bõn-kãng tɩ ned da wa n belg yãmb ne sɩlem n tõog ye. 
Colossians2:5 Bala, baa mam yĩngã sã n zãr ne yãmba, mam yam bee ne yãmba, mam sũur yaa noog mam sẽn ne yel-manesem sõngã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, la yãmb tẽebã sẽn ya kãenkãe Kiris pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Colossians2:6 Woto yĩnga, yãmb sẽn deeg Zu-soab a Zeezi Kirisã, kẽn-y ne bãmba." 
Colossians2:7 Kɩ-y yẽga, n yals kãenkãe Kiris pʋga, n tall tẽeb kãenkãe wa sẽn zems zãmsg nins b sẽn dag n zãms yãmbã, la y pʋʋs bark wʋsgo." 
Colossians2:8 Gũus-y tɩ ned da belg yãmb ne zãmsg buudu, la ninsaalb minind n zãag ye, bõn-kãens yaa dũniyã yɛla, la a ka Kiris rẽnd ye." 
Colossians2:9 Bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bũmb ningã fãa, Kiris me yaa a woto b yĩngã pʋgẽ." 
Colossians2:10 La yãmb tara bũmb fãa bãmb pʋg tɩ seke, bãmb sẽn yaa nanambs fãa Naaba la noyã fãa Zu-soabã." 
Colossians2:11 Bãmb pʋgẽ me, b kẽesa yãmb bãongo, la ka bãong sẽn kẽes ne ninsaalb nus ye, rat n togs tɩ yaa Kiris bãong sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb bas y yĩngã ratmã." 
Colossians2:12 Yãmb muma ne Kirisi, b sẽn lis yãmbã pʋgẽ, la b naaga yãmb bãmb pʋgẽ n vʋʋg n bas kũum, yãmb sẽn tẽ Wẽnnaam pãngã sẽn vʋʋg Kiris n bas kũumã yĩnga." 
Colossians2:13 Pĩnda, yãmb sẽn dag n yaa bɛɛgdb y kongrã ne y sẽn ka kẽ bãong y yĩngã pʋgẽ wã yĩngã, Wẽnnaam kõo yãmb vɩɩm ne Kiris n kõ tõnd beegrã fãa sugri." 
Colossians2:14 Bãmb yẽesa tõod nins b sẽn da gʋls n kaood tõnd bʋʋdã la sẽn da mongd tõnd bʋʋma Wẽnnaam menesa tõ-kãng wakat ning b sẽn ka a Zeezi da-pɩkã zugã. 
Colossians2:15 Kiris sãama pãens rãmba ne noyã pãnga, n wilg nebã fãa tɩ b tõog-b-la ne da-pɩkã." 
Colossians2:16 Dẽ wã yĩnga, da sak-y tɩ ned kao yãmb bʋʋd ne yãmb sẽn dɩt bũmb ning wɛɛngẽ wall y sẽn yũud bũmb ninga, wall tigrã wall kiu-paalga wall vʋʋsg daar wɛɛngẽ ye." 
Colossians2:17 Bõn-kãens fãa yaa bũmb nins sẽn na n wa wã mamsg bala, la bũmba meng-meng yaa Kirisi." 
Colossians2:18 Da sak-y tɩ ned sẽn maand wa a yaa sik-m-meng soaba la sẽn pʋʋsd malegs belg yãmb wa a sẽn date, n kɩt tɩ y kong y zoeesa keoor ye. Ned a woto buud teegda yãab buud toay-toaya, t'a ninsaalem tagsdã kɩt t'a pid ne wuk-m-meng zaalem" 
Colossians2:19 la a ka tongd a meng ne zug ning sẽn sõngd yĩngã tõrã ne a kõb-sũgdsã la a gĩina t'a bɩt bɩʋʋng sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã ye. 
Colossians2:20 Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb kii ne Kirisã, tɩ Kiris yols yãmb ne tẽeb buud toay-toayã yembdo, bõe tɩ yãmb bas tɩ b leb n modgd yãmb tɩ y sak tõod a woto sẽn ya:" 
Colossians2:21 «Da rɩk-y ye! Da lemb-y ye! Da sɩɩs-y ye!» 
Colossians2:22 Bõn-kãens b sẽn tar n tʋmdẽ wã sãamdame. Bõn-kãens yaa yeelsem la zãmsg ninsaalb sẽn tar n zãmsd taaba. 
Colossians2:23 Yaa sɩd tɩ ned sã n get yeelsmã ne zãmsgã, b wẽnda wa b yaa yam tʋʋma, b sẽn wilgd wẽn-tũudum sẽn maand ne yamleoogo, la sik-m-menga, la tõog-m-menga. La b yaool n ka tar yõod n tõe n sõng ned t'a tõog a yĩngã ratem wẽng ye." 
Colossians3:1 Dẽ, sã n yaa tɩ yãmb naaga ne Kirisã, n vʋʋge, bɩ y bao bũmb nins sẽn be arzãna, zĩig ning Kiris sẽn zao Wẽnnaam dɩtgã." 
Colossians3:2 Tags-y bũmb nins sẽn be arzãnã yelle, la y ra tags bũmb nins sẽn be dũni zugã yell ye." 
Colossians3:3 Bala, yãmb kiime, la yãmb vɩɩmã solga ne Kirisã Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Colossians3:4 Kirisã sẽn yaa yãmb vɩɩmã sã n wa n puki, dẽ, yãmb me na n naaga bãmb b ziirã pʋgẽ n puki." 
Colossians3:5 Dẽ wã yĩnga, kɩt-y tɩ y dũni ka yalẽ wã ki. Yaa yoobo, tʋʋm-rẽgdo, wẽng maaneg ratem, datem wẽnse, la rat-wʋsgo, sẽn yaa wa wẽn-naands pʋʋsgo." 
Colossians3:6 Yaa rẽnda yĩng la Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr wat kɩɩsdbã zutu. 
Colossians3:7 Yãmb sẽn dag n vɩ yel-wẽn-kãens pʋgã, yãmb dag n maanda bõn-kãense." 
Colossians3:8 La moasã, bɩ yãmb me kɩɩs bõn-kãensã fãa: Yaa sũ-kãbre, pʋ-toogo, tẽn-kãnem la gom-dẽgd sẽn tõe n yi yãmb noorẽ wã." 
Colossians3:9 Da yag-y taab zĩrẽ ye. Bala, yãmb yeega y yalẽ-kʋdgã ne a tʋʋma," 
Colossians3:10 la y yelg yalẽ paalga. Wẽnnaam palemda yalẽ-paalgã bãmb sẽn naanã, n kɩtdẽ t'a wẽnegd bãmb a Wẽnnaam n paasdẽ, tɩ tõnd tõe n bãng bãmb zãnga." 
Colossians3:11 Yel-kãngã pʋgẽ, ka be tɩ yaa Gɛrke, wall Zʋɩf wall zũnga, wall moaaga, wall weoog neda, wall nin-zẽmba, wall yamba, wall burkĩn ye. La Kiris yaa fãa nebã fãa pʋse." 
Colossians3:12 Dẽ wã yĩnga, yãmb sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsi, la neb sẽn welg toorã, la neb Wẽnnaam sẽn nong wʋsgã, bɩ y yeelg nimbãan-zoeer meng-menga, la sõmblem, la sik-m-menga, la sũ-bʋgsem, la sũ-mar wa futu." 
Colossians3:13 Tʋk-y taab zɩɩbo, la y maan taab sugri. Ned sã n tar yell ne a to, bɩ a maan a soab sugr wa Kiris sẽn maan yãmb sugrã." 
Colossians3:14 La sẽn yɩɩd fãa, bɩ y nong taab bala, tɩ nonglem yaa loɛtg sɩd-sɩda." 
Colossians3:15 Bɩ Kiris laafɩ, b sẽn bool yãmb a pʋgẽ tɩ y yɩ yĩng a yembrã soog yãmb sũyã. Yɩ-y neb sẽn mi y zaamẽ." 
Colossians3:16 Bɩ Kiris goamã zĩnd yãmb pʋsẽ ne yõod ning sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã. Zãms-y taab la y keoog taab ne yam meng-menga, ne yɩɩn-sõamyã, la Wẽnnaam yɩɩla, la yɩɩl Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõta. Yɩɩl-y bark pʋʋsg yɩɩl ne y sũyã fãa n pẽg Wẽnnaam." 
Colossians3:17 Bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn maanda, sã n yaa goam pʋga wall tʋʋm pʋga, maan-y fãa ne Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋre, n pʋʋs ba a Wẽnnaam bark a Zeezi maasem yĩnga." 
Colossians3:18 Pagba, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa sak a sɩda, wa sẽn zems sẽn tog n yɩ to-to Zu-soaba tũudum pʋgẽ wã." 
Colossians3:19 Pʋg-sɩdbã, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa nong a paga, la y ra maan gãgs ne-a ye." 
Colossians3:20 Kamba, sak-y y ba-rãmb ne y ma-rãmb bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, bala, bõn-kãng nooma Zu-soaba sũuri." 
Colossians3:21 Ba-rãmba, da maan-y tɩ y kambã sũy yiki, tɩ b raood wa n boog ye." 
Colossians3:22 Tʋmtʋmdba, sak-y y dũni zu-soben-dãmbã bũmb fãa pʋgẽ. Da sak-y bãmb b nifẽ bala, tɩ wẽnd wa yãmb baood n maana sẽn noom ninsaalb ye. Sak-y bãmb ne y sũyã fãa, Zu-soabã zoees pʋgẽ." 
Colossians3:23 Yãmb sẽn maand bũmb ning fãa, bɩ y maan-a ne y sũur fãa wa y sẽn maand Zu-soabã yĩnga, la ka ninsaalb yĩng ye," 
Colossians3:24 yãmb sẽn mi tɩ y na n deega pʋɩɩr Zu-soabã nengẽ tɩ yɩ y keoorã yĩnga. Sɩd me, yaa Kiris sẽn yaa Zu-soabã yĩng la yãmb tʋmda." 
Colossians3:25 Bala, ned ning sẽn tʋmd sẽn ka zems na n wʋka a ka-tɩrlmã yaoodo, bala, Wẽnnaam ka bakd neb ye." 
Colossians4:1 Zu-soben-dãmba, yao-y y tʋmtʋmdbã ne tɩrlem la wa sẽn zemse, yãmb sẽn mi tɩ yãmb me tara Zu-soab arzãn pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Colossians4:2 Wɩng-y ne pʋʋsgo, modg-y ne-a, n paas bark pʋʋsgo." 
Colossians4:3 Pʋʋs-y tõnd yĩng me, tɩ Wẽnnaam pak sor tõnd koɛɛgã mooneg yĩnga, tɩ mam tõog n moon Kiris yel-solemdã koɛɛga, yel-solemd ning yĩng b sẽn balg maamã," 
Colossians4:4 tɩ mam na gom a yell vẽeneg wa sẽn zems m sẽn tog n gom a yell to-to wã. 
Colossians4:5 Kɩt-y tɩ y yel-manesem ne neb nins sẽn ka be tẽeb pʋgẽ wã yɩ ne yam. Da bas-y weerã t'a loogdẽ ye. 
Colossians4:6 Kɩt-y tɩ yãmb goam tall bark wakat fãa n tar yamsem noom, tɩ yãmb na bãng y sẽn tog n leok ned kam fãa to-to tɩ zemse." 
Colossians4:7 Sã n yaa ne mam mengã yelle, m ba-bi-nongr a Tisik sẽn yaa Zu-soaba tʋmtʋmd sẽn maand sɩda, la sẽn yaa mam tʋmd-n-taag Zu-soaba tʋʋmd pʋgẽ wã na n wilga yãmb bũmb fãa." 
Colossians4:8 Pʋs n yaa rẽ yĩng la mam tʋmd-a yãmb nengẽ, tɩ yãmb tõe n bãng tõnd yell sẽn yaa to-to, la t'a bels yãmb sũyã." 
Colossians4:9 Mam tʋmda yẽnda ne d ba-bi-nongr a Onezɩm sẽn ya ned sẽn maand sɩd la a ya yãmb nedã y nengẽ. Bãmb na n wilga yãmb bũmb nins fãa sẽn maand ka wã. 
Colossians4:10 Mam bi-be-taag a Aristark ne a Mark sẽn yaa a Barnabaas saam-biigã pʋʋsda yãmba. Mam wilga yãmb bũmb nins y sẽn tog n maan a Mark yĩnga. A sã n ta yãmb nengẽ, bɩ y reeg-a sõama." 
Colossians4:10 Mam bi-be-taag a Aristark ne a Mark sẽn yaa a Barnabaas saam-biigã pʋʋsda yãmba. Mam wilga yãmb bũmb nins y sẽn tog n maan a Mark yĩnga. A sã n ta yãmb nengẽ, bɩ y reeg-a sõama." 
Colossians4:11 A Zeezi b sẽn boond a soab t'a Zustuusã me pʋʋsda yãmba. Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋka, yaa bãmb bal n naag maam n tʋmd Wẽnnaam soolmã yĩnga. Bãmb yɩɩ neb sẽn paas maam daoodo." 
Colossians4:12 A Epafras sẽn yaa yãmb nedã pʋʋsd-y lame. Yẽnda yaa a Zeezi Kiris tʋmtʋmda, n maood yãmb yĩng a pʋʋsg pʋgẽ n ka basdẽ ye, tɩ yãmb na bɩ n ta, la y bãng Wẽnnaam daabã sõama y sũurẽ, n yals kãenkãe." 
Colossians4:13 Mam kɩta yẽnda kaset n yetẽ t'a maooda yãmb yĩng wʋsgo, yãmb ne neb nins sẽn be Laodiise la Hiyerapoliisã yĩnga." 
Colossians4:14 Ba-bi-nongr a Luk sẽn yaa logtorã ne a Demaas pʋʋsda yãmba. 
Colossians4:15 Pʋʋs-y ba-biisã sẽn be Laodiise wã, ne a Nimfa la a Kiris tẽedbã sẽn tigimd yẽnda zakẽ wã." 
Colossians4:16 Yãmb sã n wa n karem seb-kãngã n sɛ, bɩ y maan y sẽn tõe tɩ b karm-a Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be Laodiise wã me sʋka, la yãmb me karem sebr ning Laodiise Kiris tẽedbã sẽn na n tʋm yãmbã." 
Colossians4:17 Yeel-y-yã a Arsɩp yaa: Gũus ne tʋʋmd ning fo sẽn deeg Zu-soabã nengẽ wã, n tõog tʋm-a sõama." 
Colossians4:18 Maam a Poll n gʋlsd ne m meng nug n pʋʋsd yãmba. Da yĩm-y tɩ b balga maam ye. Bɩ barkã zĩnd ne yãmba. 
1Thessalonians1:1 A Poll ne a Sɩlvẽ la a Tɩmote n gʋlsd Tesalonik-rãmb wẽnd doogã sẽn be ba a Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ, la Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã. Bɩ Wẽnnaam ning yãmb barka la b kõ yãmb bãane." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tõnd pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark yãmb yĩng n ka basdẽ ye, la tõnd pʋta yãmb yell d pʋʋsg pʋgẽ." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Tõnd tẽegda yãmb tẽebã tʋʋmde, la yãmb nonglmã tʋʋmde, la y tẽeb ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kirisã tẽeb‑pidsg gũudum sẽn ka vigsdã yelle, tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam taoor n ka basdẽ ye." 
1Thessalonians1:4 D ba-biis Wẽnnaam sẽn nonge, tõnd miime tɩ Wẽnnaam tʋlsa yãmba." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Bala, koe-noogã tõnd sẽn moona ka wa yãmb nengẽ ne no-goam bal ye. La yaa ne pãng me, ne Sɩɩg-sõngo, tɩ sãmbg baa bilf ka a pʋgẽ ye. Sɩd me, yãmb mii tõnd sẽn maan to-to yãmb sʋka, yãmb sõngr yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Yãmb sẽn deeg Wẽnnaam goamã yel-pakr wʋsg pʋgẽ, ne sũ-noog ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõtã, yãmb lebga tõnd togs-n-taase, la Zu-soabã togs-n-taas me." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Woto, yãmb lebga mamsg tẽedbã fãa sẽn be Masedoan la Akayi wã yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Bala, Zu-soabã koɛɛgã yii yãmb nengẽ n sãage. Ka Masedoan la Akayi bal ye. Neb sẽn be zĩig fãa bãnga yãmb tẽeb ne Wẽnnaamã yelle, tɩ ka leb n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ tõnd leb n gom a yell ye." 
1Thessalonians1:9 B gomda tõnd yell n wilgd tõnd sẽn paam n kẽ yãmb sʋk to-to, la yãmb sẽn kos sugr n tek yam to-to, n wẽnemd n bas wẽn-naandsã n sakd Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ n yaa sɩd soabã," 
1Thessalonians1:10 la y gũud tɩ bãmb bi-ribl a Zeezi yi yĩngr n wa, soab ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩt tɩ b vʋʋg n yi kũum sʋka, la b yolsd tõnd ne Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr sẽn watã." 
1Thessalonians2:1 M ba-biisi, yãmb mens miime tɩ tõnd waoongã yãmb nengẽ ka yɩ zaalem ye." 
1Thessalonians2:2 La yãmb miime tɩ b namsa tõnd Filip tẽnga, la tõnd yãa toog be. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ tõnd paam pɛl-kɛgeng ne d Wẽnnaamã, n na n moon yãmb Wẽnnaam koe-noogã maoor wʋsg pʋgẽ." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Sagls nins tõnd sẽn sagl yãmbã ka yɩ tudgri, bɩ tags-rẽgd pʋgẽ, wall ne sɩlem ye." 
1Thessalonians2:4 La a wa Wẽnnaam sẽn poes tõnd n na n kõ tõnd koe-noogã mooneg tʋʋmdã, tõnd ka gomd n na n noog ninsaalb sũy ye, la yaa tɩ noog Wẽnnaam sẽn feesd sũyã sũuri." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Yãmb miime tɩ tõnd zɩ n gom n na n belg neb ye, tɩ tõnd zɩ n gom n dat n paam paoong ye. Wẽnnaam yaa d kaset soaba." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Tõnd ka bao waoogr sẽn yit ninsaalb nengẽ, yãmb nengẽ, wall neb a taab nengẽ ye. Tõnd yaool n dag n tõe n modga yãmba, tõnd sẽn yaa Kiris tẽn-tʋmdbã yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians2:7 La tõnd sẽn zĩnd yãmb sʋkã, tõnd pida ne sũ-bʋgsem. A wa pag sẽn get a kamb yellã," 
1Thessalonians2:8 tõnd da nongẽ lame n kõ yãmb Wẽnnaam koe-noogã ne nonglem. La ka rẽ bal ye. Tõnd da nongẽ n kõo d vɩɩmã me yãmb yĩnga, bala, yãmb lebga tõnd nin-nongdse." 
1Thessalonians2:9 D ba-biisi, yãmb tẽra tõnd tʋʋmã ne d naongã: Tõnd moona yãmb Wẽnnaam koe-noogã, la tõnd tʋma yʋng ne wĩntoogo, tɩ d da wa n yɩ zɩɩb yãmb yĩng ye." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Yãmb yaa kaset rãmba, la Wẽnnaam me yaa kaset soaba, tɩ tõnd yel-manesem ne yãmb sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã yɩɩ sõama la tɩrga, tɩ rõdb kaẽ ye." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Yãmb miime me tɩ tõnd yɩɩ wa ba-rãmb ne b kamba, yãmb yembr-yembr yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Tõnd sagla yãmba, n bels yãmba, la d bõos yãmb tɩ y kẽn wa sẽn zemsd Wẽnnaam daabo, bãmb sẽn bool yãmb tɩ y paam pʋɩɩr ne bãmb soolem la b ziirã yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Tõnd pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark me n ka basdẽ ye. Bala, yãmb sẽn deeg Wẽnnaam goamã tõnd sẽn togs yãmbã, yãmb ka reeg-a wa a yaa ninsaalb goam ye. Yãmb deeg-a-la wa a sẽn yaa bũmb ning sɩd-sɩdã, Wẽnnaam goam sẽn tʋmd yãmb sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã pʋgẽ." 
1Thessalonians2:14 D ba-biisi, yãmb sɩd lebga Wẽnnaam dot nins sẽn be Zʋʋde soolmẽ wã togs-n-taase, la wẽnd-do-kãens bee a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ. Bala, yãmb tẽngã rãmb sẽn nams yãmb to-to wã, Zʋɩf-rãmbã me namsa wẽnd-do-kãens rãmb a woto me." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Zʋɩf-rãmbã n kɩt tɩ b kʋ Zu-soab a Zeezi la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, la b nams tõndo. B ka maand sẽn noom Wẽnnaam ye, la b kisa nebã fãa." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Bãmb gɩdgda tõnd tɩ d da moon bu-zẽmsã Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã, tɩ b paam fãagr ye. B sẽn maan a woto wã, b maana b yel-wẽnã n taase. La Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr baas n ta-b lame." 
1Thessalonians2:17 D ba-biisi, tõnd sẽn zãag ne taab wakat bilf yĩnga, d nina ka ne taab ye, la d sũyã loee ne taaba. Tõnd data ne d sũyã fãa n leb n yãnd yãmb neng ne nenga." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Dẽ kɩtame tɩ tõnd dag n dat n wa yãmb nengẽ. Naoor a yiib la maam a Poll dag n dat n wa yãmb nengẽ, la a Sʋtãan gɩdga tõndo." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Tõnd saagr bee ne ãnda rãmba, la ãnda rãmb n ya tõnd sũ-noog la d waoogr maanf tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi taoore, la b waoongã wakate? Ka yãmb la?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 N-yẽe! Yãmb yaa tõnd ziir la d sũ-noogo. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Tõnd wa n ka leb n tõe n gũ yɛs ye. Dẽ n kɩt tɩ tõnd yãk yam tɩ yaa tõnd bal n na pa Atɛn. 
1Thessalonians3:2 La tõnd tʋma d ba-biig a Tɩmote sẽn yaa tõnd tʋmd-n-taag Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã pʋgẽ, n moond Kiris koe-noogã, t'a wa n paas yãmb raoodo, la a sagl yãmb y tẽebã sõngr yĩnga," 
1Thessalonians3:3 tɩ yel-pakr ning sẽn paamd yãmb moasã wã da wa n vigs ned baa a yembr ye. Bala, yãmb mens miime tɩ nams-kãens yaa tõnd pʋɩɩre." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Wakat ning tõnd sẽn dag n be ne yãmbã, tõnd pĩnd n yeela yãmb tɩ d na n paama namsgo. La yãmb miime tɩ yaa rẽ n wa wã." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ mam sẽn ka leb n tõe n gũ n kaoosã yĩnga, mam tʋma a Tɩmote t'a wa n sok yãmb tẽebã yelle, mam sẽn zoet dabeem tɩ makdã na n mak yãmb tɩ tõnd tʋʋmdã lebg zaalmã yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians3:6 La moasã, a Tɩmote yii yãmb nengẽ n lebg n wa tõnd nengẽ, la a waa ne yãmb tẽebã la y nonglmã koe-noodo, la koe-nood tɩ yãmb ket n tẽra tõnd yell sõama, la y raab tɩ leb n yãnd tõndo, wa tõnd me sẽn dat n yã yãmbã." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Woto, m ba-biisi, baa ne tõnd sẽn be sũ-sãang-kãseng la yel-pakr pʋgẽ wã, tõnd paama belsg ne yãmb kibarã, y tẽebã yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Moasã, tõnd vɩɩme, yãmb sẽn paad Zu-soaba pʋgẽ kãenkãe wã yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Tõnd ka tõe n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam bark n sa yãmb yĩnga, sũ-noog ning tõnd sẽn maand Wẽnnaam taoor yãmb yĩngã yĩng ye." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Yʋng ne wĩndga, tõnd bõosda Wẽnnaam ne d sũyã fãa tɩ d tõe n yãnd yãmb nengã, la d kɩt tɩ y paam bũmb ning sẽn paoog yãmb tẽebẽ wã." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Bɩ Wẽnnaam meng sẽn yaa tõnd ba wã, la tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi pak d sorã tɩ d ta yãmb nengẽ." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Bɩ Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ yãmb nonglem taab yĩnga, la nebã fãa yĩngã lebg kãseng n puugi, wa nonglem ning tõnd sẽn tar yãmb yĩngã." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Woto, bɩ Wẽnnaam paas yãmb raoodo, tɩ y ra paam rõdb y sũyã pʋsẽ ye, la y zĩnd sõmblem tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam taoore, daar ning tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn na n wa ne nin-sõamyã wã." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Yaoolem bũmbu, m ba-biisi, yaa tɩ yãmb zãmsa tõnd nengẽ n bãng y sẽn tog n kẽn to-to n ta Wẽnnaam yam, la y pʋs n maanda a woto. Moasã, tõnd kota yãmba, n bõosd yãmb ne Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋr tɩ y maan neer n yɩɩd a woto." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Sɩd me, yãmb mii bũmb nins tõnd sẽn deeg Zu-soab a Zeezi nengẽ n wilg yãmb tɩ y maanã." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dat yaa tɩ yãmb na welg toor n yɩ bãmb dẽnda, la y yõk y mens n da maan rẽgd ye:" 
1Thessalonians4:4 Yaa tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa bãng tɩ tall a meng ne sõmblem la pʋ-peelem," 
1Thessalonians4:5 la a ra bas tɩ ratem wẽng soog a sũurã wa nin-zaalsã sẽn ka mi Wẽnnaamã sẽn maandã ye. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Tɩ ned da maan a to zãmb wall a wẽg-a yel-kãng pʋgẽ ye. Tõnd zoe n yeela yãmb tɩ Zu-soabã kaooda bõn-kãens bʋʋdo. 
1Thessalonians4:7 Bala, Wẽnnaam ka bool tõnd tɩ d maan rẽgd ye, la yaa tɩ d na welg toor n yɩ bãmb dẽnda." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Woto, ned ning sẽn kɩɩsd-a tõ-kãensã, ka ninsaal la a kɩɩsd ye, la yaa Wẽnnaam, soab ning sẽn kõ-a yãmb bãmb Sɩɩg-sõngã me la a kɩɩsda." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Sã n yaa ne ba-biir nonglmã yelle, yãmb ka baood tɩ m gʋls yãmb n gom a yell ye. Bala, yãmb mensã paama zãmsg Wẽnnaam nengẽ tɩ nong taaba." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Yãmb nonga ba-biisã fãa sẽn be Masedoan tõrã a woto. La tõnd sagenda yãmb sẽn yaa d ba-biisã tɩ y kẽng taoor n paase," 
1Thessalonians4:11 la y vɩ ne taab ne laafɩ, la y ges y mens tʋʋmã yelle, la y tʋm ne y nus wa tõnd sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã, tɩ rẽnda na n yɩɩ yãmb waoogre." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Maan-y-yã a woto tɩ y yel-manesem ne yɩng rãmbã zemse, la tɩ yãmb da zĩẽ n gũud ned sõngr ye." 
1Thessalonians4:13 M ba-biisi, tõnd ka rat tɩ yãmb zɩ neb nins sẽn gõe wã yelle, tɩ yãmb sũyã da wa n sãam wa neb a taabã sẽn ka tar tẽeb ne beoog neerã ye." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Sɩd me, tõnd sã n tẽed t'a Zeezi kiime la tɩ b leb n vʋʋgame, tõnd tẽedame me tɩ neb nins sẽn ki Kiris tũudum pʋgẽ wã, Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ Kiris vʋʋg-ba, n lagem bãmb ne a Zeezi n zẽke." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ad bũmb ning tõnd sẽn togsd yãmba, wa sẽn zems ne Zu-soabã gomde: Tõnd sẽn ket n vɩ Zu-soabã waoong daarã, tõnd ka na n deng neb nins sẽn gõe wã ye." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Bala, koɛɛg n na n zẽke tɩ yɩ bãnde, tɩ b wʋm malegs naab a yembr koɛɛga, tɩ Wẽnnaam baorg peebe, tɩ Zu-soabã meng yi arzãn n sigi. La neb nins sẽn ki Kiris tũudma pʋgẽ wã n na n deng n vʋʋge." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Sẽn pʋgda, b na n lagma tõnd sẽn ket vɩ wã ne bãmb n zẽk sawat pʋse, tɩ d seg Zu-soabã yĩngri. La woto, tõnd na n bee ne Zu-soabã daar fãa." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y bels taab sũy ne gom-kãense." 
1Thessalonians5:1 M ba-biisi, yãmb ka baood tɩ mam gʋls yãmb n wilg wakat la sasa ning bõn-kãens sẽn na n zĩndã ye." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bala, yãmb mens mii sõama tɩ Zu-soabã waoong na n yɩɩ wa wagdr sẽn wat yʋngo." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Wakat ning ninsaalbã sẽn na n yeel tɩ yaa laafɩ la bãanã, wakat-kãng la sãoong na n ling bãmba. La na n yɩɩ wa rogem toog sẽn paamd pag sẽn tʋte, la b kõn põs ye." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Mam ba-biisi, yãmb yẽ ka be lik pʋgẽ tɩ da-kãng na n wa ling yãmb wa wagdr ye." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Yãmb fãa yaa vẽenem nebã, la wĩndg nebã. Tõnd ka yʋng neb wall lik neb ye." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ d da gũs wa neb a taabã ye. Ayo, d neende, la d yɩ yõk-m-mens rãmba." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Yaa yʋng la sẽn gõe-bã gõe, la yaa yʋng la nebã yũud rãam n tuumdẽ." 
1Thessalonians5:8 La tõnd sẽn yaa wĩndg nebã, bɩ d yɩ yõk-m-mens rãmba: Tɩ d bob tẽeb la nonglem wa gãntika, la d fõgen fãagrã tẽeb pidsg gũudmã wa kut-pugla." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Bala, Wẽnnaam ka yãk tõnd tɩ d na paam bãmb sũ-puugrã ye, la yaa tɩ tõnd na soog fãagrã tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga," 
1Thessalonians5:10 Soab ning sẽn ki tõnd yĩnga, tɩ tõnd sã n vɩ wall d sã n ki me, bɩ tõnd vɩ ne bãmba." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Woto yĩnga, paas-y taab raoodo, la y bɩɩs taab tẽeb wa y sẽn zoe n maandẽ wã." 
1Thessalonians5:12 D ba-biisi, tõnd kota yãmb tɩ y waoog neb nins sẽn tʋmd yãmb sʋka, n tɛt yãmb Zu-soabã pʋgẽ la b keoogd yãmbã." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Wilg-y-b tɩ yãmb nand-b lame, nong-y-b wʋsgo, b tʋʋmdã yĩnga. Zĩnd-y ne taab ne laafɩ." 
1Thessalonians5:14 D Ba-biisi, tõnd bõosda yãmb tɩ y keoog neb nins sẽn vɩ yaarã, la y paas neb nins raood sẽn boogã raoodo, la y tebel pãn-komsem dãmba, la y maan sũ-mar ne nebã fãa." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Gũus-y y mense, tɩ ned da lebs a to wẽng wẽng yĩng ye. Mao-y tɩ maan neere, sã n yaa yãmb ne taaba, wall ne nebã fãa." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Maan-y sũ-noog daar fãa. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Pʋʋs-y n da bas ye. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam bark bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, bala, Wẽnnaam raab la a woto a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Da kiis-y Sɩɩg-sõngã ye. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Da paoog-y bãngr goamã ye. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Bʋ-y bũmb fãa yelle, tɩ sẽn yaa sõama bɩ y reege," 
1Thessalonians5:22 la y yõk y mens ne wẽng buudã fãa. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Bɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn so laafɩ wã maneg yãmb yĩn-tõrã b toor tɩ yɩ sõama zãnga, tɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris waoongã daare, bɩ b mik tɩ rõdb ka be yãmb belmã pʋgẽ ye, sã n yaa y Sɩɩgã, wall y yĩngã pʋgẽ." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Sẽn bool-a yãmbã yaa sɩd soaba, la yaa bãmb n na n maan a woto." 
1Thessalonians5:25 D ba-biisi, pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam tõnd yĩnga." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Pʋʋs-y ba-biisã fãa ne mok-sõngo. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mam bõosda yãmb ne Zu-soabã yʋʋr tɩ y karem seb-kãngã tɩ ba-biisã fãa wʋme. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris barkã zĩnd ne yãmba. 
2Thessalonians1:1 A Poll ne a Sɩlvẽ la a Tɩmote n gʋlsd Tesalonik wẽnd doogã rãmb sẽn be tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ la Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã. 
2Thessalonians1:2 Bɩ ba a Wẽnnaam la Zu-soab a Zeezi ning yãmb barka la b kõ yãmb laafɩ. 
2Thessalonians1:3 D ba-biisi, tõnd tog n pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark yãmb yĩng n ka basdẽ ye, la yaa bũmb sẽn zemse, bala, yãmb tẽebã paasdame, tɩ nonglem ning yãmb sẽn tar taab yĩngã paasdẽ." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Woto, tõnd me pẽgda d mens yãmb yĩng Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã sul pʋsẽ, yãmb modgrã ne y tẽebã yĩnga, nebã sẽn namsd yãmbã pʋgẽ la toodã sẽn sigd yãmbã pʋgẽ." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Yõwã wilgdame tɩ Wẽnnaam bʋʋdã yaa tɩrga, tɩ b na kɩt tɩ yãmb zems ne Wẽnnaam soolem kõom, soolem ning yãmb sẽn sakd namsgã yĩnga." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Bala, ne Wẽnnaam, a zemsame tɩ b kɩt tɩ neb nins sẽn namsd yãmbã namse," 
2Thessalonians1:7 la b kɩt tɩ yãmb sẽn namsdã, bɩ y lagem ne tõnd n paam vʋʋsg wakat ning Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn na n puk arzãn ne malegs sẽn tar pãnga." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Bãmb na n waa bug-vɩleng pʋgẽ, n sɩbg neb nins sẽn ka mi Wẽnnaam la neb nins sẽn ka sakd tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi koe-noogã." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Sɩbgr sẽn segd ne-b la b na n paame: Sãoong sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa, n zãag ne Zu-soabã yãabo la ne bãmb pãngã ziiri," 
2Thessalonians1:10 wakat ning Zu-soabã sẽn na n wa tɩ neb nins bãmb sẽn so wã waoog bãmb da-kãnga, tɩ neb nins sẽn tẽed bãmbã na ges bãmbã. La yãmb yaool n tẽe kaset ning tõnd sẽn kɩsã." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Yaa woto yĩng la tõnd pʋʋsd yãmb yĩng n ka basdẽ ye, tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã na kɩt tɩ yãmb yɩ neb sẽn zemsd ne boolg ning b sẽn bool yãmbã, la tɩ b na pids saag-sõama nins yãmb sẽn tar ne tʋʋm-sõamy wã maanegã, la b kɩt tɩ yãmb tẽebã tʋʋmd zems zãnga." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Woto, yãmb na waoog tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi yʋʋre, la bãmb me na waoog yãmba, wa sẽn zemsd tõnd Wẽnnaam la ne Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris nimbãan-zoeerã." 
2Thessalonians2:1 M ba-biisi, sã n yaa ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris waoongã yelle, la tõnd sẽn na n tigs taab bãmb nengẽ wã yelle, tõnd kota yãmb" 
2Thessalonians2:2 tɩ y ra sak tɩ y yam yuus tao-tao, wall tɩ rabeem yõk yãmba, neb sẽn yet tɩ Zu-soabã waoong zoe n loogame wã yĩng ye. Bala, neb tõe n gomame n yeel tɩ yaa bãngr goamã, wall b gome, wall b yeel tɩ tõnd n gʋls n yeel a woto." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Bɩ ned da tõog n belg yãmb ne manesem buud baa a yembr ye. Bala, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ leb-poorẽ deng n zĩndi, tɩ wẽn-kɩɩsdã yiki. Yẽnda yaa soab ning b sẽn na n sãame," 
2Thessalonians2:4 bɛ sẽn zẽkd a meng n yɩɩgd bũmb ning fãa b sẽn boond tɩ Wẽnnaam, la bũmb nins fãa neb sẽn pʋʋsda, hal n pʋs n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã, n kɩt tɩ b bool-a tɩ wẽnnaam." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Yãmb ka tẽr tɩ mam goma ne yãmb a yell wakat ning m sẽn dag n ket n be ne yãmbã sɩda? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Moasã, yãmb mii bũmb ning sẽn gɩdg-a t'a ka tõe n yik hal tɩ ta a wakatã." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Bala, yel-wẽnã yel-soalem zoe n tʋmdame, la yaa tɩlɛ tɩ ned ning sẽn gɩdg-a wã deng n looge." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Yaa wakat-kãng la wẽn-kɩɩsdã na n yiki, la Zu-soabã [a Zeezi] na n sãam-a-la ne b noor pemsem, la bãmb waoongã ziir na n beds-a lame." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Wẽn-kɩɩsdã waoong na n yɩɩ ne a Sʋtãan pãnga, ne zĩrẽ bõn-bãn la bãna, la bõn-yɛɛsds buud toay-toaya," 
2Thessalonians2:10 la ne ka-tɩrlem belgrã fãa, neb nins sẽn na n sãamã yĩnga, bala, b ka reeg sɩdã nonglem n na paam fãagr ye." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Woto yĩnga, Wẽnnaam tʋma meneng sɩɩg b nengẽ, tɩ b na tẽ zĩrẽ," 
2Thessalonians2:12 tɩ neb nins sẽn ka tẽ-b sɩdã, la sẽn nong ka tɩrlmã bʋʋd na kao." 
2Thessalonians2:13 D ba-biis Zu-soabã sẽn nong wʋsgo, sã n yaa ne tõndo, tõnd tog n pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam bark wakat fãa yãmb yĩnga, bala, Wẽnnaam tũusa yãmb hal sɩngr wẽndẽ tɩ y na paam fãagre, la yaa Sɩɩgã sẽn na welg yãmb toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, la yãmb sẽn na n tẽ sɩdã yĩng la y na n paam-a." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Yaa tɩ yãmb na paam fãagr yĩng la b tall koe-noogã tõnd sẽn moona n bool yãmba, tɩ y tõe n paam pʋɩɩr ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ziirã." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Woto yĩnga, m ba-biisi, yals-y kãenkãe la y tall koees nins tõnd sẽn kõ yãmbã, sã n yaa ne noore, wall ne sebre." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris mengã, la tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam sẽn nong tõndo, n bels tõnd ne belsg sẽn kõn sa, bãmb nimbãan-zoeerã yĩnga, la b kõ tõnd saag-sõngã" 
2Thessalonians2:17 bels yãmb sũyã, la b kɩt tɩ y pɛlg yɩ kãenkãe ne tʋʋm-sõng fãa, la ne gom-sõng fãa." 
2Thessalonians3:1 La koɛɛg sẽn keta, d kota yãmb tɩ y pʋʋs tõnd yĩnga, tɩ Zu-soabã goamã tõe n kell n saage, la a paam waoogr wa a sẽn tar yãmb nengẽ wã," 
2Thessalonians3:2 la tɩ Zu-soaba na yols tõnd ne neb nins sẽn ka yam la sẽn yaa wẽnsã. Bala, ka b fãa n tar tẽeb ye." 
2Thessalonians3:3 La Zu-soabã yaa sɩd soaba, la b na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yals kãenkãe, la b gũ yãmb tɩ wẽng soabã da tõog-y ye." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tõnd pʋs peela ne yãmb Zu-soabã pʋgẽ, tɩ yãmb maanda bũmb nins tõnd sẽn yet yãmbã, la tɩ y na n kell n maaname." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Bɩ Wẽnnaam tɛ yãmb sũyã n tees Zu-soabã nonglmã la Kiris sũ-marã. 
2Thessalonians3:6 D ba-biisi, tõnd yeta yãmb ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋr tɩ y zãag y mens ne ba-biig ning fãa sẽn ya kʋɩɩma, la sẽn ka tũud minind nins tõnd sẽn wilg yãmbã ye." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Yãmb mens mii y sẽn tog n maan togs-n-taar ne tõnd to-to, bala, tõnd ka yɩ kʋɩɩmb yãmb sʋk ye." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Tõnd ka rɩ ned baa a yembr rɩɩb zaalem ye, la tõnd modga d mens n tʋm wĩndg ne yʋngo, tɩ d da wa n yɩ zɩɩb yãmb ned baa a yembr yĩng ye." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Ka tɩ tõnd dag n ka tar noor tɩ zĩnd tɩ yãmb ges tõnd yell ye, la yaa tɩ tõnd mensã da rat n kõo yãmb mamsg sẽn na tũ." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Bala, tõnd sẽn dag n be ne yãmbã, tõnd dag n yeela yãmb a woto: Ned sã n ka rat n tʋm bɩ a ra rɩ me ye." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Tõnd yaool n wʋmame tɩ yãmb neb kẽer yaa kʋɩɩmba. B sẽn dag n tog n tʋmã, yaa neb a taab yɛl n pak-ba." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tõnd kota nin-kãense, n sagend bãmb ne Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris yʋʋr tɩ b maag b mens n tʋm n paam b toorẽ dɩɩb n dɩ." 
2Thessalonians3:13 La ne yãmba, m ba-biisi, bɩ y da yɛ ne tʋʋm-sõamyã maaneg ye." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ned sã n ka sak bũmb ning tõnd sẽn yet seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã, bãng-y-yã a soaba, la y ra paam lagem-n-taar baa bilf ne-a ye, tɩ yãnd yõk-a." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Da ges-y-yã-a wa y bɛ ye, keoog-y-yã-a wa y ba-biiga." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Bɩ Zu-soabã sẽn kõt laafɩ wã meng kõ yãmb vɩ-bãane wakat fãa, bũmb fãa pʋgẽ. Bɩ Zu-soabã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa!" 
2Thessalonians3:17 Yaa maam a Poll nug n gʋls pʋʋsmã. Maam n tik m nug sɛba fãa pʋse. Mam gʋlsem la woto. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi barkã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. 
1Timothy1:1 A Polle, a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmda, a wa sẽn zems ne Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd fãagdã raabo, la sẽn zems ne a Zeezi Kirisã, tõnd tẽeb sẽn be ne a soabã noore," 
1Timothy1:2 n gʋlsd a Tɩmote, m bi-roagdg tẽeb pʋgẽ. Bɩ barka, la nimbãan-zoeere, la laafɩ sẽn yit Ba a Wẽnnaam la tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ wã zĩnd ne foom." 
1Timothy1:3 A wa mam sẽn dag n sagl foom wakat ning mam sẽn loogd n dabd Masedoannã, kell n pa Efɛɛs n sagl neb kẽer tɩ b ra zãms nebã koɛɛg a to ye," 
1Timothy1:4 la b ra sak soalma, ne roog yɛl sẽn ka saabo, la sẽn ka wat ne Wẽnnaam tʋʋmd tẽeb pʋgẽ la yaa no-koɛɛm balã ye." 
1Timothy1:5 Sagl-kãng võor yaa nonglem sẽn yit sũ-yolgemd pʋgẽ, la sũ-bãngr sẽn yaa sõama pʋgẽ, la tẽeb sɩd-sɩd pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy1:6 Neb kẽer sẽn bʋdg n bas bõn-kãensã yĩnga, b bʋdgame n menem gom-vɩɩd pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy1:7 Bãmb dat n yɩɩ a Moyiis tõog karen-saam-dãmba, n yaool n ka wʋmd b sẽn gomdã, la b sẽn yetã võor ye." 
1Timothy1:8 Tõnd mii sɩd t'a Moyiis tõogã yaa sõama, b sã n tũ-a tɩ zemse," 
1Timothy1:9 la d miẽ t'a Moyiis tõogã ka maan nin-tɩrg yĩng ye, la yaa nin-wẽnsã, neb nins sẽn ka sakd noorã, sẽn ka tẽed-b Wẽnnaamã, yel-wẽn-maandbã, neb nins sẽn paoogd Wẽnnaamã, la toog sẽn ka be ne wẽn-tũudum, ba-rãmb la ma-rãmb kʋʋdba," 
1Timothy1:10 la yĩng ratem yembse, la raop bɩ pagb sẽn gãe taaba, la yemb-koaasdba, la zĩrẽ yagdba, la zĩrẽ kaset rãmba, la bũmb nins a taab sẽn kɩɩsd koe-sõngã maandbã yĩnga." 
1Timothy1:11 Yaa koe-noog ning sẽn tar ziirã, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bark soabã koe-noogã, koe-noog ning b sẽn ning mam noorẽ wã n yet a woto." 
1Timothy1:12 Mam pʋʋsda soab ning sẽn kõ-a maam pãngã barka, tõnd Zu-soab a Zezi, bãmb sẽn ges tɩ mam yaa ned sẽn maand sɩda, n zĩndg maam tʋʋmdã pʋgẽ," 
1Timothy1:13 tɩ mam yaool n dag n yaa ned sẽn paoogd Wẽnnaam, la sẽn namsd Kiris tẽedbã, la ned sẽn maand a taab pãnga. La b zoee mam nimbãanega, bala, dag n yaa zɩɩlem la ka-tẽeb pʋgẽ la mam dag n maand rẽnda." 
1Timothy1:14 La mam paama tõnd Zu-soabã barkã, n paas tẽeb la nonglem sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy1:15 Gomd ning sẽn yet t'a Zeezi Kiris waa dũni n na n fãag yel-wẽn-maandbã yaa sɩda, la gomdã zemsa reegr zãnga, la mam yaa yel-wẽn-maandbã taoor soaba." 
1Timothy1:16 La Wẽnnaam maana nimbãan-zoeer ne maam, t'a Zeezi Kiris reng n wilg b sũ-marã fãa ne maam, mam sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩd yel-wẽn-maandba fãa wã, tɩ yɩ kaset neb nins fãa sẽn na tẽ bãmba n dat vɩɩm sẽn ka sɛtã yĩnga." 
1Timothy1:17 Bɩ rĩm ning sẽn be-a wakat sẽn kõn sa, n ka tõe n ki, la ned nin sẽn ka tõe n yã, n yaa b yembr tãa n yaa Wẽnnaamã soog waoogre, la ziiri, wakat sẽn ka sɛt ye. Ãmina!" 
1Timothy1:18 M biig a Tɩmote, koɛɛg ning mam sẽn yet foom, a wa sẽn zems bãngr gomdã sẽn gom a yellã, yaa tɩ f zab zab-sõngã wa b sẽn yeelã," 
1Timothy1:19 la f kell n tall tẽeb ne sũur kaset-sõngo. Neb kẽer basa sũur kaset‑kãnga, la ne tẽebã yelle, b yaa wa neb koom sẽn dɩ." 
1Timothy1:20 A Imene ne a Alegsãndr bee bãmb dãmba sʋka, la mam basa bãmb ne a Sʋtãanã, tɩ b na zãms n bãng tɩ ra paoog Wẽnnaam ye." 
1Timothy2:1 Dẽ, mam saglg yaa tɩ y reng n kos Wẽnnaam, n pʋʋse, n yõk sɛɛga, la y pʋʋs Wẽnnaam bark nebã fãa yĩnga:" 
1Timothy2:2 rĩm-dãmb yĩnga, neb nins fãa sẽn so naamã yĩnga, tɩ tõnd tõe n vɩ ne laafɩ la bãane, ne Wẽnnaam sakre, la ne waoogre." 
1Timothy2:3 Yaa woto n be neer Wẽnnaam nifẽ, la a noom bãmb sẽn yaa tõnd fãagdã." 
1Timothy2:4 Bãmb daab yaa tɩ nebã fãa paam fãagre, la b tõog n bãng sɩdã." 
1Timothy2:5 Bala, Wẽnnaam a yembr tãa bal n be, sɛ-yõakd a yembr tãa bal n be Wẽnnaam ne nebã sʋka: Yaa rao sẽn boond t'a Zeezi Kirisi," 
1Timothy2:6 soab ning sẽn kõ a meng tɩ ra nebã fãa wã. Yõwã yaa kaset sẽn kɩs a wakate. 
1Timothy2:7 Wẽnnaam yãka maam tɩ m moon kaset‑kãnga, la m yɩ tẽn-tʋmda (mam yeta sɩda, mam ka yagd ye,) la m zãms bu-zẽmsã ne tẽebo la ne sɩda." 
1Timothy2:8 Dẽ, mam datame tɩ nebã zẽk nus sẽn yaa yɩlma, n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam zĩig fãa, tɩ sũ-kiiri la no-koɛɛm kaẽ ye." 
1Timothy2:9 Sã n yaa ne pagbã, b tog n yera fut sẽn yaa sõama n zems gesgo, la ne sik-m-menga. Bɩ b nagmã ra yɩ zutã pãnengo, wall sãnem, wall kĩndi, wall fut ligd sẽn yaa toog yeelgrẽ ye." 
1Timothy2:10 Ayo! B tog n nagsa b mens ne tʋʋm‑sõamyã maanego, wa sẽn zems pagb sẽn sakd Wẽnnaam sẽn tog n maane." 
1Timothy2:11 Pagbã tog n deega zãmsg sĩndim la sakr meng-meng pʋgẽ. 
1Timothy2:12 Mam ka kõt pag noor t'a zãms nebã, wall a soog rao ye. A tog paa sĩndim pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy2:13 Bala, Wẽnnaam deng n naana a Ãdem pipi, n yaool n naan a Ɛɛve." 
1Timothy2:14 La sẽn paase, ka a Ãdem la waafã belg n tõog ye. Yaa pagã n sak belgrã, n kɩɩs Wẽnnaam noor n beeg bãmba." 
1Timothy2:15 Baoosgo, a na n paama fãagre, a sẽn lebg ma wã yĩnga, a sã n modg ne tẽebo, la nonglem, la welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, la gũus-m-menga." 
1Timothy3:1 Gom-kãnga yaa sɩda: Ned sã n dat n yɩ karen-saamba, yaa tʋʋm-sõng la a rata." 
1Timothy3:2 Dẽ yĩnga, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ karen-saamb yɩ ned sẽn ka tar rõadga, pʋg-yend sɩda, ned sẽn gũusd ne a yel-manesem, sẽn tar yam n tõe n tagse, ned sẽn zems waoogre, sẽn maand sãamba sãando, ned sẽn tõe n zãms neb a taaba." 
1Timothy3:3 A ka tog n yɩ rã-yũuda, wall zabr soab ye. A tog n yɩɩ ned sẽn baood laafɩ. A ka tog n yɩ ned sẽn nong ligd ye." 
1Timothy3:4 A tog n yɩɩ ned sẽn get a zak yell neere, n kɩtdẽ t'a kamb yɩ kom-sakds wa sẽn zems pẽgre." 
1Timothy3:5 Ned sã n ka tõe n ges a meng zak yelle, a na n yɩɩ a wãn n ges Wẽnnaam doogã yelle?" 
1Timothy3:6 Yẽnda ka tog n yɩ sug-kot‑paalg ye, sã n ka rẽ, a tõe n kẽe wuk-m-meng pʋgẽ, n paam sɩbgr ning wẽng soabã sẽn na n paamã." 
1Timothy3:7 A togame n paam tɩ kɛɛng-rãmbã kɩt a kaset-sõngo, tɩ nebã da wa n ka nand-a, la tɩ sʋtãanã bẽdg ra yõk-a ye." 
1Timothy3:8 Yel-gɛtb me tog n yɩɩ neb sẽn zems waoogre, la sɩd dãmba. B ka tog n yɩ neb sẽn yũud rãam wʋsgo, wall sẽn maand zãmb n baood ligd ye." 
1Timothy3:9 Bãmb tog n talla tẽeb sɩd koɛɛgã sẽn pukã kãenkãe, ne sũur kaset sõngo." 
1Timothy3:10 Nebã tog n deng n maka bãmb n gese, tɩ b sã n mik tɩ b ka rõadga, bɩ b yaool n maan yel-gesg tʋʋmdã." 
1Timothy3:11 Bãmb pagbã me tog n yɩɩ neb sẽn zems waoogre. B ka tog n yɩ nin-sãbsdb ye. B tog n yɩɩ yõk-m-mens rãmba, la b maand sɩd bũmb fãa pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy3:12 Yel-gɛt tog n yɩɩ pʋg-yend sɩda, la a tog n gesa a kambã ne a zaka rãmb yell sõama." 
1Timothy3:13 Yel-gɛtb nins sẽn maand b tʋʋmd neerã paamda waoogr zĩiga, la b pels yaa kãenkãe a Zeezi Kiris tẽebã pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy3:14 Mam gʋlsda foom bõn-kãensã, baa ne mam sẽn saagd n dat n wa fo nengẽ moas-moasã wã," 
1Timothy3:15 tɩ baa mam sã n wa n kaoosdẽ, fo na bãng f sẽn na n maan bũmb ning Wẽnnaam zakã pʋga, sẽn dat n togs tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã nin-tũusdsã sʋka, sẽn yaa sɩd ra-luka, la a yẽbgr sẽn tebended-a wã." 
1Timothy3:16 Ned ka tõe n kɩɩs tɩ wẽn-tũudbã yel-soalmã ka bõn-kãseng ye. Kirisi, soab ning sẽn dɩk yĩng tɩ neb yãnd-a wã, soab ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kɩs a kaset-sõngã, b puka b meng ne malegsã, neb moona b yellã buud toay-toayã sʋka, la tẽng zug ka, neb tẽ-b lame, la b paama zẽkre, la ziiri." 
1Timothy4:1 Sɩɩg-sõng togsa vẽeneg tɩ yaoolem wakate, neb kẽer na n basa tẽebo, n pʋg belgr sɩɩse, la zãmsg zĩn-dãmb sẽn kõta." 
1Timothy4:2 La yaa bɛlgdb sẽn yaa zãmb dãmba, la b sũ-bãngrã sẽn wʋm ne kut sẽn moogã goam n na n kɩt tɩ yɩ a woto." 
1Timothy4:3 B yeta nebã tɩ b da yi kãadem ye, la b bas rɩɩb kẽer n da rɩ ye, tɩ Wẽnnaam yaool n naan rɩ-kãens tɩ neb nins sẽn maand sɩda la sẽn mi sɩdã na rɩ ne bark pʋʋsgo." 
1Timothy4:4 Wẽnnaam sẽn naan bũmb ninsã fãa yaa sõama, b sã n dɩt-b ne bark pʋʋsgo." 
1Timothy4:5 Bala, bũmb fãa lebgda sõama Wẽnnaam goamã la pʋʋsg yĩnga." 
1Timothy4:6 Fo sã n bilg ba-biisã bõn-kãense, fo na n yɩɩ a Zeezi Kiris tʋmtʋmd-sõng sẽn paam dɩlgr ne tẽeb goamã, la ne zãms-sõng fo sẽn tũ sõama wã." 
1Timothy4:7 Zãag f meng ne kibay sẽn ka kẽed ne tẽeb yelle, la ne soalem pʋg-yãans sẽn tãoodã." 
1Timothy4:8 Mao ne Wẽnnaam sakre. Bala, yĩngã modgr yõod yaa bilfu, la Wẽnnaam sakr bee yõod ne bũmb fãa. A tara vɩɩm ning sẽn be moasã wã kãabgo, la vɩɩm ning sẽn watã yĩnga." 
1Timothy4:9 Yaa gomd sãmbg sẽn ka be a pʋgẽ, la sẽn zems tɩ b reeg-a zãnga:" 
1Timothy4:10 Tõnd tʋmdame, la d maoodẽ, bala, tõnd saagr bee ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ la sẽn yaa nebã fãa fãagda, la Kiris tẽedbã fãagd n yɩɩda." 
1Timothy4:11 Fo sẽn tog n sagl nebã tɩ b maane, la f zãms-b bũmb ningã la woto." 
1Timothy4:12 Da sak n maan tɩ ned paoog foom f yãadem yĩng ye. Yɩ mamsg neb nins sẽn maand sɩdã yĩnga, ne f noor goamã, ne f kẽnde, ne f nonglem, ne f tẽebo, ne f sõmblem." 
1Timothy4:13 Wɩng ne sɛbã kaoreng nebã sʋka, la saglgo, la zãmsgo hal tɩ m wa." 
1Timothy4:14 Da bas kũun ning bãngr gomd sẽn togse, tɩ kãsem-dãmbã tik foom ne b nus n pʋʋs n kõ foomã tɩ yɩ zaalem ye." 
1Timothy4:15 Maan tʋʋm‑kãng neere, n dɩk f meng n kõ-a, tɩ nebã fãa na yã tɩ fo kẽngda taoore." 
1Timothy4:16 Mao n gũus f menga, la f gũus ne zãmsgã. Wɩng ne bõn-kãense, bala, fo sã n maan a woto, fo na n fãaga f menga, la f fãag neb nins sẽn kelgd foomã." 
1Timothy5:1 Da leng nin-kẽem ne pãng ye, sagl-a wa a yaa f ba. Maan kom-bɩɩsã wa f ba-biisi," 
1Timothy5:2 la f maan pʋg-yãansã wa f ma-rãmba, la ges pʋg-sadbã wa f tão‑pogse, ne sõmblem zãnga." 
1Timothy5:3 Waoog pʋg‑kõap nins sẽn sɩd yaa pʋg‑kõapa 
1Timothy5:4 Pʋg‑kõor sã n tar kamb bɩ yagense, bɩ kom-kãens zãms tɩ reng n zoe b meng yirã rãmb nimbãanega, n lebs bãmb bũmb nins b sẽn dag n ges bãmb yell ne wã, bala, manesem-kãng nooma Wẽnnaam." 
1Timothy5:5 La pʋg‑kõor ning sẽn yaa-a pʋg‑kõor meng-menga, n vɩ a yembre, a teegrã fãa bee ne Wẽnnaam, n modgd ne bõosg la pʋʋsgo, yʋng la wĩntoog fãa." 
1Timothy5:6 La pʋg‑kõor ning sẽn vɩ yĩng sũ-noog pʋgẽ yaa kũum, baa ne a sẽn vɩ wã." 
1Timothy5:7 Ad bũmb nins fo sẽn tog n wilg-b tɩ b maane, tɩ rõadg da zĩnd b zut ye." 
1Timothy5:8 Ned sã n ka get a neb yelle, sẽn yɩɩd fãa yaa a zaka rãmba, yẽnda basa a tẽebã, la a yaa wẽng n yɩɩd ned ning sẽn ka-a tẽedã." 
1Timothy5:9 Pʋg‑kõor b sẽn tõe n gʋls a yʋʋr pʋg‑kõapã sebr zug tog n tara yʋʋm sẽn tat pis-yoobe, la a yɩ rao a yembr tãa paga," 
1Timothy5:10 tɩ nebã fãa miẽ t'a wuba kamba, n maan sãambã sãando, n pegs nin-sõamyã nao wã, la a sõng neb nins sẽn be yel-pakr pʋgẽ wã, la a bao tɩ maan tʋʋm-sõng buudã fãa." 
1Timothy5:11 La f ra sak n gʋls pʋg‑kõap nins sẽn yaa pʋg-bi wã ye. Bala, b ratmã sã n lak ne Kirisã, b rata sɩdba," 
1Timothy5:12 la rẽ yaa beegr ne bãmba, b sẽn sãam b pipi kaoolã yĩnga." 
1Timothy5:13 Sẽn paase, b minimda kʋɩʋʋngo, n zãmsd yiy saabo. Ka b sẽn ka tʋmdã bal ye, b yɩta yel-kãnesdba, n kẽed goam sẽn ka pak-ba, la b gomd goam b sẽn ka tog n gom ye." 
1Timothy5:14 Dẽ, mam datame tɩ pʋg‑kõap nins sẽn yaa-b pʋg-pẽbã kuil sɩdb n dog kamba, la b zã zagse, tɩ b ra wa n kõ bɛyã weer baa a yembr t'a gom wẽng ye." 
1Timothy5:15 Bala, kẽer zoe n wẽnemdame n pʋg a Sʋtãana." 
1Timothy5:16 Tẽed sã n tar pʋg‑kõor a zakẽ, bɩ a ges a yelle, tɩ da yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ wẽnd doogã tʋk a zɩɩb ye. Woto, b na tõog n ges b rãmb sẽn yaa pʋg‑kõap sɩd-sɩdã yelle." 
1Timothy5:17 Taoor dãmb nins sẽn get wẽnd doogã tʋʋm yell neerã tog n paama waoogr n yɩɩda, la sẽn yɩɩd fãa, yaa neb nins sẽn wɩngd ne koe-moonego la ne zãmsgã." 
1Timothy5:18 Bala, Wẽnnaam sebrã yetame tɩ: Da ning naaf ning sẽn pãbd-a ki wã noor yʋk ye, la tʋmtʋmd togda ne a yaoodo." 
1Timothy5:19 Ned sã n wa n dõd kãsma, sã n ka neb a yiib bɩ a tãab kaseto, da reeg ye." 
1Timothy5:20 Neb nins sẽn maand yel-wẽnã, leng-b nebã fãa sʋka, tɩ neb a taabã me na zoe rabeem." 
1Timothy5:21 Mam kota foom Wẽnnaam taoore, la a Zeezi Kiris taoore, la maleg-tũusdsã taoore, tɩ f tũ no-kãens n da tũus nebã, wall f bak neb kẽer n na n sõng ye." 
1Timothy5:22 Da yãg n tigs nebã ne f nus n kẽes-b Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdẽ wã ye, la f ra naag ned a yel-wẽnd maanegẽ ye. Fo mengã, tall f meng ne sõmblem." 
1Timothy5:23 Da yũudẽ koom yeyn-yeyn bal ye. Mi n yũ reezẽ rãam bilfu, f pʋ-zabrã ne f yĩn-pa-noomã sẽn wat wakat wʋsgã yĩnga." 
1Timothy5:24 Neb kẽer yel-wẽn yaa vẽenese, baa sẽn deng b sẽn na bʋ b bʋʋdo. La ne neb kẽere, b yel-wẽnã ka pukda, sã n ka b bʋʋdã zugẽ ye." 
1Timothy5:25 Woto me, tʋʋm‑sõamyã pukdame, la tʋʋm nins sẽn ka-b sõama wã me ka tõe n pa n ka puk ye." 
1Timothy6:1 Bɩ neb nins sẽn be yembd pʋgẽ wã ges b mens zu-soben-dãmbã wa neb sẽn zems ne waoogr fãa, tɩ b ra wa n paoog Wẽnnaam yʋʋrã la tẽeb zãmsgã ye." 
1Timothy6:2 La neb nins zu-soben-dãmb sẽn yaa Kiris tẽedbã, b ka tog n paoog-b n yetẽ tɩ bãmb yaa ba-biis ne taab ye. B tog n tʋma b yĩng sõama n yɩɩda, bala, b yaa tẽedbã, la nin-nongds bãmb sẽn maood tɩ maan-b neere. Ad bũmb nins fo sẽn tog n zãms nebã la f sagl-b tɩ b sake." 
1Timothy6:3 Ned sã n zãmsd nebã bũmb a to, la a ka kẽnd wa sẽn zems tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris gom-sõngã, la a wa tẽeb zãmsg sẽn zemsd ne Wẽnnaam sakrã," 
1Timothy6:4 soab‑kãng pida ne wuk-m-menga, la a ka mi baa fɩ ye. A sã n ka wẽed no-koɛɛma, la a ka maand zab gom-biis poorẽ, yaa bãag ne-a. Yaa bõn-kãens n wat ne sũ-kiiri, la ka-wʋm-taaba, la kãnegre, la tags-wẽng neb a taab zutu," 
1Timothy6:5 tɩ neb nins sɩɩs sẽn kẽ belgr pʋgẽ wã wẽed no-koɛɛm n ka basdẽ ye. Bãmb dãmb ka tar sɩd ye, la b rɩka Wẽnnaam sakrã tɩ yɩ arzegs baoob sore." 
1Timothy6:6 Sɩda, ned sã n maand sũ-noog ne bũmb nins a sẽn tara, Wẽnnaam sakrã sɩd yaa paoong so-kẽenga." 
1Timothy6:7 Bala, tõnd ka zã baa fɩ n wa tẽng zug ka ye, la tõnd ka tõe n zã baa fɩ me n loog ye." 
1Timothy6:8 Dẽ wã, tõnd sã n tar dɩɩb ne futu, rẽ na n seka tõndo." 
1Timothy6:9 Neb nins sẽn baood n lebg arzegs rãmbã lʋɩta makr pʋgẽ, la kũusr pʋgẽ, datem wʋsg sẽn yaa yalemd la wẽns pʋsẽ, la bõn-kãens kẽesda ninsaalbã sãoong la meneng pʋgẽ." 
1Timothy6:10 Bala, ligdã nonglem yaa bõn-wẽnsã fãa yẽgre. La neb kẽer sẽn nong ligd wʋsgã menemame n zãag ne tẽebã, la b sɩbga b mens ne tood buud toay-toaya." 
1Timothy6:11 La fo sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam nedã, zãag f meng ne bõn-kãense, la f bao tɩrlem, la Wẽnnaam sakre, la tẽebo, la nonglem, la sũ-mare, la sũ-bʋgsem." 
1Timothy6:12 Zab tẽeb zab-sõngã, gãd vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã, tɩ yaa rẽnda yĩng la Wẽnnaam bool foom, la yaa rẽnda yĩng me la fo sẽn kɩs kaset-sõngo, kaset rãmb wʋsg taoorã." 
1Timothy6:13 Mam yeta foom, Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt bõn-vɩɩsã fãa vɩɩmã taoore," 
1Timothy6:14 tɩ f sak tõodã tɩ rẽgd tosg ra zĩnd ye, tɩ rõadg da zĩndi, hal tɩ ta tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris pukrã." 
1Timothy6:15 Wakat sã n ta, sẽn tar-a barkã, n yaa b yembr tãa n so naamã, dĩm-dãmb Dĩma la zu-soben-dãmb Zu-soabã na n puka bõn-kãnga." 
1Timothy6:16 Yaa bãmb bal n ka kiida, n vɩ vẽenem ned sẽn ka tõe n ta pʋgẽ. Ned nan ka yãnd bãmb ye, la ned ka tõe n yãnd bãmb me ye. Yaa bãmb n so waoogre, la pãng sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa. Ãmina!" 
1Timothy6:17 Yeel neb nins sẽn tar arzegs dũni‑kãngã pʋgẽ wã tɩ b ra maan wilg-m-menga, la b da rɩk b teegrã n teeg arzegs b sẽn ka tar a hakɩɩk ye. Bɩ b teeg Wẽnnaam, tɩ b kõta bũmb fãa tɩ seke, tɩ tõnd tõe n tall n maan sũ-noog ne." 
1Timothy6:18 Bɩ b maan neere, la bɩ b yɩ neb sẽn maand tʋʋm-sõamy wʋsgo, la b yɩ neb sẽn kõte, la sẽn nong n pʋɩ b sẽn tarã ne neb a taaba." 
1Timothy6:19 Woto, bãmb na n bĩnga paoong wakat sẽn watã yĩnga, wa yẽbgr sẽn tar pãnga, tɩ b tõe n paam vɩɩm hakɩɩkã tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre." 
1Timothy6:20 Tɩmote, tall bũmb nins sẽn bĩng fo pʋgẽ wã, la f mao n zãag f meng ne gom-vɩɩd sẽn ka kẽed ne Wẽnnaam yell ye. Zãag ne no-koɛɛma, la ne zĩrẽ-bãngre." 
1Timothy6:21 Neb kẽer sẽn dɩk bõn-kãens tɩ yɩ b tʋʋmdã ka tõog n ta zĩig ning b sẽn da tog n ta tẽebã wɛɛngẽ wã ye. Bɩ barkã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. 
2Timothy1:1 Maam a Poll sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmda, Wẽnnaam daab yĩnga, sẽn zemsd ne vɩɩm kãabg ning sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã" 
2Timothy1:2 n gʋlsd m bi-nongr a Tɩmote. Bɩ barka, la nimbãan-zoeere, la laafɩ sẽn yit ba a Wẽnnaam la tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ wã zĩnd ne foom." 
2Timothy1:3 Mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam ning mam yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n sakdã, la mam me sẽn sakd ne sũur kaset sẽn yaa yɩlemdã barka. La mam ka basd tɩ pʋd fo yell m pʋʋsg pʋgẽ, wĩntoog ne yʋng ye." 
2Timothy1:4 Bala, mam ket n tẽra fo nintãmã, la mam data ne m sũur fãa n leb n yãnd-fo, tɩ m sũurã tõe n pid ne sũ-noogo." 
2Timothy1:5 Mam ket n tẽra tẽeb ning fo sẽn tara, sẽn ka kalem ne zãmbã yelle. Tẽ-kãng dag n zĩnda ne f yaab a Loyiisi, la ne f ma a Eniisi, la mam mii m sũurẽ t'a bee ne foom me." 
2Timothy1:6 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam sagend foom tɩ f yãdg Wẽnnaam kũunã fo sẽn deeg ne mam nus-tikrã bugum. 
2Timothy1:7 Bala, ka rabeem Sɩɩg la Wẽnnaam kõ tõnd ye, la yaa pãnga, la nonglem, la yam Sɩɩga." 
2Timothy1:8 Da zoe yãnd ne Zu-soabã kaset fo sẽn tog n kɩsã ye, la f ra zoe yãnd mam yĩnga, mam sẽn be bi-bees roogẽ bãmb yĩngã yĩng ye. Ayo! Naag maam n nams koe-noogã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam pãngã sõngr yĩnga." 
2Timothy1:9 Yaa bãmb n fãag tõndo, la b bool tõnd bool-sõngo. La ka tõnd tʋʋm yĩng ye, yaa bãmb mengã tʋlsem la bark ning b sẽn maan tõnd a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ hal sẽn deng wakat sẽn ka sɩngrã wakatã yĩnga." 
2Timothy1:10 Bark‑kãng lebga vẽeneg moasã ne tõnd fãagd a Zeezi Kiris pukrã. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ kũum pãng sa, la b kɩt tɩ vɩɩm la yĩng sẽn ka kiidã yell yɩ vẽenega, koe-noogã maasem yĩnga." 
2Timothy1:11 Wẽnnaam yãka maam tɩ m yɩ koe-no-kãng moaanda, a tẽn-tʋmda, a karen-saamba." 
2Timothy1:12 Mam sakda namsg koe-noogã yĩnga, la yãnd ka tar maam ye. Bala, mam mii m sẽn tẽ a soabã, la mam mii m sũur pʋgẽ tɩ b tara pãng tɩ gũ bũmb ning bãmb sẽn ning mam nugẽ wã hal tɩ da-kãng ta." 
2Timothy1:13 Gom-sõamy nins fo sẽn deeg mam nengẽ wã, tall rẽ tɩ yɩ mamsg fo yĩnga, tẽeb pʋgẽ, la nonglem sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã me pʋgẽ." 
2Timothy1:14 Bũmb ning sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã, tall-a, Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn vɩ tõnd pʋgẽ wã maasem yĩnga." 
2Timothy1:15 Fo miime tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn be Aazi wã basa maam. A Fizɛll ne a Hɛrmozɛn bee bãmb sʋka. 
2Timothy1:16 Bɩ Zu-soabã sudg a Onezifoor zaka rãmb barka. Bala, a belsa maam naoor wʋsgo, la mam bãensã yãnd ka tall-a ye." 
2Timothy1:17 A pʋs n baoo maam ne a sũur fãa, a sẽn wa Rommã, hal n yãnd maam." 
2Timothy1:18 Bɩ Zu-soabã kɩt t'a paam bãmb nimbãan-zoeer da-kãnga. Fo mii sõngr ninga fãa a sẽn sõng maam Efɛɛsã n yɩɩd neb a taabã sẽn mi. 
2Timothy2:1 Dẽ, m biiga, keng f meng bark ning sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ wã pʋgẽ." 
2Timothy2:2 Bũmb nins fo sẽn wʋm mam noorẽ kaset dãmb wʋsg taoorã, togs-b neb nins sẽn maand sɩda la sẽn tõe n zãms neb a taabã." 
2Timothy2:3 Naag maam n nams wa a Zeezi Kiris tãb‑bi-sõngo. 
2Timothy2:4 Sodaag ka kẽesd a toog nin-zaals vɩɩm yɛl pʋgẽ, a sã n dat tɩ ned ning sẽn dɩk-a yẽnda sodaarã sũur yɩ noog ne-a ye." 
2Timothy2:5 La reem-dɛɛmd ka paamd tõogr maanfo, a sã n ka tũ reemã soay fãa n deem ye." 
2Timothy2:6 Ka-koaad ning sẽn namsd a yĩng n tʋmdẽ wã n tog n yɩ pipi n yãgs a koodã biisi. 
2Timothy2:7 Wʋm m sẽn yetã võore. Bala, Zu-soabã na n weka fo yamã ne bũmb fãa." 
2Timothy2:8 Tẽeg a Zeezi Kiris yelle: bãmb vʋʋgame n bas kũum. Bãmb yaa a Davɩɩd yagenga, wa koe-noogã sẽn yeelã." 
2Timothy2:9 Yaa koe-no-kãng yĩng la mam namsda, hal tɩ b sẽb maam wa tʋʋm-wẽns maanda. La b ka sẽb Wẽnnaam goamã ye." 
2Timothy2:10 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam sakd bũmba fãa nin-tũusdsã yĩnga, tɩ bãmb me tõe n paam fãagr ning sẽn be a Zeezi Kiris pʋgẽ, la m paam ziir sẽn kõn sa." 
2Timothy2:11 Gom-kãngã yaa sɩda: Tõnd sã n ki ne bãmba, tõnd na n vɩɩmda ne bãmb me." 
2Timothy2:12 Tõnd sã n nang pãnga, tõnd na n dɩɩ naam ne bãmba. Tõnd sã n yeel tɩ d ka mi bãmba, bãmb me na yeel tɩ b ka mi tõnd ye." 
2Timothy2:13 Tõnd sã n ka maand sɩda, bãmb yẽ paada sɩdã pʋgẽ. Bala, bãmb ka tõe n yeele, n leb n kɩɩs tɩ b ka yeel ye." 
2Timothy2:14 Ad bũmb nins fo sẽn tog n tẽeg nebã, n togs-b Wẽnnaam taoor tɩ b gũus n lak ne no-koɛɛm gom-biis poorẽ t'a ka yõod baa bilf ye. B sẽn wat ne bũmb ninsi, yaa neb nins sẽn kelgdã sãoongo." 
2Timothy2:15 Nang pãng n yals Wẽnnaam taoor wa ned sẽn bɩ, tʋmtʋmd sẽn kõn sulg a zug ne yãnd ye. Yɩ ned sẽn togsd sɩd koɛɛgã ne tɩrlem." 
2Timothy2:16 Lak ne gom-vɩɩd sẽn ka kẽed ne wẽn-tũudmã yɛlã, bala, neb nins sẽn gomd gom-kãensã na n kell n kẽeda wẽngã pʋgẽ n paasdẽ." 
2Timothy2:17 Bãmb goamã na n dɩɩ wa solenkẽega. A Imene ne a Filɛt bee bãmb dãmb sʋka. 
2Timothy2:18 Bãmb bʋdg n basa sɩdã, n yetẽ tɩ kũum vʋʋgrã zoe n loogame, la b leebda neb kẽer tẽebo." 
2Timothy2:19 Baoosgo, yẽbg-kãenkãe ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yẽbgã yasame, la gomd ning sẽn pʋgdã ning-a-la bãnde: Zu-soabã mii neb nins sẽn yaa bãmb dẽndã, la ned ning fãa sẽn pʋt Zu-soabã yʋʋr tog n basa ka-tɩrlem." 
2Timothy2:20 Yi-kãseng pʋgẽ, ka sãnem bɩ wanzuri lagd bal n be ye. Kẽer me bee be n yaa ne raado wall ne tãndo. Teed kẽer tʋʋm bee waoogre, la kẽer me tʋʋmd yaa rẽgdo." 
2Timothy2:21 Woto, ned sã n yɩlgd a meng n yiisd rẽg-kãensã, a na n yɩɩ laoko a tʋʋm sẽn be waoogre, laok sẽn welg toore, n be yõod a soaalã yĩnga, la sẽn tõe n tall n maan tʋʋm-sõng buud fãa." 
2Timothy2:22 Zãag ne yãadem datem wẽnsã, la f bao tɩrlem, la tẽebo, la nonglem, la laafɩ ne neb nins sẽn pʋʋsd Zu-soabã ne sũy sẽn yaa yɩlma." 
2Timothy2:23 Zãgs no-koɛɛm sẽn yaa yalemdo la sẽn ka yõodã, fo sẽn mi tɩ b wata ne zabã yĩnga." 
2Timothy2:24 Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd yaool n ka tog ne zab ye, a tog n tara nonglem nebã fãa yĩnga, la a tar zãmsg ne zɩɩb tʋkr kũuni." 
2Timothy2:25 A tog n demsa no-koeem‑wẽedbã ne sũ-bʋgsem, n maand tẽeb tɩ Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ b paam sũ-lebgre, n tõog n bãng sɩdã," 
2Timothy2:26 tɩ b leb n paam yam-sõngo, la b tõog n yi sʋtãanã kũusa sẽn yõg bãmb tɩ b sak-a wã pʋgẽ." 
2Timothy3:1 Bãng tɩ yaoolem wakate, tood na n zĩndame." 
2Timothy3:2 Bala, nebã na n yɩɩ beed-rãmba, ligd-noangdba, yʋ-baoodba, wilg-m-mens rãmba, wẽn-paoogdba, ba-rãmb kɩɩsdba, zɩ-beoog-rãmba, neb toog sẽn ka be ne sõmblem," 
2Timothy3:3 sẽn ka mi nimbãan-zoeere, nen-kegems rãmba, tẽn-kãn-nebã, sẽn ka tar yõk-m-menga, nin-wẽnse, nin-sõamyã bɛɛba," 
2Timothy3:4 zãmb rãmba, sũ-tʋʋls rãmba, tɩ wuk-m-meng leo b ninã, tɩ b nong b sũ-noogã n yɩɩd b sẽn nong Wẽnnaamã." 
2Timothy3:5 B na n maanda wa b sakda Wẽnnaam, la b yaool n na n kɩɩsa sakrã pãnga. Zãag f meng ne nin-bãmbã." 
2Timothy3:6 Kẽer bãmb sʋk kẽeda rotẽ n belgd pagb sẽn pid ne yel-wẽna, la ratem toay-toay sẽn tar n lengdẽ," 
2Timothy3:7 tɩ b zãmsd wakat fãa la b zɩ n tõog n bãng sɩdã ye. 
2Timothy3:8 Wa a Zanɛs ne a Zãmbrɛs sẽn kɩɩs a Moyiisã, nin-kãensã kɩɩsda sɩdã me a woto. Bãmb yaa nebã, b tagsg sẽn sãame, la b tẽebã ka yalsd makr wakat ye." 
2Timothy3:9 La b ka na n leb n kẽng taoor ye. Bala, nebã fãa na n yãnda b yalemdã, wa b sẽn yã daop a yiibã rẽndã." 
2Timothy3:10 Ne foom, fo yãnda bũmb nins mam sẽn zãms nebã, mam yel-manesem, mam yam-yãkre, mam tẽebo, mam sũ-mare, mam nonglem, mam modgre," 
2Timothy3:11 neb sẽn nams maam, mam namsgo. Nams bõe buud la b ka nams maam Ãntiyoose, la Likoniyom, la Listri? Bõe wẽng la b ka maan maam? La Zu-soabã yolsa maam ne b fãa." 
2Timothy3:12 Neb nins fãa sẽn dat n vɩɩmd tẽeb vɩ-sõng Kiris pʋgẽ wã, neb na nams-ba." 
2Timothy3:13 La nin-wẽnsã ne bɛlgdbã na n kell n kẽeda wẽngã pʋgẽ n paasdẽ. Bãmb mensã yaa neb sẽn meneme, la b menesda neb a taab me." 
2Timothy3:14 Foom, kell n gãd bũmb ning fo sẽn zãmse, fo sẽn tẽed a soabã. Fo mii f sẽn zãms bõn-kãng ned ning nengẽ." 
2Timothy3:15 Hal f yãadem wakate, fo bãnga Wẽnnaam sebrã. B tõe n kõo foom yam tɩ f tõog n paam fãagre, fo sẽn tẽed a Zeezi Kirisã." 
2Timothy3:16 Wẽnnaam n kɩt tɩ b gʋls gʋls-sõamyã fãa, la b bee yõod zãmsg yĩnga, tɩ kɩt tɩ ned bãng a kongre, tɩ rems neda, tɩ wub ned tɩrlem pʋgẽ," 
2Timothy3:17 tɩ Wẽnnaam ned tõe n paam manegr la seglg tɩ maan tʋʋm-sõamy buud fãa. 
2Timothy4:1 Mam yeta foom Wẽnnaam taoore, la a Zeezi Kiris sẽn na n kao nin-vɩɩs la kũum bʋʋdã taoore, la bãmb waoongã ne b rĩungã yʋʋr yĩnga," 
2Timothy4:2 tɩ f moon koɛɛgã, tɩ f wɩng ne togsg wakat fãa, sã n yaa a togsg wakat wall ka a wakate. Mao tɩ nebã reeg tɩ gomdã yaa sɩda. Leng la f sagl ne sũ-mare la zãmsgo." 
2Timothy4:3 Bala, wakat n wat tɩ nebã ka na n leb n dat n wʋm sɩd koɛɛgã ye. La bãmb mensã yĩns ratem yĩnga, la kelgr yamleoog sẽn tar-bã yĩnga, b na n tigsa karen-saam-dãmb wʋsgo." 
2Timothy4:4 B na n yẽda b tʋbã ne sɩdã kelgre, la b yok-b ne soalmã kelgre." 
2Timothy4:5 La foom, gũus f meng ne bũmb fãa. Sak namsgo. Maan koe-noogã mooneg tʋʋmde. Maan f tʋʋmdã neere." 
2Timothy4:6 Bala, mam zoe n lebga wa koom b sẽn na n base, la mam loogr wakat kolgame." 
2Timothy4:7 Mam zaba zab-sõngo, mam zoee zoeesã n taase, mam talla tẽebo." 
2Timothy4:8 Moasã, Wẽnnaam bĩnga tɩrlem maanfã mam yĩnga. Zu-soabã sẽn yaa bʋ-kaood tɩrgã na n kõ-a-la maam da-kãngã. La ka maam bal la b na n kõ ye, yaa neb nins fãa sẽn na nong bãmb pukrã." 
2Timothy4:9 Nang pãng n wa mam nengẽ tao-tao. 
2Timothy4:10 Bala, a Demaas basa maam n looge, a sẽn nong moasã dũni wã yĩnga. A kẽnga Tesaloniki. A Kersãns kẽnga Galasi, t'a Tit kẽng Dalmasi." 
2Timothy4:11 Yaa a Luk a yembr tãa bal n be ne maam. Peeg a Mark n wa ne, bala, a bee yõod ne maam m tʋʋmdã pʋgẽ." 
2Timothy4:11 Yaa a Luk a yembr tãa bal n be ne maam. Peeg a Mark n wa ne, bala, a bee yõod ne maam m tʋʋmdã pʋgẽ." 
2Timothy4:12 Mam tʋma a Tisik Efɛɛse. 
2Timothy4:13 Fo sã n wa watẽ, bɩ f zã m fu-bedrã m sẽn bas Torwaasã, a Karpuus yirã, ne sɛba n wa, la sẽn yɩɩd fãa, yaa gãn-nomdsã." 
2Timothy4:14 Yõak a Alegsãndr maana maam wẽng wʋsgo. Zu-soabã na n lebs-a-la a tʋʋm yaoodo. 
2Timothy4:15 Fo me gũus ne-a t'a kɩɩsa tõnd goamã ne a pãng fãa. 
2Timothy4:16 Mam sẽn yals bʋʋdã zĩigẽ pipi wã, ned baa a yembr ka zĩnd ne maam ye, b fãa loog n basa maam. Bɩ Wẽnnaam da geelg b sẽn maanã ye." 
2Timothy4:17 Yaa Zu-soabã n zĩnd ne maam, n kõ-m pãnga, tɩ mam togs koɛɛgã zãnga, tɩ bu-zẽmsã wʋme. La b fãaga maam gɩgemdã noorẽ." 
2Timothy4:18 Zu-soabã na n yolsa maam ne tʋʋm-wẽng fãa, la b na n fãaga maam n kẽes b soolmẽ. Bãmb n so ziir wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Ãmina!" 
2Timothy4:19 Pʋʋs a Akilaas ne a pag a Piriska, la a Onezifoor zaka rãmba." 
2Timothy4:20 A Erast paa Korẽnte, la mam basa a Torfim Mile t'a ya bãada." 
2Timothy4:21 Mao n wa sẽn deng waoodã wẽnde. A Ebuloos ne a Pudẽnse, la a Linuus ne a Koloodya, la ba-biisã fãa pʋʋsda foom." 
2Timothy4:22 Bɩ Zu-soabã zĩnd ne foom. Bɩ Wẽnnaam barkã zĩnd yãmb zutu. 
Titus1:1 Maam a Poll sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmda la a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmd sẽn na paas Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã tẽebo la kɩt tɩ b bãng sɩd sẽn wat ne 
Titus1:2 wẽn-tũudum, n paam tẽeb pidsg gũudum ne vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sɩd soabã sẽn dag n kãab hal tɩ dũni nan ka naana." 
Titus1:3 La wakat sẽn ta, b puka b koɛɛgã koe-mooneg ninga bãmb sẽn kõ maana pʋgẽ, wa sẽn zems noor ninga tõnd fãagd a Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ wã." 
Titus1:4 Maam n tʋmd seb‑kãnga a Tit sẽn yaa mam meng biig tẽeb pʋgẽ wã, tẽeb ning sẽn yaa tõnd fãa rẽndã nengẽ, bɩ f paam bark la laafɩ sẽn yit tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam la d fãagd a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ." 
Titus1:5 Mam basa foom Kɛrɛt tẽng tɩ f maneg bũmb ning sẽn ket n tog n manegã, la f maan wa mam sẽn dag n wilg foom tɩ f yãk wẽnd-dot kãsem-dãmb tẽng fãa pʋgẽ wã." 
Titus1:6 Bãmb tog n yɩɩ neb sẽn ka tar yelle, la sẽn tar pag a yembr bala, la sẽn tar kamb sẽn yaa tẽedbã n ka maand tʋʋm dẽgdo, n yaa kom-sakdse." 
Titus1:7 Sɩd me, togame tɩ karen-saamb sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tʋʋma yel-gɛtã yɩ ned sẽn ka tar yell ye, karen-saamb ka tog n yɩ tɩta-neda la sũur sẽn yikd tao-tao ye, a ka tog n yɩ rã-yũuda, a ka tog n yɩ zab-zabda la ned sẽn baood paoong ne zãmb ye." 
Titus1:8 Yẽnda tog n yɩɩ ned sẽn maand sãamba sãando la a yɩ maan-neer zoa, la a yɩ ned sẽn tagsd sõama, la a ya nin-tɩrga la pʋ-peelem soaba la tõog-m-meng soaba." 
Titus1:9 Yẽnda tog n gãda sɩd koɛɛgã kãenkãe wa b sẽn dag zãms-a to-to wã tɩ yẽnda tõe n sagl neb a taabã wa sẽn zems tõ-sõamyã la a tõog kɩɩsdbã. 
Titus1:10 Sɩd me, neb wʋsg n be n yaa kɩɩsdba, la gom-vɩɩd-rãmba, ne bɛlgdba, sẽn yɩɩd fãa yaa tɩ yaa zũnsã sʋk la b be." 
Titus1:11 F tog n kɩtame tɩ b sĩndi. Bãmb lubda zags zãnga n zãmsd nebã bũmb sẽn ka zems ye, n baood paoong ne zãmbo." 
Titus1:12 Kɛrɛt-dãmbã ned a yembr sẽn yaa bãmb meng no-rɛɛs dag n yeelame yaa: «Wakat fãa Kɛrɛt nebã yaa zĩrẽ-be-rãmbã, pʋ‑to-rãmba, yão-be-neb sẽn yaa kʋɩɩmba.»" 
Titus1:13 Kaset‑kãnga yaa sɩda, rẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ f leng-b ne" 
Titus1:14 pãnga tɩ b paam tẽeb sẽn yaa sõama, tɩ b ra wa tũ Zʋɩf-rãmbã soalmã, la ninsaalbã tõodã sẽn basd sɩdã ye." 
Titus1:15 Bũmba fãa yaa yɩlemd ne neb nins sẽn yaa yɩlma. La neb nins sẽn maand yel-wẽna la sẽn ka Kiris tẽedbã, baa fʋɩ ka yɩlemd ne bãmb ye. Bãmb yamã ne b sũ-bãngrã rẽgmame." 
Titus1:16 B yetame tɩ b mii Wẽnnaam la b kɩɩsda Wẽnnaam ne b mensã tʋʋmã, bãmb yaa wẽns tɩ looge, la kɩɩsdba la neb sẽn ka tol n tõe n maan tʋʋm sõng ye." 
Titus2:1 La foom, zãms nebã bũmb nins sẽn zems ne tẽebã yẽbg sõngã." 
Titus2:2 Zãms nin-kẽembã tɩ b yɩ yõk-m-mens-rãmba, la b yɩ neb sẽn tar waoogre, la b yɩ mi-m-mens-rãmba, la b yɩ sõama tẽebã pʋga la nonglem pʋga, la b yɩ sũ-maasem-dãmba." 
Titus2:3 Wilg pʋg-yãansã me tɩ b tog n paama yel-manesem sẽn yaa sõama, tɩ b ka tog n yɩ nin-sãbsdba, wall rã-yũudb ye. Bãmb tog n kõo" 
Titus2:4 sagl sõamyã, sẽn na yɩl n zãms pʋg-bi wã tɩ b" 
Titus2:5 nong b sɩdba ne b kambã, la b yɩ mi-m-nems rãmba, la neb sẽn ka maand rẽgd ye, la b ges b zags yell neere, la b yɩ pʋg-sõamyã, sẽn sakd b sɩdba tɩ Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã ra paam tʋʋsg ye." 
Titus2:6 Sagl kom-bɩɩsã tɩ b yɩ mi-m-nems-rãmb bũmba fãa pʋgẽ. 
Titus2:7 La fo mengã yɩ mamsg ne tʋʋm-sõamyã maanego, la f zãms nebã ne koɛɛg sẽn yaa sɩda la sẽn zems reegre." 
Titus2:8 La f gom gom-tɩrs b sẽn kõn tõog n dõd-f ye, tɩ yãnd na yõk nin-kɩɩsdbã, la tɩ b kõn paam bõn-wẽng tõnd zug n gom ye." 
Titus2:9 Sagl yembsã tɩ b sak b zu-soben-dãmba bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, n maan sẽn noom-ba, la b ra yɩ kɩɩsdb ye," 
Titus2:10 la b ra zuk bũmb ye, la b maan pʋ-peelem sõama wakat fãa, t'a tõe n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd fãagdã koɛɛgã paam waoogr bũmb fãa pʋgẽ." 
Titus2:11 Wẽnnaam puka b barkã, bark ning sẽn wat ne fãagr ninsaalbã fãa yĩngã." 
Titus2:12 A zãmsda tõnd tɩ d bas wẽn-kɩɩsgo la dũniyã ratem wẽnsã la d vɩɩmd zamaan‑kãnga pʋgẽ ne gũus-m-menga la tɩrlem la d sak Wẽnnaam," 
Titus2:13 n gũud tõnd Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa kãseng la fãagdã, a Zeezi Kiris pukrã sẽn wat ne sũ-noogã ziirã." 
Titus2:14 A Zeezi Kiris kõo b meng tõnd yĩnga, tɩ fãag tõnd ne yel-wẽn fãa n kɩt tɩ tõnd lebg bãmb neb b sẽn yɩlge, la sẽn wɩngd ne tʋʋm-sõamyã maanego." 
Titus2:15 Fo sẽn tog n maan la a woto, sagl nebã la f leng-b ne noore. Da sak tɩ ned paoog-f ye." 
Titus3:1 Tẽeg-b tɩ b sak soolem taoor dãmba ne pãn-soaadbã, tɩ b yɩ sakdba, la b sak n maan tʋʋm‑sõama fãa." 
Titus3:2 Tɩ b ra gom ned wẽng ye, tɩ b ra yɩ zab zabdb ye, la b yɩ neb sẽn baood laafɩ, sẽn nong nebã, n maand sũ-bʋgsem ne nebã fãa." 
Titus3:3 Bala, pĩnda tõnd me rag n yaa yalemba, la nin-kɩɩsdba, la neb sẽn bʋdge, la ratem wẽns buud toay-toay la sũ-no-yood n dag n so tõndo. Tõnd dag n vɩɩ pʋ-toog la sũ-kĩir pʋga, tõnd dag n kisa neb a taaba tɩ bãmb me kis tõndo." 
Titus3:4 La tõnd fãagd a Wẽnnaam sõmblmã la b nonglem nebã fãa yĩngã sẽn puki," 
Titus3:5 bãmb fãaga tõndo, la ka tõnd sẽn tʋm tʋʋm-tɩrs yĩng ye, la yaa bãmb mengã nimbãan-zoeer yĩng la b fãag tõndo, bãmb soo tõnd ne soob sẽn palemda, tɩ Sɩɩg-sõng tũnug rẽnda n kõ tõnd rogem paalga la vɩ-paalga." 
Titus3:6 Yaa Sɩɩg-sõng ninga Wẽnnaam sẽn tũnug tõnd fãagd a Zeezi Kiris n sik-a tõnd zug wʋsgã," 
Titus3:7 tɩ ne bãmb barkã b sã n kɩt tɩ tõnd lebg tɩrse, bɩ tõnd lebg pʋɩt-n-taas ne vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã tõnd sẽn gũudã." 
Titus3:8 Gom-kãnga yaa sɩda, la mam datame tɩ fo togs-a nebã tɩ neb nins sẽn tẽ Wẽnnaamã na wɩng ne tʋʋm‑sõama maanego. Yõwã n be neere la a tar yõod ne ninsaalba." 
Titus3:9 Lak ne yalem goamã, la rot rɩkre, la ka-wʋmd-taaba, la nokoɛɛma tõog poorẽ. Bala, b ka tar yõodo la b yaa gom vɩɩdo." 
Titus3:10 Ned ning sẽn wat ne welgr sã n paam keoogr vugri, la naoor a yiibu, n ka sak bɩ f lak f meng ne-a." 
Titus3:11 Tɩ fo miime tɩ ned a woto basa so-sõngã n dɩk so-wẽngã, n maand yel-wẽna, la a mongda a meng bʋʋm." 
Titus3:12 Mam sã n wa n tʋm a Artemaas bɩ a Tisik fo nengẽ, bɩ f nang pãng n wa paam maan Nikopoli tẽnga, bala mam yãka yam n na n zĩnd be waooda wẽnde." 
Titus3:13 Ges tõ-mit a Zenaas ne a Apoloos so-toakã yelle, tɩ bũmb da wa n paoog-b ye." 
Titus3:14 Tõnd nebã me tog n zãmsame tɩ maan tʋʋm-sõamyã n tõog n sõng ne yɛl sẽn dat manegr tao-tao, tɩ bãmb da yɩ neb sẽn ka wat ne baa fɩ ye." 
Titus3:15 Neb nins fãa sẽn be ne maamã pʋʋsda foom. Pʋʋs neb nins sẽn be tẽebã pʋgẽ n nong tõndã. Bɩ Wẽnnaam barkã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. 
Philemon1:1 Maam a Poll sẽn yaa bi-bɛɛg a Zeezi Kiris yĩnga ne d ba-biig a Tɩmote n tʋmd seb-kãngã tõnd zo-nongr la 
Philemon1:2 d tʋmd-n-taag a Fɩlmo nengẽ, ne d ba-bi-poak a Apiya la tõnd soda-taag a Arsɩp ne a Zeezi tẽedbã sẽn tigimd fo zakẽ wã." 
Philemon1:3 Bɩ tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam la Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris sik b bark la b laafɩ yãmb zutu. 
Philemon1:4 Mam pʋʋsda m Wẽnnaamã bark daar fãa n tẽegd 
Philemon1:5 fo yell m pʋʋsgã pʋga. Bala, mam wʋmda b sẽn gomd fo sẽn tar nonglem ning Wẽnnaam nebã fãa yĩngã la fo sẽn tẽed Zu-soab a Zeezi wã." 
Philemon1:6 Mam kota Wẽnnaam tɩ fo sẽn lagem tõnd n tar tẽeb ningã na kɩt tɩ nebã bãng bõn-sõama nins fãa sẽn maand tõnd sʋk a Zeezi Kiris yĩnga. 
Philemon1:7 Ba-biiga, mam paama sũ-no-kãsenga ne belsgo, fo nonglmã yĩnga, bala, fo yĩnga, Wẽnnaam nebã sũy paama belsgo." 
Philemon1:8 Yaa woto yĩnga, baa mam sẽn tar lohorem wʋsg Kiris pʋgẽ tɩ gʋls n wilg foom f sẽn tog n maana," 
Philemon1:9 mam nong n yõka foom sɛɛg ne nonglem n yɩɩda. Yaa maam a Polle, nin-kẽem a Polle, la sẽn paas moasã, mam bee bi-bees roog a Zeezi Kiris yĩnga." 
Philemon1:10 Mam kota foom m biig a Onezɩm yĩnga mam sẽn dog m balgr pʋgẽ wã. 
Philemon1:11 Pĩnda, yẽnda ra ka tar yõod ne foom ye, la moasã yẽnda na n talla yõod ne foom wala a sẽn tar yõod ne maamã." 
Philemon1:12 Mam lebs n tʋmd-a-la fo nengẽ, yẽnda wẽnda wa mam meng bala." 
Philemon1:13 Mam da nongẽ lame n kɩt t'a pa ne maam, n deeg fo zĩigẽ n sõng maam, mam sẽn be bi-bees roog moasã koe-noogã yĩngã." 
Philemon1:14 La mam da ka rat n maan baa fʋɩ tɩ ka tũ ne fo noor ye. Tɩ fo yel-sõmda ra yɩ ne modgr ye, la a na n yɩɩ ne yamleoogo." 
Philemon1:15 Tõe t'a Onezɩm sẽn loog n bas foom wakat bilf yĩnga yaa sẽn na n yɩl tɩ f leb n deeg-a wakat fãa yĩnga.
