Philemon1:16 La ka tɩ reeg-a wala yamb ye, la yaa reegr sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd yamba, reeg yẽnda wa ba-bi-nongre. Yẽnda yaa mam ba-bi-nongre, la a leb n yaa fo ba-bi-nongr n yɩɩda. Sã n yaa yĩnga pʋga wala sã n yaa Zu-soaba tũudum pʋga." 
Philemon1:17 Dẽ wã, fo sã n get maam wa f zoa, bɩ f reeg a Onezɩm wa fo sẽn deegd mam mengã." 
Philemon1:18 La yẽnda sã n da beega foom wala a sã n tara fo samde, bɩ f geelg yõwã wa mam dẽnda." 
Philemon1:19 Mam a Poll n gʋlsd gom-kãnga ne mam menga nug tɩ m na n yao-f lame. La mam ka na n yeel foom tɩ fo tara samde, la fo menga yaa maam n so ye." 
Philemon1:20 N-yẽe, m ba-biiga, bɩ f maan yel-sõm-kãngã Zu-soabã yĩng n kõ maam, bels mam sũur Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ." 
Philemon1:21 Yaa mam sẽn mi tɩ fo na n sakame wã yĩng la mam sẽn gʋlsd foomã, n miẽ tɩ f na n sak n maaname tɩ yɩɩd mam sẽn kot-fã." 
Philemon1:22 La f kell n segl gãag zĩig mam yĩnga, bala yãmb pʋʋsgã yĩnga mam tara tẽeb tɩ b na n basa maam n kõ yãmba." 
Philemon1:23 A Epafras sẽn be bi-bees roog pʋg ne maam a Zeezi Kiris yĩnga pʋʋsda foom," 
Philemon1:24 la a Mark ne a Aristark la a Demaas la a Luk sẽn yaa mam tʋmd-n-taasã me pʋʋsda foom. 
Philemon1:24 la a Mark ne a Aristark la a Demaas la a Luk sẽn yaa mam tʋmd-n-taasã me pʋʋsda foom. 
Philemon1:25 Bɩ tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris barkã soog yãmb sũyã. 
Hebrews1:1 Wẽnnaam sẽn da tall bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã n pĩnd n gom naoor wʋsg ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã ne manesem buud wʋsgã," 
Hebrews1:2 wakat-kãngã sẽn yaa yaoolem dayã, bãmb tũnuga b Bi-riblã n gom ne tõndo. Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ b soog bũmb fãa, la yaa b Bi-riblã la Wẽnnaam tall n naan dũni fãa." 
Hebrews1:3 Bi-ribl‑kãng sẽn yaa b ba wã ziir yãgbã, la b ba wã yalẽ pukrã n zãad bũmbã fãa ne b gomd sẽn tar pãngã. Bãmb sẽn yɩlg nebã n yiis b yel-wẽnã n sa, b zĩnda naab a Wẽnd dɩtg hal saasẽ." 
Hebrews1:4 Bãmb yɩɩda malegsã hal zĩig sẽn zãra, la rẽ kɩtame tɩ b paam yʋʋr sẽn yaa toor fasɩ ne malegsã rẽnda." 
Hebrews1:5 Sɩd me, malɛɛk bʋg la Wẽnnaam yeel baa vugr tɩ: Fo yaa mam bi-ribla, yaa maam n dog foom dũndã? Wall b yeel me tɩ: Mam na n yɩɩ yẽnda ba, la yẽnda na n yɩɩ mam biiga?" 
Hebrews1:6 La bãmb sẽn na n wa ne b Bi-ribl kãsengã tẽng zugã, b yeelame yaa: Bɩ Wẽnnaam malegsã fãa waoog-a." 
Hebrews1:7 La b goma malegsã yell n yeel yaa: B kɩtame tɩ b malegsã yɩ sobdo, tɩ b tʋmtʋmdbã yɩ bug-vɩlemse." 
Hebrews1:8 La bãmb yeela b Bi-riblã yaa: Wẽnnaam, fo naam geer paada wakat sẽn kõn sa, la fo naam dasaarã yaa tɩrlem dasaare." 
Hebrews1:9 Fo nonga tɩrlem, la f kisga wẽnga. Wẽnnaam, yaa rẽndã n kɩt tɩ f Wẽnnaamã kõ foom sũ-noogo, la b bas f tũud-n-taasã." 
Hebrews1:10 Wẽnnaam leb n yeelame yaa: Zu-soaba, yãmba, yãmb yẽbga tẽngã hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, la yaa yãmb nusã n maan saasã." 
Hebrews1:11 B fãa na n sãamame, la yãmba, yãmb paada y zĩigẽ. B fãa na n kʋdga wa futu." 
Hebrews1:12 Yãmb na n põd-la wa kobre, la b na n tegs-b-la wa futu. La yãmba, yãmb na n ket n yaa y sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, la yãmb yʋʋm ka na n tall tɛk ye." 
Hebrews1:13 La malɛɛk-bʋg la Wẽnnaam yeel baa vugr tɩ: Zĩnd mam dɩtgo, hal tɩ m wa kɩt tɩ f bɛɛbã lebg f nao roagendega?" 
Hebrews1:14 Dẽ yĩnga, malegsã fãa ka sɩɩs sẽn tʋmd Wẽnnaam yĩnga, tɩ Wẽnnaam mi n tʋm-b tɩ b tɩ maan tʋʋmd n sõng neb nins sẽn tog n deeg fãagrã tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩrã la?" 
Hebrews2:1 Rẽndã n kɩt tɩ tõnd tog n tags bũmb ning d sẽn wʋmã yell neer n yɩɩda, tɩ d da wa bʋdg ye." 
Hebrews2:2 Bala, sã n yaa tɩ gomd ning malegsã sẽn yeelã maana a tʋʋmde, la beegr fãa ne kɩɩsg fãa sã n paama sɩbgr wa sẽn zemse," 
Hebrews2:3 tõnd na n yɩ a wãn n põse, tõnd sã n maan yaal-yaal n ka ges fãagr sẽn yaa kãseng a woto wã yelle? Zu-soabã meng n deng n gom fãag-kãng yell a sɩngrã wakate, tɩ neb nins sẽn wʋm fãagrã yellã wilg tõnd t'a yaa sɩda." 
Hebrews2:4 Bala Wẽnnaam mengã maana bãnã la bõn-yɛɛsdse, la bõn-bãn toay-toaya, la ne koees Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõt wa Wẽnnaam sẽn datã, n wilg tɩ sẽn gomd-bã kaset yaa sɩda." 
Hebrews2:5 Bala, ka malegsã la Wẽnnaam kõ dũni ning sẽn wat tɩ tõnd gomd a yellã tɩ b soog ye." 
Hebrews2:6 La zĩig a yembre, ned n kɩs kaset n yeele: Ninsaal yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tẽr a yelle? La ninsaal biig yaa bõe tɩ yãmb get a yelle?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wakat bilf yĩnga, yãmb kɩtame t'a ka ta malegsã ye, la y kõ-a-la ziir la waoogre, [n kɩt t'a soog bũmb nins yãmb nusã sẽn naanã.]" 
Hebrews2:8 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ bũmbã fãa sakd-a. Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩt tɩ bũmbã fãa sakd-a wã, Wẽnnaam ka bas bũmb baa a yembr t'a ka sakd ninsaal ye. Baoosgo, moas-moasã wã tõnd ka ne tɩ bũmbã fãa sakda bãmb ye." 
Hebrews2:9 A Zeezi, soab ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩt tɩ wakat bilf pʋgẽ b ka ta malegsã, tõnd geta bãmb ne yamleoogo, bãmb sẽn paam ziir la waoogre, kũum ning b sẽn nams n ki wã yĩnga. Woto, Wẽnnaam nimbãan-zoeerã yĩnga, a Zeezi lemba kũum tõnd fãa sõngr yĩnga." 
Hebrews2:10 Sɩd me, a taa Soab ning sẽn naan-a bũmb fãa n kɩt tɩ b beẽ b meng yĩnga, Soab ning sẽn tall-a kom-dibli wʋsg n wa n kẽes ziir pʋgẽ wã yam tɩ kɩt t'a Zeezi, sẽn wa-a ne nebã fãagrã tũnug namsg n paam zemsg zãnga." 
Hebrews2:11 Bala, soab ning sẽn maneg nebã tɩ b yɩ sõama wã, la b rãmb nins b sẽn maneg tɩ b lebg sõama wã yaa ba a yembre. Rẽndã n kɩt tɩ yãnd ka tar a Zeezi tɩ bool bãmb tɩ b ba-biis" 
Hebrews2:12 wakat ning b sẽn yeel tɩ: Mam na n togsa m ba-biisã yãmb yʋʋrã, mam na n pẽga yãmb nebã sẽn tigmã sʋka." 
Hebrews2:13 B leb n yeelame yaa: Mam na n maana yard ne Wẽnnaam, n leb n paase: «Ad maam ne kamb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ maamã.»" 
Hebrews2:14 Woto yĩnga, kambã sẽn yaa zɩɩm a ye la neong a ye ne b ba wã yĩnga, woto me, a Zeezi me yaa a woto, sẽn na yɩlg tɩ ne bãmb kũumã, bɩ b sãam soab ning sẽn da tar-a pãng tɩ kʋ wã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ sʋtãanã," 
Hebrews2:15 la b yols b rãmb sẽn dag n be yembd pʋgẽ b vɩɩmã tɛka, b sẽn zoet kũumã yĩngã." 
Hebrews2:16 Bala, vẽeneg fasɩ wã, ka malegsã la bãmb sõngd ye, la yaa a Abrahaam yagensã la bãmb sõngda." 
Hebrews2:17 Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ bãmb da tog n wẽneg b ba-biisã bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, n tõog n lebg maan-kʋʋd kãsem sẽn pid ne nimbãan-zoeere, la sẽn maand sɩd ne Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã, n tõog n yiis nebã yel-wẽnã." 
Hebrews2:18 Bala, bãmb mengã sẽn nams wakat ning b sẽn paam makrã, bãmb tõe n sõnga neb nins sẽn paamd makrã." 
Hebrews3:1 Yaa woto yĩnga, m ba-biis sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, la sẽn naag n paam Wẽnnaam boolgã, bɩ y ges a Zeezi sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋme, tõnd tẽebã tʋʋm pʋgẽ wã." 
Hebrews3:2 Bãmb maana sɩd ne a soab ning sẽn yãk bãmbã, wa a Moyiis sẽn maan sɩd ne Wẽnnaam wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ wã." 
Hebrews3:3 Sɩd me, b gesame t'a Zeezi toga ne ziir sẽn yaa kãseng n yɩɩd a Moyiis dẽndã, wa ro-metã sẽn tog ne ziir n yɩɩd roogã mengã." 
Hebrews3:4 Bala, roog fãa yaa ned n me, la soab ning sẽn me-a bũmb fãa wã yaa Wẽnnaam." 
Hebrews3:5 Sã n yaa ne a Moyiisi, a maana sɩd ne bũmb fãa wẽnd doogẽ wã, n yɩ tʋmtʋmda, n na n kɩs bũmb ning b sẽn pĩnd n togs a yellã kaseto." 
Hebrews3:6 La a Zeezi maanda sɩd ne wẽnd doogã, bãmb sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã. Tõnd n yaa bãmb roogã, sã n yaa tɩ tõnd kell n talla raoodo, la saag-sõng ning tõnd sẽn yet tɩ d tarame wã kãenkãe hal tɩ ta wakat saabo." 
Hebrews3:7 Rẽnda n kɩt t'a wa Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yetã: Rũndã, yãmb sã n wʋm bãmb koɛɛga," 
Hebrews3:8 bɩ y ra keng y sũyã wa yãmb ba-rãmbã sẽn maan kɩɩsgã wakate, makrã wakat weoogẽ wã," 
Hebrews3:9 zĩig ning bãmb sẽn mak maam n na n gese, zĩig ning b sẽn yã tʋʋm nins mam sẽn maanã yʋʋm pis-naasã ye." 
Hebrews3:10 Rẽndã n kɩt tɩ mam sũur sãam ne zamaan‑kãng nebã, n yeel yaa: «Bãmb sũyã bʋdgda wakat fãa, la b ka bãng mam sẽn datã ye.»" 
Hebrews3:11 La m sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ, mam wẽename n yeele: «Hakɩɩka, b ka na n paam vʋʋsg ning mam sẽn na n kõ-bã ye.»" 
Hebrews3:12 Dẽ yĩngã, m ba-biisi, gũus y mens tɩ ned baa a yembr yãmb sʋkã da tall sũur sẽn yaa wẽng la sẽn ka tẽeda, hal t'a wa wẽnemd n bas Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã ye." 
Hebrews3:13 Ayo! Wakat ning tɛk ned sẽn tõe n yeel tɩ ‹rũndã›, bɩ y sagl taaba, tɩ yel-wẽnã belgr da wa kɩt tɩ ned sũur riglim ye." 
Hebrews3:14 Bala, b kɩtame tɩ tõnd lebg Kirisã tũud-n-taase, la yaa tõnd sẽn na n kell n tall d pipi pel-kɛgengã kãenkãe," 
Hebrews3:15 wakat ning b sẽn yeel tɩ: Rũndã, yãmb sã n wʋm bãmb koɛɛga, bɩ y ra keng y sũyã wa yãmb ba-rãmbã sẽn maan kɩɩsgã wakatã ye." 
Hebrews3:16 Yãmb sẽn gesã, yaa ãnda rãmb n wʋm Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã la b kell n bao Wẽnnaam noore, sã n ka neb nins a Moyiis sẽn tall n yiis Ezɩptã?" 
Hebrews3:17 La ãndã rãmb la Wẽnnaam sũur sãam ne yʋʋm pis-naasã, sã n ka b rãmb nins sẽn maan yel-wẽnã, b rãmb kũum sẽn pa weoogẽ wã?" 
Hebrews3:18 La yaa ãnda rãmb la Wẽnnaam kãab n yeel tɩ b kõn paam vʋʋsg ning bãmb sẽn na n kõ wã, sã n ka b rãmb nins sẽn kɩɩsã?" 
Hebrews3:19 Woto, tõnd yãame tɩ b ka tõog n kẽ be, b ka-tẽebã yĩnga." 
Hebrews4:1 Woto yĩnga, kãabg tɩ paam vʋʋsg ning bãmb sẽn na n kõ wã sẽn ket n be wã, bɩ d maan yɛɛsg tɩ neb kẽer na n wa bas tɩ sãam n sa tɩ b yaool n watẽ." 
Hebrews4:2 Bala, koe-noogã b sẽn moonã, yaa tõnd la bãmb me. La gomd ning b sẽn wʋmã ka zĩnd yõod ne-b ye, bala neb nins sẽn wʋm koɛɛgã ka reeg-a ne tẽeb ye." 
Hebrews4:3 La tõnd dãmb sẽn tẽ wã, tõnd paamda vʋʋsg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel tɩ: Mam sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ, mam wẽename n yeel tɩ hakɩɩka, b kõn paam vʋʋsg ning mam sẽn na n kõ wã ye. Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã yaool n da maanda hal dũni naaneg wakate." 
Hebrews4:4 Bala, zĩig a yembre, Wẽnnaam goma yopoe daarã yell n yeele: La Wẽnnaam basa b tʋʋmã fãa yopoe daarã n vʋʋse." 
Hebrews4:5 La zĩ-kãngã yɛsa, b leb n yeelame: Hakɩɩka, b ka na n paam vʋʋsg ning mam sẽn na n kõ wã ye." 
Hebrews4:6 Woto, sẽn yaa tɩ yaa neb kẽer n tar noor tɩ paam-a, tɩ neb nins sẽn yɩ-b pipi n deeg koe-noogã ka tõog n kẽ b ka-tẽebã yĩngã," 
Hebrews4:7 Wẽnnaam leb n yãka daar a to yɛsa, sẽn yaa rũndã, n tũnug a Davɩɩd noor kaoosg pʋgẽ n yeel wa sẽn togs poorẽ wã yaa: Rũndã, yãmb sã n wʋm bãmb koɛɛgã, bɩ y da keng y sũyã ye." 
Hebrews4:8 Sɩd me, a Zozoe sã n da tõogame n kõ nebã vʋʋsgã, Wẽnnaam dag n ka na n gom vʋʋsg daar a to yell ye." 
Hebrews4:9 Woto yĩnga, vʋʋsg daar a to n be Wẽnnaam nebã yĩnga." 
Hebrews4:10 Bala, ned ning sẽn deegd vʋʋsg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõtã me basda a tʋʋmã n vʋʋsd wa Wẽnnaam sẽn bas b rẽnd n vʋʋsã." 
Hebrews4:11 Bɩ d kẽ vʋʋs-kãng pʋgẽ tao-tao, tɩ ned baa a yembr da wa tũ kɩɩsgã mamsg n lʋɩ ye." 
Hebrews4:12 Bala, Wẽnnaam goamã vɩɩme, la a tara tõogre, n saas sõama wa zabr sʋʋg sẽn tar noy a yiibu. A kẽedame, hal n tõe n welg vɩɩm ne Sɩɩg n bake, n welg kõb-sũgds ne sɩɩlem toay-toayã n bake. A yaa ninsaal sũur manesem la tagsg bʋ-kaooda." 
Hebrews4:13 Bõn-naandg baa a yembr ka be Wẽnnaam sẽn ka ne ye. Bũmb fãa yaa vẽenes la bɛɛl ne soab ning tõnd sẽn na n yals a taoor n togs d yɛlã. 
Hebrews4:14 Tõnd sẽn tar maan-kʋʋr kãsem sẽn pɩʋʋg saasẽ, Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã yĩnga, bɩ d tall tẽeb ning tõnd sẽn tarã kãenkãe." 
Hebrews4:15 Bala, tõnd ka tar maan-kʋʋd kãsem sẽn ka tõe n wʋm tõnd pãn-komsmã võor ye. Bãmb paama makr ne bũmb fãa wa tõndo, la b ka maan yel-wẽnd ye." 
Hebrews4:16 Woto yĩnga, bɩ d kolg bark soab a Wẽnnaam geerã ne pɛl-kɛgenga, tɩ d tõe n paam tɩ b zoe d nimbãanega, la d zĩnd bark bãmb nifẽ, tɩ d tõe n paam sõngr wakat ning d sẽn tog n paame." 
Hebrews5:1 Sɩd me, maan-kʋʋd kãsem fãa b sẽn yãk ninsaalb sʋkã, yaa t'a na tʋm Wẽnnaam tʋʋm ninsaalb sʋka, n maan yel-wẽnã sugr maoong n yõk Wẽnnaam sɛɛga." 
Hebrews5:2 Yẽnda tõe n wʋma zɩtbã ne neb nins sẽn bʋdgã võore, bala yẽnda mengã bee pãn-komsem pʋgẽ." 
Hebrews5:3 Yaa pãn-komsem‑kãng yĩng la yẽnda tog n maan yel-wẽnã sugr maand n yõk Wẽnnaam sɛɛg a mengã yĩnga, la nebã me yĩnga." 
Hebrews5:4 Ned baa a yembr ka tõe n bao waoogr n yik n kẽes a meng maan-kʋʋr kãoseng tʋʋmd pʋgẽ ye. Yaa Wẽnnaam n boond a soaba, wa b sẽn bool a Aarõ mengã." 
Hebrews5:5 Woto me, ka Kiris n bao ziir‑kãng n lebg maan-kʋʋd kãsem ye. Yaa soab ning sẽn yeel-a tɩ: «Fo yaa mam bi-ribla, yaa maam n dog foom rũndã.»" 
Hebrews5:6 n leb n yeel zĩig a to tɩ: «Fo yaa maan-kʋʋd wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga, wa sẽn zems a Melkisedɛk sẽn yaa to-to wã.»" 
Hebrews5:7 Wakat ning a Zeezi sẽn dag n dɩk yĩngã, yaa bãmb n pʋʋs n kos Wẽnnaam ne kelemse, la ne nintãm. Bãmb pʋʋs n kosa a soab sẽn tõe n põsg bãmb ne kũumã. B paama leokre, b sõmblmã yĩnga," 
Hebrews5:8 la baa ne bãmb sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã, namsg ning bãmb sẽn namsã zãmsa bãmb sakre." 
Hebrews5:9 La b sẽn wa n kɩt tɩ bãmb zems zãnga, bãmb waa ne fãagr sẽn kõn sa, neb nins fãa sẽn sakd bãmbã yĩnga." 
Hebrews5:10 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ b Bi-riblã yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem sẽn wẽnd a Melkisedɛke. 
Hebrews5:11 Tõnd tara bũmb wʋsg sẽn na gom yel-kãng wɛɛngẽ, la bũmb kẽer bilsg yaa toogo. Bala, yãmb wʋmbã yaa maasga." 
Hebrews5:12 Sẽn kaoos n ta moasã, tɩ yãmb da tog n yɩ karen-saam-dãmbã, yãmb leb n datame tɩ b zãms yãmb Wẽnnaam yel-soalmã pipi koees sẽn yaa naana wã. Yãmb leb n tõdgda rɩ-taok n dat bĩisim." 
Hebrews5:13 La ned ning fãa sẽn ket n yẽsemd bĩisim nan ka mi tɩrlem ne ka-tɩrlem goam n bak ye, bala a yaa biiga." 
Hebrews5:14 Rɩ-taok yaa neb sẽn bɩ yĩnga, neb nins sẽn mao n mi sõama ne wẽng n bakã yĩnga." 
Hebrews6:1 Yaa woto yĩng la tõnd yõsgd Kiris goamã zãms-naana wã, n baood tɩ yɩ sõama zãnga, n ka leb n be yẽbg-paalg sẽn yaa: Tek yam n bas tʋʋm nins sẽn ya kũumã," 
Hebrews6:2 tɩ tẽ Wẽnnaam, zãmsg lisg wɛɛngẽ, nus tikri, la kũum vʋʋgre la sɩbgr sẽn ka sɛta yell ye." 
Hebrews6:3 Bũmb ning tõnd sẽn na n maan la woto, wẽnd sã n sake." 
Hebrews6:4 Sã n yaa ne neb nins sẽn zoe n paam vẽnegre, n lemb kũun ning sẽn yit yĩngrã, n paam pʋɩɩr ne Sɩɩg-sõngo," 
Hebrews6:5 n lemb Wẽnnaam gom-noogã la pãng ning sẽn na n zĩnd nindaar beoogã," 
Hebrews6:6 n yaool n lʋɩ wã, ned ka tõe tɩ b leb n kos sugr yɛs ye. Bãmb lebd n kaada Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã, n paoogd bãmb nebã taoore." 
Hebrews6:7 Sɩd me, pʋʋg sã n paam sa-koom wakat fãa n womd biis neb nins sẽn koaad-a wã yĩnga, pʋʋgã me paamda pʋɩɩr ne Wẽnnaam barkã." 
Hebrews6:8 La sã n yaa gõos ne mo-gõos n yit be bala, b yetame t'a ka sõama ye, n dat n kãab-a wẽnga, la a wat n baasa ne bugum yõogre." 
Hebrews6:9 Baa ne tõnd sẽn gomd a woto wã, m ba-bi-nongdse, tõnd mii d sũurẽ tɩ yãmb sẽn yaa woto wã yaa sõama n yɩɩd a woto, la rẽ tõe n waa ne fãagre." 
Hebrews6:10 Bala, Wẽnnaam ka ka-tɩrlem soaba, n na n yĩm yãmb tʋʋm sõamyã, wall nonglem ning yãmb sẽn wilg Wẽnnaam yʋʋrã yĩnga, ne tʋʋm nins yãmb sẽn maan nin-sõamyã wã yĩng n ket n maandẽ wã ye." 
Hebrews6:11 La tõnd datame tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa kell n wɩng hal tɩ ta wakat saabo, tɩ y tõe n paam saag-sõng meng-menga," 
Hebrews6:12 tɩ y ra wa yɩ kʋɩɩmb ye, la bɩ y maan togs-n-taar ne neb nins sẽn maand tẽeb la sũ-mare, n deegd pʋɩɩr ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãabã." 
Hebrews6:13 Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam sẽn wa n na n maan kãabg ne a Abrahaamã, bãmb wẽena ne b menga, ned a to sẽn ka be n yɩɩd bãmbã yĩnga, la b wẽena ne b meng" 
Hebrews6:14 n yeele: Hakɩɩka, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bark sek-fo, la m na n kɩtame tɩ f yagensã fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo." 
Hebrews6:15 Yɩɩ woto t'a Abrahaam gũ ne sũ-mare, hal n wa paam bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãab-a wã." 
Hebrews6:16 Bala, ninsaalb wẽenda ne bũmb sẽn yɩɩd-ba, la wẽeneg sã n pʋgl gomde, b no‑koɛɛmã fãa sɛtame." 
Hebrews6:17 Woto me, Wẽnnaam sẽn dat n wilg neb nins sẽn na n deeg-b bãmb paoongã tɩ yam ning bãmb sẽn yãkã ka na n viigã, b wẽename." 
Hebrews6:18 Yɩɩ a woto tɩ ne bũmb a yiibã sẽn ka na n viigã, la Wẽnnaam sẽn ka tõe n yag zĩrẽ b pʋgẽ wã, bɩ tõnd paam raood paoosg wʋsgo. Bala, zĩig a yembr tãa tõnd sẽn tõog n kẽ n paam põsã, yaa d sẽn gãd saag-sõng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn da kõt tõndã." 
Hebrews6:19 Saag-sõng‑kãng yaa wa baar sẽn vigl kãenkãe la sẽn tar pãng tõnd sɩɩgã yĩnga. A kẽeme hal n loog fu-lilldgã," 
Hebrews6:20 zĩig ning a Zeezi sẽn deng tõnd taoor n kẽ, n lebg maan-kʋʋd kãsem wa a Melkisedɛk wakat sẽn ka sɛtã yĩnga." 
Hebrews7:1 A Melkisedɛk dag n yaa Salɛm dĩma, la saasẽ-saasẽ Wẽnnaamã maan-kʋʋda. A kẽngame n tɩ seg a Abrahaam sẽn tɩ tõog rĩm-dãmb n lebg n watẽ wã, n ning-a barka." 
Hebrews7:2 Yaa yẽnda la a Abrahaam kõ bũmb fãa piig pʋɩɩre. La d sã n na n bilg a yʋʋrã võore, pipi a yaa tɩrlem dĩma, tɩ Salɛm rĩungã pʋgle, sẽn dat n togs tɩ laafɩ rĩmã." 
Hebrews7:3 A ka tar ba, a ka tar ma, n ka tar yaab roog ye. A ka tall sɩngre, la a vɩɩmã ka tall tɛk ye. B kɩtame t'a yɩ wa Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã, la a yaa maan-kʋʋd wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga." 
Hebrews7:4 Ges-y soab ning tõnd yaab a Abrahaam mengã sẽn yãk zabrã te-zɛɛdem piig pʋɩɩr n kõ wã, n bãng a sẽn ya kãseng to-to!" 
Hebrews7:5 A Leevi yagens nins b sẽn kõ maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã, tõogã kõ-b-la noor tɩ b reeg piig pʋɩɩr Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa bãmb ba-biisi, la a Abrahaam yagensã nengẽ." 
Hebrews7:6 A Melkisedɛk sẽn ka be a Leevi yaab roogã pʋgẽ wã deega a Abrahaam piig pʋɩɩre, a ninga soab ning sẽn paam kãabgã barka." 
Hebrews7:7 Nokoeemd kae tɩ yaa sẽn yɩɩd-a wã n ningd sẽn ka ta-a yẽnda wã zug barka. 
Hebrews7:8 La ka wã, yaa nin-kiids n deegd piig pʋɩɩrã, la be wã, yaa ned gʋls sõamyã sẽn kɩt kaset t'a vɩɩme." 
Hebrews7:9 Moasã, a Leevi sẽn deegd piig pʋɩɩrã, a ra zoe n yaoo a piig pʋɩɩre, a Abrahaam yaoodã pʋgẽ." 
Hebrews7:10 Bala, wakat ning a Melkisedɛk sẽn tɩg n seg a Abrahaamã, rẽ t'a Leevi da ket n bee a Abrahaam zɩɩmẽ." 
Hebrews7:11 Sã n yaa tɩ Leevi rãmbã maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd wata ne zemsgo, tõog ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ b nebã yẽbga maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd zugu. Bõe yĩng tɩ b leb n dat tɩ maan-kʋʋd sẽn yaa wa a Melkisedɛk la ka wa a Aarõ wa?" 
Hebrews7:12 Bala, maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd sã n toeeme, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ tõogã me toeeme." 
Hebrews7:13 Sɩd me, ned ning yell b sẽn gom woto wã yaa buud a to neda, la ned baa a yembr buud‑kãng sʋk ka be tẽn-kugrã tʋʋmdẽ ye." 
Hebrews7:14 Bala, yaa vẽeneg tɩ tõnd Zu-soabã yaa Zʋʋda neda, la a Moyiis ka gom buud‑kãng yell n kẽes maan-kʋʋrã wɛɛngẽ ye." 
Hebrews7:15 A yellã leb n yaa vẽeneg n yɩɩd wakat ning ned sẽn wa n yaa wa a Melkisedɛkã 
Hebrews7:16 n yaa maan-kʋʋd a to wã. Ka ne ninsaalb tõog yãkr la a lebg maan-kʋʋdã ye, la yaa ne vɩɩm sẽn ka sãamd pãnga." 
Hebrews7:17 Bala, b kɩsa a kaset n yeele: Fo yaa maan-kʋʋd wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga, wa a Melkisedɛke." 
Hebrews7:18 Sɩd me, b kiisa tõog sẽn dag n be, a pãn-komsem la a ka-yõodã yĩnga," 
Hebrews7:19 (bala tõogã ka tõog tɩ baa fɩ zems ye), la b waa ne saag-sõng sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩd pĩnd soabã. Saag-sõng‑kãng maasem yĩnga tõnd kolgda Wẽnnaam." 
Hebrews7:20 La Wẽnnaam ka maan t'a Zeezi yɩ maan-kʋʋd tɩ wẽeneg ka wẽen ye. 
Hebrews7:21 Sɩda, ka yɩ ne wẽeneg la neb a taabã lebg maan-kʋʋdb ye. La a Zeezi lebga maan-kʋʋd ne wẽenego, la yaa soab ning sẽn yeel tɩ: Zu-soabã wẽename, la b ka na n lebs b noor poorẽ ye. B yeelame yaa: Fo yaa maan-kʋʋd wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Hebrews7:22 Woto kɩtame t'a Zeezi lebg kaool sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩdã zãada. 
Hebrews7:23 Sẽn paase, maan-kʋʋdb kãens sõor yɩɩ wʋsgo, tɩ bõe kũum da gɩdgda bãmb tɩ b ka tõe n kẽng taoor ne b tʋʋmã ye." 
Hebrews7:24 La a Zeezi sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa wã yĩnga, bãmb maan-kʋʋrã yaa bũmb b sẽn ka tõe n deeg n kõ ned a to ye." 
Hebrews7:25 Dẽ me n kɩt tɩ bãmb tõe n fãag neb nins sẽn tũnugd bãmb n kolgd Wẽnnaamã hal sõama, bala bãmb vɩɩ wakat fãa n yõkd sɛɛg b yĩnga." 
Hebrews7:26 Yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsem a woto la tõnd sɩd tog n paame: Ned sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, n ka tar yelle, ned sẽn ka rog-b ye, n bak ne yel-wẽn-maandbã, la b zẽk-b lame n kẽng saasẽ." 
Hebrews7:27 Ka tɩlɛ tɩ b maand maand daar fãa wa maan-kʋʋd kãsem-dãmbã sẽn dengd n maan maoong b mens yĩnga, n yaool n maan neb a taabã yĩngã ye. Bãmb maana maoong a yembr tãa wakat fãa yĩnga, la yaa b meng la b tall n maan maoongã." 
Hebrews7:28 Sɩd me, tõogã yãkda neb sẽn yaa pãn-komsem dãmb tɩ b yɩ maan-kʋʋd kãsem-dãmba. La wẽeneg ning sẽn be sẽn deng tõogã waoongã yãka Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã tɩ b yɩ maan-kʋʋd kãsma, la bãmb zemsa zãng wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Hebrews8:1 Ade, tõnd koɛɛgã d sẽn gomdã yẽgr la woto: Tõnd tara maan-kʋʋd kãsem sẽn zĩnd Wẽnnaam rĩungã geer dɩtgo, saasẽ." 
Hebrews8:2 Bãmb la zĩ-sõngã sẽn yaa sɛk roog sɩd-sɩdã tʋmtʋmda. Yaa Zu-soabã n ti ro-kãngã, ka ninsaal ye." 
Hebrews8:3 Sɩd me, ned ning fãa b sẽn yãk t'a lebg maan-kʋʋd kãsma, yaa sẽn na n deeg kũunã ne maandã n kõ Wẽnnaam. Dẽ, yaa tɩlɛ t'a paam bũmb sẽn na kõ." 
Hebrews8:4 La bãmb sã n dag n beẽ tẽng zugu, b da pʋs n kõn yɩ maan-kʋʋd me wee! Bala neb a taab n be n kɩt Wẽnnaam kũunã wa sẽn zems tõogã sẽn yetã." 
Hebrews8:5 Kaorengã bãmb sẽn maandã yaa bũmb ning sẽn maand arzãnã wẽnego, la a mamsgo, wa Wẽnnaam sẽn pĩnd n wilg a Moyiis wakat ning a sẽn dag n dat n ti sɛk roogã. Wẽnnaam yeel-a lame yaa: Gese, fo na n maana bũmb fãa tɩ yɩ wa b sẽn wilg foom tãngã zug tɩ f ges n maanã." 
Hebrews8:6 Moasã wã, a Zeezi deega tʋʋmd sẽn yaa kãseng n yɩɩd rẽnda, hal n lebg kaool sẽn yaa-a sõama n yɩɩd pĩnd soabã sɛ-yõakda, la kaool‑kãng yẽbga kãabg sẽn ya sõmb n yɩɩd pĩnd dãmbã zutu." 
Hebrews8:7 Sã n da mikame tɩ pipi kaoolã zemsa zãng fasɩ, da ka yɩtẽ tɩlɛ tɩ b bao kaool a yiib soab ye." 
Hebrews8:8 Wẽnnaam goamã wilgame tɩ b lenga b nebã. B yeelame yaa: Sɩd me, Zu-soabã yetame tɩ day n wate, tɩ bãmb na n maan kaool-paalg ne Israyɛll buudã la ne Zʋʋda buudã." 
Hebrews8:9 Ka na n yɩ wa kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne b ba-rãmbã, daar ning bãmb sẽn gãd b nus n tall-b n yiis Ezɩptã ye. Zu-soabã yeelame yaa: Bãmb mensã sẽn ka modg ne mam kaoolã, mam me ka ges b yell ye." 
Hebrews8:10 Zu-soabã yeelame yaa: Ad kaool ning mam sẽn na n maan ne Israyɛll buudã da-kãsemsã loogr zugẽ: Mam na n ninga m tõodã b yamẽ wã, mam na n gʋls-b-la b sũyẽ wã. Mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, la bãmb na n yɩɩ mam nebã." 
Hebrews8:11 Tẽngã pʋgẽ, ned ba a yembr ka na n leb n zãms a to ye, la ned kõn zãms a ba-biiga, n yeel-a t'a bãng Zu-soabã ye. Sɩda, b fãa na n bãnga maam, sẽn sɩng ne sẽn yaa-a bilfu, n yɩɩd bãmb sʋkã, tɩ ta sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩdã." 
Hebrews8:12 Bala, mam na n basa b ka-tɩrlmã taale, la mam ka na n leb n tẽeg b yel-wẽnã yell ye." 
Hebrews8:13 Wẽnnaam sẽn gomd kaool‑paalg yellã, b kɩtame tɩ dẽenem soabã lebg kʋdre. La bũmb sẽn yaa kʋdr kʋʋlame, n dat n meneme." 
Hebrews9:1 Pipi kaoolã me dag n tara a tõod sẽn kẽed ne kaorengã la a wẽnd doogã sẽn yaa tẽng zug bũmbã yelle. 
Hebrews9:2 Sɩd me, b dag n tilga wẽnd doogo. A pipi pʋgã pʋgẽ, b sẽn boond tɩ zĩ-sõngã, fɩtl-doagendga la taabl ne burã b sẽn kõ Wẽnnaamã n dag n be be." 
Hebrews9:3 La fu-lilldig a yiib soabã poore, zĩig ning sẽn yaa sõama fasɩ wã da bee be." 
Hebrews9:4 Tɩdar yõogr zĩig sẽn yaa sãnem ne kaoolã koglg sẽn lud zãng ne sãnem, tɩ sãnem tʋkã mandã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, n paas a Aarõ rasaar ning sẽn da ning-a puudã, la kaoolã kug-wals be a pʋgẽ wã bee be." 
Hebrews9:5 Kãabg koglgã zugu, Serubẽ-rãmb sẽn tar ziir n be be, tɩ b maasmã lut sugr kũunã zĩiga. D ka na n yals n wegs a yellã n gom moasã ye." 
Hebrews9:6 Bũmb fãa sẽn tar a zĩig woto wã, maan-kʋʋdbã kẽeda wẽnd doogã pipi ro-pʋgẽ wã, wakat ning fãa b sẽn tʋmd kaorengã tʋʋmã." 
Hebrews9:7 La ro-pʋg a yiib soabã pʋgẽ, yaa maan-kʋʋd kãsmã bal n kẽed be vugr yʋʋmde. La a ka kẽed be tɩ ka ne zɩɩm a sẽn wat ne a meng yĩnga la soolmã nebã yĩng ye." 
Hebrews9:8 Ne bõn-kãnga, Sɩɩg-sõng wilgame tɩ sor dag n nan ka pak tɩ nebã tõe n kẽ zĩig sẽn welg toor fasɩ wã pʋgẽ, wakat ning tɛk pipi wẽnd doogã sẽn ket n be wã ye." 
Hebrews9:9 A yaa mamsg sẽn wilgd bũmb ning sẽn be moasã wã. A wilgdame tɩ ne ned ning sẽn pʋʋsd-a Wẽnnaamã sũ-bãngre, kũunã ne maandã sẽn kʋʋdã ka kɩtd tɩ ned zems zãng ye." 
Hebrews9:10 Tõ-kãensã yaa yĩng yell tõodo, sẽn kẽed ne rɩɩbo, la bõn-yũudlɩ, la pegsg buud toay-toay yelle, tɩ ya tɩlɛ tɩ nebã tũ hal tɩ ta tedgr wakate." 
Hebrews9:11 La Kirisã waame n yaa bõn‑sõamã nins sẽn watã maan-kʋʋd kãsma. Bãmb pɩʋʋga wẽnd doog sẽn yaa kãsenga la sẽn zems zãng n yɩɩd pĩnd soabã: ro-kãng ka ninsaal nug n me ye, dat n yeelame t'a ka me ne bũmb nins sẽn naan tɩ tõnd neẽ wã ye." 
Hebrews9:12 Ro-kãng la bãmb pɩʋʋg n kẽ zĩig sẽn welg toor sẽn yɩɩd fãa wã pʋgẽ vugr bal wakat fãa yĩnga. Bãmb ka kẽ be ne boees bɩ nag-bi zɩɩm ye, yaa ne b mengã zɩɩm. Yɩɩ woto la b fãag tõnd ne fãagr sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
Hebrews9:13 Bala, boeesã ne lolsã zɩɩm, la nag-sadg tompeglem b sẽn yugl neb nins sẽn dẽgmã sã n manegda bãmba, n yɩlgd bãmb yĩnsã," 
Hebrews9:14 Kirisã zɩɩm n yɩɩda. Bãmb sẽn dɩk b meng n kõ Wẽnnaam tɩ rẽgd tosb kaẽ, Sɩɩg sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩngã, bãmb na n yɩlga tõnd sũ-bãngrã n yiis tʋʋm nins sẽn yaa kũumã, tɩ tõnd tõe n tʋm Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã yĩnga." 
Hebrews9:15 Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ Kirisã ya kaool‑paalgã sɛ-yõakda, tɩ ne kũum ning sẽn ki tɩ beegr nins sẽn beeg pipi kaoolã pʋgẽ wã na paam sugrã, neb nins b sẽn boolã paama kãabg tɩ b na n paama pʋɩɩr sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
Hebrews9:16 Bala, ned sã n bas koɛɛg a kũum poor yĩnga, rẽndame tɩ b sɩd yã t'a soabã kiime." 
Hebrews9:17 Sɩd me, koɛɛg kũum poor yĩng ka tar yõodo, sã n ka a soabã kũum poor ye. Bala, a soabã sã n ket n vɩ, gomdã ka tõe n maan bũmb ye." 
Hebrews9:18 Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ pipi kaoolã ka sɩng tɩ ka yɩ ne zɩɩm daagr ye. 
Hebrews9:19 Sɩd me, a Moyiis sẽn wilg nebã fãa Wẽnnaam yeelsmã fãa yembr-yembr wa tõogã sẽn yetã, a rɩka nag-bi ne boeese, la koom, la pe-kõbd sẽn ning monem, la izop n mes sebrã menga, la nebã fãa n yeele:" 
Hebrews9:20 Woto yaa kaool ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel tɩ y maanã zɩɩm. 
Hebrews9:21 A mesa wẽnd doogã la kaorengã teedã fãa ne zɩɩmã a woto me. 
Hebrews9:22 Sã n yaa ne tõogã, yaa ne zɩɩm la sẽn kolg bũmbã fãa lebgd yɩlemde. La zɩɩm sã n ka raage, sugr ka be ye." 
Hebrews9:23 Dẽ, dag n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ kɩreng a yembre, bũmb nins sẽn mamsd sẽn be-b arzãnã paam yɩlgr a woto, la kɩreng a to me, arzãn bũmbã sẽn yaa sɩd-sɩdã me paam yɩlgr ne maoong sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩda." 
Hebrews9:24 Bala, Kiris ka kẽ manegr doog ning neb nus sẽn ti n mams a meng-mengã ye, la yaa arzãna, n na n yals Wẽnnaam taoor moasã tõnd yĩnga." 
Hebrews9:25 Bãmb ka kẽ be n na n maand b meng maoong naoor wʋsg wa maan-kʋʋd kãsmã sẽn kẽed manegr doogẽ wã yʋʋmd fãa ne bũmb a to zɩɩmã ye. 
Hebrews9:26 Bala, sã n da yaa a woto, Kiris rag n na n namsẽ‑la naoor wʋsg dũni naaneg tɛk tɩ ta moasã. La moasã sẽn yaa yaoolem wakatã, bãmb puka vugr bala, n na n sãam yel-wẽnã ne b meng sẽn yɩ maoongã pãnga." 
Hebrews9:27 A wa a sẽn be ned fãa zug tɩ ki vugr bala (la kũumã poore, bʋʋd n watã)," 
Hebrews9:28 woto me, Kiris sẽn kõ b meng vugr bal n na n tʋk neb wʋsg yel-wẽnã, b na n puka naoor a yiib soaba, la ka yel-wẽnã yĩng ye, la yaa neb nins sẽn gũud bãmb n na n paam fãagrã yĩnga." 
Hebrews10:1 Sɩda, bũmb nins sẽn be tõogã pʋgẽ wã yaa arzãn yɛlã mamsg bala, la ka b wẽneg kɛpɩ ye. Rẽ n kɩt tɩ ne maand nins b sẽn maand n ka basdẽ, yʋʋmd fãa tɩ b fãa wẽnd taabã, tõogã yɛlã ka tõe tɩ neb nins sẽn tũud so-kãng n kolgd Wẽnnaamã zems zãng ye." 
Hebrews10:2 Sã n kaẽ dẽ, b dag n kõn bas maoongã maaneg sɩda? Bala, neb nins sẽn maand karen‑kãngã rag n na n paamẽ‑la yɩlgr vugr bal wakat fãa yĩnga, la b sũ-bãngrã dag n ka na n leb n tẽegẽ bãmb b yel-wẽnã ye." 
Hebrews10:3 La ne maan-kãens b sẽn maandã, b tẽegda yel-wẽnã yʋʋmd fãa." 
Hebrews10:4 Bala, lolsã ne boeesã zɩɩm ka tõe n yiis yel-wẽn lae-lae." 
Hebrews10:5 Rẽndã kɩt tɩ Kirisã sẽn wa n wat dũni wã, b yeelame yaa: Yãmb dag n ka rat maoong wall kũun ye, la yãmb maana yĩng n kõ maam." 
Hebrews10:6 Yãmb ka reeg maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugr zugu, wall maoong yel-wẽnã yĩng ye." 
Hebrews10:7 Dẽ, mam yeelame yaa: «Wẽnnaam, ad mam watame n na n maan y raabo. Seb-pindgã pʋgẽ, b gʋlsame n gom mam yelle.»" 
Hebrews10:8 Bãmb deng n yeelame yaa: «Yãmb dag n ka rata, la y ka reeg maando, wall kũuni, wall maand sẽn yõogd bugum ye.» Tɩ b yaool n maand bõn-kãens wa tõogã sẽn yetã." 
Hebrews10:9 La b yeelame yɛs tɩ: «Ad mam watame n na n maan y raabo.» Dat n togs tɩ bãmb menesda pipi manesmã n na n wa ne manesem a yiib soabã. 
Hebrews10:10 Yaa Wẽnnaam daab‑kãng maasem yĩng la tõnd paam welgr n lebg toore, a Zeezi Kiris sẽn kõ b meng vugr tãa wakat fãa yĩngã yĩnga." 
Hebrews10:11 Maan-kʋʋd fãa kẽngda a tʋʋmd zĩigẽ, n tɩ maan a tʋʋmde, tɩ naoor wʋsgo, b maanda maoon-yɛngã bala, maand sẽn ka tol n tõe n yiis yel-wẽnã." 
Hebrews10:12 La a Zeezi sẽn maan maoong a yembr tãa yel-wẽnã yĩng n sa wã, b zĩnda Wẽnnaam dɩtgo, wakat sẽn ka saab yĩnga." 
Hebrews10:13 La moasã, b gũudame n na n paam b bɛɛbã n tab n zĩẽ." 
Hebrews10:14 Bala, ne kũun a yembr tãa bala, b kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn welg toorã zems zãnga." 
Hebrews10:15 Sɩɩg-sõng kɩta tõnd bõn-kãng kaset me. Bala bãmb sẽn yeel tɩ: 
Hebrews10:16 « Zu-soabã yetame yaa: Ad kaool ning mam sẽn na n maan ne bãmb ra-kãens loogr zugẽ. Mam na n ninga m tõodã b sũyẽ wã, la m na n gʋls-b-la b yamẽ wã.» B paasa gomd n yeele:" 
Hebrews10:17 «La mam ka na n leb n tẽeg b yel-wẽnã wall b tʋʋm wẽnsã yell ye.» 
Hebrews10:18 La zĩig ning yel-wẽnã sugr sẽn paame, maoong ka leb n maand yel-wẽnd yĩng ye." 
Hebrews10:19 Woto yĩnga m ba-biisi, tõnd mii hakɩɩk tɩ d tara noor tɩ kẽ manegr doogẽ wã, a Zeezi zɩɩmã maasem yĩnga." 
Hebrews10:20 A Zeezi meng n yɩ pipi n kẽ be n tuk sor tõnd yĩnga, wa so-paalg sẽn vɩ n pɩʋʋgd fu-lilldgã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ bãmb mengã yĩngã." 
Hebrews10:21 La tõnd tara maan-kʋʋd kãsem sẽn so Wẽnnaam yirã. 
Hebrews10:22 Woto yĩnga, bɩ d kolg bãmb ne sũur sẽn yaa sɩda, ne tẽeb zãnga, ne sũur sẽn yɩlge tɩ d sũur ka kaood d bʋʋd ye, la ne yĩng sẽn paam soob ne ko-yɩlgemde." 
Hebrews10:23 Bɩ d wilg d tẽebã n da sãmb ye, bala soab ning sẽn kãab-a tõndã pidsda b kãabgo." 
Hebrews10:24 Bɩ d ges taab yelle, tɩ d tõe n nek taab ratem tɩ nong taaba la maan tʋʋm-sõamyã." 
Hebrews10:25 Bɩ d da bas d wẽnd doogã wa neb kẽer sẽn minim n maandẽ wã ye. Bɩ d sagl taaba, n sagl taab n yɩɩda, yãmb sẽn ne tɩ daarã kolgdame wã yĩnga." 
Hebrews10:26 Bala, tõnd sã n bãng sɩdã n yaool n maan yel-wẽn ne yamleoogo, maoong ka leb n ket yel-wẽnã yĩng ye." 
Hebrews10:27 La bũmb ning sẽn keta, yaa tɩ gũ bʋʋdo la bugum sẽn segl n na n dɩ kɩɩsdbã, la rẽ bee rabeem." 
Hebrews10:28 Ned sã n kɩɩs a Moyiis tõogã, b kʋʋda a soabã, neb a yiib bɩ a tãab sã n kɩs kaset t'a beegame, tɩ nimbãan-zoeer kaẽ ye." 
Hebrews10:29 La yãmb ka tagsd tɩ ned sã n tab Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã ne a naoã, la a ges kaoolã zɩɩm ning sẽn kɩt tɩ yẽ lebg toor Wẽnnaam yĩngã wa bõn-zaalga, la a paoog Sɩɩg ning sẽn wat ne sugrã, a na n paama sɩbgr sẽn yaa toog n yɩɩd sɩda?" 
Hebrews10:30 Bala, tõnd mii soab ning sẽn yeel-a tɩ: Sũ-dokr yaa bãmb n so la bãmb n na n keo wã. B leb n yeelame tɩ: Zu-soabã na n bʋʋ b nebã bʋʋdo." 
Hebrews10:31 Tɩ lʋɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã nugẽ yaa yell meng-menga! 
Hebrews10:32 Tẽeg-y sɩngr wakatã yelle, wakat ning y sẽn paam namsg wʋsg tɩ yɩ maoor meng-menga, y sẽn paam vẽenemã zugẽ." 
Hebrews10:33 B ninga yãmb yãnde, n nams yãmb nebã taoor tɩ b ges-yã, la yãmb paama yam a yembr me ne neb nins b sẽn namsd a woto wã." 
Hebrews10:34 Sɩda, yãmb zoee bi-beesã nimbãanega, la yãmb saka ne sũ-noog tɩ b wʋk bũmb nins yãmb sẽn tarã, yãmb sẽn mi tɩ y tara paoong sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩda, la sẽn ka loogdã yĩnga." 
Hebrews10:35 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y ra bas pɛl-kɛgeng ning yãmb sẽn tarã la sẽn wat ne keoor sẽn yaa kãsengã ye." 
Hebrews10:36 Yãmb sɩd tog n nanga pãnga, tɩ yãmb sẽn maan Wẽnnaam daabã, y na reeg bũmb ning b sẽn kãab yãmbã." 
Hebrews10:37 Bala, keta bilfu, bilf bala! La sẽn tog n wa-a wã na n waame, b ka na n kaoos n wa ye." 
Hebrews10:38 La mam nin-tɩrg na n vɩɩ ne tẽebo, la a sã n leb poorẽ, mam sũur ka noom ne-a ye." 
Hebrews10:39 La tõndo, tõnd ka be b rãmb sẽn foogd b mens n na n sãamã sʋk ye, tõnd bee b rãmb sẽn tẽed n na n põsã sʋka." 
Hebrews11:1 La tẽeb yaa pɛl-kɛgeng ned sẽn tar ne bũmb nins a sẽn tẽed t'a na paamame, la a yaa bũmb nins ned sẽn ka ne wã wilgri." 
Hebrews11:2 Yaa tẽebã yĩng la kʋdem-dãmbã paam kaset-sõngo. 
Hebrews11:3 Yaa ne tẽeb la tõnd wʋmd tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam noor gomd n naan dũni, tɩ bũmb nins tõnd sẽn ne wã ka yi bũmb nins sẽn tõe n yãndã wã pʋgẽ ye." 
Hebrews11:4 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Abɛll maan maoong sẽn be yõod n yɩɩd a Kaẽ rẽndã n kõ Wẽnnaam. Tẽebã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam yeelame t'a Abɛll yaa nin-tɩrga. Bãmb mengã kɩsa yẽnda kũum kaseto, la tẽebã yĩnga, baa ne a Abɛll sẽn ki wã, a ket n gomdame." 
Hebrews11:5 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Henok paam tɩ b zẽk-a, t'a ka ki ye. Nebã ka leb n yãnd-a ye, tɩ bõe Wẽnnaam zẽk-a lame. Sẽn deng a zẽkre, a paama kaset t'a taa Wẽnnaam yam." 
Hebrews11:6 La tẽeb sã n kaẽ, ned ka tõe n ta Wẽnnaam yam ye. Ned ning sẽn wat Wẽnnaam nengẽ tog n tẽeme tɩ b beeme, la tɩ b ronda neb nins sẽn baood bãmbã." 
Hebrews11:7 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Nowe, wakat ning Wẽnnaam sẽn wilg-a bũmb nins neb sẽn dag n nan zɩ n yã wã, a zoee Wẽnnaam dabeem, n ka koom-kogl-bedre, n na n fãag a yirã rãmba. Yaa tẽebã yĩng la a wilg tɩ dũni ka bʋʋm ye, la a paam tɩrlem sẽn paamd ne tẽebã." 
Hebrews11:8 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Abrahaam sak Wẽnd boolle, n yi n tees tẽng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn na n kõ-a t'a soogã. La a yiime n da ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye." 
Hebrews11:9 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la a kẽng n tɩ zĩnd tẽng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãab-a wã, wa tẽn-sãanga, n zĩnd fu-rot pʋse, ne a Izak la a Zakoob sẽn na n soog bũmb ning sẽn kãabã." 
Hebrews11:10 Bala, a dag n gũuda tẽng sẽn tar yẽbgr sẽn yaa kãenkãe, Wẽnnaam meng sẽn yaa a meebã magda la a meta." 
Hebrews11:11 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Saara menga, baa ne a sẽn kʋʋl wʋsgã, Wẽnnaam kɩtame t'a tõog n dog biiga, bala, a maana tẽeb tɩ soab ning sẽn kãab-a wã pidsda a sẽn kãabe." 
Hebrews11:12 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ ned a yembr pʋgẽ, dao a yembr sẽn da zoe n yaa kũum, yagens wʋsg n yi be, tɩ b sõorã ta ãdsã sẽn be yĩngrã, la bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noor tɩ ned ka tõe n sõd n sa wã." 
Hebrews11:13 Bãmb fãa kii ne b tẽebã, n ka paam bũmb nins b sẽn da kãab bãmbã ye. La b tool n gesa bõn-kãens yɩɩg n beel-ba, n wilg tɩ bãmb mensã yaa sãamb la kaoos-wet tẽng zug ka." 
Hebrews11:14 Neb nins sẽn gomd a woto wã wilgda vẽeneg tɩ b baooda ba-yiri. 
Hebrews11:15 La ba-yir ning b sẽn yi n basã yamleoog sã n dag n tar-b lame, b rag n na n paama sor n leb n leb be." 
Hebrews11:16 La sɩd-sɩdã, b rat n paama ba-yir sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩd pĩnd soabã, sẽn be yĩngri. Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ yãnd ka tar Wẽnnaam, nebã sã n yet tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam segla tẽng b yĩnga." 
Hebrews11:17 Yaa ne tẽeb la wakat ning a Abrahaam sẽn paam makre, a rɩka a biig a Izak n kõ Wẽnnaam. Yaa a bi-ribl‑yend la a rɩk n kõ Wẽnnaam, tɩ yaool n yaa yẽnda la Wẽnnaam kãab bũmb toay-toayã," 
Hebrews11:18 la yaa yẽnda yell la Wẽnnaam da gom n yeele: Yaa ne a Izak la fo na n paam yagense, sẽn na n tall fo yʋʋrã." 
Hebrews11:19 A ra maanda tẽeb tɩ Wẽnnaam tara pãnga, hal baa sẽn na kɩt tɩ ned vʋʋg n bas kũum. Rẽnda n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam lebs-a a biiga. Mamsg n be yel-kãngã pʋgẽ." 
Hebrews11:20 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Izak ning a Zakoob ne a Ezayu bark nindaar beoog yĩnga. 
Hebrews11:21 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la a Zakoob sẽn wa n na n ki wã, a ninga a Zozɛf kambã zut barka, la a tik a dasaarã n wõgemde." 
Hebrews11:22 Yaa ne tẽeb la a Zozɛf sẽn wa n kolg kũum, a goma a Israyɛll kambã yikr yelle, la a yeel b sẽn na n maan yẽnda kõabã to-to." 
Hebrews11:23 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la a Moyiis ba-rãmba solg-a a dogem wakate, kiis a tãabo. Bala, b yãame tɩ biigã dag n bee neere, la b ka zoe rĩmã yam-yãkrã ye." 
Hebrews11:24 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la a Moyiis sẽn wa n bɩ, n tõdg tɩ b kõn bool-a tɩ Faarõ bi-puglã biigã." 
Hebrews11:25 Bala, sẽn noom yẽnda n yɩɩd yaa tɩ naag ne Wẽnnaam nebã n paam namsgo, la ka tɩ paam sũ-noog ning yel-wẽnã sẽn kõt wakat bilf yĩngã ye." 
Hebrews11:26 Sɩda, a dag n getame tɩ yẽndã sã n paam yãnd ning Kirisã sẽn na n paamã yaa arzɛk n yɩɩd Ezɩpt arzegsã. Bala, a long n geta keoorã sẽn be yɩɩgã." 
Hebrews11:27 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la a yi Ezɩpt n ka zoe rĩmã sũ-puugr ye. A yalsa kãenkãe, wa ned sẽn ne bũmb nins neb sẽn ka tõe n yã." 
Hebrews11:28 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la a maan Pakã, la a mes zɩɩm, tɩ sãamdã da wa sɩɩs Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽemsã ye." 
Hebrews11:29 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la b pɩʋʋg mog-miuugã wa tẽn-koɛɛnga, la Ezɩpt nebã sẽn mak n na n pɩʋʋgã, koomã rɩ-b lame." 
Hebrews11:30 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la Zeriko lalsã lʋɩ yã, nebã sẽn gilg-a dasem a yopoe wã poore." 
Hebrews11:31 Yɩɩ ne tẽeb la pʋg-yoodr a Rahaab ka naag ne ka-tẽebã rãmb n sãam ye, bala, a reega tẽn-gũusdbã ne laafɩ." 
Hebrews11:32 La m na n leb n yeelame tɩ bõe? Bala weerã ka na n sek maam tɩ m gom a Zedeyõ la a Barake, la a Samsõ, la a Zɛfte, la a Davɩɩde, la a Sãmwɛlle, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã yelle," 
Hebrews11:33 sẽn tall-b tẽeb n tõog soolem dãmba, la b tʋm tɩrlem tʋʋmã, la b paam kãabdo, la b mum gɩgmã noyã," 
Hebrews11:34 la b sãam bugum pãnga, la b põs zabr sʋʋs noyã, la b sãoog n paam pãnga, la b yɩ gãndaad zabr zĩigẽ, la b sãeeg tẽms a taab sodaasã yell ye." 
Hebrews11:35 Pagb kẽer paamame tɩ b neb sẽn ki leb n vʋʋge. Neb namsa neb a taaba, la sẽn namsdbã ka sak tɩ b yols-b ye, sẽn na yɩlg n paam vʋʋgr sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩda." 
Hebrews11:36 Kẽer deega yaalgo, la kalwaase, la hal baa bãens sẽbre, la bi-bees roogo." 
Hebrews11:37 B lob-b-la kuga, n nams-ba, n wã-b ne ra-wãad‑sʋʋse. B kʋʋ kẽer ne zabr sʋʋga, n yeelg kẽer piis la bʋʋs gãndo, n dig-b tɩ b yi n yeebdẽ, n ka tar baa fɩ ye, tɩ neb maand-b pãnga, n maan-b wẽnga." 
Hebrews11:38 Bãmb dag n ka zems ne dũni wã ye. B dag n yeebda wetẽ, la tãmsẽ, la tãms bogdẽ, la bogd sẽn tu tẽnga." 
Hebrews11:39 La nin-bãmbã fãa sẽn paam kaset-sõng b tẽebã yĩngã ka tõog n paam bũmb nins b sẽn kãab-bã ye. 
Hebrews11:40 Bala, Wẽnnaam dag n nee bũmb sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩd tõnd yĩnga, tɩ nin-kãens da wa n zems zãng tɩ tõnd ka naag ye." 
Hebrews12:1 Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd me sẽn tar kaset dãmb wʋsg sẽn gũbg tõnd a woto wã, bɩ d tõdg zɩɩb fãa la yel-wẽnã sẽn lut tõnd naana wã, la d nang pãng ne zoees ning sẽn be tõnd taoorã," 
Hebrews12:2 n get a Zeezi sẽn yaa tõnd tẽebã sɩngd la a taasdã. Bãmb basa sũ-noog ning b sẽn yet tɩ b na n kõo bãmbã, n sak da-pɩkã n ka zoe yãnd ye, la b zĩi Wẽnnaam geerã rɩtgo." 
Hebrews12:3 Ges-y soab ning yel-wẽn maandbã sẽn nams b yõorã, tɩ yãmb da wa yɛ ye, la tɩ y raood da boog ye." 
Hebrews12:4 Yãmb nan ka kɩɩs yel-wẽnã hal tɩ y zɩɩm yi a poorẽ ye. 
Hebrews12:5 La yãmb yĩma saglg ning b sẽn sagl yãmba, wa ned sẽn sagend kom-dibli: M biiga, da ges sɩbgr ning Zu-soabã sẽn sɩbgd foomã wa bõn-yaalg ye, la b sã n lengd foom bɩ f da boog f raood ye." 
Hebrews12:6 Bala, Zu-soabã sɩbgda ned ning bãmb sẽn nonge, la b sɩbgda biig ning fãa bãmb mengã sẽn sak n deeg wa b biigã ne dasaare." 
Hebrews12:7 Sak-y remsgo: Wẽnnaam maanda yãmb wa b kamba. Bala, bi-ribl bʋg la a ba ka remsda?" 
Hebrews12:8 La yãmb sã n ka paamd sɩbgr ning kamb fãa sẽn paamdã, dẽnd yãmb yaa tãmpĩiba, la y ka yirã soab kamb ye." 
Hebrews12:9 Tõnd sẽn paam yĩng ba-rãmb tɩ b ra sɩbgd tõnd tɩ tõnd waoog-bã, tõnd ka tog n sak d sɩɩs ba wã n yɩɩda, tɩ d tõe n paam vɩɩm?" 
Hebrews12:10 Sɩd me, tõnd ba-rãmba dag n sɩbgda tõnd wakat bilf yĩng wa b sẽn tẽed tɩ zemsame, la Wẽnnaam sɩbgda tõnd d sõngr yĩng meng-menga, tɩ tõnd me na welg toor n yɩ sõama wa bãmba." 
Hebrews12:11 Yaa sɩd t'a wakatã, sɩbgr buud fãa ka sũ-noog ye, yaa sũ-sãanga. La kaoosg pʋgẽ, a womda tɩrlem biis sẽn wat ne laafɩ neb nins sẽn paam remsgã yĩnga." 
Hebrews12:12 Yaa woto yĩnga, bɩ y zẽk y kamsã sẽn yɛ wã, la y rũmã sẽn ki wã." 
Hebrews12:13 Bɩ y naoã tũ so-tɩrse, tɩ sẽn keoosd-a wã da wa bʋdg ye, la b pʋs n paam maagre." 
Hebrews12:14 Bɩ y bao tɩ laafɩ zĩnd yãmb ne nebã fãa sʋka, la y bao pʋ-peelem, tɩ pʋ-peelem sã n kaẽ, ned ka tõe n yã Zu-soabã ye." 
Hebrews12:15 Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa mao n da wa n mong a meng Wẽnnaam barkã ye, tɩ yẽgen-tõaag baa a yembr da wa tobe, n wa ne rãmbgo, n nams neb wʋsg ye." 
Hebrews12:16 Bɩ y mao tɩ ned baa a yembr da yɩ tʋʋm-dẽgd soaba, wall ned sẽn paoogd neb wa a Ezayu sẽn dɩk a kãosengã n tek ne rɩɩb a yembr tãa wã ye." 
Hebrews12:17 Yãmb miime tɩ kaoosg zugẽ, a sẽn wa n dat n deeg a ba barkã, b tõdgame, bala a ka tõog n yãnd sor n tũ n tõog t'a ba wã tek yam, baa ne yẽnda sẽn bao barkã ne nintãmã." 
Hebrews12:18 Sɩda, yãmb ka kolg tãng ning ned sẽn ka tõe n sɩɩse, tɩ bugum zird a zugẽ ye. Yãmb ka kolg lika, wall lik bida, wall sob-kãsenga" 
Hebrews12:19 wall baorgã peebgo, wall goam sẽn yɩ ne pãng wa koɛɛg ning nebã sẽn dag n wʋm n bõos tɩ b ra leb n gom ne bãmb baa gom-bi-yendã ye." 
Hebrews12:20 Bala, b sẽn yeel bãmb tɩ: «Baa sã n yaa rũng n sɩɩs tãngã bɩ b lob-a kugã, ra yaa toog ne bãmba.»" 
Hebrews12:21 Bũmb nins sẽn maanã da wata ne rabeem wʋsgo, hal t'a Moyiis yeel tɩ yɛɛsg n tar yẽnda t'a rigda." 
Hebrews12:22 La yãmb kolga Sɩyõ tãngã la Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã tẽnga, sẽn yaa yĩngr Zeruzalɛm, la malegs tus wʋsgã." 
Hebrews12:23 La tigingã ne kom-dẽemsã b sẽn gʋls b yʋy arzãna sullã pʋgã, la Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa nebã fãa bʋ-kaoodã, la nin-tɩrs sẽn paam n zems zãngã sɩɩse." 
Hebrews12:24 Yãmb kolga a Zeezi sẽn yaa kaool‑paalgã sɛ-yõakdã, la zɩɩm ning b sẽn tall n mese, la sẽn gomã sõama n yɩɩd a Abɛll rẽndã." 
Hebrews12:25 Maan-y gũusgu! Ra tõdg-y n ka kelg ned ning sẽn gomd-a ne yãmbã ye. Bala, neb nins sẽn tõdg n ka kelg a soab sẽn dag n keoogd bãmb tẽng zug ka wã sã n ka põse, tõnd n ka na n põs n yɩɩda, tõnd sã n tõdg n ka kelg ned ning sẽn be arzãn n keoogd tõndã." 
Hebrews12:26 Wakat-kãnga, bãmb koɛɛgã kɩtame tɩ tẽngã rigimdi. La moasã b kãaba tõnd n yeele: Moasã yɛsa, mam na n leb n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã rigimdi, la ka tẽngã bal ye, yĩngr me na n digimdame." 
Hebrews12:27 B sẽn yeel tɩ yɛsã, wilgdame tɩ bũmb nins sẽn digimdã, b na n bak-b-la toore, b sẽn yaa bõn-naandse, tɩ bũmb nins sẽn ka rigimdã na yalse." 
Hebrews12:28 Rẽndã n kɩt tɩ tõnd sẽn na n paam soolem sẽn ka tõe n vigsã, bɩ d yɩ neb sẽn mi d zaamẽ, n maan kaoreng sẽn noom Wẽnnaam sũuri, ne Wẽnnaam sakre la ne rabeem." 
Hebrews12:29 Bala, tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa bugum sẽn dɩt me." 
Hebrews13:1 Wɩng-y ne ba-biir nonglem. 
Hebrews13:2 Da yĩm-y tɩ maan sãambã sãand ye. Bala, neb kẽer sẽn maan woto, b reega malegs b zagsẽ n ka bãng ye." 
Hebrews13:3 Tẽeg-y neb nins sẽn be bi-bees roogẽ wã yelle, wa yãmb mens bee bi-bees roogẽ wã ne-ba. Tẽeg-y neb nins b sẽn namsdã yelle, wa yaa yãmb mengã n namsda." 
Hebrews13:4 Bɩ nebã fãa waoog kãadem, la bɩ ned ne a pag pĩir da zĩnd dẽgd ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam na n sɩbga raglem-dãmba la nin-yoaadbã." 
Hebrews13:5 Bɩ y mao tɩ da yɩ ligdã nonglem n kɩtd tɩ yãmb maand y sẽn maandã ye. Maan-y sũ-noog ne bũmb nins y sẽn tar moasã wã, bala Wẽnnaam meng yeelame yaa: Mam ka na n bas foom f yembr ye, la m ka na n loog n bas foom ye." 
Hebrews13:6 Dẽnda n kɩt tɩ tõnd tõe n yeel ne raood tɩ: Zu-soabã yaa mam sõangda, mam kõn zoe dabeem ye. Bõe la ninsaal tõe n maan maam?" 
Hebrews13:7 Tẽeg-y yãmb taoor dãmbã, sẽn moon-b yãmb Wẽnnaam goamã yelle. Ges-y bãmb vɩɩmã sẽn baas to-to, la y maan togs-n-taar ne b tẽebã." 
Hebrews13:8 A Zeezi Kiris yaa yembr zaamẽ la rũndã la wakat sẽn kõn sa. 
Hebrews13:9 Da sak-y tɩ koe-sãams toay-toay tak yãmb ye. Bala, yaa neer tɩ barkã keng yãmb sũyã, la ka rɩɩb ye, t'a ka sõng neb nins sẽn dɩ-a wã ye." 
Hebrews13:10 Tõnd tara tẽn-kugri, tɩ neb nins sẽn tʋmd sɛk roogẽ wã ka tar noor tɩ rɩ a rɩɩb ye." 
Hebrews13:11 Bala, rũms nins maan-kʋʋd kãsmã sẽn dɩk b zɩɩm n kõ Wẽnnaamã, b tallda b nemdã, n yi sikã zĩigẽ n yõog bugum." 
Hebrews13:12 Rẽndã n kɩt t'a Zeezi me sẽn dat n tall b meng zɩɩmã n maneg nebã tɩ b yɩ sõama Wẽnnaam yĩngã, b yii tẽngã n tɩ nams kɛɛnga." 
Hebrews13:13 Bɩ tõnd me sak yãnd ning bãmb sẽn paamã, n yi n kẽng bãmb nengẽ." 
Hebrews13:14 Bala, tõnd ka tar tẽng ka sẽn paad wakat fãa ye, tõnd baooda tẽng ning sẽn wat-a wã." 
Hebrews13:15 A Zeezi maasem yĩnga, bɩ d kõ Wẽnnaam maoong sẽn ya pẽgre, sẽn dat n togs tɩ noor goam sẽn pʋt bãmb yʋʋre." 
Hebrews13:16 Baoosgo, da yĩm-y maan-neer la kũun ye, bala yaa maand a woto buud la Wẽnnaam nonga." 
Hebrews13:17 Sak-y yãmb taoor dãmbã noore, la y sakd-ba. Bala, bãmb geta yãmb sɩɩsã yelle, bãmb sẽn na n gom b yell Wẽnnaam taoorã yĩnga. Maan-y y sẽn tõe tɩ b na ges y yell ne sũ-noogo, la ka ne wõosg tɩ rẽ ka na n zĩnd yõod ne yãmb ye." 
Hebrews13:18 Pʋʋs-y tõnd yĩnga. Bala, tõnd miime tɩ d sũur kaset yaa sõama, la d tara ratem tɩ d yel-manesmã na yɩ sõama ne nebã fãa." 
Hebrews13:19 Mam kota yãmb ne m sũur fãa tɩ y pʋʋs m yĩnga, tɩ b tõe n lebs maam yãmb tao-tao." 
Hebrews13:20 Bɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn so laafɩ wã, soab ning sẽn yiis-a piisã pe-kɩɩm kãsengã kũum pʋgẽ ne kaool sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa wã zɩɩm, tõnd Zu-soabã a Zeezi" 
Hebrews13:21 na kɩt tɩ yãmb tõog n maan sẽn yaa sõama, tɩ y na maan bãmb daabo. Bɩ Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ bũmb nins sẽn noom bãmbã maan tõnd pʋse, a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga, soab ning sẽn zems ne ziir zamaan woo zamaane! Ãmina!" 
Hebrews13:22 M ba-biisi, mam kota yãmb tɩ y sak n deeg saglg gom-kãngã, bala mam gʋlsa yãmb seb-koɛɛga." 
Hebrews13:23 Bãng-y tɩ b yiisa d ba-biig a Tɩmote n base. A sã n wa pĩnda, mam na n waa ne-a n ges yãmba." 
Hebrews13:24 Pʋʋs-y y taoor dãmbã fãa me ne nin-sõamyã fãa. Itali rãmbã pʋʋsda yãmba. 
Hebrews13:25 Bɩ barkã zĩnd ne yãmb fãa. 
James1:1 Wẽnnaam la Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmd a zak n gʋlsd buud piig la a yiibã sẽn sãeegã, n pʋʋsd-ba." 
James1:2 M ba-biisi, makr buud toay-toay sẽn tõe n paam yãmbã, ges-y-b wa bũmb sẽn wat ne yãmb sũ-noog zãnga," 
James1:3 yãmb sẽn mi tɩ y tẽebã makr wata ne sũ-marã yĩnga. 
James1:4 La yaa tɩlɛ tɩ sũ-mar maan a tʋʋmd sẽn zems zãnga, tɩ yãmb zems zãnga la y yɩ neb sẽn bɩ, la tɩ bũmb da paoog yãmb ye." 
James1:5 Yam sã n paoog yãmb ned a yembre, bɩ a kos Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt nebã fãa ne yamleoog n ka lengdẽ wã, la b na kõ-a yamã." 
James1:6 La a sã na n kos bɩ a kos ne tẽeb n da sãmb ye: Bala, ned ning sẽn sãmbd wẽnda wa ko-kãseng ko-pɛm sobg sẽn lengd la a zẽkdẽ." 
James1:7 Bɩ ned a woto da tags t'a na n paama bũmb Zu-soabã nengẽ ye. 
James1:8 A yaa ned sẽn yaa yam a yiib soaba, t'a yam yuusd a sẽn maandã fãa pʋgẽ." 
James1:9 Bɩ ba-biig sẽn yaa naong soab maan sũ-noog ne Wẽnnaam sẽn waoog-a wã. 
James1:10 La bɩ arzɛk soab maan sũ-noog ne Wẽnnaam sẽn ning yẽnda paoogr zĩigẽ wã. Bala, yẽnda na n looga wa mood puudu." 
James1:11 Wĩntoog zẽkame tɩ zĩig fãa wɩnge. A kʋɩɩsa moodã, la a puudã sʋʋgame, la a ra-sãndã menemame. Arzɛk soab me na n zelga a woto a tʋʋma pʋse." 
James1:12 Ned ning sẽn yas kãenkãe makr pʋgẽ la sũ-noog soaba. Bala, makrã zugẽ, a na n paama vɩɩm sẽn yaa keoor Zu-soabã sẽn kãab neb nins sẽn nong bãmbã." 
James1:13 Bɩ ned baa a yembr sẽn paamd makr da yeel tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam n makd yẽnda ye. Bala, wẽng ka tõe n mak Wẽnnaam, la bãmb mengã ka makd ned baa a yembr ye." 
James1:14 La ned kam fãa paamda makre, a mengã ratem sẽn tusd-a n belgd-a wã yĩnga." 
James1:15 La yĩngã ratem sã n dɩk pʋga, a rogda yel-wẽnde. La yel-wẽndã sã n wa n bɩ, a wata ne kũum." 
James1:16 M ba-bi-nongdse, da tudg-y y mens ne yel-kãng ye:" 
James1:17 Kũun-sõng fãa la kũun sẽn zems zãng fãa yita yĩngri, vẽenem ba wã nengẽ. Tekre, wall toeoong ka be bãmb pʋgẽ baa bilf ye." 
James1:18 Bãmb n dog tõnd wa sẽn zems b raabo, sɩd-goamã maasem yĩnga, tɩ tõnd na lʋɩ bãmb bõn-naandsã fãa taoore." 
James1:19 M ba-bi-nongdse, bãng-y yõwã neere: Woto, bɩ ned fãa wɩng ne kelgre, la a maag ne goamã, la a maag ne sũ-yikri." 
James1:20 Bala, ninsaal sũ-yikr ka wat ne tɩrlem Wẽnnaam nifẽ ye." 
James1:21 Yaa woto yĩnga, bas-y rẽgd buud fãa, la pʋ-toog fãa, la y reeg gomd ning b sẽn bʋd yãmb pʋgẽ la sẽn tõe n fãag yãmb sɩɩsã ne sũ-bʋgsem." 
James1:22 Yɩ-y koe-sakdba, la y ra yɩ koe-kɛlgdb bala, n belgd y mens ne tagsd sẽn ka sɩd ye." 
James1:23 Bala, ned sã n kelgd gomdã n ka sakdẽ, a soab wẽnda wa ned sẽn get a meng nen-gɛtgẽ," 
James1:24 la a sã n ges n sa, a loogdame, la tao-tao bala a yĩmda a sẽn dag n yaa to-to." 
James1:25 La ned ning sẽn get tõog sẽn zems zãngã, sẽn yaa lohorem tõogã, la a maoodẽ, n ka kelgd bal la a yĩmdẽ wã, la a maood n sakdẽ wã, nin‑kãng na paam Wẽnnaam bark a sẽn maandã pʋgẽ." 
James1:26 Ned sã n tẽed t'a yaa wẽn-tũuda, n yaool n ka tõe a zelemde, a belgda a menga, la nin-kãng wẽn-tũudma yaa zaalem bala." 
James1:27 Ba a Wẽnnaam taoore, wẽn-tũudum sẽn yaa yɩlemde, n ka tar wada, yaa tɩ kẽng n ges kɩɩbse la pʋg‑kõap b yel-pakr pʋse, la tɩ gũus f meng ne dũni rẽgdo." 
James2:1 M ba-biisi yãmb sẽn tẽed tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kirisã, sẽn so-a ziirã, bɩ y ra tũus neb ye." 
James2:2 Ned sẽn pid sãnem nugbĩnga la a yer naam fut sã n kẽ yãmb kaorengo, tɩ naong soab me sẽn yer nimbãan-fut me kẽ," 
James2:3 yãmb sã n waoog ned ning sẽn yer-a naam futã n yeel-a: Fo wa n zĩnd waoogr zĩ-kãngã wã, la y yeel naongã soaba: Fo yals yĩngr be, wall f yeel: Zĩnd tẽng mam naoẽ wã." 
James2:4 Dẽ yĩnga, yãmb ka tũusd nebã, la y ya bʋ-kaoodb sẽn tar tags-wẽnse?" 
James2:5 M ba-bi-nongdse, kelg-y-yã! Dẽ yĩnga, Wẽnnaam ka tũus neb nins dũni sẽn get wa naong rãmbã n kɩt tɩ b yɩ arzegs rãmba la b na n soog soolem ning bãmb sẽn kãab neb nins sẽn nong-b bãmbã yĩng sɩda?" 
James2:6 La yãmba, yãmb paooga naong soabã. Dẽ yĩnga, arzegs rãmbã ka weoogd yãmb la b tar yãmb n kẽnd bʋʋd zĩisẽ sɩda?" 
James2:7 Dẽ yĩnga, ka bãmb n paoogd yʋ-sõng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yãmbã?" 
James2:8 Sɩda, yãmb sã n sakd Wẽnnaam soolem tõog sẽn be gʋls-sõamyã pʋgẽ, n yetẽ tɩ: «Nong f to wa f mengã,» yãmb maanda neere." 
James2:9 La yãmb sã n get nebã n tũusd-ba, yãmb maanda yel-wẽnde, la tõogã kɩtame tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ y beegame." 
James2:10 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn sak-a tõodã fãa, n yaool n maan yel-wẽnd n kɩɩs a yembr tãa, a lebga bɛɛgd ne tõodã fãa." 
James2:11 Soab ning sẽn yeel tɩ: Ra yo wã, soab‑kãng me n yeel tɩ: Ra kʋ wã. La fo sã n ka n maan yoobo, n yaool n kʋ neda, fo lebga tõog kɩɩsda." 
James2:12 Gom-y la y tʋm wa neb b sẽn na n tall lohorem tõog n kao b bʋʋdo. 
James2:13 Bala, ned sã n ka tar nimbãan-zoeere, bʋʋdã me ka na n zoe a nimbãaneg ye. Nimbãan-zoeer tõogda bʋʋdo." 
James2:14 M ba-biisi, ned sã n yet t'a tara tẽeb n yaool n ka tʋmdẽ, a yõod yaa bõe? Dẽ yĩnga, tẽ-kãng tõe n fãagame?" 
James2:15 D ba-bi-raoog bɩ d ba-bi-poak sã n yaa beelle, tɩ daar fãa bɩ a ka tar dɩɩb n dɩtẽ," 
James2:16 tɩ yãmb ned a yembr yeel-a yaa: Kẽng-y ne laafɩ, yiis f waoodo, la f rɩ n tɩge, n yaool n ka kõ-a bũmb ning a sẽn tog n paam a sõngr yĩnga, gom-kãng yõod bee yɛ?" 
James2:17 Yaa a woto me ne tẽebã. Tẽeb sã n ka naag ne tʋʋma, a mengã yaa kɩɩnga." 
James2:18 La nina na n yeelame: Fo tara tẽebo, la mam tʋmdame. Wilg maam f tẽeb tɩ tʋʋm ka tũ ye, la mam na n talla m tʋʋma n wilg foom m tẽebo." 
James2:19 F tẽedame tɩ Wẽnnaam a yembr bal n be. Yaa sõama. Zĩn-dãmbã me tẽedame, la b rigda ne rabeem." 
James2:20 Yam ka sek soaba, fo rat n bãngame tɩ tẽeb sẽn ka naag ne tʋʋm ka yõod la?" 
James2:21 Ka ne tʋʋm la tõnd ba a Abrahaam paam tɩrlem, a sẽn ning a bi‑ribl a Izak tẽn-kugr zug n kõ Wẽnnaamã la?" 
James2:22 Fo neeme tɩ tẽeb n dag n naag ne a tʋʋmã, la a tʋʋmã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam kɩtame t'a tẽebã zems zãnga." 
James2:23 Woto, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõngã paama pidsgu. B yeelame yaa: A Abrahaam tẽe Wẽnnaam, la b gesa rẽnda wa tɩrlem a yĩnga. La b bool-a lame tɩ Wẽnnaam zoa." 
James2:24 Yãmb neeme tɩ yaa ne tʋʋm la ned paamd tɩrlem, la ka ne tẽeb bal ye." 
James2:25 Pʋg-yoodr a Rahaab me, ka ne tʋʋm yĩng la a paam tɩrlem a sẽn deeg Israyɛll gũusdbã, la a kɩt tɩ b tũ sor a to n loogã sɩda?" 
James2:26 Yĩng sã n ka naag ne sɩɩga, a yaa kũum. Woto me, tẽeb sã n ka naag ne tʋʋma a yaa kɩɩnga." 
James3:1 M ba-biisi, bɩ yãmb neb wʋsg da bao tɩ lebg karen-saam-dãmb ye. Bala, yãmb miime tɩ tõnd karen-saam-dãmbã bʋʋd na n yɩɩ toog n yɩɩda." 
James3:2 Tõnd fãa tudgda ne tuudg buud wʋsgo. Ned sã n ka tudg ne a goamã, a yaa ned sẽn zems zãnga, n tõe n gãd a yĩngã tõre." 
James3:3 Tõnd sã n ningd wiid noy salba tɩ b na sak tõndo, tõnd kɩtdame tɩ b yĩngã kẽnd tõnd sẽn datẽ." 
James3:4 Ges koom-kogl-bɛdã me, baa b sẽn yaa bɛd to-to, tɩ sob-kãseng tusd-ba, yaa koom-koglg wẽnemdedg-bil bal n kɩtd tɩ koglgã teesd a soabã sẽn datẽ." 
James3:5 Woto me, zelemd yaa yĩngã wil-bil a yembre, la a waoogda a meng ne bũmb kãsemse. Ges-y bug-bil bal sẽn tõe n yõog we-kãsengã." 
James3:6 Zelemd me yaool n yaa bugum, a yaa wẽng zĩ-kãsenga. Zelemd bee tõnd yĩnga wila sʋka, a rẽgemda yĩngã tõre, la a wɩngda tõnd vɩɩmã tõr t'a lebg basɩ. A bugmã yita bug-tẽnga." 
James3:7 Ninsaal wõra we-rũmsã buud fãa, liuuli buud fãa bõn-vuuds buud fãa, koomẽ rũms buud fãa, n kɩt tɩ b sakd yẽnda." 
James3:8 La ned baa a yembr ka tõe n tõog a zelemd t'a sak-a ye. A yaa wẽng ned sẽn ka tõe n wõr n tõog ye. A pida ne zẽnem-kʋʋdga. 
James3:9 Tõnd pʋʋsda Zu-soabã sẽn yaa tõnd ba wã bark ne d zelemdã, la yaa ne yẽnda me la tõnd kãabd neb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn naan n wẽneg b mengã." 
James3:10 Bark la kãab-wẽng yita noor a yembr pʋgẽ. M ba-biisi, a ka tog n yɩɩ a woto ye." 
James3:11 Dẽ yĩnga, ko-noog ne ko-tood tõe n bula ko-nif a yembrẽ?" 
James3:12 Dẽ yĩnga m ba-biisi, kankang tõe n woma oliiv‑rãmb sɩda, bɩ reezẽ tɩɩg tõe n woma kankama? Ko-nif sẽn yiisd ko-yamsem ka tõe n yiis ko-noog ye." 
James3:13 Ãnda yãmb sʋkã n yaa yam soaba, t'a yam weke? Bɩ a yel-manesem-sõngã wilg a tʋʋm sẽn yɩt ne bʋgsem la yam." 
James3:14 La sũ-ki-toaag sã n be yãmb sũuri, tɩ geesem-geesem me beẽ, da waoog-y y mense, la y da yag zĩrẽ n kɩɩs sɩdã ye." 
James3:15 Yam‑kãng ka yam sẽn yit yĩngr ye. A yita tẽng zug n yaa yĩng rẽnda, la zĩn-dãmb dẽnda." 
James3:16 Bala, sũ-kĩir la geesem-geesem sẽn be zĩig ningã, zũnglug la maan wẽns buud fãa bee be." 
James3:17 Yam sẽn yit yĩngrã yaa sõama zãnga, la sẽn paase, a baooda laafɩ, a wata ne sũ-bʋgsem, la sugri, la a pida ne nimbãan-zoeere la bi-sõamyã fãa, la a ka be bakre, la zãmb ye." 
James3:18 Tɩrlem bil bʋta laafɩ pʋgẽ, la yaa laafɩ baoodbã n bʋt-a." 
James4:1 Maoorã ne zabã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã yita yɛ, sã n ka yãmb datem sẽn maood ne taab yãmb yĩngã wil pʋsẽ wã pʋgẽ?" 
James4:2 Yãmb get n datame la y ka paamd ye. Yãmb yaa nin-kʋʋdba la sũ-ki-nebã, n yaool n ka tõe n paam baa fɩ ye. Yãmb zabdame la y maoodẽ, la y ka paamd ye, bõe yĩnga, yãmb ka kot ye." 
James4:3 Yãmb kotame la y ka paamd ye, bala bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tags n kosã ka sõama ye. Yãmb kotame n dat n tall n maan y yĩnsã sẽn datã." 
James4:4 Yãmb sẽn yaa nin-yoaadbã, yãmb ka mi tɩ dũni nonglem yaa beem ne Wẽnnaam la? Dẽ, ned sã n dat n yɩ dũni zoa, a yɩta Wẽnnaam bɛyã." 
James4:5 Yãmb tẽedame tɩ Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã sẽn yet tɩ: «Yaa ne sũ-kiir la Wẽnnaam nong sɩɩg ninga b sẽn kɩt tɩ b be yãmb pʋgẽ wã.» B gomda zaalem la? 
James4:6 La bãmb kõta bark sẽn yɩɩda, bala b gʋls-sõamyã yetame yaa: Wẽnnaam kɩɩsda tɩtaam-dãmbã la b ningda sik-m-mens-rãmbã zut barka." 
James4:7 Dẽ wã, sak-y Wẽnnaam. Kɩɩs-y Sʋtãana la a na zoe n zãag ne yãmba." 
James4:8 Kolg-y Wẽnnaam, la bãmb na pẽneg yãmba. Yel-wẽn-maandba, nudg-y y nusã. Yam a yiib rãmbã, nedg-y y sũyã." 
James4:9 Bãng-y y nimbãanegã sẽn yaa a soaba, maan-y sũ-sãanga, yãb-y-yã. Bɩ y laadã tek n lebg wiisgu, tɩ y sũ-noogã lebg sũ-sãanga." 
James4:10 Sik-y y meng Zu-soabã taoore, la bãmb na zẽk yãmba." 
James4:11 M ba-biisi, da gom-y taab yell wẽng ye. Ned ning sẽn gomd a ba-biig yell wẽnga, wall a kaood a bʋʋdo, a gomda tõogã yell wẽnga, la a kaood tõogã bʋʋdo. La fo sã n kaood tõogã bʋʋdo, fo ka tõ-sakd ye, fo yaa a bʋ-kaooda." 
James4:12 Wẽnnaam b yembr tãa n yaa tõogã soaba, la bʋ-kaooda. Bãmb n tõe n fãag neda, bãmb n tõe n sãam-a. La fo yaa ãnda n kaood f to bʋʋdo?" 
James4:13 Yãmb dãmb sẽn yet tɩ: Dũndã wall beoogo, tõnd na n kẽnga tẽn-kãngã, n zĩnd be yʋʋmde, n leeb n paam yõodo. Yaa yãmb la m gomd ne." 
James4:14 Yãmb sẽn ka mi y vɩɩmã sẽn na n yɩ to-to beoogã, yãmb yaa walem sẽn zẽkd wakat bilf pʋgẽ bala, la a menemdẽ wã." 
James4:15 Yãmb tog n yeelame yaa: Zu-soabã sã n data, tõnd na vɩɩmde, la d na n maan woto wall woto." 
James4:16 La moasã, yãmb waoogda y mens y tɩtaamã pʋgẽ. Tɩtaam a woto buud fãa yaa wẽnga." 
James4:17 Ned sã n mi tɩ maan neere, n yaool n ka maandẽ, a maanda yel-wẽnde." 
James5:1 Moasã, mam gomda ne yãmba, arzegsã rãmba! Wɩsg-y y meng n yãbe, tood nins sẽn na n wa yãmb zutã yĩnga!" 
James5:2 Yãmb arzɛkã põogame. Zũnzũy rɩɩ yãmb futã. 
James5:3 Tẽngempiisim n dɩ yãmb sãnemã ne y wanzuri wã, la b tẽngempiismã na n yɩɩ kaset sẽn kaood yãmb bʋʋdo, n sãam yãmb yĩngã wa bugum. Yãmb tigsa paoong moasã wakat sẽn yaa yaoolmã n bĩngi." 
James5:4 Ade, tẽn-tʋmdb nins sẽn tigs yãmb koodã tɩ yãmb yaool n ka yao-bã kelemdame. Tigsdbã kelems zẽk n taa pãn-kẽemd soabã tʋbẽ." 
James5:5 Yãmb vɩɩmda rɩ-n-tɩk pʋgẽ, la teed sẽn nags sʋka. Yãmb wuba y mens sãoong daarã yĩnga." 
James5:6 Yãmb kaoo nin-tɩrg bʋʋd n kʋ-a, la yẽnda ka kɩɩs yãmb ye." 
James5:7 Woto yĩnga, m ba-biisi, maan-y sũ-mar hal tɩ ta Zu-soabã waoongo. Ad ka-koaad gũuda a pʋtã bi-sõamyã n pid ne sũ-mar a yĩnga, hal t'a paam sigr saaga la bõn-bɩʋʋng saaga." 
James5:8 Bɩ yãmb me maan sũ-mare, n keng y raoodo, bala, Zu-soabã waoong kolgame." 
James5:9 M ba-biisi, da yẽgm-y ne taaba, tɩ Zu-soabã ra wa kao yãmb bʋʋd ye. Ad bʋ-kaoodã yɛsa dignoorẽ wã." 
James5:10 M ba-biisi, dɩk-y Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn gom Zu-soabã yʋʋrã yĩngã mamsgo la b sũ-marã tɩ yɩ mamsg yãmb yĩnga." 
James5:11 Gese, tõnd yetame tɩ neb nins sẽn yals-b kãenkãe wã yaa sũ-noog rãmba. Yãmb wʋmame tɩ b gom a Zoob sũ-marã yelle, la yãmb yãnda baoosg ning Zu-soabã sẽn kõ-a wã. Bala, Zu-soabã pida ne nonglem la nimbãan-zoeere." 
James5:12 M ba-biisi, sẽn yɩɩd fãa, bɩ y da wẽen ne arzãna, wall ne tẽngã, wall ne wẽeneg buud a to ye. La bɩ yãmb n-yẽe yɩ n-yẽe, tɩ yãmb ayo yɩ ayo tɩ bʋʋd da wa n lʋɩ y zut ye." 
James5:13 Ned bee yãmb sʋk n namsdẽ? Bɩ a pʋʋse. Ned n tar sũ-noogo? Bɩ a yɩɩl Wẽnnaam yɩɩla. 
James5:14 Ned n be yãmb sʋkã n ka keeme? Bɩ a bool Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã kãsem-dãmbã, la bɩ bãmb tik-a ne kaam ne Zu-soabã yʋʋre, n pʋʋs a yĩnga." 
James5:15 Tẽeb pʋʋsg na n fãaga bãadã, la Zu-soabã na n yik-a lame, la a sã n da maana yel-wẽna, a na paam sugri." 
James5:16 Woto yĩngã, vẽneg-y n togs-y taab y yel-wẽna, la y pʋʋs taab yĩnga, tɩ y tõe n paam maagre. Nin-tɩrg pʋʋsgo, a sẽn pʋʋs ne a sũur fãa tara tõogr wʋsgo." 
James5:17 A Eli dag n yaa ninsaal wa tõndo. A pʋʋsa ne pẽdgre, tɩ saag kõn ni ye, la saag ka tok tẽng yʋʋm a tãab la kiis a yoob ye." 
James5:18 La a leb n pʋʋsame, la saag yii yĩngr n ni, la tẽng bõn-koaadl woma biisi." 
James5:19 M ba-biisi, yãmb ned a yembr sã n menem n zãag ne sɩdã, tɩ ned a to leb n tall-a t'a wa a pʋgẽ," 
James5:20 bɩ y bãng tɩ ned ning sẽn leb n tall-a yel-wẽn-maandã t'a bas meneng sorã n lebg n wa wã, a fãaga ned yõore, la a sõng-a t'a paam yel-wẽn wʋsg sugri." 
1Peter1:1 Maam a Pɩyɛɛr sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmdã n tʋmd seb-kãngã Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã sẽn sãeeg n be Põ la Galasi la Kapadoos la Aazi ne Bitini soolem n lebg sãamb beenẽ wã. 
1Peter1:2 Yãmb yaa tõnd ba a Wẽnnaam neb b sẽn tũusi, wa sẽn zems bãmb sẽn pĩnd n bãngã, tɩ Sɩɩg-sõng welg-y toor tɩ y zĩnd pʋ-peelem n yɩ sakdb n paam t'a Zeezi zɩɩmã pek yãmba. Bɩ y paam bark la laafɩ wʋsgo." 
1Peter1:3 Pẽgr Wẽnnaam ning sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris ba. Bãmb nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, b kõo tõnd dogem paalg a Zeezi Kiris sẽn vʋʋg n bas kũumã maasem yĩnga, tɩ tõnd tar tẽeb pidsg gũudum" 
1Peter1:4 sẽn vɩ, la d paam dogem-pʋɩɩr sẽn ka tõe n sãame, wall rẽgme, wall zelg ye. La b bĩng-a-la arzãn pʋg yãmb yĩnga," 
1Peter1:5 yãmb tẽebã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam pãngã zãada yãmba, tɩ yãmb na paam fãagr ning sẽn segl n sɛ, n na n puk yaoolem wakatã." 
1Peter1:6 Yãmb maanda sũ-noog bõn-kãng yĩnga, baa ne sẽn ya tɩlɛ tɩ yãmb paam makr buud toay-toay sẽn namsd yãmb moasã wakat bilf yĩngã." 
1Peter1:7 Yaa sẽn na yɩl n mak yãmb tẽebã n bãng a sẽn yaa a soaba. Sãnem yaa bõn-sãamdga, la baoosgo b makd-a-la ne bugum n getẽ. La yãmb tẽebã sẽn tar yõod wʋsg n yɩɩd sãnemã, b makd-a lame n getẽ, t'a Zeezi Kiris waoongã daare, bɩ y paam pẽgre la ziiri ne waoogre." 
1Peter1:8 Baa ne yãmb sẽn nan ka yã a Zeezi Kirisã, yãmb nonga bãmba. Baa yãmb sẽn nan ka yã bãmbã, yãmb tẽeda bãmba, n maand sũ-noog noor sẽn ka tõe n togse, la sẽn tar ziiri." 
1Peter1:9 Bala, yãmb paama y sɩɩsã fãagr tɩ yɩ y tẽebã keoore." 
1Peter1:10 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn pĩnd n togs bark ning Wẽnnaam sẽn da bĩng yãmb yĩngã baoome la b vees n na n bãng fãag-kãnga võore. 
1Peter1:11 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã maoome, n bao n na n bãng Kiris Sɩɩgã sẽn be bãmb pʋsẽ wã sẽn pĩnd n gomd Kiris namsgã, ne b waoongã sẽn na n pʋglã sẽn na n yɩ wakat ninga, la sẽn na n tũ ne bũmb ninga." 
1Peter1:12 La Wẽnnaam vẽnega b no-rɛɛsdbã tɩ b bãng tɩ bãmb sẽn deeg koɛɛg ningã ka bãmb mens yĩng ye, la yaa yãmb yĩnga la b ya bõn-kãens tʋmtʋmdba. Moasã, neb nins sẽn moon yãmb koe-noogã togsa yãmb bõn-kãens ne Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yi arzãnã pãnga, la baa malegsã mens datẽ lame n wʋm a võore." 
1Peter1:13 Yaa woto yĩnga, yõk-y y tagsgo, yɩ-y gũus-m-mens-rãmba, la y paam tẽeb pidsg gũudum sẽn ya sõama zãng ne bark ning b sẽn na n kõ yãmb Kiris waoongã wakatã." 
1Peter1:14 Bɩ y yɩ kom-sakdse, la y ra sak wẽng ratem nins yãmb sẽn dag n sak wakat sẽn looge, y sẽn dag n be y zɩɩlmã pʋgã ye." 
1Peter1:15 La soab ning sẽn bool-a yãmbã sẽn yaa pʋ‑peelem soabã yĩnga, bɩ yãmb me welg toor n yɩ pʋ‑peelem dãmb y yel-manesemã buud fãa pʋgẽ." 
1Peter1:16 Bala, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã yetame: Bɩ y yɩ pʋ-peelem dãmba, bala, mam yaa pʋ-peelem soaba." 
1Peter1:17 Yãmb sã n pʋʋsd Wẽnnaam ning sẽn ka tũusd nebã, la sẽn kaood ned kam fãa bʋʋd wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmdã, bɩ y kẽn ne gũus-m-menga, yãmb sẽn ket n be dũniyã zug wakate." 
1Peter1:18 Sɩd me, yãmb miime tɩ ka ne bõn-sãamds sẽn wẽnd ligdi, wall sãnem, la b fãag yãmb n yiis vɩɩmã minind nins sẽn ka yõodã yãmb sẽn deeg y yaab-rãmba nengẽ wã pʋgẽ ye." 
1Peter1:19 La yaa ne Kiris zɩɩmã sẽn yaa sõama wʋsgã, Kiris yɩɩ wa pe-bil sẽn ka tar yelle, la sẽn ka" 
1Peter1:20 tar bãnde, Wẽnnaam dag n pĩnd n yãka Kiris sẽn deng dũni naanego, la b waa yãmb yĩnga, yaoolem zamaana pʋgẽ." 
1Peter1:21 Kiris maasem yĩnga, yãmb tẽeda Wẽnnaam ning sẽn vʋʋg-a Kiris n bas kũum la b kõ-b waoogrã. Sẽn na yɩl tɩ yãmb tẽebã ne y teegrã zĩnd ne Wẽnnaam." 
1Peter1:22 Yãmb sẽn sak sɩdã n yɩlg y mensã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paam nonglem meng-meng ba-biisã yĩngã, bɩ y nong taab wʋsg ne y sũyã fãa," 
1Peter1:23 yãmb sẽn paam rogem-paalgã yĩnga, ka bõn-buud sẽn sãamd n kɩt tɩ yãmb paam dogem paalgã ye, la yaa bõn-buud sẽn ka sãamda, yaa Wẽnnaam goamã sẽn vɩ n paad wakat sẽn kõn sa wã." 
1Peter1:24 Bala, Ninsaal fãa wẽnda wa moodo, la a waoogrã fãa wẽnda wa mo-pui. Mood kʋɩtame la mo-pui sʋʋgdame" 
1Peter1:25 La Zu-soabã goam paada wakat sẽn kõn sa. Yaa koe-kãng la koe-noogã b sẽn togs yãmbã. 
1Peter2:1 Dẽ yĩngã, bas-y pʋ-toog fãa, la sɩlem fãa, la zãmbo, la sũ-kiiri, la paoogr goam buud fãa." 
1Peter2:2 Yɩ-y wa kom-peelse, n tʋlg Wẽnnaam goamã sẽn yaa wa bĩisim sẽn ka pulã, t'a bɩɩs yãmb tɩ y paam fãagre," 
1Peter2:3 sã n yaa tɩ yãmb pẽnega Zu-soabã n bãng tɩ b yaa sõama. 
1Peter2:4 Kolg-y Zu-soab a Zeezi sẽn yaa ‹kug-vɩɩg› ninsaalbã sẽn zãgsã, la sẽn yaa kugr Wẽnnaam sẽn yãke, la sẽn be yõod bãmb taoorã." 
1Peter2:5 La yãmb mens sẽn wẽnd kug-vɩɩsã, me-y y mens tɩ yɩ Sɩɩg-sõng roogo, la maan-kʋʋdb sẽn yaa sõama, n kõt Wẽnnaam maoong sẽn yaa Sɩɩg-sõng rẽnda, sẽn tat Wẽnnaam yam a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga." 
1Peter2:6 Bala, Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã pʋgẽ b yeelame yaa: Ade, mam dɩgenda kugr sẽn tar pãng Sɩyõ pʋgẽ, mam sẽn yãke, la m sẽn waooge. La ned ning sẽn tẽed-a kug-kãngã, a kõn paam yãnd ye." 
1Peter2:7 Dẽ yĩnga, bãmb kug-kãng bee yõod wʋsg ne yãmb sẽn tẽedã, la ne neb nins sẽn ka tẽedã, kugr ning tãn-metbã sẽn zagsã, kug-kãng lebga roogã pãng kugri, a soakã zĩigẽ. La a yaa kug-lakdg nebã yĩnga. La pĩig sẽn lubd nebã." 
1Peter2:8 Bãmb lakda kug-kãngã, b sẽn ka sakd Wẽnnaam goamã yĩnga. La Wẽnnaam dag n pĩnd n miime tɩ na n yɩɩ a woto ne-ba." 
1Peter2:9 La yãmb yẽ, yãmb yaa buud b sẽn tũusi, la naam maan-kʋʋdba, la buud sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, neb Wẽnnaam sẽn da tɩ y moon n wilg sẽn bool-a yãmb n yiis likã pʋgẽ, n kẽes-y vẽenem sẽn be ziirã pʋgã tʋʋm sõama wã." 
1Peter2:10 Pĩnda, yãmb dag n ka Wẽnnaam neb ye, la moasã, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam nebã. Yãmb sẽn dag n ka paam nimbãan-zoeerã, moasã, yãmb paama nimbãan-zoeere." 
1Peter2:11 Mam zo-nongdse, yãmb sẽn yaa sãamb la kaoos-wetã, mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y ra sak yĩngã ratem wẽnsã sẽn zabd ne sɩɩgã ye." 
1Peter2:12 Paam-y yel-manesem sẽn yaa sõama neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã sʋka, tɩ baa b sẽn dõt yãmb zĩig ning fãa n yetẽ tɩ y yaa tʋʋm wẽns maandbã, bɩ b yã yãmb tʋʋm sõama wã n waoog Wẽnnaam, b waoongã daare." 
1Peter2:13 Zu-soabã maasem yĩnga, sak-y dũniyã nebã tõod fãa, sã n yaa rĩm-dãmba sẽn so pãnga," 
1Peter2:14 sã n yaa nanambs rĩmã sẽn tʋm tɩ b sɩbg neb nins sẽn maand wẽngã, la b waoog neb nins sẽn maand neerã." 
1Peter2:15 Bala, yaa Wẽnnaam daab tɩ yãmb sẽn maand neerã, y na kɩt tɩ yalembã bas b zɩɩlem goamã." 
1Peter2:16 Kẽn-y wa burkĩmba, la y ra sak tɩ yãmb lohormã yɩ pʋ-toog lillidg ye. Bɩ y tʋm wa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdba." 
1Peter2:17 Waoog-y nebã fãa. Nong-y y ba-biisã, la y zoe Wẽnnaam. Waoog-y rĩmã." 
1Peter2:18 Tʋmtʋmdba, sak-y y zu-soben-dãmba la y zoe-ba. La ka zu-soben-dãmb nins sẽn yaa nin-sõamyã la sũ-bʋgsem dãmbã bal ye. Sak-y neb nins sẽn ya" 
1Peter2:19 nin-toosã me. Bala, ned sã n sak namsg sẽn ka zems ne-a, a sẽn sakd Wẽnnaam yĩnga, yõwã bee barka." 
1Peter2:20 Sɩd me, yãmb sã n sak tɩ b nams yãmb y sẽn maan yel-wẽnd yĩnga, bõe waoogr n be be? La yãmb sã n maan tʋʋm sõama n sak namsg bõn-kãens yĩnga, yõwã bee bark Wẽnnaam taoore." 
1Peter2:21 Sɩd me, yaa bõn-kãng yĩng la b bool yãmba. Tɩ bõe, Kiris me namsa yãmb yĩnga, n bas mamsg ne yãmba, tɩ y tũ bãmb naoã." 
1Peter2:22 Bãmb ka tol n maan yel-wẽnd ye, la b ka tol n wʋm zĩrẽ goam sẽn yi bãmb noorẽ ye." 
1Peter2:23 Neb tʋʋ bãmba, la b ka tʋʋs n lebs ye. Neb namsa bãmba, la b ka zab ne-b ye. B basa b yɛlã sẽn kaood-a bʋʋd tɩrgã nugẽ." 
1Peter2:24 Kiris meng n deeg tõnd yel-wẽnã b yĩngã pʋgẽ da-pɩkã zugu, tɩ tõnd sẽn yaa wa kũum yel-wẽnã wɛɛngẽ wã, tõnd na vɩɩmd n maan tɩrlem. Yaa bãmb poglgã yĩng la yãmb paamd maagre." 
1Peter2:25 Bala, yãmb dag n wẽnda piis sẽn meneme, la moasã, yãmb lebgame n wa y sɩɩsã pe-kɩɩmã la b gũudã nengẽ." 
1Peter3:1 Woto me, pagba, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa sak a sɩda, tɩ baa bãmb neb kẽer sẽn ka sakd Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã, bɩ b" 
1Peter3:2 sẽn yãt b pagbã yel-manesmã sẽn yaa sõama wã, la sẽn waoogd bãmbã, kɩt tɩ b sak Wẽnnaam, tɩ ka tũ ne goam ye." 
1Peter3:3 Da bao-y neerem ning ninã sẽn tõe n yã wã bala, sẽn yaa zut pãnengo, wall sãnem fan-teedo, wall nagem fut yeelgr ye." 
1Peter3:4 La yãmb tog n baoo neerem ning sẽn solge, n be ned kam fãa sũurẽ, la sẽn ka sãamdã, sẽn yaa sũ-bʋgsem sɩɩga, la sũ-maasem. Ade, yaa bõn-kãensã n tar yõod wʋsg Wẽnnaam nifẽ." 
1Peter3:5 Kʋdemd wakate, pʋg-sõama nins sẽn da tẽed Wẽnnaamã dag n manegda b mens a woto, n sakd b sɩdba." 
1Peter3:6 Rẽndã n kɩt t'a Saara dag n sakd a Abrahaam n boond-a t'a zu-soaba. Yãmb sã n maan tʋʋm sõama, n ka sak n bas tɩ bãmb kẽes yãmb dabeem, yãmb lebga a Saara kom-pugli." 
1Peter3:7 Woto me, raopa, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa vɩɩmd ne a paga, la y bãng tɩ bãmb yaa neb sẽn ka tar pãng wa yãmb ye. Maan-y-b wa sẽn zemse, n nand-ba, bala, b yaa pʋɩt-n-taas ne yãmba, vɩɩm ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ wã pʋgẽ, maan-y-yã a woto tɩ bũmb baa fʋɩ ra wa gɩdg yãmb pʋʋsg ye." 
1Peter3:8 Sẽn na n baase, bɩ yãmb fãa paam tagsg a yembre, la yam a yembre. Paam-y nonglem y ba-biis yĩnga, la y pid ne nimbãan-zoeere la sik-m-menga." 
1Peter3:9 Da lebs-y ned wẽnga, a sẽn maan yãmb wẽng yĩng ye, la y ra tʋʋs n lebs b sẽn tʋʋs yãmb yĩng ye. Da maan-y-yã a woto ye. Bɩ y lebs barka, bala, yaa bõn-kãng yĩng la b bool yãmb tɩ y na paam bark tɩ yɩ y pʋɩɩre." 
1Peter3:10 Wẽnnaam gʋls sõama yetame yaa: Sɩd me, ned sã n dat t'a vɩɩm yɩ-a noogo, la a paam sũ-noog a vɩɩm wakate, bɩ a gũus t'a zelemd da gom wẽng ye la a ra sak t'a noor gom zĩrẽ goam ye." 
1Peter3:11 Bɩ a zãag a meng ne wẽnga, la a maan neere, bɩ a bao laafɩ ne nebã, la a pʋg laafɩ wã." 
1Peter3:12 Bala, Zu-soabã geta nin-tɩrse, bãmb kelgda nin-tɩrs pʋʋsgo, la b wẽnemdeda b neng n basd neb nins sẽn maand wẽngã." 
1Peter3:13 Yãmb sã n wɩngd ne tʋʋm sõama maanego, ãndã n na n maan yãmb wẽnga?" 
1Peter3:14 La baa yãmb sã n paamd namsg tɩrlem yĩnga, yãmb na paam sũ-noogo. Da zoe-y ninsaalbã sẽn zoet bũmb ningã ye, la y ra sãam y sũy ye." 
1Peter3:15 Bɩ y waoog Kiris sẽn yaa yãmb Zu-soabã, y sũyã pʋsẽ. Bɩ y yɩ neb sẽn tõe wakat fãa, n leokd neb nins sẽn sokd yãmb n dat n bãng y tẽebã yellã ne sũ-maasem la ne sik-m-menga." 
1Peter3:16 Paam-y sũur kaset sõngo, tɩ baa sẽn yaa zĩig ning fãa, bɩ neb nins sẽn kãnegd-b yãmbã, n gomd yãmb wẽng Kiris tũudmã pʋgẽ wã paam yãnde." 
1Peter3:17 Bala, sã n taa Wẽnnaam yam tɩ tõnd paam namsg d sẽn maan neer yĩnga, yõwã n yaa sõama n yɩɩd tõnd sẽn na n paam namsg d sẽn maan wẽng yĩnga." 
1Peter3:18 Sɩd me, Kiris me kii vugr bal yel-wẽnã yiisg yĩnga. Bãmb sẽn yaa nin-tɩrgã, b kii ka-tɩrlem dãmbã yĩnga, sẽn na yɩl n tall yãmb n ta Wẽnnaam nengẽ. B kʋʋ bãmb yĩngã, la Sɩɩg-sõng leb n kõo bãmb vɩɩm." 
1Peter3:19 La Sɩ-kãng maasem yĩnga, bãmb kẽnga kɩɩm-kulg me n tɩ moon koɛɛgã sɩɩs nins b sẽn da balgã sʋka." 
1Peter3:20 Bãmb yaa neb nins sẽn yɩ kɩɩsdb wakat sẽn looge, Wẽnnaam sẽn maan sũ-mar n kaoos wakat ning a Nowe sẽn maan koom koglgã tɩ neb bilfu, dat n togs tɩ neb a nii wã kẽe a pʋgẽ n põs koomã." 
1Peter3:21 Rẽndã ra mamsda koom lisg ning sẽn fãagd yãmb rũndã-rũndã wã. Yaa lisg sẽn ka yĩng rẽgd yiisg yĩng ye, la yaa kosg sẽn kot Wẽnnaam ne sũur kaset sẽn ya sõama, a Zeezi Kiris sẽn vʋʋg n bas kũumã maasem yĩnga." 
1Peter3:22 A Zeezi Kiris zɛk n bee arzãna, n be Wẽnnaam dɩtgo, la malɛɛk-rãmbã ne pãn-soaadbã, la pãens rãmbã sakda bãmba." 
1Peter4:1 Dẽ wã yĩnga, Kiris sẽn nams b yĩnga pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ yãmb me paam tagsg a yembr ne bãmba. Bala, ned ning sẽn nams a yĩngã pʋg basa yel-wẽnã," 
1Peter4:2 tɩ wakat ning sẽn ket yẽnda sẽn na n vɩɩmd a yĩngã pʋgã, yẽnda kõn leb n vɩ wa sẽn zems ninsaal datem ye, la a na n vɩɩmda wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam datem." 
1Peter4:3 Sɩd me, wakat sẽn looge, yãmb dag n maanda wa neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã sẽn maandã. Yaa n sekame. Yãmb dag n kẽnda raglem pʋga, ratem wẽnse la yũ rãam n tuumdẽ wã pʋga, la rã-tɩgrã ne yão-beedã pʋga, la wẽn-naandsã pʋʋsg sẽn yaa bõn-wẽng wʋsgã pʋga." 
1Peter4:4 Yãmb sẽn ka leb n naagd neb nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaamã n maand tʋʋm-dẽgd kãensã, a linga bãmb tɩ b kãnegd yãmba." 
1Peter4:5 Bãmb na n yals n togsa b yɛlã soab ning sẽn segl n sɛ n na n kao nin-vɩɩs la kũum bʋʋdã taoore. 
1Peter4:6 Sɩd me, yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ b moon koe-noogã neb nins sẽn ki wã me, tɩ ninsaalbã sẽn kao bãmb bʋʋd wa sẽn zems yĩngã rẽndã, bɩ Wẽnnaam nifẽ bãmb na vɩ sɩɩg pʋgẽ." 
1Peter4:7 Bũmb fãa sɛɛb wakat kolgame. Dẽ wã yĩnga, yɩ-y neb sẽn tar yam la gũus-m-mens-rãmba, n kẽng taoor ne pʋʋsgo." 
1Peter4:8 La sẽn deng bũmb fãa, nong-y taab daar fãa. Bala, nonglem luta yel-wẽn wʋsgo." 
1Peter4:9 Maan-y taab sãando, tɩ yẽgeng kaẽ ye." 
1Peter4:10 Yãmb ned kam fãa sẽn deeg kũunã, rɩk-y-b n tʋm n sõng neb a taaba, wa Wẽnnaam barkã kũun toay-toayã yel-gɛtb sẽn yaa sõama." 
1Peter4:11 Ned sã n gomda, bɩ a gom wa sẽn zemsd Wẽnnaam goamã sẽn yetã. Ned sã n sõngdẽ, bɩ a sõng wa sẽn zemsd pãng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ-a wã, tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn so ziiri la pãng wakat sẽn kõn sa wã paam waoogr bũmba fãa pʋga, a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩnga. Ãmina!" 
1Peter4:12 Mam zo-nongdse, ra sak-y tɩ nams-toaag ning sẽn be yãmb sʋk n makd yãmbã yɩ lingr ne yãmba, tɩ yaa wa yaa yel-sãang n paamd yãmb ye." 
1Peter4:13 Ka tog n yɩ a woto ye, maan-y sũ-noogo, yãmb sẽn paam pʋɩɩr ne Kiris namsgã yĩnga, tɩ yãmb tõe n maan sũ-noog n kɩdem wakat ning bãmb ziirã sẽn na n pukã." 
1Peter4:14 Bark bee yãmb zugu, nebã sã n nams yãmb Kiris yʋʋrã yĩnga, bala, Sɩɩg ning sẽn be ziirã sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã bee yãmb zutu." 
1Peter4:15 Bɩ yãmb ned baa a yembr da paam namsg a sẽn yaa nin-kʋʋd yĩnga, wall wagdr yĩnga, wall tʋʋm-wẽns maand yĩnga, wall a sẽn yaa ned sẽn kẽed yɛl sẽn ka pak-a yĩng ye." 
1Peter4:16 La ned sã n paamd namsgo, a sẽn yaa Kiris tẽed yĩnga, bɩ a ra zoe yãnd ye, a pẽg Wẽnnaam, b sẽn boond yẽnda tɩ Kiris tẽedã yĩnga." 
1Peter4:17 Bala, moasã yaa wakat b sẽn na n sɩng bʋʋdã kaoob ne Wẽnnaam nebã. La sã n mikame tɩ yaa ne tõnd la b na n sɩng bʋʋdã kaoobo, neb nins sẽn ka sakd-b Wẽnnaam koe-noogã baoosg na yɩɩ a wãna?" 
1Peter4:18 La sã n yaa tɩ nin-tɩrg fãagr paoong yaa toogo, dẽ ned ning sẽn yaa wẽn-kɩɩsd la yel-wẽn-maandã yell na n yɩɩ a wãna?" 
1Peter4:19 Rẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ neb nins sẽn paamd namsg wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam tʋlsmã rɩk b sɩɩsã n bas Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa naanda la sɩd soabã nugẽ, n kell n maan neere." 
1Peter5:1 Dẽ, mam sagenda kãsem-dãmbã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, mam me sẽn yaa kãsem wa bãmbã, la m ya Kiris namsgã kaset soabã, la m ya pʋɩt-n-taag ne Kiris ziirã sẽn na n wa pukã yĩnga." 
1Peter5:2 Rɩlg-y Wẽnnaam piisã sẽn be ne yãmbã. La ka ne modgr ye, yaa ne yamleoogo wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam daabã. La ka paoong ratem yĩng ye, yaa ne sũur sẽn yaa sõama." 
1Peter5:3 La ka tɩ y soog nebã b sẽn gũnug yãmbã ne pãng ye, la yaa tɩ yãmb na yɩ mamsg wʋsg piisã yĩnga." 
1Peter5:4 La Pe-kɩɩmbã kãsem sã n wa puki, yãmb na n paama maanf sẽn tar ziiri, la sẽn ka sãamd ye." 
1Peter5:5 Woto me, kom-bɩɩse, sak-y kãsem-dãmbã. La bɩ yãmb fãa paam sik-m-menga, yãmb ne taab sʋka. Bala, Wẽnnaam kɩɩsda wuk-m-mens rãmbã, la b ningd sik-m-mens rãmbã zut barka." 
1Peter5:6 Dẽ wã, sik-y y mens Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa pãng soabã taoore, tɩ bãmb tʋlsmã wakat sã n ta, bɩ bãmb zẽk yãmba." 
1Peter5:7 Sik-y yãmb yɩɩrã fãa n bas ne bãmba, bala, bãmb n get yãmb yelle." 
1Peter5:8 Yɩ-y neb sẽn tar yam! Gũus-y-yã! Yãmb bɛyã sẽn ya a Sʋtãan gõodame n kelemd wa gɩgemde, n baood a sẽn tõe n paam a soab n sãame." 
1Peter5:9 Kɩɩs-y-yã-a, n yals tẽebã pʋg kãenkãe, la y bãng tɩ namsg a woto buud me namsda yãmb ba-biisã sẽn be dũniyã pʋgã." 
1Peter5:10 Yãmb sã n nams wakat bilf pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam sẽn so bark fãa wã, sẽn bool-a yãmb tɩ y wa paam pʋɩɩr ne ziir ning sẽn kõn sa a Zeezi Kiris maasem yĩngã, bãmb menga na n zãmsa yãmba, n paas yãmb pãnga, n kɩt tɩ yãmb kɩ yẽga, la b kɩt tɩ yãmb yɩ neb sẽn ka vigsd ye." 
1Peter5:11 Bɩ pãngã yɩ bãmb dẽnd zamaan woo zamaane! Ãmina. 
1Peter5:12 Yaa ne tõnd ba-biig a Sɩlvẽ sẽn yaa sɩd soabã nug la mam gʋlsd seb-bi-kãngã n na n tʋm yãmba, la m sagl-yã, la m wilg-y tɩ yãmb sẽn be bark ning pʋgã n ya Wẽnnaam bark meng-menga." 
1Peter5:13 A Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be Babilondã, ne m biig a Mark me pʋʋsda yãmba." 
1Peter5:13 A Kiris tẽedbã sẽn be Babilondã, ne m biig a Mark me pʋʋsda yãmba." 
1Peter5:14 Pʋʋs-y taab n mok taab ne nonglem mokre. Bɩ Yãmb fãa sẽn tũud Kirisã paam laafɩ! 
2Peter1:1 Maam a Sɩmo Pɩyɛɛr sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris yamba, la b tẽn-tʋmdã n tʋmd seb-kãngã neb nins sẽn paam tẽeb sẽn tar yõod wa tõnd dẽnda nengẽ. Yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã ne d Fãagd a Zeezi Kiris tɩrlem tʋʋmdã maasem yĩng la d paam-a." 
2Peter1:2 Bɩ yãmb sẽn bãng Wẽnnaam ne tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi wã kɩt tɩ y paam bark la laafɩ wʋsgo. 
2Peter1:3 Wẽnnaam pãngã kõo tõnd bũmb ning fãa sẽn tõe n sõng tõnd tɩ d vɩɩmd Wẽnnaamã tũudum pʋgẽ, la a kɩt tɩ d bãng soab ning sẽn bool-a tõnd tɩ d paam bãmb ziirã ne b sõmblmã." 
2Peter1:4 Yaa bõn-kãens maasem yĩng la b kõ tõnd kãabs nins sẽn yaa sõama la kãsemsã, tɩ yãmb sã n zoe n bas ratem-wẽnsã sẽn be dũniyã n wat ne sãoongã, kãab‑kãens yĩnga, yãmb na paam Wẽnnaam yalẽ wã." 
2Peter1:5 La bõn-kãng yĩng me, maan-y y pãng sẽn tõe fãa, tɩ y tẽebã naag ne sõmblem, tɩ y sõmblmã naag ne bãngre." 
2Peter1:6 La bãngrã pʋgẽ, bɩ y mao n paas yõk-m-menga la yõk-m-menga pʋgẽ, bɩ y paas sũ-tõogo, la sũ-tõogã pʋgẽ, bɩ y paas Wẽnnaam sakre." 
2Peter1:7 La Wẽnnaam sakrã pʋgẽ, maan-y taab ba-biir manesem la ba-biirã manesem pʋgẽ, paas-y nonglem." 
2Peter1:8 Sɩd me, bõn-kãensã sã n be yãmb pʋsẽ, la b sã n paamd pãng be n paasdẽ, b na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb maan tʋʋmã la y wom biis sẽn na n kɩt tɩ yãmb bãng tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris n paase." 
2Peter1:9 La ned ning sẽn ka tar bõn-kãens yaa zoanga, la a nina mumame, la a yĩmdame tɩ yẽnda paama pekr ne yel-wẽn nins yẽnda sẽn da maan tɩ loogã." 
2Peter1:10 M ba-biisi, yaa woto yĩnga, modg-y n yals-y kãenkãe Wẽnnaam sẽn bool yãmbã pʋgẽ, la b sẽn yãk yãmbã pʋgẽ, yãmb sã n maan woto, yãmb kõn tol n bʋdg n bas y tẽebã ye." 
2Peter1:11 Yaa woto n na n kɩt tɩ b kõ yãmb noor zãnga, tɩ y kẽ tõnd Zu-soab la d fãagd a Zeezi Kiris soolem sẽn kõn sa wã pʋgẽ." 
2Peter1:12 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam na n tẽegd yãmb bõn-kãens daar fãa, baa ne yãmb sẽn zoe n mi-bã, la y sẽn yas kãenkãe sɩd-kãngã pʋgẽ wã." 
2Peter1:13 Mam tagsame tɩ yaa neere, tɩ mam sẽn ket n vɩ yĩn-kiid-kãngã sẽn yaa wa fu-roogã pʋga, bɩ m tẽeg-y tɩ y ra gũs ye." 
2Peter1:14 Bala, mam miime tɩ sã n yɩ bilfu, mam na n yii yĩn-kiid-kãngã pʋgẽ, wa tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris sẽn vẽneg-a ne maamã." 
2Peter1:15 La mam na n modgame tɩ mam loogr poore, bɩ yãmb tõog n tẽegd bõn-kãens yell bũmb fãa pʋgẽ." 
2Peter1:16 Sɩd me, tõnd ka tũnug soalem b sẽn tags n naane, n togs yãmb tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris pãn-kãsengã la bãmb waoongã yell ye, la yaa tɩ tõnd mens nin yãnda bãmb ziirã." 
2Peter1:17 Bala, bãmb deega waoogr la ziir tõnd Ba a Wẽnnaam nengẽ. Yaa bãmb sẽn wa n wʋm naam sẽn be ziirã koɛɛg sẽn gom ne bãmb n yeel tɩ: Ada yaa mam bi-ribl‑nongr sẽn ta mam yam zãnga." 
2Peter1:18 Yaa tõnd sẽn wa n be tãn-sõngã zug ne bãmbã la tõnd wʋm koe-kãng sẽn yi arzãn n gome. 
2Peter1:19 Tõnd leb n mii vẽeneg tɩ pĩnd-n-bãngr goam sẽn da togsã yaa sɩda. Yaa neer tɩ yãmb ges bõn-kãens wa y sẽn get fɩtl sẽn be zĩ-likẽ n yãgd n gũud hal beoog sẽn na n vẽeg tɩ yibeoog ãdgã yãg yãmb sũyã pʋse. 
2Peter1:20 Sẽn deng bũmb fãa, bãng-y tɩ ned ka be n tõe n bilg Wẽnnaam gʋls-sõamyã pĩnd-n-bãngr gomd baa a yembr võor ne a meng pãng ye." 
2Peter1:21 Bala, pĩnd-n-bãngr gomd baa a ye zɩ n tol n yɩ ne ninsaal tʋlsem ye, la yaa Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn kõ bũmb ningã la ninsaalbã reegd n togsd Wẽnnaam yĩnga." 
2Peter2:1 Zĩrẽ-bãngdb n dag n zĩnd Wẽnnaam nebã sʋka. Woto me, zĩrẽ karen-saam-dãmb n be yãmb sʋkã. B na n maana sɩlem n wa ne zãmsg sẽn menesd nebã, la b na n kɩɩsa Zu-soab ning sẽn fãag-a bãmbã, la b na n taka sãoong tao‑tao n wa b mens zutu." 
2Peter2:2 Neb wʋsg na n pʋga bãmb b tʋʋm-beedã pʋgẽ, la sɩd sorã na n paama tʋʋsgo, bãmb tʋʋm-beedã yĩnga." 
2Peter2:3 Bãmb rat-wʋsgã yĩnga, b na n belga yãmb ne sɩlem goam n fã yãmba. La bãmb sɩbgrã sɩnga hal daar zãr n watẽ, la bãmb sãoongã ka na n vaal ye." 
2Peter2:4 Bala, Wẽnnaam ka bas tɩ malegs nins sẽn maan-b yel-wẽnã põs ye B rig-b lame n lobe, n kẽes-b bog-zulung sẽn yaa lik bida pʋgẽ, n balg-b be n gũud bʋʋdã kaoob daare." 
2Peter2:5 Wẽnnaam ka bas pĩnd dũniyã t'a põs ye. Yaa neb a nii bal la bãmb põsg-yã: Ya a Nowe n dag n yaa tɩrlmã koe-moaanda. La Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ sa-kãseng wa ni wẽn-kɩɩsdbã dũni zugu. 
2Peter2:6 Wẽnnaam sɩbga tẽms nins sẽn boond tɩ Sodom la Gomoorã, n kɩt tɩ b lebg tompeglem, tɩ yɩ mamsg wẽn-kɩɩsdb nins sẽn na n pʋgl n wa wã yĩnga." 
2Peter2:7 La Wẽnnaam fãaga nin-tɩrg a Lote. Yẽnda sũur da sãama hal wʋsgo, nin-wẽns kãensã tʋʋm-dẽgdã sẽn ya wʋsgã yĩnga." 
2Peter2:8 Bala, nin-tɩr-kãng sẽn da be bãmb sʋk n yãt tʋʋm-dẽgd nins b sẽn maandã, la a wʋmdẽ wã, a sũurã ra sãamda daar fãa, t'a namsd wʋsg a tɩrlmã pʋgẽ." 
2Peter2:9 Rẽ wã, Zu-soabã mii b sẽn na n maan to-to n fãag neb nins sẽn sakd bãmbã makr wakate, la b sẽn na n maan to-to n bĩng tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã n sɩbg-b bʋʋdã kaoob daare." 
2Peter2:10 Sẽn pʋs n yɩɩd fãa, yaa neb nins sẽn be tʋʋm-dẽgd maaneg ratem pʋgã, n baood n maan yĩngã tʋlsem, la b kɩɩsd Wẽnnaam noorã. Zĩrẽ karen-saam-dãmbã yaa sek-m-mens-rãmba, la tɩta-nebã, b ka yɛɛsd tɩ paoog yĩngr rãmb ziirã ye. B tʋʋd-b lame." 
2Peter2:11 Baa malegs nins sẽn tar pãng ne pãn-tõog n yɩɩd bãmbã yaool n ka gomd yĩngr pãens rãmbã wẽng Zu-soabã taoor ye. 
2Peter2:12 Nin-wẽn-kãensã wẽnda rũms sẽn sakd b mens ratem, tɩ b belmã yõod yaa yõk n kʋ balã. Bãmb paoogda bũmb nins b sẽn ka mi. Bãmb mens tʋʋm dẽgdã n na n sãam-ba." 
2Peter2:13 Bãmb tʋʋm wẽnsã yĩnga, b na n deega tʋʋm wẽns yaoodo. Bãmb getame tɩ tʋm wẽngã ratem tʋʋm ne wĩntoog yaa sũ-noog bũmbu. Bãmb yaa wẽns la rẽgdo, la b sẽn naagd yãmb n dɩtẽ wã wakate, b maanda sũ-noog ne b zãmbã." 
2Peter2:14 Bãmb nina geta pʋg-yoaadba, la b zɩ n maan yel-wẽn n tɩg ye. B belgda neb nins yam sẽn yuusdã n tõogdẽ, b sũyã pida ne maan sɩlem n kãag n kõ b mense. Wẽnnaam kãab-wẽng bee bãmb zutu." 
2Peter2:15 Bãmb bʋdg n basa so-tɩrgã, n menem n tũ a Bewoor biig a Balaam sore. Yẽnda sakame n na n maan wẽng n deeg yaoodo," 
2Peter2:16 la a paama lengre, a kɩɩsgã yĩnga. Bõang sẽn ka gomd goma wa ninsaala n gɩdg Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs‑kãng yalem-tʋʋmã." 
2Peter2:17 Nin-kãens wẽnda buls sẽn ka tar koom ye, la wa sawat sobg sẽn dɩkda. B zĩig na n yɩɩ lik sẽn yaa bida pʋgẽ." 
2Peter2:18 Ne bãmb wuk-m-meng goamã sẽn yaa vɩɩdã, b rɩkda b yĩngã ratem sẽn yaa tʋʋm-dẽgdã n belgd neb nins sẽn nan lak b mens ne neb nins sẽn vɩ-b wẽng maaneg pʋgẽ wã." 
2Peter2:19 Bãmb kãabda nebã lohorem, tɩ bãmb mensã yaool n ya tʋʋm-dẽgd yembse, bala, ned kam fãa yaa bũmb ning sẽn tõog yẽnda wã yamba." 
2Peter2:20 Sɩd me, nebã sã n bãng tõnd Zu-soab la d fãagd a Zeezi Kirisã, n yi n bas dũni wã dẽgdã, n leb n kẽ a pʋgẽ t'a tõog bãmba, bãmb yaoolem toogã wẽng na n yɩɩga pipi rẽndã." 
2Peter2:21 Bala, bãmb sã n dag n ka bãngẽ tɩrlmã sor n são bãmb sẽn bãng-a, n yaool n wẽnemd n bas tõ-sõng ning b sẽn dag n kõ bãmbã."
