2Peter2:22 Bũmb ning sẽn paam bãmbã yaa wa yel-bũnd ning sẽn yaa sɩdã sẽn yeelã: Baagã lebg n tɩ rɩɩ a sẽn dag n wʋbã, la kurku-yãangã b sẽn nan pekã leb n tɩ bilma begdã." 
2Peter3:1 Mam zo-nongdse, ade, zoe n yaa sebr a yiib-n-soab mam sẽn gʋlsd yãmba. Sɛb a yiibã fãa pʋse, mam tẽegda yãmba, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb yamã puk vẽenega," 
2Peter3:2 tɩ yãmb tõog n tẽeg Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs sõmyã sẽn dag n deng n togsã, la tõnd Zu-soab la d Fãagdã tõogã yãmb tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn zãms yãmbã." 
2Peter3:3 Sẽn deng bũmb fãa, bãng-y tɩ yaoolem wakate, neb sẽn laad neb n na n zĩndi. B na n yaala yãmba, b na n yɩɩ neb sẽn sakd b mens yĩngã ratem." 
2Peter3:4 La b na n yeelame yaa: «Bãmb sẽn da kãab tɩ b na n lebg n waame wã, b bɛɛ?»" 
2Peter3:5 Sɩd me, yaa ne yamleoog la b yĩm tɩ wakat sẽn looge, saasẽ la tẽng zĩndame. Wẽnnaam gomame tɩ tẽng puk koomã sʋka, la yɩɩ koomã la Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ lebg tẽnga." 
2Peter3:6 La b yĩmame tɩ tẽngã Wẽnnaam sẽn naan a woto wã, yaa ko-kãsengã n leb n dɩ-a t'a sãame." 
2Peter3:7 La ne gom-kãng bala, saasẽ la rũndã dũni wã bĩnga bugum yĩnga. B bĩng-b-la b sẽn na n kao nin-wẽnsã bʋʋd n kɩt tɩ b sãamã daar yĩnga." 
2Peter3:8 Mam zo-nongdse, bũmb a yembr n be yãmb sẽn ka tog n yĩm ye, yaa tɩ ne Zu-soabã, daar a yembr yaa wa yʋʋm tusri, la yʋʋm tusr yaa wa daar a yembre." 
2Peter3:9 Wẽnnaam ka basd tɩ bãmb sẽn kãabã kaoos n pids wa neb kẽer sẽn tagsdã ye. La yaa tɩ bãmb maanda sũ-mar ne yãmba, b sẽn ka rat tɩ ned baa a yembr sãama yĩnga. Bãmb ratem yaa tɩ yãmb fãa tek yam n kos sugri." 
2Peter3:10 Zu-soabã daar na n waa wa wagdre. Badaare, saasẽ na n looga ne bʋr-kãsenga. Bugmã sẽn kok teed ninsã na n yẽnegame, la dũni wã ne bũmb nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã na n dɩɩ bugum." 
2Peter3:11 Rẽ wã yĩnga, bõn-kãensã fãa sẽn na n wa n yẽnegã yĩnga, ges-y tɩ yãmb yel-manesmã ne y Wẽnnaamã tũub yɩ sõama!" 
2Peter3:12 Gũu-y-yã, la y modg n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam daarã wa tao-tao. Yaa daar ning saasẽ sẽn kok bugmã sẽn na n yẽneg tɩ teedã fãa me sẽn kok bugum na n yẽnegã." 
2Peter3:13 La tõnd gũuda Wẽnnaam sẽn pʋlem saasẽ paalg la dũni paalgã, tɩ tɩrlem na n zĩnd a pʋgã." 
2Peter3:14 Mam zo-nongdse, gũudum‑kãngã pʋgẽ, modg-y tɩ bãmb na mik tɩ yãmb ka tar rẽgdo, la tɩ y ka tar bũmb sẽn ka zemse, la tɩ y bee laafɩ pʋga." 
2Peter3:15 Bãng-y tɩ tõnd Zu-soabã sẽn maand sũ-marã, yaa tɩ yãmb na paam fãagre, wa tõnd ba-bi-nongr a Poll sẽn gʋls me n wilg yãmb wa sẽn zems yam ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yẽnda wã." 
2Peter3:16 A Poll maanda a woto a sɛbã fãa pʋse, sɛbã a sẽn gʋls n gomd bõn-kãens yelle, la sẽn tar koees b wʋmb sẽn yaa toogo, tɩ neb nins sẽn ka mi wã, la sẽn nan ka kɩ-b yẽgã toeemd b võor wa b sẽn toeemd gʋls-sõamyã fãa võor tɩ gõdg n sãamd-bã." 
2Peter3:17 Woto yĩnga, m ba-bi-nongdse, yãmb sẽn pĩnd n paam tɩ b keoog yãmbã, maan-y gũusgu, tɩ neb nins toog sẽn ka be ne Wẽnnaam sakrã bʋdgrã da wa tus yãmb tɩ y ka leb n yas kãenkãe yɛs ye." 
2Peter3:18 Bɩ yãmb bɩ tõnd Zu-soabã la d Fãagd a Zeezi Kiris barkã pʋgẽ, la y bãngd-b yellã n paasdẽ. Bãmb n so ziir sẽn sɩng ne moasã hal tɩ ta wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
1John1:1 Tõnd gʋlsda yãmb sẽn kẽed ne vɩɩm koɛɛga wɛɛngẽ, koɛɛg ning sẽn dag n be hal sɩngr wẽndẽ wã, tɩ tõnd wʋm a kibarã, tɩ d mens nin yãnd-a wã, tɩ tõnd ges-a wã, la d sɩɩs-a ne d nusã," 
1John1:1 Tõnd gʋlsda yãmb sẽn kẽed ne vɩɩm koɛɛga wɛɛngẽ, koɛɛg ning sẽn dag n be hal sɩngr wẽndẽ wã, tɩ tõnd wʋm a kibarã, tɩ d mens nin yãnd-a wã, tɩ tõnd ges-a wã, la d sɩɩs-a ne d nusã," 
1John1:2 b puk-a lame tɩ tõnd yã. Yaa rẽ yĩngã, tɩ tõnd kõt yãmb koe-kãng kaseto, la d togsd yãmb vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã koɛɛg sẽn dag n be tõnd Ba nengẽ, tɩ b vẽneg-a ne tõndã." 
1John1:2 b puk-a lame tɩ tõnd yã. Yaa rẽ yĩngã, tɩ tõnd kõt yãmb koe-kãng kaseto, la d togsd yãmb vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã koɛɛg sẽn dag n be tõnd Ba nengẽ, tɩ b vẽneg-a ne tõndã." 
1John1:3 Bũmb ning tõnd sẽn yã la d wʋmã, tõnd togsd-a-la yãmb me, tɩ yãmb me tõe n paam lagem-n-taar ne tõndo. La tõnd lagem-n-taarã bee ne d ba wã, la ne b Bi-ribl a Zeezi Kirisi." 
1John1:3 Bũmb ning tõnd sẽn yã la d wʋmã, tõnd togsd-a-la yãmb me, tɩ yãmb me tõe n paam lagem-n-taar ne tõndo. La tõnd lagem-n-taarã bee ne d ba wã, la ne b Bi-ribl a Zeezi Kirisi." 
1John1:4 Tõnd gʋlsda bõn-kãngã tɩ tõnd sũ-noogã na pid zãnga. 
1John1:4 Tõnd gʋlsda bõn-kãngã tɩ tõnd sũ-noogã na pid zãnga. 
1John1:5 Ad koɛɛg ningã tõnd sẽn wʋm a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ n togsd yãmbã: Wẽnnaam yaa vẽenem, la lik baa bilf ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
1John1:5 Ad koɛɛg ningã tõnd sẽn wʋm a Zeezi Kiris nengẽ n togsd yãmbã: Wẽnnaam yaa vẽenem, la lik baa bilf ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
1John1:6 Tõnd sã n yetẽ tɩ d tara lagem-n-taar ne bãmb n yaool n kẽnd lik pʋgẽ, tõnd yagda zĩrẽ la d ka maand sɩd ye." 
1John1:6 Tõnd sã n yetẽ tɩ d tara lagem-n-taar ne bãmb n yaool n kẽnd lik pʋgẽ, tõnd yagda zĩrẽ la d ka maand sɩd ye." 
1John1:7 La tõnd sã n kẽnd vẽenemẽ wa bãmb mengã sẽn be vẽenemẽ wã, tõnd tara lagem-n-taar ne taaba, la bãmb Bi-ribl a Zeezi zɩɩmã pekda tõnd yel-wẽnã fãa n yiisi." 
1John1:7 La tõnd sã n kẽnd vẽenemẽ wa bãmb mengã sẽn be vẽenemẽ wã, tõnd tara lagem-n-taar ne taaba, la bãmb Bi-ribl a Zeezi zɩɩmã pekda tõnd yel-wẽnã fãa n yiisi." 
1John1:8 Tõnd sã n yetẽ tɩ d ka tar yel-wẽnde, tõnd belgda d mense, la sɩd ka be tõnd pʋgẽ ye." 
1John1:8 Tõnd sã n yetẽ tɩ d ka tar yel-wẽnde, tõnd belgda d mense, la sɩd ka be tõnd pʋgẽ ye." 
1John1:9 Tõnd sã n vẽneg n togs Wẽnnaam d yel-wẽnã, bãmb yaa sɩd soaba la tɩrga tɩ kõ tõnd sugr d yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la b pek tõnd n yiis d tʋʋm-wẽnsã fãa." 
1John1:9 Tõnd sã n vẽneg n togs Wẽnnaam d yel-wẽnã, bãmb yaa sɩd soaba la tɩrga tɩ kõ tõnd sugr d yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la b pek tõnd n yiis d tʋʋm-wẽnsã fãa." 
1John1:10 Tõnd sã n yeel tɩ d ka maan yel-wẽnde, tõnd geta Wẽnnaam wa zĩrẽ yagda, la bãmb goamã ka be tõnd pʋgẽ ye." 
1John1:10 Tõnd sã n yeel tɩ d ka maan yel-wẽnde, tõnd geta Wẽnnaam wa zĩrẽ yagda, la bãmb goamã ka be tõnd pʋgẽ ye." 
1John2:1 Mam kom-bãoonego, m gʋlsda yãmb bõn-kãngã sẽn na yɩl tɩ y ra maan yel-wẽn ye. La ned sã n maan yel-wẽnã, tõnd tara sɛ-yõakd sẽn be d ba wã nengẽ: Yaa tɩrlem soab a Zeezi Kirisi." 
1John2:1 Mam kom-bãoonego, m gʋlsda yãmb bõn-kãngã sẽn na yɩl tɩ y ra maan yel-wẽn ye. La ned sã n maan yel-wẽnã, tõnd tara sɛ-yõakd sẽn be d ba wã nengẽ: Yaa tɩrlem soab a Zeezi Kirisi." 
1John2:2 B talla a Zeezi meng n maan maoong tõnd yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, la ka tõnd bal yel-wẽnã yĩng ye, la dũni nebã fãa me yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
1John2:2 B talla a Zeezi meng n maan maoong tõnd yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, la ka tõnd bal yel-wẽnã yĩng ye, la dũni nebã fãa me yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
1John2:3 Tõnd sã n sak Wẽnnaam tõodã, dẽ tõnd miime tɩ d bãnga bãmba." 
1John2:3 Tõnd sã n sak Wẽnnaam tõodã, dẽ tõnd miime tɩ d bãnga bãmba." 
1John2:4 Ned ning sẽn yet t'a mii Wẽnnaam la a yaool n ka sakd b tõodã, yẽnda soab yaa zĩrẽ yagda, la sɩd ka be yẽ pʋgẽ ye." 
1John2:4 Ned ning sẽn yet t'a mii Wẽnnaam la a yaool n ka sakd b tõodã, yẽnda soab yaa zĩrẽ yagda, la sɩd ka be yẽ pʋgẽ ye." 
1John2:5 La ned ning sẽn sakd Wẽnnaam goamã, a wilgdame t'a nonga Wẽnnaam sɩd-sɩda. Ad tõnd sẽn tõe n bãng to-to tɩ d bee bãmb pʋgẽ:" 
1John2:5 La ned ning sẽn sakd Wẽnnaam goamã, a wilgdame t'a nonga Wẽnnaam sɩd-sɩda. Ad tõnd sẽn tõe n bãng to-to tɩ d bee bãmb pʋgẽ:" 
1John2:6 Sẽn yet-a tɩ yẽnda paada Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ, tog n kẽnda wa a Zu-soabã sẽn dag n kẽndã." 
1John2:6 Sẽn yet-a tɩ yẽnda paada Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ, tog n kẽnda wa a Zu-soabã sẽn dag n kẽndã." 
1John2:7 M kom-nongdse, ka tõ-paalg la mam gʋlsd yãmb ye, yaa tõ-kʋdg yãmb sẽn dag n paam hal sɩngrẽ wã. Tõ-kʋdg kãng yaa koɛɛg ning yãmb sẽn dag n wʋmã." 
1John2:7 M kom-nongdse, ka tõ-paalg la mam gʋlsd yãmb ye, yaa tõ-kʋdg yãmb sẽn dag n paam hal sɩngrẽ wã. Tõ-kʋdg kãng yaa koɛɛg ning yãmb sẽn dag n wʋmã." 
1John2:8 Mam sẽn gʋlsd yãmbã yaa tõ-paalg me. Yel-kãng yaa sɩd Zu-soabã pugẽ, la yãmb pʋse. Bala, lik bida wã loogdame, la vẽenem sɩd-sɩdã zoe n yãgdame." 
1John2:8 Mam sẽn gʋlsd yãmbã yaa tõ-paalg me. Yel-kãng yaa sɩd Zu-soabã pugẽ, la yãmb pʋse. Bala, lik bida wã loogdame, la vẽenem sɩd-sɩdã zoe n yãgdame." 
1John2:9 Ned ning sẽn yet t'a bee vẽenemẽ n yaool n kis a ba-biiga, a ket n bee lik bida pʋgẽ." 
1John2:9 Ned ning sẽn yet t'a bee vẽenemẽ n yaool n kis a ba-biiga, a ket n bee lik bida pʋgẽ." 
1John2:10 Ned ning sẽn nong a ba-biig bee vẽenemẽ bũmb ka be n na n lub-a ye. 
1John2:10 Ned ning sẽn nong a ba-biig bee vẽenemẽ bũmb ka be n na n lub-a ye. 
1John2:11 La ned ning sẽn kis a ba-biig bee lik bida pʋgẽ. Yẽ kẽnda likã pʋgẽ, n ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye, bala likã kɩtame t'a ninã ka ne ye." 
1John2:11 La ned ning sẽn kis a ba-biig bee lik bida pʋgẽ. Yẽ kẽnda likã pʋgẽ, n ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye, bala likã kɩtame t'a ninã ka ne ye."

1John4:4 Ne yãmba, mam kom-bãoonego, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam kamba, la y tõoga belgr no-rɛɛsdbã, bala, soab ning sẽn be yãmb pʋgẽ wã yɩɩda sẽn be-a dũniyã pʋgẽ wã."

2John1:10 Ned sã n wa yãmb nengẽ tɩ ka ne zãms-kãnga, bɩ y ra reeg-a y yiri, la y pʋs n da pʋʋs-a tɩ wẽnd na kaoos-a ye." 
2John1:10 Ned sã n wa yãmb nengẽ tɩ ka ne zãms-kãnga, bɩ y ra reeg-a y yiri, la y pʋs n da pʋʋs-a tɩ wẽnd na kaoos-a ye."

3John1:3 Ba-biisã sẽn wa n kɩs kaset ne sɩd ning sẽn be fo pʋgẽ, la fo sẽn kẽnd sɩdã pʋgẽ to-to wã, mam maana sũ-noog wʋsgo."

3John1:4 Bũmb ka kõt maam sũ-noog n yɩɩd mam sẽn na n wʋm tɩ b gomd tɩ mam kambã kẽnda sɩdã pʋgẽ ye.

3John1:9 Mam gʋlsa koees bilf n tʋm Kiris tẽedbã, la a Diyotɛrf sẽn nong n yɩ taoor soab bãmb sʋkã ka sakd n deeg ye." 
3John1:10 Yaa woto yĩng tɩ mam sã n wa wa, mam na n tẽega tʋʋm nins yẽnda sẽn maandã, a sẽn saad n gomd tõnd yell wẽngã. Tɩ rẽ ka sek-a ye. Yẽnda mengã ka reegd ba-biisã ye, la yẽnda gɩdgda neb nins sẽn dat n deeg-bã, la a rigd-b n yiisd Kiris tẽedbã sʋka."

Jude1:1 Maam a Zuud sẽn yaa a Zeezi Kiris tʋmtʋmda la a Zak ba-biigã n tʋmd seb-kãngã neb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn boole, tɩ tõnd nong-b ba a Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam bĩng-b a Zeezi Kiris yĩngã." 
Jude1:2 Bɩ Wẽnnaam nimbãan-zoeere, la b laafɩ la b nonglem zĩnd ne yãmb wʋsg n paase." 
Jude1:3 Mam zo-nongdse, mam sẽn dag n tʋlg ne m sũur fãa n na n gʋls yãmb sẽn kẽed ne fãagr ning tõnd fãa sẽn tarã wɛɛngẽ wã mam mikame tɩ yaa tɩlɛ ne maam tɩ m gʋlse, n sagl yãmb tɩ y zab tẽebã zabre, tẽeb ning b sẽn dag n kõ Wẽnnaam nebã vugr bal wakat fãa yĩngã." 
Jude1:4 Bala, raop kẽer n soos n kẽ yãmb sʋka. Bãmb yaa wẽn-kɩɩsdb sẽn tekd tõnd Wẽnnaamã bark koɛɛgã n maand raglem la b kɩɩsd a Zeezi Kiris sẽn yaa tõnd karen-saamb la d Zu-soab sẽn ka to wã. La b gʋlsa sɩbgr ning b sẽn na n paamã hal daar zãra." 
Jude1:5 Yãmb sẽn bãng bõn-kãensã fãa vugr bal wakat fãa yĩngã, mam dat n tẽega yãmb tɩ Zu-soabã sẽn fãag Israyɛll kambã n yiis Ezɩpt tẽngã n sa wã, b yaool n kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn ka tẽ-bã sãame." 
Jude1:6 La malegs nins sẽn ka pa zĩig ning sẽn zems ne bãmbã, la b sẽn yi n bas b mens zĩigã, Wẽnnaam balg-b-la bãens n bĩng-b lik bida pʋgẽ wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩngã, n gũudẽ tɩ ra-kãsengã sẽn yaa bʋʋdã kaoob daarã ta." 
Jude1:7 Woto me, Sodom la Gomoor la tẽms nins sẽn pẽ bãmbã sẽn maan yoob a woto n bao gãag buud sẽn ka segdã, b sɩbga bãmb ne bugum sẽn ka kiida tɩ b yɩ mamsg neb a taab yĩnga." 
Jude1:8 Baa ne rẽ, nin-kãensã me, rẽgemda b yĩnsã b magbã pʋgẽ, n paoogd noor ning Zu-soaba sẽn tar ne bãmbã la b tʋʋd yĩngr pãens rãmbã." 
Jude1:9 La baa malɛɛk-rãmbã naab a Misɛll sẽn dag n kɩɩsd bɛlgdã sẽn yetã n wẽed nokoeemd ne-a a Moyiis kũumã poorẽ wã, a ka saag n gom n paoog-a ye. A yeelame yaa: Bɩ Zu-soaba sɩbg-fo." 
Jude1:10 La nin-kãensã yẽ, b gomdame n tʋʋd bũmb ning b sẽn ka mi wã, la bũmb nins b yamã sẽn kɩtd tɩ b miẽ wã bala, wa rũmsã sẽn ka tar tagsgã sẽn maandã, bõn-kãng sãamda bãmb bala." 
Jude1:11 Bãmb na paam toogo, bala, b tũu a Kaẽ sorã, bãmb kẽesa b mens a Balaam tudgrã pʋgẽ, yaood yĩnga. La bãmb sẽn kɩɩs wala a Koore wã, b sãamame." 
Jude1:12 Bãmb n wat ne yɛl yãmb ba-biir nonglem dɩɩbã wakatã, n kɩdemd be n ka zoet yãnde, n dɩt n digda. B yaa wa sawat sẽn ka koom tɩ sobg rɩkd-ba, n yaa wa tɩɩs sʋʋgr wakat tɩɩs sẽn ka tar biisi, tɩɩs sẽn kʋɩ n leb n kʋɩ, n vigs n gãe." 
Jude1:13 B yaa wa ko-kãseng ko-pɛm sẽn yikd ne pãnga, n yiisd b yãnd puudu, b yaa wa ãd-saadse, tɩ Wẽnnaam bĩng-b lik bida pʋgẽ, wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga."

Jude1:15 n na n bʋ nebã fãa bʋʋdo, la b kɩt tɩ tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã yals n togs tʋʋm-wẽns nins fãa b sẽn maanã yelle, la gom-wẽns nins yel-wẽn maandb sẽn yaa wẽn-kɩɩsdbã sẽn gom bãmba." 
Jude1:16 Bãmb yaa neb sẽn nong yẽgengo, sũ-pa-noom-dãmb sẽn tũud b yĩnsa ratem tɩ b noyã gomd wilg-m-meng goamã, n belsd nebã n dat n paam bũmbu.»" 
Jude1:17 La yãmba, m zo-nongdse, tẽeg-y bũmb nins tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris tẽn-tʋmdbã sẽn dag n pĩnd n yeel yãmb tɩ na n waame wã yelle." 
Jude1:18 B rag n yeta yãmb yaa: «Wakat sɛɛb wakate, nin-yaandb n na n zĩndi, n kẽnd wa Wẽnnaam ka ye, n tũud b yĩnsã ratem."

Jude1:20 La yãmba, m zo-nongdse, bɩ y kẽng taoor ne tẽ-sõngã y sẽn tarã. Pʋʋs-y ne Sɩɩg-sõng pãnga," 
Jude1:21 la y kell n yals Wẽnnaam nonglmã pʋgẽ la y gũud tõnd Zu-soab a Zeezi Kiris nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn na n kɩt tɩ d paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa wã.

Revelation1:1 Woto yaa a Zeezi Kiris vẽnegr Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ bãmb tɩ b wilg b nonglem yembsã bũmb nins sẽn tog n zĩnd wakat bilf sã n paase. La a Zeezi Kiris tʋma b malɛɛk t'a wilg b tʋmtʋmd a Zã bõn-kãense. 
Revelation1:2 Yaa yẽnda n yɩ kaset soaba, n togs nebã Wẽnnaam goamã la a Zeezi Kiris kasetã, n wilg bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn yã wã." 
Revelation1:3 Bark bee neb nins sẽn karemd pĩnd-n-bãngr gom-kãensã wã zutu, la neb nins sẽn kelgdã, la b sakd bũmb nins sẽn gʋls tɩ be a pʋgẽ wã zutu. Bala wakatã kolgame."

Revelation1:16 Bãmb da zãada ãds a yopoe ne b rɩtgo. Zabr sʋʋg sẽn tar noy a yiib sẽn dɩt n da yit bãmb noorẽ wã. La bãmb nengã ra yaa wa wĩntoogo, wakat ning a sẽn yãgd ne a pãng tɛkã. Fɩtl dogends a yopoe." 
Revelation1:17 Mam sẽn yãnd-bã, mam lʋɩɩ b taoor n yaa wa kũum. Bãmb tika maam ne b nug-rɩtg n yeel yaa: Da maan rabeem ye!"

Revelation1:19 Dẽ wã, gʋls bũmb nins fo sẽn yã, bũmb nins sẽn be moasã, la bũmb nins sẽn na n yaool n maanã."

Revelation2:1 Gʋls Efɛɛs wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Ad bũmb ning a soab sẽn zãad ãds a yopoe ne a rɩtgo, la a kẽnd sãnem fɩtl-dogends a yopoe wã sʋkã sẽn yeta:" 
Revelation2:2 «Mam mii tʋʋm nins y sẽn maanã, la y sẽn tʋmd to-to, la m mii y modgrã. Mam miime tɩ yãmb ka tõe n sak tɩ nin-wẽns zĩnd ne-y ye. Yãmb maka neb nins sẽn yet tɩ b yaa tẽn-tʋmdb n yaool n ka tẽn-tʋmdbã n gese, la yãmb mikame tɩ b yaa zĩrẽ yagdba." 
Revelation2:3 Yãmb nangda pãnga, yãmb namsa mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, la yãmb ka boog y raood ye." 
Revelation2:4 La yell ning mam sẽn tar ne yãmba, yaa tɩ yãmb basa y pipi nonglmã." 
Revelation2:5 Dẽ wã, bɩ y tẽeg zĩig ning yãmb sẽn lʋɩ wã. Tek-y yam n kos sugri, la y leb n tʋm y pipi tʋʋmã. Sã n ka rẽ, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ, la m na n yiisa yãmb fɩtl-doagendgã a zĩigẽ, sã n ka tɩ yãmb teka yam n kos sugri." 
Revelation2:6 Baoosgo yãmb tara bõn-sõng a yembre: yaa tɩ yãmb kisa Nikolayit-dãmba tʋʋmã, tʋʋm nins mam me sẽn kisã.»" 
Revelation2:7 Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar-a tʋb kelg bũmb ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yet wẽnd-dotã: Mam na n kõo tõaagd fãa noor t'a rɩ vɩɩm tɩɩgã sẽn be Wẽnnaam Paraadi pʋgẽ wã biisi. 
Revelation2:8 Gʋls Ismirn wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Sẽn yaa-a dẽenem la yaoolem soabã, sẽn dag n ki-a n leb n vʋʋgã yetame yaa:" 
Revelation2:9 «Mam bãnga yãmb yel-pakrã ne y naongã, la yãmb yaool n yaa arzegs rãmba, la mam bãnga kãnegr ning neb nins sẽn yet tɩ b yaa Zʋɩf-rãmb n yaool n ka Zʋɩf-rãmba, la b ya Sʋtãanã karen-doogã rãmb sẽn kãnegd yãmbã." 
Revelation2:10 Da maan-y rabeem ne namsg ning y sẽn na n namsã ye. Gese, Sʋtãanã na n kẽesa yãmb neb kẽer bi-bees roogo, sẽn na n yɩl n mak yãmba, la yãmb na n paama namsg rasem piiga. Kell‑y n maan-y neer hal tɩ ta kũum, la mam na kõ yãmb vɩɩm maanfo.»" 
Revelation2:11 Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar tʋb kelg bũmb nins Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yet wẽnd-dotã. Kũum a yiib soabã ka na n sɩɩs ned ning sẽn na n paam-a tõogrã ye. 
Revelation2:12 Gʋls Pɛrgam wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Soab ning sẽn zãad-a zabr sʋʋg sẽn tar noy a yiib sẽn dɩtã yetame yaa: 
Revelation2:13 «Mam mii yãmb sẽn be zĩig ningã: zĩ-kãng yaa a Sʋtãan geere. Yãmb talla mam yʋʋrã, la yãmb ka bas y tẽeb ne maam baa wakat ning b sẽn kʋ mam kaset tɩrg soab a Ãntipaas yãmb sʋka, zĩig ning a Sʋtãan sẽn be wã." 
Revelation2:14 La mam tara yell bilf ne yãmba. Yaa tɩ neb n be yãmb sʋkã n tũud a Balaam zãmsgã. Yẽnda ra zãmsa a Balak t'a maan bẽdg n kɩt t'a Israyɛll yagensã rɩ wẽnd-naands maand nemdo, la b maan yoobo, tɩ rẽ lub-ba." 
Revelation2:15 Yãmb me tara neb kẽer me sẽn sakd Nikolayit-dãmbã zãmsgo. 
Revelation2:16 Dẽ wã, bɩ y tek yam n kos sugri, sã n ka rẽ, bilf sã n paase, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ, la m na n zaba ne bãmb ne m noorẽ zabr sʋʋgã.»" 
Revelation2:17 Bɩ sẽn tar-a tʋb kelg bũmb nins Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yet wẽnd-dotã. Mam na n kõo ned ning sẽn na n tõogã man sẽn solge, la kug-pɛɛlga. Kugrã zugu, yʋ-paalg n gʋls be ned baa a yembr sẽn ka mi, sã n ka ned ning sẽn deegd-a kugrã." 
Revelation2:18 Gʋls Tɩyatɩɩr wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Ad Wẽnnaam Bi-riblã, sẽn tar-a nin sẽn wẽnd bug-witim t'a nao wẽnd wa zũudã sẽn yeta:" 
Revelation2:19 «Mam bãnga yãmb tʋʋmã, la y nonglmã, ne y tẽebã, la y tʋʋm‑sõamyã, ne y sũ-marã, la y yaoolem tʋʋmã sẽn yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd y pipi tʋʋmã." 
Revelation2:20 La mam tara yell ne yãmba: yaa tɩ yãmb basa pag a Zezabɛll t'a zãmsd nebã. A yetame t'a yaa no-rɛɛsa, n zãmsd nebã la a belgd mam tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b maand yoobo, la b wãbd wẽnd-naands maand nemdo." 
Revelation2:21 Mam kõo yẽnda weer t'a tek yam n kos sugr a yoobã yĩnga, la yẽnda ka rat n kos sugr ye." 
Revelation2:22 Gese, mam na n gãneg-a-la tẽnga, la to-kãseng pʋga, yẽ ne neb nins sẽn maand yoob ne yẽnda wã, sã n ka tɩ b teka yam n bas b tʋʋmã." 
Revelation2:23 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kũum kʋ a kambã, la wẽnd-dotã fãa na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa soab ning sẽn feesd tagsd la sũyã, la mam na n yaoo yãmb ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã." 
Revelation2:24 La yãmb Tɩyatɩɩr neb a taabã fãa sẽn ka sakd zãms-kãngã, la sẽn ka bãng a Sʋtãan yel-solgdsã wa b sẽn mi n yetã, mam yeta yãmb tɩ m ka na n zɩlg yãmb zɩɩb a to ye." 
Revelation2:25 Bũmb ning sẽn be bala, yaa tɩ y tall bũmb nins yãmb sẽn tarã kãenkãe hal tɩ mam wa." 
Revelation2:26 Ned ning sẽn na n tõoge, la ned ning sẽn na n tall-a mam tʋʋmã hal tɩ wakat ta, mam na n kõo yẽnda noor t'a soog soolem dãmba." 
Revelation2:27 Yẽnda na n zãa naam dasaar sẽn yaa kut n soog-ba, wa b sẽn wãad tãnd lagdo, wa mam meng sẽn deeg m ba nengẽ wã." 
Revelation2:28 La mam na n kõo yẽnda yibeoog ãdga. 
Revelation2:29 Bɩ sẽn tar-a tʋb kelg bũmb nins Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn togsd mam wẽnd-dotã.» 
Revelation3:1 Gʋls Sard wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Ad soab ning sẽn tar Wẽnnaam sɩɩs a yopoe la ãds a yopoe wã sẽn yeta: «Mam bãnga yãmb tʋʋmã. Yãmb yʋʋr yiime tɩ y vɩɩme la y yaool n yaa kũum. 
Revelation3:2 Maan gũusgu, la f kɩt tɩ sẽn be fo pʋgẽ n nan ka ki wã leb n yẽege. Bala, mam mikame tɩ yãmb tʋʋmã ka zems mam Wẽnnaamã taoor ye." 
Revelation3:3 Dẽ wã, bɩ y tẽeg yãmb sẽn deeg koɛɛgã la y wʋm-a to-to wã, tall-y-yã-a la y kos sugri. Yãmb sã n ka gũusi, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ wa wagdre, la yãmb ka na n bãng sẽn yaa wakat ning la mam na n wa n ling yãmbã ye." 
Revelation3:4 Baoosgo, yãmb tara neb kẽer Sard sẽn ka rẽgem b fut ye. Bãmb na n kẽna ne maam ne fu-peelse, bãmb sẽn zems tɩ kẽn ne maamã yĩnga." 
Revelation3:5 Ned ning sẽn na n tõogã na n yeelga fu-peels a woto. Mam ka na n yẽes yẽnda yʋʋrã vɩɩm sebrã pʋgẽ ye, la mam na n boola yẽnda yʋʋrã m ba la malegsã taoore.»" 
Revelation3:6 Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar-a tʋb kelg bũmb ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn togsd wẽnd-dotã. 
Revelation3:7 Gʋls Filadɛlfi wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Ad bũmb sõmblem soabã, sɩd soabã, sẽn tar-a a Davɩɩd kʋɩlen-bilã, soab ning sẽn pakd tɩ ned ka tõe n pagã, soab ning sẽn pagd tɩ ned ka tõe n pakã sẽn yeta:" 
Revelation3:8 «Mam bãnga yãmb tʋʋmã. Gese, mam ninga kʋɩleng sẽn pak yãmb taoor tɩ ned ka tõe n pag-a ye, tɩ bala yãmb pãngã paoodame, la yãmb talla mam koɛɛgã, la y ka kɩɩs mam yʋʋrã ye." 
Revelation3:9 Ade, mam na n ninga neb nins sẽn yaa a Sʋtãan tũudbã yãmb nugẽ. Bãmb yagda zĩrẽ n boond b mens tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmba, tɩ yaool n ka sɩd ye. Gese, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b wa n wõgemd yãmb taoore, la b bãng tɩ mam nonga yãmba." 
Revelation3:10 Yãmb sẽn tall mam koɛɛg ning sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb nangd pãng mam pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, mam me na n kogla yãmb wakat ning makrã sẽn na n wa dũniyã tɛk fãa n mak nebã sẽn be a zugã." 
Revelation3:11 Mam wata tao-tao. Gãd-y bũmb nins yãmb sẽn tarã kãenkãe, tɩ ned da reeg yãmb maanfã ye." 
Revelation3:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ ned ning sẽn tõog-a wã lebg ra-luk mam Wẽnnaamã roog pʋga, la yẽnda kõn leb n yi be ye. Mam na n gʋlsa mam Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, la m Wẽnnaamã tẽng sẽn ya Zeruzalɛm paalg sẽn yit mam Wẽnnaamã nengẽ arzãn n sigdã yʋʋr yẽnda zugu, la m gʋls mam yʋ-paalgã yẽnda zugu.»" 
Revelation3:13 Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar tʋb kelg bũmb nins Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yet wẽnd-dotã. 
Revelation3:14 Gʋls Laodiise wẽnd doogã gũud n yeel-a yaa: Ad bũmb ning sẽn yaa-a Ãmina, la kaset soab sẽn yaa tɩrga, la sɩd soabã, sẽn naan-a Wẽnnaam bõn-naandsã sẽn yeta:" 
Revelation3:15 «Mam bãnga yãmb tʋʋmã. Yãmb ka maasga la y ka tʋʋlg me ye. Mam nongẽ‑la yãmb sẽn dag n na n yaẽ tʋʋlga, wall maasga." 
Revelation3:16 Woto, yãmb sẽn yaa zalzal n ka maasg la y ka tʋʋlgã yĩnga, mam na n wʋka yãmb m noorẽ." 
Revelation3:17 Yãmb yetame: «Tõnd yaa arzegs rãmba, tõnd paama arzegse la tõnd ka leb n baood baa fʋɩ», n yaool n ka mi tɩ y yaa nimbãan-dãmba, n be namsg pʋgẽ, la y ya naong rãmba, zoense, la bɛɛl ye," 
Revelation3:18 mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y ra sãnem sẽn yɩlg ne bugum mam nengẽ, tɩ y tõe n lebg arzegs rãmba, la y ra fu-peels mam nengẽ, tɩ y tõe n paam n yeelge, n lud y yãnd n da yɩ y zaal ye, la y ra nin kaam mam nengẽ n sõog y ninã tɩ y tõe n yã." 
Revelation3:19 Mam lengda neb nins fãa mam sẽn nonge, la m sɩbgd-ba. Dẽ wã, bɩ y nang pãng la y tek yam n kos sugri." 
Revelation3:20 Ade, mam yasa rignoorẽ n kabsdẽ. Ned sã n wʋm mam koɛɛgã n pak kʋɩlengã, mam na n kẽe yẽnda roogẽ n dɩ ne yẽnda la yẽnda na n dɩɩ ne maam." 
Revelation3:21 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ ned ning sẽn tõogã zĩnd ne maam mam geerã zug wa mam sẽn tõoge, n zao ne m ba b geerã zugã.»" 
Revelation3:22 Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar tʋb kelg bũmb ning Sɩɩg-sõng sẽn yet wẽnd-dotã. 
Revelation4:1 Dẽ poore, mam gesame, la haya! Mam yãnda kʋɩleng sẽn pak arzãn pʋga. La pipi koɛɛg ning sẽn wẽnd baorg mam sẽn da wʋm t'a gomd ne maamã yeela maam yaa: Rʋ yĩngr ka, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yã bũmb nins sẽn yaa tɩlɛ tɩ wa zĩndã." 
Revelation4:2 Tao-tao bala, Sɩɩg-sõng pida maam. La ade, geer n da be arzãn pʋga, la ned n dag n zao geerã zugu." 
Revelation4:3 Ned ning sẽn zao-a geerã zugã dag n wẽnda wa kug sẽn be yõod n boond tɩ zaspe la sardoan. La saag-gomtɩʋʋg sẽn wẽnd wa kugr sẽn boond tɩ emerood n dag n gũbg geerã. 
Revelation4:4 La gɛy pisi la a naas n dag n gilg ge-kãsengã, la kãsem-dãmb pisi la a naas n zao b zutu, n yer fu-peelse, la b fõg sãnem maanf-rãmba." 
Revelation4:5 Sa-yãgbo, la kelemse, la sa-kelems n yit geerẽ wã. Fɩtl-dãmb a yopoe n be geerã taoor n wit ne pãnga. Bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sɩɩs a yopoe wã." 
Revelation4:6 Geerã taoor dag n gãnega bũmb sẽn pɩnd wa vɛɛre, n tud n yaa wa kiristalle. La geerã sʋk ne sẽn gũbg geerã fãa, bõn-vɩɩs a naas n be beenẽ n pid ne nin taoor la poorẽ." 
Revelation4:7 Pipi bõn-vɩɩgã wẽnda wa gɩgemde, la yiib soabã wẽnda wa nag-bila, la tãab soabã neng wẽnda wa ninsaal nenga, la naas soabã wẽnda wa panantugr sẽn yɩgda." 
Revelation4:8 Bõn-vɩɩs a naasã ned kam fãa tara pɩgs a yoob sẽn pid ne nin b zĩigã fãa, la b pʋgẽ wã me. Wĩndg la yʋngo b yetame tɩ: Sõngo, sõngo, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn Tõeyã fãa wã yaa sõngo. Bãmb da beeme la b bee moasã la b watame, n ka basdẽ ye." 
Revelation4:9 La wakat ning bõn-vɩɩs a naasã sẽn pẽgd la b waoog sẽn zao-a geerã zug n vɩ zamaan woo zamaana, la b pʋʋsd-b barkã," 
Revelation4:10 kãsem-dãmb pisi la a naasã wõgemdeda sẽn zao-a geerã zug la sẽn vɩ zamaan woo zamaana taoore, n waoogd-ba, la b lobd-b maanf-rãmbã geerã taoor la b yetẽ:" 
Revelation4:11 Tõnd Zu-soab la d Wẽnnaam, yãmb n zems tɩ reeg ziiri, la waoogre, la pãnga. Bala, yãmb n naan bũmb fãa, la yaa yãmb daab yĩng la y naan-b tɩ b beẽ." 
Revelation5:1 La mam yãnda sebr sẽn be sẽn zao-a geerã zugã nug‑rɩtgẽ. Sebrã pʋg ne a poorã fãa gʋlsame, la b sog-a-la ne sogds a yopoe." 
Revelation5:2 La mam yãnda malɛɛk sẽn tar pãng sẽn zẽkd a koɛɛg n sokdẽ yaa: Ãnda n zems tɩ sok sogdsã la a lak sebrã? 
Revelation5:3 La ned baa a yembr da ka be arzãn wall tẽng zugu, wall tẽngã tẽngr sẽn dag n tõe n lak sebrã wall a ges-a ye." 
Revelation5:4 La b sẽn ka yã ned baa a ye sẽn zems tɩ lak sebrã wall tɩ ges-a wã yĩnga, mam da yãbda wʋsgo." 
Revelation5:5 La kãsem-dãmbã ned a yembr yeela maam yaa: Da yãb ye. Ad Zʋʋda buudã gɩgemd sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd yagengã paama tõogre, n na n sok sogds a yopoe wã la a lak sebrã." 
Revelation5:6 La mam yãnda pe-bil sẽn yas yĩngr geerã sʋka, la bõn-vɩɩs a naasã ne kãsem-dãmbã sʋka, la a yaa wa pesg b sẽn kodge. Pe-bilã dag n tara yɩɩl a yopoe la nin a yopoe sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam sɩɩs a yopoe wã b sẽn tʋm dũniyã tɛk fãa wã." 
Revelation5:7 Pe-bilã waa n deega sebrã sẽn be sẽn zao-a geerã zugã nug‑rɩtgẽ wã. 
Revelation5:8 Pe-bilã sẽn deeg sebrã, bõn-vɩɩs a naasã ne kãsem-dãmbã pisi la a naasã wõgemda bãmb taoore, la bãmb ned kam fãa zãada pɛndg la sãnem laag sẽn pid ne tɩdar sẽn tar yũ-noogo, sẽn yaa nin-sõamyã pʋʋsgo." 
Revelation5:9 La bãmb da yɩɩnda yɩɩn-paalg n yetẽ: Yãmb n zems tɩ reeg sebrã la y sogs a sogdsã, bala b ra kʋʋ yãmba, la yãmb fãaga neb buud fãa pʋgẽ, goam buud fãa pʋgẽ, tẽms fãa pʋgẽ, soolem fãa pʋgẽ ne yãmb zɩɩm tɩ b lebg Wẽnnaam nebã." 
Revelation5:10 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ bãmb lebg soolem la maan-kʋʋdb tõnd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, la bãmb na n dɩɩ naam dũni zugu." 
Revelation5:11 Mam gesame la m wʋma malegs wʋsg sẽn gũbg geerã, ne bõn-vɩɩsã la kãsem-dãmbã koeese, la bãmb sõorã yaa tus piig naoor tus piiga, la tus naoor tusa." 
Revelation5:12 Bãmb da zẽkda b koees n yetẽ: Pe-bil ning b sẽn dag n kʋ wã zemsame tɩ reeg pãn-tõogo, arzegse, yam, pãnga, waoogre, ziiri, la pẽgre." 
Revelation5:13 La mam wʋma bõn-naandsã fãa sẽn be arzãna, la sẽn be tẽng zug la tẽngã tẽngre, la ko-kãsengã zugu, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn be be wã sẽn yet yaa: Sẽn zao-a geerã zugã la pe-bilã n tog ne pẽgre, la waoogre, la ziiri, la pãnga, zamaan woo zamaane." 
Revelation5:14 La bõn-vɩɩs a naasã yeelame yaa: Ãmina! La kãsem-dãmbã yĩgimdame n waoog-ba. 
Revelation6:1 Pe-bilã sẽn sok soagdg a yembr sogds a yopoe wã sʋkã, mam gesame, la mam wʋma bõn-vɩɩs a naasã ned a yembr sẽn gom ne koɛɛg sẽn wẽnd wa sa-kɛleng n yeel yaa: Wa!" 
Revelation6:2 Mam gesame, la mam yãnda wed-moaag sẽn yaa pɛɛlga. Sẽn zao-a weefã ra zãada tãpo, la b kõo yẽnda maanfo. La a kẽnga wa tõaagda, n na n tõoge." 
Revelation6:3 Pe-bilã sẽn sok soagdg a yiibẽ soabã, mam wʋma bõn-vɩɩg a yiib soabã sẽn yeel yaa: Wa!" 
Revelation6:4 La wed-moaag a to kõbg sẽn yaa miuug wa bugum yiime. La b kõo sẽn da zao-a yẽnda wã pãn-tõog t'a yiis dũni laafɩ, tɩ nebã kood taaba. La b kõo yẽnda zabr sʋ-kãsenga." 
Revelation6:5 La bãmb sẽn sok soagdg a tãabẽ soabã, mam wʋma bõn-vɩɩg a tãabẽ soabã sẽn yeel yaa: Wa! Mam gesame, la mam yãnda wed-moaag sẽn yaa sablga. Sẽn zao-a yẽnda wã dag n zãada balãns a nugẽ." 
Revelation6:6 La mam wʋma bũmb sẽn wẽnd wa koɛɛg bõn-vɩɩs a naasã sʋka. A da yetame yaa: Bɩle bɛɛl ne wũmbl na n koosa hal deniye a yembre. Oorz ne wũmbl a tãab na n koosa deniye. La sã n yaa kaamã la reezẽ rãamã, ra sɩɩs-b ye." 
Revelation6:7 Pe-bilã sẽn sok soagdg a naasẽ soabã, mam wʋma bõn-vɩɩg a naas-n-soaba koɛɛg sẽn yeel yaa: Wa!" 
Revelation6:8 Mam gesame la mam yãnda wed-moaag t'a kõbgã yaa kẽeg-kẽega. Sẽn dag n zao-a yẽnda wã yʋʋr boondame t'a kũum, la kɩɩm-kulg rag n pʋgda yẽnda. La b kõo bãmb pãn-tõog tɩ b tõog dũniyã ned a yembr neb a naas fãa sʋk n kʋ-b ne zabr sʋʋga, la kom, la bãase, la ne dũniyã we-rũmsi." 
Revelation6:9 Pe-bilã sẽn sok soagdg a nu soabã, mam yãnda b sẽn dag n kʋ neb nins Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã poorẽ, la b sẽn kɩs kasetã yĩngã sɩɩs sẽn be tẽn-kugrã tẽngre." 
Revelation6:10 Bãmb zẽka b koees ne pãng n yeel yaa: «Zu-soben-sõng la sɩd soaba, yãmb na n gũume hal tɩ ta dabʋr tɩ y yaool n kao dũniyã nebã bʋʋdo, la y rok y sũur tõnd zɩɩmã raagr yĩnga?»" 
Revelation6:11 B kõo bãmb ned kam fãa fu-pɛɛlga, la b yeel-b tɩ b kell n vʋʋs wakat bilf yɛsa, hal tɩ bãmb tʋmd-n-taasã ne b ba-biisã b sẽn na n kʋ wa b sẽn kʋ bãmbã sõor pidi." 
Revelation6:12 Pe-bilã sẽn sok soagdg a yoobẽ soabã, mam gesame. Tẽn-digimdg kãseng n zĩndi. Wĩndgã lebga sablg diga wa bot sẽn wʋg ne rũm-sablg kõbdo, la kiuugã zãng lebga wa zɩɩm," 
Revelation6:13 la yĩngr ãdsã sʋʋga tẽngã zug wa kankang sob-kãseng sẽn wẽ t'a kankam yorge. 
Revelation6:14 Sa-gãongã looga wa sebr b sẽn pili. La tãmsã fãa ne tẽms nins koomã sẽn gũbgã sersa b zĩisẽ. 
Revelation6:15 Dũni rĩm-dãmbã la nin-kãsemsã, la a sodaas nanambsã, la a arzegs rãmbã, la a pãens rãmbã, la a yembsã, ne burkĩmbã fãa, kẽng n tɩ soonda tãms bogdẽ la tãms pĩis sʋka." 
Revelation6:16 La b rag n yeta tãmsã ne pĩisã yaa: «Lʋɩ n põd-y tõnd n solg tõnd tɩ d zãag ne sẽn zao-a geerã zugã gesgo la ne pe-bilã sũ-puugri. 
Revelation6:17 Bala, Wẽnnaam ne pe-bilã sũ-puugrã ra-kãsengã taame, la ãndã n na n tõog n põse?»" 
Revelation7:1 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda malegs a naas sẽn yas dũniyã kɩrems a naasã. Bãmb dag n yõka dũniyã sebd a naasã, sẽn na yɩl tɩ b ra wẽ tẽngã wall ko-kãsengã wall tɩɩg baa a yembr ye." 
Revelation7:2 La mam yãnda malɛɛk a to sẽn yi yaang n zẽkdẽ, la yẽnda ra zãada Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã bãn-ningdga. Malɛɛkã zẽka a koɛɛg n kelem n yeel malegs a naasã b sẽn da kõ noor tɩ b maan tẽngã ne ko-kãsengã wẽngã yaa:" 
Revelation7:3 Da maan-y tẽngã wall ko-kãsengã wall tɩɩsã bũmbu, hal tɩ tõnd paam n ning d Wẽnnaamã tʋmtʋmdbã rĩyã bãnde." 
Revelation7:4 La mam wʋma neb nins b sẽn ning bãndã sõore. Yaa neb tus koabg la tus pis-naas la a naase, a Israyɛll buudã fãa kambã sʋka." 
Revelation7:5 A Zʋʋda buudã neb b sẽn ning bãndã sõor yaa tus piig la a yiibu. A Rubɛn buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu. A Gaad buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu," 
Revelation7:6 a Azɛɛr buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, a Neftali buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, a Manaase buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu," 
Revelation7:7 a Sɩmyõ buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, a Leevi buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, a Isakaar buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu," 
Revelation7:8 a Zabulõ buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, a Zozɛf buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, a Benzame buudã me yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu." 
Revelation7:9 Dẽ poore, mam gesame, la mam yãnda neb kʋʋng ned sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. Bãmb yii soolem dãmbã fãa pʋse, buud toay-toayã fãa pʋse, tẽms toay-toayã fãa pʋse, la sẽn gomd goam buud toay-toayã. Bãmb dag n yera fu-peelse, la b zãad koms vãad b nusẽ n yas geerã taoore, la pe-bilã taoore." 
Revelation7:10 Bãmb dag n zẽkda b koees ne pãng n yetẽ: Fãagrã bee ne tõnd Wẽnnaam sẽn zao geerã zugã, la ne pe-bilã." 
Revelation7:11 La malegsã fãa ra yas n gũbga geerã ne kãsem-dãmbã la bõn-vɩɩs a naasã. Bãmb wõgemdame n fõgen b nens tẽng geerã taoor n waoog Wẽnnaam 
Revelation7:12 n yetẽ yaa: Ãmina! Pẽgre, la ziiri, la yam la bark pʋʋsgo, la waoogre, la pãn-tõogo, la pãng yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã n so zamaan woo zamaana! Ãmina!" 
Revelation7:13 Dẽ, kãsem-dãmbã ned a yembr gomame n sok maam yaa: Neb nins sẽn yeelg fu-peelsã yaa ãnda rãmba, la b yita yɛ?" 
Revelation7:14 Mam leoka yẽnda yaa: M zu-soaba, yãmb n mi. La a yeela maam yaa: Yaa neb nins sẽn yi to-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã. Bãmb pegsa b fut pe-bilã zɩɩmẽ tɩ b lebg peelse." 
Revelation7:15 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ b be Wẽnnaam geerã taoore, n tʋmd Wẽnnaam tʋʋmd wĩndg la yʋng bãmb roogã pʋgẽ. Ned ning sẽn zao-a geerã zugã na n ninga bãmb b fu‑roogã pʋga." 
Revelation7:16 Kom kõn leb n yõk-ba, ko-yũud kõn leb n yõk-ba, la wĩntoogo, wall tʋʋlg kõn leb n wẽ-b ye." 
Revelation7:17 Bala, Pe-bilã sẽn be geerã sʋkã na n dɩlga bãmba, la b tall-b n kẽng vɩɩm ko-bunds zĩisẽ, la Wẽnnaam na n yẽesa bãmb nintãmã fãa." 
Revelation8:1 Pe-bilã sẽn sok soagdg a yopoe soabã, arzãn pʋg yɩɩ sɩddd... tɩ kolg lɛɛr pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Revelation8:2 Mam yãnda malegs a yopoe sẽn yas Wẽnnaam taoorã, la b kõ-b-la bard a yopoe." 
Revelation8:3 La malɛɛk a to n wa n yals tẽn-kugrã zugẽ. Yẽnda ra zãada wisd laag sẽn yaa sãnem. B kõo yẽnda tɩdar wʋsg t'a naag ne nin-sõamyã fãa pʋʋsg n yõog sãnem tẽn-kugrã sẽn be geerã taoorã zugu, tɩ yɩ maoongo." 
Revelation8:4 Tɩdarã bug-zõos naaga ne nin-sõamyã pʋʋsg n yi malɛɛkã nugẽ n zẽk yĩngri, Wẽnnaam taoore." 
Revelation8:5 Malɛɛkã rɩka wisd laagã n pids-a ne tẽn-kugrã zug bugmã n lob-a tẽngã zugu. Sa-kelemse, la kelemse, la sa-yãgbo, ne tẽn-digimdg zĩndame." 
Revelation8:6 La malegs a yopoe wã sẽn da zãad bard a yopoe wã seglame n na n peeb bardã. 
Revelation8:7 Pipi malɛɛkã peeba baorgo. La sapɩlem ne bugum sẽn kalem ne zɩɩm zĩndame, la b lob-b-la tẽng zugu. Tẽngã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk rɩɩ bugum, tɩɩg a yembr tãab sʋk rɩɩ bugum, la mo-maasã fãa rɩɩ bugum." 
Revelation8:8 Malɛɛk a yiibẽ soabã peeba baorgo. La b loba bũmb sẽn wẽnd wa tãn-kãseng sẽn dɩt bugum ko-kãsengã pʋga. La ko-kãsengã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk lebga zɩɩm. 
Revelation8:9 La bõn-naands nins sẽn dag n be ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ n vɩ wã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk kiime. La koom kogendã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk sãamame. 
Revelation8:10 Malɛɛk a tãabẽ soabã peeba baorgo. La ãd-kẽeng sẽn dɩt bugum wa bug-vɩleng yii yĩngr n lʋɩ. Yẽnda lʋɩɩ ko-zoetmã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk zugu, la ko-bundsã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk zugu." 
Revelation8:11 Ãd-kãng yʋʋr boondame t'a Zẽnem. La koomã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk lebga zẽnem, la koomã sẽn lebg zẽnemã kʋʋ ninsaalb wʋsgo." 
Revelation8:12 Malɛɛk a naasẽ soabã peeba baorgo. La wĩntoogã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋka, la kiuugã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋka, la ãdsã pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk pãng sɛɛme, sẽn na yɩlg la pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋk lebg lika, tɩ wĩndg vẽenem pãng boog sẽn tat pʋɩɩr a yembr tãab sʋka, tɩ yʋng vẽenem pãng boog a woto." 
Revelation8:13 Mam gesame, la m wʋma sɩl-kẽeng sẽn yɩgd sa-gãnã sʋka, n zẽk a koɛɛg ne pãng n yetẽ yaa: Toogo! Toogo! Ninsaalbã sẽn be tẽng zugã na n paama toogo, bardã a taabã malegsã sẽn na n peebã koees yĩnga." 
Revelation9:1 Malɛɛk a nu soabã peeba baorgo. Mam yãnda ãdg a yembr sẽn yi saasẽ n lʋɩ tẽngã zugu. La b kõo yẽnda bulg sẽn zulum n ka tar tɛk kʋɩlen-bila. 
Revelation9:2 Yẽnda paka bul-zulungã, la bug-zõos sẽn wẽnd wa wʋn-kãseng bug-zõos yii bulgẽ wã. La bug-zõosã sẽn yi bulgẽ wã soba wĩntoogã ne pemsmã." 
Revelation9:3 Sʋy yii bug-zõosẽ wã n sãeeg n kẽ tẽngã, la b kõo bãmb pãn-tõog sẽn yaa wa tẽng zug namsã sẽn tarã." 
Revelation9:4 La b yeel-b lame tɩ b ra sɩɩs moodã sẽn be tẽng zugã wall bũmb baa a yembr sẽn ningd vãado, wall tɩɩg baa a yembr ye. B zab ne neb nins sẽn ka tar Wẽnnaam bãnd b rĩyẽ wã bala." 
Revelation9:5 B ka kõ sʋyã noor tɩ b kʋ nebã ye, la yaa tɩ nams-b kiis a nu. La namsg ning b sẽn namsd nebã wẽnda wa nang sẽn dũmd ned t'a namsd to-to wã." 
Revelation9:6 Da-kãense, ninsaalbã na n baoo kũum la b kõn yãnd-a ye. Bãmb na n datame n ki, la kũum na n zoee n zãaga ne bãmba." 
Revelation9:7 Sʋy kãens wẽnda wa wiid sẽn seglg zabr yĩnga. Bũmb n da be b zutẽ wã n yaa wa maanf-rãmba, n wẽnd wa sãnem, la b nensã ra yaa wa ninsaalb nense." 
Revelation9:8 Sʋyã rag n tara zoobd wa pagb zoobdo, la b yẽnã dag n wẽnda wa gɩgemd yẽna." 
Revelation9:9 Bãmb da tara yãad sẽn yaa wa kut gãn‑tigsi, la b pɩgsã bʋrg ra yaa wa terok-rãmb wiid wʋsg sẽn tat n zoet n dabd zabr zĩigẽ bʋrgo." 
Revelation9:10 Bãmb dag n tara zʋy sẽn wẽnd nams zʋyã, la b tara zʋ-gõose, la pãn-tõog ning bãmb sẽn na n tall n nams ninsaalbã kiis a nu wã ra bee bãmb zʋyẽ wã." 
Revelation9:11 Bãmb tara b naaba, bul-zulung malɛɛkã n so bãmba. A yʋʋr ne Ebre yaa ‹Abadõ› la ne Gɛrk yaa ‹Apolyõ,› [sẽn dat n togs tɩ sãamda.]" 
Revelation9:12 Pipi toogã loogame. Ad tood a yiib n ket n wat yõwã poore. 
Revelation9:13 Malɛɛk a yoobẽ soabã peeba baorgo. La mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yi sãnem tẽn-kugrã sẽn be Wẽnnaam taoorã yɩɩl a naasẽ wã. 
Revelation9:14 Koɛɛgã yeela malɛɛk a yoobẽ soabã sẽn da zãad baorgã yaa: Baag malegs a naasã b sẽn balg kʋɩl-kãseng ning sẽn boond tɩ Efartã zugã. 
Revelation9:15 La b baaga malegs a naasã sẽn da segl n sɛ wakate, la daare, la kiuugu, ne yʋʋmdã yĩngã, tɩ b kʋ ninsaalbã ned a yembr tãab fãa sʋka." 
Revelation9:16 La zab-zabdbã sẽn yaa wed-rʋʋdbã sõor dag n yaa tus‑kẽema kobs-yi. Mam wʋma b sõorã. 
Revelation9:17 Woto, vẽnegrã pʋgẽ mam yãnda wiidã ne neb nins sẽn zao-bã. Bãmb da tara gãntigsi, tɩ b kõbgã ya wa bugum, la wa kugr b sẽn boond tɩ safɩɩre, la wa kidbri. Wiidã zut dag n wẽnda gɩgem zutu. Bugum ne bug-zõos la kidbr n dag n yit b noyẽ wã." 
Revelation9:18 To-kãensã a tãabã sẽn yaa bugmã, la bug-zõosã ne kidbrã sẽn da yit wiidã noyẽ wã kʋʋ ninsaalbã ned a yembr tãab sʋka." 
Revelation9:19 Bala, wiidã pãn-tõogã bee b noyẽ wã ne b zʋyẽ wã. Bãmb zʋyã wẽnda wa wiisi. Zʋyã tara zutu, la yaa rẽ la b tar n namsd ninsaalbã." 
Revelation9:20 La neb a taabã sẽn kell tɩ to-kãensã ka kʋ wã ka tek yam n kos sugr tʋʋm nins b nusã sẽn tʋmã yĩng ye. Bãmb ka bas zĩn-dãmb ne wẽn-naands sẽn maan ne sãnem la wanzuri, la zũudu, la kuga, la raadã waoogr ye. Wẽn-naandsã ka tõe n yãnd wall b wʋme, wall b kẽn ye." 
Revelation9:21 Bãmb ka kos sugr b nin-kʋʋrã la b bag-bʋgrã ne b yoobã la b wagdmã yĩng ye. 
Revelation10:1 Mam yãnda malɛɛk a to sẽn tar pãng n yer sawadgo, t'a yi arzãn n sigda, la saag-gomtɩʋʋg n dag n be yẽnda zugẽ wã. A nengã rag n yaa wa wĩntoogo, la a naoã rag n yaa wa bugum." 
Revelation10:2 Yẽnda rag n zãada seb-bil sẽn lake. A tilga a rɩtg naoorã ko-kãsengã zugu, la a tilg a goabg naoorã tẽngã zugu." 
Revelation10:3 A zẽka a koɛɛg n tãs ne pãng wa gɩgemd sẽn kelemde. Malɛɛkã sẽn kelmã, sa-kelems a yopoe wã gomame tɩ nebã wʋme." 
Revelation10:4 Sa-kelems a yopoe wã sẽn gomã, mam dag n na n gʋlsame, la mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yi arzãn n yeel yaa: «Solg bũmb nins sa-kelems a yopoe wã sẽn togsã, la f ra gʋls-b ye.»" 
Revelation10:5 La malɛɛk ning mam sẽn da yã t'a yas ko-kãsenga ne tẽngã zugã zẽka a nug‑rɩtg n tees yĩngri," 
Revelation10:6 la a wẽena ne soab ning sẽn vɩ-a zamaan woo zamaanã, sẽn naan-a yĩngr ne bũmb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã, la dũniyã ne bũmb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã, la ko-kãsengã ne bũmb nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, n wẽen n yeel tɩ wakatã ka na n leb n kaoos yɛs ye." 
Revelation10:7 La daar ning malɛɛk a yopoe soabã sẽn wat n segl n na n peeb baorgã, wakat-kãng la Wẽnnaam yel-solemdã na n paam pidsg wa b sẽn dag n togs b tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã koe-noogã." 
Revelation10:8 La koɛɛg ning sẽn yi arzãn tɩ mam wʋmã leb n goma ne maam n yeel yaa: Kẽng n tɩ reeg seb-bilã sẽn lakã, malɛɛk ning sẽn yas-a ko-kãsengã ne tẽngã zugã nugẽ." 
Revelation10:9 Mam kẽnga malɛɛkã nengẽ n yeel-a t'a kõ maam seb-bilã. La a yeela maam yaa: Reeg-a n vele. A na n pidsa fo pʋgã ne toolem liga, la fo noorẽ wã, a na n yɩɩ noog wa sɩɩdo." 
Revelation10:10 Mam deega seb-bilã malɛɛkã nugẽ n vele. A yɩɩ noog wa sɩɩd mam noorẽ wã, la mam sẽn vel-a wã, mam pʋgã pida ne toolem." 
Revelation10:11 Dẽ poore, b yeela maam yaa: Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ fo leb n togs bãngr goam yɛs n gom neb wʋsg yelle, la buud wʋsg yelle, la goam buud wʋsg yelle, la rĩm-dãmb wʋsg yelle." 
Revelation11:1 B kõo maam tãnwĩig sẽn wẽnd wa dasaar n yeel maam yaa: Yik n mak Wẽnnaam doogã ne tẽn-kugrã, la neb nins sẽn be beenẽ n pʋʋsdẽ wã." 
Revelation11:2 La f bas Wẽnnaam doogã samandã kɛɛng n da mak-a ye, tɩ bala, b kõ-a-la bu-zẽmsã, la bãmb na n taba tẽn-sõngã kiis pis-naas la a yiibu." 
Revelation11:3 Mam na n kõo m kaset dãmb a yiibã pĩnd-n-bãngr goam kũuni, tɩ b yeelg bot n togs bãngr goamã rasem tusr la kobs-yi la pis-yopoe." 
Revelation11:4 Yaa bãmb la Oliiv tɩɩs a yiibã, la fɩtl-dogends a yiibã sẽn yas tẽngã Zu-soabã taoorã." 
Revelation11:5 Ned sã n dat n nams-ba, bugum n yit bãmb noorẽ wã n dɩt b bɛɛbã. N-yẽe, ned sã n dat n nams-ba, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ kũum a woto kʋ-a." 
Revelation11:6 Bãmb tara pãn-tõog tɩ pag yĩngri, tɩ saag ka ni dasem nins bãmb sẽn togsd pĩnd‑bãngr goamã wakate, la b tar pãn-tõog n tõe n tek koomã tɩ lebg zɩɩm, la b kɩt tɩ tood buud fãa paam nebã tẽng zugu, wakat ning fãa b sẽn date." 
Revelation11:7 Bãmb sã n wa kɩs b kasetã n sɛ, rũng ning sẽn yit bog-zulungẽ wã na n yika zabr ne bãmba, n tõog-ba, n kʋ-ba." 
Revelation11:8 La b kũumã na n paa tẽn-kãseng ning b sẽn boond sɩɩg wɛɛngẽ tɩ Sodom la Ezɩptã pʋgẽ, vɩʋʋgẽ, zĩig ning meng b sẽn dag n ka bãmb Zu-soabã da-pɩk zugã." 
Revelation11:9 Tẽms toay-toay nebã, la buud toay-toay nebã, la neb sẽn gomd goam buud toor-toore, la soolem toay-toay neb na n yãnda bãmb kũumã rasem a tãab la pʋɩ-sʋka, la b kõn sak tɩ b rɩk-b n tɩ mum ye." 
Revelation11:10 Dũni nebã na n maana sũ-noog ne bũmb ning sẽn paam kaset dãmb a yiibã, la b na n kɩdmame. Bãmb na n tʋma kũun n kõ taaba. Bala Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb a yiib kãens da namsa nebã sẽn be tẽngã zugã." 
Revelation11:11 La rasem a tãab la pʋɩ-sʋkã zugẽ, vɩɩm sɩɩg sẽn yi Wẽnnaam nengẽ kẽe bãmb pʋsẽ la b yikame n yals b nao zutu. Rabeem kãseng yõka neb nins sẽn yãt bãmbã." 
Revelation11:12 No-rɛɛsdb a yiibã wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yi arzãn n yeel-b yaa: Wa-y yĩngr ka! Bãmb kẽe sawadgẽ n zẽk n kẽng arzãna, la b bɛɛbã yãnda bãmba." 
Revelation11:13 Wakat-kãng bala, tẽn-digimdg sẽn yaa kãseng zĩndame, la tẽngã pʋɩɩr a yembr piig sʋk sirgame. Tẽn-digimdg‑kãng kʋʋ neb tus a yopoe, la rabeem yõka neb a taabã, la b kõo saasẽ Wẽnnaamã waoogre." 
Revelation11:14 Toog a yiib soabã loogame. Ad keta bilf tɩ toog a tãab soabã wa. 
Revelation11:15 Malɛɛk a yopoe soabã peeba baorgo. La koe-kãsems zĩnda arzãn n yeel yaa: Dũniyã soolem lebga tõnd Zu-soabã ne bãmb Kirisã n so. Bãmb na n dɩɩ naam zamaan woo zamaana! 
Revelation11:16 Kãsem-dãmb pisi la a naasã sẽn dag n zao b gɛyã zut Wẽnnaam taoorã wõgemdame n fõgen b nens tẽng n waoog Wẽnnaam n yeele: 
Revelation11:17 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam Sẽn‑Tõe‑Fãa, sẽn be, la sẽn dag n be wã, tõnd pʋʋsd-y‑la barka, yãmb sẽn deeg y pãn-kãsengã la y sẽn zĩndg y naamã yĩnga." 
Revelation11:18 Soolem toay-toayã rãmb ra yika b sũyã, la yãmb sũ-puugrã waame, la wakat taame tɩ y na n kao neb nins sẽn ki wã bʋʋdo, la y keo y no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã ne y nin-tũusdsã la neb nins sẽn zoet yãmb yʋʋrã, nin-tals la nin-kãsemse, la y sãam neb nins sẽn sãamd tẽngã." 
Revelation11:19 B paka Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be arzãnã, la b yãnda Wẽnnaam kãabg koglgã b roogã pʋga. Sa-yãgbo, la koeese, la sa-kelemse, la tẽn-digimdg ne sapɩlem wʋsg zĩndame." 
Revelation12:1 Bõn-bãnd sẽn yaa kãseng puka arzãna. Yaa pag sẽn pil wĩntoog wa fuugu, n tab kiuugã ne a nao, la a fõgen maanf sẽn maan ne ãds piig la a yiibu." 
Revelation12:2 Pagã rag n tʋtame, la a kũmda rogem kʋnkʋma, rogmã toog sẽn namsd-a yĩnga." 
Revelation12:3 Bõn-bãnd a to puka arzãna: Ad yaa wag‑bɛ-kãseng sẽn yaa miuugu, n tar zut a yopoe ne yɩɩl piiga, la maanf-rãmb n dag n fõg a zut a yopoe wã." 
Revelation12:4 Yẽnda zʋʋrã rag n kãagda ãdsã sẽn be yĩngrã, yembr tãab fãa sʋk n lobd tẽng zugu. Wag‑bɛɛgã yik n yalsa pag ning sẽn dat n dogã taoore, tɩ pagã sẽn dog yee, bɩ yẽnda vel a biigã." 
Revelation12:5 Pagã roga bi-ribla, rao sẽn na n zã kut dasaar n soog soolem fãa. La b zẽka pagã biig t'a kẽng Wẽnnaam nengẽ, la b geerẽ wã." 
Revelation12:6 La pagã zoee n kẽnga weoogẽ, zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n segl a yĩngã, tɩ b tõe n dɩlg-a be rasem tusr la kobs yi la pis yoobe." 
Revelation12:7 Zab-kãseng zĩnda arzãna. Malegs naab a Misɛll ne a malegsã zaba ne wag‑bɛɛgã. Wag‑bɛɛgã me ne a malegsã zabame," 
Revelation12:8 la b ka tõog ye. La zĩig ka leb n zĩnd arzãn yẽnda yĩng ye. 
Revelation12:9 B riga wag‑bɛ-kãsengã, wag-kʋdrã b sẽn boond tɩ rõatã la a Sʋtãana, soab ning sẽn belgd tẽngã zĩig ning fãa neb sẽn be wã nebã. B tusa yẽnda ne a malegsã n lob tẽng zugu." 
Revelation12:10 Dẽ, mam wʋma koe-kãseng arzãn pʋgẽ sẽn yeel yaa: Moasã, fãagre, la pãnga, la tõnd Wẽnnaamã naam la bãmb Kirisã noor waame. Bala, b luba tõnd ba-biisã rõatã, soab ning sẽn dag n dõt bãmb Wẽnnaam taoor wĩndg la yʋngã." 
Revelation12:11 D ba-biisã tõoga rõatã ne pe-bilã zɩɩm pãnga, la ne kasetã bãmb sẽn kɩtã pãnga, la bãmb ka nong b vɩɩmã, hal n zoe kũum ye." 
Revelation12:12 Yaa woto yĩnga, saasẽ, la yãmb dãmb sẽn be beenẽ wã maan sũ-noogo! Toog na n paama tẽngã ne ko-kãsengã. Bala, Sʋtãanã sig n waa yãmb nengẽ ne sũ-puugri, a sẽn bãng t'a wakatã sẽn ketã ka waoogã yĩnga." 
Revelation12:13 Wag‑bɛɛgã sẽn yã tɩ b loba yẽnda tẽng zugã, a babsa pag ning sẽn dog-a bi-riblã." 
Revelation12:14 La b kõo pagã panantug-kẽeng pɩgs a yiib t'a yɩk n kẽng weoogẽ wã, a zĩigẽ wã, zĩig ning b sẽn na n dɩlg-a wakat a yembre, la wakat dãmba, la wakat pʋɩ-sʋkã, tɩ waafã ra yãnd-a ye." 
Revelation12:15 La waafã kɩtame tɩ koom yi a noorẽ wã, n yaa wa mogr koom n pʋgl pagã, sẽn na yɩl tɩ koomã kãag pagã." 
Revelation12:16 La tẽngã sõnga pagã, n yaag a noor n vel koomã wag‑bɛɛgã sẽn yiis a noorẽ wã." 
Revelation12:17 Wag‑bɛɛgã sũur puuga ne pagã, la a kẽngame n tɩ yik zabr ne pagã yagensã sẽn kellã, neb nins sẽn sakd Wẽnnaam tõodã la sẽn tall-b a Zeezi kasetã." 
Revelation12:18 La wag‑bɛɛgã yik n yalsa ko-kãsengã bĩisr zugu. 
Revelation13:1 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda rũng sẽn yi ko-kãsengẽ wã n tar yɩɩl piig la zut a yopoe, la maanf-rãmb piig n dag n be a yɩɩlã zutu, la Wẽnnaam tʋʋsg yʋy n dag n gʋls a zutẽ wã." 
Revelation13:2 Rũngã mam sẽn yãndã rag n wẽndã wa ãbga, t'a naoã wẽnd rigd‑n‑yĩidg naoã, t'a noorã wẽnd wa gɩgemd noore. Wag‑bɛɛgã kõo rũngã a pãngã la a geerã la a pãn-tõogã." 
Revelation13:3 La mam yãnda rũngã zug a yembr sẽn pogle, n yaa wa a na n kiime, la a poglgã sẽn da tog n kʋ-a wã maagame. Nebã fãa sẽn be tẽng zugã yɛɛsame la b tũu rũngã." 
Revelation13:4 B wõgemda wag‑bɛɛgã taoore, a sẽn kõ rũngã pãn-tõogã yĩnga. B wõgemda rũngã taoore, n yeele: Ãnda n wẽnd rũngã, la ãndã n tõe n zab ne-a?" 
Revelation13:5 B kõo rũngã noor t'a gom wilg-m-meng goam la Wẽnnaam paoogr goamã. La b kõo yẽnda pãn-tõog t'a tʋm kiis pis-naas la a yiibu. 
Revelation13:6 Rũngã yaaga a noor n na n gom n paoog Wẽnnaam, n paoog bãmb yʋʋrã la b sɛk roogã, la neb nins sẽn be arzãnã." 
Revelation13:7 La b kõo yẽnda noor t'a yik zabr ne Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã n tõog-ba. B kõo yẽnda pãn-tõog t'a tõog buud fãa, la tẽng fãa nebã, la goam buud fãa nebã, la soolem fãa." 
Revelation13:8 La nebã fãa sẽn be tẽng zugu, tɩ b yʋy ka gʋls vɩɩm sebrã sẽn yaa pe-bil ning b sẽn kʋ hal dũni naaneg wakatã sebrã pʋgẽ wã wõgemda rũngã taoore." 
Revelation13:9 Ned sã n tar tʋb bɩ a kelge! 
Revelation13:10 Ned sã n tog n kẽ yembdo, a na n kẽe yembdo. Ned sã n kʋ ne zabr sʋʋga, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b kʋ-a ne zabr sʋʋga. Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã modgr la b tẽebã la woto." 
Revelation13:11 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda rũng a to sẽn yi tẽnga pʋgẽ. A ra tara yɩɩl a yiib sẽn wẽnd wa pe-bil yɩɩla, la a rag n gomda wa wag‑bɛɛgã." 
Revelation13:12 Yẽnda rag n tʋmda ne pipi rũngã pãn-tõogã fãa a nifẽ, la a kɩtame tɩ tẽngã ne nebã sẽn be a zugã wõgemded pipi rũngã sẽn dag n paam sãmpog-kʋʋdg tɩ maagã taoore." 
Revelation13:13 Rũng a yiibẽ soabã maana bãn-kãsemse, hal n kɩtdẽ tɩ bugum yit yĩngr n sigd tẽngã zug nebã nifẽ." 
Revelation13:14 Ne bãn b sẽn kõ-a noor t'a maan pipi rũngã taoorã, a belga nebã sẽn be tẽng zugã, n yeel-b tɩ b maan rũng ning sẽn paam poglg ne zabr sʋʋg n kell n põsã bõn-naandga." 
Revelation13:15 B kõo rũng a yiibẽ soabã pãn-tõog t'a kɩt tɩ pipi rũngã bõn-naandgã paam sɩɩga, sẽn na yɩl la bõn-naandgã gome, la a kɩt tɩ b kʋ neb nins fãa sẽn ka na n wõgemd rũngã bõn-naandgã taoorã." 
Revelation13:16 La a kɩtame tɩ nebã fãa, nin-tals la nin-kãsemse, arzegs rãmb la naong rãmba, yembs ne burkĩmb reeg bãnd b nug-rɩtgo wall b rĩyã zutu," 
Revelation13:17 la tɩ ned baa a yembr ra tõog n da wall a koose, t'a ka tar bãndã, rũngã yʋʋre, wall a yʋʋrã geel-bilã ye." 
Revelation13:18 Yam la woto. Bɩ ned ning sẽn tar yam geelg rũngã yʋʋr geelg sõore. Bala, yaa ninsaal yʋʋr geelg sõore, la a yʋʋrã geelg sõor yaa 666." 
Revelation14:1 Mam gesame, la m yãnda pe-bilã sẽn yik n yas Sɩyõ tãngã zugu, tɩ neb tus koabg la tus pis-naas la a naas sẽn da tar pe-bilã yʋʋr ne b ba wã yʋʋr sẽn gʋls b rĩyẽ wã be ne bãmba." 
Revelation14:2 Mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yi arzãna, n wẽnd wa ko-kãsems koɛɛga, wa sa-kɛleng kãseng bʋrgo, la rãamd ning mam sẽn wʋmã ra wẽnda wa pend-wẽedb sẽn wẽed b pendse." 
Revelation14:3 B yɩɩnda yɩɩn-paalg geerã taoore, la bõn-vɩɩs a naasã ne kãsem-dãmbã taoore. Ned ba a yembr ra ka tõe n zãms yɩɩllã ye, sã n ka neb tus koabg la pis-naas la a naas sẽn dag n paam fãagr dũni zugã." 
Revelation14:4 Yaa neb nins sẽn ka rẽgem b mens ne pagbã, bala b ka sãam ye. Bãmb na n pʋgda pe-bilã n dabd zĩig ning fãa b sẽn dabdã. B raa bãmb n yiis nebã sʋka, tɩ b yɩ wa dẽenem biis Wẽnnaam ne pe-bilã yĩnga," 
Revelation14:5 la zĩrẽ ka tol n zĩnd b noyẽ ye. Rõadg ka be b zut ye. 
Revelation14:6 Mam yãnda malɛɛk a to sẽn yɩgd n pɩʋʋgd yĩngri: A rag n tara koe-noog sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa, n na n togs neb nins sẽn be tẽng zugã, soolem fãa, buud fãa, goam buud fãa nebã, la tẽng fãa nebã." 
Revelation14:7 Yẽnda zẽka a koɛɛg n yetẽ yaa: Zoe-y Wẽnnaam dabeem la y waoog bãmba. Bala wakat taame tɩ bãmb na n kao bʋʋdo. Wõgemd-y soab ning sẽn naan-a yĩngr la tẽngã, ko-kãseng ne ko-bundsã taoore." 
Revelation14:8 Malɛɛk a to sẽn yaa yiib-n-soab pʋglame n yetẽ yaa: A lʋɩɩme! A lʋɩɩme! Babilond kãsengã sẽn kɩt tɩ soolem dãmbã fãa yũ yẽnda yoobã sẽn ka koakã reezẽ rãamã lʋɩɩme. 
Revelation14:9 Malɛɛk a to sẽn yaa tãab-n-soab pʋgla bãmb ne koe-kãseng n yeele: Ned sã n wõgemd rũngã ne a bõn-naandgã taoore, la a sã n deeg bãndã a dĩirẽ wall a nug zugu," 
Revelation14:10 yẽnda soab me na n yũu Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã reezẽ rãam sẽn ka pulã, sẽn kiig bãmb sũ-puugr laagẽ wã. La yẽnda na n paama namsg bugmẽ la kidbr pʋga, malegs-sõamyã wã ne pe-bilã taoore." 
Revelation14:11 Bãmb namsgã bug-zõos zẽkda zamaan woo zamaane. La wĩndg ne yʋngo, neb nins sẽn wõgemded rũngã ne a bõn-naandgã taoorã, la ned ning sẽn deeg-a yẽnda yʋʋrã bãndã ka tol n tar vʋʋsem ye." 
Revelation14:12 Woto yĩnga, nin-sõamyã tog n nanga pãnga, n sakd Wẽnnaam tõodã la b tall tẽeb ne a Zeezi." 
Revelation14:13 Mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yi arzãn n yetẽ: Gʋlse: sẽn sɩng ne moasã, bark bee kũum nins sẽn kiid Zu-soabã tũudum pʋgẽ wã zutu. Sɩɩg-sõng yetame tɩ n-yẽe, tɩ b tõe n bas b tʋʋmã n vʋʋse, bala bãmb tʋʋmã pʋgd-b lame." 
Revelation14:14 Mam gesame la m yãnda sawad-pɛɛlga, la ned sẽn wẽnd wa ninsaal n dag n zao sawadgã zugu. A rag n fõgena a zug sãnem maanfo, la a zãad goeoog sẽn dɩt a nugẽ." 
Revelation14:15 Malɛɛk a to yii wẽnd doogẽ wã n zẽk a koɛɛg n gom ne sẽn zao-a sawadgã ne pãng n yeel yaa: Yulumd f goeoogã n wʋre. Wʋrb wakat taame, bala, bõn-koaadlã sẽn be tẽng zugã bɩɩme." 
Revelation14:16 La sẽn zao-a sawadgã zugã yulumda a goeoogã tẽngã zugu, la b tigsa tẽng zug bõn-koaadlã." 
Revelation14:17 Malɛɛk a to yii wẽnd doogã sẽn be arzãnã pʋgẽ. Yẽnda me rag n tara goeoog sẽn dɩte. 
Revelation14:18 Malɛɛk a to sẽn dag n tar pãn-tõog ne bugum yii tẽn-kugrẽ wã, n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeel malɛɛk ning sẽn zãad‑a goeoog sẽn dɩtã yaa: Yulumd f goeoogã sẽn dɩtã, n yãgs reezẽ tɩɩsã sẽn be tẽng zugã bi‑gĩna, bala, b reezẽ wã bɩɩme." 
Revelation14:19 Malɛɛkã yulumda a goeoogã tẽngã zugu. A yãgsa reezẽ tɩɩsã sẽn be tẽng zugã biisi n lob-b Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr reezẽ rãam wẽkr kogl‑kãsengã pʋga. 
Revelation14:20 La b yii ne‑a tẽngã kɛɛng n tab‑a, la zɩɩm yii koglgẽ wã n zoe. A zulmã tata wiid salba, la a zoeeme n ta kɩlometr kobs-tã." 
Revelation15:1 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda bãnd a to arzãn sẽn yaa kãseng n sek gesgo. Yaa malegs a yopoe sẽn da zãad tood a yopoe, yaoolem dãmbã. Bala yaa ne to-kãens la Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã na n pidsi." 
Revelation15:2 La mam yãnda bũmb sẽn yaa wa ko-kãseng sẽn yaa nen-gɛtga, n kalem ne bugum. La mam yãnda neb nins sẽn tõog rũngã ne a bõn-naandgã la a yʋʋrã geel-bilã sẽn yɛs yĩngri, nen-gɛtgã sẽn wẽnd ko-kãsengã zugu. Bãmb da zãada Wẽnnaam pendse." 
Revelation15:3 Bãmb yɩɩnda Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis yɩɩllã, la pe-bilã yɩɩlle: Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam Sẽn‑Tõe‑Fãa, yãmb tʋʋmã yaa kãsemse la b bee neere! Soolem dãmbã rĩmã, yãmb tʋʋmã zemsame la b yaa sɩda." 
Revelation15:4 Zu-soaba, ãndã n ka na n zoe yãmba, la a ka na n waoog yãmb yʋʋrã? Bala, yãmb y yembr tãa n welg toore. La soolem dãmbã fãa na n wa wõgemda yãmb taoore, yãmb tɩrlmã sẽn pukã yĩnga." 
Revelation15:5 Rẽ poore, mam gesame, la b paka kaset fu-roogã yɩlgr zĩigã arzãn pʋga." 
Revelation15:6 Malegs nins sẽn da zãad tood a yopoe wã yii yɩlgr doogẽ wã. Bãmb dag n yera peen‑neer sẽn yaa pɛɛlg falll... fut sẽn yãgda. La b rag n sẽba b yãad ne sãnem sẽbdse. 
Revelation15:7 Ned a yembr bõn-vɩɩs a naasã sʋk kõo malegs a yopoe wã sãnem laas a yopoe sẽn pid ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ zamaan woo zamaanã sũ-puugri. 
Revelation15:8 La yɩlgr doogã pida ne bug-zõose, Wẽnnaam ziirã ne b pãngã yĩnga, la ned baa a yembr da ka tõe n kẽ yɩlgr doogẽ wã ye, hal tɩ toodã malegs a yopoe wã sẽn zãadã sɛ." 
Revelation16:1 Mam wʋma koe-kãseng sẽn yi wẽnd doogẽ wã n yeel malegs a yopoe wã yaa: Kẽng-y n tɩ kiig-y Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã sẽn be laas a yopoe wã pʋsã dũniyã zugu. 
Revelation16:2 Pipi soabã kẽngame n tɩ kiig sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã dũniyã zugu. La nod-kɛgeng sẽn yaa toaag yõka neb nins sẽn dag n tar rũngã gʋlsem bãnde la b wõgemded bõn-naandgã taoorã. 
Revelation16:3 Malɛɛk a yiibẽ soabã kiiga sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ, la a lebga zɩɩm wa kũum zɩɩm. La bõn-vɩɩs nins fãa sẽn dag n be ko-kãsengã pʋgã kiime." 
Revelation16:4 Malɛɛk a tãabẽ soabã kiiga sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã kʋɩlsã ne ko-bundsã pʋse, la b lebga zɩɩm." 
Revelation16:5 La mam wʋma koomã malɛɛkã sẽn yeel yaa: yãmba, soab ning sẽn dag n be, la sẽn be moasã, n welg toorã, yãmb sẽn kao bʋʋdã a woto wã zemsame." 
Revelation16:6 Bala, bãmb daaga neb nins sẽn welg toorã la yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã zɩɩm, la yãmb kõ-b-la zɩɩm tɩ b yũ. Rẽ segda ne bãmba." 
Revelation16:7 La mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yi tẽn-kugrẽ wã n yeel yaa: Hakɩɩka, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam Sẽn‑Tõe‑Fãa, yãmb bʋʋda kaoob yaa sɩda, la tɩrga." 
Revelation16:8 Malɛɛk a naasẽ soabã kiiga sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã wĩntoogã zugu. La b kõo wĩntoogã pãng t'a yõog ninsaalbã ne bugum," 
Revelation16:9 la tʋʋl-kãseng yõoga nebã. Bãmb paooga Wẽnnaam ning sẽn tar-a noor ne to-kãensã yʋʋre, la b ka tek yam n kos sugr n na n kõ Wẽnnaam waoogr ye." 
Revelation16:10 Malɛɛk a nu soabã kiiga sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã rũngã geerã zugu. La yẽnda soolmã lebga lik bida. Toogã kɩtame tɩ ninsaalbã rũmd b zɛlma. 
Revelation16:11 La toodã ne noadã sẽn tar bãmbã yĩnga, b paooga saasẽ Wẽnnaamã, la b ka tek yam n kos sugr b tʋʋm wẽnsã yĩng ye. Sũ-puugr laaga." 
Revelation16:12 Malɛɛk a yoob-n-soabã kiiga sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã kʋɩl-kãseng ning sẽn boond tɩ Efartã zugu. La kʋɩlgã koom kʋɩɩme tɩ lebg sor rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn yit yaangã yĩnga. 
Revelation16:13 Mam yãnda sɩ-rẽgd a tãab sẽn wẽnd wa loms sẽn yit dargõ wã noorẽ la rũngã noorẽ la belgr no-rɛɛsã noorẽ. 
Revelation16:14 Bãmb yaa sɩɩse, zĩn-dãmb sẽn maand bõn-yɛɛsdse, la sẽn kẽngd dũni gill fãa rĩm-dãmbã nengẽ n na n tɩ tigs-b Wẽnnaam sẽn tõe fãa ra-kãsenga sẽn yaa zabr daarã yĩnga." 
Revelation16:15 Ad mam wata wa wagdre. Bark bee ned ning sẽn ka gõe la sẽn yer a futu, sẽn na yɩl la a ra kẽn beelle, la tɩ nebã kõn yã‑a yãndã zugu." 
Revelation16:16 B tigma nanambsã zĩig a yembr sẽn boond ne Ebre goam tɩ Harmagedõ. 
Revelation16:17 Malɛɛk a yopoe soabã kiiga sẽn be yẽnda laagẽ wã pemsmã pʋga. La koe-kãseng yii geerẽ wã, wẽnd doogẽ wã n yeel yaa: Maaname n sɛ!" 
Revelation16:18 La sa-yãgb ne koeese, la sa-kelems ne tẽn-digimdg sẽn ya kãseng zĩndame, la hal ninsaalb sẽn be dũni zug tɛka, tẽn-digimdg sẽn yaa kãseng a woto nan ka tol n zĩnd ye." 
Revelation16:19 Tẽn-kãsengã welga zĩis a tãabo. Soolem toay-toayã tẽms lʋɩɩme, la Wẽnnaam tẽega Babilond kãsengã yelle, n na n kɩt t'a yũ bãmb sũ-puug-kãsengã reezẽ rãamã sẽn be laagẽ wã." 
Revelation16:20 Koomã sẽn gũbg tẽms ninsã fãa zoeeme, la ned ka leb n yã tãmsã ye." 
Revelation16:21 La sapɩlem zɩslem sẽn kolg kɩlo pis-naas yii yĩngr n dʋʋg ninsaalbã zutu. La sapɩlmã toog yĩnga, nebã paooga Wẽnnaam. Bala to-kãng talla pãng tɩ looge." 
Revelation17:1 Dẽ poore, malegs a yopoe wã sẽn da zãad laas a yopoe wã, b ned a yembr waa n goma ne maam n yeele: Wa tɩ m na n wilga foom pʋg-yood‑kãsengã sẽn zĩ ko-kãsemsã zutã bʋʋdo." 
Revelation17:2 Yaa ne yẽnda la dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã maan yoobo, la dũni nebã ra yũu yẽnda yoobã reezẽ rãam tɩ b nens yilim." 
Revelation17:3 Malɛɛkã rɩka maam m tagsgã pʋgẽ n kẽng weoogẽ. La mam yãnda pag sẽn zao rũng sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, n pid ne yʋy sẽn paoogd Wẽnnaam, la a tara zut a yopoe ne yɩɩl piiga." 
Revelation17:4 Pagã ra yera fuug sẽn yaa miu-kẽega, la miuug mas n nags a meng ne sãnem la kug‑neeba, la pɛrl‑dãmba. Pagã rag n zãada sãnem laag a nugẽ, la laagã rag n pida ne tʋʋm-wẽnse, la ne pagã yoobã rẽgdo." 
Revelation17:5 Yʋʋr n da gʋls pagã rĩirẽ, yaa yel-solemde: Babilond kãsengã, dũni pʋg-yoaadbã ne tʋʋm-wẽns ma." 
Revelation17:6 Mam yãame tɩ neb nins sẽn welg toorã, ne a Zeezi kaset dãmbã zɩɩm yilimd pagã nenga. Mam sẽn yãnd-a wã, linga maam wʋsgo." 
Revelation17:7 La malɛɛkã soka maam yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ yaa lingr ne foom? Mam na n togsa foom pagã ne rũng ning sẽn zɩt yẽnda, n tar zut a yopoe ne yɩɩl piigã yel-solemdã." 
Revelation17:8 Rũng ning fo sẽn yã wã rag n beeme, la a ka leb n beẽ ye. A na n yii bog-zulungẽ wã n kẽng sãoong zĩigẽ. La dũni neb nins yʋy sẽn ka gʋls vɩɩm sebrã pʋgẽ hal dũni naaneg wẽndẽ wã sã n yãnd rũngã, a na n yɩɩ lingr ne bãmba, rũngã sẽn dag n be, n wa ka leb n beẽ la a na n leb n pukã yĩnga." 
Revelation17:9 Bãngr sẽn yɩt ne yam n tog n zĩnd ka: Zut a yopoe wã yaa tãms a yopoe nins pagã sẽn zao b zutã. 
Revelation17:10 Leb n yaa rĩm-dãmb a yopoe. Bãmb b nu n lʋɩ t'a yembr beẽ, t'a to wã nan ka wa nand ye, la a sã n wa wa, a tog n dɩɩ naam wakat bilfu." 
Revelation17:11 Rũng ning sẽn dag n be, n ka leb n be wã meng yaa rĩm a nii soaba. Yẽnda me yaa rĩm-dãmb a yopoe wã ned a yembre. La a rabda sãoong zĩigẽ." 
Revelation17:12 Yɩɩl piigã fo sẽn yã wã yaa rĩm-dãmb piig sẽn nan ka reeg soolem ye, la b reegda pãn-tõog wa rĩm-dãmbã lɛɛr a yembr yĩng ne rũngã." 
Revelation17:13 Bãmb yam yaa a yembre, la b kõta rũngã b pãngã ne b pãn-tõogã." 
Revelation17:14 Bãmb na n zaba ne pe-bilã. La pe-bilã na n tõog-b lame, tɩ bõe bãmb yaa zu-soben-dãmb Zu-soabã la rĩm-dãmbã Dĩmã. La neb nins b sẽn boolã, neb nins b sẽn tũusã, ne neb nins sẽn maand sɩdã, n be ne pe-bilã na n tõog-b lame me." 
Revelation17:15 Malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: «Koom nins fo sẽn yãnd tɩ pʋg-yoodrã zĩ b zutã, yaa nebã, la neb kʋʋndo, ne soolem‑dãmba, la goam buud toay-toayã nebã." 
Revelation17:16 Yɩɩl piigã fo sẽn yãndã, n paas rũngã na n kisga pʋg-yoodrã, n dees a futã n bas-a a zaala, la b wãb a nemdã, la b ning-a bugum t'a rɩ tẽma." 
Revelation17:17 Bala, Wẽnnaam ninga bãmb sũyã pʋs tɩ b maan Wẽnnaam daabo, la b naag taab yam a yembre, n dɩk b naamã n kõ rũngã hal tɩ Wẽnnaam goamã wa paam pidsgu." 
Revelation17:18 La pagã fo sẽn yã wã yaa tẽn-kãseng ning sẽn so-a dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã.» 
Revelation18:1 Rẽ zugẽ, mam yãnda malɛɛk a to sẽn tar pãn-kãseng sẽn yi arzãn n sigda, n tar noor sõama la a zĩirã kõo dũniyã vẽenem." 
Revelation18:2 Malɛɛkã zẽka a koɛɛg ne pãng n yeele: A lʋɩɩme! A lʋɩɩme! Babilond kãsengã lʋɩɩme! Yẽnda lebga zĩn-dãmb yiri, la zĩ-dẽgd fãa, la bõn-yɩgd‑rẽgd fãa, la rũm‑dẽgd buud fãa nebã sẽn kis zĩiga." 
Revelation18:3 Soolem dãmba fãa sẽn yũ Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr wa reezẽ rãam yẽnda yoobã yĩnga, tɩ dũni rĩm-dãmb maan yoob ne yẽnda, la tɩ dũni lɛɛbdb tũnug yẽnda nag-teedã pãng n lebg arzegs rãmba." 
Revelation18:4 La mam wʋma koɛɛg a to sẽn yi arzãn n yeele: Mam nebã, yi-y tẽngã pʋga, tɩ y ra wa n naag n maan yel-wẽn ning a sẽn maandã, la tɩ y ra wa n naag yẽnda n paam tood nins sẽn na n paam-a wã ye." 
Revelation18:5 Bala, yẽnda yel-wẽnã zamame hal n tãag arzãna, la Wẽnnaam tẽega a ka-tɩrlem tʋʋmã yelle." 
Revelation18:6 Yao-y yẽnda wa yẽnda sẽn yao wã, la y lebs-a a tʋʋmã naoor a yiibu! Wamd ning pʋgẽ a sẽn kiigã, kiig-y-yã a woto naoor a yiib n kõ-a." 
Revelation18:7 Yẽnda sẽn waoog a meng n kẽ nagma pʋgẽ n ta zĩig ningã, kɩt-y t'a toogã ne a sũ-sãangã ta a boto. Bala, a yeta a sũurẽ yaa: Mam zĩi wa rĩm-poaka, mam ka pʋg‑kõore, la mam kõn tol n paam kũum sũ-sãang ye." 
Revelation18:8 Rẽnda yĩngã, yẽnda toodã na n waa daar a yembr pʋgẽ. Bãag sẽn na n kʋ-a, sũ-sãanga, kom, la bugum na n dɩ-a lame. Bala, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, sẽn kaood-a yẽnda bʋʋdã yaa pãn-kẽeng soaba." 
Revelation18:9 Dũniyã rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn maan yoob ne tẽn-kãngã, la b paam te-neeb ne yẽnda wã sã n wa yã tẽngã sẽn dɩt bugmã bug-zõose, b na n yãbame n wiis a yĩnga." 
Revelation18:10 Bãmb sẽn zoet rabeem tɩ yẽnda toogã na n wa paam bãmbã yĩnga, b na n yalsa yɩɩg n yeel yaa: Kayto! Kayto! Tẽn-kãsengã, Babilond tẽng sẽn tar pãnga! Fo sɩbgr waa wakat a yembr pʋgẽ bala." 
Revelation18:11 La dũni fãa toandb yãbdame n wiisd yẽnda yĩnga, ned baa a yembr sẽn ka leb n daad bãmb koosmã yĩnga:" 
Revelation18:12 Yaa sãnem, la wanzuri, la kug sẽn be yõod wʋsgo, la pɛrl‑dãmba, la lamd gĩs-bãaneg peen-sõamyã, la peen-miu-kẽese, la peen‑fʋlfʋle, la pɛɛl sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la raoog buud fãa sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la teoog buud fãa sẽn maan ne wob-yẽna, la teed buud fãa sẽn maan ne raad sẽn be yõod wʋsgo, la sẽn maan ne zũudu, la kutu, la kug sẽn boond tɩ marbre," 
Revelation18:13 kanell la ra-pegd buud sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la zẽ-biis sẽn kõt yũ-noogo, la tɩdare, la vãad buud b sẽn boond tɩ miiri, la wisdu, la reezẽ rãam, la kaam, la zom-bãanega, la koodo, la niig ne piisi, la wed-moose, la terok-rãmba, hal baa ninsaalba." 
Revelation18:14 Fo sẽn da rat bũmb ning ne f sũur fãa wã loog n basa foom. Bõn-sõamy wã fãa, wall bõn-neebã menemame n bas foom, la ned kõn leb n yãnd-b abada." 
Revelation18:15 Toandb nins sẽn tũnug Babilond n lebg arzegs rãmbã sẽn zoet rabeem ne toog ning sẽn na n paam tẽn-kãngã yĩngã, b na n yalsa yɩɩga, n yãbe, n maan sũ-sãanga." 
Revelation18:16 Bãmb na n yeelame yaa: Kayto! Kayto! Tẽn-kãsengã sẽn dag n yer peen‑neer fut la fu-miu-kẽesã, la fut sẽn yaa miid mas n nags a meng ne sãnem ne kug-neeb la pɛrl dãmbã!" 
Revelation18:17 Wakat a yembr pʋgẽ bala, arzegs wʋsg a woto sãamame. Koom kogond zu-soben-dãmbã fãa ne neb nins fãa sẽn be koom kogendã pʋsã, la koom kogendã pʋg tʋmtʋmdbã ne neb nins fãa sẽn tolemd ne koom kogendã dag n yasa yɩɩga," 
Revelation18:18 la b sẽn yã bugmã sẽn dɩt tẽngã bug-zõosã, b kelmame n yeele: Tẽn-bʋg n dag n wẽnd tẽn-kãsengã?" 
Revelation18:19 Bãmb da yugda b zut tom, n yãbda n maand sũ-sãang wa ned n ki, la b kelemdẽ n yetẽ: Kayto! Kayto! Tẽn-kãseng ning sẽn dag n tar paoong wʋsg tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn tar koom kogond ko-kãsengã zugã tũnug be n lebg arzegs rãmbã, wakat a yembr pʋgẽ bala, a lebga rasempʋɩɩga." 
Revelation18:20 Arzãna, maan sũ-noog ne bũmb ning sẽn paam-a wã. Yãmb me sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga, la tẽn-tʋmdbã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, maan-y sũ-noogo. Bala Wẽnnaam sẽn kao tẽngã bʋʋdã, b roka yãmb sũuri." 
Revelation18:21 Dẽ, malɛɛk sẽn tar pãng tebga kugr sẽn wẽnd neer sẽn yaa bedr n lob-a ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ n yeele: B na n tusa Babilond sẽn yaa tẽn-kãsengã a woto ne pãng n lubi, la ned kõn leb n yãnd-a yɛs ye." 
Revelation18:22 La ned kõn leb n wʋm pend-wẽedbã, la yʋʋmbã, la wɩɩs ne bar-pɛɛbdbã rãamd fo pʋgẽ ye. Ned kõn leb n yãnd nug-tʋʋmd buud baa a yembr soab beenẽ ye, la ned kõn leb n wʋm neer rãamd beenẽ ye." 
Revelation18:23 Fɩtl vẽenem kõn leb n yãg be ye, la ned kõn leb n wʋm pʋg-paal sɩd ne a pʋg-paalã koees beenẽ yɛs ye. Bala, fo toandbã dag n yaa dũni nin-kãsemse, fo belga soolem dãmbã fãa ne f bagrã." 
Revelation18:24 La b yãnda Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã ne nin-sõamyã, la neb nins fãa b sẽn kood dũniyã zugã zɩɩm fo pʋgẽ." 
Revelation19:1 Rẽ poore, mam wʋma koe-kãseng arzãn pʋgẽ sẽn wẽnd neb kʋʋng wʋsg koees sẽn yet yaa: Haleluya! Fãagre, la ziiri, ne pãng yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã n so," 
Revelation19:2 bãmb bʋ-kaoorã sẽn yaa sɩd la tɩrgã yĩnga. Wẽnnaam kaoo pʋg-yood‑kãsengã sẽn dag n sãamd dũni ne a yoobã bʋʋdo. La Wẽnnaam doka b tʋmtʋmdbã sũuri, yẽnda sẽn daag bãmb zɩɩmã yĩnga." 
Revelation19:3 La b leb n yeela naoor a yiib soab yaa: Haleluya! La yẽnda bug-zõos zẽkda zamaan woo zamaane. 
Revelation19:4 Kãsem-dãmbã pisi la a naasã ne bõn-vɩɩs a naasã wõgemdame n waoog Wẽnnaam sẽn zao geerã zugã n yeel tɩ ãmina! Haleluya! 
Revelation19:5 Koɛɛg yii geerẽ wã n yeel yaa: Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdbã, yãmb dãmb sẽn zoet bãmbã, nin-tals la nin-kãsemse, pẽg-y tõnd Wẽnnaamã." 
Revelation19:6 La mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn wẽnd wa neb kʋʋng wʋsg koeese, n wẽnd wa ko-kãsems koeese, n wẽnd wa sa-kelems kãsems koees sẽn yet yaa: Haleluya! Bala tõnd Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam Sẽn‑Tõe‑Fãa wã zĩndga b naam." 
Revelation19:7 D maan sũ-noog n kɩdme, la d waoog bãmba. Bala pe-bilã pʋg-peegrã daar taame, la bãmb pʋg-paalã segla a meng n sɛ." 
Revelation19:8 B kõo pʋg-paalã peen‑neer fuug sẽn pɩnd n ka tar rẽgd t'a yeelge. peen-neer fuugã yaa nin-sõamyã wã tʋʋm sõamyã. 
Revelation19:9 Malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: Gʋlse: Bark bee neb nins b sẽn bool tɩ b wa pe-bilã pʋg-peegr tigrã zutu! La a yeela maam yaa: Koe-kãngã yaa Wẽnnaam meng goamã. 
Revelation19:10 La mam wõgemda yẽnda taoor n na n waoog-a, la a yeela maam yaa: Da saag n maan a woto ye! Mam yaa fo tʋmd-n-taaga, la fo ba-biis nins sẽn tar a Zeezi kasetã tʋmd-n-taaga. Waoog Wẽnnaam! Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã goam yita a Zeezi kasetã pʋga." 
Revelation19:11 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda arzãn sẽn pake, la mam yãnda wed-moaag sẽn yaa pɛɛlga. Ned ning sẽn zao-a weefã yʋʋr la a Sɩd-maanda, la a Sɩd-sɩda. Bãmb bʋʋda bʋʋdã ne tɩrlem, la b zabd ne tɩrlem." 
Revelation19:12 Bãmb ninã yaa wa bug-witim. Maanf-rãmb wʋsg n fõg bãmb zugã. Bãmb tara yʋʋr sẽn gʋls tɩ ned baa a yembr ka mi, sã n ka bãmb mengã bala," 
Revelation19:13 la b yera fu-taok sẽn los zɩɩmẽ. Bãmb yʋʋr la a Wẽnd-gomde. 
Revelation19:14 Sodaasã sẽn be arzãnã dag n zaoo wed-peels n pʋgd bãmba, n yer peen‑neer fut sẽn yaa peels la yɩlma." 
Revelation19:15 Zabr sʋʋg sẽn dɩt n dag n yit b noorẽ wã n na n sɩbg soolem dãmbã. Bãmb na n zãa kut dasaar n dɩlg-ba. Bãmb na n taba bũmb nins sẽn be Wẽnnaam Sẽn‑Tõe‑Fãa wã sũ-puugr sẽn yaa kãsengã reezẽ rãam wẽkr koglgã pʋgẽ wã. 
Revelation19:16 Bãmb tara yʋʋr sẽn gʋls b fuugã zug la b geerã zugu: rĩm-dãmb Rĩma, la zu-soben-dãmb Zu-soaba." 
Revelation19:17 Mam yãnda malɛɛk sẽn yas wĩntoogã pʋgẽ. Yẽnda zẽka a koɛɛg ne pãng n yeel bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã yaa: wa-y n tigm-y taab Wẽnnaam tig‑kãsengã yĩnga," 
Revelation19:18 tɩ y tõe n dɩ rĩm-dãmb nemdo, sodaas nanambs nemdo, pãens rãmbã nemdo, wed-moos ne b rʋʋdbã nemdo, neb fãa nemdo, burkĩmb la yembse, nin-tals ne nin-kãsemse." 
Revelation19:19 Mam yãnda rũngã ne dũni rĩm-dãmbã ne b sodaasã sẽn tigim taab n na n zab ne soab ning sẽn zao-a wed-pɛɛlgã, la ne a sodaasã." 
Revelation19:20 La b yõka rũngã ne zãmb no-rɛɛs ning sẽn dag n maan bõn-yɛɛsds rũngã taoor n belg neb nins sẽn deeg rũngã bãndã la b wõgemded yẽnda bõn-naandgã taoorã. B loba bãmb b yiibã fãa vɩɩs bugum mogr pʋgẽ zĩig ning kidbr sẽn dɩtã. 
Revelation19:21 La sʋʋg ning sẽn dag n yit soab ning sẽn zao wed-moaagã zugã noorẽ wã kʋʋ neb a taabã. La bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa rɩɩ bãmb nemdã n tɩge. 
Revelation20:1 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda malɛɛk sẽn yi arzãn n sigda, n zãad bog zulungã kʋɩlen-biiga, la bãn-kãseng a nugẽ." 
Revelation20:2 Malɛɛkã yõka dargõ wã, la wag-kʋdrã sẽn yaa rõatã, la a Sʋtãanã n balg-a yʋʋm tusr yĩnga." 
Revelation20:3 A lob-a-la bog-zulungã pʋgẽ n page, la a sog bokã noor Sʋtãanã zugẽ, sẽn na yɩl t'a da leb n belg soolem dãmba yɛsa, hal tɩ yʋʋm tusrã pidsi. Rẽ poore, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b lok-a n bas wakat bilf yĩnga." 
Revelation20:4 Mam yãnda naam gɛyã. La b kõo neb nins sẽn zĩnd gɛyã zutã noor tɩ b bʋ bʋʋdo. La mam yãnda neb nins b sẽn fiuus b zut a Zeezi kasetã ne Wẽnnaam goamã yĩngã sɩɩse, la neb nins sẽn dag n ka wõgemd rũngã wall a bõn-naandgã taoore, la b ka reeg bãndã b rĩyẽ wall b nusã zutã sɩɩse. Bãmb vʋʋgame n dɩ naam ne Kiris yʋʋm tusri." 
Revelation20:5 La kũum a taabã ka vʋʋg ye, hal tɩ yʋʋm tusrã pidsi. Vʋʋg-kãng yaa dẽenem vʋʋgre." 
Revelation20:6 Neb nins sẽn naag n paam dẽenem vʋʋgrã tara bark la sõmblem. Kũum a yiib soabã ka tar b tʋʋmd ye. Bãmb na n yɩɩ Wẽnnaam ne Kirisã maan-kʋʋdba, la b na n dɩɩ naam ne Kirisã yʋʋm tusri." 
Revelation20:7 Yʋʋm tusrã sã n wa pidi, b na n yiisa a sʋtãan a bi-bees roogẽ wã n bas-a," 
Revelation20:8 la a na n yiime n belg soolem nins sẽn be dũniyã kɩrems a naasã nebã, Gaoog ne Magaooge, sẽn na n yɩl n tigim bãmb zabr yĩnga. Bãmb sõorã yaa wa ko-kãsengã bĩisri." 
Revelation20:9 Bãmb yiime n yɛdg tẽng zugu, la b kẽe nin-sõamyã tãb-sikẽ wã, la tẽn-nongrẽ wã. La bugum yii arzãn n sig n dɩ-ba." 
Revelation20:10 B loba bɛlgdã, soab ning sẽn dag n belgd nebã bugum mogr sẽn dɩt kidbr pʋga, zĩig ning rũngã ne belgr no-rɛɛsã sẽn be wã. Bãmb na n namsa wĩndg ne yʋngo, zamaan woo zamaane." 
Revelation20:11 Dẽ poore, mam yãnda ge-kãseng sẽn yaa pɛɛlga, ne ned ning sẽn zao-a geerã zugã. La dũniyã ne saasẽ zoee bãmb taoor n looge, la zĩig ka leb n be bãmb yĩng ye." 
Revelation20:12 La mam yãnda neb nins sẽn ki wã, nin-kãsemse, nin-talse tɩ b yas geerã taoore. La b lagsa sɛba, la b laka sebr a to sẽn yaa vɩɩm sebre. B bʋʋ sẽn ki-bã bʋʋdo, n zems ne bũmb nins sẽn gʋls sɛbã pʋsã, n zems ned fãa tʋʋmd sẽn yɩ a soaba." 
Revelation20:13 Ko-kãsengã lebsa kũum nins sẽn da be be wã, tɩ kũumã ne kɩɩm-kulg lebs kũum nins sẽn da be be wã, la b bʋʋ bãmb ned kam fãa bʋʋd wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã." 
Revelation20:14 B loba kũumã ne kɩɩm-kulg bugum ko‑kãsengã pʋga. Bugum ko‑kãsengã yaa kũum a yiib soaba. 
Revelation20:15 B loba ned ning fãa b sẽn ka yã a yʋʋr tɩ gʋls vɩɩm sebrã pʋgẽ wã bugum ko‑kãsengã pʋga. 
Revelation21:1 Mam yãnda yĩngr paalga, la dũni paalga, bala, dẽenem yĩngrã ne dẽenem tẽngã loogame, la ko-kãsengã ka leb n be yɛs ye." 
Revelation21:2 La mam yãnda tẽn-sõngã, Zeruzalɛm paalgã sẽn yi Wẽnnaam nengẽ n sigda, la a wẽnda wa pag sẽn nags a meng a sɩd yĩnga." 
Revelation21:3 Mam wʋma koe-kãseng sẽn yi geerẽ wã n yeele: Ad Wẽnnaam yirã bee ninsaalb sʋka. Wẽnnaam na n zĩnda ne nebã. Bãmb na n yɩɩ Wẽnnaam nebã, la Wẽnnaam mengã na n paa ne bãmba." 
Revelation21:4 Wẽnnaam na n yẽesa nintãm fãa sẽn be b ninẽ wã. Kũum kõn leb n zĩnd ye, la sũ-sãang wall yãbre, wall toog kõn leb n zĩnd ye. Bala, dẽenem bũmbã fãa loogame." 
Revelation21:5 Ned ning sẽn zao geerã yeelame yaa: Ade, mam maanda bũmbã fãa paalse. La b yeel yaa: Gʋlse, bala, gom-kãensã yaa vẽenega, la b yaa sɩda." 
Revelation21:6 Bãmb yeela maam yaa: Maaname! Maam la Alfa la Omega, Sɩngre, la Sɛɛbo. Mam na n kõo ned ning ko-yũud sẽn tarã vɩɩm ko-bundmã zaalem." 
Revelation21:7 Ned ning sẽn na n tõogã pʋɩɩr na n yɩɩ a woto: Mam na n yɩɩ yẽnda Wẽnnaam, la yẽnda na n yɩɩ mam biiga." 
Revelation21:8 La sã n yaa ne rabɛɛmbã, la ka-tẽeb rãmbã, la tʋʋm-dẽgd maandbã, la nin-kʋʋdbã, la nin-yoaadbã, la tɩ-maandbã, la wẽn-naands pʋʋsdbã, la zĩrẽ‑be‑nebã fãa, bãmb pʋɩɩr na n yɩɩ tɩ kẽ bugum mogrẽ wã, zĩig ning kidbr sẽn dɩtã. Rẽ yaa kũum a yiib soabã." 
Revelation21:9 Dẽ poore, malegs a yopoe wã sẽn da zãad laas a yopoe sẽn pid ne yaoolem tood a yopoe wã ned a yembr waa n goma ne maam n yeel yaa: Wa tɩ m na n wilg-f‑la pʋg-paalã, pe-bilã pagã." 
Revelation21:10 Malɛɛkã rɩka maam m yamẽ n kẽng tãn-kãseng sẽn yaa lug‑lug zugu. La a wilga maam tẽn-sõngã sẽn yaa Zeruzalɛmã sẽn yi yĩngri, Wẽnnaam nengẽ n sigdã." 
Revelation21:11 Tẽngã dag n tara Wẽnnaam zĩirã. Yẽnda ra-sãndã rag n wẽnda wa kugr sẽn be yõod wʋsg neerlem, wa kugr b sẽn boond tɩ zaspe n tond wa vɛɛre." 
Revelation21:12 A rag n tara lal-kãseng sẽn yaa zãondgo. A rag n tara zag-noy piig la a yiibu, tɩ malegs piig la a yiib be zag-noeyẽ wã. Yʋy n da gʋls b zutu: Yaa Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã yʋya." 
Revelation21:13 Zag-noy a tãab n be yaanga, t'a tãab be rɩtgo, t'a tãab be goabga, t'a tãab be nin-taoore." 
Revelation21:14 Tẽngã lalg mee yẽbgr piig la a yiib zugu, la b gʋlsa pe-bilã tẽn-tʋmdb piig la a yiibã yʋy yẽbg-kãens zutu." 
Revelation21:15 Malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gom-a ne maamã dag n tara makdg sẽn yaa sãnem dasaare, n na n mag tẽngã ne a zag-noyã la a lalgã." 
Revelation21:16 Tẽngã ra yaa maoko, t'a woglmã ne a yalmã zem taaba. Malɛɛkã maga tẽngã ne sãnem dasaarã: Yaa kɩlo tus a yi. A woglmã ne a yalmã la a zãntlemã rag n zema taaba." 
Revelation21:17 Yẽnda maka lalgã: A yaa kãntɩɩs koabg la pis-naas la a naase, ninsaal kãntɩɩga, sẽn yaa a yembr ne malɛɛkã kãntɩɩga." 
Revelation21:18 Lalgã mee ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ zaspe, la tẽngã yaa sãnem halaal sẽn wẽnd wa vɛɛr halaale." 
Revelation21:19 Tẽngã lalgã yẽbgrã rag n nagsa ne kug buud fãa sẽn be yõodo. Pipi yẽbgrã yɩɩ ne zaspe, la yiibẽ soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ safɩɩre, la tãabẽ soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ kalsedoan, la naasẽ soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ emeroode," 
Revelation21:20 la a nu soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ sadonigsi, la a yoob soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ sardoan, la a yopoe soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ kirzoliti, la a nii soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ berilli, la a wɛ soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ topaaze, la piig soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ kirzopraaze, la piig la a yembr soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ Iyasẽnte, la piig la a yiib soabã yɩɩ ne kugr sẽn boond tɩ ametisti." 
Revelation21:21 Zag-noyã piig la a yiibã yɩɩ ne kugr b sẽn boond tɩ pɛrle. Zag-noor fãa yaa kug-yende. Tẽngã soay yaa sãnem halaale, n tond wa vɛɛre." 
Revelation21:22 Mam ka yã wẽnd-doog tẽngã pʋg ye. Bala, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam Sẽn‑Tõe‑Fãa wã la pe-bilã me yaa tẽngã wẽnd doogo." 
Revelation21:23 Tẽngã ka baood tɩ wĩntoog bɩ kiuug yãg beenẽ ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam ziirã kõt-a-la vẽenem, la pe-bilã yaa a fɩtla." 
Revelation21:24 Soolem dãmbã na n kẽna bãmb vẽenemẽ wã, la dũni rĩm-dãmbã na n waa ne b zĩirã beenẽ." 
Revelation21:25 Tẽngã zag-noy kõn pag wĩndg ye, yʋng ka na n zĩnd beenẽ ye." 
Revelation21:26 B na n talla soolem dãmbã ziirã la b waoogrã n wa beenẽ. 
Revelation21:27 Bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgdo, wall ned ning sẽn maan wẽnga wall a yagd zĩrẽ kõn kẽ be ye. Yaa neb nins yʋy sẽn gʋls pe-bilã vɩɩm sebrẽ wã bal n na n kẽ." 
Revelation22:1 Malɛɛkã wilga maam vɩɩm koomã kʋɩlga, kʋɩlg sẽn pɩnd wa vɛɛre, la a yita Wẽnnaam ne pe-bilã geerẽ wã." 
Revelation22:2 Vɩɩm tɩɩgã bee tẽngã sʋka la kʋɩlgã kɩrems a yiibẽ wã. A womda naoor piig la a yiibu, a womda a biisã kiuug fãa. Tɩɩgã vãad tar n maagda soolem toay-toayã neb bãase." 
Revelation22:3 Wẽnnaam sẽn kãab bũmb wẽng kõn leb n zĩnd be ye. Wẽnnaam ne pe-bilã geer na n zĩnda tẽngã pʋga. Bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã na n waooga bãmba," 
Revelation22:4 b na n yãnda Wẽnnaam nenga, la Wẽnnaam yʋʋrã na n zĩnda bãmb dĩyẽ wã." 
Revelation22:5 Yʋng kõn leb n zĩnd ye, la nebã kõn dat fɩtl vẽenem wall wĩntoog vẽenem ye. Bala, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam n na n yɩ bãmb vẽenem. La bãmb na n dɩɩ naam zamaan woo zamaana." 
Revelation22:6 Malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: Sãmbg ka be gom-kãens pʋgẽ ye, la b yaa sɩda. Zu-soabã sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsdbã sɩɩs Wẽnnaamã tʋma b malɛɛk t'a wilg bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã bũmb nins sẽn tog n zĩnd bilf sã n paase." 
Revelation22:7 La a Zeezi yeelame: Gese, bilf sã n paas bala, mam na n waame. Bark bee ned ning sẽn sakd seb-kãngã bãngr goamã zugu." 
Revelation22:8 Yaa maam a Zã n wʋm bõn-kãense la m yãnd-ba. La mam sẽn wʋm bõn-kãens la m yãnd-bã, mam wõgemda malɛɛk ning sẽn da wilgd maam bõn-kãensã taoor n na n waoog-a." 
Revelation22:9 La a yeela maam yaa: Ra saag n maan a woto ye! Mam yaa fo tʋmd-n-taaga, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yaa fo ba-biisã tʋmd-n-taaga, la neb nins sẽn sakd seb-kãngã goamã tʋmd-n-taaga. Waoog Wẽnnaam!" 
Revelation22:10 Dẽ poore malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: Da solg seb-kãngã pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã ye! Bala, b pidsgã wakat kolgame." 
Revelation22:11 Bɩ ned ning sẽn yaa ka-tɩrlem soab kell n paas a ka-tɩrlmã, tɩ ned ning sẽn yaa tʋʋm-dẽgd soab kell n dẽgem a meng n paase, tɩ ned ning sẽn yaa tɩrg kell n maan tɩrlem n paase, tɩ ned ning sẽn yaa yolgemd kell n yɩ yolgemd n paase!" 
Revelation22:12 A Zeezi yeelame: Gese, bilf bal sã n paase, mam na n waame, la mam zãada keoor n watẽ n na n keo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmde." 
Revelation22:13 Maam la Alfa la Omega, dẽenem la yaoolem, Sɩngre la Sɛɛbo." 
Revelation22:14 Bark bee neb nins sẽn pegsd‑b futu, sẽn na n yɩl la b paam noor tɩ rɩ vɩɩm tɩɩgã biisi, la b tũ tẽngã noy n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ wã zutu." 
Revelation22:15 Ninsaan-baasã, tɩ-rɩtbã, nin-yoaadbã, nin-kʋʋdbã, wẽnd-naands pʋʋsdbã, la ned ning fãa sẽn nong zĩrẽ la sẽn yagd zĩrẽ paada yɩnga, n ka kẽ tẽngã pʋg ye." 
Revelation22:16 Maam a Zeezi n tʋm m malɛɛk t'a wa n kɩs yãmb bõn-kãens kaset wẽnd-dotã pʋse. Mam yaa a Davɩɩd tɩ-tobeng la a yagenga, la yibeoog ãd-yãgdga." 
Revelation22:17 Sɩɩg-sõng ne pʋg-paalã yetame yaa: Wa-y-yã! Bɩ ned ning sẽn wʋmd-a yeel tɩ: Wa-y-yã! Bɩ ko-yũud sẽn tar‑a soab wa, la sẽn dat-a bɩ a reeg vɩɩm koom zaalem!" 
Revelation22:18 Mam yeta ned ning fãa sẽn wʋmd seb-kãngã bãngr goamã tɩ ned sã n paas bũmb be, Wẽnnaam na n paasa tood nins b sẽn bils seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã yẽnda sɩbgrã zugu." 
Revelation22:19 La ned sã n boog bãngr gom-kãensã sebrã goamã, Wẽnnaam na n deega pʋɩɩr ning yẽnda sẽn da na n paam ne vɩɩm tɩɩgã la tẽn-sõngã b sẽn bilg seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã n bas-a." 
Revelation22:20 Ned ning sẽn kɩt-a bõn-kãensã kasetã yetame yaa: «N-yẽe, sã n yɩ bilf bala, mam na n waame.» Ãmina! Zu-soab a Zeezi, wa-y-yã!"
